songs.title: Ka Gam Uah Nang Vaihawm In
songs.author: T.Pumkhothang

lines: Lunglai ah aw ka gel chiang in
Aw ana i gam simthu
Toupa mel loubang a tul zouta
Aw lung in i gel ngam diam
Toupa aw hong leng in
Ka gam uah nang vaihawm in
Toupa aw hon ngai ung
Nanglou in zaw muanna aw a om theilou
Simlei muanna ka zong zel ua
Muanna ding a omlou e
Taikhua val dong a ka sial lai un
Sial zatam tuibang kang zel
Aw na mite na hon vel chia'n
Lung na awina hiam Toupa
Itna leh lainatna bei zouta
Toupa aw hon ngaidam in
U leh naute kingaihsun ni
Lung i gel a hunta hi
Ngaihdamna ei a ahihlai in
Toupa kiang i zuan ding uh
Aw Toupa ka gam uh hon en in,
Khelhna leh gitlouhnate'n munteng a luah zou;
Ki itna a kiamta hehpihna a bei,
Ka gam uh siatna'n kidim,Toupa aw hon damsak in.
Ka gam uh Toupa hon damsak in,
Van apan hon en inla;
Aw na mite sualna hon mu inla,
Sualna vang a liamsa gam;
Toupa aw hon damsak in.
Duhamna ki neksiatna gam hi,
Angmasialna toh kidim huaihamna ngen hi;
Siatna tui kihawt in lehlam lehlam ah,
Ka gam uh ahon pi e, Toupa aw hon hondam in.
Khristian gam kichi sam napi in,
Muanna leh nunnopnate galmuanna omlou;
Kithahna a pungzel, mulkimna beita,
Ka gam uah na mel kilawm loubang in tul zouta e.
Toupa aw, ka gam siatnate uh,
Itna leh zahngaihna toh aw hon en lai in;
Na mite kisik a, a hong thum uleh,
Sualna henkol apan in Toupa aw hon honkhia in.
Tou Jesu ka neih man in,
Bangdang thupi om ta lou;
Tou Jesu neih kei adin a hun hi,
Siamna, sanna hauhnate;
Bangmah neilou ka hi zong,
Tou Jesu neih kei adin ahun hi.
Tou Jesu neih kei adi'n,
Bangteng sang in amanpha;
Tou Jesu neih ka hauh na pen ahi.
Hiai khovel in mihai bang lel in;
hon sim taleh zong,
Tou Jesu neih kei adin ahun hi.
Taksap hunte hontung a,
Lametna abei zong in;
Tou Jesu neih kei adin ahun hi,
Theipi kung pallun lou in;
Huang ah ganta bei zong in,
Tou Jesu neih kei adin ahun hi.
Zaitha hatna hong bei in,
Pallai ni hong vulzong in;
Tou Jesu neih kei adin ahun hi,
Teek leh vuai hun hong tung a;
Tung sunni akai ta zong,
Tou Jesu neih kei adin ahun hi.
Toupa na tate lai ah kawlni suak sim in,
Huhamna leh siatna in;
Ka gam uh aluah zou,
Ki itte ki laizomte dougal a suak zouta;
Ki itna'n mun a nei nawn ta lou.
I thou ding aw i zuan ding,
Toupa i zuan ding uh;
I gam zong Toupa'n a hon it lai,
Bang hang a i Toupa mel liahtu i hi lailai;
Kisik in Toupa i zuan ding uh.
Khelhvang in aw sen momnou,
Sanggah a tam ngei;
A it huai a naupangte nangawn in zong a thuak,
A poi in a mulkimhuai tulai i nuntakna;
I Toupa a melsiatna a hi.
Zuang hongthou un tun leh zua,
Chin leh tuaite aw;
Kisathei in om kei ni kingaihniam a hun ta,
Kisik a I sulhei leh ngaihdamna i tang ding;
A liam ma'n i zuan meng ding uhi.
I Toupa hon itna lian hi na lawmlawm,
Hoihna khat zong nei lou i hih lai in;
Itna sisan hong luang in a hon tanta,
A ta'n hon bawl lamdang e a hon itna.
Tua sisan hi, ka lungnop a kimna,
Tua sisan ahi ka kisak theihna pen;
Kalvary kross a sisan hong luangkhia,
Kei adi'n aw ka damna tua sisan hi.
Eimah utdan a om in i leeng zel a,
Amah i heisan lai a hon itpa;
Lam pialsan a i om zong hon it lailai,
Toupa it bang itna dang a om lou e.
Mihingte it vang in aw a hon thuak a,
I mohna liammate a damsak ta;
Aw miteng dia hinna lui a hong luanna,
A dawnte din damna lui a hong hi ta.
Ke'n hoihna khat zong ka nei lou,
Jesu Khrist hoihna koppih in;
Amah vanga dika sim in ka om lel hi,
Aw tu in zong hoihna ka neilou;
Ka hihna zaw mikhial lel ka hi,
Khrist vanga siangthou;
Khrist vanga hoih, ka hi lel hi.
Khrist hoihna kei a ahi ta,
A sianthouna kei a ahi ta;
A hihna A hon nei sak a,
A hon pomta;
Tu'n ah lau ding ka nei nawnlou,
A huang ah muang in ka om,
Khrist hoihna leh sianthouna kei a ahi ta.
Kei mahmah ka ki et chiang in,
Sianthouna hoihna ka neilou;
Hizong Ama'n siangthou in a hon pomta hi,
Amah nna te ka semthei ta a;
A paina ah ka pai theita hi,
Khrist vaka nungta'n;
Amah bang in a hon bawl ta.
Aw i gam gingtu hinkhua,
Siatnate'n zingdai bang in a nawk;
Tangthupha in a luahna gam,
Sualnate in aw! a dimzou ta.
'Thou inla, na Pathian sam in'
Aw! i gam mangthang ding hilou maw?
I khelhnate thupha tawi in,
Aman hon ngaidam lai ding ahi.
Tuun leh jua a mangthang uh,
Chiin leh tuaite zong a mangthang uh;
Mulkimhuai siatnate sung ah,
Aw! Setan sal in a tang uh e.
Lungmuang in i omlai maw,
Donlou in hun sawt i omta ngei;
Kua a hiam itna khitui toh,
Aw! Amaute ding a thu ngen ding.
Van aksi leh thilsiamte khempeuh,
Tuipi te leh taang te kilawm,
Ahoih na te suiseng hilou,
Tua te sang in Tou Jesu hoih zaw.
Aw kilawm na e, ka Tou Jesu,
Aw a manphat dan, suiseng hilou
Aw a thilsiam khempeuhte sang,
Jesu hoihzaw hi aw tua te sang in.
Hauhna hoih in,siamna zong hoih hi,
Nuntakna ding i geel te zong;
Inn leh lou leh neih leh lam zong,
Tua te sang in Tou Jesu hoih zaw.
Kisak theihna Jesu ah kanei,
Manphatna te neita kei leng;
Ka bangkim hi ka Tou Jesu,
Khovel sang in Tou Jesu hoih zaw.
Tuana simthu sut le'ng maw, tual i niam simthu,
Theihphak louh selung mawlte i hi;
Tung Pathian itna vang in, ei di'n khua a hong vak;
Tu'n A tate hi hang e.
Phatna zaila lawm ging, a kilawm semgua toh,
Vanglian Toupa min phat in;
Tuan-a selung mawlte tu'n A hondomsang ta,
Toupa ei di'n hoih na e.
Itna thu sang kei le'ng maw, bang i suak ding hiam?
Toupa it na lian in sang na e;
Ju leh va bang gammual a vakvai a i om lai,
Itna in hon zong khe ta.
Itna vang siamnate leh sannate nei hang,
Tua khempeuh i Toupa vang ahi;
Lamdang in thupi na e, loubang A hon khualna,
Toupa ei di'n hoih na e.
Hatlou mi ka hi zong, hat theihna thuguk te,
Toupa in kei a dingin a nei,
Khovel in a tellouh, khovel in a deihlouh,
Toupa in Amah dingin a tel.
Aw a lamdang e ..Aw a thupi e
Na itna aw na hehpihna,
Mimawlte nangawn zong aw na tel lawmlawm.
Lamdang in aw a thupi e
Lelliangte na it a, genthei te na huai a,
Leitung mi'n a phawk zohlouh te zong,
Toupa aw na thei a, Itna in na pi zel,
Gentheihna panin nunnopna ah.
Lamet bei a lungngai, mipoite na thei a,
Piangsualte bukimloute na ngawn,
Khovel hoihna mulou, mitdel te na thei a,
Nang a din na telta lamdang e.
A chinglou a om lou, a siamlou a omlou,
Mi khempeuh i Toupa mai ah zaw,
Leitung mi a ding a simmoh huai a neute,
Silpak bang a lun Toupa a din.
Aw a lamdang e ..Aw a hon telna
Kipak in nuamna lasa ni,
Khovel in a phawklouh mi ihi zongin,
A hontel na a lamdang e.
Hiai khualzinna gam, nuai simlei ah,
Gimthuak a i mau lai in;
Pathian tate dia ni thupi pen,
Haibang i ngaklah ngei e.
Hiai khualzinna gam, simlei ahi,
Eite inn van ahi zaw;
Tuun ah gimthuak in, i mau zong a,
Denchiang zoh laa i sa ding.
Hiai khualzinna gam, nuai simlei ah,
Lungmuanna ding a omlou;
Van-gam nuam ah zaw, lungkim tak in;
Nuam in i khawl denta ding.
Hiai khualzinna gam, nuai simlei ah,
Thupina neilou te'n zong;
Van-gam nuam ah zaw, Belamnou in,
Thupi tak in a thuam ding.
Toupa Pathian aw na hoihna ka mu,
Vualzawlna lampite ah na honpi;
Lam-etna khen gam ah na honpi lai,
Manpha in thupi lua.
Non vualzawlna simseng ahi lou,
Na honpi dan suut seng a hilou;
Kei leh ka innkuan bang hiam ka hih uh,
Hiai tantan a Na honpi.
Ahun ahun in Na hoihna hong tung,
Koi a kipan a hong pai ahi hiam;
Zion apan in aw Na panpih na,
Hongtung ahi zaw hi.
Na simthuphate Na hon musak a,
Manpha hina e, thupi hina e;
Mimawl a ding in pilna ahi a,
Hon tawisangtu ahi.
Na hon khotuah daan thupi hina e,
Loubang na khualna kan in a sang ngei;
Gamkeu leh haksatna ah hilou in,
Vualzawlna ah No'n pi.
Ka sung a om sual ngaihtuahna te'n,
Ka utlouhlam a honpi zel;
Hoih ka ut a ka sualzel ahi,
Na mai ah mikhial ka na hi ta.
Hon ngaidam in, hon ngaidam in,
Toupa aw kei mikhial ka hi;
Hon ngaidam in, hon ngaidam in,
Toupa aw kei mikhial ka hi.
Kei mikhial lel na hon it man in,
Na sisan kei a di'n hong luang;
Hoihna neilou kei bang leltak in,
Na itna ka mu lamdang na e!
Hoih ka hilou, dik zong ka hi lou,
Na itna'h dikna ka mu zaw;
Kei ziak hilou, Khris ziak lel ahi,
Ka phulouh A ngaihdamna ka tan.
Toupa na siamsa lei mihingte,
Nopna zong in nisim in buai ung;
Simlei thupinate'n a hon pi zel,
Nang hon ngilh ung Toupa na tate'n;
Huaihamna sung a kibualta in,
Duh-amnate'n aw a hon zouta.
Aw Na mite Nanglam a hei di'n,
Toupa Na tate hon huai nawn in;
Lambang haih ung Toupa na huangsung pan,
Aw ka Pathian hon nuse lou aw;
Hehpihna in aw! hon enlai in,
Na kha siang in Toupa hon huai nawn in.
Itna a kiam nisim a kiam zel,
Lainatna zong tuibang in kiam a;
Hehpihna luipite a kang zouta,
Nang toh nunnuam kholhkhawmna munte;
Gitlouhna te'n aw! a luah zouta,
Hon pikik nawn in na huangsung ah.
Toupa aw tuni in ka hon ngen,
Koute a di'n aw! Na zahngaihna;
Honpia in aw Toupa ka hon ngen hi,
Nang hehpih thei Pathian Na hi a;
Itna aw neem in ka lungsung uah.

songs.title: Ka Gam Uh Dam Sak In
songs.author: T. Pumkhothang

lines: Aw Toupa ka gam uh hon en in,
Khelhna leh gitlouhna te'n munteng a luah zou;
Ki itna a kiamta, hehpihna a bei,
Ka gam uh siatna'n ki dim, Toupa aw hondamsak in.
Ka gam uh Toupa hondamsak in,
Van a pan hon en inla;
Aw Na mite sualna hon mu inla,
Sualna vang a liamsa gam,
Toupa aw hondamsak in.
Duh-amna ki neksiatna gam hi,
Angmasialna toh kidim huaihamna ngen hi;
Siatna tui kihawt in lehlam lehlam ah,
Ka gam uh ahonpi e, Toupa aw hon hondam in.
Khristian gam kichi sam na pi in,
Muanna leh nunnopna te galmuanna omlou;
Kithahna a pung zel, mulkimna beita,
Ka gam uah Na mel kilawm loubang in tulzouta e.
Toupa aw ka gam siatnate uh,
Itna leh zahngaihna toh aw hon enlai in;
Na mite kisik a ahong thum uleh,
Sualna henkol a pan in, Toupa aw hon honkhia in.
Tangthupha vang in i semgim in i tawl hiam aw,
Aw A gam vang in i genthei maw?
Tua i thuaknate i tunung a i tan ding toh;
Phulou in simtham a hilou hi.
Simlei ah gentheihnate thuak in i mau zong a,
Aw A gam vang in i lelliang in bangteng i taan zong;
Thupi a vanglian i Toupa bang a i om chiang'n,
Gimna i thuakte tung ah zohna lasa in,
Denchiang i leng ding.
Aw! i ginnate a bah in tawl in a om maw?
Lunglel a om in a nguigawp maw?
Muhtheih enlou in i pai ding hi i ginna toh,
Van a thil omte i mitsuan ding.
Gimna tampite i thuak in van-gam i lut ding,
Tun ah gimthuak huibang i mau lel;
Aw i ngaklah ngei Pathin tate thupi hun ding,
Van a aksi bang i jem hun ding.
Khelhna zanmial ah, lungkham in ka om,
Ka van-gikte ka puak lai in;
Ka thumna za in A aw nem ka za,
Na mohna ka ngaidamta chi in.
Ka nuamta, ka lung nuamta,
Lui siangthou ah ka khelhna siangta;
Khris sisan luisiang a ka bual lai in,
Dai ngeilou ka lungnopna hong luang.
Kei hoihna nei lou, kei a moh mi in,
Na ngaihdamna ka za Toupa;
Nang a pan hinna ken ka neita hi,
Lungnopna ka gen zou ngei ding maw?
Aw lamdang lua hi, kei na hon itna,
Tangtawn tangtawn a tul ngeilou;
Aw kei dia damna'n ka sung ah hong luang,
Tangtawn in a kang ngei nawn lou ding.
Toupa na kiangah ka muangta ding
Dahna lungkhamna ki lel lou ding,
Na siang nuam a ka len chiang,
Damsung khosak buaina haksatna,
Leigim haksatna ka thuakte uh,
Tua mun nuam ah om nawnlou.
Tul ngeilou ding kipahna,
Tul ngeilou ding nunnopna,
Sisan a na gam chiam,
Tua mun ah kalen hun chiang,
Tul ngeilou in ka leng ding.
Hun in lenmual khum a liamzel in,
Ka lei nunnate a liampih a,
Theihlouh kal in a bei zel,
Simlei nunnopna ka zon te uh,
Tangtawn lungnopna a ching zoulou,
Na siang kia ah bukim hi.
Vang nei ki sa'ng e ka ngaihsut chiang,
Nunnuam kisa'ng e ka lunggel chiang,
Hon neisakta ka Toupa'n,
Leitung buaina ten a sukkhak louh,
Tawntung lungnop na'n a luahna gam,
Ka Toupa vang ka neita.
Toupa aw kei hong len in,
Simlei a kazin lai in;
Keikia in kapai siamlou,
Ka zinna a haksa in;
Lamhaih in gammang zel ing,
Na lamvak hong musak in;
HonG zui ning maw.
Na lam vak-ah kapai theih na di'n,
Ka lampi ah navak hongtaan in;
Mittaw bang khua mulou a,
Zanmial bang kapai lai in;
Hon len in kapuklouh na'n honglen in aw.
Buaina tui kihawt kal a,
Lauhna te'n kei hong tuam a;
Lung muanna hong neisak aw,
Muanhuaipa a kip tawntung;
Nang na hi nang kia na hi,
Toupa aw na ban in hong lenden in aw.
Galkhat lam ka hong kai ma'n,
Tua mual siangthou kong tun ma'n;
Lampial lou din hong len in,
Nisim in ka nuntakna;
Hong siamthak hong hatsakin,
Na angsung ka tun mateng hong pi in aw.
Khovel a ka leen sung in,
Ka hindan ding hong hilh in;
Hiai khovel ka inn a hih louh dan,
Ka mun ding na kiang hi zaw;
Ka inn ding na kiang hi zaw,
Kipak a kong tun theihna di'n.
Hong theisak in aw Toupa,
Khovel ka leen sung in;
Na deih leh na lunggelna,
Nisim in kei hong hilh in;
Ka nunna leh kalsuante,
Toupa aw kei hong pi in aw.
Khovel a ka leen sung in,
Toupa aw kei hong hilh in;
Ka deihtelnate na deih hi di'n,
Na paina ka pai theih a;
Na khawlna a khawl thei din,
Ka lutang nanglam hei in aw.
Khovel a ka leen sung in,
Kei tunga a hong tungte;
Nang a pan na sawl hi zeel hen aw,
Nopnate ka tuah ni in;
Dahnate ka tuahni in,
Ka khitui nang honsawl hi hen.
Toupa a omte dingin bangkim a hauhna hi,
Itna ah zong itna lian semsem,
Zawnna ah zong hauhna thupi pen,
Toupa a neite a di'n.
Nang na omna nuam,
Nang na om na a nuam hi,
Toupa aw ka siang uah hong om in,
Nang toh ton in pai leng,
Bangkim a muanna ,
Toupa na om na nuam hi.
Lemna leh muanna gam zaw Toupa a neite hi,
Huatna leh kidanna om ngeilou,
Ei a din i gam a din damna,
Toupa a hong om chiangin.
Sum leh pai hauhna, pilna, siamna leh sanna te,
Manna ding a omlou na omlouh le,
Hinna khempeuh sang na manpha zaw,
Toupa na om leh nuam hi.
Nunlui liamsa ka gel jel a,
Ka phawk kik zel tualniam ka hinkhua;
Ka phu lel in hon pi lechin,
Ka tang zou diam ka tu dinmun.
Kipahna genseng louh ka nei Toupa,
Na vualjawlna ka tan vang in aw;
A omlai ding ka kipahna,
Ka tanlai ding vualzawlna omte ah.
Van daitui in Na honluan a,
Ka na ah lei vualzawlna non pia;
Ka neih haichi tangkhat lel zong,
A leh za in na pungsakta.
Na honpi dan a lamdang ngei,
Ka hihna bangmah a hilou zong;
Mi a simtaak hi lou mah leng,
Na honpi lut mihing lai ah.
Leivui pan in na honpi khia,
Na pal zou in a sangzaw sem ah;
Sim zohlouh vualzawlna mu dia,
Na hopi zaw a lamdang lua.
Na thupina gen in gen vual hilou,
Aw a vanglian Toupa nang na min lian hi;
Van Angel sangsawmte'n,
Phat la ngaihtak in na kim ah leng uh.
Vangletna leh minthanna,
Thupina leh pahtawina;
Zahtakna teng vaihawmna teng Nang a,
Na siangthou Na siangthou hi Toupa;
Tangtawn in thupina Nang ahi.
Nang phatna la tangtawn in sa nuam ing,
Nang phatna ka kha ah dim leh ka nuam hi;
Na mai a hong kun in,
Pahtawina leh Thupina ka hon pia.
A hoih khempeuh keia nong hisak a,
Na kilawmna khempeuh kei ah nong koih hi;
Na hoihna a lian lua,
Halleluiah Halleluiah Amen.
Kros thu zaw mangthang lelte adin haina ahi,
Hotdam tate ding in thilhih theihna ahi;
Aw kros mite'n musit in hon pampaih mahleh,
Kei din ka damna khros ka siamtanna na hi.
Nuam in ka puang zel ding,
Nuam in ka puang zel ding;
Ka damna Jesu Kross tanchin hoih,
Suan ding dang ka nei lou;
Gen ding dang ka nei lou,
Ka damna Mang Jesu;
Kros tanchin lou ngal zaw.
Ka pilnate zang in damna ka na zong a,
Ka theihnate zang in ana ka na sem a;
Hizong ka mu zoulou, khamuanna bukim zaw,
Kadamna zaw Toupa Kross thu kia ana hi.
A thupina kumpi lukhute suahkhia in,
Thildang tengteng taan in kei ahon telta hi;
Ken leng ka meet zawkna ding thilte taisan in,
Ka mang leh Tanpa ngei ka tel zota ding hi.
Huihpite hong nung in, suangpite a kham a,
Puanzak kek paisuak in khovel amial zou a;
Hichitel a thilhihthei Khross sihna thupi'n,
Khelhna sal a tangte zaleenna a pe ta.
Tangthupha I ngah kum khua sawt ta,
Lainatna leh lemna'n I lak ah vai a hawm;
Hihang Toupa maitaam a chimzou ta,
Hong un i Toupa maitaam; Tungding thak nawn ni.
Hong pai ve un, Toupa kiang ah;
Hong un Toupa kiang ah zuan kik ni
Bohnen khitsa himahle hang;
Hongdam sak kik lai ding ahi,
Paihkhiak a om himahle hang;
Naubang hong sang kik lai ding hi.
Hun thak khangthak hun a Tuailaite'n,
Ningzu kangsa khovel nunkhum luai in teep uh;
Taina ngahlou, beidotna mailou ngal,
Hong lunghei unla, Khris hinna tui dawn zaw ni.
I gam leh i nam humbitna di'n,
Kawlchiang namtem jun a,dougal dou a ngailou;
Ei galthuam ding Gospel lel ahi zaw,
I kihumbitna'n tua galthuam muang in zang ni.
Tulpah ding gam khual in buai gawp hang,
I sakmel uah pahna bei in mual gawpta hang;
Toupa tung ah lungdamna hatna hi,
Tunglam mitsuan leng luahlouh gam za in tam lai.
Muvanlai bang hi, gingtu hinkhua,
Simlei tungah i liim, leng in vakvel mahleh;
I hinna zaw vansang a leeng ahi,
Khelhna nawk phaklouh di'n Toupa'n ahon domsang.

songs.title: Jesu Kiang Ah Ka Bit Ding
songs.author: Thanbuka

lines: Jesu kiang ah ka bit ding,
A ang sung nuamtak ah;
Ka kha a khawl sam ding a,
Aman hon liahkhuh ding;
Aw angelten aw suah uh gam thupi a pan in;
Laa ngaihtak sa in hon sam tua lui gal apan in.
Jesu, Jesu, nakiang ah om ka ut,
Jesu kei hon ittu pen;
Na kiang ah om ka ut,
Haksatna a bei ma teng;
Nang in hon liahkhuh in.
Jesu kiang ah ka bit ding,
Ka buaina bei ta ding;
Khemnaten hon hihbuai lou,
Sual in hon hihbuai lou;
Omlou ding lungngaihnate kah leh khasiat nate,
Mittuite luang jel mah leh haksat sung sawt lou ding.
Ka kha a kipahna pen,
Jesu kei ding si hi;
Kumkhua a ka kingakna,
Tangtawn suangpi ahi;
Kei dia mun honbawl sak tu'n,
Denchiang in honpi ding;
Zanmial om nawnlou ding a, thupina vak ta ding.
Aw Nang Karbi Anglong, Na gamlei dohzanggam,
Sing leh loudum dii diai a na zep bang in,
I tung lun mang vanpuan dum toh hong zem aw
Tung lun mang aw na laukha hambang huai louh in
Nuai zin mang henkol bulh bang chin ka sut ding uam....
Vualzou a zouzel pa na laukha hon sawl aw
Thumzel,pezel,semzel din tha hong guan aw
Aw khristian tuailaite thou in masuan ve ni
I Tung sianmang simthu taka nau bang sang in
I sikna chiang chiang gam ei ding a piak ahi
Dialdial leh diamdiam in ma chiang suan ve ni
Ngai dih i field gam mial in hon sam chiai chiai e
Na thumnlouh ziak in maw itte mangthang zelzel
Na piaklouh ziak in zong a kuan ding zah kuanlo
Na kuan khiak louh man zong zatam mualliam ta
Aw Nang Karbi Anglong Na gamlei dohzanggam,
Sing leh loudum dii diai a na zep bang in,
Thiamang salpha zatam gah hong suang ve maw
Lungngaih,mangbatna,puakgik toh
Selung muanglou khattang kisa
Lamet neilou zaitha nem zou
Tawldamna Toupa ka hon zuan hi
Lung aw dam in, tawldam in
Nang hon it Jesu ah tawldam in
Lung aw dam in ,tawldam in
Nang hon it Jesu ah tawldam in
Bah leh liam in hatna neilou
Ka kha nang ngai in a mau zel
Ka zinna hiai lei gamdai ah
Nang lou in Toupa ka hing zou lou
Ka vai khempeuh nang kiang kon lan
Na thu bang zel in hon pi in
Pathian hat leh hoih nang na hi
Bang teng sang' lian zaw na hi Toupa
A hampha Pasian mite toh kikholh khop liailiai mah
Nop achih in nop e
Hampha Pasian mite toh kikholh khop liailiai mah
Nop achih in nuam e
Mi khempeuh maitai in a om uh
Nopsi ei Pa Pasian a kiphat ziahziah
Chiang Pa Pasian mite toh kikholh khop liailiai mah
Nop a chih in nuam e
A itna'n hong lungdam sak
Lung kituak in hong omsak
I lungsim sangkhan in Toupa i phat hi
Hong gumpa kiang loungal kei
Ka utzawk na mun omkei
Nuamlua ing kei Pasian inkuan pih hithei
Munkhat peuhpeuh omta leng
Nih leh thumbek hita leng
Pasian khasiangthou in
hong ompih veve
Tuasang houlimna nuamzaw
Koi ah i mu thei tam aw
Pasian tate kikholh na mah nuam mataw
Van ah i kimuh chiang in
Toupa'n hong saptak chiang in
Misiang khempeuh kongpi tawn in pai ding hi
Toukhawm kiim ah it teng toh
Inn a kikhawl ding mataw
Tua ni takteh nuam taktak inteh mataw

songs.title: Aw Jesu Tuihing Lui Na Hi

lines: Damlou natna genthei thuaksa te'n
Na kiang lam hon zuan ua
Hinna leh damna na pia
Tangtawn hinna leh damna
Aw Jesu tuihing lui na hi
Kalvari a tuihing
Hiai tui hong zangkik nawn in
Natna veitu te tengteng damna
Tang a khovel ah na lenlai in
Na kianga apan damna
Mite'n ana sangzel ua
Tu in zong neih ka ut hi
Muang leh laulou in hon zuanmeng in
Jesu kiang ah damna pen
Ei dia koih ahi ngal a
Zuanmeng in aw i damna
Phak leh mitdel piangsual khebaite
Tou Jesu kiang ah damna
Ei di'n koih ahi ngal a
Aw Jesu hon pia in aw
Aw Pasian nanglou lawm dang nei ke'ng
Ka laukha zawngkhal tha hong dim kik in
Ka dahna khempeuh hong thuakpih ding
Nanglou lawm pha zaw dang muzou ke'ng e
Aw hon zui ning maw lampi haksa mahleh
Dawimangpa in ka lam hong khak mahleh
Aw hon zui ning maw singlamteh pua in
Na paina mun peuh ah hong zui ning maw
Aw ka khe in siatna lam zuan in
Ka khutte mohna bawlna khut ahi
Ka lungsim ngaihsutna khempeuh zong
Huaihamna leh gitlouhna bek ahi
Aw ka laukha lungzuang mah si maw
Ka taksa'n ze-etna dou zou lou a
Pasian mai ah kilawmna neilou
Hong zuan ning maw Toupa hong maisak aw
Jesu a hoihpen Toupa
Jesu lamdang thulakpa
Min khempeuh sang in minlian zaw
K'ong pia uh hi
Kou toh hong om khawm lamdang hi
Phat ding na kilawm hi
Pahtawi ding in
Khut siangthou te laam tou sa in
Na min siangthou
Hong phat ung
Nang na lian hi ,
Na bawl nate lamdang hi
Nang bang omlou hi Toupa (2)
Aw Toupa mikhial ka hi hon paisan in
Ka hoihna leh felnate
Kahih na tengteng et in
Na mai ma ah suan ding ka neilou
Ka innsung ka et chiang in
Nang teenna taak ahilou
Hizong leh itna in nong kem
Aw Toupa Pathian kua ka hi a
Ka innkuante kua hi hiam
Hiaitan tan na hon tunpih
Khovel mite et bang a hon en lou in
Ka sakmel leh neih leh lam
Ka siamna leh pilnate
Ka phulouh in na hon domsang a
Lei vualzawlna khen lam ah
Na vanmang tutphah thupi
Na hon pia a Toupa ka phulou hi
Aw Toupa Na melvak ken ka en ngamlou
Na hoihna leh sianthouna
Na itnate ka muh in
Ka khelhnate a lang chian zel a
Hiai bangzah a Lal thupi
Itna toh hon pitu Pa
Kon taisan kha nak hi hon ngaidam in
Toupa ka sualna a tam a
Mihing a simtak ka hilou
Hizong na itna aw nem in
Ittak in na hon sam ngal a
Ka aw hi Jacob aw himahleh
Esau silhpuan in hon thuam hi
Gou luahtu ding Jesu silhpuan in
Nahon thuam a
Toupa (aw Toupa) ka phulou hi
Ka aw hi khemtu sual aw bang
Jacob aw bang mai ana hi
Esau silhpuan Khrist Jesu in
Ka khelhna te na ngaidamta
Ka khelhna te liah khuh ding in
Na thuakna mel ka en ngamlou
Phulouh itna lamdang takin
Tangtawn hinna nahon pia hi
Ka chinna leh ka etlawmna
Nangmah Jesu kon neih man hi
Thildang bangmah ka ngai nonlou
Bangkim a ka bangkim na hi
Galkhua dak un buh te
Lak ding in min zou ta
Hihhang buh la ding mi
Omlou a buh te vuai mang ding hi ta
Tung sunni a taan lai in
I Toupa nna sem in
Tung sunni hongtum in
Khim khua hong zing ding
Kua ma'n nna sem thei ta lou ding
Aw aw sem theita lou ding
Gal khua dak un hun in
Chiautui luang bang in
Mi zata mial nuai ah taimang in
Zanmial in simlei tuam ta
Tawntung sihna mialnuai a
A mangthang kha te
Toupa hatna toh pi khe meng in
Zingkhua hong vak pah ta ding
Khalam vualzawlna leh lal thukhun tungding di'n
Pianna gam laizom leh pa inn paisan a kul
Suaknu leh piang masa nauchil pen khah khia a
Gou manpha lan ding in Toupa'n ahon sam hi
A haksa ngei a thuak hak ngei
Gou manpha latzaw dimlet khalam
Vualzawlna tang ding in
Khak khiak na ngai ahi mangpha ka gou manpha
Sual gallian dou ding leh gou manpha laan ding in
Sapna ahong tunga dawn ahaksa ngei e
Lungngaihna mittui toh bangkim ka gel chiang in
Lunglai ana lua hi aw ka neih gou manpha
Gou manpha latna mun Moriah tang ka tungta
Tan leh tan thuak leh thuak sih leh sih dam leh dam
Genthei chiteng thuak a sisan a hon tantu
Ka it Toupa sapna sang dingin ka manta
Ka hinna leh bangkim Toupa ka piak ni in
Ka ta lungkham ken aw ko'n len dia kon thuam ding
Taikhua a hong val chiang na pahna suak ding hi
Chih thu ahong tung a halleluijah Amen
Hinna hong pia ka Toupa hong it ing
Mangthang lungngai ka vaih lai in
Lung laigil ah khamuanna nong pia a
Muanna tuibang na hong luanna
Hinna hong pia ka Toupa aw
Nang lou muanna ding ka nei ngei diam
Lungngai huibang ka mauna simlei ah
Nang toh om leng ka lungnuam hi
Suan ding omlou ka hoihna zong omlou
Nang toh om di'n ka ching zoulou
Hizong Toupa na itna aw nem toh
Kong it chi in na hong sam lai
Keimah lampi ka zuih khempeuhte leh
Ka lunggel leh ka ngaihtuahna
Toupa nang di'n a chingzou ding omlou
Hizong kong it ka ta nong chi
Khovel mipite theih bangin ka theilou zong
A theih phaklouh tangtawn hinna thuguk ka thei
Khovel mihaute neihbang ka neilou zong
A neih phaklouh tangtawn hinna Kris Jesu ka nei
Khovel in a hon englou ken zong ka engsam lou
Atheih phaklouh ka thei a neih phak louh ka nei
Jesu vang in ka tan phaklouh ding zong ka tang
Ka nung leh ma ah aw a hon um kimvel
Samari numei zong muhsitna neilou in
Kei mikhial leh hoihna neilou a hon it a
Ka sualna leh thulim louhna theinuam lou in
It luat vang in tangtawn hinna ah hon pilut ta
A tapa neihsun zong itlou a hon petu'n
Thildang bangmah kei a ding in it lou ding hi
Pathian tapa nei a lungkimna neilou in
Khovel pumpi neikhin mahleh lungkim lou ding hi
Tuan a simthu sut leng maw
Tual i niam simthu
Theih phaklouh selung mawlte ihi
Tung Pathian itna vang in
Ei di'n khua a hong vak
Tun a tate hi hang e
Phatna zaila lawm ging
A kilawm semgua toh
Vanglian Toupa min phat in
Tuan a selung mawlte
Tun a hon domsang ta
Toupa ei di'n hoih na e
Itna thu sang kei leng maw
Bang i suak ding hiam
Toupa itna lian in sang na e
Zu leh va bang gammual a
Vakvai a i om lai
Itna in hon zong kheta
Itna vang siamnate leh
Saan nate nei hang
Tua khempeuh i Toupa vang ahi
Lamdang in thupi na e
Loubang a hon khualna
Toupa ei di'n hoih na e
Mi damthei lou te'n daktor a ngai ua
Mi damthei te adi'n angai lou
Kei mikhial pen le hoih na neilou in
Hondam tu Jesu mah ka ngai pen hi
Toupa ki pak ing
Khemna tui hual te'n hon tuam vel in
Bah hun om zel zong
Hoh hih hat tu Toupa nang nahi
Na nasem ding in mihoih te kia lel
Teel lou in mikhial te nongsam a
Thupi na tel e aw na hon itna
Lungsim in a thuk dan a zui zoulou
Bawlsiatna te le mualphou nate in
Nisim in ka nun khua buaisak zong
Khawlmai ka tumlou hi na nungzuih na
Ka damsan leh lam-etna na hi ngal a
Muan ding leh dot ding Toupa nang lou omlou hi
Damsung huihpi hat in hong nuai chiang in
Singim haksatna'n ka kha a hong nuai chiang in
Toupa hong sam ing nang n'ong lungmuan zel hi
Hong len kip ning
Mialna leh mun khempeuh ah
A tawntung inn nuam hong tunpih in
Ka kha hong kem in
Toupa simlei lauhuai ah
Nanglou in hin man bei hi'ng
Hong len den in Toupa it aw
Hiai nuai simlei ah lunglenna ding a tam hi
Ka tuailai lungsim hong suak thei zel a
Sum leh pai deihna'n ka kha anuai hun chiang in
Toupa hong len in tui tung ah tum kha ning
Genthei leh bah a ka om Toupa'n hong thei hi
A thu hong sinsak hong lungmuan zel hi
A nna semlou a lehlam ka gel hun chiang in
A itna lian toh kei hong thuhilh zel hi
Tangtawn gamnuam i zot lai in
Lungkham buaina meipi'n hon bawm
Nopna leh dahna te'n hon tuam zel
Lungkham buaina khen gam i tun ma'n zaw
Jesu lou in damlai khovel
Hinna bangmah lou mai a hi
Khovel pilna zong hai huai lel hi
Hih hang mang Jesu toh bangkim hihtheih ahi
Lungkham buai ni'n a hon panpih
Lusuun mangbat ni'n zong hon nem
Gentheih taksap ni'n hon taisan lou
Mang Jesu ah bangkim hihtheih ahi
Theipi kungte paaklun lou in
Lou in nekding piangsak lou in
Huangsung ah ganta a mangthang zong
Ka kipaak ding Toupa ka hotdamna'h
Belampu hoih i Mang Jesu
Hatlou te panpih tu ahi
Anung zuitu te taisan ngeilou
I makai tu nunnem zaidam ahi
Ka khualzinna leh ka khosakna gam ah zaw
Ka tha a hat zoukei hi Toupa hon huai in
Mial lal thuneihna nuai a ka puklut ma in
Aw van laukha siangthou hong vehthak nawn in
Aw ka pahna Toupa bangkim a ka bangkim
Sihna luiguam lampi zuih hon phal mahmah ken
Zohna puanlap khai a na nungzui ding in
Ka nuntakna luahtu hon zohsak in aw
Mihing pilna leh siamna'n na nna ka sem a
Hizong hehpihna dan ah a ching zoukei hi
Aw nang van laukha siangthou nang tellou in zaw
Mihing zaw bangmahlou mai ka hi uhi
Lei lungkhamna leh buainate'n hon tuam mahleh
Van Mang Immanuel nang honna huaizel in
Mial thuneihna nuai a tangte honkhia ding in
Toupa ka honna hon siamthak sak in aw
Ka Mang lenna khopi Zion ah
Toupa ka muh chiang
Itna tullou Toupa kiang ah
Bangzah in nuam ding
A mel vak ah misiangte toh
Meel kimu kik ding a
Nuam leh kipak in vualzohna la
I sa khawm ding
Van Angel leh Serafte'n
Zaila sak mun ah
Ka lung hon len e Toupa
Na lenna mun ken ngai veng
Hinna tui dam in a luang
Aw tua mun nuam ah
Gibang khen louh na khopi hoih leh vak
Ka ngai ngei e
Zohna la thupi lem uh
Toupa pah tawi uh
Belam nou a taan na ah
Dah a lung kham meel himhim omlou
Ka kha in lam bang a veel
Ginna kha zak in a leng
Ka Mang lenna mun ka tang tawn mun ding
Tun kal ngak lang
I sa khawm ding
Ki it na gam ah nun nuam den ding
Hallelui ah
Lametna van Kanaan gam hon chiamlai zaw
Vuina ding omlou hi ka tan vualzawna
Hun mualliam sate ka geel kik chiang in
Toupa hon pina thupi'n lamdang lua sang
Kei bang leltak phulouh vualzawlna'n hon vuk a
Ngaihsut phaklouh gamte ah honpi Toupa na hi
Khrist ziaka hamphatna ka tansa tengteng
Genseng kei ning puang seng kei ning na hon pina
Lametna van Kanaan gam hon chiamlai zaw
Vui na ding omlou hi ka tan vualzawlna
Ka hihna bang a vualzawl ding hi leng
A vualzawlnate mu di'n ka lawmlou e
Ahihhang itna ziak kia toh hon en lai a
Tuni dong hon keem lai Toupa nang kia na hi
Deihthusam lunggeel nate tuangtung hileh
Keimah thupi nang leh nopsakna lel hi
Na min thupina leh na melliah khuh hizaw
Na lunggeelna lampi ah honpi zaw in Toupa
Haksatna bei dotnate hong tun chiang in
Ka Toupa hon pina mangngilh kha zel ing
Tuaman in vualzawlna mu di'n ka lawmlou
Hihhang a itna'n hon taisan lou hon keem zel hi
Ka hondampa bang lawmhoih dang omlou
A omlou khatlel zong
Ka kha natna damsak thei dang omlou
A omlou khatlel zong
Mang Jesu'n ka haksatna thei in
Sun nitum dong hon kem zel ding
Jesu bang lawmhoih kua dang a omlou
A omlou khatlel zong
I kiang ah omlouh hun a nei ngeilou
Nei ngeilou khatvei zong
Hon khamuan theihlouh zan mial a omlou
A omlou khatvei zong
Tua lawmhoih pen in hon nusia ngeilou
Nusia lou khatvei zong
Mi khial ninpen zong a manthat phallou
A phallou khatlel zong
Tua hondampa bang midang a om hiam
A omlou khatlel zong
A hotdam zohlouh mikhial a om hiam
A omlou khatlel zong
Hiai khovel a ka lenlai in
Sual in hon bawm ka bah zel hi
Khrist tellou a hinkhua zaw
A haksa ngei ka pai siam lou
I zalen hun a hong nai ta
Ei di'n van nuam ah inn om hi
Ni thupi a hong tung ngei ding
Sawt lou ding aw a sawt lou ding
Nun bei dong leh lungngai te aw
Na tan bang uh a tang sam ta
Ka lung ngaih mangbatna te
Tun zel in aw Pathian kiangah
Hiai lei pawtsan ka tup lai in
Ka Toupa thu a hong tung ta
Ka mite damna ding in
Khovel haksa nang di'n hon chi
Ka ngaklah ngei ka gam nunnuam
Lungngaih kahna a om nawn lou
Kum khua nunnop tawplou in
Ka teng ding aw na gam nuam ah
Lam-et omlouhna hiai khovel ah
Leigou te'n kei a hon gamlat zel a
Lam-et te'n hon liamsan zel mahleh
Khovel thak kei di'n sehkholh in a om
Tua khovel thak Belamnou tual lenna hi
Tuang ka tun chiang Jesu'n kong a hong dia
Nunnuam in tua ah hondamtu phat in
Khovel lui ngai nawnlou in i leng ding
Hondampa sulnung zuih haksa in
Sa duhgawlna te'n kei hontuam zel a
Tu'n luankhi nul in pangzel mahle'ng
Khovel thak in kei hon na ngak ahi
Leigim huai haksatna ka tuah te'n
Ka Toupa sianglam hon ngaisak sem a
Nopna leh pahna ka tuah zel te'n
Khovel thak nop ding dan mel hon musak
Ka hondampa kiang ka tun hun chiang
Ka theih bukim louhte ka theita dia
Lam-etna khen lam a nopsakna
Khovel thak ah kei a ahi ta ding

songs.title: Khris Min Ziak A Ka Hamphatna
songs.author: Solomon Hmar

lines: Toupa na honpi dan lampi zaw
Ka don vel in a thupi ngei
Na hoih na leh na zahngaihna Toupa
Ka lam bangkim ah a hong lang zel
Khris min ziak a ka hamphatna te
Ka puang seng lou ka phulou hi
Na hoih na leh na zahngaihna Toupa
Haksatna mun ah a hong lang zel
Na hoih na leh zahngaihna Toupa
Ka machiang ah a luang kiam zel
Mi vakvai leh genthei himahle'ng zong
Nang k'on neih vang in ka kha a muang
Haksatna leh vangsiat na Toupa
Kei a ding in a manpha ngei
No'n vualzawl na le khamuanna thu in
Na mel hon musak tu a hong hi
Khovel thupi na leh hauhsak na
Khovel siamna leh pil nate
Nang tel lou in bangmah lou mai ahi
Na maima ah ka hong kilaan hi
Aw ka damsung nite khawllou in a liam zel a
Naupang hun leh tuailai hun te zong a liam zel a
Sanna leh hauhsak na te'n kumtam a daih kei hi
Sa vuak a kik nawn ding in a luang liam zeel
Ki man meng in tua ziak in
(Ki man meng meng in Mi tengteng Toupa ni a di'n)
Mei lak ah a hong pai ding
Mei lak ah
(Thupitak in mulkim huaiin aw a hong pai ding)
(Ngai in) Kap kawm in na inn leh lou
Pai san a kul ta ding
(Tua hun chiang) Hehpih na hun beita ding
Mangtut phah ngou mai ah namchih zata kikhawm ding
Hinna bu gelh bang a ka min sap hun chiang
Pahna luankhitui nul a tantu chibai buk in
A thupidan ding aw ka gen siam lou
Mang Jesu neilou a kha na pham ni chiang in aw
Kapkawm in kong hong hon in chi'n thum mah lechin
Kua'n a hi hiam kong thei kei chia noh khiak
(Na aw) A mulkimhuai dan ding aw gel ngam lang e
Khris sisanpha vang a gamchiam tang tute
Hiai khovel toh kilem thei i hi nawn lou
Sa dan ah hin leh khovel toh kilem zaw
Toupa dou na leh khalam keu na ahi
Mang Khris thuakna koppih ding in
Gingtu te Toupa'n hon lam en
Mang Khris sepsa sunzom ding leh
Haksatna tampi thuak in tua gam i lut ding
Khris sisanpha vang a vangou luah ding te
Toupa min in bangkim dal i ngam ding hi
Khovel thupi dan kumsang daih ding omlou
Tangtawn daih ding mah i buai pih zaw ding uh
Khris sisanpha vang a thupina tang ding te
Nopsakna kipahna kia tang ding hilou
Khris min in bawlsiat na te zong i thuak dia
I thuak na hang in Manglukhu i ngah ding
Gingtu te lunglel lou in i paizel ding
Hiai lei zaw i tangtawn gam ding a hilou
Ginna'n galdon leng tua gamnuam leh etlawm
Ngoumei bang kai hi Hondampa lenna mun
Jerusalem thak i tun chiang
I Hondampa mel i mu dia
Khensa i it misiangthou te toh
Tangtawn Toupa phat in i omden ta ding
Toupa ken nang hong phat ning e
Nang ka hinna pen na hi
Aw miteng in nang hon thei ding uh
Kumpi te' kumpi na hi
Mial lak ah ka gamtat n'ong thei a
Sun dai a ka gamtat n'ong thei a
Ka ngaihsutna teng nang na thei a
Hizong hong it in nang n'ong sam lai
Itna in n'ong sam a dohzohna in
Kei n'ong enkol
Itna in n'ong sam na sisan in
Kei n'ong sawp siang zou
Toupa ken nang hong phat ning e
Hotdamna kei n'ong bawl sak
Kua'n hih thu lamdang gen thei ding hiam
Kumpi te' kumpi na hi
V PAUKHANSIAM
Lungkham liang vaite ding a
Kingakna Toupa hi
A hehpihna kiching hi miteng di'n
Amah belte'n lungnopna kiching neiden zel hi
A hoihna thupina genzou kei ning
Ken genseng ngeikei ning ka Toupa hon itna
Kei ding a hoihna thu genseng kei ning
A hoihna thei semsem ing ka kha'n semsem chiang in
Ka bitna hiden ding hi tangtawn dong in
Pa neiloute pa hi a nu neilou te nu hi
A it ding neiloute a it pa hi
Khamuanna neiloute dia khamuanna Toupa hi
A si khempeuh hinna pia Toupa hi
Toupa aw nong itna ka ngaihsut chiangin
Lamdang lua sang keibang leltak nong it
Na mai ah chinglou suan ding neilou hizongleng
Tuchiang dong n'ong pi lungdam lua ing e
Lungdam lua ing Toupa lungdam lua ing
Kei banglel tak nong it man nuamlua ing
Na itna tul ngeilou a manpha ngei e
Na min siangthou phatzel ning Toupa aw
Khovel nopsakna pallutna ka zong a
Ka paizel a hizong n'ong ngilh kei a
Lawm leh vual ngai a nang
Kon pelhlai hun in zong
Nong samlai maw Toupa hon ngaidam in
Ka hotdamna suangpi ka bitna nahi
Ka hinna leh ka damna ka bangkim
Nang kia nahi e ka muanna leh kipahna
K'on bel ding hi ka hihtheih nateng in
Muanna suangpi Toupa muanhuai aw
Na angsung hong bel ning
Nang ah bitna om hi (2)
Lungkham leh lau Toupa hong kem in
Nang ah muanna om hi
Nang ah bitna om hi (2)
Sih lau kei ning Toupa n'ong gumkhia
Nang hong muang denta ning
Nang ah bitna om hi (2)
Aw lungkhamte'n zuan un Hondampa
Bitna tua ah om hi
Tangtawn muanna ahi (2)
Simlei thupina leh hauhsakna
Deihtaakna in lungsung a luahzou
Nang sang a zong in ka buai den ua
Ka lungsung uah nang di'n mun a omlou
Toupa aw nang kia ka hon tel hi
Nang sang in bang dang ka tel theilou
Simlei thupina tengteng sang in
Ka Pathian aw nang mah ka hon tel zaw
Lei hauhsakna teng kei a hi a
Nang theilou a ka om sang in zaw
Genthei pen hih a nang toh kinai
Ka tel zaw lai ahi ka Pathian aw
Toupa na vualzawlna ka tante
Na deihsakna thupi ka tante
Nang hon gamlattu ahih in zaw
Hon ngaidam in Toupa ka hon ngen hi

songs.title: Nang Toh Ton A Pai Ka Ut Hi
songs.author: V.Paukhansiam

lines: Nang toh ton a pai ka ut hi
Hunteng in Toupa hong leen in
Nang toh om khawm in lungnuam hi
Tawntung in Toupa hong leen in
Khat vei vei lungsim a thawm hau
Hizong leh nang toh i ton chiang
Ka lungsung nop na'n a dim zel
Nang om na peuh ah muanna om hi
Aw Jesu hong zui zel ning e
Na hoihna kei ah hong dim hen
Haksatna huihpi hong nung zong
Nang toh om lunglau ngeikei ning

songs.title: Ngaklah Tak In Aw Ka En
songs.author: Buonglienkung

lines: Ngaklah tak in aw ka en ka tangtawn mun ding
Chikchiang in tua mun etlawm tuang ka tung sam diam
Hiai khovel ka zinna gam ka pawtsan hun chia'n
Kipak tak a Toupa phat in ka leng ding hi
Aw nuam na- in chia maw
Tua gamnuam katun hun chiang in
Hehpih in ka Toupa'n a honna pom ding a
Hiai khovel ka zinna gam khovel ngai nawnlou in
Van hehpihna pak taanin ka leng sin ngal a
Hiai khovel a sum leh pai gou thil ka-et chiang
Lungnopna a om theikei ka tantawk a di'n
Van mun a goutan dingte ka ngaihsut kik chia'n
Kipahna tawplou tang in ka leng sin ngal a
Thupitak a Mang Jesu a hongpai hun chiang
Gingloute vakvai tak in a hong om ding ua
Tua hun in gingtute hinna ki bawlthak in
Mu banga kha a leng in i om sin ngal ua
Sang tamtak in hon ngak uh tangtawn inn nuam ah
Tua mun a ka tun hun chiang nuam in leng ta ning
Lawm it aw tua mun tungthei di'n na kiman hiam
Niteng in Toupa'n honsam hi itna aw in
Phatna zaila i sa ding
Lungdamna thu i gen ding
Lemkum vei it leh ngaihte liam nung in
Toupa'n a hon khotuah
A hon makaih hon taisan lou
I hoihna hang hilou
Halleluiah aw Halleluiah
Hichi tan hon makaihtu Toupa ahi
Aw Toupa ka lungdam uh
Phatna zaila hon awi ung
Dang ngeilou Kumpi na hi
Saptuamte hon makaih in
Aw hiaitan honpi Toupa
Leivui pan hon domsang tu amah ahi
Khatvei vei lungkham in
Haksatna te hong tung zong
Zohna toh hon ompih
Tanglai Israel na mite
Kanaan gam ah na pi bang'n
Koute zong hon makaih zel in Toupa
Na gamchiam hon tun in
Tui damluan na'h honpi in
Na mite tawldam na
Khovel ah zaw gingtu te in
Haksatna te i thuakzel a
Ei ding in lei thupina te
Manna ding a omlou hi
Hiai puan ngou silhte kuate hi hiam
Koi apan a hong pai hi u hiam chi in hon dong a
Hiai mite zaw gimthuakna tampi thuak tute hi uh
A puante uh belamnou sisan in silsiang ta hi
Ka lei hinna a hong bei a
Toupa kiang katun hun chiang
Lungkhamna chiteng ka tuahte
Aw ka Mang ka hilh ding hi
Ka mit apan khitui luangte
Ahon nuul hulsak hun chiang
Hinna singkung te tung ngei ah
Thu kanei samta ding hi
Lei gimhuai ah ka leng zong in
Hiai leigam mi ka hilou
Ka lenna ding lalgam thupi
Aw ngai in huibang mau veng
Sa in ka phat ding hi aw ka Mang deih huaipen
Na hehpihna tuh sa in pahtawi zel ning e
Tuisuahgiat leh simlei mual teng phatna'n
Dim mahleh na thupina gensenglou ding uh
(I sa ding) Phatna lasa in i aw neih teng toh
Hiai leitung tengteng phatna la in dim henla
Thupina tang hen (aw) Halleluiah Amen
Na zahngaihna thilhihte ka ngaihsut chiang in
Ka lailungsung nopna in a dimlet zel a
Hichitel a hehpihna lamdang leh thupi zaw
Mihing pilna a baan zoulou
Gen zel mahleng zong sa in ka gen seng lou hi
Van miteng in leng thu in gen senglou ding uh
Angel siang leh Serafte'n khawllou in phat mahleh
Tangtawn dong in phat tawplou ding uh
Sian lemgeel hinkhua ka tuahte
Sian phallouh theihpihlou omlou
A honpi dan ka theisiam lou zong
A honpi tu ken ka theichian hi
Jehovah Toupa'n kei hon pi hi
Nang lemgeel a thil hong tungte
Na phal hang a ka tuahzelte
Banghang hihiam chin lel uh
Ka kungtung a tung khempeuhte
Sian in a phal hang a tung hi e
Nang lemgeel a thilhong tungte
A hang tua theih lung ka lawplou
Sihna apan nong humbit den pen
Bang hang hihiam bang ding a nong deih
Nong deih na theih lung ka lawp zaw hi
Ka khualzinna ka zoh chiang in
Hinkhua ka tuah haksatna te
A ziak a hang ka theichianlou zong
Bukim a theihchetna gam tung in
Nopna bukim toh Sian min phat ning
Mite'n Jesu nungzuihna lungkia in tawpsan mahleh
Ken bel ka khros mah pua in ka zui zel ding
Nisim tha hong guan ding in Tou Jesu ka nei zouta
Suploh kei ning Jesu nung ka zuih man in
Hon piaksa te bek a lungdam ka hikei hi
Hongpiak laidingte hang zong amin phat ing
Tuaman in nisim in ah vualzohna la kasa ding
Suploh kei ning Jesu nung ka zuih man in
Ka kha nuntakna ding in ka muh nailouh vantung
Gam upna toh tung ding chi a kigenkhol bang
Pasian hong kamchiam bang in
Hih leitung nna khempeuh zong
Hong pia zou hi chi'n upna toh ka mu ta
Toupa honpi dan ka ngaihtuah'n
Theihphaklouh te na hon thei a
Bangmahlou te na hon phawk a
Milian lak ah na hon simtel sam zaw
A lamdang ngei na hon pi dan
Si lah hilou hing minpu in
Gensiatna leh nuaisiahna na kal ah
Genthei bang a om a taksap him neilou in
Lungkham hun ah aw hon khamuan in
Ka gentheihna zong pahna na suaksak zel
A kal in gimthuak na mun ah
A kal in tawldamna mun ah
Kal suandan ka theihlouh in zong
Nang man paidan na hon sinsak thak zel
Tanglai Jacob khualzin bang in
Savuak lel in ka hong pawt a
Tu in zaw aw na vualzawlna
Ka sim zongin Toupa ka sim senglou
A kal in aw hui vungvung in
Dontu neilou banglel kahi
Hizong thununna thuaklou in
Na ta hawmthoh ka hithei diam Toupa
Toupa nong itna lian hi van pan na tapa nong sawl
Mohneilou Jesu kei mohna pua in si
A ching lou ching in nong bawl
A khial kei siam nong tangsak
Tua kia hilou na van khopi nong tangsak
Hong phat ing Toupa na min thupi hong phat ing
Kei tang Jesu hong sih tel lamdang lua hi
Mipil misiam tampi om mihau mihoih tampi om
A chinglou kei bang nong tel lungdam lua ing
Lamet bei a ka om in lamet na thak nong guan a
Suan ding nei lou suan ding nang kong neih nuam lua
Tasam a ka om nong mu hauhsak dan nong sinsak a
Hiai itna lamdang a bei ngeilou itna
Ka kha zawngkhal leh bah a nang ngai a gilkial dangtak
Nong muh chiang hinna tuikhuk ah nong pizel
Suk liam a ka om nong mu nong tuam a
Nong damsak man halleluiah Toupa na min thupi hen
Toupa zaw ka belampu ahi tasam kei ning
Loupa hing dipdip mun ah honpi ding a
Khawlna tui gei mun nuam ah kipak in honpi ding a
Hon tai san ngei nawnlou ding ka damsung in
Thupi hinatel e aw Toupa
Na honpi na khempeuhte itna lampi a hi ngal a
Niang leh taitak a om hunte tungzel mahleh
Savuak beidong lungzing taksap ni om ding hi
Sihna lim guam totlai in a itna a hon musak
Toupa kei dia belampu hoihpen ahi
Hon doutu mitmuh leh gensetute kal ah zong
Ka ma ah dohkan na hon bawlsak zel hi
Na Mang tutphah thupi tung a lalbang a tu ding in
Ka lu sathau na nilhkhin Halleluijah
Khovel hauhsakna zongtute zaw gilkial ding ua
Mahni felna suangtute dangtak ding uh
Toupa muang tute in zaw thilhoih tasam ngeilou ding
Toupa bangkim hihthei a Tou uh ahi
Lei taksa hatlou in khalam zong bahzel mahleh
Khasiangthou in a hon hih halhthak zel hi
Amah taimangsan leng zong dikna lampi a hon hilh
Toupa kei dia Belampu hoihpen ahi
Tuailaite hun leh ni kipahhuai
Aw tu in tuang i tung nawnta a
I hun leh nite a beima ngei in
Toupa nna i sem ding
Awle i hinna Toupa kiang ah
I pia ding uh tuailai tengteng in
Mualdawn a kal in i khawnvak vak toh
Gammial i tanvak ding uh
Hibang a hun hoih leh hun manpha
I damsung in i munawn kei ding
I hun leh nite a beima ngei in
Toupa nna i sem ding
A hon it Toupa awle tu in
Na tuailaite hong vualzawl inla
Na thu bangzel a bangkim seem ding in
Nang in hon panpih'n la
Khuakhal tuiva lui leng gammang bang ka haam a
Tulsing singdawn ah simbu haam bang
Khuakhal tui om louhna sakhi bang ka tau a
Ka nunna'n Toupa ngai in ka tau den e
Nang toh lou in nunna chinglou
Itna leh ngaihna nang' kiang ah a om te
Hong neisak in aw Toupa
Mohna guam sung ah kia'n sakhi thang-awk bang in
Mualsang khuva bang in ka tau a
Ka om nan'g khimkhua zing sunggil kial ana e
Ka nunna'n Toupa ngai in ka tau den e
Itna phuitong pal bawm vasa bang i kholhlai
Nunnuam Sian vontawi lia leh taang toh
Itna ningtui ka dawnlai ni te ka ngai e
Ka nunna'n Toupa ngai in ka tau den e
Van leh lei siamtu ka Toupa aw
Na siamsa te'n hong phat uh
Phatna kim lalna kim nanga hi
Tangtawn ah lal nang nahi
Zingsang in vasa te'n hong phat in
A siamtu nang hong pahtawi uh
Ken zong nong piaksa aw toh
Hong phat ning
Ka hat tawp dong hong phat ning
Zingkhua vak in na thupina phuang
Sun nisa'n na vangletna
Khuamui kai in na itna hong lang
Na vangletna na'n zelkhin zou

songs.title: Ka Khete'n Na Lampi Tawn Hen
songs.author: V.Paukhansiam

lines: Tuni'n na ta tuailai hatloute'n
Na min phat in la hong sa ung
Hehpih in ka lak uah hong tel in
Na deih bang in hong sasak aw
Ka khete'n na lampi tawn hen
Ka khutte'n na deihlam sem hen
Ka mitte'n na deihlam mu hen
Khasiang hong sawl'n hong theisiam sak aw
Ka kam in na itna thu gen in
Ka awte'n na min phat hen aw
Ka lung uah la hong guan zel inla
Na min phatla hong sasak aw
Ka sakte'n na deihlam sa hen aw
Ka tumgingte'n na min phat hen
A tawppen na kiang hong thum ung
Na deihna bang'n hon zang ta in
Vanmang siamsil bawl khempeuh
Ka ngaihsut chiang in ah lamdang in kilawm hi
Mual leh guam mun khempeuh
Gal in don leng dum diidiai etlawm ganhing chiteng
Siamtu na thupidan singta'n lel zoulou hi
Hong phat ning kei hong it
Pathian thil bangkim siam
Mikhial na hong tanta thupi'n lamdang
N'ong itna lian thu in genseng kei ning
Sing leh lou te hong dimdim
Gamlak silpak in zem khuaimute hong leng in
Vasate ham siausiau tulvum lengthe
Hong khuang in huihkhi damdiai in laang
Luita luang ging biabia simlei kilawmna'n dim
Khuadak in tunglam en le'ng
Van ah ni leh kha taang aksi sang zatamte
Tang singseng in leng uh
Galdon veng nuai simlei pan thangvan kilawmna'n dim
Siamtu na thupidan thilsiam te in gen hi
Thianmang aw simlei miza
Loubang na khualna lian mikhialte n'ong itna
Thuk in sang hinah e na tapa tangkhat n'ong sawl
Koute hinna ding in siamtu na thupi lua
Thilsiam te'n hon phat hi
Zing ninou hong suah chiang
Na hoihna hong lang in
Tungleng vasate'n na min phat in
Na siam mihing te'n phat
Ding zah in hong phatlou zong
Toupa aw na hoihna ni'n tumpih ngeilou
Aw Toupa Pathian aw lungdam lua ing
Nang bang hoih omlou simlei ah Toupa aw
Mun chih mualchih ah na hoihna ni bang tang hi
Toupa na chitna vang in hong phat den ning
Hunnuam hun haksa ah
Na chitna dang ngeilou
Na itna'n kei hon leen gige hi
Nisim in lungdam thu
Ka hon puak theilou zong in
Hunteng in na vualzawlna kiching n'on pia
Toupa na hoihna leh
Chitna ka tan zelte'n
Tawpni beini chih om ngeilou ding
Tui suahgiat kihawt diam
Diam bang in dai ngeilou hi
Hong phatden ning nang n'ong it masak vang in
Enven ka teenna'ng gamnuam
Leimi te'n a tel zohlouh
Mizawng mipoite leh
Tagahte nopsak na gam
Kei hong simmoh kha ken maw
Inn leh lou ka neihlouh hang
Lei inn sanga phazaw
Van ah inn nuam ka nei hi
Ngaklah veng tua khopi ka tun hun ding
Tou Jesu a khut pawn ka let ni chiang
Lungdamna khitui te a luang ding a
Kei hong honpa aw chin
Lungdam in la kasa ding
En ven tuun nou anglai ah
Melsia mipoi tampi te'n
Van mi bang mel etlawm
Toupa'n bawl pha khin zouta
Lei a i bawl siatna te
Kham lukhu in khu ta uh
A lutung te ziahziah
Suangmanpha toh kizem hi
Sihna hanmual hong liamsan
A paisa it leh ngaihte'n
Hih lei gentheihna gam
Nusia in hong pai un chi
Kei ngai in kap kei unla
Kei omna ah hong pai un
I tun ding hong ngaklah
Van khuapi pan khut hong vaan
Aw kei hon gum Toupa aw hong nuse lou aw
Simlei mialna nuai ah tummang kha ning'
Aw na itna khut in kei hong len gige'n la
Damsung buaina chiaugal hong kaipih in
Na vak ah mialna om ngeilou
Na siang ah muanna kim hi
Nang ah muanna nga ing
Hong leen gige'n
Sunni tum muikhua zing
Zankhua hong mial chiang in
Mialna mitte hong vak ka kha kem in
Zing ninou hong suak a simlei pallunte lang
Simlei palte lou di'n aw hon phalken
Toupa nanglou belh ding ken simlei ah nei keng
Ka mit thuksem mu di'n hong vak sak in
Aw na itna hoihna hehpihna a thuk dan
Nang naihsem a mu di'n hon vaksak in
Ka thumna ngaikhia in Nang ngai a dangtak hi'ng
Khemna huihpi lak ah ka kha a vai
Hihhang ko'ng sap chaing in Nang kei ah na om a
Pahna mittui luang toh phatla kasa
Saltangte suahtakna ding in
Jesu Khris lei ah hong vakvai
Genthei liangvai chiteng hong thuak
Jesu'n Khros ah hon zohsak ta
Halleluiah Halleluiah
Toupa'n thil thupi hon bawlsak hi
Pengkul leh kaihging kilawmte toh
Dak khutbet ging ngaihtakte toh
Pelhkhuang tumging chi dangdang toh
Khuangta leh lam in
Ka phatzel ding
Hehpihna a hon zong mutu
Ka damsung in din seng kei ning
Mikhial ninpen hon silsiangta
Tangtawn hinna ka neita hi
Gingtute i paizel ding uh
Toupa min siangthou thupipen
A siangthou hi chia kikou in
Ka theihtawp in ka phatzel ding
Zanmial a bei ding a
Tangtawn in khua a vaak dia
Zohna puanngou silh in
Mang Jesu a hong pai ding hi
Khosiangthou Jerusalem ah zaw
Tatsa mite i khawl dia
Hinna manglukhu hoih khu in
Nibang in i taang ding hi
Ni leh kha te pan in
Chiamteh nate i mudia
A hun a hong naita
Ihmute a thou nawn ding uh
Buaina leh natna te
Kialte zong hong ke mah leh
Mei lak ah Jesu kiang
Van lam zuan in I leng ding uh
Pathian hong itna lamdang lua sa'ng
Leitung mi khempeuh a siamsa hi
A siamsa mite honkhe ding in
A Tapa hong sawl hong honkhia hi
Khros ah n'ong si maw kei ka hin nang
Nong itna thuk dan lamdang lua sang
Linglukhu khu a na sisan luang
Kei dia damna hi hong phat den ning
Toupa nong itna lamdanglua sa'ng
Mikhial nong itna thuk in sang hi
Kumpi lukhu suah ling lukhu teel
Mohneilou siangthou moh ten na pua
Na itna thukdan kuan gen thei ding
Simlei leh van mi'n suut zoulou ding
Van angelte toh misiangthou te'n
Nang phat lasak ding lawp lua ing e
Toupa aw k'on ngen hi na khut in hon len in
Na itna hoihna muthei gige di'n
Simlei lungngaihna leh
Dahna natna lak ah
Nang a muanna kha'n hong dimsak zel in
Nanglou in muanna omlou
Nanglou in damna omlou
Nanglou in ngaihdamna a omlou
Muanna suangpi na hi
Tangtawn hinna na hi
Khamuanna nang a om mite hampha
Simlei miza lai ah muanna pethei omlou
Sum leh pai pilna siamna haute zong
Lunglau lungmuang theilou
Simlei thawmhau den ah
Khamuanna nang a om mite hampha
Chitna khatzong neilou hoihna khatzong neilou
Na itna lian in sang hi Toupa aw
Man ngenlou a hinna
Hongpia Pathian hoih aw
Nuamlua ing na tung ah lungdam lua ing
Leitung ka en kikhenna lungkhamna
Piangsual mi genthei leh haute
Lungmuan omlou kikhenna kithahna
Van a ka khua ding ka ngai e
Aw Toupa aw na lenna ken ngai veng
Van a angel siangthou te toh
Nibang a taang na vakna gamnuam ah
Aw lungmuanna di'n ka ngai e
Van aksi aw na lenna a sang hi
Van sang ka etchiang leng nuam ing
Van aksi aw na omna khen lam ah
Tang in nunnuam kumkhua ta ning
Zan a kha aw na vakna etlawm e
Meipi na kiim ah leng diaidiai
Van sang ka en ka lenna ding gel in
Van a ka khua ding ka ngai e
Toupa'n hong khawm ding hi mi namchih khat vei chiang
Misia leh mi pha khen nih in hong khen ding hi
Kimkhat te Toupa'n nang na pha hi a chih chiang
Nang na omkha diam aw tua mi hon te lak ah
Misiang te'n lungdam lasak laitak
Khitui luang a a kap tam ding hi
Hotkhiat ngah mite'n hinna tui a dawn laitak
Tuiduh dangtak a a thum tampi om ding hi
Ka hun a bei chiang' kei zong ka pai ding van ah
Leitung ka nun sung ka sep thaman ka sam ding
Kimkhat ten nuntak na lukhu a hong khuk chiang in
Nang na omkha diam aw tua mi hon te lak ah
Hongtung ding hi tua Toupa hun ni khat ni chiang
Tua thu khenna toh kua mah kipelh theilou hi
Kimkhat te'n sihna meikuang lam a zot chiang in
Nang na omkha diam aw tua mi hon te lak ah
Moh neilou Pasian tapa a sih laitak in
Moh nei kei tang Pasian thu khenna thuak hi zou
Hotkhiatna a ngah misiangte hong khop chiang in
Kei ka om ding hi aw tua mi hon te lak ah
Nuntom pakpalh banglel
Ka simlei tangbang damlai hun leh nite
Vul pah ding hizong leh
Paal zatam te'n Toupa pampaih in
Simlei pallun te zou zong leh
Ken bel Toupa di'n zang ning e
Toupa aw hong sang in
Ka pallut nate hatlou zong leh
Nang a ding in hong pia ing e
Toupa aw hong sang in
Ka pallut nate hatlou zong leh
Nang a ding in hong pia ing e
Anbang itna simthu hemlam a
Naubang a sang te vang in maw
Na mel eenglou zongleh
Silpak etlawm namtui a leng hiauhiau
Bang in maw kei zong Toupa
Na gim ka duang ah theng lou ding
Haksatna chiteng nuai ah hei hihang
Toupa gam nasem zousiah te
Hizong i haitan i maban zohding
Ei hon siampa deihdan ahi
Aw naang bang in nemlou hi
Toupa gam nasep zaw
Hon deihna mun peih ah pheiphung suan di'n
Bangchi'n simthu ka lel diam
Toupa nasem hi buang ing
Haksatna nuai ah ding ngam ding in
Kris Toupa sapna a tang khempeuh te
Bangchi'n sang zelding i hi hiam
Haksatna thuaklou Toupa nasem om diam
Zion mual gum a ding ngam ding in
Kris sepaih te aw machiang suan zelni
I maban sep ding tamlua hi
Tutkhawl manlou hang ze-ol thei zong hilou
Khawlna mun nuam i tun mateng
I lam-et van Kanan thak etlawm ah
Hehpihna luipi a luang deldel
Toupa phat a angel te'n laa sa a
Phatna laa hoih ki thawn tuah in ka mu
Toupa vang a i gam ahi
(Toupa vang a i gam i lam-et leh ngaklah)
Lungkham dakging a om nawn lou
(Lungkham mangbatna leh)
sihna lusunna te'n mun tang zoulou
Ginna a i lamet gam ah zaw
Sihna leh natna te hong tun hun chiang
Tua gam pen ngailuat ni a om nak
Sepgimna leh buaina te'n tuam kimvel
Chikchiang hiam in ka paisan ngei ding hi
Gingtu paisate i phawkkik hun chiang
Tua gam nunnuam ngaih a na ngei mai
Phamsa te melmuh louhna simlei zaw
Laukha khovel ahi a vak tawntung
Tu'n buaina simlei ah i tam sung in
Lungdeih te toh gibang kikhen hang
Toupa Pathian vaihawmna mun nuam ah
Kikhenna thu i gen nawnkei ding hi
Don kimvel veng nuai simlei hinkhua
Hon ittu deih pen theisiam lou in
Salam hauhna mahni hamphatna
Manoh in gamchiam lam heisan in
Aw haksatna Mang melmuhna
Lungkim tak in ka hon pom dia

songs.title: Chik Chiang A Jingkal Hi Ding Hiam?
songs.author: Upa S.Thuamzadam

lines: Hong it Toupa hong paina ding
Pumpi tatna ka ngah na ding
Leimi hinna ka dou galte
Zo a thaman ka ngah na ding
Chik chiang a jingkal hi ding hiam?
Zan bei ding a hita . Jingkhua vak ding hita
Ihmu khanlawh hunta
Mial thil hihte pai in
Vak thuam in kithuam ni hang e
Tangtawn jingkal hi ding hita
Lei a jingkal tengteng sanga
Jingkal siangthou leh deihhuai pen
Sihna zou a thohnawnna ding
Siangthou pumpi thak neihna ding
Chik chiang a jingkal hi ding hiam?
Lungkim lou omlou ka Pa Inn
Itna siang leh pahna a dim
Jesu sisan manpha vanga
Ka inkuan te ka muh hun ding
Chik chiang a jingkal hi ding hiam?
Tui hing lui Kalvari apan
Nam chih mi chih a di'n hong luang
Eden nat na omlai vei thuak
Hong zuan in na dam ngeingei ding
Hin thak in leng dialdial uh
Mitdel khebai leh piangsual
Omlou Belamnou tual lenna ah
Halleluiah chin Toupa phat uh
Hiai tuihing lui luan na peuh ah
Bengngong pau theilou leh phungzawl
Phak zeng leh natna chiteng thuak
Jesu ah damna muta uh
Aw Krist Jesu naak pan hong luang
Tui hing sih sial bang hong zuan in
Hinna damna nopna kim om
Pumpi leh kha khawl tawldam na
Hun kipah huai hotdamna ni
Mual ah liamma in hong zuan in

Tangtawn nunnop kim zouta ding
Damsung gamdai gam keu
Khelhna puakgik toh ka vaih lai in
Sapna aw nem ken ka zata
Khawlna mun nuam ka tunngta hi
Ka kha khawl tawldam ta
Jesu tui hing lui ah
Gamdai gamkeu ni sat hang
Jesu ah ka khawl ta hi
Hamse dong sing khros ah
Nang leh kei dia kilh lup a om
Sepna aw nem ken ka zata
Tuihing lui hong luang naa tengdam
Omlai vei nat lungkham
Om nawnlou Jesu tuihing lui
Na kha tawldam ta ding tua ah
Genthei liangvaite khawl na mun
Aw tu hun kipah huai
Hotdamna ni mual a liam ma
Hong zuan in Jesu tuihing lui
Den chiang chi ken tu'n hong zuan in
Aw hehpih ding ka Pathian in
Kei mikhial mangthang sa
Hong zong a Hotdam ding in
A ta neihsun hon sawl
Aw a lamdang lamdang lua hi
Mikhial kei bang tel a hon It
Van gou luah ding a ta a hon pom
Ka phulou Toupa ka phulou hi
Mi khial si tan a kilh belh un
Tangtawn hinna nei ta
A mah bang in kei mikhial
Jesun hon hondam ta
Aw ka siam tanna leh dikna
Siangthou na felna kim
Lailung muanna nopna kim
Tou Jesu nang na hi
Ka neih leh ka omdan te
Ka thu leh la hilou
Bangkim tung a thu nei pan
A deihdan vaihawm hi
Hondampa itna a lamdang ngei
Kei di'n lungkham chiteng thuak in
Bethlehem leh Kalvari ah
Hambang a vai ka Mang Jesu
Ka damna leh nopna pen ka kipahna
Aw ka hondampa kei mikhial leh hing taklou
A hinna hon peta
Gethsemani huan ah ka Toupa'n
Abba Pa aw a hih theih leh
Hiai nou lamang in hihhang in
Nang thu hizaw hen chi'n thum hi
Hon ngilh kei ning aw ka Toupa it
Kei dia na kho-ul sisan kai
Leh Kalvari a na thuakna
Tangtawn hinna tuinak na hi

songs.title: Van Mang Vontawi Bia In Kun Ni
songs.author: V Ngulthuam

lines: Angel lungtuak zaila sak in
Beth-lehem vangkhua a thawn e
Tuni'n nou di'n David khua ah
Hondampa mimbang hong piang ta
Aw hong pai un tu in
Beth-lehem vangkhua lam zuan in
Vanmang vontawi bia in kun ni
Vanmang pianni Jubili daak
Ging tak in i tum ding uh aw
Michih a ding in hotdamna
Ni thupi a hongtung ta hi
Sihna mun lim a tute leh
Saltangte a dia suahtakna
Ni thupi tuang a hong tungta
Hosana chi'n zaila'n lemni
Lusu nawnken hun na neihlai in
Na kim na kiang ah tatna theilou
Sang tampi mialnuai ah tulai uh
Tangthupha hotdamna thupi amaute
Zasak lou ding na hiam
Na hilh louh pi bangchi'n za ding hiam
A zaklouh pi uh bangchi'n ging ding
Hehpihhuai lua kha mang ding te
Hanmial sung ah kap in mau chiaichiai uh
Amau ding in ka ta neihsun si
Tangtawn hinna a neihna ding un
Lusu nawnken thou inla kuan in
Ka inn a dim theih na ding in
Khatbek hon pi in Toupa'n a chi
Kuanmeng in tangthupha va hilh in
Na tha na lungsim a hatlai in
Hehpih in Toupa ankuang umding in
Siding kha gilkial leh dangtak
Hon pilut in zekai ma'n
Toupa hong paina ding ni a naita
Misiangthou te pikhawm ding in
Huaini chiang in nutsiat in na om diam
Kingaihsun in ka it sanggam aw
Hun kipahhuai hotdamnni
Mual a liam ma in
Na khelh puakgik teng toh
Toupa kiang zuan inla
Nutsiat in om ken aw
Huaini chiang in minih lou ah om ding
Khat laktouh in a omding a
Ahihhang khat nutsiat in om ding hi
Sanggam aw nutsiat in na om diam
Sanggam aw nutsiat na hihlouh nang in
Na gitlouhna tawpsan inla
Lungsim khek in
Toupa kiang zuan meng in
Toupa'n nang a hon ngaidam nuam hi
Toupa'n amah i theihlouh lai in
Hehpihna hang in kitheihmoh bawl
Ahihhang in tun zaw
Gamchih a mi tengteng khelhna kisik dingin
Thu a peta
Lungsim khek in hong kihei aw
Toupa Jesu hon zuan meng in
Hotdamna ni mual a liam ma in
Lungsim khek in hon zuan meng in
Hun kipahhuai tuibang kiam hiaihiai
Hotdamna ni mual ah tum lellel
Na tangtawn munding tuin na deihzawk tel in
Lungsim khek in Jesu kiang zuan meng in
A hongpai na ding ni chiam naita
Dikna toh Toupa vaihawm hun ding
Michih a thilhih bang in kipahman pe ding
Lungsim khek in Jesu kiang zuan meng in
Sualgal hong lian setan sualgal
Toupa tatsa vondeih paallai
Sawnban thu kai lenmual khum ding
Aw a na e ka en ngamlou
Delh in laulou in delh in
Lamtawn in ko'n ompih ding hi
Ka kha thilhihtheihna in
Na hon khevek ngeingei ding hi
Suihlung ka mawl vang in Toupa
Na goumanpha na hon kepsak
Simlei tha pina leh paallun
Lunglai khuambang luahzou ta e
Delh leng ka phalai diam Toupa
Ka sep ding te semkha lou in
A beipah sum leh pai zong in
Hon ngaidam in kana khial ta
Delh leng ka phalai diam Toupa
Suangpi bang kip na sim thuchiam
Thilhihtheihna hatna muang in
Na si a na lei vontawi
Ka gal pa khut tung apan in
Honkhe ding in ka kuan ta ding

songs.title: Khris Sisan Pha Vanga Gamchiam Tang Dingte

lines: Khris sisan pha vang a gamchiam tang ding te,
Hiai khovel toh ki lemthei i hi nawnlou,
Sa dan a hin leh khovel toh ki lem zaw,
Toupa dou na leh kha lam keu na ahi.
Mang Khris thuakna kop pih ding in,
Gingtute Toupa'n hon lamen,
Mang Khris sepsa sunzom ding leh,
Haksatna tampi thuakin, tua gam I lut ding.
Khris sisan pha vang a,vangou tang dingte,
Toupa min in bangkim taan i ngam ding hi,
Khovel thupina kumsaang daih ding omlou,
Tangtawn daih ding mah, i buaipih zaw ding uh.
Khris sisan pha vang a, thupina tang ding ten,
Nopsakna kipahna kia tang ding hilou,
Khris min in bawlsiatna te zong i tuak dia,
I thuakna hang in,Mang lukhu i ngah ding.
Gingtute lunglel lou in, i paizel ding hi,
Hiai lei zaw i tangtawn gam ding ahilou,
Ginna'n galdon le,tua gam nuam leh et lawm,
Ngou mei bang lang hi, Hondampa lenna mun.
Jerusalem thak i tun chiang, I Hondampa' mel i mu dia
Khensa i it misiangthou te toh,
Tangtawn in Toupa phat in i om denta ding.
Mang Khrist thupha ziak a,
Kalsuante leh mang Khrist ziak a gentheihna thuakte,
Mang Khrist ziak a inn-le-lou taisan te'n;
Toupa' bawl inn thupi luah ding uhi.
Toupa na hon deih a leh, Kei zong honsawl in,
Na thupha za nailou sang tampi a omlai hi,
Na gam a dia ching a n'on pom leh,
Toupa kei zong hon sawl in.
Na thu za nailou te'n,
Na mite dou a theichian te'n kipahna tang uh,
Tua kipahna thuguk phuangzak dingin,
Toupa kei zong hon sawl in, ka kuan ding.
Na hinna thu puangzak,
Dingin theisiam ahaksa ngei ka gensiam theikei,
Ahun leh nite zong ahong naita,
Aliamna ma pua in kalsuan zel.
Kuhkal takin Toupa,
Nna i sem ding khemna zou in i paizel ding uh.
Sepgim man Lallukhu san hunchiang in,
Tangtawn in zohna la isa ta ding.
Eigi Eeshor eigi Ningthou
Kanbiba mapu ni (2)
Matik mangal thagatchani
Jatlon khuding makna (3)
Nungshi thoujal haiba Eeshor
Nahakki minglen du (2)
Malemsinba thungnanaba
Sandokke pangbi-yu (3)
Angakpani Jisugi ming
Pukning waba kok-I (2)
Pappi singnasu harauni
Pumnamak ingthani (3)
Seitan gi pangaldu ngam-i
Pap bandi thadoh-I (2)
Amotpa sengdokpi ee-na
Jisu gi eeduna (3)
Kros thakki eena eigi pap chambi
Sengdokpikhare thamoi
Sengdokpigani nanggi thamoi su
Nangna thajaradi.
Khurumsi Prabu Jesu bu
Thagat si Prabu Jesu da
Eibu kanbinaba lakle taibangda
Pap tagi kanbikhare
Anoubagi asa anouba punsi
Oihnanbire eikhoi halleluiah Amen
Changjaraklo nang ngasi Prabuda
Aran khubam phangnaba
Magi oihanlo nahakki thamoi
Hinggani lomdana.
Prabu Jesu amuk lenglakkani
Eibu lousinbinaba
Keidoungei halloi eigi thajaba
Prabu lenglaktri phao.
Leihanni eibu lomba naidana
Awa tengtha leitana
Sargaduk singga haraominnani
Hinggani lomdana.
Keja ase nangklang, arjutha kedo-an,
Kroithati, kroithati, Khristo aphanle kroitha;
Chethanglo det pirthe lunlo kadokave,
Kroithati, kroithati Khristo aphanle kroitha.
Damra hai damtha, damra hai damtha,
Kethe apinpo hanglo;
Alangli lam kroisi ladet pe-un dampo,
Kroithati, kroithati Khristo aphanle kroitha.
Arjutha jakongthe, damnon ladet pirthe,
Kroithati, kroithati, Khristo aphanle kroitha;
Ha soitan do along, kehai arki par don,
Kroithati, kroithati, Khristo aphanle kroitha.
Vangnon kekroitang an, soitan perem lonang,
Kroithati, kroithati, Khristo aphanle kroitha;
Ha soitan do along, kehai arki pon non,
Kroithati, kroithati, Khristo aphanle kroitha.
Non jakong do arni, vangnon Jisu 'kengri,
Kroithati, kroithati, Khristo aphanle kroitha;
Birta keme eli, det do-an than dam nang',
Kroithati, kroithati, Khristo aphanle kroitha.
Jadite hako lamo ili akesung,
Than un-e li akelu alam;
Ranam akanghon pensi, Pathe-anglo ephan,
Li planglo alang somar.
Kerot kethip jume, arki pen Hemphu phan,
Amen phan ro archonang;
Hako li kelu pen,non e-rung pangtuilo,
Hemphu akeme e-phan.
Kanghon alam kroikrete, pi li plangjima,
Hemphu ephan akanghon kethe;
Maratson nampi ason li kachongvir un hut,
Kanghon pen nangri tanglo.
Kanghon pen kekroi ajok ili the dinglo,
La do-an Hemphu pen ajoksi;
Manghumeme ajakong pen nang o-ra ephan,
Hemphu akeme e-phan.
Itna sisan luang in ka tatsa mite,
Khuamial gimna sung ah kahna aw ka za;
Lainat in ka khi luang, kua sawl ding ka hiam,
A Mangthang khate kua`n pikhia ding hiam?
Toupa`n nang hong sam lainatna aw toh,
Ka nna sem dingte a tawm lua e.
Mangthang khate kiang itna thu gen ding,
Nang hong sawl ing ei na hih zou diam? chi.
Na neih-na lam khempeuh kong piaksa hi a,
Khat zong siitlou in lakik theipa ka hi.
Hizong lakik kei ning na phal bang pia in.
Van ah n'ong ciah chiang na hawmthoh kha diam?
Na tuailai in sem in tuumbang na vuai ding,
Na neihlai pia in beina hun hong tung ding;
Gal leh sa haksa in buai na`n hong lap ding,
Septheih lai sem in khua hong mial ding hi.

songs.title: Tapaikei Itcha Ma Sumpin Chu (Nang Thu Hi Toupa)

lines: Tapaikei Itcha ma Sumpin chu,
Tapai ko hatma mato ma hung;
Dhali Banau nos Itcha ansar,
Parkhi ma basda namra iha.
Tapaikei Itcha ma sumpin chu,
Janchera kharnos Malik Yesu;
Hiubanda Seto Dhunos Prabhu,
Aile charan ma ma jhukdachu.
Tapaikei Itcha ma Sumpin chu,
Gayal ra Thakit Madhat garnus;
Sarvashaktiman shristikarta,
Cho i niko parnus Muktidata.
Tapaikei Itcha Ma Sumpin chu,
Purna asititav Wasma Raknus;
Pavitra Admale Bharera,
Dheknu Sabeile Christ Pavitra.

songs.title: Mero Nimti Yesu Pauna Kafi (Tou Jesu Neih Kei A Di'n A Hun Hi)

lines: Maile Yeshu Pa-ko le aru thok Mahan chhaina
Mero nimti Yeshu Pauna kafi
Gyan Buddi sampati sabai na bhae pani
Mero nimti Yeshu pauna kafi.
Mero nimti Yeshu sabai vhanda mulya chha
Mero nimti Yeshu pauna dhan chha
Yea sangsar le muqha jhei molai here ta pani
Mero nimti Yeshu pauna kafi.
Apat samai aiera asha sake ta pani
Mero nimti Yeshu pauna kafi
Anjir ko rukh na phule, gothma bastu na raheni
Mero nimti Yeshu pauna kafi.
Shakti sakera jawan abasta sake pani
Mero nimti Yeshu pauna kafi
Brida abasta aiea, gham abela bhae pani
Mero nimti Yeshu pauna kafi.
Sihna mial nuai a tu in, mi sang tampi mangthang uh,
Hotdamna, aw hotdamna neilou in;
Hinna lampi mansuah in singbul suangbul a bia uh,
Eimah bang a tatsate hi uh.
Hotdamna (hotdamna)
Tangthupha (tangthupha)
Gamchih a puangzak ding in (Halleluiah),
Toupa'n tu in hong sam hi, hong sam hi, hong sam gige
Hotdamna huang ah hon pilut in.
Toupan nang hon it man in, sih tanpha in hong thuak hi,
Na khelhman leibat honditsak zouta;
Aw unau kingaihsunin na leibat na dit ken zaw,
Toupa kiang ah bang na gending hiam.
Amaute pikhia ding in unau na muang om ding maw
Hun a tomta lenmual a khum zel hi,
Gammial a Toupa itte laukha tampi mangthang uh,
Amaute pikhia ding omlou uh .
Toupa kei hiai ah ka om, na it te honkhia ding in,
Na deih bangtak a n'on zat ka ut hi,
Nang a ding in ka hing dia, nang a ding in ka si dia,
Ka theihna ka pum in hon zang in.
Sepgim lungzin buaina kinawkna lak ah,
I Toupa Pathian in hon huh zel;
Pa thuchiam ni thupipen a hong tungta,
Saltangte pawtna ding Ni thupi.
Tangthupha deihhuai paizel inla,
Gammial dang a saltangte pi di'n.
Tang a pi leh pu te'n hiai ni thupi pen,
Mu nuam galdot gige mahle uh;
Mu lou in thangvan sang kaizouta uh e,
Van zohna thupipen tang ding in.
Aw damna damna Gospel thangvel inla,
Kawl kimvel dong in va leng inla;
Gentheite kipahna vakvaite inn nuam,
Na pak gimlim nam teng damna ding.
Aw nam zousiah leh thilsiam zousiahte'n leng,
Toupa thupi pak in aw suah un;
Kalvari a itna lamdangtak ziak in,
Ei a di'n damna lui a luangta.
Tun`n tuailai teng in hontanpa thei lehang,
Bangzah in nuam ding hiam Khasiang tawh ki polhna;
Hontanpa it lehang Khasiang hong sawl ding a,
Tuailaite halhna hong pia ding hi.
Tuailai ki ngaihsun in,
Sihna hong tung ding hi;
Tuailai lungtang khauhte Pasian mai I ding ding.
Tu a hun lai in ki bawlpha ciat ni.
Hontanpa thei lehang ginna muan huai tak tawh.
Khasiang hong sawl ding a bangzah in nuam ding.
Tun`n tuailai teng in Hontanpa thei lehang,
Nguina omlo ding a, Khasiang in hong pawl ding.
Halhna halhna chi in Hontanpa muang kei le`ng,
Bangchi'n Khasiang hong tung ding hiam?
Zabung puak ding mangngilh lo, Mangngilh hang lakik hamtang,
Sumpi ding Mangngilh tawntung, mangngilh hang lakik tuanlou.
Laisiangtho thu donlo in, Vantung tun ding na sawm a;
Endih ve na kha a ding, khasia in naubang a kap.
It le hang a mel a hoih, mudah leng a mel a sia.
Phal le hang piak ding om a. Phal kei leng piak ding omlo.
Pai nuam leng naichik hi a. Ut kei leng lah gamlapi.
Ki itna in khum pen a mudahna in khaat in kha.
Na deih teng leina dingin, sum leitawi kihta ngeilo,
Pasian a ding khatvei bek, Sum leitawi in pai ngeilo.
Pasian a ding phalo te`n phal hun cih nei ngeilo ding.
Neihman a piak hi a, Phal man a piak hi zaw hi.
Pasian na sep ding chiangin, Kei teekta ing na chi a;
Aituam na sep ding chiangin kuamah kihta keng na ci;
Pasian na sep donlo te`n , Man hun cih nei ngeilo hi.
Ka man citciat kei ci in, Citciat in hun beisak hi.
Zing nino eng singseng, mualdawn ah hong suakta;
Zan khuamial lungzin teng theng zouta e.
Etlawm sang e silpak pakpalhte khuaimu`n bawm;
Lungdam ung Toupa aw lungdam lua ung.
Aw Khros mizatamte din haina hi zong leh;
Kei din ka hina leh ka damna pen ahi.
Na thuaknate hang in Toupa Jesu hoih aw.
Kei in damna bukim ka muta
tun leh zua khitui hulni om ngeilo ding;
Bawi aw bawi aw chi in maimit si`ng mawng.
Lungkham luankhi chikchiang daibang theng ding hiam chi`n;
Khros sisan pha vang in daibang thengta.
Ka tuai momnote sakmel panin hong langta;
Tou Jesu hon itna lamdang in sang.
Lamdang lua sa`ng hizahta nong itna thupi;
Gelchim la`ng e sutchim la`ng e Toupa.
Honpi zel Toupa lampial nawnlou dingin;
Ka lai lungsung na inn siangthou hi hen.
Khovel thupina teng sangin kon tel zaw hi;
Nang kia na hi ka deih pen Toupa aw.
Tulai momno lia leh tang,
I gam a ding nang bang na gel mawhna kol sung.
Gal in don vaw mulkimhuai lua luankhi tawh.
Nisim thunget ki sam.
Hong it lua veh aw I Zogam mialpi sung zong,
Bang hang tu chiang Zeisu mel leng lo.
Kua muang na hiam I gam a ding Zeisu in,
Nang tektek hong deih.
Nang na ki hel lo in maw?
Hong mial semsem ding I Zogam maw u-le-nau;
Dipkuat huai lua tulai I nuntakna thu,
Citak ding hong deih hi.
Gamthak khuavak puak dingin,
Nang leh kei in tavuan I nei na tel nai maw?
Gupna khuavak nibang taang hen Zogam ah.
Jesu`n thupha hong pia.
Toupa nong itna lian hi, Van pan na tapa nong sawl.
Mawhneilo Jesu kei mawhna pua in si;
A chinglo chingin nong bawl, A khial kei siam nong tangsak;
Tua kia hilo na van khopi nong tangsak
Hong phat ning Toupa, Na min thupi hong phat ning.
Kei taang Jesu hong sih tel lamdang lua hi.
Mipil-misiam tampi om, mihoih-mihau tampi om;
A chinglo kei bang nong tel lungdam lua ing.
Lamet bei a ka om in, lametna thak nong guan a,
Suan ding neilou suan ding nang kong neih nuam lua`ng.
Tasam a ka om nong mu; haksat dan nong sinsak a;
Hiai itna lamdang a bei ngeilo itna.
Ka kha zawngkhal leh bah a, Nang ngai a gilkial-dangtak.
Nong muh chiang hinna tuikhuk ah nong pi zel.
Sukliam a ka om nong mu, nong tuam a nong damask man;
Halleluijah! Toupa na min thupi hen.
Khovel thupina ten kuamah hondam theilou hi;
Hoihnate leh felnate in zong.
Gantate sisan in khelhna a sawpsiang zoulou;
Jesu Khris sisan kai`n khelhna a sawpsiang hi.
Phuangzak zel ni hiai thu;
Khovel munchih-gamchih ahi.
Kipakni aw I zalenta ahi;
Tatna thu a theihnailoute kiang I theisak dia,
A za nailou te I zasak ding hi.
Mial nuai a tute aw, zalenna khua a vakta;
Henkol bun a omte, nuam un.
Simmoh thuak mite leh saltangte pawtna ni e;
Halleluia nuamin Toupa phat ve ni.
Hon zongkhia tu Toupan, Kalvari sing khross tung ah;
I bat teng a din zou ta hi.
Mi kuapeuh tua theichian hotdam in a om ding a;
Jesu Khris min in Zohna a tang zel.
Aw Toupa mikhial kahi hon paisan in
Ka hoihna leh fel nate kahihna teng teng et in
Na mai ah suan ding ka neilou
Ka insung ka et chiangin Nangten natak ahilou
Hizong leh itna in non kem den hi
Aw Toupa(Aw Toupa) Pathian kua kahi a ?
Ka inkuan te kua hi hiam?
Hiai tan tan nahon tunpih
Khovel mite et bang a hon enlou in
Kasak mel leh neih leh lam, kasiamna leh pilna te
Ka phulouh in nah on domsang a
Lei vualjawlna khenlam ah na vanmang tutphah thupi
Nahon pia a Toupa kaphulou hi
Aw Toupa na melvak ken ka en ngamlou
Na hoihna leh sianthouna Na itna te kamuh in
Ka khelhna t alang chiang zel a
Hiabang zah a Lal thupi itna toh honpi tupa
Kon taisan khanak hi hon ngai dam in
Ka hihna tenga mikhial kana hi,
Khovel etin chitna ka neilou;
Etna chitenga ka et chiangin zong,
Chitna ka neilou Nanga ding in.
Ka chitna Toupa ka hoihna Jesu,
Nang kia na hi e ka hatna leh pahna;
Kua hiam siamlouh hon tangsakta ding?
Siam hontang saktu Khrist Jesu a hi ee.
Ka muanhuai kei hi chih na thei Toupa,
Nanga dingin ka muanhuai kei hi;
A hon hih hattu Khrist Jesu kia in,
Muanhuai leh siamtangin honpom hi.
Dikna ka nei kei chih na thei Toupa,
Hizong dikin na hon pomta hi;
Ka diklouh na tengteng Nang na pua a,
Na dikna puanin na hon thuam hi.
Chitna neilou siamtang in na hon pom,
Ka lei damsung ni tomkal sungin;
Sih donga muanhuai a na nasem di'n,
Ka hong kipia hi Nanga ding in.
Ka hondampa bang lawm hoih dang Om lou,
A omlou khat lel zong,
Ka kha natna damsak thei dang om lou,
A omlou khat lel zong.
Mang Jesu'n ka haksatna thei in,
Sun nitum dong hon kem zel ding,
Jesu bang lawm hoih kua dang a om lou,
a omlou khat lel zong.
I kiangah om louh hun a nei ngei lou,
Nei ngei lou khat vei zong,
Hon khamuan theih louh zan mial a om lou,
A omlou khet vei zong.
Tua lawm hoih pen in hon nusia ngei lou,
Nusia lou khat vei zong,
Mi khial nin pen zong a manthat phal lou,
A phallou khat lel zong.
Tua hondampa bang mi dang a om hiam,
A om lou khat lel zong,
A hotdam zoh louh mikhial a om hiam.
A omlou khet lel zong.
Mang Jesu ka neih apan in, lampi neu tawn ka hong hi.
Ka ut zawng thilte bawl ding a lemta lou,
Ka tan tawka lungkim in haksa in tawlhuai mahleh
A deih bang a om ding in, Mang Jesu'n ahon ngak hi.
Ka hinkhua (ka hinkhua hi) aw abei chiang in
Ka tantu mel deihhuai tak tuh ka mu ding
Ka lei lungkhamna mittui, ahon nulsiang sak ding a,
Thupi tak in ka leng ding Mang Jesu ka neita hi.
Lei hauhsakna, lalna leh thupinate nei kei mahleng
Mang Jesu neih kei di'n ahuntawk hi.
A melsiat ding ka phallou, amin tul ding ka phal lou
Ka bangkim a bangkim tuh Mang Jesu kia a nahi.
A haksa ngei khovel hih lungkimna himhim a omlou
A sangzaw lam delhna in mun aluah zou
Bang ding a buaizel ka hiam bang ding a ka lunggim hiam
Lungkimna pen mang Jesu, ka goutan manpha ahi
Ka nunna in Toupa ngai in a dangtak a,
Sakhi luitui duh nak hawkhawk bang in;
Pathian hong tui duh in ka kha a dangtak a,
Honpi diing in Toupa ka ngai hi.
Hon siamthak nawn in Toupa,
Ka nun hi lungngai in a mau zel;
Mihing lui nusia'n, Hin thak kaneihtheih na'n,
Toupa hon siamthak nawn in aw.
Nang di'n hunhoih zang in hunteng zangmahle'ng zong,
Hinna ka neilou Mang nasem diing in;
Ka omdan hon sim ua muhdiing a omkei hi,
Hon itna thei suahtu kahong hi.
Sinai taang dan bang in Mang na ka sem zel a,
Khongaihna dan ah zaw a ching zou lou,
Sa dan a hin in zaw khalam a douzel a,
Siamthak nawnna Toupa ko'n ngen hi.
Ka hun leh nite hi nang di'n ka zang ta diing,
Khovel mite'n au in hon sam zong leh;
Mang na sem kawmzel in mailam ka nawtzel diing,
Toupa'n hon siamthak nawn hun chiang in.
Kuan in, sem in, kizang bei in,
Na pahna Pa' deihlam nasep;
Tua hi, Heutupa paina lam,
A nasempa'n zuilou ding hiam? (2)
Kuan in, sem in , a thawn hilou
Lei a manna van punna hi;
Mihing in hon pakta lou zong,
Heutupa'n hon pakta mahmah. (2)
Kuan in, sem in, a hoihzou hi,
Aman hon pahtak ngal aleh,
Thumang hon kipahsak ngal leh,
Amah dia nasep thawnlou hi. (2)
Kuan in, sem in, sun ahihlai':
Khovel zanmial pai mengmeng hi,
Zawntatna paikhia'n, thanuam in;
Khamangthan gte vabang man in. (2)
Semzel in, bah ke'n, thum kawm in;
Kha lamhaih man ding in pil in;
Khovel lamlian ah kuankhia in,
A vakmang hon pilut khial ke'n. (2)
Na kiang khuamial ah mi si hi,
Han ah nemding lamet bei in;
Meisel la in tanvak suak in,
Mial sahpen vaksak ding meivak. (2)
Sem in, na nasep ah nuam in,
Semgim di'n khawl, vakvai di'n inn;
Mouneipa' aw na zapah ding,
Zanlai kikou, 'ngai in, k'ong pai. (2)
Jesu kiang ah ka kipumpiak,
Nuam in ka bangkim ka pia;
Amah it in ka muangden diing,
Niteng a kiang ka om diing.
Ko'ng kipumpiak hi (2vei),
Ka Hondampa nuamsa na kiang ko'ng kipumpiak hi.
Jesu kiang ah k'ng kipumpiak,
A khebul ah ka kuun hi;
Leitung nopna ka nusia ta,
Hongla'n Jesu tu'n hong la'n.
Jesu kiang ah ko'ng kipuampiak,
Honpa nang kia'n hon nei in;
Kei nang a nang kei a na hih
Khasiang in hon theisak hen.
Jesu kiang ah ko'ng kipumpiak,
Toupa nang din kong kipia;
Na itna hatna'n hon dimsak,
Na vualzawlna'n hon vuk in.
Jesu kiang ah ko'ng kipumpiak,
Tu'n lungsung ah ka thei ta;
Aw hotdamna kim kipahna!
Amin thupi thupi hen!
Pa aw en in simlei na tatsa
Nungchiang hei in hambang vai ung,
Chikchiang na lam kong nga diing uam?
Hong leng in aw hon ngai ung.
Aw hon ngai ung hongleng in,
Hambang hon huai nawn in;
Na gimthuakna tetheisak din
Hong leng in aw laukha
Huibang mauna gam
hi leitung a tuangnung siah in leng nuam ung e,
Nat le sat omlouhna mun ah,
Leng nuamta ung na siang ah.
Hizong sang tamte na lamhaih in
Nisim hanmual hon liamsan uh,
Kuan pikhe diing uh hiam Toupa,
Hong leng in aw hon ngai ung.
Lungdeih zatam ka taan zong in
Simlei ah nun ka nuamlou zong,
Ka deihpen na hi Toupa aw.
Endih leitung khuapi te kilawm sem sem
Teenna Innte nisim in kilawm sem sem
Hizong Inn hoih tampi te kidouna mun hi.
Inn kilawm tampite mangbatna'n dim ta
Innsung maitam ah phatna la sa ni
Inn sung Maitam ah I Toupa bia ni
Inn sung Maitam tung pan Van gam kigal muh thei
A thupi dan gen ni Innsung Maitam tung ah.
Siamtu Pathian zah lou Nu leh Pa tam ta
Nu leh Pa zahtaklou TA te dimzou ta
Innkuan sung kisia ta I gamsung kisia ta
Vualzawlna tampi toh lungkham den ding maw?
Siatna lungkhamna leh mangbatna pel di'n
Innsung Maitam tung pan Toupa sam ve ni
I sepgimna te uh a thawn a hih louh na'n
Innsung Maitam doh in Toupa na sem ni

songs.title: Jehova Min I Lou Den Ding Uh

lines: Haksatna chi teng in a hon dawn  Toupa
Suan ding leh belh ding bang mah nei lou,
Niteng in a thak in a hon dawn
Toupa bang chi hita ding hiam?
Khen khat in Kangtalai a muang ua,
Khenkhat in Sakol te muang uh hi.
En zaw Toupa  Pathian, I Pathian
Jehovah min I lou den ding uh.
Toupa lou a thil dang muang zaw tu te zaw.
A lungkhamna uh zual sem ding a,
A tawpna ding uh zaw kah leh hagawi na
Tua zaw tang tawn sihna
Gingtu ten haksatna I tuah lai in leng,
Haksatna I tuah ding phal a hi ,
A ta deih thoh a it lainat te a din,
Chiamtehna a na hi.
Toupa'n hongkhawm diing hi mi namchih khatvei chiang,
Misia leh mipha khennih in hongkhen diing hi;
Kimkhatte'n Toupa'n, 'nang na pha hi', A chih chiang'
nang na omkha diam aw tua mi honte lak ah?
Mi siangte'n lungdam la saklaitak,
Khitui luanga a kap tam diing hi;
Hotkhiatna ngah mite'n hinna tui a dawn laitak,
Tuiduh dangtaka a thum tampi om diing hi.
Ka hun abei chiang kei zong ka pai diing Van ah,
Leitung ka nun sung ka sep tha-man ka sang diing;
Kimkhatte'n nuntakna lukhu hongkhuk chiang in,
Nang na omkha diam aw tua mi honte lakah.
Hongtung diing hi tua Toupa hun nikhat ni chiang,
Tua thukhenna toh kuamah kipel theilou hi;
Kimkhatte'n sihna meituang lam a zot chiang in,
Nang na omkha dia'm aw tua mi honte lakah.
Mohneilou Pasian Tapa a sih laitak in,
Mohnei kei tang Pasian thukhenna thuak hizou;
Hotkhiakna a ngah misiangte hong khop chiang in,
Kei ka om diing hi aw tua mi honte lak ah
Pa Pathian Bangkim hihthei,
Lei leh Van siam ka ging;
Huan, A Tapa tang neihsun Jesu Khrist,
I Toupa leng ka ging.
Amah Khasiangthou paisakin,
Mari sung hong suak hi;
Pontia Pilat nuai ah thuaka,
Krosa kilhden a om.
A sih zoh chianga,
Hankhuka vuia om;
Nuailam misi khuaa vahoh a,
Ni thum ni a thounawn.
Vana kahtou nawnta,
Pathian taklama tu;
Mihing leh misi vaihawm dingin,
Van pan hong pai nawn ding.
Khasiangthou ka ginga,
Saptuam siangthou khat;
Misiang kigawmna zong,
Khelhnate ngaihdamna, pumpi thohnawnna,
Tangtawn hinna ka ging. Amen.

songs.title: Jesu Min Lian Phat Chiat Ni E
songs.author: Edward Perronet

lines: Jesu minlian phat chiat ni e,
Angelte'n bia'n kun hen;
Mangpen' lukhu honla unla,
Khusak un miteng' Lal!
Martarte'n Amah khusak un,
A maitam pan hong sam;
Phat un Jese Jikpi phat un,
Khusak un miteng' Lal!
Nou Israel chitelte aw,
Omsun hatlou leh tawm;
Na Hondampa uh phat unla,
Khusak un miteng' Lal!
Nou Jentel gilou te'n thei un,
A thuakna ngilh kei un;
Koih un gallu A khebul ah,
Khusak un miteng' Lal!
Namchih, pauchih, mi khempeuh te,
Hiai leitung-a teng te;
Lalna khempeuh Amah pia un,
Khusak un miteng' Lal!
Aw tungchiang mi pawl siangthou toh,
A khebul ah kun le'ng;
Tangtawn Amah phat la sa-in,
Khusak ni miteng' Lal!
Pathian, hon phat ung!
Na Ta it Jesu ziak'!
Amah si-in thounawn,
Tu'n van ah om hi.
Haleluia, Nang na vanglian,
Haleluia, Amen;
Haleluia, Nang na vanglian,
Hon halhsak nawn in.
Pathian, honphat ung!
Na Kha Siangthou ziakin;
Aman Hondampa honhilh,
Zan mial thengsak.
Phatna thupina,
Thahsa Belamnou'a;
Aman i khelhna pua,
I nitna siangsak.
