Hon halhsak nawn in,
Na itna'n hon dimsak;
Michih' kha Na mei in,
Hon kuangsak nawn in.
Aw Pathian, tanga hon panpih,
Machiang ka lamet uh;
Huihpi vuahpi nuaia bitna,
Tangtawn-a ka inn uh.
Na mangtutphah limnuai belin,
Na misiangte bit uh;
Na khut in honpii honkai in,
Ka bit ding uh, Toupa.
Gammual tangbang kikhun ma in,
Leitung a om khiak ma'n;
Pathian hi chia tangtawn apan,
Tangtawn tulmawh Na hi.
Nang ding in kum sang tampi zong,
Mitphiat kal a ching lou;
Tuma, tunung, kou ka chih uh,
Nang, Tu, na chi gige.
Hunin chiautuipi luang bangin,
Mihingte taimang hi;
Zan a mang zingkal a bei bang,
Mihingte ngilhin om.
Aw Pathian, tanga hon panpih,
Machiang ka lamet uh;
Damsung teng honchingpa hi in.
Tangtawn-a ka inn uh.
Theihvualouh-in Pathian gamtang,
A lamdang na sem ding';
Tuipi tung sik bangin paia,
Huihpi tung bang ah tuang.
Tehvuallouh thukpi lei nuaiah
Zia kilawm vante koih;
Amah deihbangin na sema,
Sem khial, bawl khial ngeilou.
Nou misiang, lauthawngte, hang un,
Meipi na lauh un zong '
Zahngaihna tampi tun nou ding'
Vualzawlna'n hongzu ding.
Theitawmin Toupa mawhsa ken,
A hehpihna muang jaw'n;
A maigum na muhte ah zong,
A nuihmai kisel hi.
A tupte buching pah ding hi,
Dakkal tengin nai hi;
Tuin haksa tadih mahleh,
Buchin nuam mahmah ding.
Ginlahna zaw khial mahmah ding,
Pathian' khutsuak haih ding;
Pathian kiain genchian theia,
A gingtami hilh ding.
Tangtawn la kilawm ngai un,
Vana hong kipan;
'Thupi Pathian thupi hen,
Tung Pathian,' chi,
Vakna munnuam akipan,
Angel leh misiangthou lasak,
Ngaihtak-a tum leh kikou;
'Toupa Mangpen.'
Vualzohna la ngai dih un,
Khovel tengteng thawn;
Tuipi luangging bangin ngaih,
Jaknop mahmah;
'Halleluia, Toupa hi,'
Vualzohna la gam tengteng ah,
Aw ngaih leh nakpi-a sa'n;
'Toupa Mangpen.'
Nuamsa Thumte phat chiat un,
Nou van mipite;
Phat un, Pa phat un, Tapa
Leh Kha Siangthou;
Tangtawna a hih bangin,
Tangtawn tangtawn in gingging hen,
Tatsate'n gengen ding uh,
'Toupa Mangpen.'
Kanan juan i pai, puanlap khaia la sa'n,
Gilou doudinga kipia sepaih i hi;
Hizong galdou lai kikhen i om louhna'ng,
Toupa' lam pang kua kua chiin kidong hang.
Aw i lak uah kua ahiam, thutak-a muanhuai,
Thutak gum a ding ding, Toupa lama pang?
Aw i lak uah kua ahiam, thutaka muanhuai,
Thutak guma ding ding, Toupa lama pang?
Temsau leh galvante te solsol thei hi,
Setan zong vak sawltak bang kibawl thei hi;
Hizong lungtang ah muanhuailouhna om thei,
'Toupa lam pang ka hi,' kam in a chih hang'.
I lak uah kuahiam vaihawmna nuai a om,
Pathian zahngaihna ngaihdamna neilou lai;
Lungtang kisathei niamkhiak in honla in,
Toupa'n hon ngak laiin Amah lam juan meng'.
Dahna, natna leh bawlsiatna khawksa ken,
I thuma khawisatna la suak pah ding hi;
I zuih muanhuai ei hon Pipa Khros pua in,
Vualzou i kikou ding; Toupa' lam' pang hang.

songs.title: Khasiang Ka Sung Hong Teng Den In
songs.author: E H Stokes

lines: Kha Siang, ka sung' hong tengden in,
Ka lungtang ling hong sil in;
Siangthouna-in kei hong luah in,
Hong pai-in, hong dimsak in.
Hong dimsak', hong dimsak',
Jesu aw, tu'n hong dimsak';
Siangthouna in kei hong luah in,
Hong pai-in hong dimsak in.
Hon hehpih Kha, non dimsak thei,
Dim dan kon hilh theih louh hang;
Ka taksap tawntung Nang na hi,
Hong pai-in, hong dimsak in.
Kei a jawngkhal tawntung hi'ng e,
Na maiah tu'n hong kun ing;
Tangtawn Pathian Kha nuamsa aw,
Na tha tawh hong dimsak in.
Hongsil, hong khamuan, hong hong in,
Siangsak in hong vualjawl in;
Nong khamuan ding nong hongkhia ding,
Nong dimsak ding hi, tuin.
Aw Toupa tungnungpen, lambang hon pak ung,
Pathian hing leh bangkim hihthei Nang na hi;
Nuaisiahte, tengkhawi, liangvai, giloute' Lawm,
Sanggah, gentheite teng' Toupa leh Pathian.
Thumnate dawngpa Pathian na hih jiakin,
Na mite'n taksap hon nget uh Na pe jel;
Na tate' kah leh mau Nang na ngaikhe jel,
Thudik gum, na hoih sem, Na pampaih kei hi.
Na thu hoih mijawng leh haute zasak in,
Midang Nang hon doute'n zong zata uhen;
Tu-a hotdama ka om samna ding un,
Bang a hiam ka hih ding, chi uh hen, Amen.
Namchih mial paisan, leh sal suak kipak hen,
Tungnungpen ah Pathian thupipen hen aw;
A kipahpih leimite lak' lem leng hen,
Hosana, Hosana, chi-in sa uh hen.
Huan, namchih kiang ah Na min zahtak huai hen,
Na gam thupitak-in hong tung jel hen aw;
Van- a mi'n a hih bang-un leia mite'n,
Na deihlam hih henla, gam chih ah, Amen.
Aw hotdamna ja! aw itna tuipi thuk,
Zahngaihna lian, Khrist-in tunglam pan hontun;
Khovel pum tatna manpha athawna piak,
Miteng dia tua luangin, kei zong hontum in!
Ka khelhna a tam, ka nitnate a thuk,
Khelh lungkham ka kahna khitui luang a tam;
Ka kah phatuam lou, sisan tuipi luangin -
Tun non silsiang thei hi, kei zong hontum in!
Ka lungtom, sinsiat leh utna giloute'n,
Ka kha henchipin honkhialsak hamtang hi;
Tuipi manpha luang ah suahtakna ka mu,
Thilhihthei hongluang in, kei zong hontum in!
Khemnaten honsualin, lauhnaten hondelh,
Lungnop, phattuamna beiin kum tam ka hing;
A hoihzaw ka tang ngei ding chih ka thei hi,
Khatvei hontum lechin, Na sianna tui in.
Aw zahngaihna tuipi, nang hinna pethei,
Tui lamdang, na piautak ah kong ding ngeita;
Siansakna tuipi tuin kong tung nawn hi,
Ka puma non tup ma'n, ka kik nawnlou ding.
Tu'n tuipi luang, ken a tui ka khoih kha hi,
Hondam dia Hat-in honsapna ka ja hi;
Ka ginna'n muang ngamta, hotdam hi ngei ding,
Damna tui ah ka bual, tuin hontum hi!
Halleluia! tu'n zaw ka damsung nite,
A phatna dingin phaltakin ka zang ding;
Aman A sapum liamin kitamsak hi,
Hotdamna tuipi ja, A luansak theihna'n.
Pathian' itna, itna tungnung,
Van kipahna hong kum in;
Kou ah Na tenna hong bawl in,
Na hehpihna hong khusak';
Jesu, Nang mi Na hehpih thei,
Itna ngenin Na dim a;
Hotdamna in kou hong veh in,
Hon ngaite' siang ah lut in.
Na itna Laukha pia inla,
Mi lungkhamte' lungsung ah;
Bangteng Nang ah hong luahsak in,
Na chiam khawlna hon musak;
Khelh utna lamangta inla,
Alpha leh Omega hi'n;
Ginna bul leh a tawpna Nang,
Suahtakna hon pia ta in.
Hong pai in, Nang hondam dia hat,
Nangmah' hinna hon neisak;
Kou-a teng ding, hongkik pah in,
Na tempul nusia ngeike'n;
Nangmah kon phat gige ding uh,
Nangmah na sem gige in;
Nangmah phat-in kong thum ding ua,
Na itna kia suang gige'n.
Khaile, Na siamthak zou ngalin,
Siangthou leh deihhuai hi n'ung;
Ka hotdamna uh Nangmah ah,
Kimtaka om mu nuam ung;
Thupi semsem hong hita n'ung,
Vangam kong tun tanpha un;
Lamdang, itna, phatna-a dim,
Na mai'h bangkim ngak dongin.

songs.title: Kei Tanga Ding Pa Jesu Hi
songs.author: Obed W Stucky

lines: Kei' tanga dingpa Jesu hi,
Kei tang' zumna thuak laitak';
Liam, kitam, sisan luanga si,
A min hang' hinna ngah ing.
Aw, hotkhiakna lamdang nah e,
Aw, A mel kilawm nah e;
Tanpa, Honpa, kei tang a ding,
Hehpihna'n hong zawlzou hi.
Kei tanga dingpa Jesu hi,
Itna hang' A min phat un;
Sih dong itna, zahngaihna hang',
Amah ah ken mun nei ing.
Kei tanga dingpa Jesu hi,
Kumsawt-in lamdang hizou;
Namchih pan tatsa misiangte'n,
Tatna la nuamin sa un.
Kipaksak ding Jesu hongpai,
Itna tan chiang';
A lungkhamte lungnuamsak ding,
Itna tan chiang';
Itna'n thum dan hon hilh ding,
Lungkham dahna lamang ding,
Miallak khua vaksak ding hi,
Itna tan chiang'.
Itna tan chiang',
Itna tan chiang';
Lungsung panin la kisathei,
Itna tan chiang',
Itna tan chiang',
Itna tan chiang',
Midangte lungnopna puak thei,
Itna tan chiang'.
Leitung pumpi hong kilawm ding,
Itna tan chiang';
Nasep zong lungnopna hi ding,
Itna tan chiang';
Gim thuakna zong siangthou ding,
Lungsung muanna omden ding,
Nuntakna manpha tuam ding,
Itna tan chiang'.
Dah lungkhamna hong nuamtuam ding,
Itna tan chiang';
Lungsung puakgik hong jang tuam ding,
Itna tan chiang';
Vangletna hong tang ding a,
Paina'ng lampi honhilh ding,
Lungsung nopna ki-ngah ding,
Itna tan chiang'.
Tullou thupina ngahta ni,
Itna tan chiang';
Lawmte itna taktak piang ding,
Itna tan chiang';
Leitung vualzohna ngah chiang',
Vantung nuntak kipat chiang',
Nisa vak kul nawnlou ding,
Itna tangta.
Itna lamdang! A min ngaih e,
Kei bang kihhuai hon hut;
Kei ka mangkhin tu'n A hon mu,
Mitdel tu'n ka mu thei.
Tua itna'n laudan hon sinsak,
Itna'n ka lau beisak;
Tua itna manpha lawmlawm e,
Ka gintak laitak in.
Lauhuai gimna, thang tampi lak',
Kei ka paisuakta hi;
Itna kia hi tutan hon pii,
Itna'n inn hon tun ding.
Ka pumpi leh lungsim bah a,
Ka lei hinna bei chiang;
Tua puanjak sungah ken ngah ning,
Hinna nuam leh muanna.
Tua munnuama ni bang tanga,
Kum sangsawm i vei chiang';
Pathian phat la kiam lou lai ding,
Phatna ni kiam lou ding.
Pathian chitna lamdangpen pen la in sa ni,
A hon khotuah leh ven gige na;
I kipumpiakna gimnamtui bang zaam tou hen,
Thuum a Amai a i kihop chiang.
Amah phat in bia ni, A silbawl te vang in,
A hoihna leh khotuahna gen ni;
I kipumpiakna gimnamtui bang zaam tou hen,
Thuum a Amai a i kihop chiang.
A hehpihna thilpiak lamdang la in sa ni,
Itna in tua teng a hon musak;
A tapa Jesu toh i kikholhna nuam ah,
Tua in A mangtutphah hon naihsak.
A vualzawlna in hon zui zel ding in thum ni,
I lampi A hon vaksak na di'n;
Ei Amah a i hong buchin theihna ding in,
A vangam thupi i luahna ding.
Siangthou, Siangthou, Siangthou!
Toupa Pathian Hat,
Jingkhang in ka la uh
Na kiang hong tung ding a;
Siangthou, Siangthou, Siangthou!
Hehpihpa leh Hatpa;
Pathian a mi Thum,
Thum nuamsate aw.
Siangthou, Siangthou, Siangthou!
Siangthoute' biak aw;
A kham lukhu uh tui-
Pi kim a koihkhia-in;
Cherubim leh Sera-
Fim Na mai ah khukdin,
Omkhin, omlel leh,
Om gige ding-pa.
Siangthou, Siangthou, Siangthou!
Mial in honliah zong;
Giloute' mitin Na
Thupina mu lou zong;
Nang kia siangthou na hi,
Nang lou kua dang om lou,
Hatna, itna leh
Siangthouna-a kim.
Siangthou, Siangthou, Siangthou!
Toupa Pathian Hat;
Leitunga Na bawlte'n
Nang hon phat chiat ding uh;
Siangthou, Siangthou, Siangthou!
Hehpihpa leh Hatpa,
Pathian a Mi Thum,
Thum nuamsate aw.
Ka mit in Toupa thupi-a hongpailai
A na muta,
A lunghehna grepkhuk a kipan in
A chilkhe lel hi!
A namsau hiamtak leh lauhuaitak leh kin
A phawikheta,
I Pathian a kuankhia.
Thupi, thupi, Haleluiah,
Thupi, thupi, Haleluiah,
Thupi, thupi, Haleluiah,
I Pathian a kuankhia
Puan um zakhat venna mei tampi lak ah
A mel honglang,
Amah din nitak dai kiak hun leh vot ah
Maitam bawl uh;
A vaihawmna thu meivak kuangtak leh vak ah
Ka sim thei,
I Pathian a kuankhia.
Nungkik ngeilou ding-a sepna dingin pengkul
A hong ging,
Aw, vaihawmna mangtutphah ma-a mite
Lung ommoh sak;
Aw, ka kha kinin, Amah panpi'n ka kha
Kipak om in,
I Pathian a kuankhia.
Lili pallun lai in Khrist hong piang lei-a
Mite' kiang ah,
Nang leh kei hon hih lamdang thei, loupina
Hon pianpih a;
Mihingte' siangthouna din a si, suahtak
Na'n si ngap leng,
I Pathian kuankhiak lai.
Immanuel nakliam apan,
Sisan lui hong luang khia;
Tua sisan lui migilou ding',
Gitlouh silsiangna hi.
Gilou si ding a kilh un zong,
Tua lui mu man-in nuam;
Amah bangin gilou leng zong,
Tua ah ka siang ding hi.
Ka it Belamnou, Na si pha'n,
Thahat mansuah ngei lou;
Tatsa saptuam khial nawn lou dia,
Hotkhiak a hih dong in.
Na liamma pan sisan lui luang,
Muanna toh ka muh nung;
Tatna itna hi ka thupi
Ka sih mateng gen ning.
Kei dangawk pi hankhuk sunga
Dai dide' ka jal chiang,
Tuachiang' la ngaihjaw'n honphat ning,
Hondam dia Na hatna.
Pathian i Kulhpi muanhuai hi,
A kip tawntung Kulhpi hi;
Amah eite hon huhpa hi,
Gitlouh tuipi tung' vualzou;
Tanglai pan melmapa'n,
Siatna ngenta a zong;
A pilna leh hatna,
Huatna ngen in a dim;
A kimpih leitung om lou.
Eimah hatna in dou lehang,
I zou ngeikei hial ding hi;
Mitakpa panpih louh in jaw,
Amah Pathian' Mitelpa;
Amah kua ahi hiam?
Amah Khrist Jesu hi!
Toupa Sabath A min,
Kikheng thei ngeilou hi;
Aman kidouna zou ding.
Leitung dawi ngenin dim henla,
Honhihsiat tum mahle uh '
Lau kei ni; Pathian-in deihzou,
Ei-a A Thutak vualzoh.
Neihlehlam teng mang hen,
It teng, lei hinna zong;
Pumpi zong that uhen;
Pathian' Thutak omden,
A gam tangtawnin omden.

songs.title: Jesu A Lawm Hoih I Neih Dan
songs.author: J Scriven

lines: Jesu a Lawmhoih i neih dan,
I gitlouh dahna po ding;
Hamphathuai mahmah i hilh theih,
Bangteng Pathian kiang thumna'n;
Aw, lungmuanna tam i na tan,
Aw, nat thuak louh ding i thuak;
Amah i hilh louh vang hi e,
Bangteng Pathian kiang' thumna'n.
Ze-et leh khem-in i om hiam,
Buaina koipeuh a om hiam?
Lunglel ngeilou-in om ni e,
Bangteng Toupa' kiang thumna'n;
Tuabang Lawm muanhuai i mu diam,
I lungkham hon thuakpih ding;
I hatlouhna Jesun thei vek,
Bangteng Toupa kiang' thumna'n.
Hatlou leh gik pua'n i om hiam,
Damsung khosak ngaihtuahna'n?
Hondampa Hoih i bitna hi,
Bangteng Toupa kiang' thumna'n;
Simmoh leh ngilh-in na om hiam?
Toupa kiang thumna'n gen in;
A angsung ah a hon pom ding,
Lungmuanna tua'h na mu ding.
Ginna'n hon entou ing,
Kalvari Belamnou,
Ka Hondampa;
Ka thumna ngaikhia in,
Ka mohna honthuk ken;
Aw tuni'n ka pum in
Hon siangsak in.
Ka laukha sawlsapna,
Hehpihna'n hatsak in,
Aw, Pa Pathian;
Ka tang Na hong sita,
Ken leng hon it thei ta'ng;
Aw kon itna dai thei-
Kei leh chi veng.
Leitung buaina miallak,
Heina ka vaih lai in,
Hon pi jel in;
Ka ma mial vaksak in,
Lungkhamna thengsak in;
Mang ding hon phal nawn ke'n
Aw Pa Pathian.
Hinna pak vulna dia,
Sihna lui mial kon kan
Dektak chiang in;
Toupa, hon hehpih in,
Ka ban hon na kai in;
Tatsa gamlei thangvan
Hon kaipih in.
Aw Pathian, Nangman tangthupha non pia,
Kipahthu kon hilh, kipahthu kon hilh,
Kipahthu kon hilh, Nang kiang.
Haleluia, Amen.
Hiai leitung tengteng khuamial in bawmdim,
Tanvakpa hong suak, Tanvakpa hong suak,
Tanvakpa hong suak, Jesu.
Leitung namchih lai' tu'n khua hong vak hen,
Hihdampa' Tangthu, Hihdampa' Tangthu,
Hihdampa' Tangthu pha toh.
Vanglian Kumpipa hong sihna,
A Khros lamdang ka velvel chiang',
Ka hauhna, ka kiphatsakna,
Ken tu'n bangmah-in sim nawn keng.
Khrist ka Pathian' sihna loungal,
Bangmah suan ding phalken, Toupa;
Thupina lim lung la pente,
Amah sisan khekna'n neita'ng.
En ve'n, A lu, A khut, A khe
Panin dahna, itna luangkhawm!
It leh dah kituak thei ngei hiam,
Lingin lukhu kibawl ngei hiam?
Leitung pumpi kei a hi leh,
Pathian piak di'n ka hawmthawh lai;
Tuabang Pathian' itna manpha,
Ka kha, hinna, bangkim a man.
Toupa misiangte aw, na ginna uh ki-
Ngakna Pathian' Thu suangphum khuambang kip hi;
Jesu a bukna juan a tai noute kiang',
A gensa bangval, A gentuan ding omlou,
A gensa bangval, A gentuan ding omlou.
'Lauke'n, Kon ompih hi, aw lungmang het ke'n,
Nang' Pathian ka hih vang' Kon panpih ding hi;
Kon hatsak ding, panpih-in Kon dingsak ding,
Ka khut bangkim hihthei, siamin Kon dom ding,
Ka khut bangkim hihthei, siamin Kon dom ding.'
'Tuipi thukpi a pai dia kon sap laiin zong,
Lungkhamna tui in hon tum lou hial ding hi;
Kon ompih ding hi, na thuakna vualzawl ding',
Na thuakna thukpen pen Ka siangthou sak ding,
Na thuakna thukpen pen Ka siangthou sak ding.'
'Ze-etna meikuanga na paisuak laitak'
A kiching Ka hehpihna in kon vuk ding;
Meikuang honhihsia dinga Ka koih hilou,
Na nin halmang, dangkaeng bang siangsak ding,
Na nin halmang, dangkaeng bang siangsak ding.'
'Tekkun tanpha-a dam Ka mitten thei ding;
Ka itna tungnung, tangtawn' dang ngeilou hi;
A lu uh samkangin a zep dongin zong,
Belamnou bangin Ka ang ah Ka pom ding,
Belamnou bangin Ka ang ah Ka pom ding.'
'Kua leng Jesu-a muanga khawl peuhmahte,
Melma lak ah Ka taisan ngei, ngeikei ding;
Tuabang mi, gawtmun in sualin, dou mahleh,
Ka nusia ngeikei ding, nusia ngeikei ding,
Ka nusia ngeikei ding, Nusia ngeikei ding.'

songs.title: Mi Siangte Aw En Un Thupi
songs.author: T Kelly

lines: Misiangte aw, en un thupi,
'Dahna thei Mi' tu'n en un;
Galdouna pan vualzou-a kik,
Khuk teng A mai ah kun ding!
Angelte, manglukhu khusak,
Honpa, kumpite' Kumpi;
Angelte, manglukhu khusak,
Honpa, kumpite' Kum-pi.
Angelte'n Honpa khusak un,
Jesu'n zohna manpha puak;
Thuneihna tutphah ah tusak',
Van pahna thawm gin laiin.
Mikhialte'n engbawlin khusak,
A kumpina mawkbawl uh;
Misiang leh angelte'n um-in,
Kumpi'n nei, A min phat uh.
Ngai un, tua A phatna ging ngaih!
Ngai un, tua vualzohna la!
Jesu'n mun sangpen a tangta!
Tua muh-in lungnopna lian!
Aw Heutupa, hon tonpih in,
Nasepna mun niampen ah leng;
Na thuguk kei hon hilh inla,
Sepgim tawl lungkham thuakzou ding'.
Ka lungsim zekai hon huh in,
Na itna thu kiteltak-in;
Ka khe pial-hat Nang kem inla,
Inn lam juan-in Nang hon pii in.
Na thuakzoh dan hon sinsak in,
Nang naih-a om kinken dingin;
Muanna nuam, hatsak, nasem ding',
Khelhna zou dia, Nang hon muangin.
Lametna vak hon tangsak in,
Ka mai lampi za semsem ah;
Muanna Nang kia in Non pia thei,
Heutu, Na kiang hon omsak in.
Khut thilpiakte Nang vualzawl in,
Sep dia lungtupte vualzawl in;
Ginna, tupna, ngaihtuahnate,
Na min phatna'ng hongvualzawl in.
Ka khutsuak uh kou ka chih uh,
Nangmah vualzawlna ngen ahi;
Ngaihtuah theihna, septheihnate,
Nang honpiak hi, ka Pathian uh.
Sem thei jel ding', pia thei jel ding',
Aw Pathian aw, Nang honhuh in;
Ka sepgim gah ua nuam dingin,
Tasam zawte zong ngilh lou ding'.
Lamtawn-in ka Toupa'n honpii,
A min phat un,' min phat un;
A van mana in hon vak hi,
A min siangthou phat un.
Haleluia, hiai ka la hi,
Jesu, Jesu nitum dongin;
La ngaih thupi lua hong sa un,
A min siang phat un.
Ka bah chiang' itna'n hon ding sak,
A min phat un, 'min phat un;
Ka lau chiang' A ban in hon pom,
A min siangthou phat un.
Damsung lungkhamna'n hon lap chiang',
A min phat un, 'min phat un;
Hizong A hon nusia ngeilou,
A min siangthou phat un.
Minthang hen, Toupa' thaunilh,
David Tapa Lianjaw;
Thang hen, a hun chiam hong tung,
Leitung vaihawm kipan;
Zohthawhna zou ding' hong pai,
Saltangte khah ding in;
Tatlekna beisak dingin,
Dika vaihawm dingin.
Leitung a gahsuah dingin,
Vuahtui bang' hong tung ding;
Itna, nopna, lametna,
Leitung ah pakkhia ding;
Mualsang tung pan A mai ah,
Lemna thu tangkou ding;
Mualtung pan phaijang dongin,
Dikna chiktui luang ding.
Kumpipate'n A mai ah,
Kham leh ngun toh bia ding;
Nam khempeuh in bia dinga,
Mikhempeuh in phat ding;
A kiang ah thu-nget, thuchiam,
Niteng kahtou den ding;
A gam lian semsem ding a,
Bei ngei, ngeilou ding hi.
Gal khempeuh tung' vualzou ding,
Mangtutphah tung tu ding;
Tangtawn in lian semsem ding,
Vualzawlna toh nuam ding;
A thukhun kisia theilou,
Hun in paipih thei lou;
A min ei ding' Itna hi,
A min omden ding hi.
Hong in, Kumpi Vanglian,
Na min phat la sa ding;
Hong panpih in;
Pa, thupina a dim,
Vualzou Pathian hong in;
Koute tung vaihawm in,
Tanglai Mi aw!
Nang, mihing a hong suak,
Thu, Na tem toh kivan;
Koute thum ja'n:
Na mite vual hong zawl',
Na Thu lohching sak in;
Siangthouna Kha hong kum',
Koute tung ah!
Hong in, Khamuanpa aw,
Theihpihna siang pia in;
Hiai hun nuam ah!
Nang thil bangkim hihthei,
Michih sung' vaihawm in;
Hon nusia ngei ken aw,
Thilhihthei Kha!
Thum-a Khat thupi in,
Phatna sangpen tang hen;
Tua pan tangtawn',
A kumpi thupina,
Thupi'n koute'n mu n'ung,
Tangtawn, tangtawn dongin,
It n'ung, bia n'ung.

songs.title: Damsung Tuipi Tungah Khelhna Puakgik Toh
songs.author: H L Gilmour

lines: Damsung tuipi tung ah khelhna puakgik toh,
Lungkham a kei ka vaih laitak;
'Kei hong tel in' chi a aw nem ka jak ma'n,
'Longkhawlna nuam' ah ka lutta.
Ka kha a khawlta, long khawlna bitna ah,
Tuipi tunga vai nawn lou;
Tui tung ah huihpi bangteng a nun hangin,
Jesu ah kei ka bitden hi.
It-a hon pom dingin kei ka kipia a,
Upna'n A thu lenkip den hi;
Ka kolbutte kia, ka kha'n tawlngakna mu,
Longkhawlna nuam ka Toupa hi.
Toupa'n kei hondamsak khitchiang' ka kha-in,
Tangthu lui hamphatna la'n sa;
Longkhawlna Nuama inn a deih khempeuhte
Damsak nuam Jesu' tangthu hi.
A it leh nuamsa Johan bang eite zong,
A ang tang thei! ngaihsut chiang' nuam;
Jesu' ang bitna mun khawlna ahi a,
Huihpi'n siatna tun theilou hi.
Hong in, Honpa'n ngaktheitakin honngak hi,
A hatna'n nang hon honkhia ding;
Hong in, na kha khawlsak' Longkhawlna nuam ah,
'Ka itpa keia hi' chiin.

songs.title: Vualjawlna Nak, Nang Hong Nai Aw
songs.author: Robert Robinson

lines: Vualzawlna Nak, Nang hong nai aw,
Phatla sa ding hong lem aw;
Kang ngeilou zahngaihna tuite,
Phatla ngaihpen toh lawm hi;
La ngaih mahmah hong hilh ve leh,
Vanmite'n a sak pen uh;
Phat ning ka lung a tham denna,
Nang non itna tatna Mual.
Hia'h ka Eben-ezer tung ing,
Nong huhna'n hitan kong tung;
Na deihna hangin bittakin
Inn hongtun kilamen hi'ng.
Jesu'n hong zongkhia melmak mi,
Pathian pan ka man laitak';
Lauhuai pan hong honkhia dingin,
A sisan pha'n hong gum hi.
Aw, hehpihna tung' leiba tam
Hi semsem ing nisim in!
Deihsakna'n khainiang bang' ka lung
Vak-hat Nang ah henchip in.
Toupa, ka it Pathian nangawn
Vakmang san hat hi'ng, thei ing;
Hia'h ka lungtang om hi, la in,
Na inn ading' chiamteh in.

songs.title: Tung Thangvan Gam Nuam Ah Tatsate'n Lasa
songs.author: Julia H Johnston

lines: Tung thangvan gam nuam ah tatsate'n la sa,
A mangpen uh maia manglukhu koih-in;
Leitung lungkham, dahna, launa, mohna bei,
Misiangthoute'n kipahna la thak sa uh.
Belamnou phat-in,
Kalvari a ei dia hong si;
Belamnou phat-in,
Tangtawn, tangtawn a hing gige.
A hehpihna la lamdang pen a hong kim,
Amah muanga gingte' di'n gim namtui hi;
Toupa eia dinga si-a thounawnta,
Pathian kiang ah tangtawn in vai i hawm ding.
Belamnou sisana kisawpsiang loungal,
Tua la thak hoih kuama'n sa thei lou ding hi;
Mohna, khelhna apan Toupa'n hon sawp hen,
Tuin nopla thupitakin kipan hen!

songs.title: Aw Pau Sang Tampi'n La Sa Ding
songs.author: Charles Wesley

lines: Aw, pau sang tampi'n la sa ding!
Kei hong Tanpa phatna; (2)
Ka Pathian Kumpi' thupina,
A hehpih vualzohna. (3)
Itsiam ka Heutu leh Pathian,
Na min zahtakhuaina, (2)
Hiai leitung tengteng vannuai ah
Phuangjak ding' honghuh in. (3)
I launa beisak min Jesu!
I dah lungkham hon nem, (2)
Mikhial ading min ngaihnophuai,
Hinna, damna, muanna. (3)
Khelhna kol Aman a sut hi,
A koltang khahkhia hi; (2)
A si'n kihhuaipen siangsak thei,
Tua sisan kei ding' om. (3)
Khebaite aw, nuamin diang un,
Nangongte aw, ja un; (2)
Pau ngeilouten Amah phat un,
Noute Honpa hongpai! (3)
Ka khelh sawpsiang ding,
Ka nit sawpsiang ding;
Kalvari Khros ah,
Jesu kilh-in om;
Angelte'n ensuk,
Lamdang sa uh hi;
Mikhial keia ding',
A kipumpiakna!
Aw itna lamdang,
Aw tatna manpha!
Ka khelh beisak ding',
A man piak thupi;
Hiai thu hoih gen un,
Hotdamna manbei;
Mikhial keia ding',
Itna lamdang hi!
Ka khelhna tengteng, Jesu'n a pua hi;
Ka tatna man kim, A thawnin pia hi;
Ka khelhna teng pua, Kalvari sing ah;
Mikhial keia ding', Itna lamdang hi!
Linglukhu khusak, Amah paipih uh;
Tua ni mulkimhuai, Luguh mun tun uh;
Khua a hong mial zong, Miteng in mu uh;
Mikhial keia ding', A kipumpiakna!
A luang sial uh hi, Josefa' han ah;
Tua kilhlup Toupa, Hondam dia hat hi;
A hinna pia hi, Kei ka hin theihna'ng;
Mikhial keia ding', Itna lamdang hi!
Maijen! Ka Hondampa liam maw?
Ka Kumpipa si maw?
A lu siangthou hong pia nuam maw,
Mikhial keia dingin?
Khros phung ah! Khros phung ah!
Vak ka muh laitak in,
Ka lungsung gitlouh puakgik tuk mang hi;
Tua ah ginna in mitvakna ka mu,
Tu'n sunkhua'n kipakin ka om hi.
Ka khelh thupi luate hang maw,
Amah sing ah a mau?
Hon khasiat hehpihna lamdang!
Hon itna theihzoh louh!
A siamsa mihing khelhman a,
Khrist vanglian sih laiin,
Ni'n zong A thupina sel a,
Khuamial a silh kilawm.
A Khros hongkilat laitakin,
Ka maizum sel kilawm,
Ka lung nuama nehnou kilawm,
Ka khitui luan kilawm.
Khitui luangte'n din zoulou ding,
Itna lei tam ka bat;
Hiaiah, Toupa, kei kong kipia,
Ka hihtheih tawp ahi.
Maijen! Ka Hondampa liam maw?
Ka Kumpipa si maw?
A lu siangthou hong pia nuam maw,
Mikhial keia dingin?
Honpa it aw, hong huh in aw,
Nang gum muanhuai den ding';
Na tutphah tung a na tut chiang',
Kei hon thei gige'n aw.
Ka khelh thupi luate hang maw,
Amah sing ah a mau?
Hon khasiat hehpihna lamdang!
Hon itna theihzoh louh!
A siamsa mihing khelhman a,
Khrist vanglian sih laiin,
Ni'n zong A thupina sel a,
Khuamial a silh kilawm.
A Khros hongkilat laitakin,
Ka maizum sel kilawm,
Ka lung nuama nehnou kilawm,
Ka khitui luan kilawm.
Khitui luangte'n din zoulou ding,
Itna lei tam ka bat;
Hiaiah, Toupa, kei kong kipia,
Ka hihtheih tawp ahi.

songs.title: Ka Toupa Neih Ding Maizum Ke'ng
songs.author: Isaac Watts

lines: Ka Toupa neih ding maizum ke'ng,
Amah gup ding zum ke'ng;
A Thu zahna gup ding zum ke'ng,
A Khros vangletna zong.
Khros phung ah! Khros phung ah!
Vak ka muh laitakin,
Ka lungsung gitlouh puakgik tukmang hi;
Tua ah ginna in mitvakna ka mu,
Tu'n sunkhua'n kipakin ka om hi!
Jesu ka Pathian! min ka thei'
A min kia hi ka muan;
Ka lamet leh laukha muanna,
Vuaksuaksak lou ding hi.
A thuchiam A tutphah bang kip;
Ka sih ni dongin zong'
Amah khut a ka kepsakte,
Bittakin kem thei hi.
Ka min thulimloupi Aman
A Pa maiah gum ding;
Tung van Jerusalem Thak ah
Ka kha mun a guan ding.
Lungkhamna leh mialna khenlam,
Ka kha, dai dide'n en in;
Thuchiam tengteng tungkimta hi.
Hehpihna ni thupi toh;
Jubili nuam, Jubili nuam,
Jing khuavak thupi tang hen.
India mite, Negro mite
Leh namtomte'n en ve ua,
Tua Pathian vualzohna thupi;
Setden ding Kalvari ah;
Tua tangthupha, tua tangthupha,
Kawlmong dong in gingta hen.
Gam lianpipi mial laka tu,
Toupa' hinna vak tan in,
Suahlam pan tumlam gam dongin,
Jing khuavak hon tangsak in;
Tatna manbei, tatna manbei,
A leisa vualzouta hen.
Ni thupi hongnai sem sem in,
A mialna uh hawlmang in;
Tangtawn hinna tangthupha in,
Na min siangthou thangsak hen;
Gamlapi ah, gamlapi ah,
Immanuel' gam khen ah.
Thang in tangthupha vanglianpi,
Vualzou in, tawp ngeikei in;
Tangtawn Na gam a za mahmah,
Khang semsem, lian semsem hen;
Kumpi chiang toh, Kumpi chiang toh,
Honpa, leitung vaihawm in.
A nungta, a nak thei tengteng,
Lungdam thu gena kun hi;
Pa, Tapa, Kha Siangthou phatin,
Hehpihna Pathian phat un:
Halleluia, Halleluia,
Phatna khua vannuai dim hen.
Vanmun thupi a angel-te,
Leitung ah hongkum suk un;
Nou, thilsiam thu la-a sate,
Tu'n Messia pian thu phuang un.
Hong un, bia un; hong un, bia un,
Khrist, Kumpi thak piang bia un!
Belamchingte gamlak ah om,
Janlai' belamte chingin,
Pathian mihing kiang tu'n hongteng,
Tua ah Naungek vakna tang:
Mipilte'n vak dang zon tawp un,
Kilakna vakzaw hongtang!
Namte Deihpen tu'n zong unla,
A pian aksi na muh uh:
Misiangthoute maitam ah kun,
Lau leh lamena ngakin,
Toupa hongkum suk guih dinga,
A tempul sung' kilang ding.
Tangtawn gawt ding khial, kisikte,
Dikna'n mohsakna pai tu'n;
Zahngaihna'n nou honsam hi tu'n,
Tanna kolte sutta un.
Jesu'n vai a hawm hi,
Vanmang' tutphah tung ah;
A lu ah manglukhu, A khe-
Bul ah misiangte toh.
Vang lian in Hondampa,
Kim ah bit-a om-in;
Eite i lung kim ding,
Denchiang in, (3)
Eite i lungkim ding,
Denchiang in. D.S.
Puanngou silh-in ding uh,
Zatam simseng louhte;
Vualzohna lalchiang tawi chiat-in,
Zaila ngaih sa uh hi.
Pathian Belamnou phat,
Amau dia hong sipa;
Belamnou tatna sisan vang',
Manglukhu khu chiat uh.
Honhehpi'n aw Kha Siang,
Na huhna pha hon pia'n;
Vualzou a van misiangte toh,
Ka len theihna ding un.
Mohna toh kidim leitung nuntakna,
Kei lungmuanna kim theilou hi;
Kei kia-a khemnate ka nan laitak',
Toupa kiang lou kei ko'h tai ding?
Kei ko'h tai ding, Aw kei ko'h tai ding?
Ka nuntakna'ng ken ko'h zong ding?
Kei hong honkhia ding Lawm ngai mahmah ing,
Toupa kiang lou kei ko'h tai ding?
Innsak-innkhang siam uh, amau it ing,
Amau toh lungtuakin leng ung;
Hihhang' ka kha'n muanna a lunggulh chiang',
Toupa kiang lou kei ko'h tai ding?
Ka it ka lawmte toh nunnop manpha,
Pathian thu pan' lungmuanna mu'ng;
Hihhang' sihna ken ka tuah dektak chiang',
Toupa kiang lou kei ko'h tai ding?
Jesu thungetna huan ah,
A khut a hensak ua;
Konglak a zumhuai pi'n paipih;
Mohneilou a siangthou pen,
Honpa a chilphih gawp ua,
Moh hi, sing ah that un, chi uh hi.
Leitung hihsia'n, Amah khahkhia ding,
Vantung mi sangsawm samthei napi'n,
Vantung mi sangsawm samthei napi'n,
Nang leh keia dingin hong si hi.
CONDA: Ei ding' hong si.
A manpha A lu tung ah,
Linglukhu a khusak ua,
Zahpi'n, Kumpipa en un, chi;
Hamsiat-in a satgawp ua,
Min siangthou zahpih uh;
Na tengteng Amah kia in thuak hi.
Sing tunga kilhbelh chiang un,
A nu a gei dingh a,
Numei, na ta en in, a chi;
Tui ka duh hi, chi napi'n,
Dawn ding bang pia lou a,
Mohnei mite A thahna thuak hi.
Migiloute tung ki-ap in,
Hehpihna A ngen kei hi;
Zumna sing Amah kia'n thuakta,
Kizoukhin hi, chi'n kikou,
Lu kun in sita hi;
Gupkhiakna nasep a manta.
Hondampa' mel ah chitna kim,
Ngaihhuaina in dim hi;
A lu ah thupina a khu,
A kampau itna'n dim. (2)
Lungdong panpih-bei A hon mu,
Hon panpih ding' hon delh;
Kei dia Khros zumhuai teng pua-in,
Ka dahna teng zong pua. (2)
Ka hinna Amah tung' ka ba,
Ka kipahna teng zong;
Sihna tunga zohna honpia,
Hankhuk pan hon hondam. (2)
A tenna van munnuam lam ah,
Ka khe tawl A tonpih;
Ka Pathian' thupina hon lak,
Ka dahna tengteng zong pua. (2)
A hauhdan bangjelin hon pia,
Hon it hi chih ka chian;
Lungtang sangkhat nei hi lengzong,
Toupa, Nang kon pia ding. (2)

songs.title: La In Hon Sak Sak Nawn Dih Ve
songs.author: P P Bliss

lines: La-in hon saksak nawn dih ve,
Hinna thu lamdangte!
A hoihna tamsem hon musak,
Hinna thu lamdangte!
Hinna, hoihna thute,
Muan leh sep ding hon hilh!
Thu kilawmte! Thu lamdangte!
Hinna thu lamdangte! D.S.
Khrist nuamsa pen in miteng pia,
Hinna thu lamdangte!
Gilou, itna sapna ngai in,
Hinna thu lamdangte!
Manbei vekpi a piak,
Vanlam eite hon zawl!
Gospel sapna aw nem' mual thawn,
Hinna thu lamdangte!
Ngaihdamna, muanna mi teng pia,
Hinna thu lamdangte!
Jesu, Honpa omsun,
Siangthousak tawntung in!
Kha Siang, Nang pitu muanhuai!
Khristian kiang-a nai gige,
Khut-a len in honpi in,
Gamdai a khualzin lai in;
Tawlte kipak gige uh,
Aw nem-a huau a jak un,
'Vakvai, hong in, hong jui in,
Inn tun pha in konpii ding'.
Chikpeuh a om lawm dik pen,
Honpanpih dia nai gige;
Mial lakah hon nusia ken,
Lau leh ging lah a vai in;
Huihpi a lau, lam-et bei
Aw nem penin hon huau in
'Vakvai, hong in, hong jui in,
Inn tun phain konpii ding'.
Sepgim nite bei chiangin,
Tawldamna nuam ngaklai in,
Van leh thumna lel kisam,
Tua lai kou min om muangin
Tuithuk pal, Jesu' sisan
Kia suanga om hong huau in,
'Vakvai hong in, hong jui in,
Inn tun phain konpii ding'.
Manglukhu tam khusak,
Belamnou Kumpipa;
Ngai in, van lapi hong ging hi,
Ging dang tengteng khup hi;
Ka kha, thou in, lasa'n,
Nang dia Sipa phat in;
Amah na Kumpipa Mangpen,
Tangtawn dongin phat in.
Manglukhu tam khusak,
Amah itna Toupa;
A khut, A pang a liamma thuk,
Tunglam pan mu, pahtawi;
Van angel kuamah in,
Liamma entel ngamlou;
Hizong Aman tangtawn thuguk,
Mittui toh honen suk.
Manglukhu tam khusak'
Muanna Toupa Amah;
Sikchiang toh vannuai vaihawm ding,
Hankhuk tungah vualzou;
A vaihawm tawp neilou,
Si-a thounawn Toupa;
Tangtawn hinna pia dingin si,
Sihna a bei theihna'ng.
Manglukhu tam khusak',
Hun leh tangtawn Toupa;
Amah van Mang, hinna Toupa,
Pa toh, Kha toh kikhat;
Kon bia, Toupa, kon phat,
Kei dingin Na sita;
Nang phatna'ng tawp nei ngeilouin,
Tangtawn lian semsem in.
Nang Pathian' Belamnou
Nin banglou, hong huh in;
Na sisan manpha in,
Hon siangsak thei, ka thei,
Aw, puakgik hong dawn in,
Khelhna hong sawpsiang in;
Nangmah dikna hong guan',
Ka lungsung siangsak in.
Ken lam-et dang nei ke'ng,
Paulam dang zong nei ke'ng;
Kei dia hong hing, hong si,
Nangmah keleu loungal;
Non ngaihdamna aw ja'ng,
Kei-a na hi, hon chi;
Nang Khrist kon neih nungsang,
Ken bangmah lau nawn ke'ng.
Nangmah kiang' om den ning,
Thumangin tengden ning;
Hong ching, hong lamkaih in,
Nun sung ni theih kholh louh'.
Deihna dang ken nei ke'ng;
Min dang kuamah muang ke'ng;
Khelhna pan Non damsak,
Nang ah deih teng kim hi.

songs.title: Ka Suangpi Na Hi
songs.author: Mrs C E Breck
songs.key: Doh is Bb (Tehna khat a khuang thum)

lines: Ka Suangpi Na hi, aw Tanpa nuamsa,
Ka Limbelh Na hi, ka bukna ding;
Ka Suangpi Na hi, hon hum, vualzawl ding,
Nangmah ah kei ka bit tawntung ding.
Nang ka suangpi, aw ka Tanpa nuamsa,
Ka lawm Na hi, ka Pipa Na hi
Ka lamet leh ka Hondampa Na hi,
Ka Muan Na hi, Nang ah ka bu ding.
Ka Suangpi Na hi, khelhna'n hong zol chiang',
Ka Suangpi Na hi, ze-etna ah;
Ka Suangpi Na hi, lungkham ka thuak in,
Ka Suangpi Na hi, bang ka lau dia.
Ka Suangpi Na hi, khemna'n hong sual chiang',
Ka lawm Na hi, dang ngeilou leh tak;
Ka kha in a muang Nangmah tung kia ah,
Muanhuai, siangthou-a non kep dingin.
Ka Suangpi Na hi, kumpigam leh nam,
Vaihawmmi leh manglukhu siat chiang';
Ka bitna Suangpi Na hi tawntung ding,
Tangtawn Suangpi, Nang honmuang den ning.

songs.title: La In Sa Ning Tangthu Lamdang
songs.author: F H Rawley

lines: La-in sa ning tangthu lamdang,
Kei tanga hong si Khirst' thu;
A inn nun nuam hon nusia a,
Kalvari a hong sih dan.
La-in sa ning tangthu lam dang,
Kei tanga hong si Khrist' thu;
Tuipi siang geia kikhawm in
Ka mang, hizong Jesu'n hong mu,
Belam vakmang hong mukhia;
A itna ban in hon pom a,
A lampi ah hong zawl kik.
A liamgawp, Jesun hong damsak'
Pukna tampi hanga bah;
Muhna bei, launa toh kidim,
Tua teng pan hon suaktasak.
Mialna niten hon tuam laia,
Lungkhamna lam ka tawn nak;
Hizong Honpa'n hong kem lailai,
A khut in bittak' honpii.
Luipi tui luang gei ka tun dong'
Aman hong kem gige ding;
Bitin gal hong kaipih lai ding,
Tua ah ka itte mu ding.
Ka hinna kon pia, Toupa,
Nang ading' sehtuam hi hen;
Ka hunte, nite kon pia,
Phatna tawplou-in luang hen.
Ka khutte kon pia, Nang ding',
Nang itna'n na semsak hen;
Ka khete kon pia, Nang ding'
Kilawm leh juanjang hi hen.
Ka aw konpia, la sa ning,
Ka Kumpipa kia ading;
Ka muk kon pia, dimsak in,
Nang apan-a thu hoih in.
Ka sum leh paite kon pia,
Paisa san khat zong it ke'ng;
Ka lungsim kon pia, zang in,
A hatna Na deih bang in.
Ka deihtelna Nang kon pia
Keia hi nawn lou ding hi'ng;
Ka lung kon pia, Nanga sa,
Na mangtutphah hi ding hi.
Ka itna kon pia, Toupa,
Na khebul goubawm suah ing;
Ka pumpi'n kon pia, vekpi'n,
Nang'a hi tawntung nuam ing.
Jesu' khebul ah muanna ka mu,
Aw nopna ni, pahna ni;
Amah gin ziakin muanna ka mu,
Ka khelhna a sawpsiangta.
Tangthu kumlui ka gengen ding,
A hehpihna kim manbei;
Hon it ziakin Amah ka pahtawi nuam,
Amah ka phat nuam, phat nuam.
Jesu' khebul ah khawlna ka mu,
Khawlna bukim ka mu hi;
Tua mun ah ka kha in vakna mu,
Ka kha in nuamsa mahmah.
Jesu' khebul ken ka hon juan hi,
Ka khelh mohna kon paipih;
Aman tua ah ka khelhna maisak,
Hotdamna hon peta hi.
Haichi tang ah a kung leh pak,
A om, a hing bangin,
Thutak leh hehpihna Pathian,
A Kha kei ah hing hi.
Khrist kei ah hing hi,(2)
Aw hiai hotdamna lamdang!
Khrist kei ah teng in hing.
Pathian gamlat, khelhna a si,
Ka kha'n vak mu theilou;
Pathian' Thu ah vak ka muta
Tunga nisa zung a kipan,
Lei in gah a suah bang;
Hinna, vak, itna Khrist in pia,
Amah kei ah hing hi.
Ka lunggulh leh ka ngaihtuah pen,
Amah bang a om ding!
Hiai ka ngaihtuah gige hi hen,
Tu'n Khrist kei ah hing hi.

songs.title: Tangthu Hoih Gen Nuam Ka Sa
songs.author: Miss Hankey

lines: Tangthu hoih gen nuam ka sa,
Muh nailouh vantung thu;
Jesu leh a Thupina,
Jesu leh a itna!
Tangthu hoih gen nuam ka sa,
A dik chih ka theih in;
Ka lunggulh hon lungkimsak,
Lungkimna dang omlou.
Tangthu hoih gen nuam ka sa!
Jesu leh a itna thu!
Tangthu kumlui ka thupi,
Kumsawt in gengen ning.
Tangthu hoih gen nuam ka sa,
A lamdang semsem hi,
Lunglen thu khempeuh sangin,
Deihthusam peuh sang in;
Tangthu hoih gen nuam ka sa,
Kei ding' manpha penpen!
Tuabang manpha ahih man',
Tu'n nang ka hon hilh hi.
Tangthu hoih gen nuam ka sa,
Genkik kik a nuam hi;
Gentam peuh leng nuam semsem,
Jaknophuai semsem hi;
Tangthu hoih gen nuam ka sa,
A za ngeilou om lai.
Hotdamna thu hi ka gen,
Pathian' Thu siangthou pan'.
Tangthu hoih gen nuam ka sa,
A theisa tengtengin;
Lunggulhin za nuam semsem,
A za ngeilou mah bang;
Thupina mun ka tun a,
La thak ka sak chiangin,
Tangthu kumlui mah sa ning,
Ka na sak nop tawntung.
Mangpen' sepaih i hi, Sisan a tat i hi;
Toupa Khrist dia galdou dingin, Sepaih in i kipia,
Sih lauhuai ah i leng, Hizong nuam in la sa;
Mangpen' sepaih huaisiam Toupa'n, I lungsim a hihhat.
Mangpen' sepaih i hi,
A phat la i sa ding;
Muanhuai-in A na i sem ding,
Ei Mangpen vanglian hi.
Mangpen' sepaih i hi, A min nuam in i pua;
Khrist Kumpipa a kilhden ua, Khros tunga min om pen;
I kiam punna'n ngai ni, Lungkham dahna'h nuam ni,
Toupa Jesu' min pahtawi na'ng, Mangpen sepaih i hi.
Mangpen' sepaih i hi; A kiangah kilang ni;
Lungkhama dahna i tanna'n, A kiangah thuak le-hang;
Khros ah ma-bang pan leng, Sun sawt kivei lou ding;
Vangletna ni a hong naita, Mangpen' sepaihte'ding'.
Honpa, Chingpa bang honpii in,
Na kepna kiphamoh ung;
Honvak in louhing mun nuam ah,
Kou ding' mun honbawlsak in.
Nuamsa Jesu', nuamsa Jesu,
Non leizou, Nang' a hi ung. D.S.
Nang' a hi ung, honlawmbawl in,
Ka lampi uh Kempa hi'n;
Na ganhon ching in, honhum in,
Ka pialmang un hongzong in.
Nuamsa Jesu, nuamsa Jesu,
Kong thum chiang un hondawng in. D. S.
Koute sang di'n thu Na chiama,
Genthei, khial ka hizong un;
Hon dawnjangna'ng itna Na nei,
Sianna'ng, suahtakna'ng hatna.
Nuamsa Jesu, nuamsa Jesu,
Nang lam hon ngasak pah in. D.S.
Na hon deihsakna zong pah n'ung,
Nangmah deihlam sem pah nu'ng;
Toupa nuamsa, Nang kia Honpa,
Na itna'n hon dimsak in.
Nuamsa Jesu, nuamsa Jesu,
Non itzou, Non it lailai. D.S.
Aw, thupha genjak un, Mihing omna peuh ah;
Mihing' lungsim sung ah, A lungkhamte' kiang ah;
Khristian aw tengteng in, Lungdamna thu phuang hen;
Lungmuanpa hongtungta!
Lungmuanpa hongtungta,(2);
Kha Siangthou, Pa honchiam,
Van apan hongtungta,
Aw, thupha genjak un,
Mihing omna peuh ah;
Lungmuanpa hongtungta!
Jankhua sawt beita a, Jingkhua hongvakta hi;
Huihpi lauhuai thengta, Tuin dai khipkhep hi;
Tung sunni hong suak in, Mualdawn hontat bang in;
Lungmuanpa hongtungta!
Kumpite' Kumpipa'n, Damna kha hongjak hi;
Saltang tengteng ading', Suahtakna hon puak hi;
Saltanna inn sung ah, Vualzohna la ging hi;
Lungmuanpa hong tungta!
Pathian hon itna thuk! Ken bangchin genseng ding?
Lammang vakvaimite, Pathianin hong itna;
Amah kiang tengden a, Amah banga tang ding'!
Lungmuanpa hongtungta!
Lungdam thu thangsuak hen, Thangvan sang thawntou hen;
Tuachiang van misiangten,Lei mite sakpih hen;
Ki-it tawplou zaila, Dai thei ngeilou ding hi;
Lungmuanpa hongtungta!
Jesu, Hondampa honpi'n!
Damsung tuipi lauhuai ah;
Ka ma'h theihlouh tui kihawt,
Suangpi kisel lauhuai tam;
Nang pii lammang om theilou,
Jesu, Hondampa, honpi'n.
Nu in naukap a khem bang',
Toupa, Na kham thei tuilian;
Toupa'n Dai un, na chih chiang',
Tui kihawt in Na thu mang,
Tuipi tung Kumpipa aw!
Jesu, Hondampa, honpi'n.
Chiautui gal kong kai kuan a,
Tuipi lauhuai hong mau leh,
Khawlmun leh kei ki-kal ah;
Tua chiang' Na angsung belin,
Lau ke'n! Ka honpii ding hi!
Na honchih ja hi leng aw.

songs.title: Jordan Luigal A Kikhop Hun Chiang
songs.author: F A Blackmer

lines: Jordan lui gal a i kikhop hun chiang',
Hotdamte vanglian in melmu ni;
Chiaului geia piaunel sim zohlouh bang',
Etchimlouh piandang hi i muh ding!
Chiaului gei a piaunel sim zohlouh bang',(2)
Etnophuai hi ding,
Hotdamte i muh hun chiang',
Chiaului geia piaunel sim zohlouh bang in.
Tang apan hotdamte i muh chiang in,
Lungkham, ze-etna suahtaksante,
Van pahna toh i kituah hun chiang in,
Etchimlouh piandang hi i muh ding!
Chiaului kilawm geia i din hun chiang,
Guabang hinna tullim nunnuam ah;
Kanan gam etlawm lam gal in don ni,
Etchimlouh piandang hi i muh ding!
Ei hon Hondampa i muh hun chiang in,
A thupina chiantak in mu ni;
Kumpi gam tangtawn a vai a hawm chiang',
Etchimlouh piandang hi i muh ding!
Na hehpihna thupha'n,
Ka lungtang khauh nem sak;
Khovel A it manin,
A Ta khat neihsun pia.
'Kuapeuhmah in Amah ging leh
Tangtawn hinna pha mu ding hi'.  (2)
Gullim 'khai' et lel in,
Hinna damna pia thei;
Tua bang Khros a Jesu'n,
En in, hing in, hon chi:
Moh jiaka si mai ding'
Ka tan lauhuai ja ing;
Tangtawn a mangthangsa,
Na hehpihna Thupha'n.
Mihing mohsak ding in,
'Dahnathei Mi' hong lou;
A min vang mihingte'n,
Hinna a neihna ding:
Toupa, ginglah huh in,
Ginna muanna honpia'n;
Na tangthupha'n a gen,
Naupang' muan bang muang ding.

songs.title: Kei Tatsa Ka Hong Hih Theih Na'ng
songs.author: J E Hall

lines: Kei tatsa ka hong hih theihna'ng,
Mulkimhuai Khros tunga A thuak,
Tua zaha Jesu'n hong itna,
Lei-in kilel zoulou!
A hon itna lei in lel mawng, (2)
Tua zaha Jesu'n hon itna,
Lei in kilel zoulou!
Tangtawn a kei ka hin theihna'ng,
Lungkhamna thupi A hong thuak;
Aw, tua linglukhu A hong khuk,
Lei in kilel zoulou!
Pathian maia kei hong ngetsak,
Toupa a muanna ken ka neih,
A sisan pha thilhihtheihna,
Lei in ki lel zoulou!
Amah hongnai chia' lungnopna,
Launa bei khawlna kei hong pia,
Amah a lam-et vak a siang,
Lei in ki lel zoulou!

songs.title: Toupa Ah Kipak In Nuam Un
songs.author: M E Sarvoss

lines: Toupa ah kipak in nuam un,
Nou lungsim dik leh hoih nei teng;
Nou Amah tel pen a nei teng,
Dahna lungkhamna hawlmang un.
Nuam un! nuam un!
Toupa ah kipak in nuam un!   D.S.
Kipak un, Toupa ahih man,
Lei leh vana thupi penpen,
A thu in a bawl, vai a hawm,
Vanglian in hat hi tan ding in.
Thudik gum a galdouna ah,
Na galte a vualzou dek zong;
Pathian sepaih na muhlouhte,
Hondou galte sangin tam zaw.
Sun laiin mialin hontuam zong,
Zanin na tungvan a nim zong,
Bangteng ah na thawmhau kei un;
Lauhuai bei mateng na muang un.
Toupa ah kipakin nuam un,
A pahtawina la in sa un;
Kaihging leh tumging leh aw in,
Halleluia, chiin awi un.
Kipahna tuipi bang in lian,
Aw, Khamuanpa hongtungta;
Tu'n i kiang ah a om gige,
Amah muangte sung ah teng.
Lailung muanna nuam,
Lungsung khawlna nuam,
Ka kha a kitheihna nuam;
Tuipi lauhuai ah Jesu'n honhoupih,
Lauhuai tui kihawt a dai.
Hinna leh kipahna ngen hi,
Zinpa vanglian omna peuh;
Ginlahna leh dahna hawlmang,
A thu man lel a khawlna.
Vana vuahtui hongkia bangin,
Vana nisa hongtang bang';
Tua bang in Kha Siangthou piak hi,
Van apan a hongtung hi.
En in, galsuah ding' a khangta,
Gahna hoih, dikna a gah;
Hinna tui tuin a luangta,
Keuna gamdai ka kha ah.
Aw a lamdang, hiai hotdamna,
Tanpa' mel lungdamhuai muh!
Tenna nuam hi, tenna galmuang,
Tawlngakna nuam, khawlna nuam.
Nang thu hi Toupa, Nang thu hi hen,
A sekpa Na hi, a tung ka hi;
Mek in honbawl in, Na deihlam in,
Daidide a Nang kon ngak laiin.
Nang thu hi Toupa, Nang thu hi hen,
Zong in honchian in, Heutu tuni'n;
Vuk sang' ngou Toupa tu'n hon sil in,
Kiniamkhiak-in Na mai ah kong kun.
Nang thu hi Toupa, Nang thu hi hen,
Liam leh tawl-a om, panpih k'on ngen!
Hatna, hatna teng Nang'a vek hi,
Hon khoih in dam ning, Hondam Pathian.
Nang thu hi Toupa, Nang thu hi hen,
Hon pom in, hon len', hon pumkep in;
Na Kha'n dimsak in zata muh ding',
Amah Khrist kia lel, kei-a ompa.
Ka Pa, ka Pathian, ka inn pan,
Gam vangla albang ka man sung',
'na deihbang hihen!' chi thei ding'
Thu honhilh in.
'na deihbang bang hih in om hen'
'na deihbang hi hen!' chi thei ding',
Thu honhilh in.
Khat kia-in lungkham thuak mahleng,
Lawmte'n hon nuse khin mahleu';
'na deihbang hihen!' ka chi ding,
Thumangtak in.
'na deihbang bang hih-in om hen'
'na deihbang hi hen!' ka chi ding,
Thumangtak in.
Ka lungtang sawlsam nuamsak in,
Na laukha'n ka sung' hong teng in;
'na deihbang hihen!' ka Pathian,
Thildang teng zaw.
'na deihbang bang hih-in om hen'
'na deihbang hi hen!' ka Pathian,
Thildang teng zaw.
Sunchin lungsim Thak hon guanin,
Nang lungsim toh kigawmsak in,
'na thu hi hen!' chih haksatna,
Nang lamang in.
'na deihbang bang hih in om hen!'
'na thu hi hen!' chih haksatna
Nang lamang in.
Leitung ka nuntakna bei chiang' 61
Luankhi toh thumna hongbei chiang',
'na deihbang hi hen!' chi'n sa ning,
Gam nunnuam ah.
'na deihbang bang hihin om hen!'
'na deihbang hi hen!' chi'n sa ning,
Gam nunnuam ah.

songs.title: Honpii Na Peuh Ah Ka Zui Ding
songs.author: W C Martin

lines: Hon piina peuh ah ka jui ding,
Amah muan dan ka theita hi;
Kei-a ding hi, ka theichian hi,
Thah-in a om Kalvari ah.
Sun leh jan Jesu'n honpii ding,
Aman lamtawn in honpii ding;
Amah keiding' Lawm dikpen hi,
Kalvari ka thei gige hi.
A thupiakte ka kipahpih,
A khut a honpii ka ut hi;
A deihlam kei ding a hoih hi,
Kalvari ah siin siangsak.
Lau lou muanglah lou ka pai jel,
Hondampa Khrist naiin ka nuam;
Ni khattei Amah ka mu ding,
Kalvari Jesu hi ka Lawm.
Khrist ka Kumpipa thuchiamte a ding in,
Tangtawnin Amah phatna ging tawntung hen;
Tungnungpen ah thupi hen chi'n la sa ning,
Pathian thuchiamte ah ka ding hi.
Ding in, ding in,
Pathian ka Hondampa thuchiamte a ding in,
Ding in, ding in,
Ka Pathian thuchiamte ah ka ding hi.
A juauthei ngeilou thuchiamte a ding in,
Ginlahna leh launa huih in honmut chiang;
Pathian thu hing zangin kei ka vualzou ding,
Pathian thuchiamte ah ka ding hi.
Thuchiamte a ding in tu'n ken ka mu thei,
Sianna sisan hoih kim kei ding a tua om;
Khrist in a bawl tua suahtakna siksan in,
Pathian thuchiamte ah ka ding hi.
Khrist keimah Toupa thuchiamte a ding in,
Itna khau in Amah toh kei honkan den;
Kha namsau zanga nisima vualzou-in,
Pathian thuchiamte ah ka ding hi.
Thuchiamte a ding kei ka puk theikei ding,
Mitphiatkal tenga Kha sapna aw ngaiin;
Ka bangkima bangkim, Honpa a khawlin,
Pathian thuchiamte ah ka ding hi.

songs.title: Ni Tumna Khen Ah Jingsang Nuam Om
songs.author: Virgil P Broak

lines: Nitumna khen ah jingsang nuam a om,
Hondampa toh om, van kipan hi;
Lei sepgim beita, aw phalvak thupi,
Nitumna khen ah, i na zoh chiang'.
Nitumna khen ah meipi jing nawnlou,
Huihpi nung nawnlou, launa beita;
Kipahna ni hi, tua ni'n tawp neilou;
Nitumna khen ah, tangtawn nopna.
Nitumna khen ah khutin honpii ding,
Ka biak Pa Pathian kiang hontun ding;
Hon ompihna nuam, hon ngaihna paukam,
Ka tan ding ahi, tua luigal ah.
Nitumna khen ah kimuhna nuam om,
I it, i ngaihte, na paisate;
Tua innpi nuam ah kikhen om nawnlou,
Nitumna khen ah, tangtawn dong-in.

songs.title: Ka Damlai Na Ka Zoh Chiang
songs.author: Fanny J Crosby

lines: Ka damlai na ka zoh chiang' buaina chiaukuam gal kai ning,
Jing khovak eng singseng ka mu ding ahi;
Hon Tanpa mel in thei ning, A kiang ka tutkhawl chiangin,
A hehpihna ken zong zouin om sam ning.
Mel in thei ning, mel in thei ning,
Hon Tanpa ma a ka din chiang in;
Mel in thei ning, mel in thei ning,
A khut a sikkilhna mel mu ning.
Tung thangvan mun ka tun chiang ka kha in nunnuam ding hi,
A duang kilawmnou lungdamhuai ka muh chiang';
Hon itna leh hon khasiatna phat in zaila sa ning,
Thangvan a inn hon bawlsakpa A hih jiak.
Aw lungtuak a tua lam a paite'n honsam tungchiang ah,
Sihna luia gibang ka kikhen lai un;
Eden thak inn nunnuam a hon na dawn mahle uh leng,
Hon gum Toupa tuah masak penpen ka ut.
Puan thupipen silh a van khopi nuam ka tun chiangin,
Khitui nul nawnlouhna mun ah honpi dia;
Kumsawt nunnop zaila sa in om ding himah lehang,
Hon gum Toupa tuah masak penpen ka ut.

songs.title: I Thil Hoih Muh Bang Uh
songs.author: Rev Liangkhaia

lines: I thil hoih muh bang uh,
Kuaman a mutheilou;
I Pa gam thil a hi,
Awiloute'n muthei lou;
Honkhen lou ding thil bangmah in,
I Pa' hon itna a kipan.
A sandan tun vuallouh,
A thukdan teh vuallouh;
Hon itna thupi-dan,
A man kua sim vuallouh;
Tung thangvan a Serafte aw,
A thupidan honhilh ve ua.
Lei a man laitak hi,
A nunnopna teng toh;
A thilbawltheihnate,
A thupina teng toh;
Leitung nopna bei pahpah e,
Ka Toupa mah hoih ka sa pen.
Leitung sum-leh-pai leh,
A thupina teng zong;
A pak lunlaite leh,
I muhtheih zousiah teng;
Ka Toupa jaw hoih penpen e,
Linglukhu khusak mahle uh.
Ka damlai ni niteng in kiam,
Niteng hun beina ding nai;
Damlai sunni tang nanungpen,
A bei ding hun ngak lel hi'ng;
Pal lutlai hun sunni tang pan,
Leitung janmial bei ngak hi'ng;
Muikhua jin kuan tung si-alte,
A hong tan hun ngak lel hi'ng.
Buh-attein buhphal nanung,
A minpha a khop ngak hi'ng;
Pallai nite pakbang vul a,
Pallai ni lenkil kia ding;
Ka lungsung hun buhbang minte,
Buh-atte aw khawm meng un;
Pallai hunte pakbang vul a,
Inn juana pai ding hita'ng.
Angelte in minthang kongkhak,
Hon honhun ding uh ngak in;
Tawl, gilkial, Vuaktang leh bah in,
Kongkhak bul ah na ngak hi'ng;
A tongluang uh leh kalsuan ging,
Gamlapi pan ken za ing;
Malbang kouhna aw ngak lel hi'ng,
Tua zui ding in manta hi'ng.
Tenna gam nuam ka muh ngeilouh,
A tangpha zaw ken ngak hi'ng;
Tua ah hinna sing pallun a,
Sing leh loute hing den hi;
Hotdamna bukim na ngak ing,
Hontanpa'n honpiak hun ding;
Khelh vang-a nat lungkhamnate,
Om nawnlou ding tua mun ah.
Jesu kei ding' bangkim ahi,
Hinna nopna, bangkim;
Niteng in ka hatna ahi,
Amah louin puk ning;
Dah laiin Amah kiang ka juan,
Honnuamsak thei kuadang omlou;
Ka dah chiang in honkipaksak,
Ka Lawm hi.
Jesu kei ding' bangkim ahi,
Lungkhamna ah ka Lawm;
Honvualzawl ding'Amah ka juan,
Aman honpia, honpia;
Nisa leh vuahtui bang honpia,
Buhlak ding hoih A honpia hi;
Nisa leh vuah buhlak ding bang,
Ka Lawm hi.
Jesu kei ding' bangkim ahi,
Muanhuai ning Amah ding';
Tuabang Lawm ka nial thei ding hiam,
Kei ding' tuabang gin-om;
Amah jui-in ka dik thei ing,
Aman sun leh jan in honching;
Sun leh jan Amah ka zuih leh,
Ka Lawm hi.
Jesu kei ding' bangkim ahi,
Kul ke'ng lawm hoihzaw dang;
Ka muang, Amah ka muangden ding,
Ka sihni tanpha in;
Tuabang Lawm toh hinkhua etlawm,
Atawp ngeilou hinkhua etlawm;
Tangtawn hinna, tangtawn nopna,
Ka Lawm hi.

songs.title: Hon Pel Ken Hondampa Nun Nem
songs.author: Fanny J Crosby

lines: Honpel ken Hondampa nunnem,
Ka thum honja in;
Nang midangte na veh ngalin,
Kei honpel ken aw.
Honpa, Honpa, ka thum honja in,
Nang midangte na veh ngal in,
Kei honpel ken aw.
Na itna tutphah apan in,
Lungnopna honpia'n;
Kisik tua a ka khukdin lai',
Ka ginlah panpi'n.
Na hoihna kia a kinga in,
Na mel ka zong ding;
Ka lungkham leh liam hihdam in,
Na hehpihna in.
Nang ka muanna teng Nak na hi,
Hinna pen Na hi;
Nang lou lei ah kuadang ka nei,
Van ah Nang loungal?
Kon itsem nuam, Khrist aw,
Kon itsem nuam!
Khukdin a kong thumna,
Nang honja in;
Hiai konnget pen ahi;
Kon itsem nuam, Khrist aw,
Kon itsem nuam. (2)
Lei lungnop, muan leh khawl,
Ka zon lai om;
Khukdin a kong thumna,
Honpia'n hoihpen;
Kon nget teng hiai hi ding;
Kon itsem nuam, Khrist aw,
Kon itsem nuam. (2)
Dahna hongtung hen aw,
Lungkham, nat zong,
Na sawlte manpha e,
A la uh ngaih;
Hiai honsakpih chiang un!
Kon itsem nuam, Khrist aw,
Kon itsem nuam. (2)
Ka nak tawpna pen-in
Nang phat lai ding;
Hiai khenna aw hiding,
Ka lungsung pan;
Hiai a nget hilai ding:
Kon itsem nuam Khrist aw,
Kon itsem nuam. (2)
Hichi maimah hi'ng suan ding bei,
Hizong kei ding' Na sisan pawt;
Nang kei na kiang ah non sam a,
Pathian' Belamnou aw, kon juan!
Hichi maimah, ka khelh nitna,
Khat zong paihmang ding ngak lou in,
Nitna teng sisan a sawp thei,
Pathian' Belamnou aw, kon juan!
Hichi maimah, lungbuai, muanglah,
Sung leh pua ah kisual leh lau,
Hibang teng toh kidim mahleng,
Pathian' Belamnou aw, kon juan!
Hichi maimah hi'ng, jawng, mitdel,
Lungsim damna, hauhna, muhna,
Hi, ka deih teng Nang ah mu ding;
Pathian' Belamnou aw, kon juan!
Hichi maimah hi'ng, honpom in,
Honpak, ngaidam, siangsak, panpi'n;
Na thuchiamte ka gin ziakin,
Pathian' Belamnou aw, kon juan!
Hichi mai hi'ng, phawklouh itna'n
Dalna teng hihgawp vekta hi;
Tu'n Nang'a hi ding, Nang a kia;
Pathian Belamnou aw, kon juan!

songs.title: Banghang Ka Kha Lungkham Ding Hiam?
songs.author: J H Sammis

lines: Banghang ka kha lungkham ding hiam?
Leitung hauhna zoujai;
Pathian' Tapa Khrist' a hivek,
Amah lah kei lawm hi.
Ahi, kei Lawm ahi,
A neih tengteng kei hong koppih;
Na tengteng Khrist'a,
Banghang kei lungkham ding?
Jesu kei lawm ahih man in.
Tunga khapi leh tunga ni
Leh aksi tengteng zong;
Amah kia-a hi, avekpi'n,
Amah lah kei lawm hi.
Aman nitengin ankuang lui,
Amah ankuang ah tai'
Mihing leh thilsiam, ganhing teng,
Amah lah kei lawm hi.
Thupina toh A hongpai chiang,
Vualzoute ma kaih chiang',
Amah ka lawm hi ka chi ding,
Thupi mahmah ding hi.
Hun tengin kon ngai hi,
Itsiam Toupa;
Nang aw bang aw om lou,
Muanna pia thei.
Kon ngai hi, Nang kon ngai hi,
Hunteng in kon ngai hi;
Honpa, tu'n honvualzawl in,
Nang kon juan hi.
Hun tengin kon ngai hi,
Kiang nai om in;
Khemnate'n hat mansuah,
Nong nai om chiang'.
Hun tengin kon ngai hi,
Nop hiam nat in;
Hongmeng', hong ompih in,
Nang lou hinthawn.
Hun tengin kon ngai hi,
Nang deih honhilh;
Na thuchiam hausate
Kei ah tangtun'.
Hun tengin kon ngai hi,
A Siangthou pen;
Nang'a ngei honbawl in,
Nuamsa Tapa.
Laillung muanna ka neih,
Leitung in pia ngeilou;
Muanna ka neih lamang thei lou,
Hinsung haksatnate'n,
Lummei bang hontuam zong,
Muanna ka neih lungsung tengden ding.
Lungsung-a teng gige,
Jesu kei-a;
Lungsung-ateng gige,
Van kipahna;
Khattang honnuse ngeilou,
Tongdam in honhuau;
'Kon nusia ngeilou ding'
Jesu kei-a.
Muanna ka muh lai-in,
Hondampa leh Kumpi;
Leitung teng in phat di'n mu'ng e;
Buaina teng mangta hi,
Jan khomial sun hongsuak;
Nuamsa Jesu, Na vang lian e, lian.
Hiai gou manpha ka kem,
Lei-a bawl sapum ah;
Hiai leitung' ka vakvaih laiin,
Ni thupi ah keimah;
Hongla di'n hongpai ding;
Tunglam-a ka van innpi nuam ah.
Ka Hondampa nungjui-in,
Hiai la ka sa ding:
A min thupipen hen aw;
Hehpih ziakin hongzong,
A sisan-in hongleita,
A min thupipen hen aw.
Halleluia, tangtawn Toupa,
Thupipen hen aw,
Ka tangtawn la ngaih ahi;
Ka hondampa, aw hon Itpa,
Mikhial Tanpa thupipen hen aw;
A hinna kei dia phal in,
Ka hotdamna'ng hongsi;
A min thupipen hen aw.
Khimjing nua'h leh ka bah chiang',
A honching gige,
A min thupipen hen aw;
Launa, hatlouhna ah,
Aman honkhamuan ding hi;
A min thupipen hen aw.
Ka kiang a om in honveng,
Honkhamuan ding hi;
A min thupipen hen aw;
Jordan lui honpiikai ding,
Van ah hontun ding hi:
A min thupipen hen aw.
Aw Itna, kei honkhah lou ding,
Ka kha gim nang ah ka khawl sak;
Hinna konbat konkik nawnta,
Nang ah tuipi sang a thukzaw'n,
Hoihzaw'n, kimzaw'n om hen.
Aw Vak, nang ka lampi hontan
Ka meisel mit dekdek konpia;
Vakna konkhelh konkik nawnta,
Na vak ah ni bang tang-in,
Vakzaw, tangzaw hi hen.
Aw Pathian, haksapi-a hong zong,
Ka lungsim kon pialou theikei;
Vuah lak sakhituihup ka mu,
Thuchiam juau ngeilou hi, ka thei,
Tua jing khitui bei ding.
Aw Khros, ka lutang hondomkang,
Nang apan vakmang ngam kei ing;
Damsung thupina ka ngakhia,
Tua pan in pak banga hing in,
Si nawnlou ding' thou ning.
Vakna nunnem, khomial in hon kimvel,
Nang honkai in!
Khua mial lua e, inn apan gamla ing,
Nang hon kai in!
Ka khe kem in, gam vangla muh ngen ke'ng,
Kei ading in kalkhat a hun zou hi.
Tua bang nuam in chikma'n ka thum ngei kei,
Honkai in chi'n!
Ken zaw ka deih ka tel nuam nak, tu'n zaw
Nang honkai in!
Mi' pahtak ut hing, launa tam zonga,
Kisathei hing, hun paisa ngilhta in.
Na thahatna'n hon na kem tawntung a,
Honkai lai ding!
Lamsuk, tou leh kawl leh kensia lak ah,
Jan bei dong in;
Huan jing khovak leh angel nuihmaite,
It leh ngaih khensate toh ke'n mu ding.
Toupa, Pentikost ni bang-in,
Thilhihtheihna'n hong in;
Tua halsiangthouna meikuang-in,
Ka tung uah hongtung in.
Toupa, honpia'n hatna,
Na Pentikost hatna;
Na van kong honhong in,
Vualzawlna honbua in;
Toupa honpia'n hatna,
Na Pentikost hatna,
Khialte pianthakna ding leh
Na min thupina ding'.
Michih hatna honpia'n Toupa,
Na na sep theihna ding';
Hong in Na mite huai inla,
Hon nuse ngeingei ken.
Na na sem dia hon ngakte kiang'
Hong in, khelhna siangsak';
Phatuamngai leh upna lian-in,
Hondimsak chiat in aw.
Na mangtutphah mai ah ngak ung
Na thuchiamte muang ung;
Na vualjawlna N'on piak mateng,
Thum in kon ngak ding uh.
'Vualzawlna vuah hongzu ding hi:'
Hiai itna thuchiam ahi;
Halhthak hunte hongtung ding hi,
Hondampa a kipan in.
Vualzawlna vuahpi,
Vualzawlna vuahpi ngai ung;
Ka kim uah zahngaih vuahmal phin,
A zuk-in honzusak in.
'Vualzawlna vuah hongzu ding hi:'
Tua halhthak kikna manpha;
Guam teng leh mual chih apan in ,
Vuah tampi hongging kiza.
'Vualzawlna vuah hongzu ding hi:'
Toupa kou tung' zusak in;
Tuin halhna honpia inla,
Na thu tu'n hihlianta in.
'Vualzawlna vuah hongzu ding hi:'
Tuni'n zupah maileh aw;
Pathian kiang ka kiphuan lai un,
Jesu min ka kouh lai un.
'Vualzawlna vuah hongzu ding hi':
Pa' thu jui in muang peuh le'ng;
Halhthakhunte hongtung ding hi,
Pathian vaihawmsak peuh le'ng.
Mihing bang atel hiam ! Thianmang?
Na Ta thangvan nusia Non sawl;
Na itna thuk! Na itna sang, Thianmang!
Mihing pilna lung-in gel maw'ng.
Gel maw'ng e, gel maw'ng e, gel maw'ng.
Mihing leh Na itna simthu;
Mihing pilna lung in gel maw'ng, Thianmang,
Laukha'n lailung ah hon gel hen.
Mihing bang atel hiam ! Toupa?
Vanmang tutphah nusia nong tat;
Na lainatna lian in ja e, Toupa,
Simlei singta' lung in gel moh.
Mihing bang atel hiam ! Thianmang?
Kum sang zatam na lunggimna;
A gawl han, a lei khemna hilou hiam?
Naubang Na dopna kansang sa'ng!
Mihing bang atel hiam ! Thianmang?
Van gou luah dia ngaihkhua Na tuah;
Itna sang hi! Gupna sang hi! Thianmang!
Mihing simthu zaila'n lel moh.

songs.title: Tuni In Tua Gam Nuam Om
songs.author: E E Hewitt

lines: Tuni in tua gam nuam omdan ken ka ngaihtuah,
Tung sunni tumchiang ka tunna ding;
Hehpih vang-a Hondampa kiang-a ka din chiang',
Ka manglukhu aksi'n a jem diam?
Pahtawina aksi'n ka manglukhu a jem diam?
Ka damsung nite hong bei chiang-in;
Khawlna inn nunnuama ka khanlawh hun chiang-in;
Ka manglukhu aksi'n a jem diam?
Toupa' hatna muang-in ken thum in na sem ning,
Kha mangthangte man ding' ken sem ning;
A phatna tuipi luang ging bang a than chiang-a,
Tua aksi tangte ka ngah theihna'ng.
A mel lungdamhuai ka muh chiang' nuam mahmah ding,
A khebul suangmanpha ka ngak chiang';
Tua kham khuapi ah ka nopna lian semsem ding,
Ka manglukhu aksi in jem leh.

songs.title: Tuipi Sisan A Luang Ka Mu
songs.author: Mrs Phoebe Palmer

lines: Tuipi sisan-a luang ka mu,
Tuipi khuk thuk ja hi;
Tou Jesu hondam dia hat in,
A pang-a liam honhilh.
Sianna lui luang ka mu, ka mu,
Ka bual a, aw honsilsiang hi;
Ka Toupa phat-in om hen aw,
Honsilsiang hi, he, silsiang hi.
Tu'n thilsiam thak-in ka thouta,
Tua sisan gen ka ja;
Mihinglui nin-pen sita hi,
Tua sisan ah tummang.
Khawvel leh khelhna tunglam ah,
Van vak-a lengta ding;
Lungsim sung ah Khrist Kumpi hi'n
Puansilh ngou tawh leng ding.
Jesu, Jesu, khros-a si kia
Leh sisan hontat theih;
Aw, hehpihna lamdang lua hi,
Lei ah van ka nei hi.

songs.title: Khrist In Ka Lungsim Dahthei Ngen
songs.author: H R Palmer

lines: Khrist in ka lungsim dahthei ngen,
Ka lutsak ding hiam?
Lungsung-a teng ding ngak-in ngen,
Aw! ka lutsak ding hiam?
Ka lungsim khelhna'n a dim a,
Kisathei, nopna bei-in mial;
Khrist in lungsung honsak ding' hon ngen;
Aw! ka lutsak ding hiam?
Kipahna thupha ka pia diam,
Ka lutsak ding hiam?
Itsiam Toupa nuailut-a pom,
Aw! ka lutsak ding hiam?
Itna tawp neilou hon pia thei,
Ka lungtang hel ngaidam thei hi;
Hizong Amah ka sawlmang ding hiam,
Ka lutsak zaw ding hiam?
Hongta ning, lungsim kisathei,
Aw! lutsakta ning!
Amah kipahpih gige dia,
Aw ka lutsakta ding!
Honpa, kei hon ompih gige'n,
Lungkham leh dahna jang tuam ding;
Nang tawh om leng tangtawn-in ka bit,
Aw Toupa, hong lut in!
Honpia'n Hinna Tanghou, Toupa it aw,
Tuipi geia tampi Na hawm bangin;
Na laibu khen lam ah konzong, Toupa;
Ka kha in Nang honngai, Hinna Thu aw.
Vualzawl in, tua Thutak kei ding' Toupa,
Galili tui kianga tanghou bangin;
Huan, tanna a bei dia, henna tat ding,
Huan, muanna neita ning, ka thupipen.
Hinna tanghou Na hi, kei ding' Toupa,
Na Thutak siangthou in kei honhongkhia;
Neka hin ka ut hi, van ah Nang kiang',
Thutak it honsinsak', Itna Na hi.
Na Kha hon sawl, Toupa, tu'n ka kiang ah,
Ka mit hon khoihsak hen, muhtheih ka ut,
Thutak sel honlak in, Na Thu sung ah,
Na Laibu sung kilak kon mu, Toupa.
Gamlapi mual tung ah mellawm lou khros a om,
Thuakna leh zumhuaina genna hi;
Tua khros ken ka it hi, gilou, mangmite dia,
Deihpen leh itpen thah-a omna.
Mellawm lou khros ken ka lunggulh ding,
Ka gallakte ka ngak matan-in!
Mellawm lou khros ken ka lenlen ding,
Ni khattei manglukhu khenna ning.
Leitung in a simmawh, tua mellawm lou khros-in,
Kei di'n hipna lamdang a nei hi;
Belamnou in tua khros Kalvari tan pua dia,
Vanmun thupi A nutsiat vang-in.
Pathian' sisan banna, tua mellawm lou khros ah,
Kilawmna lamdang ken ka mu hi;
Ngaidam ding leh siangsak dia mellawm lou khros a,
Jesu'n thuaka a sihtak vangin.
Tua mellawm lou khros di'n ka muanhuai gige ding,
Zumna, engbawlna nuamin thuak ning;
Ni khattei hon sam ding, tua ka inn vangla ah,
A thupina koppih tawntung ning.
Tanglai Lumsuang kei dia khi'n,
Na limnuai honbelsak in;
Na pang-a liamma pan a,
Sisan leh tui luangkhia in,
Khelhna thangpaihna pan in,
Damsak in hon siangsak hen.
Khut-a ka nasepte in,
Na dan thu jui thei ngeilou;
Phatuamngaihna lianpen leh
Ka khitui luang tam in zong,
Ka khelhna siangsak theilou,
Nang kia in non hondam thei.
Khut vuak hi'ng suan ding neilou,
Na khros kia muang-in ka len,
Vuaktang hi'ng, honsilhsak in,
Huh-bei, Na hehpihna ngen;
Mi-nin in tuinak kon juan,
Non sil kei leh si ding hi'ng.
Hiai lei-a ka hin sung-in,
Ka sihni hongtun chiangin,
Theihlouh gam kong tun chiang-in,
Thukhen-a tu honmuh chiang';
Tanglai Lumsuang kei dia khi'n,
Na limnuai honbelsak in.
Jesu! Mikhialte' Lawm lamdang!
Jesu! Ka laukha Itpa;
Melma'n dou, lawmte'n honma zong,
Honpa'n kei a hondamsak.
Haleluia! Tanpa lamdang!
Haleluia! Lawm lamdang!
Hongtan, honghuh, hongkem, hon it,
A tawp pha'n hon ompih ding.
Jesu! Hatlou' Hatna lamdang!
Amah ah ka kibu ding;
Kei khem leh ze-et-a lawhsam,
Amah kei ding' vualzou hi.
Jesu! Dah lai' Muanna lamdang!
Lungkham tuipi hong let lai';
Lungjin tawpkhawk ka kinepna,
Amah kei hon huhpa hi.
Jesu! Piipa! Kempa lamdang!
Hinsung huihpi honghat chiang';
Jan mial-a om chiang' ka sam a,
Amah ka Piipa'n honja.
Jesu! tu'n Amah ka neita,
Amah ah deih kim ka mu;
Hon ngaidamta, Amah-a hi'ng;
Amah zong keia hita.
Jesu migi, hong paukhia in,
Nang gen louh hoih dang omlou;
Lungmuanna'n Na thu a dim a,
Honhilh, kou honhihhat hi;
Leitung aw ngaihpen-pente leng,
Hoihlouhna ngen ahi jaw;
Nang' aw nem deihhuai pen gin in,
Dai-in a pau thei kei uh.
Jesu, thupi penpen hong hi'n,
Na hatdan kitheisak in;
Lei in Nang hondou theilou ding,
Gehen in panpih mahleh;
Na' min zahtakhuai na lawm lawm,
Melma tengteng sim, gel zou,
Leitung in honlau mahmah hi,
Nang na hongkuan hial aleh.
Khawvel tanvak, ka Toupa uh,
Hiai inn ah hongteng inla;
Hiai maitam ah kong kipia uh,
Hon na kipahpi'n Toupa;
Na Laukha Siangthou vak thupi,
Na hehpihna thu manpha,
Huihpi bang kon mulou zong un;
Jing daikia bang in hongvuk in.
Hiai Biakbuk Nang'a ahita,
Hondawngpa honghi gige'n;
Kon pawl theihna'ng un honpi'n la,
Thum dan honsinsakta in;
Na' aw nem-in thu honhilh in,
Mikhial lungheina'n pang hen;
Toupa, Na min thupina ding',
Na Saptuamte hongjun jel in.
Pathian hing' Kha, ka tung ah,
Hong tungthak aw;
Pathian hing' Kha, ka tung ah,
Hong tungthak aw,
Tamsak'! Tuisak'! Velthak'! Dimsak'!
Pathian hing' Kha, ka tung ah,
Hong tungthak aw.
Lamet dang bangmah ka neilou,
Jesu' sisan leh dikna lou;
A hoihpen zong ka muang ngamlou,
Jesu' min kia ken ka muang hi.
Khrist' Suangpi kip tung ah ka ding,
Mun dang piaunel tum theihna hi;
Mun dang piaunel tum theihna hi.
Khuamial in A mai liah lai zong,
A hehpihna ah ka khawlta;
Huihpi hat leh lauhuai nuai ah,
Ka sikkip in Amah len hi.
A kichiamna, Thukhun, Sisan,
Tui lian laka kei honpanpih,
Ka kha lungkia-a om lai-in,
Amah ka muan leh tenna hi.
Pengkul ging tawh A hongpai chiang',
Amah-a om-in honmu leh;
Ama' dikna kia-a thuam-in,
Mangtutphah mai dembei ding ning.
Lametna hoih ka neih dan,
Jesu' hon it man hi!
Pathian' hinna ka luah hi;
Jesu' hon it man hi!
Aman ka kha hu ding,
Lawm dang tuan theilou hi;
Aman honkem tawntung ding,
Jesu mah thupi-pen hen!
Laulou-in la ka sa thei,
Jesu' min mah phat un!
Amah honpanpihna nai,
Jesu' min mah phat un!
Ka zinna-a pai zel-in,
Jesu kia mah muang-in!
Niteng ka kipahna hi,
Jesu kia mah muang-in!
Mainawt in ka pai jel ding,
Jesu kia mah en-in!
Khawlna gam ka tun mateng,
Jesu kianga teng ding !
Nang kon naihsem nuam hi,
Ka Pathian aw;
Kei a hong phongtou pen,
Khros hi zong leh;
Hiai ka la hilai ding;
Nang kon naihsem nuam hi,
Nang kon naihsem nuam hi,
Ka Pathian aw.
Vakvai bang vai zongleng,
Ni hongtum zong;
Khuamial in hontuam-a,
Suang ka khap hang';
Ka manglam nangawn in,
Nang kon naihsem nuam hi;
Nang kon naihsem nuam hi,
Ka Pathian aw.
Tua ah thangvan lampi,
Hong kilang hen;
Ka kiang nonsawl khempeuh,
Hehpih-a piak;
Angelte'n honvaan ding,
Nang kon naihsem nuam hi,
Nang kon naihsem nuam hi,
Ka Pathian aw.
Huan, ka honghalh chiangin,
Nang phat nuam ding;
Lungkhamna thukpen pan
Bethel din ning;
Bangteng ka thuak zong-in,
Nang kon naihsem nuam hi,
Nang kon naihsem nuam hi,
Ka Pathian aw.
Kipahna kha jak-in,
Thangvan sang ah;
Ni, kha, aksi kheng-in,
Tunglam leng ning;
Hiai ka la hilai ding,
Nang kon naihsem nuam hi,
Nang kon naihsem nuam hi,
Ka Pathian aw.
Jesu hoihpenpen,
Thilsiam teng Vaihawm-pa
Pathian' Ta leh Mihing' Tapa!
Nang kon lunggulh ding,
Nang kon pahtawi ding,
Nang ka kha pahna, thupina.
Loupa gam hoih e,
Sing hing gamte hoih e,
Nipi-a nah a suan lai-un;
Jesu hoih tungnung, Jesu siang tungnung,
Aman lungsim dah la sasak.
Nisa zong hoih e,
Tung khapi tang hoih e,
Aksi tang zoujaite zong hoih;
Jesu tangpha zaw, Jesu siangthou zaw,
Tungvan angelte sang' tungnung.
A kilawm Honpa!
Namte' Toupa ahi!
Pathian' Ta leh Mihing' Tapa!
Thupina, zahna Leh pahtawinate
Tu leh khantawn' Nang-a hi hen.
Jesu' khros honnaihsak in,
Tuikhuk manpha omna';
Zata ding damna tui luang,
Kalvari mual apan.
Tua khros ah, tua khros ah,
Ka thupina om hen;
Tua luigal-a khawlna-a,
Ka kha a tun mateng.
Khros kiang' ka kha ling-a om,
Hehpih-itna'n hongmu;
Tua ah Jingsol Aksi in,
Ka kim a hontanvak.
Khros kiang' ah! Aw Belamnou,
Kei honmusak inla;
Nisim kei honkai jel in,
Tua khros lim honliahsak'.
Khros kiang;' ka ngakngak dinga,
Lam-en leh muang gige'n;
Kham luipiau ka tun mateng,
Tua luigal nai-a om.

songs.title: A Thu Vak A Pai In
songs.author: John H Sammis

lines: A Thu vak-a pai-in,
Toupa toh ton lehang,
I lampi thupina'n hong tangsak;
A deihlam i bawl chiang',
I kiang ah teng gige;
Amah muang, A thumangte kiang ah.
Muang in, mang in;
Jesu-a pahna ding,
Lampi dang omlou hial hi,
Muan leh thuman louhngal.
Puakgik i puakte zong,
Dahna i tante zong,
I sepgim zong honditlouh omlou;
Lungkhamna manna zong,
Maigum leh khros gik puak,
Muang-in A thumang leng vualzawhna.
A nasep kipahna,
I theichian ngeilou ding,
I bangkim maitam-a i piak ma'n;
Deihsakna A piakte,
Kipahna A piakte,
Muang-a A thumangte ading hi.
Kithuahna nuamtak-in,
A khebul ah tu ni;
Amah tawh ton-in lampai nihang;
A gen peuh i sem dia,
Honsawlna' i kuan dia,
Lau louin muang in A thu mang ni.
Khelhna thuk ah ka na mangta,
Hizong Toupa Khrist in honhuai;
Ka kha'n siatna lampi a tawn,
Huan, Khrist hongpai, ka puakgik pua.
Dikna'n vaihawm,
Zahngaihna'n a dawng;
Jesu'n ka sapna ja hi;
Tua' kum sangsawm omthei mahleng,
Itna ziak kia'n ka omthei ding;
Dikna'n vaihawm,
Zahngaihna'n a dawng.
Khrist kei dingin khros ah si hi,
Khelhna pan ka suahtak theihna'n;
Khelh vanga ka leibat zatam,
Khrist in pia hi, Amah phat un.
Tunglam inn nuam ka tun chiangin,
Itna ziak kia'n ka omthei ding;
Ka hin theihna'n Khrist kipumpiak,
Tangtawn hinna kei honpia hi.

songs.title: Ki Theihchianna Nuam Jesu Kei A
songs.author: Fanny J Crosby

lines: Kitheihchianna nuam, Jesu kei-a!
Aw, Pathian' thupina i chiam panta!
Hotdamna gouluah, Pathian leisa,
A Kha-a piansak, A si-a sil.
Hiai ahi ka thu, hiai hi ka la,
Sunnitum-a ka Hondampa phat;
Hiai ahi ka thu, hiai hi ka la,
Sunnitum-a ka Hondampa phat.
Kipumpiakna kim, kipahna kim,
Tangtawn-a nopna kim mel-in mu hang;
Angelte'n honpuak tunglam apan,
A chitna mual thawn, Itna thuhuau.
Kipumpiakna kim, tawldamna kim,
Ka Hondampa ah nuamsa, hampha hi'ng;
Tungchiang maimit suan, haibang ngak-in,
A hoihna leh A itna a dim.

songs.title: Leitung Om Main Thu A Om A
songs.author: Edwin Roland

lines: Leitung om ma-in Thu a om a,
Pa Pathian kiang tangtawn-a om ahi;
Bangkim avekpi'n Amah siam hi,
A siamlouh omlou hi leitung ah.
Hiai thu ah hiai pen kipahpih hang,
Tua Thu mah mihing-in a hongpiang;
A thupina mupa in hon gelh,
Hehpihna leh Thutak-in a dim.
Bangdang hi kei e, hiai 'Thu' i chih,
Toupa Jesu Khrist Amahngei ahi;
Mi lungsim Thu-a hongsuak bang-in,
Pathian' lungsim-a suak Khrist ahi.
Pathian' zawlneite'n thu a gen uh,
Van angelte'n zong a hon gen uhi;
Pak ve ni aw, A honsawl nanung,
Pathian, Mihing Ama' Tapa ngei.
Thangvan sunni tang in ka lam hontan,
Guam leh mual tawna ka zinna ah;
Jesu'n honchiam: 'Kon nusia ngeilou ding,'
Tua Pathian thuchiam juau ngeilou hi.
Thangvan sunni tang, thangvan sunni tang,
Pathian thupina'n ka kha dim hi;
Haleluia, kipahna'n ka dim,
A phat la ka sa: Jesu kei-a.
Ka paina kimvel mial in hontuam zong,
Ka Honpa leh Pii-pa liah ngeilou;
Amah Vak ahi, mialna a omlou,
Amah tawh ka ton, ka lamtawn-in.
Thangvan inn juan-in niteng-in ka pai,
Ka lamtawn-in A phat la ka sa;
A vak in hontan, kipak-in ka pai,
Sunni tanga pai itna ni tang.

songs.title: Jesu Kia In Khros Pua Ding Hiam?
songs.author: Thomas Shepherd Altered

lines: Jesu kia in khros pua ding hiam,
Midangte awl ding hiam?
Michih ading in khros om chiat,
Kei ding in leng khros om.
Thangvan misiangthou nuamsate,
Lei puakgik zoute hi;
Itna siang leh pahna zou uh,
Khitui nul nawnlou uh.
Ken zong ka khros pua-in jui ning,
Ka sihni tanpha-in;
Van ah manglukhu khuta ning,
Kei di'n koihkholh in om.
Khros manpha! Manglukhu thupi!
Aw thawhnawnna lamdang!
Bangkim A khebul ah nga-in,
A min hoih gengen ning.
Mang, mang in lei nopna,
Jesu kei' a! Beita in kizopna,
Jesu kei' a!
Gamdai khuamial lua hi,
Lei in khawlmun neilou;
Jesu kia in nuamsak,
Jesu kei' a!
Ka kha khemkhia lou aw,
Jesu kei' a! Hia'h om gigeta leng,
Jesu kei' a!
Lei-a bawl mangthei lel,
Ni khat lel dam dia piang,
Ka lungsim paisan un!
Jesu kei' a!
Mangpha, ihmut mangte,
Jesu kei' a! Jingkhua vak chiang-in bei,
Jesu kei' a!
Ka kha'n a tup tengteng,
Lungkhamna kia suahlel;
Jesu'n nuamsak khinta,
Jesu kei' a!
Mangpha, sihna, mangpha,
Jesu kei' a! Tangtawn aw, ka hon pak,
Jesu kei' a!
Konpak, aw it leh ngaih,
Konpak, khawlna munnuam,
Konpak, Hondampa' ang,
Jesu kei'a!
Toupa kei honkempa ahi,
Ka tasam kei ding hi;
Loupa hing lak ah honkualsak,
Tuiluang kiang ah honpi.
Ka kha Aman halhsak jel hi,
Aman a honpaisak,
Diktatna lampi jui ding in;
A min manpha vang in.
Sihna limguam tawn' pai leng zong,
Siatna him lau lou ding;
Ka kiang' Na om a, Na chiang leh,
Khetbuk in hon-muan hi.
Nekding-takding Nang non piata,
Ka melmate muh-in;
Ka lutang thau Na honnilh a,
Ka nou a dimlet hi.
Hoihna leh chitna in ka dam,
Sung honjui ding hi;
Tuachiang' Pathian' inn sung nuam ah,
Ka teng tawntung ding hi.

songs.title: Tua Huangsung' Kei Vuak Kongpai Lai
songs.author: C Austine Miles

lines: Tua huan sung' kei vuak kong pai lai',
Paksil ah jing daikia vung nalai;
Tua mun ah aw khat ken ka bil-in ja'ng,
Pathian' Tapa'n a genkhiak.
Aman kei hontonpih, honhoupih a,
Amah'a hi'ng chih honhilh hi;
Tua muna lungdamna ka neihkhawm uh,
Kuadang in thei kha ngeilou.
Thu hon gen, A aw nem mahmah,
Vasa zong ham dai-in dai khipkhep;
A aw ging kilawm kei hong jaksak pen,
Ka lungsung ah thamden hi.
Huan sung' A kiang omden nuam ing,
Ka kim ka pam khua hongmial zong-in;
Hihhang Aman kei pai ding' honsawl hi,
Tua nung A aw zaden ing.
Hiai khawvel ka Pa'a,
A thisiamte'n aw suah;
Ka kim ka kiang la-in dim e,
Ka jak-in nuam ka sa.
Hiai khawvel ka Pa'a,
Lei leh van leh tuipi
Leh a sunga thilsiam zousiahte,
Ngaihtuah chiang' ka muang hi.
Hiai khawvel ka Pa'a,
A thilsiamte'n gen uh;
Jing nisuak hoih, lili pallun,
Leh vasate'n pak uh.
Hiai khawvel ka Pa'a,
Thilsiam teng ah kithei;
Huihkhi len ging ah A aw ka ja,
Koipeuh ah honhoupih.
Hiai khawvel ka Pa'a,
Aw, ngilh ngeikei hial ning,
Gitlouh khelhna honghat mahleh,
Aman vaihawm lai hi.
Hiai khawvel ka Pa'a,
Galdou omlai mahleh,
Toupa Jesu'n hun a sak chiang in,
Lei leh van kigawm ding.

songs.title: Toupa Na Thu Mah Manpha Pen
songs.author: Rev Liangkhaia

lines: Toupa, Na Thu mah manpha pen,
Leitung sum tengteng sang-in;
Toupa, Na Thu mah hoihpen e,
Leitung thupina sangin;
Khuaiju sangin khumzaw,
Ka lungsim a taisak hi.
Gamkeu gamdai paisuak ding-in,
Na Thu in honpii jel ding;
Hiai hi tung thangvan meipi vak,
Israeltate'n a zuih uh;
Kou honpii dingin leng,
A vakna mial tuan lou hi.
Nuai simlei tuisuahgiat tung a,
Lauthawng-a ka pailai un;
Mal Aksi bang in Na Thu in,
Van lampi ah honpii hen;
Huan, honjui tawntung n'ung,
Tangtawn-a mang nawn lou-in.
Khemna tuihual, khemna gal lian,
Khawvel tawh hondou mahleh;
Toupa, honthuam in Na Thu-in,
Kha namsau ahih manin;
Lau kei n'ung, Setan gal,
Nangmah hatna masuanin.
Aw, ngaihtuah in tunglam-a inn,
Vakna kilawm luipi piau-a om;
Sitheilou misiangthoute tua ah,
Puan ngou a kijem-in om uh.
Tunglam a, tunglam a,
Aw, ngaihtuah in tunglam a inn;
Tunglam a, tunglam a, tunglam a!
Aw, ngaihtuah in tunglam a inn.
Aw, ngaihtuah in tua-a lawmte,
Ei ma-in khualzin na zouta uh;
Huihkhua ah la kilawm sa uh hi,
Pathian' innpi sung nuampen ah.
Ka Hondampa tu'n tua ah om,
Tua ah u-le-naute tawlngata;
Aman ka lungkham leh dahna pan,
Nuamsate gam ah hon tengsak.
Tua-a inn-a kei ompah ding,
Ka khualzinna tawpna ka mu hi;
Tua ah ka it leh ngaihte om hi,
Kei hon nangak in hon en uh.
Lungsung nuamte hong un,
Hondampa' min it teng;
A minthang Toupa hi,
Hong un, lasa'n pak ni;
Hilh un, hilh un, milian mineu (2)
Na bat uh huai honhehpihna.
A manglukhu nusia,
Kumpi puan thupi tawh;
Hehpihna kha jak-in,
Hongkum hongsi ei di'n,
Kua'n gen thei ding A thuakgimna (2)
Gawtmun sihna pan hongtan ding.
Misite omna mun,
Hankhuk mial pan thounawn,
Hatna thupi tang di'n;
A melmate nuaisiah;
Vualzou vantung sang ah paitou (2)
Hondampa Pathian in vaihawm.
Van pan hongpai guih ding,
Lei ah omden lou ding;
I khate pii ding hi,
Ni tumlou gamnuam ah;
Muta ni hang A mel kilawm, (2)
A angsung ah honpom den ding.
Muanna'n tuipi bang ka lampi honzuih chiang',
Lungkham tuipi bang kihawt chiang';
Bangteng ka tuak zong, hiai thei ding non sinsak;
'A hoih hi, a hoih hi, ka kha ding.'
A hoih hi, ka kha ding',
A hoih hi, a hoih hi, ka kha ding'.
Setan in honsual, ze-etna hongtung zong,
Theihtelna nuam in hongnem hen;
Khrist in panpih ka ngaihdan a theigige,
Ka kha ding' A sisan a suahta.
Ka khelhna aw hiai ngaituah nuam ka sa hi,
A khen kia hilou, avekpi'n,
A khros ah kikilhbelh, ka khu nawnta kei;
Ka kha aw, phat in, Toupa phat in!
Tua pan-in kei ding-in hin Khrist hita hen,
Jordan tui in hontum zongleh;
Hinna leh sihna ah na ka sa kei ding,
Ka kha lungmuanna thu'n na huau ding.
Hizong Toupa aw, Nang n'ongpai ding ngak ung,
Han hilou, van hi tunna ding;
Aw angel' pengkul, aw Toupa' sapna aw!
Lamet nuam! Ka kha ding' khawlna nuam!
Toupa, ginna muhtheih suahni tungsak meng',
Meipi laibu bang kizial ding;
Pengkulpi ging ding, Toupa hongkumsuk ding,
'Tuazah dong' a hoih hi, ka kha ding'.
'Khrist leh Saptuam di'n i aw suah ni,
Eite Kumpipa nuamsa min ngaih pahtawi ve ni;
Tuailai thahatna-in kilawp-in sem ni,
Thutak gam adi'n muanhuai takin ding ni.
Hon Tanpa Khrist deihhuai di'n,
Hondam dia si Khrist di'n;
Sisana A lei Saptuam di'n,
Siangsak', hangsak', Toupa.
'Khrist leh Saptuam di'n' nakpi'n thum ni,
Niteng khros pua-in eite'n A puanlap jui ve ni;
Kipia ni, i pum-in, Kha thahatna ah;
Hun hoih pen ah muanhuai-in A na sem ni.
'Khrist leh Saptuam di'n' it lou pia ni,
Hun leh talent leh sum-le-pai Heutupa adi'n;
I piak theih hoih phapen pen Amah pia ni,
Lungsung hauhna itna a kiamlou ding pen.
'Khrist leh Saptuam ding-in' hon itna,
Vualzou zang-in henna, lau, kisaktheihna pai in,
Tuabang tup thupi-in i hin hausak hen,
Tuachiang' Honpa kiang sapna jak nuam ding hi.
Hebru saltang khukdin na mu uh hiam,
Jingsang, sun, jan-a thum-a om?
A dantan sung ah Zion phawk tawntung,
Gamlapi a saltang hi zong.
Jerusalem lam dawngkot na hong uh hiam,
Hiai leitung-a 'sawtlou sung' saltang bang-in?
Thupina tawh Kumpipa hongpaina ding,
Sunchin-in na ngak uh hiam?
Kammeipi-a lut ding lunglau kei un,
Sa limlian' kul a paihlut zong;
Daniel' Pathian in hon hongkhia ding hi,
A angel tua'h honsawl ding.
Pathian hing' vontawite'n hansan suah un,
Na suahtakna uh la'n sa un;
Noute' Kumpipa hongpai nading mual,
Zion lam mitsuanta un.
Jesu di'n bangkim, Jesu di'n,
Tatsa keimah sep theih teng;
Ka ngaihtuah, kampau leh nasep,
Ka ni leh ka hun teng zong.
Jesu di'n bangkim, Jesu di'n,
Ka ni leh ka hun teng zong. D.S.
Ka khutte'n A deihlam sem hen,
Ka khete'n a lam tawn hen;
Ka mitte'n Jesu kia mu-in,
Ka mukte'n Amah phat hen.
Jesu di'n bangkim, Jesu di'n,
Ka mukte'n Amah phat hen. D.S.
Jesu kia ka mitsuanta a,
Bangdang mitla om nawn lou,
Ka kha'n Amah kia mitsuanta;
Kilhbelh Amah kia enin.
Jesu di'n bangkim, Jesu di'n,
Kilhbelh Amah kia en-in. D.S.
Aw piandang hi, aw piandang hi,
Kumpite' Kumpi Jesu'n,
A it chih-in hon minlawh a,
A kha nuai ah honkhawlsak.
Jesu di'n bangkim, Jesu di'n,
A kha nuai ah honkhawlsak. D.S.

songs.title: Gamnuam Ni Banga Tang A Om
songs.author: W A Ogden

lines: Gamnuam nibang-a tang a om,
Tua'h vante tangden hi;
Tua mun khimkhua jing ngeilou ah,
A vakna Honpa hi.
Khros pu lehang lungdamin,
Manglukhu i khu ding;
Tua misiangte tawh ten chiang',
Tangtawn nibang tanna ah.
Hiai nunkhua tuipi gal lam ah,
Hinna gam nunnuam om;
Tua ah huihpi lang nawnlou hi,
Tua ah i gou om hen.
Inn nuam leh thupi ei dingin,
Vantung gam nuam ah om;
Phamsa i it leh ngaih teng in,
Hon na-muak ding tua ah.
Nusia nuam hang simlei tulkuan,
Albang mang pah dingte;
Nopna tawp ngeilou vantung-a,
Misiangte lak ut hang.
Tanga Israel mi zatam,
Henkol bunin om uh;
Pathian in A hatna'n pi-in,
Tuipi luanglai khawlsak.
Tuipi luanglai khawlsak,
Tuipi luanglai khawlsak,
Ka kiang Jesu nai hi.
Lauh ding bangmah omlou,
Tuipi luanglai khawlsak.
Khelhna'n ka lungsim a tummang,
Khemnate'n thu nei hi;
Toupan lungmuan, ngaihdam honpia,
Tuipi luanglai khawlsak.
Lampi ginlah, launa'n dim zong,
Jesu tawh tonkhawm ding,
Lailung itna in honkem ding,
Tuipi luang khawlsak ding.
Ka sih chiangin Toupa Jesu,
Na gam lam honjuan ning;
Nang hon na-kai in Na ban-in,
Tuipi luang khawlsak in.
Siangthouna'ng hun zang in,
Na Toupa hou in;
Amah ah om inla,
A Thu'n kivak in;
Pathian' tate khawl in,
Hatloute panpi'n;
Bangkim ah muh tum in,
A vualzawlnate.
Siangthouna'ng hun zang in,
Khawvel kinoh hi;
Jesu kia khawl inla,
Lungsung mun-guk ah;
Jesu kia en lechin,
Amah na bang ding;
Amah batna nang ah,
Na lawmte'n mu ding.
Siangthouna'ng hun zang in,
Amah kipiisak';
Amah makhelh kenla,
Bangteng hongtung zong;
Na nop leh na dah-in,
Toupa mah jui in;
Jesu mah en inla,
A thu muang lai in.
Siangthouna'ng hun zang in,
Khamuang-in om in;
Na ngaihtuah leh tupna,
A thu-in koih in;
A kha'n nang honpii ding,
Itna tuikhuk ah;
Tuachiang' A na sem ding',
Semtaak na hi ding.

songs.title: Pathian In Hon Itna A Lamdang Mahmah
songs.author: Rev David E Jones

lines: Pathian in hon itna a lamdang mahmah!
Migenthei hinglou ding a hon huai mahmah;
Damna, hinna leh lungmuanna hon pia hi,
I dougal tung a vualzou di'n hon panpih.
Ka mohna te tui in hon silsiang theilou,
Huangvulh ganta sisan in hon tan theilou,
Jesu sisan hoih i kithoihna ahi,
I gitlouh te na lou in A hihdam thei.
Vannuai mi Tanpa kiang kumsawt pahtawina
Lei leh van a mi tengteng in pia uhen;
Hon hihdamtak ziak in kipah la sa ni,
Mi tengteng tanpa ahi pahtawi ve ni.
Leitung ah thuhoih tu in a hong tungta,
Lei mial tanvakpa Jesu Amah i mu;
Leitung a namchih tengteng kikhawm in ah,
Nopna zaila sa'n vanmang pahtawi ve ni.

songs.title: Aw Manphatna Ken Gen Siam Leng
songs.author: S Medley

lines: Aw manphatna ken gensiam leng,
Aw, thupina ken sasiam leng;
Ka Honpa pan tangkhia;
Tangtawn-in vantung kaihging tawh,
Gabriel tawh kiphatteh leng;
Pathian kaihging bang-in. (2)
Sisan manpha ken phat nuam ing,
Mawhna mulkimhuai leh Pathian'
Hehna pan hong tatna;
Pathian diktatna puan thupi
Silh-in ken phat tawntung nuam ing,
Ka kha tang tawntung-in. (2)
A nunhoihnate phat nuam ing,
Itna namkim A silhte tawh;
A tutphah-a pahtawi,
Phatna la sangpen, ngaihpen tawh,
Tangtawn-in ken phatden nuam ing,
A thupina phuang-in. (2)
Ahi, tua nopni hongtung ding,
Ka Toupa'n kei honglak chiang-in,
Ken A maitang mu ding;
Ka Honpa, Sanggampa leh Lawm,
Amah tawh tangtawn nuamden ding,
A hehpihna vualzou! (2)
Toupa thehzak inla,
Van a pan vualzawl vuah,
Haibang ngak ung;
jinglam leh nitaklam,
Ka haichin chiteng un
Dawnsuang in hong pou ding
Lei keu apan.
Non hehpihna thupi,
Haichin tung' namtui in dim kimkot ah;
Theihlouh gam lamlam mi'n
A hon zuan chiat ding ua,
N'on hehpih vualzawlna,
Hong sang ding uh.
Nangmah mel kilawm in
Leitung a piang chiteng
A nemzou hi;
Nangmah ah deihteng kim,
Na chiteng a om hi;
Tuapan luangkhia te in,
Lung damsak hi.
Na vualzawlna manpha,
Koute'n ka saan chiang un,
Saandan siam in,
Na tung a lungdam in,
piakkik dan thei le ung,
Pumpi zong pia le ung,
Nang ah nuam ding.
Kalvari mual tung' tua jingsang khat,
