Khrist ka Honpa paitou tawl mahmah;
Mawhneite tang' khros tung' si ding' kuan,
Manthatna pan amau gumkhia ding.
Tanpa nuamsa hi, Tanpa manpha hi!
Kalvari sing tung' ken mitkha'n mu ing;
Liam-in A si luang, mawhneite ding' ngen,
A thudon lou, mitdel kei ding' si!
'Pa, amaute ngaidam in,' chi'n ngen,
A sisan luan laitak nangawn-in;
Lunggim laitak' mawhneite ding' ngen,
Jesu it bang' kuaman hon it lou.
Ken it mahmah ing, Honpa leh Lawm,
Bangchin ka phatna tawp thei ding hiam?
Kei vantung ka omden tak chiangin,
Tangtawn dongin Amah ken phat ning.
I Suangpi Toupa, i bukna,
Huihpi hat lai a Bukna hi!
Siatna bangteng hongtung zong bit,
Huihpi hat lai a Bukna hi!
Aw, gimna gam sung-a Suangpi Jesu hi!
Belh ding Suangpi, belh ding Suangpi!
Aw gimna gam sung-a Suangpi Jesu hi,
Huihpi hat lai a Bukna hi.
Sunlai a liim, janlai bitna,
Huihpi hat lai a Bukna hi!
Bangmah lau ke'ng, gal zong lau ke'ng,
Huihpi hat lai a Bukna hi!
Hon um huihpi'n honnuai zong-in,
Huihpi hat lai a Bukna hi!
Bitna mun nusia ngeikei ning,
Huihpi hat lai a Bukna hi!
Pathian' Suangpi Limbelh deihhuai,
Huihpi hat lai a Bukna hi,
Paibang hon Koppa hi gige'n,
Huihpi hat lai a Bukna hi!
Khros lam juan-in ka hongpai,
Genthei, hatlou, mitdel hi'ng;
Bangdang ka deih om nawnlou,
Hotdamna kim ka mu ding.
Toupa, Nang ka honmuang hi,
Nang Kalvari Belamnou;
Na khros bul ah ka hongkun,
Jesu, tu'n hon hondam in.
Nang kon lunggulhna sawtta,
Khelhna'n honzawhna sawtta;
Jesu'n aw nem-in a gen;
'na khelhna sawpsiang ning,' chi.
Hia'h ka neih teng Nang konpia,
Lawmte, hunte, lei vante;
Ka kha leh sapum tanpha'n,
Tangtawn Nang ading' konpia.
Na thuchiamte ka muang hi,
Tu'n sisan nasep ka thei;
Kiniamkhiak, lei-a bokkhup,
Khros ah kilhbelh ka hita.
Jesu hongpai'! hondimsak'!
Amah ah bukimta ing;
Ka pumpi'n hondamsakta,
Belamnou thupi hen aw!
Toupa, Nang honmuang laiing,
Nang Kalvari Belamnou;
Na khros bul ah ka hongkun,
Jesu, tu'n hon hondam in.

songs.title: La Khat Sak Nop Mahmah Ka Nei
songs.author: E O Excell

lines: La khat saknop mahmah ka nei,
Tatsa ka hih nungin;
Ka Tanpa Honpa, Kumpi' la,
Tatsa ka hih nungin.
Tatsa ka hih nungin,
Tatsa ka hih nungin;
Amah min kia ka suang ding;
Tatsa ka hih nungin,
Ka Hondampa' min kia ka suang ding.
Honlungkimsak Khrist ka neita,
Tatsa ka hih nungin;
A deihlam sep ka kipahna,
Tatsa ka hih nungin.
Theihpih dik leh muanhuai ka nei,
Tatsa ka hih nungin;
Ginlahna leh launa delhmang,
Tatsa ka hih nungin.
Kei dia bawlkholh inn khat ka nei,
Tatsa ka hih nungin;
Tangtawna ka tenna ding mun -
Tatsa ka hih nungin.

songs.title: Thou Aw, Ka Kha Kipak A Om
songs.author: S Medley

lines: Thou aw, ka kha kipak-a om,
Na Tanpa phatna la sa in;
Aman kei apan la honngen,
A itna-siamna aw, manbei!
A itna-siamna aw, manbei hi,
A itna-siamna aw, manbei!
Pukna'n honhihsiat A honmu,
Hizong Aman hon it lailai;
Ka manna apan A hontan,
A itna-siamna aw, a lian!
A itna-siamna aw, a lian hi,
A itna-siamna aw, a lian!
Melma galhat tam mahmah zong,
Lei leh gawtmun in hondal zong;
Bittak-in ka kha a pii jel,
A itna-siamna aw, a hat!
A itna-siamna aw, a hat hi,
A itna-siamna aw, a hat!

songs.title: Tua A Hamphate' Gam I Gen
songs.author: Mrs F Mills

lines: Tua a hamphate' gam i gen,
Tua a tangpha gam, a hoih gam;
A thupina eite'n i gen,
Tua a om nuam natel inchia!
Tua a om! Tua a om!
Tua a om nuam natel inchia!
Tua a om! Tua a om!
Tua a om nuam natel inchia!
A lampi kham-a bawl i gen,
A bangte suangmanpha-a bawl;
A nuam a lamdang genzawhlouh,
Tua a om nuam natel inchia!
A muanna, a itna i gen,
A thupite'n a silh uh puan,
A hamphate'n a sak uh la;
Tua a om nuam natel inchia!
Khelhna, dahna, khemna, lungjin
Pan-a suahtakna thu i gen;
Sung leh pua ze-etna pan zong,
Tua a om nuam natel inchia!
Toupa, Nang nop leh dah in zong,
Vantung-a teng di'n kou Non bawl;
Ahi, kou zong thei baihta n'ung,
Tua a om nopdan phawkta ding!

songs.title: Jordan Lui Gei Huihpi Lak Pan
songs.author: S Stennett

lines: Jordan luigei huihpi lak pan,
Lunggulh in ka en hi;
Kanan gam nuam leh gam hoihpen,
Ka neih teng omkhawmna.
Tua gamchiam juanin kei ka pai,
Tua gamchiam juanin kei ka pai;
Aw, kuakua hongpai na ut ua?
Tua gamchiam juanin kei ka pai.
Tua phaijang lianpi gam khen ah,
Tangtawn sunni a tang;
Tua ah Pathian' Tapa'n vaihawm,
Mialna teng a delhmang.
Tua luigal gamnuam, damna gam,
Huihsia, hisia leng lou;
Damlouh, lungkham, natna, sihna,
Tua mun ah om nawnlou.
Chikchiang' tua gam nuam ka tung diam,
Tangtawn a nunnuam in?
Chikchiang' ka Pa' mel ka mu diam,
Amah ang-a khawl in?

songs.title: Jordan Lui Gei Huihpi Lak Pan
songs.author: S Stennett

lines: Jordan luigei huihpi lak pan,
Lunggulh in ka en hi;
Kanan gam nuam leh gam hoihpen,
Ka neih teng omkhawmna.
Tua gam nuam leh gam hoih ah i khawl ding,
Tua luigal ahing gige mun ah;
Mosi leh Belamnou' la sa ding, denchiangin,
Jesu kiang' i om tawntung ding.
Tua phaijang lianpi gam khen ah,
Tangtawn sunni a tang;
Tua ah Pathian' Tapa'n vaihawm,
Mialna teng a delhmang.
Tua luigal gamnuam, damna gam,
Huihsia, hisia leng lou;
Damlouh, lungkham, natna, sihna,
Tua mun ah om nawnlou.
Chikchiang' tua gam nuam ka tung diam,
Tangtawn a nunnuam in?
Chikchiang' ka Pa' mel ka mu diam,
Amah ang-a khawl in?

songs.title: Ka Kha Aw, Phat In La Sa Un
songs.author: El Nathan

lines: Ka kha aw, phat in la sain,
Sisan-a hong tanpa, Toupa;
Na kolbut honsutsakta hi,
Tatna mun ah nang hontun hi.
Tua tatna mun, lungmuanna mun!
Tua tatna mun, itna lamdang!
Pathian phatna khangsak sem ni,
Tatna mun-a hon hondam hi.
Ka Pathian ka na-vakmangsan,
A sianthouna tawh kidouin;
Hihhang' tu'n Pathian ka phat hi,
Tatna mun ah kei ka dingta.
Aw, lungnopna hongtungta hi,
Kalvari kei honmuhsak chiang';
Ka kolbut honphel, suakta ta'ng,
Tatna mun ah la sata ing.
Tu'n kei sep hoih man hilouin,
Ka taksap teng Jesu'n pia hi;
Diktatna keiah om hetlou,
Tatna mun ah chih louhngal zaw.
Ka kha bah aw, hia'h hongkhawl in,
Tatna pom in, na hampha ding;
A si Khrist Pathian in tawisang,
Honngaidam ding, tatna mun ah.

songs.title: Tangthu Kumlui La In Sa Un
songs.author: Mrs Harriet E Jones
songs.key: Doh is Ab (Khuang thum a khen)

lines: Tangthu kumlui lain sa un,
I Hondampa hon itna;
Jesu leh A thupina sa'n,
Tunga tatsa mipi tawh.
Sa un, sa un, Jesu itna,
Gingsak un, Amah phatna;
Tangthu lamdang sa kikkik un,
Leitung in a jak mateng.
Hon itna manpha lain sa'n,
A sihna lain gen un;
Langaihin namchih Honpa it
Bul ah jawl in om hen aw.
Nou tatsate'n itna gen un,
Tawp louin sa kikkik un;
Gamchiha mi tampite in,
Itna la sak theih mateng.

songs.title: Thu Lamdang Ka Genchim Theihlouh
songs.author: Rev Liangkhaia
songs.key: Doh is Ab (Khuang thum a khen)

lines: Thu lamdang ka genchim theihlouh, Kalvari simthu ahi;
Bangding a Pathian' Ta tangkhat, Mohnei kei ding a hong sih?
Kalvari mual, kalvari mual, sunkhua, zankhua'n gelchim la'ng.
Kalvari mual, kalvari mual, Sunkhua, zankhua'n gelchim la'ng.
Nou van a angel sianghtou leh, Serafim thupi te aw;
Sunchin Toupa' nasem te leh A lungtuak a hei te aw;
Kalvari mual, kalvari mual, Tanchin hon hilh theilou maw?
Kalvari mual, kalvari mual, Tanchin hon hilh theilou maw?
Aw ka kha, tua mual minthang ah, Sunchin, zanchin valeng in;
Na Toupa sing Khros tung a om, Hing in na vamu ding hi;
Kalvari mual, kalvari mual, Tanchin honna hilh ding hi
Kalvari mual, kalvari mual, Tanchin honna hilh ding hi.
Sim leh mal, suah leh tum a mi, A khebul ah hong kuun hen;
Aneu, alian mi tengteng in, A min phatna la sa hen;
Kalvari ah, kalvari ah, Amau dia A thuak tak ziak'
Kalvari ah, kalvari ah, Amau dia A thuak tak ziak'

songs.title: Toupa Jesu Aw, Tui Bang Ka Siang Nuam Hi
songs.author: J Nicholson

lines: Toupa Jesu aw, tuibang ka siang nuam hi,
Ka lungsim sung khuambang hongluah tawntung in;
Gal khempeuh nawhkhiain, milimte pai in,
Tu'n hongsil in, vuk sang' ka ngouzaw ding hi.
Vuk sang' ngouzaw, he, vuk sang' ngouzaw (3)
Tu'n hong sil in, vuk sang' ka ngouzaw ding hi.
Toupa Jesu aw, a sianglou beisak in,
Na sipha tawh hongsil in nit beisak in;
Siangthouna'ng in na khempeuh tawpsanta ing,
Tu'n hongsil in, vuk sang' ka ngouzaw ding hi.
Toupa Jesu aw, van pan hon ensuk in,
Kei hongkipumpiak thei ding' Nang honghuh in;
Keimah leh ka theih khempeuh tawpsanta ing,
Tu'n hongsil in, vuk sang' ka ngouzaw ding hi.
Toupa Jesu aw, kiniamkhiak-in konngen,
Toupa nuamsa aw, Na khebul ah konngak;
Ka sianna'ng sisan luang ginna tawh kongmu,
Tu'n Non sil leh vuk sang' ka ngouzaw ding hi.
Toupa Jesu aw, Nang kon ngakngak Non mu,
Tu'n hongpai in, lungtang thak kei honguan in;
Na kiang hongtaite kuamah Na nial ngeikei,
Tu'n hongsil in, vuk sang' ka ngouzaw ding hi.
Lawm hoih Jesu nasem ding in,
Kuahiam om? Kuahiam om?
Khrist thohnawnna thu gen dingin,
Kuahiam om? Kuahiam om?
Khawlna mun nuam Jesu ahi;
Milian mineu namchih laiah,
A hehpihna phuangjak dingin,
Kuahiam om? Kuahiam om?
A ngaihdamna thu gen dingin,
Kuahiam om? Kuahiam om?
Mimawh ngaihdamna thu gen di'n,
Kuahiam om? Kuahiam om?
A zahngaihna ngoutuipi bang,
Mingou, mivom, chichih kiang ah;
Suah, Tum, Sim leh Mal hilh dingin,
Kuahiam om? Kuahiam om?
Pasalpha Jesu gum dingin,
Kuahiam om? Kuahiam om?
A galdou bang doupih dingin,
Kuahiam om? Kuahiam om?
Pathian' deihlam ahih peuh leh,
Gammial gamgiau, gamdai ah leng,
A min thupi phuangjak dingin,
Kei ka om, Kei ka om!
Pathian thupi hen, thil thupite hihta,
Khawvel it mahmah in A Tapa honpia;
Aman khelhna khuhna'n hinna pia a,
Miteng lut theihna'n Hinna Kongpi hongta.
Toupa phat! Toupa phat!
Lei in a aw za hen!
Toupa phat! Toupa phat!
Mite kipak uhen!
Tapa Jesu tawn in Pa kiang' hongpai un,
Thupina pia un! Thil thupite hihta.
Aw tatna bukim, sisan a kileisa,
A gingta peuhmah kiang a Pathian chiamsa!
A khial phapen hizong Amah gingtate'n,
Tua hun mah in Jesu pan ngaihdamna mu.
Thil thupite hon sinsakta, honhihta,
Tapa Jesu hang-a i lungnopna lian;
Siangsem ding a, sangsem ding a, liansem ding,
Lamdang sakin, limdanna, Jesu muh chiang'.

songs.title: Ka Kha Aw, Laulou In Kuan In
songs.author: Lalsailova

lines: Ka kha aw, laulou in kuan in,
Tua Zion mual minthang juan in,
Tua mual enkawm jel-in pai in,
Tualai-a sing khros mitsuan in,
Tua ah na Toupa kilhden uh;
A nak siangthou ah sisan luang.
Tua Kalvari mual minthang ah,
Lemna thupipen muding uh;
Suah leh Tum, Sim leh Mal-a mi,
Sihna khimjing nuaia omte'n,
Mial zong leh tua mual enle uh,
Tangtawn in lungmuangta ding uh.
A kilhna sikte en ding in,
Bangchiteng in gamla leh zong;
Amah lu kun lai zong mu ding,
Mawhna tampi zong A sil thei,
Vukbang a sawpsiangna A nei,
Mawhna nin kimu nawnlou ding.

songs.title: Min Khat Ka Zaknop Gige Om
songs.author: F. Whitefield

lines: Min khat ka jak nop gige om,
Ka sa nuam a hoihna;
Ka jakin a ging kilawm hi,
Vannuai-a min ngaihpen.
Aw Jesu ka it tel! (3)
A hon it masak jiak'.
Hondampa itna honhilh hi,
Honsuaktasak dia si;
A sisan manpha thu honhilh,
Mikhial ken ka suanpen.
Ka Pa' thilhoih neihte honhilh,
Niteng kei dia A koih;
Lampi janbang mial tawn mahleng,
Aman honvaksak jel.
Lungkham thukpen hontheihpih a,
Itna a dim honhilh;
Ka dahna teng honthuakpiha;
Midang honnem omlou.

songs.title: Theih Ka Ut Tamsem Jesu Thu
songs.author: E E Hewitt

lines: Theih ka ut tamsem Jesu thu,
A itna tamsem mi lah ding';
A hotdamna kim ka mu nuam,
Kei dia Sipa' itna tamsem.
Jesu ka theisem nuam, (2)
A hotdamna kim ka mu nuam,
Kei dia Sipa' itna tamsem.
Sin ka ut tamsem Jesu' thu,
A sianthouna theisem nuam ing;
Pathian' Kha ka Heutu honghi'n,
Khrist' thilte kei honensak in.
Jesu' thu tamsem, A Thu ah,
Ka Toupa mah tawh kipawlin;
Bangkim ah A awte ja in,
A gen khempeuh kei ading hi.
Theih ka ut tamsem Jesu' thu,
A thupina tutphah a tu;
A gam lian semsem ding pen thu,
Lemna Kumpi hongpai ding thu.
Galili gam mite kiang a,
Jesu' thugen ka ja;
Dil-a ngaman mite kiang ah,
Kei hon jui un, A chi.
Honjui un, honjui un,
Mimante hi gigeta d'in,
Chi'n Galili pan kija hi;
Jesu, Nang konjui hi.
Na thu kei a hihsak ka nuam,
Aw Jesu, hithei hen;
Amaute kia chi hilou in,
Kei kiang' zong chilou hiam?
Ka lungtang tengin juijel ning,
Nang tawh tuni'n sem ding;
Ka sianglou zong honnusia ken,
Ngaidam, siangsak, kongthum.
Ka lungsung ah Na it piangsak,
Ngaman mi hi dingin;
Lendenna mun hoih honhilh in,
Galili mite bang'.

songs.title: Kua Hiam Ka Kongkhak A Ding
songs.author: M B C Slade

lines: Kuahiam ka kongkhak a ding,
Chimtak lou a honngak?
Inn sung-a lut honngen a?
A aw ka jak kuahiam?
Tongdam nem ngiingei hongging,
'Kong hon honve kei ding';
Konsapna na ngaihsak leh,
Nangmah a teng ding hi'ng.'
Amah kia inn pua a ding,
Kei kia inn sung a om;
Ka kizekaisak sung in,
Honpel khalou ding hiam?
Tua jan khuamial leh vot ah,
Amah hi honkiu nawn;
Jesu, Non chimtak kei maw,
Tua bang khawsawt nonngak?
Ka lung kongkhak Nang hon di'n,
Kintak in hongtai ing;
Hontaihilh in honsawi zawng,
Kei honompih ding hi.

songs.title: Lei Leh Van Ah Leng Theih Vek Hi
songs.author: P P Bliss

lines: Lei leh van ah leng theih vek hi,
Ngaihnop ka sa, adik manin;
Tua tangthu kumlui thak gige,
Jesu' thu tamsem honhilh'.
Jesu' thu tamsem honhilh'!
Jesu' thu tamsem honhilh'!
Kei hon it-Pa ka thei nuam hi;
Jesu' thu tamsem honhilh'.
Pak hoihpente vuaiin sipah,
Damsung lungkham meipi hongjing;
Lei pahnate bei pahpah hi,
Jesu' thu tamsem honhilh'.
Ginlahna'n hontuam kimvel a,
Dah lungkhamna a gik laiin;
Hehpihin hondelh hondom in,
Jesu' thu tamsem honhilh'.
Tua gam thupi ka muh chianga,
Kei dia mun-bawl ka luah chiang in,
Ka tangtawn la hiai hiding hi,
Jesu' thu tamsem honhilh'.

songs.title: Nang Kon It, Nang Kon It
songs.author: Anonymous

lines: Nang kon it, Nang kon it,
Ka Toupa, kon it;
Ka Hondampa, kon it,
Ka Pathian, kon it;
Nang kon it, Nang kon it,
Kon it chih Na thei;
Nang kon itdan ka na-
Septe'n gen ding hi.
Ka kipak, ka kipak,
Aw thugen nuam hi!
Ka pahna si theilou,
Mual tung ah ka ding;
Ka gou manpha ka mu,
Tua ah om ka ut,
Jesu leh angelte,
It leh ngaih teng tawh.
Aw Jesu, ka Honpa,
Nang tawh om nuam hi;
Ka hinna, hotdamna,
Ka pahna, khawlna;
Na min ka thupi,
Na itna ka la hi;
Na hehpihna'n ka lung,
Ka lei thuzawh ding.
Aw Honpa bang kua om?
Amah Salem Lal;
A nuihmai, A hon it,
La sa di'n honhuh;
Phat ning, Amah phat ning,
La ngaih leh chiang-in;
Ka kha ah kipahna,
Tuipi bang luang hi.

songs.title: Aw Tua Thugen Thupi Leh Khum
songs.author: A B Simpson

lines: Aw, tua thugen thupi leh khum,
Ginna-a lak ding;
Jan leh tuni leh tangtawn in,
Jesu a ngeingei;
Khialte ngaidam nuam lailai hi,
Na leh sa damsak;
Dahte nem in huihpi daisak,
A min thupi hen.
Jan leh tuni leh tangtawn in,
Jesu a ngeingei;
Bangteng dangzong Jesu danglou,
A min thupi hen (3)
Bangteng dangzong Jesu danglou,
A min thupi hen.
Mimang, nang hondam ding' honzong,
Amah khialte Lawm;
Khial aw, A Khephung ah hong in,
Kisik in kun in;
'Siamlouh kon tangsak kei ding hi,
Pai in, khial nawn ken,'
Chi a sawtlam a A gen bang';
Na kiang ah tu'n gen.
A khial mahmah Peter ngaidam,
Nangleng lau hetken;
A ginglah mahmah Thoma naih,
A ginlah beisak;
It Johan A ang-a sia in,
A tawldamsak hi;
It aw nem-in nang hon samlai,
A ang ah khawl in.
Leitung ah na leh sa damsak,
A khut thahat in;
Tu'n zong i natna leh lungkham,
A thupiak in bei;
Numei in khoih a damsakpa'n
Damna pia thei lai;
Kuapeuh ginna a a ngente,
Tua bangzah pia ding.
Huihpi vuahpi nuaiah tuipi
Tung ah khe in pai;
Tua Galili tuipi a bang,
Huihpi kham thei lai;
Getsemani ah lungjing in
Nang ding' thum in kap;
Aman i lungjinna noute
Tu'n hong dawnpih lai.
Emau khua juan amau tawh ton,
Omkhawm lai ding in;
Tuabangin hinsung lampi ah,
Aman hong tonpih;
A mel mu nawn pah ding hihang,
Toupa, hongkin ve;
Hiding, Jesu ngei mah hiding,
Van-a paipen mah.

songs.title: Kawlmong Pha A Buh Om Tengteng
songs.author: J O Thompson

lines: Kawlmong pha a buh om tengteng,
Minta, lakkhawm hunta hi;
Gamla, nai, zougam, phaigam ah,
Buh minta, eng phengphung hi.
Toupa aw, Nang kon saplai un,
Kong thumna aw uh ngai in!
Tu'n buhphal khawm ding honsawl in,
Buh lakhun a kikhel ma'n.
Jingsangpi in zong sawl inla,
Sun nisat laitak in zong;
Ni tum dektak chiang' zong sawl in,
Munchih pan khawm di'n sawl in.
Kinmeng in, buh kuaigawp ding hi,
Kham buhphalte khawm ding in,
A inn sung ah non puakkhawm leh
Hongpainawn chiang' nuamsa ding.
Khristian, pilvangin pai, gal a hongnai,
Lau leh ling kawm' pai in, na zinna ah;
Pualam ah thang, sunglam ah khemna om,
Honkhialsak lailai dingin nang honzol;
Khristian, pilvangin pai (3),
Gal a hongnai.
Khristian, kipakin pai, huihpi lak' zong,
Tung khuapi nim in dipkuat-huai mahleh;
Lummei jing leh huihpi hongtheng pah ding,
Na Hondampa tawh na khawl tawntung ding,
Khristian, kipakin pai (3)
Huihpi lak' zong.
Khristian, thumthum in pai, na puk kha ding,
Na Hondampa sap ding na mangngilh leh;
Ze-etna leh buaina lak' na bit ding,
Thumna galvan-a na zat gige leh;
Khristian, thumthum in pai (3),
Na puk kha ding.
Khristian, lamen in pai, mun na muang ding,
Khawlmun na tun chiang' dah leh nat bei ding;
Thukhenpa pahtakman na sangta ding;
Na Toupa lungnopna sung ah lut in,
Khristian lamenin pai (

songs.title: Toupa A I Kipah Nop Leh
songs.author: El Nathan

lines: Toupa a i kipah nopleh,
Pathian lamtam sut le'ng;
A Thu sung' ginna kiang' kilak,
Simseng louh sutsut le'ng.
Mawh phelna, muanna, hatna,
Siangthouna leh Pialgal om hi;
Tuateng Khris ah kei'a hita,
Amah phatna lasak a kiang tung hen.
Mawhna teng Pathian' hehpihna'n,
Ngaihdamna manbei pia;
Ngaihdamna tawh muanna keia,
Jesu' si-a muanna.
Khelhna vangletna phel nading',
Hehpihna kiching hi;
Lungsunga om Kha Siangthou in,
Mawhna pan honsiangsak.
Pathian kiang' midang pii theih na'ng,
Kha Siangthou hon guan hi;
I Toupa Khrist Thawnpiak hi a,
Lailung khuambang luah hi.
Vualzawlna teng gin vang eia,
Naupang bang' muanna in;
Khrist ah Pathian in piak kilawp,
Chiamsa pe teitei ding.
Toupa, Na aw nem a,
Na honsapna ka ja;
Na si manpha a siansak di'n,
Kalvari a hongluang.
Toupa, hongpai ing!
Nangmah bel ding in;
Sisan in honsilsiang in,
Kalvari a luang in.
Hatlou leh mawhneipi,
Nangman hatna Nonpia;
Kei mawh nitna Non sawpsiangsak,
Nitna bei a siang in.
Hiai leitung leh van ah,
Kinepna leh muanna,
Ginna leh itna kim tang di'n,
Kei hongsam Jesu hi.
Khelhna vaihawmnasa,
Lungsung a nasepna;
Hehpih tung hehpihna pia a,
Kipsakpa Jesu hi.
Toupa muanga omte
kiang aman thu gen hi;
Athuchiam pel ngeilou Toupa'n,
I thumna hon dong hi.
Phat un, thoihna sisan!
Phat un, A hontatna!
Phat un, Thawnpiak i Toupa Khrist,
I Hatna leh Dikna!
Pathian in mawhneite hon it,
Pukna hang-a sesa;
Hotdamna bukim manpha pen,
Man neilou in honpia.
Aw itna, itna lamdang,
Pathian' kei hon itna!
Kei Honpa hong kumsuksak hi,
Kalvari a si di'n.
Gin vang in Amah kei'a hi,
Pathian' Tapa thounawn;
A sihna ah tatna ka ngah,
A sisan ah sianna.
Itna'n thupia dimna hontun,
A misiangte theisak;
Khelhna apan tawlngakna nuam,
Khrist kia a ginna jiak'.
A ummite'n nuam in juan un;
Piak na hiding uhi;
Hiai leia thupi a lepkholh,
Van a hin bei theilou.
Setan tung' tu-a vualzawh thu,
Tatsa mite'n sa hen;
Khrist Toupa i Kumpipa hang',
Sih donga vualzou ding.
Tua jingsang khuavak thupi-a,
Mihing Tapa hongpai chiang',
A vanglian tangpha eite'n i mu ding hi;
Kawlmong dong a namchih apan,
Ama' mite sapkhawm chiang',
Tatsa mite kikhopna thupi hiding.
Tungnungpen a kikhopna nuam,
Nop kiam theilou hehpihna gam a
Tatsate kikhopna;
Tungnungpen a kikhopna nuam!
Tua inn nuam a tatsa mite kikhopna!
Jesu a ihmu hamphate,
Aman hongsap chiang' thou ding,
Hankhuk daidam leh tuipi nuai apan in;
Vanlam pumpi neiin Amah
Tuak ding uhi huihkhua ah,
Si leh hingte kituahkhawmna lamdang ding!
Tenna kiching omna khuapi,
Eiten mit a i muh chiang'
Tua sunga chiauluipi dam a luang pen tawh;
Sihna'n hon khensa lawmte tawh,
Lungdam in kigawm kik ni,
Kikhen nawnlou dia kipahtak lamdang ding!
Aw, Kumpipa hongpai ding hi,
Nisim in a hun hongnai;
Mitphiatkallou a limdanna ding hongnai,
A chiam ni thupi i muh chiang',
Mitphiat kallou limdangin,
Tangtawn in Amah kiang' i omden ding hi.
Van inn paina lam khros ka tawn ngei ding hi,
Lampi dang omlou hial hi;
Kongpi vak ka mu thei ngeilou hial ding,
Khros tawn a paina ka haih leh.
Van inn lampi khros ahi,
Van inn lampi khros ahi;
Ka pai kawma tua theih nuam ka sa hi,
Van inn lampi khros ahi.
Khros phung ah ka puakgik khempeuh tukmang hi,
Ka Toupa ka et laiin;
Lungsung nopna tawh tua lampi ka tawn,
Ka lungsung phatna tawh kidim.
Sisana luan lampi ka jui tawntung ding,
Ka Hondampa'n tuamah tawn;
Nunnopna mun sang ka tun theih aleh,
Pathian kiang ka kha nunnuam ding.
Tu'n khawvel lampi ken ka nusiata hi,
Tua lampi jui nawn lou ding;
Toupa'n, Hongpai in, honchi inn ka juan,
Aman honngak kong honsa ah.
Ka Toupa' khros lampi ka juihtak chiangin,
Ama'n honpii lungdam ing;
Nisim vantung ka naih semsem chiangin,
Pai masate' husa ka ja.
Honpa, hinna sang' manpha,
Nang konlenkip, lenkip gige ding;
Na sisan pha nasep in,
Na kiang honnaih, honnaihsak sem in.
Niteng in, hunteng in,
Hontheisak' Na siansakna;
Na hon itna hoihpen in,
Toupa, Na kiang honnaihsak sem in.
Hiai khawvel kidangdang ah,
Damdam in kei hontonpih pih in;
Nang muang ka paikhial kei ding,
Ka lammang ngei ngeikei hial ding hi.
Nang hon it semsem sak in,
Hiai damsung tomchik a bei mateng;
Ka kha itna' dim mateng,
Tunglama khua nuamzaw, nuamzaw ah.
Jesu'n tuni'n honhondam nuam,
Bangchi'n Amah na dawng ding hiam?
'Ka kiang hongpai in,' honchi hi,
Aw, banghang na zekai lai ding?
Jesu, Nonsam, ken ka thei hi,
Nangmah pan vakmang nawn kei ning;
Thou in juan ning, ka Hondampa,
Inn-a kei honmuak dia honngak.
Na zekai leh bang phatuam hiam?
Amah na nial leh na mang ding;
Jesu kia'n nang honhondam thei,
Khros a si in aman pia hi.
Nang hontan dia, sikhin Jesu,
Nang dingin mun bawl in paikhin;
Thupina ah tu'n nang honngak,
Vakvak nawn kenla, hongpai in.
Vakmang ka hongpai keimah kia'n,
Ka lam janbang in mial;
Ka en Nang lam, aw ka Pathian,
Tuachiang' vak ka muta.
Jesu, Honpa, Pathian' Belam,
Konbat tam mahmah e;
Na honhehpihna tengteng leh,
Na honitna tengteng.
Lau leh ginlahna tawh kongpai,
Na thu lou lamet bei;
Sisan luang ka et laitak in,
Na ngaihdam aw ka ja.
Kha' thilhih theihna thei thei leng,
Hiai ka lung hatlou ah;
Na thu ka vak leh meivak hi'n,
Ka lum leh phaw hi hen.
Aw, Toupa, Na aw hontheisak',
Mi tampite lak ah;
Nang ka lamet, hinna, pahna,
Ka tangtawn la hi in.

songs.title: Hong Ja Un Gan Inn Kongkhak
songs.author: Lt Comm Arch R Wiggins

lines: Hongja un gan-inn kongkhak,
Vaihawmte leh ganchingte,
Tuang siangthou sik ding ngak un,
Pathian' Tapa jalna;
Thawnpiak kham Amah puak uh,
Juda huang pan Belamnou;
Lamdangsak melin en uh,
Pathian' Tapa naungek.
Kumpipa hausa hilou,
Piak ding bangmah ka nei kei,
Belamnou nangawn keng lou,
Pathian' Tapa, Nang di'n;
Hizong Na gei ah om ning,
Kongkhak a kihong ja hi!
Khut vuak in bang pia thei ding,
Aw, Nang Pathian' Tapa.
Piak ding bangmah neilou zong,
Ka lunglawp kikhou zoulou;
Itna hang' ling kawm kongpai,
Deihhuai, Pathian' Tapa;
Na mai ah tu'n ka kun hi,
Thawnpiak bei ka hizong in,
Nang bangkim ka honpe siang;
Vanglian Pathian' Tapa.
Lungkhamnate ka tuah chiangin,
Dah mahmah a ka om lai in;
Ka ngaihtuah in ka kipak hi,
Toupa'n honkhotuah jiak'.
Toupa, Nang nonkhotuah,
Toupa, Nang nonkhotuah;
Na kiang ah banghiam ka lauh ding,
Toupa, Nang nonkhotuah.
Damsung omdingdan khualna in,
Ka lungsim hihbuai mahmah zong;
Lunggimna bang ka tuah chiangin,
Toupa'n honkhotuah jel.
Tagahna bang hongom leleng,
Buaina meipiin hontuam zong;
Kipakin ka om jeljel ding,
Toupa'n honkhotuah jiak'.
'Khrist leh Saptuam di'n' i ding,
Lungsim leh khut kizom';
I muk Amah phatna'ng,
I khut hatlou huhna'ng,
I khe mangthang zonna'ng,
'Khrist leh Saptuam di'n.'
'Khrist leh Saptuam di'n' i ding,
Lungsim leh khut kizom;
Tua pan i hinna pia vek le'ng,
'Khrist leh Saptuam di'n'.
'Khrist leh Saptuam di'n' i thum,
Niteng in na i sem;
Kuhkal hatna thak tawh,
Nasep i tum ding hi;
Thukhun muanhuai jui ni,
'Khrist leh Saptuam di'n'.
'Khrist leh Saptuam di'n' i sa,
Phatna Hosana tawi';
Honsuahtaksak ziak leh,
Zawhna honchiam jiak in;
I tuppen hiai hi ding;
'Khrist leh Saptuam di'n'.
Khrist in gitlouhna beisakta;
Hondampa hoih lamdang hi!
Tat i hita, man piaksa hi:
Hondampa hoih lamdang hi!
Ka Jesu, ka Jesu,
Hondampa hoih lamdang hi!
Ka Jesu, ka Toupa,
Hondampa hoih lamdang!
Amah phat ing, sisan vang in;
Hondampa hoih lamdang hi!
Tua in Pathian tawh honlemta;
Hondampa hoih lamdang hi!
Ka khelhna teng pan honsiangsak;
Hondampa hoih lamdang hi!
Tu'n Aman ka lungsung vaihawm;
Hondampa hoih lamdang hi!
Ka paina ah hontonpih jel;
Hondampa hoih lamdang hi!
Niteng' honkem, hon muanhuaisak;
Hondampa hoih lamdang hi!
Vualzawlna hatna honpia hi;
Hondampa hoih lamdang hi!
Ze-etna teng ah vualzawhna;
Hondampa hoih lamdang hi!
Amah ka lungtang teng ka pia,
Hondampa hoih lamdang hi!
Khawvel in honneihpih lou ding,
Hondampa hoih lamdang hi!

songs.title: Kei A Di'n Ni Tawm Chik Kia Om
songs.author: Chas H Gabriel

lines: Kei a di'n ni tawmchik kia omta hi,
Phatna ding, thugenna ding hun;
Hinsung ni tum chiang' Honpa'n hongsap chiang',
Thupina tawh A kiang pai ning.
Manglukhu jem khat ka khros in khek ning,
Kongpi kisung hon ngeilouhna';
A khe phung ah puakgik teng ngakhia ning,
Jesu tawh vaihawm tawntung ding.
Sepgim leh khitui luang sawt nawnlou ding,
Khualzinna kizou pah ding hi;
Tua hun chiang'Amah tawh om tawntung ning,
Tua ah tangtawn taikhua val ding.
Mual a sangpi leh lui a thuk tam zong,
Ka lampi silpak jem lou zong;
Suang kham in khattang jan a sawt zong in,
Nopna jingkhua vak in honngak.
Lunggulh Amah mu dia ka khanlawh chiang',
Aw, nopna kigen thei ding hiam!
Khawisa nawnlou ding, si ngei nawnlou ding,
Tua hun ken ngaklah mahmah ing.
Hongumpa hong sihna khros,
Sangpi in hong kitung hi;
Tua khros tung pan hong gingta,
Aw kilawmte ngaihnophuai;
'Itna tatna kizouta,'
Hongpai v'aw, mohnei, hongsam.
'nang ding in ankuang kilui,
A kiching nek ding om hi,'
Na Pa angsung hongtaiin;
Ka ta aw, honchi ding hi,
A inn pan taimang lou di'n;
Hongpai v'aw, mohnei, hongsam.
'nunsung nite beipah ding,
Nangmah hongumpa leh Lawm;
Ngai in, kongpai hongla di'n,
Tangtawn gam hontun ding in;
Keima' tangtawn innpi sung,'
Hongpai v'aw, mohnei, hongsam.
Biaklai hunnuam! Biaklai hunnuam!
Mangbatna pan kei hongsamkhia;
Ka Pa' mangtutphah mai' hongsawl,
Taksap leh deih teng vahilh di'n;
Dahna leh lungkhamna ah leng,
Ka laukha in tungjanna mu;
Khemhatpa' thang ka pelkhe jel,
Nong kik chiang' aw,
Biaklai hunnuam! D.S.
Biaklai hunnuam! Biaklai hunnuam!
Ka ngetnate nang vatun in;
A thutak leh muanhuaina tawh,
A ngak mite vualjawlpa kiang';
A mel zong ding, A thu um ding,
A hehpih muang ding' honsawl man';
Ka buainate Amah tut ning,
Huan, honngak ning,
Biaklai hunnuam! D.S.
Biaklai hunnuam! Biaklai hunnuam!
Na lungmuanna kei honghawm in;
Pisga mualsang tung pan en a,
Ka inn juan-a ka pai dong in;
Hiai pumpi nusia'n ka thou dia,
Tangtawn pahtakman sang ding in;
Vantung juanin kei kikou ning,
'Mangpha, mangpha,
Biaklai hunnuam!' D.S.
Nang tangtawn kei a, manpha chia,
Hinna leh lawmte sang in;
Hiai leitung a ka khualzin lai',
Hondampa, hontonpih in;
Nang naihin, Nang naihin (2),
Hiai leitung a ka khualzin lai',
Hondampa hontonpih in.
Khawvel nopsakna ngen kei ning,
Mun leh mual, minthanna zong;
Kipak a semgim in thuak ning,
Nang hontonpih peuh lechin;
Nang naihin, Nang naihin (2),
Kipak a semgim in thuak ning,
Nang hontonpih peuh lechin.
Honpii in, sihna kuam mial leh,
Damsung tuipi lian tung ah;
Huan, tangtawn hinna kongpi ah,
Toupa aw, honlutpih in;
Nang naihin, Nang naihin (2)
Huan, tangtawn hinna kongpi ah,
Toupa aw, honlutpih in.

songs.title: Khatvei Khelhna Kolbun In Ka Tanga
songs.author: Haldor Lillenas

lines: Khatvei khelhna kolbunin ka tang a,
Suahtak tum mahleng suakta zoulou;
Tuin suahtakna thupi ka neita,
Jesu'n ka kolbutte tolsakta.
Suahtakna thupi, suahtakna lamdang,
Khelhna kolbun a thumthum nawnlou;
Hong suaktasakpa thupi Jesu hi,
Amah tangtawn in keia hi ding.
Enna, huatna, kisiat leh kinakna,
Kiletsakna leh ki-otsakna;
Khawvel thildeih ka hin nuamlousak teng,
Sa ut leh deih pana suahtakna.
Kisaktheihna leh khelh nopsakna pan,
Sum-le-pai hauhna deihtakna pan,
Heh leh lungsim sia pana suahtakna,
Suahtakna thupi, nopna thupi.
Launa, thawmhauna pana suahtakna,
Mangbat lungjinna pan suahtakna;
Tanpa nuamsa Khrist ah suahtakna om,
Amah hi ka kolbut teng sutpa.

songs.title: Khrist Sisan Pha Tuibang Hong Luang
songs.author: Macleod Wylie

lines: Khrist sisan pha tuibang hongluang,
Ka mawhna sianna hi;
Lunglauna leh ginlouhna pan,
Ka laukha tutkhawlta.
Aw piandang sisan pha hongluang,
Hongum Toupa nak pan!
Thangvan donga ka zaila ding,
Aw sisan, sisan pha.
'A khelhna leh lungmawlna uh,
Lailung ngilhta ning e;
Ka Ta neihsun amau di'n si,'
Tung Pathian in a chi.
Ka ginna leh ka meltheihna,
Mawhna'n bawl mang lou ding;
A sisan pha hongluang kei di'n;
Ka khelhna sawpsiang hi.
Ka simlei mihinna pumpi'n,
Omlai vei thuak zongleh;
Tua sisan pha-a tutkhawlin,
Lailung muang kumkhua ning.
Mi tampite lunglawp patau,
Kinawh-a paiden bang thu hiam?
Nisim a mi tampi kikhawm,
Kisaklah bangthu hiam ka chi?
Tualaitakin honghuau uh a;
'nazareth Jesu in hongtawn hi.' D.S.
Hiai Jesu kua hi mahmah hiam,
Khuasung mi khempeuh a linsak?
Theihlouh mikhual khat leltak in,
Mipi lungphawng thei hiam ka chi?
Lungphawng aw in hongdawng uh a;
'nazareth Jesu in hongtawn hi.' D.S.
Jesu! Amah hi leitung a,
Mihing natna gimna hongthuak;
A paina peuh a lungkhamte'n,
Nangong, khebai, china hongpuak;
Mitdelte tua aw ja in nuam,
'nazareth Jesu in hongtawn hi.' D.S.
Amah hongpai nawn! Sul zuih theih,
Mun khat pan mun khat a paina;
Eite kankil ah hongkhawl a,
Honglut, tam di'n kiniamkhiak lai;
Nuam-in hiai genlou ding i diam?
'nazareth Jesu in hongtawn hi.' D.S.
Khaile! puakgikte hongpai un!
Ngaihdam, lungmuan, khawlna, inn om;
Pa taimangsante, hongkik un,
A hehpihna piak hongsang un;
Khem-a om nou di'n Bukna nai,
'nazareth Jesu in hongtawn hi.' D.S.
Hihhang' hongsap na nial lai leh,
A itna pha na thangbawl leh,
Dah in hon kiheisan ding a,
Ngaihdam na nget nialta ding hi;
'Lap lou! lap lou!' hongkichi ding,
'nazareth Jesu'n hong khengzou hi.' D.S.

songs.title: Sawmkua Leh Kua-Te Dam In A Om Uh
songs.author: Elizabeth C Clephane

lines: Sawmkua leh kuate dam in a om uh,
Huangsung nuam a nuamsa om in;
Himahleh khat bel tang ah mangthangta hi,
Damna huang bittak a kipan in;
Belampu' khut muanhuai apan taimang hi,
Gamnuai lauhuai, taam leh linglakpi ah. (2)
Toupa, hiai ah sawmkua leh kua na nei,
Hunna sa lou na hi ahiam?
'Hiai leng keia ahi,' Belampu'n a chi,
Ka huangsung pana taimang ahi;
Lam lauhuai, suk leh tou ah vakmang mahleh,
Ka belam zong' gamdai ah ka kuan ding.' (2)
Tatsaten a Tanpa uh theilou uh,
Tui thukpipi A kante leh
A belam vakmang zonga A janhah lam,
Tatsate kuamahin theilou uh;
Hizong Aman ja, gamdaia belam' aw,
Belam damlou si ding panpih ngai hi. (2)
Toupa, hiai gamlak lampite khawng a,
Sisan kiate koi apan hiam?
'Belampu'n honpiikik nawn mateng taimang
Belam adia sisan luang ahi.'
'Toupa, Na khut a liamma koi apan hiam?'
'Tujan ling tampi in kei hon sun hi.' (2)
Tang sangpi leh luiguam sia lak apan
Leh suangpi kawmlak apan in,
Kipahna aw'n van kongpi tungtouta hi;
'nuam un! Ka belam mu nawnta'ng' chi;
Mangtutphah kim a angelte'n dawng uhi;
'nuam un! Toupa'n A belam honpikik.' (2)

songs.title: Ka Hondampa Honpii Ding' Nai Gige
songs.author: E S Lorenz

lines: Ka Hondampa honpii ding' nai gige,
Bangteng hongtung zong in kei ka bit hi;
Huihpi vuahpi pan kei honsel ding hi,
A angsung ah honpom ding!
A angsung ah honpom ding! (2)
Bangteng hongtung zong-in kei ka bit hi,
A angsung ah honpom ding!
Aman itna banin kei honkawi hi,
Lungmuanna thu A aw in honhilh hi;
Pathian ngei in honlen a, ka bit hi,
A angsung ah honpom ding!
Aman ka kha ching, honnusia lou ding,
A itna pan bangma'n honkhen lou ding;
Tu leh tangtawnin honkem ding ka thei,
A angsung ah honpom ding!
Jesu muan a lungdamhuai pen,
A thugen khempeuh taksan;
A thuchiam a kinga a muan,
'Toupa'n chi hi,' i chih theih.
Jesu, Jesu, ka muang mahmah!
Muanhuai hi, ka chian gige!
Jesu, Jesu, manpha Jesu!
Bangkim a Amah muan ding!
Aw Jesu muan a lungdamhuai,
Sian nading' A sisan muan;
Ginna mawltak in ka bual a,
Sianna lui A sisan ah.
Aw, Jesu muan a lungdamhuai,
Kei dia hin leh khelh tawp in;
Hinna, khawlna, nopna muanna,
Jesu ah ka mu, ka nei.
Nang konmuan theih ka lung nuam hi,
Jesu, Hondampa, ka Lawm;
Ka kiang ah Na om chih ka thei,
A tawppha'n on ompih ding.
Sisan pha, sisan pha,
Sing Khros tung a luang in,
Khelhna pan hon tan in,
Mohsa dik hn tangsak:
Mikhial a ninpen zong sianna,
Kalvari sisan pha ahi. (2)
Aw sisan, sisan pha,
Van kong hon honsak hi;
Vangam hon tut chian gin
I la tullou ding pen:
Sisan, sisan, sisan, sisan!
Chi in tawp lou'n i sa ta ding (2)
Tang minthang Kalvari,
Mite'n simmoh mahleh,
Tang dang tengteng sang in,
Ke'n zaw ngaizaw veng aw:
Aw nopna tang, aw mun siangthou,
Pathian' sisan a luanna hi. (2)
Ze-etna te'n hongkimkot,
Eite'n theisiam theikei hang,
Tua gamchiam juana Pathian in honpii dingdan theikhang;
Hihhang A mit in honpii ding, i sih donga jui ding,
Theisiam zawta ding hi hang e, denchiangin.
Denchiangin,
Jingkhua hongvak chiang';
Pathian misiangte inn tunkim chiang;
I vualzawh dan thu genin sutsut ve ni,
Theisiam zawta ding hi hang e, denchiangin.
Damsung nuntak nading kul
Taksap mah hongom pahpah;
Inn leh lou sapna leh neklehtak sapna mah tam hi;
Hihhang Toupa muang hi hang, A thu honhilh bangbang in
Theisiam zawta ding hi hang e, denchiangin.
Khemna, zolna leh thang tam,
Theihkholh louhin honphawng a,
Pilvanlouh kamkhat, gamtatkhat in honliamsak pahpah;
Theihtawpsuah nung nangawna ze-etna tung, theisiam khang,
Hihhang theisiam zawta ni hang, denchiangin.
Jesu, ka laukha Itpa,
Na angsung honbelsak in;
Tuilian in honnaih chiangin,
Huihpi hat hongnun chiangin;
Ka Hondampa, honsel in,
Damsung huih a then tanpha'n;
Bitna khawlmun hontun in,
Nangma'n ka laukha nei in.
Belh ding ken kuamah nei ke'ng,
Panpihbei, Nang konbel hi;
Khattang honnusia ken aw,
Honhuh, honkhamuan lai in;
Ka muanpa pen Nang na hi,
Honhuh gige Nang na hi,
Hutna bei ka lu hum in,
Na kha nuai honbelsak in.
Ka deih leh ngaih Nang na hi,
Taksap teng Nang ah ka mu;
Puk phong in, bah halhsak in,
Na damsak, mitdel pii in;
Na min dik in siangthou hi,
Kei jaw nitna a dim hi'ng;
Mawhna a dim gilou hi'ng;
Nang thutak, itna'n na dim.
Ka khelh leh mawh khuh ding in,
Na hehpihna kiching hi;
Damna tui luangsak inla,
Lungsung siangsak honkem in;
Nang nuntakna Nak na hi,
A thawnin hondawnsak in;
Ka lungsung ah nak nei in,
Tangtawn in luang tawntung in.

songs.title: Lamdang Lua Sa In Ka Ding Hi
songs.author: Chas H Gabriel

lines: Lamdanglua sain ka ding hi,
Nazareth Jesu mai ah;
Kei hon it theih lamdang saing,
Mikhial, nin siamlouh tangsa.
A lamdang hi! a lamdang lua!
Chih ka la hi tawntung ding;
A lamdang hi! a lamdang lua!
Ka Hondampa' hon itna.
Kei di'n huan ah honthumsak a,
'Kei thu hilou, Nang thu,' chi'n;
Amah dia lungkham hilou in,
Kei di'n khawul sisan luang.
Angelte'n khasiat in en uh,
Khuavakgam pan hongpai in;
A lungkhamna lungmuan ding in,
Tua jan ka kha di'n A thuak.
Ka gitlouh dahna teng A la,
Amah a ngeiin bawl hi;
Puakgik Kalvari a pua in,
Thuak in Amah kia'n si hi.
Thupina khu tatsate tawh,
A mai ken ka muh chiang in;
Tangtawn ka lungnopna hi ding,
Kei hon itna la a sak.
Jesu min manpha kiguan in,
Lungkham leh liangvai' ta aw;
Lungnopna, pahna honpia ding,
Heina peuh ah paw jel in.
Min manpha, ngaih mahmah!
Lei lamet leh van pahna;
Min manpha, ngaih mahmah!
Lei lamet leh van pahna!
Jesu' min kiguan gige in,
Gal namkim kidalna lum;
Ze-etna'n hong kimkot chiang in,
Thumna'n Jesu min sial in.
Aw, Jesu' min manphapen hi!
I lungnopna ngen in dim;
A itna ban a honpom chiang',
Eite'n A late i sa.
Jesu' min lawhna ah kun in,
A khe bul-a bokkhup in;
Thangvan a Mangpen pahtawi ni,
I khualzin i zawh chiang in.
Ka hinna nang konpia,
Ka sisan pha ka suah;
Salbang konsuah nading',
Phamsa tangtawn hinna'ng
Ka hinna nang konpia, konpia,
Kei bang nonpeta hiam? D.S.
Kumsawt lelliangtheiin,
Hambang ka vai nang di'n,
Tangtawn mangthang lou a,
Nunnop mel na muhna'ng;
Kum zatam konpeta, peta,
Kum khat nonpeta hiam? D.S.
Ka Pa' Innpi vakpha,
Ka mangtutphah thupi;
Tuangnung honsia vek in,
Lei ah gentheih kong thuak!
Ka nusia vek nang ziak, nang ziak',
Kei ziak' bang na nusia? D.S.
Nang dia ka thuak natdan,
Na kam' gen zoulou ding;
Lungjin thukpen kong thuak,
Gawtmun pan honhong di'n,
Ka thuakna lian nang di'n, nang di'n,
Kei di'n bang hiam na ngap? D.S.
Thangvan ka inn pan in,
Nang di'n hiai teng konpuak;
Hotdamna kim, manbei,
Ka ngaihdamna itna;
Thawnpiak thupi konpuak, konpuak,
Kei di'n bang nonpuak hiam? D.S.
Na hinna neih teng leh,
Na hun Amah pia in;
Leitung dah paivek in,
Nop leh dah kop hong in;
Na neih tengteng tawi in, tawi in,
Na Hondampa juiin. D.S.

songs.title: Ngaiin Tuinak Thuk Leh Za Om
songs.author: Ira D Sankey

lines: Ngai in, Tuinak thuk leh za om,
Ngai in, a luangkhia hi;
Hondampa' nak apan luangkhia,
Vuk bang a ngouna hi! (2)
Hiai lui hong juan in,
Tuni'n zong luang hi;
Hongpai nuam khempeuh hongpai hen,
Mawhnate sawpsiang di'n.
Jesu in Kalvari khros ah,
Lungkhamtak in thuak hi;
Tua ah sisan piandang hongluang,
Vuk bang a ngouna hi! (2)
Aw, i vek in thei lehang maw,
Tua lui a damna om!
Sisan manpha kia muang le'ng maw,
Vuk bang a ngouna hi. (2)
Hongum Toupa hongkumsuk a,
Pai dia sap i hih chiang';
Tatna sisan mah muang lai ding,
Vuk bang a ngouna hi! (2)

songs.title: Tua Luiluang Ah Damna A Om
songs.author: F J Crosby

lines: Tua lui luang ah damna a om,
En in, tui sisan in luang;
Kalvari mual apan hongluang!
Thupina Lal sihna ah.
Aw, tua lui luang!
Hinna, damna lui luang!
A thawn in luang, kipak ing;
Aw, tua lui luang!
Hinna, damna lui luang!
Toupa phat un, honsiangsak.
Tua lui luang ah damna a om,
Nang gim leh tawl hongjuan in;
Tua ah na khelhna honkhuh ding,
Jesu'n damsak di'n honngak.
Tua lui luang ah damna a om,
Tu'n Jesu en in, hing in;
Na puakgik khros phung ah nga in,
Na vakmang honngaidam ding.
Tua lui luang ah damna a om,
Sisan a luang lui manpha;
Hong in, Hondampa'n nang honsam,
Tua sisan lui ah bual in.
Tunglam a kaihging kilawm tawh, Lasate kuate hi hiam ?
Ngai un hehpihna lian gen uh; Jehovah hehpihna lian.
Belamnou sisan pha a,
A puansilh uh sawp a ngoute hi uh (2vei)
Tangtawn mangtutphah kimvel a, Om gigekuate hihiam ?
Lei gimthuakna a kipan a, Van khawlna tungte hi uh.
En un a puan uh ngou mahmah, Nit nahimhim omlou hi;
En un a manglukhu uh vak, Thahsa Belamnou leisa.
Pathian' Belamnou innpi ah, Sun leh zan Ana sem uh;
Van tuikhuk in amau a vak, A khitui uh nul hulta.
Misiangthou Khrist a hotdamna, A la ngaih uh hi lailai;
Gimthuak a amaunate uh, La suak mangtutphah kim ah.
Toupa Jesu Na thupha in,
Mija lungsim taisak;
Aw Toupa, Na thu hoihdan dang,
Mija nunnopna hi.
Toupa Jesu hinna kei di'n,
Pathian kiang kithoihna;
Pa Pathian leh genthei kei di'n,
Kipahna gimnamtui.
Ken zong Toupa, ka sum leh pai,
Ka lungsim leh zaitha,
Lung kisik lou Amah pia leng,
Amah di'n gimnamtui.
Toupa Thupha, nopna simthu,
Mawhneite kiang gen ni;
Tangtawn hinna simthu pha hi,
Namchihta'n honjuan hen.
Aw Pathian, Nang Lalpen Na hi,
Ka lungsim uh Na en;
Bangkim ka gel uh Nangmah in,
Na hon musak gige.
Nang Na ihmu ngeikei hial a,
Kou Non veng gige hi;
Lungsim hoihpen honbawl inla,
Toupa Jesu vang in.
Nang thu thu in om nuam ung e,
Nang thu hinna ahi;
Huaiziakin hon theigige in,
Nangmah mite hi ung.
Khatvei Khrist nuamsa leh kilawm,
Mihing muh louh deidan hi;
Hizong dahna, sihna thuakin,
Deidanna A keksak ta.
Dahna thei Mi Amah en un,
Aw, Amah chiantak' kimu;
Ngai un, Amah vualzou vanglian,
Deidanna A keksakta. D.S.
Amah Pa Pathian kiang' tu'n om,
Nang adia hon thumsakin;
Amah zaw vualzou vanglian hi,
Deidanna a keksak ziak'.
Angel siangte A mai ah kun,
Leimiten pahtawina pia;
Amah zaw it tungnung ahi,
Deidanna A keksak ziak'.
Itna dik sangpen leh thukpen,
Tangtawn, tangtawna itna;
Amah kia a pethei ahi,
Deidanna a keksak ziak'.
Kalvari ah ka Honpa si,
Tua'h ka Toupa kilhbelhin om;
Khros ah kei di'n A sisan luang,
A lei zouta ka ngaihdamna.
Aw Kalvari tang mial tung ah!
Jesu'n A sisan suah kei di'n;
Aw Kalvari! mial Kalvari!
Tua ah ka Honpa si kei di'n.
Suangpi puakkham, vanpi hongmial,
Hon gum Toupa kuna sih lai';
Puanjak kekin thangvan pahna,
Sunni tumlou lampi a hong.
Toupa Jesu, lamdang nah e,
Kei dia Na hinna nong piak tel!
Khros gik Na pua, lungkham nong thuak,
Mulkimhuai hi, Kalvari ah!

songs.title: Ni Suahna Gamteng Mun Teng Ah
songs.author: Isaac Watts

lines: Nisuahna gam teng mun teng ah,
Toupa Jesu'n simthu lel ding;
Mualdawn khapi a tan lai teng,
Leitung ah A gam lian ding hi.
Mi namchih leh pauchih-a te'n,
A itna la ngaihin sa hi;
Naungek' awte'n phuangjak ding a,
A min pahtawi pah ding uhi.
A kianga thumna tawplou ding,
Bei theilou phatna khusak ding;
A min gimnamtui bang jamtou,
Jingteng kithoihna tawh ton ding.
A manna mun ah hauta uh,
Mitangte a hong pawtkhia ua;
Hin chimtakte'n tangtawn khawlna,
Muta uh mi zawngte nuamta.
A manna kilakna peuh ah,
Sihna tongsia a beita hi;
Adam mawh vanga mang louin,
Tangtawnin hinna tang chiat uh.
Jesu'n gam neih a pel theilou,
A man piain a thounawnta;
Pa Pathian in a kaihthawhin,
A min a gelh gam laibu ah.
Khemna ah lut kenla, lut khelhna ahi,
Vualzohna'n hong huh ding, midangte zou di'n;
Hangsan-in dou jel in, mial ngaih nuaisiah in,
Jesu lam en gige'n, honpii tawntung ding.
Panpih di'n Honpa ngen in,
Lungmuan, hihhat honkem ding;
Aman honpanpih nuam hi,
Honpii tawntung ding hi.
Lawm gilou nusia in, kamsia zanglou in,
Pathian' min zah inla, amawk in gen ken;
Ngaihsut siam, hahkat, nunnem, thutak inla,
Jesu lam en gige'n, honpii tawntung ding.
Pathian in vualzoute manglukhu pia ding,
I puk jel hangin ginna'n i vualzou ding;
Amah i Honpa'n i hatna thaksak ding,
Jesu lam en gige'n, honpii tawntung ding.
Gam teng ah khros sihna thupha,
A than in hongthang kimvel hen;
Kalvari ah khua hongvak hen,
A vak kawlmong pha'n vaksuak hen. (2)
Toupa, kou Pathian, Na nasep,
Simlei tung vannuai pha'n thang hen;
Na hehpihna nuaisiah theih louh,
Vannuai teng ah kithehjak hen. (2)

songs.title: Ka Lungkhamna Teng Jesu Kiang' Gen Ning
songs.author: E A Hoffman

lines: Ka lungkhamna teng Jesu kiang' gen ning,
Hiai puakgikte kei kia'n paw zou ke'ng;
Ka mangbatna ah a honpanpih ding,
Aman A it A tate kem hi.
Jesu kiang' gen ning!
Jesu kiang' gen ning!
Ka puakgikte kei kia'n paw zoulou;
Jesu kiang' gen ning!
Jesu kiang' gen ning!
Jesu kiain kei honpanpih thei.
Ka buainate teng Jesu kiang' gen ning,
Amah Lawm migi leh hehpihsiam;
Amah ngen leng Aman hon honkhia ding,
Ka buainate beisak pah ding hi.
Khem leh ze-et a om, Honpa ka ngai,
Ka puakgikte hondawn thei Amah;
Jesu kiang' gen ning, Jesu kiang' gen ning,
Ka buai leh lungkhamna hondawn ding.
Khawvel in khial dingin kei honzol hi!
Khial ding a khem in ka lungtang om!
Jesu kiang' gen ning, A honpanpih ding,
Leitung in kei a honzou kei ding.

songs.title: Jesu Nang Lung A Theihna In
songs.author: Bernard Of Clairvaux

lines: Jesu, Nang lunga theihna in,
Kei pahna'n hondimsak;
Hizong nuamsem Na mel muh ding,
Na kiang a tutkhawl ding.
Lungsim pilna in gel thei lou,
La in zong sa thei lou;
Na min sang a ging kilawmzaw,
Aw, michih Hondampa.
Aw, lungtang kisikte Lamet,
Aw, dawhtheite pahna;
Aw, pukte tung a Na hoih dan,
Aw, nang zongte tung ah!
Nang mu peuh in hamphatna mu,
Lei leh lai in lak mawh;
Jesu itna bang hi hiam chih,
A itte kia'n thei hi.
Jesu, Nang ka nopna uh hi'n,
Zonpen Na hih vang in;
Jesu, ka thupina uh hi'n,
Tangtawn, tangtawn dongin.
Tua jan ihmu dinden hi,
Beth-lem-khamuang mual ah;
Ganchingte'n daidide'n ching,
Om khipkhep belamte;
Ngai in! zaila ngaih kaih dang,
Van kihong pan hongluang;
Guam leh kawl a thawnsuak hi.
Tung Pathian vanglian hen!
Leitung ah A lemna leng hen,
Mihingte ah kideihsakna.
Huang apan kilawp a kuan,
Ganchingte tawh hong un;
Gimlim mura leh kham tawi,
Mipilte tawh hong un,
Amah kiang ah hongpai un,
A jalna gankuang ah;
Angelte la sakpih un.
Neih bang thilpiak hontawi un,
Naupiang etna hiding;
Tawi ding neilou khutvuak zong,
Lungtang a neih hoihpen;
Naupang kipakte honpii,
Lungdamhuai Khristmas ah!
Khelhna bei Jesu hongpiang.
Khawvel kipak hen! Toupa hong,
A Kumpipa sang hen;
Mi tengteng in lungsung awn hen,
Thangvan leh simlei mi'n, (2)
Thangvan, simlei mi'n la sa hen.
Khawvel nuam hen! Honpa'n vaihawm,
Mite'n la sa uhen;
Lou, tui, suang, mual leh phaijangte'n,
Lungdam la sakik un, (2)
Lungdam, lungdam la sakik un.
Thutak leh itna'n vai A hawm,
Namte a chiansak hi;
A diktatna thupinate,
A itna lamdangte, (2)
A itna, itna lamdangte.

songs.title: Ding Un! Ding Un Jesu Din!
songs.author: G Duffield

lines: Ding un! ding un! Jesu di'n!
Nou khros sepaihte aw;
A Kumpi puanlap khai un,
Manna thuak het kei hen!
Vualzou a vualzou jel di'n,
A sepaihte pii ding;
Galte khempeuh kizou a
Khrist, Toupa pen hih dong'.
Ding un! ding un! Jesu di'n!
Pengkul sapna jui in;
Tuni A ni thupi ah,
Gal khawkna lam juan un;
Simsenglouh galte dou un,
Muante'n A nna sem un,
Lungsim kihansuah chiatin,
Dou un zou ngei dingin.
Ding un! ding un! Jesu di'n!
Amah thahatna kia'n;
Sa hatna'n dou zoulou ding,
Nou hatna suang kei un;
Gospel van in kithuam un,
Thum gige'n kiveng un;
Sep ding lauhuaina mun ah,
Na omlou ngei kei un.
Ding un! ding un! Jesu di'n!
Kidou sung sawt lou ding;
Tuni a galdou husa,
Jingchia' vualzawh la ding;
Hinna lukhu kipia ding,
A vualzou mi kiang ah;
Thupina Kumpipa tawh,
Tangtawn vaihawmkhawm ding.

songs.title: Banghang Pathian In Hehpihna Hon Pia Hiam?
songs.author: Daniel W Whittle

lines: Banghang Pathian in hehpihna,
Honpia hiam, ka theilou;
Banghang Khrist in kei it taklou,
Amah dia hontan hiam.
Ahihhang' ka Muanpa ka thei hi,
Ken ka theizou hi, Aman a kemthei;
Amah kiang' ka piak, ka kepsak,
Tuani dongin kem ding hi.
Bangchi a hotdamna ginna,
Honpia hiam ka theilou;
Bangchi'n hiam A Thu ginna in,
Lungmuanna hontun hiam.
Bangchi a Kha in mi khelhna
Theisak hiam ka theilou;
A Thu ah Jesu kilaksak,
Amah muanna omsak.
Bang in kei hon ngak ahi hiam,
A sia apha thei ke'ng;
Ginna nopna hi zong theike'ng,
A mai ka muh main.
Ka Toupa chikchiang hongpai ding,
Sun hiam, jan hiam theikeng;
Sihna luiguam honkaipih diam,
Huihkhua'h ka tuak zaw diam.
Pathian itna, aw lian in sang,
Genseng vuallouh, gelhseng vuallouh;
Van aksi sangpen tung ah om,
Gawtmun nuainungpen tanpha'n om;
Takhial nupa lungkham a kun,
A Tapa pia ngaidam;
A takhial zong kitampih kik,
A khelhnate maisak.
Pathian itna manpha in siang,
Tehvuallouh in hat hi!
Angelte leh misiangthoute'n,
Tangtawn lain sa ding.
Kumsawt chimtakhuai a bei chian,
Lei mangtutphahte a man chian;
Pathian kiang a thum nuamlouten,
Suangpi leh tangte a kouh chian;
Pathian itna aw tullou lai,
Tehvuallouh in hat lai;
Adam suan tatna hehpihna,
Lei leh van misiang la.
Ngoutuisuahgiat laitui tang hen,
Tung a vanpi laipek tang hen;
Sing leh lou teng laikung tang hen,
Leimi zata'n gelh chiat hen aw;
Pathian itna gelhseng lou ding,
Tua ngoutuipi kang zong;
Pathian itna gelhseng lou ding,
Tua tung vanpi bei zong.
Juda maitam tung a,
Ganta sisante in,
Lungsung muanna pia theilou hi,
Khelhna sawpsiang theilou.
Khrist van Belamnou bel,
I khelhna teng pawmang;
Kithoihna tungnungzaw ahi,
Sisan manphazaw nei.
Ka ginna'n khutjak-in,
Na lutung' khut nga ning;
Kisik-a kong din kawmkawm in,
Ka khelhna kong phuang hi.
Ka kha'n a enkik a,
Puakgik A puak ka mu;
Hamsethuak singa kikhai in,
Ka khelhna Na pawta.
Huan, Nang ka Honpa aw,
Pahtawina teng tang in;
Kei tu-a pan tangtawn dong in,
Nang a ka hita hi.
Kongkhak bul ah Mikhual om;
Lutsak in!
Tua' na om gige khin hi:
Lutsak in!
Lutsak in A pai ma in,
Lutsak in Misiangthoupa;
Jesu Khrist, Pathian' Tapa,
Lutsak in!
Tu'n Amah na lungsung hon',
Lutsak in!
Na zekai leh pai man ding:
Lutsak in!
Lutsak in, na Lawm ahi,
Na kha hon hondam ding hi;
A tawp tanpha'n honkem ding,
Lutsak in!
A itna aw na ja hiam?
Lutsak in!
Tu mahma'n Amah tel in:
Lutsak in!
Kongkhak bul ah A ding a,
Kipahna a honpe ding;
Huan, A min na it ding hi,
Lutsak in!
Tu'n van Mikhual lutsak in:
Lutsak in!
Nang di'n ankuang honlui ding:
Lutsak in!
Na khelh ngaihdam honhilh din,
Huan, lei damsung a bei chia'n,
Van inn ah nang honpii ding,
Lutsak in!
Belamchingte'n zanlai' ching a,
A tutkhawlkhawm lai un;
Toupa' angel hongkumsuk a,
Thupina tang kimvel.
Launa'n amau lungjingsak hi,
'Lunglau kei hial unla,
Nou ading leh mi tengteng di'n,
Kipahna thu konpuak.'
'Tunin nou di'n David' khua ah,
David khanggui apan,
Hondampa Khrist Toupa hongpiang,
A theihna ding hiai hi.'
'Van Naungek na vamu ding uh,
Mihing muhtheiha koih;
Naupuan khat-a tuam-a kisial,
Gan ankuang sunga lum.'
Hichibang in Seraf-te'n gen,
Kipah la sa kawma;
Pathian phat angel tang honte,
Hong kuankheta uhi.
Pathian in thupina tang hen,
Lei ah lemthu leng hen;
Van apan mihing deihsakna,
Kipan, tawp ngeilou ding.

songs.title: Khatvei Ka Lung Kongkhak Mial Ah
songs.author: Rev S D Pheips

lines: Khatvei ka lung kongkhak mial ah aw ja'ng,
Khiala ihmu lai ka khanglouta;
A kiu Jesu hi, aman a kiuta,
Heutu nuamsa, honglut in, ka chi.
Honve leh, honve!
Honve, Heutu lutsak in;
Lungsim ah vanvak a hongvak ding ahi,
Heutu na lutsak takin.
Itna tatna ankuang honluita dia,
A mikhual kipak in honbawlta;
Ka kipah lai' tung a misiangthoute,
Nuam tuan ding ahi ua eita chi'ng.
Thutak melma tawh kidouna siang ah,
Ka phaw hi ka dawhkan a bawlkhol;
Hinna bawlhoih jel ka tuailaina tawh,
Thumna dawng in vualzawlna honpia.
Ompihna nuam in kei honvak lai ding,
It lou hial-a itna A honpiak;
Hiaia A nasep lai in vantung ah,
Thupina ankuang lui A chiam hi.
Belamchingte'n belam ching a,
Pawn-a a giahpih lai un;
Angel thupi hongkilak in,
'Lau kei unla, ngai dih ua;
Michih ading tangthupha leh,
Lungdamhuaipen,
Nou ading' konpuak hi,' chi.
Hondampa a hongpiangta hi,
Nou adi'n David khua ah;
Kumpi Khrist hi, Kumpi Khrist hi,
Chi in a vatangkou hi;
Kipahhuai Nau, A min Lamdang,
Lemgelpa, Tangtawn Pa,
Lemna Kumpi hi.
Pathian' Ta ahi, Nau hongpiang
Mikhial kei hontan dingin;
Pathian in hon it mahmah hi,
A Tapa tangkhat honpia;
Amah pak in hia'h i kikhawm,
A min phatin,
Aw khawvel zaila'n dim hen.
Jing in haichi tuh le'ng, migitna haichite,
Sun laitak leh nitak daikiak dongin zong;
Buhlak hun ding leh a at hun ding na ngak le'ng,
Kipakin i pai ding, buhphalte puain!
Buhphalte puain, buhphalte puain!
Kipak in i pai ding buhphalte puain!
Buhphalte puain, buhphalte puain!
Kipakin i pai ding, buhphalte puain!
Nisa lak leh niliap nua'h haichite tuh in,
Meipi kai laulou in khuadam thuak ngap le'ng;
Denchiang' buhlak hun ding, sepgim thatawl bei ding,
Kipakin i pai ding, buhphalte pua in!
Kapkawm in kuankhia in Heutupa dia tuh di'n,
Kiamna i tuahte'n i lungsung nasak zong;
I kahna hongbei chiang' lungdam in honsam ding,
Kipakin i pai ding, buhphalte pua in!
Jesu nung jui ding in ka kipanta, (3)
Kik nawn lou ding, kik nawn lou ding.
Kua'n honjui lou zong, Jesu ka jui ding, (3)
Kik nawn lou ding, kik nawn lou ding.
Khros tuh ka ma ah, khawvel ka nung ah, (3)
Kik nawn lou ding, kik nawn lou ding.
Ka Khros pua ding hi'ng, Jesu muh dong in, (3)
Kik nawn lou ding, kik nawn lou ding.

songs.title: Hondampa It Ka Kha Dia Ni
songs.author: John Keble

lines: Hondampa it, ka kha dia Ni,
Nang nong naichiang' khimkhua jing lou;
Na nasem mit nang honliah di'n,
Leitung meipi hongjing kei hen.
Jan-a ka ihmutkal inleng,
Muh theihlouh lauhuai tam mahleh;
Na ang-a jal bangin muang ning,
Toupa aw, sawlbang hongliah in.
Asun ajan in hongompi'n,
Toupa, Nang louin om thei ke'ng;
Jan hongnai chiang' hong ompih in,
Nang lou zaw sihna dou ngam la'ng.
Tuni'n Na ta it vakvai a,
Na thu hon limsaklou omleh,
Toupa, a tung ah zahngai in,
Mawhna khuk-a lut phal het ken.
Thawh chiang' hongnai, honvualzawl in,
Hiai leitung-a ka tam sung un;
Na itna tuipi a tum a,
Vantung ka hongtun tanpha un.
Damlou, tagahte veh jel in,
Na hehpihna khut in khoih in;
Sihna lusun ziak a kapte,
Lungmuang laikhun ah jalsak in.

songs.title: Tuni In Khawl Ni A Hong Tung

lines: Tuni in Khawlni a hongtung,
Amah phat dingin i kikhawm;
Jing a thou in Amah i bia,
Nuamsa leh kipakin i om.
I mawhnate thupha i tawi,
Nisim in mawh louhlai omlou;
Amah hon itna ngaihtuah chiang',
Lamdang i sa A honhawi lai.
Ni guk sung ei na i sem thei,
Khawlniin Pathian na kia sem;
Amah hoihna in honvuk jel,
Tuabang ding a Khawlni bawl hi.
Ka lungsim in van thu loungal,
Bangmah dang ngaihtuah kei hial hen;
Pathian siangthou A thupi dan,
Ngaihtuah hen a deihhuaipen hi.
Jesu bang-a thilhoih hih in,
Amah bang-a thu gen thei di'n;
Kha Siangthou Pathian kon ngen uh,
Van khawlna-a hontun ding in.
Huihpi lak' na sikkip in hon khouh diam?
Kidouna meipi a hong niamkai chiang in;
Tuihualte sang, sikkhaute kikan chiang',
Na sikkip a tolh diam, a kip ding hiam?
Ei hon lenkip den sikkip nei hang,
Tuipi tuihual hat zong kip den hi;
A ling theilou Suangpi tawh kizom,
Honpa' itna sung kiptak in kiphum.
Tuigeng ah na sikkip in honkhouh diam?
Tuihual ging a, suangpi kisel a nai chiang';
Tuihual leh huihpi'n hong kimkot chiang in,
Lauhuai tuihualte'n na long hong khuh diam?
Sihna tuite'n na hat tawp votsak chiang',
Tuachiang' na sikkip in a honkhouh na diam?
Tuihual tung' na lawhsam ngeikei ding hi,
Puanjak sung na sikkip in let sungteng.
Jing khuavak chiang in nang na mu ding hiam,
Tua longkhawlna thupi leh tua kham khuapi?
Hiai damsung huihpi a beiden hun in,
Na sikkip in vantung hontun ding hiam?

songs.title: Jing In Vasate'n Pathian A Pak Uh
songs.author: David E Jones

lines: Jingin vasate'n Pathian a pak uh,
Silpak teng in A thupina a phuang uh;
A siamsa teng in Amah pakchiat uh,
Mihingte kia loungal hilh ngai omlou.
Lei leh vanmin leng pak sam ve ni,
Amau sangin ei i piljaw hi:
Khawvel teng inleng pahtawi chiat hen,
Amah pahtawina la saseng kei ni.
Nitengin Na hoihna mu gige ung,
Sun leh jan tuk leh khal leng hong om gige;
Hun hongthak bangin kipahna hong thak,
Tangtawn sata nung la angelte tawh.
Pilna leh theihna thilhihtheihna in,
Mihing tengteng in Amah phat chiat leng leng,
Ei dinga a hoihna genseng kei ni,
Tangtawn' genseng kei ni A hon itna.

songs.title: Kuan In, Sem In, Kizang Bei In
songs.author: H Bonar

lines: Kuan in, sem in, kizangbei in,
Na pahna Pa' deihlam nasep;
Tua hi, Heutupa paina lam,
A nasempa'n jui lou ding hiam? (2)
Kuan in, sem in, athawn hilou,
Lei a manna van punna hi;
Mihing in honpakta lou zong,
Heutupa'n honpakta mahmah (2)
Kuan in, sem in, a hoih zou hi,
Aman honpahtak ngal aleh;
Thumang honkipahsak ngal leh,
Amah dia na sep thawn lou hi. (2)
Kuan in, sem in, sun a hih lai',
Khawvel jan mial pai mengmeng hi;
Jawntatna pai khia'n, thanuam in,
Khamangthangte vabang man in. (2)
Na kiang khuamial ah mi si hi,
Han ah nem ding lamet bei in;
Meisel lain tanvak suak in,
Mial sahpen vaksak ding meivak. (2)
Sem jel in, bah ken, thum kawm in,
Kha lamhaih man ding in pil in;
Khawvel lamlian ah kuankhia in,
A vakmang honpilut khial ken. (2)
Sem in, na nasep ah nuam in,
Semgim di'n khawl, vakvai di'n inn;
Mouneipa' aw na za pah ding,
Janlai' kikou, 'ngai in, Kong pai.' (2)
Toupa, hon tawpsak in Na hon
Vualzawlna tawh kipahna'n;
Na itna tang-in vualzou nu'ng,
Tatna hehpihna sung ah;
Aw, hon halhsak', aw, hon halhsak',
Hiai gamdaia khualzin lai'.
Kipahthu gen in konbia uh,
Na gospel kipahhuai ziak'n;
Ka lungsung uh leh hinna uah,
Na hotdamna'n gahsuang hen,
Muanhuai gige'n, muanhuai gige'n,
Thudik ah muanhuai nuam ung.
Leitung pawtkhiaksan nading a,
Puan kipei ka muh chiang un,
Angelte' kha tunga tuang in,
Sapna kipahhuai jui di'n;
Vai i hawm nuam, vai i hawm nuam,
Tawplou' Khrist tawh vaihawm nuam.

songs.title: Ngai Un Heutupa'n Tu'n Hon Sam
songs.author: Julia Sterling

lines: Ngai un, Heutupa'n tu'n honsam hi,
Hangsan leh muanhuaite;
Loua buh lak ding minzou vekta,
Hizong a semding tawm.
Kuan un, kuhkal, itsiam, migi'n leh
I Heutupa' min-in;
Thu kipahhuai hotdamna manbei,
Khawvel tenga phuang di'n.
Kuan unla, mangthangte honkhia un,
Khelh leh mial nuaisiahte;
Kuan unla, amaute hongkhia un,
Setan kolbulh phel un.
Kuan unla, liangvaite honsam un,
Itna ankuang um di'n;
Huan, Aman tangtawn hinna ann in,
Amau a nem ding hi.
Kuan un, nitum dek hi, mualdawn ah,
A hongtum pah ding hi;
A ni leh hun hongtung pah ding hi,
Na sep theih nawnlouh hun.

songs.title: Bang In Ka Moh Sawpsiang Thei
songs.author: R Lowry

lines: Bang in ka mawh sawpsiang thei?
Toupa Jesu' sisan kia in!
Bang in kei hondamsak thei?
Toupa Jesu' sisan kia in!
Aw, Jesu' sisan pha,
Vuk bang-a hon ngousak!
Tui dang sianna omlou,
Toupa Jesu' sisan loungal!
Ka sianna di'n hiai ka mu;
Toupa Jesu' sisan kia hi!
Ngaihdam ka nget theihna sun,
Toupa Jesu' sisan kia hi!
Mawh tan thei bangdang omlou,
Toupa Jesu' sisan loungal!
Ka thilhih hoih vang hilou,
Toupa Jesu' sisan vang hi!
Ka kingakna leh muanna,
Toupa Jesu' sisan kia hi!
Ka diktat theihna omsun,
Toupa Jesu' sisan kia hi!

songs.title: Kihei In Nang Mimang
songs.author: F J Crosby
songs.key: Doh is G (Tehna khata khuang thum pai)

lines: Kiheiin, nang mimang gim leh lungkham,
Ngaiin! Belampu Hoih in honsam tu'n;
Hondam di'n honzong, silsiang di'n honngak,
Kin in, Amah pom in halhal nawn ken.
Aw nem leh migi in Aman honsam,
Belampu Hoih sapna ngaikhia in;
Aw nem leh migi in Aman honsam,
Hon it-in, Ka kiang' hong ve, A chi.
Hon ngakngak veh, na mangthang tel ding maw?
A huang apan vakmang gawp mah leteh;
A hinna sisan in nang hontanta,
A itna lamdang gentheih vuallouh hi.
A thu ngai in, A hehpihna ngaihtuah!
Mawhlou, hizong sing ah nang' mawh A pua;
Ngaidam vekta, tangtawn hinna omta,
Nang adia tatna A honpiak ziakin.
Lamlui hongtawn in, lamdik hongtawn in,
Jesu ah lut in, Amah kongkhak hi;
Amah Belampu hi, aw nemin sam,
Na hatlouh tawh hong in, vakvak nawn ken.

songs.title: Na Mang Tutphah Leh Na Mang Lukhu
songs.author: E S Elliot

lines: Na mangtutphah leh Na manglukhu non nusia,
Leitung a kei dia Nong pai laiin;
Hizong Beth-lehem inn sung ah mun awnglou,
Nang misiangthou Nong pian nading'.
Hongluah in aw, Jesu, ka lung,
Nang di'n ka lungsung ah mun om;
Hongluah in aw, Jesu, ka lungsung!
Nang di'n ka lungsung ah mun om.
Angelte lasak in vanmun thupi thawn e,
Na Mang thupiakte a phuan laiun;
Hizong Toupa aw, mun niampen ah Nong piang,
Kingaihneuna niampen pen in.
Sihalte'n bukna nei, vasate'n zong bu nei,
Nuai simleia singlim liap lakah;
Hizong Nang Pathian' Tapa jalna gankuang,
Galili ah gam daidam ah.
Hinna thu tawh hongpai chia, Toupa Pathian aw,
Na mite dia salsuahna bawlin;
Hizong simmawh in om chia, linglukhu tawh,
Kalvari ah Nang honpii uh.
Hongluah in aw, Jesu, ka lung,
Nangma' khros kia ahi ka suan;
Hongluah in aw, Jesu, ka lungsung!
Nangma' khros kia ahi ka suan.
Thangvan zaila sak chiang' mualchih gamchih thawn ding,
Vualzoua Nang na hongpai nawn chiang';
Non sapna aw ja ning e, aw ka Toupa,
Nang di'n ka kiang' mun om honchi'n.
Ka lung nuam ding, Toupa Jesu,
Hongpai a kei nong sap chiang in;
Ka lung nuam ding, Toupa Jesu aw,
Hongpai a kei nong sap chiangin.

songs.title: Na Mohpuak Gikpan Na Suakta Nuam Hiam?
songs.author: L E Jones

lines: Na moh puakgik pan na suakta nuam hiam?
Suahtak na'ng hatna, sisan ah om;
Setan tung-a zawhna neih na ut hiam?
Hatna lamdang sisan ah om.
Thilhihtheihna, hihtheihna lamdang,
Belamnou' sisan ah;
Thilhhtheihna, hihtheihna lamdang,
Belamnou' sisan pha ahi.
Lungsim kisathei na paisan nuam hiam?
Suahtak na'ng hatna, sisan ah om;
Sawpsiangna Kalvari tuinak juan in,
Hatna lamdang sisan ah om.
Vuk sang-a ngouzaw a ngou na ut hiam?
Ngou theihna'ng hatna, sisan ah om;
Tua hinna tui luangin mawhna sawpsiang,
Hatna lamdang sisan ah om.
Na Kumpi Jesu' nna na sem nuam hiam?
Sep theihna'ng hatna, sisan ah om;
Niteng A phatna la na sa nuam hiam?
Hatna lamdang sisan ah om.
Aw Khrist, ka kha'n Nang ah muta,
Nang kia ah a muta;
Muanna, pahna ka zon ka zon,
Nopsakna tua thei phet.
Tu'n Khrist lou lungkimna dang bei,
Kei di'n min dang omlou;
Itna, hinna, pahna tawplou,
Toupa Jesu, Nang ah.
Khawlna leh kipahna ka ngai,
Nang hilou, amau ngai;
Hizong Hondampa ka pelh lai',
A itna'n a honman.
Bel gawpsa sung ka zong Toupa,
Maijen! Tui lah omlou!
Dawn ding a ka kunsuk aleh,
Khem in ka om maimah.
Vualnopna mualliamsa ngai ing,
Nang ngaiin kap ngei ke'ng;
Hehpihna in Na it-huaina,
A hon muhsak mateng.

songs.title: Tun Jesu Din Thu Kam Khat
songs.author: Fanny J Crosby

lines: Tu'n Jesu di'n thu kam khat,
Na Lawm ngaihpen, dikpen;
Honkipaksak, honhilh in,
Nang dia honbawlsakte.
Tu'n Jesu di'n thu kam khat,
I lampi' honhuh ding!
Thu kam khat lel Jesu di'n,
Aw gen, aw sa'n, thum in.
Tu'n Jesu di'n thu kam khat,
Na khelh ngaihdam na thei;
Aman honhehpih vang-in,
Van ah inn tun tum in.
Tu'n Jesu di'n thu kam khat,
Khros hi theilou ding hi;
'Ka Hondampa ka it hi,
Kei di'n A hin pia,' chih.
Tu'n Jesu di'n thu kam khat,
Hun hoih mawk mansak ken;
Sepding limsaklouhna in,
Dahnate a omsak.
Tu'n Jesu di'n thu kam khat,
Na ginna hatlah leh;
Na hatlah pan thou inla,
Aban Amah khiat in.
Hounem, itsiam, aw Pathian,
Mi itna in Na dim;
Tembang kideih amau gel,
Simthu pha tawh gawm in;
Na vangletna donkhawm in,
Na vang honzou uh hen,
Phamna'n gibang khen mateng,
Simthu chiam pellou di'n.
Hiai leitung a Nong lenlai'
Kana vangkhua' Na hei;
Lambang Na pak kitenna,
Uain nek nuam zoupi'n;
Uain bangin amau gel,
Taksapna uh guan in;
Na min honlou jel uh hen,
Tangbang a damsung uh.
Amau gel paibang kopna'n,
Na simthu hoih mahmah;
Inntum suanga phungching in,
Toupa tuibang tung in;
Amau Nang lumbang sung in,
Siangsung phungching ding in,
Lambang pak ung Toupa' min,
Na banjal ah nga ung.
Aman honpii ka kipak hi,
Aw, thu, van lungmuanna a dim;
Koi ah omin bangteng hih leng,
Pathian' khut hi kei honpii jel.
Aman honpii, Aman honpii!
A khut hat in kei honpii hi;
Amah jui muanhuai ka hi ding,
A khut hat-a A honpii ziak'.
Akal in dahluatna bang ah,
Akal in Eden pallun ah;
Buaina tuipi tung' hizong leh,
Pathian' khut hi kei honpii jel.
Toupa, Na khut ken ka len dia,
Phun lou leh lungkim in om ning,
Ka hih hih ah kipakta ning,
Ka Pathian in A honpii ziak'.
Leitung a ka nna a bei chian,
Nang ziak a gal ka zawh chiangin;
Sihnate bang lau nawn kei ning,
Jordan kan-a Non pii ziakin.
Aw, Nang omna peuh ka kha in nuamsa hi,
Gim ka thuak lai in Nang kon sam;
Sunkim ka kinepna, jankhua sawt ka la,
Ka lamet hotdamna, ka bangkim!
Hon Chingpa it, Na belamte toh kaw' om,
Amau itna ann-a vak di'n?
Bangding in sihna luikuam ah ka kap dia,
Hiai khawvel gamdai a vakvaiin?
Bangdi'n Na kiang apan ka vakmang ding hiam?
Gamdai a gilkial a kap in?
Na melma in ka lungkham muin nuam ding,
Ka khitui mu in nuihmai ding hi.
Hondampa it, Na mel honmusak gige'n,
Na kha muanna honpia inla;
Na itna ngaihdamna kitheihna nuamin,
Ka kha lungkham, thawmhau muangsak in.
Angel sangsawmte Na mel muin nuam uh,
Sangsawm tampi'n Na paukam ngak;
Na paukam tangtawn in manglouin ging hi,
Tangtawnin Toupa, Nangmah honphat.
Jankhua dai! Jankhua siang!
Dai zou vek, vaksuak vek;
Naungek leh A nu siangthou kim,
Naungek siangthou ngaihhuai, chingkam
Muanga lumin A om. (2)
Jankhua dai! Jankhua siang!
Belamchingte ling uh;
Van angelte'n la honsa uh,
Haleluia, chi'n phat la sa;
Khrist Hondampa piangta. (2)
Jankhua dai! Jankhua siang!
Pathian' Ta, itna vak;
Na mai ah itna vak hongtang
Itna tatna khua hongvakta;
Tou Jesu Na pianin. (2)
Jankhua dai! Jan siangpen!
Van Aksi, hongtan in;
Angelte tawh la sa ni hang,
Haleluia, Mangpen, chiin,
Khrist Hondampa piangta. (2)
Laukha saltang leh khelh gik pua kawm a,
Lungkham, mangbang a mau ka vaih lai in;
Tua Kalvari sing hamsethuak khros ah,
Ka Toupa'n zawhna honpiata.
Aw khros! Aw khros!
Aw khros! Kei mikhial siamtanna;
Aw khros! Aw khros!
Aw khros! Kei hon pahtawipen.
Kei mikhial nin-gawp-a hihtheih neilou,
Hoih ka na tup nak theihna masuanin;
Lungkhama mau vakvai ka na hi zong,
Ka Toupa'n zawhna honpiata.
Kei mikhial mangthangsa kikilhden in,
Keiah tu'n Jesu Khrist a hingta hi;
Leitung in honhihbuai theita lou ding,
Ka Toupa'n zawhna honpiata.
Hinsung buai, lungkhamna hongtung zong leh,
Jesu Khrist ka phaw ahi, lau kei ning;
Sunchin Amah pakin la sata ning,
Ka Toupa'n honzawhsak ziakin.
Toupa' pengkul honggin chiang in hun beina a honghi dia,
Tangtawn jingkhua hoih a hong vakkhiata ding;
Luigal gam nuam ah leimi hotdamte kimuhkhawm chiang in,
Tunglam a min sap chiang' tua ah ka om ding.
Tunglama min sapkhawm chiangin, (3)
Tunglam a min sap chiang' tua ah ka om ding.
Meikai lou tua jingkhua vak-a Khrist-a misite thou a,
A thawhnawnna thupina a tan chiang un;
Vandumte khen-a a inn ua A telte kikhop chiang in,
Tunglama min sap chiang' tua ah ka om ding.
Phalvak pan nitum dongin Heutupa dingin na sem ning,
A itna leh khawtuahna lamdang gen ning;
Tuachiang' lei hinkhua hongbei a, Ka na ka sep zawh chiangin,
Tunglama min sap chiang' tua ah ka om ding.
Gamdaia hambang ka vaih sung,
Toupa aw, honhuai in;
Tang a pipu hiai gamlei ah,
Nang louin mang zou uh.
Pharo' gam Izip apan in,
Kanan gamlei siangthou,
Sun a ngoumei, jan a mei in,
Honpii tung ngei ding hi.
Na gamchiam kongtun theih na'ng un,
Mang lou di'n honpii in;
Kou hon nadou ding khempeuhte,
Nangma'n hawlkhe jel in;
Izip gamlei ngai nawnlou ding,
Tua gam ka tun chiang un;
Zion tangvum ka kal ding ua,
Sunchin Nang honphat in.
Nang louin zaw tua gamlei nuam,
Kuamah hongtung lou ding;
Jordan chiaukuam khimkhua jinna,
Gal kai ngeingei ding hi'ng;
Toupa, Nang non itna vang in,
Muanna khain leng n'ung;
Huan, Jordan chiaugal hongkaiin,
Tangtawnin tutkhawl n'ung.
Ngaiin, Toupa Jesu kikou,
'Tuni a kua sem dia kuan ding?
Buh min lua a la ding ngak hi;
Kuain buhphal pua ding hiam?'
Heutupa'n nakpi in honsam,
Kipahman tampi honchiam;
Kipaka hi chia dawng ding kua?
'Hia'h om ing, kei honsawl in!' (2)
Tuipi gal na kai theihlouh ziak,
Awilou gam na phakei zong;
Amau naisem ah na mu thei,
Kongbul ah leng na huh thei,
Tampi pezou kei mah lechin,
Meithai piak zah kia leng hoih;
Tawmkha Jesu dia na sep leng,
A muhin manpha ding hi. (2)
Angel bang na pau theilou zong.
Paul bang na gen theilou zong;
Jesu' itna na hilh thei a,
Miteng dia si na gen thei;
Vaihawmna lauhuaitak inleng,
Mikhial na lausak lah zong,
Hondampa hehpihna ang ah,
Naupangte na pii thei hi. (2)
Zion tang tunga ding sang a,
Van gam lampi kawkmuh a;
Miteng dia hinna pia galvil,
Hi thei kei mah lechin leng;
Na thumsakna leh thilpiak in,
Pathian' deihlam na sem thei;
Zawlnei ban domkang Aron bang,
Na septheih khomkhom sem in. (2)
Upa lak' na phatuam kei zong,
Khrist ei Honchingpa'n hiai chi;
'Ka belamnoute vak inla,
A bat ding un ann koih in.'
Naupang neu A kiang na pii te,
Na suangmantam honghi ding;
Tung thangvan tuang na tun chiangin,
Na suangmantam honghi ding. (2)
'Ka hih theih bangmah a om kei,'
Kuamah jakin chi het ken;
Sun, jan mihing laukha mang hi,
Heutu'n nasem di'n honsam;
Kipaktakin A nna sang in,
A nasep kipahna ding;
A honsapna kintak' dawng in,
'Hia'h ka om, honsawl in,' chi'n. (2)

songs.title: Ka Kipak Pa Vana Om In Hon Hilh
songs.author: P P Bliss

lines: Ka kipak, Pa van-a om in honhilh,
A honpiak Laibu sung ah A itna;
Bible sung ah thillamdangte ka mu,
Hiai manpha penpen hi, Jesu'n hon it.
Jesu'n hon it ka kipak mahmah,
Jesu'n hon it, Jesu'n hon it,
Jesu'n hon it, ka kipak mahmah,
Kei nangawn A hon it.
Amah na ngilhin na vakmang leng zong,
A hon it lailai ka manna peuh ah;
A hon itna huangsung juan ka tai a,
Jesu'n hon it chih ka theihkhiak lai in.
Aw, la khat lel sak theih ka neih aleh,
A kilawmna a Mangpen ka muh chiang';
Hiai pen ka la ahi ding tangtawn in,
'Aw Jesun hon it a lamdang hi,' chih.
Jesu'n hon it, Amah ka it ka thei,
Ka kha liangvai tan di'n it man hongkum;
Hi, hon it manin sing ah hongsi hi,
Aw, ka theichian hi, Jesu'n kei hon it.
Bangchi'n na thei a, chi'n nondot uleh,
Jesu thupi hen, ka thei mahmah hi;
Pathian' Kha Siang in kei hontheihpih hi,
Hon theihpih gige hi Jesu'n hon it.
Hiai kitheihchinna ah khawlna ka mu,
Jesu ah muang in, ka thei, hampha hi'ng;
Lungdong Setan in ka kha taisan tu'n,
Jesun hon it hi chih ka hilh lai-in.
Toupa, Na Nitak-an ah mu'ng,
Na hehpihna thupi;
Kipahpiha kei mun nonpiak,
Lamdangsa penpen ing.
Kei khelhna a dim a nin-gawp,
Ka Pathian tung a hel!
Kei, Na Tapa khros a kilhlum,
A sisan khe a chil.
Hiai hehpihna lamdang nah e,
Kei mikhial mun Nonpiak!
Ka Hondampa'n khut in honlen,
Ka Jesu'n kei honsam.
Lei misiang leh van mipite,
Kigawmkhawm in phat un;
Ei a bang Hondampa omlou,
A itna bang omlou.
Mialna omlou ding hi, Jesu hongchiang',
Mialna omlou ding hi, Jesu hongchiang';
Mialna omlou ding hi, Jesu hongchiang',
A itte piikhawm dingin.
A itte piikhawm dingin,
A itte piikhawm dingin;
Mialna omlou ding hi, Jesu hongchiang',
A itte piikhawm dingin.
Lungkham om nawnlou ding, Jesu hongchiang',
Lungkham om nawnlou ding, Jesu hongchiang',
Jingsol aksi vak tawh Jesu hongchiang',
A itte piikhawm dingin.
Kahna om nawnlou ding, Jesu hongchiang',
Kahna om nawnlou ding, Jesu hongchiang',
Vualzawlna thupi tawh A hong paichiang',
A itte piikhawm dingin.
Kipahna la sa ding, Jesu hongchiang',
Kipahna la sa ding, Jesu hongchiang';
Kipahna kikhop tawh, Jesu hongchiang',
A itte piikhawm dingin.

songs.title: Jesu' Thu Kei Hon Hilh In Aw
songs.author: Fanny J Crosby

lines: Jesu' thu kei honhilh in aw,
Ka lungsung ah hon gelh in;
Jesu' thu manpha honhilh in,
Ngaihnop-huaipen, manphapen,
Jesu a pian in angelte'n,
Kipahpihin la sa uh;
'Van ah Pathian thupipen hen,
Lei ah muanna leh pahna.'
Jesu' thu kei honhilh in aw,
Ka lungsung ah hon gelh in;
Jesu' thu manpha honhilh in,
Ngaihnop-huaipen, manphapen.
Jesu damsung thu honhilh in,
Gamdai bang a an-ngawl a,
Ka khelh vang-a khemna thuaka,
Hihhang'Amah vualzou hi;
Kumtam A sepgim honhilh in,
Lungkham A thuak honhilh in;
Simmawh leh gimthuak a oma,
Deihlouh, inn-bei leh genthei.
A sihna khros thu honhilh in,
Lungkham leh na A thuakna;
A vuina han thu honhilh in,
A hinkik dan honhilh in;
Tua thu ah itna nou ngiingei,
Chiang semsemin ka mu thei;
Itna'n hon tanzou, chi'n honhuau,
Kipahna khitui a luang.
Biak hun kipahhuai ahi,
Lungtang kingaihniam lai;
Jesu i Hondampa leh
Lawm kiang' i kikhawm;
Amah muangin naih lehang,
Honhumna tangkhawm di'n;
A tawlte dia damna hi!
Aw, tua' om nuam na'n chia!
Biak hun kipahhuai!
Biak hun kipahhuai!
A tawlte dia damna hi!
Aw, tua' mun om nuam hi!
Biak hun kipahhuai ahi,
I Honpa hongnai chiang';
Itna nou ngiingei in A'
Mite ngaikhia ding;
I buainate A khephung
Nga thei ding, honhilh chiang';
A tawlte dia damna hi!
Aw, tua' om nuam na'n chia!
Biak hun kipahhuai ahi,
Khem leh ze-et mite'n;
Amaute itpa, Honpa,
Dahnate hilh lai;
Hon dahpihna lungtang in,
Mangbatna a lamang;
A tawlte dia damna hi!
Aw, tua' om nuam na'n chia!

songs.title: Toupa Jesu, Na Kiang Kong Thum
songs.author: Eliza H Hamilton

lines: Toupa Jesu, Na kiang kong thum,
Non hut louhleh kei siding hi'ng;
Aw Na hotdamna honpuak in,
Ka hih bang' honpom in.
Ka hih bang' honpom in,
Ka hih bang' honpom in;
Ka suan sun hiai: Khrist kei dia si!
Ka hih bang' honpom in.
Hihtheih neilou, mawhna a dim,
Hizong kei di'n Na si pawt hi;
Na deihlam in Na honbawl thei,
Ka hih bang' honpom in.
Kisakkholhna ken bawlthei lou,
Ka tup phapen kenjui zoulou;
Hizong Na min in hon hondam,
Ka hih bang' honpom in.
Honmu in, Na khebul' ka om,
Pha na sak bang in honbawl in;
Na na pan in, Na na zou in,
Ka hih bang' honpom in.
Damsung hoihpen zong tom hi,
Singteh pulh tawh kibang hi;
Buhphal gak tawh kibang hi, hun lap in!
Nite bei mengmeng in gen,
Kikhel thei hun hongnai hi;
Sihna gamgi kheng pah ding, hun lap in!
Hun lap in! hun lap in!
Jesu'n nang honsap lai ahi, hun lap in!
Khelhna a na omden leh,
Hinna kong hon laplou in,
Nang di'n a kikhel ding hi, hun lap in!
Pak hoih pente vul mengmeng,
Tuailai leh kilawmna bei;
Aw, hun sawt na nei kei hi, hun lap in!
Pathian' Kha in honchial lai';
Khial aw, na vakmang nawn ken;
Lamet na beisak khading, hun lap in!
Adak ani bei mengmeng,
Sih leh vaihawmna naita;
Jesu' angsung delh meng in, hun lap in!
Kithaman hiam ngaihsun in,
Sihna gi na kan main;
Na kha gawtmun a tun ma'n, hunlap in!
Khial aw, vauna ngaihsak in,
Toupa telpiin neiin;
Tua chiang' van teng kipak ding, hun lap in!
Mial apan vak honjuan in,
Jesu'n nang honbawl dik hen;
Tujan van juan kipan in, hun lap in!

songs.title: Hun Tuibang Kiam In Mual Khum Jel
songs.author: Jennie Wilson

lines: Hun tuibang kiam in mualkhum jel,
Lei thil tangtawn daih omlou;
Tangtawn thilte kia lamen in,
Pathian' khut muanhuai len in.
Len in, Pathian' khut len in,
Len in, Pathian' khut len in;
Tangtawn thilte kia lamen in,
Pathian' khut muanhuai len in.
Honnusia ngeiloupa muang in,
Damsung' bangteng na tuak zong!
Na lawm ngaihte'n honnusia zong,
Amah naisemin len in.
Khawvel hauhsaknate eng ken,
Kintakin siain bei hi;
Van-gou hauhsaknate zong in,
A mang thei ngeilou gou hi.
Na damsung zin na zawh chiangin,
Pathian dia na muanhuai leh;
Tua van innpi kilawm leh vak,
Na kha'n nuamsa'n a luah ding.
Khatvei Kumpi David khua ah,
Bawng-inn thupi lou khat om;
Tua lai' nu khat in a nau sial,
Gan-ankuang A jalna mun;
Tua tun nunnem Mari ahi,
Jesu Khrist, a naungek ahi.
Van apan lei ah hongkumsuk,
Miteng' Pathian leh Toupa;
Amah di'n gan-inn A inn hi,
A lupna gan lupna mun;
Mi tagah leh mi niamte tawh,
Lei ah i Honpa hongtengta.
Naupang lamdangtak a hih lai',
Zahdan siam, thumandan siam;
Nu kingainiam it-in enjui,
A ban kham-in A lum hi;
Khristian naupangte tengteng leng,
Amah bang thumang ding ahi.
Amah naupangte Etjui di'n,
Niteng ei bangin A khang;
Amah hatlou, panpihbei hi,
Ei bang' dah leh nuam theita;
Ei' lungkhamna hongthuakpih hi,
I nuamna zong hontanpih hi.
Hun tawp chiang'Amah i mu ding,
A hongtatna itna hang;
Tua naupang deihhuai leh nunnem,
Aman A tate pii jel hi,
Amah a paina munmun ah.
Tua gan-inn sung ah hilouin,
Bawngte omna hilouin;
Amah i mu ding vantung ah;
Pathian taklam ah tu hi,
Aksi bang lukhu khuk chiangin,
Puan ngou silh taten um ding hi.
Aw Toupa, ka Pathian, Na siamsil bawlte,
Lamdanglua sa a ka ngaihtuah chiang in;
Aksite ka mu, van-ging thupi ka ja,
Na thilhihtheihna lei leh van in lak.
Tua chiang' ka kha'n Honpa Pathian honphat,
Na thupi lua, Na thupi lua!
Tua chiang' ka kha'n Honpa Pathian honphat,
Na thupi lua, Na thupi lua!
Gammang nuai leh gam mun nuama ka pai chiang',
Sing a vasate lasak hoih ka ja;
Mualsang thupi tung pan ka dakkhiak chiangin,
Luita ging ja'ng, huihkhi honsem thei ing.
Pathian in A Tapa zong sitlou hiala,
Si dia honsawl lawmlawm lung in gel maw'ng;
Khros tunga ka puakgik kipaktak a pua,
Sisan luang-a si, ka khelhna lamang.
Pahtawina thupi tawh Khrist hongpai nawn chiang',
Kei honglak chiang' ka lung nuam a dim ding;
Tua chiang'Amah bia in A ma ah kun ning,
Ka Pathian Na thupi lua chi'n gen ning.

songs.title: Sianna Dingin Jesu Kiang Na Zuanta Hiam?
songs.author: Rev E A Hoffman

lines: Sianna dingin Jesu kiang na juanta hiam?
Belamnou' sisan ah na bual hiam?
Tuin A hehpihna na muangkim na hiam?
Belamnou' sisan ah na bual hiam?
A si ah na bual hiam?
Belamnou' sisan ah na bual hiam?
Na silhpuan leh na lungsung sian nading in,
Belamnou' sisan ah na bual hiam?
Niteng' Hondampa tawh tonin na pai hiam?
Belamnou' sisan ah na bual hiam?
A sihna muangin na khawl tawldamta hiam?
Belamnou' sisan' na bual nuam hiam?
Mouneipa hongpai chiang' na puan a ngou diam?
Belamnou' sisan a sawpsiang in?
Innpi vak luah di'n mansa'n na om nuam hiam?
Belamnou' sisan ah na bual hiam?
Khelhnaa nin sia, na silhpuan paikhia in,
Belamnou' sisan ah kibual in;
Laukha nin silsiang na'ng tuikhuk khat luang hi,
Aw, Belamnou' sisan ah bual in!
Simsenglouh sian nungin tua tui kiamlou lai,
Belamnou' sisan ah na siang hiam?
Namchihta di'n sisan tuibang kanglou lai,
Belamnou' sisan ah hongbual in.
Ka hinna Kumpipa thupi,
Manglukhu kon khusak;
Na linglukhu ka ngilh khading,
Kalvari hontun in.
Getsemani ka ngilh khading,
Na lungjinna ka ngilh khading;
Kei non itna ka ngilh khading,
Kalvari hontun in.
Na jalna hankhuk honensak',
Nang itte'n honsunna;
Angel puan ngou silhte'n honveng,
Hankhuk-a Na jal lai.
Mari bangin jan mial laiin,
Thilpiak tawh hongpai ning;
Na nutsiat hanvuak hong ensak'
Kalvari hontun in.
Toupa, niteng ka khros puain,
Nang di'n hin ka ut hi;
Na lungkhamna nou dawnpih in,
Kei di'n bangkim Na thuak.
Hankhuk sung ah lum hi,
Hong gumpa Jesu!
A thawhnawn ni ding ngak,
Ka Tou Jesu!
Han apan-in thounawnta,
Zawhna thupiin galte zou hi;
Hankhuk mial apan vualzouin thounawnta,
Tangtawn-a misiangthou tawh vaihawm dingin,
Thounawnta! Thounawnta!
Haleluia! Khrist thounawn!
A jalna ching thawn uh,
Hong gumpa Jesu!
A luang chiamteh thawn uh,
Ka Tou Jesu!
Kha phamna'n zoulou hi,
Hong gumpa Jesu!
A henkol buh phel hi,
Ka Tou Jesu!

songs.title: Lungsim Leh Aw Toh Toupa Phat Ning
songs.author: Kyman G Guyler

lines: Lungsim leh aw toh Toupa phat ning,
Amah tung ah kipak ning;
A hon itna lamdang ka phat ding,
Hiai ka la hiding hi:
Ka khelhna teng Aman lamang hi,
A min siang phat un (2);
Ka khelhna teng Aman lamang hi,
Haleluia 'min phat un.
Khelh puakgik tawh Amah ka zot chiang',
Khawlna leh muanna deihin;
Ka thumna jain honsuaktasak,
Hiai ka la hiding hi:
Ka hat tawp dongin Amah phat ning,
Sihna zoupa ahih vang';
Tangtawnin Amah phat tawntung ning,
Hiai ka la hiding hi:
A zong khempeuh adingin mun om,
A ut peuhmah in juan un;
Kipahna kim Toupa kiang ah om,
Hiai ka la hiding hi.
Jesu, lung a ka it, ka gulh,
Na hehpihna mahmah ka ngen;
Lungkimtakin honpia'n, Toupa,
Nang kia kon it theihna dingin.
Minthang khuapi, suangmantam khua,
Mite'n lunggulhin ngai mahleh;
Ka kha'n a deih bangdang omlou,
Na omna peuh kei adi'n van.
Toupa, Na itna tehpihbei,
Lei thil bangmah tel ding omlou;
Ngaiin tunglam kon en gige,
Chik leh Na mel ka mu diam, chi'n.
Paradis ah pahna tam zong,
Pak hoih muhnop-huai tam mahleh;
Ka lungsim hihnuam thei bangmah,
Na hon itna bangval omlou.
Nang tellou-in van thupina'n,
Ka kha kipaksak theilou ding;
Leitung lungkhamna mun hi zong,
Nang tawh omin ka lungkim hi.

songs.title: Na Thupi Na Tengteng Mu Dingin
songs.author: Geo F Root

lines: Na thupina tengteng mu ding in,
Ka mitmial hon hihvaksak in;
Sum leh pai leh bangdang teng sang in,
Kei ding in tuamah hoihpen hi;
Khawvel leh sum tengteng mang ding,
Ka Pathian' thu mang ngeilou ding,
Tangtawn a hinna thu hontheisak,
Pathian leh Mihing Jesu in.

songs.title: Kumpipa Gam, Thupi Hong Tung Ding Om
songs.author: El Nathan

lines: Kumpipa gam thupi hongtung ding om thangvan khen gam ah,
Tua ah misiangthoute kumsim in tam hi;
Nite kiam hulhul in tua Kumpipa gam honnaisak hi,
Kumpipa gam hongtun ding a nai manin.
Aw, Kumpipa gam hongtung ding naita hi, (2)
Kimansak in, ka kha aw,
Pengkul hongging pah khading,
Kumpipa thupi in hongkimu ding.
Tua Kumpipa gam leh thupina bawlkholh lametna leh,
I Hondampa hongkimu ding ngakna in;
I tanna khawvel panin eite honsuaktasak uhi,
Kumpipa gam hongtun ding a nai man in!
Kumpipa gam hongtun chiang' i mu ding i Toupa nuamsa,
A gam tun ma'n Kumpipa hongkimu ding;
Haleluia, A min phat in, A sisan in honleita,
Aw Kumpipa gam hongtun ding naita hi.
Aw khawvel in a ngak sawt mahmah manin tawlgawpta hi,
Lau uh ahihman in mite lungkia hi;
Kumpipa gam thu amau hilhin lain halhsak ve ni,
Kumpipa gam hongtun ding naita, chi in.
Saptuam kingakna khat kia,
A Toupa Jesu hi;
Toupa' thilsiam thak ahi,
Kha leh Thu-a siamthak;
Van apan hongkum, hongzong,
A mou siangthou hi di'n;
A sisan ngeiin honglei,
A si, Saptuam hinna'ng.
Namchih pana telkhawmte,
Khrist ah pumkhat hi uh;
Hotdamna khat, pianna khat
Toupa khat, ginna khat;
Min khat kia muang in phat ni,
An khat kia mah ne hi;
Lamet khat kia a nei a,
Itna kim piak ahi.
Sepgim leh gimthuakna ah,
Niteng galdouna ah;
Tangtawn muanna buchinna,
Kuhkalin a ngak hi;
A vangletna buchinna,
A mitin a mu ding;
Saptuam vualzou vanglian in,
Tangtawn khawlna tang ding.
Leia a om sung inzong,
Pathian Mi-thum tawh khat;
Lei a tatsa mite teng,
Muhtheih louh in kizom;
Aw siangthoute, nuamsate,
Toupa, honvualjawl in;
Kiniamkhiak leh chingkam in,
Nang tawh kithuah ni ung.

songs.title: Luiphai Nuam Ah Ka Hondampa Ka Jui Suk Ding
songs.author: Rev W O Cushing

lines: Luiphai nuam ah ka Hondampa ka juisuk ding,
Pak hoih a pakna, tui lim a luanna mun ah;
Aman honpiina peuh ah ka jui, ka jui jel ding,
Amah jui tawntung ding manglukhu ngah dong.
Jui ing! Jui ing! Jesu ka jui ding hi,
Koi ah leng, munchih ah ka jui jel ding hi!
Jui ing! Jui ing! Jesu ka jui ding hi,
Aman honpiina peuh ah ka jui jel ding.
Luiphai nuam ah ka Hondampa ka juisuk ding,
Huihpi a nunna, tui lauhuai a luanna ah;
