A khutin honpii ding a, ken ka lau ngeikei ding,
Ka Toupa nai leh lauhuaite lau lou ding.
Luikuam thukpi leh mual sangpipi tung ah zong,
Ka Hondampa tawh kinai tawntung' ka om ding;
Amah painasa ah kei bittakin honpi ding,
Pathian' omna misiangte khawlna dongin.
Lungkham mangbanga ka om laiin,
Jesu'n kei hon awlmawh hiam?
Puakgik-a ka lung a jin laitakin,
Ka lampi saua tawlhuaiin?
Hon awlmawh, honkhawtuah ka thei,
Ka dahna honthuakpih hi;
Jan khawmial leh lam haksa ah,
Ka Hondampa'n kei honkhawtuah hi.
Ka lampi mial a ka lau laiin,
Jesu'n kei hon awlmawh hiam?
Sun khawvak beia jan mial hongtunin,
Ka kiang nai di'n honngaihsak hiam?
Khemna ka doua ka zawh louhin,
Jesu'n kei hon awlmawh hiam?
Ka daha jankhua a ka kah laiin,
Ka lungkham a bei theihlouh in?
Leia itpente ka khen laiin,
Jesu'n kei hon awlmawh hiam?
Ka dahna, lungkhamna a nat luat in,
Honmu in khawk honsakpih diam?
Khelhna nuaisiah nou khate aw,
Toupa' kiang honjuan un;
Ama'n khawlna honpia ding hi,
Amah Thu taksang un.
Amah muang un! aw muang mai un!
Tu'n Amah muang un!
Hon gum ding hi, hon gum ding hi!
Tu'n hon hondam ding.
Toupa Jesu'n A sisan pia,
Manpha mantampen hi;
A sisan pha tuibang hongluang,
Vuk bang-a sianna hi.
Jesu Thutak, Lampi ahi,
Khawlna gam zotna lam;
Hal louin Amah muang lechin,
A hampha na hi ding.
Hong un, hiai pawl siangthou zom un,
Thupina lam juan un;
Kipahna vullou a luanna,
Van gam-a teng dingin.
Ka Toupa ngaih aw, kei hon ompih in,
Khua mial semsem Toupa ka kiang om in;
Panpih leh hehnem ding a omlouh chiang',
Panpihbei panpihpa'n hon ompih in.
Damsung sawtloukal in a mangthang ding,
Leitung nopna leh thupina mang ding;
Ka muh theih tengteng leng a sia vek ding,
Dangtuan theilou Nang in hon ompih in.
Mangte' Mang bang' lauhuai in hongpai ken,
Migi, chingkam, damna tawh hongpai in;
Kapte di'n hehpihna hon omsak in,
Mawhneite lawm ka kiang uah om gige'n.
Nang louin mitphiatkal khat zong muang ke'ng,
Nang panpih louh' Setan dou zoulou ding;
Nang bang piipa leh kingakna kua om?
Khawnim leh nisa ah hon ompih in.
Nang non ompih leh melma lau lou ding,
Lungkham a poilou, kah leng a poilou;
Sihna inleng kuahiam a zawh theih ding?
Nang non ompih leh ka vualzou jel ding.
Ka maimit sin ma'n ka kiang ah om in,
Khuamial lak' tang in, van honensak in;
Van a vak ding, lei lim a mangthang ding,
Damsung sih tanphain hon ompih in.
Vakvai gim dia Muanna Aksi,
Ka tung ah hongtangpha in;
Longpu nguai mitvak halhsak in,
Tuipi gamla'. D.S.
Lamet Aksi! Tui kilok a,
Nang ngaia thum vualzawl in;
Longpu thawmhau vualzawl in aw,
Tuipi gamla'. D.S.
Ginna Aksi! a sepgim teng,
Huih in nuai chiang' Nang honjuan,
Tui kiloklai ah hondam in,
Tuipi gamla'. D.S.
Aksi Pathian! Bittak' pii in,
Vakvai mi Na kiang tun in;
Khemnate'n sual sawt hi amah,
Tuipi gamla'. D.S.
Hon gawm Khristian itna,
Vualzawl in om hen aw;
Lungsim kikhatte kikholhna,
Vantung a mah bang hi.
I Pa' tutphah maiah,
Thumna lungtang bua hang;
Lau leh lamet leh tup kikhat,
Lungmuan leh dah na-ngawn.
Lungkham kithuakpih in,
Puakgik i kidawn chiat;
Albang kidahpih chiat eite'
Khitui a luangkhawm hi.
Gibang i kikhen chiang',
Lailung sung hondahsak;
Hihhang lungsung a kizom lai,
Kimuh zong lamen lai.
Hiai lametna thupi'n,
Hansanna hon thaksak;
Lunggulh tua ni muh ding lamen,
Eite i zin laitak'.
Dahna, tawlna, natna,
Khelhna pan suakta ding;
Ki-it kihoutheihna kim in,
Tangtawn vaihawmta ding.
Aw kipah ni, Nang ka Toupa,
Hondampa dia ka hontel ni;
Hiai lung kipak nuam semsem hen,
A kipahna gen kimvel hen.
Kipah ni! Kipah ni!
Jesu'n ka mawh a sawpsiang ni!
Kiveng leh thum dan honsinsak,
Nisim kipak a om ding in;
Kipah ni! Kipah ni!
Jesu'n ka mawh a sawpsiang ni!
Zawh hi, nasep zawh ahita,
Toupa a hi'ng, Amah keia;
Aman honkai, ken ka juita,
Pathian' aw phuang dia kaih a om.
Tu'n khawl in, ka lung gimsawt aw,
Hiai vualzawlna len-in khawl in;
Na Toupa nusia ngeikei in,
A hoih khempeuh Aman nei hi.
Ka thuchiam za-khin vantung in,
Nisim thuchiam thak za ding hi;
Damsung hun tawp-a ka kun dong,'
Thuchiam hoih in sih nuamsak ding.

songs.title: Lauken, Tung Pathian In Hon Kem Ding Hi
songs.author: Fanny J Crosby

lines: Lauken, tung Pathian in honkem ding hi,
Nisa leh liapa nang honkempa hi;
Amah neih kemsiam a hehpih ahi,
Khattang-a vak di'n honnusia lou ding.
A tawp pha'n Pathian in honkem ding hi,
Amah Pa hoih, Tanpa leh Lawm ahi;
Jesu'n hondawng ding hi, na sap laiteng,
Aman honkem ding hi, Amah muang in.
Sun nitum in Pathian in honveng ding,
Na khe veng' lampi dik ah honpii ding;
Nang honkempa, Hondampa, piitu hi,
A tate tuidam luanna ah pii hi.
Na damsung Pathian in hon kem ding hi,
Kua piak theih louh vualzawlna honpia ding;
Sih ni tanpha'n Pathian in honkem ding,
A tawp ah nang A gam ah hontun ding.
Tangtawn Kumpipa, honpi'n,
Machiang suan hunta hi;
Tua pan gallak gamte ah,
Na puan-inn ah teng n'ung;
Ka kisakkholh sung un leng,
Hehpihna'n honhatsak';
Tu'n aw tangtawn Kumpipa,
Ka galla uh sa ung.
Tangtawn Kumpipa, honpi'n,
Khelhna gal bei mateng;
Muanna nuam, Amen, chiin,
Sianthouna'n honhuau ding;
Gal nawhna namsau ging leh,
Khuangpi ging hilou in;
Itna zahngaihna nasep
Tawh van-gam hongtung hi.
Tangtawn Kumpipa honpi'n,
Laulouin honjui ung;
Na mel kimuhna peuh ah,
Pahna jing nisuak bang,
Ka tung uah Na khros kang hi.
A vak ah masuan ung;
Manglukhu'n zawhna ngak hi,
Honpi'n, aw Pathian hat.
Tanglai pate' ginna! hing lai,
Suangkulh, mei leh tem in dou zong;
Thupi mahmah tua thu jak chiang',
Ka lungsung pah luatna'n dim hi;
Pate' thugin! thugin siangthou!
Sih dong in muanhuai n'ung Nang di'n.
Tanglai pate, suangkulh tang zong,
Lungtang noplen, mawh kisak bei;
A tate uh zong hampha ding,
Nang di'n amau bang si le uh;
Pate' thugin! thugin siangthou !
Sih dong in muanhuai n'ung Nang di'n.
Tanglai pate' ginna! Nang di'n,
Pang in tual leh gal zong it n'ung;
Na thu gen n'ung kon it zah un,
Thu kamdam leh hinna hoih in;
Pate' thugin! thugin siangthou!
Sih dong in muanhuai n'ung Nang d'in.

songs.title: Toupa, Ni Nop Piak A Tum Zouta
songs.author: Rev John Ellerton

lines: Toupa, ni Non piak a tum zouta,
Na thuin khua hongmialta hi;
Kon phat la uh Na kiang hongtungtou,
Tuibang siangsak ding ka khawl uh.
Sun leh janin lei kihei kawm in,
Suahlam manawhin paipai hi;
Kou Na saptuamte' zong khawl louin,
Maimit sing louin honpak ung.
Gamchih, mualchih ah tawlnga loua,
Taikhua val, sunni hongsuah bang'
Leia Na saptuamte' thumna leh,
Phatna zaila dai ngeilou hi.
Mualdawn ah sunni tumkhia jelin,
Lei pang lama unaute phawng;
Hun tenga tongluangte'n tunglam ah,
Na nasep piandang zaila'n pak.
Ahi, Toupa, Na mangtutphah zaw,
Lei gam banga mang thei hilou;
Na gam ding a, khang tawntung ding hi,
Na siamsilte'n Na vang zoh dong.
Ngaidih! Honsam aw in,
'Tunia kua kuan ding?
Ka nasep ding zong a,
Ka sap nial lou ding?
Ka puanlap lik sanga,
Galdou a kuan ding?
Pathian leh thudik gum,
Ka melma dou ding'?'
Jesu'n puanjak nuai ah,
A sepaihte pii!
I melma teng zou in,
Dikna vualzou ding.
Pathian' hatna muanga,
Gal kizawh dong in;
Setan pawlte dou in,
Kigalvan chiat ni;
A siangthouphapen tum,
A dikphapen gum;
Pathian doute kia dou,
Eite i pangkhawm.
Ngaidih! la sa kawm a,
Galkap-hon paiging;
Ei' Piipa, Kumpipa,
Thupi, thupi hen,
Gamla nai apan kuan,
Tup siangthou kibang;
Ngaidih! A aw uh ging,
Gal dou di'n kuan uh!
Jesu aw, ka sih dongin,
Nangma' na sem ning, chi'n,
Kichiamna kip kong bawlta,
Nang hongnai gige in;
Ka Tou, ka Lawm, ka Lamkai,
Nang hongompih lechin,
Kidouna lau lou ding hi'ng,
Lam sikkhial lou ding hi'ng.
Nang ompihna honphawksak',
Lei thilte'n hongneh hi;
Etlahhuaite'n hongzol a,
A uthuaite'n hongsam;
Ka galte'n sung leh pua ah,
Hong nehchipden uhi;
Jesu, nang hongnai inla,
Khial lou ding' hongkem in.
A jaknophuai na thugen,
Honzasak gige in;
Sautna huihpi nung bang,
Deihtel nopna'n honghuau;
Jesu, hong hanthawn dingin,
Thu hon gen mengmeng in;
Nang thu gen in, ngaikhia ni'ng,
Ka hinna Kempa aw.
Jesu aw, nang honjuite,
Thu na chiamkhin zou hi;
Thupi na tanna mun ah,
Na nasemte om ding;
Jesu aw, ke'n zong kong chiam,
Sih dong na nasem ding';
Ka Toupa honjuisuak ding',
Hehpihna honpia in.
Aw, Thupha mawkin mangsak ken,
Khuavak na maimit sinkhum ken;
Mikhial aw, na lung khauhsak ken,
Tu'n hotdam' om in.
Ba' tua omlou ding?
Ba' tua omlou ding?
Hotdam dingin,
Ba' tua omlou ding?
Jingchiang khua hongvak ngeilou thei,
Na maimit zulhjau vualzawl di'n;
Tu a hun hi, mawk om nawn ken,
Tu'n hotdam' om in.
I Toupa'n hehpi'n hon ngakngak,
Hon itna it thuk lou ding maw?
Nang deihlam tawpsan ngal mai ve,
Tu'n hotdam' om in.
I Toupa'n kuamah nial neilou,
A hinna tang nuam laukhate;
Ging in, jui' nasep zawhsa hi,
Tu'n hotdam' om in.

songs.title: Ngai Un! Van Tung Mi Sangsawmte'n
songs.author: T Kelly

lines: Ngaiun! vantung mi sangsawmte'n,
Kaihging tawh phatla sa hi;
Itna Pathian, Jesu'n vai hawm,
Vanmite kipak uhi;
En un, mangtutphah tung ah,
Jesu kia'n khawvel vaihawm;
Haleluia, Haleluia!
Jesu kia'n khawvel vaihawm.
Thupina Kumpi, vaihawm in,
Manglukhu tangtawn Nang'a,
Nang'a sa Na itna panin,
Bangmah in khen theilou ding;
Nangma'n na hehpihte hi,
Na mel mu dinga sehsa;
Halleluia, Halleluia!
Na mel mu ding a sehsa.
Hondampa, hongpai nawn meng in,
Ni thupi tuang hontun in;
Na sapna mulkimhuai jak chiang',
Lei leh van a taimang ding;
Tuachiang' kaihging tawh sa n'ung;
'Kou Kumpipa thupi hen!
Haleluia, Haleluia!
Kou Kumpipa thupi hen!'.
Toupa hongpai ding denchiangin,
Mansain na om in!
A van inn nuam pan hongpai ding,
Mansain na om in!
I diktatna Toupa ahi!
A telte vualzawl di'n hongding;
A Pa' tutphah mai' hon gum ding,
Mansain na om in!
Mouneipa hongchiang' na mansiang ding hiam? (2)
Sunlai, janlai banglai peuh,
Na meivak a tangpha diam?
Mouneipa hongchiang' na mansiang ding hiam?
Lei ah hongkumsuk nawn pah ding,
Mansain na om in!
Khuavannuai vaihawm A pan ding,
Mansain na om in!
Jesu'n tatna honpuak chiangin,
Haleluia vantung' ging ding;
Aw, na Kumpipa dawn dingin,
Mansain na om in!
DC
Mansain na om in!
Ngaiin! mi teng kiang' hongpai ding,
Mansain na om in!
Pengkul sapna i za pah ding,
Mansain na om in!
Vannuai, gam mualchih pan mite,
Hongsam ding hi Thukhenna ah;
A tutphah mai' i ding chiat ding,
Mansain na om in!
Kha mangthangte honkhia in,
A vakmangte zong in;
Chingkamtak' amau pii in,
Lam kochik ah pii in!
Migitakin kun inla,
Hondampa sap huau in;
Ankuang a manta hilh in,
Miteng di'n mun om, chi'n.
Mun a om, mun a om,
Ankuang a manta hilh in,
Miteng di'n mun om, chi'n.
Lungkhamna luiguam apan,
Jan khawmial lak apan;
Sunni a tanna mun ah,
Muanhuai siang leh vak ah;
Jesu kiang' hon piikhawm in,
Sapna vahuau nawn in;
Ankuang a manta hilh in,
Miteng di'n mun om, chi'n.
Itna lungtang toh kuan in,
Heutu min in kuan in;
Hinna' hotdamna bukim,
Khawvel kiangah phuang in;
Ni a tan laiin kin in,
Khua a mial ma'n kin in,
Ankuang a manta hilh in,
Miteng di'n mun om, chi'n.
Baptisna tang kipahpih in,
Aw, Toupa, tung Pathian;
Khelhna lungheisan-a tualkhia,
Nang leh zata muhin.
Jesu'n, Nungzuiin bawl unla,
Baptis zel un, a chi;
Nungzui min pua zou ngei dingin,
A sih dong' Nang huh in.
Saptuam lak' tel kipahpih ung,
Laibu sung min khumin;
Hinna laibu sung' omsam hen,
Van Saptuam kipahpi'n.
Jata laia chiamtehna tang,
Jesu dinga kipia;
Chiamtehna pua zou di'n bawl in,
Zahlak ngeilou dingin.
Koute in tuiin baptis ung,
Hiai pen ching nailou hi;
Kha siangthou meia baptisna
Aw Jesu, Nang tangsak'n.
Ngaiin, itna it tawp neilou,
Mikhial mangthangsate;
Pa in a piak eite, 'Pathian'
Tate' i kichihna.
Ngaiin, A itna lamdang,
A hon itna lamdang
Pa in eite a honpiak hi;
Pathian' tate hih theihna,
'Ta' chiha i om theihna'ng.
Tuin Amah gamlat nawn lou,
'Sisan pha'n' hon naihsak!
'Itpenpen a pom-a omte,'
Pathian' angsung i om.
Sawtlou chia' i thupina ding,
'Hong kilang tadih lou;'
'Hizong i Toupa i muh chiang,'
Amah batna nei ding'.
Tuabang lamet kipahhuai tawh,
Siangthou sema om ding;
Toupa thounawn bang sem nuam hang,
A mel i mu pah ding.
Kum tawmchik kia omta,
Buaina tawmchik kia lel;
Nop leh dah tawmchik kia omta,
Thumna tawmchik kia lel.
Bawlsiatna tawmchik kia,
Lungjinna tawmchik kia;
Lungkhamna la tawmchik omta;
'Mangpha' tawmchik omta.
Tua nung tangtawn khawlna,
Tua nung tangtawn mipi;
Tua nung tangtawn thupina ni,
Tua nung tangtawn la hi.
Mawhna pan tatkhiak hi'ng,
Kipahna' lut dingin;
Ka lungin Hodampa ka muangta hi!
Muanna lamdang neita'ng,
Ka puakgik pan suakta'ng;
Pathian' Tapa ka muangta hi!
Ka muang hi, ka muang hi!
Ka lungin Hondampa ka muangta hi!
Ka muang hi, ka muang hi!
Pathian' Tapa ka muangta hi!
Ka taksap honhilh a,
Itna in honzol a;
Ka lungin Hondampa ka muangta hi!
Ka mit A vaksak a,
Khuakvak ka muta hi;
Pathian' Tapa ka muangta hi!
A hehpihna chiamta'ng,
Amah mel ngei muta'ng;
Ka lungin Hondampa ka muangta hi!
Itna tuipi'n hontum,
Ka kha di'n bangkim hoih,
Pathian' Tapa ka muangta hi!
A angsung bukna ah,
Nopna leh khawlna om;
Ka lungin Hondampa ka muangta hi!
Lain Amah phat ning,
A itna gen-gen ning.
Pathian' Tapa ka muangta hi!

songs.title: A Hoihzaw Gam Zuan A Zin
songs.author: Ira D Sankey

lines: A hoihzaw gam zuan-a zin,
Gamdai nisatna' ka pai;
Pa, na khutin honlen in,
Honpii honhuai zel in.
Mara muna dangtakin,
Tuipak siasia ka pakta;
Tui kha tuilim in bawl in,
Honpii, honhuai zel in.
Gamdai a haksat chiangin,
Elim singlim nua'h honpi'n;
Tua mun-a tuisiang honpia'n,
Honpii, honhuai zel in.
Tui leh meia ka pai chiang',
Hiai hi Toupa aw, ka deih;
Na itna'n lung ah huau in,
Honpii, honhuai zel in.
Jordan gei a ka din chiang',
Lunglau lou di'n honpanpi'n;
Pa, honlen in, tum kha ning,
Honpii, honhuai zel in.

songs.title: Khros Sepaih Galhat Ka Hi Hiam?
songs.author: Isaac Watts

lines: Khros sepaih galhat ka hi hiam,
Belamnou nungjui hoih?
A vang ka gum ngam nading hiam,
A min lawh ka zum diam?
Min hoihpen, min manphapen,
Kei tanga hongsipa;
Itna'n chiam Manglukhu mu ning,
Ka khros bangteng hi zong.
Nuamsa ngenin tung thangvan ah,
Puaklutin ka om diam?
Midangte'n kipahman mu dia,
Sipawt a thuak lai un.
Melma ka tuah ding omlou hiam,
Tuilian ka pal ding zong?
Khawvel leh itna lawmta hiam,
Pathian kiang hontun di'n?
Vaihawm ut gal ka dou kul hi,
Hanna pungsak, Toupa!
Ka semgim ding, na ka thuak ding,
Na thu a panpih in.
Jesu'n honvaksak, vak siangthoutak in,
Jankhawmial lak' meivak a tangpha bangin;
Hiai lei khawmial sung ah eite vak ni,
Nang na omna mun ah, kei ka mun ah.
Jesu'n honvaksak, Amah adingin,
Hoihtak honmu hi, i vak hoih leh hoihlouh;
Van apan in hon en, i vak hoih hiam,
Nang na omna mun ah, kei ka mun ah.
Jesu'n honvaksak, midangte adi'n,
Mialna tuamtuam in hiai lei a dimzou hi;
Khelh, taksap,lungkham om, i vak ding uh,
Nang na omna mun ah, kei ka mun ah.
Aw nang Beth-lehem khaw lian lou,
Om dinden kon mu uh;
Na ihmut lai' na tunglam ah,
Aksite pai diamdiam!
Na kongzing khawmial lak ah,
Tangtawn vak a tang hi,
Kum tam lamet leh launa teng;
Tujan nang ah kituak.
Mari sung a Khrist hongpiang hi,
Angelte kikhawm uh;
Lei a mite ihmut laiin,
Itna lamdang en uh;
Aw, jingsol aksite aw,
Pianna siangthou phuang un;
Pathian Kumpipa phat unla,
Lei mite di'n lemna.
Dai didein, dai didein,
Thawnpiak lamdang piak hi;
Tuachi'n Pathian' mite lung ah,
A van vualzawlna pia;
A hong bilin za lou thei,
Hiai khovel gilou ah;
Amah ngai, kingainiamte kiang',
Ittak Khrist a lut lai.
Aw, Nang Beth-lehem Nau siangthou,
Hongkum in, kon ngen uh;
Ka khelhna uh hawlmang inla,
Tu'n kou ah hongpiang in;
Angel siangthoute thugen
Kipahhuai ka ja uh;
Aw, hong inla, hong ompih in,
Toupa, Immanuel.
Lau ken! Pathian na lum,
Na kipahman thupi;
A hatna vualzouta,
Na hatna Toupa hi.
Lau ken! Pathian' aw hi,
Na kiang' hiai thu gen hi;'
Daktou inla, nuam in,
Jesu Khrist Toupa ah.
Lau ken! Pathian' hon ja,
Lungkham a na kahna;
A thu in tuibangin,
Na kha tawl nuamsak ding.
Lau ken! Lungmang het ken,
Na kiang' om gige ding;
Nang honpanpih dingin,
Nang honhatsak dingin.
Lau ken! pawltawmte aw,
Hondampa hongpah ding;
Thupina suah dingin,
Inn-a honla dingin.
A omna mun-guuk ah kei A honsel ding hi,
Leitung lungkhamna leh puakgik apanin;
A zahngaihna limnuaia lungmuang tutkhawlin,
Tua ah ka Hondampa'n honhum ding.
Honsel ding, bittak honsel ding,
Khemna, lungkhamna honkhuh phak louhna mun ah;
Honsel ding, bittak' honsel ding,
A omna mun-guuk ah kei A honsel ding hi.
A omna mun-guuk ah kei A honsel ding hi,
A thupina vak dan a honlak ding hi;
A vakna puan banga A honsilhsak chiangin,
Aw tua pahna sang ken ka theih ding!
A omna mun-guuk ah kei A honsel ding hi,
A itna tawpneilou a kei honkem in;
Tua mun-a ka Hondampa toh om houlungkum,
Tunglam nopna chepkhawlhna nuam hi.
Toupa, Na nasepin,
Na mite halhsak in!
Thilhihtheiin thu honggen in,
Na mi koute'n za n'ung.
Na nasep hatsak in,
Kuna kon nget laiun;
Itsiam Toupa, hongkumsuk in!
Tu'n kou hong vualzawl in!
Na nasep hatsak in!
Na minpha pahtawi in!
Nong itna zatam lailung ah,
Meibangin hongtang hen.
Na nasep hatsak in!
Na simthu vualzawl in!
A thutak siang bangmah hel louh,
Thuman di'n kiza hen!
Na nasep hatsak in!
Penti kos vuah zusak in!
Thupina Nangmah kia'n tang in,
Vualzawlna kou hongpia'n!
Zaitha hatna honpia'n,
Na kiang ah hongthum ung;
Na Kha'n honpawl, honkhamuan hen;
Ka kiang uah hon ompi'n.
Ka kiang uah hon ompi'n,
Toupa aw, kon ngen uh;
Toupa ngaihpen, Nang hong inla,
Khamuanin honpanpi'n.
Zaitha hatna honpia'n,
Na min siangthou thang hen;
Na hatnain honpanpih in,
Ka kiang uah hon ompi'n.
Zaitha hatna honpia'n,
Kou ma sawn zou kei ung;
Na thau namtui in honnilh in,
Ka kiang uah hon ompi'n.
Zaitha hatna honpia'n,
Ka lungsim sung mial uah;
Khua vaksakin hongvak inla,
Na min hongthang zel hen.

songs.title: Thangvan Zaila Tua Zankim Lai
songs.author: R Lowry
songs.key: Doh is Ab (Tehna khata khuang li pai)

lines: Thangvan zaila tua zankim lai',
Hong luangsuk a, thupi'n a honthawn;
Tua la ngaihnophuai a dim hi,
Zaila sate angel honpi hi.
'Tungnung pen ah thupi henla,
Leitung ah lungtuak simthu leng hen;'
A ging khangsawn ah paisawn hen,
Simlei kipak tangkou hen.
Ganchingte'n tua thupina mu,
Van angelte thupuan za uhi;
Gankuang bul ah bia'n kun uhi,
Huihkhua zaila kaihdang-a dim lai'n.
Hondampa Khrist, Pathian' Thaunilh,
I bat lauhuai pe di'n lei ah hong;
Dahnathei Mi leh nolh-a om,
I khelh lamang Pathian Belamnou.
Aw vanglian Jehovah honpi'n,
Hiai gamdai a zin ka hi;
Kei hatlou, Nang zaw na hat hi,
Na khut thahatin honpi'n;
Van Anpha aw, van Anpha aw,
Ka vah mateng honvak in. (2)
Tuikhuk siangthou tu'n hong inla,
Damna tui a luankhiakna;
Meikuang leh Meipi'n honpiin,
Ka zin sungteng honpi in;
Honpa thahat, Honpa thahat,
Ka hatna leh phaw hiin. (2)
Sihna lui kon kan dektak chiang',
Ka lauthawngna beisak in;
Sihna leh gawtmun zoupa Nang,
Khawlmun bitin honkaipi'n;
Phatna late, Phatna late,
Nang konpia tawntung ding hi. (2)
Aw Toupa, Na vualzawlna pha,
Ka bangkim tung uah kimu;
Nang thu louin kou hinna pha,
Ka neih teng uh toh mang ding;
Honpak ung e, honpak ung e,
Na hehpihna ka muh un. (2)
Na honhehpihna banzal pan,
Hinna leh phatmoh chiteng';
Silpak leh guabang hing tengin,
A tang uh vualzawlnate;
Phatna zaila'n, phatna zaila'n,
Hon-awi uhi kumkhua in. (2)
Aw Toupa, sil bangkim Siampa,
Na banzal siamsil tengin;
Albang dah a lumbang honsung,
Lambang honpak lah zong le'ng;
Honheisan ken, honheisan ken,
Na deihdan honsinsak in. (2)
Hunte nite a bei zel a,
Simlei pallun sawlbang heu;
Kou khelh mohna teng aw Toupa,
Na siamna in a sawpsiang;
Hun mu nuam ung, hun mu nuam ung,
Na hatna muang kawm zel in. (2)

songs.title: En In! A Hong Suk Meipi Toh
songs.author: J Cennick & C Wesley

lines: En in! A hongsuk meipi toh,
Giloute adia thahpa;
Misiangthou tampi'n honzui uh,
A vualzawh la sa kawm in;
Haleluia! (3)
Jesu hong, vaihawm di'n hong.
Mit teng in Amah a mu ding,
Vanglian lauhuaia kijem;
Amah simmawhte leh zuakte,
Leh singa Amah thatte'n,
Lungkham luain, (3)
Messia taktak mu ding uh.
Pengkulpi a honggin chiangin,
Lei leh van a taimang ding;
Amah huate om theilou ding,
Tua nia sapna a jak un:
Thukhenna ah! (3)
Hong un, thukhenna ah chi'n.
Tun tatna kim i na ngakngak,
En in, vanglianin hongtung!
A misiangthou mi deihlouhte'n,
Huihkhua'h Amah tuak ding uh;
Haleluia! (3)
En in, Pathian ni hongtung!
Ahi, Amen! honpak uhen,
Tangtawn mangtutphah a Nang;
Hondampa, Hatna, Thupina,
Lalgam la in, Nang ading!
Hong mengmeng in, (3)
Haleluia! Toupa aw.

songs.title: Tatna! Aw Thu Lamdang Ahi
songs.author: S M Sayford
songs.key: Doh is E (Tehna khata khuang thum pai)

lines: Tatna! aw thu lamdang ahi lua,
Thu kipahhuai nang leh kei ding;
Jesu'n i ngaihdamna leizouta,
Leibat teng sing ah A khinta.
Taksang in, aw mikhial, taksang in,
Sang in, kipahhuai thutak hi;
Muang in, kilhlupa om Hondampa,
Hotdamna nang a honpia hi.
Sihna pan hinna A hontunta,
Hehpihna'n Pathian ta'n honbawl;
Mikhialte di'n tuikhuk A bawl hi,
Tu'n sisan ah kisilsiang in.
Khelhna in vaihawm nawnlou ding hi,
Khem ding leh buaisak di'n om zong;
Khrist in ei hontatna manphain,
Khelhna thahatna gawpsak ding.
Pathian zahngaihna tu'n sang inla,
Kin in, Jesu tunin juan in;
Amah juite kipahpih ding a,
Kiksakin hawlmang ngeilou ding.
Hondampa, lampial lou ding',
Damin honpi'n lamtawnin;
Na kianga om ka bit hi,
Na itna ah tengden ning.
Honpi'n honpi'n,
Toupa, honpi'n mang lou di'n;
Damsung ni a kiam laiin,
Toupa, honpi'n lamtawnin.
Ka kha bukna Nang Na hi,
Damsung huihpi nun chiangin;
Nang Nong nai chiang' ka bit hi,
A zahngaihna ka muang hi.
Hondampa, honpii zel in,
Damsung huihpi then chiangin;
Dah leh kah a beina mun,
Ni tanna ka tun dongin.
Naupang neu leh hatlou hi hang,
Dinmun sangin piang kei hang e;
Toupa Jesu vanglianpa ding,
Bang na hiam i sep theih ding om?
Sunchin Khristian naupangte in,
Lungsim gil ah gimna thuak hang;
Mohna kidouna Jesu di'n,
Lunglau louin sih pha'n pang ni.
Lunghehna leh kisaktheihna,
Lungsima i ngaihtuah chiangin;
Pau gilou in pau kha hang e,
Khasiatna mittui a hongluang.
Lungheh-a jal maimit sing hang,
Huan, thusia lasia bawl hang e;
Tongdam nem naubang kisang hang,
Toupa di'n kidouna dou ni.
Nuihna mel leh kihehpihna-
Vak, sunchin i tung hongtang hen;
Tongdam nem naubang kisang in,
Bangkim Jesu vangin sem ni.
Naupang neu lua, hatlou omlou,
Khros puak ding i nei chiat uhi;
Jesu adia i nasep theih,
Itna leh pahna nasep hi.

songs.title: Toupa Tuni'n Bang Ka Hih Dia?
songs.author: Royal C Paddock

lines: Toupa, tuni'n bang ka hih dia,
Na thu a lamtawna phuang di'n;
Tuipi gal a mite hilh di'n,
Nanga hinna thak kimu thu.
Toupa, tuni'n Na kiang honpi'n,
Jana ban kal khat bek suan di'n;
Ama sanga naksep zaw di'n,
Zawh tanpha Toupa'n honpi in.
Toupa khukdin in kong thum ding,
Tunia Na thu phuangte di'n;
Gamdang a teng mite ding leh,
Nang a kipia ding mite di'n.
Ka sum-leh-pai pia ning, Toupa,
Mite'n Na thu a jak theihna'n;
Nangmah ngei a honmuh theih ua,
Kei banga tat honghih na'ng un.
Toupa kuanin ka gen ding hi,
Khial leh mial a teng mite kiang';
Ka khelh vang ua Khrist a sihna,
Miteng dia kilhdena omna.

songs.title: A Sangzaw Lam Ka Delh Tawntung
songs.author: Rev Hohnson Oatman, Jr.

lines: A sangzaw lam ka delh tawntung,
A sangzaw mun nisim ka tung,
Ka paikawm in ka thum tawntung,
Toupa, a sangzaw mun' honpi'n.
Toupa, hondingsak in ginna'n,
A sanna mun vanmun khawng ah;
Ka tunkhitna sanga sangzaw,
Toupa, a sangzaw mun' honpi'n.
Ginlahna lauthawngna mun ah,
Toupa omden ka ut kei hi;
Tua bang mun ah midang om zong,
Ken zaw mun sangzaw ka tum hi.
Khawvel tunga len ka ut hi,
Setan thalte'n honkap zongleh;
Ginna'n pahna la zata hi,
Mun sangzawa misiangte la.
A sanna mun tak kah ka nuam,
Thupina vak muh ka nuam hi;
Van ka tun matan ka thum ding,
Toupa, a sangzaw mun' honpi'n.
Hiai khawvel lungkham mangbatna,
Gentheih i thuak sawt nawn lou ding,
Thupina inn lam i juan ding,
Tua Jerusalem Thak ah.
Ei di'n itna hehpih thawnpiak,
Itna hehpihna kim;
Itna hehpihna kim,
Tua Jerusalem Thak ah;
Aw Toupa, honpii jel in,
Jordan luigal lam ah;
Toupa, honpii jel in,
Tua Jerusalem Thak ah.
Kua pai ding kipahman muin,
Vangam thupina tang dingin;
Tua ah pahna tul lou ding,
Tua Jerusalem Thak ah.
Hotdamna thupi la sain,
Ka lungsung nopna-pahna'n dim;
Ka khain a kha jakin leng,
Jerusalem Thak zuan in.
Misiangthoute'n puan ngou silh in,
Manglukhu tawh phat la sa uh;
Amau laka tel sam ka ut,
Tua Jerusalem Thak ah.

songs.title: Tu In Jesu Nang Mah Kiang Ah
songs.author: Pay Palmer

lines: Tuin Jesu, Nangmah kiangah,
Na saptuamte a om dingin;
Thukhun ah Nau konpia uh,
Kipahpihin Na kha'n vuk in.
'naupang neute Ka kiang' hongpai,
Phal unla, nial kei un' chia;
Lei a Nong lenlai' Na gen,
Kipahpih ung, manpha sa ung.
Tang a Pathian muang Hana in,
Na na sem dingin a ta pia;
Tu'n zong hiai pen konpia uh,
Samuel bang honghi hen aw.
Loisi leh Eunisi hoih in,
Naupan chil akipanin zong;
Timothi a sinsak bang'n,
Laisiangthou sinsak sam uhen.
Hiai nau lei-gou manphapen pen,
Nangmah kiang ah konpia uhi;
Tang, kem, veng kumkhua inla,
Na van Saptuam ah telsak in.
Ganchingte' khangsum bang biak,
Gankuang sunga jal kuahiam?
Piandang Mang hon gum Jesu hi,
Vualtungtuangpa Mangpen ahi;
A ma ah kun in bia un,
Kumpi lukhu khusak un.
Gamdai laisung gilkial thuak,
Gamdaia lungkham kuahiam?
Mi tampipi a simthu'n,
Kuahiam lailung muangsak thei?
A dahte, omlaiveite,
Kua siang ah a hong kikhawm?
Kua ahiam naubang kap a,
Lazar han geia dingpa?
Jan lai Getsemani a,
Mimbang thum, lungkham kuahiam?
Laukha'n tuangnungsiah san a,
Tullela khapham kuahiam?
Kuahiam hinna pe ding leh,
Hondam, han pan-a thounawn?
Kuahiam dawimangpa nuaisiah,
Kuahiam sihna zoua thou?
Mangtutphah-a simthu lel,
Simlei thangvan Mang kuahiam?
Mual kilawm khat a om, gamlapi gam khat ah,
Tuipi gal gam nuam mahmah khat ah;
'Luguh mun' kichi mun khat ah Toupa si hi,
Nang leh kei leh mi khempeuh ading.
A thuak dan ka theihin,
Ka khitui a luang nak;
Ka enen tua mual chiklaipeuhin,
A tung ah Jesu in,
Thuakin hong sita hi;
Kei banga khialte hotdam nading'.
Lungkhama a pailai' khros gikpi pawsak uh,
Linga bawl lukhu khuin pai hi;
Khros tung ah kilhden uh, mihonpite'n nuihsan,
Tua mual kilawm tung'Amah khai uh.
A lungkhamna ka thei, Amah a hen laiun
Ka Hondampa a kilhden laiun;
Amah khros liktou uh mihonpite' muhin,
Kalvari mual tung'Amah khai uh.
Khuamialin Amah khuh, suangpi khempeuh kitam,
Lungkhamna aw ging a jak chiangun;
Ei Toupa' aw ahi, sihna mulkimhuai thuak,
Mikhial eite khempeuh ngaihdamna'ng.

songs.title: Tua Jingsang Kilawma Ka Khanlawh Chiang
songs.author: Dr. H Bonar

lines: Tua jingsang kilawma ka khanlawh chiang',
Khua vakden-a jan om nawn ngeilouh chiang',
Thupina tangtawn ni a tanden chiang',
Ka lungkim ding, lungkim mahmahta ding!
Ka lungkimta ding hi,
Ka lungkimta ding hi;
Tua jingsang kilawma ka khanlawh chiang'.   D.S.
Na thupina maituaha ka muh chiang',
Na tate Na angsung-a Na pom chiang';
Na hehpihna hauh Non etsak vek chiang',
Ka lungkim ding, lungkim mahmahta ding.
Ka it leh ngaih teng ka muh hun chiangin,
Sawta khensa ka itte ka pom chiang';
Kei dia Na muanhuai dan teng ka muh chiang',
Ka lungkim ding, lungkim mahmahta ding.
Kei dinga hinna Pepa ka muh chiang',
Mit vaktaka A mel ka etchian chiang';
Tangtawn la ngaiha Amah ka phat chiang',
Ka lungkim ding, lungkim mahmahta ding.
Kuahiam Toupa' lam pang,
Kumpi' na sem ding?
Kua'n Amah panpih ding,
Midangte pii di'n?
Kua'n khovel nusia ding,
Melma dou dingin?
Kuahiam Toupa' lampang,
Kuahiam kuankhe ding?
Kuahiam Toupa lam pang,
Kumpi' nasem ding?
Kua'n Amah panpih ding,
Midangte pii di'n?
Na tate thupiin,
Na hehpihnain;
Toupa' lam pang hi ung,
Nangmah'a hi ung.
Thupina delh hilou,
Manglukhu delh lou;
Galkap ding kipia ung,
Vualzawh la sain;
A leisa mi tengteng,
Itna in ngen hi;
Jesu min lou peuhmah,
A lam pang hi uh.
Jesu, Nang Non leita,
Sum leh pai lou in;
Na sisan pha'n Non lei,
Nangmah pahtawina'n;
Na kiang hongpai peuhmah
Vualzawlna'n Non vuk;
Na thu mang dia bawlin,
Non suaktasakta.
Heutu toh ton gige'n bangteng hongtung zong,
Na Makaipa kiang om', na lampi mial zong;
Melmate'n honzawl ua, lauhuai a nai chiang',
Jesu toh na ton chiang' lau ding na neilou.
Ton inla, hangtakin masuan',
Kihantoh gige inla;
Nisim na Hondampa toh ton',
Aman lam tawntungin honpii ding.
Heutu toh ton gige'n na paina peuh ah,
Mialna leh limliap ah lampi honhilh ding;
Hon ompihna vak in na lampi tan ding,
Gamdai zong paklun huan kilawm suaksak ding.
Heutu toh ton gige'n lampi ah khawl ken,
Thu A honpiak peuhmah aw kin-in mang in;
A honsawlna mang in, A hatna'n sem jel',
Jesu toh na ton chia'n na diklou theilou.
Itna thu ka ja hi,
Sisan manpha ka mu;
Kithoihna thupi ka mu hi,
Pathian toh kilemta'ng.
Tangtawn muanna ka nei,
Jehova' min bang kip;
A mangtutphah vuang ngeilou bang,
Tangtawn a ngeingei hi.
Meipi hongjing zongin,
Huihpi hongnung zongin;
Sisan in kizopna kip gen,
Khros hongnai tawntung hi.
Ka itna kiam jeljel,
Ka kipahna kiam jel;
Amah toh lemna dang tuanlou,
Jehova dangthei lou.
Kei ka dang thei gige,
Khrist dangin sithei lou;
A itna ka kingakna hi,
A thutakin honlen.
Naupang khakha inleng,
Hotdamna thu gen thei chiat uh,
Hontanpa leh Khros a
A thuak dan genjak thei uh;
Khual leh tual a mi dah
Leh kap leng lungmuangsak thei uh,
Lungmuanna thu Bible
Simin, hawmin vak thei uh.
Naupangte'n leng hotdamna
Thu gen thei chiat uh,
Hontanpa hon itna thu;
Naupang te'n leng hotdamna
Thu gen thei chiat uh,
Van lampi hilh thei chiat uh.
Naupangte'n leng Toupa'
Na ah sep ding tampi nei uh,
Lungkham buai, dah leh kap,
Toupa' thupha'n nem thei uh;
Dah leh kahna lungsim
Meipi bang jingte kiang ah zong
Khawvak hoihtak bang thu
Ngaihnophuai tak gen thei uh.
Naupangte'n leng Toupa'
Thuchiam ah tan nei sam uhi,
A hehpihna, hauhsak-
Na leng hontang zok ding uh,
Van apanin Toupa'n
Amau sun leh jan-in veng hi,
Van ah amau veng-in,
Vansawltak zong om uhi.
Pathian' Laukha Siangthou,
Na vakin tanvak hen;
Lungsunga mialte thengsak in,
Ka mit uh vaksak in.
Lungsim dah beisak in,
Van lungmuanpa deihpen;
Hondampa muangthei zel dingin,
Hondampa vanglianpen.
Kou ginna kipsak in,
Ginlahna paimang in;
Hehpihpa si thei ngeilou pen,
Kuangsak gige in aw!
Kou khelhna sawpsiang in,
Na kiang ah honpii in;
Pathian' itna tembang deihhuai,
Theih chiang' lamdang sa n'ung.
Mihing Hehpihsiampa,
Tangtawn Lemna Mang hi;
Mite' Mangpen leh Ngaihtuahpa,
Nangma'n theisak in aw.
Lungsim siangthousakpa,
Laukha Piangthaksakpa;
Hinna thak honpia chiat inla,
Lungsim kilawmsak in.
Aw ginna muanhuai ka deih hi,
Gal ma-a tailou ding;
Lei lungkhamna bangtenga zong,
Ling lou ding ginna pen.
Taihilhna sawina tuah lai' zong,
Phun lou ding ginna pen;
Dahna, natna tuah laia zong,
A Pathian muang zou ding.
Huihpi vuahpi ahat lai a,
A tangpha sem ginna;
Lauhuai leh mialna muna zong,
Lau lou, ginlah nei lou.
Hiai hinna a bei matana,
Lam kawchik tawn ginna;
Siding kuan lupna tanvakthei,
Van vak leh siangthouin.
Toupa, tua bang ginna honpia'n,
Huan bangteng hongtung zong;
Tua tangtawn inn nopna siangthou,
Hiai lei ah chiamkhol n'ung.
Ka thumna uh Lawhchingsakpa,
Lungmuanna kon ngen hi;
Lungkham-in liangvai mahleng zong,
Aw Toupa honnial ken.
Nangmah bangin om nuam ing e,
Nang kei hon itpa aw;
Ka pil zohlouh chiangin leng Nang,
Aw Toupa, honnial ken.
Na pahtakna ngahtaak lou hi'ng,
Mikhial ka hihman in;
Nang kiang-a hongtaak ka hilou,
Aw Toupa, honnial ken.
Ka vengte leh ka sungte'n zong,
Hon deih kei mahle uh;
Lawmte'n honpaisan mahle uh,
Aw Toupa, honnial ken.
Hiai leitunga Nong kumsuk a
Singdawna na sih a,
Thangvana Na honthumsak ziak',
Aw Toupa, honnial ken.
Saptuamte laka om dingin,
Sihna lau lou dingin;
Van a hoihtak a om dingin,
Aw Toupa, honnial ken.
Mihing, misi ngaihtuah dinga,
Vanglian leh zahtakhuai;
Meipi laka Nongpai chiangin,
Aw Toupa, honnial ken.
Haichi manpha tuh un,
Jingsang phalvak kipat tungin;
Haichi manpha tuh un,
Suntang laitakin;
Haichi manpha tuh un,
Khangnou lungsim tawh kilawm hi;
Haichi manpha tuh un, lungduaiin kem un.
Haichi manpha tuh un, (2)
Gamchih leh kilchih ah,
Lungduai, itna khut tawh;
Hinna an balnen in,
Tangthupha na genkik-kik un;
Haichi manpha tuh un,
I it gamsung ah.
Haichi manpha tuh un,
Ni a kai laitak-in ah zong;
Haichi manpha tuh un,
Khua a mui dong-in;
Haichi manpha tuh un,
Phun lou, umlah louin om un;
A vekpi'n Pathian ap-in, Amah muang un.
Haichi manpha tuh un,
Lunglawp leh hanchiam takpiin;
Haichi manpha tuh un;
Kham haichi manpha;
Haichi manpha tuh un,
Khutte thazawsak ngeikei un;
Nisa leh vuahtui Pathian kiangah ngen un.
Aw ngai un, hiai tangthu lamdang lua,
Sawtlam-a i manna thu;
Ahihhang' van apan Mi khat hong,
Man genseng louh-in hongtan.
Tangtawn mang ding kua'n hongtan hiam?
Bang A hih a?
Tua koia om?
Van-a nang dia ngen-in om.
Van Angelte laia sangpen zong,
Ei tang-a hongding thei lou;
Pa, Ta, Kha Siangthoute laka Khat,
It, khros a hongsi loungal.
Hiai tangthu lamdang beidek loulai,
Ngaihtuah noppen gennoppen;
Van ah Siampi Lian hi, ei di'n gen,
A min zong Khrist Jesu hi.
Hiai Hondampa kiang' na kipia diam?
A ma ah na hongkun diam?
Nang zong A deihsakna na thei ding,
Tu'n zong nang honhondam nuam!
Jesu migi, nun-a nem,
Naupang neu hon ensuk in;
Ka mawl milmel honhehpi'n,
Na kiang ah honpaisak in.
Na kiang ah hongnuam ing e,
Toupa nuamsa, honnial ken;
Na hehpihna Lalgam ah,
Naupang neu mun honpia in.
Pathian Belamnou kon en,
Ka etzui pen Na hi ding;
Nang nun-a nem leh migi,
Khatvei naupang neu hi chia.
Nang bang-in om nuam ung e,
Na thuman lungsim honpia'n;
Nang mi hehpihthei leh hoih,
Na itna lung honneisak.
Jesu Belamnou itsiam,
Na hehpih khut sung om hi'ng;
Hondampa, Nang honbangsak',
Ka lungsung ah hongteng in.

songs.title: Tangbang Damlai Semmeng Ve Ni
songs.key: Doh is Bb (Tehna khata khuang li pai)

lines: Tangbang damlai semmeng ve ni,
Khelhna lummei zing nuai ah;
Denchiang in Mang Jesu ziak in,
Vanmang lukhu i khuding hi.
Aw, lei manglukhu te zaw,
Tangtawn gam tunglou ding uh,
Chiaugal a hinna manglukhu zaw
Aw thounawn tate'n khuta ding uh.
Tang a Eden huan siangthou a,
Evi leh Adam te'n zaw;
Selung gel a ching zoulou in,
Khelhna in a hih tuamta hi.
Semgim te leh puakgik te'n zong,
Chiaugal ah ngata unteh;
Ngoumei lai a N'ong pai nawn chiang,
Ka lungkhamna beita ding hi.
Haibang ka ngak Immanuel,
Lungkhamna gam daidam ah;
Denchiang in Kanan gamnuam ah,
Houlungtuak in ngabang leng ni.
Toupa, Kum Thak vualzawl in,
Hiaia hong kikhawmte di'n;
Na Thu na hatna guan in,
Nanga hi nuam di'n honbawl'n.
Leisa belamte Chingpa,
Lungtang khauh kah sinsak in;
Mittaw'n mu di'n mit nei hen,
Kimu'n Nang lam en uhen.
Nasep Na patna mun ah,
Hatna thak pia'n, sepna di'n;
Mial, ginlah, lau delhmang in,
Dahte khitui nulhul in.
Aneu alian hon vualzawlin,
Mi tengteng' honphat nadi'n;
Na thahatna leh itna,
Hia' kikhawmte'n nei uhen.
Jesu min gen zel ding uh, Haleluia!
Jang-gam lei leh singtang ah, Haleluia!
Hiai ah Gospel hongtungta, Haleluia!
Suahlam ah a pai zel ding, Haleluia! (2)
Haleluia! Haleluia! Suahlam ah a pai zel ding. (2)
Mi tengteng kikhawm ding uh, Haleluia!
Hondampa pahtawi dingin, Haleluia!
Kalvari tatna gen ding Haleluia!
Leitung gam mun tengteng ah, Haleluia! (2)
Haleluia! Haleluia! Leitung gam mun tengteng ah. (2)

songs.title: Kha Siangin Hong Halhsak Ve Aw

lines: Kha Siang in honhalhsak ve aw,
Toupa Jesu' minin;
Ka lungsung uah teng gige hen,
A nasep mei bangin.
Pentikos Ni a hongtunin,
U-le-nau a panpih;
Tua in mawhna sut bang theiin,
Zata phillei luang bang.
Tua banga Na nasep theih na'ng,
Kha Siang ka hon ngen uh;
Hongpawl, sinsak, hong lungmuan di'n,
Thangvan tun matengin.
Bangdang kim nei mah lehang leng,
Hiai i taksap pen hi;
I mawhnate hong theisak di'n,
Kha Siang kia i deihpen.
Kalvaria itna hong kilang,
Khangthaka gensawn sawn ding;
Tangtawna zong tul lou ding hi,
Tul ngeilou ding, tul ngeilou ding,
Tul ngeilou ding, tangtawn in.
Van late lak' zong hiai la ngaih-
Pen ahi louthei kei ding;
Semgua siangthou tum dia hoihpen,
Hiai phatna la, hiai phatna la;
Hiai phatna la ahipen.
Belamnou' sisan hihlamdang,
Khate tatkhiakna natdan;
Seraf aw nem phat theih sang' leng,
A sang zawsem, a sang zawsem,
A sang zawsem, nakpi in.
Khangthak piaunel zah bei nung in,
Phat la kipan bang phet ding;
Etnop lamdang A si pha ah,
A om zel ding, a om zel ding;
A om zel ding, a thuk hi.
Tangtawn in A kipiakzawhna,
Kuata'n hiam genzou thei ding?
Ngaihtuah phak louh nung inleng hiai,
A thak gige, a thak gige;
A thak gige, bangchik in.
Aw hoih gen theihlouh nei leng zong,
Phattawp theih ka kiging lou;
Ka aw neihsun hoih hun hileh,
Ka ut lua hi, ka ut lua hi;
Ka ut lua hi, Amah di'n.

songs.title: Hondampa Na Min Ngaih Phat Nawn Dingin
songs.author: John Ellerton

lines: Hondampa, Na Min ngaih phat nawn dingin,
Kithutuak in tawpna la konsa uh;
Biak tawp main ding in kong thum uhi,
Tu'n Non lungmuanna thu ka ngak uhi.
Ka pai chiang un lungmuanna honpia in,
Nang tawh ni pan' Nangmah tawh ni tum ding;
Khial lou di'n muk veng, lung zahlak lou di'n,
Hiai inn ah Na min ka louta uhi.
Muanna honpia'n Toupa jan hun kal-in,
A mialnate vakna honsuaksak in;
Na-leh-sa pan' Na tate humbit in,
Nang adingin mial leh vak kibang hi.
Ka damsungun Na lungmuanna honpia'n,
Dah chiang' kinepna, haksaa bukna;
Huan, buainate tawp hen, Na chih chiangin,
Honsam in Toupa, Na tangtawn muanna'h.

songs.title: Gamnuam Apan Lathak Naza Na Hiam?
songs.author: J Johnson

lines: Gam nuam apan la thak na za na hiam,
La kipahhuai na za hiam?
Lunglawp takin i buhphal kankhawm ni,
A hun sawt nawn lou ding hi.
Buhnei Toupa hongkilang pah ding hi,
A mel mu pah, A aw za pah ding;
Buhnei Toupa hongkilang pah ding hi,
Buhlate Inn-a pii di'n.
Gam nuam apan amau hon ensuk uh,
I it leh ngaihte'n hon en;
A na uh zou ua, a khros uh paw khin,
A manglukhu uh ngahta.
Aw, gam nuam pan tua la ngaihnop kisa,
I lung uh tu'n hatsak hi;
A la ngaihin i khate hatsak hi,
Gim leh tawla i sep lai'.
Aw gam nuam pan tua la ngaihnop kisa,
Nuamna leh silpak guam pan;
Ginna hing in i phawk a, i thei thei,
Tua la ei la hipah ding.
Kalvari zawhna thupipen,
Angelte'n Amah phat ding uh;
Mite'n pahtawi chiat ding uhi,
Khovel Hondampa sisan ah;
Mi mangthang dingte tankheta,
Kimelmate kilemsakta.
Mual tengteng sangin Kalvari,
Nakpiin a thupi zawtham!
Tua ah hotdamna nak a lang,
Mihing leitung ah a luangsuak,
Mi tengteng a hing-thaksak ding,
Kumsawt hinna tui ahi ding.
Machiang suan hang chiautui luang bang',
Nite kiam in hontonpih;
Hiai lei i nuse pahta ding,
Thangvan inn nuam manawhin.
Masuan hang, suan hang chiautui luang bangin,
Masuan hang, suan hang hun tuibang kiam tawh;
Masuan hang, suan hang tua gam nuam zuanin,
Masuan hang, suan hang chiautui luang bangin.
Damsung lamsuk-toua pai in,
Kum tampi i paikhengta;
Nopna, dahna, zong i thuak hi,
Maitai ni, maigum ni zong.
Nitengin Toupa muang ni hang,
Lam dika honpi dingin;
Lamdang piallou ding, ngeilou ding,
Khelh leh mialna tawnlou ding.

songs.title: Van A Pathian Tutphah Kim Ah
songs.author: Mrs Anne Shephered (Newton)

lines: Van a Pathian tutphah kim ah,
Naupang sang tampi ding;
A khelhna uh ngaihdam veksa,
Misiangthou nuamsa pawl.
Thupi, thupi, chi'n la sa uh,
Thupi, thupi, chi'n la sa uh.
Tua bang vanmun vak leh hoih ah,
Bangchia pai uh hiam?
Muanna, pahna, itna mun ah,
Bangchia pai uh hiam?
A khelhna uh silsiangna di'n,
Hondampa'n sisan pia;
Tua sisan pha a kisilte,
En in, siang in ngou uh.
Lei ah Hondampa min it uh,
A hehpihna zong uh;
Tu'n Belamnou mai ah ding in,
A mel kilawm mu uh.
Jing khuavak in van jem,
Ka lung phawngin kikou;
Jesu phatin om hen!
Sep leh thum hunin zong,
Jesu kiang ka tai jel;
Jesu phatin om hen!
Janmial sun hongsuak jel,
Hiai i sak theih chiangin;
Jesu phatin om hen!
Mial hatna taimang jel,
Hiai thu a jak chiangin;
Jesu phatin om hen!
Tangtawn nopna van ah,
Hiai la ngaihpen hi ding;
Jesu phatin om hen!
Lei leh van leh tuipi'n,
Phatna la'n dawng uhen;
Jesu phatin om hen!
Ka damsung ni tengin,
Hiai ka phatla hi hen;
Jesu phatin om hen!
Tangtawn, tangtawn dongin,
Hiai phat la ging hen aw;
Jesu phatin om hen!
Kah in hondam lou ding,
Ka mai khituiin dim zong;
Ka lau beisak thei tuanlou,
Ka khelhsa sawpsiang theilou;
Kah in hondam lou ding.
Jesu kei di'n kap-in si,
Jesu'n sing ah kei di'n thuak;
Hondam di'n kei hon ngak hi,
Amah kia'n hondam thei.
Sep in hondam lou ding,
Ka nasep hoihpente leh;
Ngaihtuah siang leh sa theihna'n
Ka kha piangthaksak thei lou;
Sep in hondam lou ding.
Ngak in hondam lou ding,
Khial-a mang panpih bei hi'ng;
Hizong zahngaihna aw za'ng,
Hiai ah ngak leng si mai ding,
Ngak in hondam lou ding.
Khrist gin in hondam ding,
Na Ta kei dia kap muangin;
Amah sepsa muangta ning,
A angsung juan honpanpi'n;
Khrist gin in hondam ding.

songs.title: Ka Ginlah Teng Jesu Pia Ing
songs.author: J C Morgan

lines: Ka ginlah teng Jesu pia ing!
A hehpih thuchiam ka za;
Chikmah chiangin lungbuai lou ding;
Tua thu ah ken ka muang hi.
Ken ka muang hi, muang mahmah ing,
A thu ah ken ka muang hi;
Ken ka muang hi, muang mahmah ing,
A thu ah ken ka muang hi.
Ka khelhna teng Jesu pia ing!
A si ah honsawpsiang hi;
Aman siangthouin honkem ding;
Pathian kiang' Inn hontun ding.
Ka lauhna teng Jesu pia ing!
Ka kha Amah ah tutkhawl;
Ka lampi ah khim hongzing zong,
A vakna mial thei ngeilou.
Ka nopna teng Jesu pia ing!
Bangkim-a ka bangkim hi;
Leitung a mi sang' tungtuang hi,
Amah ah ka deih teng kim.
Ka vek-in Jesu kiang pia ing!
Ka pumpi, ka kha tengteng;
Ka neihsa leh ka lamet teng,
Tangtawn pha'n Amah hi ding.
Pathian' Tapa galdou di'n kuan,
Kumpi lukhu ngah di'n;
A si luan puanlap hongkimu,
Kuahiam Amah jui mi?
A lungkhamna nou dawnpih thei,
Thuakna tung-a vualzou;
Damsunga a khros pua teitei,
Tua mi Amah zui hi.
Martar masapen in mu thei,
Hankhuk khenlam gamla;
Tung van-a a Heutupa mu,
Hondam dingin ngen hi,
Amah bang ngaihdamna aw nei,
Pumpi natna thuak zong,
A tung-a giloute di'n thum,
Kuahiam Amah zui mi?
Pawl thupi, telpawl mi tawmte,
Kha hongtunna pawlte;
Misiangthou hangsan sawm-le-nih,
A lamet uh theite;
Mei leh khros lau louin nuaisiah,
Tem leh humpi ma' ding;
A ngawng uh tan ding' pia ngam uh,
Kuahiam amaute zui?
Sepaih suanhuai- paching, valnou,
Nupi leh nungakte-
Honpa' mangtutphah kim ah nuam,
Kumpi puan ngou silhin;
Lauhuai, gimna, natna thuakin,
Van lamtou ah pai uh;
Aw Pathian, hehpihna hongpia'n,
Kou zong amau zui ding'.
Pathian aw, kipak ung,
Lungtang, khut leh aw'n gen ung;
Na nasepte lamdang,
Nang ah Na khawvel kipak;
Ka nu angsung ua pan,
Lamtawn in non vualjawl;
Itna thilpiak simseng
Louh koua hi tutan.
Aw Pathian hau, thilphal,
Ka damsung un hongnai in;
Lungsung pahna'n nuamna'n,
Koute honhalhsak in aw;
Na itna-a kemin,
Mangbatin honpii in,
Gilou lak honveng in,
Hiai lei leh van ah leng.
Pahna, phatna chiteng,
Pa Pathian piakin om hen;
Tapa leh Kha Siangthou,
Na vaihawmpihte kiang leng;
Nangmah Pathian khat kia,
Lei leh van in honbiak;
Tuabang phat-a omta,
Omlel, om gige ding.

songs.title: Toupa, Ka Kiang' Thu Hon Gen In
songs.author: Francis R Havergal

lines: Toupa, ka kiang' thu hon gen in,
Na aw suak bang ka pau theihna'n;
Nang non zonkhiak bangin ken zong,
Mimang thawmhaute ka zong ding.
Toupa, nonpiak thil manphate,
Hilhsawn thei di'n honsinsak in;
A kisel lungtangte khoih di'n,
Ka gen, na thute hatsak in.
Na khawl tawldamna nuam honpia'n,
Tawldamsaka, thu gen thei di'n;
A tawlte kitaksap laitak',
Na thu bang ka gen theih nadi'n.
Aw nangmah bukimna ngeiin,
Ka lungsung hong dimlet inla;
Na itna uangtaka gen a,
Na thupina ka lah theih na'n.
Toupa, kei na-ngawn honzang in,
A mun, a hun, na deih bangin;
Na khawlna, nopna, thupina,
Na lungdam mel ka muh mateng.
Ka Pathian, lamdang mahmah chia,
Na vanglet vak mahmah;
Na zahngaihna tutphah lamdang,
Vak mahmah, thuk mahmah. (2)
Na tangtawn kumte lamdang hi,
Aw Nang tangtawn Toupa;
Sun leh jan kun a biak tawntung,
Tawploua biak Nangmah. (2)
Lamdang mah ding, kilawm mah ding,
Na mel tak kimuh ding;
Pilna, thilhihtheihna tawpbei,
Siangthouna-a dimlai. (2)
Aw Pathian hing kon lau mahmah,
Ka lungsim thuk tak ah;
Lametna tawh nang kon bia hi,
Kisikna khitui tawh! (2)
Hizong Toupa, kon it mahmah,
Bangkim hihthei Nangmah;
Bangmah hilou hiai kei lungtang',
Itna ngen nong kunsuk! (2)
Sihna luigal ah kituak ni,
Jesu' si-a ngou puan silhin;
Natna beita, nunnuam ni hang,
Kikhen lauhna om nawn louhna,
Sihna luigal lam ah.
Sihna luigal lam ah, (3)
Kituak ni khen lou di'n; (4)
Sihna luigal lam ah.
Tu'n dahna hongtung zong lau ke'ng,
Ginna'n ka van inn ka muta;
Angelte gen ginna'n ka za,
'Ka Toupa'n khitui nulsiang ding,'
Sihna luigal lam ah.
Lawmvual it tawh kithuahna nuam,
Pahna bangteng ka tuak diam aw;
Kham kongpi ka lut khit chiangin,
Ka kha'n nunnop bangteng gawm dia,
Sihna luigal lam ah.
Hondampa it ka khe pii in,
Tua pahna kim ka tan theih na'n;
Khitui hon nulhul tua itna,
Pak-a tangtawn ka hin theihna,
Sihna luigal lam ah.
Ka lampi haksat chiang',
Toupa aw, hongnai in;
Ka hinna a bei dektak chiangin,
Kon sapna honza in, honlen in, puk louh na'ng,
Toupa ngaih, Na inn ah hontun in.
Toupa ngaih honlen in, honpiin, honding sak',
Kei ka nem, kei ka tawl, kei ka bah;
Huihpi leh janmial pan honpiin, na vak ah,
Toupa ngaih, Na inn ah hontun in.
Ka nasep ka zawh chiang'
Taina ka mualsuah chiang';
Na honlah Na vak ah honmusak,
Tua khawpi hoih kilawm, Belamnou a tanna,
Toupa ngaih, Na inn ah hontun in.
Aw hong un muanhuaite,
Vualzou-a kipakin,
Beth-lehem khua lam ah pai diamdiam ni e;
Ngai un! gankuang-a lum angelte Mangpen,
Aw hong un, Amah phat ni, (3)
Khrist Toupa.
Sa un, angel lapawl,
Vualzawhna la ngaihpen,
Van sang thupi phatna la in jelsuak hen;
I Pathian in tu'n thupina khuta hen,
Aw hong un, Amah phat ni, (3)
Khrist Toupa.
Amen! honphat ung e,
Kou hondam dia hongpiang,
Aw Jesu! Na min phatin om tawntung hen;
I Pa, Pathian thu, mihing a hongsuak ta,
Aw hong un Amah phat ni, (3)
Khrist Toupa.
Suangmanpha man tampen ka mu,
Lungnuamin la ka sa;
Khrist kei'a hih vang' la sa ning,
Khrist ka zaila hi ding.
Suangmanpha man tampen ka mu,
Lungnuam in la ka sa;
Khrist kei'a hih vang la sa ning,
Khrist ka zaila hi ding.
Khrist ka zawlnei, siampu, kumpi,
Ka zawlnei khuavak hi;
Mangtutphah mai' ka siampulian,
Van-a ka kumpi hat.
Amah toute' Toupa ahi,
Kumpite' Kumpi hi;
Amah dikna sunni ahi,
A kha nuaia damna.
Khrist ka muanna, kei di'n hongsi,
Kei di'n A sisan suah;
Kei dia kithoihna lamdangin,
Pathian kiang ah kipia.
Khrist Jesu kei di'n bangkim hi,
Khamuanna leh itna;
Ka lei hinna, ka kipahna,
Manglukhu honghi ding.

songs.title: Pia Unla, Piak Na Hi Ding Uh

lines: Khawvel khiala mangthangsa tankhia dingin,
Pathian in a Tapa neihsun honpia hi;
A tatsa khiala mangte'n, hinna lam hontheih na'ng un,
Thilpiaka nasem dingin Toupa'n honsam.
Pia unla, hileh piak na hi ding uh,
Piakin Pathian na khupzou theilou ding;
Pathian in mihing lei a ba ngeilou,
Vualzawlna nak honghi zaw hi.
Gingtute aw, thupiak khauhtak mai i nei,
'Kuan unla, tangthupha va hilh un,' a chi;
A kuankhia theiloute'n zong mawhpuakna lianpi i nei,
Thilpiak a nasem dingin Toupa'n honsam.
Gingtute aw, koilai' gou na kholkhawm ua?
Laukha bawma na kholkhawm leh a bit ding;
Ginnaa na piak ding pen Toupa'n a ngak gige hi,
'Bangzahta'n non muang ngam nading hiam,' a chi.
Ka na zata Toupa, malbang non kouhna,
Khristian tengteng Missionari di'n nongsam;
Kong kipia, ka neihteng leh ka pumpi, ka hinna tawh;
Nang'a hi'ng sisana nong lei khit manin.

songs.title: Pathian In Hoih A Honvuk Hi

lines: Pathian in hoih a honvuk hi,
Vannuai a miteng in pak hi;
Pa leh Ta leh Kha kigawmkhawm,
Van angelte pahtawipen hi, Amen.
Ka kikhopna uh tawp chiang' leng,
Ka kiang uah om gige'n Toupa;
Ka lungsung uh leh ka inn uh,
Na inn siangthou honghi zel hen, Amen.

songs.title: Phat Leh Thum Hun Nuam Mahmah E
songs.author: Fanny J Crosby

lines: Phat leh thum hun nuam mahmah e,
Thumna kigawmkhawm chiang';
Ginna kha tunga vatuang a,
I nop la kahtouh chiang';
Tua hun in thuchiam manphate,
Kitel sem in za hang,
Lei ah lawmte khen mah lehang,
Vantung' kimu kim ding.
Van ah' kimu khawmchiat ni e,
Vantung' kimu kim ding;
Jesu sisan pha ginnain,
Vantung' kimu kim ding.
Eite hong henkhawm itna khau,
Manpha, nuam mahmah e;
Pa' Tapa Khrist min manpha a,
Eite i kikhop chiang';
Kikhenna hongtung pah lezong,
A Thu sung ah kigen-
Lametna manpha: denchiangin,
Vantung' kimu kim ding.
Ahi, i khe gim leh tawlte,
Luigal kai pahta ding;
Tua ah it leh ngaihte'n hon ngak,
Ni tanna gam nuam ah;
Ni tawmchik lel, kum tawmchik lel,
Huihpi thuak lai lehang;
La ngaih leh lungnop bei lou toh,
Vantung' kimu kim ding.
Hondampa kipiakna kim hi,
Nangjui di'n bangteng nusia'ng;
Nang ka Piipa leh hon Gumpa,
Tua kipan hi tawntung ding.
Ka pesiang bangteng, (2)
Ka neih teng Jesu kiang ka tun,
Ka pesiang bangteng.
Lung kisika ka hongpaiin,
Hiai hun siangthou takmai ah;
Ngaiin aw, Khrist, ka lung thumna,
Kha thilhihtheih hon phawksak.
Ngaihdam ngetna kim ka honbawl,
Nuamsa, hauhna, lengmang ding;
Kha Siang in a mun luahta ding,
Kei hita lou, Khrist kei ah.
Hiai thu ka la leh thu hihen,
Tu leh hinna bei matan;
Hiai ka muanna, hiai ka letna,
Chiaukuam vak ka tun mateng.
Aw, hotdamna kim kipahna,
Aw, Pathian, itna muanna;
Aw, siangthou-a om a nop dan,
Amah' hi'ng Amah keia.

songs.title: Kipak Un, Nuam Un, Tanpa Hongpai Hi
songs.author: H Bonar

lines: Kipak un, nuam un, Tanpa a hongpai hi,
A nauluai, A khros, A han en mah dih uh.
Phatna la sa'n a thu gen un,
Thah-a om Amah hi;
Phatna la sa un lungdamin,
Amah hing kikta.
Kipak un, nuam un, sunni hong tangta hi,
Meipi jing a thengta mialna paimangta.
Kipak un, nuam un, tua sisan luang vang-in,
Tatna zawh ahita, aman piak hita.
Kipak un, nuam un, ngaihdamna manbei hi!
Midik khialte dingin singdawn ah si hi.
Kipak un, nuam un, thahsa Belamnou vang',
Amah sihna tunga vualzouin hingkik,
Kipak un, nuam un, i Kumpipa'n van ah,
Mangtutphah tung pan ei di'n hon gensak hi.
Kipak un, nuam un, Amah hongpai nawn ding,
Thahsa Belamnou a vangletna teng toh.

songs.title: Ka Pa Uh, Van Thupi-A Om

lines: Ka Pa uh, van thupi-a om,
Na Min zahtakin om hen;
Na deihdan vana bawl bang',
Leitung ah leng kibawl hen;
Nek-le-tak honpia inla,
Khemna ah honpilut ken;
Gam, Hatna, Vangletna toh,
Kumsawt Nang' a hi, Amen.
Ka Pa uh, van thupi-a om,
Na Gam siangthou hongtung hen;
Ka tung ua leibat neite,
Ka ngaihdam bang un Nang le'ng,
Ka leibat uh ngaidam in;
Giloupa pan honching in,
Gam, Hatna, Vangletna toh,
Kumsawt Nang'a hi, Amen.
Tanglai mite'n kipakin,
Piitu aksi a mu uh;
A vak kipahpih uhi,
A piina lam ah zui uh;
Tua bang Na kiang' honpii in,
Hehpihsiam ka Toupa aw.
Kipak, kintakin tai uh,
Gankuang Na jalna zuan uh;
Lei leh van Mang honmu uh,
Na ma' kunin honbia uh;
Tua bang kou khete'n zong Na
Zahngaihna tutphah zuan hen.
Thilpiak manpha hontawi in,
Tua gankuang ah hongpia uh;
Tua bang kipahna siangthou,
Khelhna pana siangsa tawh;
Ka gou manpha penpen uh,
Khrist ka van Mang honpia n'ung.
Siangthou Jesu honpii in,
Lampi kawchik haksa ah,
Lei thilte hongbei chiangin,
Tatsa ka kha uh pii in;
Tua mun aksi pii ngailou,
Na thupi liah leng omlou.
Thangvan gam nunnuam vak ah,
Bawltawm vak ngai nawnlou uh;
Nang, vak, pahna, manglukhu,
Sunni tum ngeilou Na hi;
Nang ka Kumpipa phatin,
Haleluia sata n'ung.

songs.title: Khantawn Inn Nuam A Om Hi
songs.author: H R Parmer

lines: Khantawn inn nuam a om hi,
Kilawm leh tang hi;
Tua ah kipahna om,
Mial in khuh ngeilou hi;
Angelte'n puansilh, la sa,
Mangtutphah kima phatin;
Aw chikchiangin kon mu dia,
Nang inn hoihpen, hoihpen aw.
Inn! Inn hoihpen aw!
Inn tang, inn hoih aw!
Hondampa, inn tang aw,
Inn tang, inn hoih aw.
Pak tul ngeilou om gige,
Tua inn hoihpen ah;
Naupang neute'n la sa,
Tua ah Jesu phat in;
Ngaihtakin amau la sa,
Mangtutphah kim a phatin;
Aw chikchiangin kon mu dia,
Nang inn hoihpen, hoihpen aw.
Tatsate ka mu pah ding,
Van khenlam pek ah;
Khrist ka hotdamna hi,
Bangdi'n sih ka lau dia!
Ka mu hak nawn kei ding hi,
Amah mangtutphah-a tu!
Aw, tua chiangin konmu ding,
Nang inn hoihpen, hoihpen aw.

songs.title: Na Khelhna Toh Lui Hong Zuan In
songs.author: Fanny J Crosby

lines: Na khelhna toh Lui hongzuan in,
Na dah lungkham puakgik toh;
A tui ah tuate phummang in,
Tua'h jangkhaina na ngah ding.
Kin meng inla, ba' muang om lai?
Tomchik zekaiin na kha mangsak ken;
Jesu'n hotdam di'n nang honngak,
Tuni'n hehpihna'n honsam!
Na hih bangin Lui hongzuan in,
Jesu'n nang a honngak hi;
Na khelhna sandup bang hi zong,
Vuk bangin na ngou ding hi.
Hondampa thuchiam hiai ahi,
Lungheia Amah gingte;
Amah muanga kinga nuamte,
Aman hinna honpia ding.
Hong in, Lui ah kidamsak in,
Khamuanhuai aw ngaikhia in;
Mikhial khat hong paikiktung ah,
Tu'n angelte kipak hen!
Jankim siang laitakin hong ging,
Tua tanglai la thupi;
Angelte a hong kumsuk ua,
La sa uh kaihging toh;
Van Kumpipa'n mihingte ding',
Lemna deihsakna pia;
Khuavannuai in dai khipkhepin,
Angelte' la ngai hi.
Van kihong ah hongpai lai uh,
Muanna kha hong jak-in;
A la ngaih uh hong ging lailai,
Leitung tawlna gam ah;
Dahna leh lungkhamna mun ah,
A hong leng diaidiai ua;
Leitung pautuam buaina tung ah,
Angelte'n la hongsa.
Aw nou, leia hin chimtakte,
Tawl leh bah-a omte;
Aw nou, semgim leh puakgik pua,
Lam suk leh tou a vai;
En un, tu'n lungdam hun hongtung,
Khajak-in hongleng hi,
Aw, khawl tadih unla, ngai un,
Angelte'n la sa hi.
Nite kumte pai mengmeng a,
Zawlnei genkholh naisak;
Nite kumte pai mengmeng a,
Tangtawn mun hontun ding;
Muanna, khuavannuai luahsuak a,
Thupina honpuak chiang';
Tua chiangin thilsiam zousiah in,
Tua Angel' la sa ding.

songs.title: Misiangthou Paina Lampi Lui Jui In
songs.author: James L Black

lines: Misiangthou paina lampi lui juiin,
I ma ah Toupa a pai zel;
Van gam lam zuan-a i pai laitakin,
Van aksi i tung ah a vak.
Van inn nuam lam zuanin i pai,
Hinna leh nopna tang ngei dingin;
I tun chiang' i kipak mahmah ding,
Bitin gam thupi ah.
Ginna neia lam lui hoih i zuih leh,
Ki-itna leh kituahnain;
Toupa' mel muin i kipak ding uh,
Amah toh i om tawntung ding.
I laitah laitakin haksa mahleh,
Sihna lui lauhuaitak kan chiang';
Toupa'n gal lehlam hon kaipih ding hi,
Tua'h A phat la sa tawntung ni.
Tanna, dahna leh mialna apan,
Jesu, kon zuan; Jesu, kon zuan;
Nang a suahtak, nopna leh vak ah,
Jesu, Na kiang kon zuan:
Damlou jawngkhal, Na damna zuan in,
Tasam-a vai Na hauhna zuan in;
Ka khelhna apan Nang-a lut di'n,
Jesu, Na kiang kon zuan.
Manna leh chinlahna zumhuai pan,
Jesu, kon zuan; Jesu kon zuan;
Punna thupi Na khros ka hon zuan,
Jesu, Na kiang kon zuan;
Lei lungkhamna pan Na kiang nopna,
Damsung huih pan Na kiang a thenna;
Mangbatna pan Na kiang kipahna,
Jesu, Na kiang kon zuan.
Lungkimmoh leh kisaktheihna pan,
Jesu, kon zuan; Jesu, kon zuan;
Na deih leh kipah lama om di'n,
Jesu, Na kiang kon zuan,
Keimah deihlam a omna nusia'n,
Na itna nuama teng di'n kon zuan;
Tung lama vakhu bang a lengin,
Jesu, Na kiang kon zuan.
Hankhuk mial lau mulkimna apan,
Jesu, kon zuan; Jesu kon zuan;
Aw Na inn nuam leh vak ka hon zuan,
Jesu, Na kiang kon juan;
Siatna thuk genvuallouh akipan,
Bukna muanna Na huang ka hon zuan;
Thupina mel mu gige dingin,
Jesu, Na kiang kon juan.

songs.title: Vakna Pia In, Aw, Pe Mengin
songs.author: Fanny J Crosby

lines: Vakna piain, aw pe meng in,
Tuipi gal gam gamla ah;
Ei hon Tanpa ngaih' min vangin,
Damna thu hat paisak in.
Vakna pia in aw pemeng in,
Tuipi khen lam gamte ah;
Itna tawpbei, hehpih thawnpiak,
Thu lamdang za meng uhen.
Vakna pia'n, mialna, dahna leh,
Zan-a khate sihna ah;
Kinmeng in, nite bei hulhul,
Hunte mualliam mengmeng hi.
Vakna pia'n Toupa'n thu honpia,
A Thu siangthou limsak in;
'Kuankhia in, Ka Gospel genin;
A tawp pha'n Kon ompih hi.'
Pathian in hehpih man',
Hotdamna kim a gel;
Hehpihna Amah kia'n pe thei,
Gilou hotdam a tel.
Hehpih jiak' ginna' hotdam!
Gin in, gin in,
Gin in nou sepkhiak hilouin;
Gin in nou sepkhiak hilouin;
Sep hilou, sep hilou;
Sep hileh mi ki-uangsak ding hi,
Pathian thawnpiak ahi;
Sep hileh mi ki-uangsak ding hi,
Pathian thawnpiak ahi,
Pathian thawnpiak ahi, (4)
Pathian thawnpiak.
Pathian hehpihna om,
Jesu Khrist A Ta ah;
Zumhuaina khros-a kikhaiin,
Pathian hehpihna phuang.
Pathian ging tengteng in,
Khrist gintakna ah phuang;
Hehpih vangin hotdamna nei,
Pathian' tate hita.
Galvil, jan omdan honhilh',
Thuchiam theihna bang om hiam;
Khualzin, na mual tung lamah,
Tua aksi tangpha en in!
Galvil, tua aksi tang in,
Pahna, lametna gen hiam?
Khualzin, aksi in gen mah,
Israel ni chiam hontun.
Galvil, jan omdan honhilh',
Tua aksi sang semsem hi;
Khualzin, hamphatna leh vak,
Lemna leh Thutak hontun;
Galvil, tua mun kia ngak-in,
A pianna kia tang ding hiam?
Khualzin tangtawn Amah a
En in, leitung teng hontan.
Galvil, jan omdan honhilh',
Jingkhua vak nai leh kilawm;
Khualzin, khuamial bei vekta,
Ginlah leh launa beita;
Galvil vakvak nawn kenla,
Na inn ah tawlngata in,
Khualzin, Pathian' Tapa hong,
En in, Lemna Kumpipa.

songs.title: Hawk Khia'n Jesu Thupi
songs.key: Doh is C (Lah is A) DORCAS

lines: Hawkkhia'n Jesu thupina hongliah pen,
Ka lungsim uh sunvak henla;
Kalvari mual a A thuakin,
A itna honglang chiantakin,
Tuin hiai ah,
Tuin hiai ah honglang nawn hen.
Mundang belh ding koiah hiam ka muh ding,
A liam sung loungal omlou hi;
Na dikna loungal thildang teng,
Honkhuh thei ding om louhial hi;
Tua ah keimah,
Tua ah keimah honsel in aw.
Tua jan lungkhamhuai tak ah Jesu in,
Tanghou la a, vual a zawl in;
A phel a, Hiai, chiin a gen,
Ka pumpi ahi, nou'a ding;
Non theih gige,
Non theih gige na'ng hiai hih un.
Ka tan chiat uah vual hon zawlsak vek in,
Jesu'n ka kiang uah um henla;
Umpih tham-in honbawl inla,
Sakramen tak honghi ngei hen;
Hih thei jel di'n,
Hih thei jel di'n kon ngai uh hi.
Tua bangin uain nou leng A la a,
Kipahthu genkhitin A gen,
Ka sisan phaa thuchiam thak,
Hiai nou ahi, na dawnte uh;
Non theih gige,
Non theih gige na'ng hiai hih un.
Toupa, Sakramen ah Nang om inla,
Siamtang a nuam din honghuh in;
Tanghou, uain tui ah Nangma'n,
Hongpawl ngei inla, bangmah in
Hondal kei hen,
Hondal kei henla, tengden in.
Ngai un! angel tangkou la,
Kumpi hongpiang thupi hen;
Lei ah lemna zahngaihna
Pathian leh gilou kitam;
Namchih kipakin thou un,
Van mi' vualzohna' tel un;
Angel honpi tawh gen un;
Khrist hongpiang Beth-lehem ah,
Ngai un! angel tangkou' la;
Kumpi hongpiang thupi hen.
Van mite pahtawi pen Khrist,
Tangtawn Toupa Khrist Amah;
Hun sawt nung' hongpai en un,
Nungak siangthou sung' hongpiang;
En un, Pathian sa-a tuam,
Pak un, Pathian mihing suak;
Mihing lak ah teng nuam hi,
Jesu ei Imanuel;
Ngai un! angel tangkou' la;
Kumpi hongpiang thupi hen.
Lemna Kumpipa' Tapa,
Dikna Ni, Amah pak un;
Vakna, hinna miteng puak,
A kha-a damsakna toh;
A thupina honnusia,
Mi sih nawn louh na'ng hongpiang;
Mite phong dingin hongpiang,
Pianthakna pe ding hongpiang;
Ngai un! angel tangkou' la;
Kumpi hongpiang thupi hen.
Adam batna tu'n beisak',
Nang batna'n a mun luahsak';
Tunglam pan Adam nihna,
Na itna honluahkiksak';
Ngai un! angel tangkou' la,
Mang thak hongpiang thupi hen;
Lei ah lemna, zahngaihna,
Pathian leh gilou kitam;
Ngai un! angel tangkou' la,
Kumpi hongpiang thupi hen.
Bible pomkip in! thildang teng a mang zong,
A sinsakna manphate mangsak ken;
A thu gen in kha ihmute khanglousak,
Sihna apan hin na'ng honchiam kip hi.
Bible pomkip in! Bible pomkip in!
Bible pomkip in! I Meivak, Makai!
Bible pomkip in! hiai gou hoih leh manpha'n,
Tangtawn hinna honpuak, pukte hondam;
Kuama'n a manphat dan teh thei ngeilou ding,
A vualzawlna zong in, na zon theih lai'n!
A lamhaihte ading-a meivak hong hi,
Tuailai puktheite ading-a Makai;
Gilou tatdan kisiate di'n Lamet hi,
Tek leh vuai di'n chiangkhun, Laibu hoihpen.

songs.title: Van Mun Thupi A Na Itte
songs.author: Ada R Hershon

lines: Vanmun thupi-a na itte,
Ngaiin huibang na mau hiam?
Na damlai ni hongbei chiangin,
It leh ngaih na juan nuam hiam?
It leh ngaihte i kim ding uam?
Nungchiangin inn nuam ah
Eite hon ngak inn hoihzaw ah,
I kim diam van inn ah?
Ei hon itte'n hon na-hilh uh,
Itna lamdang a om chi'n;
Hondampa sihna honhilh uh,
Tu'n Amah tawh omta uh.
Sawt a innkuan kima om lai,
Itna la sak lai na thei;
It leh ngaihte'n honpaisan a,
Dahna khitui luan na thei.
Khatkhat a a paikhiak chiang-un,
A kiam uh innkuan kim zong;
Hiai ah innkuan i kim nawn lou,
I kim na-diam tua inn ah?
Khros naihsem ding, ka chi thei hi,
Kong pai nai semsem hi;
Nisim tua khros naih semsemin,
Kong pai nai semsem hi;
Jesu sihna sing khros naihsem,
Sisan-a luang tuikhuk naihsem,
Ka Hondampa' pang liam naihsem,
Kong pai nai semsem hi. (2)
Khristian, zahngaihna tutphah naih;
Kong pai nai semsem hi;
Van mana-a ka kha vakin,
Kong pai nai semsem hi;
Ginna hatzaw'n ka muchian zaw,
Jesu kei adia hongkipia,
Amah toh kinaisem nuam ing,
Kong pai nai semsem hi. (2)
Thumna-a naih sem ka kinem,
Kong pai nai semsem hi,
Itna ka kha'n lunggulh semsem,
Kong pai nai semsem hi;
Gim leh buaina beina naih sem,
Pahna ka tan ding naih semsem;
Manglukhu ka khuk ding nai sem,
Kong pai nai semsem hi. (2)
Piandang suiseng louh aw Pathian,
Na siam chiteng lim-in dang veh;
Tua ban Non hehpihna kan-in,
Sangtou lai, lamdangsa pen ing. (2)
Nang bang vansin nuai ah omlou,
Piandang Non itna lian-in sang. (2)
Mohna mulkimhuai thuak lou dia,
Mohna-a ninsa Non hawi lai;
Aw Toupa Na piandanna hi,
Kuata tua bang om thei ding hiam? (2)
Albang mangsa kipak-a ling,
Tu'n Pathian hon itna mu hang;
I mawhna lianpi thuk louhna'n,
Jesu' sisan in honleita. (2)
Hiai hehpihna suiseng vuallouh,
Piandang tung Pathian nasep hi;
Pahtakna khuavannuai dim hen,
Thangvan angelte pahna toh. (2)
Van dakte tumging un! tuni kipah ni,
Gilou khat hong kihei nawn man in;
En un, lampi ah a Pa'n a na dawn hi,
A ta vakvai gim A na dawn hi.
Thupi! Thupi! Angelte'n la sa!
Thupi! Thupi! Kaihging ngaih tumging;
Tatsa mipite hi, tuipi gin ngaih bang;
Suaktate' lapi ngaih sa uhi.
Van dakte tumging un! tuni kipah ni;
Vakvai in inn lam hongzon manin;
Hi, mikhat a khelhna pan hotdam-in om,
Ta tatsa ahi, piangthak ahi.
Van dakte tum un! tuni'n ankuang lui un,
Angelte, vualzohna la sa un!
Kipahna thu gen un! gamla leh nai-a
Kha manpha a pianthaktak manin.
Pathian in a tungin kitenna a bawl,
Innkuan bul siangthou omkhawm dingin,
Kipahpih, kizahtak, muanhuai tuak dingin;
Hindan kikheng-a buching dingin.
Nuamsa in kipahpih chiat ni e,
Nupa-a kiteng i unaute;
Hiai a i theihpih uh van ah theih hi hen,
Tonkhawm ding sihna'n a khen mateng.
Toupa Jesu'n A Saptuamte A it a,
A sik-a A hin A piak bangin;
Hiai mouneipa inleng a mou it mah hen,
Gentehna siangthou limsak uhen.
Toupa, a nih un Na khut' kon kemsak uh,
Khotuah in Na hoihna in vuk in;
Dah leh kipah hun kiphawk tuahsak zelin,
Na piak Nang' nasep-in thuk uhen.
'Toupa leh A vangletna ah noute hat un!'
A thudik gumin kiptaka dingin;
A haksapen gal lakah,
Bittakin honpii ding hi,
Toupa min in gal na zou ding uhi.
Thudik gum, dingkip un!
Kumpipa' thupiak a vualzawh dong'!
Toupa' minthanna dingin,
A thu vualzawhna dingin,
Toupa' thahatna ah dingkip un!
'Toupa leh A vangletna ah noute hat un!'
Galte mai ah taise ngeikei hial un;
Thudik guma gal dou chiang',
Aman hong huh ngeingei ding,
Toupa' vangletna ah mailam nawt un!
'Toupa leh A vangletna ah noute hat un!'
A thuchiamte kipelh ngeilou ding hi;
Na khut taklam honglen ding,
Thudik gum, gal na dou chiang',
Amah muang, na vualzou tawntung ding uh.
Grinlan vuk gam apanin,
India gam lum apan;
Afrika gam ni-ong leh
Tuipi leh gam apan;
Tanglai luipi luita pan,
Mualtung leh phaigam pan;
Nuaijinmang henkol buhte'n,
Salbang suah di'n honkou.
Silon gam dohtam tung ah,
Huihkhi namtui honglang;
Maimit suan lamlam hoih e,
Mihing kia gilou hi;
Pathian' thilpiak simseng louh,
Khuavannuai ah dim hi;
Hizong Amah theiloute'n,
Sing leh suang bia uhi.
En zaw Gospel pha theiin,
Khuavak muta hang e;
Miala om mite adi'n,
Hinna vak i it diam?
Hotdamna, Hotdamna om!
Chi'n tangkoupih jel ni;
Leitung namchi'n Messia min
A theihvek mateng uh.
Huihpi huihkhi nangawn in,
A thu na phuangjak un;
Tuipi thupi luang bang-a,
Gamchih a khuh dongin;
Tatsa thilsiam khempeuh in,
Tua thahsa Belamnou,
Tanpa, Kumpipa, Siampa,
Vaihawm dia hongpai dong'.
Khristian sepaih, masuan'!
Galkap bang paiin;
Mailama napaikhin,
Jesu mitsuanin:
Khrist ei kumpipa in,
Galdou-in makai,
En un, A puanlapte,
Galphual ah lut hi.
Khristian sepaih, masuan'!
Galkap bang pai in;
Mailam a napaikhin,
Jesu mitsuan in.
Jesu' min lawhna ah,
Setan pawlte tai;
Khristian sepaih masuan'
Vualzawh nadingin!
Gawtmun suangphumte ling,
Phatna aw za-in;
Unaute, kikou un,
Lapi sa ngaih un.
Sepaih pawlpi hat bang,
Pathian' saptuam pai;
Unaute, pai ni hang,
Misiangte paina';
Kikhen omlou hi hang,
Sapum khat hi hang;
Lamet thugin-a khat,
Itna-a leng khat.
Toupa, Nang'a hi'ng, Na aw zata ing,
Tuain Non itna honhilh;
Hizong ginna ban-a hon lamtouin,
Nang kon naih semsem nuam hi.
Honpii naiin nuamsa Toupa aw,
Na sihna khros honnaih sak';
Honpii naiin, naisem,
Nuamsa Toupa aw;
Na panga sipha luang ah.
Tu'n honsiangsak' Toupa, Na nna sem di'n,
Non hehpihna vanglianin;
Ka kha'n lametna kipin hon en hen,
Nang deih bang hondeihsak in.
Dakkal khat lel zong Na tutphah mai a,
Thuma kong kun chiangin;
Lawmta banga Nang ken kong khoih chiangin,
Lungnopna kigen zoulou.
Tuipi neu ka kan masiah theih louh ding,
A thuk lua itna om lai;
Nang tawh muang, ka khawl masiah ngahlou ding,
A sang lua nopna om lai.
Aw Kha Siangthou, hong halhsak in,
Ka tha uh hatsak in;
Ka ginna un honmusak in,
Tuaa gam nuam mahmah.
Gamdai gamkeu ka paisan ding,
Natna leh gimna gam;
Nunkhua nopna gam ah pai ning,
Tangtawn nopna mun ah.
Kulhpi bul ah ka om gige,
Ninou hongsuak ngak-in;
Ni thupi hongsuak leh ka chi,
Kalvari zawhna ni.
Leitung pahna bei pahpah hi,
A vualnopna teng tawh;
Khantawn nopna dang omlou hi,
Jesu Khrist phat louhngal.
A kha uh Nangma'n na pii a,
Tanglai misiangte zong;
Kei leng ka ban in honkai in,
Hinna lampi tawnin.
Gamdai gam paikhengna dingin,
Haksatna tampi om;
Nang hatlou Khamuanpa Na hi,
Piipa hat zong Na hi.
Mi, Nang na pii peuhmahte zaw,
Pathian' tate hi uh;
Lam lauhuai ah honpii in aw,
Hehpihna thagui in.
Lamet khawlna gamnuam ka ngai!
Chikchiang' ka tung ding hiam;
Chikchiang' galvan ka nga ding hiam,
Lailung muanga tengin?
Jesu hongpai mateng,
Sem ni, hongpai mateng;
Sem ni, hongpai mateng,
Huan, inn ah khawlkhawm ding.
Simlei tung' lailung dam omlou,
Lumbang sung omlouh tawh;
Hiai leitung ka inn ahi lou,
Gamdai gimna gam hi.
Jesu kiang' khawlna ka zuan a,
Lam pial lou di'n honhilh;
Van inn nuam-a honpii mateng,
A angsung ka bel ding.
Hondampa kiang ka belta hi,
Lamdang ka pial kei ding;
Amah tawh ton sih lau kei ning,
Ka van inn nuam tung ning.

songs.title: I Kimuh I Kituahkhawm Nawn Ma'n
songs.author: J E Rankin, D D

lines: I kimuh i kituahkhawm nawn ma'n!
Pathian in honpii, honlen hen;
Bittakin nang hon nakem hen,
I kimuh i kituahkhawm nawn ma'n!
I kimuh nawn mateng!
Jesu kiang kimuh mateng;
I kimuh nawn mateng!
Pathian in hon ompih tawntung hen.
I kimuh i kituahkhawm nawn ma'n!
Aman A kha hon zakkhum hen;
Niteng nek-le-tak honpia hen,
I kimuh i kituahkhawm nawn ma'n!
I kimuh i kituahkhawm nawn ma'n!
Damsung lungkhamna'n honbawm zong;
Pathian in anglai honsia hen,
I kimuh i kituahkhawm nawn ma'n!
I kimuh i kituahkhawm nawn ma'n!
Sih lauhuaina'n a hontuam zong;
Itna puanlap honzakkhum hen,
I kimuh i kituahkhawm nawn ma'n!
Sa in Jesu itna lamdang, Sa'n a siamna hehpihna;
Tenna inpi vak leh nuam ah, eidi'n mun hon bawlsak ding.
Vangam nuam i tunchiang in
Lailung damna ni thupi hiding hi.
Jesu i muhchiang in
vualzawlna lasa'n kikou ding.
Eite khualzin i pailaitak, khuanim in van akhuh ding;
Hizong khualzin a beichiang in lunggim tawlna bei ding hi.
Ahi eite muanhuai ve ni, Niteng a a nna semin;
Thupia Amah tomkal muhzong, Sepgim toh kithaman ding.
I mai a kipahman delh ni, Jesu kilawmna mu ding;
Suangmanpha kong kihong pah ding, Khamkhuapi ah i leng ding.
Khristian thou un ihmu lou,
Mite kap ei khawl ding maw?
Toupa'n thu honpia napi,
Mawktut maimai ding i hiam?
Kuan un, sem un, tu'n sem un!
Kuan un, zong un, mangthangte;
Khelhna mial laka panin,
Ankuang um ding' honpi un.
Hondampa' min i it hiam?
A thuchiam i muang ngam hiam?
I bangkim i piata hiam?
Honsap mang lou ding i hiam?
Muan ding bangin i muang hiam?
Honsinsak bang' i hing hiam?
Amah a kia i hi hiam?
Nasepin ginna gen ni.
Khros i puak ding a om hi,
Manglukhu i lamet leh;
Thanuam tak' tu'n sem pah ni,
Hun a tom, ni a tawmta.

songs.title: Lungsim Thawmhau Kep Ding Om Uh
songs.author: George Cooper

lines: Lungsim thawmhau kep ding om uh,
Nite a mualliam zel lai';
Bah leh tawl a mangthang om uh,
Nite a mualliam zel lai';
Nuihmel thaksak thei le hang,
I zinna i pai kawm in;
Aw, na hoih i sem thei chiat,
Nite a mualliam zel lai'.
Mualliam zel, mualliam zel,
Mualliam zel, mualliam zel;
Aw, na hoih i sem thei chiat,
Nite a mualliam zel lai'.
Midem mawkmawk na'ng hun omlou,
Nite a mualliam zel lai';
Na mai zingsang bang tangsak in,
Nite a mualliam zel lai':
Leitung khawisatnate'n dim,
Lungkham leh kahnain bawm;
Na unau kipuk phong in,
Nite a mualliam zel lai'.
It leh ngaih i kizoppihte,
Nite a mualliam zel lai'n,
Khat khat in nung ah nusia hang,
Nite a mualliam zel lai':
Hizong chi hoih i tuhte,
A liap a tang ah khang ding,
I lungsung hon nuamsak thei,
Nite a mualliam zel lai'.
Ka Hondampa toh kituak ding,
Khutvuak in ka pai ding maw?
Ni khat bek A na sem lou in,
Puak ding bangmah keng lou in?
Kei hontanpa toh kituak ding,
Khutvuak in ka pai ding maw?
Kha mangthang khat bek pii lou in,
Ka tuak ding maw Hondampa?
Sih zaw dah in lungkham keng e,
Hondampa'n hongtat man in,
Hihhang' khutvuak a tuah ding in,
Hon dahsak, hon lungkhamsak.
Mohna toh mawk bei kumte aw,
Tu'n honsam kik thei leng maw,
Ka Hondampa kipaka pia'n,
A deihlam in ka zang ding.
Misiangte, thou in hahkat un,
Ni a tan laiin sem un;
Sihna zan in honlap ma in,
Zon theih lai' khate zong un.
Toupa Jesu' hatna muang lechin,
A honpanpih ding, honpanpih ding;
A hon itna pellou na muan leh,
La'n hon dimsak ding hi.
A hatna leh A itna muang in,
A hatna leh A itna kilang;
A hatna leh Van a inn en in,
Hondampa' hatna muang in.
Toupa Jesu' hatna muang lechin,
Lampi vaksak ding, A vaksak ding;
Kipakin honpiina ah zuiin,
A aw nem mang zelin.
Toupa Jesu' hatna muang lechin,
Na buaina pia in, Amah pia in;
Na puakgik a gik mahmah zongin,
Toupa kiang Thum zel in.
Toupa Jesu' hatna muang inla,
Na bangkim pia in, bangkim pia in;
Hehpih leh itnain A dim hi,
Hon ensim lou ding hi.
Toupa Jesu' hatna muang inla,
Na taksap lungjin honhu ding hi;
Hondampa dia Amah pom teng di'n,
Lawm dik leh muanhuai hi.
Nongpai diam, nongpai diam,
Na lungtang puakgik toh?
Na khelhna a puak gik,
Hondampa, Toupa' khebul ah nga vekta in,
Jesu'n khawl honpia ding.
Aw khawlna nuam, deih khawlna nuam,
Jesu'n khawl honpia ding;
Aw Amah muanga hongpai lou ding na hiam?
Jesu'n khawl honpia ding.
Nongpai diam, nongpai diam?
Nang di'n zahngaihna om,
Na lungkham damsak ding;
Na khelh bang in hongpai inla, A min muang in,
Jesu'n khawl honpia ding.
Nongpai diam, nongpai diam?
A man na liau ngai lou;
Nang honit pen Jesu'n,
Khros a A sihnain na kha hinna leizou;
Jesu'n khawl honpia ding.
Nongpai diam, nongpai diam?
Tu'n nang A honchial hi;
A angsung zuan pah in.
Na khelhna lungkhamna bangteng ahita zong,
Jesu'n khawl honpia ding.

songs.title: I Kim I Vel Ah Buhlak Ding Tampi Min Hi
songs.author: Golden Bells

lines: I kim i vel ah buhlak ding tampi min hi,
Amau va-at ding in kuan in;
Toupa'n honpanpih ding na hatna' kinga ken,
Toupa' hatna ah kinga zawin.
Na chi tuh a pou ding,
Toupa'n honpanpih ding;
Na khantawn mun na tut theihna di'n,
Na hatlai in sem in, Toupa' hatna muang in.
Na seplouh manin tampi mangthang gawpta hi,
Toupa itte mangmang mawk uh;
Va panpih di'n na kuan kei dia hiam,
Panpih ngai mahmah uh, a manthat vek ma un.
Kuanmeng in, vasem in,
A ni uh tum man ding;
Laukha simsenglouh mangthang dingte,
Na it kei hial a hiam, Khat bek honpii tanla.
Dakkhia in, envel dih, tatna thei nailoute,
Toupa'n a tat lam thei kei uh;
Lungmuang in tulai uh, piikhia ding in kuamah
Om lou hi, Hondampa theilou uh;
Amau vapii ding in,
Toupa'n nang hondeih hi;
Chikchiang' Jesu mai a kun ding ua,
Hontanpa chih thei a, A manna min phat in.
Na meivakte mansa'n om di'am,
Mouneipa hong chiang';
I meivakte a tangpha di'am,
Mouneipa hong chiang';
Tua zan lung hihmohhuai ah,
I meivakte tangpha di'am,
Mouneipa hong chiang'?
Aw, mansa in! aw, mansa in!
Aw, mansa in, Mouneipa hong chiang'.
Hong sapna ging i za na di'am,
Mouneipa hong chiang';
Lunglawpna aw i za na di'am,
Mouneipa hong chiang';
Tua zan lung hihmohhuai ah,
I meivakte tangpha di'am,
Mouneipa hong chiang'?
Kisakkholh ding zekai kei ni,
Mouneipa hong chiang';
Kikhenna om zenzen kha ding,
Mouneipa hong chiang';
Tua zan lung hihmohhuai ah,
I meivakte tangpha di'am,
Mouneipa hong chiang'?
Dah hun a suak zenzen kha ding,
Mouneipa hong chiang';
Tuikuang leitawi i lam-et leh,
Mouneipa hong chiang';
Tua zan lung hihmohhuai ah,
I meivakte tangpha di'am,
Mouneipa hong chiang'?
Aw, kimuh khawm thupi om ding,
Mouneipa hong chiang';
Halleluia chia kidawng ding',
Mouneipa hong chiang',
Tua zan kipahhuai tak ah,
I meivakte tangpha tawh
Mouneipa hong chiang'.

songs.title: Ka Hondampa Mu Kei Mah Leng
songs.author: Rev J Oatman

lines: Ka Hondampa mu kei mahleng,
Chiklaipeuhin kei honhoupih;
Deiha Amah ka tel nungsang,
Phatin om hen, A aw ka thei.
A aw ka thei, ka Honpa' aw,
Aw ka lungsung honnuamsak hi;
Kei honhoupih peuhmah chiang in,
Phatin om hen, A aw ka thei.
A mel mu ngeikei mahleng zong
Huihpi tung ah A aw ka ja;
Tuipi kihawt lai zong khawlsak,
Ni hong tangkhia, bangkim damta.
Thudik, thupha ka kiang hon gen,
Muh nailouh nopna, khawlna thu;
Muanna, itna thupha honhilh,
Vantung a inn nuam thu honhilh.
Mi mangthang hinna bei i hihdan i ngilh,
Pathian in a hongzong hi;
Tua ahih man eite hongzong-Pa phat ni,
Vualzawl vuahtui hongluang hen.
Hongzuan un, hongzuan un,
Tuin A min in kikhawm ni;
Suah, Tum, Sim leh Mal, hongzuan un,
Van ankuang um di'n honchial.
Belam bangin A kiang apan in i mang,
Mohna lingnok in hondal;
Pathian in sulkik dingin honsamta hi,
Sulkik in lambang pak ni!
I pu leh pa apan i deihpen ahi,
Hongzong in A hongtungta;
I Pa, i zon mel in i na theilou hi,
Mite aw, sulkik ve ni.
Tangthu lamdang vanglian vannuia ah hongthang,
Hon-gumpa Jesu thu hi;
Tung thangvan apan hongkum suk in A si,
A hon it mahmah man in.
Kumpipa' puanlap khai ding khat hong kipia,
Kumpipa' sepaihte kiang';
Tuni'n chiamtehna kilawm in tua khai hang,
Tatte'n la i sak kawm-in.
Masuan! Masuan un!
Khrist di'n bangteng manna'n sim un;
Kumpi lukhu khusak dingin,
Puanlap nua'h semin sa un!
Tui kilok bangin galpa hongkuan mahleh,
Tua puanlap kikhai sang hen!
Tua puanlap nuai ah Toupa' sepaih khempeuh,
Thutak gum lau kei hial un!
Tuipi tung leh gam tung, mihing omnapeuh,
Tangthu pha va-zasak un;
Sisana luan puanlap thu tuin gen un,
Toupa'n amah'ate zong!
Thupina hongtun chiang'-tun hong naizou hi,
Nisim in hongnai semsem;
Eite Kumpipa mai ah galpa tai ding,
Leitung ah khros vualzou ding!
Kumpipa in ankuang a lui ah,
Mun omlai, um ding honkhawm in!
Aw, mi honkhawm in, A innpi dim hen,
Gilkial dangtakte'n ne'n dawn hen.
Lamlian leh lamneu ah pai inla,
Khelhna lampi khua mialna ah;
Kuan in, kuan in, itna lungtang tawh,
Vakvaite hon piikhawm in.
Mun omlai, amaute honkhawm in,
Chialna thudonlou tampite-
Amau di'n chialna thu ging nawn lou thei,
Ngaihsut chiang' lungsung hondahsak.
Mun omlai, khial mite honkhawm in,
Tung Pathian in honthupiak hi;
Aw, itna huang ah amau piilut in,
Hondampa' hon itna ang ah.
Lungkham liangvai leh ahaute di'n,
Thangvan ah tutkhawlna mun om;
Aw, honchial nawn in, kong a kikhak ma'n,
Awlmawh in hon gen kimvel in.
Aw, van ankuang um dak ging dekta,
Gam siangthou hongtun ding vangin;
Leitung lungkham, thum, gilkialin a buai,
Hongpai un, eite'n chial ve ni.
Jesu'n mawhneite sang nuam,
Hiai hehpihna thu hilh un;
Van lampi pialsan teng kiang',
A tham den, a puk teng kiang'.
Sa un, sa un, sasa un,
Khrist in mawhneite sang hi;
Hiai thu teltakin hilh un,
Khrist in mawhneite sang hi.
Hongpai v'aw, honkhawlsak ding,
Muang in, Amah juau ngeilou;
Gilou phapen zong sang ding,
Khrist in mawhneite sang hi.
Kei kimawhsakna tu'n bei,
Dan mai ah kei siangta ing;
Nitna pan kei hong sil-Pa'n,
Dan leiba honditsakta.
Khrist in mawhneite sang hi,
Kei na-ngawn mawhna teng tawh;
Mawhna khempeuh pan hongsil,
Amah tawh vantung lut ing.
Sitheilou, muhtheihlouh, Pathian pil omsun,
Naihtheihlouh Vak sung ah Nang na kisel a;
Nuamsapen, thupipen, Tanglai Mi na hi,
Vanglianpen, vualtungtuang Na min lian phat ung.
Khawl ngeilou, Kinawhlou daitakin Na taang,
Samsak lou, valsak lou, vanglian in Na maang;
Na dikna meipi tung' mualsang bang kilang,
Na meipi pan hehpihna itna hongluang.
Aneu alian kiang ah hinna non pia a,
Hinna nei khempeuh sung Na nungta laia;
Sing leh lou bang dawnsuang, paklun mah le-ung,
Vuaipah, mangpah, Nang bel tangtawna omden.
Thupina Pa na hi, a kipden Vak' Pa,
Vansawltakte'n mai khuh-in Nang honbia a;
Na vaang tangpha mu-let zouta kei leung,
Na om gige theiin honbia veve ung.

songs.title: Amah Kilh A Ompa Et In
songs.author: Miss A M Hull

lines: Amah kilha ompa etin hinna a om,
Tuin nang ading in hinna om;
Mawhnei aw, amah en in, hotdamin om in,
Sing dawna kilha ompa en in.
En inla, hing in,
Amah kilh-a ompa et-in hinna a om,
Tuin nang ading in hinna om.
Banghang' tua-a khelhna pua bang a om ding hiam,
Na mawhna pua ahih louh ngalin?
Banghang' A panga mawh sianna siluang ding hiam,
Nang leiba pia ahih louh ngalin?
Na kisikna khitui leh thumnate hilou,
Sisan hizaw laukha tatna pia;
A'leh tua sisan suahpa tung ah kintakin,
Na nitna puakgik nga mengta in.
Pathian in a kisam om nawn lou a chihsa,
Nang honsan nopna muanglah kei in;
Leitung ah khatvei Amah hongpai khinta hi,
A na-patsa a zoukhinta hi.
Kipaktakin Jesu apan hinna lain,
Tangtawn hinna nang A honpia hi;
Na si thei nawn kei ding chih kitheichianta in,
Na dikna Jesu ahih manin.

songs.title: Ka Kha Ah Khuavak Om Tun'n
songs.author: E E Hewitt

lines: Ka kha ah khuavak om tuni'n,
Vakna thupi ahi;
Leia ni sangin vakpha zaw,
Jesu ka Vak ahi.
Aw, ka kha ah khuavak nuam om,
Muanna leh pahna tuipi bang luang;
Jesu'n maitaia hon et lai',
Ka lungsung ah khua vak hi.
Ka kha ah la khat om tuni'n,
Ka kumpipa phatna;
Jesu'n ngaikhiain A za thei,
La ka sakkhiak theih louh.
Ka kha ah thakna om tuni'n,
Toupa a hongnai chiang';
Ka lungsung muanna khuva ham,
Hehpihna silpak lun.
Ka kha ah pahna om tuni'n,
Lamet, phat leh itna;
Vualzawlna, tuin honpia a
Tungchiang' pahna koih lai.
Bangmahlou kisathei sawt ka hi,
Ka Toupa kikilh-lum ngaihsak lou;
Ka na theilou kei dia si ahi,
Kalvari ah.
Zahngaihna lian, hehpihna manbei,
Kei din ngaihdamna kiching om hi;
Ka kha puakgik bei, suahtakna mu,
Kalvari ah.
Pathian' Thu panin ka khelh ka phawk,
Ka tatlekna dan lauin ka ling;
Mawhnei ka ngetna tawh ka en hi,
Kalvari lam.
Tu'n Jesu kiang ka bangkim ka pia,
Tu'n Amah ka kumpipa'n nei ing;
Tu'n ka kha'n lungdamin la sa hi,
Kalvari thu.
Aw, hotdamna hong gel tua itna,
Mihing kiang' hong puak tua hehpihna;
Aw kal gamla Pathian in zom hi,
Kalvari ah.
Aw buh-at nasemte kaw' om uhiam,
Khelhna loua buhtak omte khawm ding?
Thutak hiam zangin na kizou ding hi,
Buhlak zawh mateng tawlngak omlou ding.
Ko'h hiam nasemte?
Kua hongkuan ding,
Buh lak zawh chiang a thupina tang nuam sam?
Kuahiam honghuh ding, lakhawm dingin?
Khelhna loua buhtakte khawm ding.
Gamchih leh kilchih ah vazong vekin!
Lou tam lakpi ah zong buh om kha ding;
Khat kia leng mangsakin kaikangsak ken,
I Toupa pang ah hongsunglut vekin.
Buhte lak hun luain min phengphung hi,
Leitung in buhlak hun kia tu'n ngak hi;
Nasep ding tamin a sem ding tawmlua,
Kizekai leh tampi mangthang ding hi.
Mite, hongpai un, na hiamzat uh tawh,
Kham buh manphate lakhawm zou vek di'n;
Buhla Toupa hongpai donga sem ding,
Buhlak zawh chianga thupina tang ding.
Hongzuan in, semgim, khawlna nuam,
Jesu'n mual khum ding hi;
Hongzuan in, lungsung nopna mun,
Amah thu kia muang in.
Mual khum dek! Mual khum dek!
Jesu tuni'n a pai laiin,
Aw, Amah tuak di'n kin meng in;
Mual khum dek! Mual khum dek!
Hongzuan in, gikpua, na puak tawh,
Jesu'n mual khum ding hi;
Itna tawh thumna ngaikhia-Pa'n,
A hoih hon itlou ding.
Hongzuan in, gilkial, deih ngenin,
Jesu'n mual khum ding hi;
Hinna an-in na kha vak ding,
A hontaisak ding hi.
Khasia, A hehpihna ngen in,
Jesu'n mual khum ding hi;
En in, A mel ah hehpihna,
Nisa hong tangkhia hi.

songs.title: Aw Jan Gimhuai A Bei Dekta
songs.author: Fanny J Crosby

lines: Aw, jan gim huai a bei dekta,
Meipite a theng dekta;
En v'aw, lamet nilouh jingkhua,
Tu'n van ah hongvak dekta;
Zion mual sang apan galvilte
Kikou i jak chiangin;
Kipakin i kikhawm ding hi,
Kumpipa hong chiang'.
Aw, Zion! Aw, Zion!
Na zawhna thupi ding,
Kumpipa hong chiang';
Aw, Zion! Aw, Zion pahtawiin na om ding,
Kumpipa hong chiang'.
