Jehova in a tatsate,
Suahlam leh Tumlam apan,
Nuam leh kipakin hongpai ding;
Khawl tawldamna chiam ngah di'n;
Tuachiang' gamchih apan namchih
Vualzawlin omta ding hi,
Kipakin kikhawm ding uhi,
Kumpipa hong chiang'.
Hongpai chiangin sun-zan ngakte,
Muanhuai takin hon muleh;
Kumpi na i sepna mun ah,
I galvan teselselin;
I meivakte hoih leh siangin,
Tangpha leh nuamta zen ding;
Kipaka i kikhop theih na'ng,
Kumpipa hong chiang'.

songs.title: Ka Kha, Na Honpa Bukim Manbei In
songs.author: El Nathan

lines: Ka kha, na Honpa bukim manbei in,
Thuin hongkipia nawn;
Tu'n Toupa, thu ka khentat ngeingei kul;
Nang apan ka sang diam?
Sang ding! Sang ding! Sang ding!
Toupa, Non huh leh Nangmah a hi nuam!
Non leina ding Na sisan pha luangta,
Ka puma Nang'a ding!
Non hehpih man na chitna tu'n sang ning,
Na itna'n honzol zou;
Nang, aw Khrist, Nangmah kon gingta nuam a,
Nang kia konmuang nuam hi.
Nang na thei hi, Toupa, ka hatlouh dan,
Vakmang khak ka lauh dan;
Sep na'ng tha Nang kia pan ka lamen hi,
Tha honpia teitei in.
Toupa, hehpihna mi khempeuh pia in,
La honsakpih dingin;
Lungsung pan kou banga lunglawptaka,
Khrist-a hi ding, chi di'n.
Leia om laia Toupa, na ut maw,
Honchite kiang', Ka ut!
Chih amau Na dawnna ahi gige,
Tu'n tua ah kinga ung.
Hinna kidangta kei dingin,
Hondampa ka muh nung';
A khros ah zahngaihna ka mu,
Hon it ka Hondampa hi.
Ka ginlah leh lau beita,
Jesu'n khuamial vaksakta;
Van-gam gamla nawn hetlou,
Hondampa ka muh nung'.
Itna lamdangin kei honzong,
Hondampa ka muta;
Hotdamna honpuak tunglam pan,
Hondampa manpha keia.
Meipi kaiin hontuam nak zong,
Hondampa ka muh nung';
Hon ompih hi, kimu lou zong,
A nai tawntung Hondampa.
Aman ka khut kiptakin len,
Hondampa ka muh pan',
Mangtutphah zuanin honpii hi,
Tua' Hondampa mel mu ning.
Aw Eden phaijang nuam etlawm!
Na sunkhua dai nuam hi;
A gim leh tawlte lungsung ah,
Damna'n Na thu'n huau in.
Aw Eden phaijang nuam etlawm!
Siang, nuamsate tenna;
Hiai damsung tuipi kihawt laiah,
Na khawlna nuam lunggulh veng!
Adah lungkhamte lungsung ah,
Ni thupi hongtang hi;
Angelte la ngaih hongging hi,
Gamlapi apan in.
Ka Hondampa inn nunnuam om,
Tua ah hotdam tate'n,
Thupi leh ngaih lathak sa uh,
Tua gam thupi thawn hi.

songs.title: Aw Nang Lunggim Inn A Om Hi
songs.author: W H Bellamy (Arr.)

lines: Aw, nang lunggim, inn a om hi,
Sepgim leh mangbatna khen ah;
Tua inn ah meldanna omlou,
Tualai' khawl nuam lou kua om ding?
Aw, na ngakngak in, phunlou hialin (2),
Aw ngak, aw ngak;
Aw, phunlou-in ngak in.
Na puakgik nuai ah na kun zong,
Leia na tan van phasak hi;
Dakin, tung tenna nuam tung ding,
Na ngakngak in, phunlou hialin.
Na lampia ling a om leh,
Aw linglukhu khu-pa ngaihsun';
Na lungtanga lungkham aleh,
Nang sanga siang lung ah leng om.
Semzel in, gimhuai chilouin,
Mauna, thumna ngilh lai omlou;
Khawlni nang di'n hongsuak ding hi,
Na ngakngak in, phunlou hial in.
Muan, Muanna kim! khelhna khawvel mial ah,
Jesu' sisan in lungmuanna honpia.
Muan, Muanna kim! nasep thait lakah?
Jesu' deihlam sep jaw tawldamna hi.
Muan, Muanna kim! dah lungkham tam lak ah?
Jesu' angsung' kingai leng hon lungmuan.
Muan, Muanna kim! itte gam-a omlai'?
Jesu' itna ah bit hang, amau zong.
Muan, Muanna kim! malam theih omlou in?
Jesu thei hang, Amah vaihawm in tu.
Muan, Muanna kim! sihna lim a om in?
Jesu'n sihna zoukhin a hatna tawh.
Hiai theih hoihzou: lei gimna beipah ding,
Jesu'n muanna kim ah honsam ding hi.
Khawvel gal lai' Toupa di'n dingkip in,
Huih vot hongnung in, tui kihawt sang zong;
Suangpi kip kia'n hinna leh hatna pia,
Khelhna sepiah hongnai chiang'.
Tua suangpi tung' ding ni,
Aw kiptakin ding ni;
Khrist Suangpi kip tung kia ah;
Douna dou teitei leng bittak i ding diing,
Mangtutphah um misiangte tawh.
Tupna siang tawh adik gum dingkip in,
Lungtang dik, hangsan, ginna'n hat gige'n;
Hiai khawvel khelhna tampite tung ah,
Suangpi kip kia'n zawhna pia.
Thudik gum, dingkip in, nang di'n hoihpen,
Sunsawt kivei zong thudik vualzou ding;
Suangpi kip kia'n muanna leh khawlna pia,
Damsung huihpi a then chiang'.

songs.title: Hon Gum Hon Dam Sak Thei Hong Nai
songs.author: Wm Hunter

lines: Hon gum, hondamsak thei hongnai,
Hon khasiat theipa Jesu;
A lungkia halhsak di'n thu gen,
Aw, Jesu tongdam ngaiin!
Seraf-te la a ngaihpen,
Mite theih a min ngaihpen;
Kumsawta sak la ngaihpen,
Jesu! Nuamsa Jesu!
Na khelhna tam kingaidamta,
Aw, Jesu' tongdam ngai in!
Lungmuang in vantung manawh in,
Jesu tawh manglukhu khu'n.
Thounawn Belamnou thupi hen!
Tu'n ken Jesu muangta ing;
Hondampa nuamsa' min ka it,
Jesu min ngaih ka it hi.
Jesu' min kia in beisak thei,
Mawh ka kisak leh launa;
Aw, ka kha'n za nuam tawntung hi.
Jesu' minngaih, min manpha.
Sunni banga tanna van a,
Jesu mudia i thawh chiang;
Itna mangtutphah kimvel ah,
Jesu' min lain sa ni.
Sun sanga kilawm zaw gam a om,
Ginna in tua gam mel i mu thei;
Pa in lampi ah hon na-ngak hi,
Tenna nuam eia dia bawl dingin.
Nungchiang in, nunnuamin,
Tua gam nuam ah i kimukhawm ding;
Nungchiangin, nunnuam in,
Tua gam nuam ah i kimukhawm ding;
Tua gam nuam ah eite'n la sa ding,
Nuamsate la ngaih i sa ding hi;
Dah lungkhamna i phawk nawnlou ding,
Khawlna nuam mu' khawisa nawnlou ding.
I Pa migi vana om kiang ah:
Phatna tengteng tuin pia ve ni;
A itna thawnpiak thupi mahmah,
Nopsakna i muh dingte mahleng.

songs.title: Galzou Ding Pawlpi Eimah I Hi

lines: Galzou ding pawlpi eimah i hi,
Kumpipa' thahatna'n dou lehang;
Kha namsau hiam tawiin pang lehang,
Giloute Jesu kiang i tun ding.
I zou ding, ka ging hi,
Kumpipa thahatna'n dou lehang;
I zou ding, ka ging hi,
Kumpipa thahatna'n dou lehang.
Ni dangin eite i vualzou ngei,
Gal mun ah galte i delhjak ngei;
Atawp pha'n Kumpipa dia dou ding,
Kha namsau tawiin i pang ding hi.
Galte hatin, hangsan mahle uh,
Kidouna haksa'n lauhuai mahleh,
Kumpipa hondam dingin hat hi,
Kidou lai' i kiang nai gige hi.
Kumpipa minin gal i dou ding,
I puanlap huihmuta kipei tawh;
Pathian leh adik gum i dou ding,
Setan thuneihna gam i sut ding.
Pathian leh sepaih pawl dia muanhuai,
Kumpipa min in gal i dou ding;
Mei leh sisan in gal i zou ding,
A khebul ah khawvel i tun ding.
Aw Mei siangthou, Nang hongtung in,
Na thilhihtheihna hon theisak';
Lungsung itna hon guan chiat in,
A haksat hunin honkem in.
Huihnung bangin hongtung inla,
Ka omna uh hong luahdim in;
Ka ginlah uh la mang inla,
Na hehpihna in hontum in.
Mei mittheilou, Nang hongkum in,
Tangtawn Tapa, Khrist min vangin;
A itna hauh hongphuang inla,
Lungsim kikhat in honbawl in.
Aw, vanlam theihna manpha,
Leilam theihna khup hi;
Jesu-a Pathian' itna,
Kiching mahmah om hi.
Theih leh taksan, kipaka san,
Lamdang hi, Thu lamdang hi!
Itna a om, Pathian a om,
Sisana ngaihdam, siansak.
Pathian' Thu in hiai theihna
I kiang' phuangzakta hi,
A thu gelhsa in phuangzak,
Pathian' Telpa tawnin.
Ginna in i ngahta hi,
Pathian' mihing itna;
Kalvari ah i taksang,
Khelh hon ngaihdam laitak'.
Ei sunga teng A Kha in,
Tunglam pan hon theihpih;
Khrist a Pathian itna hi,
Hehpihna thu'n honhilh.
'A za peuhmah in!' chih thu na gensawn un!
Simlei tung teng ah hiai thupha na phuang un!
Mi na muh peuhmah hiai thupha na hilh un,
'A ut peuhmah hongpai thei'.
'A ut peuhmahte!' (2)
A mual, a guam ah hiai thu na tungsak un;
Lamhaihte van inn-a sam, itsiam Pa hi,
'A ut peuhmah hongpai thei'.
Hongpai nuamte dingin zekai kullou hi,
Tu'n kong kihong hi, na lut theih lai lut in;
Jesu thutak hi, Hinna Lampi omsun,
'A ut peuhmah hongpai thei'.
'Hongpai nuamte' chih thuchiam kip mahmah hi,
'Hongpai nuamte' in thuakzawhna neih kul hi;
'Hongpai nuamte' di'n tangtawn hinna ahi,
'A ut peuhmah hongpai thei'.
Hondampa' itna thu ka ja,
Tua itna lamdang ahi mah ding;
Tung thangvan pan A hongkumsuk,
Kei hon it leh khasiat man hi hiam, hi hiam?
Kei hon it leh khasiat man hi hiam?
Hi, hi, hi, kei di'n, kei di'n!
Hi, hi, hi, kei di'n!
A itna tawpbei-in Toupa hongkumsuk,
Khros tung ah nang leh kei di'n hongsi.
A thuak dan, si luan dan ka za,
Khros tung-a A gim dan, A sih dan;
Hihhang' A gimna, A thuakna,
Kei ading', chi'n koiah kigen hiam, gen hiam?
Kei ading', chi'n koiah kigen hiam?
Tung thangvan simthu ka theita,
Jesu' mite muh ding tua vantung;
Hihhang' tua vantung khuapi ah,
Kei ading' mun bawlsa a om hiam, om hiam?
Kei adi'n mun bawlsa a om hiam?
Toupa, kon dotna hondawng in,
Nang kiang lou kua kiang ka pai ding hiam?
Kha Siangthou in kei kiang' gen in,
Hondampa leh vantung om kei di'n, kei di'n,
Hondampa leh vantung om kei di'n.
Pathian apan ka na-mangthang,
Tuin inn kon zuan;
Gilou lam ah ka pai ngitnget,
Toupa, inn kon zuan.
Inn kon zuan, Inn kon zuan,
Mawkvak nawn lou di'n;
Hehpihna'n Nang'a ka hi,
Toupa, inn kon zuan.
Kum tampi mawk beisakta ing,
Tuin inn kon zuan;
Tu'n kap kawmin ka kisikta,
Toupa, inn kon zuan.
Toupa, khelh leh vakmang ka chim,
Tuin inn kon zuan;
Na itna leh na thu muang ing;
Toupa, inn kon zuan.
Ka kha damlou, ka lung a gim,
Tuin inn kon zuan;
Ka tha hatsak' lamet honpia'n
Toupa, inn kon zuan.
Aw, Toupa, hon ngai in,
Ka lam hongtanvak in;
Ka mawhnate hon ngaidam in,
Ka manthat, ka bei ma'n; (2)
Luiguam thuk ka lau kei dinga,
Sihna hongnai laiin;
Tua luiguam thuk honkaipih in,
A lauhuai pha penpen na-ngawn;
Nangma'n na zou khinta.
Sihna pan in ka zuan,
Na hehpihna kulhpi;
Nangmah vang in lei dougalte,
Ka zou jel ding Toupa; (2)
Nangma' hauh dan thupi dante,
Tuin honchiam pan ta'ng;
A ni a hongtung zok ding a,
Ka laukha tung thangvan sang ah;
A khawl tawntungta ding.
Simlei luankhi nulna,
Lungkhamna leh buaina;
Sihna lusun, kahna gam ah,
Bangteng thuak mahleng zong; (2)
Non itna goubawm honchiangin,
Kei di'n thupina ding;
Tangtawna thupi semsem ding,
Khawksa lou ding A thupina'n
Hontatvak ding ziakin.
Hondampa gen ka ja,
'na hatna neu mahmah;
Ta hatlou, kiveng thum in,
Na bangkim Kei ah mu in'.
Jesu'n pia zou vek,
Amah tung' ka ba;
Khelhna in kei hon nitsak,
Vuk bang ngou A siangsak.
Bangmah hoihna nei ke'ng,
Nangmah hatna kiain,
A phakte siangsak thei hi,
Lungtang khauh nemsak thei hi.
Bangmah hoihna nei ke'ng,
Na hehpihna ngen di'n;
Ka silhpuante sawpsiang ning,
Kalv'ri Belamnou siin.
Ka sih kuan lupna pan,
Tatsa ka kha thawh chiang';
'Jesu'n pia zou vek!' chihin,
Van a khawngkek tou ding hi.
A mangtutphah maia,
A bukim' ka din chiang';
Ka nasepna gah khempeuh,
Jesu khebul nga ning.
Damsung tuipi tung huihpi'n honmut laiin,
Bangteng mansuah kisa na lunglelh laiin;
Honvualzawlna khatkhat in sim in, gen in,
Toupa'n nang dia honghih lamdang na sa ding.
Honvualzawlna khat khat-in sim in,
Honvualzawlna sim in, Pa' honpiak;
Honvualzawlna khat khat-in sim in,
Toupa'n nang dia honghih lamdang na sa ding.
Damsung khawsak lungkham puakgik na pua hiam?
Na khros gikpuak pen gik na sa mahmah hiam?
Honvualzawlna sim in, ginlahna bei ding,
La sa-in nitum tum' na omtheita ding.
Midangte neih-le-lamte na et chiang in,
Khrist in hauhna genseng louh honchiam theiin;
Honvualzawlna sim in, hauhna'n leithei lou,
Vantung-a pahtakman hiam tung-a na inn.
Galdounate alian aneu lakah zong,
Pathian bangkim tung ah om, lungkia'n om ken;
Honvualzawlna sim in, angelte'n honching'
Na zinna tawp dong honhuh, honlungmuan ding.
A honsiampa tung Pathian in,
Tanga A na-gel in,
Pasal amah kia om phallou;
Ompih ding A bawlsak.
Nuam in ka pahtawi uh,
Hiai mou leh mouneipa;
Khen ngeilou dia tong a chiam uh,
Toupa, Nang vualzawl in.
Lungkham leh buaina a tuah un,
Nangma'n ompih inla;
A tung uah nibang tang inla,
Amau vualzawl zel in.
Na minlouin tong a chiam ua,
Nangma'n Na theihpih hi;
Khenlou dia tongchiam khut kilet,
Itna guiin hen in.
Ginna'n gam nuam aom chih ka thei,
A thupidan genseng louh ahi;
Tangtawn inn ni sang-a vakzaw ah,
Jesu tawh tua ah om nuam na'ng e!
Tua a om! Tua a om!
Jesu tawh tua ah om nuam na'ng e!
Tua a om! Tua a om!
Jesu tawh tua ah om nuam na'ng e!
Pathian' Thu lungsung a ka sut chiang',
Hinna, muanna thu hi, ka kipak;
Gilkial leh dangtakte a bei ding,
Tua gam ah a bahte khawl ding hi.
Van-gam nopdan kuata'n gen thei dia?
Dahna bang, lungkhamna bang himhim,
Phamsa ngaihte, kahte, natte khawng,
Sih leh man zong om nawnlou ding hi.
Tua van-gam nunnuam-a teng dingin,
Pathian in mikhialte honchial hi;
Kuapeuh A honchialna sangte zaw,
Tua gam nunnuam ah teng ding uhi.

songs.title: Pathian Khasiang Ka Thum Uh Ja'n
songs.author: Dr. L Mason

lines: Pathian Kha Siang, ka thum uh ja'n,
Ka lungtang uah teng in;
Na hehpihna thilhihtheihna'n,
Kha Siang thupi hong in;
Na hehpihna thilhihtheihna'n,
Kha Siang thupi hong in.
Na vak-in hon kimusak in,
Vuaktang lungkhamhuaina;
Midikte paina lampi ah,
Kou zong honpii jel in;
Midikte paina lampi ah,
Kou zong honpii jel in.
Kithoihna mei bangin hong in,
Ka lung uh ha'siang in;
Ka pumpi uh hon Tanpa di'n,
Maitam thillat hi n'ung;
Ka pumpi uh hon Tanpa di'n,
Maitam thillat hi n'ung.
Jing daikia siangthou bang hong in,
Hiai hun hongvualzawl in;
Gahsuah theiloute'n kipak in,
Na hatna tangta n'ung;
Gahsuah thei loute'n kipak in,
Na hatna tangta n'ung.
Vakhu bang' kha jakin hong in,
Itna muanna kha jak;
Huan, leia Na Saptuamte zong,
Van-a Saptuam bang hen,
Huan, leia Na Saptuamte zong,
Van-a Saptuam bang hen.
Deihsakna tawh huih bang hong in,
Pentikos ni bang in;
Na thupina mi tengteng in,
Ka muh theihna ding un;
Na thupina mi tengteng in,
Ka muh theihna ding un.

songs.title: Jesu'n Kiu; Nang A Hon Sam
songs.author: W Kitching (Arr.)

lines: Jesu'n kiu; nang A honsam,
'Thatawl aw, honjuan in,' chi;
Amah kia'n hon hondam thei,
Na kong lianhon in!
Na kong lianhon in! (2)
Amah kia'n hon hondam thei,
Na kong lianhon in!
Jesu'n kiu; hondam di'n hong,
Nang di'n A hinna a pia;
Hankhuk tung Amah vualzou,
Na kong lianhon in!
Jesu'n kiu; tu'n kiu lailai,
Deihtelna Amah pe meng;
Nuamna'n na lung dimsak thei,
Na kong lianhon in!
Jesu'n kiu; hun lah beibei,
Hotdamna a nai lai in;
Hondampa'n honkhen main,
Na kong lianhon in!

songs.title: Mohnei Hong In Zahngaihna'n Hon Sam
songs.author: Fanny J Crosby

lines: Mawhnei, hongin zahngaihna'n honsam,
Jesu' khebul ah!
Lunghei inla, na bangkim ngain,
Jesu khebul ah!
Ngain, ngain, aw ngain,
Na puakgik tengteng ngain;
Ngain, ngain, mawh puakgik,
Jesu khebul ah!
Muang in hongpai in, khawlna zongin,
Jesu' khebul ah!
Na lunggimna van-gikte ngain,
Jesu' khebul ah!
Na ginnain hondamsak ding hi,
Jesu khebu ah!
Hongin, na kha gim leh tawl ngain,
Jesu khebul ah!
Hongpai in nang ding in mun om hi,
Jesu' khebul ah!
Na mawh gik bangteng hi zong ngain,
Jesu' khebul ah!
Khawlna ding Paradis om hi,
Muanna mun galkhat ah;
Jan mial leh sihna limguam khenlam ah,
Thatawl, dahna beina.
Hongdawn in aw tua mun ah!
Jingsanga phalvak kilawm a hongtan chiang';
Hongdawn in, aw tua mun ah!
Luigal lehlam sang ah nang hong na-dawn in.
A tangpha Khuapi khat om hi,
A nopdan genseng louh;
Tua a lutte'n Kumpipa muding hi,
Amah tawh tengden ding.
Van ah manglukhu a om hi,
Khrist Toupa'n a piak ding;
A hongpaina kuhkal-a ngakte leh,
Amah dia hingte kiang.
Tua hih nung sihpha'n muanhuai leng,
Vantung lampi jui in;
Hinna Kongpi i lut theihna ding in,
Nitum ngeilou gam ah.
Mangdingte honkhia in,
Sidingte kem in;
Hehpih in, khelhna leh han pan hum in,
Lamkhialte di'n kap in;
A pukte phong in,
Hondam thei Jesu amaute hilh in.
Mangdingte honkhia in,
Sidingte kem in,
Jesu'n zahngai thei hi,
A hondam ding.
A ngaihsak louh hang un,
Aman ngakngak hi;
A kisikte sang nuamin ngakngak hi,
Chihtaktakin zol in,
Kam nemin zol in,
Muang peuh le-uh Aman ngaidam ding hi.
Khemhatpa'n a bawlgawp,
Mihing lungsung ah;
A tummang lungtang itna'n hingsak thei;
Itna khutin khoih a,
Chitnaa phawnhalh;
A beisa hinna hing nawn thak ding hi.
Mang dingte honkhia in,
Sep ding him ahi;
Sep nading hatna Toupa'n honpia ding;
Lampi kawchik jui ding,
Zol teitei inla,
Vakvai hehpihhuai Honpa sih hilh in.
Jing khawvak sangin na hoihzaw,
Aw kei Honpa, Kumpipa!
Na thupina leh kilawmna,
Laa sak ka kha'n nuamsa.
Jing khuavak sangin Na hoihzaw,
Na vakzaw, sun sangin Na vakzaw;
Na ompihna thupina ah,
Meipi leh mialna theng hi.
Vakna puan bangin Na silh a,
Pathian' thupina Na khu;
Gam vaihawmna chiang Nang'a hi,
Toupa, tu leh tangtawn in.
Aw, Na zahngaihna a letdan,
Na hehpihna kichindan;
Aw, tua itna'n kei ading in,
Na gam ah mun honbawlsak.
Leia ka hinna bei chiangin,
Kizopna a tah chiang in;
Sangsawm mun sangsawm tampi tawh,
Phatna la sa tawntung ding.

songs.title: Jesu Kiangah Ka Kipumpiak
songs.author: J W Van De Venter
songs.key: Doh is D Duet - S & T

lines: Jesu kiang ah ka kipumpiak,
Nuam in ka bangkim ka pia;
Amah it-in ka muang den ding,
Niteng A kiang ka om ding.
Kong kipumpiak hi,
Kong kipumpiak hi;
Ka Hondampa nuamsa Nang kiang',
Kong kipumpiak hi.
Jesu kiang ah kong kipumpiak,
A khebul ah ka kun hi;
Leitung nopna ka nusiata,
Hongla'n, Jesu tu'n hongla'n.
Jesu kiang ah kong kipumpiak,
Honpa, Nang kia'n honnei in;
Kei Nang'a, Nang kei'a Na hih,
Kha Siang in hontheisak hen.
Jesu kiang ah kong kipumpiak,
Toupa, Nang di'n kong kipia;
Na itna, hatna'n hondimsak',
Na vualzawlna'n honvuk in.
Jesu kiang ah ka kipumpiak,
Tu'n lungsung ah ka theita;
Aw, hotdamna kim kipahna!
A min thupi, thupi hen!
Ka omdan ka gamtatdan a hong lamdangta,
Jesu'n ka lungsung a luah nung!
Ka zonzon vakna ka lungsung ah ka neita,
Jesu'n ka lungsung a luah nung!
Jesu'n ka lungsung a luah nung! (2)
Ka lungsung ah kipahna tuipi bangin luang,
Jesu'n ka lungsung a luah nung!
Vakvai leh lammang nawnlou in ka omta a,
Jesu'n ka lungsung a luah nung!
Ka gitlouhna tampi sawpsiang vek ahita,
Jesu'n ka lungsung a luah nung!
Lametna tak leh muanhuai ka neita, tuin,
Jesu'n ka lungsung a luah nung!
Ginlahna meipi ka lampi ah kai nawnlou,
Jesu'n ka lungsung a luah nung!
Tuin sihna guam ah vakna om kei dingin,
Jesu'n ka lungsung a luah nung!
Hiai apan in khuapi kongpi ka mu thei hi,
Jesu'n ka lungsung a luah nung!
Tua khopi-a teng di'n ka pai ding chih ka thei,
Jesu'n ka lungsung a luah nung!
Kipakin nuam mahmah ing, ka pai kawmkawm in,
Jesu'n ka lungsung a luah nung!
Khrist' thukhen nading a hun,
Mi jata'n masuan hang;
A taksa leh a hutte,
Bukin kithei ding hi;
Kalvaria Na sisan in,
Jesu, honpanpih in;
Tuachiang' lehlam a dikna,
Honbuk zou thei ding hing.
Khrist in hon bukkak chiangin,
Bangkim kitel ding hi;
A taktak leh a lemte,
Kimuchian vek ding hi;
Pathian aw, Na khut hatin,
Ka lailung chiamteh in,
Tua ni thupi hongtun chiang',
Tua kia lungnoppih ding.
Khrist' thukhenna hongtun chia,
Ka kha, na omna ding;
Suangphum leh a vanzatte,
Hoihtak in zongta in;
Kalvari tang apan in,
Vanzat kim la inla;
Tung khopi nim lauhuai zong,
La na sa thei ding hi.

songs.title: Jesu Kipahman Pedia A Hong Chiang
songs.author: Fanny J Crosby

lines: Jesu kipahman pe dia a hongchiang',
Sunlai hiam janlai hiam in;
I meivak bawlsa veka na om in,
Kigingsa'n A honmu diam?
Aw manta ung, i chi thei diam, unau,
Laukha innlam juan dingin?
Toupa hongpai chiang' nang leh kei mansa'n,
Mansa'n, Amah ngakin honmu diam?
Jingkhangpi, khawvak ma'n zong hongpai thei,
Khatkhat-in honsam inchin;
Toupa kiang i nasep i piakkhawm chiang',
Nang kiang, Hih hoih, honchi diam?
Hon gintak bang in i na om na hiam,
I theihtawp i suah na hiam?
I lungsim in hon siamlouh kei aleh,
Khawlna thupi i tang ding.
Toupa'n kiging-a A muhte hampha,
A thupina tang ding uh;
Sunlai hiam, janlai hiam in hongpai leh,
Kigingsa'n A honmu diam?
Kou Suahlam Kumpipa thumte,
Gamlapi pan thilpiak tawiin;
Mual leh guam tawn in kong pai uh,
Van aksi jui jel-in.
Aw, aksi lamdang, van aksi,
Kumpi aksi vak leh hoih;
Tumlam juan-a pai jel in,
Na tanna kim ah honpi in.
Kumpipa Khatna:
Bethlehem phai a Kumpi piang,
Dangka-eng kon tawi Amah ding';
Beini neilou tangtawn vaihawm,
Manglukhu khusak ning.
Kumpipa Nihna:
Begaw ka nei, Amah piak ding,
Namtui Pathianna tawh kilawm;
Mi tengteng-in thum-in phatna,
Van sang Pathian pia hen.
Kumpipa Thumna:
Mura kei tawi gimnam kha nei,
Mangbatna hongtung ding theisak;
Dah-a thum, sisan pawt-a si,
Hansung vot-a khakkhum.

songs.title: Tui Kihawt Lai Ah Hinna Khau Khak In
songs.author: Rev E S Ufford

lines: Tui kihawt laiah Hinna-Khau khak in,
Unau kuahiam khat hotdam ding om hi;
Khattei' sanggam, hondam dia kua kuan ngam?
Hinna-Khau va khak ding, lauhuai thuakpih ding?
Hinna-Khau khak in!
Hinna-Khau khak in!
Tuiin a taih mi khat om;
Hinna-Khau khak in!
Hinna-Khau khak in!
Mi khat a tummang dek om.
Khut kin leh hatin Hinna-Khau khak in,
Bangdinga khawl, bangdinga sawt zekai?
En in, tum petmah ding, aw kinmeng in,
Hinna Long tawh delh in, kin in, delhmeng in.
Lauhuaia omte Hinna-Khau khak in,
Tum huthut uh na muh louhna mun ah;
Khemna huihpi hat, lungkham tui kilok,
Tui thukna mun ah tummang pah ding uhi.
Hotdam theihna hun kikhel pah ding hi,
Mangthang den ding, tummang pah tading uh;
Kinmeng in, sanggam aw, zekai nawn ken,
Tuni'n Hinna-Khau khak', amau hondam in.
Hondampa, Na thahat muang-a,
Khawl tawldam nuamsa'ng e;
Buaina haksa lak honghuh thei,
Na hatna theih nuam hi.
'na lungjinna teng Amah pia'n' (3)
Aman nang honkhotuah ngaihsak hi.
Ka lungjinna Nang hontun leng,
Toupa, Na deihlam hi;
Lungkham dahna teng hontun leng,
Toupa, Na deihlam hi.
Non itna, khotuahna muang-in,
Nang kia honmitsuan leng;
Na Mangtutphah maiah kun leng,
Lei lungmuanna mu ding.
Nungchiang gentheih khak ding lauin,
Bangdi'n ka patau dia?
Banghang muanlah man-a launa'n,
Ka kha ling dimsak ding?

songs.title: Namchih Kianga Hilh Ding Tangthu I Nei
songs.author: H Earnest Nichol

lines: Namchih kianga hilh ding tangthu i nei,
A lung uh hoih lam ngasak ding;
Thutak leh zahngaihna thu hi,
Muanna leh vakna thu hi. (2)
Jan khawmial, jing phalvak hongsuak ding,
Jing phalvak sun vakpha suak ding;
Khrist gam thupi leiah tung ding hi,
Tua itna leh vakna gam.
Namchih kianga sak ding la khat i nei,
Toupa lam lungsim ngasak ding;
Gitlouhna zou ding la khat hi,
Tei leh tem gawpsak ding hi. (2)
Namchih kianga hilh ding thu i nei hi,
Van-a vaihawmpa Toupa in;
A Tapa ei tan ding' honsawl,
Pathian itna ei honglak. (2)

songs.title: Kham Kongpi A Lut Ding Mi Om Hi
songs.author: G M J (Arr.)

lines: Kham kongpi-a lut ding mi om hi,
Denchiangin, denchiangin;
Tua mun thupina aman ngah ding,
Nang bangchi ding? Kei bangchi ding?
Kham kongzing tawn ding mi a om hi,
A muhnophuai mahmahte mu ding;
A kigen tawntung nopna ngah ding hi,
Nang bangchi ding? Kei bangchi ding?
Khros puakgik ngakhia ding mi om hi,
Denchiangin, denchiangin;
Muanhuai, pahtak, lukhu ngah ding hi,
Nang bangchi ding? Kei bangchi ding?
Thupi Kumpipa mai mu ding hi,
Leitung dahna pan suakta ding hi;
Amah tawh lungdam tawntung ding hi,
Nang bangchi ding? Kei bangchi ding?
Kongpi kikhak nung kong kiu om ding,
Denchiangin, denchiangin;
'nang kong thei kei' kichih za ding hi,
Nang bangchi ding? Kei bangchi ding?
A sap hang-in kidawng lou ding hi,
Lut a sawm hang' kihon lou ding hi,
Misiangte' pahman ngah lou ding hi,
Nang bangchi ding? Kei bangchi ding?
Vualzawhna lasa mi om ding hi,
Denchiangin, denchiangin;
Tatsa mite tawh phat la sa ding;
Nang bangchi ding? Kei bangchi ding?
Luigal tun chiang' aman muak ding hi,
A it a ngaih paisate khempeuh;
Thupina tawh bit tawntungta ding,
Nang bangchi ding? Kei bangchi ding?
Aw nem leh migiin Jesu'n mi a sam,
Nang leh kei A honsam hi;
Kuhkalin Jesu'n mi a ngakin a ching,
Nang leh kei A honching hi.
'Hong un! hong un!
Gim leh tawlte aw, hong un!'
'Aw nem leh migiin Jesu'n mi a sam,
Hong un, aw mikhial, hong un!'
Jesu'n honchial lai in i zekai ding hiam?
Nang leh kei A honchial hi;
A itna ngaihsak louin i om dia hiam,
Nang leh kei adia itna?
Hun leh nite kintak takin paimang a,
Nang leh kei hon nusiain;
Khua hong liap-in sihna hongnai semsem hi,
Nang leh kei a honnaih hi.
Aw, a lamdang mahmah itna honchiam hi,
Nang leh kei adia chiam hi;
I na khialta zong itna, ngaihdamna nei,
Nang leh kei dia ngaihdamna.

songs.title: Sunni Taang Kilawm Leh Vak Pha
songs.author: W Robert Lindsay

lines: Sunni taang kilawm leh vakpha a paiin,
Jingsang san singseng hiam, jan dai kawt lai hiam;
Mailam-a kalsuan-a niteng-a pai in,
Lam tawntung Jesu zui in.
zuiin, Jesu i zui ding hi,
zuiin, niteng in zuiin;
zuiin A hon piina peuh ah,
Lam tawntung Jesu i zui ding hi.
Sunni taan laitak hiam, khua mial laitak hiam,
Khal hun nuam lai hiam, nipi haksa lai hiam;
Honpa'n honsam ngaiin, A thu zui mengin,
Lam tawntung Jesu zuiin.
Sunni taang kilawm hiam, a liap pha ah hiam,
Huihpi a hat lai hiam, a then chiang-in hiam,
A hehpihna muang in, ni a tum dong-in,
Lam tawntung Jesu zui in.
Jesu' hotdamna hongthang,
Jesu in hondam hi;
Aw, a thu na gensawn un;
Jesu in hondam hi!
Gam chih ah A thu phuang un,
Tang leh guam, tuipi kan in;
Gen jel un, Toupa'n thu pia,
Jesu in hondam hi!
Tuipi luangte puasak un,
Jesu in hondam hi!
Koipeuh ah khialte hilh un;
Jesu in hondam hi!
Tuikulh gamte'n la sa un,
Tuipite'n na pawsawn un;
Lei in suahtakna lawm ding:
Jesu in hondam hi!
Gim leh buai chiang' la sa un,
Jesu in hondam hi!
A sihna leh hinna in,
Jesu in hondam hi!
Hehpihna ngai mite kiang',
Aw nem takin la sa un,
Sihna tung' vualzawh la sa'n,
Jesu in hondam hi!
Huihpi huihkhi in sa un,
Jesu in hondam hi!
Tuin namchih kipak hen;
Jesu in hondam hi!
Hotdamna kim leh manbei,
Gamchih michih zasak un;
Sa un, hiai vualzawhna la:
Jesu in hondam hi!

songs.title: Jesu'n Aw Nem In Nang Hon Sam Hi
songs.author: Fanny J Crosby

lines: Jesu'n aw nemin nang a honsam hi,
Tuni'n honsam, tuni'n honsam;
A itna vak pan bangdia paimang ding,
Gamla semsem ba' pai ding?
Tuni'n honsam! Tuni'n honsam!
Jesu'n honsam,
Tuni'n nang aw nemin honsam hi!
Jesu'n tawlte khawl dingin honsam hi,
Tuni'n honsam, tuni'n honsam!
Na puakgik tawh juan in, na hampha ding,
Honnial, hon kiksak lou ding.
Jesu'n hon ngakngak, tuni'n Amah juan in,
Tuni'n hon ngak, tuni'n hon ngak!
Na khelhna tawh A khebul ah kun in,
Hongpai in, zekai het ken.
Jesu'n hon zolzol veh, A aw ngai v'aw,
Tuni'n ja in, tuni'n ja in!
A min muangte lungmuan mahmah ding hi,
Kintak' thou inla, juan in.
Tulvuah leh lummei kaina khen ah,
Chiau i gal ah;
Tangtawn nopna ni bangin a tang,
Muikhua zing lou gam ah.
Tua ah dahna, natna,
Gibang khen om nawnlou ding;
Chiau i gal ah kimu nawnpah ding,
Muanna Thianmang siang ah.
Tuipi tuihual a luanna khen ah,
Ginna'n kha jak;
Itna'n eite honhilh kham khuapi,
Tua lametna'n la sa.
Kha kiakna chiau luikuam khengta uh,
It leh ngaihte'n;
Innpi zatam ah dawnbang tuak ni,
Eite tungkim vek ni.
Aw nopna bei theilou jingsang nuam!
Aw ni thupi!
Tua mun ah dahna khitui khempeuh,
Jesu'n a nulhul ding.
Pathian' Laisiangthou muang ing,
Jesu' Thutak honhilh hi;
Vantung paina lam honhilh a,
Van-gam i lut thei ding.
Aw Bible, aw Bible,
Ka it nusia theikei ve'ng;
Aw Bible, Aw Bible,
Pathian' Laibu Siangthou.
Pathian' lungsim thuk dante,
Mihing' khelhna leh omdan;
Hinna manpha thu zong honhilh,
Thu lungdamhuai-pen hi.
Jesu' Laibu hoihpen e,
Pathian' thawnpiak manpha hi;
Sihna pan thohnawnna thu gen,
Hinna thu manpha hi.
Jan-a meivak tang bangin,
Na Thuin lungsung tanvak;
Gou manpha sangin manpha zaw,
Lungsung ah kem hoih ning.

songs.title: Kongpi Khat Honsa In A Om
songs.author: Mrs L Baxter

lines: Kongpi khat honsain a om,
Tua kong ah vak hong tangkhia;
Gamlapi khros pan a tang hi,
Hondampa' itna gen hi.
Aw hehpihna thuk mahmah e!
Tua kong kei ding' hon hitel maw?
Kei ding', kei ding',
Kei ding', hon hitel maw?
Tua kongpi kihong miteng ding',
Tua tawn-a hotdamna zong;
Azawng, ahau, alian, aneu,
Namchih, chichih mite ding'.
Naih in, melma'n hon zumpih zong,
Hehpihna kong hon laiin;
Khros pom inla, lukhu ngah in,
Tangtawn itna chiamtehna.
Luigal langkhat ah i nga ding,
Hiaia i puak lai uh khros;
Hinna lukhu i khuta ding,
Amah itsem ni van ah.

songs.title: Aw Zion, Kin In Na Nasep
songs.author: Mary A Thomson

lines: Aw Zion, kin in Na nasep zou ding in,
Miteng hilh in, Pathian khawvel Vak hi,
Amah Pathian; michih namchih Siampa in,
Kuamah zan mial lak' a man ding deihlou.
Phuangzak in Thupha, Muanna pahna;
Jesu' Thu gen in, A tatna thu gen in.
En in, mi sang tampi mial laka omte,
Khelhna suangkul ah henkol bun in tang;
Hondampa amau di'n si, hinna pia di'n,
Hizong amau hilh ding kuamah omlou.
Tangthupha gen dingin na tate sawl in,
Na neih na lam pia in, thu gen nadi'n;
Amau di'n na lungtang tengtengin thum in,
Na sen khempeuh Jesu'n hondin vek ding.
Aw Zion, Amah hongpai na tuah main,
A hehpih, hotdamna gen mengmeng in;
Na ngaihsak louh manin mi mangthang kha ding,
A mel mu taklou khat zong omkha ding.
Phat un, Kumpi thupi, Pathian dang omlou,
A lamdang nate honlak manin phat un;
Zinna lamtawn' hon ompih dia honchiam man',
Jan a meikuang, sun-a meipi' honpii man'.
Angelte aw, phat un,
Sana kaihging tawh;
A mite aw, bia un.
Nou A mel mute'n;
A manna gamteng ah,
Tangtawn, tangtawnin,
A siamsate'n phat ding (3)
Ka kha aw, phat in.
Phat un, tatna pia hi, manbeiin pia hi,
Hon damsak thei Tuikhuk pia, Amah phat un;
It-a honkepna leh A chitna jiakin,
I thumnate hondawn ding A chiam jiakin.
Phat un, thuakna honpiak itna-a piak hi,
Vanlam thilte i neih semsem theih nading;
Ginna vualzou, lamet bei theilou honpia,
It teng Amah kiang kikhopna ding gam pia.

songs.title: Jesu Tawh Koipeuh Ah Bit-In Ka Pai Thei
songs.author: Jessie Brown

lines: Jesu tawh koipeuh ah bit-in ka pai thei!
Hiai leitung koimun peuh ah Aman honpii!
Amah louin koipeuh ah lungnopna bei,
Jesu tawh ton koipeuh ah ka lau kei hi!
Koi ah leng, koi ah leng,
Ka lau thei kei hi;
Jesu tawh koipeuh ah bit-in ka pai thei!
Jesu tawh koipeuh ah kei kia ka hi kei,
Lawmte'n hon taisan, Amah kei'a hi lai!
Aman lampi haksa ah honpii mahleh,
Jesu tawh koimunpeuh phatna inn ahi.
Jesu tawh koipeuh ah ka ihmut nuam thei,
Mialna in kimkot ah hontuam jel mahleh!
Honphawng ding-a, mawkvak nawnlou ding ka thei,
Jesu tawh koimunpeuh inn nuam, inn nuam hi!
Muanna nuam lunggulhin,
Ginna hatsem delhin,
Aw, na lungsim tengin na ngen hi;
Hizong khawlna mu lou,
Nopna mu lou hial ding;
Na bangkim Amah na piak mateng.
Aw, na bangkim Toupa kiang' na pia vekta hiam?
A Kha'n na lungtang neivek hiam?
Na sapum leh na kha,
Na bangkim na piak chiang',
Na nei ding muanna, khawlna, nopna.
Muang leh lungkim gige,
Toupa mah tawh ton-in;
A thu vak-a pai na ut kei maw?
A deihlam na bawl kul,
Gilou pan suahtak na'ng,
Na bangkim Amah na piak kul hi.
A vualzawlna deihin,
Vualzawlna hoihpenpen,
Sun leh jan A kiang ah i ngen hi;
Aw, i bangkim piaa,
Aman hon neihvek ma'n,
Aw tuate bangchi'n honpia ding hiam?
Itna honpiak ding leh,
Hon lungnopsak ding dan,
Aw, kuata'n gen theiin, genseng ding?
Amah tawh kikholhna,
A khebul ah mu ni,
I bangkim Amah i piakvek chiang'.
Hongveh in aw Pathian Honpa,
Tanglaia bangin;
Leitung buppi Kha khanlawhna,
Kong nget hongpuak in.
Toupa, Hongpuak in khanlawhna,
Kha khanlawhna thupi!
Kha khanlawhna thupi!
Toupa hongpuak in, khanlawhna,
Kei sung ah kipansak in!
Honhenchip Hell khau hongphel in,
Dawite hawlmang in;
Na kha thahat hongpuakta in,
Tuamah kisam ung.
Lungsung milimte khen-gawp in,
Khelhna siangsak in;
Kipumpiak lungtang hong guan in,
Na deihlam sem ding.
Leitung buppi Kha khanlawhna,
Kong nget hongpuak in;
Buhte min ziazua kimkot ah,
An lak hun lua hi.

songs.title: Aw I Vekin Pang Chiat Ni
songs.author: W P Williams

lines: Aw i vekin pang chiat ni,
I lungtang leh tha tawh;
Toupa, Makai' nasem di'n,
A nasep lungkim ding;
Sep masa pahtak in jui,
Chih thei gige lehang;
Pa' deihlam zuihna pan in,
Lungnopna hongluang ding.
Khrist leh Saptuam di'n,
Bangkim pia ung, Toupa!
Khrist leh saptuam di'n,
Aw, hing gige le-ung!
Aw, i vekin pang chiat ni,
Khrist' dia khawvel zou di'n;
Lamlian ah leh lamneu ah,
Zong ding hotdam ding mi;
Leitung buppi-a mite,
Tangthupha hilhkim di'n;
Michih namchi'n jak mateng,
Tua ging kipahhuai pen.
Aw, i vekin pang chiat ni,
Khrist' Saptuam bawl ding in;
A nasep a muanhuaiin,
I bangkim pia vekin;
A thusehte jui ni aw,
Vualzawlna nak ahi;
Tua bang Khrist vangletna nei,
Hinna bei dong' khang ni.
Toupa ah kipak'!
A zahngaihna' nuam un,
Aman henna a phelta hi;
A sisan-a tat, banghang i lau ding hiam?
Jesu i bangkim a bangkim!
Pathian' hon gup leh (3):
Kuahiam honzou thei ding,
Kua, kua, kua?
Kuahiam honzou thei ding, zou thei ding.
Toupa ah hat un!
A hatna ah nuam un,
Nisim muanhuaiin dik unla;
Khelhna'n honsual chiang' thutak gum hangsan un,
Amah i tha leh bitna ding.
Amah Thu muang un,
A chiam pel lou ding hi,
Khrist ah thuchiamte a kip hi;
Lei leh van mang zong, thuchiam omden ding hi,
Chiin kigelh, kigelh tuan hi.
Toupa ah om un,
A hatna ah bit in,
Tu'n tangtawn hinna kipan hi;
A zawngkhal phapen zong A khut sung panin,
Kuama'n hong sutkhia theilou ding.
Gam vanglaa Setan khuamial nua' tengte,
Mi sang zatam tangtawna mang mai ding;
Kuahiam kuan ding, hotdam thu gen ding in,
Haksa mahleh zong Jesu muang zaw ding?
'Ka kiang vangletna teng piak hi , (2)
Gam teng ah kuankhia unla,
Tangthupha gen un;
Ngai un, K'on ompih gige hi.'
En un, leitung teng sepna dia kong kihong,
Khrist' sepaihte aw, tua ah lut meng un;
Khristiante aw, thou-in hatna gawmkhawm un,
Khelhna khau sut di'n Gospel thu gen un.
Bangdia si ding? chi'n Pathian' aw'n honsam hi,
Bangdia si ding? chi'n A min hong gingkik;
Sihna lauhuai' pan hondam di'n Jesu si,
Hinna leh hotdamna thu vagen un.
Mi namchihta'n, Pathian thupi hen, chia,
Vualzoua la a sak chiang un nuam un;
Tatte'n hotdamna kipahpi'n kikou un,
Haleluia, Toupa Kumpi hi, chi'n.
Honpa' sisan manpha hongluang,
Ka bat hongsutsak na'ng;
A lu siangthou a hongkunta,
Hinna ka neih theih na'ng.
Belamnou nunnem penin,
Kalvari ah hongthuak;
Belamnou thahsa, hong thounawnkhinpa,
Ka Hondampa ahi.
Ka mawh vang in hongum Toupa,
Khros tung ah hongmau hi;
Hehpihna leh mi-it theihna'n,
Honpia tawntung hinna.
Tung a niin mel lak ngamlou,
Meipi puanin a silh;
Honpa'n ka khelhna teng puaa,
Khros a A thuak laiin.
Ken leng tu'n ka lu kunsak ning,
Ka Toupa Khros bul ah;
A thuak natdan ka ngaihtuah a,
A mel kia ka muhin.
Ka lungkhamna khitui luang zong,
Kei dia A thuak na zaw;
Ka pumpi in ka kipia ding,
Tua kia ka hihtheih tawp.
Hangtakin van sepaihte aw,
Laulou-in malam nawt jel un;
Toupa Jesu honpipa hi,
Kalvaria A zohsa hi;
I Toupa honpipan.
I Toupa honpipan (3),
Gam nuam ah hontun ding;
Gam nuam ah hontun ding (3),
I Toupa honpipan.
Hangtakin van sepaihte aw,
Sihna leh natna paisan un;
Toupa Jesu honpipa hi,
Hana pan vualzoua thounawn;
I Toupa honpipa.
Hangtakin van sepaihte aw,
Paisuak ni, aksi khen gam ah;
Toupa Jesu honpipa hi,
A ina hontun ngei ding hi,
I Toupa honpipan.

songs.title: Ka Toupa Jesu Hondampa Lamdang Hi
songs.author: Fanny J Crosby

lines: Ka Toupa Jesu Hondampa lamdang hi,
Hondampa lamdang kei adi'n;
Suangpi kitam sung'Aman ka kha sel hi,
Tua ah nopna tuiluang ka mu.
Suangpi kitam sung',
Aman ka kha sel hi;
Tua Suangpi'n gamkeu liimsak hi;
A itna thuk ah ka hinna a sel hi,
Tua ah Aman khutin honhum. (2)
Ka Toupa Jesu Hondampa lamdang hi,
Aman ka puakgik a lamang;
Aman honlen, ka ding, ka puk kei ding hi,
Aman niteng hatna honpia.
Aman mitphiatkal teng vualzawlna'n honvuk,
A hoihna'n ka nite dimsak;
Lunglawp in la ka sa, Pathian minthang hen,
Tuabang tanpa kei'a hi a!
A vakna thupi silh-a kei ka thawh chiang',
Meipi lak'Amah ka tuah chiang';
A hotdamna bukim, A itna lamdang,
Vanmi zatamte tawh sa ning.
Phat un! Phat un! Jesu i tanpa nuamsa hi,
Sa in, lei aw, A itna phuangjak in!
Bia un! bia un! Vantung angel sangpenten zong,
Hatna, zahna, A min siangthou pia un;
Belampu bang, Jesu'n A tate veng hi,
A baan un nitum dongin A pii zel!
Phat un! phat un!
A vangletna thu genzak un;
Phat un! phat un!
Kipahna la sa ni.
Phat un! phat un! Jesu i tanpa nuamsa hi!
I khelhnate hanga thuaka si hi;
I suangpi, i tangtawn hotdamna lametna,
Bia un, bia un', singa kilhden Jesu!
'A phatla sa'n, Jesu'n i dahnate pua,
A itna lian, lamdangin thukin hat.
Phat un! phat un! Jesu i tanpa nuamsa hi,
Hosana ging in van khawpi thawn hi!
Jesu, Hondampa in tangtawn in vaihawm hi,
Amah Zawlnei, Siampu leh Kumpi hi:
Manglukhu pia'n, vualzou in hong pai kik ding,
Vangletna, thupina Toupa' a hi.
Tangthu kumlui honhilh in,
Muhnai louh vantung thu;
Jesu leh A thupina,
Jesu leh A itna;
Theihnuam takin hon hilh in,
Naupang kianga gen bang';
Hatlou leh tawl, panpih bei
Leh a ninsa ka hi.
Tangthu kumlui honhilh in,
Tangthu kumlui honhilh in;
Tangthu kumlui honhilh in.
Jesu leh A itna.
Tangthu kumlui honhilh in,
Ka theih theihna ding in;
Tua tatna thu hoih lamdang,
Mohna damsak na thu;
Honhilh hilh in tua tangthu,
Ka mangngilh pahpah hi;
Zingsang daitui thak kia zong,
Sun nisat chiang' mang hi.
Tangthu honhilh, kamdam in,
Chitak deihsak na toh;
Jesu hotdam ding mikhial
Kei hi'ng thei gige in;
Tangthu honhilh gige in,
Mangbatna ka tuah chiang,
Kei ding a hong lungmuanpa
Nong hihnop taktak leh.
Tangthu Kumlui honhilh in,
Leitung thupinate'n
Kei hon susia ding chi a
Non lauhpih peuhpeuh chiang;
He tua leitung thupina'n,
Ka kha hongkhem chiang in,
Tangthu Kumlui honhilh in,
'Jesu'n hondamsak', chi'n.

songs.title: Ka Tanpa A Hing Chih Ka Thei Hi
songs.author: Jessie H Brown

lines: Ka Tanpa A hing chih ka thei,
Leitung ah vai A hawm nawn ding;
Tangtawn hinna A pia chih ka thei,
Hehpihna leh hatna A nei.
Ka thei, ka thei,
Jesu A hing hi,
Leitung ah hongding nawn ding hi;
A hinna A pia hi chih ka thei,
Hehpihna leh hatna A nei.
A thuchiam juau ngeilou chih ka thei,
Thu a gen a, si thei nawnlou;
Sih mulkimhuai in ka sa sual zong,
Denchiang in Amah ka mu ding.
Ka omna ding A bawl chih ka thei,
Amah kiang a ka om theih na'ng;
Kei hong khawtuahna lamdang mahmah,
Ni tawpni chiang' kei hongpii ding.

songs.title: Tatsa Ka Hih Gen Jak Nuam Ka Sa!
songs.author: Fanny J Crosby

lines: Tatsa ka hih genjak nuam ka sa!
Belamnou sisan a tatsa;
Zahngaihna tawp nei lou in hon tan,
A ta ka hi tangtawn dongin.
Tatsa, tatsa, Belamnou sisan a tatsa,
Tatsa, tatsa, A ta ka hi tangtawn dongin.
Tatsa Jesu ah nuam mahmah ing,
Nopna pahna kigen zoulou;
Aman kei hon ompih tawntung a,
A omna vak ka om tawntung.
Hon tanpa nuamsa ka ngaihtuah na,
Sunni tumtum in ka ngaihtuah;
Kamsim mawk thei nawnlou ka hih man,
A itna la'n ka sa tawntung.
A dan ka kipah na Kumpipa,
Kilawmna kima om mu ding;
It in ka kalsuan veng tawntung a,
Janmial ah zong la hong guan hi.
Hondampa thounawn-a hing,
Amah na sem ka hi;
Amah a hing chih ka thei,
Mite'n bangteng gen zong;
A zahngaihna khut ka mu,
A kipah aw ka ja;
Amah ka kiang nai gige,
Ka ngaih chiangin.
Hing hi, hing hi,
Khrist Jesu tuni'n hing;
Hon tonpihin honhoupih hi,
Damsung lam kochik ah;
Hing hi, hing hi,
Hotdamna pia dingin,
A hin ka theihdan non dong maw?
Hing hi, ka lungsung ah.
Ka kim ka kiang ka et chiang',
Hon it, khawtuahna mu'ng;
Ka lungsim hongtawl mahleh,
Ka lungkia ngeilou ding;
Huihpi vuahpi lakah zong,
Honpii ding chih ka thei;
Amah hong kilatna ni,
Hongtung pah ding.
Nuam in, nuam in aw Khristian,
Khrist Kumpipa phat in;
Tangtawn Halleluia, chi'n,
Amah phat la sa in;
A zongte di'n lamet hi,
A mu di'n panpihna;
Amah bang itsiam, hoih leh
Siam dang omlou.

songs.title: Jesu Kiang' Kal Khat Kia Lel
songs.author: Fanny J Crosby

lines: Jesu kiang' kal khat kia lel,
Bangdia tua suan lou ding?
Hongin, na khelhna phuangin,
Na Honpa' mai' kunin.
Kal khatkia lel, kal khat kia lel,
Suanin hon ngak hi;
Hong in, na khelhna phuang in,
Vualzawlna na tang ding hi,
A hehpihna manbei hi,
Nang honpia nial het ken.
Jesu kiang' kal khat kia lel,
Muangin na hing ding hi;
Hon it in nang hon ngak hi,
Ngaidam din mansa'n om.
Jesu kiang' kal khat kia lel,
Khelhna pan hehpihna;
Na lungtang koilam puk hiam?
Mitphiat kal teng' hun bei.
Jesu kiang' kal khat kia lel,
Aw, bangdia honsuan lou?
Hodampa kong kipia hi,
Bangdia chimai lou oi?
Tumlam phaizang apan,
Theihsakna la hongging;
Muanhuaina la, muanhuaina,
Khrist di'a muanhuaina,
Tua la hongging sawnsawn,
Mualten a ging lasawn;
Muanhuaina la, muanhuaina,
He, Khrist dia muanhuaina!
'Vualzou di'n kuan un!'
'Vualzou di'n kuan un!'
Thupi ei makaipa'n chi;
A thupiak in kuan ni,
Tua gam i luah pah ding,
Muanhuaina in, muanhuaina,
He, Khrist dia muanhuaina!
Nou hangsanten ja un,
A ging in lei lingsak;
Muanhuaina la, muanhuaina,
Khrist dia muanhuaina;
Pang ngam dingin ding un,
Tua hasot la sa un;
Muanhuaina la, muanhuaina,
He, Khrist dia muanhuaina!
Muanhuai kou lak' pang un,
Gilou milian phuk ding;
Muanhuaina in, muanhuaina,
Khrist dia muanhuaina,
Setan' puanlap lenna',
Pengkul in i mut ding;
Muanhuaina la, muanhuaina,
He, Khrist dia muanhuaina!
Tuailai hatna i pia,
Tu'n Jesu' khebul ah;
Muanhuaina in , muanhuaina,
Khrist dia muanhuaina,
Gospel i phuang jak ding,
Leitung gam chiteng ah,
Muanhuaina thu, muanhuaina,
He, Khrist dia muanhuaina!

songs.title: Ka Tanpa Phatla Sa Ning E
songs.author: P P Bliss

lines: Ka tanpa phat la sa ning e,
Hon itna lamdang phat ning:
Mulkimhuai sing dawn ah a thuak,
Hamsia pan hon suaktasak.
Lain sain kei hon Tanpa,
A sisan in hong leizou;
Hon ngaihdamna khros ah kipsak,
Leibat pia, hon suaktasak.
A lamdang tangthupha gen ning,
Ka gammang hong zongkhia hi;
A itna, zahngaihna lianin,
A mawkin hon tanta hi.
Ka Tanpa it phat la sa ning,
A vualzawh thahat gen ning;
Khelhna, sihna, gawtmun tung a,
Vualzawhna honpiak gen ning.
Ka Tanpa phat la sa ning e,
Hon itna phat in sa ningl
Sihna pan hinna ah honpi,
Pathian' ta hihna honpia.
Toupa, nang naihsem nuam ing,
Nang naih semsem in;
Na kha limnuai ah bit-in,
Om gige nuam ing;
Ginlah leh khelh na lian hi,
Sung leh pua ah, honsual hi;
Zou di'n honhuh in Toupa,
Nang naih semsem in!
Toupa, ka Suangpi naihsem,
Ka kha bukna Nang;
Huihpi zong laulou ding hi'ng,
Tui kihawt zong leh;
Huih hat chiang patau lou ding,
Hon hihsia theilou ding hi;
Na itna baan a kinga,
Nang naih semsem in!
Panpihpa leh Kingakna,
Nang naih semsem in;
Kiniam khiak' hiai ka chi ding;
'Pa, Nang thu hi hen',
Gimthuakna ah kisin in,
Dahna meipi hongkai chiang';
Itna'n na khut kuansak ding,
Nang naih semsem in!
Toupa, Nang naih hongpai ing,
Pathian hinna vak;
Nopna, muanna, keia hi,
Nuamsa Tapa vang';
Na itna ah hon tengsak',
Na kiang nai ah hon omsak,
Tangtawn suangpi ah buin,
Nang naih semsem in!
Nektak tamna gam ka tungta,
A hauhnate tengteng keia;
Hia'h nopna ni vak tawntung hi,
Ka jan mial bei khin ahih man'.
Aw Biulah Gam nuam! Biulah Gam,
Na mual sangpen tung-a dingin;
Tuipi gal lampek ka en a,
Tua Innpi kei ding' bawlsa om!
A gam thupi tangpha ka mu,
Thangvan ka ten tawntungna ding.
Ka Hondampa'n hon tonpih a,
Amah tawh nuam in kithuah ung;
A khut-a lenin hontonpih,
Van gamgi a om ka hih man'.
Gim namtui huihkhi in honlen,
A nou tawntung singte panin;
A vul ngeilou pakte a pak,
Hinna tuisik a luanna ah.
Thangvan mite' lasak ging hoih,
Huihkhi nemin ka kiang hontun;
Angel leh puanpak silh tampi'n,
Suahtakna la ngaih sa uhi.

songs.title: Sunni Chin In I Om Na Hiam?
songs.author: E E Hewitt

lines: Sunni chin in i om na hiam,
Vak tate om ding bangin;
Mial nasepte leh jan khomialte
Paikhia a delh mangin?
Tunglam apan nitang manbei
I deih man i nusia hiam?
Hondampa itna lamdang,
Ni tang siang leh hoih deih man in?
Vak tate om ding bangin,
I om hiam A mitmuh in;
Jesu sisan pha-in,
I puansilhte i sawpsiangta hiam?
Thupina lam juanin
I paina hiam vak tate bangin?
Kingainiamin i om na hiam?
Vak tate om ding bangin,
Nat leh dahna khawvel ah khelhna
Hatna kigawmna ah?;
Lampi mial leh sia a vakmang
Mite zongin i om hiam?
Tangtawn ni bei ngeilou
Thupina di'n amau i man hiam?
Kipak in i late sa ni,
Vak tate sak ding bangin;
A hotdamna kipahna in,
I lung leh mai taisak hen;
Aw khialte'n a ngaikhe ding uh
Tangthupha i hontut pen;
Huan, eite toh Kumpipa
Khua lam ah Jesu zui ding uh.
Khristian pawlte gamla, nai pan,
Jesu pan sinding in paikhawm;
Lametna leh nopnaa dim,
A Laisiangthou simkhawm dingin.
A min a hia' kikhawm,
Lungtup leh sep kibang;
A min lian phuangzak le'ng,
Tua ah kipak' ding le'ng;
Pathian leh i gam di'n,
I theihtawp suah chiat le'ng;
Ei Khristian pawlte
Amah vualzawl di'n thum le'ng.
I kikhawm hia'h phatla sa di'n,
I kumpipa Khrist phatna la;
Khangnoute'n zong a muh na'ng un,
Tangtawn hinna tawplou lampi.
I Toupa' nna leia i sep,
Sem zel dingin hia'h i kichiam;
A itna muang, Amah zui ding,
Tung thangvan-a honpi tanpha'n.
Na sem ni! na sem ni!
Pathian na sem ni hang,
I Toupa sep bang semin a paina zui ni;
I tha hatsak kik ding' A hihna damna hi;
Sep ding i tuahte khempeuh theihtawpin sem ni.
Na sem ni! semsem ni!
Na sem ni! semsem ni!
Lamen ni, kiging ni,
Toupa hongpai mateng sem ni.
Na sem ni! na sem ni!
A gilkialte vaak ni,
A tawlte Hinna tuikhuk ah va pi ve ni;
Khros leh a puanlap ah i thupina om ding,
'Aman bei hotdamna!' chiin tangkou lehang.
Na sem ni! na sem ni!
Michiha ding' na om;
Mialna leh khelhna gam puk ding ahihman in,
Tua chiangin Jehovah min pahtawiin om ding;
'Aman bei hotdamna!' chia kisak chiangin.
Na sem ni! na sem ni!
Toupa thahatna tawh;
Sepgim man kumpi puan leh lukhu i sang ding,
Amuan huaite innpi sung i ten chiang in ah,
'Aman bei hotdamna!' chi'n tatte tawh awng ding!

songs.title: Pathian Hia'H Om, Hon Vualzawl Din
songs.author: James L Black

lines: Pathian hia'h om, hon vualzawl di'n,
Hinna pia Kha hatna tawh;
En un, meipi hong niam kaita,
Vualzawl vuah zusak di'n ngak.
Zusak in, Toupa hon ngen ung,
Vualzawl vuahpi zusak in;
Kouten ngak ung, hia'h nangak ung,
Miteng lungtang halhsak aw.
Pathian hia'h om! A omthei hang,
Kisiansuahsa hiai mun ah;
Hih hang A hehpih manbeia,
Kha halhsakna ngai hi hang.
Pathian hia'h om! Gingta kawmin,
I lunggulh A kiang' ngen le'ng;
A itna mei tu'n kuang henla,
I lungsung kuang sak leh aw.
Honpa aw, kon' nget uh honpia'n,
Ginna mawlchik tawh kun-ung;
Na zahngaihna tawhlet pan in,
Vualzawlna hon buaksuk aw.
Aw Jesu' itna, itna thuk,
Tuibang ching singta'n lelmawh;
Tuipi kihawt kimvel bangin,
Kei dingin hongluangkheta;
Ka kimkot ka heina peuhah,
Non itna'n gawl bang hon um;
Machiang honsuan khaubang chiah lai',
Tutkhawlna nuam manawh in.
Aw Jesu' itna , itna thuk,
Phatna'n simlei luansuak hen;
Lailung anbang itnain dim,
Tangtawnin tul ngeilou hi;
Anbang itna banjal honhuai,
Hon it manin kha hongpham;
Mimbang honthumsak thangvan ah,
Mangtutphah pan in honveng.
Aw Jesu' itna, itna thuk,
Tangbang phabel itna hi;
Nunnop teng libang chinna hi,
Zaitha tawl tutkhawlna hi;
Aw Jesu' itna, itna thuk,
Kei di'n van nuam penpen hi;
Na manna gam ah tuang hontun'
Na nen ah tuibang honjawl.
Aw, ka lawmte, en un puanlap,
Tung ah hongkipei!
Honpanpih ding tu'n hongkimu,
Vualzawlna naita!
'Dingkip un , Kei ka hongpai hi',
Chi'n Jesu'n hon hilh;
Tunglam ah dawnna petou un,
'Hehpihna'n ding ding.'
En un, sepaih hatte'n masuan,
Setan in makai;
I kim ah mihatte puk e,
Hansanna bei phial!
En un, puanlap thupi kipei,
Ngai un! pengkul ging;
I Pipa' min-a vualzou ding,
Melma teng tung ah.
Kidouna uang in sawt mahmah,
Hizong panpih nai;
I Makaipa hat hong naita,
Lawmte aw, nuam un!
Sunni tum nawnlou gam ah,
'Killinei khuapi' om;
Tua khopi bei ngeilou ding,
Tua ah 'janmial om lou'.
Pathian in 'khitui nul ding,'
Sihna, natna, launa bei;
Lenkum kivei nawnlou ding,
Tua ah 'jan mial om lou.'
Suang mantam in bawl kongkhak,
'Killinei khopi' om;
Sana-in bawl kongzing te,
Tua ah 'jan mial om lou'.
A kong kikhak ngeilou ding,
'Killinei khopi ah;
Hinna tuisiang tua ah luang,
Tua ah 'jan mial omlou'.
Sunni tang ngai nawnlou uh,
'Killinei khopi' ah;
Belamnou nibang tang a,
Tua ah 'jan mial om lou.'
Sande skul ah kaive ni,
Mi chih a dinga hoih hi;
Aneu alian kai diamdiam ni,
Numei pasal ading hi.
Hong pai un, a hoih hi,
I gam ah dawnsuang hen la;
Hiai thu eia di'n hoih;
I nam ading a hoih hi.
Bible sim in a ngaihtuah uh,
Pathian leh mihing thu hoih,
Thu baihlam ei theihkham leng om,
A thuk leng Pathian lungsim.
Toupa Jesu thu hoih deihhuai,
Hotdamna lampi honhilh;
Damlai hindan hoih honhilh hi,
Sih muan theih na honhilh hi.

songs.title: Tu A Vualzou A Zou Jel Ding
songs.author: S Martin

lines: Tu-a vualzoua zoujel dingin,
Kumpi thahatin kuan hi;
Aman a muanhuaite A pii jel,
Kidouna phual sungah pii;
Hang in malam suan uh, en in,
A galvante uh ate;
A Piipa uh min sial uh hi,
A thugen uh ngai him in.
'Douna hatte zoh hi tuanlou;
Taina kinten zou tuanlou;
Dikte leh muanhuaite dingin,
Hehpihnain zohna chiam'.
'Tu-a vualzoua zoujel dingpa,
Hiai Kumpi lamdang kua hiam?
A pii sepaihte koi pan hi hiam,
A thupina a sak uh?'
Amah eite Toupa, Tanpa,
Hondampa, Kumpi Pathian;
Amaute aksi a gam a
Kumkhua a tang ding hi uh.
Tu-a vualzou a zoujel dingpa,
Jesu, Nang miteng vaihawm;
Mangtutphah leh lalchiangte mang ding,
Manglukhu thupi ke ding;
Atawp pha a muanhuai leh dik,
Na sepaih na huaiten bel,
Na innpi ah tangtawn khawlna,
Ngah ding gal azoh chiang' un.
Aw, ka lungsung janmial in hontuam kimvel,
Ka lungkhamna tuipi bangin lian;
Ka Hondampa'n hongmu, ka kha a vaksak,
Mialna hawlmangta, hon damsakta.
Kei adi'n Kalvari tanpha'n a hongpai,
Kei ading in, kei ading in;
Kei adi'n Kalvari tanpha'n a hongpai,
A si, hon honkhia ding'.
Mikhial A maiah ling kawmkawmin ka kun,
A itna ngaihdamna ka theilou;
A aw nem ka ja hi, 'Lungkham nawnkei in,
Na leibat ka pia, kon ngaidamta.'
Aw, Hondampa honglah itna lamdang hi,
Mangtutphah nusia'n Kalvari juan;
Gim a thuak laiin Amah kiain a thuak,
A min phat tawntungin phuangjak un.
Aw, nou Toupa hongpaina ding ngakte aw,
A hongpai ni ding gen kimvel un;
Gamchih leh munchih ah pai kimvel unla,
A hongpai dekta, chiin gen un.
Ni chiamte a naita, a hongpai dekta,
Nite a kiam, hun a tomta;
Tatsate'n lem hen A hongpaina pakin,
Namchih kiman uhen.
Aw, nou Toupa hongpaina ding ngakte aw,
Ihmute phawng un, thu ngetsak un;
Van-a Mouneipa a hongtung pah ding hi,
En un vaibang tham sawtlou ding hi.
Zion Toupa thupipen i phat ding uh,
Zawlneite'n zong ana gen uhi;
Van Angelte aw, zaila'n Toupa phat un,
A maiah kipahthute gen un.

songs.title: Nang Kon It Zaw Ka Thei Toupa
songs.author: Frances R Havergal (Arr.)

lines: Nang kon itzaw, ka thei, Toupa,
Lei pahna bangteng sang';
Lungmuanna lah N'on peta a,
Bangmah hihsiat theihlouh.
A kimkhat kigen ngeilou lai,
Itna kim manneilou!
A kimkhat kigen ngeilou lai,
Sisan kei honsiangsak.
Nang na naizaw nak chih ka thei,
Leimi kuamah dang sang';
Nangmah ngaihtuahna a nuamzaw,
La hoih bangmah sangin.
Nang ka lung ah pahna Na koih,
Kipak ding mah ka hi;
Na itna thuguk pang louin,
Dah lou thei lou ding mah.
Aw, Hondampa manpha keia,
Na omna nuam na'n chia;
Leia damsung Nang toh om bawn,
Kipahna'n a zuih leh.
Bangdia lungkhama om?
Bangdia nguia om?
Pahna ngaihtuahnain
Honnuamsak lou maw?
Khelhna lungkhamnain,
Na puak giklua hiam?
Jesu' hoihna ngaihtua'n,
Honsiangsak thei hi.
Aw nang, van gouluah ding,
A itna ngaihtua'n;
A hehpihna zoujai,
Na neih di'n honpia.

songs.title: I Long Inn Lam Juanin Paisak Un
songs.author: Fanny J Crosby

lines: I long inn lam juanin paisak un,
Tui tung' lametna puan jak un;
Ei hon ngak lawmte ngaihtuah dih un,
Long khawl chiang-a ei zong tua' khawl ding!
Sepgim leh khitui nul a bei chiangin,
Khawlna nuam ni tanna' ki mukhawm ding;
Tatsa mi tampite' pahlasak i za ding,
A nuamsate innpi-a tengkhawm ding.
I long inn lam juanin paisak un,
Lau louin i pai jel ding uh;
Longkhawlna muanna i naih chiangin,
Longkhawlna meivakte i thei ding.
Tenna ding i Gam kilawm mahmah,
Tua gam in pak hoih puanin nei;
Tua ah ei hon Itpa leh Tanpa,
Phatna la kipakin i sa ding.
Tua Gam pan' huihkhi leng damtuam hi,
Tua Gam jing khovak hoih tuam hi;
Tua ah dahna, natna, sihna bei,
Tua ah it leh ngaih mu pahta ding.
Van laukha siangthou, hon ngai ung,
Tu'n koute hong halh sak in;
Bah sawt lua ung e, hong veh in,
Michih lung sung hong luah in hong phawnghalh in.
Nangmah-a Na mite a kipah theih na ding un,
Nangmah-a Na mite a kipah theih na ding un;
Na hong hih halh nawn kei dia hia, Toupa aw?
Van Laukha Siangthou, Meikuang bang',
Hong leng in, koute sung ah;
Lungsung khelhna'n khimbang jing hi,
Hong haalsiangin, hong siangthousak chiatta in.
Van Laukha Siangthou, Huihpi bang',
Hong nung in, koute kiang ah;
Mawhna tawh kidim mite kiang',
Pentecost ni bangin hong kilak in aw.

songs.title: I Pa Hehpihna Vak Hong Tang
songs.author: P P Bliss

lines: I Pa hehpihna vak hongtang,
A inn vak gige apan;
Hizong ei ven di'n honpia hi,
Tuipa geia meivakte.
Meivak nuainungte kuangsakin;
Tui kihawt khen pha'n tanin!
Tuimi bah leh laitat khattou,
Huin na hondam kha thei.
Gitlouhna janmial hongtungta,
Tuipi kilok ging honhon;
Lungkhamte'n ngaiin mitmei suan,
Tuipi geia meivakte.
Unau, na meivak kemhoih in,
Tuimi kuahiam huihpi'n nuai;
Longkhawlna tun teitei tum hi,
Miallak ah mangthang kha'n teh.
Khristian unau kikhen ma'n
Lungsim leh aw gawmkhawmin;
I Pa, Pathian phatin,
Phatna, pahna la sa ni.
Tu'n van Pathian na kiang ah,
Thupi-denna piak hihen;
Non it man' kipak ung e,
Ka lungtang uh nang neiin.

songs.title: Pa Siangthou Kon Sap Hon Ja'n
songs.author: Danforth

lines: Pa siangthou, konsap honja'n,
Honpa siangthou, bil hondoh'n;
Khasiangthou, Nang hongnai in,
Pa, Honpa kha hon ja in.
Pa, ka khelhna pan honhu'n,
Honpa na zahngaih konngen;
Hehpih thei Kha, honsiang sak,
Pa, Ta, Kha, honhondam in.
Pa, na itna hon chiamsak',
Honpa, muanna'n hon dimsak',
Khasiang, ka lung phawnghalh in,
Pa, Ta, Kha, honvualzawl in.
Khrist ka hauhsakna hi,
Ka damna, ka hinna tuikhuk;
Ka poimawh chiteng honpia honneisak,
A mite' dingin thilhoih a it ngeilou.
Khattang in om keng,
Honheisan ngei himhim lou ding;
Ka poimawh chiteng honpia honneisak,
A mite' dingin thilhoih a it ngeilou.
Khrist ka sianthouna hi,
Ka dikna, ka khelh ngaihdamna;
Ka poimawh chiteng honpia honneisak,
A mite' dingin thilhoih a it ngeilou.
Khrist ka thupina hi,
Pahtawia ka omsam theihna'ng;
Ka poimawh chiteng honpia honneisak,
A mite' dingin thilhoih a it ngeilou.

songs.title: Na Khelh Puakgik Pua Jesu Ding
songs.author: El Nathan

lines: Na khelh puakgik pua Jesu ding'
Ten nading mun na nei hiam?
Na lungsung kong hongkiuh lai-in,
Khial aw, na lutsak ding hiam?
Thupi Kumpi Jesu ding mun!
Thumang in mun pemeng in;
Na lungsung kong na hon in la,
Hon ngaklai samlut mengin.
Kilhbelh Jesu na lungsung a
Teng nuam in nang ding sizou;
Nopna leh sum zon na'ng mun om,
Jesu ding zong omlou hiam?
Jesu ading mun na nei hiam?
Hehpiha honsap laitak;
Aw tuni hun kipahhuai hi,
Jingchiang sapna'n laplou thei.
Tu'n Jesu na hun leh mun pia'n,
Hehpihna hun beipah ding;
Na lungtang khauhgawp pah ding a,
Honpa'n hong sam nawnlou thei.
Honpak veng e, Honpa manpha,
Na itna'n honman zenzen;
Kei non hondam, siangsak, dimsak,
Na vualzawl luanna hi ding'!
A luanna lel, Toupa manpha,
Hihhang, Na vangletna teng,
Koute tawn' luangsak' nonzang thei,
Ani teng leh hun teng in.
Vanzat leltak, vualzawlna' dim,
A dangtak khempeuhte' di'n;
Na hotdamna kim gen ding leh,
Na itna thu tangkou ding.
Non dimsak di'n ki-awngsak ing,
Na khut a bel siang hi di'n;
Thupiak teng tawh Non piak loungal,
Vangletna ken neilou hi'ng.
Na hot theihna vanglian lakin,
Sa leh mawhna pan khahin;
Nang adi'n non leizouta a,
Na kichinna'n hongluah in.
Jesu, tu'n Na Kha'n dimsak in,
Kipumpiakkhin lungtangte;
Mihinna sungnung apan a,
Tuihing luite luangsak di'n.

songs.title: A Va Kikhum Bang Sal In Ka Tang
songs.author: A E B

lines: A va kikhum bang salin ka tang,
Ka lungkhamna pan suakta zou ke'ng;
Hihhang Jesu'n ka thum ka mau za.
Pathian thupi hen, Hon suaktasak.
Hon suaktasak, Hon suaktasak,
Ka kolbutte Ama'n tansakta;
Thupi sam ding, ka Jesu mu ding,
Pathian thupi hen, hon suaktasak.
Nisim a sang semsem ka tung a,
Jankhomial beivek, mialna omlou;
A sangjaw mun ah kei ka ding a,
Pathian thupi hen inn juan hita'ng.
Khelhna leh honbuaisakte, mangpha,
Leitung thilin sulkiksak lou ding;
Nisim ka sem a, nisim ka thum,
Pathian thupi hen, paisuak ding hi'ng.

songs.title: Ka Na Tum Thuk Mohna Ah
songs.author: James Rowe And F S Tunney

lines: Ka na-tum thuk mawhna ah,
Thou nawnlou dia tum thuk;
Sunglam mawhna'n tuam zouta,
Zahngaihna ka na-ngen;
Huan, tuipi Heutupa in,
Lungkham ka kap a ja;
Khrist Hondampa'n hondomkang, tuin ka bit.
Itna'n hondom! Itna'n hondom!
Khrist lou kua'n hondam theilou;
Itna' hondom! Itna'n hondom!
Itna'n hondom! Khrist lou kuan hondam theilou
Itna'n hondom!
Lunglaute aw, entou un,
Jesu'n hondam siang vek;
A itna'n nang hondom ding,
Tui kihawt lauhuai pan;
Tuipi heutupa ahi,
Tuipite'n A thu mang;
Na Hondampa ahi nuam, Kihondamsak'.
Lungkham tuipi kihawh chiang',
Mangbang a ka om chiang;
Jesu'n ka khut a len a,
Vual honzawl nuam gige,
Launa teng a delhmang ding,
Taksap teng a pe ding;
A itna' sap limsakte'n, Khawlna mu uh.
Jing dam kawl ninou suak pan bang,
Daitui thak siang sensen bang;
Jesu tong dam nem tuang hongtung,
Lungmuan nou ngiingei juaulou;
Jan khawmial sun khawvak hongsuak.
A aw nem nou ka jak lai,
Thangvan halhna hunte hong tung,
Nuama kipahna thak pia.
Lamet thu huau, angelte' zaila ngaih bang,
Jesu na itna kei ding' la ngaihpen.
Ngaihdamna zaila ngaih sa in,
Ka lungsung ah ka ja a;
Jesu'n nuaisiah zou tangtawn in,
Mawhna leh anuai siahna;
Galdou dia hansuah thu huau in,
Na hon ngai ka thum lai in;
Toupa thupi pen leh thou nawn ,
Aw Nang ka hon pak tuni'n.
Lamet sikkip hi hon kem ding,
Kip leh muanhuai a len in;
Lamet in siangthouna hontun,
A si in hon siangsak a;
A hongpai na lametna huau,
A thu ah ka lunglawp a!
Aw kiging leh ngak a om ding,
Toupa dawn dia mansain.

songs.title: Khrist Ei Hon Tanpa Khros Tungah Si
songs.author: John

lines: Khrist ei hon Tanpa khros tungah si,
Mikhial tanga si, a bat teng sut;
Amah sangte ding' lau ding beita,
Ama'n nang hon paikan, paikan ding.
Sisan ka muh chiang',
Sisan ka muh chiang';
Sisan ka muh chiang',
Nang kon paikan ding, kon paikan ding.
Akhial phapen Jesu'n hodam thei,
Aman a chiamsa bangbang hih ding;
Khial aw, A thu ngai inla, muangin,.
Ama'n nang hon paikan, paikan ding.
Mi khempeuh thukhenna hongtung ding,
Amah nial, Amah deihloute ding';
Khial aw, kin meng in, Jesu sang in,
Pathian in hon paikan, paikan ding.
Lainatna lian e, itna kiching!
Jesu'n vangletna nei, diktat lai;
Amah muangte huihpi pan bit hi,
Ama'n nang hon paikan, paikan ding.

songs.title: Lamtawn In Jesu Ka Zui Jel Ding
songs.author: Rev C Saikhuma

lines: Lamtawnin Jesu ka zui jel ding,
A hon itpa ahih manin;
Ka hondampa dia ka pomtak jiakin,
Lamtawnin Jesu ka zui jel ding.
Lamtawnin Jesu ka zui jel ding:
Van-gam hon tunpih ding chih ka thei hi,
Thupina tawh A hongpai nawn chiangin,.
Tangtawnin A kiangah ka khawl ding.
Lamtawnin Jesu ka zui jel ding,
Haksatna huihpi hongnung zong;
A hatna thagui ka lenden ding a,
Ka khelhna paisan in ka jui ding.
Lamtawnin Jesu ka zui jel ding,
Kha Siangthou in honpi ding hi;
Hon hihsiangthou hi, Amah bang dingin,
Van-gam ah hihthupi ka hi ding.
Lamtawnin Jesu ka zui jel ding,
Mite'n hon simmoh mah lezong;
Ka Hondampa dia ka pomtak ziakin,
Tangtawnin A kiangah ka khawl ding.

songs.title: Banghanga Angelte Biakpa Pen In Ah
songs.author: Londonderry Air

lines: Banghanga angelte' Biakpa pen in ah,
Mihingte a it theih ken gen thei keng;
Banghanga Belamchingpa bang vakvaite,
Pikik dinga a zon , ken gen thei keng;
Hihhang ka thei: Mari sung pan hongsuak a,
Beth-lehem gankuang sung inn in neia,
Nazareth ah tengin semgim mahmah a,
Tuabangin vannuai Honpa,Honpa hongpai hi.
Daidide-a a thuakdan ken gen thei keng,
Khitui luanna muna honlungmuan lai';
Khros tung a lungtang tapkhap dan gen thei keng,
Kum sawmthum leh thum dong natna a thuak;
Hihhang ka thei: Lungtang tamkhamte damsak,
Khelhna beisak, launa zong thengsak a,
Van-gik puate' van gikpi zong sangkhia a,
Tuabangin vannuai Honpa, Honpa hia'h hong om.
Bangchi'n namte zouzou ding, ken gen thei keng,
Bangchi'n a leigou hongluah zou ding hiam;
Bangchi'n suah, tum, khial leh misiangte' taksap
Leh lunggulh lamet peding, gen thei keng;
Hihhang ka thei: A thupina mu kim ding,
A chipawi gahte Ama'n at ding hi;
Nopni hongsuah chiang' tangpha mahmah ding a,
Vannuai Honpa, Honpa hihna kitheih chiangin.
Bangchi'n vannuai in bia ding, ken gen thei keng,
Ama' sawla huihpi teng then chiangin;
Lungnopna bangzah lian ding, ken gen theikeng,
Mi khempeuh itna tawh kidim chiangin;
Hihhang ka thei: Vante lungnuam mahmah ding,
Mi tul-then tampite'n la a sak chiang';
Lei leh van kidawngin zaila in awi ding;
Vannuai Honpa, Honpa Kumpipa honghih chiang!
Saptuam ki-ngakna Toupa khat hi,
Ginna khat leh Baptisna zong khat;
I Pathian Kha leh si-a siansak,
Ginna-a dik tanga baptis hi.
Baptisna tang kipahpi'n,
Aw Toupa ka Pathian,
Sih dongin Nanga hong hita hen,
Ginna leh thu taka khanglian a,
Khrist leh A saptuam diading kip-in;
Thutak gum, lenkipa jui jel di'n,
Hinna Manglukhu a khuk dongin.
Toupa, Nang ngeiin vualzawl jel in,
Damlai nite Nang dia zang hoih in;
Galdouna leh lau huaina mun ah,
Aw Pathian Na Kha-in thuam jel in.

songs.title: Khanglou Aw, Lei Leh Bangkim
songs.key: Doh is Eb Chang khatna sakika zat ding

lines: Khanglou aw, lei leh bangkim,
Lungnop konpuak uh ngai un;
Tujan' thilsiamte'n sa un,
Van leh aksi tengteng tawh,
I kimkot pan mialna beita,
Leitung pan ni hongsuakta;
Jankhua'n tang hi, sun bei zong.
Honbia ung Ni, Vak nuamsa,
Tuja'n leitung teng tan in;
Na itna leh vangletna,
Koute' lungsung hongtang hen;
Pathian Mihing na hi taktak,
Thei ung, kamin hon gum ung,
Honbia ung, Diktatna Ni.
Tuja'n tangphain siangpha,
Angelte'n, Lau kei un, chi;
Khutbeng nakpi'n kikou un,
Naupangte aw, khanglou un,
'Tung sangah Pathian thupi hen,
Lei mite lak lem leng hen,'
Naupangte'n sa un, 'Amen'.
Na thupi na tampi kigen,
Kou Pathian khawpi Zion;
A thuchiam pel ngeiloupa in,
Ama' tenna'ng honbawl hi.
Tangtawn Suangpi tung a kinga,
Bangin hon lingsak ding hiam?
Hotdamna kulhpi a ki um,
Gal khempeuh na lau kei ding,
Hotdamna kulhpi a ki um,
Gal khempeuh na lau kei ding.
Tangtawn Suangpi tung a kinga,
Bangin hon lingsak ding hiam?
Hotdamna kulhpi a ki um,
Gal khempeuh na lau kei ding.
En in, hinna tuite a luang,
Tangtawn itna pan nak nei;
Nangma' tate khempeuh in dawn,
Gilkial, dangtak lau beisak,
Dangtak khempeuh di'n tua tuiluang,
Kuahiam dangtaka bah ding?
Hehpihna A pia pa bangin
Tangtawn dongin om den hi.
Hehpihna A pia pa bangin
Tangtawn dongin om den hi.
Hehpihna A pia pa bangin
Tangtawn dongin om den hi.
Hehpihna A pia pa bangin
Tangtawn dongin om den hi.
Tua tenna mun khempeuh tung ah,
Meikuang leh meipi kilak;
Vangletna leh bitna ding hi,
Toupa hong ompihna hi.
Sunchin ma-na honpia Amah,
I kouh hon Dawngpa Amah,
Amah phatna Hosana chih,
Amangtutphah tung tou hen.
Amah phatna Hosana chih,
Amangtutphah tung tou hen.
Amah phatna Hosana chih,
Amangtutphah tung tou hen.
Amah phatna Hosana chih,
Amangtutphah tung tou hen.
Hondampa non hehpih man a,
Tua khopi sung no'n piak leh;
Leitungin hon simmawh hang in,
Na min kia ka suang ding hi.
Leitung nop na mangthang tawntung;
A vangletna khempeuh tawh.
A tawntung lungdamna taktak,
Zion tate kia'n nei hi.
A tawntung lungdamna taktak,
Zion tate kia'n nei hi.
A tawntung lungdamna taktak,
Zion tate kia'n nei hi.
A tawntung lungdamna taktak,
Zion tate kia'n nei hi.
Na muanhuaina a lian, aw Pathian, ka Pa,
Thukhel lungsim Nang na nei ngeilou hi;
Nang dang tuan ngeilou, Na itna juau ngeilou,
Na omngei bangin na omden ding.
Na muanhuaina a lian!(2)
Nisuak simin na itna thak ka mu;
Ka taksap khempeuh na khut pan nong pia hi,
Na muanhuaina a lian, Toupa kei di'n.
Nipi leh Phalbi leh Tuk leh Khalte leh
Tung a ni leh kha leh aksite in;
Lei thilsiam khempeuh toh lam tampi'n theisak,
Na muanhuaina, zahngaihna leh itna.
Mawhna ngaihdamna leh muanna omden ding,
Hon kipaksak, honpi di'n non ompih;
Tuni ading hatna, jing ading lamet,
Vualzawlna teng keia, sangsawm dang tawh.
Khatvei khelhnaa si,
Lametna teng zong si;
Tu'n khelhna sihsan ta'ng,
Jesu tawh kilhlupkhawm.
Lawmlawm, 'Ama'n kei hon it a,
Kei dia hong kipia' maw?
Lawmlawm! 'Ama'n kei hon it a,
Kei dia hong kipia' maw?
A sandan bat phaklouh,
A thukdan teh theihlouh;
Aw itna tawp neilou,
Ka Tanpa ah mu ta'ng.
Ama' maitam tunga,
Itna kuangsak dia lawm;
Jesu heisan thei zaw,
Pahdan theilou mah hi.
Ka hing, kei bel hilou,
Khrist kei sung a hing hi;
Khelhna dan leh sihna
Pan hon suaktasakpa.
Jesu' hehpihna lamdang,
Ka khelhna sang' lianzaw;
Ka leiin bangchi'n gen ding,
A phatna kaw' pan ding?
Ka puakgik a lamang a,
Ka kha a suaktasak;
Jesu' hehpihna lamdang in kei zong honban.
Jesu' hehpihna tehpih bei, tehpihbeia lamdang,
Tuipi thukpen sang zong thukzaw hi;
Hehpihna lamdang kiching kei ding', kei nangawn ading',
Ka tatlekna tengteng sang' lianzaw hi,
Ka khelh leh zumna tengteng khuhzou;
Aw Jesu' min manpha liansak un,
A min siang phat un.
Jesu' hehpihna lamdang,
Mangthang teng kiang hongtung,
Tua hehpihna' ngaihdam hi'ng;
Ka pumpia hotdam;
Ka tanna kol tanta hi,
Suahtakna honpia hi,
Jesu' hehpihna lamdang in kei zong honban.
Jesu' hehpihna lamdang,
A nin phapen zong huai;
Thilhihtheihna lamdang,
Pathian' ta-in honbawl;
Muanna leh van honleisak'
Tangtawn ading in pia,
Jesu' hehpihna lamdang in kei zong honban.

songs.title: Leiah Lawmvual Nuam In Ki Mu Hang
songs.author: E W Chapman

lines: Leiah lawmvual nuam in kimu hang,
Nite tomin thei hang;
Hizong lungsim dahna hongtung jel,
Mangpha, chih kul jel hi.
Mangpha, chi ngeilou ding, van ah,
Mangpha, chi ngeilou ding;
Tua gam kilawm nopla sakna',
Mangpha, chi ngeilou ding.
Sihna'n it leh ngaihte honkhen zong,
Lametna in honnem;
Leia sepgim a bei vek chiangin,
Omkhawm tawntungta ding.
Gibang khenna simthu lel lou ding,
Thangvan inn kilawm ah;
Nopna, pahna, muanna la ngaihpen,
Thangvan ah tawplou ding.

songs.title: Miallak Tuipi Kilok Pan Kikou Aw In
songs.author: Chas H Gabriel (Arr)

lines: Miallak tuipi kilok pan kikou aw in:
'Meivak hongpuak un!' chi;
Miallak hotdamna ngaia chimawhte in:
'Meivak hong puak un!' chi.
Vapuak ni, gospel meivak tangpha!
Tuipi mong dong tangsuak hen!
Vapuak ni, gospel meivak tangpha!
Tawlnga louin tangden hen!
Makedonia gam pana sapna aw in:
'Meivak hongpuak un!' chi;
Khros bula i biakna thawnpiak nga kawmin,
Meivak va puak ve ni!
Jesu' hon hehpihna mite' ngahkim na'ng,
Meivak vapuak ve ni!
Khrist lungsim bangbang mite' neih kim na'ng in,
Meivak vapuak ve ni!
Eite'n itna nasep chimtak ngeilouin
Meivak vapuak ve ni!
I manglukhu zep na'ng suangmanpha khawm in,
Meivak vapuak ve ni!

songs.title: Luigal Khat A Gamte Kilawm Mahmah
songs.author: G F Root

lines: Luigal khat a gamte kilawm mahmah!
Zatam kikhawmte thupi mahmah!
Hizong vana itna, thupina-a dim,
Hon Gumpa banga pha kuahiam om?
Aw, Amah sangsawm lai a tungnungpen!
A phatna nuam in tuipi bang luang!
Amah hoihkimin deihhuai kim tungtuang hi!
Chih i lungnop la hiden ding hi.
Amah hoihkim in deihhuai kim tungtuang!
Ama'n tongdam nem in nang honsam;
Ka kha banghang A hotdamna thupi lua,
Ki ching, manbei, hontah sanglou ding?
Amah hoihkimin deihhuaikim tungtuang!
A tongdam ngaiin nang hon samlai:
'nou semgim leh puakgik pawte hongpai un,
Keiman van-gik pi honsang ning' chi.

songs.title: Mimang Zongin He
songs.author: W A Ogden
songs.key: Doh is Bb (Khuang thuma sak ding)

lines: Mimang zongin, he, kamsiam in jawlin,
Mualsang tunglama mang lamhaihte;
'Ka kiang hongpai un,'
A chih gengen un;
Heutupa' thute tuni'n gen un.
Gamla kuan un,
Mualsang tunglam ah,
Vakvaite hon pikik nawn un, pinawn un;
Ei hon Tanpa, Jesu, Belamnou,
Khialte' dia thah, Huangsung nuam ah,
Huangsung nuam ah.
Mimang zongin, Jesu amau musak,
Mi hatloute, lungkham leh dahte;
Hotdamna lampi ah amau piin,
Tangtawn hinna lampi musakin.
Tuabang hehpihna Thu genin kuanni,
Nisima Khrist nungjui gigein;
Lungkiate halhsakin, pukte phongin,
Mangthangte hilhin, Jesu Lampi.
I Pa Pathian, itna ahi,
Zahngaihna'n i lam hon taan;
Nopna piain dahna nem zel,
Pathian, itna leh vak hi.
Pathian, itna leh vak hi,
Pathian, itna leh vak hi!
Bangkim kidang in vul mengmeng,
Mihing vuai meng, kum paipai;
Hizong A zahngaihna kiam tuanlou,
Pathian, itna leh vak hi.
Lungkhamna mialin hontuam zong,
A chitna hoihna kiam lou;
Miallak pan A vakna tangkhia,
Pathian, itna leh vak hi.
Lungkham mangbat i chihte'n zong,
A hehpihna kilangsak;
I Pathian dangtuan thei ngeilou,
Pathian itna leh vak hi.
Toupa Nang kon zuan,
Ka nun na hong siamthak in;
Na zahngaihna hong luangkhia ka muh in,
Toupa ka thei ta;
Kei a hatlouh na om tengtengte,
Hong maisak in aw;
Na itna hih theihna'n.
Honlen in na itna'n in hon len in,
Hong pi in na angsung nuam ah;
Nang kong ngak hi,
Muvanlai bang i leng ding,
Na kha'n honpi inla,
Nang toh ka leng ding hi;
Na itna hih theihna'n.
Toupa munuam ing,
Na mai ah hong munuam ing;
Na itna theinuam ing, kei sung teng ding in,
Toupa hong siamthak;
Nisim a khangsem thei ding in,
Na deih bang kei sung ah;
Na itna hih theihna'n.
Toupa hoih hi Toupa lian hi,
Lungkham hunin hong huh a
Amah kiangah abel mite,
Aman limtak hong keem hi.
Hong phatning maw
Toupa hong phat ning
Na vangletna lamdang sii
Thukin zai veh lamdang hong itna
Ka belh suangpi Tou Jesu.
Lungsim tamkham lamet beite,
Meigong tagah gentheite
Leivui panin hong laamtou a,
Jesu hong itna bek hi.
Khasiangthou mit hong vaksakta,
Itna khuttoh hong leen a
Kei nongsap leh kong dawng ding a,
Ka thusim kong hilh ding chi.

songs.title: Van A Pa Aw Nang Kong Pahtawi Uhi

lines: Van a Pa aw nang kong pahtawi uh hi,
Van a Pa aw nang kong pahtawi uh hi,
Hong it ung, hongbia ung,
Na mai ah hongkun ung;
Van a Pa aw nang kong pahtawi uh hi.
Pasian ta aw na min hong liansak ung,
Pasian ta aw na min hong liansak ung,
Mawhna pan nong sawp a,
Kha Siangthou nong guan zou;
Pasian ta aw, na min hong liansak ung.
Kha Siangthou lamdang hehnempa na hi,
Kha Siangthou lamdang hehnempa na hi,
Ka lampi nong hilh a,
Ka sung ah nong teeng zou;
Kha Siangthou lamdang hehnempa na hi.
Toupa Na itna khuavak hongtaang,
Leitung khuamialna lakah hongtaang;
Leitung vak Jesu taang in koute tung,
Nong puak thutakin hong suaktasak in,
Kei tungah hongtaang in.
Taang in Jesu Pa thupina'n hiai gam dimsak in,
Kha aw kuang in, koute lung kuangsak;
Hehpih zahngaihna tuipiin namte tumsuak in,
Toupa Na Thu pia'n khuavak hong om hen.
Toupa Na omna mun kong zuan hi,
Limliap pan Na melvak thupi ah;
Sisan vang in Na vak sung tum thei hi'ng,
Hong entel in ka mialna halsiang in,
Kei tung ah hongtaang in.
Na Kumpina taang pha kong et chiang,
Nang batna ka maitang uah kilang;
Thupina pan thupi semsem a taang,
Koute nuntakna'n Na thu tangkou hen,
Kei tung ah hongtaang in.
Van leh lei piangsak Pathian,
Ni le kha piangsak Pathian,
Ka nuntakna a hongbawl ka Pathian,
Ni taang leh guahtui hongpia,
Tuuk chiangin an hong lasak;
Na vangletna kong phat hi ka Pathian.
Toupa aw ka lungdam hi,
Nisim nong lungdamsak hi,
Ka hinlai teng na min ka phat den ding;
Tumging tawh nang kong phatding,
Laamna tawh nang kong phat ding;
Haleluiah Na min thang denta hen.
Tuni in keia dingin,
Hun hoih hun nuam hong kipia,
Toupa tung lungdamna ka kou ding hi,
Lungdam kouh biakna pia in,
Toupa ka pahtawi ding hi;
Ka hatna teng tawh A min ka phat ding.
Khatveivei nek ding neilou,
Khatveivei silh ding neilou,
Ahizong Toupa hoihna ka phawk hi,
Van a leeng vasate leh gamlak Unok paakte in;
Ka nunna nisim in tha hongdim zel.
Toupa kei honkempa ahi,
Zanmial leh lauhuai lakah ,
Khattang honnusia ngeilou,
Ka kiang nai om gige hi,
ka bukna suangpi ahi,
Tawplou in phat zel ning e.
Haleluiah Toupa hongphat ung
Thupina, lalna, pahtawinate
Tangtawnin nang'a ahi,
Haleluiah hong phat ung.
Zing nisuak in na thupina ,
Ka mitmuh in taangsak hi,
Solkha leh si-al te ah,
Na etlawmna ka mu hi,
sing leh louhing chiteng in,
Na hehpihna langsak hi.
Toupa na siamsa mihingte,
Sihna lam zuan honheisan,
Amau gupkhiatna ding a,
Na tapa sisan luang-in,
Na itna thukpen langsak,
Lamdang itna genchim laang.
Immanuel Na min lian hen,
Thupina Nang honpia ung;
Michih Nangmah bia'n kun henla,
Phat uh hen Na min zaila'n
Pathian Hondampa Kumpipa,
Van a kaihging in Nang honphat,
Phatna ging thupi'n lei thawn hen
Lian hen, Lian hen, Lian hen, Na min Immanuel.
Lian... Immanuel! Immanuel!
Thupina, maanna, pahtawinate,
Pilna, thuneihna Nang'a hihen,
Tu leh tangtawnin!
Lian... Immanuel! Immanuel!
Lei leh vanmang tung Pathian,
Lian hen, Immanuel!
Immanuel Na min lian hen,
Tatsate'n hon umkimvel;
Lei kumpite'n Nang Kumpipa,
Sangpen Manglukhu honpia,
Tatsa tanglai mi tengteng zong,
Mangtutphah ngou kim ah kikhawm,
Phatna la ngaih honsa uh hi,
Lian hen, Lian hen, Lian hen, Na min Immanuel.
Immanuel Na min lian hen,
Thounawn Kumpi Hondampa;
Tangtawn bangkim hihthei Nangmah,
Melma te zou vek Nangmah,
Sihna khelhna gawtmun zou vek,
Setan hatna a tam khinta,
Tangtawn Na min Thupi hen aw,
Lian hen, Lian hen, Lian hen, Na min Immanuel.
Tunglam Jerusalem thak ah,
Tatsa misiangthoute leh serafte'n;
Mangtutphah tung a tupa leh
Thahsa belamnou phat in la thak sa uh.
Thupina lalna leh vaihawmna,
Vualzohna leh thilhihtheihna, pilna leh pahtawina;
Tangtawn nang' a ahi,
Halleluiah, Halleluiah, Halleluiah, Amen.
Tunglam Jerusalem thak ah,
Nam tengteng leh chi chih pauchih a mi;
Belamnou sisan a leisa,
Halleluiah Hotdamna chiin au uh.
Jerusalem thak a teng ten,
Zan khuamial leh nat lungkham kahnate;
Gilkial dangtak thuak nawn louin,
Thupina mangtutphah vak kim ah leng uh.
Halleluiah aw hondampa,
Na sisan pha a non leitak manin;
Tangbang ka damlai ni bei chiang,
Ka teengsam ding tua Jerusalem thak ah.
Pathian zahngaihna thupipen a ka neih,
Aw a tamdan simseng thei ngeikeng;
Van a Aksite sangin zong tamzaw uh,
Luipi a piaunelte sangin zong.
Zahngaihna thupi keiin bangchi thuk ding,
Zahngaihna dang tuanlou leh tak;
Amah it in neih teng toh A nna sem ning,
Ka lei hinkhua bei mateng in.
Jingkhang in ka thawh chiangin honna dawn ua,
Sun chiangin ka lungsim hon nuamsak;
Zan khuamialna ah zong honzui jel uh a,
Sun sepgimna zoh ahih chiangin.
Van Angelte ka kim hon umsuak saka,
Ka paina lamteng ah honpi ding;
Ka lam kathuam teng ah chiamtehna honlak,
Aw kei ading in hinkhua nuam lua.
A hoihna leh zahngaihnan honzui jel dia,
Ka lampi tawpna tanpha ah zong;
A sim thuchiam kipel thei ngeilou ka nei,
A chitna tangtawn a om ding pen.
Aw kei honggum Toupa,
Aw hong nusia lou aw,
Simlei mialna nuaiah, tummang kha ning;
Aw Na itna khut in kei honglen gige'n la,
Damsung buaina chiaugal hong kaipih in.
Na vak ah mialna om ngeilou,
Na siang ah Muanna kim hi,
Nang ah muanna nga ing,
Hong len gige'n.
Sunni tum muikhua jing,
Zan khua hongmial chiangin,
Mialna mitte hongvak ka kha kem in;
Zing ninou hongsuak a, simlei pallunte lang,
Simlei palte lou di'n aw hong phal ke'n.
Toupa Nang lou belh ding,
Ke'n simlei ah nei ke'ng,
Ka mit thuksem mu di'n hong vaksak in;
Aw Na itna, hoihna, hepihna a thukdan,
Nang naih sem a mu di'n hong vaksak in.
Ka thumna ngaikhia in,
Nang ngaia dangtak hi'ng,
Khemna huihpi lakah ka kha a vai;
Hihhang k'ong sap chiangin, Nang keiah Na om a,
Pahna mittui luang toh phatla ka sa.

songs.title: Toupa Phat Un A Min Siangthou
songs.author: V Siampu

lines: Toupa phat un a min siangthou phat un,
A siangthouna lain sa ve ni e;
Tatna bawlpa Pathian lungkimsakpa,
Hondampa Khrist Toupa a min phat ni.
Aw belamnou gensiatbei in khros ah,
A si'n mite moh maisakta,
Han suangpi leh sihnain zoulou a,
Hankhuk pan ni thum ni'n thouzou hi,
Tua Khrist neite sihnain zoulou ding,
Tangtawnin Belamnou siangthou phatni.
Toupa phat un a min siangthou phat un,
Haan apan misite kaithou ding hi;
Misite leh mihing vaihawmpa hi,
Vualzoupa siangthou chi'n a min phat ni.
Toupa phat un a min siangthou phat un,
Pathian leh mihingte kilemsak hi;
Lei leh van mi'n a min phatla sa hen,
Belamnou min phat ni Halleluiah.

songs.title: Hondampa Phatna La I Sa Nawn Ding
songs.author: Lyman G Cuyler

lines: Hondampa phatna la i sa nawn ding uh,
Pathian itna i theihna ding un A si;
Hon khasiatna leitung gam tengah gen ni,
Van a hon thumsak gige dan zong gen ni.
Tangthu lamdang i gen ding uh,
Ei dinga sing a A sih
Phatna thupina teng Amah'a hi hen,
Khelhna pan i suahtakna'n Aman a thuak.
Hon lungmuanna thute jiak Amah phat ni,
Tua thu hon nutsiatte tanglai pan gelhsa;
A gingta tengteng kiangah Amah nai hi,
Amuanhuaite kiang' A zahngaih ensak ding.
I mit ua i muh ding innpi honchiam a,
Lungsung hon kipahsak jiak'Amah phat ni;
Tua mun ah tatsate toh i kikhop chiang',
Hon deihsakna hauhna gen vuallouh luah ding.
Tung van khopi salem thak nuam i tun chiangin,
Tua ah lungkham dah leh kahna om nawnlou ding,
Nun i nuam ding hi tung van salem khuapi nuam
Tuang i tun hun ding lungin haibang ngakla'ng.
Nunin nuam nanchia maw tua Van khopi,
It leh ngaih khensate a kimna mun,
Tanpa lenna tung van khopi nuam,
Tuang i tun hun ding lungin haibang ngakla'ng.
Tung van khopi salem thak nuam i tun chiangin,
Khensa tuangtung masaten honna dawn ding ua,
Lungkham naubang kah om nawn louhna gam nuam ah,
Nunnuam ngabang leng in Toupa i phat ding.
Thangvan sana khopi thak nuam i tun chiangin,
Tanpa lungdeih sakmel etlawm i muta dia,
Kahna simlei tung ngaihnawn louhna gamnuam ah,
Tuang i tun chiangin nuamin Toupa i phat ding.

songs.title: I Toupa Jesu Khrist Leitung Ah
songs.author: James Songrolal

lines: I Toupa Jesu Khrist leitung ah a len laiin,
Natna chiteng thuakte din, Damna thupi thupi ahi,
Phak sawmte in a kiangah damna a hongmu ua,
A lak ua khat kiain kipahthu a vagen hi.
Sawm ka damsak ahi kei maw,
Adang kuate koia omta uhiam?
Sawm ka damsak ahi kei maw, sawm ka damsak ahi kei maw
Ngaiin Toupa Jesu lungnuam theilou hi.
Khovel lungkhamna leh haksatna na thuak laiin,
Nopna leh khamuanna pia thei midang omlou hi
Toupa Jesu'n na mangbatna teng a lamangta,
A vualzawlna muin kipahthu genlou ding maw.
Eden sual a liamsate Toupa Jesu vang in,
Damna siktui siang tua Kalvari tui siangthoupen,
Toupa naka sisan leh tui hong luangkhia ziakin,
Khantawn a hinna i neih lungdam sam lou ding maw.
angtawn gamnuam i zot laiin,
Lungkham buaina meipi'n honbawm,
Nopna leh dahna te'n hontuam zel;
Lungkham buaina khen gam i tun ma'n zaw.
Jesu louin, damlai khovel hinna bangmahlou mai ahi;
Khovel pilna zong haihuai lel hi,
Hihhang mang Jesu toh bangkim hihtheih ahi.
Lungkham buai ni'n a hon panpih,
Lusun mangbat ni'n zong hongnem,
Gentheih taksap ni'n hontaisan lou;
Mang Jesu ah bangkim hihtheih ahi.
Theipi kungte paaklun louin,
Lou in nekding piangsak louin,
Huangsung a ganta a mangthang zong;
Ka kipak ding Toupa ka hotdamna'h.
Belampu hoih i Mang Jesu,
Hatloute panpihtu ahi;
A nungzuitute taisan ngeilou,
I makaitu nunnem zaidam ahi.
Simlei haksatna tuangnung siah leng,
Sian anglai ah mun muangta ding a;
Gim gentheihna teng ngilhta ding a,
Khen nawnlou ding it leh ngaih teng toh.
Hinna singliim nuai ah khawldenta ni,
I leitung hong beichiang;
Mubang ngaikei ning tulsa simlei,
Sian anglai ah tuang i tun chiang in.
Naubang kahna gam tuangnung siah leng,
Tung thangvan gam saumang nunnuam ah;
Angel siangte toh houlung tuak in,
Leng diamdiam ta ding thangvan gam ah.
Thangvan gamnuam tuang i tun chiang in,
Gibang khenna om nawnlou ding a;
Lungzuan, nat leh sat ngilhta ding a,
Phatna tullou ding tangtawn dong in.
Simlei tung a mimbang piang mi zata
Min lian min hoih tampi om hi,
Hizong Jesu bang min lian piang omlou,
Min lianzaw piangngei nawnlou ding.
Lian hi, lian hi, piandang A min lian hi,
Lian hi, lian hi, piandang Immanuel lian hi,
A min lamdang, lemthei, Pathian Hat hi, lian hi,
Piandang A min lian hi.
Kumpite Kumpi A min lian penpen,
Siangthou siangthou chin i phat ding,
Min tungnungpen Toupa'n Amah peta,
Min lianzaw piangngei nawnlou ding.
Vaimang siamsil bawl khempeuh,
Ka ngaihsut chiangin ah;
Lamdang in kilawm hi,
Mual leh guam mun khempeuh;
Galin don leng dum diidiai,
Etlawm ganhing chiteng;
Siamtu Na thupidan, Singta'n lel zoulou hi.
Hongphat ning, Kei hong it;
Pathian thilbangkim siam;
Mikhial Na hongtanta,
Thupi'n lamdang; Nong itna lian,
Thu in genseng kei ning.
Sing leh loute hing dimdim,
Gamlak silpak in zeem;
Khuaimute hongleng in
Vasate ham siausiau;
Tulvum lengthe hongkhuang in,
Huihkhi damdiai in laang;
Luita luang ging biabia, Simlei kilawmna'n dim.
Khuadak in tunglam enle'ng,
Van ah ni leh kha taang;
Aksi sang zatamte,
Tang singseng in leng uh;
Galdon veng nuai simlei pan,
Thangvan kilawmna'n dim;
Siamtu Na thupidan, Thilsiamte in gen hi.
Thianmang aw, simlei miza,
Loubang Na khualna lian;
Mikhialte Nong itna; Thukin sang hinah e;
Na Tapa tangkhat nong sawl,
Koute hinna dingin;
Siamtu Na thupi lua, Thilsiamte'n honphat hi.
Itsiam Toupa hehpihna lamdang,
I khelh mohna khuhzou hehpihna;
Tua Kalvari mual pan hongkipia,
Tua ah Belamnou sisan hongluang.
Hong ngaidam ding hong siangsak ding,
Pathian hehpihna i khelh mohna
Khempeuh sang lianzaw tua hehpihna.
Mohna lungdonna tuihual bang hot,
Man ding launa'n hinna hong lausak;
Genseng louh hehpihna lian in ah,
Bukna'ng tua Khros vanglian ei honglak.
I nitna vom kisel thei ngeilou,
A silsiang thei bang om tazen ding;
En vaw sisan tuipi in luang veh,
Nang zong vuk sang hong ngousak thei hi.
Tehpih bei tawntung hehpih lamdang,
Manbeiin a umte tung kipia;
A melmu nuam noute khempeuh aw,
