A hehpihna tu'n sang nuam lou maw?

songs.title: Khristian Hinkhua Masawn A Pai Zel Ding
songs.author: N Zasang

lines: Khristian hinkhua masawn a paizel ding,
Ki awlmohlou mi tampite;
Toupa adia i hun manpha zang in,
I hatna leh lungsim teng toh.
Ann gum nelouin kuamah piching lou ding,
Nawitui kia in kuamah khanglian lou ding hi,
Masawn lou a ommun a om gige,
Khristian piching hi theilou hi.
Toupa nasep miten nuamden ding sa,
A haksat chiangin lungkia uh;
Lungkiatna in mite piching theilou,
Kuhkalna in pichinna hi.
Mite apan engbawl leh gensiatna,
Toupa min in na tuak ngei hia?
Hiai khovel a guallelhna tampite,
Toupa ngaihin gualzohna hi.
Lungkimlouhna khovel natna tawlna gam ah,
Khelhna asang semsem buaina lah sang semsem;
Khovel etlawmnate mitla atam semsem,
Hizong khovel pallun suahtaksan akul hi.
Ginna long a tuangin khovel tuipi tung ah,
Buaina a sansem leh ginna sangsem kul hi;
Tunglam en a paiin mailam nawt jel ni e,
Ginna long a tuangin khovel suahtaksan ni.
Lungkimna om nawnlou duh-amna'n dim zouta,
Pilna, siamna san chiang buaina khelhna sang jel;
Hoihna asan chiangin doutu a pung jela,
Doutu atam chiangin ginna asan kul hi.
Khovel ah lam-et bei ginna in ka hing a,
Lemtheihna neilou in Toupa ka sam jel a;
Hatna teng abei chiang zohna hongpia jel hi,
Sihna a hongkim chiang zohna bukimta ding.
Hiai khovel ah hi sualgal a honglian a,
Van Jerusalem juan a ka pai laiin,
Ka sung a muanna kha hong kiliin chiangin,
Toupa aw nang hongmakaih na kha'n hong ompih in.
(Toupa aw) Hongleenin sualna jaan mial ah,
Hongpiin tuipi lian tung ah (Na mite)
Nisim in sual galdouna haksain lauhuai zong,
Zohna toh nang hong ompih in aw.
Jing ninou leh zingsang daitui bang kiaa,
Silpak leh louhingte nun na bawl thak zel,
Aw na mite nunna pahna om nawnlou,
Pahna daituiin na kha toh hong ompih in.
Aw ka zogam lei uh mohna'n dim zouta,
Khelhnate honglian a nisim in hontuam;
Leitung nopsakna sung ah kibualta ung,
Toupa aw nang hong ngilh ung ngaihdamna hongpia in.
Aw laukha siangthou hongleng in,
Hiai leitung mialna mun ah;
Mial nuaia mi tampi omte,
Na vakin hong tanvak in.
Aw hongleng in, aw hongleng in,
Hiai leitung mialna mun ah;
Aw hongleng in, aw hongleng in,
Khasiang nang konngai uhi.
Aw laukha siangthou hongleng in,
Hiai leitung mialna mun ah;
Nang honthei nailoute kiang ah,
Hongleng inla tanvak in.
Aw laukha siangthou hongleng in,
Mialna teng beisak in;
Na thil hihtheihna lamdang toh,
Hongleng inla tanvak in.
Thangvan nuam a kuatehiam teng,
Jesu Pathian toh kithuah den,
Angel siangthou a misiangte,
Naupang Jesu paktate toh,
Nunnop tawp louin a awi uh.
Kaihging lawm toh nopla lem uh,
Kalvari thu a theih phak uh,
Huan sakik uh Halleluiah, Halleluiah,
Kaihging lawm toh nopla lem uh,
Kalvari thu a theihphak uh,
Huan sakik uh Halleluiah, Halleluijah.
Banghang a kikhou zoulou hiam,
Tanpa phat a zaila sak uh,
Jesu it thupi a manpha,
Tangtawn a lang semsem ahi,
Amau vak dan toh a mu uh.
Aw, Nang kumtawn suangpi nuamsa,
(Leh muanhuai bukna suang),
Nang kon muang hi Toupa it,
(Kumtawn suangpi kon muang hi),
Damsung huihpi'n a hontuam hi,
(Kei hon sel in nuamsa),
Kumtawn suangpi honsel aw.
Honsel in aw kumtawn suangpi,
(Honsel in Nangmah ah)
Na mel lungdamhuai mu din,
(Honsel in na melmu din);
Damsung huihpi'n a hontuam hi,
(Kei honsel in nuamsa),
Kumtawn suangpi honsel aw.
Ka zinna ka zoh vek chiangin
(Innpi nuam ka zuan dia);
Ka kha tawl nang tonpih in,
(Lamtawn in nang honkem in),
Na ka zoh mateng honkem in,
(Ka damsung na zou a),
Khovel ka nutsiat mateng.
Meipi hongjin in hon kem in
(Ka lampi khuamial ah),
Nisa hongvak nawn mateng,
(Zingsang ni hongsuah mateng),
Ka damsung na ka zoh chiang in,
(Tutkhawl ding inn nuam ah),
Tua tangtawn gam nunnuam ah.
Vaihawmna ni thupi hongtun in,
Ja ing pengkul a hong ging hi,
Namchih leh chichih hong pungkhawm in,
Ka mu mangtutphah ngou maiah,
Van Angel siangthou a hongkumsuk a,
Tuipi leh leitung tengteng tung ah,
A khut van lam a liktou kawm in ah,
Hun leh ni atawpta a hongchi.
Ngaidih, kah leh lungkham kikou aw'n,
Mangthangten atan uh theiin,
Tang leh mualte kiang ah, hondelh un,
A thumna uh akai lawta.
Mi sumhaute zong tel sam uh a,
A sum uh tuimang khinta a,
Khutdoh bang maiin Toupa maiah,
A leiba uh din zoulou uh,
Lei mi thupite zong om sam uh a,
Sihna natna thuak in mau uh a,
Angel min gelhna Vanlaibu tawiten
A thupina tuam uh mulou uh.
Meithai leh tagahte zong om uh,
Toupa'n a thumna uh ngaikhia;
Khutdoh lungkham om nawn louhna ah,
A khitui uh a nulsiang ding;
Sum kikap hatte leh zukham hatte,
A kiang ua zu dawnding zuakte toh,
A kiang ua zu zuak phalna petu toh
Gawtmun ah a lut khawmta diam uh.
Hoih kisa a kideihhunte zong
Om uh, ahoihna uh chinglou,
Tang a Jesu kilhlumtute zong,
Mihing ngaih in hoih in lang uh,
Hotdamna simmoh a tu lungmuangte,
Tuin hun omlou awl awl in ah,
Hotdam ka hithouna ding chi tute,
A kikhel sih nihna tangta uh.
Kum sulhei a hongtun chiangin,
Lungzuan thelbang thousak,
Ngailou leh kipaklou kuamah omlou;
I ngaklah Khristmas ni tuang a hongtung nawn ta,
A etlawm sem din Bethlehem pak toh;
Hongpak lunta e pakbang lawm ni.
Aw etlawm sang e, hiai nunnop ni hun tomkal sung,
Vangnei kisa'ng e, nopna ni tuang hongtungta,
Lung kituak in nunnop zaila'n awi ni,
Na lungkhamna silhpuan bang paiin.
Omlaivei leh lusunta ten,
Tantawk gel sam dih ua,
Hun mualliamsa teng ngaiin i mau hi;
Pak bang i lopsa hiai ni thupi hongtun chiang,
Sungkuan kim a i lenlai ngaisem hang;
Naubang kahna luankhi tui a luang.
Tung Thianmang hambang honhuai hen,
Nunnuam in zaisa ni,
I lailung sung natna teng damta hen;
I ngaklah ni kipahhuai tuang hongtung nawnta,
Na puakgik tengtengte paikhia inla;
Nunnuam ni hun hoih i neih sung in.
Nazareth Jesu koia pai ding na hi hiam?
Lenna vangkhua tualnuam peel gamdai gam manoh in,
Sual tate na itna vangin khros po kawm in,
Kulhpua gamdai dama leenna mun nusia mai ding maw?
Aw, kapin ka mau jel a, hizong tawp simthu leel in a omlou,
Melmate'n pi jel uh, gamdai dam lam zuan in,
Aw, Nazareth Jesu koia pai ding na hiam?
Lalna vangkhuapi tualnuam a sawlbang heina,
Khawvel nunnop palzou mangthangte honkhia dingin,
Pa angsung nuam pel a mangthangte zong ding in,
Ka kipia ding hotdamna'n na chi maw ka Mang Jesu?
Aw a mualkhum dekta maw khovel sual tanpa,
Bahin puk zel mahleh tawp simthu a leel theilou;
A hon it ziakin maw, en in mualkhum dekta,
Kapin ka mau jel a, hizong tawp vual a hilou hi.
Nazareth Jesu koia pai ding na hi hiam?
Mipi pungkhawmtein na tungah khros honnga uh,
Hizong Toupa Jesu kei din damna na hi,
Na gam na tun chiangin hon theigige in ka Toupa.
Aw munuam veng namchih damna kalvari tang,
Hangsan tuaidawng lili paak vanmang ta phamna mun,
Khasiang hongleng aw halleluiah chi'n lem ni,
I tangtawn van khopi kongkhak Kalvari i awi ding.
Mohna neilou Na Ta tang khat,
Hizong van apan nongsawl hi,
Mohneite lak hong teeng ding in,
Pathian Belamnou honghi di'n.
Aw siangthou Pathian Belamnou,
Ken ka it Pathian Belamnou,
Aw Na sisan pha'n hongsiangsak,
Ka Jesu Khrist kei hongtanpa.
Itna a nong piak kilhdeen uh,
Bawlsiatna thuakin hongsi hi,
Kumpi hizong ki-ngainiam in,
Lat in om Pathian Belamnou.
Kei ka mang khin hing dia lawm lou,
Hizong na kiang nong naihsak hi,
Na khut thahaat in nongpi a,
Pathian Belamnou nong musak.
Aw siangthou Pathian Belamnou,
Nangbang a ka om theihna di'n,
Aw na sisan pha'n hong siangsak,
Ka Jesu Pathian Belamnou.
En un, Van Mang vontawi,
Lungkham in naubang kap,
Nang leh kei vangin maw,
Moh neilou mohnei bangin
Nang leh kei hong it man,
I mohna teng puain,
Khros tungah naubang kap.
Pa aw hon paisan ding na hi hiam,
(Khros tungah mohteng khu naubang kap)
Kei khattang hon nusia ke'n chi in,
(Mohteng khu Pathian in sulheisan)
Moh neilou Belamnou,
Nang leh kei hong it man,
Khros tung ah hongsi hi.
Mulkimhuai, mulkimhuai lua,
Van Mang' von hongthuakna,
Kuata'n en ngam ding hiam,
Van angel te'n en ngamlou,
Sunni zong tang ngamlou,
Vanmang' vontawiin thuak,
Nang leh kei nunna di'n.
Khelh vanga hongsi Toupa
Toh tangtawn ading a ,
Gibang khensa hi zong,
Belamnou itna lamdang'n,
A thuakna kho-ul leh,
Sisan in Toupa toh
Kizopna bawl thak hi.
Sihna mial nuaia tu in, mi sang tampi mangthang uh,
Hotdamna, aw hotdamna neilou in;
Hinna lampi mansuah in singbul suangbul a bia uh,
Eimah banga tatsate hi uh.
Hotdamna (hotdamna)
Tangthupha (tangthupha)
Gamchih a puangzak ding in (Halleluiah),
Toupa'n tuin hongsam hi, hongsam hi, hongsam gige
Hotdamna huang ah hon pilut in.
Toupan nang honit manin, sih tanpha in hongthuak hi,
Na khelhman leibat honditsak zouta;
Aw unau kingaihsunin na leibat na dit ken zaw,
Toupa kiangah bang na gending hiam.
Amaute pikhia dingin unau na muang om ding maw
Hun a tomta lenmual a khum zel hi,
Gammial a Toupa itte laukha tampi mangthang uh,
Amaute pikhia ding omlou uh.
Toupa kei hiaiah ka om, na itte honkhia dingin,
Na deih bangtaka nonzat ka ut hi,
Nang ading in ka hing dia, nang ading in ka si dia,
Ka theihna ka pumin honzang in.
Toupa na gam panpihtu ding,
Na biakbuk inn siangthou ah,
Belampu din kon namkip uh hi,
Na Khasiangthou in honghih kippih in aw,
Toupa ka Belampute uh migitna leh ,
Dohzohnate, hangsanna leh hatna pia in,
Na Belamte pitu dingin.
Saptuam pi ding zaw gensiatbei,
Zi khat nei leh mi kizen,
Lungsim siangthou, kidek zoumi,
Kipahdan siam leh zudawn kham ngeiloumi,
Dangka ngainalou, mi kamsiam,
Innkuan kepdan siam, mi ginom,
Zaidamtak leh miveh chingmi,
Sia leh pha a Khrist pomkip mi.
Nou Belampu deihhuaite aw,
Belamte kemtu dingin,
Toupa Jesu dong gige un,
Lou hinna mun ah napi thei ding uhi;
Aw Belampu deihhuaite aw,
Gensiatna, tawlna buainate,
Nuaisiahna, simmohna, vuakna,
Thuakna Toupa min in thuak un.
Jesu Belampu hoih zuiin,
Gamdai mun leh guamthuk ah,
Belam mangte zongding in ah,
Khrist a Lalna gam a pilut dingin ah,
Toupa ka Belampute uh,
Sawltak Peter bang nnasepna,
Tawlnate hangsanna'n thuam in,
Kha a dimin nang pizel in.
Nuai simlei mi zatam laiah ei hongtel,
Anbang itna lamdang kuan genzou ding hiam?
Bangmahlou suanding bei nam mangthang hiding,
Anbang itna'n nam khat hongsuah hi.
(Aw hongphat ung) Aw hong phat ung Toupa,
(Ka bitna uh) Ka bitna uh na hi
(Minletna teng) Minletna teng Nang' a hihen,
Nam tengteng lal(Nam tengteng lal)
Toute' Toupa (Toute' Toupa Na hi),
Namte bawlpa (Namte bawlpa) hong phat ung e.
Tuan a pi leh pu saltanna apan a,
Nuai zinmang henkol apan hong suaktasak;
Tangthupha tuipi gal apan hongpuak in,
Anbang itnan nam khat hongsuah hi.
Simlei ah laukha mangthang zatamte kiang,
Nong itna tangthupha phuangzak thei dingin;
Na laukha'n hambang honghuai zelin Toupa,
Tangthupha toh gammial tanvak din.
Omsa Pathian, omlel leh omgige ding,
Piandang na vangletna lian hi;
Lei siam a van leh tuipite asiampa,
Tangtawn a tangtawn Nang na hi.
Piandang na vangletna lian hi,
Toupa, Piandang na vangletna lian hi, Toupa;
Tang a Pathian Nang Tawngtawn a hilai ding,
Piandang na vangletna lian hi.
Lei leh asung a thilsiamte abawlpa,
Vangtung Angel sangsawm lak zong;
Na thupina genzou suutzou a omlou,
Piangdang na vangletna lian hi.
Nite kumte hongbei in hong kidang zel,
Hizong Na vanglian dang ngeilou;
Thilsiam a beisate lak zong Pathian nang,
Thilsiam thak ah zong hilai ding.
Genthei tate zalenna ding,
Tuni'n a hongtung kipak ni;
Nuai jinmang in henkol a hon bulhna,
Luainam bang sutin omta ding.
Aw (Hallelui) Halleluiah,
Jesu hongpiang, Halleluiah!
Nunnuam in zailain pahtawi chiat ni,
Hondampa mimbang a hongpiang.
Van Kumpipa hihna nusia'n,
Nang leh kei tan dingin hongkum;
'Tungnungpen ah thupi henla' chiin,
Vantung mite'n zaila sa uh.
Mipilte leh Belampute,
Gamlapi apan hongpaiin;
Bethlehem ah Kumpi Thak pahtawi ding'
Lungtang leh thilpiak tawiin kuan.
Hondampa ei dinga hongpiang,
Pahtawiin zaila in awi ni;
Kaihgingte leh gingthei khempeuh tum in,
Jesu Immanuel pak ni.

songs.title: Thil Hithei Hiding Maw Kei Ding In
songs.author: Charles Wesley

lines: Thil hithei hiding maw kei ding,
Tanneih ding honpa sisan ah,
A thuaksak keia ding si maw,
Kei asisakpa hilou maw?
Itna lamdang nang ka Pathian,
Kei dia na sih hithei hi maw?
Itna lamdang Nang ka Pasian,
Kei dia na sih hithei hi maw.
A pa kumpi tutphah nusia,
Hehpihna manbei tawp neilou,
Itna lou peuh bangkim nusia,
Adam suan panpih beite ding'
Zahngaihna lian hi na lawm lawm
Ka Pasian in kei hong muhkhiak.
Tun mohtanna ka lau beita,
Jesu bang bangkim keia hi,
Amah a hing ka lutang hi,
Pasian diktatna hongsilhsak,
A kumpi tutphah naih thei ta'ng
Khrist kei a, Kumpi lukhu toh.
Khrist Toupa tuni'n thounawn! Halleluia!
Mite leh angelten chi! Halleluia!
Kipak un vualzohna lian, Halleluia!
Nou vante'n sa'n lei'n dawng hen, Halleluia!
Itna, tatna na zoh hi! Halleluia!
Galdou zou, vualzohna tang, Halleluia!
I Ni awkin valh nawnlou! Halleluia!
Aman asi suah nawnlou! Halleluia!
Suang, venna, sitna a thawn! Halleluia!
Khrist in gawtmun kong phujak, Halleluia!
Sihna'n Amah zou zoulou, Halleluia!
Khrist in paradis hongta, Halleluia!
I Kumpi thupi hing nawn, Halleluia!
Aw sihna, na gu koiah? Halleluia!
I kha hinna ding' A si, Halleluia!
Aw han, na zohna koiah? Halleluia!
Kumpi thupi, Kha nuamsa, Halleluia!
Hiai tangtawn hinna ahi, Halleluia!
Nangmah theih, Na hat etchian, Halleluia!
Tuabang la sa, tuabang it; Halleluia!
Jordan luithuk galah ka inn a om,
Toupa luithuk gal lehlam gamah kai ut hina'ng e,
Jordan luithuk galah ka inn a om,
Toupa luithuk gal lehlam gamah kai ut hina'ng e.
Tangthupha gending a kuan na utsam hiam,
Huai gamchiam nuam na gam ngeiah;
Aw Toupa luithuk gal lehlam gamah kai ut hina'ng e.
Hotdam tate tualleng nopna khopi ah,
Toupa thupi pakin zaisa;
Aw Toupa luithuk gal lehlam gamah kai ut hina'ng e.
Khovel hin ngai nawnlou kahna om nawnlou,
Puanpak silhin Toupa kiangah;
Aw Toupa luithuk gal lehlam gamah kai ut hina'ng e.
Aw tua kitheihna, aw tua kipahna,
Toupa ban hat nuaia om hiing,
Aw, tua vualzawlna,
Aw, tua kipahna, Toupa ban hat nuaia om hiing.
Khawl hi'ng, khawl hi'ng,
(Jesu ah khawl hi'ng, Jesu ah khawl hi'ng)
Launa bangmah om nawnlou hi;
Khawl hi'ng, khawl hi'ng,
(Jesu ah khawl hi'ng, Jesu ah khawl hi'ng)
Toupa ban hat nuaia om hi ing.
Laulou in om ning, hiai lei ka zinna,
Toupa ban hat nuaia om hiing,
Aw, ka lampi vak semsem niteng in,
Toupa ban hat nuaia om hiing.
Banghiam ka lauh ding, banghiam ka lauh ding,
Toupa ban hat nuaia om hiing;
Ka Hondampa nai, ka kipahna kim,
Toupa ban hat nuaia om hiing.
Noel masa van Angelte'n gen,
Belamchingte kiangah tuang hongtung tading;
Jana Belamte a chin laiun;
Tua jan khosiang leh jan khodai ah,
Noel (4), Israelte Kumpipa piangta.
Thangvan sangah aksi taang mu uh,
Suahlam aksi vak kilawm leh hoihtak ah;
Vak thupiin simlei hontan in;
Jan khomial lai sun hongsuakta,
Noel (4), Israelte Kumpipa piangta.
Tua Thangvan aksi taang honzui in,
Suahlam pan mipil thumte hongpai uh a;
Kumpi hongpiang ding lung a gel in,
Amau pitu aksi zui jel in,
Noel (4), Israelte Kumpipa piangta.
Tua aksi in mallam zuanjel in,
Bethlehem bawnginn tungzawn ah vaibang tham;
Jesu mi siangpa Lal tungzawn tak ah;
Tualai mun ah a hongkhawl denta hi,
Noel (4), Israelte Kumpipa piangta.
Mipil thumte gan-inn honglut in,
Kipak leh kingainiam in chibaibuk uh;
Begaw, Murate, Dangkaengte;
Naungek maiah honglaankhia uh hi
Noel (4), Israelte Kumpipa piangta.
I vek ua lungsim kithutuak in,
A thu a simlei leh thangvan siamtu leh,
A sisan a mihingte leitu;
Toupa Van Pathian phat la sa in,
Noel (4), Israelte Kumpipa piangta.

songs.title: Na Ngaihdamna Ni Thupi Kei Ding Hong Taangta
songs.author: Evan G Thawnzakham

lines: Na ngaihdamna ni thupi kei din hongtaangta,
Mikhial siding bangmah theilou ka hih laiin;
Na sisan hoih manphain kei na honsam a,
Khutvuakin na sianglam ka honzuan hi.
Kuan ning Toupa, Na honsawlna peuh ah,
Na ut bangin honzangin ka sihni tanpha'n;
Zinmang doh-ai ka nuaisiah theihna din,
Ka taksap teng hon guanin banjal honhuaiin.
Ka hinna non hawinasan pen ka ngilhvang in,
Laukha saltang mi sang tampi mangthangzou hi;
Ka hun tamzaw athawn in ka na zangzou ta,
Hon ngaidamin Toupa hon ngaidamin.
Na maiah nuamsain Toupa hong kikhawm ung,
Na hotdamna leh loupina lambang pakin;
Hizong Nang honthei nailou leh umlou mite,
Khelhna saltang pikhiak ding don omlou.
Gamteng ah pai unla Tangthupha vagen un,
Namchih a mite nungjui dingin bawl unla;
Ka thupiakte malkhat zong imlou in gen un,
Kap kawma kuan kipakin na tung ding.
Khantawn a hinna ka muhna Pathian laisiangthou ahi,
Pathian hatkhum a piaksa ahi,
Hiai sang a hoihzaw kuaman gen theilou hi;
Banglam peuhah a phatuam hi
Mi'n a zat hoih phot peuhmah ualeh.
Kithuhilhna, kihasotna ding bang,
Mikhialte siamlou tansakna ah bang,
Kitaihilh a kibawldikna ding bang,
Diktatna thu kihilhna lamah bang ,
Banglam peuhah a phatuam kha vek hi,
Ka limlang, ka gamlai, ka khawnvak hi.
Sih muan theihna nei nailou a khovel a lungkhamte leh,
Damsung a bawi hakkol a tangte,
Suahtaksak theihna thuhoih thupha om hi;
Damlai hindan hoih honhilh hi,
Mi'n a zat hoih phot peuhmah ualeh.
Hiai laisiangthou thu i sim a kuhkalna leh khamuanna,
I hon neih theih samna ding uhleh
Lametna bang i na neih theihna ding un;
Nidanglaia gelh peuhmahte,
Eite hon hilhna dia gelh ahi.
Pathian laisiangthou bu sungah sual sepaih galdoute din,
Galvan bukim lak ding aom hi,
A vualzoute manglukhu piak achiam hi;
Azawng apha kibang chiat in,
I nasep bangzel in honpe ding.
Lau ken, Zion tanu, en in na Kumpipa,
Thunuailut in Sabengtungnou tunga tuang in,
A hongdiing chi'a genkholhna thu a hongtungta,
Mipi anung leh mapai te'n kikou jua jua.
Hosana, Hosana, Hosana chi'n kikou uh
Hosana, Hosana, Hosana chi'n kikou uh.
I Pa David gam hongtung ding ahampha hi,
Amah David tapa kiangah Hosana chi'n,
Toupa min a hongpai hampha chi'n kikou uh,
Tungnungpen ah Hosana chi'n kikou uh hi.
Amah David tapa Toupa Hondampa hi,
Na lungtang puante uh suahkhia unla phah un,
Thupina Kumpi honglut in chiin chial uh,
Amah toh si, thounawn vualzou tawntung dingin.
Limbang belh tung lunmang aw Na vualjawlna,
Kilawm sa'ng zata di'n etlawm e;
Tangpalnou sakmel a etlawmlou omlou,
Liapal nou sakmel lawmlou omlou.
Itna in sakmel lawm in musak,
Alamdang Sian aw itna Na siam,
Lia-leh-tang anbang ki-it tuibang kigawm,
Kitenna Sian aw hong vualjawl in.
Sianmang aw Na siam a mi sa zat leng te,
Nu-le-pa tuibang gawm din Na siam,
Tuibang gawm vondeih zatam hongtawi ding a,
Asiampa zata'n lambang pak ding.

songs.title: Pathian A Thilsiamte A Et Et Chiangin
songs.author: Rev N Vungzasin

lines: Pathian in a thilsiamte a et et chiangin,
A lungkim mahmah hi, hoih asa mahmah hi;
Hizong pasal amah kia a om a etin,
Hoihsalou in numei panpihtu ding pia hi.
Hiai ahi kitenna, hiai ahi kitenna,
Pathian in a gawmsa mihing in khen kei hen,
Khenlou dia tong chiamsa,
Sian in lumbang honsung zel hen.
Vondeih zatam tawi a siangsung phungching dingin,
Houlungtuak tangbang dam nunnuam ngabang leng din;
Tungthianmang vanglian in lumbang honsung zel hen,
Itna tongchiam simthu hualkhau khihkip den hen.
Tanglai Kana khua a na tel bangin Toupa,
Taksap teng hongguan din hongngai ung hongleng in;
Lungkham dah leh taksap hun hongtung zel mahleh,
Hiai kitenna siangthou pahtawiin omzel hen.
Sianmang simthu lelsa, nihgel anbang ki it,
Tuibang kigawmna ni tuang hongtungta a,
Nuamin honpahtawi ung hiai kitenna siangthou,
Sian in lumbang sung in vualzawl ta hen.
Nunin nuamin zaila'n pakni Sianmang muanga,
Damtui bang kigawmte damsung khenlou dinga,
Khristian innkuan bawl di'n tu leh ta phungching di'n
Sian in huai hen.
Sanggam aw tuni in, na thilhoih muh lianu,
Na chiin na tuai teng leh Khrist a na unaute'n,
Nuam in honpahtawi ung, hizong Sianmang muang a
Na simthu chiamsa uh khuambang kip hen.
Asiamtu minthanna, innkuan phungching hiding,
Mi siangthou tampite tun leh zua hiding in,
Sian in hongsung henla, siangthou kitenna in,
Asiampa Pasian minthangsak hen.
Nang na hongpai aw Hondampa!
Nang na hongpai, Kumpipa!
Leichih in na min lou tading,
Nuamsa in lasa ta n'ung!
Nang na hongpai! Zung thupi te'n
Na sih in puanjak keksak;
Khualzinna lampi nuamsakta,
Thupina Nang apan sawl.
Nang na hongpai! Nang na hongpai!
Na lampi ah hontuak n'ung!
Nang na hongpai! Kon mu ding uh.
Tuani chianga Nang bang ding;
Nang na hongpai! Nang na hongpai!
Jesu ka Toupa it uh!
Aw vaihawmna Nang honmuh ding,
Biakpen, Pahtawi pen, Itpen.
Nang na hongpai! liap a omlou,
Mei kailou, khitui luanglou;
Khelhna omlou, dahna omlou;
Nisuak thupi leh vakin,
Nang na hongpai! Jesu Hondam,
Bangdang ngaihtuah tham omlou;
Thupi leh nopna lamdang hi,
Tua Na thuakna'n hon leisak.
Ka Jesu Ka honpa, nangbang kuadang omlou,
Ka nuntak sung Nang kong phat ding,
Na itna lamdang luat manin
Ka muanna ka tenna ka bitna leh ka hatna
Ka hinsung teng ka pumpi in,
Nangmah biakna tawplou ding.
Toupa phat un leitung tengteng'n la sa'n
A vangletna leh lalnate phat in
Tuipi mau ding tangte kun ding uh,
Na min a zak hun chiang un,
Na khutsuakte kipahpi'n la ka sa
Tangtawn in kon it ding tangtawn a kip di'n,
Na thuchiam ka neih bangbang tehvual hilou hi.
Toupa aw kong ngen hi nakhutin honlenin
Na itna hoihna muthei gige di'n
Simlei lungngaihna leh dahna  natna lakah,
Nanga muanna  kha'n hong dimsak zelin
Nanglouin muanna omlou,
Nanglouin damna omlou
Nanglouin ngaihdamna omlou
Muanna suangpi nahi, tangtawn hinna nahi,
Khamuanna nanga om mite hampha
Simlei miza laiah, muanna pethei omlou
Sum leh pai Pilna Siamna haute zong,
Lunglen Lungmuang theilou simlei thawmhau den ah
Khamuanna nanga om mite hampha
Chitna khatzong neilou, hoihna khatzong neilou
Na itna lian in sang hi Toupa aw,
Man ngenlou a hinna hongpia Pathian hoih aw,
Nuamlua ing natungah lungdam lua ing.
Ka Toupa hon itna lamdang lua sa'ng,
Mikhial kei hon itna thukin sang hi;
Khelh vanga siding kei honit manin;
Sing khros tungah sihna hial kei di'n hongtel.
Mellawm lou tua khros ah kikilhdenpa,
Aw kei di'n sakmel etlawm pen ahi;
Gim gentheih zatam thuakin N'ong lei maw!
Tangtawn hinna neita'ng Jesu, Nang vangin.
Engbawlna linglukhu hon khusak uh,
Mihingte nuihsan leh pampaih in om;
Tuabang teng Na thuak zong sul heilou lai;
Kei vangin maw Toupa hiai bangteng N'ong thuak.
Kalvari tang lam manoh in apai,
A khros puak giksain tawl in apuk;
Bah leh chau in aw kei din apai zel;
A thuakgimna kei di'n lungmuanna ahi.
Khros tungah enghouna chiteng Na thuak,
Simmoh leh bawl gentheih in Na om a;
Na taksa pan sisan hong luangkhia hi;
Tua sisan luang te'n ka khelhna sawp siangta.
Halleluiah Toupa honphat ning e!
Kei dia hinna lampi N'ong bawlsak vang'n
Ka moh N'ong maisakta ka batteng zong,
Tun kei suakta hi ta'ng Jesu Nang vang in.
Hinna hongpia ka Toupa hong it ing,
Mangthang lungngai ka vaih laiin,
Lunglaigil ah khamuanna Nong pia,
Muanna tuibang na hong luanna.
Hinna hongpia ka Toupa aw,
Nanglou muanna ding ka nei ngei diam?
Lungngai huibang ka mauna simlei ah,
Nang toh omleng ka lung nuam hi.
Suan ding omlou ka hoihna zong omlou,
Nang toh om di'n ka ching zoulou,
Hizong Toupa na itna aw nem toh,
Kong it chiin Na hong samlai.
Keimah lampi ka zuih khempeuhte leh,
Ka lunggel leh ka ngaihtuahna,
Toupa nang di'n a chingzou ding omlou,
Hizong kong it ka ta nong chi.
Khawlni Toupa, thumna ngai in,
Na inn ah hongleng ung, Nang Ni'n,
Nang biakna thu genin, la sa'n,
Gimnamtui bang hong jamtou hen.
Simlei khawlni nonpiak bawn nuam,
Ka laukha semgim leh liangvai;
A tutkhawl kumkhuana ding ah,
Vana khawlni na bawl ngakla'ng.
Thangvan khawlni a hongtun chia'n,
Dahna leh thumnate tengteng,
Kipahna mun ka tun chiangin,
Tuate van ah om nawnlou ding.
Dougal laang laang nawnta lou ding,
Nunnop tutkhawl sunni bei toh,
Sunnitum a, muikhua zing lou,
Vanglian Toupa sunni bang tang.
Lunggulh kumsawt khawlni kipan,
Toupa leh Amah mi te toh,
Nunkhua nuam in, tawp ngeikei ni,
Nunnop zaila sa'n kumvei ni.
Lungsung nuam leh kipahthu gen ni,
A siangthou Pa kiang,
Amah Tapa Jesu Khrist
Eite hong pia hi.
Ahat lou in kei ka hat chi hen,
A zawng in ka hau chi hen,
Toupa'n ei dia hon hihsakte hang in,
A hatlou in kei ka hat chi hen,
A zawng in ka hau chi hen,
Toupa'n ei dia hon hih sak-te hang in,
Nuam ni.
A siangthoupen kiang ken hong zuan ing,
Hong zuan ing Belamnou sisan vang;
Hongzuan ing Nang kia hong bia ding in,
Hongzuan ing vangletna pia di'n
Toupa hong bia ing,
Nang hong bia ing,
Toupa hong bia ing,
Nang hong bia ing,
Na min siangthou siangthou hi.
Phat ding Na kilawm hi Toupa Jesu,
Pahtawi ding Na kilawm hi;
Phat ding Na kilawm hi Toupa,
Minthanna khempeuh ngah ding;
Vangletna khempeuh,
Uk zohna khempeuh,
A tawntung phat ding in Na kilawm hi,
Vangletna khempeuh
Uk zohna khempeuh,
A tawntung phat ding in Na kilawm hi.
Ka aw bildoh in Toupa aw,
Kong kipumpiak hong sang in;
Limtak in hong ngaihkhiak in ka kah aw,
Ka Kumpipa ka Pathian,
Nang kiang hongthum ka hi ngal a,
Jing tengin ka aw na za zel ding,
Toupa jingkhangin
Nang kiang kong thum ding a,
Nangmah kia hong mit suan ning.
Aw Vanglian pen Halleluia,
Honpak ung e Immanuel;
Pahtawina leh manna tengteng,
Tangtawn in Nang'a a na hi.
Halleluia, Halleluia, Amen. (2)
Vannuai mija namchih vontawi
Angelte tawh houlung tuak ung;
Na tatna sisan pha vang in,
Salem Thak tuallai lengkhawm ung
Aw tuibang thuk, gam singbang sang,
Vabang Na pilna leh itna;
Laukha vangkhua a gingthei teng
Leh thangvan tongluang lel theih louh
Aw honhilh in thukna vanglian,
Gankuang leh tongsia banna sing;
Thangvan manglukhu leh simlei
Eden leh Salem Thak kizom.
Nuai simlei gam daidam ah hon huai jel in,
Aw Jeho, Vanglian pen Nang na hi;
Kei zaw ka zaitha kiam e, aw Nang in zaw,
Na khut zaitha'n sawnban honkai in;
Van anpha in, khantawn in hon vak inla.
Naktui siangthou libang ching in luangsak in,
Siktui duh zaitha tawl hehnem di'n;
Kammei kuang leh ngoumei tang in honpi in,
Nuaisimlei a jingbang ka zin lai;
Hambang honhuai, lauhuai lumbang honsung in
Lai ka tah di'n ka kiang sawlbang hong hei in,
Albang ka dah luat heh hong nem in;
Khaphamna leh nuai jinmangte lau kei ning,
Jesu thawh bang in thelbang thou ning,
Zaila sa ning, khantawn in hon pahtawi ning.
Salbang hon suahna simthupha in,
Van Ninuai teng jelsuak hen;
Mijata'n Thianmang hon muhna ding un,
Thianmang hong tualkum in
Aw Thianmang aw, sawnban' honkai in,
Pi-le-pu dung sun in simlei khimjing ah,
Albang mang ve ung.
Hizong leh tung Lunmang Jesu in,
Sisa bang mihing honsuah;
Simlei misiang vuitang bang khawm ding in,
Thianmang hong tualkum in.
Thangvan gam nunnopna gam en in,
Albang dahte sawlbang hei;
Tung Thianmang in hambang hon huaita in,
Thianmang hong tualkum in
Thianmang kiang tung di'n niteng pai ing,
Sunkim ngaiin donchim la'ng;
Albang dah luankhi a hulna ding in,
Thianmang hong tualkum in.
Sunni chin a muan Toupa,
Ka tuanglam khimbang jing in;
Ka ginna malneu mahleh,
Toupa kia ka honlen ding hi.
Sunni chin a muan Toupa,
Sun leh jan a muan Toupa;
Chikmah in ngilh theikei ning,
Toupa Jesu nung jui jel ning.
Tung Pathian' Khasiangthou in,
Ka lungsung a sunvak hi;
Koimun ah leng laulou in,
Toupa Jesu nung jui jel ning.
Nopna mun a la sa in,
Dahna mun a thuak jel in,
Sihna manna kal ah leng,
Toupa Jesu nung jui jel ning.
Ka damlai ni bei masang,
Simlei albang man masang;
Thangvan tuang ka tun mateng,
Toupa Jesu nung jui jel ning.
Simlei Aigupta gam ah zaw,
Muanna leh pahna ka zong a;
Damsung manzawh tum in ka vai,
Naubang kahna leh lungkhamna lel hi.
Aw, i pianna gam in a zilta lou,
Muanna leh pahna ka zon hang'n;
Mukei ning e, a mun hilou
Ka Mang Khrist' gam ahih louh vang in.
Albang mang ding gam a lengte,
Tatna sisan manpha vang in;
Tangtawn hinna tang sam ding in,
Namchih, chi chih ding in a kihongta.
Aw, tua mun a leng sam ding in,
Toupa Na hatna'n honpi in;
Simlei nopna albang manna,
Ngaiin don nawnkei ning, nunlui gam zaw.
Itna Kumpi gam zuan ding in,
Ka laukha aw, nang leng zong in;
Simlei hoihna'n hon sam zongleh,
Lilipal Mang nunnem in hon ngak hi.
Sepgim lungjin buaina kinawkna lak ah,
I Toupa Pathian in hon huh jel;
Pa thuchiam ni thupipen a hong tungta,
Saltangte pawtna ding Ni thupi.
Tangthupha deihhuai pai jel inla,
Gammial dang a saltangte pi di'n.
Tang a pi leh pu te'n hiai ni thupi pen,
Mu nuam galdot gige mahle uh;
Mulou in thangvan sang kaizouta uh e,
Van zawhna thupipen tang ding in.
Aw damna damna Gospel thangvel inla,
Kawl kimvel dong in valeng inla;
Gentheite kipahna vakvaite inn nuam,
Na pak gimlim nam teng damna ding.
Aw nam zousiah leh thilsiam zousiahte'n leng,
Toupa thupi pak in aw suah un;
Kalvari a itna lamdangtak ziak in,
Eia di'n damna lui a luangta.
A hehpihna a ka khawl in,
Ka pa'n hon theita;
A deihlam nna ka sep chiang in,
Vual hon jawlsak jel;
Kuhkaldan lung a ka theih in,
Kei di'n vualzawlna;
Lungkhamna kisikna vang in,
A itna ka ngah.
A ta a ka om main zong,
Ka pa'n hon theita;
Gamdai haksa a ka len in,
Aman hon veng jel;
Tutan in Aman honpi jel,
Lauhuai lak ah zong;
Nunnuam in ka jui jel ding hi,
Zion tang tanpha'n.
Toupa pahtawi di'n kipia in,
Hiai nuai simlei ah;
Na mawhna teng tawh Amah jua'n,
A hon na dawn ding;
Na lungdamna tul ngeilou ding,
Na Toupa' mai ah;
Toupa pahtawi in la sa in,
Zion tang tanpha'n.
Jordan luigal i kai hun chiang,
Kiitna vak gamnuam ah,
Chiaului gal gam Toupa kiang ah,
A inn vak ah i khawl ding.
Aw ka Toupa, tua itna gam etlawm vak,
Khawlna'n Na bawlta Na sisan ngei in;
Kei mikhial in sisan vang in kon juan hi,
Sisan a silsiang in hon khawlsak in.
Toupa'n hon chiamsa gamnuam ah;
Tawlngak hun ken ngakla'ng e;
Tua nuntakna singlim nuam ah,
Bangchik chiang ka khawl sam diam?
Aw, van Jerusalem Thak nuam,
Etlawm in a thupi e;
Ka laitah chiang in Mang Jesu,
Na khawpi thak hontun in.
Hondampa kiang ka tun chiang in,
Ka lungjinna beita ding;
Buaina khen gam ah tutkhawl in,
Kial lunggimna beita ding.
Ka lenna gamdai a na hi.
Vei leh tak theilou in;
Ka Pa' inn nunnuam hong nai hi,
Chiin ka lamen jel.
Machiang thangvan thawn aw
Ka lungsung a ging in; [ging lawm,
Albang dahna teng tuangnung sia,
Gim leh tawl zouta uh
Laukha siangthou lampi hilh in,
Meipi leh meikuang in;
Kal khat zong suan diklou ding hi'ng,
Nang na honhuai louh leh.
Akhenchiang taklam ka pial dia,
Akhenchiang veilam ah;
Tuabang kalsuan kawm'
Paradis gam tanpha'n. [honhuai in,
Tua gam in ka lailung kuai e,
Simsenglouhte lenna'n;
Kalvari sihna pahtawite,
Pawl nuam veng phat sam di'n.
Aw Kalvari sing khros tung a,
Kei dia kilhbelh kikou;
Jerusalem, Kanan gam tengteng,
Na Mang uh hilou hiam? (2)
Aw, ka gen theilou, aw ka gen siamlou,
A itna lamdang lua hi!
Itna piandang ka gen theilou,
Hon itdan a lamdang lua!
Puanjak thupi a hong kek a,
Suangpi hong kitam hi!
Itsiam Pathian a lailung sung ah,
Bangzahta'n na ding hiam? (2)
Simlei khimkhua a hong jing a,
Jinpi a hong ling a;
Lau in khovel a taimangta hi,
Misiangte thouta uh. (2)
Babel ah tong kidawng mawh zong,
Simlei namchih mija;
Juda Jentel tuibang a hon gawm
Itna sisan luang in. (2)
"Na inn ding Ken ka bawl,
Hoihtak leh nuamtak in;
Na kha tenna ding vantung ah,
Gilkial, dangtak omlou,
Na van gamnuam ah jaw,
Tangtawn kiam theilou Gam nuam ah." (2) D.S
Tua gamnuam mahmah ken
Lungsim mitkha'n ka mu;
Nop leh awl kiam nawnta lou ding,
Tu'n a gamla nawn kei,
Tua gam mubang ka ngaih,
Kei ding a A bawl inpi nuam (2) D.S.
Tua gamnuam keikia inn
Ding hilou, nang ding zong
Nazareth Jesu tenna;
Tua gam a tengte bangzahta
A nuam ding! tangtawn a
Aman hon it vang in. (2) D.S.
Tua gam a innpi hoih,
A nopdan gensenglouh
Tua ah lungkham leh gim beita,
Aw kilawm leh kipaktak a,
Zaila sa ding,
Gamchih a mi kimukim ding.(2) D.S.
Hong un, u-le-naute,
Kisa in hongpai un;
Pai ve ni, Zion gam juan in,
I Hondampa'n a bawl,
Inn nuam a teng ding in;
Sih nawnlouhna gam nuamtak ah.
Sih leh nat a len nawnlouhna,
Lungdon, launa, mulkim,
Lungjuan omta lou ding,
Beita ding khitui luan kahna.
Ka Pa na hi, Ka Pathian ngei na hi,
Gam vangla khelhna sal a ka tan lai,
Na hehpihna simthupha tuang hong tung,
Hong sulhei in kong tan zouta, chiin.
Na hehpihna thupiak zuih zaw,
Kisik om ngeilou uhi Toupa;
Leia mi leh van mi dong in.
Aw Toupa Na hon vualjawlna phate,
Nang sang in zatam in ngaina jaw uh;
Taksap vang a khitui a dai lai' zong,
Na gam leh dikna'n kei hon gamlat ke'n.
Nang ngei Jesu ka hon neih leh,
Bangdang ka ngai ding hiam aw Toupa;
Bangkim a ka bangkim na hi.
Nopna zong in sang tampi vialtai uh,
Mulou in han mial ah mangthangta uh;
Thupina lim a delh uh mei lim bang,
Mu leh tang te'n zong nei denlou uhi.
Nang ngei Jesu neih tak nahi.
Tangtawn dong a thupi leh hoih semsem;
Lei leh van a vualjawlna pha.
Tanga Aigupta a lungkhamte,
Tungnung' khut in hon pikhia in;
Ngaikei ning e ka gamlui Aigupta,
Hehpihna Mang' thuchiam lam manawh ning.
Meiding vak, honpi jel in,
Nang kon jui jel ding uh;
Na gamchiam Kanan gam hoih,
Nuam in tuang hontun in,
Kanan pal zou a len ka nuam hi.
Gamdai puanjak nuai a kipan in,
Kap in Zion ka galdot a;
Lailung juang veng duangvul jel ding hi'ng e,
Kei bang a hon ngai zaw singdang om diam?
Paran gamdai gamkeu ka tungta,
Ka zaitha tawl, hinlouh ka lau;
Nang hon ngai veng, Hinna sing limliap nuam,
Nang lou lungkham hehnem ding dang omlou.
Manawh gamnuam tuang i tung dekta,
Salem vangkhua thawm ngaidih ua;
Kanan lenkawl ni hong suak eng singseng,
Israel, lungkham louin nuamta in.
Leia ka neih bang ahia?
Gentheih dahna kia ahi;
Dougal in hon umkimvel,
Niteng' buaina in hon bawm.
Toupa, Nang ka hon muang hi,
Tung Pathian Mitel Na hi;
Niteng' la ka sa ding a,
Nang kia hon pahtawi ding in.
Bawlhoih thei, Nang hon kem in,
Ka damna'n hon silsiang in;
Huan Na khros ka pahtawi ding,
Thangvan gamnuam tun phain.
Ka damsung in hithei leng
Nangmah na kia ka sem ding;
Nangdi'n ka kimangzou ding,
Niteng' Nang ka hon pawl ding.
Jesu migi hon jel in,
Hong vak in ka kungtung ah,
Huan Na khros ka pahtawi ding,
Thangvan gamnuam tun phain.
Jing ka zinna vangla e,
Singkhual thamna vangla e;
Ka lungsung leh kimkot ah,
Dougal simsenglouhten gawlbang hon um;
Mangbatna aw'n malbang hon kou veng.
Aw, ka laukha kiang ah leh,
Ka kungtung ngei ah zong;
Vengtu thupi, Tanpa Vanglian ka hi,'
Chiin Toupa, genkik jel in.
Singkhual a ka zin sung in
Singgam a ka tham sung in,
Khattang sawlbang hei ngam la'ng;
Joba' lawmte bang ka lawm hoihte zong,
Khemmi suak jel uh, Nang tellou in.
Kisa nawn uh! aw Toupa,
Simsawm uh midik tung ah,
Ka kha aw, nang zaw pang ken;
Elija' gal, mang David' dougalten,
Thupi a lel uh, Mang Herod in.
Thawmhauhuai gamdai mun ah,
Khemna huih a honglan in,
Sang zatam albang mang uh;
Kei zong Toupa, khemna huihpi hat nua'h,
Albang man lau veng, ka Hondampa.
Tuanglam lauhuai ah hon huai in, Toupa,
Simmawh leh muhdahna lai' ka leng zong;
Nunnop leh albang dah laitak in zong,
Laukha Siangthou hon huai in.
Gamdai lungkhamhuai a ka len lai in,
Toupa Jesu lailung hon khamuan pen;
Tuanglam hoih leh dik leh a siangthou ah,
Lumbang hon sung jel in, aw Toupa.
Setan leh a hatna kaih zatamten,
Hon nuaisiah dia palbang hon nan lai un;
Toupa maiah lunglau louin pang ning,
Laukha Siangthou, hambang hon huai in.
Tang apan a tuanglam a vakvai hi'ng,
Ka Pa' inn tuangnung ka siahsan apan;
Tu'n sulkik hon lel veng, aw ka Toupa,
Hon kai in, lumbang hon sung jel in.

songs.title: Kei Ding A Hong Si Hi
songs.author: Charles Wesley

lines: Jesu min a tungung pen hi,
Simlei leh thangvan ah;
Angel leh mihing in a biak,
Nuai jinmang in a lauh.
Deihlouhna dang nei nawn kei veng,
Midang ka ngai nawnlou;
Khrist sihna kei di'n a hun hi,
Kei ding a hong si hi.
Jesu' min giloute ding hi,
Gilou adia piak hi;
Gitlouh mohpuak a lamangta,
Gawtmun van a tangsak.
Jesu'n koltangte kolbut sut,
Setan' lu khen sidup;
Hatna neiloute hatna pia,
Misite hinna pia.
Aw, khawvel in mu in thei leh,
A hehpihna hauhna;
A itna khut kei hon pom pen,
Mi khempeuh in sang ding.
A dikna thupi ka ensak,
A hotdamna ka phuang;
Leia ka damsung nasep hiai,
Belamnou en un chih.
Ka hat tawpna'n A min lou leh
Nuamsa ka hi mah ding;
Ka laitah dong' A min gen leng,
'En ve un, Belamnou.'
Jakob leh vualpha lei kansang ah,
Aw Pathian, chiam bang kimna Nang na hi;
Phamna chiaului kihawt tung pan in,
Aw thangvan, tuanglam khaubang hong chiah in.
Aw, jawlbang zam in Jordan tung ah,
Laulou a kong galkai theihna'ng in;
Aw Jingsolnou, hambang hon huai in,
Phamna chiaului lian tung pan in.
Toupa, tuanglam in Na kikhung in,
Na vontawi dougal lau hambang vaiten;
Muanna tangbang damna van Kanan,
Gam hong tung thei phet ding ka hi uhi.
Lamet pialgal tuangtun theihna di'n,
Tuanglam dang bangmah a omkei hial hi;
Tua pan in ka it Toupa Jesu,
Hambang hong huai in, mubang ngaih teng tawh.
Hun kidangta, vaihawmna ni thupi,
Sunchin ka naih semsem;
Khemna leh lungkham buainate,
Ka dougal tuibang a hong lian.
Aw, khattang hon nusia ken,
Ka kiang ah om jel in;
Zion tang etlawm ka tun ma'n,
Ka Hondampa, hon pi jel in.
Ka ma ah khemna tuipi a hong-
Man ding lau veng Toupa; lian,
Tua chiaului a tumsate zaw,
Tangtawn gam tuangtungnawn-louding.
Noa damlaia thil omdan bang in,
Leh Sodom khua bang in;
Mahni nopsakna kia zong in;
Aw, Toupa hon heisanta uh.
Na laibu siangthou a kigelh bang
Nuai simlei a buaita in,
Kiitna a hong dai zouta,
Buaina leh lungkhamna'n a dim.
Simlei gimhuaina leh lungkhamnain,
Pa' mel hon musak in;
Zion tate i noplenna'ng,
Ni thupi a hong naita hi.
"Hon mangngilh kei ning'' chih thuchiam manpha e,
Bangmah in ka kha susia, hawlmang lou ding;
Sihna luikuam ah jankhua a mial zong a,
A gallam zek ah tangtawn ni a tang hi.
"Hon mangngilh kei ning, nusia kei ning,
Ka khut in hon len ning, Ka angsung honpom ning;
Hon mangngilh kei ning, nusia kei ning;
Na Tanpa ka hi, nang ka hon kem ding hi."
Jesu' hon itna, hon khawtuahna vang in,
Ka kipahna Amah bangchi'n ka lak dia?
Midangte kiang ah A hotdamna gen ning,
Amah pom, A thuchiam a tan nading un.
"Hon mangngilh kei ning'' A chih thuchiam muang in,
Kipah leh phat la sa'n masuan in pai ning;
Khawvelin simmawh, lawmten hon nusia zong,
Jesu ka kiang nai ding, hon kipaksak ding
Sana a luan kongpi a ka din chiang in,
Ka gimthuakna teng, ka dahna teng bei ding;
"Nasem muanhuai, hong lut in, Kon kipahpih"
Chih thu kipahhuai ka jak chian' nuam na'n chia!
Ngaihtam sial lungjuan ka sial niin aw Toupa,
Heh hong nem in, duanghei lawmnou;
Lelliangthei ngaihtam sial kei di'n,
Naubang kah luankhi hulna hi.
Aw, ngai veng e, Ka Hondampa,
Hon huai ve aw, Na tang siangthou;
Tuang ka tun ma'n Toupa,
Tuangnung hon sia lou aw
Nun ka nop lai sunnite lenkil ah kia jel,
Vangtah kei di'n khimkhua hong jing;
Lumbang hon sung in ka Limbelh,
Lungjuan ngaihtam sial nawn kei ning.
Albang dahte nuama i lenna'ng ni thupi,
Chikchia'n mel k'on mu ding uhiam?
Angel houlungtuakte lenna,
Aw, donchim thei ding ka hiam aw.
Naubang ka kah sunni tam zong aw Mang Jesu,
Na tongchiam gibang khenlouh gam;
Lawmvualte tawh houlungtuak a,
Ngabang ka lenna di'n hon nem.
Tangbang damlai tomkal sungin,
I Jua Pa' nna sem ve ni;
Hun a bei nawn jel main,
Mang' nna i sem ding uh.
Aw, a kul, Mang' nna sem ve ni,
I laukha damna ahi;
Mang' nna sem ve ni,
Akul hi, a kul hi, chi'n gen kimvel un.
I Mang Jesu Khrist loungal jaw,
Pathian dang omlou uh hi;
Lei leh van vaihawmpa hi,
Nasep in pahtawi ni.
Leitung thupina ngaihnat zaw,
Khelhna leh pukna ahi;
Kihehpih leh kingaihniam,
Pialgal tuanglam ahi.
Van a ka Pa phuhlouhte jaw,
Bawhkhiak vek ding chih ahi
Khiaklah ding a om kei hi,
Mang' nna i sem ding uh.
Hiai khawvel damlai gamdai
Lummei bang jing nuai ah;
Sual chiteng leh lungkhamnaten hon umkimvel,
Himahleh leng ka Hondampa ,
Na simthu hoih ka hon theih in,
Ka lungkhamna teng kipahna a suaksak jel.
Tangthu hoih ka kipahna,
Tangthu pha kei dia damna,
Ka Mang' thukhun thupipen ahi,
Aw, kei dia damna.
Sual huihpi leh Jinhuaiten
Hon um kimvel zong leh;
Ka Hondampa'n A hehpihna kulhpi sung ah,
Ka laukha liam A pi ding a,
Hon Tanpa' thuchiam khuambang kip,
Bangmah in dal zoulou hi, aw A hehpihna
A hehpihna min thupi-
Pen kia kei di'n manpha;
Kei migilou, liangvai, genthei, hingtak nawnlou,
Tangtawn pialgal lam hon honsak;
A sisan lui siangthou tak in,
Lungsim in hon musak in, aw ka Mang Jesu
Dougal honglang hiai leitung ah,
Setan dougal sunchin in khuaibang hong hang jel;
Laukha'n paibang non kop louh leh,
Na min lawmnou Toupa, hon gum ngamlou ding hi'ng.
Tang a Na sawltakte Na thuam bang in,
Na Laukha in hon thuam inla;
Ginna'n Na mel lawm hon musak in,
Nuam in na min hon pak nawn ning.
Kalvari mual tung a Toupa'n,
I mawh vang in lungkham haksa chiteng A thuak;
A lungkhamna ngilh vuallouh ding,
Khelh vang in aw, A lungkhamna i ngilh zouta.
Hon ngaidam in, aw Mang Jesu,
Kou dia lungkhamna Na thuakte ngilh mahle ung;
Nang anbang hon Itpa Na hi,
Ka hon ngai hi Toupa, Na mel hon musak in.
Na gam tungding ding in Toupa,
Na tatsate khelhna sal pan pikhia ding in;
Khelhna gallian nuaisiah ding in;
Lunglau ung e, Immanuel, hon huai nawn in.
Khawvel khelhna jing nua'h,
Laukha in hon huai in;
Anbang non itna thu,
Ka gen gen nuam hi.
Thuaknatdan gensenglouh,
Hamsia thuak singdawn ah;
Kei di'n Na hong thuakta,
Lambang hon pak jel ning
Jesu, Na hon itna,
Nuai simlei zilja ah;
Gen di'n hon panpih in,
Nang dia vak hi di'n.
Zion kulhpi pua ah,
Melmaten hon um uh;
Aw, ka Hondampa jaw
Na liangvai lua hi.
Na hon itna simthu,
Na hon panpih kei leh,
Mikhialte jak ding in,
Gensiam thei kei veng
Suahtakna long ni khat paitou ding,
Jesu suahtakna longpu ahi;
Long sung ah namchih pan mi kimding,
A pilut ding thangvan gamnuam ah.
Tua gama lut ding in,
Tua gama lut ding in;
Long sung ah hong lut un, u-le-nau. D.S.
Jesu'n awlmawhin nang hon sam hi,
Long sung ah hong lut un, mikhialte;
Zion gam juan ding long dang omlou,
Hun lapin hong lut in, long sung ah
Galkaina'ng suahtakna long paileh,
Hong nunghei lou ding, na khou zong in;
Zion gamnuam vak lam kaita ding,
Naubang na kap ding tuipi gal ah.
Ka pianna mial mang' kulhpi,
Vak mu ding in aw Jesu,
Na vontawi sual sal a tangsa,
Na banjal zaitha hatin,
Pahna kimna gam etlawm,
Hehpih in tuang hon tun in.
Huan, lungdamta ning Toupa,
Huan, nunnuamta ning Jesu;
Simlei puakgik tengteng tualkhia in,
Angel lenna khelh om nawnlouhna'h;
Khantawn in tutkhawlta ning.
Tua gam tuangtun theih nadi'n,
Hih theih bang ahiam ka neih?
Nangmah hihtheihna ngei hi, Pa,
Vak muhna ding lampi hi;
Ken zong ka tang samta hi,
Hon mualsuak sak ngei ding in
Ka sung a om teng lak ah,
A neupen Nangmah na hi;
Hizongleh aw, ka Mang liangvai,
Vaihawmtu hatpen ding in,
Tu'n zaw hon chialta ning e,
Bangkim Nang thu hita hen.
Nang thu in tuibang siang ning,
Khawvel pal ngai nawnlou in;
Nang sianglam zotna lampi dik
Na Bible thu deihhuai hi;
Tudong in aw, ka Toupa,
Ka thubul hong hita hen.
Lungdam thu gen jel ding zaw,
Ka laukha nangmah na hi;
Khelhna chiteng mauna lak ah,
Kalvari vajuan jel in;
Tangtawn hinna na tan pen,
Khawllou in gen tawntung in.
Luinak a om, sisana luang,
Kalvari pan hong luang;
Tua sisan lui migilou in,
Sianna a muhna hi.
Aw Kalvari lui kilawm, (3)
Kei di'n na hong luangkhia
Gilou si ding a kilhbelh un,
Tua sianna lui muta;
Amah bang in gilou leng zong,
Toupa'n hon siangsak thei.
Toupa ngaihpen, Na sisan pha,
Tampiten theilou lai;
Hotdam taten hiai a mu uh,
A puakgik uh tukmang.
Ka ginnain tua lui ka mu,
Luang hi ka gam pha in;
A hon itna ka thupipen,
Ka sih ni tanpha in.
Haibang ka ngak vangkhua minthang,
Tungchiang Jerusalem khawpi;
Nuai simlei lungkhamna, sen naubang kahna mun,
Tuangnung sia'n leng nuam veng.
Toupa aw, hambang hon huai in,
Lungkham buaina lummei kaiin hon bawm;
Ka van innpi minthang gam vangla leh nuam ah,
Chikchiang' tuang ka tung diam!
Ka tangtawn innpi ding ngai veng,
Suangmantam leh sana vangkhua;
Lungkham, buai, kah omlou, gilkial, dangtak omlou,
Gibang khenna omlou.
Aw ngai veng Immanuel' gam,
Van misiangte tuallenna mun;
Muikhua jinna omlou Belamnou nibang tang,
Zion khawpi tual ah.
Chikchiang' nong tualkum diam, Toupa?
Simlei dahna'n mangbang hon bawm;
Thangvan khopi tual ah ngabang ka len hun ding,
Sunchin gal in don veng.

songs.title: A Lungkhamna Lung In Gel Ni
songs.author: Taivela

lines: A lungkhamna mun gal don ni,
Toupa' henkol buhna;
Gethsemani huan etlawm ah,
A khawul sibang luang! D.C.
Simon Barjon na namsau in,
Na dal zoukei ahiam?
Ka Hondampa paipihta uh,
Siampu lian inn sung ah. D.C
Linglukhu leh mangpuan pia uh,
Chiangin chibai buk uh;
Kuahiam hon vua Na gin gen in
Chiin Amah dong uh. D.C.
Aw Hondampa, na lua sa'ng e,
Kei dia na thuakna zaw;
Mikhialten zong khu ngeilou uh,
Na manglukhu bang zaw! D.C.
Aw ka Hondampa, mubang hon ngai veng,
Kei di'n lungkham meipi hong jing;
Na mel lawmnouin ka lungkham hon nem,
Jingdam Solnou, hong tang nawn in
Aw, hon ompih in,
Mubang hon ngai veng;
Nang louin jaw ka Hondampa,
Sunni ka tum zoulou.
Ka mauna gamdai leh buaina apan,
Hon heisan ken, aw Hondampa;
Aw, Na hon itna in hon tuam kimvel;
Tuanglam lauhuai ka jawt laiin
Sihna Jordan chiaului hong lian zong leh,
Hon ompih in, aw Mang Jesu;
Aw, Na tuanglam galmuang sana tual ah,
Nopna zaisa'n hon heisak in.
Salem kulhpi sung Hinna Singlim ah,
Angelte tawh ka leng zong in;
Aw, Nang tellouin jaw ka Hondampa,
Nang ngai' sunni ka tum zoulou.
Tuisuahgiat bang a hehpihna,
Tuilet bang in migitna;
Hinna Mang siangthou A sihna;
Ka hinna tan a si hi;
A hon itna ngilh teitei a,
Phatlou kuahiam om thei ding;
Tawplou hialin van om sungteng,
Amah ngilh lou hial ding uh.
En dih, kalvari mual tung ah,
Selguk thugil a puakjak;
Pathian hehpihna'n achinkhawm;
A luangjak kiman lawmlawm;
Pathian itna leh lainatna,
Mihing lam ah a luangkhawm;
Dikna leh itna kituak in,
Khawvel mawhpua pomta uh.
Bei hen ka ginlahna, ka kiang ah Jesu,
Pathian in hon hawi ding, Amah ta itte;
Ken A kiang ah ngen leng A hon pe ngei ding,
Ka kiang ah Na om leh launa teng beita.
Ka lampi mial ah Aman hon pi jel a,
A thu jui tawntung ding hon pina peuh ah;
Long sia in mi zousiah tummangpih mahleh,
A simthu gente jaw khangtou den ding hi.
Amah hon itna ken tuin ka muta,
Kei si dinglai Aman hong tankheta hi;
Aman A aw nem in A hon najawl a,
Lungdamtakin Aman kei hong hondamta,
Nat leh gentheih, liangvaih, lungdon bei theilou,
Kei kisaklah ziak hilou, Aman gen zou;
Hotdam hihna'ng thei ing Amah hon hilh hi;
Bangteng hong tung zongleh Toupa juijel ning.
A thuak ngam omlou ding Amah thuak bang in,
A thuakta mikhialte suahtak theihna di'n;
Kei lampi sang a haksa jaw ah paita,
Toupa paina lampi ka jui ngei ding hi.
Damlai gamdai a khualzin sung in,
Niteng khelhna leh lungkhamnaten
Kipahna thengsak, ngaiin
Toupa kap in kou veng,
Tuin vualzawlna hong langta.
Aw, a khawl ding phalkei un, (2)
Ngaiin Toupa malbang kou jel ni
Tang a Babulon a saltangten,
Dah leh kap in Zion galdon uh;
Semgua, kaihging kilawmte
Khawla naubang kapte,
A Mang Jeho un a pikhia.
Nuam in Zion la lem in, (2)
Kipak in Toupa lambang pak ni.
Hun nailou hi Laukha aw, sem in,
Buai leh kisaktheih gimthuaknate;
Sem hat in, Toupa,
Na hatna leh hihtheihna in,
Mial nasepte hong beita hen.
Mial nasepte hawlmang in, (2)
Toupa, na min kia hong thang ta hen.
Laukha, hon ngai ung, hon pi jel in,
Khelhna leh albang manna gam ah;
Na lampi zuihdan
Theisiam kei veng, Toupa Jesu;
Ka lampi ka ah hon pi in.
Gam thupi ka hong tun ma'n, (2)
Vualzawlna khut in hon pi jel in.
Hun mualliamsa teng a pammaih lua maw, Toupa
Na itna vang in ka samkik thei ding hiam?
Ka ta, hun mualliamsa samkik thei lou e,
Itna thupha phuan laiin koia om na hiam?
Ka gen thei diam, Toupa,
Ka gen thei diam, Pa aw?
Setan vanzat a thupipen kei kana hi.
Beth-lehem a suahtakna dakging hiam na gen?
Kalvari tatna dakging maw na gen?
Ahi, aw ka ta hehpihhuai leh liangvai,
Khovel khelhna palbang na nan zawhlouh jiak in.
Khawvel khelh nopsakna'n hon tumbuai jel mahleh,
Na ta khial kisik na ngaidam jel maw, Pa?
Ngaidam jel e, Ka ta ithuai liangvaite,
Ka khamuanna khut len in, Ka von lungdeih aw!
Toupa, Na taklam hiam, Na veilam hiam len ning,
Na veilam hi zongleh kon len phot ding hi,
Ka letna khut jaw khut taklam ahi ding;
Ka deihsakna khut siangthou len gigeta in.
Nunnopna Jingsol Toupa,
Bitna Suangpi Mang Jesu;
Endih lei mija vontawi,
Simlei nunnopna zong in;
Albang manna manawh uh,
A machiang uah hong ding in.
Na mel a kipahna kim,
Nangmah neih a lungmuanna;
Simlei mija in hon thei le uh jaw?
Khelh nopsakna kua'n zong ding,
Albang manna ding phet in.
Sihna gu a na chi uh,
Khelhna gal a hang chi uh;
Hizong ka Mang Jesu in,
A liangvai koute vang in,
Linglukhu leh hankhuk mial,
Kalvari ah n'ong mualsuah.
A thukdan leh a sandan,
A saudan leh a letdan;
Lei leh vana thil chiteng,
Pau chih leh ginghoih teng in;
Anbang Na itna vanglian,
Nunnuam in phuangjak uhen.
Ka lailung temple sung uah,
Mun sangpen hong tang lechin,
Thupi tung a thupina
Pahna tung a van pahna;
Koua ngei hong hita ding,
Tua pen Nangmah ngei na hi.
Ka kha lungkham bangta in,
Na Toupa'n a hon theita;
Lungkhamna leh haksa ah,
Dah leh kap a na mau in;
Nuaisimlei leh thangvan ah,
It in nang hon en tawntung.
Anbang itna ka gensiam lou, lah ka dai thei lou,
Lei leh van Toupa thupi, siangthou kilawmdan,
Halleluia, i theihsun chiat bek in galdon ni.
Siangthou (4), Mang tungnung pen;
Siangthou (3), Hong Hondampa ahi
Anbang itna ka gen siam lou, zana lawmlawm e!
Khawvel mialna leh lungkhamna meipi jing zong;
A liah tuanlou gawtmun in zong ni bangin tang hi.
Halleluia, Halleluia, ni bang in tang hi;
Zion vak tung ah siangthouna la ngaih sa uh,
A phatna la tuipi kihawt bang a dai theilou.
Na lung uh mangbang kei hen,
Limbelh Toupa muang un;
Albang dah in mau kei un,
Toupa Khrist a ihmute,
Hon pi ding ngoumei lai'h.
Ki lungmuan tuah chiat un, (6)
Ki lungmuan tuah chiat unla,
Hiai thu in.
Na lung uh mangbang kei hen,
Toupa Jesu muang un;
Tu'n khimkhua hong jing zongleh
Jing taikhua a hong vak chiang'
Hinna A hong pia ding.
Toupa hong tualkum ding hun,
A ni nai donsak un;
Misiangthoute' na sepsak,
Tungchiang thangvan a chiahpa;
Hong tualkum nawn pah ding.
Ngai un, Mouneipa' kikou aw,
Vaibang tham lel ngoumei lai ah;
Tatten nunnop zaila'n dawn hen,
Hossana, chi a kikou in.
Ka hong pai pah ding hi,
Chiin Toupa'n nam chih A hilh;
Na manta un, nam chih zatamte aw,
A hongpai ni ding a naita.
Aw tangtawn khua, hong vakta in,
Tatten simlei ngai nawnlou uh;
Na gam thupi Jingsol Aksi
Tawh hong vakin, Aw Mang Jesu.
Aw tangtawn khua, hong vakta in,
Tatte hambang vai sawt lua uh;
Maimit luankhi hulna gamnuam,
Hong kihong in, Salem khawpi.
Mial leh vak in hontuam sung in,
Kipahna kim ka nei theilou;
Aw nopna Toupa, hong leng in;
Na gam lilipak hon khiah in.
Aw, tangtawn mualdawn a panin,
Ka hong painawn ngei ding A chi
Tatten nunnop zaila'n dawn hen,
Hossana, chia kikou in.
Ka Hondampa a paipih uh,
Kalvari ah, Kalvari ah;
Khros giktak singbang pua sak uh,
Bah mahmah in a pukpih a,
En un, Pathian Belamnou in,
Khawvel mawhna a pua zouta.
Mikhialten a khaikang uhi,
Kalvari ah, Kalvari ah;
Engbawlna lukhu khusak in,
Hamsia thuak singlel ah A mau;
Tuin zong ka khelh mawhnaten,
Ling sang in a sunna zaw hi.
Nopna siktui siang ka dawnta,
Kalvari mual a hong luangkhia;
Vanmang lukhu i khuk theihna'ng
Aman linglukhu hong khu hi;
Anbang hon itna gen thei ke'ng,
Toupa ka phat tawntungta ding.
Ka Hondampa kha a phamta,
Kalvari ah, Kalvari ah;
A thuak natdante ka theih in,
Ka mawhna meipi bang theng jel;
Sisan phain Ka hon tanta,
Khelhna sal pan pawt in, hon chi.
Sana manglukhu teng sang in,
A linglukhu etlawm jaw hi;
Simlei pallun khempeuh sang in,
A niam lai pen zong etlawm jaw;
A van bukim a kithuam in,
Bangzahta etlawm hi ding hiam.
Thangvan mite gal in don leng,
Nunnop tulsing Toupa bawl bel uh;
Lungkham sawlbang in a bang ua,
Van Mang nunnem tung ah. (2)
Toupa en in, ka lenna mun,
Khemna ngoumeiin mangbang a bawm;
Khemna lummei bangjing nuai ah,
Kinepna'ng omlou hi. (2)
Toupa kenzaw ka damsung in,
Lungkham sawlbang ban na'ng thei kei ve'ng;
Ka lenna gamdai gam ahi,
Naubang nuihna omlou. (2)
Ngaiin mau veng e, Na gam siam,
Silhpuan minthang bat a ka len na'ng;
Ka ngaih niin hongnai henla;
Ka lungsim gilou ah. (2)
Aw ka Mang khovel khelhna pua,
Mial gallian in a manta;
Angel leh A Jua Van Mang in,
Bangchi'n suihlung a gel ding ua?
A na e, ka Mang nunnem,
Ka suihlung a mawl zouta.
Aw Simon Peter leh Martha,
A phamta, ka Hondampa;
A lenna Kanan gam a ngui,
Khawpi sung leh Temple sung ah,
Bangchin tual ka leng ngam diam!
Hondampa tawh i lenna.
Aw a na e, a na lua e!
Hambang vaihna Kanan gam;
Daibang theng mawh ka lungkhamna,
Sumeon genkhawlhna bangin,
Tuin tuang hong tungta e,
Ka lailung sut bang na hi.
Aw Kana a na mouloplai,
Mubang ngai veng nunnoplai;
Tuin lah pakbang a vulta,
Na sakmel etlawm pa bang mual,
Galili na lenna gam'h,
Chikchiang lai ka leng ding hiam?
Ngai veng e, tang a i heidan,
Hossana a sam lai uh;
Omlaivei leh damlou chiteng,
Nuam leh pak a sulheisakpa;
Aw a pham e, khelh vang in,
Noplai ni lenkil ah kia.
Tuin zaw ka Mang Hondampa,
Na Van gam na tun chiangin;
Linglukhu lah ngai nawnlou dia
Vangletna Na manglukhu pen,
Na khuk chiangin liangvaite,
Hon don un, Angel siang tawh.
Aw phat un Pathian Belamnou,
Kalvari a si in;
Nang leh kei A hon tatna di'n,
A sisan hong luangkhia.
Sisan in, Sisan in,
Hon tanta, Belamnou sisan in;
Hon tanta, hon tanta,
Belamnou, Halleluiah! Phat un.
Aw, Toupa hon itna thupi,
A hauhsak chil vuallouh!
Sang tam kiang' A peta, kei zong,
Vualjawlna honpia hi.
Halleluia, thupina teng,
Aman tang tawntung hen;
Khawvel khelhna leh kei Khris in,
Sisan pha'n hon tanta.
Aw ka Hondampa mihing n'ong tan lai'n,
Damlou, nat chiteng thuak a hong paikhawmte;
Amau kuamah na nial ngeilou,
Dam leh nuam in Na paisak jel;
Aw, ka laukha liam in zong Nang hon ngai hi.
Hatloutak in kon juan,
Hehpihtu Mang nunnem;
Na khut siangthoutak in hon pom inla,
Khemna tui kihawt lai hon pikai in,
Na angsung galmuang mun tuang hon tun in.
Na sakmel ah pahna kim om, chi uh,
Na tongsuah zong khuaiju bangin a khum hi;
Na mihipna Na mel deihhuai,
Na tongsuah khuaiju bang khum tawh,
Aw mu leh theisiam ding in ka hon juan hi.
Na sulnung hon jui ing ka Mang Jesu,
Hiai nuai simlei khimjing ah hambang vai ing,
Mang David meivak tang kilawm,
Nang ngei Jesu Jingdam Solnou;
Aw ka lutang jawn ah hong vak tawntung in.
Ka tung ah khemna tangni sa lua e,
Khemna huihpi chiteng ka kim ah hong lang;
Ka lu sawlbang liah ding omlou,
Na kha jak in kei hong liah in;
Aw khemna huihpi lanlai zong hong len in.
En dih ua i Mang Jesu mel deihhuai,
Gilou kisikte tung ah A nuihmai hi;
I mawh vang ua A thuakna leh,
A nak siangthou a sutna uh,
Aw A thuaknat dan teng A ngilhzouta hi.
Aw Hondampa sual leh buaina khimjing lai ah,
Laukha'n hambang hon huai in;
Sisan luang a Na tatsate sual a liam in,
Nunnopna tuipi luanglai a khawl.
Nopna tuipi luang henla,
Simlei albang dahna;
Mang Vontawi ka sual Tanpa,
Ka machiang ah sawlbang hong hei in.
Bangdang teng sang' Na thupi e, ka Hondampa,
Na khutsuak kipahpih ung;
Thilsiam teng sang' Na hoih tungtuang ka Hondampa,
Anbang Non itna lung in gel mawng.
Toupa simlei Na thil thawnpiak masa ahi,
Lei pahna ka simsenglou;
Van mun thupi Na vualjawlna bukim ahi,
Kalvari mual ah kei non pia hi.
Thilsiam teng in Na hehpihna theisiam le uh,
Simlei leh thangvan dong in,
Phatna zaila dim in a ging a dai lou ding;
Thilsiam teng in Nang hon pahtawi hen.
Toupa Na min zah in om hen,
Na gam thupitak in tuang hongtung hen;
Endih, Na gam nuaisiah ding in,
Nuai Jinmang in khelhna hon zang,
Na min lian lawibang hong thang hen.
Aw Jesu, ka Hondampa,
Na min hong pahtawi in;
Phaijang Lili pal vangkhua ngui lai ah,
Khelhna nuaisiah ding in Nang hong pai in.
Gingtu lai a khelhna ziak in,
I Toupa min tongsia in lel uh e;
A min siat ding phal kei ve ni,
A mel siat ding phal kei ve ni,
I laukha liam damna ahi.
Ka min tongsia a lelna un,
Khasiatna'n hon tun nak, Jesu'n a chi.
A min siangthou pahtawi ding a,
A dikna silhpuan a kithuam,
Tatsa lai'h mi omlou i hiam?
Khelhna in a lua neilou hi,
Laukha simseng louh a pimang zou hi;
Van Mang Vontawi siangthou pen zong,
Nuaisimlei a hong len lai in,
Sisan kai in a mausak hi.
Khelh vang in muanna omlou,
Simlei gimhuai mun ah;
Van gam ka ngai e, ka Jua sau etlawm,
Khelhna lummei bang jing nawnlou chi uh.
Jan muikhua jin thawmhauhuai ah i Mang Jesu'n,
A pumpi A hawm a, A sisan a hawm in;
Non theih tawntung na'ng un hiai dawn un, A chi hi,
Albang dah luankhi tawh.
Bukna a bawl uh a,
Zion kulhpi sung ah;
Chinglou in gel teitei uh,
Vai dik in hawm nuam lou uh,
I Toupa kung tung ah.
Huan lam juan in pai uh, dougalte tuak ding in,
A lawmvualte selungngai, maimit sing zou uh;
Mang vontawi Amah kia'n, khawul sibang luang in,
Jankhua in A thum hi.
Melma Rom sepaihte'n Amah bawlsia uhi,
Enve ua kotkawl a sisan kai niuniau in;
Khawdung leh khawvai ah nunglehhen in pi uh,
I Mang lelliangtheipa.
Tawp simthu lel lou uh, endih ve ua tua Mang,
Singlamteh a suan ua, Amah khakiak na'ng in,
Kalvari mual lam ah mipi'n a masuan ua,
Etngam vual hilou hi.
Tua mual a tunta ua, a khai ua tullel ah,
A nuai a mipiten saksi bang in awi uh;
Siktui a dawn sak ua, A lu A hong kun a,
A kha a khahta hi.
Lungmuanna kim, nunnopna kim,
Hehpihna vak, ka Mang mel ah;
Lusun lai leh thuak lai a nem,
Liangvaite din inn nuam.
A omna mun peuh van ahi,
A khebul a om zong nuam hi;
Lungkham leh mial nuai a bahte,
Nuam in a khawlsak jel.
Aw, i it paisate ka mu,
Kiitna vak ah a hong lang;
Lungtuaka lenkhawmlai zong nuam,
Hong un, chi'n hon sam uh.
Luankhi nul a i khensate uh;
Puanngou silh in leng diamdiam
Lungkham leh dahna teng beita,
Angelte dung sun uh.
Lailung juang veng hiai leitung ah,
Hizong itna Toupa vang in;
Ka laukha a lungdeihte tawh,
Thangvan ah lengkhawm uh.
Hon ngaiveng e, nunnopna pen,
Na thuakna in kahlai hon nem;
Ka lenna mun gamdai ahi,
Gibang hon khen la'ng e.
Sianglou mun ahi hiam, ka pianna nuai simlei;
Ka tung sunni lenkawl a hong suak niteng in,
Gentheihna leh lungkhamnate'n hon bawm.
Ka tawlta hi, (2)
Suangtu khelhna vang a simlei hamsia thuak jaw,
Ka tawlta hi, (2)
Ka puakgik hon dawn ding lawm hoih ka ngai.
Sim leh mal ka zong a, lawm hoih dang ka mu lou,
Gentheihna'n hon bawm in ka neih teng mang zouta;
Van Mang Immanuel a hong nai jaw.
Hiai thu A gen: (2)
Ka ta na puakgik Ka khebul ah hong nga in;
Hiai thu A gen: (2)
Ka khut leh khe en in, na jang ding hi.
Ka it ka na muh in, ka puakgik hon dawn jang;
Lei hamsia teng pua in Kalvari ah A mau,
Hon makhelh in ka nuailam pan hon dom.
Gensiam leng aw, (2)
Kei bang a puakgik leh mi lungkhamte kiang ah,
Gensiam leng aw, (2)
A hon itna a thukdan, a san dan.
Lei ka Pa gam hilou, ka kha a muang thei diam?
Amah a khuksak uh linglukhu hilou maw?
A paina haksa zongleh ka jui ding.
Honphal lou ding (2)
Amah ngilh a simlei pallun zou mai ding jaw;
Honphal lou ding, (2)
A omlouhna mun a liangvaih ding jaw.
Ginna'n gelsiam lehang,
Hiai khovel a pan in;
Pak ka nuam Hondampa,
Na hehpihna deihhuai.
Kipak louthei hi keng, (2)
Hondampa, Na nak liam,
Tatna sisan pawtna;
En in Non tatdan tel;
Na lua lawmlawm sa'ng e.
Na manna kumsawt gam,
Pel in nuai simlei ah;
Ka dahna uh Na pua
Hamse thuak singdawn ah
Tang a pi leh pute,
Mansaksa van pialgal;
Itna sisan vang in,
Kei in ka na muta.
Angel siangte lenna,
Sunni tumseng lou gam;
Aw, Na sisan vang in,
Chikleh tuang ka tung diam?
Simlei ah liang zongleh,
Hehpihna'n honhuai in;
Ka laukha vangam ah,
Nunnuam in lengta ding.
Na min thupi phat in,
Nuam in zaila sa ning;
Tullou pak Hondampa,
Aw, Na hoih tuan lua hi.
Aw tuailaite na hun hoih lai,
Toupa a di'n pia un;
Na tuailai hun hoihte Toupa'n A zang nuam hi,
Na Hondampa na sem inla;
Na tuailai hun hoih in.
Na tuailai hun hoih in,
Nang hon Siampa Pathian thei in;
Na hun hoih lai'n Toupa ding in,
Sem in thanuamtak in.
Hun leh nite tuibang kiam jel,
Damlai ni zong kiam jel,
Hun tampi mualliamta, ni leh kha kidangta,
Aw tuailaite na pak lutlai-
In Toupa nna sem in.
Toupa'n, "Na tuailai hun hoih in,
Ka nna sem in," A chi;
Denchiang in na hun hoihlai mual a liam ding hi,
Tua na hun hoihlai in sem in,
Sem in sep hun ahi.
Noute pai un namchih kiang ah,
Suahtakna thu hilh un;
Kuapeuh Amah ging in tangtawn hinna nei ding,
Na tuailai hun hoih beima in;
Na Toupa nna sem in.
Lungkhamna sual chiteng in hon kimvel,
Sihna hontun ding in;
Ginna in nunglam ka enkik a,
Ka Hondampa'n A hon zong.
Ka kipak mahmah hi, tu in jaw,
Hondampa migi, anbang hon Itpa'n,
Ka laukha A hondamta hi.
Kipahna tak lungsung a ka neih
Jesu hon piak ahi pen,
Lei pahna sang a pahna thupi,
Van pahna in ka dim hi.
Belamnou Mang lenna tang ka
Kipahna'n hon dawn a; dot in,
Sihna Jordan ka kai hun chiang in,
Van ankuang ken ka um ding.
Getsemani huan ah,
I Toupa Jesu a thum lai'n,
Mipi hongpai khawm ua, i Toupa hong man uh;
A tung simthu lel in mawhpaih uh e,
Siampu lian inn sung ah A sihna'ng lel uh.
Lungkham meipi jing, (2)
I Toupa a hon bawm, Kalvari mual tung ah;
Linglukhu leh tongsia banna sing lou,
A belh ding neilou hi maw i Toupa in.
Aw, Simon Peter leh,
Nungjui lungkhamte, thouta un,
Na Toupa uh pi uh, A phamna ding mun ah;
Thangvan pan hong tualkum Van Mang lelliang,
A lungkham hehnem ding kuamah omlou hi.
Simlei leh thangvan ah,
A hoih mi gen Hondampa pen,
Thah ding na leh uh maw Zion mipite aw!
A lutlai ni ngilh zou na hi uhiam?
Na pahna pak uhi, tangbang damna pak.
Aw, nou Serafte leh,
Angel siangte'n va endih ua;
Panpih ding neilou na pahna uh Mang Jesu'n,
Khawvel mawhpua a A lungdon laiin,
A Pa malbang kou hi, lungkhamna aw in.
Aw, etngam hilou hi,
I Toupa Jordan galkai ding;
A zaitha hong nem in, A lu hong kun a,
A kha A khah a, kumsawt gam hong tang;
Sual leh dougal nusia'n Jordan gal A kai.
Min dang tengteng sang in,
A ngaih pen Mang Jesu hi;
Mawhna apan hong tan,
En in, van mangtutphah ah,
Vai A hawm lel hi.
Ginna'n gal in don leng,
Anbang itna leh nunnop pallun zouin,
Aw lungdeih teng tual a leng diam?
Ka laukha hambang vai,
Na Toupa mu lou na hiam?
En in Zion tate,
Tangtawn gam thupi juan in,
Khaubang chiah uhi.
Mawhna in gam thupi
Leh ka Toupa mel a liah;
Pialgal tuanglam haih veng,
Lungkham dahna tuibang lian,
Laukha, hon huai in.
Anbang non it hiam ka chi a,
Hichi maimah ding hiam?
Lili bang hong pal ding ka sak lai' i gam,
Khimkhua hong jing, taikhua hong val nawn lou hi.
Aw Galili tuipi tung a Na simthu gen,
Hon gingsak nawnta in aw Toupa;
Buaina chiautui in a taihte'n,
Honpa kon ngai uh.
Na nuaisiah zouta ka sa a,
Hi bang a hon bawl uh;
Na belamte huangsung a ngabang leng lai,
Khelhna'n jaksak, tai ding lunggelta uh.
Gosen gam a a mau bang un,
Ka mau uh nang ngai in;
Tuipi San Na pikaina khut thahat in,
Honpi sam in, zalenna hon tun in.
Mial thuneihna a bei chiang in,
Hon ensak sam ding hi'ng;
Dantan sunggil a saltang zong Ka suah thei,
Keia te hon ngilh thei ding ka hi hiam!

songs.title: Amah Ka Juan A Pahna Ka Mu

lines: Jesu hon itna ka theih in,
Nuam in Amah ka juan ding;
A hon itna thute ka theih in,
Nuam in ka phat tawntung ding.
Amah ka juan a pahna ka mu,
Ka laukha zong A hondam;
Kei dia mun hon bawlsak thangvan ah,
Tangtawn in ka tutkhawl ding.
Ka lungkhamna khempeuh A pai
Lungnuam in ka omta ding;pih,
A kiang a tangtawn pahna om pen,
Nunnuam in tengdenta ding.
Sawtlou kal in A hong pai pah ding,
Anbang A itte pi di'n;
A van inn nuam ah A pi ding a,
Pahna tawplou gam nuam ah.
Sunchin khelhna in hon vel zong leh,
Hangtak in ka ding ding hi;
Jesu vangletna in honpi dia,
Khemnate ka nuaisiah ding.

songs.title: Khawpi Tul Lou Gam Hon Nem In
songs.author: Thrangchhuma

lines: Zion khawpi ka manawh lai',
Khial a liam in machiang suan la'ng;
Nangmah louin simlei ah zaw kap veng Toupa,
Tang a ka pahna pen Laukha hon huai nawn in.
Hun mualliamsa ka gel chiang in,
Ka ngai e, lungdeih ka khente;
Khen nawnlouhna Immanuel'
Khawpi tullou gam'n hon nem in.
Ka kahna gam zil in ja e,
Simlei ah zaw vakvai ka hi;
Immanuel mial gal a lian hon huai jel in,
Hiai khawvel leh sihna Jordan ka kai ma in.
Simlei ah zaw kimna ni ding,
Mun omlou hi, ka buaina gam;
Aw bangchik hiam lungdeihte tawh ka len hun ding,
Tangtawn mualdawn ahi, buaina gal a then ding.
Jesu hon sapna aw ngai in,
Nou mikhialte, hongpai un;
Khawlna leh muanna Ka nei hi,
Nang adia Ka hon piak ding.
Hotdamna kim, (3)
Tuin nei inla, nuam in. (2)
Tuin tung thangvan sangtak ah,
Om zong leh hon sam lailai;
Ginna in A aw i za thei,
'noute hong pai un,' A chi.
Sapna aw ging a dai pah ding,
Hizong tuin hon sam hi;
Khial aw, hon sapna ngaikhia in,
Bitna sisan lam juan in.
Jesu kiang kia ah na mu ding,
Hinna nang dia piak a om;
Sum leh pai kham leh ngun loua,
Pathian thilthawnpiak ahi.
Simlei ah zaw lungkham tate,
Suah, Tum, Sim, Mal a mi;
Dawnbang tuah ni'n Toupa Jesu hon kipahpi'n,
Houlungtuak a Non itna simthu sutkhawm in;
Simlei kahna teng theng sak in.
Na laukha'n hon dimsak inla,
Simlei kahlai bang in;
Lambang hon pak n'ung anbang Na itte'n,
Tang a hon deih louh uh;
Aw vanglian in ngabang leng in.
Ka gen ka sut chim theihlouhte,
Na vang a lengkhawm in;
Lungdeih simthu a sut uh maw Na sisan in,
Mualchin leh tangchin gam apan hong paikhawmte,
Aw hong leng in, hon siangsak in.
Nuaisimlei zaw lungkham kahna,
Mun in na gel zong a;
Laukha siangthou thupi leh vualzawlna manpha,
Zata din lungdamhuai leh lungsung hoihna hi'n;
Aw Laukha Siangthou hon pia in.
Aw Mang Jesu, thawmhau tak in,
Hon omsak kei hial in;
Aw Na vang a lawmvual ngaihteng a hong kim chiang',
Kumtawn a nuai simlei pallun tuangnungsia in,
Zata lunglai ah hong teng in.
Ka gam tul ding ka tenna mun,
Bangchik chiang tuangnung ka siah diam?
Angel siangte leh ka Toupa' mel-
Muh kal ngakla'ng e.
Aw Jerusalem dai,
Ka Toupa'n thawmhau in A ngak;
Tongsia banna sing ah thuaksak uh,
A linglukhu tawh.
Na thuakdan ka gensiam lou hi,
Sual thoihna'n Van Mang Belamnou;
Na hong piang mun genthei Bethlehem,
Bawng inn daidam ah.
Mang Jesu gal in donchim la'ng,
Kalvari lam ka hon zong ding;
Khawvel mawhpua a Na lungkhamna,
Ngilhni omlou ding.

songs.title: Pahtawi In Om Tawntung Hen Belamnou
songs.author: Kamlala

lines: Halleluia, aw Halleluia Amen,
Kalvari a itna sisan vang in;
Kahna gam leh lungkhamna jankhua mial,
Nopna van pialgal in hon tanvak.
Kipahna tullou ding,
Halleluia, Halleluia,
Pahtawi in om tawntung hen Belamnou,
Anbang A itna'n lungkham a nem.
Laukha, hong leng in, pahna gim namtui,
Halleluia, chiin gam daidam ah;
Kipak in hon awi nuam uh liangvaite'n,
Nang Na om leh lei van a tang jel.
Kumkhaw gam leh tangtawn a bei mateng',
Pahna vak thupi, van Saron pak hoih;
Aw Na pallunlai vulni omlou ding,
Nang hon ngai pen ing, hong ompih in.
Khawvel in mel theih leh ka Mang vanglian,
Van angelte lai' pahna kha jak in;
Kalvari a Belamnou hon itna,
Zaila'n awi ding uhi, tangtawn in.
Bible thutak ahi,
Bible thutak ahi,
Hehpihna kong kihon lai in,
Lut in, gam siangthou ah. (3) D.S.
Dan palsat mi thuaksak,
Pa' thu kipia ahi;
A hong tungta teltuamte lak',
Genthei naubang kahna. (3) D.S.
Niteng hun tuibang kiam,
Damsung zong niteng kiam;
Khrist tawh nunnuam a lenna ding,
Ka hun bukim meng hen. (3) D.S.

songs.title: Simlei Thupina Ka Zon Lai In
songs.author: D.Angel

lines: Simlei thupina ka zon laiin,
Ka lungsung pan thu hong kigen hi;
Lammang sul hong heita in, hong chi.
Ka Toupa simlouh ken muan ding neilou,
Ka lam manna pan kei hon sam hi!
Toupa Nang loungal muanna omlou.
Genthei in lammang hita leng zong,
Na itna vang' nuamsa ka hita;
Simlei lungkhamna ngilhta ning e.
Aw! Hondampa tun ka hon sam hi,
Ka nuntakna khempeuh Nang kon pia;
Hon zang in, Toupa Nang ading in.
Tun zaw simlei thil nusiata ning,
Ka Toupa Na hinna thu kia lel;
Zaila'n lambang hon pak kumkhua ning.

songs.title: Ka Ngaihni'n Hong Tung Jel Uhen

lines: En dih, Hondampa na Toupa'n,
Tongsia banna sing ah hon ngak;
Kei zong hon ngak in, Hondampa,
Ka hong pai lampi haksa zong.
Khemna lampi chiteng ah zong,
Aw Toupa k'on taisan louhna'ng;
Van angel lungtuak muanhuaite,
Ka ngaih ni'n hongtung jel uhen.
En dih ua, hinna ding lampi,
Zuih hak hi, tun louh ding lau veng;
Toupa van Laukha huai louh in,
Kuahiam tua mun tuang tung thei ding.
Chikchiang in kong mu ding uhiam?
Haibang ngakla'ng lei gimhuai ah;
Don jel veng nuam a len hun ding,
Aw Na hon hehpihna vang in.
Tongsia banna tulsing piandang,
Lungkham thuak a Na hong tatna;
Ka hinna pen tulsing ahi,
Chiin pahtawi tawntung thei leng.

songs.title: Vansin Nuai Zaila Sain Dim Ding
songs.author: Patea

lines: Aw Toupa Mang David leh a Suan Aksi,
Na dikna gam ading in Nang Na hon bawl;
Aw, nun ka nopna tuisuahgiat bang luanglet,
Phamna luigei ah zaisa'n Na min phat ning.
Aw Toupa, Na min ngaih lambang pak ning,
Simlei a Na siam zousia'n pak hen;
Toupa pahtawina'n aw suah uhen,
Nuai simlei zaisa in dim ding.
Mihing ka hih main zong Toupa Jesu,
Man dang lamen lou in sisan in nong tan;
Simseng a hon theisiam hi maijen leng jaw,
Nuai simlei zaila sa din dimsak nuam ing.
Koilai ah hiam Toupa, mun na hon bawlsak,
Danial bang in dawngkot pan gal in don ning;
Sana vangkhua siangthou leh a mun thupi,
A gimhuai ah zong khukdin bek in don ning.
Aw, Immanuel lei leh van thak siam ah,
A dung leh vai ah limnga bang leng sam leng;
Buaina chiteng thuak a gibing ka khente,
Van thupina silh in a mel uh mu ning.
Beth-lehem tang tung ah,
Van misiangthou kikou aw'n hon thawnvel;
Zata din Tangthu Pha lungdamhuai,
Tuang hong tung, chi'n gen uh. (2) D.S.
Kuahiam thuak sik A thuak,
Beth-lehem leh Kalvari mual tung ah;
Gimhuai chiteng thuak mualsuah zou in,
A pham Kalvari ah. (2) D.S.
Aw, a min Kalvari,
Khawvel Hondampa kha a phamna mun;
Tangtawn la ngaih in thang kimvel hen,
Halleluia, Amen. (2) D.S.
Thu in ka genseng lou,
Keia ding in gimhuai chiteng A thuak;
A lungkhamna thuakpih sam ding in,
Khawpua ah pai ning e. (2) D.S.
Aw Halleluia! Toupa vanglianpen,
A phatna'n kawlkil teng thawn hen;
Namchih Mang thupi leh zahom pen in,
Mija lunglai' simthu hong lel nawn in.
Hambang huai nawn in, taimangsa te,
Laukha maimitsingte thousak in;
Simlei huaipa tung Si-al Vanglian pen,
Albang manna leh dahna gam tanvak in.
Kumpi David leh hambang huai Mosi,
Lei aksi lian mualliamta uh;
Tuin Mang Jesu leh Laukha Siangthou,
I Siampu Lianpen leh i Aksi hi.
Ngoutuisuahgiat leh simlei mual din ma'n,
Theih phaklouh Pathian Nang Na hi;
Sunni leh solkha leh si-al teng in,
Na vakna ningbang zou in a tang uh.
Thuneihna thupi, pahtawina sang pen,
Vualzawlna tang dia lawm na hi;
Leilung pian lai a gawhsa Belamnou,
A sisan in Khawvel hondam hen aw.
A manna gam kheng in,
Van Mang Vontawi hong piang;
Beth-lehem bawng inn ah,
Gankuang a hong jal in,
Ka Mang naubang A kap;
Liangvai na lawmlawm e,
A hon khawtuah ziak in.
A hon khawtuah ziak in,
Vanmang Vontawi liangvai,
Lungakna nei lou in;
Guabang ka hinna ding,
Gimhuai chiteng A thuak;
Kalvari mual tung ah,
Kha a phamsak uhi.
Aw tua kalvari mual,
Maimit suan chim la'ng e;
Ka Mang khaphamna mun,
Tualthattu bang in maw,
Khros tung ah a khai ua;
Hibang a pham singdang,
Om diam hong en ve ua.
Simlei mi a pham leh,
Tun leh jua sau sung ah,
Phungvual in gawlbang um;
Ka Mang kha a pham leh
Kalvari mual tung ah;
Phungvual in tuangnung sia,
Giloute kal A ngak.
Lei hamsia thuak Na kungtung ah,
Khelhna lummei bang hong jing in;
Ka Mang mel deihhuai sawlbang liah;
Kawl a nisuah ngak in-
Mial a sawlbang hei hi'ng,
Jing taikhua'n hong val in;
Mial nuai ah kap in ka vai,
Pialgal sunni hon tan in. (2) D.S.
Buaina chiautuipi Na tung ah,
Galili tuipi kihawt bang',
Ka dougal lian in hat zong leh;
Huih leh tulvuah nuai ah-
Lungkham albang dahna'n,
Gawlbang hon um zong leh;
Long' nung ah ka Mang Jesu,
Hambang huai ding' hong nai hi. (2) D.S.
Mial a taikhua val ngakte zong,
Tu dong in zong thawn lou uhi;
Ken zong ka Mang Jesu ngak in,
A thuchiam a ding in-
Kumpi David meivak,
Ka tuanglam jawtna ah;
Ka sumlu sawlbang liah di'n,
Mang meivak a tang nawnta. (2) D.S.
Na sulnung hon jui a Toupa,
Gentheihna ka thuak khempeuhte,
Hehpihna thilpiak a na hi;
Jan mial khengta hang maw!
Jingkhua hong vak nawnta,
Thou un Zion vontawi;
Tangtawn gam adin sem ni,
Lummei jing a thengsakta. (2) D.S.
Van khopi tuallai a lengsa,
Lei lungkham thuak in hong thum e;
Pa aw, hon paisanken, A chi,
Panpih A ngai ahi, A mel ka et in.
Mang mel ka muh chiang' phat in la sa ning,
Khawvel lungkhamna ka kipahna a hong hi dia;
Van ka zalenna ding gam nuam,
Sunchin galdon ning.
Israel vontawi lungmawlte,
Salem kulhsung gal lian suak uh;
Mang sisan nam chih di'n hong luang,
Kei mikhial silsiangna lui siangthou ahi.
Hondampa tatna sisan luang,
Kalvari hamse thuak tulsing
Lel a linglukhu A khuk lai,
Mel mu nuam ing e, aw van khawpi thak tawh.
Lungkhamna in hon tuam kimvel,
Khelhna'n sunchin tuibang hon jawl;
Aw, ngai veng e ka Hondampa deihhuai,
Ka kulhpi leh ka bitna pen;
Hon ompih jel in aw.
Aw, galdon ning Toupa,
Lungkham meipi hong jing zong leh,
Ka laukha tutkhawl na'ng Zion
Leh Na sakmel deihhuai.
Tuin pak in hong lun nawn in,
Simlei khelhna khimjing lai ah;
Simlei pallun sunchin ningbang zoute,
Na itna theisak nawn inla;
Albang man ding phal ke'n.
Tanga i nopna leh pahna,
Ka mang sakmel deihhuai liamsa;
Tuin pakbang hong vul tadih zongleh,
Aw, A hong lun nawn ngei ding hi,
Nuama zaisak nawn na'ng.
Aw, galdon ni Zion vangkhua,
Lungdeih, lawmvual a kimna uh;
Itte luankhi tawh gibang i khente'n,
Sunchin don in hon ngak den uh;
Tangtawn pah la sain.
Ngaihsutna kim kiman hang in,
Ka Mang' anbang itna kilang tawplou;
Kou ding a Na hinna Na hon piak,
Mizata'n mel in thei chiat le uh;
Kalvari a Na hon thehjak ngei.
Kipak mahmah ing Toupa,
Na thupha leh zaila in hon pawl tawntung in;
Ka lungsung ua thuneihna mun sang tang inla,
Hotdamna Zoar hon tun in.
Na simthu leh late phuang di'n,
Ka chin kei, Toupa ka lung mawl lua hi;
Nangmah in hon phuang zaw ta mai in,
Mite lungsim sung ah na thu hing;
Hon gelh in tangtawn a hing ding in.
Khawvel thuneihna paikhia un,
Thildang tengteng sang a A deih pen zaw;
I lungsung thukpen ahi jaw hi,
Toupa a ding in mun awngsak un;
Toupa tawh kikholh lugdamna hi.
Toupa hon nusia ngei nawn ke'n,
Ka lungsung thuneihna hong luah inla;
Hong teng tawntungta in, Mang Jesu,
Thildang bangteng zong ngai nawn kei ning;
Zion la lem in nunnuam ta ning.
Jerusalem Zion khopi gal in don un,
Aw, mi a tam Belamnou Mang len na'ng
Mun a om lou;
Aw, lungkhamna leh pahna Kalvari
Tang a kilang hi.
Aw nam tengteng leh,
Chi chih pau chihte;
Van Mang naubang a kahna Kalvari ah,
Khentuam neilou uh. (2) D.S.
Jerusalem khawpi thak nuam galin don un,
Aw, mi atam Belamnou Mang lenna
Mun etlawm ah;
Aw, Kalvari a Pathian' hehpihna,
Lung a gel kul hi.
Halleluia, gensiam leng aw, Halleluia,
Aw, hehpihna dai ngeilou kipahna
Hinna pak hoih;
Gensiam om di'am, sutsiam om him di'am maw-
Aw, A hon itna.
Lungkham buaina dougal hong lang e,
Albang dah ni'n aw Na vak hong tangkhia hen;
Dougal hong lang, Setan dougal hong lang,
Hon veng in aw, Na gam tan lou ding'.
Hon paisan ke'n ka Mang Immanuel,
Nang hon ngai pen veng, nuai simlei ah;
Buaina dougal hong lian zong leh,
Ka bitna galven buk Kulhpi Na hi
Aw Hondampa, khemna gallian in,
Ka hon pe ding aw, Gehen gamnuam, a chi!
Pai ngam la'ng e, mikhial a gawtna uah,
Na gam galmuang Kanan gam lou zaw.
Nopna pialgal ah Na leng zong in,
Malbang kou jel ning, Hondampa mel deihhuai;
A hong lang e, Na gam doutu sual gal,
Ka tuanglam hon dal Nang nuaisiah in.
Sunni bang Na tanna gamnuam ah,
Dougal omlou maw, albang dah nawn kei ning?
Melmu nuam veng jingtui bang hong la in,
Angel siang leh misiangthou' lenna'.
Lei ah pathian tampi om zong,
Pa Pathian khat kia lel van ah om;
Bul leh tawp bei omden Pathian ahi.
Aw u leh nau, nu leh pa itte,
Tangtawn hin kiamlou neihna din;
Lunghei unla, Pathian hon bel un.
Juauthei hinna bei pathiante'n,
Lampi mial ah hon pimang tawntung;
Dahna loungal bangdang neilou uhi.
Khelhna bulpi Lungzaipa in,
A sep leh a kipahna pen zaw;
Laukhate gawtmun a pilut ahi.
Ngai un, ei hon siam Pathian in,
A mi mangthangte zonkhiakna di'n;
A Tapa tang neihsun A hon pia hi.

songs.title: Hon Na Pi Jel In Mang Jesu

lines: Simlei pak hoih ka nen a lunte,
Daibang thengsak in meipi jing tawh;
Na tuanglam tang a manglou in,
Sakmin lamna Jordan gal lehlam ah.
Aw hon pi jel inla,
Khelhna khukpi sihna mial zou in;
Honpi jel in aw,
Immanuel Mang Jesu.
Gam teng ah thangsuak in, Mang liangvai,
Na hon itna gen jeljel in aw;
Na min siangthou pahtawi ding in,
Miteng hilh in aw Kalvari bang in.
Lawmvual lungtuak gibang khenna gam,
Kap in mau uh e, ka Hondampa;
Sisan pha a Na tatsate,
Simlei pak hoih pak in a leng nawn uh.
Kumpi David Jingdam Solnou aw,
Hong vak nawn in ka lailung sung ah;
Khelhna khimjing nuai a lengte,
Na vang zou din aw hon pi kik nawn in.
Hondampa zaw ka theih ma in,
Singdang Pathian hiam aw chi'ng e;
A Tangthu Pha ka hon sim leh,
Ka Pa, ka mansan A na hi.
Ka manna lauhuai a A hon zonna ah,
Gimna chiteng A hong thuak a;
Ka laukha hondam ding in.
A Tangthu Pha gen lel in zong,
Lailung sung a nuamsak zou ngei;
Kha Siang theihsakna ngial in zaw-
Khitui luang saklou thei lou.
Aw a bukim a muh ka ut lawmlawm ngei,
Ka mawh sianna ding a sisan;
A luanna liamma pawn ngei.
A laitah ding kuan in Jesu,
A melmate ding in thum hi;
Pa aw amaute ngaidam in,
A theihlouh vang uh hi, chiin.
Itna ding in zong a buching zou ngei maw?
Pathian hehpihna Kalvari
Kheng a genthei dang omlou.
Mikhial koute ding in Jesu,
N'ong kipezou na lawmlawm e!
Na silhpuan zong tang zoulou maw?
Na silhpuan ding' aisan uhi.
Hinna tawp dong a anbang hon itpa aw,
Ka laitah kuan dong in Toupa;
Lung in hon ngilh kei ning e.
Hondampa lungkham in a pai,
A galte'n a kai ua;
A paina ding lam ka et leh,
A sihna ding mun ahi.
Tua tangtung ah a khaikang ua,
Hamsethuak singdawn ah;
Liangvai kahna aw ka jak jaw,
Hondampa' aw ahi.
A liangvaihna sing khros pua in,
Toupa a pita ua;
Hondampa koikuam tun uh hiam,
Ka Toupa vahuh ning.
Puan thupi leh linglukhu tawh,
I Toupa a kai ua;
Ka tatkhelhna tengteg pua in,
Gentheihna tang juan hi.
Tua ah mipi a kikhawm ua,
Toupa simmawh mite;
Lungkhamnaten Amah a bawm,
Sing khros ah khaikang uh.
Ka Mang thuakna ka ngaihtuah chiang',
Naubang kahna'n a lawm;
A mai a betna uh leh a vuakna liam uh,
Ka ngaihtuah ni'n zaw luankhi'n hon tum.
A na lua e, A hon tatna! (2)
Khawvel Hondampa sakluang,
A paipihta uh;
I Toupa lungching hi, liangvai zong leh.
Juda miten siamtang lou in,
Hon gel mahle uh zong;
Kenzaw hon ngaina veng, ka Mang lungching Na hi,
Koute' mawh vang in aw, kulsin na tang.
Lunta pham leh vual in awi a,
Van Mang pham awilou uh;
Phamna'n naubang a awi, i Mang hehpihhuai hi,
Kulsin ah jalsak uh, mi muhdahpa.
Thelbang thounawnta i Toupa,
Khawlna gam juan ding in;
Oliv tang tung ah ngoumei in a pi a,
Khawlna gam a juanta i Toupa un.
Khawlna gam Na manawh ziak in,
Khawvel a ngui zouta;
Sulkik hon lel dih vaw simlei haksatna ah,
Tatna simthu gen in, tanglam ve ni.
Ka Hondampa ka mawh tan in,
Lei ah A vakvai a;
Mikhial hing takloute bang in,
Sing ah a thuaksak uh.
Aw Hinna Mang siangthoutak in,
Ei din A thuak zouta;
Lungkhamna sih dong a thuak in,
Eite hon tan khiata.
Ka Hondampa'n Ka dang a tak,
Chi a A mau lai in;
Mipi sang tampi te lai ah,
A pe ding omlou uh.
A tuanglamte galdon jel leng,
Kalvari mual dong in;
Toupa, hon jui ngam kei ung e,
Gingtuten a chi uh.
A lungkham, A thawmhau bang in,
Panpih A ngai gige;
A deihlam na sem jel ding in,
Ka theihna tawm lua hi.
Sunchin in ka lungtang in Jesu ka ngai semsem hi,
Amah zaw jingsang khawvak thupi sang in kilawmzaw;
Amah zaw ka lunggulh theih khempeuh sang in zong manpha,
Sunchin ama sang in A hong ngaihhuai semsem ahi.
A kim zong kisut zoulou,
Hih leitung apan in;
Tua luigal gam ah Amah
Ngaihhuai semsem lai ding hi.
Gamlapi apan ka muh in A thupina'n hon tan,
Lili pallun sang' kilawm, jingsol aksi sang' tangpha;
Ka lunggulh bang hong lungkimsak hon nuamsak jeljel hi,
Sunchin ama sang in A hong ngaihhuai semsem ahi.
Khatveivei ka lungkham hang in Aman hong dawnjang a,
Ka dah mahmah lai in Aman A anglai ah hon sia;
Ka mawhna khempeuh hong puaksak Khrist ken ka itpen hi,
Sunchin ama sang in A hong ngaihhuai semsem ahi.
Dahna leh kahna omlou vantung ah,
Na khempeuh thupi tua mun ah;
Lungkham omlou ding, lungdam kimta ding,
Tua mi honpi lak' i om chiang'.
Khitui, khitui, khitui luanglou,
Dahna leh kahna beita hi;
Khitui, khitui, khitui luanglou,
Kahna omlou hi vantung ah.
Vangletna'n hon ngak, hon ngak vantung ah,
Ni tum ngeilou hi, tua mun ah;
Honpa tawh om ding eite tua mun ah,
Hon dahsak thei bangmah omlou.
Jingkhua hong vak chiang' khanglou ding tua ah,
Leitung nuntak lungkham bei ding;
Theitel sem ding a, itte it sem ding,
Eite thak kim ding vantung ah.
Nopna leh kipahna Nang a,
Ka nopna leh ka kipahna;
Aw Mang Jesu Nangmah
Hon piak ngei ahi.
Aw, a na e Pa, Kalvari tang,
Na thuakna liam ka en ngamlou;
Na phamna tulsing.
Mi zatamte'n mel in ma uh,
Israel vontawite'n nial uh;
Zentel Saptuamte'n Kalvari
Ah pak uh.
Zentel Saptuamte i vang nei,
Lei a thil thawnpiak gentak louh;
Hotdamna leh van manglukhu
I tan tuan.
Pianthakna Laukha Nang lou in,
Van gam nunnuam tungthei kei ning;
