Aw, Mang Laukha Siangthou,
Honna huai jel in.
Ka Mang Khros ngai thupi pen ing,
Simlei sum leh pai lamtam sang;
Tua ah namchih mi zata ding,
Kipahna bukim a om hi.
Aw, kon ngai pen hi, hon phat jel ning e,
Ka Toupa sing khros ka bitna pen;
Lungngai tate Nangmah ziak in,
Ka machiang uah aw, Pahna'n kawl hong eng.
Simlei pallun leh thupina,
Et in lungkhamna tamsak lel;
Tangtawn a laukha khawlna leh,
Kipahna dang khat leng mu ke'ng.
Sual huihpi leh khawnim kal ah;
Leh gal ma a ka din chiang in;
Ka kulhpi leh ka bitna pen,
Kalvari sing hon ngaina veng.
Tuisuahgiat, van leh nuai simlei
Belamnou hong sihna thupi;
Pak in zai sa hen tangtuan in,
Hallelui, Halleluia, Amen.
Hinna siangthou Siampa a hua uh Zion ah,
Minsiat leh lungkhamna thuak in a mansak uh;
Laikuang a umpih teng dougal tang zouta uh,
A sulnung hon jui uh mipi simsenglouh ten;
Juda machiang suan uh, dawh-ai a man ding in.
Tuachi'n a manta ua, Siampu Lian in sung ah,
Simthu khauhtak chiam uh, linglukhu khusak ding';
Linglukhu lanbang nga, ka Toupa sumlu ah,
Khut in va beng uh a, sisan kai niuniau in;
Ka Hondampa pi uh, Kalvari mual juan in.
Phamna'n tulsing lem uh, Kalvari mual tung ah,
Kilhna sik sekkhol uh, ka Toupa kilhna ding;
Ka Toupa khaikang uh, sakmel vul ningniang in,
A nak ah a sun ua, sisan leh tui hong luang;
Zion kulhpi sung ah simthu lelkhial uhi.
Tuan simthu tuibang tung Hondampa kung tung ah,
Simthu chiamsa bang in Hondampa A phamta;
Thangvan misiangthoute'n jinpi ling zungzung in,
Kulsin a jalsate' Laukha thelbang thousak;
Hondampa sun ding in khaw siangthou tualleng uh.
Na thuakna ngilh chiang in khelhna lummei hong jing,
Maimit khimbang jingsak, Na vak sawlbang liah di'n;
Lummei bang thengsak in, Na vak ngou bang lang hen,
Na sakmel a itna luankhi tuibang hong luang;
Khelhna lungsung mial ah Toupa aw hong leng in.
Zion kulhpi sung lung in gel dih ua,
Toupa' lungkhamna mun;
A sisan etsakna'n uain nou A dawn a,
Aw, A lungkhamna mel ka en ngamlou.
Ka Mang' lungkhamna tuibang lian e,
Dal vual ding hilou hi;
Tuangnungsiah nuamlou hi dahna meipi nuai ah,
Linglukhu A khu e, hong en ve ua.
A min luguhmun juan in pita uh,
Tua i Toupa nunnem;
Bah leh lungkham in maw Zion tang mual a khum,
Ka Mang sul hong hei in, chi omlou uh.
Israel vontawite nunsia uh e,
Albang dah kungtung ah;
Van khawpi ngui in simlei in kahla lem hen,
Aw, ka Mang sihna mun Kalvari mual.
Van khua a ngui e, nop la a dai zou,
I Toupa A pham ni'n;
Mial in A mel liah e, sunni zong tang ngamlou,
Mang nunnem sun di'n simlei jinpi'n ling.
"Salpha kha pham ni'n lei leh van kal ah,
Sak a kai," chi umaw?
Van salpha Mang nunnem Kalvari mual tung ah,
Kha a kiak ni in sak a hong kai hiam?
Tua jan lungkhamhuai ah,
I Toupa Jesu in;
"Hiaite ka taksa leh
Ka sisan dawn ding hi;
Non theihden na'ng un," chi.
Hondampa deihlou uh,
Zion kulhpi sung ah;
Panpih ding A neilou,
Sing hamsia thuak a bel.
Thou un hiai a kipan,
I paikhia meng ding uh;
Amah zaw gilou in,
Sim ding uh, chia gelh,
A hong tung dekta hi.
Huan a paikheta ua,
Olive mual lam ah;
Siampu Lianpente leh,
Sepaih chiangtawite in,
Amah hen in vua uh.
Engbawlna mang puan leh,
Linglukhu piandang tawh;
Kalvari manawh a,
Amah a pi lai un,
Panpih ding neilou hi.
Kalvari mual minthang,
Sunchin in galdon ing;
Ka Hondampa deihhuai,
Gilou kal a ding in,
Ka sinlai hon lun e.

songs.title: Na Hon Itna A Na Lua
songs.author: Suakliana

lines: Thangvan sang a Toupa Jesu,
Lungkham, genthei nopna Toupa;
Simlei gimhuai teng thuak zou in,
Ei din Toupa A hong vakvai.
Lamdang na e! lamdang na e!
Na hon itna a na lua hi;
Kou dia Na thuakna Kalvari,
Gen thei kei veng , Toupa Jesu.
Simlei ah lungnopna omlou,
Kap leh mau in albang mang veng;
Hizong itna mel lungdamhuai,
Kou ding' Khris na hong paita hi.
Lungkham buaina chiau tuipi lian,
Pal ngam kei veng ka Hondampa;
Anbang itna Kha Siangthou in
Simlei gimhuaina beisak in.
Khebaite khe in paita uh,
Phakte siansak in omta uh;
Piangsualte'n pianthakna mu uh,
Misite kaihthawh in om uh.
Gentawp thei kei veng, aw Toupa,
Hon ngai tawp thei kei veng Toupa;
Ka lungsung mial hong vaksak in,
Itna lui luang hon musak in.
Anbang non itna pal zou ning,
Ka laukha bah hih halh jel in;
Simlei buaina' ka len sung in,
Laukha'n hambang honhuai jel in.
Awi ve ni aw, Kalvari mual,
I Toupa saksi bang phamna;
Sual huihpi in i Mang
Nunnem tual a kiakna. (2)
Mual minthang hontun in Laukha,
Ka Mang nunnem paipihta uh;
Kap a jui ding omlou,
Ka lai ana lua hi. (2)
Kulsin sung mel munuam veng e,
Ka Toupa luang a sialna uh;
Sanggah liangvai lua hi,
A sih ni tan pha in. (2)
Tu in Toupa hon muta'ng,
Min dang zong nawn kei ning;
Nangma' angsung ah ka teng ding,
Na itna tuisuahgiat ah.
Ka Mang hi chia; hon mu ning e,
Hon mu ning e, ka Mang na hi;
Aw, Na hon itdan ka theih in,
Na thuak hi, Kalvari ah.
Aw, Na thuakna Kalvari,
Don ning e, simlei ah,
Itna vang in mel in mu ning,
Aw, ni sang' Na vakzaw hi.
Mipi leh lei lunmangte'n,
Simmoh in kimvel uh;
Nang zaw gentheite Toupa kia,
Kei din Na hun hi, Toupa.
Na pianna leimun niampen,
Na phamna luguh mun;
Na gentheihna paibang kop ning,
Aw nunnuam ning Nang vang in.
Lun leh mang lamtam vaivut suak thei,
Simlei pallun lai sawlbang heu thei;
Tangbang i damlai ni lenkil hong kia zong leh,
Kumsawt guabang hing Jesu nei hang.
Lili pallun Mang Jesu keia,
Heisa bang pal thangvan gamnuam ah;
Ngaihtamsial albang dahin Aman hon nem,
Lili pallun Mang Jesu keia.
A gam nunnuam sunni bang tang ah,
Jingdam Solnou hon gum Mang Jesu;
Gimthei thuak mahleng hiai leitung lungkhamna ah,
A gamnuam ah tuang A hon tun ding.
Tuin kap in huibang mau zongleng,
Khakiakna dawnbang ka tuah chiang in;
Lunglau kei ning kulsin pan Toupa'n hon phong dia,
Dah leh kahna mittui nulsiang ding.
Lawmvual i ngaihte'n nuai simlei ah,
Tuangnung hon siah chian lungkham ngai ing;
Albang dah kei ning khattang sawlbang ka hei zong,
Lili pallun Jesu'n heh honnem.
Toupa'n anbang hon itna,
Thangvan sana gam tuangnung sia'n,
Sual vontawite hong zong di'n,
A thuak Mang Jesu in.
Lungkhamna sing khros tuh,
Kei din A pua a, bah in A puk a;
Kilhna sikkhet kei di'n a na lua e!
Aw, ka gen theilou.
Tenna ngeilouh gamlei ah,
Puansan leh linglukhu thuah in;
Lungkham chiteng thuakzou in,
Belamnou Mang Jesu.
Etchim theihlouh Mang Jesu,
Giloute dia sing khros pua in,
Kalvari lam manawh in,
A bah ahi, ka Mang.
Aw, kei ding a thuakzou in,
Kalvari mual sing khros tung ah,
Ka khelhna tengteng pua in,
Hon tanta mang Jesu'n.
Toupa Jesu aw Nang kon muang hi,
Lungkham dah ni'n kouh ding dang ka nei lou;
Na sisan vang in Nang ka hon nel hi,
Gimna thuak a tat ka hih ziak in.
Ka gimthuak laiin hong leng in aw Toupa,
Hambang ka vaih ni'n ngaiin hon don veng;
Ka gimthuak laiin hong leng in aw Toupa,
Nang zaw liangvaite nempa Na hi.
Toupa, kua dang kiang ka juan ding hiam?
Nangma'n tangtawn hinna Na nei ngal a;
Na zahngaihna tuipi libang ching in,
Kei gilou nangawn a hontum hi.
Toupa a hun hi Na hoihna zaw,
Ka gimthuakna lamang din Nang kon ngen;
Ka hatlouhna a Na thilhihtheihna,
A kimuh ding Nang Na deihlam hi.
I Toupa Jesu'n manpha A sak,
A mina gim gentheih thuak a na hi;
Mei a dangkaeng a haltui nung ua,
A siangthou kia om kipahpih hi.
Adam suan mial nuai a saltang,
Salbang suah ding kua hong kuan ding hiam?
A gimna uh hong thuaksak ding leh,
A sik ua si ding in,
Van Mang Vontawi hong piang.
Halleluia, nunnuam in pahtawi ni,
Thangvan Mang Jubili;
Beth-lehem leh Kalvari tang tung ah,
Salsuahna dak a ging.
Sheol nuai a Mansoul khawpi,
Sal suahna dak ging na ja uhiam;
Nou ading in van Mang Vontawi ngei,
Sisana kithuam in;
Dougal khawpi a sim.
Nungchiang ah dougal hong lian e,
Khelhna'n a kha jak, hon man ding in;
Jehojire mual ah hong kal in,
Hossana tangkou in;
Salem puanjak nuai ah.
Salem puanjak nuai a bitna,
Salem Mangpa khut a vualjawlna;
Jeho-jire mual a miten zaw,
A tang ngei ding uhi;
Halleluia, Amen.
Anbang Non it vang a Toupa, Na thuakna,
Hon don ning e, Kalvari mual pha in;
Linglukhu khu a Na mela sisan luang lai,
Hon en ngamla'ng e, a na lua hi, Toupa.
Na hon itna tengteng,
Thu in ka genseng lou ;
Na min k'on phat ding bang in,
Toupa aw, hon phat thei kei veng.
A galdon mite lai' Amah it om lou,
Ka dang a tak, chi a A mau laiin,
Ka Toupa dangtak tui pia ding kuamah om lou,
A nget louh pen zuthuk leh thilkha pia uh.
Na linglukhu bang khu kuahiam om, Toupa?
A lawmlou e, nang ding in linglukhu;
Na van manglukhu koilaia om ahi hiam,
Engbawlna puansan leh linglukhu Na khuk?
A thuaklai mel etin ngilhvual hilou hi,
Nang leh kei vang in maw lei leh van Mang;
Lungkhamna thuak ngeilou lungkham in A thum hi,
Lambang pak ni, anbang hon it Mang deihhuai.

songs.title: Ka Nopna Pen Nang Na Hi
songs.author: Thanherha

lines: Simlei thupina leh a hoihna teng sang in,
Melmu nuam veng e, Mang Khrist sakmel;
Engbawlna puan silh in linglukhu khu zong leh,
Etlawm sa'ng lei lunmang teng sang in.
Aw, ka nopna pen ka Hondampa,
Ka khamuanna leh ka
Hoihna in a pal ka lungsung ah,
Vulni nei ngeilou ka Hondampa.
Hondampa hon itna kuata'n lel thei ding hiam?
Hon zongin lungkham chiteng A thuak;
Beth-lehem leh Kalvari mual a hon zong in,
Honpi kik nawnta, Itna huang ah.
Toupa, Na itna mel etlawm hon musak in,
Lungkham, liangvai, genthei vontawite'n,
Hiai nuai simlei zaw mubang ngainawn kei n'ung e;
Na angsung ah naubang hon pom in.
A hong pai nawn diing vangletna tawh mei tung ah,
Salbang hon suahsa te hong pi di'n,
Simlei gimhuai tuangnung i siahsan ni naita,
Halleluia, kipak ing, Toupa.
La hoih ding dang mu zou kei veng,
Hiai nuai simlei ah;
Toupa Khrist kei ding a hongsi,
Ka la ngaihpen hi.
Aw, ka zaila ngaihpen zaw Khrist ahi,
Khemna huih leh lungkham kihawt lai';
Ka kulh leh ka kingakna hi.
Simlei a la kilawm dangte,
Pak bang vul zouta;
Ka Mang pahtawina la kilawm',
Vulni nei lou ding.
Lungkham a ka kah lai in zong
Heh hon nem ding hi;
Kinepna dang muzou kei veng,
Khrist kia loungal zaw.
David in kulh in a hon nei,
Hon Tanpa deihpen;
Ken zong hon bel sam ve ning e,
Aw, ka Mang Jesu.
Van huihkhi, hon ngai veng aw, hong leng in,
Ka lungsung a lummei jing lenkhia in;
Mial leh lungkham in kei palbang hon nang,
Manawh lai kumsawt pialgal sawlbang liah.
Aw, Toupa kei dia bangkim a Bangkim,
Hinna siktuikhuk Na hi, hon ngai veng;
Thupina leh van mun kon ngen tuan lou,
Van zaw Nangmah Na hi, hon ompih in.
Tanga Eden pallun zoua lengsa,
Vai ung e, khawvel sual leh mial nuai ah;
Hizong Kalvari mual a lengte zaw,
Kumsawt gam Eden Thak in malbang kou.
Simlei silpak a lunte zong vul uh,
A nopla uleh ging lawmte zong dai ;
Aw ka Mang, Na sakmel zaw tullou hi,
Kumsawt in a pallun in hon nem ding.
Na min ka kouh in mial a hong theng jel,
Gamdai lungjuanna gam zaila'n ka awi;
Ka pahna hong thak jel genseng kei veng,
Na vakin kei din khua a vakta hi.
Simlei gimhuaina silhpuan bang in ka thuap a,
Taksapna zong ka machiang lummei bang in jing;
Buaina kigawmkhawmten ka Mang' gam hon gamlat,
Tun louh lau veng tungchiang Kanan thak ah.
Aw ginna'n Na lampi a ka hong laiin,
Ka Mang Nang Jingsol Aksi'n ka ma honpi in;
Tungchiang gam nunnuam a hon pikai ding in.
Aw, gimhuaina in damsung hon daih ding ahi,
Tangtawn gam ding hikei maw Toupa, nuai simlei zaw;
Gam thak ngaiin gamdai pan sunchin galdon veng,
Tuangtun kal ngak la'ng tung Salem thak ah.
Aw, haksatna ka machiang thuah bangzah om lai?
Nun sung a ka tuah ding leh dawnbang hon tuak dingte?
Tang a sawltakte Laukha a Na thuam bang in,
Hon galthuam in sual gallian zou ding in.
Simlei gimhuai ah jingzin vaibang tham sawt ing,
Tungchiang a paisaten van Belamnou pahtawi uh;
Khattang in simlei buaina tuibang kihawtte,
Douzou la'ng e, ka Mang Immanuel.

songs.title: Thahat Leh Hangsan In Om In
songs.author: Rev. T. Sungte

lines: Tangthupha gen dia N'on sawlna peuh ah Toupa,
Mual sangpi leh tuipi kihawt tung hita zong;
Na thu leh khros etlawm in hon thuam in,
Na itna thupha ken gengen ve ning.
Kuan khia inla, sem in,
Hun tuibang kiam tawntung;
Kalvari tatna a theinailoute hilh in;
Na paina mun khempeuh na gam hong hi ding hi,
Thahat leh hangsan hon suah phot mai in;
Lunglau lou in Setan gallian daibang nawk in,
A tawntung na kiang a om ding thu K'on chiam hi;
Keiman k'on sawl hilou hiam, lau het ken,
Thahat leh hangsan hon suah phot mai in.
Ka thuchiam suangpi bang kip hi kipelh ngeilou,
Bangma'n hon nang zoulou ding chi'n thu K'on chiam hi,
Na paina khempeuh nang kon pia ding hi,
Thahat leh hangsan hon suah phot mai in.
Ka hotdamna mual Zion ah hon pikhawm in,
Amau' ding' a tawntung khawlna nuam ka bawlsak;
Thahat leh hangsan in hilh kim chiat in,
Na thaman ding manglukhu etlawm hi.
Belam mawh pawpa en ve ua,
A phamna ding lenmual juan in pi uh;
A lungkhamna panpih ding omlou hiam,
Mawh chiteng pawpa.
Aw ka Mang liangvai, hambanghuai nei lou in,
Kalvari mual sihsial bang juan;
Zatam lailung hambang vaita,
Kap in sulhei uh.
A phamna ding mual a tung ua,
Bangchin a gawt uhiam, va en ve ua;
A puak sing ah etnop in a bawl ua,
Nuihchiam in lel uh.
Maimit suan in naubang nui maw'ng,
A khakiak dan lai ah lenthal bang tham!
A mel siangthou sisan in dimzouta,
Hong en dih ve ua.
A sisan pha hong luan vang in,
Siamlouhtang a khial a liangvaite di'n;
Hinna tuanglam dawngkot A hong hongta,
A tate zuih ding.

songs.title: Kei Ding' A Hinn A Pia
songs.author: Saptawna

lines: En in, Hondampa a pita uh,
A linglukhu tawh;
Melma simsenglouhten kai uh,
Kalvari mual dong in.
Ka khelh vang ua Na thuaknaten,
Na khawul sisan in luangsak;
Na aw nem nou ngii ngei hongluang,
A tamden ka lailung sung ah.
En ngam kei veng ka Toupa
Melmate'n vua uh, deihhuai
A thuak natdan ka gen theilou,
Kei di'n A hinna pia.
Sihna mulkimhuai A thuaklai in,
Kua in hiam panpih?
Pa aw, Pa aw, chiin A mau,
Sing hamsia thuak tung ah.
Aw ka laukha Hondampa sihna,
Zion juan inla ;
Tua ah ngaihdamna na mu ding,
A sisan apan in.
Aw koiah hiam, Hondampa in,
Lungkham gimhuai A thuak;
A mel lungdamhuai mu nuam
Itna sisan luanna. veng,
Aw, Na sisan luang ka muh chiang'
Ka mawhna teng a sawpsiang dia;
Lungkham mangbat a beita ding,
Aw, Na sisan luang ah.
Aw hon ngai veng, Toupa tuin,
Ka mawhna sawpsiang di'n;
Simlei ah zaw Nangmah loungal,
Sianna dang omlou hi.
Ka laitahhun hongtun chiang in,
Itna in honpi in;
Lunglau keining phamna chiaului,
Bit in hong galkai ning.
Tua luiguam gal kongkai chiang in,
Thangvan angelte tawh;
Phaiphuleng leh semgua luang
Phatna dai nawnlou ding. [ging,
Ngai dih! Kalvari a Na lungkham dah ni'n,
Melma simsenglouh in a pungkhawm uh;
Kuahiam Na lungkhamna sim nuam,
Thangvan lummei in a honbawm,
Kalvari a hon liah.
Amen, Amen, Halleluiah, Amen,
Lei leh vanten Amen lem hen;
Tuisuahgiat leh simlei mualte'n,
'Hallelui' sa nawn hen.
Ngaidih! Sihna nuaisiah in A thounawnta,
Sihna sun a khawpi nunnuam ngeilou;
Kalvari palzou in leng uh,
Thuakna sun in zawhna pak uh,
Buaina om nawnlou hi.
Phamna chiaugal a aw Salem van khawpi,
Manna gam silpak jemnou in a bawm;
Tua ah phaiphuleng a lem ua,
Vualtungtuang Manglian pahtawi uh,
Phatna dai ngeilou hi.
Aw ka laukha, na khawpi galdon jel in,
Hondampa leh angelte tuallenna;
Sihna lusun, huibang mauna,
Om nawnlou hi, laukha vangkhua',
Naubang kah om nawnlou.
Gal in don lehang,
Kalvari tang a kha phamna mun;
Khawvel Hondampa i Toupa Jesu,
Lungkham leh mangbatna'n mangbang a bawm.
A paina ding lam, aw don ngam la'ng e,
Juda mipi leh melmate kal ah,
Ka khelh vang a thuak, aw ka Mang Jesu.
Aw, Nong it man in,
Lungkham kihawtvel Kalvari ah;
Liangvai albang mangsa Na hon tanta,
Aw ka mawh sianna Na sisanpha in.
Hiai nuai simlei ah,
Liangvai gentheite Na hong zongta;
Na angsung muanna tuang ka tun mateng,
Hon zong jel ning e, aw ka Hondampa.
Laukha tuanglam nuam,
Si-al piandang aw, Nang hong tang in;
Israelte leh suahlam mipilte,
Tuanglam a Na pi bang in hon pi in.
Thou aw, ka kha, thou aw,
Na khelhna paisan in;
A hon tatna sisan,
Keia ding a hong luang;
Mang tutphah mai keisik din ding
Ka min A khut ah kigelhta. (2)
Kei dia hon thumsak ding,
Vantung ah Toupa om;
A hon khasiat tatna,
A sisan pha in gen;
A si in khelhna teng silsiang
Hehpihna tutphah maiah theh.(2)
Kalvari a hiamma,
Mun nga a A thuakte;
Thumna manpha hi uh,
Kei di'n nakpi'n thum uh;
Ngaidam in aw, ngaidam in aw
Mawhte tatsa sih phalken chi. (2)
Ka Pathian lungdamta,
A ngaihdam aw ka ja;
A ta ding in hon nei,
Ka lau nawn kei hial hi;
"Abba, Pa aw, Pa aw," chi in,
Lung a muang in tun ka juan hi. (2)
I lungsung khelhna jing nuai ah,
Thangvan hinna chi kiphum;
Pak ding leh gahsuah ding a
Kem hoih ding in thupiak i hi;
Hinna Manglukhu lawh ding in.
Toupa Jesu Laukha hon sawl in,
Nang dinga pak gimnamtui hong hi sam ding in;
Na Manglukhu thupina di'n,
Ka hinna uh siangsak in.
I gam lungmawl leh liangvai lai'
Damna Gospel Tangthupha;
Pak ding leh gahsuah ding a,
Kem hoih ding in thupiak i hi;
Dikna Manglukhu lawh ding in.
Toupa Kha Siang pi louh in zaw,
Pilna, siamna, sannate;
Hoihnate leh diknate lungsung a
Hong pak khia ding lai;
Liahdi'n sual gallian suakthei hi.
Hehpihna in kong lianpi a hong,
Van Mang' nna sepna ding in;
Tui malkhat leh singkhuah khat,
Thil simmawhhuai chitengte zong;
Thangvan gam sum a suahtheihna.

songs.title: Kei Bang A Mikhial Gentheite Ding
songs.author: Fanny Crossbee

lines: Gamlapi gam khat ah, mual tang om, keu gemgam
Tuipi gal lampek gam khat ah om;
A van siang sensan nua'h Mi khat si ding in pai,
Leitung mi khempeuh nang leh kei di'n.
Aw, ka lung giksak in, ka khitui luangsak hi,
Lungsim mitkha a ka et chiang in;
Jesu hong thuakna mun, hong sihna mun hi a,
Kei bang a mikhial gentheite ding'.
En dih vaw, bahtak in leitung puakgik pawpa,
Linglukhu khupa hongpai enven;
Khros lel in kunsuk a, zata lai masuan lai,
Tua mual tung ah paitou lailai veh.
Ngai dih vaw, a kilhna sek gingte ke'n za veng,
Ka Toupa sing ah kilhden uh hi;
Tua a khros domtou uh, zata'n lambang pak vel veh,
Kalvari a Belamnou hampha.
A sihlai' kougawp uh, naklah a kipeklai,
A lawmte lah lungkham in kap hi;
Amah tang in bah zong phun lou, thum peuhmah lou,
Tua mual tung a A thuak laitak in.
Tualaiin khua hong mial, suangpite hong kitam,
Lungkham thawmhau phawng a aw kikou,
Sihna gu a thuakpa, i Kumpipa aw hi,
Lungkhamdenna pan ei hong gum ding.
Pathian hamsia pua a mangthangsate,
Khelh leh lungkhamna nuai ah i tang;
Hotdamna thupha lungdamhuai pen,
Tuang hong tungta, nuam un Hossana.
Nun nuam in Gospel Jubili lambang pak ni,
Lemna Tangthupha hotdamna manpha
Hon tun mite' khe leh kalsuan etlawm hi,
Khelhna saltang salbang suahna di'n.
Tangtawn hinna leh damna deih miten,
Van hinna tanghou Toupa muang un;
Aw laukha gilkial hong pai meng in,
Chi'n Jesun aw nem in A hon sam.
Siktui duh, zaitha tawl, hong pai unla,
Kalvari mual ah hong paita un;
Hondampa' nak a sisan luangkhia,
Na laukha di'n hinna tui ahi.
Jerusalem khaw pam Kalvari mual ah,
Hondampa lungkham a A mauna mun ah;
Aw laukha Sianghtou tuang hontun in.
Munuam veng e, aw ka Hondampa,
A khut, A khe, A nak ah liamma thuak,
Mi gilou nih kal ah A phamta.
Juda mipite leh siampu liante in,
Nunglehhen in pi uh, Zion kulh sung ah;
Hamsia thuak singdawn ah kilhbelh uh.
Hambang Na vai lua hi, aw ka Hondampa,
Khawvel khelhna vang in Vanmang Ta siangthou;
Lungkham gensenglouh thuak in N'ong si.
Nang hong leng nawn ve aw, Toupa, hon ngai ung,
Gimhuai chiteng thuak a Na hong tatsate;
Khelh leh dougal vang in nguizou uh.
Pentikos Ni bang in aw Laukha Siangthou,
Hinna tui hon tawiin, mei leh huih bang in;
Hong kihawmjak nawn in ka tung uah.
Hiai ah hinna tui a luang hi,
Kalvari a hong pawtkhia ;
Mi tampi damsakna'n a luang,
Kuapeuh a dawn nuamte ding;
Nang, Eden omlaivei thuak aw,
Hongpiin vadawn meng in;
Tuachiang Kalvari a tuichim,
Na lungsung ah a luang ding.
Huan hiai tui theigige inla,
Midang zong theisak sam in ;
Mi kuapeuh in a dawn aleh,
A dam ngeingei ding, chiin;
Jesu thupina ahi ding,
Thangvan angel siangthoute'n;
Nopna la lamdang lem ding uh,
I Toupa Pathian mai ah.
Hiai apan a tangtawn dong in,
Tua hinna siktui a luang;
Thounawn taten a tui siangthou,
Tangtawn in dawnta ding uh;
Belamnou hinna siangthou in,
Hotdamte kivak ding uh;
Eden thil lui om nawnlou in,
Hin thak in lengta ding uh.
Sual galdouna a Van Mang Tapa'n,
Linglukhu A khuk ding tuh A en a;
A lungkham a A thum lai in,
A khawul sisan bang luangkhia;
Gethsemani ah,
Nunglehhensawm uh Israelten.
Lungkim mawh uh, (2)
Israelte lungkim mawh uh;
A tung ah paulam bawl uh e,
Mipi'n vaihawm uh,
Pilat in kilhbelh din a peta.
A Lal uh hua uh Israelten,
Kalvari tang tung ah a kilhbelh ua;
A tun vangselnu Mari in,
A von tuaidawng lai a tah in,
A laina, chi uh,
Manna gam tuangnungsiah i Toupa'n.
Tua ni lungkhamhuai khimjing nuai ah,
I Mang nunnem laukha khaubang chiah ni'n;
Jerusalem a temple a,
Puanjak thupi hong keksuak in;
Simlei jinpi'n ling,
Mi siangthou laukha sulheizouta.
Hunta e sual galdouna tawp ven,
Khawvel gam teng Toupa leh Khrist gam ding';
Sual douna gal zoutu Mang in,
Sisan pha in a man zouta-
Kalvari tang ah,
Kilepna'n Vanmang Ta mel hong mual.
En un, melmate'n khaikang uh,
Lungtuak simthu lel ding;
Thianmang vontawi ngei a na hi,
Kalvari sing hamsia thuak a hongsi.
A thounawnta, A thounawnta hi,
Lambang pak un, Hondampa thounawnta;
Thupi in A melma A nuaisiah,
Tangtawn in misiangthoute tawh vaihawm uh.
A luang silhpuan nem in tuam uh,
Pathian gam lamenten;
Huan a han vuak ah a sial ua,
Vualzawhna thupi tawh A thounawnta.
Han a pan in A thounawnta,
Hondampa, Mang vanglian;
Hankhuk mial pan A hong pawtkhia,
Khawvel sual leh sihna A nuaisiahta;
Sihna ngei A nuaisiah zouta,
Zoutu vanglian phat un ;
Halleluia, i Hondampa,
Phatna zaila'n simlei hong dim nawn hen.

songs.title: Kei Dia A Thuakna A Na

lines: En dih, Jerusalem khawpi,
Mipi hong pai khawmte'n,
Toupa mawhtangsakta uhi,
Israel vontawiten.
A na e, kei dia A thuakna,
Vanmang Ta Belamnou;
Bangchin simthu ka lelta dia!
Ka sik a A sih vang'.
Jerusalem khawpi sung ah,
Mipi'n kimkot ah um;
Enghouna tawh zumhuaipiin,
Hamsia teng thuaksak uh.
Kalvari mual ah a pi ua,
I Toupa phamta hi;
Ni in zong a vak suah ngamlou,
Lei pumpi hong lingta.
Aw, tuin namchih tate aw,
Ka Toupa sun ding in;
Kalvari mual galdon ve ni,
A tun Mari bang in,
En un, Pathian Belamnou mawh pawpa,
Minthang Kalvari mual tung ah ;
Hamsethuak singtung ah a khaikang ua,
Kei din A sisan pha hong luangkhia.
Hondampa nak siangthou ah aw,
Sisan leh tui a hong luangkhia;
Ka lungsim in ngilh kei henla,
Mawhnei tuibang sianna.
Hehpihna lui siangthou a luang tua ah,
Hondampa sihna mun tak ah;
Sunchin jankhua'n tua mun ah valeng in,
Ka laukha, na Hondampa kiang ah.
Tua sisan lui luang a bual khempeuhte,
Mawhna vuk sang in ngouzaw ding ;
Aw, na mawhna tawh khaubang hong chiah in,
K'on silsiang ding, Hondampa'n A chi.
Hon taimangsan nawn kei ning leitung ah,
Anbang ka it Mang Hondampa;
Aw, Na Laukha Siangthou in hon pi in,
Na mel lungdamhuai hon musak in.
Kalvari a Na hon itna,
Tui bang a hong luang in,
Kei mikhial, gamdai gamkeu, guamse mun ah,
Nem ngii ngei in a hongluang a,
A tung ah ginna long lepdan siam theikei veng.
Leppihpa Laukha ka ngai,
Leppihpa Laukha ka ngai e,
Noa long Leppihpa Laukha ka ngai.
Toupa, Zion paina lampi,
Laukha huai louh in zaw;
Sinlai heksiam vang a kua tuangtung thei ding?
Toupa khaubang hong chiah thei ke'ng,
Na pilna leh ka siamna kiton louh vang in.
Toupa, Na banjal hat ngak in,
Khelhna tuipi tung ah;
Donding neilou naungek bang in ka om a,
Na hon itna a hong tung a,
Ka ginna bangjel in nuam in ka omjel hi.
Ka Hondampa ka Mang Jesu,
Tuibang a honglet chiang;
Ka haksatna leh buaina a tummang dia,
Anbang A itna'n hon hum dia,
A nen a tutkhawl di'n A hon pilutta ding.
Ka henkol buh, henkol pehsik
Vang in maw Hondampa;
Linglukhu tawh Salem dai ah,
Sisan kai niuniau in kai uh,
Jinmang kaih zatamten,
Sihna mulkimhuai thuak in phamsak uh.
Aw van Mang ahi,
Lungkham chiteng hong thuak;
Israel leh simlei tung ah,
Simthu lelte'n mel in thei le'u,
Tua thupina Mangpa,
Tulsing lel ah kua ta'n
Pehsik khen diam?
A mi kha kia phungvual in awi,
Tun leh jua sausung ah;
Vanmang liangvai A sau tan in,
Giloute kal ah A phamta,
Kalvari mual tung ah,
Melamaten saksi bang in awi uh.
Aw tung thangvan, hong mau ve aw,
Van Mang Ta sun ding in;
Nam chih vangkhua thum in mau hen,
Ngou tuisuahgiat luankhi'n luang hen,
Simlei jinpi'n ling hen,
Van Migil Vondeih kha A kiak ni in.
Khelhna kulhpi, phamna kulsin,
Zouin A thounawnta ;
A phamna vang a liangvaite'n
Hinna thak paksil bang lawm uh,
Ngalliam Tanpa vang in;
Hinna khawpi gam etlawm luahta uh.
Ka sual ziak in aw ka Toupa A hong liam,
Thuakna genseng hilou, liamna genseng hilou;
Aw, A mel deihhuai sisan hong suak zouta
Van Mang Ta liamsak uh, (2)
A nungjang kijik in ;
Kilhna sikzum leh nak a liam thuak in,
Toupa hanmual khumpihta uh.
Toupa liamna thu kawlmong pha'n genjak un,
Sim leh mal mi in zong hon thei sam le uh zaw,
Aw, Toupa chi in kahla hon lem ding uh.
Toupa liam mangbang kikou ging aw hoih in,
Nuai simlei hon hawt in phamsa thelbang thousak,
Aw, kulsin sung a buanlei na suaksate.
Gimna genseng louh thuak in A hong tanta,
Sisan man hi ing e, thoihna kim a tat hi'ng,
Aw, ka Pa' gam ah A hon pikik nawnta.
Ka hinna sing leh ka kipahna Na hi,
Na kiang ah leng ning e, Na thuam ah hon awi in,
Aw, Salem thak ah naubang in hon nga in.
Ka Hondampa'n ka sik a sih A hong tel a,
Guabang hing a lawmlou hotdamna'n;
Amah in singlamteh lampi A tawn nuam hi,
Ka khelh mawhna khempeuh ngaihdamna'n.
Ka mawhnate khros tung ah kilhbelh zouta hi,
Bangzahta tam zong A pua nuam hi;
Lungkhamna tawh Jesu khros lam juan in paita,
Tua ah ka mawhnate A pua ta.
Amah kei din nunnem, itsiam thuakthei A hi,
Mawhna puanbang dum hon sawpsiangta;
Ka suahtakna ka thei, mawhsakna omnawnlou,
Ka mawhnate khros ah kilhbelhta.
Tua ah ka mawhna khempeuh tuangnung siah zouta'ng,
Bangchi'n hon hihbuai thei nawn ding hiam?
Toupa Jesu'n khros tung ah kilhbelh zouta hi,
Aman tatna man pia zouta hi.
Ka Hondampa tawh gibang kikhen nawn kei ning,
Sunchin in Amah nna sem zaw ning;
Amah pahtawina'n phatna la ka sa ding a,
Ka mawhna khempeuh A lamangta.
Jan lungkhamhuai Zion pindan sung a,
Ka Toupan A sisan A hawm in;
Tuabang lungkham dahna meipi jing in,
Ka Mang thawmhau in a mausak hi.
Aw, nou Jerusalem tate aw,
Hon hehpihna na tan uh thei un;
Na natna teng uh A hon hihdamsak,
A lungkhamna ngilh mahmah kei un.
Jerusalem kulhdai pawlam ah zaw,
Jawlnei sih ngeina hilou, chi uh;
Hizong en in, Kalvari tang lampi,
Mipi lak ah ka Toupa ka mu.
En dih, Kalvari tung petmah ding hi,
Bangchin simthu ka lelta ding hiam!
Aw, ka Mang Na hong kik nawn kei ding maw?
Na mun ding zaw Kalvari ahi.
Hon mangngilh kei ning e, ka Mang Jesu,
Kalvari mual lam hong hei ning e;
Kei dia Na thuakna ka lungsim sung ah,
Ka laitah dong in mangngilh kei ning.
Tongse lawh omlou Pathian Belamnou,
Mangtutphah zaw a om, jan omlou ding;
Lahmei kuang leh sunni ngailou,
Tung Pathian tawh tangtawn in
Vai a hawm ding uh.
Amen, hong paita in Toupa Jesu,
Toupa Jesu anbang hon itna;
Misiangthoute kiang ah om hen aw,
Halleluiah, Amen. (2)
Toupa Jawlneite laukha Pathian in,
Thil hongtung pah dingte a ensak hi;
Ngai dih, Ka hong pai pah ding hi,
Hiai thugenkholh pom peuhmah,
A navak uhi.
A hunzaw a hong tung dekta ngal a,
Mi diklou zaw a diklou in om hen;
Misiangthou lah hihsiangthou in,
Aw, na om jel hen aw;
Ka hongpai pah ding hi.
Genkholhna thu a a lakmang in zaw,
Hinna sing leh khaw siangthou a a tan;
Tung Pathian in a lamang ding,
Hiai thu theisakpa in,
'Ka hong pai pah ding' chi.

songs.title: Hiai Leitung Vai A Hawm Ding
songs.author: William Pearson

lines: Aw, Nang ka Toupa leh ka Pathian uh,
Vangletnate, pahtawinate, thilhihtheihnate teng,
Na dikna vang a mu dia lawm Na hi;
Nang in bangkim Na bawl a, Na deih vang a hong om leh bawl
A hita vek ngal ua.
Belamnou a thah zawh nung un,
Mangtutphah a tu in,
Hiai leitung simthu A lel ding,
Angel siangte'n chi uh.
Mangtutphah a tu leh A silbawlte'n,
Belamnou kiang ah zaw vualzawlnate, pahtawinate,
Vangletnate leh simthu lelnate;
Tangtawn in hong om gigeta hen, a chih uh ka ja hi,
Thilhing lite in ah.
Hiai puanngou silhte kuate ahi ua,
Koi a pan a hong pai ahi ua? chi'n hon houpih a,
Ken bel a kiang ah, 'na thei' ka na chi;
Aman ka kiang ah, 'Hiaite gimthuakna thupitak a pawtte
A hi uh' a chi.
A hon hilh khin thei kua a om ding hiam?
Sun leh jan in mi tam ka dongta a;
Gen siam leh hihthei tampi om uh,
Hizongleh genkhin thei kuamah omlou.
Laukha Siangthou, Nangman hong hilh in aw,
A pianna bawngin leh A sihna Kalvari,
Lei mi lailung mawlte Zoar tuang hon Tunpa,
Genzou thei omlou uh, bitna khua i luahsan.
Beth-lehem ah van bungpi a suan uh,
Suahlam mi leh belamchingte pi pa,
Si-al lian, kei zong honpi sam in,
Mu nuam veng van Mang vontawi hong jalna.
A pianni'n Herod dougal a hong lian,
A sihna ding' Judate'n vaihawm uh;
Ka khelhman din ding in ka Toupa,
Khelhna in a phamsak khawpi kiang ah.
Mi khempeuhte'n hong en chiat un Toupa,
Jerusalem vontawite dinmun ah;
Hamsia thuak singdawn ah a khai ua,
Lungkhamna khitui luanglou theilou hi.

songs.title: Sawnban Hon Kai Jel In Toupa
songs.author: Tawnhluia

lines: Hotdamna kong hong kihongta, Kalvari mual ah,
Lungkham, liangvai mun neilou di'n;
Nunnuam ngabang i lenna ding,
Van Mang inn nuam A bawlta hi.
Ka hon juan hi, Aw ka Toupa,
Na mun bawlsa;
Khelh leh buaina gal lian zong leh,
Sawnban honkai jel in Toupa.
Ka laukha na Hondampa sihna Kalvari ah,
Sunkhua, jankhua in va leng in;
Tua mun na tenna ding gamnuam,
Galdot in lungkham hon nem ding.
Thil lui khempeuh albang mangta, a hong thak nawnta,
Mawhna liamsate hong thou un;
Nunnuam a ngabang i lenna'ng,
A bawl gamnuam, i tenna ding.
Immanuel lei leh van thak khawpi tualnuam ah,
Aw, bangchikchiang tuang ka tung diam?
Mubang ngai veng tangtawn gamnuam,
Lawmvual lungtuak teng kimna ding.
Hondampa lungkhamna Kalvari lam manawh in,
Laukha Siangthou hambang hon huai in;
Melmu nuam veng e ka Hondampa,
A linglukhu leh A thuak lai mel.
Aw, a na lua e, A hon tatna!
A khut, A khe, A nak ah,
Melma liam A thuak;
Kei di'n khros lel ah A hinna pia.
Sunchin lung in ka gel Hondampa khaphamna mun,
Ginna'n simlei pan' mel in mu'ng e;
Mi giloute kal ah khaikang uh,
Ka dang a tak, Mang Jesu'n A chi.
Ngaidih ua, Hondampa lungkham, thawmhau huibang mau,
Ka Pathian, bangdia hon paisan, chi'n;
Amah kilhbelhte di'n A thumsak,
Khros tung a lai A tah ding kuan in.
Aw, Toupa amau dia na lungjinna Kalvari
Ah mijata pi'n kiensak in;
Amau dia Na thuakna thei le uh,
Mang Jesu hon pak lou theilou ding.
Hinna luipi a luang lel a,
Sihna lim a tute ding';
Lungkham leh mangbangte di'n zong,
Lungdamna leh nopna hi.
Kalvari ah,
Hinna damtui a hong luang. D.S.
Huan tua tang lam vajuan lechin,
Hinna tui siang na mu ding ;
Tua ah khelhna teng ngaihdamna,
Ka muh chian ka lungdam ding.
Tua mun kia ah,
Ka mawh ngaihdamna a om. D.S.
Hinna luipi luang ka mu a,
Hehpihna ngen in a dim ;
Keia ding a luang tua tang ah,
Dangtak a ka bah louh na'ng.
Khrist kia a hi,
Kei adia hinna damtui. D.S.
Tang dang tengtengte sang in zong,
Ka Hondampa'n A thuakna
Golgotha ngai thupipen ing;
Ka hotdamna tang etlawm.
Kalvari mual,
Lailung in ngilhnawn kei ning. D.S.

songs.title: Ka Mang Leh Tanpa Na Hi
songs.author: Kailian

lines: Hon Gumpa koilai ah Na om,
Chiin ka hon zongzong hi;
Kei di'n thil thupi N'on bawlsak a,
Ka tangtawn van pahna ding.
Aw Hontanpa thupipen,
Aw, hon Gumpa lamdang pen;
Kei din sing hamsia tung ah Na hong thuak,
Ka Mang leh Tanpa Na hi.
Aw, N'on itna thuk leh zatdan,
Kuaman mu pha ngeilou uh;
Thangvan misiangthou khempeuh ten zong,
Na thukdan muban lou uh.
Aw Na hong kumsuk lai bang in,
Tuin ka hon mu theilou;
Hizong Na hon itna simthu siah,
Ka lailung sung ah tamden.
Aw ka laukha khaubang chiah in,
Nang hon Gum Toupa kiang ah,
A khut taklam ah vatu inla,
Na tangtawn vankhawpi ah.

songs.title: Ka Toupa Gilou In Sim Uh

lines: Ka Toupa gilou in sim uh
I gitlouh sik un A sita;
A maban hihding a sep ua,
Amah khros puain A paita.
Tuin Jesu'n hon ngen tawntung,
Ka dang a tak hi, A chi hi. (2)
Linglukhu leh puansan pia uh,
Melmaten a paipihta ua;
A min Luguh mun kichi ah,
Gitlouh nga uh Amah tung ah.
Kalvari ah haksa A thuak,
Midang panpih ding omlou uh;
Pa aw, bangdia hon paisan chi'n,
Lungkham in kikou, singdawn ah.
Samari mi in tui pia lou,
Aman tuinak pawtsak tawntung;
Singdawn a A om laitak in,
Pia nuam lou hi khuanim in zong.
Kalvari mual tung ah i Toupa,
Khros tung ah linglukhu tawh;
Mipite nuihsan ding in,
Tulsing lel ah khaikang uh.
Aw na mah tel in chia!
Ka Toupa a gawtna uh;
A khut, A khe, A lu en un,
I mawhna hang' A sisan
Siangthou tuibang a hong tak,
Thum vungvung a Thuakpa.
Ka dang a tak chi a kikou in,
Zuthuk a dawnsak uh a;
Zuthuk in phasak lou ding,
Laukha ngai a dangtak hi.
A sih kuan a A dangtak laiin,
Kuaman pia nuamlou uhi;
Melma simsenglouh lai ah,
Dangtak vungvung in A si.
Aw, Ka laukha hon tatna natdan,
Ken zaw ka gen theilou hi;
Juan in, Kalvari mual ah,
Na Toupa mah vadong in
Kalvari mual lam gal in don lehang,
I Toupa thuakna mel in mu nihang;
A sisan luangkhia leh A lu a linglukhu,
I mawh vang uh hi maw chih i theitelta ding.
Ei mawh vang a melma hiamma,
A thuak zou ngei maw!
Hichibang a hehpihna,
Kuama'n neilou uhi.
Na na lawmlawm e Toupa thuakna,
Enchim thei kei veng e ka Mang thuakna;
Melmate'n saksi bang in awi, Kalvari mual ah,
Nuihchiam in lel uh e tua Rom sepaihte in.
Ka it pen Hondampa'n A thuakna zaw,
Lung in ngilhzou la'ng e A dangtakna;
Ngilhni nei thei kei veng ka lai a nalua hi,
Khawvel khelhna vang in sihna gimhuai A thuak.
Kalvari mual gal sialbang don nawn ning,
Maimit suan chimlang e ka Mang thuakna;
Lailung muantu ding ban in sam e ka Toupa,
Pa aw, hon nusia ken, chiin A kikou hi.
Ka Pathian anbang hon itpa,
Na tuanglam kon haih nung in leng;
Na hehpihna aw nem ngiingei,
Anbang Na itna simthu sia'n,
Ka lailung sung a hong luah hi. (2) D.S.
Na vualjawlna'n lei Na buak a,
Thilhihtheihna'n Na domkang a;
A tung ah ngabang ka leng a,
Ka khelh vang in ka Mang Jesu,
Thah in A om Kalvari ah. (2) D.S.
Ken zong Toupa keia ding in,
Na Ta neihsun Na hon sawl a,
Theihtawp suah in hong pang sam ning;
Ka thil bangkim tuangnung sia in,
Ka pum in kong kipia ta ding. (2) D.S.
Non itna tuibang thuklua e,
Mihing pilna in banpha lou,
Ka neu lua hi, phuang seng kei ning;
Ka pum a kong kipiak kan zaw,
Hihtheih nei nawn kei veng Toupa. (2) D.S.
Ka damlai ni a beima in,
Na Laukha in hon huai jel in,
Nang a ding kia in ka hing ding;
Ka damlai hanmual liam chiang in,
Ka kha'n Nang vang a zouta ding. (2) D.S.
Van in tuipi gallam,
Aw, vangla pan albangmang zong di'n;
Mi khial sik a si ding in,
Mang Vontawi ngei a hon sawl ua;
Aw, singdang hithei omlou uhiam?
Aw nun in nuam in, ka kha liangvai,
Na manna tuibang thuk zong;
Paradis ah tuang hon tunta,
Aw vangla pan a hong zongpa in.
Ka sik in A si a,
Aw, ka sik in khet sidup in om!
Talekpa bang a bawl in,
Midik a thuaksakta uhi;
Aw, A sihna ah kei ka hingta.
Dah lungkham gen lehang,
Mang Jesu kan a lungkham om diam?
Aw itna jiak kia lel a,
Khawul sisan bang a luang zaw,
Aw, sim leh mal ah vazong dih ua.
Sisan pha, sisan pha,
Aw, van Mang Vontawi sisan pha in;
Sual leh dougalte lai ah;
Hinna khawpi hon bawlsakta,
Aw, thangvan khawpi a thansuahta.
Tua ah van misiangthou tawh,
La i sa khawm ding uh;
Leitung a mi nam khempeuh in,
Damna sisan i mu.
Belamnou lambang pak ni,
Kalvari mual tung a hong si!
Halleluia (3), Amen.
Belamnou' thupina kilang,
A lasak un a chi;
Belamnou thupi pen hen aw,
Gilou tang in A si.
Pathian vangletna a lian bel,
Jesu Hondampa hi;
Vualjawlna manpha namkim zong,
Tangtawn' Nang a, Toupa.
Simlei a om mi khempeuh in,
Minlian lambang pak uh;
Thupitak in mangtutphah ah,
Amah i mu ding uh.
Hehpihna kong kihong hi,
Mi teng leh namchihta ding;
Vual hon jawlpa phat chiat un,
Mang thupi tungnung ahi.
Mikhial, genthei leh liangvai,
Hehpihna gamnuam juan un;
Sisan siangthou in hon tan zouta,
A ut peuhmah hong lut un.
Van kong kihon lai ahi,
Lut chiat ni, gamnuam sung ah ;
Na khelhna teng tawh hong pai,
Hehpihna'n A ngaidam ding.
Gamchiam tang dinga sehsa,
Unau gammang nawn ken la;
Sapna aw nem ngaikhia in,
Van Kanan Toupa ahi.
Lungdam aw nem ka zata,
Vak thupi ka muh laitak'n ;
Toupa'n lungnopna hon pia,
Tatna sisan ka tangta.
Simlei nunsung sawt nawnlou ding hun kinawhta,
Aw, mikhial leh liangvai mite aw;
Lei lungkhamna awkna khempeuhte,
Tuangnungsia'n Toupa beel in.
Aw lei nunnopna pallun na ngaih.
Tangtawn dong-a i mawhna ding hi ;
Tuangnung siah in ngainawn kei ni, aw sanggam,
Toupa ah kinem tawntung in.
Nungchiang bang hong tung ding hiam tuin thei kei hang,
Hilhna thute a donsak omlou;
Mawk a gamta thumangloute in,
Gim gentheih thuak zoulou ding.
Siatna khimkhua hong jing laiah aw ka Toupa,
Na Kha Siangthou in hon salvak in;
Khelhna khempeuh hong kilang vek ding,
Khelh bang in Nang hon jui n'ung.
Aw hehpihtu Pathian in,
Eite lailung sung ah;
Laukha hon piak lungdamna,
Khawvel pilna'n a zoulou hi.
Mipil mihinna in zaw,
A ngaihtuah khia zoulou ding hi;
Ka Hondampa Na thuguk zaw.
Aw thuk in sang natel e!
Khovel pilna teng sang';
Pathian hon itna simthu,
Thangvan leh simlei dim zouta.
Aw kei mikhial mangthangsa,
A hehpihna vang in;
Laukha hon piak hinna hi,
Aw ka hinna Toupa phat in.
Van Mang nunnem Immanuel gam nuam,
Ngaiin ka mau, sunchin galin don veng;
Simlei loubang tul chia ka khawlna ding,
Aw, donchim la'ng e, ka tangtawn mun ding.
Kumtawn gam ding ka gel in,
Simlei pak bang a vul ding kal ngakla'ng;
Gam siangthou tuangtun kal ngakla'ng,
Phamsate tawh laitual i lenna ding.
Simlei ah zaw liangvaiin kap zong leng,
Van Mang nunnem kiang ka tungngei ding a;
Ka lungkham luankhi A nulsiang ding a,
Naubang nui siausiau in ka lengta ding.
Lungkham banna ding himhim ka theilou,
Simlei lungkhamna a adim vang in;
Honhuai inla, kumtawn pialgal gam ah,
Ka lungkham luankhi a hulta ding hi.
Pialgal gamnuam tuang ka tun hun chiang in,
Ka Mang nunnem in naubang hon pom dia;
Damna siktui siang in a hon sil dia;
Kumtawn hinna ka tangsamta ding hi.
Tung Pathian, hong tualkum aw, nuai simlei ah,
Lungkham puanbang thuap in, vangsel henkol khai veng;
Aw, leitung damlouh vei hong sutkhe ta in.
Mualliam lou aw, Toupa,
Mualliam lou aw, Laukha,
Heh hong nem in;
Leitung natna lungjuan mual ah dak veng aw,
Zata lusun naubang hong awi in.
Tongdam nem ngiingei nou aw e, van Laukha,
Nang hon ngai duangvul veng, heh hong nem in Laukha;
Aw, leitung damlouh vei, Toupa hong veh in.
Jangkhua khal e, aw a gamlei kidang hi,
Tulvum lengnou khuan tawh, selung juan kidang hi;
Aw, nunnopna ding' Pathian gamnuam aw chi'ng.
Nuai simlei ah zaw lailung muanna omlou,
Ngaihtam sialna hi e, gibing khenna hi e;
Aw, nunnopna ding' Pathian gamnuam ngai veng,
Bualna ding Pathian gam nunnuam don ve ni,
Namchihta nunnopna Pathian gamnuam don ni;
Aw, angelte leh misiangthou tuallenna.
Laukha Siangthou, meikuang leh meipi a Pipa,
Mang Immanuel hong nai nawn in;
Gamdai suk leh tou a ka vaih lai in,
Hong vak nawn in, pialgal
Jingdam Solnou, vak hoihtak in.
Aw van Aksi, aw van Aksi etlawm,
Ka Hondampa leh Ka Mang deihhuaipen Na hi,
Lungkham tuipi kihawt in gal hong lian zong leh,
Bitna Toupa, kon belding kum khua in.
Suangmanpha dawngkot hoih leh thupi hon hun chiang',
Sana vangkhua tuallai' ka leng dia;
Khelh vang a ka lungkhamnate teng zong,
Gam minthang leh tangtawn mun ah,
Sil bang in a pal ding.
Belamnou manna gam nitum ngeilouhna ah,
Khensate'n simlei ngai nawnlou in;
Zaila'n Belamnou lambang a pak ua,
Hinna tulsing lim nuam ah,
Silhpuan ngou bat in leng uh.
Laukha Siangthou, khuva bang nem,
Hong leng nawn in, hon ngai ung;
Hon halhsak nawn in mipi a bahte,
Mualliam louin hong kik nawn in.
Aw hon ngai ung e, Laukha nunnem,
Nangmah louin mipite lammang uh;
Pi nawn inla aw Jingdam Solnou,
Zion, nopna lam siangthou ah.
Ngaidih, Toupa Na tatsate'n,
A tangtawn tuanglam uh haih;
Lei Belamchingten lah pi theilou uh,
Bangchin hita ding hiam, Toupa?
Laukha Siangthou, Nang Na om chiang',
Lei lungkhamna a nem jel;
Sual huihpi leh khemna gal lian zong leh,
Na min phat in zaila sa ning.
Jesu nunnem hong gen nawn in,
Lungkham tak a Na thuakna;
Theisak inla, aw, Na linglukhu tawh,
Na lungjinna lamdang lua tawh.
Pentikos ni bang in, aw, Hondampa,
Hong hei nawn in, namchih zatamte;
Tangtawn Pialgal lamhaih in bah uh e,
Hong pi khia nawn in.
Buaina gam lungkhamna tanvak ding in,
Na hatna thupi tawh hong leng in;
Khelhna kangmang ding in meikuang bang in,
Laukha, hong leng in.
Mulkimhuai sihna thuak a Na tatte,
Simlei pal zou a lailung muangte;
Hambang huaiin Na tangtawn gam manna
Tuanglam theiloute.
Laukha Siangthou nunnem hong hei nawn in,
Hotdam ngai uh, Na ta taimangten;
Tangtawn hinna lampi zong theilou a,
Albang mang dingte.
Ngilh sawt lua uh sing khros a Na thuakna,
A lungsim uh sual mial tanvak in;
Thengsak in, a pahna uh lei pallun,
Na huai theih nadi'n.
Laukha hong leng in, Eden a thil lui,
Albang mang ding Na gam hoih ka don ding;
Huan ka mu ding a A vangletnate,
Phatna ging huihkhi siang bang in leng ding.
Immanuel, Na itna huangsung ah,
Buaina gal a lian e, hong nai nawn in;
Sul hong hei nawn in ka bitna Na hi,
Na itna huangsung ah aw,
Buaina gal a lian e.
Aw, nopna leh vualjawlna ni thupi,
Na tuanglam galmuang ah hon huai jel in;
Jordan tuipi liante hong kihawt in,
Kanan gam hoih chiaugal ah ka kai ding.
Khuva bang a lensiam in valeng leng,
Ka bitna Kalvari mual ka nawk ding;
Tua mun tuangnung ka siahsan hun chiang in;
Sunni tum ngeilou manna gam juan ning.
Aw, ka damlai ni albang a man chiang',
Nopna khawpi tuallai ah ka leng ding;
Kalvari sihna lambang a pakte,
Nopna tul thei nawnlou in ka pawl ding.
Toupa, Na Laukha'n hong vehsuak nawn in,
Simlei daidam naubang kahna;
Hotdamna huangjawl sung a leng ding in,
Na mite hon pi jel in.
Van lampi ah honhuai in,
Mial leh lungkhamna nuaisia'n;
Hondoutu sualgal ka zou ngei ding,
Huan Na vak ah ka leng ding.
Toupa' Laukha'n paibang a honkop leh,
Machiang khimjing a theng jel ding ;
Simlei buai leh haksatna nuaisiah in,
Ka leng ding uh Na gam ah.
Toupa' Laukha huai louh in nuai simlei,
Sang tampi manna gam ahi ;
Mang louin gam siangthou tuang hontun ding,
Toupa, Na hatna muang in.
Haksa khempeuh nuam in i thuakjel ding,
Toupa'n hatlou panpih hon chiam;
A tawp dong in Laukha'n honpi ding a,
Mun thupi i tun pha in.
Tang a pi leh pute, Eden huansung a mi,
Dougal a hat man in,
Sihna leh lungkhamna mawhpua in a pawt ua,
Naubang kah thei lou ding, sun naubang hon kapsak,
A khawk ngei! A khawk lawmlawm ngei maw!
Tutan pha'n zong;
Itna huangsung a maw A vondeih hi ding lai,
Zekhemna jiak in maw henkol a hon bulh hi.
Doudan siampa Setan, gal hangpa doudante,
Eiten theisiam lehang ;
Zawhna Laukha namsau, Pathian Thu hiamtuah a,
Dougalte zou ding in simthu chiamsa ahi.
Hiai simlei Tulsa a ngabang ka len sung in,
Ka ban in hon kai in;
Lungkhamna mial nuaia hambang ka vaih sung in,
Aw Laukha Siangthou, Nang hambang hon huai jel in.
Chi genthei lungdonna hiai lei ah,
Lungdon khitui tawh Nang kon ngak hi;
Ka Toupa'n hon ompih gige in,
Nam genthei, liangvai silbang a pak ding.
Aw hong leng in, Toupa k'on ngai hi,
Kalvari a anbang Non itna;
Ka tung uah puan bang in hong jak in,
Nam genthei, liangvai silbang a pak ding.
A haksatna mun ah om mahleng,
Toupa Nang lou, kua dang muang lou ding;
Senlai naubang ka kahna gam ah,
Namchih lungmawl lak ah Nang hong tang in.
Khelhnate'n hon naih jel mahle uh,
Sihna luiguam ah ka leng zong in;
Toupa, Hinna Kha'n hong ompih in,
Anbang N'on itna silbang a pak ding.
Genthei mahleng aw, Vanmang lukhu,
Khelhna gal lak ah semgimte ding;
Na gam vang a ka gentheihnate,
Ka Pa ang ah pak namtui in a pak.
Ka galvan nusia ngam la'ng e;
Aw ka tenna gal lauhna mun;
Niteng khemna in hon dou e,
Aw, ka Hondampa nusia ding in.
Hon galthuam aw, Immanuel,
Na Laukha in hon galthuam in;
Hiai lei gilou mial gal thupi,
Nang din ka hon dou jel ding hi.
Bah leh nguitak a ka om a,
Nang dia dawilawk mel ka puak chiang'n;
Galdoute ding a Manglukhu,
Aw, Na bawl pen hon hilh thak jel in.
Aw, hon en dih ka Hondampa,
Na sisan a Na tatsate:
Hiai lei gilou mial kulh sung ah,
Aw, tang uh e, Toupa simsenglouh.
Nang N'on panpih leh melmate,
Zou jel ning, Na sisan vang in;
Na tangtawn gou luahpih ding in;
Aw, sual sal apan hon pikhia ning.
Denchiang a jingkhua hongvak chian,
Ka Hondampa mel ka mu ding;
Tua ah galvan ka ngata ding,
Aw, puan ngou thupi hon silhsak ding.
Damlai khawvel ka zin sung in,
Nang kon ngai hi, Mang lungnem;
Buaina tuipi kihawt in,
Mi sang tampi a taihman nua'n,
Toupa hon ngai veng.
Pipa Mang thupi, (2)
Na vontawi hehpihhuai liangvai in;
Khemna huihpi a lan laiin,
Toupa hon ngai veng.
Sisan luang a Na tatsate,
Ka manthat ding uh phal ke'n;
Tuipi tung leh gam teng ah,
Na banjal hat a hon pi di'n,
Toupa hon ngai veng.
Naupang tanghou Na vualjawl bang,
Ka lailung sung khimjing uah;
Na Laukha vak kilawm in,
Hong luah dimsak in aw Toupa
Halleluiah Amen.
Lemna Mangpa A piang Beth-lehem ah,
Tua gam lailungpen a Kanan gam nuam;
Namchih dia pheiphung suan a tuntheihna hi,
Tua ah hinna damtui siang a luang hi.
Aw lungdamtak in naungek Mang pian ni in,
Kipak in sa ni, lemna lungdamna;
Chi chih namchih ding a suahtakna ahi,
Nuam in pak un, Halleluiah, chi in.
Phalbi daidam jan khawsawt vuksan lai',
Belamchingte'n belam a chin lai un;
Jankhanglai in Gabriel in hong veh a,
Hinna damna thupha kon pua hi, chi'n.
Tua in angel sangja'n vanlaijawl ah,
Hong kilak in zaila ngaih a sa uh;
Tungnungpen ah Pathian' thupina hi hen,
Simlei ah pahna leh lemna leng hen.
Nun in nuam ni lei leh van Mang pianni'n,
Van khuangpi leh lei khuangpi thawn tuah,
'Lunmangte Lunmang leh toute Toupa hi',
Mang Jesu pak' damsung kumvei ve ni.
Belamchingten zong khawpi lam juan uh,
Suahlam mipilten zong tua khua juan uh;
Chibaibuk in liangvaiten a neihsun un,
Kumpi leh mangte'n zong goubawm hong uh.
Ka lailung sung mawhna' dimsa,
Na tempul hong suaksak in;
A sung ah ka it Toupa aw,
Kumsawt ngabang hong leng in.
Na heina mun, (2)
Tangtawn nun a nopna hi. D.S.
Aw khatvei bek kimu thei leng,
Khatvei bek Na mel mu leng;
Simlei nunnop pallun sang in,
A lehja in etlawm chia.
Hong kipia ning, (2)
Nang tawh ngabang lengkhawm di'n. D.S.
Aw hawkkhia in, ka mawhnate,
Ka laukha humbit inla;
Ka chimta hi, mial a om zaw,
Hong vak in, van Vak Vanglian.
Na hong vak chiang', (2)
Lailung sung nopna'n a dim. D.S.
Endih, Toupa, Na sisan luang a Na tatsate,
Simlei thupina silpak bang a vul ding;
Mi sangtampite'n a lunggulh uh,
Tangtawn a pal ding van Saron, Nang sang in.
Aw, hong thou chiat un,
Damlai ni mual a liam ma'n;
Muanglah lou in Mang' nna i sem ding,
Simlei tawh mangkhawm ding thupinate,
Hon nungheisan in, tangtawn gam nna sem ni.
Dangka sum nasem leh van gam nasem mipite,
Leigam huai a thangvan gam huaikhawm i sawm,
Simlei tuangnungsiah ni hong tung in,
Tangtawn khua hong vak leh bang i suakta dia?
Mang' nasep ding denchiang' chi'n ni tam i khelsak sak,
Gen chiat ve ni, Zion tate i maban;
Sihna nuai a kha mangthangsate,
Toupa hatna muang in pi kik nawn ve ni.
Hon pikhawm in chi chih a mi, pauchih a mite,
Sim leh Mal mite tanpha'n zong Belamnou,
Simlei haksatna nuaisiah zou a,
Khawvel Hondampa lambang pak kal ngakla'ng.

songs.title: Ka Khe Veng In Mang Jesu
songs.author: Rev. Thangngur

lines: Damsung tuipi tung a ka vaih-
Laiin aw ka Mang Jesu;
Ka lu tung jawn a vak in,
Ka machiang Na tangsak in;
Huihpi nung in van a nim,
Lungkham tuipi kihawt hi.
Mial hong sah chiang in ka vai,
Lungkham a nat in ka kap;
Theihlouh gam' ka pai laiin,
Ka khe ching in Mang Jesu;
Ka machiang Na pai inla,
Na khut in hon na len in.
Sun leh jan omlou thei hilou
Damsung tuipi tung ah jaw;
Ahihhang' ka Mang Jesu,
Mial in Na mel a liah chiang',
Patau in huibang ka mau;
Nang adin a mial kei hi.
A siang leh sianglou kikal ah,
Asang leh aniam mun ah;
Kalsuan dan thei siam kei veng,
Paidan Nang hon sinsak in;
Anuam leh ahaksa ah,
Na khut in hon len gige'n.
Aw, thuak laia huibang mauna
Hehpihna i chi thei diam?
Ahihhang' van thupina,
A bukim a i tan chiang',
Nunsung a haksa tomchik,
Gentham i sa ding ahiam?
Pathian phatna lungtang ka deih
Khelhna omlou lungtang;
Kei dia luang sisan thei tawntung,
Tuabang lungtang ka deih. (3) D.S
Kiniamkhiak, kipumpiak lungtang,
Tanpa thupi mai ah ;
Khrist kia in vai A hawmna mun,
Ka lungsung' mangtutphah. (3) D.S.
Kisik a kiniamkhiak lungtang,
Thudik ginna siangthou;
Sihna'n a khen theih nawn ngeilouh,
Tua lungsung a om pen. (3) D.S.
Bangkim a thak khinsa lungtang,
Itna siangthou a dim;
Hoih leh siangthou leh a dikkim,
Hon neisak sam ve aw. (3) D.S.
Nangma hindan siang hon pia in,
Tunglam a kipan in;
Ka lungsung ah hon gelh sam in,
Na hon itna min ngaih. (3) D.S.
Sual sepaih gal tawh sunchin ka kidou uh,
Sih theihna gu zang a hon dou chian,
Ka zaitha a nem;
Mang Jesun A galvan paibang hong kop chiang,
Laulou in machiang ka suan nawnta.
Vual honjawl jel ding a,
Ka muan sual huihkhi in sem zongleh,
Vuang ngeilou hi;
Khuambang kip munjang suangpi sang in.
Lau lou dou jel un, gitlouh thahatnate,
Belamnou Mang sepaih dal zoulou,
Khelh leh sihna in ;
I machiang khawpi nim daibang theng zouta,
Zion khawpi a lang, galdon un.
Kidouna thupi Na hunchiam tungsak in,
Mang Jesu, Mikael kuansak in,
Setan gal man hen;
Sepaihte'n galzawhna pak kal ngaklah ung,
Khelhna gal Gehen mangpa aiin.
Na angsung muanna tuin tuangtungta ung,
Kipah la thangsuak hen lei leh van,
Nam chih mija kiang;
Sual sihna khimjing pan salbang Non suah nawn,
Ngaihman Na om ka sialsial Toupa.
Hon phat ni'ng, Hondampa Manpha,
Nang a kia ka hita a;
Sisan a hon silsiang ziak in,
Belamnou thupi hen aw.
Thupi, thupi Jesun hon tan,
A min siang phat in om hen;
Sisan a hon silsiang ziak in,
Belamnou, Halleluiah!
Hiai khawlna kim ka lunggulh a,
Ka hahkatna khua sawtta;
Hahkat tawp a ka muan lel chiang,
Vualjawl in ka om ta hi.
Mitphiatkal teng zong ka muang hi,
Sisanpha kei hon siangsak;
Tua lui ah muang in ka khawlta,
Hondampa kiang a teng in.
Nang dia sem din hong kipia ning,
Nang dia hing a, si ding in ;
Hotdamna kim, lamdang thawn piak,
Kipak in ka genta ding.
Mikhial ka hi Toupa hon ngaidam in,
Thupha ka hon tawi hi, Na khe bul ah.
Ka kiang a Na om louh leh,
Leitung kei din sihna ;
Van zong ka kahna gam ding,
Aw, hon ompih in.
Muanna dang omlou hi nuai simlei ah,
Nang kia ka hon bel ding dougal ma ah.
Gamdai a kumsawt hambang ka vaih nua'n,
Tuin Na aw jain ka hon juan hi.
Tuin Toupa, tuibang hon siangsak in,
Na gam huin melma ka dou sam ding.
Ka sautna leh thahatna
Leh ka mawhna'n hon buaisak ;
Mawhna leh kidektheihlouhna,
Ka kisik nawn theikei hi ;
Hon hotkhiak ni, (2)
Khuavak muhkal ngaklah ing. (2)
Jan khawvak in na ngaklah ing,
Jing phal hong vak ngaklah ing;
Ka kongkhak hon ka lamen hi,
Ka kolbutte khaubang sut ;
Khuavak ngak ing, (2)
Jan khawmial lungjinna ah. (2)
Jingkhua a hong vak ngei ding a,
Lummei jing thengsak ding in;
Lummei leh vuahpi kikhawmte,
Hong then hun hong om ding hi;
Tuabang hun ding, (2)
Ginna in mel in mu'ng e. (2)
Aw ka gam lui simlei Aigupta
Leh ka vaihna lei gimhuai ;
Lambang kheng a khamuanna leh,
Thangvan nopnate ka tangta ;
Na sung a ka vual luite zong salbang suah in.
Aw, hong maiin, Toupa kiang ah,
Aw, hong tel in, Toupa lam ah ;
Mang nasemmi kichinglou uhi,
Theihtawp a sem ding in nang zong honchial uh.
Aw, simlei ah Toupa lou a,
Sum leh pai lamtam neite zaw ;
A tawpna ding uh gel dih ua,
Laisiangthou thu in a hon hilh ;
A utna utawh mangthang jel uhi, chiin.
Leinopna aw, hon nusia in,
Kikhenden ding hita hang e ;
Ka Toupa hon sapna bang a,
A nasem din kipanta ing,
Tangthupha phuang ding in lawm hoih leng ka zong ding.
Aw, van Mang nna sem chiat ve ni,
Sanggah liangvai lei saptuamte'n ;
Leitung gam lianzaw en lehang,
Laukha hotdamna ding ngai in,
Koute zong hon pikhia un, chiin hon ngak uh.
Ka thou ding a ka Pa sianglam vajuan ve ning,
Ka machiang lummei bang a jing;
Anbang hon it singdang omlou nuai simlei ah,
Ka Pa loungal ka dougal hi.
Gilou in heisan mahleng,
A hoihna tul ngeilou;
Lunghei in A siang zong leng,
A vang ka zou nawn ding.
Ka Pa' inn ah hauhsakna kim, nunnopna kim,
Albang dahte heh A nem jel;
Kei vuaktang leh laisung gilkial ka si ding maw,
Bangdia lelliang bang vai ka hiam?
Aw, A nen a ka hei laiin nunnuam na'ng e,
Simlei nunnop ka zon tengteng;
Ka Pa' insung ngaina veng e, gel chingtang e,
Thupha tawi ding hilou ka hiam?
Kei migilou, lungkhamsak leh zahlaksakpa,
Kei ding a mun A hon phal leh;
Simlei pallun ka dougalte ngai nawn kei ning,
A lut lai hun a tom lua hi.
Pialgal sunni ka lailung ah a hong tangta,
Ka kha simlei a kalsuan lai,
Ka gentheihna nopna'n a hong pal,
Pa thununna ka thuak mualsuah zawh in.
Pa thununna ka thuak lai in,
Khasiat mittui in hon tum nichin in,
Theisiam ngeikei veng ka Pa' hon itna.
Thununna lawh lou vangkhawlai ta lah hilou,
Ka pianna Mang' sisan ahi;
Khelh nasem in ka kimang ding hiam?
Tangtawn a gou ding ka Mang' nna loungal.
Kei dia ka hin laiin nopni chih om ngeilou,
Mang Jesu hon sapna bang a,
Isak' maitam a ka kilat chiang,
Vualjawlna tuikhuk nopna'n a hong luang.
Mansoul khawpi ah zaw mun leh mual ka neilou,
Ka Mang Khrist a simmawhna uh;
Pua in khua pamlam ah pai ning e,
Salem Thak ah mun ka tanglaina ding.
Nang a ka hih hon ngilhsak ken, ka Mang Jesu,
Na hinnain hon hingsak in;
Damlai gamdai a ka zin sung in,
Ka kalsuan bangkim Nang thu hita hen.
Simlei ah zaw khemna leh,
Gitlouhna bei lou ding,
Sunchin in khemin ka om gige;
Ka mitmuh leh bil a ka jakte in,
Khelhna ah hon tun.
Hizong ka Toupa' hehpihna thupi in,
Gilou kisik ngaidam;
Kisik, kiheiin kon juan, Toupa (2)
Ka gitlouh ngaidam in.
Anbang A hon it vang in,
Hing leh dam in i om;
Hizong A itna thei kei nak hang,
Kalvari a tatna ngailou bang in,
Leipal i pak uh.
Simlei hoihnate khempeuh,
Tangtawn a ching zoulou;
Hizong a etlawmna zong nak hang,
Nuai simlei ah nuam in ka leng zong a,
Mangthang ka na hi.
Mangthangte zong a hondam
Ding in Mang Jesu in,
Hehpih in hon zong liangvai tate;
Sual sihna mial nuai a na kimangte,
Thounawnta ve ni.
Ka pumpi leh ka nuntakna,
Mang Jesu kiang ah ka peta;
Lungkham buaina lau nawn kei ning,
Ka neih teng tawh kipumpiak ing.
Mang Jesu kia nuntakna pen,
I tangtawn Pa, Lemna Mang hi;
Amah kiang ah nuntakna om,
Khelh leh haina a pukte din,
Leitung a mihingte lak ah,
Misiangthou khial ngeilou om hiam?
Mihing' Tapa Mang Jesu kia'n,
Siamlouh khelhna khat leng neilou.
Leitung lamtam leh nopsakna,
Manthatna leh khemna a hi;
Hizong Pialgal sesum lamtam,
Tangtawn in tuibang kiamlou ding.
Mang Jesu'n ka khelhna hon tan,
Jin teengkhawi apan hon pikhia;
Tua bang hihthei singdang om diam?
Jin teengkhawi pan hon pikhia thei?
Toupa lou a hun paisate,
Koilam tungkhinta uhiam ?
Kik nawnlou in mualliamta uh,
Hun ka neih lai bangchin ka mang ding hiam?
Toupa hon din nuam veng,
Hinna leh Vak non piak ;
Kha Siang in hon panpih hen,
A leh li'n kon din ding.
Toupa k'ong pai kei mikhial zong,
Nang mulou, khial a nungta;
Ka hun tamzaw ka beisak nung',
Ka hun bei kuan a silbang Na hong pal.
Toupa Jesu hatna zang in,
Adam suan khimjing nuai ah;
Keimah bang a khelhna'n laukha a khakkhumte
Pi khiak ka ut ngei e.
Aw ka laukha, na saltanna,
Mang Khrist in hon tan zouta;
Nang zong thou in, Toupa' a ding
Kia in hing in tangtawn Amah' ding in.
En in, Toupa in na ma ah,
Lampi nih ka Ka khung chi;
Koi zaw na zui ding hiam?
Na ut zawkzawk tel in.
Kumsawt hinna lampi leh,
Kumsawt manna lampi hi;
Koi zaw na jui ding hiam?
Na ut zawkzawk tel in.
Lampi nih kathuam lai' na ding,
Kumtawn damna lampi leh,
Kumtawn sihna lampi;
Na ut zawkzawk tel in.
Apelmawh a zuih ding lampi
Nopna khawpi tunna lam leh,
Dahna khua tunna lam;
Na ut zawkzawk tel in.
A lamtou pen van gam lampi,
A lamphei pen dahna lampi,
Koi zaw i jui nuam diam?
I ut zawkzawk tel ni.
Galhat melpu din hon thuam in, ka Mang Jesu,
Tuikhang bang in lian khimjinmang,
Gehen gal sual zatamte.
Mang sisan kai puanlap,
Gal ma ah pei un, ngilh kei ni;
Mangpen' sepaih hihang,
Khelhna tuipi hong kihawt zong leh.
Manglukhu tang ding sepaihten, i zawh hun chiang'
Vak leh khawvel i kidou lel,
Mang Khrist hong thuakna vang in.
Ging vengvung dougalte sang in i thupizaw,
Kha gilou pungkhawm, gal minthang,
I kap Zion sepaihte'n.
Gehen dougal sisan vang a i zawh hun chiang,
Gal ai ding phit leh sawnkai tawh
Thangvan Zion khawpi ah.
Mangpen sepaihte'n manglukhu i khu chiat ding,
Van misiangten hon na dawn ding,
Nunnopna i zouta ding.
Zion vangkhawpi tualnuam tuang i tun chiang in,
Simlei mubang ngai nawn kei ni,
Nunnuam a lenkum vei in.
Khelhna khukpi lam manawh a pai in,
Tua mun lam a pahna ka zon lai in ;
Tua lui mial a kikou aw ka jak in,
Lauhna'n ka dim nawnta ngal a.
Aw Jesu kei lam hong nga nawn in,
Toupa, Na lam haih in, ka vakvai hi.
Khelhna lawhtak sihna ahi ngal a,
Pal ngam kei veng tua sihna tuipi lian;
Hizong paina dang omlou hi Toupa,
Lailungmuanpa Nang hon ngai veng,
Kum tampi ka vakmang san nung in zong,
Anbang Itna in A hon veng jel a;
Bangkim a ka bangkim Na hi, Toupa,
Phatna zaila'n simlei dim hen.
Aw Toupa, Tangtawn in Nang hon phat ning,
Na min pahtawina la ken sasa ning;
Simlei leh thangvan a Toupa Na hi,
Na min phat in zaila sa ning.
Hiai lei zaw tangtawn gam a chinglou,
Lungkham naubang kahna ahi, Toupa;
Nopnaten lenmual khumzouta,
Nunnop pak heuta.
Aw, gal in don veng tung thangvan,
Angel lenna minthang khawpi ah;
Hotdamten khawlna galmuang ah,
Simlei albang mang hen chi uh.
Aw, ka ngai pak chih lutna gamnuam,
Tul lou ding Mang nunnem in a siam ah,
Hon pi in, hon kai tawntung in,
Kah lai hon nem in.
Belamnou' gam Zion ka tun chiang',
Lungdeih gibang khenna ngai nawnlou ding ;
Itna khawpi namchih zata,
Nunnop kimna hi.
Thianmang anglai limbelh kulhpi ah,
Nunnuam phungching in tualleng diamdiam uh;
Nuai simlei pan ka galdot in,
Ka sinlai hon lun.

songs.title: Aw, Nopna Gam I Manawh Ding
songs.author: Thangvung

lines: A tangtawn gouluah tum in i sem jel ding,
Lungkhamna a hong len lai in;
Ka kiang ah om jel inla aw,
Ka Hondampa deihhuai.
Aw, nopna gam i manawh ding,
Khawldenna ding,
Aw ka ngai e, khensa teng,
Kimna'ng thangvan gam.
Simlei hoihna teng zong albang a mang ding,
Tangtawn manna zaw tullou ding;
Khangthak dong in gensawn ding uh,
A gam bei ngeilou ding.
Mit a muhlouh gamnuam ei dia hon bawlsak,
Manawh in juanni tua gamnuam;
Aw, tua mun ngei ana hi maw,
I tangtawn inn nuam ding.
Lei nopna mang nawn mai jel mun a tengte,
Khenlouhna gam hon bawlsak vang ;
Halleluiah, aw Hondampa,
Pahtawiin om jel hen.
Huihpi hat lauhuai khen ah,
Denchiang in, denchiang in;
A tawpchia inn tungkhawm ding,
Denchiang in, denchiang in,
Huihpi, vuahpi, khenlam a,
Puanjak sung bit a om in;
I jial ding i long puanjak,
Denchiang in, denchiang in.
Hondampa mel i mu ding,
Denchiang in, denchiang in;
Hotdamna la i awi ding,
Denchiang in, denchiang in,
Rose leh Lili pal lutna'h,
I luankhi daibang theng ding ;
Aw tua nopna i tang ding,
Denchiang in, denchiang in.
Tungchiang sana gam nuam ah,
Denchiang in, denchiang in;
Lawmvual ngaihte i mu ding,
Denchiang in, denchiang in,
Tua chiaugal gam nunnuam ah
Lungkham mangbat beita ding,
Mangpha kichi nawnlou ding,
Denchiang in, denchiang in.
Lungkham buaina'n mangbang a bawm,
Simlei hamsia thuak;
Toupa vang a ka lawmvual ngaih,
Khenna'n kawlni hong suak.
Aw gibang khen la'ng e, (2)
Lawmvual lungtuak te aw;
Toupa, Na Laukha'n hong leng in,
Sunkim heh hong nem in.
Sunkim jankhua a zaila sa'n,
Na min ka oih pih;
Gibang khenna'n kawlni hong suak,
Lungkham buaina'n hon bawm.
Na min pak lou thei kei ung e,
Laukha lungdam na'ng;
Anbang N'ong itna jamvel ah,
Van mite dungsun ung.
Gibang kikhen mahle ung aw,
Laukha, hong ompi'n;
Albang dah naubang ka kah lai',
Saron pak hon khiah in.
Khenlouhna gam ka ngai e,
Immanuel' gamnuam;
Gibang khenna'n kawlni
Sialbang hong suak nawnta;
Ka ngai khenlouhna Zion tang etlawm.
Ka ngai silbang pal thangvan,
Aw khenlouhna khawpi;
Ka lal mel leh hinna tulsing,
Saron paksil a lun.
Van Jerusalem etlawm,
Hinna siktui aluang;
Mit a muhlouh gam leh,
Hinna tulsing limnuam;
Salem thak etlawm ah tuang hon tun in.
Manna gam khawpi tual ah,
Van Belamnou A leng;
Khimjin lungkhamna leh,
Naubang kah om nawnlou,
Pialgal Tanvakpa Mang in tu, chi uh.
Manna van khawpi tanchin,
Genseng vual ahi lou;
Ka Mang Hondampa leh,
Serafim zaisakna,
Ka Mang lenna tua Zion tang etlawm.
Ka kumsawt inn ding lemta ning e,
Kumsawt Suangpi kip Khrist tung a lem in;
A hun laiin theihtawp in lam ning,
Ka omna simlei inn hong mangpah ding.
Kumsawta hinna inn kip Khrist pen ka neita e,
Damlai huihpi leh tuipi hong kihawt mahleh;
Khrist vang in kei a hon tum talou ding.
Aw, envel dih loubang tul simlei,
Lungkhamna leh natna'n a dim zouta;
A tung ah lungmuanna omta lou,
Siatna tuipi a kihawt tak ziak in.
Aw, sihna tuipi a hong lianta;
Zion taten innsang lamtouta ni ;
Laukha Siangthou hinna'n kithuam ni,
Hinna Sangpen innsang tungnung ahi.
Nuai simlei nguizouta a tung a mihingte tawh;
Gitlouhna leh gimhuai in dimzouta;
I it i ngaihteng leh vualngeihte'n mualkhum zou.
Aw, Belam nunnem in gam thak A bawlna mun,
Aw, ka kha aw nang leng tua gam lam zong sam in;
Simlei tuangnung siah chia na omna mun ding in.
Dikna gam siamzouta, aw i tangtawn gamlei ding,
Lei lungkhamna gamsia hong chim mahleh;
Mang Khrist na muan a-leh gam thak ah na leng ding.
Tang a i pi leh puten a muhphak louh gam uh,
Sisan vang in kei in ka na muta;
Tua gam zotna lampi i Mang Khrist kia ahi.
Tangbang damlai ni lenkil hong ke dialdial,
Nun i nopnaten lenmual khum jel ;
Sulkik lel ding lung in gel maw'ng,
Ngai in dondon zong le'ng.
Lawmvual lungtuakte aw,
Gibang kikhen zong le'ng;
Nunbang nuam a houlung tuak in,
Damlai tuanglam suk leh tou ah,
I Toupa' nna i sem ding uh.
Jan muikhaw jin leh sun khawsawt nuai ah zong,
Simlei lungkhamna'n mangbang hon bawm;
Lungkhamna kipahna suak hen,
I kah lai bang le'ng maw.
Toupa, banjal' hon huai in vual lungtuak tawh,
Na lenna zaisa a manawh in;
Gibang kikhen lau nawnlou ding,
Lungkham buaina khen ah.
Luankhi nul a gibang kikhen lau nawn lou,
Aksi khen gam hoih a lengten jaw;
Zaideih awi uh ging lawmnou tawh,
Nibang lun vangkhua ah.
Lungkham dah ni a om,
Lungkham buaini a om ;
Hon khutvan uh kipahpih ning,
Pathian' Angelte omna'h.
Pathian' Angelte omna'h,
Gam vangla nunnuam ah;
Nuamsa tak a ka luah hun ding,
Pathian' Angelte omna'h.
Toupa ka hatna hi,
Hon pi tawntung Aksi;
Bit a tua gam hon tun ding in,
Pathian' Angelte omna'h.
Gam vangla nunnuam ah,
Ka luah ding in nuam om ;
Tua ah Manglukhu kei din om,
Pathian' Angelte omna'h.
Ka long in innlam juan,
Hon buaisak kan pah ning;
Bit in tua inn ah ka tung ding,
Pathian' Angelte omna'h.
Mialna leh jan lauhuai a mang nawnlou ding,
Kongpi kilawm hon hun chiang in;
Pathian A tanna khawpi tual ah leng ning,
Kongpi kilawm hon hun chiang in.
Kongpi kilawm hon hun chiang in (2)
Hon gum Toupa' mel muin nunnuamta ni,
Kongpi kilawm hon hun chiang in.
Ka itten khawlmun ah kei hon na ngak ding,
Kongpi kilawm hon hun chiang in;
Hon kipahpih ding uh ka khelh beita ding,
Kongpi kilawm hon hun chiang in.
Natna, dahna, lunggimna om nawnlou ding,
Kongpi kilawm hon hun chiang in;
Khensa lawmvual tawh nunnuam houlung kum ding,
Kongpi kilawm hon hun chiang in.
Nopna, pahna gen zawhlouh keia hi ding,
Kongpi kilawm hon hun chiang in;
Tua ah Amah siangthou Pathian ka muhchiang',
Kongpi kilawm hon hun chiang in.
Thupina a tuam in i omta ding a,
Kongpi kilawm hon hun chiang in;
Tua gam vangla ah nuam in la sata ding,
Kongpi kilawm hon hun chiang in.
Damsung puakgik in hon buaisakta lou ding,
Kongpi kilawm hon hun chiang in;
Nuamsa tawntung in Khrist tawh i omta ding,
Kongpi kilawm hon hun chiang in.
Kulsin a khaubang chiah aw, hon sun dah n'ung,
Lungkham khimjing in kulsin mangbang bawm zong,
Na machiang ah Hondampa'n tua lampi tawn zou,
A hon itna meivak nang Honpitu hi.
Kulsin ah sambang na jal, melmuh louh in,
Na manawh Khrist loungal tuanglam dang omlou;
A hon itna banjal hambang hon huai ding om,
Toupa pham nung mawhneiten lamen thei hi.
Kulsin sunglam juan chia, simlei tuangnungsia'n,
Na kha hatlou lunglau in lingkha zong leh;
Lailung na muan na'ng Paradis sunni hong tang,
A ging na jakpen Serafim zaila hi.
Kulsin sung juan lailun aw, hong ngai dah n'ung,
Thianmang hon gum Toupa'n lumbang hon sung hi;
Hon pia in, hon pi e, hon thaksak nawn ding hi,
Toupa Pham nung khakiak dawh-ai om nawnlou.
Adam suan gitlouh sihna khimjing nuai ah,
Simlei namchihta kap in mau uh;
Kei bang a vangtah omlou khua van nuai ah,
Ka tuaidawng pallun lai singbang tanta.
Ngaiin ka jua siang thangvan gal in don veng,
Lungkham lusun kahna himhim om nawn ngeilou;
I it leh ngaih khaubang na chiahsate'n,
Kipahna pak Mang nunnem bel uh.
Gelsau ngam la'ng i tankhawm chiat dia vaihawm,
Bang i suak ding hiam ka lungdong veh;
Phamngai heh hong nem ding omlou simlei ah
Ka Mang nunnem, nopna pak Nang loungal.
Buaina meipi lungkhamna kihawt kal ah
Don ing e, nungchiang hong hei om lou;
Hehpihna Mang tuallenna Zion tang nuam,
Manawh in naubang kah lai bang ding uh.
Kei zong ka damlai ni a hong bei chiang in,
Manna gam hoih ka luah sam ding hi;
Ka it na paisate tawh tualleng ja in,
Belamnou liamsa zaila'n i awi ding.
A khajak nuai lim nunnuam ah,
Tatsa vontawite tutkhawl ding;
Tangtawn nopsakna a tan chiangun,
Nunnuam in ngabang leng ding uh.
Tutkhawl in tengdenta ding uh,
Itna Toupa lambang pak in;
Tangtawn nunnopna pal zouta ding,
A khajak nuai lim nunnuam ah.
A khajak nuai lim nunnuam ah,
Naubang kah lungkham omlou ding;
Khelhna huihpi leh khemna gal lian,
Daibang theng khawpi etlawm ah.
A khajak nuai lim nunnuam ah,
Albang dah lungkham omlou ding;
Hinna tuikhuk ah vabang bual in,
Vuk sang zong ngouzaw ding uhi.
Aw, tua mun a ngabang lengte'n,
Lei lungkhamna ngai nawnlou ding;
Van semgua ginglawm tawh van khawlai,
Mang Khrist tawh laitual leng ja uh.
Ginna'n gal in don veng,
Ngoubang lang van gamnuam;
Ka lungkhamna khawvel,
Nuai simlei gam daidam;
Hinna tui a luanna aw,
Itna gam etlawm,
Chikchiang' ka tung ding hiam,
Galvan ka ngakna ding.
Leitung gentheihna mun,
Vakvai sawt nawn lou ding;
Taikhuaval naita e,
Tutkhawlna ding naita,
Tua ni thupi van tun chiang',
Misiangthoute tawh,
Belamnou thahsa nung,
Nuam in zai oihpih ni.
Tuin kap mah leng zong,
Chiaugal gam etlawm ah;
Kipak' dawnbang tuak ning,
Ka lawmvual ngaihte teng;
Hondampa angsung nuam ah,
Laitual lengja in,
Gibang khen nawn lou ding,
Naubang kap nawn lou ding.
Ka lungkham kipahna
Nuam a hong tan hun ding;
Chikchiang ahi ding hiam?
Toupa, hong paimeng in
Lei saptuam tengteng leh,
Van angel siangte tawh,
Muh kal ngakla'ng, ngakla'ng,
Tua pialgal gamnuam ah.
Aw, tua gam etlawm ah,
Ka lawmvual teng kim ding;
Nuai simlei tuangnung sia'n,
Ka tutkhawl ngei ding hi.
Ni a niam hun a tom,
A naita nunnop ni,
Taikhua val naita e,
Ka tutkhawlna ni ding.
Lung a leng mual chih galkhua ka don a,
Ngoumei a jam jiljial, aw lenkawl a bawm.
Zaila in phat in Mangpen,
Lung a juan ni in;
Nungta leh nungtalou leh
Ging luanglawmnou tawh;
Gam chih ah dim hen,
I nop lasak ging.
Khanglouin vankhua galin ka don a,
Aw, nopna vak singseng in ka lung hon len,
Vanmite' kaihging luanglawm a hong thang,
Nuai simlei honthawn e, lungkham kahna gam.
Hongpai un, sa ni e, Toupa mai ah,
A hehpihna thupi zaila'n i phat ding
Sakpih nuam ing e, thilsiam khempeuhte,
Aw hoih vasate tawh simlei daidam ah.
Sihna lui gal a gamnuam etlawm ah,
I tangtawn van inn kilawm a om ;
Lung a i deih tua luipi kansaten,
Luigal gam etlawm ah hon ngak uh.
Aw, nopna Inn, tangtawn hamphatna mun,
Tangtawn luankhi nul omlouhna gam;
Innkuan kiitte leh Hondampa tawh,
Bang lou a kikhopna a om ding.
Toupa, ka lungdamna gen chim kei ning,
Kalvari a zahlakna teng pua a;
Melma' tongsia tawh kha Na pham vang in,
Kei ding' tangtawn sau nuam Na bawlta.
Ka kahna leh ka buaina gam daidam,
Pel in tua laukha vangkhaw tual ah;
Kalvari Belamnou a thahsa uh,
Thupina tang in mel va mu ning.
Gal in don le'ng thangvan khawpi,
Khenlouhna gam ngoubang a lang;
Gibang i kikhen hun chiang in,
Khenlouhna gam ka ngai.
A tom ngei maw, simlei nopna,
Pak bang in a vulnawnta;
Kikhen louthei hi kei hang maw,
I lenna a dan jiak in.
Aw, ka ngai gibang khenlou a,
Laitual i len diamdiam hun ding;
Bang chikchiang' tuang i tungsam diam?
Khennawn louhna khawpi.
Gentheih thuak a gibang kikhen,
Chikchiang' i kituak khawm nawn dia?
Simlei gimhuai i khen chiang in,
Nunnuam in i kikhawm ding.
Hon ngai veng khenlouhna khawpi,
Simlei a gibang kikhen chiang;
Lungkham puanbang banna'ng omlou,
Nuai simlei gimhuai ah.
Gibang khen a ka kah lai in,
Thangvan inn nuam galin don veng;
Gibang khen omlouh ka theih in,
Tunkal ngakla'n mau veng.
Angel siangte leh lungdeihte,
Anbang itna'n hon ompih un;
Lei gimhuai a ka kikhen un ;
Hon ngai tawp thei kei veng.
Lungjuan lungsim ginna in don lehang,
I mu van gam thupi;
Lei a lungkham tate laitual lenna,
Belamnou leh hinna sing pal zou in;
Hehpihte tualleng uh;
A thupi e, kipak in la sa ni.
Aw sisan pha, zaila'n hon pak ning e,
Na hon itna thupi;
Kalvari a tatna sisan,
Zaila'n kon pahtawi ding.
Lung a juan ni'n bangkim gelgel lehang,
Kipahna hong nai e,
Hehpihpa' sisan jiak a kipahna;
Vangnei kisa'ng, Pathian' tate ding in,
Khrist Toupa'n hon bawlta;
Kipahna kim zaw Toupa nasep hi.
Ka tankhom a kipahna thupipen,
Hehpihna siangthou hi;
Pathian' ta hih leh Ama' nasepna;
Hon veng inla, kei ah Na nna sem in,
Aw ka Toupa it aw;
Hong zang in aw, kha mangthang man ding in.
Hon juan veng e, Salem vangkhua,
Lungkham omlouhna gam nunnuam;
Tunkal ngakla'n ka hon juan hi,
Kei ding' mun a om hiam, Toupa?
Dahna leh lungkhamna thuak in,
Hambang vai veng hiai leitung ah,
Nang lou in zaw k'ong gammang kha ding,
Van Mang nunnem, hon nusia kei hial in.
Tangtawn hinna sing limliap ah,
Van angel lungtuak nga bang leng;
Hambang vaiveng hiai leitung ah,
Van Mang nunnem, hon ngilh ken aw.
Sih sialbang hon juan veng Toupa,
Ka machiang dougal khuaibang hang;
Nuai simlei leh thangvan kal ah,
Nang lou in hong hingzou kei ning.
Ka machiang phamna Jordan lian,
A gal hinna gam eng singseng;
Nanglou' hong galkai zoukei ning,
Aw van Laukha hon pikai in.
Pialgal ka ngai, ka Mang lenna,
Lungkham omlouhna gam etlawm;
Chikchiang ka tung ding hiam?
Albang ka dahna luankhi,
Chikchiang' a hul ding hiam?
Chi a ka ngaihtuah in,
Ka ngaih Toupa'n kei honpi in.
Guabang hinna singlim liap ah,
Hon khawlsak sam ve, aw Toupa;
Khemna tangnisa ka dou zoulou,
Guabang hinna singlim liap ah,
Hon khawlsak sam ve, aw Toupa.
Leitung haksatna thuakzoute,
A tung uah puanin na jak maw?
Kei zong hong jakkhum in;
Khawlna ding limliap omlou,
Leitung gamdai gam ah khawlna limliap omlou,
Khemna tangnisa dou la'ng e.
Nuai simlei gamkeu gamdai ah,
Khawlna om hiam chi'n ka zong a;
Khawlna gam ahi lou,
Tangtawn gam ding hilou hi;
Simlei gimhuai ahi chih ka theihkhiak chiang in,
Guabang hinna singlim ngai veng.
Guabang hinna singlim liap ah,
Misiangthoute a khawlta uh;
Kei pen bang ka hi hiam,
Tawlnga theilou a ka om?
Ka sapum in hon dal, hihlamdang ni tung leh,
Kei zong khawlsamta ding hi'ng a.
Pi leh pu suihlung a mawl jiak',
Phamna leh lungkham dahnate,
Namchih tung ah a leng ua;
Ka tung ah khuaibang a tu,
Lungkham huibang in ka mau,
Kumsawt gam ka ngai e,
Ka ngai e ka Pa' gamnuam,
Laukha in hon huai in;
Anbang itte khawlna mun,
Tuang hon tun in.
Khawvel nun ka ngaihtuah chiang in,
Suihlung a mawl selung a jing;
Phamsa'n lenmual a khum ua,
Bangteng selunggel a hun,
Lungkham dahna tuibang lian,
Vual ngaih mualliamsate don veng,
Phamsa ngaiin malbang kou veng;
Nungchiang heilou in leng uh,
Mangtutphah din kimvel in,
Halleluia, chi'n leng uh.
Van khawpi thak tuang ka tun chiang',
Gibang khenna omnawn lou ding;
Lungtuak vuitangbang kimna,
Angel siang Serafim tawh,
Mang nunnem zaila'n awi ni.

songs.title: I Pa' Nna Sem Ve Ni
songs.author: Rev. Thangngur

lines: Tuibang a kiam sot lua,
I khawvel tangbang damsung nite;
Kipahna pak vul nawn ding hita,
Gibang khenna ding in;
Lenkawl ah ni a hong suak nawnta,
Gibang khenlouhna gam ngaina hang e.
Khenlouhna gam vualgen gam nunnuam ah,
Chin leh tuaite i tutkhawl dia;
Ei hon Vengtu Mang Khrist,
I Hondampa deihhuai khebul ah,
Lungkhamna beita ding.
Hiai nuai simlei ah zaw,
Kap leh mauin hambang vai zong leng;
Buaina gallam ah gam etlawm om,
Ei hon Hondampa Khrist
Nungjui dia i hinna i phal leh,
Tua gam etlawm ah naubang i nui ding.
Nopna pak lutna mun,
Hondampa Khrist laitual lenna mun,
Ngaiin sun nichin in galdon veng;
Van angel siangte leh
I vuallui gibang khensate tawh,
Bangchik chian nuamin i kikhawm nawn dia.
It leh ngaih chin leh tuai,
Thanuamtakin i Pa' nna sem ni;
Sunchin in hun tuibang kiam tawntung,
Jingsol etlawm thupi,
Ngoubang latna'ng sunni hong naita,
Sep zawh chiang a i tutkhawlna ding ni.
Aw, ka Mang Hondampa,
Kipahna pak ding Nang hong pal in;
Simlei pahna pak a vul zouta,
Na sakmel lawmnou ah,
Lungdamna chiteng a hong kilang ;
Kipahna pak Saron etlawm Na hi.
Simlei hehpihhuai gam,
A sung ah ka leng a ;
Khelhna leh lungkham, dahnate'n,
Sunchin in a hon bawm.
Aw, tul mai in, (2)
Nuaisimlei gimna gam;
Vualngaihte leh ka Hondampa,
Ngai a sunchin a ka mauna.
Ka ngai tangtawn gamnuam,
Toupa' Zion khawpi;
Simlei a utna tengteng leh,
A pallun a bei jel.
Ka ngai ka Pa' gamnuam,
Gibang khenna omlou;
Misiangthou leh angel siangte,
Sunchin a lenna uh.
Gam thupi ka tun chiang',
Hambang vaihna simlei;
Ngaiin don nawn kei ning Toupa,
Na mel ka muh chiang in.
Kanan gam thak hon juan ding in,
Gamdai ah ka zin a;
Vei leh tak ah tuanglam haih veng;
Mei leh ngoumeia kilak',
Ka ma ah Nang hong tang gige'n.
Aw ka Hondampa, kei hon na dawn in,
Kanan gam thak tun louh lau veng;
Lungkham lummei jing nuai ah,
Dah leh kap in hambang vai veng.
Gamdaia lumsuangpi pan in,
Siktui siang hong luang in;
Kanan gam juan bahte dawn ding',
Gamdaia ka om sung in,
Aigupta gam ngilhna ding in.
Ka main sang sawm tungta uh,
Kanan gam thak nuam ah;
Banghang nungchiang ka ngai ding hiam?
Sihna gam tuangnung sia in,
Hinna khawpi lam juanta ning.
Si-al khen a van innpi ah,
Hondampa pahtawi uh,
A nuachiang uh gimhuai ngilh in,
Lungdamna la thak sa uh,
Lunglawp veng amau tawh hei ding.
Simlei pahna tomkal bawn i khiaklah leh,
Tangtawn pahna ding van pahna zong ve ni,
Simlei mauna'n dim zouta,
Ken zaw pahna muzou kei veng, D.S.
Tangtawn pahna ding van pahna zong ve ni.
Hinna haksa tomkal bawn i ngaih aleh,
Nuam leh pahna van hinna pen nei ve ni.
Gilouten a tan ding uh,
Laisiangthou gen gawtmun ahi. D.S.
Nuam leh pahna, van hinna pen nei ve ni.
Ut leh utlouh thu himhim kidong lou in,
Sunchin sihna'n sang tampi a pi mang jel;
Sih muan theihna i ngai hi,
Omden ding om kei hang lei ah, D.S.
Sihna Zoupa, Mang Jesu mah bel ve ni.
Machiang huai ding i ngai hiai lei gimhuai ah,
Machiang huai ding i ngai lei nutsiat ni'n zong
Sihna hun a hong tung a,
Van Inn a hong tunpa ding in; D.S.
Machiang huai ding i ngai Mang Khrist Kha Siang ngei.
Khawvel in sum leh pai lamtam,
A hoih chi'n a zong vel ua;
Hihhang' a hoihna un pialgal kaipih zoulou,
Van hoihna'n pialgal a tanvak,
Ken ka gennop tua ahi.
A simthu gensiam leng aw tung vankhua,
A hoihdan gensiam leng aw ka Mang lenna;
Mi khempeuh in lunggulh leh maw,
Van Inn ah pai chiat leng maw.
Leitung thupina leh hoihna'n,
Sunchin in hong kheng zouta;
Van hoihna khangthak piaunel zah bei nung in zong,
A thak in a kilawm semsem,
Aw tua hi kihilh tham pen.
Van Innsang, thupi leh etlawm,
Kongpi zaw kun a lut hi;
Aw, Kalvari mual leh Beth-lehem bawng inn sung',
Jal ding in leh khros pua ding in,
Kumpi puan tawh kua kuan ding?
Bangchik chiang' ka vaihna gam leh,
Ka kahna gam hong bei dia;
Aw, van gam thupi hoih gensenglouh tangtawn gam,
A bukim in a hong tung dia;
A ngai in huibang mau veng
Ka lenna gamdai tuangnung sia'n,
Van Jerusalem nunnuam ah;
Bangchik leh tuang k'ong tung sam diam?
Na tangtawn pialgal gam ah.
Aw, ka ngai gibang khenlouhna gamnuam ah,
Hinna tui a luang;
Hotdamtaten a dawn ua,
Tangtawn hinna tang uh.
Belamnou lenna mun thupi,
Ngaiin sunchin galin don veng;
Aw Laukha Siangthou, hong leng in,
Na gam ah tuang hontun in.
Kongkhak ging kilawm a hong ua,
A ging lawmnou in lung honlen;
Misiangthoute tuallenna ah,
Aw, kei zong len ka nuam hi.
Aw, tua mun ah ka Mang deihhuai,
A mel sunni vanglai bang in;
A vaknate tang kimvel e,
Tangtawn a damna ding in.

songs.title: Pathian Anglai Mun I Muang Ding

lines: Laukha vangkhua galin don veng,
Mi hausa leh Lazar ka mu;
Tuabang lelliangtheipa Lazar,
Nunnuam in thangvan tual' ngabang leng,
Belamnou leng juiin ka mu.
Ngaidih ve ua, a tongdam nem,
Lelliangthei jata'n hon juan un;
Kei hon ngai, lusun, liangvaite,
Heh ka nepsak ding.
Tuin albang dah leh kap in,
Simlei ah ngabang leng mahle'ng;
Belamnou nunnuam a juite'n,
Pa Abraham' anglai sa' nuamjaw,
Pathian' anglai mun i muang ding
Mi hausa nun in a nuam zong,
Kha a kiak chiang' phamsa' vangkhua'h;
Albang dah, siktui duh in thum,
Tuabang phamsa' vangkhua hei kei ni,
Thangvan ah lailung muang' hei ni.
Jata aw, hong sulhei ve ua;
Toupa a it vang a Lazar;
Thangvan gamnuam tuang a tun leh,
Belamnou' sisan pha a tatte,
Lenlouh lauin lungkham kei ni.
Mawhna, phamna, setan tung ah,
Salbang i suak sisan vang in;
Lunglau kei ni, Belamnou huai,
Simlei sum leh pai a tat hilou,
Belamnou' sisan tat hi hang.
"Toupa tawh omden ding!"
Amen, tuabang hihen;
Sihna pan a hinna thu hi,
Khakiak mawhna thu hi;
Pumpi henchip a om,
Amah pan gamla ing;
Hizong niteng a kisuan in,
Niteng in Inn naih ing.
Inn naih ing, (2)
Niteng in Inn naih ing.
Tungchiang a ka Pa Inn,
Ka kha Inn ding hong nai;
Ginna mit a gal ka dot chiang',
Na kham kongpi hong lang;
Tuachiang' ka kha lunglawp,
Ka ngaih tua gam tun ding,
Misiangthoute luahding khawpi,
Tungchiang Jerusalem.
I kal lummei kai chiang',
Ka galdotna liah zong;
Noa gam khuva bang leng ing,
Tui kilok, khawnim kal;
Meipi hong theng pah hi,
Huih leh tuite hong dai;
Ka lungsung nunnuam a om ah,
Muanna' zouzum hong jam.
Jing leh jan in ka ja,
Sunlai leh jankim lai',
Van a zaila luang lawmnou in,
Leitung pautuam nuaisiah ;
Tua thawhnawnna simthu,
Tua vualzawh kikou aw'n,
"Toupa toh omden ding" Amen,
Tuabang hihen, hihen.
Ginna in Kalvari tang tung ah,
Gam ngaihhuai leh khaw siangthou ngoubang lang,
Misiangthoute lenna
Tua khawpi a tuang ka tun chiang in,
Damsung buaina leh gimhuaite'n,
Hontum thei nawnlou ding.
Hon tun ban lou ding chih ka theih in,
Haleluiah, chiin Toupa pak veng,
Salbang hon suah jiak in;
Khelh puakgik leh siamlouh tangsa nung,
Sisan in siam a hon tangsak,
Gam nuam a leng ding in.
Gam nuam a ngabang ka len chiang in,
Nuai simlei gimhuai ka galdon ding a,
Hambang ka vaihna gam;
Tua ah ka khitui luang nawnlou ding,
Ka Toupan hon ompih ding a,
Nungchiang ngai nawnlou ding.
Toupa ngai a ka mauna gamdai,
Ka laukha'n tuangnung a siahsan chiang in,
Toupan hon pi ding a;
A khajak tung ah hon tuangsak dia,
Jordan tui kihawt leh lauhuai,
Hon lenkaipih ta ding.
Ka ma ah chiaugal vangkhua etlawm om,
Tunkal ngakla'ng khawpi etlawm;
It leh ngaih lungtuak teng kimna,
Melmuh nuam in donchim la'ng e
Aw, khaubang chiah lai tutkhawl lou in,
Toupa hatna muang in,
Khawpi etlawm juan ni
Tua vankhua etlawm lam manawh jel in,
Bah lou in machiang suan jel ni;
Simlei ah lungmuanna omlou,
Toupa siang tuang i tun mateng..
Khaubang sutsiam hileng phatchim kei ning,
Jin dougal lai ah leng zong leng;
Van mun thupi tun hun chiang in,
Phatna zaila dai nawnlou ding.
Aw van Laukha Siangthou hong leng inla,
Lailung khimjing tanvak ding in;
Na gamnuam ah tuang hon tun in,
Nunnop pallai heu louhna ah.
Leitung sihna gam hihhang in,
Van tung zaw hinna gam hi;
Leitung kikhenna hihhang in,
Vantung zaw kimuhna hi;
It leh ngaih gibang i khen a,
Pham ngai a i dah lai in,
Vantung khua a nuam galdon le'ng,
Dah lungkham a hon nem ding.
Nichin a tungthakte dawn uh,
Nichin lungdam semsem uh;
Sih leh kikhen lau nawnlou uh,
Tawplou ding nopna tang uh.
Melma gilou sihna kumpi'n,
Sung kim naubang hon kapsak;
Lelliang tuam kisa om kei ni,
Tangtawn dam ding om kei hang ;
Hinna Siampa Pathian in zong,
Von khat tawi sun, naubang awi;
Hihhang' van khua hon tun zaw hi,
Lawm manpha'n na nei ve ni.
Tun leh jua leh vualngaihte leh,
Chin leh tuai leh vontawite ;
Sihna'n nupa zong hon khen in,
Lungkham ban na'ng nei kei hang;
Pathian' Ta sihna zoupa leh
Sih muantheihna neipa pen,
Limbang bel in kulhpi'n nei le'ng,
Lungmuang in nuam denta ni.
Lengleng lehang thangvan sang ah,
Ngoumei leh khawmui kheng in;
Valeng lehang tangtawn inn nuam,
Salem thak khawpi tullou;
A huangjawl sana tui a luan,
A tual lai' valeng lehang,
Tua mun ah vateng denta ning,
A itna gam eng singseng.
Aw, ngai veng e, tangtawn inn nuam,
Angel leh ka jua lenna;
Tua ah paksil hoih teng a lun,
Hinna tui a luang deldel.
Tua gamnuam a valengten zaw,
Simlei tuangnung siahsan uh,
A Jua Thianmang sausung lum uh,
