A luankhi uh luang ngeilou;
Vuk sang' ngou a tuibang siang kim,
A sakmel uh tul ngeilou ;
Tang nisa khuambang dou lou in,
Huan kumsawt in lungdeihte tawh,
Tua mun nuam ah zai awi in;
Hon siampa tung Thianmang bel in,
Sau nunnuam ah i awi ding;
Galdon in a ngaiin ka kap.
Lungdeih teng ngabang lenna;
Haibang ngak uh ngaihteng kim ding,
Hinna sing Na lim nuam ah.
Ka lungkhamna simlei gimhuai
Leh naubang kahna gam,
Mubang ngainawn ke'ng Toupa,
Hon mu nuam veng e;
Theihlouh gam ka hong tung a,
Nang Lili pak Mang Jesu'n,
Khelh huihpi leh khemna lai'
Sawnban' hon kai in.
Ka ngai, Belamnou nunnem,
Na tatsate tawh Na lenna gam ;
Mubang ngai veng e,
Lung in hon ngilh ken aw,
Khamkha'n k'ong vei hi.
Aw, lamdang na lawmlawm e!
Lungkhamna palbang nang la'ng;
Khelh thuneihna jiak in maw,
Kikhenna i tuah!
Sihna lusunnate zaw,
Khelh huihpi bang in hong lang;
Aw, ka ngai tangtawn pialgal,
Lungdeihte lenna.
Aw, ka ngaih tangtawn gam ah,
Gibang khensate leng uh;
Van Mang nunnem Belamnou,
Zaila'n a pak uh,
Simlei gimhuai khel ah ke'n,
Hong galkai in, tangtawn gam
Chi a kei hon sapna uh,
Ginna'n ka ja hi.
Ka ginna'n phamsa laukha vangkhua gal in don veng,
Lailung a dah leh sakmel ngui om nawnlou;
Tatsa vontawite nunkhawnuam in leng uh,
Kei zong tua mun a leng ding in haibang hon ngak uhi.
Mubang ngai veng aw gam thupi,
Lungdeihte laitual lenna mun;
Tuangtun hun ding haibang ngakla'ng,
Phamsate vangkhua nunnuam.
Aw, Hondampa nunnem in mun a hon bawlsakna,
Tuang ka tung thei diam kei mikhial leh liangvai?
Tung thei e, Ka ta hehpihhuai leh liangvai,
Albang dahte leh liangvaite mun ding a bawl ahi..
Nuai simlei ah lungkham dah chiteng thuak mahleng,
Lungkham kei ning, ka Toupa'n A hon huai leh;
Bangchik chiang' simlei gimhuai tuangnung sia in,
Ka lungdeihte tawh lungtuak in kituak ding uhiam?
Aw, tua gamnuam ah it-le-ngaihte tungkhinta uh,
Phamsa ngai a naubang kah om nawnlou hi;
Aw, tua mun tuangtun hun ding haibang ngakla'ng,
Ka Toupa'n linglukhu khu a vankhua a sat thak ah.
Hei! salphate'n mualkhumta,
Simlei lungkhamna tuangnung siain;
Kanan gam hoih juan uh,
Lungkhamna chiautuipi,
Ginna kha a jak ua,
Mubang in lengkai uh.
Hei! salpha kim nawnlou uh,
Khelhna gallian khuambang dou ding in;
Laukha aw hong leng in;
Lungkhamna simlei ah,
Khelh gal a hong lian e,
Liangvaite dou ding in.
Aw, simthu hong lel nawn in,
Zion kulhsung a Na lel bang in;
Simthu hong lel nawn in;
Mial gal tuibang honglian;
Zawhna Laukha Siangthou,
Ka tung uah hong leng hen.
Aw kin meng ve aw, Toupa,
Na itna huangsung ah gal a lian;
Gam tan ding laulou maw?
Zion bitna kulhpi,
Zawhna galvan tawi in,
Tuibang in hong lian in.
Kumsang vaihawm ni hong nai in,
Kei bang a genthei leh hambang vai ;
Thilsiam tengteng leh hiai lei saptuamten,
Ngaiin hon don uh, Jesu hong naiin.
Hong tualkum in Toupa, hon ngai ung,
Salem Zion mual minthang Toupa;
Tun leh juapa leh phungvual muallianta,
Aw, ka mang nunnem, ka lu hong liah in
Phamsa ngai in kap veng, Toupa,
Simlei Aigupta gam ah ka vai;
Toupa, Na vualjawlna pha ka tante,
Pakbang tawi manlou in mualliamta uh.
Phamsa ngai, ka kah lai in zong,
Lilipal, tatsate tuallenna;
Ginna'n tung thangvan sang ka galdon a,
Lungdeihte tuallenna Zion a lang.
Ka ngai Jerusalem Zion,
Jawlnei, Martar, sisan a tatte,
Phamsa thounawn leh ka lunggulh gam nuam,
Melmu nuam veng e, phung leh vual kimna.
Kanan phaijang Saron pak hoih,
Tang a Rom miten a nakhiak uh;
Vangkhua a ngui zou, Saron a khiahna uah,
Chin leh tuai liangvai hambang huai nei lou in,
A damna uh Saron a khiah jiak un. (2) D.S.
Saron pak hoih a khiahsa uh,
Amah anbang a itte kiang ah ;
Lili'n A hong pal a lailung khimjing uah,
A lutung jawn uah Jingsol Aksi'n hong tang,
A kim uah pahna gimlim jam kimvel. (2) D.S.
Saron pak, Na hoihna chinglou,
Ka lenna uh khimbang jinglai ah;
Lummei jinglai hi na pal etlawm liah din,
Sunni bang tang in, Na sakmel hong lang hen;
Tuachiang' Na hoihdan mel in thei ding uh. (2) D.S.
Kanan phaijang Saron pak hoih,
Judia gam ah hong pallun nawn in;
Zalen ngaklah uh Na thilsiam zousiah in,
Ngaiin galdon uh, simlei mi liangvaiten,
Israelten zong hon pahtawita ding. (2) D.S.
Aw Saron pak, hon mu nuam veng,
Van thupi a silbang n'ong pal ding;
Kilepna sing a Na pal tualkhiakna ah,
Na hong zaikhe dia zalenna thupiin,
Sa leh laimi dougal bangta ding uh. (2) D.S.
Ka kipahna pak a vulta,
Ka ngaihte sihna'n mual liampihta;
A nuachiang uh vangkhua ngui ah,
Kap in kei hambang ka vai;
A tunna ding uh ka ngilh theilou hi. D.S.
Malbang ka kou a sulhei lou,
A aw un lenmual a khumzouta ;
Manawh Mang Immanuel' gam,
Kumsawt vakna gam nunnuam,
Tua ah nung ngailou ngabang leng uhi. D.S.
Khawvel in lah hon dawn theilou;
A sung ah sunchin naubang kap ing;
Salem thak ka Mang khawpi leh,
Lungtuakte ka muh ma'n jaw,
Lungkham naubang kah bang thei kei ning e. D.S.
I kal ah Jordan chiautui luang,
Leimi siam long in galkai theilou;
Mial nuai ah kap in k'on ngak uh,
Aw Mang Jesu, hong nai in,
Van long in Jordan gal kai nuam ing e. D.S.
Zion mual leh si-al etlawm,
Toupa'n kei ding' hon bawl ;
Denchiang' tua mun tuang ka tun chiang',
Ka pahna silpak ding.
Hun bang hiam lel in tu'n kei hon dal,
Sisan vang a kei a Zion tang;
Aw, bangchik chiang' hiam ken ka muh ding?
Hondampa leh gam sunni tum lou,
Tuin buaina Jordan chiau gei,
Ah ka ngak Hondampa ;
Tua aksi khen tutkhawlna mun,
Chikleh tuang ka tung dia?
Hun, pai meng in, Zion taten,
Gam thupi ngaklah ung;
Ka lenna gam daidam ahi,
Tuangnung siahsan pah ning.
Aw Zoutu Mang Immanuel,
A gam tuang ka tun chiang',
Itna mang puan duang a bat in,
Tangtawn ngabang leng ning.
Lungkhamna koppih a,
Buaina tampi ka thuakpihten;
Sihna Jordan a hon kaisanta uh,
Khatkhat a pai in,
A nuachiang uah lungkham thuak in hambang ka vai.
Damsung gamdai ah bangchin ka lengta dia?
Van Lilipal khawpi hoih a tualleng,
Tatsa lungtuakten,
Ka machiang a gamdai gimhuai in langsak uh.
Gamdai ka khen ma in,
Buaina tampi tuak ding ka hi;
Lungkhamna thak tuang hongtung nawn ding leh
A tungsate zong,
Van nopna in khaltui bang in a nemsak thei.
Gamdai a ka lenlai,
Nungchiang, machiang en kimvel ing;
Lungkhamna thuak a thum mijata leh,
Lungdong kikoute,
Van nopna mulou in sang tampi mualliamta.
Khawvel na tung a gik,
Mial in a kha hon jakkhum a;
Gawtmun meikhu gim na namzouta hi,
Nang nna sem ding in,
Thupina lim in ka kha tuibang jawl nawn ken.
Kumtawn nasem ding' tuibang hon jawlta uh,
Van Lilipal khawpi hoih a leng ding
In na sung ngei ah,
Misi lakah van hinna thu phuangjakta ning e.
A mang lel lei chimtakhuai,
Van nuam hong lang dekta ;
Mubang ngai in don chimla'ng,
Hong lang ding gam etlawm;
Lei jan bang in mial zong leh,
Thupina tang kimvel;
A hong nai hi kham vangkhua
Immanuel' gamnuam.
Aw, Jesu hinna tuikhuk,
Nunnopna libang ching;
Sihsial bang juan ve ni aw,
Nunnopna naktui hi;
Nunnopna vangkhua nuam ah,
Ka teng ding Nang vang in;
Vangletna tawh kidim hi,
Immanuel' gam ah.
Hon hehpih van Vaihawmpa'n,
"Kei'a na hi," hon chi;
Khial liangvai mun neilou di'n;
A phal Van Mang' inn nuam ;
Hong tung nuam veng Na Inn ah,
Nunkhawnuam dang omlou,
Gam ni tumlou Belamnou-
Vakna gam lou jaw.
Mou in mouneipa mel kia,
A muhnop bang ken zong;
Mu nuam veng vangkhua sang in,
Hon hehpih Mang' mel kia;
Manglukhu tan ding sang in,
Hon Pepa ngaizaw veng;
Thangvan thupina pen zaw,
Belamnou ahi.
Van Mang' Ta hehpihna in,
Lei mun nun in nuamsak;
Lungkham, dah leh kahna zong,
Tua hehpihna in nem;
Pak veni aw tung Thianmang,
I tan vuallouh hon pia;
I tan ding phal van khua nuam,
Salem kulhpi sung.
Ka van inn nunnuam vak kilawm
Phamna leh natna vei omlou;
I innpi nuam sunni sang' tang,
Tua vangkhua ah ten kal ngakla'ng.
Ka Pa' inn ah chiahta ning e,
Tua vangkhua ah ten kal ngakla'ng; (2)
Ka Pa' inn ah chiahta ning e.
Ka Pa' inn bawl thangvan ah om,
Gam vangla ah si-al in bawm;
Nuai simlei tuangnungsiata ning,
Ka kumtawn inn hoih ngoubang lang.
Leitung nunnop pallun zongleh,
Tuiin tum in kammei' kang thei;
Thianmang' siang ah mun muangta ning,
Leitung bang in mang theilou hi.
Tangthu Pha thu lamdang, (3)
Lung in gel dih ua;
Hiai tangbang damlai hun
Lung a gel leh hih hun ahi;
Sual ngaihdamna thu ahi,
Sihnung thawhnawnna thu lungdamhuai pen hi.
Aw hun kipelhsak ken.
Tua pan kum ja nung chiang', (3)
Koilai na om diam?
Hiai tangbang damlai hun,
Lung a gel leh hih hun ahi;
Simlei tuangnung na siah dia,
Van leh gawtmun ah bang na suakta ding hiam?
Deihjawk tel hun ahi.
Mi gen van saumang ah, (3)
Mun na tangta hiam?
Hiai tangbang damlai hun,
Lung a gel leh hih hun ahi;
Tua a mun na tan kei leh,
Gawtmun leh sihna mun nang a hi lailai,
Aw, na kingaihtuah in.
Hun tuibang kiam jel e, simlei nunnopna bei,
Nuai simlei ah nunnopna kim theilou;
Toupa hong tualkum in ni thupi hon tun in,
Liangvai taten leitung haksa nusia nuam uh.
Aw, Eden Thak inn nunnuam ah hon tun in,
Dah leh kap a gibang kikhente lengkhawm le'ng,
Nunnop teng kim dia lambang hon pak jel n'ung,
Hiai leitung mubang ngai kei n'ung
Na gam ah jaw.
Nang ding a thuakte tua gam nuam in kinem uh,
Leitung ah nunnop amau din pallou;
Zion mijata leh ki-itna Toupa' mel,
Minthang sunni tuang hongtung ding donchim lou uh.
Leitung dahna kahna, buaina meipi nuai ah,
Gingtuten nunnuam in zai awi jel uh;
Amau din khua vak hen, Salem thak nunnuam ah,
Na pikhawm ding hun ni thupi ngaiin don uh.
Simlei jaw nuai omlai vei gibang khenna hi,
Lungjuan sunsawt naubang a oihna hi;
Lawmvual lungtuak zaila'n palbang ki-am zong le'ng,
Kawlni sialbang hong suak dia gibang hon khen ding.

songs.title: Tangtawn Zion Khua Hong Vakta In
songs.author: Saihnuna

lines: Ka pumpi a lungkham hang in,
Kha in vantung ah ka leng jel;
Tuin bah in ka mau hang in,
Denchiang in khain ka leng ding.
Damsung ni a beima'n jaw, Toupa,
Lungnopna kim ki nei theilou;
Tangtawn Zion khua hong vakta in,
Buaina khempeuh nopna suakta hen.
Khial a si in khuamial sung ah,
Tangtawn khuavak lam ka zong a;
Kei mi genthei, bah leh vuaktang,
Nunnopna in hong thuam in aw.
Khawpi etlawm kham leh ngun gam,
Pialgal van khawpi tuangtung le'ng;
Nunlui gam ka galdon ding a,
Ka kahna gam ngai nawn kei ning.
Gamdai a lungjuan ka sial ni'n aw Toupa,
Na mel lawmnou leh Na aw nem in;
Heh hong nem aw lungjuan ngaihtam a sialte,
Khelh vang a kahlai bangta ning e.
Aw koilai ah hiam Tanpa Mang thupipen?
Anbang itte tawh mubang ngai veng;
Gal in don jel ning, Belamnou Mang' lenna,
Lungjuan sial naubang kah hon nem ding.
Lungkham lusun thuaka ka kah laitak in,
Hon sam uh it leh ngaih paisaten,
Nunna muantui leh sulheilou pal tawi in,
Tongdam nem in, Hongpaiin, chi uh.
Malbang kou jel ni, Zion vontawi eiten,
I luah ding gamnuam tuang i tun ma'n ;
Nuam in zaila sa ni, lungkham tuangnung sia'n,
It-le-ngaih hotdamtate'n hon ngak.
Aw, thangvan dang kaeng mun hing nuam juan in,
Lungdeihten kipahna pal zou uh;
Hinna siktui siang leh ngaihte pallutna,
Lailung juan ni'n aw mubang ngai veng.
Nuai simlei lungkham buaina chiaugal ah,
Sunni bang tang gam nunnuam a om;
Lawmvual ngaihte leh Limbelh Toupa tawh,
Laitual ngabang i lenkal ngakla'ng.
Aw ka ngaih Toupa, tuang hon tun in,
Lili pallun lai Na gamnuam ah;
Aw, bangchikchiang in tuang ka tung diam,
Hondampa hon chiam khenlouhna gam.
Ka ngai semsem Toupa, albang dah ni'n,
Ginna'n hon donsak in, tua gamnuam;
Hong kilawm sem in, ka lailung sung ah,
Lungkham a ka kah puanbang bang ning.
Tua ah lawmvual ngaihten honna ngak uh,
Hondampa tuallenna Zion ah;
Aw, bangchikchiang' tua mun ka tung ding hiam,
Zaila'n oihpih ning khennawn lou din.
Sawnban' hon kai in, aw Limbelh Toupa,
Mimbang ka thumna gam daidam ah;
Ka juan jel ding Belamnou Mang lenna,
Gibang khenlouhna tangtawn pialgal
Ka buaina gamdai gamkeu ah,
Ka Mang ka Tanpa mel deihhuai,
Luigal a bawlsa gamte tawh,
Ngaiin ka lailung a juang hi.
Tua gam etlawm ah khawl sam ning,
Toupa tenna gam etlawm ah;
Ka khawl sam ding buaina khen ah,
Kei dia tangtawn galmuanna ah.
Mun ka bawl ding, Toupa'n A chi,
Gingtute nuam a khawlna ding;
Ngai nawnlou ding ka khawvel nun,
A bawlsa gam ka tun chiang in.
Leia vai in mun neilou in,
Gamdai haksa tawnsuak zong le'ng;
Toupa'n kei dia A bawlsa ah,
Ka khawlsam ding chiaului gei ah.
Aw, zaisa ni Toupa phat in,
Belamnou thahsa thounawn in ;
'Ka hongpai nawn ngei ding' A chi,
Nuam un, lungkhamte, nunnuam un.
Toupa lung a itten,
Lungdam la hon sa un;
Lungkituak in la hon sa un, (2)
Mangtutphah kimvel un. (2)
Zion manawh hihang,
A kilawm, a kilawm Zion,
Tungchiang Zion khawpi kilawm,
Toupa Pathian' khawpi ahi.
I Pathian theiloute'n,
Sa lou in om uhen;
Vantung Kumpipa' taten jaw, (2)
Genjak ding lungdamna. (2)
Zion tang hoih simthu'n,
Zata selung taisak;
Vantung gam i tun ma in zong, (2)
Kham khuapi tun ma'n zong. (2)
I zaila khangsak ni,
Lungkham mittui hul hen ;
Immanuel' gam paisuak in, (2)
Tunggam hoihzaw tung ding. (2)
Thangvan meikuang hong leng inla,
Ka tung uah vabang hong tuang in;
A tungsa Pentecost ni bang,
A thak in hong sem nawn in.
Aw van mei, van meikuang thupi,
Hong tung in kon ngai uhi;
Aw van mei, van meikuang thupi,
Hong tung in kon ngai uhi.
Thianmang aw, na thu bang jel in,
Halhna thupi tuang hon tun in;
Khawvel mialna'n hon tuam zou hi,
Van meikuang aw hong leng in.
Toupa aw, na thu bang jel in,
Na mite hong hihhalh nawn in;
Hong veh in van meikuangpha in,
Michih lungsung hong tang hen.
Thangvan dawngkot hon hong inla,
Na van meikuang hon sawlkhia in;
Vanmang, na kiang kong thum uhi,
Hon sem in tanglai bang in.

songs.title: Aw Nem In Hon Chial Hi
songs.author: Pastor Chawna

lines: Toupa'n anbang A itte dia gam A bawl,
Simlei Kanan gam sang a zong nuam jaw hi;
A aw nem in A mite sunchin in hon chial,
A gam nunnuam a teng sam ding in.
Niteng in hon chial hi, A aw nem ngai in,
Anbang itna hon juan in, hon juan in;
Jordan tui kihawt zong leh,
Aw Toupa' gam ah hong lutta un.
Aw, tua ah hinna sing leh lenkhang khawmui,
Galdot chiang' ka ngai hinna paklunte tawh;
Sianna chiaului gei leh tangtawn gamnuam etlawm,
Toupa anbang itte tuallenna.
Aw, tua ah tangtawn vak i Toupa Jesu
Leh angelte tawh nunnop la ngaih sa ding;
Toupa Khrist' melmu ten mawhna lau nawnlou ding,
Nuam in Amah phat tawntung ding uh.
Hiai lei ah khualzin ka hi,
Tung van ka inn ahi;
Lei jaw gamkeu gamdai hi,
Tung van ka inn ahi,
Lauhuaite leh lungkham mangbatna'n,
Sunchin in gawlbang hon um,
Tung van ka Pa gam ahi,
Tungvan ka inn ahi.
Khemna lummei jing zong leh,
Tung van ka inn ahi;
Lei ah jaw khualzin lel hi'ng,
Tung van ka inn ahi,
Ka hun nichin in tuibang kiam hi,
Hun sawtlou bei nung chiang in,
Tuang ka tung ngeingei ding hi,
Tung van ka inn ahi.
Tunglam ka Hondampa kiang'
Tung van ka inn ahi;
Pahtawi in nunnuam leng ning,
Tung van ka inn ahi.
Tua mun ah mi hoihte tualleng uh,
Ka it-le-ngaihte zong om;
Tua ah kei zong tutkhawl ning,
Tung van ka inn ahi.
Tua teng vang in ka phun lou,
Tung van ka inn ahi;
Simlei ah liangvai zongleng,
Tung van ka inn ahi;
Pellou in ka Pa maiah ding ning,
Tunglam Toupa' taklam ah;
Tung van ka Pa omna gam,
Tung van ka inn ahi.
Haibang ngakla'ng Hondampa lenna,
Kumsawt gam etlawm tuang hong tung ding;
A tunna ding ni hong nai henla,
Kumsawt gam etlawm hong tungta hen.
Hongtung henla, laitual leng le'ng.
Tua khawpi ah Hondampa leh
Angel siangte tawh,
Salem Thak hoih tangtawn pak lutna,
Tua mun ah simlei ka ngai nawnkei ding.
Pakbang vul ding simlei gimhuai ah,
Na gam thupi ngai in ka mau hi;
Hambang hon huai in ka Mang Jesu,
Na siang dougal muang ah hon sia in.
Tu'n khelhna khimjing ah ka vai zong,
Denchiang' tangtawn taikhua hong val dia;
Tua ah lungkham buaina omlou ding,
A sung ah Belamnou tuallen vang'.
Tua vangkhawpi simthu ka gel niin,
Ka lungsung pahna'n a hong dim jel;
Kei zong Jesu, Na tatna vang in,
Salem Thak hoih ah tuang hontun in.
Hun mualliamsa teng ka gel a,
Tul in lenmual khumzouta uh;
Van heisa pal leh nopna tullou,
Vul ni chih om nawnlou ding.
Aw ngai veng e, tua gam tul ngeilou,
Tangtawn adia Toupa bawlsa gam;
Tatte leng uhi tul ngeilou in,
Belamnou vanglian phat in.
Tua gam thupi ka gel chiang in,
Ka tenna lei silpak bang a,
"Tangtawn a dia chinglou him" chi uh,
Aw, ngai veng tangtawn gam ding.
Lei nopna leh pahna i tan,
Kah leh lungkhamna tangzouta;
Laukha Siangthou hon din thak nawn in,
Nopna tullou sangjaw in.
Laukha Siangthou pallun zoute,
Ka gel in mual liamzouta uh;
Aw ka Toupa hon pikik nawn in,
Tanpa zaila'n i awi ding.

songs.title: Na Ban' Hon Huai Jel In
songs.author: Manhleia

lines: Haibang ngakla'ng Zion khua nuam,
Mang lenna van gam thupi;
Suihlung len in gal in don veng,
Simlei buaina tuangnung sia'n.
Aw, gam siangthou, hinna gam vak,
Manna gam etlawm mu nuam veng;
Tuang ka tun ma'n aw Mang nunnem,
Na ban' hambang hon huai jel in.
Tungchiang a leng in kha jak uh,
Natna leh albang dahna,
Phamna chiaukuam a ding hihang,
Hinna gam gal in don ni.
Damlai simlei don dih ve ua,
Lungkham lummei jingden hi ;
Simlei pel a nunthak ngai in,
Mang nunnem mai ah kap veng.
Pham ngai heh hong nem in Toupa,
Phamna vontawite pahna'n;
Pham ngaite din lenkawl hong eng,
Zion gam gal in don ni.
Gam ngaihhuai omdan ka ngaihtuah chiang in,
Leitung lungkhamna meipi bang jing nawnlou,
Tua gam ah jaw hinna tuisik siangthou,
Hotdam taten dawnta ding uh.
Aw, tua gam nuam ah leng nuam ing e,
Hondampa leh angelte tuallenna gam ah;
Hinna tuisik siangthou dawn ni hang e,
Tua gam ngaihhuai i tun chiang in.
Misiangthoute lenna gam ngaihhuai ah,
Hinna kipahna namtui a jam kimvel;
Kipahna din silbang in a pak a,
Hon it mahmah Toupa mai ah.
Toupa lenna Zion tang kilawm ah,
Leitung lungkham mawhna daibang a thengta;
Hotdam tate tuallenna ni ah jaw,
Lungkham, dah, naubang kah omlou.
Sihna lui Jordan gal i kai chiang in,
Leitung lungkham, dahna a beita ding a;
Lelliangtheite laitual lenna gam ah,
Kei zong ngabang lengta ning e.
Ka Mang Jesu melma lai ah Eden sual liam a,
Kha na pham niin van khawpi Elsadai bangchin a om diam maw?
Na dungsun in ka von lelliang ka tan e,
Ka kahlai puanbang ka bang theilou hi.
Malbang kou jel in galdon ning vankhua,
Melmuh nuam veng tulsa a pallun ding,
Lili pal etlawm ngailai bang thei kei ning e.
Ka zonzon hang' mu zou kei veng, kap in zai awi ing,
Buanlei tangta uh, a senchil pan khaltui bang ka ngak lai hiven;
Phallou uh e, thangvan sau tuangtun pih uh,
Ka lei hinna'n jaw ngaisiam theilou hi.
Aw ka damlai ni mualliam in, ka lunggulh gam ah,
Tuangtung leng aw, van Salem Zion lunglualna tang khenlouhna ah
Hambang vaihna hiai simlei ka buaina gam,
Ka jua Mang siang ah ka hilh ngei ding hi.
Mawh puak gik leh simlei chimtakna tawh,
Thangvan ka et chiang' tua ah lut nuam ing;
Tua mun mawhnei tenna'ng hilou napi,
Hongpai in chi'n hon sam aw ka ja hi.
Tua hong chiam gam siangthou leh thupi sung',
Mawhneipi bangchi'n lut thei ding ka hiam?
Mangtutphah vak mai' bangchin ding thei ding?
Hihhang', Hongpai in, chi'n khut hong van hi.
Thangvan tuang lam ka zuih nop laitak in,
Sunchin siatna in kei hon jui tawntung;
Hihhang' zahngaihna thupha hong tung a,
Kisik in, kihei in k'on gum ding chi.
Keimah hong sam pen Jesu' aw ahi.
Keimah hong huai nuam pen Ama' khut hi;
Mawhna siangsak thei Ama' sisan hi.
Mangtutphah mai' mawhneilou a dinna'ng.
Adik Toupa, kei tang' hong dawnsak aw,
Hoihna teng Nang a, a vangteng kei a,
Linglukhu Nang a, manglukhu kei a,
Nangma' hinna Non pia kei' hin theihna'n.
Ka bat k'on dit na'ng nei ke'ng Toupa aw,
Hihhang' ka lungtang khempeuh hon pia ning;
K'on chiam bangbang ka kipiakna'n gen hen,
Nakpi'n N'on ngaidam ken nakpi'n k'on it.
Ni thupi a hong tung dekta,
I ngak Mang Immanuel;
Khelh leh jinmang nuaisiahna ni,
Hotdam tate i noplenna hun ding
Tua hun in nunnop zaideih ka awi ding,
Mang gam bawlsa tangtawn mun khuambang ka luah ding;
Aw, nun in nuam nan chia maw!
Lungdam huai nan chia maw!
Nunnop tawp lau lou ka leng ding.
Bangchik chiang hi ding hiam Toupa,
Zawhna ni ka muh ding uh?
Leng in Jordan ka hong kai dia,
Nang din van aksi bang in ka tang ding.
Hina ngei e, tangtawn Toupa,
Na bawl thak van khawpi ah;
Na sisan a Na leisate,
Ka kiang' hong pai un, Na chih tawntung mah.
Aw khawpi thak etlawm ve chia,
Na sung ah vualzoute leng;
Vualtungtuanna la thak sak ding,
Simlei albang manchia sak din sit uh.
Ka hinna zaw heisa bang in,
Sawtlou kal in a bei ding;
Janchiang jalmang khua a vak a,
A mang nawn bang lel ahi.
Aw ka laukha, van ah leng in,
Lei bang na khiaklah na hiam?
Na tangtawn khawpi hoih juan in,
Misiangthoute' khawpi hi.
Leitung hinna bang bel ahiam?
Natna leh lungkhamna kia;
Nunnopna leh kipahnate,
Loupa pak bang lel ahi.
I lawm ngaihtak paikhinsate,
Kipak in tungkhinta uh ;
Mangtutphah kimvel' la sa uh,
I tangtawn Toupa pak in.
A thupina vak etlawmnou,
Sunni sang in tangpha jaw;
A thupina mai a ding in,
I Mang Jesu i mu ding.
Ka aw hoih neihsun tengteng in,
Ka phat ding ka tun chiang in;
Vakhu bang a lensiam hileng,
Lengnuam veng vantung sang ah.
Aw ka kha aw, tuin leng in,
Leitung zaw paisan mai in;
Na tangtawn khawpi hoih juan in,
Khawpi hoih Toupa' gam nuam.

songs.title: Sihna Luigal Ka Kai Chiang In
songs.author: Kamlala

lines: Tuin hiai leitung buaina tawh,
Sim leh mal jawt mah lehang;
Thangvan inn nuam ka tun chiang in,
Muta ning nopsakna kim.
Sihna lui gal ka kai chiang in,
Kalvari tatna sisan;
Thupi nah e, Halleluia,
Chiin pak chimtak kei ning.
Hehpihna kim lu a khu in,
Tanglai Toupa A liangvai;
Aw ka kha, enjui jel in aw,
Hondampa na muh mateng.
Jerusalem na velsuak zong,
Aw, Kidron luigal lam ah;
Hondampa omna zong jel in,
Kalvari na tun mateng.
Hamse teng thuak tang tung ah zong,
Lau louin pai jel inla;
Ka kha na nopna kim ding hi,
Na Hondampa' sisan ah.
Laukha liangvai a kisa teng,
Kalvari ah kikhawm uh ;
Aw, hehpihna lamdang lua hi,
Chiin pak chim ngeilou uh.
Sihna lui gallam ah khawpi khat hong kimu,
A thupidan kigen zoulou hi;
Tua ah ni tum ngeilou, singnah zong vul ngeilou,
Tua sana vangkhawpi etlawm ah.
Tua ah ni tum ngeilou,
Singnah zong vul ngeilou ;
Tua ah amuanhuaite'n Hondampa' mel mu a,
Tua sana vangkhawpi etlawm ah.
Tua ah Kumpipa, Tanpa, Toupa i it uh,
A muanhuaidan nuam in melmu uh;
Tua ah midikte aksite bang tangden ding,
Tua sana vangkhawpi etlawm ah.
Khros phung a eiten i hon paipih kha khempeuh,
Huangsung i hon pi belam khempeuh;
I lukhu jem na'ng suangmanpha vak bang om ding,
Tua sana vangkhawpi etlawm ah.
Pathian' ta sisate i thawhnawn vek chiang in,
Tua Jerusalem Thak nunnuam ah;
Nunnuam in Toupa phat in om tawntungta ni,
Tua sana vangkhawpi etlawm ah.
Omna ding gam a om thangvan ah,
Pak bang a kilawm leh hoih ahi;
Inn nuampen ni sang a vakjaw hi,
Leng nuam veng Jesu kiang thangvan ah.
Len ka nuam, len ka nuam,
Jesu kiang thangvan ah leng nuam ing,
Len ka nuam, len ka nuam,
Jesu kiang thangvan ah leng nuam ing.
Pathian thu lungsung a ka sut chiang,
Hinna, muanna thu ahi ka thei;
Gilkial leh dangtakna a hon nem,
Liangvaite Pathian a munmuang ding.
Van gam nopdan kuata'n gen thei dia?
Dahna bang lungkhamna bang himhim,
Phamsa ngai a naubang a kah khawng,
Sihna leh manna bang om nawnlou.
Tua gam nunnuam i luah ding gam hi,
Pathian in mite A hon sam hi;
A sapna hoihtak in ngai dih ua,
Toupa kiang tangtawn a omna hi.
Jerusalem ka Innpi nuam,
Na min kei ding' manpha;
Nopna, muanna tawh nang luah in,
Sepgim chikchiang' bei diam?
Nang kham kulhbang leh kongpite,
Hotdamna hat leh kip;
Na kongzing sanatui a luan,
Chikchiang' kong mu diam hiam?
Natna, dahna leh sihna zong,
Banghang' ka lau ding hiam?
Kanan gam nuam hun beilouhna,
Ka mit in mu tawntung.
Apostol martar Jawlneite,
Ka Hondampa kiang' ding;
Khrist' min vang a ka lawmte zong,
Pawlpi lak' tel pah ding.
Apostol martar Jawlneite,
Ka Hondampa kiang' ding;
Khrist' min vang a ka lawmte zong,
Pawlpi lak' tel pah ding.
Zion khawpi etlawm Jerusalem,
Vualngaih leh vanmi ngabang a lenna;
Toupa Jesu vang mawhnei khempeuh,
Leng ding uh sunni tum ngeilouhna mun ah.
Halleluia, Toupa thupi hen aw,
Halleluia, Amen, Halleluia;
Hondam din mimbang A hong piangta,
Aw Toupa, Immanuel, Halleluia.
Khros tung a sisan pha tuibang hong luang,
Nam chih zata tangbang damna ding in;
Mawhneite tuibang sianna ding hi,
Sisan pha, Toupa' sisan, Halleluia.
Nuaisimlei a hong tualkum nawn chiang in,
Gehen nuaisiahna van dak Jubili;
Mawhneite nunnopna'ng van Mang hi,
Tungnung pen ah, Hosana, chi'n kikou un.
Jerusalem Mangpen, Vanglian Messia,
Jerusalem Mang minlian Messia hi;
Toupa' min a hongpai hi, nuam un,
Lambang pak un, mangte' Mang Halleluia.
Ginna'n vangkhua gal in don veng,
Simlei lungkhamna thuakzoute,
Naubang nui siausiau in ka mu;
A kipah la uh leh ginglawm,
Sunchin ngilhlai nei thei kei veng,
Aw, tuang ka tun kal ngakla'ng e.
Van Mang siangthou, hon ensuk in,
Kei mi hehpihhuai leh hatlou;
Gitlouhna'n henkol hon bulh hi;
Na gam hong tung nuam mahleng zong,
Mialna leh lungkham dahnate'n,
Sunnichin in hon bawm.
Ngaklah thu a tun theih hilou,
Chi a Na hon theihsak chiang in,
Khasiatna in a hon tum nak;
Hong tun kal ka ngaklah jiak hi,
Toupa, Na gam siangthou leh nuam,
Ngaihman kahtam lou kha nak veng,
Awl a bangkim ka ngaihtuah chiang,
Ka liangvaih dan kithei san ing,
Ka kah khawsawt nading phet in;
Kaplai naubang a nuih nading,
Nuaisimlei ah mu zou kei veng,
Hon ngailou thei hi kei veng maw?
Kaplai naubang nui theikei ning,
Toupa Na hon pi mateng jaw,
Ka lungkham van ah bangta ning;
Ka omdan ding Na lel ma'n jaw
Van gam tunkal ngaklah mahleng,
Toupa hong tung thei kei ning maw?
Simlei gentheihna mun ah leng,
Toupa, Na hon ompih phot leh,
Bangdin ka na lungkham ding hiam ?
Na hon ompih chih ka theih in,
Kaplai naubang a hong nui in,
Lungkham sunkhua sawt ka tomsak.
Pialgal gamnuam leh ka Toupa,
Itna ngoubang lang ding;
Galdon jel ning khemna huihpi
Leh sual khimjing lai ah.
Denchiang a khemna meipi leh,
Khimjing a then chiang in;
Ngoubang lang jel ding A itna,
Pahna tuikhuk manpha.
Simlei buainate tuangnung sia'n,
Itna Mang deihhuai pen;
Phat kal ngakla'ng nopna tullou,
Thangvan la ngaih sa ni.
Simlei buaina lak ah Toupa,
Na hon itna min ngaih;
Lungtup bang in lambang pak la'ng,
Ka khelhna in hon dal.
Mel muhlouh dougal a lang e,
Bangjal tangbang hon kai;
Nang lou in machiang suan la'ng e,
Laukha aw, hon huai in.
Tang a Mosi'n Kanan gal in don,
Luah zoulou in Toupa' thukham a pua;
Kanan gam thupi leh hoihna mel in mu,
Kisik a ngai in a kap ding hiam.
Aw, ke'n zong Kanan gamthak don ing,
Kei hatna muang in tungzou kei ning;
Hizong Mang Jeho in a hon pi dia,
Gamnuam tuabang ken zong mel in mu ning.
Kanan lenmui leh sunni tum kuan,
Huaisiam Mosi'n lunggulh in gal in don;
Jordan gal a kai ding Mang in phallou hi,
A it, a huaite gibang khenta.
Lungjuan mual aw mubang hon ngai veng,
Manna'n a lawm e kumsawt gam nunnuam;
Tua ah vualzou Belamnou Mang in a tu,
A kimvel manna silpak in bawm.
Kanan silpak leh vangkhaw tualnuam,
Huaisiam Mosi'n nungchiang heisan zouta;
Ngailou bang in Salem vangkhua juantouta,
Israel vontawite a ngai diam aw ?
Pialgal gamnuam tuang ka tun chiang in,
Nuaisimlei albang mang ding ngai kei ning;
Nuaisimlei mihinna ngailou in,
Hinna sing leh Toupa' lim bel ning.
Aw ngai veng e, pialgal gam nuam
Thounawn tate' laitual lenna mun;
Sihna, lusun, kahna bei ding hi,
Aw Pialgal, kei din hong kihong in.
Tuagam ka ngaihtuah chiang' lung honlawng,
Belamnou leh a tatsate tualleng;
Aw, simlei ngailou hon heisan uh,
Kei lah tua gam tuangtung thei nailou.
Denchiang a jingkhua hong vak ding hi,
Chih ka theih in naubang kahlai ka bang;
Nuaisimlei gimhuaina hon tuamte,
Pel ning tua gam tuang ka tun chiang in.
Tua ah tang a thuak a na liamte,
Kipak laitual leng uh genthei tate;
Hondampa leh A tatsate tawh,
Aw khenlou a i lenna hun ding.

songs.title: Aw Tua Ah I Tutkhawl Ding
songs.author: Patea

lines: Ka damsung huihpi a then chiang in,
Ka Mang Hondampa' mel ka muta ding a;
Tua ah ka nunnopna tul lou ding,
A mel ah van heisa a pal tawntung ding.
Aw hinna sing, na limliap ah,
Van angel lungtuak ngabang leng;
Aw, tua ah i tutkhawl ding hi,
Israel tang siangthou nuam ah.
Tua khawpi ngai a ka mauna in,
Lungkham, buaina, sihna tuang hontun thei leh;
Tatna sisan vang a lungdeihte,
Nuai simlei ah zaw gibang ka khenta ding.
I paijel ding aw Zion vontawi,
I zalenna gam thupi a hong naita;
Tu a lungkham, kah leh buainate,
Nun i nopna'n silbang in hong pal ngei ding.
Tua khawpi hoih tuang ka tun chiang in,
Ka lenna gamdai mubang ngainawn kei ning;
Van Belamnou leh A mangtutphah,
Piandang etchimlouh leh kipahna pen hi.
I lungdeihpen leh pahna pen,
Hong pakkhia eilak ah;
Lungchimtak a kipahpih ma'n,
Kap in khen nawnta hang,
Mihing ngaihtuah zawhvuallouh in,
Hong pakkhia hoihtak in;
Hiai leitung gilou engbawl din,
Toupa'n phal nawnlou hi.
Banghang in i khasiat ding hiam,
A Pa kiang tung ding hi;
Van gam tualnuam a leng ding in,
Angelte pah sam na'h.
Tuin kap in khen mah lengzong,
Lungdam in mu nawn ni;
Tangtawn nunnopna tawplou ah,
Lungkham thuak nawn lou in.
Aw, a aw ging leh lungdam mel,
Kei hon lungdamsak pen;
Kapkap in sam ing, sam zou ke'ng,
Sihna in paipihta.
Aw, manpha e, Toupa' min jaw,
Thu in phat seng kei veng;
A hehpihte simlei lungkham,
Gimna tung ah leng uh.
Sihna sihna in ngai kei uh,
Toupa hehpihten jaw;
Van khawpi lutna kongkhak hi,
Pa mel a muh na'ng un.
Thianmang anglai tuibang siang ah,
Sihna vontawi tutkhawl ding;
Tuamun ah lamdang sa ding uh,
Gawtmun mei a pawtna uh.
Pathian phatna (2)
Thangvan ah tawpnawn lou ding. (3)
Mawhna pan hon tatkhiak jiak in,
Hondampa Toupa Jesu,
Tangtawn mun nuam tuangtun chiang in,
Lasa in phat tawntung ding.
Semgua tumte (2)
Thangvan ah dai nawnlou ding. (3)
Mihing lungsim a lut ngeilou,
Mit muh louh, bil a jak louh;
Toupa'n amah itte adia,
A bawl khuambang luah ding uh.
Nunkhawnopna (2)
Tangtawn in uang semsem ding. (3)
Pathian mai a puan ngou silh in,
Sun, jan zom in om ding uh ;
Gilkial dangtak thuak nawnlou in,
Nunnop kim zouta ding uh.
Ngaihtam sialna, (2)
Tangtawn in thuak ngeilou ding. (3)
Jerusalem Thak nunnuam ah,
Khakiak, nat, lusun, lungdon;
Albang dah zaitha tawl lou in,
Enchim lou ding Etlawmnou.
Toupa' itna, (2)
Bang lou in lambang pak ding. (3)
Simlei tuangnung sia le'ng,
Nungchiang hei nawn lou in;
Nuam a pai masaten,
Pialgal gamnuam ah hon ngak uh,
Tangtawn nopna mun ah.
Kahna leh lungkhamna,
Simlei ka tenna gam;
Lungtuak lenna Zion tanga,
I len hun ding ngakla'ng.
Toupa aw, hon en dih,
Ka bualna uh simlei,
Gamdai lungkhamna hi ;
Sihna in lawmvual hon khen nak,
Na gam tun ma in jaw.
Lunmang Immanuel,
Khawpi Zion ah jaw
Gibang khen om nawnlou ;
Tua ah lungkham liangvai tate,
Dawnbang tuah kal ngakla'ng.
Haibang hon ngak ung Mangpen,
Lei gimhuai khimjing nuai ah;
Na sat van Salem khawpi aw, mubang ngai nang e,
Simlei lungkhamna leh khimjing nuai ah ka leng zong;
Anbang it a kei hon zong,
Ka ngaih bang theilou hi.
Van thupi Eden Thak nunnuam,
Lungkham om nawnlouhna tua mun;
Aw, chikchiang in ka tung ding hiam?
Na tangtawn manna gam,
Nunnuam eng singseng.
Hong nai in, ka Hondampa,
Gal a lian, nuai simlei ah;
Sisan a Na tatsate lungkham naubang kap uh,
Lei a na len lai a Na mangbatna Kalvari,
Dougalte a hong nai uh,
Na gam hon doutute.
Aw, koiah hiam Hondampa,
Zion tang gal muanna mun?
Mawhsianna itna tui a kou dia na luanna mun;
Sual danna dai kulhpi Na tangtawn van khua-le-tui,
Hotdamte Na lim nuai ah;
Nunnuam a lenna mun.
Aw, simlei a hong mang ding,
Sawtlou kal in hong mang ding;
Hondampa A kikou dia, lei i nusiata ding;
Toupa anbang itten, A vangletna tang ding uh,
Anbang itna tuibang lian,
Nuam un, Halleluia.
Jordan chiaukuam gal lehlam a,
Kanan gamnuam gal in don veng;
Tang a lawmvual ngaih ka khente,
Van mi tawh tualleng in ka mu.
Hondampa' hon itna thupi.
Phat in, A sisan a tatte,
Nopna silpak lutna gam ah,
Angel siangte tawh i leng ding,
En in, a nun uh a dangta,
Tua gam thupi tuangtungsate;
Lungkham, dahna, nunnopna teng,
Sihna tangtawn hinna hong suak.
Simlei gimhuai khen ah leng uh,
Lungkham lusun kahna kheng in;
Tang a luankhi tawh kikhente,
Nuam in tua ah kituak nawn uh.
Damsung gimhuai namkim thuak a,
Hondampa' min a liangvaite'n;
Laukha khawlna nuam tangta uh,
Tangtawn in khawldenta ding uh.
I Toupa' lungkham jan hong tung a,
A nungjuite tawh Jerusalem ah;
Tua inndan tungnung ah hun nanungpen hita,
Ankuang umkhawm uh e, jan khawsawt daidam ah.
Toupa Sakrament ah,
Na Kha in hong tel in;
Ka kha leh sapum ua hatna hong hi ding in,
Ka nek ka dawnte uh ka tan uah vualjawl in.
Tua chiin Toupan tanghou la a,
Vualjawl in tanghou A balkhamta hi ;
Noute sik leh tang a ka piak ding Ka sapum
Hiai la unla ne un, nungjuite kiang, A chi.
Toupa aw, hiai tanghou ka tan uah,
Hon vualjawl in bah leh liamte adin;
Ka khelh man un Toupa' sapum in liamna thuak,
Tuin kou damna hi'n hatna thak hong hi hen.
Tua khit in Toupan nou A la a,
Kipahthu gen in, hiai la in dawn un;
Mi tampi dia pawt ding Ka sisan hiai ahi,
Khelhnate ngaihdam na'ng Thukhun ahi, A chi.
Thianmang aw, hiai Uain ka tan uah,
Hon vualjawl in hatloute hatna din;
Huangvulh ganta sisan in siangsak theilou,
Mikhial koute sianna Toupa' sisan a hi.
Aw, ngai veng e, i tangtawn gam,
Leh suangmanpha khawpi tual, a leldawn jaw;
Tung sunni sang zong tang zaw chi uh,
Melmuh nuam veng, Toupa' sau suan,
Van mite lenna.
Thangvan Inn hoih zotna tuanglam,
A kimvel kenliang vang in manding lauveng;
Kei ka gitlouh a hatlouh jiak in,
Van Kanan gam etlawm, thupi,
Tun louh lunglau veng.
Toupa Na Laukha huai louh in,
Kuahiam Na siang tuangtung ding? Nuai simlei jaw,
Laukha albang a manna gam hi;
Gingtute tung ah aw Toupa,
Khelhna'n kha a jak.
Vualtungtuangte a Pa' gam uah,
Sunni sang a tangzaw in a leng ding ua;
A simlei lungkham leh buaina uh,
A nunnop na'ng un hong pal dia,
Vul ngeinawn lou ding.
Leng nuam veng aw, Van saumang ah,
I tangtawn tutkhawlna ding etlawm sa'ng e;
I Toupa bawl Salem vangkhua ah,
Ei zong ngabang valeng lehang,
Albang dah lou ding.
Jawlnei genkholh mah bang in Lunmang Khrist,
A piang Beth-lehem ah;
Kipahpih ni, simlei namchih jata'n,
Thangvan mang Immanuel.
Van mipite'n Beth-lehem tang tung ah,
Awi uh Van Mang vontawi;
Tungnungpen ah thupi henla,
Lei ah lem leng hen, chi uh.
Belampute'n belam a chinlai un,
Mang' sawltak thupi in ;
Beth-lehem ah Hondampa A piangta,
A kiang ah, pai un, chi uh.
Van a aksi tang thupitak in ah,
Tua suahlam mipilte
A pi jel a Beth-lehem tang pha in,
Tua chi'n a gou uh pia uh.
Thangvan gam thupi tanchin kua ahiam genzou thei ding,
Lungkhamna nuai simlei a i len lai in;
Hondampa Toupa Jesun A nungjui A it kiang ah,
Van gamnuam thupidan A theisakta hi.
Aw, Thangvan gam etlawm leh nuam,
Houlungtuak a gibang khenlouhna gam hi;
Itna gamnuam leh etlawm, thupina vak ni bang tang,
Tuang ka tung ding tua gamnuam leh etlawm ah.
Tua van khawpi etlawm pen, a min Jerusalem Thak,
A kulhbang suangmantam a te selsel hi;
Vualgen dangkaeng leh dangkatui a luan in a tang,
A huang zaw tuikepsuang a kijem ahi.
Tungvan khawpi nunnuam ah sunni tang ngai nawnlou hi,
Tung solkha leh si-al tang ngai nawn lou ding;
Toupa sunni bang tang dia, biakin zong omta lou ding,
Mang Jesu mu in amah sumbang bia ni.
A hon itna leh hoihna pak in zaila i sa ding,
Lungkhamna leh khelhna kihhuaina chiteng;
Kidouna omnawn lou ding, kongkhak ginglawm thupi ah,
Toupa itte kia tua ah lut thei ding uh.
Kei din sunni leh solkha tang nawnlou,
Mial in hon tuam e, aw ka Hondampa;
Na mun thupi tuangtun kal ngakla'ng e.
Hondampa pen aw, mubang hon ngai veng,
Na hehpihna thagui in hon kai in;
Hotdam tate lenna mun etlawm ah.
Thangvan tuallai a Belamnou' aw in,
Ka ta hong meng in, na mawh puakgik tawh;
Hon na dawn ning, chi'n malbang A hon kou.
Na hon itdan leh Na vangletdan te,
Kuahiam genthei ding simlei mite lai';
Thangvan miten zong gentheilou uhi.
Na lungkham aw in zong lei a lin leh,
Na vangletna tawh Na hong pai nawn chiang'.
Lei leh van in zong hon dawl zoulou ding.
Tua bang ni thupi tuang hong tung ding a,
Na dougalte zong lau in ling ding uh;
En dih, hon Tanpa, ka chita ding uh.

songs.title: Na Min Ngaih Hongthang Meng Hen
songs.author: Siamliana

lines: Kalvari a anbang Non itna'n,
Jelsuak meng hen simlei leh khuakim gam;
Nangmah tatsa lei mihingte,
Sihna hamsia lai ah leng uh.
Toupa Jesu, Na Vangletna leh Na itna,
Hong thang meng hen, namchih lai ah;
Mihing lungsim khial a liamsa,
Na min ngaih lambang pak zaisa hen.
Ka gam uh lungkham buaina jinglai',
Kuahiam Toupa kuan ding honkhia ding in?
Sim leh Mal ah Nangmah min ngaih.
Panpih ding dang kuamah omlou.
Khawlvel khelhnate lummei bang in,
A hong jing e, Toupa ka lailung ah;
Hong halsiang in van meikuang in,
Nang din silbang paklun nawn ning.
Ka kap Toupa aw, Na gam ngaiin,
Tangtawn gam leh anbang itte lenna;
Bangchik chiang hiam lungkham mauna,
Pela luankhi tui a hul ding?
Tungchiang Jerusalem Thak nuam,
Misiangthoute' khawpi ahi;
Tua ah Mang Immanuel in vai A hawm hi.
Manawh gamnuam Zion ka ngai semsem hi.
Simlei mun a sang in,
A nuamjaw tua kumsawt gam;
Sunchin mi tuangtung;
Kha teng in tam, kumteng in pung jel,
Zion tang tung a Belamnou om
Zaila'n a pak uh.
Immanuel aw, Na sisan,
Ka tangtawn zaila ding uh hi;
Misiangthou gam ka tun chiang in zaila sa ning,
Tangtawn sing ka Mang nunnem pallun zou ding.
Halleluia aw Hondampa,
Gam tengteng Nang a hong hita;
Na sisan in N'ong tanzouta, Nang a hi ung,
Hon ngak ung, buaina Jordan mei jing nuai ah.
Na hongpai dekta hiam Toupa?
Ka gam uh haksatna'n a bawm;
Kanan gam leh Na sakmel ngaih puanbang bang mawng,
Jing kha in khawsiangthou ah leng nuam veng e.
I omna uh lei Inn chim mahleh,
Khut a bawllouh tangtawn inn ka nei;
Tua munnuam ngai in tu'n tuang ka tung thei nailou,
Lei Inn ka pumpi in hondal hi.
Gam ka nei, gam thupi,
Hondampa'n kei ding a A bawlsa;
Hiai lei ah ten kumkhuana ding mun ka neilou,
Gam hoihzaw tung thangvan gam lou jaw.
I omna lei Inn huibang mauna,
Aw, bangchikchiang ka paisan ding hiam ?
Itna Toupa phat leh Amah pahtawi ding in,
Lei Inn ka pumpi in hon dal hi.
Lungmuanna leh khawlna ka zong a,
Mu zoukei veng hiai nuai simlei ah,
Ginna'n Gam siangthou don ing, ka tung thei nailou,
Lei Inn ka pumpi in hon dal hi.
Abraham mah bang in tuin jaw,
Ginna in gamchiam juan in ka pai;
Misiangthoute tawh gam thupi luah sam ding in,
Lei Inn ka pumpi in hon dal hi.
Mubang ngaiveng, aw ka Mang nunnem lenna,
Laukha, Jordan honpi kai in;
Sunni tumlou gam hon tun in.
Aw, michih pahna, pialgal gamnuam,
Anbang itna jam vel nuai ah;
Lili pak hoih lutna gam ah.
Khemna lummei jing a hong jam kimvel a,
Mi siangthou tawh mun thupi ah;
Ngabang len kal haibang ngak la'ng.
Loubang tul mai hen aw hiai simlei gimhuai,
Hongpi inla aw Mang Jesu;
Jan omlouhna Na gam nuam ah.
Kei zong tua mun nuam tuang ka tun hun chiang in,
Ka bualna mun ngainawn kei ning;
Tutkhawl in ngabang lengta ning.
Buaina himhim om nawn ngeilou,
Laukha vangkhua tung thangvan ah;
Tatsate nunnuam a lenna,
Hiai nuai simlei bang hilou hi.
Lungkhamna leh dahna in hon bawm,
Buainate'n tuilian bang in hon tai;
Nuam in zaila sa ning a tung ah,
Bit in tua gam nuam a hon tun ding.
Lei ah mun nuam kei' ding a tawm,
Gentheih thuak a ka kahna kia,
Tua mun nuam tuang vatungtou leng,
Kipahna mun ka tang sam diam?
Hondampa mihing hong hihl lai'
Omna mun tampi om hi chi;
Kei ka tankhom omsam lou hiam,
Chia ngaiin donchim la'ng e.
Hiai simlei a ka khensaten,
Honsam uh, luigal lehlam ah;
Hong galkai un, i lengkhawm ding,
Chi'n khut honvan siausiau uhi.
Sisan thupi, na manpha hi,
Nangmah vangin liangvai tate;
Tua munnuam tuangtung khinta uh,
Tu'n zong khaubang chiah jel uhi.
Thangvan a kei ding' inn sehsa om,
A nabawl ding ka Toupa paita;
Hotdamte gam nunnuam ah,
Hotdamsa ka itte tawh;
Lutkhawm ding, phat la kisa tawntung ding.
Kum sawt lua om ngeilou,
Kipahna gam ah jaw;
Gim, gentheih om nawnlou,
Tua mun ah khatvei tei i teng ding.
Kei ding in Hondampa hong sita,
Ka kha hotdamna honpiak theihna'ng;
Hiai lei hin gentheihna mun,
Pel in ken ka nusia ding;
Van gamnuam hoihtak a tengden ding in.
Hun leh ni tampi ah aw Toupa,
Nang non ompih tawntung chih ka thei ;
Mang lou hial in Toupa aw,
I tenkhawmna ding mun ah;
Ngaihtuam, muhdah omlou, lemna lengta.
Thangvan gamnuam sana khuapi ah,
Nat-le-sat, gentheihna om nawn lou;
Lungdam la sa tawntung ding,
Gim leh tawl bei vekta ding;
Nunnuam tawntung ding, tua innpi nuam ah.
Aw Laukha Siangthou migi,
Lungkham naubang ka kah heh hong nem in;
Phamsa ngaiin naubang ka kap sunnichin in,
Naubang kahlai tahpuan bang bang maw'ng e.
Sun khawsawt a ka kah lai in,
Leitung lungkham dahna mun ah,
Aw ka Mang nunnem, Nang in hon ompih inla,
Naubang kahlai tahpuan bang bangta ning.
Phamsate mu nawn kei ning.
Chi a lungkham a huibang ka mau in;
Belamnou tawh thangvan gam tualnuam ah leng uh,
Chih ka theih in nuam in naubang ka nui.
Mi'n a gen tangtawn gamnuam,
Manawh in vualngaihte a mualliam zou;
Nunnopna libang in chingta dia tua mun ah,
Tua ah lusun tate nunnuamta ding.
Ei Honpa hong tualkum chiang,
Han a omteng a hong thouvek ding ua;
Sunni suah dang dia, Jingdam Solnou dungsun in,
Sisan a chibang tel teng A huai ding.
Hiai lei gimhuai beita hen,
Khensa lungtuak tawh ngabang leng nuam veng;
Hinna damtui Toupa, laukha tangbang damna,
Na pallai mu nuam veng tua khawpi ah.

songs.title: I Mauna Teng Nopna La Ding
songs.author: Kamlala

lines: Tuin a thak kiitna vak nuam ah,
I Toupa mun thupi;
Nunnopna silpak lun e tua mun ah,
Sawlbang heu nawnlou ding.
Nunnuam in denchiang kikhawm ve ni,
Tung thangvan angel lungtuakte tawh;
Lungkhamna gam a i mauna teng,
I Toupa mai' pahna la hi ding.
Ka damlai sunni lenkil kiak mateng,
Kei din meipi a jing;
Denchiang a tua gam tuang ka tun chiang in,
Ngai kei ning nuai simlei.
Huan tua gam Vangkhuapi lam juan jel in,
Simlei i gamlat hiai;
Tuin a pallun namtui ka chiamta,
Aw, nuam na zen in chia!
Ka Hondampa mel deihhuai liamsa in,
A mangtutphah tung ah;
Simthu lel ding tatsate nunnopna'n,
Halleluia, Amen.
Jingdam Solnou Hondampa manna gamnuam ah,
Lei lungkham buaina, gimhuaite tawh;
Damlai meipi jing om nawnlou ding,
Kap in gibang khennawnlou ding.
Lilipal leh thupina tang kimvel.
Belamnou leh a tatsate lenna,
Van khawpi leh angel siang tawh,
Muhkal ngakla'ng e.
Gal in don un, thupina mun tung masate,
Phatna'n ging kilawm thupi lem uh;
Lei a lawmvualten ngai in don zong,
Ngai in nungchiang hei nawnlou ding.
Jingkha jak in van Jerusalem Thak nuam ah,
Aw a leng uh tua gam etlawm ah;
Ka lung hon len hi a mel vak un,
Ka lungsung ah a tamden hi.
Tung thangvan mauna khen Toupa lenna gam ah,
Sunni tang leh meivak ngailou ding;
Janmial lungkhamna om nawnlou ding,
Belamnou ni bang tangden hi.
Damsung in hong Tanpa vang in,
Nuam in kikhawm tadih zongleng;
Kap in gibang kikhen jel hang,
Aw, ngai veng khenlouhna gamnuam.
Hondampa satthak gamnuam ah,
Nuai simlei a gibang khensa ;
Tangtawn mangtutphah kimvel in,
Aw, bangchik chiang' i kikhawm dia ?
Ngoubang lang Kalvari mual ah,
Don dih ni khenlouhna gamnuam;
Ngabang lenna tum in dang zong,
Ginna in aw i lengkhawm ding.
Malbang kou le'ng limbelh Toupa,
Thawmhau liangvai hehnem ding in ;
Amah lou hon nem ding omlou,
Samtui bang tom simlei nopna.
Hiai nuai simlei ah zong Aman,
A hon itna khajak nuai ah ;
Nuam in vuitang bang hon khawm dia,
Kap in kikhen tadih mah leng.

songs.title: Kei Zong Hon Nem In Aw Toupa
songs.author: Laibata

lines: Aw, Toupa lungkhamna'n ka dim nak,
Vangsel dahna'n hon um kimvel;
Naubang kah, mauna gamdai ah,
Lungkham dahna luankhi tawh kon juan.
Aw Toupa, ka mangbatna tengteng zong,
Na banzal ah lanbang kon nga ;
Lungkham liangvaite Hehnempa'n ;
Kei zong hongnem in aw Toupa.
Aw Toupa, ka lungkham Hehnempa,
Nang lou jaw laina ka nei lou;
Kua dang siang manawh ding ka hiam,
Nang kia anbang hong itpa Na hi.
Lungkham lummei kei din a jing nak,
Kumpi David' limbelh Kulhpi;
Kei zong Na lim hon belsak aw,
Khial liangvai vontawi in kon juan hi.
Tang a Kanan gam dung leh vai ah,
Lungkham vontawite Na nem jel;
Liangvaite'n Na mel kipahpih,
Kei zong ka kipahna pen Na hi.
Tuin buaina mualdawn a ding in,
Ngaklah in vangkhaw nuam don veng;
Tudong a ka ngilhlouh lungdeihte,
Puanngou silh a lenna uh.
Hon nial kenla, haibang kon ngak,
Naubang ka kahna gam za zong ;
Tatte tawh tawplou a zaisak na'ng,
Dougal muanna hon tun in.
Aw, kei ding in simlei gimhuai zong,
Tangtawn taikhua hong val chiang in;
Lungkham buaina teng bei ding, chi uh,
Haibang ngak ning ni thupi.
Kumsawt vei lua kei ding a buaina,
Tul mai hen aw simlei pallun;
Muhnuam veng e, tatte tuallenna,
Lawmvual ngaih itteng kim ding.
Damlai gam daidam ka pelh chiang in,
Vanmite nunnuam a lenna;
Aw, khen lou in khawlna tullim ah,
Tawp lou in zai oihpih ni.

songs.title: A Vangletna Lei In Lel Zoulou
songs.author: Upa Zasiama

lines: Suihlung a len ni in,
Toupa hong leng in, ka lunglai ah;
Liangvai tate' tutkhawlna mun, Na lenna mun,
A simthu hon hilh in,
Lei lungkhamna a ka len lai in.
A vangletna simthu lei in lel zoulou hi,
Van semgua, phaiphuleng;
Pahtawina kei adia tum hun ding.
Hiai simlei gamdai ah,
Daha luankhi nul in kap mahleng;
Phamna chiaugal ka kai chiang in itsiam Toupa'n,
Dawnbang hon tuak ding a,
Lungkham luankhi nulna beita ding.
Aw, tua mun a lengte'n,
Gibang khenna simthu lel nawnlou;
Khua siangthou leh Belamnou simthu leh zaila'n,
Angel siang leh Seraf-
Te tawh dai ngeilou in pahtawi uh.
Aw, tua mun tung ding in,
Simlei haksatnate'n kei hon dal;
Aw, ngaklah ing Na gam siangthou, hon donsak in,
Zawhna tumnah tawi a,
Aw, Salem Thak a len kal ngakla'ng.
Lailung juan ni'n don kimvel veng,
Hiai leitung gam kikhenna mun ;
Lungkham meipi in mualchin bawm,
Ka laukha lungkham in a vai.
Aw, honpi in damlai,
Lungkham meipi bang jing nuai ah;
Hon ompih in aw ka Toupa,
Naubang kahlai bang ning.
Aw, ka lunggulh aksi khen gam,
Angel siang lungtuakte lenna;
Kei selung juang naubang kahna,
Lungkham meipi bang jing nuai ah,
Aw, ka laukha, na lungkhamna,
Leitung dahna tuangnung sia in;
Khuva bang in valeng inla,
Nunnopna gam van khawpi ah.
Tua ah lungkham kah leh buaina,
Om nawnlou ding, thangvan gam ah;
Aw, Hondampa, hon pi jel in,
Phamna chiaugal gam nunnuam ah.
Ni tumna vakna khenlam ah,
Van meipi kai khen ah,
Van aksi a vaklouhna ah,
Tunglam ah inn ka nei.
Khut a lamlouh, tua a innpi,
Kei din mun bawlsa om;
Pathian leh angelte' omna,
Tua inn kei inn ding hi.
Natna, lungkhamna khenlam ah,
Hin haksatna khen ah;
Hun leh lamdanna beina mun,
Ka inn in hon ngak hi.
Sihna tui kihawt khenlam ah,
Hiai jan khawmial khen ah;
Ka kha'n kipak kawm in a en,
Tua a vakna innpi.
Gitlou, dah, hehna leh buaina,
Mang un, ka chita a;
Tangtawn in tunglam van mun ah,
Khrist ka Toupa kiang ah.
Zatam Vualgen Zion gam etlawm,
Ngai in don veng sunni chin in,
Kei hong pi in na tangtawn
Pialgal gam etlawm ah.
Aw, hon ngaiveng ka Hondampa,
Lili pak Mang Immanuel
Hinna siktui siang a luang,
Aw, ngai ung Na tatsaten.
Khelhna leh khemna gal hong lian e,
Sanggah liangvaite dou ding in;
Aw, van Laukha hong leng in,
Khelhna gallian zou di'n.
Lungkham sawlbang banna'ng omlou hi,
Hiai nuai simlei gam gimhuai ah;
Namchih vuitang bang kimna,
Van Kanan gam etlawm.
Kalvari a Sidar sing tung ah,
I Mang Jesu'n A hong thuakta;
Tatna na semkhin zou hi,
Halleluia, Amen.

songs.title: Sihna Luiguam Kan A Pai Ding

lines: Sihna luiguam kan a ka paisuak chiang in,
Hizong Hondampa ven in ka pai suak ding;
Ka hon nuse ngeilou ngeilou ding, A chi,
A chiang in tualai a hon muangsak.
Sihna luiguam, sihna luiguam,
Sihna luiguam kan a pai ngei ding ka hi;
Hizong Jordan tui in bangmah chih theilou,
Tua gam ah muanna a om ka thei.
Sihna luiguam kan a ka paisuak chiang in,
Sepgim tawl leh lungkhamna a beita ding;
Jesun khut hat a hon pom, hon ompih a,
Lungkham nawnlou ding ka hih man in.
Sihna luiguam kan in paita mahleng zong,
Ni nou suak thupi leh vak ka mu ding hi;
Jordan kheng in a lasak uh ka huh dia,
Tualai ah ka itten hon ngak uh.
Sihna luiguam kan in ka pai thei ta dia,
Ka Toupa paina na ah ka jui jel ding,
Luiguam mei lak kan in Aman hon pi dia,
Luigal Gam Hing a ka khawl mateng.
Ka hon tuak ding jing khawvak chiang,
Tua luipiau kilawm ah;
Dahna, lungkhamna a bei chiang in,
Tua inn lim ah ka hong ding ding,
Tua kongpi kihon chiang'
Damsung lungkhamna a bei chiang in.
Kon tuak ding, jing khawvak chiang',
Bang na chi, kon chi ding;
I tukhawm ding luipiau nuam ah,
Sawt a meltheihna a thak ding, nuam ding,
Non thei ding, jing khawvak chiang,
Tua khawpi nuam innpi kilawm ah.
Ka hon tuak ding jing khawvak chiang,
Nopna hun denchiang in;
Khros ka puakgik manglukhu'n khek ning,
Tua hun in lungkimlou omlou,
A si zong omlou ding,
Tua mun ah ni zong tum ngeilou ding.
Ka hon tuak ding jing khawvak chiang,
Damsung lampi bei chiang;
Tua mun sana khawpi tualnuam ah,
Tua mun ah omdenta ni hang;
Lungdam in nuamsa ni,
Hun leh kumte bei chih omlou in,
Ka Mang lenna Jerusalem thak nuam,
Phatna zaila ngaih leh vangletna in bawm;
A vangletdan pau chih in kigen jel zong leh,
A kimkhat zong gen zoulou uh.
A kim khat zong gen zoulou uh,
Khawpi etlawm Mangpen manna vangkhua;
A kimkhat' kimkhat zong gen zoulou uh.
Misiangthou tengteng leh angel siangte,
Khawpi sung suangmanpha kilawm chikimte;
Khangthak piaunel zah bei nung a zong thak jel ding,
A kimkhat zong gen zoulou uh.
Namchih, chichih lai a simsenglouhte,
Niteng Belamnou manna gam ah lut uh;
Laukha tampi khawpi sung lutte kipahna,
A kimkhat zong gen zoulou uh.
Vualzou leh Hinna Bu a min khumte,
Hondampa'n a Na bawlsaksa vek ahi;
A sepgim uh khawlsan in Hondampa vang in,
A hauhsakna tangta ding uh.
Na hon itna vang a nunnuam tutkhawl khawmte,
Gibang ka kikhen chiang un Hondampa;
Hehnem ding dang omlou nuaisimlei ah,
Aw Mang Jesu ka kiang ah hong leng in.
Aw tengden in , Mang Jesu ka kiang uah,
Hong ompih in, thawmhau vontawi liangte;
Na mel ah lungdamna a om,
K'on ngaih bang theilou ding.
Nuaisiamlei jaw kap a gibang kikhenna hi,
Aw Mang Jesu, Na hon itna vang a;
Na tangtawn gamnuam tuang ka tun chiang un,
Gibang kikhen nawnlou ding gingtute.
Thawmhau in tu'n Mang Jesu malbang hon kou veng,
Aw hong leng in, ka lungsung gilou ah;
Jingsol aksi sang in Na tang hoih jaw,
Na mel ah lungdam leh muanna om hi.
Na gam ngai in simlei tungpan gal in don veng,
Khensa lawmvual ngaih leh Toupa lenna;
Gibang khenna simthu lel om nawnlou,
Lenkal ngakla'ng nuaisimlei tuangnung sia'n.
Tung thangvan khawpi thak nunnuam ah,
Pathian in A it teng kimu ni;
Lungkhamna, khitui nulna omlou,
Tung Pathian kiang ah mun i muang ding.
Khua nunnuam, Eden Thak,
A lui sang a nuamjaw;
Tua mun ah tutkhawl tawntungta ni,
Tunglam khawpi Toupa sat thak ah.
Hiai leitung i nutsiah nung chiang in,
Khawpi nunnuam i tung thangvan ah;
Mawhneilou tua tung masate tawh,
I Toupa mai ah mel kimu ni.
Tua mun ah mawhneiloute om uh,
Jawlnei midik mawhneilou teng tawh ;
Naupang pahtak lawh khempeuhte tawh,
Nunnop zaila awi in a om uh.
Van khawlak sanatui a luan tawh,
Tung Pathian khantawn a A vakna;
Vantung mi leh Inn nuam penpen tawh,
Mawhneiloute tawh muh kal ngakla'ng.
Aw ka bualna nuai simlei jaw,
Gamdai gamkeu lungkhamna lel;
Tuangnungsia'n tungchiang ka leng dia,
Belamnou Mang Jesu kiang ah;
Ka tenna ding aw ka gam nuam,
Aw, ngai veng lungtuakte lenna,
Don jel ni e, tatsate'
Tuallenna gam nunnuam.
Lungtup gam nuam, ka tenna ding,
Simlei ah hambang vai zong leng;
Ka Hondampan liangvaite di'n,
Pahna tuikhuk manpha A hong.
Aw hon Tanpa, Na thuakna jaw,
Anbang itna'n muchian thei leng;
Bangkim a ka bangkim Na hi,
Ka laukha din bangkim Na hi,
Sana vangkhua tual a leng ding,
Na thuakna in a manzou hi;
Aw Na hon itna ana hi,
Kei mi genthei din.
Aw Mang Jesu, melmu thei leng,
Lungdeih teng laitual lenna mun;
Kalvari a itna vang in,
Chi chih nam chihte lengkhawm uh;
Ken zong na gentheihna vang in,
Gamdai gamkeu ka paisan ding;
Aw ka Toupa, honpi inla,
Kiitna gam ah.
Simlei a thupi leh pahna,
Albang mang ding a pallun tawh;
Hondampa kiang ah ka leng dia,
A vangletna tang kimvel ah;
Simlei nopna ngai nawn kei ning,
Anbang hon itna huangsung ah;
Tangtawn pahla i sata ding,
Belamnou ma ah.
Gal in don ua khawlen mui kai kal ah,
Laitual lenna Zion tang nuam;
Houlungtuak in laitual leng uh,
Simlei loubang tulsa mubang ngailou.
Ngilhni lah omlou dia, kap veng,
Toupa Na gam ngai in ;
Leng diamdiam uh houlung tuak in,
Lennem Toupa awi in.
Hon ngailou in gam siangthou ah leng uh,
Sulkik lellou machiang suan uh;
Simlei tuangnung siahna gam hi,
Pallai zoupa bang mual lailung juang veng.
Nun i nopna tuang hong tung ding ngakla'ng,
Muanna thangvan tuang hong tung dia;
Gibang khenlou lungtuakte tawh,
Nunnop zou in Toupa lambang pak ning.
Hiai lei a i damsung in,
Nunnuam leh lawp in i leng zong in,
Tangtawn taikhua hong val ma'n,
Luankhi nul kikhenna bei lou ding.
Tangtawn taikhua a hong val chiang in,
Luankhi nul a gibang khensa tawh;
Luigal ah kimu khawm vekta ni,
Tua ah nunnopna teng kimta ding.
Khawpi etlawm leh uthuai,
Mi zata'n a lelchim theihlouh;
Lungkham puakgik lai ah zong,
Sunchin ka laukha in lunglen hi.
Aw, ka lunglai hon nem pen,
Khawpi vak, etlawm leh nunnopna;
Aw, na sung a lengte tawh,
Lung hon len, ngilh ni om ngeilou ding.
Tuin naubang kap zong leng,
Tangtawn sunni tum ngeilou gam ah,
Ka lungkham luankhi tengteng,
Anbang it Toupa'n a nulhul ding.
Lungkham meipi jing lai ah,
Kei ka hong leng a;
Nopna ni vak a hong liap,
Taikhua val theilou.
Aw vualjawlna ni, hon ngai veng e,
Ka tung ah hong tang in ;
Mial gallian in gawlbang hon umkim,
Hong vak inla, Na tangtawn gam
Nopna pialgal ah tuang hon tun in.
Adam kulsin mial sung ah,
Aw, Na vak ngai in;
Tatna sisan pha vang in,
Malbang hon kou veng.
Simlei lungkham mauna'n dim,
Namchih zata ding;
Aw, Eden sunni tumsa,
Mubang hon ngai veng.
Denchiang a laukha vangkhua
Nopna tun chiang in;
Mial leh simlei pallun teng,
I nuaisiah ding hi.
Tangbang damlai chiaukuam khimjing i leng zong,
Machiang khua nuam Kanan mitsuan jel leng;
Ka kipahman manglukhu hong naita hi,
Kap in nuai simlei ah tam sawt nawn kei ning.
Sawt nawnlou ding damsung lungkham buaina,
Malbang hon kouhna uh ka jak in;
Mangtutphah kim a hon ngaklahna aw un,
"Hehpihte kahna khaubang sau lua," chi uh.
Hambang ka vaihna chiaukuam a sau zong in,
Hon huai Mal Aksi mitmei suan jel le'ng;
Longkhawlna mun siangthou A hon tun ngei ding,
Tua ah vualngaih it khempeuh a kimta ding.
Ka juan jel ding tangtawn huihsiang a lenna,
Vullou heisa pallun e etlawmnou;
Belamnou leh van silpak a lun tawntung,
Sisan vang in aw tuang ka tung ngei ding hi.
Zatam vual gen kham khawpi a ka len chiang,
Nunlui mualliam ding ka ngainawn kei ding;
Tua a suangmanpha Toupa gam jemsakte,
Tullou in tangtawn in a tangden ding uh.

songs.title: Hon Musak In, Na Bawl Salem
songs.author: Patea

lines: Hiai leitung a ka len lai in,
Sunchin buaina in hon bawm;
Khakiakna Jordan gal ka kai ma'n,
Toupa, lungkhamna honglian jel hi.
Mel hon musak in, Na bawl Salem,
Lungtuak angel tuallenna, gibang khenlouhna;
Simlei lungkhamna tuangnung sia'n,
Aw? Bangchikchiang' tuang ka tung ding hiam?
Tang a lungkham huibang maute,
Tua mun tuang a tun chiang un ;
Tuangtung masa leh angel siang tawh,
Aw, Salem Mangpa phat la sa uh.
Aw, kumsawt zaila oihpih din,
Malbang hon kou vualngaihten;
A tongluang lawmnou uh ka jak in,
Aw, tua mun thupi ngai in ka kap.
Mubang ngai veng Immanuel,
Na sat Salem Thak nunnuam;
Ka lenna gamdai ahi, Toupa,
Tuangtun louh lau veng, hon huai jel in.
Lungkham mel himhim omlou ding,
Vanmite tuallenna mun ah;
Simlei lungkham thuak a thumten,
Kahlai bang in Toupa bel uh.
Toupa, tua gamnuam hon donsak in,
Hiai simlei a ka lenlai in;
Lungkham thuak a ka kahnate,
Aw, lungdam in hon thuak ning e.
Aw, tua mun a omsaten jaw,
A khensate uh ngaihlouhna'n;
Damna'n van muantui a dawn ua,
Lou uh pahna nungheilouh pak.
Don jel lehang tua mun thupi,
Angel siang leh Jingsol Aksi ;
Lenkhang khawmui kai lungjuang veng,
Belamnou tuallenna ahi.
Thangvan khawpi tuang ka tun chiang,
Kei zong Toupa'n hon ompih ding;
Angel siangte lai a leng in,
Kumkhua'n Toupa lambang pak ning.
A hon hehpih Limbelh Toupa'n heh hong nem in,
Simlei dougal honglang, lungngaih khimkhua hong jing;
Hambang honghuai ding' hong leng in Laukha,
Nuai simlei gam daidam ah vaibang tham kei ning.
Aw, ka ngaih sawlbang banglou thangvan khawpi,
Gal in don veng, nuai simlei khimkhojinna ah;
Ka ngai semsem etlawm vangkhaw nunnuam,
Sunni bang tang khuambang luah ning,
Tua gam zilja, sisan vang in.
Aw tung kawlva bang hongleng in gam daidam ah,
Hambang vai uh tatsate simlei khimjing ah;
Hambang hon huai in albang mang lou in,
Na sat gam vangkhua loubang tullou tuangtung di'n.
A hon hehpih ka Limbelh leh tangbang damna,
Heh hongnem in lungngai, liangvai, Na tatsate;
Sawnban' hon kai in ka muan Toupa aw,
Nun a nopna sunni bang tang, Na gam nuam ah.
Lengvan gamnuam tuangtung nuam veng hongum Toupa,
Sanggah liangten van Mang lambang pak uh tua ah;
Laitual ngabang len ka nuam Toupa kiang,
Loubang tullou gam vangkhaw nuam thangvan tual ah.
Zaila'n ka awi ding hun mualliamsate,
Sang tamzaw di'n nopna thupi;
Simsenglouh di'n kahna ahi,
Lungkhamsa nunnuam in Toupa mai ah.
Ka mu ding nunlui mualliamsa,
Gelh chiteng ah tuangzong leh;
Gitlouh mial gallian,
Na dikna vang in ka lungkham kei ding.
Eden khimjing nuai ah naubang kap ung,
Na gam thangvan k'ong tun hun chiang;
Ka mawh vuk sang in ngouzaw ding,
I mang Immanuel' gam nunnuam ah.
Hehpihna thak jel ding gam ka don ding,
Hun tuibang kiam, ni hong thakta;
Laukha Siangthou, hon halhsak in,
Pham ngai hon nem in, taikhua vaksak in.
Hon juan veng e, Toupa, Na gam nunnuam,
Simlei khimjing dougal lai ah;
Sawnban' hon kai jel in Toupa,
Nangmah muang in sih sialbang k'on juan hi.
Aw, lungkhamna kei di'n a na lua!
Hon hehpih Toupa'n daibang thengsak in;
Ngilh kei ning Salem Thak gal in don ning,
Haibang ngakla'ng nunnopna pak lutna gamnuam.
Aw, ka ngai khenlouhna gamnuam,
It le-ngaih tengteng tawh nuam a lasa'n;
Nopna gensenglouh i tang ding,
I nopna pen i Hondampa.
Sual meipi jing thenglou ding bang,
Jingsol lemna Mang lian hong nai nawn in;
Nuam in hon juan jel n'ung manna gamnuam,
Mial in hon tuam kimvel kah leh lungkhamna tawh.
Immanuel, kap in hon ngak ung,
Hinna tuipi, simlei ah luangsak in;
Namchih ding Saron pak hoih hon phut in,
Buaina lummei jing nua'h Toupa hon ngak den ung.
Lawmvualte aw, khua hongvak dekta,
Itna gam etlawmtak in hong langta;
Mial nasep pai in vak thuam a ngaita,
Halleluia, ka Mang deihhuai hon ompih in.
Amah tuh a kiang uah A om dia,
Amaute A mite a hi ding ua;
Pathian ngei in A ompih dia,
A mit ua pan khitui A nulsiang ding hi.
Dangtak khempeuhte kiang ah,
Hinna tuikhuk a tui;
A mawk in ka pia ding,
Aw, laukha dangtakte in vadawn uhen.
Sihna a om thei nawn kei ding hi,
Lungkhamnate, kah leh natnate zong;
Tuang hong tung thei nawnlou ding hi,
Thil masate tengteng zong a beita hi.
Ngaidih! Thil bangkim ka bawlthak hi,
Gelh in, hiai simthu jaw gintak huai hi;
"Huan, ka kiang ah tuang hong tungta,
Kei Alpha leh Omega - Abul leh Tawp.
Amasapen leh Ananungpen,
Hinna Sing tung ah thu a nei thei uh;
Vangkhua a lut theihna ding ua,
Tuibang siang a bualte nunnuamta uh hi.

songs.title: Ka Kiang Ah Tengden In, Toupa
songs.author: C.Z. Huala

lines: Sunchin ka kiang ah tengden in aw Toupa,
Kei zong Na kiang a om ka ning lou;
Ka ngaih ni'n tutkhawlna gam hon donsak in,
Zaila sa ning lungkhamna mei jing nuai ah.
Aw, nopna chiaugal tuang ka tun chiang,
Albang daha gibang ka khente ;
Ka Mang' mel liamsa zaila'n oihpih ning,
Tua ah van pialgal pak a lun tawntung ding.
Pakbang vul baih lua i nunnop lai nite,
Aw Kalvari silbang hong pal in;
Zaila'n hon awi nawn ning na pal hon khiah in,
Nunnuam in Gam Siangthou lam hon manawh ning,
Tang a nunnopna pialgal tan mahle hang,
Kalvari ah khua hong vak nawnta;
"Zion Gamnuam a hong nawnta" chi uhi,
I thou ding, nunnopna kawl hong engta hi.
Tuin lungtuak in tua ah sawlbang hei le'ng
Albang dah ni a lawmvual ngaih teng;
Nuam a Toupa mai a zai oihpih hun ding,
Suihlung ka gel chiang' mubang ngai na veng e.

songs.title: Tua Mun Thak In A Lang
songs.author: Patea

lines: Ka thupina ding leh ka bitna mun,
Dougal lauhuai leh launa omlou;
Gamdai apan in ka mu ginna in,
Tua tangtawn gam in hon umkimvel.
Sunchin galdon ning, tuang ka tun mateng,
A hehpihna vak leh lungdamhuai;
Miten tua mun tul ding in gingta zong,
Ka gen theilou ding thak in a lang.
Tua hun hong tun chiang' namteng chi teng in,
A thupina vak tang kimvel a;
Hotdamte mel vak kilawm leh thupi,
A muh chiang un zaw muangta ding uh.
Huan denchiang in A ta anbang itte,
Tangtawn Jingsol Aksi Vak etlawm;
Kei a hong hi uh a omsate tawh,
Tangtawn lungdam la i sakhawm ding.
Ka laukha lungkham leh vakmang kiang a,
Khrist in anbang hon itna thu hing;
A na theihsak phal samtak man in aw,
Halleluia! Ka phat chimlou ding.
Buaina hong theng in, ka gam ka juan ding,
Simlei ah zaw ka kha a muang theilou;
Toupa bawl Salem Thak vadon dih ning.
Aw, phamsa thelbang thawhna sihna zoupa,
Kho siangthou ah tuang hon tun in,
Luipiau kilawm zaw ah;
Buai leh sihna zou in zaila sa ning.
Kap veng aw Toupa, Na mel mulou in,
Suihlung leng in sunni ka tum zoulou,
Zion kulhpi, koilai ah om na hiam?
Pialgal ni vak hoih ka lampi mial ah,
Hong tang in aw, Toupa ka pai siam lou ;
Buai leh han mial in palbang hon nang hi.
Ka damlai ni zaw kulsin ah pel ning,
Hihhang' non ngakna gam ka manawh ding;
Tuipi luang ging daihna ah ka khawl ding.
Albang mang hen simlei chimhuai,
Lawmvual lungtuak kikhenna tawh;
Natna leh lungkhamna khempeuh,
Tangtawn kipah la'n hong tangta hen.
Lungkham buaina om nawnlou ding,
Hondampa tuallenna mun ah;
Simlei buaina thuak nawnlou in,
Aw ka laukha na tutkhawlta ding.
Vuallungtuakten zawhna pak in,
Zion Mangpa lambangpak uh;
Kei zong Jesu tatna vang in,
Ki itna gamnuam ah hon tun in.
"Ngaidih! Ka hong paipah ding hi,
A hun leh ni hong nai zouta;
Tuin thil bangkim a thakta,
Na Toupa' lungdamna ah lut in."
Ni tum ngeilou Zion khawpi,
Ngai in ka mau ka kap sun nichin in ;
Tatsate leng uh silhpuan piandang tawh,
Kei di'n zong mun om hiam tua gam nuam ah.
Ngaina veng e, ngaina veng e,
A mun thupi nibang lunlai sang in;
Anbang hon it Mang Khrist mel etlawmnou,
Mu nuam veng albang dah ka banna ding.
A gam etlawmdan genseng louh,
Sisan in a hongta zalenna gam;
Ka laukha tua gamnuam galdon jel in,
Simlei pallun loubang hong tul ding hi.
Lungdeih Hondampa lenna mun,
Tuangtun louh ding lunglau veng Mang Jesu;
Sisan in hon sil in Laukha in honhuai in,
Mang nunnem' gam pen mah ngaina veng e.
Sisan a loubang N'on khualna,
Khuambang luah a Na pallun zou ding in;
Na vanglian lim sawlbang bel nuam veng e,
Simlei pallun sun naubang awiawi veng.
Kap in mau ngeilou uh,
Buaina nuaisiahta uh;
Van Salem khawpi a,
Ngabang lengte'n.
Khelhna gal nuaisiah uh,
Sihna lau ngeilou uh;
Aw, nuam in zai awi uh hi. D.S.
Aw, khawvel ka et in,
Mialna in tuam tawntung;
Lungkham lusun tate,
Huibang mau uh.
Nun i nopna pallai,
Vul in lenmual khum jel;
Aw, ka gam ka ngai nah e. D.S.
Aw, sisan nang vang in,
Tua khawpi'n heh hon nem
Chiaugal lawmvual ngaihteng,
Kimna gam ah.
Hon na pikai inla,
Angel siangte lai ah,
Aw, zaila sak nuam nang e. D.S.
Don chim la'ng e Na gam, ginna'n a lang,
Tangtawn khawpi, buaina chiaugal lam ah;
Thangvan inn nuam a om.
Aw, Belamnou leh misiangthoute'n,
Kum sang bei nung van vaihawmna mun ah,
Aw tua mun ah zaw lungkhamna leh,
Naubang kahna himhim om ngeilou.
Khua hong om nawn ding in ka lung hon lun,
Zion tang nuam, Hinna Sing leh gam nuam;
Silpak lun in a bawm.
Ka kahna leh ka mauna gam ah zaw,
Don jel lehang mun thupi leh vualngaih,
Lenmual a khupna uh.
Ka it leh ngaih, u le-nau lungtuakten,
Serafim leh angel houlungtuak tawh;
Haibang hon ngak uhi.
Hiai lei chimtak huai khen tung thangvan gamnuam ah,
Ni khattei i tungtou ding;
Lei a nituang paitou tung thangvan gamnuam ah,
Ni khattei i tungtou ding.
I tungtou ding, van gamnuam ah,
Ni khattei i tungtou ding;
Hondampa'n ei adia mun A bawl gamnuam ah,
Ni khattei i tungtou ding.
Lei lungkhamna pel in tung thangvan gamnuam ah,
Ni khattei i tungtou ding;
It-le-ngaih teng kim ding tung thangvan gamnuam ah,
Ni khattei i tungtou ding.
A kilawm kongpi ah Toupa'n hon na tuak ding,
Ni khattei i tungtou ding;
Nuihmai tawh hon na sang ding uh van gamnuam ah,
Ni khattei i tungtou ding.
Hondampa'n ei adia mun a bawl gamnuam ah,
Ni khattei i tungtou ding;
Nuam a leng tawntung ding tung thangvan gamnuam ah,
Ni khattei i tungtou ding.
Ngaina veng aw, Na gam thupi
Dinthak lei a tuang hong tung ding;
Kum sang vaihawmna'ng ni thupi,
Sunni bang hong taangta in.
Tangtawn gam, ka gam thupi,
A ngai in hambang vai veng;
Tangtawn gam, ka gam thupi,
A ngai in hambang vai veng.
Ka Mang vaibang thamsawt lua hi,
Gam luah ding thu la thangvan ah;
Zaisa'n malbang hon kou jel ning,
Lei Zion a nguizouta.
Lei lunmangte kiang' zaw Toupa,
Ka lungkham simthu sut maw'ng e;
Zatam lai ah zong aw Toupa,
K'on ngaih simthu lel maw'ng e.
Aw, hon ngai veng ka Mang nunnem,
Ngilh kei ning tang a Na thuakna ;
Na Laukha in tua hinna thak,
Khawvak ah kei hong pi in.
Ka bualna simlei khimjing a man chiang',
Tung thangvan mite heina munnuam;
Khuambang ka luah ding gam vangkhawnuam ah,
Jesu sisan vang in teng kumkhua ning.
Tatsate tua ah paksil lunlai nou bang,
Silhpuan nem ngiingei duang a bat ;
Simlei ngailou a tuangnungsia'n,
Toupa lambang pak uh aw, Halleluia, chi in.
Toupa' gam nunnuam sunni bang tang ah,
Lawmvual ngaih khensa chiambang nui uh;
Simlei lungkham buaina tuangnung siah in,
Nun khonuam in laitual ngabang leng uh.
Simlei khimjing buaina loubang tulsa,
Lambang kheng a tuangnung siahna ding,
Lambang ka et chiang' ka ngai, aw tua gam,
Ka ngaih puanbang a thak thangvan khawpi.
Ka Jua Thianmang' saupha tunkal ngak la'ng,
Kawlni suahsim lungngaih mei' hon bawm;
Omlaivei ngaihtamsial kah omlouhna,
Mubang ngaiing, Thianmang' saupha nunnuam.
Aw, hambang hon huai, Laukha hong leng in,
Naubang kap heh hong nem aw, Laukha;
Ngaihtam sialna nuai simlei sau daidam,
Tuangnung sia'n leng nuam ing, vangkhua thak ah.
Hondampa lenna Zion gamnuam.
Lailung juan ni in galdon veng;
Leng nuam veng tua mun ah,
Ka lungkhamna nuai simlei zaw,
Sawtlou nung chiang' albang mang ding ahi,
Ka Pa' gam siam ka ngai.
Ka Hondampa nunnem ka ngai e,
A mel mu lou a ka om chiang'
Ka laukha liangvai hi;
Simlei buaina dougal bang lian,
Ka kiang' om tawntung leh ka Mang nunnem,
Banghang' ka lungkham dia?
Simlei gimna thuak a ka mau chiang,
Ka Pa migi in hon en leh
A hon khasiat mah ding,
Chih ka theih chiang' ka lungmuang hi;
Denchiang in A gam ah hontun ding a,
Naubang ka nuita ding.
Simlei a liangvai a mimbang piang,
Hizong lungkham nawn kei ning e;
Ka Pa Mang nunnem in,
Ka lu sawlbang in hong liah hen;
Simlei ah hambang vai in liang zong leng,
Na sisan pha ka muang.
Lungjuanna gam, lungjuanna gam,
Albang manna gam ah ka leng zong in,
Tangtawn Suangpi tung ah ka khawl ding hi,
Mei leh tuilian in a tup phak ngeilouh.
Ka tangtawn inn (2)
Ding a Toupan A bawl piandang leh,
Sana vangkhua tuallai tunkal ngakla'ng;
Lungkham banna ding in.
Jerusalem, Jerusalem,
Toupa inn bawl etlawm ah leng nuam veng;
Aw Van Laukha, hongleng in hong pi in,
Palbang nang la'ng simlei gimhuainate.
Suangmanpha nam kim a kibawl,
Van Mang' Vontawi laitual ngabang lenna;
Ginna'n kei zong tua ah ka khawl ngei ding,
Simlei lungkhamna albang mangta ding.
Tung Pathian sehsa damsung,
Ni tawmchik zang hoih in,
Tuibang kiam a bei zawh ma in;
Thumna in i ngen ding uh,
Aw, tangtawn hin manpha,
Lamzang a damsung zatna ding.
Damsung a ka damlai ni simdan hon sinsak in,
Pilna lungtang ka neihna ding;
Na deihdan nna hon sem a,
Omdan ka siamna ding,
Vualjawlna chiteng hon vuk in.
Mihing damsung mangpah in.
Pak bang in vul pah jel;
Kipak a i nuihlai nite,
Lungkham ni guikhau bang hong sau ding,
Lung in gel in;
Lungmuanna Pa kiang ah ngen in.
Leitung gamdai a paina,
Tuanglam haksa zong leh,
Tung Pathian lungtuak in om in;
Na laukha in thangvan ah,
Tangtawn hin a neihna'n,
Niteng in A min ngaih lou in.
Ginna kha a leng in,
Kalvari mual lam vajuan ve ning;
Ka Toupa kha A phamna mun,
Ka tenna ding tung Salem Thak mu ning.
Ka lei lungkham naubang kah bangta ning,
Pahna pak hoih lutna ka ngaihtuah chiang'.
Kalvari tang tung a,
Sisan luangkhia Hondampa' nak a,
Namchih tuibang a sianna ah,
Aw ka laukha, limnga bang vabual in.
Jerusalem vangkhua
Thak ngoubang a latna dang omlou;
Gal in don ni Kalvari ah,
Ngoubang a lang hon gum Toupa nak ah.
Ka laukha valeng in,
Hongum Toupa kha phamna mun ah;
Nangmah vang a A thuakna hi,
A hon itna sisan ah vabual in.
Damlai chiautui dung leh vai ah,
Ka len laiin aw Toupa;
Na hehpihna banjal in hon huai in,
Van Kanan gam Na sat gamnuam,
Toupa, hon donsak in.
Leng nuam veng aw, Na sat Salem vangkhua,
Angel siang leh lungdeihte lenna;
Gibang khen simthu lel lou uh,
Tua gam nuam ah leng nuam veng aw,
Toupa tuang hon tun in.
Tu'n lungkham naubang kap zong leng,
Lungkham lummei kai khen ah;
Lungdeih gibang khensate nunnuam a,
Toupa lambang pak in mu ni,
Tunkal ka ngaklah hi.
Honhuai jel in, aw Mang Jesu,
Ka lenna gam daidam ah;
Aw Van Laukha, hambang hon huai jel in,
Salem tualnuam a leng ding in,
Toupa, tuang hon tun in.
Toupa, lungkhamna'n dim zongleng,
Nang albang dahte' Toupa ;
Anbang Non itna thute ka theih in,
Lungdam in, zaila'n kon pak ding,
Haleluia, Amen.
Eden lui tuangnung i siahsan gam hi,
Sunchin machiang gal in don veng;
Buaina lummei kai theng ding' a lawm lou,
Naubang kap a sunsawt veina'n lawm.
Aw Eden Thak, mubang hon ngai veng,
Sun nichin in ginna'n ka hon don hi;
Aw tang a ka lawmvual ngaih pai masate,
Naubang nui siausiau in ka mu.
Lungjuan naubang kah ni'n gal in don leng,
Buaina lummei khen gam hong lang;
Etlawm sa'ng e, lungdeihte tuallenna,
Mang Immanuel' gam zilja hi.
Simlei ah zaw nunnop kim ni omlou,
Kap in lungdeih i khen jel hi;
Eden Thak tuallai a ngabang lengte,
Kaplai naubang a nui nawnta uh.
Ngai mahleng zong Na gam k'ong tun ma'n zaw,
Ka kahna'n sunsawt kivei lua;
Na sat gam siangthou tuang hon tun inla,
Naubang kah lai bangta ning.
Gimhuai ka thuak lai in aw Toupa, hong leng in,
Lungkham ka kah in Toupa, hon na dawng in;
Simlei buaina tuipi bang hong lian hi,
Ka ngaihte koilam a taimangta hiam?
Hambang vaiin huibang mau veng e.
Aw, haibang ngakla'ng Lalgam tuangtun ding,
Hong tung henla ngabang leng leng;
Huan Mang anbang itte tawh,
Toupa' anbang itte tawh.
Gimhuai ka thuak lai' thuneihna tang lechin zaw,
Khelhna'n lei a Na belamte a hawljak zou;
Na sawltak Mikael hon sawlkhia in,
Setan nunglehhen in man maita hen,
Ka laukha liangvai sak hi, Toupa.
Gimhuai ka thuak lai in ka kha liangvai zong leh,
Van inn thupi apan Na belamte' aw ja'n ;
Khasiat a Na mite na pikhiak bang,
Khial thuneihna nuai a sal na tangte,
Pikhe ding in Toupa, lemgel in.
Aw, ka nunnopna pen ka haksat thuak kei sang'
Nang na natheih masak ahi, ka kipahna;
Van innpi a om Nang zong khawvel in,
A hon sapkhiak bang in Toupa, Nang zong,
Van innpi ka tunna'ng hon sam in.
A manna tangtawn in a uang sem ding,
A hauhsakna bei ngeilou ding;
Simlei pallun leh thupina,
Albang hong mang ding hi.
Nuai simlei albang mang zong leh,
Toupa'n kei dia mun hong bawlsak;
Lawmvual ngaih leh van angel siangte tawh,
Simlei ngailou a i lenna'ng.
Nuai simlei khen a tangtawn munnuam ah,
Jawlnei, martar, angel siang tawh;
Phaiphuleng ging luang lawmnou tawh,
Toupa lambang pak uh.
Hondampa leh angel siangte lenna,
Aw ka ngai e, khenlouhna gam;
Simlei ah zaw lungkham dahna,
Naubang kahna'n hon bawm.
Zaila'n lambang pak ve ni, i Toupa,
Nuaisimlei albang a mang zong;
Phatna zaila'n tangtawn dong in,
Tawpni neilou ding hi.
Aw, Jerusalem khawpi thak, nuam leh vak kilawm,
Misiangthoute tengteng leh,
Vangliante tuallenna mun ah;
Hondampa i mu ding a,
A thupina i tang ding,
Tung Jerusalem Thak etlawm ah.
Aw, Jerusalem Thak nuam (2)
Misiangthou tengteng leh,
Vangliante tuallenna mun ah;
Hondampa i mu ding a,
A thupina i tang ding;
Tung Jerusalem Thak etlawm ah.
Aw, Jerusalem Thak nuam, nopna khawpi ahi,
Tua a kulhpi etlawm ah,
Tangtawn a vak thupitak ah;
Jawnkhalnate bei ding a,
Bahte khawl tawldam ding uh,
Tung Jerusalem Thak etlawm ah.
Aw, tua tang Jerusalem, khawpi vak leh etlawm,
A thupidante tengteng zong;
Mel i mu kimta ding hi,
A kongzing sana etlawm;
Belamnou in tan kimvel,
Tua Jerusalem Thak etlawm ah.

songs.title: It Leh Ngaih Teng Kim Ding
songs.author: Upa Thansaima

lines: Aw, ka Toupan tenna gam ding,
A sat thak gam nuam ah;
Pahtawina lasa a tualleng in,
It leh ngaih gibang khen om nawnlou ding.
Aw, ngaklah ing Non pikhawm hun ding,
Simlei ngailou a Zion Toupa pak leh,
It leh ngaih teng kim hun ding.
Tua ah lungkham kahna beita,
Khawpi thak nunnuam ah;
Sihna luigal kai chia tenna ding,
A ngai in ka kahlai zong bang maw'ng e.
Denchiang a jingkhua hong vak chiang',
Lungdeihte tualleng ding;
Tua ah Toupa hon telsak sam in,
Simlei ngailou tuangnung siahkal ngakla'ng.
Hun hong tung dia phamsa thelbang,
A hong thou vek ding ua;
Kaplai luai naubang hon nou ding ua,
Thianmang sau nunnuam tuang ka tun chiang in.
Huibang mau' kon ngak, gamthupi,
Hong nai in, Mang Immanuel;
Tung thangvan gam ah ka laukha,
Nuam in a lengta ding.
Aw, nang, ka lenna gam lungmawl,
Na tang tung ah liangvai tate hambang vai ung;
Aw, nang gam minthang, manna pak hoih in a hon bawm,
Nang ngei na hi ka lung hon lun den gam.
Lei haksa a leng ka laukha,
Pak bang in vul tadih zong leh;
Nuamna gam siangthou tun chiang in,
Vulni om nawnlou ding.
Simlei nunnopna pakbang vul,
Lunglen nuachiang ngaih a na hi;
Hambang vaiveng nuai simlei ah,
Sanggah naubang ka kap.
Toupa, Na banjal'n hon huai in,
Na hehpihna tuipi lian ah;
Zion khawpi leh gam siangthou,
Melmu nuam veng, Toupa.
Nuaisimlei ah aw ka Hondampa,
Albang dah in sawlbang hei veng;
Hon huai ve aw, Na tuanglam ah,
Aw ka Mang Jesu.
Phamna chiaugal hon pi kai in,
Kah leh mauna khen gamnuam ah;
Lungdeih gibang khensate tawh,
Nuam in tualleng ja ding.
Albang dah, lusun, luankhi nulna,
Gentheih thuak a ka kahna mun ;
Loubang tul hen nuai simlei jaw;
Lungkham ka kahna.
Aw, ka ngaih Toupa' angsung nuam ah,
Gibang khen simthu lel lou in;
Belamnou ei ding a phamsa,
Zaila'n i awi ding.
Jingdam Solnou, Hondampa, Toupa,
Ka lungsung gilou khimjing ah;
Hong tang in, Na tuanglam siangthou,
Mel ka muh theihna'n.
Toupa sum ka ngaineu hi,
Dangka leh sana zong;
Van gamnuam ka ngaihtuah in,
A sung a ka khawlna'ng;
Na Lalgam lehkhabu ah,
A pek thupi sung ah;
Ka Hondampa hon hilh in,
Ka min a kigelh hiam?
Ka min a kigelh hiam?
A pek ngou leh hoih ah?
Na Lalgam lehkhabu ah,
Ka min a kigelh hiam?
Toupa, ka khelhna a tam,
Chiaului a piaunel bang';
Hizong Hondampa Na sisan,
Kei a din a hun hi;
Na thuchiam gelh ahi a,
Laimal vak selsel in;
"Na khelhnate san zongleh,
Vuk bang in ngou sak ning."
Aw, tua vangkhua etlawm ah,
Inn vak thupitak ah,
Mawhna neiloute laukha'n,
Silhpuan minthang silh uh;
Thil gilou omta lou ding,
Nunnopna hihnin din;
Angel ven vangkhua nuam ah,
Ka min a kigelhta.
He, ka min kigelhta,
` A pek ngou leh hoih ah ;
` Na Lalgam lehkhabu ah,
` He, ka min kigelhta.
Nuai simlei lungkhamna khempeuh,
Pel in kumsawt gam nunnuam ah;
A hehpihna khajak nuai ah,
Ka ngaih Toupa'n hon ompih ding.
On nawnlou ding kikhennate;
Lungkham, buaina, khitui kiak zong;
Ka Hondampa Mang Jesu in,
Ka nulsiang vek ding, A chi.
Hondampa'n vangkhua sat thak hi,
Lungdamna khawpi vak leh hoih;
Tua nunnopna mun thupi ah,
Tangtawn in i tengden ding.
Nunnuam in van angel siang tawh,
Hotdam tate i kikhawm ding;
Kumsawt tangtawn hinna tang in,
Gibang kikhen lau kei ni.
Gal in don ni Kalvari ah,
A lang e, i tenna ding gam;
Van Belamnou tualleng, chi uh,
Tua gam vak thupi mun ah.
Hondampa hon itna vang a,
Kei zong A vangletna tang a;
Tua gam vak a ka len chiang in,
Lambang paklou thei kei ning.

songs.title: It Leh Ngaih Teng Kim Le'ng
songs.author: T. Thangkhum

lines: Suihlung len in siang nuai kidang hi,
Lailung juan heh hon nem ding omlou;
Ka heina paisan ni tuang hong tung dia,
Kahlai bangta ning.
Aw, ka gam ngaih aw,
Silpak jem a jam liai liai;
Sanggah liangvai hambang hon huai in,
Manna gam nunnuam, (2)
Khuambang ka luah ding.
Ava bang in vanjawl jui thei leng,
Thangvan sang ah kha in ka leng ding;
Kalvari tang sing hamsia banna ah,
Va bang in tuang ning.
It leh ngaih teng kim le'ng vangkhua ah,
Lungjuan lai a na a bang ding hiam?
It leh ngaih kim lou, lungjuan lah bang lou,
Kah lah bang theilou.
Lungjuan kidawn chiat ni, lungtuakte,
Thianmang lumsun in tangbang dam ni;
Laukha vangkhua ah laitual leng ja ni,
Simlei tuangnung sia'n.
Ze-et a om lungkham khanak hang e,
Vangtah leh dah tuam kisakna in;
Pathian theiloute nuamsa a mu in;
Banghang hiam chiin theisiam kei hang.
Nungchiang in thei ni, avek in thei ni,
Nungchiang in thei ni, banghang hi hiam?
Halh in, unau nguai ni vak ah leng in,
Nungchiang in thei ni, theisiam vek ni.
Sihna'n i itte a lakmang chiang in,
Innsung dai lua in, thawmhauhuai hi;
Tuabang hun in khialte nuamsa'n i mu,
Banghang hiam chin lamdang sa'n en hang.
"Sihpha'n muanhuai in" hon it Heutu'n chi,
Ni tamlou semgim in ngaklai le'ng;
Sepgim, tawl, lungkham bangma'n ngai kei ni,
Tua kongpi etlawm i lut chiang in.
Jesu thupi a hong pai i muh chiang'
Pengkul ging in itte hon khawm ding;
Tua innpi nuam ah Amah tawh om in,
Theisiam vek ni, i lungkhamnate.
Lung honlen galdon chim la'ng e,
Simlei dahna khen gam;
Damlai lungkhamna lummei jing,
Ka pel ding kahna gam.
Lei lungkham luankhi a hul dia,
Naubang ka kahni bei dia;
Aw Toupa melmuh kal ngakla'ng,
Albang mang hen lei chimhuai.
Kalvari ah hongum Toupa'n
Thangvan dawngkot A hong;
Sihsial bang vajuan in laukha,
Na tangtawn gam a lang.
Ka kahna jan mial a bei ding,
Jordan luigal gam ah;
Aw ka ngaih ka lungdamna pen,
Ngabang a lenna uah.
Aw chikchiang ka tuangtung diam chi'ng,
Tungchiang vangkhua nuam ah;
Sihna luimial ka kan khit chian,
Kahna gam ngai kei ning.
Ni thupi hongtun nading a naita,
Lemna Mangpa leh tatsa lungdeihte'n ;
Thangvan ah khuangpi leh pengkul ging tawh,
Honsam ding uh, tatsa lungdeihte.
Tua ni lung a gel in,
Kimansa in om chiat ni;
Mangtutphah ma a ding ding in,
Toupa' nna i sem chiat ding uh.
Tanglai a Noah damlai hun nite,
Lung in gel unla, siatna taisan un;
I tenna gamlei uh hong mang ding hi,
Namchih Jordan luigal kaita ding.
Tua gam thupi tuang a hongtun chiang in,
Lei a teltuamte hotdam hita ding;
Lungkhamna leh kahnate nuaisiah in,
Hotdam tate tualleng khawmta ding.
Lei a teltuam taten lung in gel un,
Tua gam thupi tuang hongtun nading ni;
Mang tengteng' Mang leh Toupa tungnung pen,
Tangbang damlai' Mang Khrist pahtawi ni.
Kap lou thei hikei veng aw anbang ka itte,
Sulhei ding simthu lah lel nawnlou ua;
Pialgal vangkhua nunnuam tuangtungta uh,
Sulhei ding lellou uh.
Ka kap simlei gam zilja ah,
Mun-in, gam lou a lungjuan ka sial ni'n;
Lenmual khumsa ngai in mau veng,
Thelbang thousak, mubang ngaihlai nite.
Lailung juang veng heh hon nemte sulhei nawnlou,
Naubang ka kah sunkhua sawt e Toupa;
A lenna uh mu nuam veng sakmel tawh,
Angelte dungsun uh.
Zion limbang bel uh ka it, lungdeihte tawh,
Galmuanna tang tung a leng in awi uh;
Haibang ngakla'ng tua gam nuam etlawm ah,
Laitual i lengkhawm ding.
Lei lungkhamna a ka len in,
Mawhna'n ka lungsung a buaisak;
Mawhna simlei a bualsa ka lailung,
Kalvari ah pikik nawn in.
Aw, ka Kulhpi leh ka Mang Na hi,
Hambang hon huai ding hon ngai veng;
Simlei ah lungdamna omlou,
Na kiang ah lailung ka muang ding.
Phamsa ngaih, kah leh mauna zong,
Om nawnlou ding tua gamnuam ah;
Lei lungkham, dahna tuangnung ka siah ding,
Lung ka gel chiang' suihlung juang sak.
Ka lungkhamna leh buaina te,
Kheng a Toupa' siang tun ngakla'ng ;
Liangvai tate nunnopna paksil lun,
Ka limbelh Toupa, Nang Na hi.
Ka lungkhamna nite tam hang in,
Aw, ka Toupa honpi jel in;
Tutkhawlna gamnuam tuang ka tun mateng,
Khelhna gallian ka dou zoulou.
Lummei jing leh khemna kal ah,
Khawlna zong in hambang vaiveng;
Nuai simlei gamdai gamkeu ah,
Ka muh sun zaw lungkhamna kia.
Hinna tulsing ka Hondampa,
Hon khawlsak in Na limliap ah,
Tangtawn pialgal gam nunnuam ah,
Nang di'n heisa bang hong pal ning.
Khemna tangni a salua e,
Khuambang dou la'ng, Nang lou in zaw ;
Lau leh ling kawm in k'on juan hi,
Kei' di'n Pialgal khawlmun Na hi.
Tutkhawl nuam veng Na limliap ah,
Nang lou in zaw tei thei kei veng;
Simlei thupina leh pallun,
Kei' din'n albang manna ahi.
Na kiang a om chim ni omlou,
Hiai nuai simlei gimhuai ah zong;
Ka kiang a sawlbang Na hei leh,
Kei' di'n pialgal paksil a lun.
Van Mang Vontawi Limbelh Toupa'n,
Bulbang A bawl a mizata ;
Nuaijinmang henkol hon bulhsa,
Salbang A hon suah zouta hi.
Aw singta vontawi lelliangte'n,
Lumbang hon sung Toupa Jesu;
Nunnop zaila sa'n lambang pak ni,
Kumsawt guabang hinna honpia.
Zata vontawi albang mangsa,
Limbelh tung Pathian'n itna in;
Kumsawt tangbang damna i nei,
Zaideih awi in lambang pak ni.
Zatam laukha jinmang kaihsa,
Toupa Jesu'n salbang hon suah;
Thanmual suahna hanzai sa in,
Van Mang Vontawi lambang pak ni.
