Van ni nuai a mimbang piang teng,
Phammawh dawh-ai tawi thei omlou ;
Vanmang Vontawi Limbelh Toupa'n,
Khakiak mawhna dawh-ai tawi hi.
Guabang hinna tembang deihte'n,
Khakiak mawhna Jesu juan un;
Kumsawt tangbang damna A nei,
Muanna Toupa vanglian A hi.
Mang pianhun silpak a lunnawn ta,
Selung maimit singzong thelbang thousak ;
Zatam vualgen Beth-lehem tangtung ah,
Ginna'n kha in hon lenkai pih.
Aw, ka Mang nunnem, Nang in hon huai jel in,
Na tun leh Na jua kal a senlai naubang Na kahna
Mun tual ka ngai.
Ngaih a na e, Beth-lehem vangkhua,
Sunni tum kuan lenkawl ah eng singseng;
Bawng inn daidam sung ah ka Mang lelliang,
A tun liang Mari'n a pom hi.
Beth-lehem si-al a tang nawnta,
Eden kulsin dawngkot sung a tanvak;
Halh in thou un, Eden taikhua vakta,
Lungtup gam i juanjel ding uh.
Etlawm sang e, manna gam tulsing,
Ei din Beth-lehem tang a lunnawnta;
Tang a pi leh pute'n a muhphak louh,
Saron pallun zou in i leng.

songs.title: Ka Muanpen Jesu Hong Leng In
songs.author: Chalnghianglova

lines: A manpha e thilhing khempeuh,
Mualchih jem a lunglual in;
Vanmang phat in zaiawi uh lei ah,
Aw Mang thupipen, chiin sa uh.
Aw, Halleluia! Tungnungpen,
Simlei thawmhau leh Na nuachiang gam daidam ah;
Nangmah ngai a bah in a thum uh,
Aw, ka muanpen Jesu hong leng in.
Ka damsung simlei khimjing ah,
Malbang kou ning Hondampa;
Tunkal ngakla'ng hin tawplouhna gam,
Hong vak in tangtawn kumsawt gamnuam.
Tangbang damsung lenkil kia zong,
Ka ngak Kanan vankhawpi;
A hong tang ding sunni tumlou gam,
Kipahna kim ding, manglukhu tawh.
Mang lenna Zion galmuang ah,
Simlei leh thangvan Mangpa;
Halleluia chi a zaisa in,
Angel tawh mangtutphah kimvel in.
Jordan chiaului gei a ding in,
Don veng Toupa' tenna gamnuam;
Kanan gam leh ka tangtawn tenna ding,
Khawlna Pialgal gam a na hi.
Denchiang in tutkhawl ni,
Jesu kiang a khawlna nuam ah;
Belamnou phat a la ngaih ka sak hun chiang'
Nunnopna silpak hong lunta ding hi.
Tua gamnuam ka galdot chia'n,
Tangtawn vak in suihlung hon len;
Lei gimhuai lungkham buaina omlouhna,
Mu nuam veng e hinna gamnuam.
Chikchiang' tuang ka tung sam ding hiam,
Hotdam tate noplenna ah?
Itna Toupa vang a tuang ka tun chia'n,
Simlei gimhuaina ngai kei ning.
Nunnopna'n ka lailung hong dim,
Hinna gam siangthou ka dot in;
Lungkham, lusun, naubang kahna omlou,
Zaila ngaih thupi'n thawn kimvel.
Ka lungkham liangvaihna hiai nuai simlei,
Tangtawn ngoumei kai ngiingiai nuai a,
Vanmite' zaila luangging ka jak in,
Lung hon len, tuang ka tunkal ngakla'ng.
Tua ah lungkham naubang kahna omlou,
Tanpa phat zaila sak tawplou uh;
Nunnuam in hinna siktui siang dawn uh,
Tangtawn gam sunni tum ngeilou ah.
Tua gam nuam mun hing dimdim a leng in,
Itna simthu lel tawp ngeilou uh;
Van semgua, phaiphuleng luang lawmnou tawh,
Itna zaila thupi a lem uh.
Tua mun a it leh ngaih pai masate'n,
Lui gal gamnuam pan malbang hon kou;
Lei lungkham buaina thawmging a zak un,
Amau kiang a teng di'n hon van uh.
Tua munnuam ah kei zong ka tutkhawl ding,
Itna tullou ka Toupa kiang ah;
Bangzahta a nunnopna hi ding hiam!
Tangtawn nunnop tul ngeilou ding.
Mangtutphah tung a Tupa' taklam a,
A sung leh pua a kigelh Laibu;
Chiamtehna sagih a chiamteh ka mu,
Kuamah phel theihlouh, hon theihlouh van
Gam laibu ahi.
Thangvan khua simpi ah vanmi a sim ua,
Mangtutphah kimvel a libang chinna lai ah;
Vanmi in hon gelh tel ding uam,
Hinna Laibu sung ah?
Laibu minthang pen Pathian chiamtehsa,
Tungleng nuailengten phel zoulou hi;
Jawlnei leh angel in zong phel zoulou,
Danial lah lungjing Johan lah lung-
Kham naubang a kap.
Juda nam David suan vualtungtuangta,
Chiamtehna phel ding hong tualsuakta;
Angelte, vantungmi leh a siamten,
Mangtutphah kimkot ah hon khiang uh,
Aw, Haleluia.
Chiamtehna sagihna a phel laitak',
Van khawpi dak kimkhat a daita;
Hinna Laibu a mintuang tengteng zaw,
A khelhna uh Ka thei gige nawn
Ta kei ding A chi.
A vualzoupa puanngou in kijem dia,
A tung ah Ka min thak Ka gelh dia;
Angelte mai leh Ka Pa mai ngei ah,
Angvan in Ka pauhial zaw ding hi,
Chi'n A hon khamuan.
Misi tengteng mangtutphah mai' ding uh,
Minkhumna Laibu hong kihongta;
Sihna laibu leh Hinna Laibu hi,
Si leh hing khenna Van Laibu hi,
Koi ah na kigelh ?
Leitung ka inn hilou,
Ka khualzinna phet hi;
Ka gou manpha a om,
Van dum kiikiai khen ah;
Angelte'n van kongkhak pan,
Khut hon van uhi;
Hiai leitung ah zaw
Nuam ka sa thei nawnlou hi.
Toupa, Na thei,
Nang bang lawm ka nei lou;
Van ka inn hikei leh,
Toupa bang ka lawh dia;
Angelte'n van kongkhak pan
Khut hon van uhi;
Hiai leitung ah zaw
Nuam kasa thei nawnlou hi.
Kei hon na lamen uh,
Hiai ka theichian mahmah;
Hondampa'n hon ngaidam,
Tu'n van juan ka pai hi;
Ka thei, Inn hon tun ding hi;
Hatlou tawk leng zong;
Hiai leitung ah zaw
Nuam ka sa thei nawnlou hi.
Van gam thupitak ah,
Hon it ka nu om hi;
A khut ka let mateng,
Khawl maimai ka tum lou;
A kihong van kongkhak pan,
Aman hon ngak hi;
Hiai leitung ah zaw
Nuam ka sa thei nawnlou hi.
Van gam thupitak ah,
Tangtawn in i teng ding;
Angelte'n kimkot ah,
Vualzawhna la sa hi;
Phatna la ngaih a sak un,
Van pan lei hon thawn;
Hiai leitung ah zaw
Nuam ka sa thei nawnlou hi.
Khros ah sisan manpha a om,
Khros siangthou ka mu hi;
Tua sisan Jesu'n hon theisak,
Kei dia tang a luangpen.
Aw sisan thupi penpen,
Jesu'n A thuakna hi;
Khros tung ah sisan manpha luang,
Ginna in ka muta.
Khros aw, tua Khros gik mahmah pen,
Jesu'n kei ding in pua;
Lungkham tak a A thuakna pen,
Kalvari ah nga hi.
A jang nadiam tua Khros manpha?
Tua Khros ken enchim la'ng;
Ka pua kang zou tei ding hiam aw,
Pang ning Manglukhu om.
Tua Manglukhu thupi penpen,
Vualzoute Manglukhu;
Van ah Jesu ka muh chiang in,
Ken zong khu samta ning.
Ka khitui luang nawnlou ding hi,
It tawplouhna mun ah;
Leitung pan kei hon pikhia in,
Pahna mun hon tun in.
Mimbang hong piangta lei ah, Van Mangpen,
Angelten pahtawi uh pahla thupitak in;
Tungnung pen ah thupi hen aw,
Lei mihing di'n lemna leng hen, chi uh.
Aw, thangvan angelten zai hon awi,
Beth-lehem vangkhua honthawn e;
Nunnop lasak thangkimvel te'n,
Immanuel Lunmang tungnung pen hen aw, chi uh.
Lemna Mang siangthou pen A hong piangta,
David suan Aksi vak hoihpen tangtawn a om;
Kumsawt Lunmang A hiden ding,
A min limlian tangtawn in phat ding uh.
Aw, angelte'n zai hon awi nawn le uh,
Beth-lehem vangkhua daidam a ka lenlai in;
A ging lawmnou uh leh thawmging,
Ka lungsung uah tangtawn in thamden hen.
Chiamsa Mang Immanuel,
Adam suante khelh man in;
Van thupi suangmanpha gam nusia'n,
Judia gam, Beth-lehem ah,
A pianna'ng mun awng lou zong,
Beth-lehem gankuang ah hong jal hi.
Nunnuam in la sa ni,
Hon Tanpa hong piangta;
Halleluia, Amin ngaih phat ni,
Leitung ah lem leng hen;
Namchih mi zata ding;
Ei di'n nuntakna A hontun hi.
Simlei Kumpi tam piangta,
Lei inn nuam thupi sung ah;
Endih, Mang' Vontawi pianna bawng inn,
Aw ka kha, na Mang ahi;
Vazong inla, gankuang ah,
A tun Mari'n nou hiauhiau in pom.
Kumpi Kaisar minkhum lai',
Belamching kiang' angelte,
Toupa' thupina tawh hong pai in;
"Lunglau lou in ngaihdih ua,
Tangthu Pha tuang k'on tun hi;
Hondampa hong piangta e, " chi uh
Toupa aw, ngailou na hiam,
Suangmanpha khawpi tualnuam ?
Tuangnungsia a gankuang a N'ong jal;
"Aw, ngai ing thangvan gamnuam,
Hizong na mawhna hang leh,
Nang itna vang a hong thuak hi'ng e".
Hondampa mimbang piang ei ding' lungdamhuai hi;
Lailung ka sial in thangvan mite'n,
Anbang a it uh Toupa, gibang khenna'n zai awi.
Na von khat tawi nunnopna tengteng tuangnung sia'n;
Lungkhamna thuakvuallouh N'ong thuaksak.
Ngaihkhua non tuahna Toupa, kuatan lel zou ding hiam?
Aw Toupa, kou ding a Na Ta, Na it mah mah,
Beth-lehem bawng inn a N'ong piansak,
Hehpihna a kim Toupa, tangtawn in Nang Na hi.
Hondampa mimbang piang, koikuam sawlbang hei hiam?
Beth-lehem bawng inn daidam sung ah,
Sangbang zong di'n khaubang chiah'n, hon gum Toupa kiang ah.
Vazong in, ka laukha, na Toupa mimbang piang,
Hambang hon huai ding Toupa ahi;
Angel' ven thangvan vangkhua tuang hontun ding Pa hi.
Thangvan tuang hontun ding van Mang' Ta genthei in;
A nunnopna phat in nuamsa ding;
Lunglai ka sial chiang in aw ka nunnopna pen hi.
Mang lungkim kum, hun kipahhuai,
Tuin i tungnawnta;
Don jel ni e, Beth-lehem tang tung a,
Vanmi'n la hon sakna.
Aw nang Beth-lehem vangkhua hon ngai veng e,
Na tang tung a Pipa van Aksi vak;
Kap in hong zongjel ning e aw,
Ka Mang' pianna leimun genthei pen.
A ngailou om ding hiam tua mun,
Toupa mimbang pianna;
Kaisar manlai sunni sakkai nuai ah,
Ka Mang naubang A kap.
Hong en ve ua, angelte aw,
Khiaklah Vanmang Jesu ;
A hong tungta genthei tate nopna,
Pak in lawm chiat ve ni.
Tamlai ve ua, belamchingte,
Gamdai nusia lou in;
Lungkham louhna aksi khen gamnuam ah,
Denchiang in lengta ni.
Nuai simlei ah Kumpi tampi hong piangta hi,
Hizong Kumpi Khris bang hong piang ngei nailou hi;
Vanmang' Ta hong piang Manglukhu hon khusak di'n,
Thangvan mi teng inleng hon kipahpih sam un.
Nunnuam in lungdam ni, Vanmang Ta pahtawi ni,
A pianna kipahpi'n leitung zaila'n dim hen;
Vanmang Ta hongpiang Mang lukhu hon khusak di'n,
Thangvan mi teng in leng hon kipahpih sam un.
Vanmi simsenglouhte'n pahtawi la hong sa uh,
Aw kilawm in hon thawn belamchingte'n ja uh;
Kumpi Khris pianna mun teltak in va hilh uh,
A belam uh nusia'n Mang chibai vabuk uh.
Suahlam mipilte'n zong namtui tawi in juan uh,
Tung thangvan aksi vak in a ma uh pijel;
A tun liang Mari pomlai naungek va mu uh,
A goubawm uh hong in Mang chibai vabuk uh.
Kumpi Herod in a theih in lungjingpih hi,
Mipilte hem in dong e, chibai buk nuam in;
Sepaih lauhuai teng khawm Judia gamsung teng ah,
Chibai bukna mulkimhuai pedin kuanta uh.
Aw Jesu, tunin kou lungsung bawng inn sung ah,
Hong piang thak nawn in ka tangtawn Kumpi ding un;
Ka khut sanggah uh Na tun Mari khut hi hen,
Tangtawn in kipak in nunnuam tawntungta n'ung.

songs.title: Lem Leng Hen Chi'n Zai Awi Uh
songs.author: Kamlala / Patea

lines: Ngaidih, a thawmging uh kilawm,
Ni thupi hong tung pak in;
Leitung gilou khemna lai ah,
Lem leng hen, chi'n zai awi uh.
Tungnungpen ah thupi hen aw, (2)
Chi in semgua ging lawmnou tawh;
Lem leng hen chi'n zai awi uh.
Tang a Aigupta gam bang in,
Jubili tuang a hongtung;
Tungnungpen ah minthang hen aw,
Salem thak kongkhak Hongpa.
Melmak gam vangla singdang hi,
Henkol sutpa pahtawite;
Tangtawn lemna Mangpa phat in,
Lem leng hen chi'n zai awi uh.
Etlawm sa'ng e silhpuan minthang,
Sunni bang a tang mel tawh;
Silhpuan minthang duang a bat in,
Lem leng hen, chi'n zai awi uh.
Hong lel ve ua angelte aw,
Thangvan Mang Immanuel;
A mangtutphah tuangnungsia a,
Mawhnei ei dia hong tualkum.
Nibang tang hen i kungtung uah,
Chiamtehna Jingdam Solnou;
Khua vannuai ah lungtuak simthu,
Leng hen chi'n zai oih pih ni.
Lunglau lou in ngaihdih ve ua namchih ta' ding,
Tangthu Pha lungdamhuai mahmah tuang ka hon tun;
Tuni'n David vangkhua ah Hihdamtu hong piang,
Mang Khris, na chiamteh theihna ding un,
Gankuang ah na mu ding.
Toupa mimbang pianna aw,
Mubang ngaina veng e;
Belampute tawh ton nuam in,
Beth-lehem tang tung ah;
Naungek silhpuan a tuam in,
Tong hon dawng thei hileh;
Bubang A bawl Zion khuapi nuam,
Lunglai in ngilh lou ding.
Tang a nun i nopna pak namtui a thengta,
Hizong ka Toupa'n Zion pak etlawm hon khiah;
Gamdai in zong zai hon awi hen, "Hosana" chi'n,
Van ni nuai gamteng ah nunnopna,
Lungtuak simthu leng hen.
Tang a silpak lunte nuam un, van Hosana,
Jawlnei gensa bang in Zion dawngkot honhong;
Van khawpi di'n lungkham buai leh luankhi nulna,
Hizong ei di'n phaijang nichin pak hoih,
Hong paklun nawnta.
Eden khua mual a lun nawnta, dougal thengta,
Nopna gimlim leh van la ngaih hong thang kimvel;
Nunnuam in lambang pak ve ni, Mang lelliangthei,
Anbang hon it man vangkhua tualnuam,
Tuangnung hon siata hi.
Beth-lehem ah Lemna Kumpi hong piang,
Tua mun gam laizangpen Kanan gamnuam;
Namchih A kiang tun theihna ding hong bawl,
Tua ah hinna damtui siang a luang hi.
Aw, nopna ni thupi Beth-lehem tang tung ah,
A hong piangta, michih ading in;
Lei leh van a mite in Amah pahtawi chiat ni,
A phatna la ngaih nuam in kikoupih ni.
Phalbi jan sawt leh vuk dai kai lak ah,
Belamchingte'n belam a chin lai un;
Jankhang in Gabriel in hong veh a,
Hinna, damna thupha tuang hon tunta.
Suahlam mipil leh Belamchingte'n zong,
Lemna kumpi hong piang chibai buk uh;
Aw ka kha, zong jel in hon Tanpa zaw,
Hambang A vai nangmah mawhna hang in.
Vanlaijawl ah simseng louh van angel,
Ngoubang hong lang, van zaila hon sa uh;
Tungnung pen ah Pathian thupi henla,
Leitung ah lungtuak simthu leng hen chi'n.
Belamchingten Beth-lehem hon juan uh,
Phaksap tuanglam piandang muh louh apan;
Suahlam mipilte'n zong chibai hong buk,
Mang leh Kumpi'n leng goubawm a hong uh.
Lemna Mangpa hong piang Beth-lehem ah,
Huai mun gam laizangpen Kanan gam nuam;
Mang Vontawi Hondampa vaendih ni,
A tun Mari'n nou hiauhiau in pom hi.
Kanan gam nitum kuan ka et chiang in,
A kap gankuang sung ah i Hondampa ;
Amah pahtawi di'n kuamah hong pailou,
I pai ding uh Amah pahtawi ding in.
Kumpi pianni'n tung leh nuai nunnuam hen,
Phatna zaila'n lei leh van hon thawn hen;
Mangpente' Mang, thianmangte' tung Thianmang,
Namchih mija'n lambang pak ni, Toupa.
Thupha angelte' hon puak ngaidih ua,
Phatna zaila'n thangvan a thawn kimvel ;
Leitung a Mang thak hong piang lambang pak un,
Leitung ah muanna a hong tungta hi.
Beth-lehem a Nau hong piang pak un,
Namchih mi ja'n Amah pahtawi hen;
Tu'n nunnuam in lambang pak ve ni,
Mang Vanglian pen, Halleluia, chi in.
Van si-al thupiin tuanglam tanvak in,
Suahlam mipilte ma a kaihsak lai;
A mai a kun in khangsum bang bia uhi,
Lemna Mang a piang, dahna a beita.
Aw, hun kipahhuai ah Amah phat ni,
Zaila'n pahtawi ni, ging kilawm teng tawh;
I aw neihsun teng in phat la i sa ding,
Vakna hong tungta mialna beita ding.
Mang pianni lenmual khumsa,
A hong tung nawnta;
Beth-lehem ngaihna tulsa,
Lungsung ah hong thak nawn;
A kipahpih angelte' lasak,
Ka lungsung ah tamden hi,
Ngilhni om nawnlou ding.
Tungnung pen ah, (2)
Pathian thupi in om hen;
Tungnung pen ah, (2)
Pathian thupi in om hen;
Amen, Amen;
Pathian thupi in om hen,
Amen.
Aw, nang Beth-lehem khawpi,
Na etlawm tungtuang;
Na min ngaih vansin nuai ah,
Aw a tul ngeilou ding;
Na sung a Van Mang Vontawi hong piang,
Tun liang Mari in a pom,
A min Immanuel.
Khrismas ni a hong tun chia'n,
Beth-lehem ka ngai ;
Muh nuam veng singkhual inn a,
Van Mang' vontawi hong piang;
Thangvan Aksi vak in honpi hen,
Beth-lehem khua daidam ah;
Lunmang hong piang lawm ding.
Immanuel pahtawi ding',
Mipilte hong pai;
Gou manphate hon tawi in,
Immanuel hong pia;
Ei' Hondampa mimbang hong piang hi,
Simlei miteng in pak hen,
Halleluia, Amen.
Aw, nopna Khrismas, na pal kon zou lai un,
Lenkum kivei mualliam jui ding in ;
Hon khenlah ung e, tuangnung non siahsan ding,
Hon phal nai kei ung.
Tutkhawl in, khawl lai in,
Hon ngai ung, khawl lai in;
Lia leh tang in hon phallou gibang khen ding,
Aw, nopna Khrismas.
Lenkum mualliam ding jui louthei ding hi ke'ng,
Ni tamzaw tam theihna piak omlou;
Na nopna pak uh tuin mualliam ding hi'ng,
Damtak in chibai.
Ka hong kihei nawn chiang',
Kimu nawn ngei ding in;
Vualzawlna thak tawh nunnopna zou nawn ni,
Damtak in chibai.
Leitung pianchil pan Van Mang' na gel bang in,
Gibang khen louthei i hikei maw!
Na la ngaih lawmnou ka lungsung uah tham hi;
Aw nopna Khrismas.
Pathian in hon veng hen,
Kimu nawn ngei ding in;
Na chiam vualzawlna tawi in hongpai nawn in,
Damtak in chibai.
Ka khelh man in Van Mang' Vontawi siangthou,
Lei ah hong tualkum;
Simlei mijata min a gelh lai un,
Beth-lehem bawng inn sung ah hong kisial,
Kei ka hinna di'n. (2) D.S.
Namchih mija ding' Hondampa Toupa,
Mimbang hong piangta;
Thangvan mite'n pahtawina la sa uh,
Tungnungpen a Thianmang thupi hen aw;
Chi in hon gen uh. (2) D.S.
Aw A min Lamdang, Lemgelsiam, Toupa,
Lemna Mang ahi;
Lungtuak simthu leng hen, simlei tung ah,
Suahlam mipilte'n zong a hon zui uh;
A gam bei lou ding. (2) D.S.
Beth-lehem ah taikhua hong val,
Simlei mi kisimpi in;
Tua ah Lemna Mang hong piangta,
Lei mi in a sim ding uam?
A phatna aw ging ngai un,
Angelte' zaila luangging;
"Tungnungpen ah thupi henla,
Lei ah lem leng hen," chi uh.
Gitlouh saltang liangvaite leh,
Sihna lim a tute ding';
Pialgal sunni etlawm hong tang,
Simlei khimjing hon tanvak.
Hong tang nawn in Jingsol Aksi,
Thangvan vak tawh hon zom in;
Aw Vak, paitou kon phat la tawh,
Thangvan Mang' lungsim sun in.

songs.title: Kumpi Kaisar A Man Lai In
songs.author: Rokunga

lines: Kumpi Kaisar a man lai in,
Khawvel kisimpi in;
Chial kimvel hi namchih vontawi
Lenkum vei mualliamta.
Aw Beth-lehem mubang ngaiveng,
Belamchingte tuallenna;
Serafimte nunnop zaisakna,
Ka Mang pianna mun na hi.
A liangvai hi Van Mang vontawi,
Gankuang sung a hong jal ;
Mimbang hong piang Mari' vontawi,
Bawng inn daidam sung ah.
Tungnungpen ah thupi hen aw,
Vannuai namchihta ding;
Nuai simlei ah lem leng hen aw,
Lemna Mang A piangta.
Jesu, ka kiang uah hong teng in,
Jankhua a sawt zong in;
Nuam in taikhua hong val pih in,
Na min lambang pak ding.
Nunnuam in lambang pak ve ni,
Lemna Mang A hong piangta;
A mangtutphah leh manglukhu;
A misiangte tuangnung sia'n;
Khial a vakvai eite khempeuh,
Hotdamna lampi hong hilh;
Pahtawi un namchih, pau namkim in,
Mangpen pahtawi chiat un.
A phatna dai nawnlou ding,
Leitung bei hun dong in zong;
Niteng, kumteng A phatna,
Uangsem ding tangtawn dong in;
Lei leh van a bei dong in,
Angel siang tawh i phat ding.
Bawng inn niam a hongpiang in,
Gankuang jalna in a neizong;
Amah Vanglian ahi, A gam in bei ni nei ngeilou ding;
Suah, tum, sim leh mal a mi chih,
Sihna limnuai a omte,
A manna phat in ni teng, kha teng,
Kumteng in pung ding uh.
Eden huan a Setan in, I manglukhu hon laksaksa,
Tuin i Mang Jesu'n vualzou in, hon pekik nawnta hi;
Huaiziak in nungak tangval,
Atek akhang leh mi teng in;
Mangpente' Mangpen pahtawi un,
Tuipi thangvan mau bang in.
Lei a simsenglouh mite leh van angel simsenglouh tawh,
Aw Toupa, Na hon itna thukdan,
Sandan, letdan, saudan,
Na Ta neihsun zong hawi lou a,
Kou dia N'ong piaktak ziak in,
Aw neihsun tawh theihtawp suah in,
Tuin lambang hon pak ung,
Jawlneite genkholh Kumpipa Messia,
Kaisar' ni thupini in A hong piang;
Kumpi thak lungdamhuai, phat ni phat un. (2)
Van angel siang leh belamchingte,
Mipil hongpai vangla pan in;
Tung si-al leh misiangthoute'n,
Nunnuam in Kumpi thak piang, chi'n hong hilh.
Lunmang teng Mang bang in A piang na'm maw,
Beth-lehem bawng inn niam sung ah hong piang,
A min Piandang, Lunmang phat ni, phat un. (2)
Angelte'n khenna'n zaideih hon awi uh,
Mihingte kiang' lemna leng hen, chiin;
Khris, Lemna Mang, Vanglian, phat un, phat ni. (2)
Hotdamna dak Mang, Jubili aw in,
Lei leh van gam teng a thawn kimvel hi;
Mang Immanuel hi, nuam un, nuam un. (2)
Eden huan a pi-le-pu lungmawl man',
Khelhna leh sihna'n vai a hawm;
Sihna khajak khimjing nuai ah,
Simlei miza huibang mau uh,
Hondampa piak chiam ngaklah in.
Haleluia, Amen, Amen,
Thangvan itna si-al mel hong langta;
Nunnuam in ka kha, zaila sa in,
Albang mangsa van Pialgal ah,
Aw, hong pikik nawn ding.
Mang lunggulh Tanpa A hong lat ni ding,
Abraham, Mosi, David te'n,
Ngai in vangla pan galdon uh;
Ginna'n a Hondampa uh ni,
Mel a mu in nunnuam uhi.
Van itna pakkhu si-al mel etlawm,
Jui in, ka kha, lunglau lou in;
Sihna'n a kha hon jakkhum ding,
Khelhna dougal a hong lian ding,
Hizong bittak in honpi ding.
Khial a siamlouhtan ding ka lau nawn kei,
Mang sisanpha ka gin vang in;
Thangvan itna tuipi kiching,
Kalvari a hong luangkhia in;
Ka kimvel in a hon tuam hi.
Jankhang lai a belamching,
Beth-lehem pawnlak a giakte,
Thangvan thawmging in hon phawng;
Ngai ding in a thou uh.
Nopna huihkhi hong lang hiauhiau,
Angelte' tongluang ging in;
Michih adia pahtawitak Mang,
Khris pianna thu hong gen in,
Leitung ah lem leng hen.
Van Mang' Ta va endih ua,
Beth-lehem bawng inn niam sung ah;
A tun liangvai Mari in,
Gankuang sung ah jalsak.
Tung Si-al a hong tang singseng,
Gankuang laikhun tungjawn ah;
Suahlam mipilte'n hon jui uh,
Goubawm manpha hon tawi in,
Mang chibai hong buk uh.
Hiai ahi thangvan thugil,
Nam chih, chi chih tatna ding in;
A khut leh khe a kilh in,
A nak ah sun ding uh.
Hinna siktui in hong luang dia,
Aw, Kalvari mual tung ah;
Huan, leitung ah hong luang jak dia,
Jawlnei thugenkholh bang in,
Namchih hihdamna di'n.
Eden pallun loubang tulsa thaksak ding',
Khawvel Hondampa hong piangta e;
Pialgal nun etlawm hong silhsak nawn theihna'n,
Mang tungnungpen in mun niampen A hong tel.
Pahtawi ve ni, Lemna Mang A hong piang,
A phatna'n simlei, thangvan thawn hen;
Hibang zah a lungdamhuai Kumpi ei ding',
Piang ngeilou, piang ngei nawnlou ding tangtawn in.
Tang a mite'n a muh nopni lungdamhuai,
Mu lou in sang tampi'n mualkhumta;
Mang' lungkim kum hun lungdamhuai hotdamna,
Eite'n i tan tuanzaw i hampha ngei e.
Tuma' tunung khua vannuai singta lai ah,
Hondampa ding singdang pianglou ding;
Tang a misiangthou Simeon dungsun a,
Mu a lungdampihte hamphapen hi uh.
Lei leh van a simsenglouh zatam lai ah,
A hoih tungnung pen hi Hondampa;
Israelte'n nial a hon paihkhiaksa uh,
Van Mang gou, pialgal Suangmanpha ka neita.
Gam siangthou a Mang mimbang piang,
Tungchiang si-al in a juan jel a;
Mipil Amah hon zongtute'n zong,
Si-al maimit suan uh;
Kei zong tua si-al vaklam juanjel in,
Mang pianna mun niam Beth-lehem hon tun ding.
Aw Beth-lehem tang ka tun mateng,
Tutkhawllou in juan ning;
Tung si-al tang in honpi jel ding a,
Mari pomlai naungek mel in ka mu ding.
Tangtawn Salem kongkhak thupi,
Eiding in A hon hong nawnta hi;
Albang manna gam a lengsate,
Vankhua hon luahsak hi;
Nuam in zaisa ni Mang thak hong piangta,
Tangtawn la kilawm in simlei hon thawn hen.
Mang thak lungdampih lou om diam,
Van mipite'n gibang honkhen uh;
A ngaiin vangkhua a dai zouta,
Kap in lei galdon uh;
Tangtawn si-al in zong hon jui jel a,
A pianna Beth-lehem tang a hon tunta.
Aw, tu'n ei zong khaubang chiah in,
Mun daidam lam vazuan jel lehang;
Lei lunmangte'n Amah dou mahleh,
Simlei mizata'n zong,
Ken zaw ka mang deih lailung hon nempa,
Lungkham albang dahlai' zong hon ompih ding.
Mang pian hun lungdamhuai i tung nawnta,
Nunnuam a zaisa'n lambang pak ni;
Sihna mial nuai a tute di'n,
Khovak thupi hong tungta,
Halleluia! Nuam in la sa ni.
A min Piandang, Lemgelsiam, Toupa,
Tangtawn Pa, Lemna Mang thupi hi ;
A gam in bei ni nei ngeilou ding,
Zil in zajel ding tangtawn dong in.
Tuin Beth-lehem khopi manawh in,
Ginna kha a leng in vajuan le'ng;
Tun liang Mari pom lei leh van
Mang liangvai mel i mu dia;
I neih gou manpha teng pevek ni.
Ginna'n galdon veng ka tungchiang vankhua,
Lemna Mang vontawi mimbang pianni'n;
Khenna'n zaideih awi uh,
A tongluang ginglawm un simlei leh
Ka tung thangvan sang a thawn kimvel.
Hon tanpa Mangpen thak mimbang hong piang,
A min Mang Khris Immanuel hi;
Hosanna tungnunpen ah,
Thupitak in omta hen aw,
Lungtuak simthu leng hen, simlei ah.
Lungdam ni thupitak hong tang,
Jan khua mialna lenkil ah kia;
Lei Beth-lehem daidam A ngak,
A min jaw Mang Immanuel.
A tungnung, A tungnung,
Tungnungpen Mang thupi;
Hiai lei ah tangtawn in,
Lem leng hen, Halleluia.
A mel in simmawhhuai mahleh,
Leitung leh Van Mangpen ahi;
Leilunmangte'n dou mahle uh,
A gam hongja semsem ding hi.
Vannuai kawlmong pha'n hong thou un,
Semgua leh phaiphuleng thuah in;
Tungnung pen ah thupi hen aw,
Chi in angel zai oihpih ni.
A tagah leh A manna om,
Lei Beth-lehem leh thangvan ah;
Lungsung dawngkot na hon lehang,
Gou dang bangmah ngai nawn lou hi.
Kumpi David suan Aksi vaktak in,
Beth-lehem a tanvak a,
Vakna thu phuang in a genkim vel ua;
"Tungnung pen ah thupi hen aw" chiin.
Tungnung pen ah thupi hen, chi in sa uh, (2)
Zaila'n phuang uh van Angel mipi te'n,
"Lungtuak simthu leng hen" chi'n zai awi uh.
Belamchingte'n belam a ven lai un,
Mang' sawltak thupipen in,
Beth-lehem ah hihdamtu A hong piang,
Amah kiang' hongpai un, chiin gen uh.
Tungthangvan mipite galdon dih ua,
Mang Khris gibang khen niin;
Galdot uhi thangvan pan nuai simlei,
"Tungnung pen ah thupi hen aw " chi uh.
Mial in lei a tuam laiin,
Van vak in simlei a sun;
Thangvan zaila ngaih hong ging,
Lem leng hen, chi in sa uh.
Tungnungpen ah Pathian tuh,
Thupitak in om henla;
Leitung a mihingte kiang'
Lem leng hen, chi in sa uh.
Puanngou vak thupi silh in,
Beth-lehem pam pawnlak ah;
Hondampa mimbang hong piang;
Pahtawina la thak sa uh.
Vanmite lenmual khum a;
Thangvan sang a kai nung un;
Belamching selung juangte'n,
Beth-lehem daidam ngak uh.
Nou vanmite aw, kou zong,
Belamchingte mah bang in;
Lei ah lem leng hen, chi in,
N'on sakpih kei ding ua hiam ?
Hosana! chi jel in aw, Halleluia Amen,
Mang Khrist A hong piangta e, Beth-lehem khua ah;
A tongdam luang hehpihna, namchih damna ahi,
Nunnuam in kikou ni, 'Hosana' chi in.
Aw, Beth-lehem tang tung ah,
Tangtawn taikhua hongval e,
Gen kimvel dih ua;
Kuapeuh in tua hinna vak kipahpih a muangte'n,
Lungkham, kah leh buaina, thuak nawnlou ding uh.
Lamdang in thupina e, eite Lemna Mangpa,
Kiitna a luangsak hi, simlei zilja ah;
Khelhna pan i taikhiak theihna ding a hong hi a,
Itna gam Kumpipa hi i Mang Jesu.
Pa hun chiam a hong tungta, ei di'n damna ahi,
Kiitna a luanglet e, Kalvari mual ah;
A lamdan dan kuan gen thei, simlei miza aw in?
A itna gam ah Aman tuang hontun ding.
Zion thupina Mangpa, mangthang eite hong zong,
Thangvan mite'n phallou zong, khou zoulou uhi;
Bangkim a bangkim tung ah Mangpen hen aw, Amen;
Anbang hon itna kuama'n nial theilou hi.
Lenkum kivei nunkhua nuam leh hun hoih,
Tanglai suak maita ding maw?
Bangteng ka gelkholh chia'n,
Lailung juan kidang veh.
Na pammaih, na pammaih,
Aw, hun leh kumlui mualliam;
Na sung ah namchih vontawi ngabang leng ung,
Tangbang damlai sungkim nite tawh.
Nunnop loubang tul jel aw mi tampi,
Nunnopna pakbang hong vul;
Namchih ta'n hun mualliam,
Ngaih na i sa lawmlawm.
Khouh theih hileh lungdam hun khou nuam veng,
Lenkil ah hong ke diam ua;
Nunlui ngai a hei in,
Tanglai, i chi vungvung.
Hun leh kumlui mualliam ngilhni om diam?
Simlei tung vanni nuai ah;
Lun leh mang mizata,
Limnga bang a bualna.
Kum lui mangta, ni leh kha, kum kidangta,
Tujing kum thak ni eng singseng suak;
Jalna laikhun pan juangthou un nunnuam in,
Nunnuam in pahtawi ni ninou vak hoih tawh.
Hong un, hong un, Toupa lambang pak ni,
A hehpihna mangngilh thei kua hiam ?
Kumtawn a tangbang dam a hon chingpa hi,
Tangtawn, tangtawn A min thupi tawntung hen.
I it leh ngaih lawmvual khaubang chiahsate,
Tu'n van gam nuam ah ngabang leng uh;
Bangdi'n a ngai huibang i mau diam lei ah,
Kumtawn a honchingpa Pathian pahtawi un.
Lungdamna simthu leh sepgah hontawi un,
Tuin Pa A hong e, vualjawl di'n;
Hondampa'n na mawh kiphuanna A ngai nuam,
Kumtawn a na mawhna phuang in, tawpsan in.
Kum lui mangpha khak, kum thak phat la sa ni,
Aneu-alian kuapeuh hong pai un;
Pa' vualjawlna tangloute kisik ding uh,
Nunnuam in pahtawi ni Toupa Hondampa.
I ngak kumthak lungdamhuai hong tungta,
Nunnuam in zaila'n pak ni;
Nunlui ngaih phatuamlou,
Machiang don zaw ve ni.
Hon phat ung, hon pak ung,
Nang hun leh kum thak deihhuai;
Lei mite di'n na pak hoih khempeuh suah in,
Nunlui ngaihnawn louh na'n simlei ah.
Dah leh lusunte dia loubang tulsa,
Kum thak mel a i muh ah -
Mihingte hong piang in,
Bangkim hong thak nawn hen.
Vualjawl kum zatam albang man nua'n,
Jesu' hon itna i tang;
Namchih di'n hun manpha,
Lenkawl ni a hong suak.
Hun leh kum silhpuan bang hong thak nawnta,
Simlei tung vanni nuai ah;
Lun leh mang mizata,
Limnga bang hong bual ding.
Hun leh kum albang mang jel,
Nun i nop lai niteng tawh;
Jangni pal leh nuai simlei pallun,
Kei' di'n lungkham kahna mun leh gam ahi.
Aw, i tangtawn khawpi gal muanna mun,
Ngaina veng e, tatsate tuallenna mun,
Lungkhamna leh lungdonnate,
Om nawnlou dia kahna a beita ding.
Nuai simlei lungkhamna leh
Luankhi in palbang hon nang;
Gamkeu-gamdai huibang ka mauna,
Lambang kheng in itte tawh leng nuam ing e.
Nun i noplai pakbang vul,
Nuai simlei pallun teng zong;
Simlei nopna loubang tul jeljel,
Loubang tullou kumsawt gamnuam ngai nang e.
Heh hong nem ve aw, Toupa,
Khapham lusun, liangvaita;
Hon huai ve aw, Na lenna gam ah,
Buaina gam nuai simlei ka ngai nawn lou ding.
Hon it hon huai Toupa Jesu,
Namchih zata'n lambang pak ni;
Tangbang damlai tual lengja ding,
Toupa'n hon itna'n lumbang honsung.
Lambang pak ni i jua tung Thianmang,
Lumbang A hon sunna vang in;
Gibang khensa vual lungtuakte,
Tangbang dam in tual i lengja uh.
Khrist mina chin leh tuai ngaihte,
Na sakmel uh muh kinem ung;
Na hon na welcome na uh leh,
Khuangpi ging in ka lailung juangsak.
Simlei lungkham buaina tam zong,
Angelten i machiang huai hen;
Thangvan zaila hong tualkum hen;
I sinlai vabang hong phawngta hen.
Mel muhphaklouh gamlei apan,
Chin leh tuaite' sakmel muta'ng;
Lambang pakna tung Thianmang kiang'
Tungta hen, thangvan thawn hen, Amen.
Mimbang pianna A saumang mitsuan ing,
Vanmi lun pen angelte pahtawi lai;
I mawh vang in ka Mang Hongum Toupa,
Khenna'n zai awi uh, angel lungtuakte'n.
Aw, thupi hen aw, i Mang hon gum Toupa,
Jawlnei genkholh, van Mang Immanuel;
Tuang hong tungta, en un, Hondampa,
Thou un, simlei mija, en un, Hondampa.
Vonsen Na hong pianna bawng inn daidam,
Khemna lummei jing nuai a galdot in;
Ka lailung hon lun chia Toupa Jesu,
Laukha zai awi in, Toupa lambang pak di'n.
Lunmang zatam mimbang a hong piang zong,
Ka Mang Hondampa bang omlou ding hi;
A liangvai vannuai Tanpa Belamnou,
Hon kipahpih un, angel lungtuakte.
A sulnung hon sui ua ka Mang nunnem,
A liangvai hi, hiamma chiteng A thuak;
Salpha tuaidawng Lili pak khiahna mun,
Laukha hong leng in, awi ve ni Kalvari.
Tang a Eden huan siangthou ah,
Suangtu Adam leh Eve-
Tung Pathian in lungkimtak in,
Sapum khat ding in gawmta.
Tua dan eite'n i na jui ua,
Kipak in i kikhawm;
Aw Pathian, Nang hong vualjawl in,
Hiai a kitenna siangthou.
Lungkham leh nop lai hun a zong,
Kipahpih tuah jel ding;
Itna gui in a lungsung uah,
Nangman hong gakkhawmta in.
Na mangtutphah thupi mai ah,
Kiitna thu chiam uh;
Aw, Pathian amau lungsung ah,
Na min gelh in vualjawl in.
Hun tomchik kia i neita,
Lungtuak i lenkhawm na'n;
Simlei gentheih lungjuanna mun,
Koute hon ngai nawn kei unla,
Tangtawn gamnuam in kinem un.
Lawmvual lungtuak, khaubang chiah aw,
Damtak in aw mangpha;
Kigalvan un, mei leh sisan'n,
Mang Immanuel' gam dungsun in.
Lungjuan chiteng sutkhawma,
Ngaihlai gibang khente;
A paina'ng uh ni nemsak in;
Khemna meipi hong jing zong leh,
A lam uh vaksak in, Toupa.
Zion simthu sutkhawm ding',
Lenna mun dang zong leh;
Guabang hinna thak vak mun ah,
Misiangthou leh angel siang tawh,
Tangtawn ngabang leng kumkhua ni.
Kumte silbang hong pal nawnta,
Hizong lungjuan hong thak jel hi;
Lenmual khumsa malbang kou leng,
Lawmvual ngaih teng kimvekta hi.
Aw, koi ah hiam anbang itte,
Toupa'n hon ngak tangtawn gam ah;
Hongpai unla, hinna pak hoih,
Namtui khiak in leng diamdiam ni. D.S.
Hunte'n lenmual a khum ngeilou,
Sana vangkhua tual nunnuam ah;
Lungkham albang dah a lengte,
Om nawnlou ding tangtawn gam ah.
Aw, ngaiveng e itna gamnuam,
Ngoumei jing lai ah galdon ni;
Aksi khen van Salem thak nuam,
Lungdeihte laitual lenna gam.
Haibang ngakla'ng e tua gam nuam,
Denchiang in tuang ka tung ding hi;
Lawmvualte gibang khen mahleng,
Tua ah nuam in ngabang leng ni.
U-le-naute aw, chidam tak in,
Lungdam in na hong tung uhiam?
Kholhpih lawmvual it leh ngaihte tawh,
Damtak in n'ong ton thei chiat uhiam?
Dahna thuak in khitui tampi a luang,
Dahnate chikchiang a bei thei ding hiam?
Vantung Jerusalem khua sung i tun chiang in,
Tangtawn Pathian kiang ah i lungdam ding.
Hiai leitung ah nisim tawntung in,
Gimna, dahna bei thei ding hiam?
Khrist hon itna thupha muang lehang,
Tuate Ama'n hong zousak ding hi.
Sawtlou sung i kikhen laitak in,
Bang i chi diam chi'n i lungkham;
Tun lungdamna tawh kimu khawm hang,
Hon hehpihna phat in la sa ni.
Aw, simlei i tuallenna gam,
Lungtuak gibang khenna;
Aw chikchiang' tuangnung ka siah diam,
Hambang ka vaihna gam? (2) D.S.
Lenmual khumsa tung si-al zong,
Thangvan jawl ah munmuang;
Sanggah liangvai kei simlei ah,
Hambang vai sawt lua ing. (2) D.S.
Zatam vualgen itte lenna,
Lelliangte tutkhawlna;
Kei zong tua ah ka tutkhawl ding,
Hambang vai nawn lou in. (2) D.S.
Simlei daidam ah giakmawh bang,
Gahliang in vai zong leng;
Si-al tang Inn nuam ka tun chiang';
Hambang vai nawnlou ding. (2) D.S.
Eden huan a pi leh pu'n a khelh man in,
Setan in hong dal in, hiai
Leitung kha a jakkhum hi;
Hondampa ka Mang Khrist in,
Gimna thuak a hong siin,
Mikhial kei A hong tanta.
Damsung ni a tomta a,
Lalgam nna a kinawhta;
Khawdak in ka von liangvai,
Mang Khrist chibang tel zaw in.
A mangthang ding Babulon khelah kenla,
Hun nanung ah i Mang Khrist
Chiamtehna na tang sam in;
Deihzawk tel a hunlai in,
Zong sam in, Laukha Siangthou'
Chiamtehna na tangzaw in.
Mangthang ding gam leh nam tung ah leng ve ni,
Tangthu Pha mekmih sawm in,
Nungchiang machiang hon kimvel;
Hizongleh lungkhamlou in,
Tangthu Pha na genjak in,
Mang Khrist in hon panpih hi.
Lelliang veh e, Vanmi mimbang hong piang,
Beth-lehem bawng inn daidam A ngak;
Amah zaw mihing leh Pathian ahi,
Kumpi leh Hondampa hih a kop.
Nunnuam in Amah lambang pak ni,
Hong hondam ding in hong kiniamkhiak;
Thupi henla, Amah thupi pen hen,
Pathian eite' kiang A hong tung.
A manna thuguk mite'n a theihlouh,
Tangtawn a A Pa angsung a om;
Mipilte leh A manna si-al tawh,
Van mipite'n a hong gen uh.
Nuam in kikou ni Mang thak hong piangta,
Lailung in Amah sumbang bia ni;
Edom gimlim leh dangkaeng sang in,
Lungsung a thumna manpha zaw.

songs.title: Miza Lungsung Ah Na Teng In

lines: Mija lungsung ah Na teng in,
Khutte vualjawlpa Na hi a;
Na khempeuh Nangmah bawlsa hi,
A kilawm Na Biak inn lungdamna'n dim.
A nuam lungdamhuai hina lawmlawm e,
Lei in lel theilou;
Lungnopna tawh nuaisiah ing simlei,
Vanmang vanglianpen Na siang awi in.
K'on tel uh Mang Immanuel,
Na Biakinn ah lawmte hon pi'n;
Ka hon ngak uh Na ta itte'n,
Nangmah ngai lungtuak a Na siang awi in.
Lungkham kikou aw Na dawng a,
Buaina tuilian Na vaudai jel;
Tanglai gal lauhna mun mah ah,
Lungkham thuaksa, lungdamna in ka dim.
Lungkham dahna nopna in dim,
Hondampa'n hong vualjawl niin;
Kha khialte bit zawhna Kulhpi,
Jesu'n hong pia, nuam un, Halleluia.
Tang a nunlui loubang tulsa,
A latna tang om diam?
Don jel lehang ngoumei kal ah,
Ngilhni omlou ding hi
Hong nem in, Mang Immanuel,
Kah lai ka bang ding hi,
Nunlui ngaih zaw lentang ngoumei bang,
A then ni om ding hi.
Thangvan hong mau sinlai hon phawng,
Nunlui ka ngai semsem;
Vanglai pal zou lawmvual kim leh,
Pialgal kaisa ngai ing.
Phamsa ngai in naubang ka kap,
Hong nem ding omlou hi;
Ava bang a noplai nite,
Muh ni om nawn ding hiam?
Ngai mah lengzong nunlui mualliam,
Lelliang leltak hi'ng e;
Galdon ning thangvan vangkhaw nuam,
Nuam in ken thuak bei ning.
Et chimlouh sen vontawi mimbang hong piang,
Pom chim louh lungdamna thak jel;
Pomlai von lungdamhuai.
Hinkhua sawt hen, Mang Jesu nna sem ding',
Khang in hong lian mengmeng leh aw;
Mang galkap- khial dou ding,
Zion galvan zang in Toupa,
Hon vualjawl in.
Tunnu lungdamna leh juapa nem di'n,
Namchih zata lungdamna pen,
Vonsen pomlai ahi.
I awi ding zaila leh silhpuan nem in,
I siang sungdawh piallai liap ah,
Sawnban tawnpih ning e.
Simlei leh Thangvan simthu leh Toupa,
Kipak lua ung, Nangmah vang in,
Vonsen anglai siah.
Ginna'n gal in don le'ng tung thangvan vangkhua a lang,
Toupa bawlsa Salem Thak nuam ah;
Martar pawl leh angel siangte tawh,
Tuin Mangtutphah ah hon ngak uh.
Tua ah hon ngak, khenlouhna ah,
Tatsa itte a kimna ah;
Lungkham, gimna thuak a maute zong,
Tawldamta ding, chi'n Toupa'n A gen.
Tuin ka lungdeihte kap in gibang khen mahleng,
Vual gen suangmanpha kham khuapi ah;
Khenna thu kigen nawnta lou ding,
Khenlouhna ni a hong tang zaw ding.
Aw, tu a lei lungkhamna khempeuh a bei chiang in,
Belamnou leh mangtutphah vak pha;
A misiangthoute tawh tangtawn in,
Jingdam solnou bang in tang ding uh.
Hondampa, chikchiang in hiam tangtawn mun N'on pi ding,
Lungkhamna thu kigen nawnlou in;
Kikhen lungkhamna thuak a maute,
Nopna kha jak in lengkhawm ding uh.

songs.title: A Vak Ah Ka Leng Ding

lines: Hondampa'n mun A bawlzou ta,
Khial a pukte thounawn ve ni,
Zaila sain juan ve ni,
Salbang hontatna a kimta.
A hon itna vanglian vang in,
Ka tutkhawl ding i Pa' gam ah;
Tangtawn in a vak ah ka leng ding.
I omna leitung inn mauna,
A mangthang zong tangtawn inn ding;
Ei' ding a A bawlsa hi,
Genthei tate nun i nopna'ng.
Kuapeuh Ka kiang hong juan khempeuh,
Pampaih kei ning, Na chih vang in;
Khial a nin in k'on zuan hi,
Aw Toupa, hon siangthousak in.
Gibang khensate ngai mahle'ng,
Toupa' gam ah tuak nawn ve ni ;
Anbang Non itna aw in,
Tuin Toupa hon khamuan hi.
Loubang tulsa kum leh i nunluite,
Tuibang kiam in lenmual a khumta uh;
Tuai gua bang dawnsuang nawn ding in lawmlou,
Ngaiin kou zong tutkhawl nawnlou ding hi.
Sunni tumkuan leh khua a nim chiang in,
Nun i nop ni leh albang dah jante;
Pialgal kia a dawnbang tuak nawn ding in,
Mualkhumta uh nungchiang hei nawnlou in.
Hizong kumthak, Siamtu thupi seh bang'n,
Tuang hong tungta, machiang a hon suan hi;
Maimit singte, thou un, khua hong vakta,
Mizata nopna pak hon puak na'm aw.
Honpak ung kum kivei silhpuan bang thak,
Nuam leh pak in zaila'n hon awi ung e;
Ka nun uh na sung ah hong lamzang hen,
Kumlui nusia'n lungdamna hong puak in.

songs.title: Lambang Pak Ni, Zaila Sa In
songs.author: Evan. P.K. Nengsong

lines: Aw Toupa, Na hon itnate,
Na siamsil bawl ah kilang;
Na simthu in khawhlou haichi,
Tuin tuk tangbang hong tung.
Lambang pak ni zaila sa in,
A hon itna haithak tawi';
Sumbang bia ni tung Thianmang,
Aw Toupa, ngaihkhua n'on tuahna,
Tulvuah thangvan daitui in;
Khawhlou haichi, Na simthu in,
Nunnuam in Na hon khangsak.
Aw, Toupa, siamsil bangkim bawl,
Na kampau siamsil bawlte'n,
Lambang hon pak, zaila sa hen,
Thianmangte' tung Thianmang chi'n.
Muatthei a phum a om,
Muattheilou a thou ding;
Simmawhhuai a phum a omte,
Thupi a pahtawi a thou ding. (2)
Hatlou a phum a om,
Vanglian a thoukik ding;
Sa pumpi tawh phum a omte,
Laukha pumpi tawh thoukik ding. (2)
Lei pumpi a tuam a,
Van pumpi a tuam hi;
Lei pumpi thupina a tuam,
Kha pumpi thupina a tuam. (2)
Toupa kikou aw tawh,
Angel vangliante tawh;
Pengkul in hon sam khawm ding a,
Toupa kiang ah tutkhawlta ding. (2)
Sihna om nawnlou ding,
Kahna om nawnlou ding;
Sihna gu in hon zou lou ding,
Dougal nanung na nuaisiahta. (2)
Pathian in A hon hehpih man,
Tomkal khat hiai ah i lengkhawm;
Tu'n kikhen ni hong tungta hi,
Hongkha ung, na dam chiatta un.
Tomkal khat i kikhen hang in,
Khatvei tei i kimu nawn ding;
Pathian in hon ching tawntung hen,
I kimuh khawm nawn mateng un.
U-le-nau ngaih kikhen nungchiang',
Mual leh guam in hon hal zongleh;
I kiitna mangngilh kei ni,
Itna Jingsol in tangden hen.
U-le-nau ngaih k'on khakna un,
Banjal in chibai hon buk ung;
I siamlahna kimaisak ni,
Pathian vualjawlna i tan theihna'ng,
U-le-nau i kikhen hang in,
Itna'n hong henkhawm tawntung hen;
Leitung ah kimu kei mahle'ng,
Van gam ading in kinem hang.
Khawlna munnuam laukha khawlna,
Keiman ka na mu a;
Tangtawn silbang a pak tawntung,
Tua gam hing nunnuam ah;
Tuanglam khat kia nei hang, Jesu'
Kiang tuang i tun theihna'ng.
Ginna a muh ding lamen hang, (2)
Tua gam a teng ding in.
Kiman gige'n tua haksatna,
Daibang nawk chiat ve ni;
Gingtute kiang' A pe ngei ding,
Tua Manglukhu thupi;
Tualai mun ah gingtute in,
A haksatna teng uh,
A khebul ah koihta ding uh, (2)
A leitung buaina uh
Tua tatsate paina tuanglam,
Keiman ka na en a;
A Pa uh thupipen ma ah,
Nuamsa in pai jel uh,
Tua ah kei zong honsam uhi,
Manglukhu tang ding in.
Launa khempeuh beita ding hi, (2)
Tua nunnopna ni ah.
Na gam thupi ka tun chiang in,
Misiangthoute leh angel siangte tawh;
Mawhnei hong pai ding ua,
Ken zong hinna ka tang zou sam ding hiam?
Aw, khelhna a liam ka hi,
Toupa aw, hong huai in;
Hinna tuikhuk ah honpi in,
Ka khelh sawpsiang ding in,
Tuachiang Na gam tuang hong tung theita ning,
Van khawpi ngaih lai a nat chiang',
Tunkal ngaklah in sunni tumzou la'ng;
Vual lungtuakte lenna,
Toupa tuang hong tun kal haibang ngakla'ng.
Na gam thupi tuang ka tun chiang,
Simlei hambang vaih leh naubang kahna;
Ngai in don nawn kei ning,
Silhpuan minthang duang a bat in leng ning.
Simlei loubang tul leh nguai ah,
Nunnopna ding bangdang muzou kei veng;
Ka Mang Jesu loungal,
Ka lungkhamna hehnem ding dang omlou.

songs.title: A Sung Ah Hong Teng In
songs.author: Saptawna

lines: Zion Temple kullou Inn lam nawnta ung,
Nang koute Siampi Lian Na hi;
A sung ah hong teng in,
Tatna kithoihna sisan pha hong theh in.
Chikim, nam kim hia'h kikhawm ung,
Vualjawlna khempeuh ngak ung;
Salem Kumpi alaitak' hong ding in,
Simthu hong lel in lungdamna'n.
Solomon, Jerubabel leh Herod in,
A lamsa uh mun siangthou ah,
Tuin kilam thakta;
Deidanna kullou, mi kim, nam kim ading.
Nang hon phat n'ung lungtuak in Na Inn nuam ah,
Simthu teng sut zaila sa in;
Pahna kihawt kimvel,
Thangvan ah a uangsem ding, bei nawnlou ding.
Thudik gum a dingkip di'n hon panpih in,
Muanhuaitak a machiang suan in;
Dikna galvan tawi in,
Khelhna gal sangbang nawh dia zou jel ding in.
Ngai in Amah hong paikik ding hi,
Thupina tawh van mei tung ah;
I Mang uh Immanuel in,
Khuavannuai vaihawm ding.
Mi kim, nam kim, A Mangtutphah mai ah,
Kikhawm ding a kipuang ding hi;
Salem Kumpipa mai ah aw,
Bang ka gen sam ding hiam?
A mel thupi nibang a tang ah,
Dawite leh melma khempeuhte;
Tatsate i lungdam ni in,
Lau in lingta ding uh.
Lei lungkham buaina lambang kheng in,
Pai masa leh angel siang tawh;
Salem thak tual nuam a leng in,
Hin tawp omlou ding hi.
Lungkham leh naubang kah omlou ding,
Van semgua ging luang lawmnou tawh;
Kalvari Belamnou liamsa,
Phat in zaila lem ni.
Denchiang a mi zatam hong paikhawm ding,
Mangtutphah mai a hong ding dingte;
Mang bang in phatna zaila in awi uh,
Mizatam singta kuamah simsenglouh,
Hong hita ding.
Van khawsimpi ah vanmi a sim ua,
Simlei dahna khial mun a pai,
Thianmang Vontawi thangvan mi in,
A sim ding uam?
Thangvan khawsimpi ah.
Van mipi tamdan ka sim dek chiang in,
Ka gelh chiang in zong ka simseng lou;
Ka simsenglouh man in hiai ka tangtel,
Mi zatam singta kuamah simsenglouh,
Chi'n ka kikou.
I na thulimta kei a, i nopna,
A daizouta anbang itte tawh;
Gibang kikhen omlou ding tua mun ah,
Lungkham a kithuam ngai nawnlou ding a,
Khua vakta ding.
Van kongkhak Vengpa in thu lungdamhuai,
Ana lasawn A vengpa hutna'n;
Mikhial kisik leh ngaihdam a omte,
Tangtawn Inn lam juan in hong pai lel uh,
Halleluia!
Mou leh mouneipa ki it tuah ding',
Gibang khen lou di'n Jesu'n thu kham;
Kimak buaina, khelhna nusia'n,
Dikna mitsuan jel un.
Hiai thutak theigige unla,
Na lungsung uah sa pumkhat dia Pathian gawmsa,
Mihing in khen kei hen, Toupa'n a chi,
A siang ngeilou a hi e.
Toupa'n A sehsa hiai thukhun zaw,
Mihing kigawmna ding a A siam;
Thuchiam thupi hinna sial in,
Lenglai n'ong kilen uh.
Lungdamna tanu tapa tawi in,
Tung Pathian in vual honjawl hen aw;
Itna thuchiam pellou ding in,
Pehsik kual a chiam hi.
Kitenna thu kipahpih chiat hang,
I theihpihta leimite dan in;
Vondeih tawi a vualjawlnate,
Itna Toupa seh hi.

songs.title: Mari Tanpha Bang Na Telta Hiam
songs.author: Rova/Lalbieklien

lines: Tangbang ka damsung ni sawt nawnlou ding,
Nisim hunsim in mualliam den hi;
Ka Toupa adia hunte zang lou in;
Denchiang' chi'n hun tamjaw mualliam zouta.
Tang a Martha a thaitna,
Hondampa'n lungdampih lou;
Mari'n tanpha ana tel pen,
Buaisak lou ding in A hilh a;
Mari tanpha tel bang na telta hiam?
I damsung lungkham buainate khempeuh,
Albang mang lel a nunnopna tawh;
Tangtawn gam hon tun zou ding omlou hi,
Tangtawn gou ding ka Toupa' nna lou jaw.
Van Kanan gam etlawm i manawh lai',
Lungkham buainate'n hon tuamkimvel;
I damsung lungkham buainate khempeuh,
Tuangnungsia'n Mari' tanpha bang tel ni.
Lungkham kahna leh buaina gam,
Kheng in manna gam nuam ah leng uh;
Ka juan jel ding khelhna mial nua'h,
Hon na kai in Na vak tang kimvel ah.
Ka tuanglam khimjing apan in,
Ka ngai e, mitsuan jel in pai ning;
Aw, tua gam etlawm nuam ah valeng lehang,
Ka simlei hinna ngainawn lou ding hi'ng.
Aw, Na mel a pahna namtui,
Ka nunnopna a tulzouta hi;
Vang in la zong lungdeihte tual
A lenna uh tullou di'n hong nem in.
Aw, endih uh, tatsate'n zaw,
Zaideih awi uh e, tua gam nuam ah;
Itna Toupa siam Salem kulh
Sung a lengte leh misiangthou tengteng.
Ka itte aw, tua lai mun ngei,
Juanjel ve ni aw tua gam nunnuam ;
Thangvan mite'n puanpak silh in,
I lenna gam uh enchim lou uhi.
Tung kawlva bang' lensiam hileng aw,
Ka Mang sihna mun vajuan ve ning;
Tua ah hon tatna ka va mu dia,
A mai a sisan kai niuniaute,
Itna puannem in va nulsiang ning.
Aw Kalvari, aw Kalvari,
Na tung ah na Mang a khaikang uh;
Thou inla a kilhna sik phawi in,
A sisan luangkhia va nulsiang in.
Kidron luidung, nang zong thou inla,
Na Toupa dangtak va dawnsak in;
Zu thuk in a dangtak dailou ding,
Kuan inla A muk siangthou nuai ah,
Nem ngiingei in ah va luangsak in.
Kei hon ngai a dangtak hileh zaw,
Kidron chiin malbang hon kou ding;
Tanga tuan in va dawnsakta ning,
Nang honngai a dangtak ahi jaw,
Kuan in laukha tui va dawnsak in.
Vapai leng zong bang ka va lawh dia,
I Toupa dangtak daisak ding in;
Hihtheihna bangmah neilou hi'ng a-
Pai zaw pai ning e, Kalvari ah;
A sisan luang bek va nul ve ning.
Kalvari leh aw Jerusalem,
Ka Mang nunnem hong kahpih unla;
I khelh vang a liamna thuak hi e,
Thou in, lusun naubang awi ve ni,
Van Belamnou kha A pham ni in.
Hongum Toupa'n ka gitlouhman,
Ama' sisan hong pia;
Keimah bang a migilou di'n,
Kilhbelh in A om hi.
Hondampa aw, hon panpih in,
Muanhuai tawntung ding in;
Na Mangtutphah a Na tut chiang',
Hon phawk tawntung in aw.
Sing Khros tung ah bangkim A thuak,
Hon ngaihdamna ding in;
Hon itna a thupi lua hi,
Lung in ngaihtuah zoulou.
Ka Hondampa A sih laiin,
Ni zong kilang ngamlou,
A gentheihna khuhmang ding in,
Meipi a hong jing hi.
Kei zong tua Amah Khros ma ah,
Ka lu ka kun ding hi;
Lungdam vang in ka biang ah zong,
Khitui a luang gige.
Nakpitak a ka lungkham hang',
Bangmah phatuam lou ding;
Toupa ka pum in k'ong kipia,
Ka hihtheih tawp ahi.
Vual hon jawl ding in van ah,
Vai A hawm nawnta;
Eden kongkhak A hong nawnta,
Lut in Zion khua a vakta.
Phat un, Phat un, Hondampa,
Belamnou A hongta ;
Pak un Halleluia, Amen,
Halleluia, hondam ding in A hongta.
Jan la ngaih kisaklai in,
Lei a nguizou hi;
Eden a pukte thouta uh,
Vual gen sun aksi koi hi hiam.
Mang tengteng Mang leh Zion a,
Vaihawmpa pen;
Mihingte'n mangngilh theilou ding,
Anbang A itna lamdang hi.
A phat la sa un Van
Misiangthoute teng in;
Tuisuahgiat leh simlei in zong,
'Zion' lou hen, Halleluia.
Aw, hehpihna khawvel vakna,
Kalvari tang sing khros tung ah,
Ka Toupa'n A hon bawl;
Ka ngaihtuah chiang' lamdang lua sa'ng,
Sihna mulkimhuai kei di'n thuak,
A sisan hong luang khia. (2)
Hehpihna' dim Toupa'n hong thuak,
Lungngaih, mauna, gawtmun apan,
Hong tankhia zouta hi;
Gensiat bei Toupa ziak laukha,
Thangvan tual ah nibang tang in,
Lengkum tawntung ding hi. (2)
Toupa' chitna, hoihna, phatna,
Simthu zaila'n lel theilou hi;
Pahtawi uh thangvan ah,
Toupa, Mangtutphah tung a tu,
Serafimte'n zaila'n pak uh,
En leng pak sam ve ni. (2)
I ngaklah ni hong tung pah ding,
I Toupa'n hon pikhawm nading;
Toupa' mel muta ning,
Khensa vualngaih u-le-nau mu'n
Tangtawn khawpi tual ah leng ning,
Lawp veng lailung juang veng. (2)
Khawvel tawp chiang thangvan tual ah,
A tatsa teng kikhawm ding hi;
Nunnuam sawlbang hei ding,
Tua ah lungkham, buai, kahnate,
Sih, kikhen luankhi nul omlou,
Nuam in kumveita ni. (2)
Innpi kilawm pen kongpi bul a tu in,
Pathian ta mi khat si ding a om;
Khawvel in limsak lou, neih leh lam nei lou,
En in, tunglam pan kidanna'n ngak.
Angelte'n tonpih khawlna gamnuam lam ah,
La kilawm kisa'n tung vante thawn;
Hondampa'n van ankuang luina ah na ngak,
Paradis ah ngaih teng tawh omkhawm.
Hiai damsung mangbatna tawpna bang hi ding,
Eite kiang ah tua dotna hong om;
Hiai lampi a pailai puakgik in hon delh,
Lungkham dahna khitui kiakia hi.
Nang Jesu' nungjui, neih leh lam nei lou zong,
Gou manpha in tunglam ah hon ngak;
Gimthuak lungdamna'n sim, om sawt nawnlou ding,
Aw, denchiang' kidanna hong tung ding.
Tunglam en in, malam Toupa di'n malam,
Hun leh talent teng Amah zat ding;
Na sep tamlou zong kipahman thupi hi,
Hiai ah khros, tua ah pahna lukhu.

songs.title: Kim Louh Ding Zaw Na Sang
songs.author: Pastor Thawngkham

lines: Toupa ka damlai hun leh ni mual liam jeljel te,
Theihlouhkal in mualliam in hong thak jel;
Na sat van Salem khawpi thak tual nuam a,
K'ong tun hun ding nite hongnai sak hi.
Na vualjawlna hun leh ni ka tanpihte leh,
Nunnop zaila ka oihpih te;
Na mangtutphah mai a pahtawina zaila,
Oih hun chiang in,
Kim louh ding zaw Toupa, laiah na sa'ng.
Khawvel buaina meipi jing leh tui kihawt kal ah,
Toupa'n eid'n hunte hon thaksak lai;
Tanglai Kanan a Na mite Na pi bang,
Hon pi jel in Toupa hon jui jel ning.
Lawmvual lungtuak it leh ngaih, nu-le-pa itte aw,
Unau sangtampi'n mual hon liamsan nung;
Toupa'n eidia hunte hon thaksak lai in,
Toupa leh A gam di'n hunte zang ni.

songs.title: Amin Di'n Jesu Na Sa Ding
songs.author: Upa Khamtual

lines: Ngai in Nazaret khua nungak,
Mari kiang ah Pathian in
Van angel Gabriel A sawl a;
Chibai nakpi a deihtuam,
Toupa Pathian na kiang ah om,
Chih thu'n Mari lau in ling,
Lau ken, Mari na hong gai dia,
Tapa na hon nei ding hi.
A min di'n Jesu na sa ding,
Amah milian hong hi dia,
Tungnungpen a siangthou,
Pathian Tapa a chi ding uhi.
A gam in bei ni neilou ding,
Kumsawt kum sawt A lal ding,
Chi a angel tongluang lawmnou
In, ka lailung vabang phawng.
Joseph nang Lal David tapa,
Na ji Mari neih lau ke'n,
A naupai Kha Siangthou lak a ahi;
Tapa a nei dia,
A min di'n Jesu na sa ding;
Aman A mite khelhna-
Pan a A hotdam ding ziak in,
Chi'n Joseph angel in hilh.
Thianmang vontawi hong pianna,
Jawlnei Mika'n hichi'n gen;
"Nang Judia gam a Beth-lehem aw,
Judia khawpite lak ah
Nang zaw na neupen kei hial hi,
Na sung a pan Ukpa ding,
A hong suak ding ahi ngal a,
Israelte vengpa ding."
Toupa hiai leitung khomial ah,
Zingsol aksi bang tang in;
Na tatna sisan pha vangin,
Tangtawn nunnop hinna pia'n.
Aw Toupa, solnou bang taangin,
Tuipi gal gam gamla ah;
Nang non itna simthu hoihpen,
Amawka piakna chiam hi.
Khomialna mun hiai leitung ah,
Misi dingte nang gum in,
Kum bei, ni bei, hun beibeita,
Awlmoh in aman ma un.
Na thuchiam thupi leh siangthou,
Gospel simthu lel unla;
Huan, na kiang uah ka om zel ding,
Chi a na thuchiam hilh in.
En in Tanpa, Kalvari sing ah;
Nang leh kei dia thuakgim dan mu in;
Itsiam a hon sap lai in ngai in,
En in, na hing ding.
En in, na hing ding! (2)
Nang ding a A sihna khros en in;
En in, na hing ding!
Kha puakgik, hotdam ding na nei hiam?
Tangtawn a hinna na nei nuam hiam?
Jesu mah in tatna pia zouta,
En in, na hing ding.
Hankhuk pan thou Hondampa en in,
Amah juan meng' mun a om lai in;
A mel lungdamhuai in hon nem ding,
En in, na hing ding.
Gensak ding in van ah Jesu om.
Khial a lungkhamte taksap A thei;
Na kalsuan hon pi ngeingei ding hi,
En in, na hing ding.

songs.title: Thupi A Hon Tuah Ka Kinem
songs.author: Redemption 952

lines: Thupi a hontuah ka kinem hi,
Damsung huihpi a then chiang;
Tangthu kumlui, sutkhawm ka kinem,
Luigal gam nuam leh vak ah.
Tua gam vak pha ah, Tua gam kilawm ah,
I Pa Innpi ah, nunnopna gam ah;
Tua mun a na vek ua hon tuah ding ka kinem,
Zawhna lukhu khu a, thupi in.
Thupi a hontuah ka kinem hi,
Hinna sing pouna kim ah;
Hon Tanpa deihhuai phat ka kinem,
Hehpihna'n tua mun hon tun.
Thupi a hontuah ka kinem hi,
Hondampa tutphah kim ah,
Tatsa lak a vatel ka utta,
Tatna, itna la sa in.
Thupi a hontuah ka kinem hi,
Lei a ka nna zawh chiang in;
Nuam a na khut uh let ka kinem,
Gallam tangtawn gam vak ah.
Ka mu gamnuam kei ding a om,
Lungsim maimit a ka et chiang;
Tua gam vak in eng singseng e,
Tua gam in vak silhpuan in nei.
Aw itna gam, nuampen leh vak,
Na thupina'n lei mial tanvak,
Na luipiau nuam kou zong mu ding,
Sunni suah a mialna bei chiang'.
Tua gam kilawm luipiau nuam ah,
Khawmial omlou, nitna omlou;
Tua mun tungte kikhen nawn lou,
Kumsawt kikhen dawnbang kituak.
A vante lei vante bang lou,
Ze hoihpenpen chi kim a dim;
Sunni tang tua mun ah kul lou,
Jan khawmial delhmang ding om lou.
Tua mun ah huihkhi sia lang lou,
Tenna gamnuam leh muanna ah;
Hondampan tua tenna mu thei,
Pathian Paradis sung nuam ah.

songs.title: Van Inn Ah I Teng Ding
songs.author: Ar Herberson

lines: Van mun thupi hehpihna gam,
Misiangthoute Inn a hi;
Amau kiang a na ten theihna'n,
Leitung vante nusia in.
Leitung nite a bei chiang in,
Denchiang in Inn nuam sung ah;
Misiangthoute tenna gam ah,
Van Inn ah i teng ding.
Tangtawn Inn nuam thupi tak a,
Teng teng innkuan khat hi uh;
Huai inn nuam a tengsam ding in
Michih, nam chihte chial hi.
Hondampa sihna mun thupi,
Hehpihna thu a gen uh;
Kisakkholh hun a hih lai in,
A itna thu taksang in.
Khatkhata a paikhiak chiang un,
A kiam uh innkuan kim zong;
It teng ngaihteng khantawn mun ah,
Kim ni chih a om ding hiam?
Ka ta vakvai tujan kaw' om,
Ka ta ka hawmthawh penpen;
Khatvei ka lungdamna leh lamet,
Ka ta, it a ka thumsak?
Aw, ka ta tujan kaw' om? (2)
Itna'n ka lung dimlet aman a thei;
Aw, ka ta tujan kaw' om?
Jing daikia bang in a siang a,
A nu khuk ngai a khukdin;
Tuabang mel, tuabang lungtang omlou,
Amah bang deihhuai omlou.
Aw bawi, tu'n nang hon mu thei leng,
Nidang a na mel hoih bang';
Na pau, na nuih in innsung nuamsak,
Damsung khawsa nuamtuamsak.
Kuan un, tujan ka ta zong un,
Kuan un, mun khempeuh zong un;
A nitna khempeuh tawh hon pi in,
Ken it lailai ing, hilh un.
Ngaidih, manthatna janmial mulkimhuai nuai ah,
Laukha simsenglouh mang ding om uh;
Suahtakna thu theilou a mangjel te,
Nang na kitheihmawhbawl mai ding a hiam?
Amaute huh ding mi ngai uh,
Aw kinmeng in kinmeng in mang jel uh.
Aw, zekai lou in sem in hun beima in,
Tangtawn hinna lam theilou a mangte;
Hinna Vak lam ah honpi inla,
Tangtawn tangtawn a mangnawn lou ding in.
"Manthatna lampi jui a paite pi ding in,
Kei dia sem di'n kua a hiam kuan ding?
Sisan a ka leisa khial a mangte,
Aw amaute ka itna dai tuanlou;
Khelhna meipi'n sunchin tuam hi,
Tuin thou in, kuan in zong in, sem in."
Endih, tangtawn manthatna meipi kai nuai ah,
Mangthang panpih ngen aw te ngai in;
Tua aw gingte na ngilh mai ding hiam?
Amau huh di'n Pathian galvan la in;
Hanmial lam juan in kuankhia in,
Khial a puksate hon pikik meng in.
Tua tangthupha vakna lampi theisa eite'n,
Sihna janmial nuai a mangthangte;
Aw, khelhna meipi jing nuai a omte,
Hinna vak thu hilhlou ding i hi hiam;
Gam chih kil chih a om mite'n,
Tangtawn tangtawn hinna a theihna'ng un.
Ken mangngilh thei ngeikei hial ing,
Ka nu' thugen ken ka jak ni;
"Hon nusia ding maw, Bawi, tuin,
Na nu' thumna ngilh ngei ken," chi.
A it huai lua ka ngaihsut chiang'
Ka kiang' om bang Amah ka thei;
Huihkhua pan aw huihkhi'n hon len,
Ka nu' thumna hon theisak thak.
Ken mangngilh thei ngeikei hial ing,
Hon lungdamsak tawntung a aw;
Gamlapi ah ka taiman hang',
Ka nu' thumna thei gige ing.
Hunte bei zong mangngilh thei ke'ng,
Hon itna thu ka za lailai;
A tutna ngei a tu lai a,
Ka nu itpen thum in ka mu.
Ken mangngilh thei ngeikei hial ing,
Hondampa'n kei hon sinsak hun;
Ka khelh mawhna a thaisiat lai'
Tua ah ka nu' thumna dawng hi
Toupa phat in hehpihna hang,
Eite vantung ah kimu ding;
Tua van innpi ah tengkhawm ding,
Ka nu' thumna dawnna hi ding.

songs.title: Ka Kha Na Hon Dampa Di'n
songs.author: Elnathan

lines: Ka kha na hondampa'n tunna kiang ah,
Thu ahon piata a,
Tun ah Toupa ka deih ka teel dinga,
Nangthu kia ka ging ding.
Ging ding, Ging ding, Ging ding
Toupa non panpih leh nangkia gingding,
Na sisan pha'n kei na hon leita a,
Nang kia di'n ka hing ding.
Hehpihna in na chitna tun muding,
Na hon itna teng toh,
Toupa Jesu nang kia ka honbel ding,
Nang kia ka hon ging ding.
Nang na thei hi Toupa ka hat louh dan,
Vak mangkhak ka laudan,
Nangkia kiangah hatnate ka hon zong,
Hatna nang honpia in.
Tun ah Toupa nang phatla honsa ning,
Hehpihna honpia in,
Toupa kiang ah ka hong kipia chi in,
Kipak in sa ning.
Ngentu nang kiang a hongpaite Toupa,
Hon panpih in chite,
Kon panpih ding na chih gige bangin,
Tun tua ah kinga ung.
Toupa Jesu dungsun ding',
Hingdam a i om lai;
Pathian nna mah sem ding in,
I vuai gawp dong in zong;
Vantung pan hongkum suk a,
Mi khempeuh huai ding in;
Amah hinna hong pia hi,
I leibate dit na'ng.
Aw Mang Jesu dungsun ding, (2)
Aw Mang Jesu, aw Mang Jesu;
Aw Mang Jesu dungsun ding.
Toupa Jesu dungsun ding,
Mi itna tawh dim ding;
Liangvai tate huai ding in;
Ei huhna kulte kiang',
Toupa Jesu dungsun ding',
Aman giloute it;
Khasiatna beitheilou in,
A lungsung kidim hi.
Toupa Jesu dungsun ding',
A kiang ah vathum le'ng;
Amah zong, Pa kiang thum ding'
Mual tung a kaltou hi;
Thawmhau takin tua mun ah,
Amah thum jankhua in;
A Pa deih bang nasep ding,
A an limpen ahi.
Simlei ah zaw mikhual ka hi,
Aw ka ngai sek ngei e, ka inkuante;
Ka tam sung in buaina khempeuhten,
Tuilian bang in nisim hon len.
Aw, hun hon daltu zaw a bei hun chiang,
Tangtawn gam ka juan ding a;
Tua ah ngailou in ka tenna mun,
Buainate tawh ka pawtsan ding.
Lungkham dakging thang kimvelte
Leh buaina chiteng mauging ka jakten;
Ka tangtawn gam hon ngaisak semsem,
Ka Pa mel ni bang a tanna.
Ka zinna gam gamdai ah zaw,
Ka Lalgam lutpih tak ding ka neilou;
Hinna thukhah neilou hizen leng,
Khutvuak in ka gam ka juan ding.
Ka Lalgam in ni a ngailou,
A melhoihna in khawpi sung tanvak;
Vaihawmna Mangtutphah a tu in,
Phatna ging kilawmten a bawm.
Hunte tuibang in a liam a,
I khawvel damlai nite zong;
Ngak neilou in sun nichin in mual ah liam jel,
Khawvel pahna albang mangjel;
Zong in, nichin in ah nuam tang,
Muang om nawn ken, vualngaihte aw;
Tawpna ni a naita.
Hiai khawvel ah nopna zong in,
Sang tampi sihna in pi mang;
Hizong nopna mu leh neite nuamden omlou;
Muanna, bitna a chihlai un,
A tawpna un a honlap ding;
Muang om nawn ken, vualngaihte aw,
Tawpna'n honlap kha ding.
Aw, hongpai un vualngaihte aw,
Hotdamna thu hong ngaikhia un,
I Toupan hehpihna aw in a honsam hi;
Na hun kikhelsak sak nawn ken,
Na tawpna ding mulkimhuai hi;
Muang om nawn ken, vualngaihte aw,
Hun in ngak a neilou.
Sihna in zawhlah a neilou,
Natna in zong lauh a neilou,
Gawtmun in zong kuamah valhzawh louh a neilou;
Hotdamna thu na ngaih ken zaw,
Na tan ding zaw ka ngaingam lou;
Muang om nawn ken, vualngaihte aw,
Sihna in hon ngak hi.
Khuakhal tuiva luileng,
Gammang bang ka tau a;
Tujing singdawn a simbu hambang,
Khuakhal tui omlouhna,
Sakhi bang ka tau a;
Ka nunna'n Toupa ngaiin ka tauden e.
Nang tawh lou in
Nunna ching lou;
Itna leh ngaihna Nang kiang a omte;
Hong neisak kik aw, Toupa.
Mawhna guam sung a kia,
Sakhi thang awk bang in;
Mualsang khuva bang in ka tau a,
Ka omna khimkhua jing
Sung gilkial a na a;
Ka nunna'n Toupa ngaiin ka tauden e.
Itna phuntong palbawm,
Vasa bang i kholh lai;
Nunnuam sian vontawi lia leh tang tawh,
Itna ningtui ka dawn
Lai nite ka ngai a;
Ka nunna'n Toupa ngai in ka tauden e.
Simlei ah zaw khualzin ka hi,
Ka khualzinna a bei mateng;
Simlei hinna ka khit chiang in,
Van khawpi a lengta ding.
Van khawpi a ka len chiang in,
Ka khualzinna a bei chiang in;
Lungdon kahna Aigupta zaw,
Ngai nawn lou ding van gam ah.
Simlei ah zaw khualzin ka hi,
Siatna tuipi kihot lai ah;
Khemna huihpi bang in a nung,
Toupa nang hon panpih in.
Simlei ah zaw khualzin ka hi,
Ka khualzinna sawt nawnlou ding;
Ka khualzinna ka khit chiang in,
Van khawpi a lengta ding.
Jing nisuak vak thupi bang a,
Pathian' Tapa hong kum chiang',
A vanglian vak khua vannuai a mi'n mu ding;
Kawl kimvel a namchih lai a
Ama' midik samkhawm ding;
Tatsa mite kikhopna thupi hi ding.
Tungnungpen a kikhopna nuam,
Nop kiamtheilou gam a kikhopna,
Hehpihna gam tungnungpen' kikhopna,
Tatsate tenna khawpi nuam
Tungnungpen a kikhopna!
Thianmang tung a lungdamna mu,
Phamsa thelbang hong thawh chiang',
Hankhuk sung leh tuipi jalna tuangnungsia'n,
Kituakkhawm ding thangvan jawl ah
Tung kawlva bang lamtou ding;
Si leh hingte kituahkhawmna om ding hi.
Thangvan khawpi sunni bang tang,
Nat leh sat omlouhna gam;
Awlna luipi gei a i kimuh chiang in,
Thianmang siang ah phamsate tawh
Thangvan' nunnuam in leng ni,
Khen nawn lou dia kikhopna ni hi ding hi.
Toupa Jesu hong kum hun ding,
Niteng in hong nai deuhdeuh;
Mitphiat kal lou a limdanna ding hong nai;
A chiam ni thupi hong naita,
Mitphiat kal lou' limdang in,
Thangvan khawpi i tungtou ding, denchiang in.
Ka damsung ni niteng in kiam, Taina mualsuah dekta'ng;
Ka haksatnapente beita, Ka vualzawh na'ng naita.
Hong un, angelte, Ka kim ah hong ding un;
Na khajak tung ua tuang in hon pi un,
Ka tangtawn inn nuam ah. D.S.
Lawmvual lungtuak misiangte kiang', Kei zong tung dekta ing;
Jordan luigei dai nawkta ing, Tua lui kan dekta ing.
Ka van inn nuam tung dekta ing, Ka kha'n nakpi'n la sa ;
En vaw, van misiangte hong pai ! Khajap gingte za veng.
Kei dia sisan luang a si a, Khelhnate siangsak a ;
Vualzawhna hon pepa kiang ah, Ka lunglawp hon tun un.
Lei ah zaw ka inn simmawhhuai nipnep tawh
Neih leh lam tawm tawh lungkim lel ing ;
Tatsate tenna tunglam khawpi ah bel,
Ngun a kijem pen kham innpi deih ing.
Tua mualtung zek ah tenna innpi nei ing,
Tua gam tanpha a kitek ngeilou ding;
Tua kham khawpi ah, vakvai nawnlou ding in,
Ni khat ni chiang in tengdenta ning.
Khemna, ze-etna, lunggim ka thuak jel hang',
Tanglai kamsang bang' suang ka khap hang',
Lei ah tenna munkip ka neih louh hang in,
Ama'n hon peding innpi kei ading.
Lelliang a sanggah, simmawh, hon chi ke'n aw,
Ka lungkia lou hi, vantung juan hi'ng;
Lei a khualzin lel, khawpi a kip zong hi'ng,
Innpi tawh, kumpilukhu tawh deih hi'ng.
Simlei buaihuaina khen tunglam ah,
Toupa'n gam khat hon sehsak;
Tua mun a mitelte' tenna ding in, (2)
Mang' lemgel ahoih leh thuk ahi. (2)
I khawsakna uh van ahi ngal a,
Tua pan in Hondampa i ngak gige;
Bangkim a thu'n a hih theih man in,
I niamlai pumpi thupi'n hon bawlsak ding.
Simlei ah zaw ling leh khau tam a,
Gu leh thang in dim zouta;
Ginna kha jak in lengsang chiat ve ni, (2)
Toupa' bawlsa vansang nunnuam ah. (2)
Lengleng lehang tungthangvan sang ah,
Nuai simlei tuangnung sia in;
Sih leh nat lungjinna khen tunglam ah, (2)
Van Mang lungdamsak tei ding hi hang. (2)
Tunglam maimit suantou gige in,
Hondampa na ngak ve ni;
Tunglam, tunglam, tunglam en gige in,
Honpi ding van a khawsa i hi. (2)
Tunglam a gamchiam ka tun a la ka sak chiang in,
Ka lungkimta ding;
Hondampa Khrist' tatna hehpihna ka phat chiang in,
Ka lungkimta ding.
Ka lungkimta ding. (2)
Toupa' omna mun a ken zong
Tawl ka ngak chiang in,
Ka lungkimta ding.
Sih ngei nawnlouhna khawpi a kei ka tun chiang in,
Ka lungkimta ding;
It leh ngaihte tawh kimu ding, kikhen nawnlou ding,
Ka lungkimta ding.
Tua luigal a tatsate ka muh kimtak chiang in,
Ka lungkimta ding;
Tua mun a angelte tawh phat la ka sak chiang in,
Ka lungkimta ding.
Ka lei damsung ni kihei liam jel ah,
Natna leh mangbat, kial leh lungjinna,
Sum leh pai taksap leh gentheihnate'n
Honchim vel mahleh mun tangzou nawnlou.
Leigam buaina leh sihna hong tungte'n
Ka hinna gam Khrist a lingsak ngei lou;
Mang lemgel hongtung ka hun tuah jel ah,
Buai kei veng damsung ni sim ka siamta.
Mang lemgel louh a thiltung him omlou,
Thil om lelte zong om ding him ahi;
Thil lamdang leh thil thak tuam zong om lou,
Tangtawn a Mang' lemgel ngen a na hi.
Mun leh gam tuam bik zong na omlou hi,
Mun manpha leh man tawm zong om tuanlou,
Milian leh mineu, Mang leh gentheita,
Lunglualna Zion tang a leng i hi.
Ka lenna uh zoukuam gam,
Mang nunnem gam hong suak hen;
Honpa ngaiin kikou ung,
Immanuel hong nai in.
Na mel muta ung, Toupa,
Lemna lenkawl hong engta;
Kalvari anbang itna'n,
Pumkhat in hon bawlta.
Nunbang nuam in kipak ni,
Setan kulhpi a chimta;
Dawi leh jinmang vuallelta,
Itna gam dingkipta in.
Kalvari mual etlawm pen,
Lemna Mang Khrist hong thuakna;
Namchih zata lailung ah,
Itna tuipi luanglet hen.
Aw nang khros vang a ka lawm,
Lungsim munkhat pu jel in,
Itna chibai konbuk hi;
Nunnuam in la sa jel ni.
Nuntom pakpalh bang lel ka simlei
Tangbang damlai hun leh nite,
Vulpah ding hizong leh;
Pal zatamte'n Toupa pampaih in,
Simlei pallunte zou zong leh,
Ken bel Toupa di'n zang ning e.
Toupa aw, hong sang in,
Ka pallutnate hatlou zong leh,
Nang ading in hong pia ing e. D.S.
Anbang itna simthu hemlam a
Naubang a sangte vang in maw,
Na mel lenglou zong leh;
Silpak etlawm namtui a leng hiau
Hiau bang in maw kei zong Toupa,
Na gim ka duang ah theng lou ding.
Toupa hiai leitung khomial ah,
Zingsol aksi bang taangin,
Na tatna sisan pha vangin,
Tangtawn nunnop hinna pia'n.
Aw Toupa solnou bangtaangin,
Tuipi galgam gamla ah,
Nang non itna simthu hoihpen,
A mawka piakna chiam hi.
Khomialna mun hiai leitung ah,
Misi dingte nang gum in,
Kumbei, nibei, hunbei beita,
Awlmoh in aman ma un.
Na thu chiam thupi leh siangthou,
Gospel simthu lel unla,
Huan nakiang uah ka om zel ding,
Chi-a na thuchiam hilh in.
Toupa na omna deihhuai hinah e,
Nang omna ah khimkhua jing ngeilou ;
Na siang ah ngabang leng nuam ing e,
Nuai jinmang in palbang hon nang.
Toupa, na siang ah hong leng nuam ing e,
Muikhawjin in thilhingte'n hon phat;
Kei zong Toupa, na omna ngai in.
Zion Pathian mai' khukdin ing.
Toupa, muikhawjin in hon ompih in,
Ka hinna hon bawlhoihsak jel in;
Gitlouhna puan inn a ka om sung,
Aw Jesu, sawnban honkai in.
Toupa, kong thumna na bil hon dawh in,
Sunni tum in kon samsam ngal a;
Sepaihte Toupa, koi' om na hiam?
Galdouna ah hon panpih in.
Toupa, galzou a na kiang kong chiah chiang',
Na dikna nivak hoihtak mai ah;
Belamnou thahsa thounawn, angel
Siangte tawh phat kal ngaklah ing.
Aw vansin mizan pak ve ni,
Van Mang in hotdamna kim hon pia hi;
Itna thuk libang ching hi;
I Mang Khrist leh i Pa'n
Lung kituak a muanhuai in,
Gilou hotdam ding lel uh.
Van a kim in hong kikhen,
Damna thu gen nading in;
Simlei mizata ding in,
Mang Khrist in hon puak hi;
Aw a sung ah lut meng un,
Vanlam paipih kik ding hi.
Kamsangte'n a na genkholh uh,
Mang David in a limkha kipahpih;
Pahna kim van diktatna'n,
Mang Khrist mel hong kilang;
Van Sharon pal hon piak pen,
Bangzahta'n pak ding i hiam?
"Kei Thutak, van paina lampi,
Leh Hinna ka hi," Mang in a chi;
Gelsiampa lemgel bang a,
Van Mang lempih loute'n,
Sihna pan hong kipan in,
Sih nihna tang ding uhi.
Aw Kalvari tang galin ka don a,
Ka Hondampa hong thuakna tang;
Tua tang lauhuai leh mulkimhuai tung ah,
Ka thuak sikin a thuak.
Ka kipak ngei, Toupa ka kipak ngei,
Hichitel a itna lamdang;
Gensiam kei ve'ng hoih hina tel chia maw,
Hon phat chim kei ning e.
Hichi lawmlawm tel a itna lamdang,
Khelhna tuipi a tumsate;
Itna ziak a Na hon pikhiak man in;
Nang kia honjuita ning.
Na sisan in a hong zalenna gam,
Tua mun a hon pitung ding in;
Na Laukha a paibang n'on kop man in,
Ka lung a kim ngei e.
Genchim theikei ning e, Na hon itna,
Khawvel thupina genlou in;
Anbang n'on itna thu kia gen ning e,
Toupa, hon panpih in.
Halleluia Amen, Halleluia,
Amen, Amen, Halleluia;
Toupa vualzawlna chiteng hon petu,
Na min thupi hen aw.
Hiai khawvel ah zaw gingtu a tam ngei e,
Hizong gingtu nundan siam a tawm ngei e;
Hizong puakgik pua nun tawldamloute din,
Nundan siam hon sinsaktu Jesu ahi.
Nundan ka hong siamta (2)
Hon sinsaktu Mang Jesu Amah ngei ahi;
Lungkim jel ka chingta (2)
Lungkimna hon sinsaktu Jesu ahi.
Sum leh pai hauhsakna duhamnate in,
Hunta chih nei ngeilou lungkim zawh haksa ;
Sanggah gentheite zong Jesu panglou in,
Thuaksiam dan omlou hi lungkim zawh haksa.
Gentheih dan ka siamta, hauhsak dan ka siamta,
Niangletai, gilkial a omdan ka siamta;
Anbang hon it Toupa ka bangkim a hi,
Hon hihhatpa vang in bangkim ka hihthei.
Khrist itna pan bangmah in honkhen lou ding,
Lauhna lungkhamna leh haksatnate'n zong;
Nopna leh muanna ah hon pitu ahi,
Hon hihhatpa' vang in bangkim ka hihthei.
Jesu neih hinna nuam,
Kipahna thuguk hi;
Ka kha ah muanna honpia,
Jesu neih kia kipahna.
Jesu neih pilna bulpi,
Jesu neih hauhna bukim;
Jesu neih zaw, Vannuai toh kikhenna.
Jesu ka nei hi gen
Kimvel ning vannuai ah;
Ginna in ka muchianta,
Khros tunga a sihna mel.
Jesu neih hinna nuam,
Mihaute'n nei zoulou;
Mipilte'n theisiamlou uh,
Kua ziak a dangtak hi hiam?
Van Kanan ka inn ding,
Leitung ka khualzinna;
Aigupta a haksa lua,
Ka Mang Jesu honpi in.
Simlei thupinate nisim ka machiang ah,
Gou hoih pen bangin pallun zong leh,
A hoihna tengsang in Mang Jesu ka tel zaw;
Ken gou kholta ning e Van ah.
Leikha leh tuiek in a neksiatna lei ah,
Ken gou kholkei ning e;
Leikha leh tuiekte nek siatlouhna Van ah,
Ken gou kholta ning e.
Simlei mi zatamte'n muanna, bitna chiin,
Sesum libang chinna simlei ah;
Machiang ngaihkhua tuah in leigoute kholzong le'h,
Ken gou kholta ning e Van ah.
Simlei thupinate tomkal sung hongbei dia,
Hong kilang pah ding Van thupina,
Setheilou, ninbanglou, tullou tangtawn hinna;
Van ka tun chiang ka luah ding hi.
Enven ka ten na'ng gam nuam leimite'n a tel zawhlouh,
Mizawng mipoite leh tagahte nopsakna mun;
Kei hong simmawh kha ken maw;
Inn leh lou ka neihlouh hang,
Lei inn sanga pha zaw van ah innuam ka nei hi.
Ngaklah veng tua khuapi ka tun hun ding,
Tou Jesu a khutpawn ka let ni chiang;
Lungdamna khituite a luang ding a,
Kei hong Honpa aw chi'n lungdam in la ka sa ding.
Enven Tunou anglai ah, melsia mipoi tampite,
Vanmi bang mel etlawm Toupa'n bawlpha khin zou a;
Lei a i kousiatnate kham lukhu in khuta uh,
A lutung te ziahziah suang manpha tawh kizem hi.
Sihna hanmual hong liamsan apaisa it leh ngaihte'n,
Hi leimun siatna gam nusia in hongpai un chi;
Kei ngai in kap kei unla, kei omna ah hong pai un,
I tun ding hong ngaklah van khuapi pan khut hong van.
Ka khualzinna leitung gamdai ahi,
Toupa' hon chiam Kanan gam luah ding in;
Buaina meipijing leh tui kihot lai ah,
Galkai nuam veng Jordan luigal gamdai khen ah.
Gamdai khen ah pichinna mun tuang ka tun chiang,
Senlai hinkhua gamdai ngainawn kei ning,
Mihinglui sihna Jordan gal ka kai chiang in.
Ka it lawmvual, nu leh pa te thou un,
Pathian thutak galvan lakhawm nihang;
Toupa sihna leh thawhnawnna koppih in,
Nithum nung chiang i kai ding uh gamdai khen ah.
Toupa hon chiam Kanan gam i tun chiang,
Kidouna siangthou ah i pang sam ding;
Thawnpiak mana zaw om nawnta lou ding hi,
Kanan pallun zouta nihang gamdai khen ah.
Leitung hinna gamdai gimhuai khen ah,
Vualzoute' luah dinga Toupan a bawl;
Toupa' thupina leh siangthouna silh in,
I leng ding uh Van Jerusalem thak nuam ah.
Pasian melhoihna itna maitaina leh
Kalvari khuavak nibang hong tang hen;
Mittaw khuamial sungpan a sap Zoumite'n,
Mawhna kulhsungpan gupna a ngahta.
(I Pasian) Minthang hen, Minthang hen.
I Pasian minthang ta hen.
(Zogamlei) Thawn sak un, Thawnsak un,
Mualkuam zanglei thawnsak un;
Toupan lam man honglak in,
Hong gual zohpih ding,
Tang zai hen, Tangzai hen,
Zogamlei nibang hong tang hen.
Gupkhiatna thupha leitung mun khempeuh ah,
A kihilh nang in sep ding i nei hi;
Khitui leh kha toh i sepna khempeuhte,
Toupa gam zai hen, tangzai tawntung hen.
Lamdang itna sisan toh kei hongtan khia,
Leipan vantung kahlei hong dohsak zou;
Sihna pan gualzou vangletna toh thoukhia,
Tawntung pan tawntung min thang denta hen.

songs.title: A Hon Itna Phat In Lasa Ni
songs.author: Francis Bottom

lines: A hon itna phatin lasa ni,
Aman hon itna tawp ngeilou hi;
Salbang hon tatna sisan vangin,
Kum sawta min pahpih i sa ding.
Denchiangin...nunnuam in,
Chiaukuam gei kilawm ah kituakni,
Denchiangin...nunnuam in,
Chiaukuam gei kilawm ah kituakni.
Sisan vangin Pathian taklam ah,
Khantawn hinna leh nunnopna om;
Mi tampi din hinna tui aluang,
Tua tui ah Toupa'n hon sil ding hi.
A hon itna vang i zou lai in,
A min vangin nunnop na'n i dim;
Thangvan itun chiang bang om nawn dia,
Belamnou siangthou la oih pih ni.
A mina ikituah khawm chiangin,
Khantawn in nunnuam ah hon sawl dia,
Nunuam in i pa  inn ah tungni;
Khantawna tenna ding gam nuam ah.
Silh puanzak nuai bang i omlai,
I thupipen siangthouna hi hen;
A khut ah manglukhu i nei dia!
Amaanna vanglianpi i mu ding.
Ka Pa uh Van thupi a om,
Na min phat in om tawntung hen;
Jin tengkhawi pan salbang suah dia
Hehpih a nong kankhiak ziak in,
Toupa na kiang kipahthu k'on hilh.
Thilhoih tanchin kipah huai,
Tunte khe a kilawm;
Non hotdamtak ziak in Toupa
Na kiang kipahthu kon hilh.
Na hon it vang a it tute,
Tuipi gal gamvangla apan;
Tangthupha meivak hon tawi a,
Hinna lam hong hilhte ziak in,
Toupa na kiang kipahthu kon hilh.
Kei bang a saltang, khate dia,
Pawtna Jubili dak khen din;
Mittaw te mit hihvak ding a,
Kha Siangthou non piak takziak in;
Toupa na kiang kipahthu kon hilh.
Jerusalem leh Judia gam,
Samari leh kawlmong pha in;
Nang dia theihpihtu hi ding a,
Na ompihna non chiam ziak in;
Toupa na kiang kipahthu kon hilh.
Jesun itnan sihna pan hong gumkhia,
Mikhial kei a ding in a sisan luangkhia,
Mangthang, mikhial, gilou, kihhuai pen in,
Vanglian a ka tuahding tel!
Aw kei bang leltak in vanglian a ka tuah ding,
Lamdang, aw lamdang lua;
Aw kei bang leltak in vanglian a ka tuah ding,
Lamdang, aw lamdang lua!
Aw A itnan Jesun hong gumkhia zou,
Phulouh vangletna toh kei hongpom lai a,
Mangthang, mikhial, gilou, kihhuaipen in,
Vanglian a ka tuah ding tel!
Tua vangletna piandang sisan vang hi,
Piandang vangletna hi ka tandia lawmlou,
Mangthang, mikhial, gilou, kihhuaipen in,
Vanglian a ka tuah ding tel!
Vantung ka tun ding a ka la ding hiai,
Piandang sisan vang in vangletna kei a;
Mangthang, mikhial, gilou, kihhuaipen in,
Vanglian a ka tuah ding tel!
Lei gimhuai gam sihna mun a,
Tangtawn taikhuaval ngakte;
Lailung muanga na lusute,
Toupa tuak din phawng halh un.
Ni thupipen tuang hongtung ding,
Kawlni suak bang in i Toupa a hongvak dia;
A aw ziak in han a omte thou ding,
Van leh meipi kal ah;
Khensate toh i Toupa
Tuak din i lengtouta ding.
Lungkham kapte taiin nuam un,
Hun sawt lua ngak nawnlou ding;
Lungkham mauna in van a thawn,
Toupa ngaihdan buai nawn lou.
I Toupa' simthu chiam bangin,
Hun kilamdang thil hong thak;
Lungsim khial gilou silsiang in,
Laukha Siangthou samlut in.
Lei leh van thil tengteng sangin,
Munuam veng ka Hondampa,
Kei dia saron pak bang na lut-
Ni ding tuang hongtung sak in.

songs.title: A Tak Manpha Nuamna Na Ngaihnop Leh

lines: A tak manpha nuamna na ngahnop leh,
Jesu na lungsung tengsak in;
Na mohna maisak ding, Na janmial tangsak ding,
Na hinna sia a thak suaksak ding.
Na mohna maisak ding, Na janmial tangsak ding,
Na hinna sia a thak suaksak ding.
A tak manpha nuamna na ngahnop leh,
Jesu na lungsung tengsak in;
Na mohna maisak ding, Na janmial tangsak ding,
Na hinna sia a thak suaksak ding.
Aw piandang hi Jesu Kris,
Hehpihna tutphah hi;
Khial a nin ka hi zong a,
Hon ngaidam pet mah hi;
Ka loh zoh man hi lou hi,
Amah hehpihna tut phah hi.

songs.title: Zakai Siah Dongpa Mi Neu Khat Hi A
songs.author: Mrs Nr Schaper

lines: Zakai siah dongpa mi neu khat hi a,
Jesu munuam hongpai;
A niam manin theipi kung kahtou,
Tua mun Jesu hongpai ding ngak;
Tua lam pi ah Jesu hongpai a,
A dak touh chiang'  Zakai mu hi;
Zakai hong kum meng in,
Tuni'n na inn ah kongtung ding hi;
Zakai hong kum meng in,
Tuni'n na inn ah kongtung ding hi.

songs.title: Jesu'n Hongluah Nung Ka Lung Nuam Den
songs.author: Eft

lines: Jesu'n hongluah nung ka lung nuam den hi,
Tua bang nopna na thei ngei keng;
Jesu'n hongluah nung ka lungnuam den hi,
Amah phat la sa tawntung ning.
Pathian, naupangte vualzawl in,
Amaute kem thimthiam in;
Naupangte in Nang hon thei,
Hon it in, Na nna sem uhen.

songs.title: Jesu'n Ni Zung Hiding Hong Deih
songs.author: Lellie Talbot

lines: Jesu'n ni zung hiding hong deih,
Nisim khuavak sak ding;
Amah lungdam sak tawntung ding,
Mun khempeuh a tang ding.
Ni zung khat, ni zung khat,
Jesu'n ni zung hi ding hong deih;
Ni zung khat, ni zung khat,
Amah ding' nizung hi ning.
Hong panpih ding Jesu ngen ning,
Mohna pan hong kem ding,
Amah hoih na ki mu sak ning,
Amah ding vak sak ning.
Kei Jesu ding ni zung hi ning,
Tum peuh leng hi thei ding;
A chik lai peuh a na sem ning,
Amah kiang teng den ning.

songs.title: Khelna Kol But Kitan Ta E
songs.author: Dc

lines: Khelhna kol but kitan ta e,
Kei ka suak ta, suakta;
Khelhna te mang, khelhnate siang,
Kei ka suak ta, suakta.
Hallelujah Toupa Jesu,
Ka tan in si ta hi;
Hallelujah Hallelujah
Kei ka suakta, suakta.
Tu'n ka ging ta,
Tu'n ka muangta;
Jesu kei tang' si hi,
Kros tung ah a sisan luangta;
Moh na pan hong khah ding.
Kha namsau la unla,
Thu dik gum in gal dou un;
Kha namsau la unla,
Tua in gal te tai sak hi;
Kha namsau la unla,
A hat na ah lungmuang un;
Namsau la, namsau la, namsau la.
Muanna ka ngah tuipi bang,
Muanna ka ngah tuipi bang;
Muanna ka ngah tuipi bang,
Lungsung ah,
Muanna ka ngah tuipi bang,
Muanna ka ngah tuipi bang;
Muanna ka ngah tuipi bang,
Lungsung ah.
Nopna ka ngah tuipi bang,
Nopna ka ngah tuipi bang;
Nopna ka ngah tuipi bang,
Lungsung ah,
Nopna ka ngah tuipi bang,
Nopna ka ngah tuipi bang;
Nopna ka ngah tuipi bang,
Lungsung ah.
Pahna ka ngah tuipi bang,
Pahna ka ngah tuipi bang;
Pahna ka ngah tuipi bang,
Lungsung ah,
Pahna ka ngah tuipi bang,
Pahna ka ngah tuipi bang;
Pahna ka ngah tuipi bang,
Lungsung ah.

songs.title: Hiai Hi Ka Lungdamna Penpen Ka Gen Chim Ngeilou

lines: Hiai hi ka lungdamna penpen ka genchim ngeilouh,
Pathian Tapa lei ah hongpiang kei ding in;
Banghang' ka lungkham lai ding hiam?
Banghang' ka lunglau lai ding hiam?
Aman ka lung kham leh lau thei,
Ka khelh moh puak gik pua hi;
Amah Hondam dia thau nilh Jesu Kris hi.

songs.title: Kei Tang A Hong Si Kua Hiam
songs.author: Owl

lines: Kei tang a hong si kua hiam?
Jesu hi, Jesu hi;
Hon it man a hong si hi,
Hi, kei a ding hi.
Kei hon kem a veng kua hiam?
Jesu hi, Jesu hi;
Hon it man a hong kem hi,
Hi, kei hon veng hi.
Ka thum na hon dawng kua hiam?
Jesu hi, Jesu hi;
Hong it man ka thum na ja,
Hi, ka thum ja hi.

songs.title: Pak Hong Pak E, Kua Bawl Hiam

lines: Pak hong pak e, kua bawl hiam?
Nang bawl kei bawl hi lou;
Pak hong pak e kua bawl hiam?
Ei Pathian bawl hi e.
Vuah hong ju e kua bawl hiam?
Nang bawl kei bawl hi lou;
Vuah hong ju e kua bawl hiam?
Ei Pathian bawl hi e.
Huih hong nung e kua bawl hiam?
Nang bawl kei bawl hi lou;
Huih hongnung e kua bawl hiam?
Ei Pathian bawl hi e.
Ka hinna aw Toupa phat,
Ka hinna aw Toupa phat;
Ka sung a om teng teng toh
A min siang phat in.
Lalte Lal (tangtawn in, tangtawn in),
Toute  Tou ( tangtawn in, tangtawn in);
Lalte Lal ( tangtawn in, tangtawn in),
Lalte Lal leh Toute Tou,
Ka hinna aw Toupa phat,
Ka hinna aw Toupa phat;
Ka sung a om teng teng toh
A min siang phat in.
Jesu Kris Lampi hi,
Jesu Kris Thutak hi;
Jesu Kris Hinna hi,
Amah keia hi.
Na hoih sem ni, Na hoih sem ni,
Na hoih sem ni, Jesu ding;
Thuhoih gen ni, La hoih sa ni,
Na sem ni, A mah ding.
Sep kuh kal ni, sep kuh kal ni,
Sep kuh kal ni, Jesu ding;
Pathian itna i lung dam hi,
Mi khem peuh kiang' gen ni.
Phat un, phat un,
Naupang neute Pathian;
Itna hi, itna hi,
Phat un, phat un,
Naupang neute Pathian;
Itna hi, itna hi.
It un, it un,
Naupang neute Pathian;
Itna hi, itna hi,
It un, it un,
Naupang neute Pathian;
Itna hi, itna hi.
A na sem un,
Naupang neute Pathian;
Itna hi, itna hi,
A na sem un,
Naupang neute Pathian;
Itna hi, itna hi.
Khusak, khusak,
Manglukhu khusak un;
Itna hi, itna hi,
Khusak, khusak,
Manglukhu khusak un;
Itna hi, itna hi.
Tunin Nipi Skul i kai,
Jesu'n i thum na ja hi;
Amah phat in la sa ni,
I Kumpi Toupa Jesu.
Tunin Nipi Skul i kai,
Jesu'n i thum na ja hi;
A thu manpha ngai khia ni,
Kipak in A thu jui ni.
A kilawm bel anuam bel van,
A kilawm bel anuam bel van;
Tua'h moh na om lou,
Dahna, kah na zong;
A kilawm bel ,a nuam bel van.
A kilawm bel anuam bel van,
A kilawm bel anuam bel van;
Tua'h tatte om ding,
Thupi na ngah ding;
A kilawm bel, a nuam bel van.
A hongpai chiang',
A hongpai chiang';
A suang man tam khawm ding,
A suang hoih te, suang man tamte;
A it Amah a.
Jingsol aksi te bang a,
A manglukhu jem ding in;
Thupi'n a vak ding uhi,
A manglukhu jem ding.
A la khawm ding,
A la khawm ding;
A gam a koih ding in,
A siangthou te a vak teng teng,
A it Amah a.
Naupang neute,
Naupang neute,
A Tanpa it tengteng;
Amau hi suang manpha man tam,
A it Amah a.

songs.title: Toupa Muang In La Lung Mang Ken

lines: Toupa muang in la lung mang ken,
Amah lawm muan huai hi;
Na buai na bang teng a hi zong,
Jesu'n hon pi tham ding la sa in sun vak lai;
Sa in jan mial ah zong ni sim in lam tawn in,
La sa, sa sa, sa'n.

songs.title: Hiai Ka Vak Neu Mah Leh

lines: Hiai ka vak neu mah leh, Lei tung ah tang sak ning;
Hiai ka vak neu mah leh, Lei tung ah tang sak ning;
Tang sak ning, tang sak ning, tang sak ning
Loh nua'h ka sel ding hia, I, Lei tung ah tang sak ning;
Loh nua'h ka sel ding hia, I, Lei tung ah tang sak ning;
Tang sak ning, tang sak ning, tang sak ning.
Setan in dal lou ding, Lei tung ah tang sak ning;
