Setan in dal lou ding, Lei tung ah tang sak ning;
Tang sak ning, tang sak ning, tang sak ning.

songs.title: Mit Nih Nei Ing. A Thu Muh Na'ng

lines: Mit nih nei ing, a thu muh na'ng,
Bil nih nei ing; A thu jak na'ng,
Khe nih nei ing, A lam zuih nang,
Khut nih nei ing, A na sep na'ng.
Ka muk ten a thutak gen ding,
Ka lungtang a deihlam' khang ding;
Aw Jesu honpom honnei in,
Nadeih lam thutak ah hon pi'n.

songs.title: Toupa Aw Nang Mah Kong Muanga
songs.author: Frances R Havergal

lines: Toupa aw nang mah kong muanga,
Na angsung kong bel;
Na hotdamna manpha leh kiching kong juan.
Nang kong muang hi honpi ding in,
Nang mah in nong pi;
Niteng hun teng ka taksap khempeuh nong guan.
Toupa aw nang mah kong muang hi,
Hon nusia kei in;
A tawntung in koimun peuh ah kon muang den.
Jesu hondampa hi chia,
Nang ka hon bel ding hi;(3)
Jesu hondampa hi chia ,
Nang ka hon bel ding hi.
Jesu nang ka lawm hoihpen,
Nang na hon it masa;(3)
Jesu nang ka lawm hoihpen,
Nang na hon it masa.
Lung kham leh dahna honnem,
Nang ka hon ngaipen hi;(3)
Lung kham leh dahna honnem,
Nang ka hon ngaipen hi.
Damsung ka tuahte lau keng,
Na kha'n hon ompih man;(3)
Damsung ka tuahte lau keng,
Na kha'n hon ompih man.
Namel muhkal ngak la'ng e,
Tung thangvan gamnuam ah;(3)
Namel muhkal ngak la'ng e,
Tung thangvan gamnuam ah.
Hiai hi pianthakna lampi,
Na itna'n lung sung dim sak;
Na it na la in sa nu'ng.
Sa un, sa un, sa jel un,
"Toupa Jesu ding vualjoh na,"
Mikhem peuh in hon sa un,
Toupa Jesu'n khua vannuai vai hawm.
Kros tung ah na si na bua,
Ka khelh na nong ngaidam hi;
Ka lung sung ah thu gen in.
Hiai hi na vang letna pen,
Pepa nang, thil piak zong nang;
Lung sung taksap hong guan in.
Honngai ung toupa, Hongpai in,(3)
Toupa, Hongpai in.
Kap kawm' honsam ung, Hongnai in,(3)
Toupa, Hongnai in.
Na phat lasa ung, Ngaikhia in,(3)
Toupa, Ngaikhia in.
Na ma ah thum ung, Honja in,(3)
Toupa, Honja in.

songs.title: A Pil Pa'n Suangpi Tung Ah Inn Lam A
songs.author: Ann Omley

lines: A pil pa'n suangpi tung ah inn lam a,
A pil pa'n suangpi tung ah inn lam a;
A pil pa'n suangpi tung ah inn lam a,
Tua khit chiang' vuahpi hong ju.
Vuahpi hong ju in tui hong khang a,
Vuahpi hong ju in tui hong khang a;
Vuahpi hong ju in tui hong khang a,
Hizong suangpi tung' inn ling lou hi.
A hai pa'n sehnel tung ah inn lam a,
A hai pa'n sehnel tung ah inn lam a;
A hai pa'n sehnel tung ah inn lam a,
Tua khit chiang' vuahpi hong ju.
Jesu Kris tung' na nun tak na lam in,
Jesu Kris tung' na nun tak na lam in;
Jesu Kris tung' na nun tak na lam in,
Vualzawl na hong tung sak ding.

songs.title: Jacob Kal Bi Kah Tou Hi Hang

lines: Jacob kal bi kah tou hi hang,
Jacob kal bi kah tou hi hang;
Jacob kal bi kah tou hi hang,
Kros sepaihte aw.
Kalbi suan in sang sem sem hang,
Kalbi suan in sang sem sem hang;
Kalbi suan in sang sem sem hang,
Kros sepaihte aw.
Khial aw ka Jesu na it hiam?
Khial aw ka Jesu na it hiam?
Khial aw ka Jesu na it hiam?
Kros sepaihte aw.
Na it sam leh a na sem ve,
Na it sam leh a na sem ve;
Na it sam leh a na sem ve,
Kros sepaihte aw.
Thou in, vak in, pathian pah tawi,
Thou in, vak in, pathian pah tawi;
Thou in, vak in, pathian pah tawi,
Kros sepaihte aw.

songs.title: Apha Bel Lawm Ding Jesu A Hi

lines: Apha bel lawm ding Jesu a hi,(2)
Ka sap chiang' aman hon ja,
Ka puk dek chiang hong kem hi;
Aw apha bel lawm ding Jesu a hi.
Apha bel muan ding Jesu a hi,(2)
Amah tung na kingak leh,
A tawp dong in hong kem ding;
Aw apha bel muan ding Jesu a hi.
Apha bel sim ding laisiangthou hi,(2)
Ni sim a na sim peuh leh,
Na paina peuh hong huh ding;
Aw apha bel sim ding laisiangthou hi.
Naupangte Toupa phat ni,
Amah phat la sa ni;
Naupangte Toupa phat ni,
Toupa phat ni.
Thupha hong pia hi phat ni,
I Toupa pahtawi ni;
Thupha hong pia hi phat ni,
Toupa phat ni.
Khawlni hong pia hi phat ni,
I Toupa pahtawi ni;
Khawlni hong pia hi phat ni,
Toupa phat ni.
Nipi skul hong pia hi,
I Toupa pahtawi ni;
Nipi skul hong pia hi,
Toupa phat ni.
Hong sinsak ding hong pia hi,
I Toupa pahtawi ni;
Hong sinsak ding hong pia hi,
Toupa phat ni.
Pathian kiang' thum ni,
Unau pa, Unau nu, nu te leh pa te ding;
Aw Toupa vualzawl in.
Pathian kiang' thum ni,
Dam lou te, gim thuak te leh mi hat nun nem ding;
Aw Toupa vualzawl in.
Jesu hondampa,
It min a ngen in khelh na pan a hon tan hi;
Aw Toupa hon thei in.

songs.title: Na Lung Kong Khak Ah Jesu'n Hong Ngak
songs.author: Hdc

lines: Na lung kong khak ah Jesu'n hong ngak,
Na lung gitlouhna pai khia in la;
A hong kiuh na ngaih sak inla,
Na lung sung' Amah teng sak in.

songs.title: I Huh Thei Jesu La Sak In
songs.author: Maa

lines: I huh thei Jesu,(3) la sak in;
I huh thei la sak in,(2)
I huh thei Jesu la sak in.
I huh thei Jesu,(3) thilpiak in;
I huh thei thilpiak in,(2)
I huh thei Jesu thilpiak in.
I huh thei Jesu,(3) nasep in;
I huh thei nasep in,(2)
I huh thei Jesu nasep in.
I huh thei Jesu,(3) itna in;
I huh thei itna in,(2)
I huh thei Jesu itna in.

songs.title: Kei Hong Sap Chiang', Ken Na Dawng Ning
songs.author: Ejl

lines: Kei hong sap chiang', ken na dawng ning,(3)
Ka min hong sap ken bil na doh ning.
Mun khat pan bil doh ning,(3)
Mun khat pan bil doh ning hong sap chiang',
Mun khat pan bil doh ning,(3)
Mun khat pan bil doh ning hong sap chiang'
Nang hong sap chiang', nang na dawng ding,(3)
Nang na dawng ding, Na lungsim a dik nak leh.
Nang hong sap chiang' nang na dawng ding,(2)
Nang na dawng ding, Na lungsim a dik nak leh;
Nang hong sap chiang' nang na dawng ding,(2)
Nang na dawng ding, Na lungsim a dik nak leh.
Na mel theih leh, Nang na dawng ding,(3)
Nang na dawng ding, Amah na mel theih nak leh.
Na mel theih leh, Nang na dawng ding,(2)
Nang na dawng ding, Amah na mel theih nak leh;
Na mel theih leh, Nang na dawng ding,(2)
Nang na dawng ding, Amah na mel theih nak leh.

songs.title: Tu'n Kei Ka Ihmu Ta Dia Angel Te'n Kei Hong Ching Hi Toupa

lines: Tu'n kei ka ihmu ta dia,
Angelte'n kei hong ching hi Toupa;
Toupa aw, ka kha kem in,
Angelte'n kei hong ching hi.
Sun leh jan in,
Angelte'n kei hong ching hi,Toupa;
Sun leh jan in,
Angelte'n kei hong ching hi.
Thou khia lou ka si zong a,
Angelte'n kei hong ching hi Toupa;
Toupa aw, ka kha la in,
Angelte'n kei hong ching hi.

songs.title: Sisan A Luang Lui Khat Om Hi

lines: Sisan a luang lui khat om hi,
Jesu kros apan in;
Kuapeuh tua lui tui a kisil,
A khelhna siang ding hi;
Ken kaging ta, Ken ka thei,
Jesu kei tang si hi;
Kros tung ah amah pum kipia,
kei hong hondam ding in.

songs.title: Tung Van A Aksi Te Jan Chiang A Vak Uh
songs.author: Jleonard

lines: Tung van a ak si te jan chiang a vak uh,
I lung tang hat lou te Toupa kiang ah thum;
I lei neu chik te in Toupa phat la sa,
I kal suan nang i mai I ngatna lam lam.
I khut neu siang thou in I om tung i koih,
Vualzawl na thu ngen in A kiang i thum a;
I mit neu te si in I khe te khep in,
Toupa a ngel in veng A deih lam sem te.
"Ka hon om pih tawn tung",
Hondampan hong chi;
"Na thum na uh ja ing,
Amau te dawng ing;
Ni teng kong pan pih ding,
Kon it mah mah man',
Kong pi tawn tung bang bang,
Kong pi tawn tung ding".

songs.title: Naupante  Lawmhondam  Pa Khat Veu Han Mial Ah Lum
songs.author: Lois E Lebar

lines: Naupang te lawm,
Hondam pa khat vei han mial ah lum;
Easter ni a hong tun in,
Han kongkhak tuk mang ta,
Tu in hing hi, Amah hing !
Ka hondampa hing hi;
Hing mah tham e,
Hing tawn tung hi;
Easter ni in thou kik.

songs.title: Thuma In Amah Mu Ning, Jesu Kumpipa

lines: Thumna in Amah mu ning, Jesu Kum pi pa,(3)
Amah mu tawn tung ning.
Ka mu ding, Jesu kumpipa,(3)
Amah mu tawn tung ning.
Bible ah  Amah mu ning, Jesu Kum pi pa,(3)
Amah mu tawn tung ning.
Meipi tung ah hong pai ding, Jesu Kum pi pa,(3)
Amah mu tawn tung ning.
Kumpi te kumpipa hi, Jesu Kum pi pa,(3)
Amah mu tawn tung ning.
Jesu katuak lam kathuam ah,
Lampi nih ka hi;
Setan zong tua mun ah ding a,
Hiai lam hongpai in;
Nopna atam atam kong pia ding hi hong chi hi,
Ken, "Utkeng," ching;
"Hiah Jesu ding Amah hong piak en ve,
Hiah ka mohna maisak hi;
Van ah inn hongpia lai hi,"
Phat un Jesu kei lampi.

songs.title: Hong Luang E, Hong Luang Tuipi Lian Bang In

lines: Hong luang e, hong luang tuipi lian bang in;
Jesu itna'n hon tum, Tuipi luang bang in,
Tuipi tung ah, tuipi tung ah, Jesu hondampa'n honpi
Tuipi tung ah, tuipi tung ah, Tuipi tung ah honpi.

songs.title: A Ut Peuhman Toupa Kiang Hongpai Hen

lines: A ut peuhmah Toupa kiang hongpai hen,
A ut peuhmah Toupa kiang hongpai hen;
A ut peuhmah Toupa kiang hongpai hen,
Kua mah hawlkik lou ding;
Jesun'n Jesu'n, A lungkhamte damsak,
Jesun'n Jesu'n, A lungkhamte damsak;
Jesun'n Jesu'n, A lungkhamte damsak,
Nang hong damsak ding.

songs.title: A Dim Let E, A Dim Let E

lines: A dim let e, a dim let e,
Ka nou a dim, a dim let e;
Toupa'n hon hut nung,
Nuam a sak in kasa hi;
Ka nou a dim a dim let e.
Hinna tanghou in ka kivak,
Hinna tuikhuk ah tui ka dawn;
Jesu'n agen khinzou hi,
"Tua tui dawn, Dangtak ngeingei nawnlou ding hi."
Dangtak nawnlou ding maw?
Dangtak nawnlou ding;
Dangtak nawnlou ding maw?
Dangtak nawnlou ding;
Jesu'n agen khinzou hi,
"Tua tui dawn, Dangtak ngeingei nawnlou ding hi,
Dangtak nawnlou ding hi."

songs.title: Muanna Kim In Na Kem Ding

lines: Muanna kim in na kem ding,
Muanna kim in na kem ding;
Muanna kim in na kem ding,
Nangah lung sim nga te.
Na khelhna sandup zonga,
Na khelhna sandup zonga;
Na khelhna sandup zonga,
Vuk bangin ngou ding hi.
Toupa angak mite jaw,
Toupa angak mite jaw;
Toupa angak mite jaw,
A hatna uh thak ding.
Na suahthak ding hi, kong chih,
Na suahthak ding hi, kong chih;
Na suahthak ding hi, kong chih,
Lamdang sa kei hial in.
Toupa in hongsuahtaksak leh,
Toupa in hongsuahtaksak leh;
Toupa in hongsuahtaksak leh,
Na suakta takpi ding.
Toupa kiang' lungdamthu gen un,
Toupa kiang' lungdamthu gen un;
Toupa kiang' lungdamthu gen un,
A min siangthou phat un.
Pathian in hong it man,
A tapa neih sun pia,
Kalvari a si ding,'
Mohna pan hong khah ding,'
Ni khat tei hong kik ding,
Tua thupi mah mah ding;
Kei hong tatna lamdang hi.

songs.title: Mihing Man Ding' Nou Kon Bawl Ding
songs.author: Hdc

lines: Mihing man ding' nou kon bawl ding,
Mihing man ding', Mihing man ding';
Mihing man ding' nou kon bawl ding,
Nong zuih peuh uh leh,
Nong zuih peuh uh leh,
Nong zuih peuh uh leh;
Mihing man ding' nou kon bawl ding,
Nong zuih peuh uh leh.
Ngai Kris sapna ka kiang hong un,
Ka kiang hong un, Ka kiang hong un;
Ngai Kris sapna ka kiang hong un,
Khawlna kong pia ding;
Khawlna kong pia ding,
Khawlna kong pia ding;
Ngai Kris sapna ka kiang hong un,
Khawlna kong pia ding.
Khovel thukhen ding' hongpai lou,
Moh sak ding hongpai lou;
A zong ding kia in hongpai lou,
Hon dam ding hong pai hi;
"Hondampa" chin sam lehang;
"Hondampa" chin sam lehang,
"Hondampa" chin sam lehang dik;
A min hon dam pa hi.

songs.title: Jesun Numei Tui Pia, Tuikhuk A Omlou Tui

lines: Jesun numei tui pia, Tuikhuk a omlou tui,
Jesun numei tui pia, Tuikhuk a omlou tui;
La sa in pai khia hi, Midang te honpi hi,
Tua tui dawn ding hon pi,Tuikhuk a om lou tui.
Jesun tui pia lai hi, Tuikhuk a omlou tui,
Jesun tui pia lai hi, Tuikhuk a omlou tui;
A ging ta hong pai te, A thu pom te kiang ah,
Aman tuihing pia ding, Tuikhuk a om lou tui.

songs.title: Nikodem Mah Bang A Na Suah Thak Ngeingei Ding

lines: Nikodem mah bang a,
Na suah thak ngeingei ding;
Nikodem mah bang a,
Na suah thak ngeingei ding;
Janlai' Jesu kiang' hong,
Nang ding' zong tun hun om;
Nikodem mah banga,
Na suah thak ngeingei ding.

songs.title: Mohna Silsiang Thei Lui Khat Ken Ka Thei
songs.author: Ocl

lines: Mohna silsiangthei lui khat ken ka thei,
Janmial zong sunvak suahna mun ka thei;
Puakgik ki sung khia,
Mitdukten muthei;
Thahat na lamdang om hi,
Kalvari sisan luang ah.
Hallelujah, 'lelujah!
Amah kalawm hi, kalawm
Jing chiang' bahna hongtung zong,
Halelujah, Amah kalawm.
Jesu'n naupang neute it a,
Naupang lian zong, naupang neu zong;
Jesu'n naupang neute it a,
"Hongpai sak un," chi.
A neu khat, a neu nih, Naupang neu thum zong,
A neu li, a neu nga, naupang guk zong;
Neu sagih, a neu giat, naupang neu kua zong,
Naupang neu sawm hong un.
Banghang' aksite tang hiam?
Banghang tuipi dumthei hiam ?
Lawm aw, nang honghilh dih ve,
Ken zong kong itna hang honghilh dih ning.
Pasian in aksite bawl,
Pasian in tuipi zong bawl,
Pasian bawl bangbang om uh
Pasian hongbawl hang' ken zong hong it hi'ng.
Ka hondampa'n kei hon neita,
Amah pan in, vakmang kei ning;
Ka hondampa'n kei hon neita,
Amah pan in, vakmang kei ning;
Ka Toupa lungkhamsak nuam nawnlou hing.
Ka Toupa lungkham sak nuam nawn lou hi'ng,
Ka Toupa lungkham sak nuam nawn lou hi'ng;
Ka Toupa lungkham sak nuam nawn lou hi'ng.
Jesu Kris tuni'n angei,
Amen, sanggam, Amen,
Hinna, thutak leh lampi,
Amen, sanggam, Amen.
Amen, sanggam, Amen, sanggam,
Amen, sanggam, Amen,
Ka hondampa a hin kathei,
Amen, sanggam, Amen!
Amawk in hong ngaidam ding,
Amen, sanggam, Amen,
Lungsung muanna namu ding,
Amen, sanggam, Amen.
Kris jui in khovel nusia'n,
Amen, sanggam, Amen,
Lungsung nuamna namu ding,
Amen, sanggam, Amen.
A chiklaipeuh Jesu kul,
Amen, sanggam, Amen,
A hatna kia'n vualzou hang,
Amen, sanggam, Amen.
Amawk in hotdam hihang,
Amen, sanggam, Amen,
Mohtanna om nawnlou hi,
Amen, sanggam, Amen.
Nipi jing kipah huai,
Nipi jing kipah huai;
La sa'n, thum in, Bible sim ni,
Tu Nipi jing kipah huai.
Pathian in nulmang ta,
Ka suakta ta, ka kipak,
Pathian in nulmang ta,
Isai laibu ka en ding;
Bung sawmli leh li,
Sawmnih leh nih thum;
Kei hon chihna hi,
Tu'n ka kikou thei nulmang ta hi.
Ka muang lah nawn kei hi,
Athu kei ding in hun hi,
Johan bungthum en in,
Tang sawmthum leh guk in gen;
Hon kipaksak lai,
Bangding' ka dah dia,
Aman nulmangta,
La sa'n kikou ning, Hon hotdam man.

songs.title: Jui Ding! Jui Ding! Jesu Kajui Ding Hi
songs.author: W O Cushing

lines: Jui ding! Jui ding! Jesu kajui ding hi,
Koi ah zong munchih ah kajui jel ding hi;
Jui ding! Jui ding! Jesu kajui ding hi,
Aman hon piina peuh ah kajui jel ding.
Amah nisim ka it semsem,
Amah nisim ka it semsem;
A kiang nai ah om tawntung ning,
Amah nisim' ka it semsem.

songs.title: Tukmang Ta, Tukmang Ta, Tukmang Ta

lines: Tukmang ta, Tukmang ta, Tukmang ta,
Ka lungsung puakgik khempeuh tukmang ta;
Tukmang ta, Tukmang ta, Tukmang ta,
Ka lungsung puakgik khempeuh tukmang ta;
Ka mohna teng siang ta, Sisan luang nuai ah (Hallelujah),
Tukmang ta, Tukmang ta, Tukmang ta,
Ka lungsung puakgik khempeuh tukmang ta.

songs.title: Lamdang Takpi, Jesu Kei-A Hi A

lines: Lamdang takpi, Jesu kei-a hi a,
Lamdang takpi, Nuntakna thak hongguan;
Thupi takpi, Amah in hong deihsak,
Lamdang takpi hi; Jesu kei tang' si!

songs.title: Nisim Jesu Toh Om Ama Ni Sang'nuam Zo Sem Hi
songs.author: Robert C Loveless

lines: Nisim Jesu toh om, (Nisim Jesu toh om),
Ama ni sang' nuam zo sem hi, (Ama sang' nuam hi);
Nisim Jesu toh om, (Nisim Jesu toh om),
Amah ka it semsem, (Ka it semsem hi)
Jesun hong hu hong kem,
Amah ka ngak ka Muanpa hi;
Nisim Jesu toh om,
Ama ni sang' nuam zo sem hi.

songs.title: Kris Kei A, He,Kris Kei A Hi

lines: Kris kei a, He, Kris kei a hi;
Honpa, Kumpipa leh Toupa,
Lungmuanna la sa'n ka kikou,
Kris kei a, He, Kris kei a hi;
Niteng lampi a ka pai lai in, Kris kei a hi.
Laisiangthou, Pathian laibu,
Gou manpha keia na hi;
Kong kipatna honghilh ding,
Bang hi ka hiam honghilh ding.
Ka mawkvak chiang' hongtai ding,
Honpia itna honhilh ding;
Honpii ding, hongveng ding nang,
Hon mohsakthei, nuamsak thei.
A lungkham hong khammuan ding,
Hiai gamdai a kagim lai;
Ginna hing hong musak ding,
Sihna tung' vualzoh theih na'ng.
Malam nopna honghilh ding,
Mikhialte hekpa hi ding;
Aw nang Pathian laisiangthou,
Gou manpha keia na hi.
Laisiangthou, Laisiangthou,
Hi, kei dia gelh ahi;
Pathian thu kia ka-kingak na hi,
Laisiangthou, Laisiangthou.
Alamdang, alamdang Jesu!
Nang toh kua ki-tehthei!
Alamdang, alamdang Jesu !
Bangteng sang hoihjaw chi'n kei ding.
Alamdang, alamdang Jesu!
Ka kha'n hon it dan tel!
Ahoihpen sang' hoihjaw chia,
Jesu aw, kei dingin.
Aki-lawm leh hoih khempeuh,
Thilsiam lian leh aneu;
Apil leh a lamdangte,
Avek un Pathian bawl.
Sing leh pakhoih a namkim,
Tungleng leh nuaileng zong;
A jia namkim a kilawm,
Avek un Pathian bawl.
Tuk leh khal, nipi, phalbi,
Huihkhi, nisa, vuah zong;
Luita, tuipi, guam leh mual,
Avek un pathian bawl.
I mit muhna din honpia,
I kam phatna ding in;
Pathian hat, thupi phat un,
Bangkim siampa phat ni.

songs.title: Min Ka Theih La' Jesu Ngaih Penpen
songs.author: Ll

lines: Min ka theih la' Jesu ngaih penpen,
Amin ngaih bangbang' Amah hoihkim hi,
Tua hihman amah ken ka it penpen;
Aw min katheih lak' Jesu ngaih penpen.
Mangpha, Mangpha, Mangpha,
Eite i maitai hi,
Mangpha, Mangpha, Mangpha,
Amah i itman in.
Mangpha, Mangpha, Mangpha,
Eite i lungdam hi;
Jesu kiang' zot lai tak';
Mangpha, Mangpha, Mangpha!
Tuimal neuneu kigawm,
Leimal neuneu ten;
Tuipilianpi bawl in,
Gam kilawm bawl hi.
Nasep hoih, itna thu,
Neu khakha kigawm;
I lei Eden bang sak,
Tung thangvan bang sak.
Tuailai khut a nasep,
Hehpihna a sep;
Gam tampi vualzawlna,
Awilou gam tanpha'n.
Mitphiatkal sau loulou,
Simmoh huai mahleh;
Kum tampi hongching in,
Tang tawn hongching hi.
Amah phaijang Lili pallun,
Amah Jingsol Aksi vak;
Amah sangsawm lai a hoihpen,
Miteng theih ding' ki-phamoh.
Miteng theih ding' ki-phamoh,
Miteng theih ding' ki-phamoh;
Miteng theih ding' ki-phamoh,
Jesu kua hiam.
Pathian Tapa mihing hongsuak,
Miteng ding' thuak in si;
Tangtawn hinna i neih nan'ng hi
Miteng theih ding' ki-phamoh.
Hankhuk pan thoukik van ah om,
Amah leitung hondampa;
Kumpipa lian in hongpai ding,
Miteng theih ding' ki-phamoh.

songs.title: Hallelu, Hallelu, Hallelu, Hallelu, Toupa Phat Un

lines: Hallelu, Hallelu, Hallelu, Hallelujah, Toupa phat un,
Hallelu, Hallelu, Hallelu, Hallelujah, Toupa phat un;
Toupa phat un, Hallelujah, Toupa phat un, Hallelujah,
Toupa phat un, Hallelujah, Toupa phat un.

songs.title: Pathian In Jing Khang Thumna Dawng
songs.author: Salvation Army

lines: Pathian in jing khang thumna dawng,
Sunlai tak in zong dawng (hon dawng);
Pathian in nitak thumna dawng,
Na lungtang diksak in.
Jesu jing khang in hongpai thei,
Sunlai tak' hongpai thei (pai thei);
Jesu nitak in hongpai thei,
Na lungtang dik sak in.

songs.title: Nikhat Hunzat Na'ng, Hun Masa Jingsang
songs.author: John Parker

lines: Nikhat hunzat na'ng, Hun masa jingsang,
Hon nang thumna hi, ei ding',
Thum nate gim namtui bangin jamtou,
Pak namtui bang jamtou.
Jan khomial hongtun chiang' na dah kei ding,
Na lungmuangsak ding thumna'n;
Jingkhua hongvak chiang' Nuamna sausak ding,
Mialna avak sak ding.
Ja, (Ja ji, ja hi)
tuipi bang ja (ja hi tuipi bang),
Tung a vanpi bang sang hi (sang hi);
Thuk, (thuk hi, thuk) thuk,
tuipi (tuipi) thuk pen bang,
Hondampa itna (Hondampa itna);
Kei (Kei it tuak) it (kei it)
tuak kei leng zong,
A ta it, a kep ka hi (ka hi);
a thu in hong hilh hi,
A itna'n koi peuh ah hong ban hi.

songs.title: Ginna Hat In Thuchiam Mu A

lines: Ginna hat in thuchiam mu a,
Pathian kia mitsuan ni;
Hihtheih louh chih peuhmah nuihsan,
Hihzou ding, chi'n kikou;
Hihzou, hihzou ding, chi'n, kikou,
Hihtheih louh chih peuhmah nuihsan,
Hihzou ding, chi'n kikou.

songs.title: Jesu Kiang Ah Kei Pai Ning

lines: Jesu kiang ah kei pai ning,
Avak ah, Avak ah;
Amah toh ton in pai ning,
Ka Toupa vak ah.
Khelh ngaihdamna ken mu ning,
Avak ah, Avak ah;
Khelhna ken tawpsan ta ning,
Ka Toupa vak ah.
Toupa vak ah vapai ni,
A vak ah, A vak ah;
Toupa vak ah vapai ni,
I Toupa vak ah.
Jesu Na kia ken sem ning,
Avak ah, Avak ah;
Hatna,zohna ken mu ding,
I Toupa vak ah.
Setanin hongzou lou ding,
Avak ah, Avak ah;
Pathianin honghuh ding hi,
I Toupa vak ah.
Sihna ahong tun chiang in,
Avak ah, Avak ah;
Bangmah ken lau nawn kei ning,
I Toupa vak ah.
Pathian vak ah kei lut ning,
Avak ah, Avak ah;
Tangtawnin kei tengta ning;
I Toupa vak ah.
Nungjui sawmleh nihte,
Jesu'n panpih ding' sam;
Simon, Peter, Andru, Jacob leh Johan,
Philip, Thoma, Mathai, Jacob Alphia tapa,
Thatdai, Simon, Juda leh Bartholomai.
Ei zong hongsam hi,
Ei zong hongsam hi;
Eite zong a nungjui,
Nangmah kei mah zong;
Ei zong hongsam hi,
Ei zong hongsam hi;
Eite zong a nungjui,
Amah na sem ding.
Jesu vuaksuak ngeilou,
Vuaksuak lou, vuaksuak lou;
Jesu vuaksuak ngeilou,
Ii, Ii, Ii!
Jesu hon taisak thei,
Taisak thei, taisak thei;
Jesu'n hon taisak thei,
He, He, He!
Hongpai kik ding, Hongpai kik ding,
Jingsang zong, sun zong hithei;
Nitak lam zong, aw baihguih thei!
Hongpai kik ding, Hongpai kik ding,
Aw tua ni mahmah nuam ta zen in chia!
Jesu hongpai kik ding hi!

songs.title: Jan Leh Tunileh Tangtawnin Jesu A Ngeingei
songs.author: Ab Simpson

lines: Jan leh tuni leh tangtawnin Jesu a ngeingei,
Bangteng dang zong Jesu danglou,
A min thupi hen! A min thupi hen, A min thupi hen;
Bangteng dang zong Jesu danglou, A min thupi hen.
Jesu toh ton ing,
Lamtawn in ton ing,
Nisim in ton ing;
Jesu toh ton ing,
Jesu bek toh kei ton ing.

songs.title: Jesu Kilawmna Kei Ah Kimuta Hen
songs.author: Albert Osborn

lines: Jesu kilawmna kei ah kimuta hen (ta hen),
Ami itna leh sianna lamdang khempeuh;
Aw Nang, Pathian Khasiang,
Ka pianken bawlhoih in,
Jesu hondampa kilawmna kei a kimuh mateng.
Halh un, Pathian mite!
Lungkhampih ding bangmah omlou;
Lauh ding zong bangmah omlou hi;
Ginlah ding zong omlou;
Thei un! Jesu vuaksuak ngeilou;
Ba' muang a kikou mailou !
Jingsang ding na lungkhampih uh leh na kisik ding uh.

songs.title: Ngai Un! Ngai Un! Kongkhak A Dingin Kongkiu, Kiu, Kiu

lines: Ngai un! Ngai un! kongkhak a dingin kongkiu, kiu, kiu,
Ngai un! Ngai un! Kongkhak a dingin kongkiu, kiu, kiu;
Khatpeuh in ka aw ja a, Khatpeuh in ka aw ja a,
Kong honghon leh, honleh,
Kong honghon leh, Konglut ding hi.

songs.title: Thupi, Halleluijah! Krist In Hong Hongkhia
songs.author: N E B; Leland Green

lines: Thupi, Hallelujah! Kris in hong honkhia (Thupi Hallelujah)
Thupi Hallelujah ! Ken nuntakna thak mu;
Mohnate hong maisak, Kei vantung juan' kapai,
Tua ah ka tengden ding.
Thupi, Hallelujah! Kei hongla pah ding hi.
Van Kumpipa ta eite,
Zinlam a nuam a lasa;
Phattuak Honpa la'n phat un,
A nasep dan lamdang hi.
Pathian innpi juan' pai hang,
I pate paina jui hang;
Tuin amau nuamta uh,
En zong nopna mupah ding.
Leitung gamdai gamkeu ah,
Lungmuanga kapai lai un;
Toupa nang hong makaih in,
Nangmah hongjui tawntung nu'ng.

songs.title: Lungkham Dahna Kinepna Ding Neilou Te'n

lines: Lungkham dahna kinepna ding neilou te'n,
Pathian muang in lungsung nopna kawm hen aw.
Hi leitung nuntak sung I lungkham dahna'n,
Van a nopna itan ding bukzou ngeilou.

songs.title: Thangvan Sunni Tang, Thangvan Sunni Tang
songs.author: Rev.H T Zelly

lines: Thangvan sunni tang, Thangvan sunni tang,
Pathian thupi na'n ka kha dimsak;
Halleluijah, kipakin ka dim,
A phat la kasa; Jesu kei a.

songs.title: Keimah Ka Hi Thohnawnna Leh Hinna

lines: Keimah ka hi thohnawnna leh hinna,
Kei hon gingta peuhmah te bel si mahleh;
Hing kik ding hi, Hing kik ding hi,
Huan, hing a kei hon gingta peuhmah te bel silou ding,
Singei ngeilou ding.

songs.title: Jesu Nungjui Ing, Niteng In Jui Ing

lines: Jesu nungjui ing, Niteng in jui ing,
Ma akaih chiang' honsia sakthei omlou;
Nisa zong liap zong, Bangteng hongtung zong,
Jesu ka hondampa ka bangkim hi.
Van a Pathian, naupang khempeuh
Kem thiamthiam in vualzawl in;
Amau Nangmah hongtheih, hong it,
Na nasem hen koipeuh ah.
Toupa Nang ding' hong vaksak',
Toupa Nang ding' hong vaksak';
Leitung mialna lak ah,
Hong siangsak', hong ngousak';
Toupa Nang ding' hong vaksak',
Toupa Nang ding' hong vaksak';
Nangmel ken kongmuh dong in.
Jesu bang kapia diam?
Ka septheih sep ka ut;
Jesu bang kapia diam?
Ka lungtang itna teng,
Ka khut leh khe leh sum teng zong,
Ka phatna leh late,
Avek in Jesu pia ning,
Bangkim Amah a hi.
Thuk mahmah, (chiktui) ja mahmah,
A luangtawn tung chiktui khat om hi,
(luang tawntung chiktui)
Thuk mahmah, (chiktui) ja mahmah,
A luang tawn tung chiktui khat om hi.
Bei, bei, bei, bei, Hi, kamohna bei;
Tu'n keimah khan nuamsa ka lungsung la om;
Tuipi thukpi ah phum hi,
Hi, tum hoihzou kei ding in,
Tangtawn in kanungta ding,
Pathian phat in om hen.
Nou, vana meivakte, mangpha,
Nou vak tangphalou toh;
Mangpha, mel khenkhat khapi aw,
Jan kumpinu mel mual.
Aw nang sun kizepna, vakpha,
Tangpha bel, Nang sunni;
Nang khenlam ah ka kha lengtou,
Na panpih ngai nawnlou.
Ahi, Aman kei hong khotuah,
Unau bangin kei hongkem;
Ahi, Aman puakgik hongdawn,
Launa teng zong lamang hi.
Ahi, Aman kei hongveng a,
Sun leh janin hong ompih;
Ahi, kei nangawn honghu a,
Lampi-a siatna te pan'.
Mihing damsungin tuailai hun poimoh,
Na tuailai hunin na mihinna bawl;
Na hun zatdan en inla,
Na lungsim leh deih enchian in.
Na tuailai hunin Pathian thei inla;
Honsiampa thei in, Tuailai in.
Tuailai lungsim gilou mihoihlou suak,
Tuailai lungsimhoih-te mihoih hongsuak;
Mihoih a honbawl ding in,
Pathian Ta Jesu si ei di'n.
Mi Pathian theite jaw lungmuangin si;
Hiai hi Pathian theihna Jesu Kris neih;
Aman hon bawlhoih chiangin,
Pathian tate chih in i om.

songs.title: Lungnopna Ka Nei. Ka Nei, Ka Nei, Ka Nei

lines: Lungnopna ka nei, ka nei, ka nei, ka nei,
Ka lung sungah, Ka lung sungah, Ka lung sungah;
Lungnopna ka nei, ka nei, ka nei, ka nei,
Ka lung sungah, ka lungsung' omden ding.
Muanna genkhit theih vuallouh ka nei, ka nei,
Ka lung sungah, Ka lung sungah, Ka lung sungah;
Muanna genkhiak theih vuallouh ka nei, ka nei,
Ka lung sungah, ka lungsung' omden ding.
Jesu itna ken ka nei, ka nei, ka nei, ka nei,
Ka lung sungah, Ka lung sungah, Ka lung sungah;
Jesu itna ken ka nei, ka nei, ka nei,
Ka lung sungah, ka lungsung' omden ding.
Kahtou in mualtung vak, van huihsiang nunna ah,
Kahtou in mualtung vak mai hongtat vakna ah;
Mohna uplahna taisang' Tung Pathian en in,
Kahtou ni mualtung vak ah, Nang leh kei.

songs.title: Ka Meivak A Tui Guanin Vaksak In
songs.author: A Sevison

lines: Ka meivak a tui guanin vaksak in,
Ka meivak a tui guan', kong ngen;
Ka meivak a tui guanin kuangsak in,
Jing khuavak dongin hong kuangsak in.
Sa'n (Hosana chi'n), Sa'n (Hosana chi'n),
Sa'n (Kumpite kumpipa), Sa'n (phatla sa'n)
Sa'n (Hosana chi'n), Sa'n (Hosana chi'n),
Sa'n (Kumpipa phatla sa), Sa'n, (in).
Mihing man ding' hongbawl in hong zongsak;
Mihing man ding' hongbawl kong ngen;
Mihing man ding' hongbawl in hong zongsak;
Jesu hongpai ding hong zongsakin.

songs.title: Aw, Jesu Ka It, Aw Jesu Ka It
songs.author: H D C

lines: Aw, Jesu ka it, Aw, Jesu ka it,
Aw, Jesu ka it, Ka Hondampa leh lawm.
Hondam ding' a si, Hondam ding' a si,
Hondam ding' a si, Ka Hondampa leh lawm.
Hongkem ding' a hing, Hongkem ding' a hing,
Hongkem ding' a hing, Ka Hondampa leh lawm.
Hongpai kik ding hi, Hongpai kik ding hi,
Hongpai kik ding hi, Ka Kumpipa leh lawm.
Tuni'n khattei kiang' hongpi'n,
Kagen ding honghilh in, Toupa;
Ka lawmte khelhna a mang,
Lampi theilou om uh;
A khawksa lah tawmlua a,
A thumnuam lah tawmlua (tawmlua)
Ka lungtang nemsak', dimsak;
Tuni'n kha khat hongpia'n.
Nou naupangte lasa un,
Lasa un, lasa un,
Pathian siam hi, hong khotuah,
Naupangte lasa un.
Toupa'n nek leh tak pia,
Silh leh ten zong pia;
Bukna ding inn zong pia,
Amah siam kim hi.
Toupa'n eite hong it,
I taksapte thei;
Thawnpiak hoihkim hongpia,
Muanhuai tawntung hi.
Jesu kia na mitsuan in,
A mel lamdang phatak' en in;
Leitung kilawmnate hongmual ding hi,
A thupi leh hehpihna vak ah.

songs.title: Lungtaina Toh Itna Toh A Pia Mi
songs.author: M C Leatherwood

lines: Lungtaina toh itna toh a pia mi hi nu'ng Toupa;
Tunia ka khut tawite un khattei panpih hen, Toupa.
Ka khelhna silsiangta hi;
Tua kalvari kros ah;
Tu'n nisim' ka lungdam hi ;
Ka khelnate sian man in.
Hong hotdam in kidanna om (a takpiin om),
Lungsung kidanna (takpi in), lungsung kidanna;
Hong hotdam in kidanna om (a takpiin om),
Lungsung kidanna om hi.
Suangtung ka ding hallelujah,
Suangtung ka omden ding hallelujah,
A buan thuk lak pan hongkaikhia zou hi,
Suangtung ka ding den ding.
Huangsung ka om Hallujah.
Huangsung ka om den ding,Hallujah,
KA gam manna pan hongpii kik zou hi,
Huangsung ka ding den ding.
A haksat chiang thum in,
Lamet tawm chiang' thum in
Pathian in achiamsa tung sak ding,
A haksat chiang' thum in, thum in.

songs.title: Ka Lungsung Ah, Ka Lungsung Ah

lines: Ka lungsung ah, ka lungsung ah,
Honglut in Toupa Jesu aw,
Omden ding in Tuni'n honglut'
Ka lungsung ah, Toupa Jesu.

songs.title: Aw Lamdang Nah E Jesu'n Hong Muta!
songs.author: K S

lines: Aw lamdang nah e Jesu'n hong muta!
Miallak a om in vak ka muthei kei;
Aw lamdang nah e! Akhut hatin hongdom hi,
A lamdang pha penpen kei nangawn hong hu.
Kipak ing, Toupa nong hotdam,
Kipak ing Toupa hong damsak;
Kipak in Toupa kei nong piak,
Hotdamna manpha thupi a thawn.
Na sem ning, Thum ing, Nisim in amah na sem ning,
Keimah a melthupina toh mupah ding hi'ng;
Keiman a aw kabil doh ning, Keiman a deihlam telpi ning,
Jingsang khatchiang' Amah tuak ding in thou ding hi'ng.

songs.title: Piadang Sakmin A Nei, Piandang Lukhu Akhu
songs.author: A H A

lines: Piandang sakmin a nei, Piandang lukhu akhu,
Piandang vualjawlna vualzohna in pia;
Aw piandang Kalvari Piandang hong deihsakna,
Piandang ka Toupa itna piandang hi!

songs.title: Gamlapi Gan Innsung Lupna Omlou Pi
songs.author: M L

lines: Gamlapi gan innsung lupna omloupi,
Angeklai Toupa Jesu deihhuai lum hi;
A lupna mun ah van aksi ten ensuk-
Toupa Jesu lum hi, loupa keu tung ah.
Gan honte ham a, tua naungek khanglou hi,
Hihhang Toupa Jesu kap in nuaklou hi;
Toupa Jesu aw, ken kong it hong ensuk,
Ka lupna kiang hongching, hong awi ihmu in.

songs.title: Jesu, Jesu Nang Nong It Ka Thei

lines: Jesu, Jesu nang nong it ka thei,
Ka thei, ka thei, Nang a hi'ng;
Kei tang Na ding ta, Nang tang ding ning,
Leitung ka nuntak sung in Nang ding'nungta ning
Toupa,Toupa bangsem ding' nong deih?
Ka ut, ka ut, Nang a ding;
Sepding nong guan chiang, hatna nongpia,
Toupa Na thujui peuhleng na semthei ding hi'ng.

songs.title: Tam Semsem Leng Anuam Hi,Anuam Hi,Anuam Hi

lines: Tam semsem leng anuam hi, Anuam hi, anuam hi,
Tam semsem leng anuam hi, Anuam semsem hi;
Nang lawmte kei lawm hi, kei lawm te nang lawm hi,
Tam semsem leng anuam hi, Anuam semsem hi.

songs.title: Jesu Bang Veh, Na Kongkhak Hongkiu Khat Om Hi

lines: Jesu bang veh, na kongkhak hongkiu khat om hi;
Jesu bang veh, Na kongkhak hongkiu khat om hi.
Na kongkhak hongkiu khat om hi,
Na kongkhak hongkiu khat om hi;
Aw, khial aw, banghang' na hon lou?
Na kong khak hongkiu khat om hi.
Jalou na hiam? Na kongkhak hongkiu khat om hi;
Jalou na hiam? Na kongkhak hongkiu khat om hi.
Jesu hon in, Na kongkhak hongkiu khat om hi;
Jesu hon in, Na kongkhak hongkiu khat om hi.
Jesu'n hong sam, Na kongkhak hongkiu khat om hi;
Jesu'n hong sam, Na kongkhak hongkiu khat om hi.
Muanglou na hiam? na kongkhak hongkiu khat om hi;
Muanglou na hiam? na kongkhak hongkiu khat om hi.
Toupa kei khristian hinuam ing,
Ka lungsung ah, ka lungsung ah,
Toupa kei khristian hinuam ing,
Ka lungsung ah.
Ka lungsung ah (ka lungsung ah)
Ka lungsung ah (ka lungsung ah)
Toupa kei khristian hinuam ing,
Ka lungsung ah.
Toupa ken it semsem nuam ing,
Ka lungsung ah, ka lungsung ah.
Toupa ken it semsem nuam ing,
ka lungsung ah.
Toupa siangthou semsem nuam ing,
Ka lungsung ah Ka lungsung ah,
Toupa siangthou semsem nuam ing
ka lungsung ah.
Toupa kei Jesu bang nuam ing,
Ka lungsung ah, Ka lungsung ah,
Toupa kei Jesu bang nuam ing
Ka lungsung ah.

songs.title: Ka Mit Aw,Ka Mit Aw,Bang Namu?

lines: Ka mit aw, ka mit aw, bang namu?
Ka mit aw, ka mit aw, bang namu?
Vantung ah i Pa om a, It mahmah in hong ensuk;
Ka mit aw, ka mit aw, bang namu?
Ka bil aw, ka bil aw, bang naja?
Ka bil aw, ka bil aw, bang naja?
Vantung ah i Pa om a, It mahmah in hong en suk;
Ka bil aw, ka bil aw, bang naja?
Ka muk aw, ka muk aw, bang nagen?
Ka muk aw, ka muk aw, bang nagen?
Vantung ah i Pa om a, It mahmah in hong en suk;
Ka muk aw, ka muk aw, bang nagen?
Ka khut aw, ka khut aw, bang nasem?
Ka khut aw, ka khut aw, bang nasem?
Vantung ah i Pa om a, It mahmah in hong en suk;
Ka khut aw, ka khut aw, bang nasem?
Ka khe aw, ka khe aw, k'oh napai?
Ka khe aw, ka khe aw, k'oh napai?
Vantung ah i Pa om a, It mahmah in hong en suk;
Ka khe aw, ka khe aw, k'oh napai?
ka mit leh bil leh muk, khut leh khe,
ka mit leh bil leh muk, khut leh khe,
Vantung ah i Pa om a, It mahmah in hong ensuk;
ka mit leh bil leh muk, khut leh khe.
Khat veivei kei ka sangtou jel, Aw Toupa
Khat veivei kei ka deng dektak, Aw,Toupa.
Kuama'n theilou kei lungnop louhna,
Kuama'n theilou kei dah na;
Kuama'n theilou kei lungnop louhna,
Vanglian hallelujah!
Noute toh ton in nong muzong, Aw Toupa
Ken lung noplouhna ka nei hi, Aw Toupa.
Bang hang setan hong mudah hiam? Aw Toupa
A honglet hong khasuah hang hi, Aw Toupa.

songs.title: Aw Sangam, Nakpi In Kun In

lines: Aw sanggam, nakpi in kun in,
Sanggam nakpi in kun in.
Vanvak katung hong tangsak in,
Vanvak katung hong tangsak in;
A sang vantung tun na kongpi a niam hi,
Vanvak ka tung hong tangsak in.
Aw Pastor, nakpi in kun in,
Pastor, nakpi in kun in.
Aw U-pa, nakpi in kun in,
U-pa, nakpi in kun in.
Aw siapa, nakpi in kun in,
Siapa, nakpi in kun in.
Jesu nungjui dingin ka kipanta,
Jesu nungjui dingin ka kipanta,
Jesu nungjui dingin ka kipanta,
Kik nawnlou ding, kik nawnlou ding.
Kuan honjuilou zong Jesu kajui ding,
Kuan honjuilou zong Jesu kajui ding,
Kuan honjuilou zong Jesu kajui ding,
Kik nawnlou ding, kik nawnlou ding.
Kros tuh kama ah, khovel kanung ah,
Kros tuh kama ah, khovel kanung ah,
Kros tuh kama ah, khovel kanung ah,
kik nawnlou ding, kik nawnlou ding.
Ka kross puading hi'ng,Jesu muhdong in,
Ka kross puading hi'ng,Jesu muhdong in,
Ka kross puading hi'ng,Jesu muhdong in,
Kik nawnlou ding,kik nawnlou ding.

songs.title: A Melsia Kalvari Kros Tung Ah
songs.author: A E B

lines: A Melsia kalvari kros tung ah,
Nang ding' Jesu'n hinna pia;
A gilou pah pen na hi zong a,
Jesu'n nang zong hong it hi
Jesu'n nang hong it mahmah hi,
Amah lawm tak muanhuai hi.
A giou phapen na hi zong a
Jesun nang zong hong it hi.
Puak gik bangpeuh in nang hong delh chiang'
Bangmah naloh theih louh chiang;
Jesu'n hongthei hi mangngilh ngei ken,
Jesu'n nang zong hong it hi.
Hong pai inla, Amah ki kemsak'.
Mohna maisak,damsak ding;
Nang dah lungkhamna hong sang ding hi,
Jesu'n nang zong hong it hi.

songs.title: A Neu Mitte Pilvang Un, Na Muh Uah

lines: A neu mitte pilvang un, na muh uah,
A neu mitte pilvang un, na muh uah;
Vantung ah i Toupa om, itna toh hong-en tawntung;
A neu mitte, pilvang un, na muh uah.
A neu bilte pilvang un, na jak uah,
A neu bilte pilvang un, na jak uah;
Vantung ah i Toupa om, itna toh hong-en tawntung;
A neu bilte, pilvang un, na jak uah.
A neu mukte pilvang un, na gen uah,
A neu mukte pilvang un, na gen uah;
Vantung ah i Toupa om,  itna toh hong-en tawntung;
A neu mukte, pilvang un, na gen uah.
A neu khutte pilvang un, na sep uah,
A neu khutte pilvang un, na sep uah;
Vantung ah i Toupa om, itna toh hong-en tawntung;
A neu khutte, pilvang un, na sep uah.
A neu khete pilvang un, na pai uah,
A neu khete pilvang un, na pai uah;
Vantung ah i Toupa om, itna toh hong-en tawntung;
A neu khete, pilvang  un, na pai uah.
Jesu migi nun anem,
Naupang neu hon ensuk in;
Ka mawl milmel honhehpi'n,
Na kiangah hon paisak in.
Na kiang ah hongnuam ing e,
Toupa nuamsa, honnial ken;
Na hehpihna Lalgam ah,
Naupang neu mun honpia in.
Pathian Belamnou k'on en,
Ka etjui pen nahi ding;
Nang nun a nem leh migi,
Khatvei naupang nei hichia.
Nangbang in omnuam ing e,
Na thuman lungsim honpia'n;
Nang mi-hehpihthei leh hoih,
Na itna lung hon neisak.
Jesu Belamnou itsiam,
Na hehpih khut sung om hi'ng.
Hondampa, nang hon bangsak'.
Ka lungsung ah hongteng in.
Jesu in hong it kathei,
Laisiangthou in honhilh hi;
Naupang Amah a hihang
A thahat in honpii hi.
Jesu'n hon it hi,
Jesu'n hon it hi;
Jesu'n hon it hi,
Laisiangthou in hon hilh.
Jesu in kei hon it hi,
Amah a ho'ng "lauken" chi;
Ka mohna sawpsiang ding in,
Vangamnuam ah honpii ding.
Jesu'n hon it tawntung hi,
Ka omna peuh ah nai hi;
Ka sih nungchiang Amah in,
Vangamnuam ah honpii ding.

songs.title: Ka Hondampa Hon Itna Lamdang Hi

lines: Ka hondampa hon itna lamdang hi,
Mikhial niinpen kei zong ahon huai hi;
Mohnei kei ahon itna vang in,
Sing khros tung ah man ngenlou'n honsi.
Haleluia ka Pathian lungdamta,
Kabat teng maisak kanit siangsak;
Sing Khros tung ah sisan luang in,
Kamoh teng maisakta.
Leitung hauhna in zong alei zohlouh,
Sisan manpah kei di'n athawn in luang;
Vantung mi leh van Angelte'n zong,
Sisan manphat dan theipha lou uh.
Toupa no'n itna manpha hina e,
Ka damsung in hondin zoukei ning e;
Na linglukhu kei dia manglukhu,
Thuak a na sih na kei dia damna.

songs.title: A Mualdawn Pan Luangsak Luita Lungtai
songs.author: L H Edmunds

lines: A Mualdawn pan luangsak luita lungtai,
Tuaksuk biabia, tuaksuk biabia;
Kawlni tang singseng zaila'n a awi a,
Tuaksuk biabia'n aluang.
Zaila sain Zaila sain,
Chiau tuipi manohin;
Zaila sain, Zaila sain,
Siangthou na lasa in.
Tangni sat sunkim nahnuai a nelsak,
Nuisuk hiauhiau, nuisuk hiauhiau;
Ava leng leh silpak sik tui dawn pia,
Nui suk hiau hiau aluang.
Chiautui manoh luita phungching ve aw,
Zaisuk biambiam, zaisuk biambiam;
Na luanna peuh vualjawlna napuak aw,
Zaisuk biambiam aluang.
Luita bang naupang eite kizen leng,
Zaila sain, zaila sain;
It siam phatuam ngai lungsim siang, noplen,
Zaila sa'n masuan leng.
Jesu in naupangte a it,
Hehpihna in a dim hi;
Sun leh jan amau a veng a,
A mangtut phah a pan in.
Jesu in a (Jesu'n hon it)
Hon it ka thei,(hon it ka thei)
Amah ading kia i hi ua;
(Amah a ding kia i hi ua Jesu' hon it)
Jesu in hon it kipak ni,(aw ka kipak)
Amah in a hon tan hi.
Ka nun nopna bang hi ding hiam,
Jesu kei ding in si hi;
Huan BIble in a honhilh hi,
Naupangte hong pai un,chi.
Jesu in naupangte nget ja
A mang tutphah a pan in;
Hongpai unla kipahpih ni,
Thangvan gosem te pan ni.

songs.title: Toupa'n Hongkhawm Ding Hi Minam Chih Khatvei Chiang'
songs.author: On Khansuan & T Jamkhothang

lines: Toupa'n hongkhawm ding hi minam chih khatvei chiang',
Misia leh mipha khennih in hongkhen ding;
Kimkhatte Toupa'n Nang napha hi, a chih chiang',
Nang na om kha diam aw tua mihon te lak ah?
Misiangte'n lungdam lasak laitak',
Khuitui luanga akap tam ding hi.
Hotkhiat ngah mite'n hinna tui adawn laitak
Tuiduh dangtak a athum tampi omding hi.
Ka hun a beichiang' keizong kapai ding van ah,
Leitung ka nunsung kasep thaman kasang ding;
Kimkhatte'n nuntakna lukhu hongkhuk chiangin,
Nang na om kha diam aw tua mihonte lak ah?
Hongtung ding hi tua Toupa hun nikhat nichiang',
Tua thukhenna toh kuamah kipelh theilou hi;
Kimkhatte'n sihna meikuang lam azot chiangin,
Nang na om kha diam aw tua mihonte lak ah?
Mohneilou Pasian Tapa a sih laitak in,
Mohnei keitang Pasian thukhenna thuak hizou;
Hotkhiatna angah misiangte hongkhop chiangin,
Keika om ding hi aw tua mihonte lak ah.

songs.title: Van A Pathian Tutphah Kim Ah
songs.author: Mrs Anne Shephered

lines: Van a Pathian tutphah kim ah,
Naupang sang tampi ding;
A khelhna uh ngaihdam veksa,
Misiangthou nuamsa pawl.
Vanglian, vanglian chi'n lasa uh,
Vanglian, vanglian chi'n lasa uh.
Tuabang vanmun vak leh hoih ah,
Bangchi a pai uh hiam?
Muanna pahna itna mun ah,
Bangchi a pai uh hiam?
A khelhna uh silsiangna ding',
Hondampa sisan pia;
Tua sisanpha akisite,
En in siang in ngou uh.
Lei ah Hondampa min it uh,
A hehpihna zong uh;
Tu'n Belamnou mai ah dingin,
A mel kilawm mu uh.
Naupang neu leh hatlou hihang;
Dinmun sangin piangkei hang e;
Toupa Jesu vanglianpa ding,
Bang na hiam i septheih ding om?
Sunchin Khristian naupangte in,
Lungsim gil ah gimna thuak hang;
Mohna kidouna Jesu ding,
Lung laulou in sih pha'n pang ni.
Lung-hehna leh kisaktheihna,
Lungsim a i ngaihtuah chiangin,
Pau gilou in pau kha hang e,
Khasiatna mittui a hongluang.
Lung-hehna jal maimit sing hang;
Huan, thusia lasia bawl hang e;
Tongdam nem naubang kisang hang,
Toupa ding, kidouna dou ni.
Nuihna mel leh kihehpihna vak,
Sunchin i tung hongtang hen;
Tongdam nem naugbang kisang in,
Bangkim Jesu vangin semni.
Kristian naupangte, Kros pua in,
Zaitha tawl lah lunglau tuak ni;
Jesu juiin A'na sem ni,
A kianga i tun theihna ding.

songs.title: Phat Un, Phat Un, Naupang Neute

lines: Phat un, Phat un, naupang neute,
Pathian, Itna hi, itna hi;
Phat un, Phat un, naupang neute,
Pathian, Itna hi, itna hi.
It un, It un, naupan neute,
Pathian, Itna hi,itna hi;
It un, it un, naupang neute,
Pathian, Itna hi, itna hi.
A na sem un, naupang neute,
Pathian, Itna hi, itna hi;
Ana sem un, naupan neute, Pathian
Itna hi, itna hi.
Khusak' khusak, manglukhu-
khusak un, Itna hi, itna hi;
Khusak' khusak, manglukhu-
khusak un, Itna hi, itna hi.

songs.title: Nu Aw, Nongzuih Nop Leh, Ki Enpha In

lines: Kei vantung ah kapai ding hi,
Hongjui in, (kei hong jui in)
Vantung ka pai din;
Vantung' vantung a nuam dahna-
Hongsuk khaklouh na mun,
Paisa itten hongngak na mun,
Toupa pahman kasanna mun
(Ka tung ding ken ngak la'ng)
Nu aw, nongzuih nop leh, Ki enpha in,
Na siangthou hiam? Kei vantung ah kapai ding hi,
Hongjui in, (kei hong jui in)
Vantung ka pai din.
Pa aw, nongzuih nop leh, Ki enpha in,
Na siangthou hiam? Kei vantung ah kapai ding hi,
Hongjui in, (kei hong jui in)
Vantung ka pai din.
Lawm aw, nongzuih nop leh, Ki enpha in,
Na siangthou hiam? Kei vantung ah kapai ding hi,
Hongjui in, (kei hong jui in)
Vantung ka pai din.
Nunnem Mari'n a nausial,
Niamtakin gankuang ah;
Tua ah lupna bei a lum,
Lei ah mikhual hong hi;
Tuabang mun a tuabang nau,
Honpa hithei ding hiam?
Namchih lak a deihsak tang,
A hotdamte dong un.
Angelte'n a pianna sa,
Mipilten zongin mu;
Van aksi vaktak hongtang,
Tupina'n kimkot tan;
Belamchingte'n lamdang mu;
Angelte la sak ja;
Tua jan pahijang teng tang suak,
Mual leh tangteng kikou.
Nunnem Mari'n a nau sial,
Niamtakin gankuang ah;
Amah nitna bei hi lai,
Mikhual jaw hi nawn lou;
Pathian Tapa pianna niam,
Tua thu hoih lamdang hi;
Leitungte'n A min phat un,
Thupina Kumpibia'n.
I Tun leh Jua lungmawl in,
Pianna gam giabang jun ding;
Senvontawite hongngak uh,
Sin in sem in giabang jun.
Dialdial-in diamdiam leng,
Dialdial-in diamdiam leng,
Vualjawlna i gamlei ding.
Tuabang ding a mimbang piang,
Namchih miza tamlai ah;
Ki-itna leh kituahna,
Tangtawn in om gige hen.
Sum leh pai lam tamsang in,
Sakmin hoih manpha jaw e;
Lawmvual liangvai panpih in,
Na min lawibang hongthang ding.
Khaile, lawm aw masuan-ni,
Lungkia-lou in pangve ni;
I tunnu juapa gamlei,
Noplenna gam hongsuak ding.
Van aksi tanna khen,
Ka tangtawn inn ahi;
Leitung ka nun bei chiang,
Tua ah kei ka chiah ding.
Aw tua ah, (tua ah)
Hinna singlim nuai ah;
ki itna khajak in,
It leh ngaihte leng uh.
Ni te'n kei hongkheng a,
Leitung hong gamlat  sak;
Sihna lui kongkai chiang,
Jesu,Hongna len in.
Jesu, ka kumpipa,
Na ma' k'ong ding ding a;
Tua hun a hongtung chiang,
Kei hong na makaih in.
Ka it, ka kumpipa,
Phawk tawntung ke'n ka khelh;
Ka nun a gilou zong,
Toupa,hong ngaidam in.
Sing Kros tung ah hongsi,
Nang leh kei hong it man;
A kho-ul sisan in luang hi;
Sing Kros tungah hongsi
Nang leh kei hong it man
A kho-ul sisan in luang hi.
Hotdam hih theihna din,
Amah kiang zuan lechin,
Jesu na hondampa hiding.
Hotdam hih theihna din,
Amah kiang zuan lechin,
Jesu na hondampa hiding.
Hotdamna a thawn,
A thawn a piak ahi;
Jesu ka hondampa ahi.
Hotdam na a thawn,
A thawn a piak ahi;
Jesu ka hondampa ahi.
Naupangte Toupa'n it hi,
Naupangte lungsim siangthou;
Naupangte Toupan sam hi,
Naupangte khaam kei un chi;
Vangam ah paiding uh hi,
Lawm aw pai in zuini;
Halleluiah halleluiah ah,
Nuam e lawm aw Toupa phatni.

songs.title: Hosana Chi In Tangkouph Zel Un

lines: Hosana chi in tangkouph zel un,
Ei hon hondampa hong ki hilhi;
Simlei mi'n pahtawina zai lasa hen,
Lemna mang ta kumpi Jesu hi.
Hosana Hosana Tungnungpen ah,
Hosana Toupa min a hong pai tuh ahampha hi;
Hosana Hosana Tungnungpen ah Hosana.
Toupa koute hon hondam in.
Na lungsim kongkhak lut ding in hon ngen,
Kintak in hong meng akikhel man;
Lungsim puan hoihpente ana phah in
Lemna mang ta Jesu hong pai nang.
Khelhna khau hen chipsate phekhia in,
Huai mah hi jesu'n tu nia a deih;
Natung ah lemna kum pi tuang sak in
A vualzawlna'n hon vuk ding hi.
Toupa aw hong ensuk in,
Kou naupang neu sisen te;
Tunin koute bang din nondeih Toupa,
Na nnasem nuam ung e.
Na nnasepna ding in Toupa pilna,
Siamna, hauhna, kuul ung;
Ka kuulte uh hon pain,
Toupa nangmah nna kia sepna ding in.
Gending sakding thei nailou,
Aneu chiuchiau naupangte;
Nangmah naasem muanhuai hi din Toupa,
Sawnbaan honkai den in.
Aw naupangte aw ngai un,
Hinna lampi tangtawn hinna;
Khantawn hinna lampi om hi,
Huai bel maw, Pathian tapa Jesu hi;
Sim in zil in zui in na hing ding hi.

songs.title: A Khual Zinna Gamdai Gamkeu A

lines: A khual zinna gamdai gamkeu a,
Sun nisa leh kho-ul kai toh;
Gilkial dangtak dawnding omlou,
Malbang kou in naubang kap e.
Thawl a omlou tuidawn ding omlou,
Taamsawl naubang kahna aw ngaih dih;
Khabang a pham ding na ngaingam hiam,
Nang leh kei Toupa'n sepding hongguan hi.
Naupang siding ka-en ngamkei,
Chi a Hagar kahna aw in;
Thangvan thawn e a siampa kiang,
Mimbang thumna Toupa'n dawng e.
Thou inla naupang phong inla,
Nakhut in len in Toupa'n chi;
Sihna apan hinna ngahdin,
A tunnu neem Toupa'n sawl hi.
Toupa'n honsawl bangin semin,
Naupang siding Toupa'n mu hi;
Lamet kipahhuai achiam hi,
Naupang chi thupi a bawl ding.
Naupangte Toupa kiang paipih,
Nungzui ten deihlou uh hi;
Hihhang Toupa lungkimlou in
Itna toh thupha pia hi.
Lungdam in laasa ni khutbeng tek ni,
Hong itna thu ngaihtuah dih vaw;
Mok omlai ding maw lawm khut beng in.
Nileh kha lek aksite zong,
Toupan vakna thupi pia;
Vangam KNP te achi,
KNP te bang un chi.
Tuailai Daniel leh alawm thum,
Miten haaza pha mahmah;
Sakei huang leh meipi ah paai,
Hihhang Toupan honkhia hi.

songs.title: Aw Hongpai Unla, Bia In Kunni E

lines: Aw hongpai unla, bia in kunni e;
Toupa hon siampa, mai ah i khukdin ding uh.

songs.title: I Teenna Simlei Buai Zouta E

lines: I Teenna simlei buai zouta e,
Asung ah lungtuah lungmuan omlou;
Denchiang hong mangding i nuntakna,
Tawngtawn hinna Jesu zuan ni.
Jesun honsam Jesun honsam,
Na mohna toh zuanin;
Tangtawn hinna honpia ding hi,
I nuntak nang Jesu zuanni.
Hun kipahhuai tu hotdamna ni,
I Toupa' aw nem in honsam hi;
Tua sapna aw nem nazak laiin,
Tantawn hinna Jesu zuan in.
Simlei A siamtu Toupa in,
A mite A iit hi;
Mohna maisak a, Hotkhiak ding,
Toupa deihdan ahi.
Gen un gen un Tangthupha,
Simlei mun khempeuh ah;
Mohnei mite honkhia un,
Simlei mun khempeuh ah.
Simlei A siamtu Toupa hi,
A mite A itt hi;
Siangthouna toh Vangou luahding,
Toupa deihdan ahi.

songs.title: Jing A Ni Hongsuak Kua In Bawl Hi Hiam?

lines: Jing a ni hongsuak kua in bawl hi hiam?
Hong iit Pasian bawl mah hi e;
Zing amei hongkai kua in bawl hi hiam?
Hong iit Pasian bawl mah hi e.
Hong un lawmte aw i Toupa phat ni,
Sa la la la la la la la la la la;
Thilteng teng Siampa i Toupa phatni;
Sa la la la la la la la la la la.
Van a khua hongnim kua in bawl hi hiam?
Hong iit Pasian bawl mah hi e;
Vanging leh kekkia kua in bawl hi hiam?
Hong iit Pasian bawl mah hi e.
Pathian aw kei mah ah,
Lungtang siangthou siam in;
Kha diktak hon siamthak nawn in.

songs.title: Lungkhamna Kahnate Vantung Ah Beita Ding

lines: Lungkhamna kahnate Vantung ah beita ding,
Vantung ah nuam isa ding;
Kisaulna Kithahna Vantung ah beita ding,
Vantung ah nuam isa ding.
Jesu kiang ah lungmuang den ding,
Nuam isa den ding hi;
Jesu kiang ah lungmuang den ding,
Nuam isa den ding hi.
Mohna pan suahtakna Zaila sain awi ni,
Nunnuamin zaideih awi ni;
Tungsang ah tungsang ah Vantung ah i leng ding,
Vantung ah nuam i sa ding.
Mihing a muansang in,
Toupa muan a hoihzaw.
A hoihzaw hi,a hoihzaw hi;
A hoihzaw hi,a hoihzaw hi;
A hoihzaw hi.
Miliante ginsang in,
Toupa a ginna koih.
Guabang hinna singlim,
Toupa hongngai veng;
Na liim belnuam veng,
Toupa honglen aw.
Mialna in hongtuam chiang,
Toupa hongkem in;
Gimna in hongsawi chiang,
Toupa hong ompih in;
Belh ding ka neilou hi,
Toupa honglen aw.
Khimzinna hiai khovel,
Toupa honglen in;
Nuaisiah na tam hi,
Toupa hong len aw.

songs.title: Khelhna Jiak Leitung Ah Sihna A Honglut A

lines: Khelhna jiak leitung ah sihna a honglut a,
Si ding kahihlaiin Toupa'n kei hong iit in;
Engbawlna ling lukhu toh ka khelhna khu in,
Khuaul sisan pawt in kei di'n A hongsi hi.
Ei ei ei ei lungdamni,
Ei ei ei ei lungdamni;
Ei ei ei ei lungdamni hon tanta.
Khelhna jiak si dingte Jesu in hong tankhia,
Bangdia kipaklou ding bangdia lungdamlou ding;
Khelhna jiak si dingte Jesu in hong tan khia,
Kipah-louhtheih hilou lungdam-louhtheih hilou.

songs.title: Ka Ihmut Chiang Kuan Hong Ching Hi Hiam

lines: Ka ihmut chiang kuan hong ching hi hiam,
Kathoh chiang in kuan hong kaithou hiam?
Ken ka thei ngei lou;
Ka lup chiangin hongching Jesu in,
Jingsang chiangin honphawng-
Jesu in Gumpa Jesu hi.
Kei hong ching Jesu hi,
Bangmah lauh ding nei keng thum jel leng.
Khuamial chiangin hong ompih ding a,
Kalauh chiang in kei ka thum dinga
Hong lausak lou ding;
Kakah chiangin ka tawp pah ding a,
Kaheh chiangin ngaihdam kangen dia-
Hong ngaidam ding hi.
Toupa na min in, kong kithuahkhawm ua;
Kahun zatding bangkim uh hong zatpih in,
A tawp pha vualzawlna tang ding in;
Program bang kim hong zatpihta in,
Na tapa Jesu min in kong ngen uh hi; Amen.
La isakkhawm chiang krismass hongtung chiang
Lit lawmte ngai hang,
Kumte hongthak chiang paikhinsate in
Lungsim hong thak sak.
Hong un la sakhawm ni
I hondampa hong piangta,
Lei tung kikhenna hi
Lawmvual nuam in zai la sa ni.
Lungdam khutbengni kuan hongkhem ding hiam
Toupa ingaih leh,
Kikhenna gam ah i damlai nite
Toupa di'n pia ni.
Pathian aw ka kikouna, husana za inla;
Ka thumna ngai khia in.
Thumanna lohchinna thuguk,
Thumanna lohchinna thuguk;
Thumanlouh loh sapna thuguk,
Thuman-louhna losapna thu guk.
Aw sanggam tua ahihman thupiak masa ahi zou hi,
Nisim zuih ding lampi thumanna hi;
Thumanna hi thumanna hi,
Aw thumang lechin na dam kumsawt ding.
Thumanna in inkuan gakkhawm,
Thumanna in inkuan gakkhawm;
Thuman-louhna in Insung khenzak,
Thuman-louhna in Insung khenzak.
Thumanna in saptuam gakkhawm,
Thumanna in saptuam gakkhawm;
Thuman-louhna in Saptuam khenzak,
Thuman-louhna in saptuam khenzak.
Thumanna in khosung gakkhawm,
Thumanna in khosung gakkhawm;
Thuman-louhna in khosung khenzak,
Thuman-louhna in khosung khenzak.
Thumanna in gamsung gakkhawm,
Thumanna in gamsung gakkhawm;
Thuman-louhna in gamsung khenzak,
Thuman-louhna in gamsung khenzak.
Thumanna in khovel gakkhawm,
Thumanna in khovel gakkhawm;
Thuman-louhna in khovel khenzak,
Thuman-louhna in khovel khenzak.
Toupa a na kipah leh
Na khut beng (khep khep khep).
Toupa a na kipah leh
Na khut sai in (tek tek tek).
Toupa a na kipah leh
Na khe tat in (chek chek chek).
Toupa a na kipah leh
Ki kou khia in (ha ha ha).
Toupa a na kipah leh
Na khut beng (khep khep khep),
Na khut sai in (tek tek tek);
Na khe tat in (chek chek chek),
Ki kou khia in (ha ha ha);
Haleluijah chi'n ki koukhia in (Haleluijah)
Naupangte Toupa phatni,
Toupa phat Toupa phat.
Tuailaite Toupa phatni,
Toupa phat Toupa phat.
Unaute Toupa phatni,
Toupa phat Toupa phat.
Nu leh pa Toupa phatni,
Toupa phat Toupa phat.
Hong pai un Toupa phatni,
Toupa phat Toupa phat.

songs.title: David Tapa Ka Tung Uah Zahngai In

lines: David Tapa ka tung uah zahngai in,
Magician te tung ah thilhih theipa.
Muhtheih ka ut, Tou Jesu aw,
Namel hong mu sak in.
Toute Toupa koute hong hondamin,
Dawi leh kaute tung a thunei Toupa.
Na melmu di'n kamit hong vaksak in,
Ngaihdamna leh gawtna nei Toupa aw.
Coda
Muhtheih ka ut, Kong mu thei ta,
Na Laisiangthou sung ah.

songs.title: Toupa Tu In Kong Kikhenta Ding Ua

lines: Toupa tu in kong kikhenta ding ua,
Ka omna munchiat uah hongkemta in;
Na vualzawlna'n hon kikhen sakin,
Jesu min in Amen
Hon tungding nawnin,
Hong tungding nawnin;
Hong tungding nawnin Toupa aw,
Hong tungding nawnin.
Ka laukha bah hi,
Hong tungding nawnin;
Hong tungding nawnin Toupa aw,
Hong tungding nawnin.
Na saptuam hatlou,
Hong tungding nawnin;
Hong tungding nawnin Toupa aw,
Hong tungding nawnin.
Kagam uh liangvai,
Hong tungding nawnin;
Hong tungding nawnin Toupa aw,
Hong tungding nawnin.
Jehovah Pathian phat in,
Khutte ibeeng ding;
Nakpi in ikikou ding a,
Haleluijah, Amen;
Amen.

songs.title: Laukha Khial Sihna Khrist Toh Kikhenna

lines: Laukha khial sihna Khrist toh kikhenna,
Mohnei khial mite vangam lutlou ding;
Lampi dang omlou hinna'ng dang omlou,
Hinpa Jesu loungal.
"Keimah Lampi Thutak leh Hinna,
Kei tawna pailou Pa kiang tunglou ding,"
"Jesun chi hi.
Amah lampi thutak leh hinna Jesu hinna lampi.
Manthatna khopi lutna tampi om,
Tua alut mite tawpna sihna hi;
Thangvan gam khuapi lutna'ng dang omlou,
Honpa Jesu lou ngal.
Piangthaklou mite vangam lutlou ding,
Khial kiphawk kisik a lunghei mite;
Toupan ngaidam hi, tua lampi dik hi,
Honpa Jesu a hi.

songs.title: Leitung Mite Mohna Toh Mangthang Ding

lines: Leitung mite mohna toh mangthang ding,
Honggum Jesu'n hong honkhia;
A sisan toh honkhia sing khros tungah,
Nang leh ken la in sa ni.
Suahtakna lasa ni sa sa veni,
Mohna khempeuh maina lasa sa ni;
Suahtakna lasa ni sa sa ve ni,
Mohna khempeuh maina lasa sa ni.
Katha honghatsak in honggum Jesu,
Na min phatla sa ding in;
Zaila hong sa sakin Na min phatla,
Suahtakna la sa sa ning maw.

songs.title: Simlei Tung A Mimbang Piang Mizata

lines: Simlei tung a mimbang piang mizata,
Minlian minhoih tampi om hi;
Hizong Jesu bang minlian piang omlou,
Minlian zaw piang ngeilou ding.
Lian hi lian hi piandang amin lian hi,
Lian hi lian hi piandang Imanuel
Lian h Amin lamdang lemthei Pathianhat hi
Lian hi lian hi Piandang Amin lian hi.
Kumpite kumpi Amin lian penpen,
Siangthou siangthou chin i phat ding
Min tungnungpen Toupa'n Amah peta,
Min lianzaw piangngei nawnlou ding.
Amanpha hinna nei di'n
Kuahiam Jesu kiang zuan ding,
Langkhat langkhat napai sa'ng,
Tomchik nopna nadelh san'g
Gimthuak a Kros puak hoihzaw
Meidil a napai sang in.
Na mit in hong sukpuk leh
Khelkhia in pai in,
NA sapum hiang khat manthat
Nangmah ding zong hoihzaw hi,
Meidil a napai sang in.
Jesu'n Khros ah hong zohsak
Gawtmun lampi pelhtheih na'ng,
Naduh nadeih naneih sang'
Kamsia toh dimna pausang';
Naduh nadeih tannjaw in
Meidil a napai sang in.

songs.title: Van Leh Lai Siamtu Ka Toupa Aw

lines: Van leh lai siamtu ka Toupa aw,
Na siamsate'n honphat uh;
Phatna kim Lalna kim Nang ahi,
Tangtawn a lal nang nahi.
Zingsangin vasate'n hongphat in,
Asiamtu Nang hong pahtawi uh;
Ke'n zong N'ong piaksa aw toh hongphat ing,
Kahat tawp dong hongphat ning.
Zing khuavak in Na thupina puang,
Sun nisa'n Na vangletna;
Khua muikai in Na itna honglang,
Na Vangliatna'n zel khinzou.
Ka Jesu Ka honpa Nangbang kua dang omlou,
Ka nuntak sung Nang kongphat ding;
Na itna lamdangluat manin,
Ka muanna ke tenna Ka bitna leh ka hatna,
Ka hinsung teng Ka pumpi in;
Nangmah biakna tawplou ding.
Toupa phat un Leitung teng'n la sa'n
Avang letna leh Lalna te phat in
Tuipi mau ding tengte kun ding uh
Na min a zak hun chiang un.
NA khut suakte ki pahpih'n la ka sa
Tawngtawn in kon it ding tangtawn a kip di'n
Na thuchiam ka neih bangbang teh vual hilou hi.

songs.title: Tuiduh A Dangtak Sakhi Bang In

lines: Tuiduh a dangtak sakhi bang in,
Ka nun na'n nang hon ngai in;
Nang kia na hi ka lungtang deih pen,
Nangkia ka honbia nuam hi.
Ka hatna leh ka phawna hi,
Nang kiang kia ah k'ong ki pumpiak hi,
Nang kia na hi ka lungtang' deihpen,
Nang kia ka hon bia nuam hi.
Mangpen na hi zong in kei ding in,
Lawm leh ka laizom na hi;
Bangdang teng sang in zong, Ka hon teel zaw hi,
Bang dang teng sang in.
Kham leh ngun sang' hon it zaw ing,
Nang kia in hon lungkim sak chia;
Nang kia na hi lungnopna hon pia,
Leh ka mit nauta na hi.
Toupa aw hong bia ing
Namaa ah hong kun ing e
Ka pumpi ka lungsim
Na maa ah kong laan hong sang in
Phatna kim nang a hi den hen
Lalna kim nang a hi den hen
Toupa aw na min komg pah tawi hi.
Hong mu in hong chianin
Ka lungtang nang nei inla
Kong phatna kong biakna
Nang a din pom tak hong hi hen
Simlei nuntakna tomkal sung in,
Gitlouh nunsia khamtheih te'n
Honzol in hon hiip zong leh.
Len kei ning chiam kei ning,
Khoih kei ning ka dam sung in la la;
Ka Honpa len ning ka Toupa sinning,
Ka kumpi ka bitna hi.
Simlei ah kilbang ka khan sung in,
Guktak zuautat huaiham na'n
Hon zol in hon hiip zong leh.
Simlei ah siambang ka sin sung in,
Thusia lasia thang huai na'n
Hon zol in hon hiip zong leh.
Hinkhua lawhsam a ki ngaih siat chian,
Ningzu ganja numberfour te'n
Hon zol in hon hiip zong leh.
Kon pahtawi hi Kumpite kumpi
Kon pahtawi hi Belamnou.
Kon pahtawi hi Toupate Toupa
Kei din na thupi hi.
Pahizang Lili paallunte sang in ahoih zaw
Zingsol aksi sang in a vak zaw,
Vuk sang in a siang zaw a,huihkhi sang a siang
Bang dangteng sang nang ka hon deih zaw
Huihpi te dai sak a,tui fawnte thunun tu hi
Amah zaw tangtawn tan pha a bang kim a bangkim ahi
(male)
Khovel teng leh bangkim siam tu thupi na aki thuam in
Amah kei din bang kim ahi.
Khovel thupina pallun sang
Ken katel zaw hi ka damna Kros
Siamna leh pilna leh min thanna sang
Aw Jesu ken teel zaw ing.
Ka hun leh ni nang ding zangning e Toupa
Khovel in hon buaisak zou nonlou ding
Na gam zatna din namin thupi na ding
Hong zang in na deihna bang in.
Khovel nopna ten hon sam zong
Nungkik thei non vual ka hi lou hi
Jesu Kris min in tan ngaite tan in
Thuak ngeite thuak zel ning e.
Aw ei gingtute pai zel ni e
Mial nuai a tute khuavak puak din
Melna setan gam Toupa din la ni
Tua din Toupan hon deih hi.
Jesu minhoih pen Mang Jesu
Belamnou khelh na pua khelh ngaihdamna
Khros lel ah khai kang in
Sisan pha kei din a luang
Jesu min hoih pen Mang Jesu.
Vanthupinate leh Angel
Siangte laltutphah thupi leh
Lallukhu sangin ka tel zaw
Mang Jesu Min hoih pen Jesu
Jesu min hoih pen Mang Jesu.
Jesu min hoih pen Mang Jesu
Siangthouna Thuneihna thil hihtheihna
Thupina pah tawina
Kumkhua in nang a hi hen
Jesu min hoih pen Mang Jesu.
Jesu min hoih pen Mang Jesu
Ka felna ka nunna ka lemgelna
Hon veng in hon huai in
Lamtawn in honpei zel in
Jesu min hoih pan Mang Jesu.
Toupa hongbia ung,
Nang kon pahtawi uh
Phattak Toupa aw,
Na min honphat ung.
Vaihawmna thilhih theihna
Vualzawlna chiteng
Thupina leh Lalna teng
Toupa Nang a hi.
Ni kha Aksite
Etlawm hina e
Na thilsiam chiteng'n,
Nang hon pahtawi uh.
Tung leng vasate'n
Zing in hon pahtawi
Na hoihna hang in,
It siam ka Toupa.
Belhtak ka Toupa
Muantak ka Toupa
Nang kon muang uh hi,
Nang kon bel uh hi.

songs.title: Nang Toh Ton Apai Ka Ut
songs.author: G Suanmung

lines: Nang toh ton apai ka ut hi,
Nang toh ton a lengkhawm leng ka ut
Nang tawh ton a pai ka ut hi
Nang tawh ton a lengkhawm leng ka ut.
Simlei lung amuanna ding omlou
Muanna ka zonzon hang in mu zou keng e
Nang kiang lou muan na omlou.
Ka hon it hi, Non gupkhiak man,
Ka hon muang hi, ka suangpi na hi;
Ka hon it hi, Non gupkhiak man,
Ka hon muang hi ka suangpi na hi.
Aw nang kiang ah itna kiching om
Itna taktak ka zon ha'ng muzou keng e
Nang kiang lou itna omlou.
Na hon itna ken lianlua sa'ng,
Ka hon phat ding,na chitna vang in;
Na hon itna ken lianlua sa'ng,
Ka hon phat ding, na chitna vang in.
Aw ka tung a na chitna tengte
Ken leng bang aka hihtheih nang a ding in
Ka aw neihteng'n hin phat ning.

songs.title: Hiai Ka Zinna Gam Ah Zaw

lines: Kipakin ka zalenta khovel sual apan
Hinthakna nei Mang Jesu sisan vang in,
(Halleluiyah) Hotdam kahi ahehpihna vang in
Hinkho nuam kanei ta e
Hon zong muta ahonpi zel ding hi.
Hiai ka zinna gam ah zaw sawttak ka vakvai a
Lungngai in sualna ah ka pialmang zel a
Mang Jesu tanchin hoihtak sut in ka honthei a
Hinkho nuam kanei te e
A thilhih theihna in hon hondam ta.
A vabang a zalen in nuam in ka leng e
Ka laukha damna bukim ka muta
Genthei leh liangvai hi zong hauhsakna ka muta e
Hinkho nuam ka neita e
Amin siangthouna in hon hondamta.
Sintu hi'ng thilhoih teng ka sin diing,
Toupa ah Nu leh Pa thumang ning;
Omdan hoih teng kasin diing.
Naupang kei di'n damsawt na diing;
Kamsiam ning, Nunnem ning,
Naupang deihhuai kahi diing,
Kris leh a saptuam di'n Nna kasem diing,
Keidia si Jesu ahih ziak in.
Ka aw bildoh in Toupa aw
Kong kipumpiak hong sang in
Limtak in hong ngaihkhiak in ka kah aw
Ka Kumpipa ka Pathian
Nang kiang hong thum ka hi ngal a,
Jingteng in ka aw na za ael ding
Toupa jingkhangin Nang kiang kong thum ding a
Nangmah kia hong mit suan ning.
Lungsung nuam leh kipahthu
Genni A siangthoupa kiang,
Amah Tapa Jesu Khrist,
Eite hong pia hi.
Ahat lou in kei ka hat chi hen,
A zawng in ka hau chi hen,
Toupa'n ei dia hon hih sakte hang in,
Ahat lou in kei ka hat chi hen,
Azawng in ka hau chi hen,
Toupa'n ei dia hon hihsakte hang in,
Nuam in.
Ka mit aw Jesu Khros lam na mitsuan in,
Ka mit aw apang a siluang khai en in
Ka kha aw hongumpa lam na en gige'n
Nikhat chiang van ah hongtun ding hi.
Van kongkhak lungsim niamkhiakte lutna'ng hi.
Ka kha aw Jesu bang lungsim niamkhiak in.
Ka khe aw Ka Toupa paina lam tawn in,
Ka khe aw lung niamkhiak Jesu lam tawn in
Ka kha aw akhut leh khe kilhna thei in.
Nikhat chiang van ah hongtun ding hi.
Nang nalian hi, Nang na lian hi,
Nang na lian hi Toupa,
Thupina, zahna tang dia awm nahi
Thupi na zahna hatna.
Nang thil khempeuh siamtu'n
Thil khempeuh nasiam hi.
Thil khempeuh siamtu Nang nahi
Thilsiamte hang lungnopna Nanei hi
Nang na lian hi Toupa.
Toupa hongpiak leitang tawlnga sakni
Suahtakna leh lemna ni hongtungta,
Pengkul ging in minamte zasak ni,
I gam i namte siangthou sak ni.
Aw hongpai un eidi'n suantakna ni,
Lungdam in kikou khiani amah phat in
Eite Pasian tungnungpen thupi
Pahtawi in i minamte Pa hisak hi.
Ka damlai tuipi sunchin ka khuakzinna hi,
Ka luankhi tuibang in hontum zel mahleh
Buaina chiautui pi'n honum kimvel hang in a,
Longkhawlna tuangtun mateng masuanzel ning.
Haleluiah Tanpa honpa neita ing,
Haleluiah Amah phatden ning,
Haleluiah Amah phatden ning.
Vangtah lungkhamna huihpi kasiang hong nungzong
Itna huihkhi nem kasiang ah nun matan
Khawlna munnuam tunna dingin pipa muanhuai,
Honpa'n khawlna munnuam ah hontun ding hi.
Tun ka vangikte longkhawlna ah ngata ing
Honpa neitang'n buaina'n hon tumpha nonlou
Leitung haksatnate nunglam ah nusia in,
Bitna luigal ah simlei ngai non kei ning.
Lungmuannakim tun Amah honpa neita ing,
Hibang lungmuanna kei ah a om ngeilou
Ka khualzinna bei tun khamuang in omta ing,
Longkhawlna munnuam kei katuntak man in.

songs.title: Phat Ding Na Kilawm Hi Toupa

lines: Phat ding na kilawm hi Toupa,
Ka kha'n nang ngai in hongsam,
Ka pumpi ka aw ka lungsim,
Nang hongbia in hongkun ingh.
Nang hongbia ing Nang hongphat ing,
Kun in ah min hong liansak ingh,
Thupina nakiang hongpia uungh,
Tu leh tangtawn Nang aa hi ta hen..
Hi hen Toupa nang aa hi A-MEN.
Thum in na mai ah hongkun ingh,
Khelhna thupha hongtawi ingh,
Kei mikhial manna bei siding,
Hehpih in hong ngaidam in.
Vualjawl nanak Jesu nahi,
Ka kha damlou siding hi,
Nang ah ginnan honpi jel in,
Na van Inn nuam hontun in.
A siangthou pen kiang ken hong zuan ing,
Hong zuan ing Belamnou sisan vang
Hong zuan ing Nang kia hong bia ding in
Hong zuan ing vangletna pai di'n
Toupa hong bia ing,
Nang hong bia ing Toupa hong bia ing,
Nang hong bia ing,
Na min Siangthou Siangthou Siangthou hi.
Toupa nasiang hon naisak in
Ka lungsung nang din konpia a.
Ka pukmang louhna'n Toupa
Na khut hat in honlen in
Na hatna in honthuam zel in zaw
Aw laukhasiangthou hon humbit tu'n
Honthuam in honhih hatnawn in,
Nangdia muanhuai kawm zel in
Thupina nang din konlaan na hatna in.
Honthuam zel in aw
Aw nangmah ngai in ka dangtak hi,
Hon siamthak nawn in nang dia sem dingin
Aw laukhasiangthou hon hihhalh nawn in
Nanga dia hing ding hi honhuai in
Kamsiamna zong hi,
Nang din ka zang zel ding
Na hatna  in hon thuam zel in aw.

songs.title: Simlei Zaw Lungkham Buaina Gam Ahi

lines: Simlei zaw lungkham buaina gam ahi
It leh ngaih toh gibang khenna
Nopna leh pahna zaalmang bang lel hi
Genthei lungzuang kazinna hi.
Mara tuikha khumsak in
Elim sing liim nuah hon pi'n
Na van Mana in honvak in Toupa
Laisual dougal lianlak ah
Vualzoudin hon panpih in
Nachiam Kanaan gam hoihtuang hontun in.
Ka zinna simlei gamdai gamkeu lampi tawlhuai ah
Ka laukha gilkial dangtak in a bah
Ka mitte lah vaizou in ka banzal zaitha a neem
Ka khete a zoi Toupa honleen in.
Damsung gamdai gamkeu ah ka khualzinna haksa in
Bahleh ngui te hongtung zel mah leh
Jordan galgam chiam etlawm tangtawn khawlna gam nunnuam
Ginna mit a don in kal suanzel ning.

songs.title: Hiai Nuaisim Lei A Mi Honpite

lines: Hiai nuaisim lei a mi honpite,
Manthatna tangtawn lampi ah;
Lungmuang tak in paipai uh,
Tuate lampi hilhngai uh hi.
Amangthang ding sa mi honpite,
A tunna ding un theilou uh;
Sap kiknawn a hihkei ua leh
Hongpai kik mawklou ding uh hi.
I it ilawm leh i inn vengte,
Amaute lampi hilhkei leng;
Tangtawn gawtmun hong lut chiang un,
Amaute'n ei hon phuulding uh.
Haksatna hiai a i tuahte jaw,
Tangtawn toh teh in neeplua hi;
Maizumna hangin semkei leng,
Tangtawn in i kisikden ding.
Aw hong un! Nuam in Toupa phatni,
Amah bia in kuun ni e,
Thilsiam tengteng in zong hong phat uhen,
Toupa phatna'n munchih zeelsuak hen aw!
Aw Phat Un! (Aw Phat Un) Toute Toupa
Aw Bia Un! (Aw Bia Un) Lalte lalpen
Vanglian Kumpipa a Siangthoupen
Aw Phat Un! (Aw Phat Un) muanhuai Toupa
Aw Bia Un! (Aw Bia Un) Diktat Toupa
Phat chiatni e, I hondampa.
(coda)
Phat chiatni e I Hindampa.
Aw hong un! Nuam in Toupa phatni,
A min Siangthou phat ni e,
A chitna tangtawn in a omngal a,
Toupa phatna tangtawn in dailou ding.
Aw hong un! Nuam in Toupa phatni,
Thupina teng pia ni e,
Thilthupi ei ding in a hon bawlsak,
Athupi dan leimi'n leel zoulou ding.
Zing ninou hongsuah chiang, Na hoihna honglang in,
Tungleng vasate'n Na minphat in,
Na siam mihingte'n phat dingzah in hong phatlou zong;
Toupa aw Na hoihna ni'n tumpih ngei lou.
Aw Toupa Patian aw, lungdam lua ing,
Nang bang hoih omlou simlei ah Toupa aw,
Munchih mualchih ah, Na hoihna ni bang tang hi
Toupa Na chitna vang in hongphat denning.
Hunnuam,hun haksa ah, Na chitna dang ngeilou,
Na itna'n kei honleen gige hi,
Nisim in lungdamthu ka hongpuak theilou zong in;
Hunteng in Na vualzawlna kiching nongpia.
Toupa Na hoihna leh chitna katanzel te'n,
Tawpni beini chih om ngeilou ding,
Tui suahgiat kihawt diamdiam bang in daingeilou hi;
Hongphat den ning Nang N'ong itmasak vang in.

songs.title: Toupa Nong Iitna Lam Danglua Sa Ing!

lines: Toupa Nong iitna lam danglua sa ing!
A tawpkhawk iitna kei a di'n Nong lankhia maw,
Sihna lim phaizang nuam a tummai ding,
Ka hinna na pumpi Nong honkhia.
Na iitna simthu in sut senglou ding,
Zaila'n awi senglou ding,
Tangtawn dong a ka zaila hi ding,
Nang phatna la asak.
Na iitna lamdang tehpih theih omlou,
Na hehpihna hi Pasian ta ka suahtheih na,
Ahang bei iitna Nang kia a ahi,
Phat dia kilawm Nang kia Na hi.
Laa ngaih i sa ding,
Galkhat ah i tun chiangin,
Tualai ah i Toupa leh van mipite'n
Zohna dialkhai in hongdawn ding.
Laa ngaihpen i sa ding hi tua ah,
Lei a liangvai leh genthei ten zong,
Zohna puanlaap te khaisang kawm in.
Laa ngaihpen i sa khawmding.
Toupa gam vang a,
Gentheih leh liangvai thuak te'n
Pahna nang khitui luang in nuamna laa sa'n
Honpa toh chibai kibuk ding.
(coda)
Laa ngaihpen i sa khawm ding.
(bridge female)
Vaanmiten a sak theihlouh uh
Langaih eiten tua ah i sa ding.
(male)
Sisan a hong tan Vualzohna hong pia
Tuate ka la ngaih hi ding.
Toupa na itna leh hoihnate,
Ka ngaihsut sut chiang in
Hiai nuai simlei ah omlou
Hichitel a itna thupi.
Hongbia in, na mai ah hongkun ung,
Toupa nang konneih khak hampha lua ung,
Belhtak Pathian, Nang kia na hi,
Halleluiah chi'n kon phatzel ding hi.
Toupa thilsiam leh thupinate,
Kangaihsut sut chiang in
Thuk in lamdang lua sa'ng
Hichitel a thupi om lou.
(coda)
Belhtak Pathian nang kia na hi.
Halleluiah chi'n kon phat zel ding hi.
Simlei mohna khuksung ah,
Hunhoih tampi mansuah ing;
Keimah deihtelna lampi zui a kapai lai in,
Ka laukha lungzuang thawmhau damsakzou ding omlou,
Hizong Toupa'n a itna aw nem in hongsam hi.
Hallelui Hallelui ah,
Laukha damna tuihong luidawn in ka nunna
Nang a ding in ka hon lan hi,
Thangvan dong a ka zailai ka thupi pen
Nang phatna tu apan a
Ka hattawp dong in zom denta ning.
Simlei thupi nate sang,
Nang hon telzaw ing Toupa
Sum leh pai silh leh teen leh minthannate sang in,
No'n ompihna kateL zaw ka laukhaten hilh inla,
Khelhna tuipi tung ah bit in ka khalam sang in.
U leh nau itte, eimah tungchiat ah,
Deihdan teltheihna a om hi;
Asia leh apha nateel jawkjawk pen,
Tangtawn adia naset ding hi.
Na hinkhua a ding banglam nateel ding hiam?
Leitung kilawmna enlah ken;
Leitung kilawmnate beimang pah ding hi.
Tangtawn a ding Toupa teel in.
Toupa'n mi kuapeuh hon lakkhawm pihlou
Hontheh dalhsaktu ahi" chi;
Toupa teelloute Toupa' genbang in,
A melna lianpen hi ngal hi.

songs.title: Lungkham Lungkia In Om Nawnkei Ning

lines: Lungkham lungkia in om nawnkei ning
Toupa ka neihman in ah;
Kakha pumpi ka hatna tengtawh,
Amah a tawntung in ka phatden ding hi.
Halleluiah Amen, Halleluiah Amen,
Kiphat tawntung hen Toupa min siangthou,
Mialna lakpan khuavak hongtang sak
Amah ka phatden ding Halleluiah
Halluiah Halluiah Amen.
Nopna dahnate katuah chiangin
Kakiang a om tawntung hi;
A hong makaih honglen den Amah,
Aw kabelh leh kulhpi Nang Pathian nahi.
A lianpen hi chi'n ka phat zong in
Ahih na genzou kei ning;
Ka hun leh niteng pemah leng zong,
Toupa chitna tawh tehpih theihvual hilou.
Toupa sung lungdamna in ka thahatna hi
Toupa sung lungdamna in ka thahatna hi.
Toupa sung lungdamna in ka thahatna hi.
Lungdam na ka thahatna hi.
Nuntakna tui hongpia a tun dangtak non keng
Nuntakna tui hongpia a tun dangtak non keng
Nuntakna tui hongpia a tun dangtak non keng
Lungdam na ka tha hatna hi.
Ka kam nuihna toh kidimsak a ha ha ha
Ka kam nuihna toh kidimsak a ha ha ha
Ka kam nuihna toh kidimsak a ha ha ha
Lungdam na ka tha hatna hi.
Nang zong na lungdan nop leh awng inla phat in
Nang zong na lungdan nop leh awng inla phat in
Nang zong na lungdan nop leh awng inla phat in
Lungdam na ka tha hatna hi.
Na thuakna aw kagel zoulou,
Lei mihingte na it vang a,
Suamhatpa bangin mohna zong neilou
Bawlsiatna teng nathuak aw ka en ngamlou.
Ka Pa (thian ah ka) Pathian bang dia hon taisan
A khelhna uh amau ngaidam in
(A thilhih uh a khelhna uh theilou uh amaute ngaidam in)
Tuiduh dangtak a kikou aw naza hiam?
Nang leh kei hon it vang hi e.
Thukhenna mai ah dingsak uh,
Mohna neilou mohlou mohsak uh
Ittu ding neilou gumtu ding neilou
Si di'n siamlouh tan uh kamkhat zong dawnglou.
Kalvari tang lam zotpih uh
A sihna ding a Kros gik pua in
Panpihtu neilou bahin pukzel hi,
No'n itvang a nathuak Aw kangai ngamlou.
Lunglai ah aw kageel chiangin,
Aw ana i gam simthu,
Toupa mel loubang atul zouta
Aw lung in i geelngam hiam.
Toupa aw hong leng in,
Ka gam uah Nang vaihawm in
Toupa aw honngai ung,
Nanglou in zaw muanna aw a om ngeilou.
Sim leh muanna kazong zel ua,
Muanna ding a omlou e,
Tai khuaval dong a ka siallai un
Sialzatam tuibang kang zeel.
Aw na mite na honvel chian,
Lung na awi na hiam Toupa,
Itna leh lainatna bei zouta
Toupa aw hon ngaidam in.
U leh naute kingaihsun ni,
Lung i gel a hunta hi,
Ngaih damna ei a ahihlai in
Toupa kiang i zuan ding un.

songs.title: Tangtawn Pathian Koilam Na Om A

lines: Tangtawn Pathian koilam na om a,
Nangtel lou in naubang katei theilou
Na mel etlawm (pen) hon musak nawn in,
Na gam vak hontun in.
Aw ka hon it (Aw) ka ngaih Lal nunnem,
Namel honmusak in,
Ka tungzawn uah nisa bangin tang in,
Namel honmusak in.
Setan henkol sung a tangtute,
Pikhetu di'n aw Van laukha siangthou;
Nang hong leng in (Aw) hon ngailua ung e,
Halhna hongtung sak in.
Sodom leh Gomorate bang in,
Khelhna chiteng in aw adim zouta;
Na mangtutphah (vak) kilawm taanding zaw,
Lung in gelngam kei ung.
Toupa aw kei hong lenin simlei a ka lenlai in
Kei kia in kapai siamlou,
Ka zinna a haksa in lamhaih in gammang zel ing,
Nalam vak hong musak in hong zui ning maw!
Nalam vak ah kapai theihna din
Ka lampi ah navak hongtaan in
Mitaw bang khua mulou a zanmial bang ka pailai in,
Honglen in ka puklouh nan hong len in aw.
Buaina tui kihawt kal a launa ten kei hongtuam a,
Lungmuanna hong neisak aw
Muanhuai pa akip tawntung nang na hi nangkia na hi,
Toupa aw naban in honlen den in maw!
Galkhatlam ka hongkai ma'n tua mualsiangthou kongtun ma'n
Lampiallou din hong len in
Nisim in ka nuntakna Hong siamthal hong hatsak in,
Nang sung ka tunma teng Hong pi in aw!
Hong gumzou hi,Tuuno sisan toh,
Hong gumzou hi Tuunno sisan toh;
Hong gumzou hi Tuunno sisan toh
Khasianthou kei sung hong lut a;
Ka mohna teng hong sawpsiang hi,
Hong gum zou hi.
Tua bek hilou,Adang zong omlai,
Tua bek hilou A dangzong omlai;
Tua bek hilou Adang zong omlai
Lungnop na kiching hong pai hi;
Ka mohna teng hong sawpsiang hi,
Hong gum zou hi.

songs.title: Toupa Hon Itna Aw A Lamdang Lua

lines: Toupa hon itna aw a lamdang lua,
Kei leltak hon iit a hon khotuah,
Gentheite panpih liangvai te kempa,
Nakiang honbelte na taisan lou.
Athupi ngei e, Aw Haleluiah,
Non itna zan leh tuni'n tangtawn danglou
Van Angel te'n phatseng louh,

Ngaisun ngam la'ng e.

songs.title: Aw Naupang Na Ngai Dih Ua

Toupa ah na nu leh na pate thumangin,
Nanu na pa zahin, heutute zahtak in;
Pasian in hong domsang tou ding hi,
Tua bek hilou, lei ah zong na damsawt ding uhi.
A pil mi khat nahih nop a,
A siam mikhat nahih nop leh,
Mie tung a len na uta;
Mite zahtak nahih ut leh.
Toupa lamen kawmin konngak.
Keilam ah hong kihei inla;
Kakikou na aw hong zaain,
Hiai khovel lungkham na mun ah.
Honpi zelin kahon Pa aw
Ka khualzinna leitung ah;
Lung muanna ding muzou keng e,

Na min a douzou zel ding in,

Children of the Heavenly Father
Safely in His bosom gather
Nestling bird nor star in heaven
Such a refuge ne'er was given.
God His own doth tend and nourish
In His holy courts they flourish.
From all evil things He spares them
In His mighty arms He bears them.
Praise the Lord in joyful numbers
Your Protector never slumbers
At the will of your Defender
Ev'ry tempter must surrender.
Tho' He giveth or He taketh
God His children ne'er forsaketh
His the loving purpose solely
To preserve them pure and holy.
Children of the Heavenly Father
Safely in His bosom gather
God His own doth tend and nourish
In His holy courts they flourish.
Praise the Lord in numbers
No, he never slumbers
Tho' He giveth or He taketh
Yet he ne'er forsaketh.
The splash of the water the power of the word
The Spirit now binds you to Jesus your Lord
And wonder of wonders though by sin defiled
The Father in heaven
Now makes you his child!
A child of the promise his death has fulfilled!
An heir of the covenant sure as His thorne!
His promise is "I shall be always with you"
His covenant You are my own.
To Him you belong now; His grace be adore
(His grace of which sustains you as you grow in the word)
And grace of all graces the Vict'ry He won
Is your vict'ry now through your faith in the Son!
Your faith is a gracious miraculous gift
A miracle just like His rising from death
Both miracles yours now in Baptism's flood
Secured by the covenant sealed with his blood.

3. Huinun a thingna louna apul bangin,
Nangma lunghanna mihemte thigam thei,
Hing kahi keima Nangma vanga Pathen,
Nangma louva keima ima titheilou.
4. Nalung hanna kon iti sochat ing-em?
Nang ginin hoija gakisel tangem kei,
Lengthei jin twilen leng galkai le jong leng,
Chukom jong chu Nangma angsung ma hi ding.
Reference: Doh is B♭ d
1. Atheng Atheng Atheng! Pathen hat chungnungpen,
Jingpi tahin Nangma vahchoila kasauve,
Atheng Atheng Atheng! Van mikhoto Hatchungnung,
Athumin khat hin khat chu thum ahi.
2. Atheng, Atheng, Atheng! Van mitheng te jousen,
Alhai jing-ui Ama chu tan tih neilou vin,
Vantil asangja le van Mitheng te jousen,
A lhai jing ui Ama tantih neilou vin.
3. Atheng, Atheng, Atheng! leiset mite vet'a
Nangma loupi akimuthei lou jeng vang in,
Nangma bou Athenga Atheng adang umlou,
Theng le mikhoto chamkim soh.
4. Atheng, Atheng, Atheng! Pathen hat chamkim soh,
Vannoi namtin jousen Nangma bou lhai ding
Atheng, Atheng, Atheng! milungset hatchungnung,
Athumin khat hin khat chu thum ahi.
Reference: Doh is E♭ d
1. Kipah un Pathena nomun,
Lungthengsel Mithengte jouse;
Pathenchu gingun tahsan un,
Genthei gim lungdon pailhauvin.
Nomun......Nomun,
Kipah un Pathen'a nomun;
Nomun.......Nomun,
Kipah un Pathen'a nomun.
2. Nomun Ama Pakai ahi,
Vannoi leiset le van chunga
Aman gam thum vaipi apoi,
Eihuhhing hatchungnung ahi.
3. Muthim in nang khu jong le chun,
Jana vanpi nim bang jong le;
Ima lungdonna neilouvin,
Pathen jenga tahsan jingun.
4. Kipah in Pathen a nomun,
A vahchoina la ngei sauvin;
Sauvin na-aw sansah un lang,
Ao vun Halleluijah tiuvin.
Reference: Doh is B♭ sₗ
1. Hungun Mitheng jouse,
Pathen lhaina la saute,
Gingtah chehin vahchoi chehun,
Vanchunga Leng chungnung chu,
Hingjing Pathen pentil bei,
Lei le van Pakai ahi.
Ama sanga lendang umlou,
Ama bou tonsot Pathen.
2. Van le leiset noimi gamjong,
Chule simsenlou ahsi,
Nisa lhathah le thil jouse,
Ama sem'a um ahi.
Ganhing ju le va jouse,
Khovah hoi le muthim jong,
Molle lhang dam phaicham twilen,
Chule mihemte jouse.
3. Van le leisem, Chunga Pathen,
Leng ho Leng chungnung ahi,
Pakai jouse Pakai ahi,
Van le lei thempu chungnung,
Gin ding le ja ding ahi,
Van mi le leiset miten,
Vahchoi-jute chunga Pathen,
Tonsot in vahchoijute.
Reference: Doh is G sₗ
1. Kakipah e van'a ka Pa aum,
Athupha lungmon na thu eihille.
Athupha bua thu kidang tah kamui;
Hibang thupha Jesun eilungsetna.
Kakipah e, Jesun eilungset,
Kei eilungset, Kei eilungset,
Kakipah-e, Jesun eilungset,
Kei jong eilungset ne.
3. Ken Ama sumil in lamvai jong leng,
Mang ta jong leng aman eilungset ne,
Aman eilungset ken kagel doh teng,
Kalut kit jitai Ama khut sunga.
4. Keiman langei khat ana sathei leng,
Leng loupi chungnung ni kamu nile,
Hichu hiding katonsot chulmo la,
Jesun eilungset na akidang e.
5. Kichen tah a lungmonga kahi tai,
Jesu tahsanna nomsa kahitai,
Kalunga kon Satan ajam ji tai,
Jesun eilungset keiman kasei teng.
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ

songs.title: VAHCHOIJUN LOUPI LENG PATHEN CHUNGNUNG CHU

lines: 1. Vahchoijun Loupi Leng Pathen chungnung chu
Vahchoijun thil kidang ei bol peh jallun,
Umpi jing eithu tep ichenau chan'a
Meikou le meilom'a eipui le jallun.
Van Mitheng vah jousen,
Vahchoi vahchoijun,
Choi-an un amiten,
Amai mucheng chun.
Agam sung loupia chun,Phat kitol laisen,
Anatoh ho jousen (2)
Pathen vahchoi cheh ding,
Kalhan vahchoi jin.
2. Vahchoi jun manbeija mijouse alhat,
Hinna twinah eipe, eidamsah thei chu,
Eilungset eihepiu, lungsetna jallin,
Itaonao Asange ti kihet jallin.
3. Vahchoijun lungsetna, gui eilhat-uva,
Van chunga thipha toh eikan gom uva,
Tahsanna gal jona kinepna vah jing,
Ingai cheng chen khom na agam nom ahi.
Reference: Doh is B♭ d

songs.title: EI HUHHING PAN EIPUILEN EICHING NAI

lines: 1. Eihuhhingpan eipuilen eichingnai,
Itobang hung lhung jongle kahoije,
Hui le go kithona'a eisel ding,
Akhut phang kom tong sunga.
Akhut phang kom tong sunga (2)
Itobang hung lhung jongle kahoije,
Akhut phang kom tong sunga.
2. Amilungset ban'in kei eikoi je,
Avan lungmon na thun eilha mon ne,
Pathen khut in eikoijin kahoije,
Akhut phang kom tong sunga.
3. Ami lungsetna ken sumil jou lou ding,
Ka Pathen toh eikhen jou ding umlou,
Itih chan hijong leh eilha lou ding,
Akhut phang kom tong sunga.
Reference: Doh is C. d

songs.title: KAMIT IN PAKAI HUNGNA DING LOUPI TAH CHU AMUTAI

lines: 1. Kamit in Pakai hungna ding loupi tah chu amutai,
Lunghana lengpi theiga kikholla chu chilngim dingin,
Aman kolphe banga man gang tah chemjam chu Alamtai,
Pathen a gal akon'e.
Aloupita! Halleluijah (3)
Pathen a gal kon'e.
2. Simsenlou sepai galkappet vea ding Pakai kamui
Nilhah dainou laha Ama din Altar asahpeh un,
Achonphat thulhun chu meivah pha bangin
Kasim theije, Pathen agal kon'e.
3. Hung kinung tollun tilou hel dingin sumkon amuttai
Athupi tan masanga mihemte lung akhen sohding;
Gang in kalha Ama donbut ding thanom in
Ka khophang, Pathen agal kon'e.
4. Twikhanglen galla Lily hoi laha Christa peng ahi,
Ama anga loupi tah a nang le kei ivou kikhel;
Mithenna dia athi bangin thiu hite mi hinna din,
Pathen agal kon'e.
Reference: Doh is C. sₗ
1. Lam neihhil in Aw Jehovah,
Hiche leiset gamthim'a
Pathen Nangma hatchungnung in,
Nei huhhing in lungdonna.
Van'a konin, Van'a konin,
Hinna achun neivah in.
2. Pathen keima neihon peh in,
Hinna twinah kemlou chu,
Na lhagao chun nei puilen lang,
Kamasang sanga che hen.
Hatchungnung in, hatchungnung in,
Kei neihuhhing in kei Jesun.
3. Jordan twipi gal kakaija,
Hileiset ka dalhah teng,
Kalung donna suhmang soh in,
Nei puilhung teijin vangam.
