Na vahchoi la, Na vahchoi la,
Kemmon sange nitin in.
Reference: Doh is E. d
1. Eden honna Pathen in,
Anasem in nu le pa,
Ana gomin lultah in,
Phattheina tincheng apei.
Pathen Adam le Eve
Nana gomin pentil in,
Tun jong hiteni gomin,
Phattheina chamkin in pen.
2. Pentil thu umchan bangin,
Akichengtai hiteni,
Anu apa hindalhan,
Kikhen kit tih neilou din.
3. Kilungset to geltah in,
Kivahto jing jeng lhon hen,
Apheu alhau khat hihen,
Lung khat in cheng hon hen.
4. Pathen hou-in kumtu hen
Chung gam ajot teng jong leh,
Mun khat'a kaltou lhon hen,
Vangam nom'a cheng dingin.
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ
1. Kapa Nangma lam kasang e,
Eihu ding dang umlou,
Nei dalhan kichon mang le chun,
Hoija iti tangem?
Katahsanne, katahsanne,
Kei jalla Jesu thu,
Ama thisan lutah achun,
Ka chonset theng sohding.
2. Na chapa Jesun athoh in,
Kahai thei masang in,
Nat thohlel gimna athoh tai,
Ka lhagao huhhing nan.
3. Jesu Nang katahsan thei tai,
Na thahat chu kahei;
Ka ngaichat jouse tun neipen,
Kalung kipah jing hen.
4. Jesu Nangma lam kasang-e,
Kamit khamna neiven,
Neipen na thilpha lutah chu,
Hibou chu kahinna.
Reference: Doh is G. d
1. Ka Pathen Nangma kom
Kahung naije,
Gim genthei lungdonna,
Toh jeng jong leng.
Navahchoi la sange,
Na kom kahung naije,
Ka Pathen Nangma,
Kom kahung naije.
2. Kho jing hen thim jongle,
Neihon pin lang,
Vah hen thim jongle,
Nei puilhung in,
Katah in kamang in,
Nang kom nai kanomme,
Na kom cheh a Pathen,
Kahung naije.
3. Van jotna lampi,
Hin lhung lhan lang,
Van kalbi hin lah in,
Nei lungset in,
Na vantil hin sol lhan,
Ei puilhung pai ding in,
Ka Pathen Nangma kom
Ka hung naije.
4. Lung jina kom ka tho a,
Ka lung hal teng,
Pathen Nang vahchoi la,
Keiman sang-e,
Kahung e nei sangin,
Neilan neichul nam-in,
Ka Pathen Nangma kom,
Kahung naije.
5. Len theina ving neijing,
Kipah tah in,
Nisa sanga sang jon
Leng sang jong leng,
Hiche la hi mang mon,
Na vahchoi nan sang-e,
Ka Pathen Nangma kom
Kahung naije.
Reference: Doh is G.m
1. Chena vana hoima jousea
Pathen in eipui le jing nai,
Lunggel le natohna jouse a,
Pathen in eipui le jing nai.
Pathen in eipui le jing nai
Ama khut tah in eikai lei
Aseijui tahsan kichen tah,
Hinge eipui le jing jeh in.
2. Lung jin lungdon nat thoh lelna,
Genthei nan eibom jeng jong le,
A van thupha hinna thu chun,
Eipui len eilhem lung mong e.
3. Hahsa toh ing nom toh jong leng,
Twihat le twinem pal jong leng,
Eden hon nom a leng jong leng,
Pathen in eipui le jing nai.
4. Ka thi teng keima Pathen in,
Jordan lui eipui galkai ding,
Van innom'a cheng jing tange,
Olmo lou Aman eipuinai.
Reference: Doh is D.s

songs.title: VO PATHEN NANGMA, VAHCHOI LA KASAUVE

lines: 1. Vo Pathen Nangma, vahchoi la kasauve,
Eihuhing din Nachapa nahinsol lhai;
Hallelujah! Nang na loupi,
Hallelujah! Amen!
Hallelujah! Nang na loupi!
2. Lhagao Theng vangin, La kasauve Pathen,
Jesu chun eihilun mu thim apao lhai;
3. Loupina jouse, Kelngoi nou thisanin,
Mi chonsetna jouse apo mang sohtai;
4. Kalung suhal in, ngailutnan lo soh hen,
Mi jouse lunga ngailut meiyin kong hen;
5. Pentecost nia bang chun, Lhagao Theng hung kum lhan,
Mi lungsung jousea mei bangin hung kong hen;
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ
1. Tonsot songpi kadinga,
Hia chun Nanga neisel in,
Nanah thenga hung long doh,
Longlha thisan le twi chun,
Ka chonset nei soptheng in,
Nei huhhing in keima tun.
2. Ka khutin na tong jong leng,
Ka mitlhi jong jeng jongleh,
Lung nunin gunchu jong leng,
Nangma chondan thupeh chu,
Keiman juikim jou lou ding,
Ka chonset theng thei lou ding.
3. Ima kahin choipoi ken,
Cross jenga chu kingai ja,
Ponsillou ponsil dinga,
Nangma kom hinbel kahi,
Nei huhhingin lengvai kei,
Chonsetna thi ding kahi.
4. Hiche lung kagel laihin,
Thinan kamit asina,
Hi leiset kagal kaija,
Na thupi tan kamu teng,
Tonsot songpin neihuh in,
Neisellin nei huhhingin.
Reference: Doh is Db.sₗ

songs.title: VO KA PATHEN! LUNGSET TAH IN

lines: 1. Vo ka Pathen! lungset tah in,
Kachonsetna sumang soh in,
Na milungset simthei louchun,
Kachonset simtheilou soplhan.
2. Kakisem'a chonsea hung peng,
Chonse pan kei kanu sunga,
Hijeh chun ka chonset soplhan,
Naiban sah in buhbang bangin.
3. Ka Pathen nei jah sah kit in,
Nang a kon lung halna thupha,
Kalung gelna kagu bongsa,
Jong chukipan kijom kit hen.
4. Lungtheng lungnem athah neipen,
Kalunga lhagao theng cheng hen,
Chuteng Thupha seiphong leng-e,
Mi chonse lamvaite heng-a.
5. Vo Pathen, Nang mi huhhingna,
Thupha chu keiman lan sange,
Nangma min ngei vahchoina chu,
Keiman seilenge nitin in.
Reference: Doh is G.d
1. Ka Pathen kei mi chonse,
Kahung taove naheng-a,
Pathen nei engbol hih in,
Kachon khelna ngaidam in. }2
2. Mi khoto chungnung Pathen,
Kathoh hesoh kho neiton,
Ka mitlhi long theh hullin,
Kanat thoh lel subeijin. }2
3. Thempu jouse Thempu Nang,
Pakai ho Pakai nahi,
Hinna damna lungmon na,
Nanglouva hing thei umlou. }2
4. Pathen hung kihei kit in,
Kalha dammo huhhing in,
Pahten kahet jing theinan,
Nei damsah in tuchung hin. }2
Reference: Doh is B. m
1. Pathen Nangma Houbung mite,
Lungset in phat theina pen,
Namai vah chun salvah soh in,
Kalah uva kilang hen.
Chutile vannoi leiset min,
Muntin Nangma Thupha Theng hi,
Vannoi namtin le phungtin in,
Gam jousen hinna tante.
2. Vo Pathen Nangma vahchoila,
Ami hem jousen sauhen,
Mi asangja awgin thong chun,
Vannoi leiset losoh hen.
Mi sutheng thei nahi nangma,
Na gam loupi chu hinlah in,
Vannoi leiset gam kimvella,
Chonsetna sonmang soh in.
3. Vo Pathen kataona sangin,
Van Lhagao Theng hin sollin,
Nagam ka chal sah na diuvin,
Houbung mite tha hin pen.
Pathen phattheina neipeuvin,
Niseh in nei kithopiuvin,
Chuteng vannoi leiset miten,
Na loupi hetauvin te.
Reference: Doh is G.sₗ
1. Ni le lhavah angai poi,
Mi thengte chenna chu ;
A chua setna um talou,
Pathen chenna ahi.
Chu gam nom chu,
Mitin kinepna ahi ;
Lhandampu lenna ichenna diu,
Mitin kinepna ahi.
2. Lungdon lungjin umtalou,
Cholte kitha ol ta ;
Van vou thah in lhai sellin,
Chu gama alengui.
3. Chu gam khopi em hoi chu,
Kul le kotpi emsel ;
Kelngoi nou vah-in sallin,
Sun le jan um talou.
Reference: Doh is A. m
1. Ei Lhandampu neisal vahna,
Na Lhagao le na lungsetna ;
Akidange ! nei lungsetna,
Kei ding ahiye aboncha.
Eilhandampu, hithei nangem ?
Long lhen theng gan kihinglha bang !
A-itih a, tonsot geiya,
Nangma dingin hithei nangem.
2. Na mite huhhingna dingin,
Na thoh in na long na toh-e ;
Genthei na thoh, Getsemani ah,
Kei ding ahiye aboncha.
3. Nalu thengtah lingin sunta,
Eihuhhingna thisan along ;
Calvary Cross kidang tah chu,
Kei ding ahiye aboncha.
4. Cham le lungset nahao ngeiye,
Na vangam dim, gou le thillu ;
Man beiya lungset tonsotna
Kei ding ahiye aboncha.
Reference: Doh is C.d
1. Pathen Nangma lhai din,
Ka kaikhom kit tauve ;
Nei nung sun lou jenun Pathen,
Ka chonset jeng vangun.
2. Ka chonset apumpi,
Ka hinpoi na hengah ;
Na ngaidam ding le sop theng din,
Na kom ka hin bel-e.
3. Ka chonset sim thei lou,
Sapset thei ka hiuve ;
Hijong le Nangma mi lungset,
Hat jon sumang soh-in.
4. Hijeh chun ka taonau,
Ngaiyin lung theng homin ;
Leiset lung ngai sumang soh-in,
Chonphat lung nei peuvin.
5. Pathen hou tha nom chu,
Vangpha le nom chungnung ;
Athi teng vanna cheng jing ding,
Van muntheng nom laiya.
Reference: Doh is A.sₗ
1. Iti nop tam Pathen lhai pet,
Leiset lung ngai lunga beita ;
I ngai jouse kimin ei pei,
Vanna Pa laltouna konin ;
Satan gal in lam eipel tai,
Ka tao petna Nang nahung le,
Ka lungdon lungjin pet jong le,
Ka lungmon le kipan aloi.
2. Iti nop tam Pathen lhai pet,
Vantil kei dinga hungpa chun ;
Ka taona Pathen ang sung-a,
Na lhavingin po touvin lang ;
Pan eilungset na thu kajai,
A thupha dihtah chu kahei ;
Ka lung apumpin kape tai,
Hung kum lhan tun ka taopet hin.
3. Iti nop tam Pathen lhai pet,
Nanga konna lungmon na thu ;
Ka lung sunga hin khum dim-in,
Van in nom ka hung lhun kahsen;
Ka leiset vou kapai lhah a,
Kemlou vanvou chu ka chan teng,
Ka len thoa vanjol ka gei teng,
Ka lhai ka lhai leiset, ting-e.
Reference: Doh is D.d
1. Nangma ka ngai jinge,
Lungset Pakai,
Na kam ngei aw dam chun,
Eilungmon thei.
Ka ngaiye, Nang ka ngaiye,
Phattin nidan tinin ;
Phattheina nei pen Jesu,
Tun ka hunge.
2. Nangma kangai jinge,
Neingah jingin,
Lhepnan eijou lou ding,
Nei umpi le.
3. Nangma kangai jinge,
Gim le nopna,
Nangma beiya keima
Hing jou lou ding.
4. Nangma kangai jinge,
Lungtheng neipen,
Kachunga nalung chan
Bulhit soh in.
5. Niseh in ka ngaiye,
Vo ka Pathen,
Nangma chan nei sem
Bulhing soh in keima.
Reference: Doh is A. d

songs.title: PAKAI PHAT THEI NAN NEILHAU VIN

lines: 1. Pakai phat thei nan neilhau vin,
Ka lung kipa dimsah in ;
Nang ngailutna lung nei peuvin ,
Khat cheh in nei lungset un ;
Neithah sem-un tha nei peuvin,
Gam thip ka jot lai seuvin.
2. Thangvah to thon ka choi an nui,
Na Thupha nei peh jallun ;
Na mi huhhingna ga pung hen,
Leiya kahin lai seuvin ;
Tahsan umtah tah neiso uvin,
Hiu vinge tahsan jing Nang.
3. Chuti chun van thu hung lhunna,
Kei ho cheng nei kou teng leh ,
Vantil eipui touding hung chu,
A nung jui ding kipah a ;
Christa toh vaihom khom theinan,
Tonsot kemlou van gama.
Reference: Doh is A.d

songs.title: HUNG KUMLHAN LHA THENG VAN VAKHU

lines: 1. Hung kumlhan Lha theng van vakhu,
Bu hung san ka lunga ;
Ka lunga Pathen ngailutna,
Khumin meiyin kong hen.
2. Leiset lung ngai len thang sunga,
Kalunga cheng denin ;
Tonsot nopna lam-a kalung,
A kal toujou tapoi.
3. Ka la sah jong phatchomna bei,
Hal dohna umdeh lou ;
Nop la jong ka sa chim jitai,
Ka tahsan lhom jeh-in.
4. Ka ngai Pathen, itih chan kei,
Hitia ka um ding ham ;
Nangman nei lungset sim theilou,
Na lung ka tona bei.
5. Vo Lha Theng van vakhun hungin,
Ka lungah hung busan ;
Lungtheng lungnem lungdih khumin ;
Ka lungah cheng denin.
Reference: Doh is A.sₗ
1. Ngaiyun vantil ho la sah,
"Leng pengthah chu loupi hen;"
Leiya cham le ol leng hen,
Pathen le michonse ho ;
A kihou cham kittauve,
Vannoi namtin kipah un ;
Van lasa ho chu jom-mun;
Bethlehem kho sunga chun ;
Christa chu ahung peng tai,
"Leng peng thah chu loupi hen."
2. Chungnung penin a vahchoi,
Christa tonsot Pakai chu ;
Ahung pen ding kiseisa,
Nungah theng tah oi sunga ;
Tahsa phen ahungpeng tai,
Leiset mihem naosenin ;
Leiset mi toh chengkhom din,
Jesu Immanuel chu ;
Mihemin ahung peng tai,
"Leng peng thah chu loupi hen."
3. Chamna Leng chu vahchoiyun,
Vahchoiyun Ni sohthah chu ;
Hinna khovah ahin poi,
A lhaving jap dam theina ;
A loupina hin dalhan,
Mihemte sochatna din ;
Leiset mite tungdoh din,
Penthah kit thu ahin poi ;
Mihemin ahung penge,
"Leng pengthah chu loupi hen."
Reference: Doh is G.sₗ
1. Kelngoi ching hon jankhang laiyin,
A kelngoi nga pet'un ;
Pathen vantil ahung kum lhan,
A salvah soh jenge. (2)
2. Vantil chun "Kicha hih-uvin,
Keima neimu jeh-un ;
Kipana Thupha kahin poi,
Nang le mi jouse din." (2)
3. David Leng phungah apenge,
Vannoi huhhing ding chu ;
Vannoi Pakai ahung kum lhan,
Nu-ngah chan apeng tai. (2)
4. "Che leu chun gan ankong sunga,
Van a kon Naosen chu ;
Ponsea kijel mu'vin nate,
Hichu Christa ahi." (2)
5. Asei jouvin Vantil ho chun,
Van'a la asauve ;
"Vannoi Pathen chungnung nom hem,
Mihem lungmong soh hen." (2)
6. "Chungnunga Pathen loupi hen,
Leiya chamna leng hen ;
Van le leiset kijop patna,
Hihen atonsot'in."
Reference: Dod is G.
1. Hungun Pathen mite,
Kipa nop la sauvin ;
Bethlehem'a cheu hite,
Hung loiyuvin ;
Hungun gaveute,
Vantilte Lengpa so.
Hungun ! gahouvu hite,
Hungun ! gahouvu hite ;
Hungun ! gahouvu hite,
Leng Christa.
2. Sauvin van mi jousen,
Kipah in la sauvin ;
Sauvin chungnung pen'a cheng,
Vantil japin ;
Chung gam thenga chun,
Pathen mitheng len hen.
3. Leiya cheng asemsa,
Hing jousen la sauvin ;
Vahchoiyun mihem'a peng,
Christa Pathen ;
Van le lei Pakai,
Leng hat chungnung Jesu.
4. Nom hen Christa na min,
Leiya nahung peng tai ;
Tonsot tonsot geiyin,
Na min ja um hen !
Pathen Thu gou chu,
Tahsa phen apeng tai.
Reference: Doh is A.d
1. Khangkim laiyin van'a konin,
Van la loupi chu ahin sauve ;
Asa Vantil thengte janel,
A choinau ngeitah hiche ahi.
"Chungnung pen'a Pa loupi hen,
Leiya lungmon le chamna leng hen ;
A tonsot geiyin thangsoh hen,
Lei chunga kipa leng hen."
2. Kelngoi ching gam geh hon amui,
A vah loupi em hoi chungnung chu ;
Chungnung pen lemna la ngei chun,
Gankong sung chu alodim soh tai.
3. Pathen Kelngoi nou hung peng chu,
Mihem chonset apomang soh tai ;
Vahchoina le kipana lan,
Leng Christa chu vahchoiyu hite.
Reference: Doh is G.sₗ
1. Khatvei David Lengpa khopia,
Bong in'a gan an konga !
Minu khat in achasen theng,
Ponsea jellin alup sah ;
Minu chu Mariam ahi,
Acha chu Christa ahi.
2. Van'a konin ahung kum lhai,
Vannoi Pakai Pathen chu ;
Loupi pen lhunna ding ong lou,
Bong in'a ahung lhung tai ;
Mivaicha genthei ho toh,
Leiya ahung cheng khome.
3. A chapan lai khankho kidang,
Nunnem le jana neiyin ;
Lungset'in khoton anu ngai,
Lungset them Pakai theng chun ;
Eiho Ama nung juite,
Ama chon theng bang hiute.
4. Khatvei Amai imu kit diu,
Lungsetna eilhat jal'a ;
I Pakaiyu nunnem theng chu,
Chungnungpen Pakai ahi ;
A mite hungpui tou ding,
A van in noma cheng dia.
Reference: Doh is G.sₗ

songs.title: EI LHANDAMPU BETHLEHEM BONG IN A

lines: 1. Ei Lhandampu Bethlehem bong in'a,
A penge genthei jachat thoh soh in ;
A kidange Pakai hinlai khankho,
Keima eihol hol'e. (3)
A kidange Pakai hinlai khankho,
Keima eihol hol'e.
2. Ei Lhandampu Calvary thing chunga,
A thin kabat jouse eisah pehtai ;
Hibang hesoh iti athoh hi tam !
Keima jeh in athi. (3)
Hibang genthei iti athoh hitam !
Keima jeh in athi.
3. Chonset muthim'a kei ka lamvai teng,
Jesu Christa bou ahi eihuhhing ;
Ka hinna din eikouve o-nemin,
Keima eikou kouve. (3)
Ka hinna din eikouve O-nemin,
Keima eikou kouve.
4. Ei Lhandampu hung kit ding van'a kon,
A thutep theng chu keiman kamu ding ;
Van'a kon'a ahung kum kamu ding ;
Keima puiya hung ding. (3)
Vanna kona ahung kum kamu ding ;
Keima puiya hung ding.
Reference: Doh is G.s
1. Kelngoi ching hon bong in'a,
Koi ham aga lem'u chu ?
Pakai Jesu huhhing kidang,
Leng ho Leng, Pakai ho Pakai ;
Keiman lhaijing jeng tange,
Loupipen chungnung Pakai.
2. Gam thip'a gilkel thoh a,
Satan lhepna toh koiham ?
3. Chonse hin theina dinga,
Cross chunga kithat koiham ?
4. Mihem chonset jal'a thia,
Lhan'a kon thoukit koiham ?
5. A Pa jetlam'a touva,
Pakai chungnung pen koiham ?
Reference: Doh is A.sₗ

songs.title: VANNA CHENGPA JESU VAN GAM HIN DALHAN

lines: 1. Vanna chengpa Jesu vangam hin dalhan,
I phatna diuvin leiya ahung kum lhai.
Mi lungset mi lungset Pakai Jesu Christa,
Mi lungset mi lungset Immanuel ahi.
2. Lungmon kon'a Jesu Cross chunga thita,
Eiho huhhingna din athisan along.
3. Chujouvin ni somli leiya aleng len,
Seijui te kimu to pi jinge.
4. Malaiya a touna Apa jet lam'a.
Amun loupi tah chu akilo kit tai.
5. Jesu chu hung kit tei ding eiho dingin,
Amun sem lo dinga ei hung pui tou ding.
Reference: Doh is C.d

songs.title: BONG IN A SOH CHU KOI HAM?

lines: 1. Bong in'a soh chu koi ham ?
Nunnom Jesu Christa ;
Lop manna kijoh koi ham ?
Nunnom Jesu Christa.
Calvary-a gimthoh koi ham ?
Eihuhhingna thia koi ham ?
Vannoi huhhing Leng chungnung,
Nunnom Jesu Christa.
2. I taonau ngaiya koi ham ?
Nunnom Jesu Christa,
Hin kemlou eipea koi ham ?
Nunnom Jesu Christa.
Thina ding twisoh laiya,
Eila galkai ding koi ham ?
Hinna, damna Leng chungnung,
Nunnom Jesu Christa.
3. Thi louna eipea koi ham ?
Nunnom Jesu Christa,
Lhan'a kon thouva koi ham ?
Nunnom Jesu Christa.
Vannoi Thupi tan ni le,
Van kot hong dinga koi ham ?
Mi lungset Leng hat chungnung,
Nunnom Jesu Christa.
4. Ol eipe diuva koi ham ?
Nunnom Jesu Christa ;
Van'a kija pen koi ham ?
Nunnom Jesu Christa.
Lallukhuh khuhsah-un lang,
Vahchoiyun ami jousen ;
Hinna damna van Lengpa,
Nunnom Jesu Christa.
Reference: Doh is E♭ sₗ

songs.title: JESUN CHONSET A SOP THENG TAI

lines: 1. Jesun chonset asop theng tai,
Huhhingpa kidang ahi !
A thisannin eilhatdoh tai,
Huhhingpa kidang ahi.
Huhhingpa kidang ahi,
Pakai Jesu Christa,
Huhhingpa kidang ahi,
Pakai Jesu chu.
2. Eilhatdoh tai athisan in,
Huhhingpa kidang ahi !
Chule Pathen toh eigom tai,
Huhhingpa kidang ahi.
3. Lam eihil'in kei eipui lei,
Huhhingpa kidang ahi !
Eiching jinge kei damsel chan,
Huhhingpa kidang ahi.
4. Thahat le lung hat jong eipei,
Huhhingpa kidang ahi !
Hichun eilhem'a kaneh jou,
Huhhingpa kidang ahi.
Reference: Doh is E.s
1. Christan michonse alai,
Mi jouse gasei peh un ;
Lam hilouva chete le,
Lamvaiya gam mangsa ho.
Lan sauvin avel vel'in,
Mi chonse Christan alai ;
Ahet thei nauvin hil un,
Christan mi chonse alai.
2. Hungun ol peuvin nate,
Tahsan'un Christa thusei ;
Aman mi chonse alai.
Nangma jong thonmoa la ding.
3. Ka mona aum tapoi,
Lung theng sel'a kahi tai ;
Ka chonset nen asop tai,
Dan thu peh ka gingta poi.
4. Christan mi chonse alai,
Keima jong eipampai poi ;
Chonset kisop ngim soh a,
Vanmi hi ding kahitai.
Reference: Doh is D.m

songs.title: I HAM EI SOP THENG THEIYA

lines: 1. I ham eisop theng theiya ?
I dang bei Jesu thisan bou ;
Ka chonset sop theng soh thei,
I dang bei Jesu thisan bou.
Chu thisan luipi chun,
Buhbang eiso sah thei ;
A dang ima umlou,
I dang bei Jesu thisan bou.
2. Chonset suhmang soh theina,
I dang bei Jesu thisan bou ;
Kei chonphat na theng jou lou,
I dang bei Jesu thisan bou.
3. Chu bou eiki ngaidamna,
I dang bei Jesu thisan bou ;
Set'a kon'a then theina,
I dang bei Jesu thisan bou.
4. Chu bou nop le lungmona,
I dang bei Jesu thisan bou ;
Chu bou hinna le damna,
I dang bei Jesu thisan bou.
Reference: Doh is G.d
1. Jesun eilungset kahei,
Bible in kei eihil'e ;
Chapang hi acha ahi,
Ama hat chungnung ahi.
Jesun ei lungset,
Jesun eilungset ;
Henge eilungset,
Bible in eihil'e.
2. Jesun kei eilungset'e,
Keima huhhing nan athi ;
Van kotpi ahong len'e,
Chapangte lutna dingin.
3. Jesun kei eilungset ne,
Keiman Ama thu ngai leng ;
Ka lut ding kathi nung le,
Van chung in nom hoi sungah.
Reference: Doh is E.s

songs.title: JESU MIN HI ITI NGEI TAM

lines: 1. Jesu min hi iti ngei tam !
A tahsan te dinga ;
Lung donga alung monsah thei,
Dammo adamsah thei.
2. Lhagao damlou ho dam thei na,
Lung genthei lung olna ;
Lhagao hinna an pha ahi,
Tha chol dinga olna.
3. Min ngei hi ka hinna Songpi,
Ka lum le ka pho hi ;
Kem theilou ka gou thil kholna,
Van gou eilungsetna.
4. Pakai ka gol kei eichingpa,
Ka Pathen, ka Themgao ;
Ka hinna ka Lampi ahi,
Sang teiyin ka taona.
5. Ka hin laisen na min ngei hi,
Keiman seichoi lenge ;
Vo Jesu ken bangmon sange,
Na min ngei vahchoi la.
Reference: Doh is E♭.s
1. O iti nop tam ! Christa kanei,
Van gam loupi le anop eihil tai ;
Van gou lo dinga lhat kahi tai,
Thisan le Lhagaova peng kahi.
Hiche ka thusim, hiche ka la,
Keiman vahchoi ding kahin laisea ;
Hiche kathusim, hiche ka la,
Ken vahchoi jing ding kahin laisea.
2. Ahenga lut chu nop chamkim soh,
Thokit loupi nia loupina chang ding ;
Vantil hung kumlha eipuitou ding,
A koma chenga ol jing jeng ding.
3. A henga lut chu ol chamkim soh,
Genthei lengvai chol jong beisohta ding ;
Ki gingin ahung ngah jing inge,
Aphatna cheng vahchoi la'n sange.
Reference: Doh is D. m
1. Leiset nop mang jongle,
Christa kanei ;
Leiset hi chim jongle,
Christa kanei.
Hi leiset gam muthim,
Olna mun la umlou ;
Christa kei kingaina ,
Christa kanei.
2. Ka lhagao lhem hih in,
Christa kanei ;
Leiya hin um jong leng,
Christa kanei ;
Leiset phe mang kit ding,
Ni chomkhat dinga peng ;
Kalunga mang jeng hen,
Christa kanei.
3. Hinkho janmang tobang,
Christa kanei ;
Chomkah a beita ding
Leiset hinkho,
Ka lunga kagel chu,
Mang hen mil tange ken ;
Jesu bou ka hinna,
Christa kanei.
4. Ka hinkho lhing jongle,
Christa kanei ;
Sangin tonsot hinna,
Christa kanei ;
Sangin nop le phatthei,
Olna mun chu jon'in ;
Sangin Jesu angsung,
Christa kanei.
Reference: Doh is E♭. s
1. Jesun nigui din eideiye,
Adinga salvah din;
Vah jinga Ama lunglhai din,
In, school, kichep na a.
Nigui din eideiye
Jesun nigui din eideiye;
Nigui din eideiye,
Nigui hinge Ama din.
2. Jesun eidei lungset nei din,
Mi jouse lungset din;
Kipa tha nopna vet sah din,
Chapang kei eideiye.
3. Ka lung sunga kon chonsetna,
Lunggel kon louna din;
Jesu henga ken thum jing ding,
I A dingin vah hing’e.
4. Jesu dingin nigui hing’e,
Leiya ka len lai sen;
Pakai na keiman tong jing ding,
Van in nom chenna din.
Reference: Doh is G.sₗ

songs.title: CHONSET MUTHIM A VANNOI MANGSA AHI

lines: 1. Chonset muthim'a vannoi mang sa ahi,
Vannoi vah chu Jesu ahi,
Ama vah chu sunlai sang in avahjoi,
Vannoi vah chu Jesu ahi.
Hung in nag dinga vah, vah'a chun ,
Keima avah chun eisal vah tai,
Mitcho san kho kamu theitai,
Vannoi vah chu Jesu ahi.
2. Chonset muthim aumpoi Jesu heng'a,
Vannoi vah chu Jesu ahi.
Vah lamkai juileu hen, vah a iche diu,
Vannoi vah chu Jesu ahi.
3. Chonset micho muthim noija cheng nangho,
Vannoi vah chu Jesu ahi,
Sang in Ama Thupha nang jong vah chang ding,
Vannoi vah chu Jesu ahi.
4. Vangam nom'a chun sun nivah angaipoi,
Vangam vah chu Jesu ahi,
Sana khopi vah chu kelngoi nou ahi,
Vannoi vah chu Jesu ahi.
Reference: Doh is F. sₗ

songs.title: JESU BANGA GOLPHA LUNGNENG UM LOU

lines: 1. Jesu banga golpha lungneng umlou,
Khat jengcha jong umlou ;
I lhau nat thoidam thei adang umlou,
Khat jengcha jong umlou.
Jesun ilung gimnau ahenai,
Eipui lhung tei dingu Vangam ;
Jesu banga golpha lungneng umlou,
Khat jengcha jong umlou.
2. Ama banga Theng le alen umlou,
Khat jengcha jong umlou ;
Hibang gol lungnem le pha dang umlou,
Khat jengcha jong umlou.
3. A mithengte adalhah khah um em ?
Khat jengcha jong umlou.
Mi chonsete adeimo khah um am ?
Khat jengcha jong umlou.
4. Jesu banga pha eina kipe kham ?
Khat jengcha jong umlou ;
Van in'a chengdin ei deimou vintem ?
Khat jengcha jong umlou.
Reference: Doh is F.m
1. Kipa ogin ka jauve,
Jesun eihuhhingui,
Thupha chu seiphong leuvin,
Jesun eihuhhingui ;
Thu chu gam tin'a pouvin,
Molle twilen kai piuvin,
Cheuvin Pakai thu ahi,
Jesun eihuhhingui.
2. A ban ban'in tolun lang,
Jesun eihuhhingui,
Hilsoh un michonsete,
Jesun eihuhhingui ;
Twikol cheng jousen sau hen !
Twikol cheng jousen sau hen !
Vannoi leiset kipah hen,
Jesun eihuhhingui.
3. Chung'an jong chutin sauhen,
Jesun eihuhhingui ;
Athi chu hinkemlouna,
Jesun eihuhhingui ;
Muthim lah jousea seiyun,
A lung thisa hal kit din ;
Lhan chung tin'a lan sauvin,
Jesun eihuhhingui.
4. Hui nung bangin seileuvin,
Jesun eihuhhingui ;
Tun namtin kipah soh hen,
Jesun eihuhhingui ;
Huhhingna thu seileuvin,
Gam tin le twilen tin'a ;
Vannoi leiset thongsoh hen,
Jesun eihuhhingui.
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ

songs.title: PAKAI HESOH THOH JAN CHU KANGAI TO LE

lines: 1. Pakai hesoh thoh jan chu ka ngaito le,
Kalung sunga thimpi ajinge ;
Mihem dinga asem ni aso phat'in,
Ka lungsung thim jing avah soh tai.
Keima jeh in Calvary jonin achei,
Keima jeh in, keima jeh in ;
Keima jeh in Calvary jonin achei,
Eilhatdoh nan athi.
2. Mi chonse A-anga kakithing thinge,
Ka kun'e lungset ngaidam thum nan ;
"Na chonset ka ngaidam tai" ti o kajai,
"Ka satai nabat jouse" eiti.
3. Huhhingpan ei ngailut akidang lheh e,
Van'a laltouna ahin dalhai ;
I hinna dingun Calvarya ahung thi,
Vahchoiyun Amin theng phong leuvin.
Reference: Doh is G.sₗ
1. Thisan luipi khat alonge,
Christa thajunga kon ;
Mi chonseten chu luiya chun,
Chonset asop lhauve.
Chonset asop lhauve,
Chonset asop lhauve ;
Mi chonse ten chu luiya chun,
Chonset asop lhauve.
2. Cross chunga um thi dingsa chu,
Thisan lui chu amui ;
Kei jong ama banga chonse,
Ka chonset sop thengin.
3. Na thisan lui nah chu keiman,
Tahsanin ka mutai ;
O ngeiyin Nang vahchoina la,
Kathi kahsen sange.
4. Ka leiset hinkho abeiya,
Lhan'a kon katho teng ;
Van'a o-ngei cheh in sange,
Na vahchoi tang louvin.
Reference: Doh is C.d

songs.title: SOCHATNA KONG NIKHAT KAL TOU DING

lines: 1. Sochatna kong nikhat kaltou ding,
Jesu sochatna kongtol ahi;
Kong sung a chu namtin kimsoh ding,
Apuilut ding vanchung gam nom a.
{Chu gam a lut dingin, chu gam a lut dingin;
Kong a chun hungkal un u-le nao} 2
2. Jesun lungset tah-in nakouve,
Kong a hung kal un michonsete;
Zion gam jon ding kong dang umlou,
Phat hom in hunglut in kong sunga.
3. Kaina sochatna kong chu chele,
Hung kile lou ding kou jongle chun;
Zion gam nom em lam kai tading,
Nang naka ding twikhanglen gal a.
Reference: Doh is A. sₗ

songs.title: VAHCHOI JUN PAKAI JESU LENG DAVID SON

lines: 1. Vahchoijun Pakai Jesu Leng David son,
Ama vaihom kitup soh ding,
Mi genthei le mi vaicha lungset soh ding,
Chonset jouse sumang soh ding.
2. Gojuh laija hiche leiset gam chung’a,
Hampa louhing kile bang a,
Ama hung kum teng lei kisem thah soh ding,
Ama gam tin pahcha dimsoh ding.
3. Ama hung teng chon phat pung a jalsoh ding,
Gam jousea lungmon cham leng ding,
Leng jouse le chaga jousen jacheh ding,
Namtin A-ang a lut cheh ding.
Reference: Doh is G.d

songs.title: THEMPU LEN CHUN TUN EI NAIYUI

lines: 1. Thempulen chun tun einai-jun,
Mi lungset chungnung Jesu ;
Lengvai kipana aseiye,
Pakai Jesu sei ngaiyun.
Seraph la ngei chungnung pen,
Mihem kam a min ngei pen ;
Hichu tonsot la ngei pen,
Jesu Christa min ngei.
2. Loupina jouse Jesu a,
Ken ka tahsan tai Jesu ;
Huhhingpa min ngei ka ngailui,
Jesu min kangai nom e.
3. A min chu lung lengvai milna,
Jesu min tailou umlou ;
Ka jah le kei ka lung monge,
Jesu Christa minlu chu.
4. Van chung gam nom a ikal teng,
Huhhingpa mel kimu ding ;
Lungset laltouna kimvel a,
Amin ngei la kisa ding.
Reference: Doh is E♭. s

songs.title: NEI DALHA LOU JEN O JESU

lines: 1. Nei dalha lou jen o Jesu,
Ka taona ngaiyin ;
Midang Nangman nakou tengle,
Nei dalha hih-in.
Jesu, Jesu, ka taonau ngaiyin,
Nangmam midang ho nakou teng,
Nei dalha hih-in.
2. Natouna limdam noiya chun,
Keima ol neipen ;
Chua na vahchoi la sange,
Lungset in neilan.
3. Ka lung monna twinah nahi,
Ka hinna jong Nang ;
Nang lou keiman adang neilou,
Nangbou ka hinna.
4. Ka chonsetna subei soh in,
Nei siltheng sel in ;
Na deilam tah-in neipui len,
Na vangam geiyin.
Reference: Doh is A♭. m

songs.title: O EI LHANDAMPU THISAN SONA CHU

lines: 1. O Eilhandampu thisan sona chu,
Nopna le ol chamlhatna ahitai ;
Sapsetna changin along toh-in,
Namtin alhatdam lungset in.
O lungsetna sangin mi chonsen,
O lungsetna sopi'n tahsanin ;
Tonsot a kon Cross limdam noiya,
Lhandampun nakou aw nemin.
2. Cross chunga Lhandampu nangma dingin,
Genthei lengvaiyin, linglukhuh akhuh ;
Nasetna kisei kit talou ding,
Lungsetna ngaidam nahitai.
3. Noplen ihiuve lungdon lungjin bei,
Jesun ahoiye alhatdamte chu ;
"Hungin"  tin nakou lunglhai sellin,
Hungin Aman na ngaidam tai.
Reference: Doh is E♭. d
Ima jouse nangman na ngai chan chu,
Thum le chun Jesun tua nang peding.
1. Chonsen thum le chun,(3)
Huhhing tan nate.
2. Chol'in thum le chun, (3)
Olsah tan nate.
3. Hatmon thum le chun,(3)
Thanei tan nate.
4. Kel'in thum le chun, (3)
Oiva tan nate.
5. Dammon thum le chun, (3)
Damthei tan nate.

songs.title: KEI GOL NEI LOU CHANGLHA LENGVAI

lines: 1. Kei gol neilou changlha,
Pakai, neikou aw kajai ;
Kalung heiyin Nang kasange,
Tun ka hunge na hengah.
Kei ka hunge, kei kahunge,
Na lim a phatthei chang din ;
Kei ka hunge, kei ka hunge,
Cholnga dingin ka hunge.
2. Lungtheng, lungnem, jaidam, lungneng,
Naheng jonin ka hunge ;
Nei kol jingin, Nangma anga,
Pot kit lou din ka hunge.
3. Nalim kahin bel e Pakai,
Ka lhan olna a ngaitai ;
Jing khovah a Mithengte toh,
Nun noma thou kit dingin.
4. Ka koma nei umpi jingin,
Hinkho thim jing bang jongle ;
Ka lungdon kipanan hin len,
Ka lung muthim salvah-in.
Reference: Doh is F.sₗ
1. Pathen keima mi chonse,
Che kahi twisoh laiya ;
Chonset ka pohlel jal in,
Asetai kache na kong ;
Pakai Jesun neihuh-in,
Nangma bou eihuhhing thei.
2. Huipi le gopi kitho,
Thi ding koncha kahi tai ;
Nei lungset in neihuh in,
Nang tailou adang umlou ;
Thahat chungnung pen Jesun,
Keima nei huhhing teiyin.
3. Twisoh van vum a lengta,
Nei tol in neihuhhingin ;
Tu kalungdon pettah hin,
Ka kong kaina Nang nahi ;
Pakai Jesu Nang jeng bou,
Huhhinga kong chu nahi.
Reference: Doh is B♭. m
1. Pakai Jesu Leng hatchungnung,
Na thahat chu hin phongin ;
Thilha kihou sumang soh in,
Vannoi gam losoh loijin,
Agam tin a Pakai Jesu vaihomin. (2)
2. Nangma khovah dihtah nahi,
Sumang soh-in muthim gam ;
Chonphatna Lhagao Theng homin,
Hiche leiset gam chunga ;
Vannoi mite huhhingin Pakai Jesu. (2)
3. Kipana hinna Thupha hin,
Sonmang soh hen Satan gam ;
Vannoi leiset michonseten,
Sochatna Thupha mu hen ;
Huhhing molson nalhen chom Nangma ngaite. (2)
4. Hat le loupina Nangma a,
Tonsot hatna Nangma a ;
Van le leiset Leng hat chungnung,
Hiche Leng jou ding koi ham ?
Huhhung soh-in na leiset sema mite. (2)
Reference: Doh is D.sₗ
1. Ngaiyin kahung taona, Pakai Jesu,
Ka ngaicheh na dingin, lung neihin pen ;
Nang ka ngai cheh nadin,
Jesun lung neihin pen ;
Ha ngai tah-a, ka ngaina din.
2. Leiset nopna jouse, kamu soh tan,
Ahin, nopna olna, hin kichen lou ;
Nangma jengbou hinna,
Nopna le lung monna,
Ha ngai tah-a, ka ngaina din.
3. Tu vangin Nang jeng bou ngailutna ding,
Lung thengtah ka thum e, kei neihin pen ;
Nang ka ngai cheh na din,
Lungtheng, lungnem neipen ;
Ha ngaitah-a, ka ngai nadin.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ
1. Jesun neichingun neihoiyun,
Nei hoiyun na kamdam in ;
Nanga kon chonphat neihil jingun,
Neivah-un Lhagao Thengin ;
Pakai Jesun neiching jingun,
Na lhatsa Nanga kahi. } (2)
2. Nanga kahiuve nei chingun,
Ka lampiu neihil jingun ;
Nei huhdoh-un chonset a kon,
Nei hol un ka man tengu ;
Pakai Jesu nunnom Jesu,
Ngailhi jingin ka taona. } (2)
3. Nangman lang e tia nei tepsau,
Michonse hijong lengu ;
Neilhat un nei huhhing tauve,
Thenna ding le hoina din ;
Pakai Jesu, nunnom Jesu,
Nang lama kalung heijin. } (2)
4. Nei holsah-un nei lungsetnau,
Nei heiyun nacham tah-in ;
Pakai Nang bou ka sochatnau,
Cheng jingin ka lunguva ;
Pakai Jesu, nunnom Jesu,
Nei lungsetna chu molson. } (2)
Reference: Doh is E♭. m
1. Hintwi putna Cross phungah,
Nei koiyin Jesun kei ;
Man beiya peh hinna le,
Damna lui alonge.
Cross phungah, Cross phungah,
Ka loupina hi hen ;
Ka thokit ka kaltou man,
Luigal vangam nom ah.
2. Ka toh-e Cross phungah chun,
Lungset le sochatna ;
Chua um Jing valpa chun,
Keima eisal vah-e.
3. Tun ka ume Cross phungah,
Phattheina kim neipen ;
Nei kaihoiyin nitinin,
Nei koiyin nalim ah.
4. Ka kat jinge Cross phungah,
Eilungset kinemin ;
Ka galkai ka kaltou man,
Nopna van gam nom ah.
Reference: Doh is F. m
1. Ka lhagao ngailua Jesu,
Na anga um ka nom e ;
Ka vella twiso laisen,
Khopi hui ahat laisen.
Nei sellin Pakai Jesun,
Ka kichat tijat bei man ;
Nei la galkaiyin Pakai,
Lan kalha akhon ni le.
2. Kaina ding dang ken neilou,
Ka lhagao Nang jenga kai ;
Kei nei changlha lou jenin,
Neivah jingin nei ngah phan.
Ka tahsan Nang jenga um,
Nangma jeng eihuhhing thei ;
Nei lungset in neive phan,
Na lhavingin nei hinkhun.
3. Ima jousea Nang ka ngai,
Nanga kona bou ka mu ;
Alhu jong phong dingin lang,
Ana jong damsah soh-in.
Hinna twinah Nang nahi,
Nanga kon hintwi neipen ;
Ka lung sungah lonsah-in,
Neipen hinkemlou twi chu.
Reference: Doh is F♭/F/D. m
1. Ka tahsanin navei,
Calvary Kelngoinou ;
Pathen Jesu,
Ka taona ngaijin lang ;
Ka mona ngaidamin,
Tunia pat tukal in ,
Nei thensah-in.
2. Na mi lungset hao chun,
Kalung bei hatsah hen ;
Lungtheng neipen,
Keima jal a nathi ;
Nang ka ngaicheh nadin,
Kikhellou lung thengsel ;
Meiyin kong hen.
3. Muthim a kalhah a,
Ka lungjin lungdon teng ;
Lam nei hil in,
Tunin muthim pailhan ;
Ka lhi thehhul soh-in,
Nei lhadoh kit datan ;
Nang koma kon.
4. Ka hinkho bulhin a,
Thina twidap jen chun ;
Eilon khum teng,
Nei lungset in neilan ;
Kichat sumang soh-in.
Bit keichan van chunga ;
Neipui touvin.
Reference: Doh is E♭. d

songs.title: NA LALTOUNA LE LALLUKHUH NAHIN DALHAN

lines: 1. Na Laltouna le lallukhuh na hin dalhan,
Na hung kumlhai hi leiset a hin ;
Bethlehem a Nangma lhunna ding mun onglou,
Theng chungnungpen lhunna bong in.
Hungo Pakai ka lungsungah,
Kalung a na mun ding a um,
Hungo ka Pakai kalung sungah,
Na lhunna ding mun a um e.
2. Leiset chunga gam-ui jengin jong ko anei,
Chung leng van jong gena bu anei ;
Pathen Chapan alu ngapna ding mun jeng jong,
Hinoi leiset a atoh moi.
3. Van miten la asah ding nileh van gama,
Lim tah a nahung kit ni leh ;
Chu ni le neikouvin, Nangma angsunga chun,
"Na mun ding aume"  nei tin.
Pakai, ka lha kipah lheh ding,
Nangman chutia neikou ni leh,
Pakai ka lhagao kipah lheh ding,
Nangman chutia neikou ni leh.
Reference: Doh is F. dₗ
1. Pakai na natoh hi,
Hin suhal kit in lang ;
Nana tongte thahat hinpen,
Na hatna kilang hen.
Pakai na natoh hi,
Hin suhal kit in lang ;
Hung kumlhan lang tha nei peuvin,
Phattheina hin bung lhan.
2. Pakai na na tongte,
Sei themna tha pen lang ;
Gamtin lhagao huhhing nau hen,
Na mintheng loupi hen.
3. Pakai mijouse lung,
Hin suhal soh keiyin ;
Nangma mi lungsetna heu hen,
Lungsetna mei kong hen.
4. Pakai halna hin lhan,
Pentecost ni hinlhan ;
Nangma Mintheng chu loupi hen,
Vahchoiyin umjing hen.
Reference: Doh is G. d

songs.title: PAKAI JESU KEN NANG KA KAI

lines: 1. Pakai Jesu ken Nang ka kai,
Nei huhhing loule kei kathi ;
Sochatna hinna ka thum e,
Neilan iti jong leng.
Neilan iti jong leng, (2)
Jesu Christa thi man jeh chun ;
Neilan iti jong leng.
2. Lungdong le themmo kei kahi,
Ka dinga na thisan long chun ;
Athah in neisem kit in lang,
Neilan iti jong leng.
3. Kinepna neilou ka hitai,
Ka kiholna ka sukhel tai ;
Nei huhhingin nei lungset in,
Neilan iti jong leng.
4. Na banjet chun neipom jingin,
Na lungdei bangin nei chingin ;
Nalung chamtah in nei heiyin,
Neilan iti jong leng.
Reference: Doh is E. d
1. Ateh akhang ibonchauvin,
Jesu vahchoi la saute ;
Eihuhhing i-sochat jal un,
Jesu vahchoila saute.
Lunglhai sel in la ngeitah in,
Jesu vahchoi la saute ;
Lunglhai sel in la ngei saute,
Jesu vahchoi la saute.
2. In a i-nom um kom jongle,
Jesu vahchoi la saute.
Lamlhah, khomol, khol le tol'a,
Jesu vahchoi la saute.
3. In theng kipah a ikai teng,
Jesu vahchoi la saute;
Kikhoppi le chang lhatna jong,
Jesu vahchoi la saute.
4. Set tona le phattheina jong,
Jesu vahchoi la saute;
Ahao, avai, gentheiten jong,
Jesu vahchoi la saute.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ
1. Jauvin Jesu min choi annun,
Van min achoi-an'e ; (2)
Leng jouse Leng, lal jouse Lal,
Lemun (5) leng jouse Leng.
2. Lem uvin Pathen martar ten,
Alhatsa mitheng ten ; (2)
Jesu loupina choi-an'un.
Lemun (5) leng jouse Leng.
3. Israel chate aum sunin,
Lhomcha hijong leu chun ; (2)
Lungset a na huhhing Pau chu,
Lemun (5) leng jouse Leng.
4. Sumil lou jen un Gentile ten,
Thisana na Lhatpau ; (2)
Akho muh a kuncheh un lang,
Lem un (5) leng jouse Leng.
5. Chitin, namtin le phung tinin,
Paotin in choi-an'un ; (2 vei)
Chung le noi Pakai Leng chungnung,
Lem un (5) leng jouse Leng.
Reference: Doh is B♭ sₗ

songs.title: VAHCHOI CHEH UN EI HUHHING PAU NUNNOM JESU

lines: 1. Vahchoi cheh un Eihuhhingpau nunnom Jesu,
Eilungsetnau kidang chu lan sauvin ;
A vahchoiyui chunga cheng Vantil jousen jong,
Loupi jana Ama jenga hihen ;
Kelngoi chin bang Jesun achate aching,
A khut in nitinin akaihoi lei ;
A vahchoiyui chunga cheng Vantil jousen jong,
Loupi jana Ama jenga hihen.
2. Vahchoi cheh un Eihuhhingpau nunnom Jesu,
Chonse lhatnan Cross chunga ahung thi ;
I sochatnau tonsot kulpi Ama ahi,
Vahchoi cheh un Cross chunga thi Jesu ;
Vahchoi cheh un chonset pomang Jesu chu,
Eilungsetnau iti kidan hitam?
I sochatnau tonsot kulpi Ama ahi,
Vahchoi cheh un Cross chunga thi Jesu.
3. Vahchoi cheh un Eihuhhingpau nunnom Jesu,
Vantil sangjan Hosanna asam un ;
Huhhing Jesu tonsot tonsot in Leng chang hen,
Lemun, lemun, Themgao, Thempu Leng chu ;
A loupina Christa hungkit ding leiya,
Thahat, loupi Pakaiya hijing ding ;
Huhhing Jesu tonsot tonsot in Leng chang hen,
Lemun, lemun, Themgao, Thempu Leng chu.
Reference: Doh is A. m
1. Thusim kidang ken lan sange,
Ka dinga Christa thi chu ;
A van innom ahin dalhan,
Calvarya ahung thi tai.
Athusim kidang lan sange,
Ka dinga Christa thi chu ;
Vahchoiyun mithengte jousen,
Vahchoiyun eihuhhing nau.
2. Amangsa ei holdoh kit tai,
A kelngoi kei vahmangsa ;
Eipom e lungsetna ban chun,
A lampia eilepui tai.
3. Tun jong thimin ei um jinge,
Lung genthei katoh jinge ;
Ahin Jesun ei umpi nai,
Akhut tenin eikai lei.
4. Ka leiset hinkho lhin kahsea,
Eiching jing jeng ding Aman ;
Chule van a eipuitou ding,
Ka ngai chengtoh cheng khom ding.
Reference: Doh is A♭ mₗ

songs.title: KA PAKAI JESU EI HUHHINGPA NA MIN

lines: 1. Ka Pakai Jesu eihuhhingpa namin,
Vannoi leiset miten ja cheh hen ;
Na mi semte na itna le chuna in,
Vannoi leiset min nahung penge.
Pakai Jesu eihuhhingpa,
Nangma bou hinna le damna ;
Na Mintheng chungnung,
Pakai ho Pakai, leng ho Leng hatchungnung.
2. Leiset mihem van mi achan ding deinan,
Nangma leiset min nahung penge ;
Vana kemlouva atha olna dingun,
Nangman chol tintang nahung thoh-e.
3. Amaho tonsot a anopna dingun,
Gim le genthei tin nahung thoh-e ;
A gilkel kit louna dingun kelle chah,
Nathoh in najon tai Golgotha.
4. A thi kit louna dingu le tonsot a,
Hin kemlou anei theina dingun ;
Kem louva ahin jingna dingun Nangma,
Calvary Cross chunga nahung thi.
Reference: Doh is C. d

songs.title: MIN KHAT A-UM E KA NGAI NOM

lines: 1. Min khat aume ka ngai nom,
Lasah din ka deiye;
Lan a ging'e ka na sungah,
Lei chunga min ngei pen.
2. Jesun ei ngailut aseiye
Ei huhhingna thi chu;
A thisan lon thu a seiye,
Chonse huhhingna a.
3. Min ngei hi namtui bang jing ding.
Ling lah lam khoh a jong.
Thinglhang lam khoh lam nom soh ding,
Pathen kom ei lhut ding.
4. Chonsetna kon a thisana,
A lhatsa janelho;
Jesun eingailut vahchoina,
Tonsot lathah sange.
Reference: Doh is A. sₗ
1. Eilhatpau vahchoi la sange,
Ei ngailutna kidang chu ;
Cross mun khoh chunga athoh e,
Setna kon eilhat dohnan.
Eilhatpau vahchoi la sauvin,
Eilhat ui athisanin ;
Cross chun eingaidam tai;
Bat sa-lhan ei onsah tai.
2. Sei leng e athu kidang chu,
Amangsa eihuhdoh chu ;
Ami lungset mong neilou chun,
Man beiyin eilhatdoh tai.
3. Eilhatpa vahchoi la sange,
A van mi ngailutna chu ;
Thina konin eilhatdoh tai,
Pathen Chapa thengtah chun.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ
1. Jesun ei ngailut akidang,
Leiset mihemte dingin ;
Chungnungpen vahchoi nan saute,
Sau hite avahchoi la.
Van gam ilhun tengu leh,
Iti kipa thanop a um tadem ;
Jesu imu teng leh,
Gal jo la sa i-ao le diu.
2. Ei holnau vangam em nom chu,
I chenna dingu ahi ;
Chenna innom eigot peh ui,
Tonsot a chulta lou ding.
3. I mauva toh man koisa um,
Manoute kipa man chu ;
Toh gimna ichai teng amel,
Loupitah chu imu diu.
4. Songmantam kotpi ahon teng,
Van khopi sung nom em chu ;
Chu-a eiho inom lendiu,
Chung van tolpia ichendiu.
Reference: Doh is C. sₗ
1. Ka lhagao hinna din Jesu,
Cross chunga kiphal in athi ;
Nat athoh-e kei damna din,
Sei sangin eilungset.
A sei sangun eilungset joi, (2)
Na satah in keima eilungsetne ;
Jesun eilungset e.
2. Alung donna athoh theiyin,
Kineo sah in gim athoh-e ;
Hin kemlou inei theina din,
Sei sangin eilungset.
3. Jesun ilung monna dingun,
Pathen hengah eitao peh ui ;
Athisanin eilhat tauve,
Sei sangin eilungset.
4. Einai komle kalung kipah,
Olna kichat louna eipei ;
Ama a kinepna thonlou,
Sei sangin eilungset'e.
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ

songs.title: KA KULPI NAHI O EI LHANDAMPU

lines: 1. Ka kulpi nahi O Eilhandampu,
Ka kulpi nahi, ka kiselna ;
Ka kulpi nahi kahinna nahi,
Nang kom jenga bou umjing inge.
Ka kulpi nahi, O Eilhandampu,
Ka gol nahi, Ka lamkai nahi ;
Nang kahinpi Eilhandampu nahi,
Kalung monpi Nang ka kiselna.
2. Ka kulpi nahi set in eijol teng,
Ka kulpi nahi, Nang ka hoina ;
Ka kulpi nahi, kalung hesoh teng,
Ka kulpi nahi, gin kanei lou.
3. Ka kulpi nahi, set hoi dal nahi,
Ka gol ngai nahi kikhel lou ding ;
Kalung pumpi na chunga ka ngaiye.
Tahsan le mithengin nei koiyin.
4. Ka kulpi nahi, O Eilhandampu,
Namtin chitin le leng, lal jouse ;
Manghen leivuiyin lengmang jou jongle,
Ka tonsot Kulpi Nang hijing ding.
Reference: Doh is B♭. sₗ
1. Mitheng sangsom jat sangsom,
Huhhingsa galmi hon ;
Pon bang jeng akisil cheh un ,
Khovah mun ajonun ;
Thina, chonset achaiyun,
A galsat ajou vun ;
Sana kotpi a alut tauve,
Jo la asa lut un.
Halleluiyah ! Halleluiyah,
Akithatsa Kelngoinou ;
Halleluiyah ! Halleluiyah,
Ahingdoh kit a chu.
2. Halleluiyah asamun,
Van le lei adipmun ;
Selangdah sangsom gin ngeiyin,
Jo la ngei asauvin ;
Leiset thilsem jouse le,
Chitin namtin semnia ;
Pat a hesohna jouse chu,
Akisa chai soh tai.
3. Canaan gam nom hoitah chu,
Mithengte len bolna ;
Anopsah jeu seithei louvin,
Kikhen kit umlou ding ;
Mi mai vahsel sohta ding,
Mitlhi so um talou ;
Genthei lengvai nulou palou,
Meithai pagong umlou.
Reference: Doh is C. m

songs.title: NA MI NGAILUT JE KA HEI

lines: 1. Na mi ngailut je kahei,
Masangin ka Pakai ;
Nangma mi lungset nachu,
Kana notthap hel e.
Halleluiyah ! lungsetna,
Eikipe manbeiya ;
Amintheng hi loupi hen,
A thisana eilhat.
2. Chonset thimpi jing lah a,
Lamvaiya amangsa ;
Lungmonna ken nei talou,
Tun hinna ka chang tai.
3. Nangman nei ngailut jeh in,
Hin kemlou kachang tai ;
Nangman nei lungset jeh in ;
Lhatdamna kachang tai.
Reference: Doh is G. m

songs.title: TWISOH LAIYA UM MITEHO KOI HAM?

lines: 1. Twi soh laiya um hite ho koi ham ?
Hesoh le thiding koncha um jinga ;
Huhhing ngaiya Christa so,
Kelngoi thisanna kisop.
Jerusalem thah kotpia chun lutjel jengun,
Kelngoi thisana kisop ;
Jerusalem thah kotpia chun lutjel jengun,
Kelngoi thisana kisop.
2. Ama hohi Pakai Jesu tahsan,
Ging tah a Pakai hil nitsoh keiya ;
Ama jenga ki ngaiya,
Kelngoi thisana kisop.
3. Leiya gim genthei hesoh thoh soh a,
Lung thengsel a Ama lam jeng sanga ;
Tua lungmonga kicholdo,
Kelngoi thisana kisop.
4. Tun vang luigal gamnom akai soh un,
Thi le lungdon gimna a beisoh tai ;
Tonsot nopna gam kaita,
Kelngoi thisana kisop.
Reference: Doh is E♭. m

songs.title: CHAMNA LE LUNGMON KADIN LUIYIN ALONG

lines: 1. Chamna le lungmon kadin luiyin along,
Lungdon twisanglen bang jong le ;
Ka hetding dolse Nangman neihil chan chu,
A pha ta! a pha ta! ka dingin.
A pha ta, ka dingin ;
A pha ta, a pha ta, ka dingin.
2. Thupha chun ka chonset pumpi asel tai,
Cross chunga akhenbeh soh tai ;
Keiman tukal chonset po kit talou ding,
Vahchoiyin vahchoiyin ka lungin.
3. Christa chu hijing hen ka hinna bulpi,
Jordan in eiso khum jongle ;
Keima dinga olmona ding um talou,
Chamna thupha chu neihil jingin.
4. Pakai nahung kit ding ni ka ngah jinge,
Van gam nom ka hung lhun kah sen ;
Van sumkon gin le Nang O-gin ngah kahi,
Ka lha dia iti kinep um tam.
Reference: Doh is D♭. s
1. Vannoi kipah hen Pakai hung,
Leiyin sang hen a Leng ;
A umna ding mun mi jousen,
Lungsung gotsan koihen. (3)
2. Vannoi kipah Pakai vaihom,
Sauvin avahchoi la ;
Mol le lhang, Phaicham twi lenin,
A vahchoi la sauvin. (3)
3. Thutah lungset nan vai apoi,
Heu hen leiset miten ;
Achon phat le aloupina,
Seiphong hen lei chungah. (3)
Reference: Doh is E♭. dₗ
1. Hoichan a hijongle Pakai nei puiyin,
Na khut in neituh jingin neilha kang hih in ;
Ling le khao thang tam jongle nanung kajui ding,
Lhandampun nei puiyin hoichan hijongle.
Hoichan hijongle Lhandampu,
Na nung kajui ding ; (2)
Hoichan hijongle Lhandampu,
Na nung kajui ding.
2. Hoichan a hijong le Namai lhaisel in,
Nei lhamonin tha neipen set neidal peh in ;
Ka lam muthim jing jongle kei kicha lou ding,
Hoichan a hijong le Nangin nei puiyin.
3. Hoichan a hijong le Nang bou ka taona,
Lam hahsa neipui hoiyin kaman lou nadin ;
Chonsetnan eium kimvel hen hahsa jong le,
Nangin nei umpi le kei gammang lou ding.
Reference: Doh is B♭. sₗ
1. O Calvary......... Lhang gimnei tah,
Pakai thina.........Calvary lhang ;
Cross chunga chun.........Athisan along,
Chonse keima.........eilhatdoh tai.
O Calvary.........Calvary thim !
Keidia Christa thisan lonna ;
O Calvary.........Calvary hoi,
Chu a Pakai ka din athi.
2. Ohe ! Pakai.........Keima jal a,
Hibang hesoh.........Nathoh hitam !
Calvary lhang.........Gimnei tah chu !
Vannoi chonset......... Pon najon tai.
3. Song chimsoh in.........mu athim tai,
Hichun tan ta.........Lhandampu chu ;
Hou-in ponjal.........laiya lhangta,
Van kot kihong.........namtin dingin.
Reference: Doh is B♭. m
1. Pakai Jesu eihuhhingpan,
Athoh in thi hahsa ;
A thisan lu chu atoh-e,
Mi chonse eihuh nan.
Cross phunga, Cross phunga khovah kamuna-a,
Hia chun ka chonset poh tol a lhan ;
Hichun khovah ken tahsanin kamui,
Tunvang keiman nom kasa jing tai.
2. Keima mi chonse huhna a,
A thisan ato chun ;
Nisan jong athoh ve ngam lou,
A mai asel jenge.
3. Ka chonset mai hi jachatna,
Bei hen Cross kamu nin ;
Ka lung jong lungset in jol hen,
Ka mit lhi jong long hen.
4. Ka mitlhi luiyin long jongle,
Nei lungset sajou lou ;
Vo Jesu kalha Nang kapei,
Ima dang ka-neilou.
Reference: Doh is E. d

songs.title: KA KHELLIN JESU ANA THIN KEI HUHHINGNAN

lines: 1. Ka khel in Jesu ana thin kei huhhing nan,
Hing hoi hilou keima hin theinan ;
Cross phung jotna lampi khoh chu ajon lhungtai,
Ka hinlai chonset ngaidam soh nan.
Ka chonset Cross chunga akikhenbeh sohtai,
Ijat ahin apoh mang nom e ;
Lungdon seithei louhel thoh in Calvarya,
Ka chonsetna apomang joutai.
2. Nem heo chan ngailutnan eikho ngai sot theiyin,
Ka lungsung boh asutheng soh in ;
Themmo ei chansahna ka hepoi ka onge,
Ka chonset Cross a khenbeh jouta.
3. Eihuhhingpa dalhan chemang kitta ponge,
Niseh kipah in juile tange ;
Ka kam le ka lungin la sajing tange,
Ka chonset jouse pomang sohtai.
Reference: Doh is F. m
1. Pakai khopi hui anunge,
Twikhanglen kinong sangta !
Meiyin van ahin le thim soh tai ;
Ka bel dingu um talou ;
Ka thi diu lungkham lou nahim ?
I dia ihmu nahim ?
Chomkah louva ei tijat sah uva,
Ka thi ding kon uva hi.
Ka thu ngaiyu hen,
Hui le twi nongin, thip tau hen !
Twikhanglen kinong hijeng jongle,
Thilha, mihem itobang hijeng jongle,
Twiyin kong chu hin chup,
Mang thei lou ding,
Lei le van, twilen Pakai umna,
Ka thu angai cheh dingu ahi ;
Thip tauhen ! Thip tau hen !
Ka thu angai cheh dingu ahi ;
Thip chet tau hen.
2. Lha lengvaiyin Pakai keima,
Lungdong tah in ka taove ;
Ka lungkhamna hi anangeiye,
Hungthouvin nei huhhingin ;
Chonsetna le gentheina in,
Ka lhagao achup tai,
Amang ding kon kahitai O Pakai !
Nangman neilalut loiyin.
3. Pakai tijatna abei tai,
Hui le twinong thip helta ;
Lungmon nisan dil asalvah tan,
Alange vangam nom chu ;
Neivop jingin O Lhandampu,
Nei dalha kit datan,
Kipahtah in Nangma lam sanging ting,
Na henga kichol donge.
Reference: Doh is C. s
1. Halleluiyah athoudoh tai,
Chunga akaltai Jesu ;
Aphujal tai thina dal tan,
Vantil O in ajom e,
Athoudoh tai, athoudoh tai,
Ahinge thikit lou din.
2. Halleluiyah athoudoh tai,
Pakai chu loupi hidin ;
Hetsah Lhagao ahin sol e,
I hinna diu bol ahi ;
Athoudoh tai, athoudoh tai,
A vangin them ichangui.
3. Halleluiyah athoudoh tai,
Thinan ajou jou tapoi ;
Christa chu thokitna ahi,
Lhanna amite thou ding,
Athoudoh tai, athoudoh tai,
Hingjing Pakai, hungding Leng.
Reference: Doh is G.s
1. Tunin Christa athoutai ! Halleluiyah !
Van min vahchoiyun ati ! Halleluiyah !
Van le leiyin la sauvin ! Halleluiyah !
Kipa la sangin sauvin ! Halleluiyah !
2. Eilhatnau kin achai tai ! Halleluiyah !
Gal sat in gal ajoutai ! Halleluiyah !
Ni oh-val akichaitai ! Halleluiyah !
Athi asohkit tapoi! Halleluiyah !
3. I Lengpau ahing kittai ! Halleluiyah !
Thina thahat abeitai ! Halleluiyah !
A thin eihuhhing tauve ! Halleluiyah !
Buikhuh in ajou tapoi ! Halleluiyah !
4. Loupi Leng ahing jing ding ! Halleluiyah !
A tahsan hing jing jeng ding ! Halleluiyah !
La sauvin avahchoi nan ! Halleluiyah !
Tonsot hing jing Leng ahi ! Halleluiyah !
Reference: Doh is D. d
1. Nithum nin athouve Jesu,
Thi nasatah chaiyin ; (2)
Athou kittai aloupi toh,
Seijuiten amu ve. (3)
2. Chujouvin Jesun angai cheng,
Lungsetna thu seiyin ; (2)
Tunia pat in abeisoh tai,
Na chonsetnau jouse. (3)
3. Amavang lung nengtah cheh in,
Nei ngaiyun, nei ngah un ; (2)
Lhagao theng chu hinsol lhange,
Nalunguva cheng din. (3)
4. Chujou tengle seichoi lenge,
Lung olmo lou hellin ; (2)
Gam tina cheuvin hil leuvin,
Hinna Pathen Thupha. (3)
5. Koi hijong le nasei ngaiya,
Kei eihea tahsan pa ; (2)
Ama chu leiset beini leh,
Tonsot hinna peng e. (3)
Reference: Doh is D. d

songs.title: LHAN THIMA LUM AHI LHANDAMPU JESU

lines: 1. Lhan thima lum ahi, Lhandampu Jesu ;
Ni hunglhung ding ngah in Pakai Jesu.
Lhan a konin athou tai,
A thahat in agalte jouvin ;
Thina muthim gam jouvin ahung thoutai,
Tonsot loupi laltouna a tou dingin ;
Athoutai, athou tai,
Halleluiyah athou tai.
2. Alhan ngau moh ahi, Lhandampu Jesu ;
Khuhsin song moh ahin, Pakai Jesu.
3. Thinan ahenjou poi, Lhandampu Jesu ;
Lhan sin song phujalta, Pakai Jesu.
Reference: Doh is C. s
1. Jesu seinan kajai,
"Tha lhom nahi ngut nai ;
Tha lhom chaten thum un,
Pekim inge Keiman."
Ka bat jouse chu, Jesun asalhai,
Ka chonsetna jouse jong ;
Aman asop lheng tai.
2. Imacha kanei poi,
Na lungset ngehna ding ;
Nangman neisop thengin,
Calvary thisan chun.
3. Keima kathi tenga,
Ka lhagao van kal teng ;
Jesun eilhat jallin,
Kei vangam lhung ta ding.
4. Lal touna kadin teng,
Ama ang sunga chun ;
Ka galvon pailhang ting,
Jesu ang sunga chun.
Reference: Doh is E♭. m

songs.title: CHONSET LUNGDON GIM PO MANG DING

lines: 1. Chonset lungdon gim pomang ding,
I neiyui golpha Jesu ;
I jakai ipoh lut thei diu,
Pathen henga taona a ;
Lungdong lungmong mo hesoh a,
I ding gim ithoh jiu ham ?
I lhut lou jeh jiu Pathen heng,
I taonauva ijakai.
2. I neiyum thunoh le lhepna,
Lungjin lungdonna um em ?
Lung lhalouvin um jingu te,
Pathen heng lhut in taona ;
Mu nau hitem golpha adang ,
Ei thoh khompia ginchat thei ?
I hatmonau Jesun ahei,
Taovun aheng lhut soh un.
3. Hatmo le pohgih po ihim?
I lel um pohgih pohna ;
I beldiu Jesu aum nai,
Taonan aheng lhut soh un ;
Gollin nadeimoa napai em ?
Taovin Pakai heng lhut in ;
A bante nia nang huhhinga,
Nangman nomsa tading chu.
Reference: Doh is F. s

songs.title: KA LUNG KA PHU NI KA KOP NI

lines: 1. Kalung kaphu ni kanop ni,
Pakai Jesu le Pathen a ;
Kalung navah ni, nomsah ni,
Seichoi lenge kho vannoi ja.
Ka nopni, kipa ni,
Jesun kachonset soplheng ta ;
A min a taoje eihil e,
Niseh a kipa jingna thu ;
Ka nopni, kipani,
Jesun ka chonset sop lheng ta.
2. Ka molso tai thu loupi pen,
Jesu kapu kei aseijui ;
Aman eikou, ken kajuiye,
A thupha keiman phong lenge.
3. Lu tah a keiman kitepna,
Long louvin Pathen ah um hen ;
Kahin laisen jong, kathin jong,
Thu loupi penna kanei ding.
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ
1. Ka hoina kul Jesu Christa,
Khopi huiya Jesu ka bel ;
I tobang lungdon um jongle,
Khopi huiya Jesu kabel.
Ka lungdonna a Jesu kom ka bel ken,
Ka lungdonna, ka lung donna ;
Ka lungdonna a Jesu chu ka kulpi,
Khopi huiya Jesu ka bel.
2. Khopi huiyin eipha jongle,
Khopi huiya Jesu ka bel ;
Setto louna chu lha ponge,
I tihchan hijong le Jesu.
3. Ka kiselna ka van Kulpi,
Khopi huiya Jesu ka bel ;
I tobang hahsa hung jong le,
Khopi huiya ka bel Nangma.
Reference: Doh is F. sₗ

songs.title: NEI KOU O GIN KA JAI

lines: 1. Nei kou O gin kajai,
Nangma koma dingin ;
Nei soptheng dingin Calvarya,
Na thisan longlha chun.
Pakai ka hunge,
Tun Nang kom jonin ;
Thisan chun neisop thengin,
Calvarya longlha chun.
2. Chonse kahi vangin,
Na heng kahin jon e ;
Tha neipen neisop thengsel in,
Ka thensel masang sen.
3. Jesun eikouve kei,
Tahsan det kichen din ;
Lungset tahsan nop kichen din,
Lei le van chunga din.
4. Chonset hat gam sunga,
Thahat eipei Jesun ;
Lungset tah-in kei eilamtoi,
Phattheina eiboh-e.
Reference: Doh is E♭. d

songs.title: LUNGSET TAH IN VANGAM KHOPI JOTNA

lines: 1. Lungset tah-in vangam khopi jotna,
Lam nei hil in ;
Jan muthim a lamdih a nei puiyin,
Nei lamkaiyin ;
A gamlai tin ka lungkham deh sampoi,
Kal khat khat in nanung nung jui nange.
2. Eipui dih jing thei Nang kana jui dan,
Ka nom chon len ;
Kei chonna jeng bou aphan ka ngaiton,
Ka chonkhel tai ;
Ka kichatna a jong kana hoithon,
Lungset themin hichu nei ngaidamin.
3. Na banin neikol jing jengin tukal,
Nei kai jingin ;
Muthim a jong bitkeiyin nei puiyin,
Nei lamkaiyin ;
Tona thisa ka sopi ngai jouse,
Mu kit tange jing niso teng chuleh.
Reference: Doh is G. m

songs.title: NANG NA HUNG DING O LHANDAMPU

lines: 1. Nang nahung ding O Lhandampu,
Nang nahung ding vo Lengpa ;
Pao tinin Nangma vahchoi ding,
Vahchoi O tang talou ding ;
Nang nahung ding na thi jal a,
Ponjal laiya lhanga chun ;
Cholte kipa sah sohta ding,
Nopni loupi ni hiding.
Nang nahung ding (2)
Lam kim a ikimu diu ;
Nang nahung teng, Nang kamu diu,
Leiya nalen lai mel a;
Nang nahung ding, (2)
Pakai, Nang ka ngai chungnung ;
Na vaihom nikho ka ngah lel,
Tonsot a ka vahchoi ding.
2. Nang nahung ding hesoh genthei,
Ka le lhiso beita ding ;
Chonsetna kisei kit lou ding,
Jing noso emsel jing le;
Nang nahung ding Huhhing Jesu,
Dei le ngai dang umlou ding ;
Chu gam hoi le loupina chu,
Thisan a nalhat ahi.
3. Nang nahung ding ka ngah jingui,
Thonlou kinepna ging chan ;
Phat le nikho ngah lel louvin,
Ngah jingin, Nang ka sangui ;
Nang nahung ding Antheng jong a,
Nahung kit ding ka heuve ;
Tua Antheng ijonkhom bangun,
Van a jong ijonkhom diu.
Reference: Doh is C. d
1. Cross phung jonin ka hunge,
Mi genthei hesoh lengvai ;
Keima mi chonse chungnung,
Tun vang lhatdam ka chang tai.
Pakai Nang ka tahsan e,
Calvary van Kelngoi nou ;
Ka kun e na Cross noiya,
Nei lungset in nei huh in.
2. Chonset in eihen sot tai,
Lungin Nang ka lha ngaiyin ;
Nem heocha neikou kajai,
Ka hung tai Nang lim jonin.
3. Kalung le kanei jouse,
Abonchan Nang ka petai ;
Ka lhagao le ka tahsa,
A bonchan Nanga hihen.
4. Jesu hung keima hinna,
Aman kei eisop theng tai ;
Atonsot atonsot in,
Loupi jinghen Kelngoi nou.
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ

songs.title: JESU HENG JON IN KA HUNG UI

lines: 1. Jesu heng jon in kahung ui,
Ka jaovin eilam to nau,
A phat na chu ka tahsanun,
A hepia kakipah ui.
Kahung-ui inlam jon in kahung-ui,
Muthim'a kon khovah lam kahin jon ui,
Kahung-ui in lam jon in kahung ui,
Kahung ui tujan in ah.
2. Jesu heng jon in kahung ui,
Kahing na ding un athi,
Keiho eilem nom un ahi,
Ngaidam din eingah jing un ahi.
3. Jesu heng jonin kahung ui,
Cross phung chu kahin jon un,
Eilhat nau kin achai na din,
Lamdang neilou kahiuve.
Reference: Doh is G. d
1. Iti nop hitam Pakaiya,
Ki ngaiya cholnga ding ;
Na thahat chun nei tung dingin,
Ka lung lhahna channa.
Na lunggel lungkhamna jouse,
Sep lhan abonchan Achunga ;
Na lunggel lungkhamna jouse,
Aman na khankho ding agelnai.
2. Ka lunggel jouse Nachunga,
Ngaleng Nalung ahi ;
Ka lung hesoh genthei jouse,
Nangman na hesoh nai.
3. Na mi lungset khoto ging chan,
Nangma lam jeng kavei ;
Ka lungdon hesoh na channa,
Nangman lungmon neipen.
4. I bol'a ka lungkham ding ham ?
Khonung thu ding gelna ;
Ipi ka kichatpi ding ham ?
Pakaiya kingai leng.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ
1. Um kahi Jesu khut’a,
A angsung lim dam'a ;
Eilungset kemlou lim’a,
Ka lhan nomsa jing ding ;
Ngai temuvin Vantil ten,
Ka din la asauve ;
Van chung gamtheng em nom'a,
Van gam khovah noma.
Um kahi Jesu khut'a,
A ang sung lim dam'a ;
Ei lungset kemlou lim'a,
Ka lhan nomsa jing ding.
2. Um kahi Jesu khut'a,
Lungdonna um talou ;
Leiset lung ngai beita ding,
Chonset leng talou ding ;
Ka ongtai gimna a kon,
Kichat tijat umlou ;
Chomkhat lungdon le genthei,
Ka le lhiso na dim.
3. Jesu keima lung kaina,
Keima huhnan athi ;
Songpi bang hen ka tahsan,
Det jing hen Christa ahi ;
Nei umpin, nei ngah jingin,
Jan muthim bei kahsen;
Jing khovah hoi kamu man,
Vah jing van gam nom'a.
Reference: Doh is G. m
1. Jesu lhalim noiya chun,
Cholngah nom aum;
Tong gimte le pohgihte din,
Heng le koma jol le gol din;
Jesu lhalim noiya chun,
Cholngah nom aum;
Jesu lhalim noiya chun,
Ol aum.
Ol aum, mon aum, nop aum,
Jesu lhalim noiya chun.
2. Jesu lhalim noiya chun,
Cham le lungmon a um ;
Cham le thilpha hettoh theina,
Nop le lung ol kem talou ding ;
Jesu lhalim noiya chun,
Cham le lungmon um ;
Jesu lhalim noiya chun,
Cham aum.
3. Jesu lhalim noiya chun,
Kipa thanop um ;
Kipa thusim seiding aum,
Kipa thanop chungnung ahi ;
Jesu lhalim noiya chun,
Kipa thanop um ;
Jesu lhalim noiya chun,
Nop aum.
Reference: Doh is F. m
1. Pathen henga tao dinga lungnem'a kunpet hi,
Iti noptam Huhhingpa anga taopet hi !
Tahsan'a bel ihiu le Aman eihuhhing diu,
Chol dinga olna ahi, tao hi iti nop tam !
Tao hi lung ol pet, (2)
Chol dinga olna ahi,
Tao hi iti nop tam !
2. Pathen henga tao dinga lungnem'a kunpet hi,
"Nalung khamnau jouse ka ang a seplhauvin" ;
Tia lungset khoto tah a eiseipeh tengu le,
Chol dinga olna ahi, tao hi iti nop tam !
3. Pathen henga tao dinga lungnem'a kunpet hi,
Ama lung tohte gentheina amu soh in ;
Alungset lhaving noiya ni tinin ahoiye,
Chol dinga olna ahi, tao hi iti nop tam !
Reference: Doh is E♭. d

songs.title: JING NISO EMSEL A KAJING THO TENG

lines: 1. Jing niso emsel'a ka jingtho teng,
Nisa hoi chun lhumtih nei talou ding ;
Tonsotna avah emhoi chullou ding,
Chonse keima kalung lhaisel tading.
Kalung lhaisel ta ding, (2)
Jing niso emsel'a ka jingtho teng ;
Kalung lhaisel tading, (2)
Jing niso emsel'a ka jingtho teng.
2. Na loupi mailhai mel chu kamu teng,
Lhatsa nacha deite na ngongkoi ding ;
Lungset thilpeh-in kot chu nahon teng,
Chonse keima kalung lhaisel tading.
3. Che masa ka ngaicheng mel kamu teng,
Iti kipa'ngem ken ngongkoi cheh ding;
Ka dinga naphat ken simjoulou ding,
Chonse keima kalung lhaisel tading.
4. Eihuhhingpa Christa mel kamu teng,
Kei jal'a athi ken sumil lou ding ;
Tonsot chullou lan ken vahchoi tange,
Chonse keima kalung lhaisel tading.
Reference: Doh is G. m

songs.title: CHOLNA JAN THIM LUNGDON NA HIN

lines: 1. Cholna janthim lungdonna hin,
Meipi jing bangin eitom;
Kho hungvah ding kon ahitai,
Van'a ni hungsoh ding chu ;
Zion molsang vum'a kona,
Eikounau O jau hitin ;
Kipah tah-a kikhom soh ding,
Leng ahung teng le.
Gentheite kipah un,
Na loupina diu ni chu ahung naitai ;
Gentheite kipah un, Leng chungnung,
I ngau chu hung ding ahitai.
2. Jesu thisan'a lhatsate,
So le lhum lam'a konin ;
Kipah in hung kikhomun tin,
Olna gam tep noma chun ;
Vannoi chitin le namtin mi,
Gam tina kon hung ho chu ;
Kipah tah a kikhom soh ding,
Leng ahung teng le.
3. Asun ajan a ngah ho chu,
Tahsan'a athua nunga ;
Tang louva ana tong jing ho,
Lhagao chemjam pante chu ;
Vannoi leiset thim lah a hi,
A thaomei vah jing ho chu ;
Kipah thanom'a khomsoh ding,
Leng ahung teng le.
Reference: Doh is A♭. d

songs.title: JING NISO VAH NIA MIHEM CHAPA AHUNG NI LE

lines: 1. Jing niso vah loupi nia Mihem Chapa ahung nile,
A vah loupi chungnung chu imu dingu ;
Kol kimvel'a kon'a amite akoukhom teng chule,
Alhatsa te kikhop loupi ni hi ding.
Kikhoppi chungnung ni hi ding,
Nop kemlou gam'a kikhoppi loupi ;
Chungnung ni hi ding,
Kikhoppi chungnung ni hi ngei ding,
Lhatsa hingte kikhop loupi ni hi ding.
2. Jesun nunnom'a thite akouva atho tengu le,
Lhankhuh thim sung le twikhanglen a kona ;
Vou kikhel'a vanlai jol'a alamto dingu ahi,
Iti kipa thanop a umta dingem.
3. Van khopi vah hoi sunga chu inhoi tamtah i-muva,
Olna twipi pang chu ilhun tengu le ;
Thinan eikhensau i-ngai chengseu toh ichenkhom tengle,
Kikhop ni kilamto loupi ni hi ding.
4. Leng chu hung tei ding ahi, ahung phat anai tul tul tai,
Ei tepnau nopni loupi chu imu diu ;
Chuteng le mitphet kah louva ivouvu hi kikhel ding,
Ama koma ichen jing dingu hita.
Reference: Doh is C. m
1. Ngaiyun mi chonse ten, Leiset man ni thu ding ;
Leng hat chungnung tah khat Laltouna atouve.
Hung kum teiding Jesu Christa, (2)
Vantil theng asang aja toh.
2. Leiset gam kimvel'a, A vantil asol'a ;
Molle twiya cheuva, mi chomkhom sohkei ding.
Jesun michonsete jouse, (2)
A lelut ding meidil sunga.
3. Chu tengle mi chonpha, Ama lung toh jouse ;
Van'a apuitou ding, Pathen lhai la sading.
Gou kemlou hin kemlou pentin,
Ol kemlou nop kemlou pentin ;
Kemlouva nomsa jing jeng ding.
4. Mi chonsete vang chu, ago ding meidil'a ;
A thu ngailouse chu, leiset na um laiya.
Gimtan neilouna meikonga, (2)
Tonsot'a gimthoh jing jeng ding.
Reference: Doh is B♭. d
1. I din dingu Leng anga,
Vantil toh la isah ding ;
Olle van gam nom'a,
Lui pang em'a ilen diu ;
Pathen vahchoi la sading,
Olle van gam nom'a.
I din dingu Leng anga,
Vantilto la isah diu ;
Loupi hen Leng chungnung chu,
Halleluijah, Halleluijah !
I din diu Leng ang sunga.
2. Van'a jola kisa ding,
I din diu Leng ang sunga ;
Olle van gam nom'a,
Gim hesoh bei sohta ding ;
I gimnau ichaisoh teng ;
Olle van gam nom'a.
3. Chen kalha thil lu choiyin,
Leng chungnung lamto dingin ;
Olle van gam noma,
Akhopi muh a kunin ;
Alhalim noiya umin,
Olle van gam noma.
Reference: Doh is B♭ d

songs.title: GAM LOUPI TAH HUNG LHUNG DING

lines: 1. Gam loupitah hunglhung ding
Ka nga jing chu van chunga um,
A kum tin'a Mithengte punkhomna chu ;
Ni kemin chu gam loupi hunglhun ding chu asunaiye,
Pathen gam hunglhun ding chu anai ta-e.
He! Pathen gam hunglhun ding chu anaita e,
Pathen gam hunglhun ding chu anaita e ;
Kigo demin vo kalung, sumkon a eihin kou ding,
Pakai Jesun, hung lang ding loupi tah a.
2. Pathen gam loupi le aloupi gotsa chu kinemin,
Chule Pakai hungna ding lam kat jingin ;
Hichun vannoi leiset chonsetnan
Eihen eihung lha ding,
Pathen gam hunglhun ding chu anai ta-e.
3. Pathen gam hunglhun ni le
Pakai ngaitah chu imu diu,
Gam hunglhunna Pakai chu hung kilang ding !
Halleluiyah athisan'a eilhatpau chu vahchoiyun,
Pathen gam hunglhun ding chu anai ta-e.
4. Vannoi leiset min angah sottan
Alung lhadel tauve,
Tijat in mihemte lung adonghel tai ;
Pathen gam Thupha chu hilleu hitin suhal uhite,
Pathen gam hunglhun ding anai tah jeh in.
Reference: Doh is B♭ sₗ

songs.title: KIPA MAN HOM DING A PAKAI HUNG TENG

lines: 1. Kipaman hom dinga Pakai hung teng,
Isan diu hinpo nan tem ?
I tahsan jingu ahung toh nadem ?
I nga jing Pakai Jesu.
Ti nau hitem phasa dem cheh a um,
Kahi van chunga kal dia,
I kigin jingu ahung toh nadem ?
Ama lam jeng chu isan jinga.
2. Jingpi phalvah-in hung kum khattou hen,
Eiho eihin kou taule ;
Pakai anga inatoh ikum teng,
Apha lheh e tinan tem ?
3. Aman eidalhah peh u tahsan chu,
Pha tah a ching jing dinga ;
Lung thengsel'a ichin cheh nah uvem ?
Van'a nop channa dinga.
4. Jan khangkimin i-Pakaiyu hung leh,
I nga jing hung toh nantem ?
Kiging jinga um chu anunnom ding,
Van'a tonsotna nom ding.
Reference: Doh is B♭. sₗ

songs.title: PATHEN SUMKON AGIN'A LEI HI AUM LOU TENG

lines: 1. Pathen sumkon aginna lei hi aumlou teng chuleh,
Tonsot hinna khovah a niso tengle ;
Akhop teng alungtohte luipi pang gal langkhat lam'a,
Chua min kikouna sunga ka um ding.
Chua min kikouna sunga,
Chua min kikouna sunga ;
Chua min kikouna sunga,
Chua min kikouna sunga ka um ding.
2. Chu ni jingkah vahhoiya Christan mithi athosah a,
Athokit loupi achanni diu chule ;
A lhenchomte kikhop nile a in'u vanchung gam'a,
Chua min kikouna sunga ka umding.
3. Pathen na tonging kate niso a pat nilhum geiyin,
Ami ngailut kidang chu seichoi lenge ;
Chule i-natoh ijoa ihin nikho bulhin tengle,
Chua min kikouna sunga ka umding.
Reference: Doh is A♭. d

songs.title: MUTHIM UM TALOU DING JESU HUNG TENG

lines: 1. Muthim um talou ding Jesu hung teng, (3)
A ngailut cheng puikhom’a.
A ngailut cheng puikhom’a. (2)
Muthim um talou ding Jesu hung teng,
A ngailut cheng puikhom’a.
2. Lungdonna beita ding Jesu hung teng,(2)
Jing khovah loupia Jesu hungteng,
A ngailut cheng puikhom’a.
3. Kana um talou ding Jesu hung teng. (3)
Mithengte lakhoma Jesu hungteng,
A ngailut cheng puikhom’a.
4. Kikhen kit talou ding Jesu hung teng,(3)
Kilemna la sading Jesu hungteng,
A ngailut cheng puikhom’a.
Reference: Doh is F. d

songs.title: JESU HUNG KIT DING KHATVEI LEH

lines: 1. Jesu hung kit ding khatvei le, ahung ding kigingin!
Avan inom’a kon hung ding, ahung ding kiging un!
I Pakaiyu dihtah ahi,
Ama lhenchomte nunnom ding ;
Apa Laltouna anga din, ahungding kigingin!
Na neipa hung ding phat na kigin nam?
Lungmona kham’a na kigin nah em?
Jingkah, sun, jan hetthei lou ;
Ngim’a vah nam na thaomei,
Lung detna na ginnah em na neipa?
2. Ama leiya hungkit loi ding, ahung ding kigingin,
Alet alal akipan tai, ahung ding kigingin!
Vana Halleluijah ging ding,
Huhhingna hinpo ding Jesun ;
Na Lengpa lamdot din navon, ahung ding kigingin!
3. Veuvin ahunge kigingin, ahung ding kigingin!
Sumkon’a eikouvah dingu, ahung phat kigingin!
Lhagao nei mite jouse chu,
Thupi tana ahin kou chu,
Pakai anga idin cheh diu, ahung phat kigingin!
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ

songs.title: THINGPEL A KITHATPA THUJOP CHENGSE LE

lines: 1. Thingpel’a kithatpa thujop chengse le,
Pathen Chapa changkhat tahsan chengse chun ;
Sochatna chamkim’a anei ding ahi,
Aman huhhingna thahat anei jeh chun.
Sopi Pakaiyin nangma nakou kouve,
Ami lungset khoto chu manbei ahi ;
Mi chonse lhatnan athisan alongin,
Ama bou huhhing chamkim soh thei ahi.
2. Koi hijongle Pathen Thupha jop chan chu,
Chonset keuna a thisan tahsan chan chu ;
Tonsot hin kemlou anei ding ahi,
Aman huhhingna thahat anei jeh chun.
3. Koi hile alung heiya chonset pailha,
Pakai lutna dinga lungkot honga chun ;
Ahuhhing chamkim’a nomsa ding ahi,
Huhhing ding sadem’a um ahijeh chun.
Reference: Doh is A. sₗ
1. Chonset suhgenthei Lhagao ho,
Jesu tahsan leuchun ;
Aman olsah taovin nate,
Athu tahsan leu chun.
Tahsan jengun, tahsan jengun,
Tahsan jengun tun ;
Huhhing teiding, huhhing tei ding,
Nang na huhhing ding.
2. Jesun athisan lu ason,
Hinna nom ei peuve ;
Thisan luiya chun kiphum’un,
Buh banga sop bang ding.
3. Jesu lampi dihtah ahi,
Olna gamnom jotna ;
Geisang louvin tahsan loiyin,
Phatthei nachan kim ding.
4. Ahile gam loupi jonin,
Hung lhauvin loi theng a ;
Gam loupia innom’a cheng din,
Nop kemlou van in’ah.
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ

songs.title: NAGA CHE NAM NANGMA JESU HENGA CHU

lines: 1. Nagache nam nangma Jesu henga chun,
Athisan in na kisop theng nam ?
A milungsetna chu na kinem nam nang?
Athisan in na kisop theng nam?
Athisan … thenga chun,
Na chonset nasop theng soh nah em?
Navon nen chu kicheh a ngimsel soh nam?
A thisan chun na kisop theng soh nam?
2. Niseh in Jesu koma na umjing nam?
Thisana na ki soptheng hinam?
Ama chu lungmona na neinam nangma,
Athisan in na kisop theng nam?
3. Hung toh nantem ahung nile Moulang chun,
A thisan’a navon athen soh ;
Phasadem nan tem nalha vana kaldin,
A thisanin na kisop theng nam ?
4. Na chonset nen bena navon chu pailhan,
A thisan in kisil thengin tun ;
Nang dingin hinna twidung khat alonge,
Hia chun na chonset soptheng tan.
Reference: Doh is A♭. mₗ
1. Tonsot na chenna ding,
Hoi laiya in sa nahim ?
Khopi hui mutlhuh theina ham ?
Chonset neldi chung hintem?
Song chunga hin hung san,
In hung san apang det din ;
Christa jeng bou, Christa jeng bou,
Sochatna Songpi ahi.
2. Khopi hui anun'a,
Na in ahin nuh teng leh ;
Nellei chunga insa nangma,
Lung mongin umnan natem ?
3. Khopi hui nun kah in,
In mundet ding ki ngaiton ;
Na lung gel’in hung san tu man,
Longlou Songpi chung ahin.
Reference: Doh is B♭ sₗ

songs.title: VEOVIN IHINNA DING UN JESU CROSS CHUNGA

lines: 1. Veuvin ihinna dingun Jesu Cross chunga,
Eihuhnan athisan along lhai ;
Ven, mi chonsen tun ven kihuhhing sah loiyin,
Nangma huhna along toh pa chu.
Ven ! Ven ! Ven hing in,
Hinna dinga Cross chunga kikhenbeh Jesu ;
Genthei tah in athi nang chunan.
2. Hungun michonsen hung ven nahinna ding un,
Cross chunga um Jesu khu tunin ;
Jesu hilou nasam gim le genthei thoh a,
Tonsot hinkem lou nang na pea chu.
3. Na chonsetna jouse hinpon Jesu koma,
Hung seplhan Ama soptheng dingin ;
Thonmon soplhante Aman athisan lu chun,
Theng tante na chonset nen jouse.
4. Chonset muthim’a hitih chanpi na ihmun,
Na umjinge Ama helouvin ;
Vo michonse tun hungin Jesu henga chun,
Khatvei hungven na sochatna din.
Reference: Doh is G. d

songs.title: KA HENG A HUNG UVIN ATI JESUN

lines: 1. “Ka henga hung’uvin” ati Jesun,
Hinna Pakai nalung kipa sah chun ;
“Lungkham’a lung gentheiya umte ho,
Ka henga hungun ken olsah inge".
Hungun keima henga hungun,
Ka henga hungun keiman olsah inge ;
Keiman ol penge, keiman ol penge.
2. Chonset pohna a pohgih lengvai ho,
Jesun na khoton na kouvui hungun ;
Na lungdon hesoh bei sohna dingin,
“Ka henga hungun keiman ol penge.”
3. Chonset le suhkhel’a thiding kon ho,
Khangun, Pathen kichauvin lung gel’un ;
Na tahsanmo pailhan tahsanin tun,
“Ka henga hungun keiman ol penge.”
Reference: Doh is F. m

songs.title: JESUN NAKOU KOU LAIHIN CHONSE HUNGIN

lines: 1. Jesun nakou kou laihin, chonse hungin,
Nang dinga katao lai hin, chonse hungin ;
Ama neiphat tu ahi, chonse hungin,
Ama hetphat tu ahi, chonse hungin.
2. Na chonset poh nalel’em, chonse hungin,
Jesun napoh ngai jang ding , chonse hungin,
Jesun nang dalha lou ding, chonse hungin,
Jesun tun nang na sange, chonse hungin.
3. Ama lungset sunga chun, chonse hungin,
Phattheina hung kisan in, chonse hungin ;
Jesun nakou petcha hin, chonse hungin,
Nang katao peh pet’u hin, chonse hungin.
Reference: Doh is F. m

songs.title: HUNG KIHEI JIN VAH MANGSA LUNG GENTHEI

lines: 1. Hung kiheiyin vah mangsa lung genthei,
Ven Jesu Christan naching jinge nang ;
Na hol’in na ngah e huhhing dingin,
Geisang louvin Ama tahsan loiyin.
Lungdam sel’in nakouve nang Jesun,
Phaten ngaiyin Jesun nakou chu ;
Lung lhaisel’in nakouve nang Jesun,
“Hungun” tin lungset’in eikouvui.
2. Na manlouna dingin nangah jinge,
Hitih chan nangma vah manga nahi ;
Nangma chu-nan thi genthei athoh tai,
Ami ngailut kidang chu seitheilou.
3. Athu ngaiyin lang alungsetna hen,
Cross chunga nachonset a pomang tai ;
Tonsot hin kemlou chu namu sah tai,
Na chonset jouse angaidam soh tai.
4. Hungin lamlui lamdih hungjot kit’in,
Hinna kotpi Jesua hunglut loiyin ;
Lung lhaisel’in nakouve nang Jesun,
Lhachom kit talou ding nang akom’a.
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ
1. Damsel chan katong lhum’ui,
Hiche nigup sunga hin ;
Ka kikhom tauve tunin,
Pathen lhai la ka sauve ;
{Hiche Pathen nipha hi,
Van tonsot ol kihetna.} (2)
2. Mi lungset them’a Jesun,
Ka setnau soptheng soh-in ;
Chonse ho taona ngaiyin,
Ka khelnau ngaidam soh-in ;
{Bei hen leiset lung ngaina,
Ka lungu Nanga kai hen.} (2)
3. Nangma ka lhaipet chau hin,
Ka lungu sunem soh-in ;
Hiche hou-in thenga hin,
Hung kiphong in Pathen Nang ;
{Van’a kon an kemlou chu,
Kei ho neihin pe cheh un.} (2)
Reference: Doh is G. d
1. Gamtu thim noiya navale,
Jin le hoiya ding nahim?
Leiset gam thim lai najot chu,
Nalung olmo lou hinam?
Vanchung gam jon kahiuve,
Hung kipat in lhonu hite;
Pathen min vahchoiyu hite.
2. Kahinai 'Jinle' neite chu,
Ahivanga olmo lou;
Eiching pau to kalhon nai kei,
Ama vang chu kasong e.
3. Hoiya umam nalamkai pau,
Kamu hih in ka olmoi;
Chutia nachingpa aumle,
Amala akimu pon.
4. Heng kimulou ahivanga,
Eipuile phatah ahi;
Gimna jousea eihuh in kei,
Kagal asumang sohji.
5. Jingle nalampi masanga,
Vetan nathina ding chun;
Nangma hinchup jeng tale chun,
Nache tei ngam ding hinam?
Reference: Doh is G.

songs.title: HUNG UN GEL UN SOPI TE, JESUN EILUNGSET NA

lines: 1. Hungun gel’un sopite Jesun ei lungset na,
I chonset suhmang nadin, I lungu ngaitou te.
I ding lung phamo ihim ?
I lung thoinau i-ham ?
I monau phongjal leu hen,
Aman subei tante.
2. Keima Christa tahsansa, Ama lam sangsa hing,
Ka lung thoi kittan keima, tun kalung olmo tai.
Twilen soh bang lung detlou,
Mi lengvai olmo jing ;
Tha neilou mi dammo ken,
Hoiya olna mung-em ?
3. Hijongle na huhhingpa, Getsemania ngaiton,
Nang chonset pohmangna a, Athisan ul'a long.
Thingpel a aumpet chun,
Athisan along lhai ;
Nang chonset jal’in athi,
Henge tun tahsan tan.
4. Lungin tun jong atahsan lou nahi nah laiyem ?
A khophang bul’a kunin, ichonset beina din.
Chutobang Jesu chu ken,
Nahsah mon ngai ponge ;
Ka thi nungle Akom’a,
Ka lut jel theina din.
Reference: Doh is E. sₗ
1. Zion molsang chung vum'a
Gal upa thithei louvin,
Eikou ui galsat dingin,
Gal sat-a umte.
Ngaiyun sumkon gin ngei khu,
Veuvin Pathen ponlap khu,
Gal sangja ahung nai tai,
Chem le thal dom in.
2. Hung un mi chonse chate,
Sochatna ding lung pu-vin,
I dougal a sumang tai,
I lamkai Jesun.
Lhan sung a nithum cham in,
Thina dougal sat chai jin,
Loupi tah min len tah in,
A kaltou kit tai.
3. Leiset mihem mai vea,
Pathen mit'a jahcha pa,
Galsat petna kisel chun,
Ka nung juida hen.
Nu le pa, sopi dalha,
Thal le hem lah nohngam pa,
Thi le man kicha lou pan,
Ka nung hin jui hen.
4. Kon ute galsat ding in,
Theu hite Satan loi chu,
Theu hite dana gam chu,
Chonset pailhau te.
Nopna munnom tup ute,
Nop le ol kem louna chu,
Mang thei lou Pathen gam’a,
Lut teiding goute.
Reference: Doh is A.

songs.title: GAL SAM UN SATAN GAL AHUNG NAI TAI

lines: 1. Gal sam’un Satan gal ahung naitai,
Christa din ponlap dom sangun ;
Galvon von’un dingdet cheh uvin,
Athu theng chu lum le phon sung in.
Kon’un galmi loi kisemtoh un lang,
Pangdet cheh un thu hi ban tol’un ;
Malam nouvin Hosana tin ao-vun,
Christa gal lamkai pipen ahi.
2. Gal hahsa hen lang itobang jong le,
I jo tei diu ahi thon mo’a ;
Khovah lum sungin lhagao chem pan un,
Jona chu eiho chan ding ahi.
3. Vo! Vannoi Pathen ka kounau ngaijin,
Nei hu’vin na milungset chun ;
Galsat kichaiya gal kijo teng le,
Lallukhuh kasan theina ding un.
Reference: Doh is B♭. sₗ

songs.title: CHRISTIAN SEPAI KONUN, GAL SAT IN CHEUVIN

lines: 1. Christian Sepai kon un, galsat in cheuvin,
Jesu lam jeng veuvin, I-Lamkaipau chu ;
Leng Christa akontai, Satan galsat din,
Ama alamkai tai ponlap che veuvin.
Christian sepai kon’un,
Satan galsat din ;
Jesu lam jeng veuvin,
I-Lamkai pau chu.
2. Galmi janel banga Pathen mite kon,
Mitheng ho chena nung juiya ihiuve ;
A chom chom iumpoi, I boncha pumkhat,
I kinepnau jong khat, I kainau khat bou.
3. Leiset lengho gamle, A lalnau mang ding,
Christa Houbung vang chu, mantih neilou ding ;
Gim, hesoh, lungdonna, kiseikit lou ding,
A tonsot tonsot’a Christa vaihom ding.
Reference: Doh is F. s
1. Lhum lam gam'a konin,
Thu ahung thang lhunge ;
Hichu Christa lama tah panna thu ahi,
Ahung kitol tol’in ;
Thing lhangin lan asai,
Christa lama dettah a tahpanna thu ahi.
Gal jona dingin, (2)
Pakaiyin kho asam’e,
Athun chonnu hite ;
Gam lo loitau hite,
Christa lama dettah a ;
Tahpanna thu ahi.
2. Ngaiyuvin O gin chu,
Leiset hot ling soh O ;
Hichu Christa lama tahpanna thu ahi,
Hangtah in tong panun ;
Kiginnan kho sam’un,
Christa lama dettah a tahpanna thu ahi.
3. Khangdong tha ka pan’ui,
Tunin Jesu angah ;
Hichu Christa lama tahpanna thu ahi,
Athupha phong leute ;
Vannoi mi gam jousea,
Christa lama dettah a tahpanna thu ahi.
Reference: Doh is E♭, sₗ

songs.title: VAN'A LENGPA PONLAP AHUNG LENGLHA TAI

lines: 1. Van’a Lengpa ponlap ahung lenglha tai,
Van Leng sepaite hengah ;
Olmo louvin dom sangu hite tunin,
La i-sah ngei pet’u hin.
Hunguvin, hunguvin,
Christa jal’in mang jongleu hen ;
Khuh sah un Lallukhuh hoi chu,
Thingpel ponlap noi lim’a.
2. Twipi nong bang melma hung kitol jongle,
Ponlap leh sang jingun lang ;
Alim noiya umun Pakai sepaite,
Thon louva eima jo ding.
3. Twi le leiset chunga mihem cheng jousen,
Hilsoh un hiche Thupha ;
Hiche thisan ponlap van’a lenglha chu,
Pakai galjo kithanna.
4. Nopna khovah loupi ni ahung nai tai,
Niseh in ahung nai tai ;
Chuteng Leng anga dougal beisohta ding,
Vannoi Cross in khokhong ding.
Reference: Doh is B♭. mₗ
1. Gamla naiya kon Christian te,
Hikom a ikikhomui tun;
Jesu thu kihil a sim din,
Van kipa kinep dimset chu.
Eiho hapan loi hin, Amin’a kikhom min,
Lungkhat le thakhat in Amin phongjal leute ;
Pathen le igamsung din pangdet cheh-ute,
Phattheina a eichin jingna dingun taovun.
2. Akikhomsen la sau hite,
I-Lengpau Christa vahchoi la;
Khangdongin lam amuna ding,
Hinna gam jotna lampi chu.
3. Pakai natong jing uhite,
Kinepna ineisau ngaiton;
Alungset gingchan jui ute,
Chung a iki khop kah seuvin.
Reference: Doh is C, s

songs.title: PAKAI CHRISTA VANGIN SANTHU NUNG JUI JIN

lines: 1. Pakai Christa vangin danthu nungjuiyin,
Hin kemlou chu Ama vahchoina dingin ;
Kipah le thanom tah in vahchoi cheh un,
Pakai danthu nung juiyin sauvin.
Dingun ! dingun !
Pakai Jesu a dingun athutep juiyun ;
Dingun ! dingun !
Pakai thutep juiyin kadinge kei.
2. Danthu jui chu imatih in lha ponge,
Lhahchomna le kichatna Aman eihoi ;
Mantih neilou thu chu Ama a ahi,
Pakai danthu juiyin dinguvin.
3. Athu nungjui ding keima olmo lou ding,
Lhagao Thengin eikou chu ken ngai jing ding ;
Tonsot’in Pakai vahchoiyin ol tange.
Pakai nopna chun um jing tange.
Reference: Doh is B♭, sₗ

songs.title: HUNGUN CHRISTIAN TE LUNGKHAT HIU HITIN

lines: 1. Hungun Christiante lungkhat hiu hitin,
Seiphong leute sochatna Thupha ;
Thinglhang gamsunga mi acheng jouse,
Satan bulpu’vin akum tu’ve.
Hungun Christiante itha gomtou tin,
Sumang dingin idou Satan hat ;
Hungun Christiante tha gomtou hitin,
I thahat pennau Jesu umna.
2. Mi sangja hijat hinna Thu mulou,
Vetem tauvin akihen nau bul ;
Bulpu ngaiton lang i-nop pailhauvin ;
Gasut lham ute bulpute chu.
3. Hungun sopite lungthah sem’utin,
Chalsahna din Pakai Jesu gam ;
Kihabol cheh un tantih neilouvin,
Niloupi nia pam chanlou na din.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ
1. Van chung gamnom emhoi tah a,
Chun vantilten la asai ;
Halleluiyah Hosana tin,
Asamun Leng vahchoi nan ;
Hiche leiset genthei munna konin,
Pakaiyin eipui len ;
Gangtah in ka jon’uve,
Vanchung gamnom emhoi tah chu.
O chu gam ilhun teng le,
Sana lukhuh isan diu ;
Kipah le thanom tah a,
Chu gamnom em’a ilen diu.
2. Vanchung gamnom emhoi jon chun,
Nitin mi ache jinge ;
Eiho chu gam lhunna ding,
Nikhon eihin naiyuve ;
Jesu heng lam jon ihiuve,
Ama toh leng khom dingin ;
Hiche gama chu tonsot’a,
Ama kivahchoi ta ding.
3. Chu gam emhoi nom tah a chun,
Mitin din in nom aum ;
Lhandampu tahsan jouse le,
Kouna ngai jouse dingin,
Pakai thupeh hung lhun phat le,
Kipana hung lhung tading ;
Chuteng hi leiset dalha gam,
Nom hoitah chu ijot diu.
Reference: Doh is G. d

songs.title: A MANG KON HUHDOH IN ATHI KON NGAITON

lines: 1. Amangkon huhdoh in, athikon ngaiton,
Chonse khuh a konin ladoh loiyin ;
Chon khelte chu hil’in alhu kaithouvin,
Huhhing Pakai Jesu thu seipeh in.
Amangkon huhdoh in, Athikon ngaiton,
Mi lungset them Jesun huhhing tei ding.
2. Ama hon angaisah louhel vanguvin,
Aman angah jinge lung neng tah in ;
Avel vel’in dam heochan akou jinge,
Tahsan pouleu ngaidam ding ahi.
3. Mihemte lungsung setnan alodim tai,
Hijeh chun Pakai leiya ahunge ;
Lungset khut’in athamin asukhangin,
Athisa jong ahinsah kit jitai.
4. Amangkon huhdoh in nangma kin ahi,
Pakaiyin nangma thahat pen nate ;
Lhagao mang ding mi sangja a um uve,
Huhhingpan alungsetnau thu hil’in.
Reference: Doh is B. sₗ
1. Christa mi lungset seileu te,
A lungset len,
Leiset mihemte hinna din,
Alungset len.
Ahung kumlhai hi leiset'a,
Apengtai leiset naosen in;
Mihem te jal'in gim thoh in,
Alungset len.
2. Chapang ho A-anga pomin,
Alungset len,
Aphei chunga pomin vang pen,
Alungset len,
Aching jinge Ama mite,
Agim na ding uva huh in,
Apui touding van gam nom'a,
Alungset len.
3. Thina ding gui sutlham soh in,
Alungset len,
Gam thum aman vaihomin,
Alungset len,
Along athisan tohpa chu,
Ahitai van chunga Thempu;
Ami te thoh bang thoh in,
Alungset len.
4. Van'a nopna a ilut man,
Alungset len,
Lungkhat in lhai jing ute,
Alungset len,
Kai jing ute Christa heng'ah,
Kinemin ami lungsetna;
Sau hite hinlai dam sung in,
Alungset len.
Reference: Doh is E♭. d

songs.title: SOCHATNA LE HINNA KHOVAH THU DONG A

lines: 1. Sochatna le hinna khovah thu donga,
Vaipo khat jan’a Jesu henga ahung chun ;
Jesun thudih tah in ana donbut’in,
“Pengthah kit’un” ati.
Napen thah diu ahi,
Napen thah diu ahi ;
Kichen tah a kaseipeh nahi" ati ;
Napen thah diu ahi.
2. Jesun khuh a kon eihung lhatdoh nau hi,
Athu ngaitouvin mihem chapa chanu ten ;
Hiche Thupha hi moh hisah hih hel’un,
Napen thah diu ahi.
3. Nangho vangam nom’a lutnom ho chengsen,
Eihuhhingnau Thupha hi kipa lan sauvin ;
Tonsot mangmo hinkemlou nanei nomle,
Napen thah diu ahi.
4. Na lunga vangam nom chu namu nom le,
Kotpi hoi phunga chun nang na ngah jinguve ;
Chuche gamnom hoi a chu nalut nom le,
Napen thah diu ahi.
Reference: Doh is E♭, d

songs.title: O SOPI NANGMAN VANGAM MUCHI CHU

lines: 1. O sopi nangman vangam muchi chu,
Jingkah seh'a nathe jing hinam?
O sopi nangman vangam muchi chu,
Janthip gei-a nathe jing hinam?
Chang ki at phat chu ahung nai tai,
Chang ki-at chu kichai loi tading,
Nangma changpang chu adim na din,
Pontho tah in tong in nasan ding atam'e.
2. O sopi nangman vangam muchi chu,
Jan thip gei-a nathe jing hinam?
O sopi nangman vangam muchi chu,
Lungtheng sel'a nathe jing hinam?
3. O sopi nangman vangam muchi chu,
Lei phalah a nathe jing hinam?
O sopi nangman vangam muchi chu,
Miho henga nathe jing hinam?
Reference: Doh is D. d
1. Phattheina go hong hungju hen,
Lungsetna eitepna sau ;
Juhsah jing jeng hen niseh in,
Jesun hinjuh lhah sah in.
Phattheina go hong,
Ka ngaiyui phattheina chu ;
Malkhou tah in hinjuhsah in,
Hungju hen ka chunguva.
2. Go hungjun phattheina go hong,
Lhagao thisa thoukit hen,
Thinglhang le phaicham dam jol’a,
Hung chin in phattheina go.
3. Phattheina go hong hungju hen,
Pathen hin sollhan tunin ;
Kalung nguisau halsah kit hen,
