Nei tepnau guilhun sah in.
4. Phattheina go hong hungju hen,
Juhsah in tuni tah in ;
Ka setnau jouse sop thengin,
Jesu kakou petchau hin.
Reference: Doh is B♭. sₗ
1. Kan eihuhhing lou ding,
Kalhin kamai phet jong leng ;
Ka lungdon subei lou ding,
Kumsot chonset beilou ding,
Kan eihuhhing lou ding.
Kei chuna Jesu thita,
Thingpel’a kikhen behta ;
Eingah-e huhhing dingin,
Huhhing jou Ama bou.
2. Toh-in eihuhhing lou ding,
Iti chonphat jeng jong leng ;
Itobangin hou jong leng,
Ka lung thahsah theilou ding,
Toh in eihuh lou ding.
3. Ngah leng kei hing lou ding,
Panpi bei mi mangsa kei ;
Lungset’a eikou pet hin,
Ngah leng keima thita ding,
Ngah leng kei hinglou ding.
4. Christa tahsan hinna,
Pathen Chapa Jesu chu ;
A tohchan ken gingcha leng,
A bantha'n eihuhhing ding,
Christa tahsan hinna.
Reference: Doh is E♭. s
1. Ka leiset hinkho abei teng,
Ken bang ding tulai ka lasah ;
Pathen inpi sung lim noiya,
Kalut teng kei kipah jing ding.
Kimaitoa muding Amai ken,
Lungset’a eilhat thu sei ding ;
Kimaitoa mu ding Amai ken,
Lungset’a eilhat thu seiding.
2. Nikhat ka leiset in chimding,
Asot apal kasei thei poi ;
Ahin ka dingin van chunga,
Mun a ume ti ken kahei.
3. Nikhat chung toni jong mang ding,
Leiset pahhoi jouse mang ding ;
Pakaiyin, “Nabol aphai” tia,
Eikou teng lut’a ol ta ding.
4. Pakaiyin kot ahon tengle,
Ka lhagao lutjel theina ding,
Ka thaomei devah jinging ting,
Ki gingin ken ngah jing inge.
Reference: Doh is F♭. m
1. Nitin’in ka tahsane,
Ka lung tha alhom tengle ;
Kalam muthim teng jong le,
Christa a kalung kinem.
Ni tin’in ka tahsane,
Lung dong lou ding itih a ;
I-tih le kahin laisea ;
Christa a kalung kinem.
2. Ka nop kom le la sange,
Kagim kom le tao vinge ;
Set toh jeng jong leng keima,
Christa a ka lung kinem.
3. Pathen Lhagaovin keima,
Eisalvah-e nitin’in ;
Aman kei eiching jinge,
Christa a kalung kinem.
4. Keima kahinlai chansen,
Hi leiset aman kah sen ;
Nopna vangam kalhun man,
Christa a kalung kinem.
Reference: Doh is A♭. m
1. Na lung hesoh sel’in, min jong anei nai,
Thuh tah-in hasel’in, phatechan sel’in ;
Na changa na umna lung gelin ngaiton,
Jesu jah-a seiyin lung mong tante.
2. Jesu jah a seiyin, athohsa ahi,
Seisoh in ahenga, nang panpi tei ding ;
Lung mon theina thu chu nalungin ching phan,
Pohgih ngai jang anom, ahenga taovin.
3. Lungdong hesoh mihem, tamtah aume,
Amaho thu gapen lungmonna thu hi ;
Sel’in nalung hesoh, mi chu kipah hen,
Nalung hesohna chu Jesu heng lhutjon.
Reference: Doh is B♭ d

songs.title: ADANG CHE NUNG A MOLCHUNG A

lines: 1. Adang che nunga mol chunga,
Kelngoi vah mang keiman ;
Hinna lungmonna hong sung lam,
Iti holdoh tang ngem ?
Kei kahi, hinna lam leh thutah,
Keima louvin koima Pa kom alhung theipoi ;
Kei kahi, hinna lam le thutah,
Keima louvin koima Pa kom alhung theipoi.
2. Kana vahmang lengvai yin kei,
Pathen heng jon louvin ;
“Hilam khu lama” eitiuvin,
Thutah la kahol mon.
3. Hinna lam le thutah Jesu,
Henge ka chei, tukal ;
Mangthah kit talouhel dingin,
A anga ka lut tai.
Reference: Doh is B♭ m
1. Nisa vah che phahna chan’a,
Gam jousea Jesun vaihom ding ;
Gam jouse chunga
Leng chang ding,
Ni le lhavah mol mang kahsen.
2. Chitin namtin pao tintang min,
A vahchoi la sanom cheh ding ;
Chapang sen san’in jong sa ding,
A mintheng vahchoina la chu.
3. Tan neilouva Ama henga,
Taona vahchoina umjing ding ;
Amin chu thao namtui bang ding,
Namtin vai jousen hou soh ding.
4. Chuteng leiset min ja cheh ding,
A lengpau chu sang sohkei diu ;
Vantil jong hung kumlha kit ding,
“Amen” tia leiyin kho sam ding.
Reference: Doh is E. d

songs.title: HOICHAN GAM HIJONG LE KEI KICHA LOU DING

lines: 1. Hoichan gam hijongle kei kicha lou ding,
Jesun eilhonpia eipuina channa chu ;
Ama beiya lung kipa thanopna bei,
Jesun eilhonpina a kei kicha lou.
Hoi chan’a hijong le kei kicha lou ding,
Jesun eilhonpia bit keicha kei che ding.
2. Kei ka chang hilou Jesun eilhonpi nai,
Gol le pai thon jong le Ama kanei nai ;
Lam hahsa lama Aman eipui jongle,
Jesu toh umna chu vahchoina in hi.
3. Jesun ei lhonpina chan’a kei nom’a,
Imu thei kavel iti thim jeng jong le ;
Lung lhaisel’a ka jingtho ding chu kahei,
Jesu toh umna chan chu innom ahi.
Reference: Doh is D. s

songs.title: HINKHO TWIPI KINONG HUIPI HAT NATOA

lines: 1. Hinkho twipi kinong huipi hat natoa,
Mang soh a kingaito a nalung lhah teng ;
Na phattheina jouse abanchan simmin,
Pakai thilbol cheng chun kinsah in nate.
Na phattheina abanchan simin,
Amin son lang abanchan simin ;
Pakaiyin na bolpeh chengse chu,
Pakai thilbol chengchu kidang san nate.
2. Pohgih poa lungkham lungdonga na um’em ?
Naput dinga kigotpeh Cross chu gih sam ?
Phattheina sim le chun ginchat lel bei ding,
Sun nisa vah bangin vah jing tan nate.
3. Mi sumnei, selnei, gamnei navet kom le,
Christan natepsa hao seitheilou ngaiton ;
Ahao choh joulou phattheina chu simin,
Toh phatman nasan ding van’a atam’e.
4. Hijeh chun gim genthei iti hah jong le,
Lunglha hih in Pathen achungnung pen’e ;
Phattheina simin vantil’in nangah nai,
Nalam lhung keiya nalhonpi diu ahi.
Reference: Doh is E♭. m

songs.title: GEISANG LOU JENUN MI CHONSE HO

lines: 1. Geisang lou jennun michonse ho,
Christa na hinna diu a ume ;
Tunin nakouve, O nem tah in,
“Hinna penge” ati.
Nom hen, nom hen Pakai Christa min,
Ka chonset eisop lheng peh pa chu ;
A kom’a tonsot’a ka chen ding,
Van chunga in thenga.
2. Jesun na kouve ngaiyin chonsen,
“Hungun chapang ho” hitin ati ;
Hung loiyun chonse lung lengvai te,
Pakai Christa sangin.
3. Kho pholouvin um hih un mite,
Tunin hin Jesun nang nakouve ;
Hungun mi chonse lungbei olmo,
Na chonset lung khel’in.
Reference: Doh is B♭ sₗ

songs.title: LANGEI TAH KHAT KASA NOM E

lines: 1. La ngeitah khat kasa nome,
Lhatdam kachan’a pat ;
Lhandampu vahchoi la sange,
Lhatdam kachan’a pat.
Lhatdam kachan’a pat (2)
Amin vahchoi jing tange ;
Lhatdam kachan’a pat,
Amin loupi vahchoi jing tange.
2. In nom hoitah khat kaneiye,
Lhatdam kachan’a pat ;
Tonsot’in cheng jing inge kei,
Lhatdam kachan’a pat.
3. Lhandampu vahchoi la sange
Lhandam kachan’a pat ;
Tonsot in sa jing inge ken,
Lhatdam kachanna pat.
Reference: Doh is G. s

songs.title: CROSS CHU INJOT NA LAMPIA KANEI TEI DING

lines: 1. Cross chu in jotna lampia kanei tei ding,
Chulou chu lamdang umlou ;
Van khopi hoichu keiman mulou ding,
Ka mansah le Cross lampi chu.
Van in jotna Cross ahi, (2)
Kache pum hin ka lam mu kanome ;
Van in jotna Cross ahi.
2. Thisan bena lampi chu kaho tei ding,
Eihuhhingpa chenna chu ;
Van chung innom jon’a kakal tou ding,
Lhagao Pathen toh chen na chu.
3. Vannoi lampi chu kalhadoh tai keiman,
Achung hokit louhel ding ;
Jesun “Hungin” tin ka in ka jon’e,
Kot phunga einga jing na chu.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ

songs.title: KEIMA INNOM VAN KHOPI KA LHUN TENGLE

lines: 1. Keima innom Van khopi kalhun tengle,
Ka pohgih ho Akom'a ken ngading,
Kem theilou Lallukhuh kaki khuh ding ahi,
Ken kipana la-a ka vahchoi ding ahi.
Chung van gamnom keima in chu,
Ka lhun tengle keiman,
Hesoh genthei na ho jouse,
Ken dalha a lung genthei na,
Um louding chu mun'a chun.
2. Keima innom van khopi kalhun tengleh,
Leiset muthim jingho umkit talou ding,
Vangam vah emhoi chun keima eisalvah in,
Van gam kalhun kahsen eisal vah e.
3. Keima innom Van khopi ka lhun teng le,
Ka mit a huhhing pa mel ka mu ta ding,
Pakai Ama vah chun keima eisal vah in,
Mangthah louva Ama toh chengkhom ding.
Reference: Doh is C. d
1. Nalung donsah hih helun,
Pakaiya lung ngaiyun ;
Ama jenga kinem in,
Christa a thi jouse chu,
Van'a ahung pui ding.
Hijeh chun nangho,
Khat le khat hicheng thu hin ;
Kilungmon to cheh un,
Hiche jeh chun nang ho,
Hijeh chun nang ho ;
Kilungmon to cheh uvin, (2)
Hicheng chun.
2. Nalung donsah hih hel’un,
Christa bou tahsan in ;
Jan’a lungdon na cheng hi,
Jinga nomsah na dinga ;
Aman nang hung pui ding.
3. Pakai hung nading nikho,
Ngah jingin anai tai ;
Van’a akal ni banga,
Amitheng ten hin tom ding,
Hung kilah loi tading.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ
1. Ngaiyun Pakai ding bolte jousen,
Hatmo leh thi dingin ;
Pakai phatthei lhah ngah jinguvin,
Eisem pha jing nante.
Pakai thahatna kingai chu,
Athau semthah in tin ;
Alhan leng touvun tin,
Muvanlai bangin leng touvun tin ;
Lhaitou dingu thachol louva,
Chol louva lam jot diu ;
Lhaitou dingu chollou hel’a,
Chol louva che diu.
2. Tamtah vei theichim le lung thoiyin,
Achunga iphun’ui ;
Huhhingpa hingjing itahsan’ui,
I bol’a kilel dem.
3. Kipah un ei umpi jing nauve,
Leiset beini geiyin ;
Khodah in hungun lang ma son’un,
Ingai chan eipe ding.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ

songs.title: NISUN VAH A CHUN CHEN NIPI VAH A CHUN

lines: 1. Nisun vah a chun chen, nipi vah a chun,
Jinga pahcha pah le janlai dai lhah in ;
Nitin in masonin dettah in pangun,
Lam tinna Jesu juijin.
Jui un keiman jong kajui-e,
Jui un niti’in jui un ;
Aman napui le na channa,
Juijin Jesu chu alam tinnah.
2. Sun nisat emlai le, janlai muthimin,
Chamkang lou noulai le chuhlai go lonin ;
Aman nakou ngaiyun asei thun nung un,
Lam tin’ah Jesu jui in.
3. Nisa vah emlai le thimpi jing a jong,
Khopi hui nunna le lungdon nah a jong ;
Ami ngailut gingchan akhon ni geiyin,
Anung lhaso lou jen in.
Reference: Doh is B♭. sₗ
1. Jesun kot akiu kiuve,
Thachol ka henga hungun ;
Tin huhhing din nakouve,
Kot chu hong len’in.
Kot chu hong len’in,
Kot chu hong len’in ;
Huhhing jou Ama ahi,
Kot chu hong len’in.
2. Jesun kot akiu kiuve,
Nang huhnan Ama athin ;
Lhanna kon athoudoh tai,
Kot chu hong len’in.
3. Jesun kot akiu kiuve,
Don nalung Aheng lama ;
Nalung kipana dim ding,
Kot chu hong len’in.
4. Jesun kot akiu kiuve,
Huhhingna anaipet hin ;
Ajo le chemang kit khante,
Kot chu hong len in.
Reference: Doh is D♭. sₗ

songs.title: THENNA DING PHAT NEIJIN NA PATHEN HOUVIN

lines: 1. Thenna ding phat neiyin na Pathen houvin,
Amatoh um jingin Athun kivah in ;
Pathen chate ho jong kihou thei pin lang,
Ahatmo te hun lang sumil lou jenin.
2. Thenna ding phat neiyin athu nit jingin,
Jesu chu guhthim min atamjon houvin ;
Jesu vejing le chun Ama toh bang ding,
Na gol’in amud in a umchan bang thon.
3. Thenna ding phat neiyin lam kihil sah in,
A ang sunga konin jammang lou jenin ;
Gim hesohna ahi na Pakai juiyin,
Jesu lam kat jingin Athu tahsanin.
4. Thenna ding phat neiyin nalung olsah in,
Na lungput jouse chun anoiya lut’in ;
Avaihom thun nungin kipuisah jingin,
Ngailut bulpi ahi van’a puilut thei.
Reference: Doh is F. m
1. Hinkho deilai achom’e,
Thingna pullai abange ;
Changphal kansa abange ki gingun,
Hin nikho akem jinge,
Vangset ni hung lhung inte ;
Thina hunglhung loiyinte ki gingun.
Phat hom’in ki gingun,
Jesun nakou kou laiyu hin ki gingun ;
Setna a umsot leu chun,
Hinna kot hon hom louvin ;
Nalut phat kikhel’in te ki gingun.
2. Pahcha hoilai pul loiyin,
Khangdong hoilai cheloiyin,
Nang umsot ding nahipoi ki gingun ;
Pathen lhan nakou laiyin ;
Umhih un ngaisah louvin,
Manna lam’a chunnate ki gingun.
3. Phat akem tul tul jinge,
Thi vaihom ahung naiye ;
Jesu khut’a kikhum’un mangang un ;
Vangsetna ahung lhun’a,
Na lhagao man masangin,
Aloupina chu simun kigingun.
4. Hilna thu chu ngai phauvin,
Pakai chu tuhdet leu chun,
Van mi jouse kipah ding, kigingun ;
Chonset muthim dalhauvin,
Jesu chu tahsan’un lang,
Van lam jonin tun cheuvin kiging un.
Reference: Doh is E♭. d
1. Silom twikul mol lim noija,
Pahcha namtui keh chu ;
Iti namtui tam mol noiya,
Saron pah mum hoi chu. (2)
2. Hibang chun tulai khang chapang,
Hoi keichan apenge ;
Alungu thengsel nemheu chan,
Pathen lam asangui. (2)
3. Silom tuikul mol lim noija,
Pahcha chu pul teiyin ;
Mol noiya pahcha namtui chu,
Thonmo a mol loi jita. (2)
4. Mihemte jong chutobang ding,
A hinkho alhin teng ;
Athi ding lung leng olmo ding,
Thon moa la thi tei ding. (2).
Reference: Doh is E♭ m

songs.title: BIBLE A THU UM HI THUPHA CHUNGNUNG PEN

lines: 1. Bible’a thu umhi Thupha chungnung pen,
Athu jouse hinna le sochatna ;
Mi thisa jong thoukit ding tin aseiye,
Lhagao mangsa hindoh kitna ahi.
Bible thu ngaiyun, Bible thun nungun,
Mangun Bible Thupha hinna kidang.
2. Ngai phauvin Bible gou kemlou chungnung thu,
Lhagao hinna le sochatna ahi ;
Aman jat jong leiset min sim theilou ding,
Hol’in lhagao phattheina kidang hi.
3. Mi lamvaite dinga Bible meivah pha,
Khangthah dan neilou dinga jong phatna ;
Mi chonse dinga hinna le lung olna,
Teh le khang dinga hibou Thupha pen.
Reference: Doh is B♭, d

songs.title: O NGEI TAH IN SAKIT TEM IN

lines: 1. O ngeitah in sakit tem’in,
Hinna le nopna thu ;
Hi thu chu kei eihil beuvin,
Hinna le nopna thu ;
Hiche Pathen thu hin,
Phatna thu eihil’e.
Thu ngei chungnung thu kidang tah,
Hinna le nopna thu.
2. Jesun mijouse ahom’e,
Hinna le nopna thu ;
Ngai-jin nalung hongun sangun,
Hinna le nopna thu ;
Man beiyin ahome,
Vanna lut theina din.
3. Hibang hinna thupha kidang,
Hinna le nopna thu ;
Ka jah man kei kalung monge,
Hinna le nopna thu ;
Jesu bou mi huhhing,
Lungmon konna ahi.
Reference: Doh is G, m

songs.title: SEI IN THUSIM LUI THU CHU

lines: 1. Seiyin thusim lui thu chu,
Mulou van chung gam thu ;
Pakai Jesu Loupi le,
Ami lungset thu chan ;
Seiyin thusim chu ol chan,
Chapang kihil bang chun ;
Keima mi chonse le lung,
Neilou olmo ngai din.
Seijin thusim lui thu, (3)
Jesu milungset thu.
2. Seiyin thusim lui thu chu,
Kachin jing theina din ;
Mihemte chonset jal’a ;
Jesu leiya pen thu,
Sei-jin hi chu niseh in,
Thupha kidang ahi ;
Lungdon le olmo kom’a,
Kalung monna ahi.
3. Seiyin thusim lui thu chu,
Lungdon olmo komle ;
Hiche leiset gou homkeu,
Nop le ol jong chutia ;
Hi leiset ka dalhah a,
Van gam nom kalhun man ;
Seijin thusim lui thu chu,
Jesu mi huhhing thu.
Reference: Doh is C. m

songs.title: VANNOI GAMTIN CHONSET MUTHIM IN ALOI

lines: 1. Vannoi gamtin chonset muthimin aloi,
Hinna thun salvah un ;
Lhagao huhhinga um noma atam'e,
Hinna thun salvah un.
Sochatna hinna Thupha vah chun,
Agamtin salvah soh hen ;
Sochatna hinna Thupha vah chun,
Tonsot geiyin salvah hen.
2. Jet le veiya igam miten eikou-vui,
Hinna thun salvah un ;
Kipah tah le thanom tah in choileu te,
Hinna thun salvah un.
3. Hinna Thupha mijousen amuthei nan,
Hinna thun salvah un ;
Hinna Thuphan gamtin alosohna din,
Hinna thun salvah un.
4. Hinna thu lhacha ipan hi chim poute,
Hinna thun salvah un ;
Van’a ivon diu thilpha khol ihiuve,
Hinna thun salvah un.
Reference: Doh is A♭ sₗ
1. Hungun Pathen ngaite,
Kipah in la sauvin ;
Kipah in la sacheh unlang, (2 vei)
Kikhom’un kimvel’un.(2 vei)
Cheu hite Zion ah,
Zion gam nom chungnung em’a ;
Cheu hite Zion gam noma,
Pathen khopi nomtah a chun.
2. Pathen hepha louten,
Vahchoi da jeng jong leu ;
Eiho Pathen chate sen vang, (2 vei)
Phongun nalung kipau.(2 vei)
3. Pathen kihouna a,
Asang jan tha nom’un ;
Vanna khopi hoi ilhun man, (2 vei)
I len mam gam em’a. (2 vei)
4. Chu a lhi kangsoh ding,
Kipa la isah diu ;
Immanuel cha ihi diu, (2 vei)
Van khopia ilen diu. (2 vei)
Reference: Doh is G. d

songs.title: KA DINGE DETTAH IN GALVON PO KAHI

lines: 1. Ka dinge dettah in galvon po kahi,
Ka ngah jinge Lengpan thu eipeh ding ;
Malam nonge Lengin thu eipeh le,
A kom’a ding ingting Ama jen lenge.
"Ngaiyun ma lam novin" tia gal sam khu,
Anu nungui ven mi kichase ho ;
{Pakaiyin keima einganse tei ding,
Agalvon choi bou kahi jeng vangin.} (2 vei)
2. Ka ding jinge dettah in galvon choiyin,
Phasa demin chem le thal lum kathoi ;
Gal kisat gin ngah in ka dinge kei,
“Pakai ka ding nai” kati theina dingin.
3. Von po bou hijong leng chan kanei tei ding,
Loupina kemlou le Lallukhuh hoi ;
Tahsan neiya gal kasat jousea chu,
Pathen anga maipha chang tei ding keima.
Reference: Doh is B♭. sₗ
1. Ngaiyun Pakai Jesun eikou,
Tunia vaikon ding koi ham ?
Jao a angtai, chang amin tai,
Aga chomkhom ding hoi ham ?
“A chang at chu manpha penge”
Hitin ati Pakaiyin ;
“Keima ka umnai nei sol’in,”
Lhaisel’a ti ding hoi ham ?
2. Khol gamla che hih jongleu chun,
Holdoh ding amangsa te ;
Mun nate thilha hou sangja,
Hiho chu hinna thu pen ;
Sum tampi ahilou vangin,
Paini jeng cha hi jong le ;
Hiche themcha jong chu Jesun,
Tamtah in sang tei nante.
3. Thu seiyin themhih jongleu chun,
Solchah Paul seithem bangin ;
Jesu mi lungset sei leuvin,
Ei jal’a athi jeh chun ;
Thupi tan ding kicha louva,
Mi chonse ho adau le,
Chapang ho hin koukhom leu chun,
Pathen’in kipom nante.
4. Pakai o-gin najah mau le,
Mihem hinkho kemlai hin ;
Na thaset manin ti dauvin ;
“Keima ka-i alou poi”,
Lung lhaiyin Pathen na tongun,
Tong jingun thanom tah in ;
Asei najah mau le tiuvin,
“Pathen keima nei sol’in”.
Reference: Doh is F. d

songs.title: KOI HIJONG LE THUPHA HI AJACHAN IN

lines: 1. Koi hijongle Thupha hi aja chan nan,
Kipana thu hi leiset gam kimvel’a ;
Phongun homjal’un mi umna mun jousea,
“Ahung nom chan hungu hen.”
Koi hijeng jongle ahung nom chan chu,
Thinglhang le phaicham dam’a gasam leuvin ;
Pan vahmang ho inlam’a akouna hi,
“Ahung nom chan hungu hen.”
2. Ahung nom chan chu hung geisang lou jenun,
Kot kihon lutthei pet cha hin lut loiyun ;
Jesu chu hinna lampi dihtah ahi,
“Ahung nom chan hungu hen.”
3. Ahung nom chan chu thutepsa aume,
Ahung nom chan chu umjing jeng ding ahi ;
Koi hile anom chan hing jing ding ahi,
“Ahung nom chan hungu hen”.
Reference: Doh is D. s

songs.title: THOUVIN KALUNG NISA SOH TOH KIJUI IN

lines: 1. Thouvin kalung nisa soh toh kijuiyin,
Ka lungin Pathen jeng gel’in ;
Lung lhaisel le lung hal pel’in lhai ponthon,
Meiyin kong hen Pathen Nang ngai.
2. Sun le jan neilou Van Mithengte jousen,
Pathen thusim asim jingui ;
Nangman jong amaho lasah jeng gel’in,
Na vahchoi na la sangin san.
3. Pathen tujan kalha nahoi damsel’a,
Hinkho thah neipeh tujinga ;
Hibang chun vangam noma kho vah jingle,
Neilan Nangma gam nom sungah.
4. Nei ching jingin chonphat le lungnem neipen,
Na lhagao theng chun neipui len ;
Tunia ka chonnau katoh kasei jouseu,
Pathen mitmua lamjang dingin.
Reference: Doh is D. d

songs.title: DANIEL LOI BANGIN DINGUN PATHEN THUN NUNGUN

lines: 1. Daniel loi bangin dingun Pathen thun nungun,
Pahchaute loi lhom ho chun Daniel loi vahchoi-un;
Daniel bangin hangun,
Na changin dingin,
Na hannau chu leiset mi'n,
Heu hen pang det un.
2. Mihat minthanga kisei vannoi chonsoh ho,
Pathen lama dia pang mihat sangja mangsoh ta.
3. Gospel ponlap dom sangun Gal jo na dingin,
Satan gal chu no mangun Daniel dingin aovun.
Reference: Doh is B♭, m

songs.title: DAM DUNG LHUNG A JESU NUNG JUI DING KA NOM'E

lines: 1. Dam dung lhunga Jesu nungjui ding ka nome,
Pahcha namtui pahna le twilhum lona a ;
Hoichan hijongle eipuina chana jui jinge,
Anung jui jinge lallukhuh kasan man.
Jui ding, jui ding Jesu nung kajui ding,
Achena chana anung kajui ding ;
Jui ding, jui ding Jesu nung kajui ding,
Aman eipuina channa ken kajui ding.
2. Dam dung lhunga keiman Jesu nung kajui ding,
Khopi hui nunna le twilhum lonna a chun ;
Ama khut’in eipui le keima kicha lou ding ;
Aman eilhonpi le keima olmo lou ding.
3. Dam dung hihen lang mol’a kal ding hijong leng,
Ka lhagao Jesu kom’a chu umjing jeng hen ;
Bitkei le damsel chan Aman eipui lhungkei ding,
Ol eipehna ding Pathen inpi nom chu.
Reference: Doh is A♭, sₗ

songs.title: VAN'A PONLAP KHU HUNG VEUVIN HUNG UN SOPI

lines: 1. Van’a ponlap khu hung veuvin hungun Sopite !
Galmi thah sangja ahunge, Gal ijo tei diu !
Kul dalha hih un ka hunge !
Tin Jesun a sam ;
Nang thahat vangin lha ponge,
Neipen Lengpan tha.
2. Veuvin asangja ahunge, Satan sepaite !
Eima sepaite kicha-in, alungthoi gam tai !
3. Gal jona ponlap khu veuvin ! ngaiyun sumkon gin !
Pakai mina ijo tei diu, Galte tam jong le.
4. Gal kisat ahahsat vangin eipanpi tamna,
Igal Lamkai hattah Jesu, I-ham igin diu.
Reference: Doh is D, s

songs.title: NATONG IN KON UTE EIHO PATHEN SOHTE

lines: 1. Na tongin kon’ute eiho Pathen sohte,
I-Pakai nungjuiyin cheu hite na tongin ;
Aman eipeh lungthim thah chu pannu hite,
Ikhut’a itoh thei chan tong cheh uhite.
Tongute … ha tah in,
Na tongun … pon tah in ;
Ngah ute … ki nemin,
Bang poute Pakai hung kah sen.
2. Na tong cheh uhite agilkel va na ding,
Lhagao dangchah ho dangnou nadin peu hite ;
I loupina dingu Cross thu seileu hite,
“Man beiyin eihuhhingui” tin samleu hite.
3. Ibonchan cheu hitin na gatong uhite,
Chonset muthim gam chu apumpin mangsoh hen,
Jehovah mintheng loupi chu kilang soh hen,
“Man beiyin eihuhhingui” tin samleu hite.
4. Pontho tah in pangun Pakai thahat panun,
Toh phatman isan diu Pathen’in eipeh diu ;
Lhatsa mithengte toh vana ichen khom diu,
“Man beiyin eihhuhingui” tin samleu hite.
Reference: Doh is F. m

songs.title: MIHEM CHENNA CHAN'A, GALHANG SAM LEU HITE

lines: 1. Mihem chenna channa ga lhangsam leu hite,
Hungun Christa mite seileute limtah in ;
Mi chonsete henga lungmonna Thupha hi,
Lha monsah ahung tai.
Lha monsah ahung tai, (2 vei)
Pathen’in eipeh-u ;
Eitepnau Lhagao Theng,
Mihem chenna channa ;
Ga lhangsam leu hite,
Lha monsah ahung tai.
2. Muthim lungdon lengvai, gim le hesoh genthei,
Abonchan achaiyin gamtin asalsoh tai ;
In hoi lul tah bangin nisa so em bangin,
Lha monsah ahung tai.
3. Leng jouse Leng chungnung, mi damsah Lhagaovin,
Mi chonse te hengah, hinna thu hinpo lhan ;
Hungun huhhingsa te la ngei hi sau hite,
Lha monsah ahung tai.
4. Lungsetna chungnung thu lan sa choileu hite,
Van chunga cheng ho to kitoh in sau hite !
La ngei hi bang louvin sau hite lim tah in,
Lha monsah ahung tai.
Reference: Doh is C. s
1. Naiya gamla chang amin tai,
Changvui akoisoh gam tai ;
Naiya gamla a-angsoh tai,
Denna lep a phaicham’a.
Pakai chang at ding hin sol’in,
Na henga ka taonau hi ;
Ngaiyin chang at ding hin sol’in,
Chang at kile get inte.
2. Jingpi nison hin sol loiyin,
Sun nisat’in hin sol’in ;
Ni lhumkon geiyin hin sol’in,
Gamtin chang at khom dingin.
3. Man gangun chang akoi jou tai,
Changvui min atkhom loiyun ;
Nilhah tengle in lam jon’a,
Kipah a che ding nahi.
Reference: Doh is A♭. m

songs.title: MAN GANGUN, MAN GANGUN KHOVAH THU SEIPHONG LEN

lines: 1. Man gangun, man gangun khovah thu seiphong len,
Jan muthim gama cheng miho khu gahil un;
Pakai thupeh ahi, Ama Min in kon un,
Gospel thupeh kidang tah Jesu milungsetna,
Nahin nao mangcha in sunlayin na tongun,
Man gangun, man gangun, man gangun.
2. Man gangun, man gangun hinna thu gahomun,
Pakai awgin hepha louho khu gahil un;
Jing lhaving in lengleuvin Twikhanglen chunga,
Pakai thahat panin amangsa huh doh un;
Nakou kit leuvui chomkhat jong geisang hih un,
Man gangun, man gangun, man gangun.
3. Man gangun, Thupha chu po-in lhangsam loiyun,
Lhep nan bul'a ahen ganthei lhagao ho khu;
"Lhadoh tei ding" tia Pakai in thu atepsa,
Golvah ankong akithuh tai kou khom loi-un,
Geisang louvin khom un aphat aum tapoi,
Man gangun, man gangun, man gangun.
Reference: Doh is F, s

songs.title: MUN A-ONG NALAIYE KOU KHOM UN

lines: 1. Mun a ong na laiye koukhom’un,
Lengpa golvah ankong um din;
Kou khom’uvin lang a In mi dim hen,
Mivaicha gilkelten neu hen.
Lam lenna le dai pam’a potnun,
Setna lamthim’a umte chu,
Chen lang ngailut le lungset thon lang,
Vahvei ho gapui khom’un
2. Mun a ong nalaiye kou kit-nun,
Amavang eingaisah lou le;
Kou na ngailouva kilep mang ho,
Koiman kou kitta lou hel ding.
3. Mun a ong nalaiye kou kit-nun,
Chung’a Pathen thupeh a-hi;
Lung set hongsung’a gapui khom’un,
Huhhingpa lungsetna a chun;
4. Genthei lengvai le ahao din jong,
Vanna mun a ong nalai-ye;
Koukhom loiyun kot kihon pet hin,
Gunchun hilchen kimvel leuvin.
Reference: Doh is A♭, sₗ
1. O Pathen salvah soh loiyin,
Vannoi leiset salvah in ;
Alhatpau deitah min’a chu,
Asochat theina dingun.
O Pathen salvah soh loiyin,
Twikhanglen gal’a mite ;
Lungsetna Thupha man beiya,
Hom dinga natepsa chu.
2. Lhagao thi kon ho salvah in,
Jan muthim’a lamvaite ;
Ahin nikhou alhin kah in,
Salvah in huhhing loiyin.
3. Athutep loupi le theng chu,
“Cheuvin leiset gamtin ah;
A khonni geiyin ka umpi,
Ka Thupha phongjal leuvin.”
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ

songs.title: PAKAI THAHAT PAN IN HAT UN ATHU GINGCHAN

lines: 1. Pakai thahat panin hat’un athu ging chan,
Athupha theng phongun lhangsam leuvin ;
Galsat lungdonna a jong Aman eikaihoi jing ding,
Pakai mina koi ham eidou thei diu ?
Ding det un thudih a,
Leng thupeh ngaiyun galjo na ding ;
Pakai choi atna dingin athutep hi molso din,
Pakai thahat panin ding det’un.
2. Pakai thahat panin hat’un athu gingchan,
Gal masanga kon nungjam kit lou ding ;
Ama nakoma ding jing ding nagalsat huding a,
Malam nouvin athahat chu panun.
3. Pakai thahat pan'un hat un athu gingchan,
Itih channa athutep thon ngailou ;
Aman nakhut jetlam atuh jinge kicha hih-in,
Pakai chu tahsan jingin dingdet’in.
Reference: Doh is G. s
1. Ngaiyun Pakai Jesun eikouvui tun,
Leiset ga chom khom din ;
Chang at khom ding mi alhom jeh in,
Changvui akoi joutai.
Pakai minin kipah in cheuvin,
Ngailut le khoto thon ;
Man beiya huhhinga nunnom chu,
Vannoiya phong leuvin.
2. Cheuvin amang ding kon huhdoh un,
Chonset muthim’a kon ;
Aban thahat panin huhhingun,
Chonset bulpu ga lhan.
3. Kipah tah-in genthei kou khomun,
Lungset ankong um din ;
Ama ho chu hinna changlhah a,
Pakaiyin lamto ding.
4. Che leuvin nipi lai akeme,
Nilhum man tong loiyun ;
Koiman na atoh thei louna ding,
Jan muthim anai tai.
Reference: Doh is A♭ d
1. Lunghel lungdon lhamon’ute,
Hin nikho kemlai sung hin ;
Lhagao mang ding ho huh ute,
Hin nikho kemlai sung hin ;
Ama ho kipana ding,
Tongute hinlai sungin ;
Thilpha bolthei cheh ihi,
Hin nikho kemlai sung hin ;
A kem’e ....... hin nikho, (2 vei)
Thilpha bolthei cheh ihi ;
Hin nikho kemlai sung hin ;
2. Mi thase dinga phat umlou,
Hin nikho kemlai sung hin ;
Namai jing ninou soh bang hen,
Hin nikho kemlai sung hin ;
Vannoi leiset khoisat dim,
Ka le lhiso na adim.
Ule nao lhu phong dingin,
Hin nikho kemlai sung hin ;
3. Kilungset nan eikan khom’ui,
Hin nikho kemlai sung hin ;
Khat chengin iki dalhauve,
Hin nikho kemlai sung hin ;
Hijong le ithilpha bol,
Vannoi hetna kilang ding ;
Hichun ilungu nem ding,
Hin nikho kemlai sung hin.
Reference: Doh is A, m
1. Leng sepai ihiuve, thisan’a kilhatsa,
Min khumsa galsatpi dinga ;
Pakai Christa Leng chu ; kichat a um vangin,
Kipah-in la saute ;
Leng sepai Lamkai chungnung chun,
I-lung hahsat jing ding.
Leng sepai ihiuve,
A vahchoi la saute ;
Tahsan nei jing nading bolun,
I-lengpau loupi chu.
2. Leng sepai ihiuve kipah-in choileuvin,
Cross chunga kithatpa min ngei ;
Achunga kisun chu ; Leng sepai ihiuve,
Hahkam jeng jong leu hen ;
Leng chungnung Jesu choi-at nan,
Hesoh na jong thoh un.
3. Leng sepai ihiuve, Ama toh pangkhom chu,
Tun Amatoh thoh khom hen lang ;
Pampai hijong leu hen ; a ponlap dom sangun,
Phat lhin ding kon ahi ;
Lallukhuh sanni anaiye,
Leng sepaite dingin.
Reference: Doh is G, sₗ

songs.title: KHUT GOH KEOVA KACHE DING HAM?

lines: 1. Khut goh keova kache ding ham,
Ei Lhatpa lamto dinga ?
Ana nikhat jong tong louva,
Ima lan ding nei louva.
Ka che ding ham khut goh keova,
Eihuhhingpa lamtoa chu ;
Lhagao khat beh keng lou hel’a,
Ka che ding ham khut goh a ?
2. Thina in eikailut lou ding,
Tua Jesun ei huhhing ta ;
Ka lamto ding bou khut goh a ;
Phamo san kalung kham’e.
3. Ka sumang tai kum phalai cheng,
Kou la kakou kit thei tapon ;
Hichu ajen nan mangta leng,
A lunggot molso ta ding.
4. Thina jan chun hinpha le chun,
Lhagao khat huhhing louvin ;
Na huhhingpa loupi tah chu,
Ipin lamto tan natem ?
Reference: Doh is D, s
1. Na tongun jan anai tai,
Na tongun jingkah in ;
Na tongun daitwi hul man,
Pahcha pah laiyin ;
Na tongun nisa jong leh,
Tongun nilhah daiyin ;
Mite natoh chai phat jan,
Hung lhung ding ahi.
2. Tongun jan ahung naije,
Tongun sun nisat’in ;
Tongun nidan phat laiyin,
Olna anai tai ;
Tongun mitphet kahchan jong,
Ol go ta di louvin ;
Tongun jan anaitai, min
Tong kit talou ding.
3. Tongun jan ahung naitai,
Tongun nilhang kaiyin ;
Tongun ni alhum geiyin,
Tantih nei louvin ;
Khovah laisen na tongun,
Na muthei lai chan sen ;
Tongun athim tul tul’e,
Olna anai tai.
Reference: Doh is F, s

songs.title: HINNA GUI JAN LHAN THI DING MI AUM

lines: 1. Hinna gui janlhan thiding mi aum,
Chonset twikhanglen nong laiya umte ;
Koiham tuinonglai pal’a mi huhding ?
Hinna gui janlhan mi gahuh doh loiyin.
Hinna gui janlhan, (2 vei)
Twiya mi mang ding ahi ;
Hinna gui janlhan, (2 vei)
Twiya mi alha lut’e.
2. Hinna gui janlhan natha le lung thon,
Ngaiyin lhagao mang din nang nakouve ;
Vetan chonset twilen’a thiding mi,
Hinna kong kailhan mi mang ding huhhingin.
3. Hinna gui janlhan mi mang ding ngaiton,
Chonset twipin chup le homjou lou ding ;
Huipi, gopi kithon hinpha taleu,
Mang teidiu chen nangman ga huhdoh loiyin.
4. Mi mang ding lah phat kikhel loi tading,
Lhagao tamtah mangthai ding tonsot’a ;
Geisang louvin chen hinna kong kengin,
Hinna gui janlhan mi mang ding huhdoh-in.
Reference: Doh is G, sₗ
1. Pathen lekha sim jinga,
Asun ajan’a ngaitoa ;
Agunchu athanom pan,
Pathen phatthei peh amui.
Hijeh chun sun le janin,
Lung ngainan nei jingun lang ;
A thulu ching jing jengin,
Phattheina hin kemlou na.
2. Mi chonse houlimpi lou,
Mi gilou nungjui louva ;
Mi seise te kom dalha,
Mi chun chonset apailhai.
3. Lui panga thingphung keh chu,
Anan goptih nei talou ;
Hiche thing hinthei bang chun,
Mitheng nop jong kem theilou.
4. Chonse vang chu tobang lou,
Huiya vai kithe bang ding ;
Pathen thupi tan nileh,
Mi chonse chu pampai ding.
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ

songs.title: TOHGIM LE LUNG JINNA KHEL A

lines: 1. Tohgim le lung jinna khella,
Cholte din in nomtah aum ;
Kikhel tih nei lou innom a,
Koi ham cholnga nomlou ding chu ?
Ngah hat in lung nengin phun louvin,
Ngah hat in lung nengin phun louvin ;
Ngah hat’in lung nengtah in,
Phun louvin.
2. Pohgih noiya chol jongle chun,
Van phatna in nang ngai jang ding ;
Dah-in ven tonsot anai tai,
Ngah in phun louvin ngah hat’in.
3. Na lampia ling um jeng jong le,
Pakai lu kimvel ngaiton lang ;
Nalung sudong tajeng jongle,
Nang sanga thengjo asun tai.
4. Na jong le chun tong jing tangem,
Taona ima sumil louvin ;
Na olna ding ni anai tai,
Ngah hat in phun louvin ngah in.
Reference: Doh is C, s

songs.title: CHEN LANG NAPHAT JOUSEN TONG IN

lines: 1. Chen lang na phat jousen tongin,
Kipa nan Pa deilam bollin;
Hichu Pakai lampi ahi,
Najot lou ding ham ajui-jan.
2. Hinkho hoilaijin chen tongin,
Seiset japina ging louvin ;
Mihemin apachat louchu,
Pathen pachat louvin geldan.
3. Chen lang tongin tohphat ahi,
Nalung sung kipa sah in lang ;
Pakaijin na pachat ding chu,
Gellin thanomin na tongin.
4. Tong jingin chim louvin tongin,
Lhagao mang dingin lei aloi ;
Vannoi gam tina vahlen lang,
Lhagao mangte chu puikhom in.
5. Kipah-in natoh kipa pin,
Toh gim chu olna nom ahi ;
Ngaiyun jaloi ding Pakai O.
“Ka hunge” ti O chu ngaiphan.
Reference: Doh is E♭ d

songs.title: ANITIN PATHEN CHATE BANG A VAH A ICHEU HINAM

lines: 1. Anitin Pathen chate banga vah a icheu hinam ?
Jan muthim natoh pailha kho hungvah ding ingau hinam ?
Lei lungngai dalhan kho hungvah ding chu ngah jingin,
Lhandampu lungset jal’a hungsoh ding ninou emsel chu.
A mit mua … icheu hinam?
Pathen cha … deite banga ;
Christa thisan lua chu ivon’u
Isop bangu hinam ?
Loupina chang ding khovah chate banga
Icheu hinam ?
2. Nunnema Pathen chate banga vah a icheu hinam ?
Hi leiset lungdon hesoh genthei muthim jing noiya hin ;
Pakaiyin Ama khel’a tong dingin eidei cheh-uve,
Tonsot hinkemlou chang dingin mi kholkhom loiyu hite.
3. Vahchoi la saute kipahtah-in khovah chate bangin,
Lhaisel’in Christa dingin mite lah-a na tongu te ;
Chutile leiset miten sochatna thu hinjom cheh diu,
Chua kon Pathen khopi jon’a Christa ijuikhom diu.
Reference: Doh is G. d
1. Calvary ka ngaiye, Calvary lungsetna
Pakai Cross noiah kei katouve,
Cross noiya lung ol tantih neilou
Nop le olna sochat na ahi.
2. Chonset muthim noiya genthei tah in athi,
Kagah ven ken katija sa san,
Pathen kelngoi nou kithat ahi,
Kei jal'a Jesu kithat ahi.
3. Ka miltai lei lungngai lim oldam ka changtai,
Hibang lungsetna vannoi-a bei,
Cross noi-a kachen kei kalung mong,
Calvary michonse kei asoh chai.
4. Lungset in ka hoitai thisana hing kahi,
Pathen kom'a mun nom kachang tai,
Iti eiki lungset a hitam!
Lungset chungnung chonse kei chunga.
Reference: Doh is G, sₗ
1. Dingun dingun Jesu din,
Nangho Cross sepaite ;
Aleng ponlap dom sangun,
Mang louhel ding ahi ;
Gal jou-va kon galjou ding,
A sepaite pui ding ;
Gal jouse abei soh-a,
Christa leng chan kahsen.
2. Dingun dingun Jesu din,
Sumkon gin thun chon’un ;
Gim genthei hahsa thoh-un,
Ani loupi lai hin ;
Tua ading bol’a nang ho,
Gal sim senlou sat cheng ;
Lung nga mun setto na jong,
Thahatna su mangun.
3. Dingun dingun Jesu din,
Ama thahat pan’un ;
Tahsa khut thahat thon thei,
Nangma tha son dauvin ;
Gospel galvon kivon’un ;
Kiging phan tau jingun;
Toh dingin nakou nauva,
Lhah chomna nei hih-un.
4. Dingun dingun Jesu din,
Galsat sot talou ding ;
Tunia gal kisat kisei,
Jingle jo la sah ding ;
Gal satna gal joupa chu,
Hinna lukhuh chang ding ;
Loupina Leng chungnung toh,
Tonsot vaihom khom ding.
Reference: Doh is B♭. sₗ
1. Christian thouvin imut sot dan,
Lhagao mang ding don louvin ;
Pakaiyin thu eipeh laiya,
I mohtou mai mai diu ham ?
Chen lang tongin tun panin,
Amangsa holdoh kit din ;
Chonse muthim’a konin,
Golvahna a hin puiyin.
2. Huhhingpu ingailut nah em,
Athupeh init nah um ?
Inei jouseu iphalnah um ?
Athua inun lou diu ham ?
3. Ama chu itahsan nah um ?
Ahil’a ichon nah um ?
Eiho Ama a ihiuve;
Na-natoh in phong cheh un.
4. Lallukhuh san itup uleh,
Cross nitin in puhite ;
Gunchu tah-in na tongu te,
Phat achom ni anai tai.
Reference: Doh is C, m
1. Ka lhan Van Lengpa vahchoi-in,
Bohkhup in akho muh'a,
Nahin sah nadam sah Pathen,
Na ngaidam e vahchoi-in.
Vahchoi cheh un (2)
Vahchoi-un Tonsot Leng chu.
2. Lung donna Pi le Pu te,
Ana khoto a vahchoi-un,
Abang hi-jing chu vahchoi-un,
Phatthei na eipe a chu.
Vahchoi cheh un (2)
Pa-Pathen chu vahchoi-un.
3. Nu le Pa cha alungset bang,
Eiho hatmo je ahen,
Akhut in eina pom leuve,
Gal a kon eihuhhing-ui.
Vahchoi cheh un (2)
Lungset henlang vahchoi-un.
4. Vantil neihun a vahchoi nan,
Mujing nahi Amaiso,
Nisa lha sa le namtin mi,
A kuncheh e A-ang ah.
Vahchoi cheh un, (2)
Mi khoto Pathen Theng chu.
Reference: Doh is C. d
1. Tunin kumlui abeisoh tai,
Kumthah ahung lhung tai ;
Taovu hite Pathen hengah,
I chonset beina din.
2. Kumlui hitia chemang bang chun,
Akem’e ihinkho ;
Akem jinge aniseh in,
Akem mang loiji tai.
3. Hijeh chun sopite hungun,
Pathen naiyu hite ;
Ama jenga chu kinemin,
Tonsot hin jingna din.
4. Hiche kumthah hung lhun bangin,
Thah hen ilungu jong ;
Aga phat apun theina din,
Kihabol’u hite.
5. Vo Pathen Nang ka tahsan na,
Khang hen aniseh-in ;
Ka kinepnau hin khan sah in,
Det hen thihhat ai-jin.
Reference: Doh is A♭ sₗ

songs.title: VAN MITHENG TE JOUSEN KIPA LA SAUVIN

lines: 1. Van mithengte jousen kipa la sauvin,
Tunin mi mangsa khat ahunge ;
Veuvin ! lung kipah tah in Pathen achei,
Acha A-anga kipom dingin.
Kipa thanom loupi ni nopni,
“Loupi ni” atiuve Vantil ten ;
Van Mithengte jouse akikhom-uvin,
La asauve lung kipah tah in.
2. Van’a nop la sauvin Van Mitheng jousen,
Tunia chonse khat sochat jal’in ;
Aman ahin dalhan chonset lampi chu,
Ahung tai Apa Pathen henga.
3. Leiya nop la sauvin Mithengte jousen,
Mijouse hom’un hinna Thupha ;
I mitlhiu jong long hen ikipa man’un,
Tunia chonse khat sochat jal’in.
Reference: Doh is B♭, sₗ

songs.title: LUNGSET NA NAMU HITAM, BAN TOL IN

lines: 1. Lungset na namu hitam, ban tol in,
Nang chang ding jeng ahipoi, ban tol in,
Va le sah in kumlhung in,
Midang mitlhi theh sah-in,
Nabol van'a kiphon man, ban tol in.
2. Ngailut na thu najatan, ban tol in,
Vacha te lasah bang in, ban tol in,
Ala hi khantou sah in,
Mi lengvai kipa sah in,
Mi tusa na at ahi, ban tol in.
3. Jesu mi lungset na hi, ban tol in,
Chomkhat bou um ding ihiu, ban tol in,
Tunpi pahcha hoi lai in,
Vacha te lasah lai in,
Khokhal lai le noplai hin, ban tol in.
4. Nang chang ding jeng gel hih in, ban tol in,
Na sopin angai chu hin, ban tol in,
Nangma chang hin moh ahi,
Christa ding in hingle chun,
Ama toh nachen khom ding, ban tol in.
Reference: Doh is F, d

songs.title: TWIKHANGLEN PANG A INVAH KISONG BANG IN

lines: 1. Twikhanglen panga in vah kisong bangin,
Vah-in muthim lah-a chonsete mu din ;
Na lungkot hongin kithopi hung nante.
Vahsah-in Pathen thu chu, (3 vei)
Na thaomei avah laiyin kitheh ngim in ;
Vahsah-in Pathen thu chu.
2. Kong sesa bangin mi tamtah aum tai,
Mun tina mihem set thim noiya aum ;
Hil leuvin setto na muntina umho.
3. Navah emhoi chu lo khukhum lou jenin,
Navah chu mite mu theidin koi sangin ;
Salvah-in jan muthim, phattheina chang ding.
4. Na hinkho beikah-in Christa din tongin,
Christan nangma “Hungin” tia nakou tengle ;
Hiche leiset mun hi jotkit pon nate.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ

songs.title: JESUN EISOL-UI VAH HOM LE DINGIN

lines: 1. Jesun eisol’ui vah hom le dingin,
Jan muthim’a meivah cha bangin vah-in ;
Hi leiset muthim hi salvah din,
Nangma muna nangman, kei muna ken.
2. Jesun eisol’ui adinga vah din,
Ivah-u amol tengle Aman ahei ;
Van’a konin eihinve jingui,
Nangma muna nangman, kei muna ken.
3. Jesun eisol’ui midang salvah din,
Muthimin akhui vannoi leiset mite ;
Achonset hesoh nau sumang din,
Nangma muna nangman, kei muna ken.
Reference: Doh is G, d

songs.title: PAKAI VAHCHOI NAN KEN LAN SANG E

lines: 1. Pakai vahchoi nan ken la sange,
Ka kam le kalung thong ting ;
Eingailut kidang chu vahchoi nan,
Sange avahchoila.
Ka chonset jouse apomang tai,
Amin theng loupi vahchoi la sange ;
Ka chonset jouse apomang tai,
Halleluijah Amin nin.
2. Ka hunge ka chonset poh pumin,
Aman olna kim eipei ;
Eilhatdoh jeh chun avahchoi la,
Tang louvin ken sange.
3. Aheng kalhun teng kei bit keiya,
Aman eihon bit keiya ;
Ken hasah cheh ding avahchoi la,
Tonsot geiya sa ding.
Reference: Doh is B♭. mₗ
1. Ikimu to kit din einem’e,
Leiset hinkho abei teng ;
Thusim lui seiding chun einem’e,
Van gam nom vah jinga chun.
Gamnom vah a chun, (2 vei)
I-Pau chenna gam innom tah a chun ;
Kimuto nau hite, kimuto nau hite,
Galjona lallukhuh isan diu.
2. Loupia kimuto din ei nem’e,
Hinna thingphung hoi lim’a ;
Eilhatpau vahchoidin einem’e,
Alungsetna eilhat chu.
3. Loupia kimuto din ei nem’e,
Chunga laltouna kim’a ;
Lhatsa janel avahchoi lasa,
Mitheng lah a lhah ding chu.
4. Loupia kimuto din einem’e,
Leiset kin kachai tengle ;
Kipah tah-a ikikhut tuh diu,
Tonsot gamnom ema chun.
Reference: Doh is A. sₗ
1 Ka sopiten neilha tauvin,
Van gam jonin che tange ;
Vannoi leiset’a um laiya,
Ka nga jing van in nom chu.
Ka van in nom ka van in nom,
Tonsot’a hinna nop kem kit louna ;
Neisol tauvin lunglhai sel’in
Nei lha tauvin sopiten.
2. Van gam kal masa Jesu chun,
Ka umna ding mun asem'e ;
Tun eikouve chua cheng din,
Kipah tah-in che tange.
3. Chonset dim vannoija hin,
Gim hesoh kachai tai tun ;
Ka Pathen in sem’a cheng ting,
Nop kem louva cheng tange.
4. Lunghel lou jenun sopite,
Leiya kimu hih jongleu ;
Ni khat van in nom’a thon moa,
Ikimu to kit tei diu.
Reference: Doh is E♭ m

songs.title: O HE TUNI LEISET BEI NI

lines: 1. O he ! tuni leiset beini,
Abange ikikhen hi ;
Pathenin phattheina chamkim,
Pen lang damsel’in chetan.
Ikikhen ahitai tunin,
Nache na damsel chan chen ;
Pathenin kivoppi jing tan,
Lei chibai chaina sangin.
2. Tunin nangma heng lam jonin,
Ahunge na kelngoi nou ;
Pathenin kichin jingin lang,
Avan gam’a puilut’ in.
3. Pathen thahatnan damsel chan,
Che tan lungset ngai chullou ;
Pakai Jesu Christan lhonpin,
Van gam nom laija leng ding.
4. Pakai chenna van gam noma,
Kimu to ding kinemin ;
I-kimuto kahsen Pathen,
Jeng a lung ngai'uhite.
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ

songs.title: JESU MIN KIVOP JING IN LANG

lines: 1. Jesu min kivop jingin lang,
I-ngai Pakai Jesu min ;
Nache nahung le na chan’a,
Sumil hih-in Amin ngei.
Amin ngei lutah chu,
Kivop jingin nalungin ;
Amin ngei lutah chu,
Kivop jingin niseh in.
2. Jesu min kivop jingin lang,
Ama chu lumin sungin ;
Na changa navale na ah,
Ama minin tao jingin.
3. Jesu min kivop jingin lang,
Hoichana che jongle chun ;
Asei thu kigel jing le chun,
Nalung mong jing jeng tading.
4. Jesu min kivop jingin lang,
Hoichana um jong le chun ;
Athutep thenga kinem in,
Lhaso hih-in Amin theng.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ
1. Kilungset khaoguiyin,
Christian eikan khom cheh ;
I-kigol ngainau lungput chu,
Chung gam chondan ahi.
2. Pa laltouna angah,
I-taonau lhung sap cheh ;
Lungtup le kinepna thakhat,
Ilung monnau jong khat.
3. Gim genthei thoh khom’a,
Pohgih kingai jang toa ;
Khat in khat kihu to cheh hi,
Christian kilungsetna.
4. I-kikhen nung tengle,
Iti lunghel umtam ;
Hijong le ilung kikhen lou,
Kimu kit kinem a.
Reference: Doh is F. m

songs.title: LUNGLHA HIH UN ITOH JONG LE CHUN

lines: 1. Lunglha hih-in itoh jong le chun,
Pathenin ching jing in ;
Alungset lhaving noiya um in,
Pathenin ching jingin.
Pathenin naching phan,
Nache na chan a niseh-in ;
Aman naching jingin,
Pathenin ching jingin.
2. Nava le lungdonna jouse ah,
Pathenin ching jingin ;
Nache le na kichatna a jong,
Pathenin ching jingin.
3. Na ngaichat jouse nape jinge,
Pathenin ching jingin,
Nathum chan itlou vin aphal jing,
Pathenin ching jingin.
4. Na lhemlha ding itobang jongle,
Pathenin ching jingin ;
Thachol kingaiyin Pakai om’ah,
Pathenin ching jingin.
Reference: Doh is D♭ m

songs.title: PATHEN IN NANG NA UMPI JING IN

lines: 1. Pathenin nang na umpi jingin,
Chonna ding chan nahil jingin ;
Ahon lah-a naching jingin,
Pathenin umpin kimu kahsen.
Ikimu kit kahsen,
Jesu keng khopi muh a ;
Ikimu kit kahsen,
Pathenin umpin kimu kahsen.
2. Pathenin nang na umpi jingin,
Alhavingin nahui jingin ;
Niseh Van an in navah-in,
Pathenin umpin kimu kahsen.
3. Pathenin nang na umpi jingin,
Na lungdon na jousea na hun ;
Abante nin napom jingin,
Pathenin umpin kimu kahsen.
4. Pathenin nang na umpi jingin,
Na chunga akhut pei jing hen ;
Thi na lungdon sumang soh hen,
Pathenin umpin kimu kahsen.
Reference: Doh is D♭ m
1. Nilhah kon ahitai,
Gamtin mu athim tai ;
Chu tobang chun eihin naitai,
Thina ding mu thimin.
2. Kapon kakoi soh-a,
Keova kalup banga ;
Thi chun pon beiya eikoi ding,
Leiset nop pai lhaute.
3. Pakai kei nei ngah phan,
Tujan khovah kah sen ;
Na vantil nei ngasah jingin,
Nisa so kit kahsen.
4. Jing khovah niso teng,
Nisa che dungjuiya ;
Chonphat lam kajot theina diu,
Tha neipen neivah-in.
5. Ka hinkho alhin a,
Lei hi ka dalhah teng ;
Na anga neina kipomin,
Ol kemlou neina pen.
Reference: Doh is F. m

songs.title: NEI UMPIN TUNILHAH KHOTHIM KON HIN

lines: 1. Nei umpin tu nilhah khothim kon hin,
Mu athim tai Pathenin nei umpin ;
Panpi beiya kalung olthei lou teng,
Panpi ngaite panpin kei nei umpin.
2. Akem baiye kahinkho chomcha hi,
Leiset loupi le nop kem mangsoh ding ;
Thil jouse akem mang thei cheh ahi,
Kikhel lou Pathenin kei nei umpin.
3. Nangma chu ken nitin in kangaiye.
Eilhem ahatna a jong nei umpin ;
Nang banga lam eihil thei dang umlou,
Ka nopna ka gimna a nei umpin.
4. Nangman nei umpi le kei olmo lou,
Gim thoh lelna lhisa na ging talou ;
Thina le lhankhuh iti hat jongle,
Nei umpi le ka kichat umlou ding.
5. Kathi jongle ka koma nei umpin,
Mu thim lah-a lam neihil jing jengin ;
Jing khovah teng vangam kalhun na din,
Kahin, kathin, kakoma nei umpin.
Reference: Doh is E. m
1. Jingkah nilhah sunin theu hite michi pha,
Kehdoh ding aphatcha itoh gimnau chu ;
Chang at phat ngah ing ting chang kikhop jou tengle,
Changpal pha ipohlut diu thanom tah-a.
Pathen Hou in’a Pathen hou in’a (2)
Changpal pha ipohlut diu thanom tah-a
2. Theute nisa noiya theute vannim noiya,
Phalbi dap le go juh ding jong ging louvin ;
Chang akikhop soh-a ka natoh kachai teng,
Changpal pha ipohlut diu thanom tah-a
3. I-mitlhiu long jong le tuu hite, Pakai din,
Gim le gentthei thoh-in lou neipu dingin ;
Inatoh ijouva Aman eikou teng le,
Changpal pha ipohlut diu thanom tah-a.
Reference: Doh is C.s
1. Ki habol uhite; (3)
Habol habol,
Pakai kom iphah mauvin.
2. Tahsan jingu hite; (3)
Tahsan tahsan,
Pakai kom ipah mauvin
3. Kana um talou ding;(3)
Um lou, um lou,
Chukom van chung gam noma.
4. Thina um talou ding;(3)
Thina thina,
Chukom van chung gam noma.
5. Lungdon um talou ding; (3)
Lungdon lungdon,
Chungkom van chung gam noma.
6. Chonset um talou ding; (3)
Chonset chonset,
Chukom van chung gam noma.
Reference: Doh is D. m

songs.title: KHOVAH DING AHITAI PAKAI MUCHI TUDIN THOUVIN

lines: 1. Khovah ding ahitai Pakai muchi tu din thouvin,
Nilhum geiyin Pakai din na tongin lang ;
Mihem mangthai saho abanin kaithou peh jengin,
Thohhat tah-in Pakai dingin na tongin.
Muchi lu chu theuvin, (2 vei)
Ningtin a le gamtin’a the chansoh keiyun ;
Hinna changlhah hom’in kipana
Thupha lhangsamun,
Pakai dingin tongin tohman atam’e.
2. Jingpi tah-in thouvin Pakai dingin natong panin,
Kho thim geiyin muchi pha hi tu jingin ;
Gingcha lel louhel’in muchi pha hi tujingin lang,
Ima jouse dalhan Pakai tahsanin.
3. Muchi pha hi gunchu le tahsan neitah-in tun lang,
Na muchi tu chu na-at kit din gingchan ;
Lung le tha choltih nei louhel’in muchi pha chu tun,
Pathen henga phatthei channa ding thumin.
Reference: Doh is B♭. mₗ

songs.title: HINLAI NATOH KACHAI A TWISOH KA GALKAI TENG LE

lines: 1. Hinlai natoh kachaiya twiso ka galkai tengle,
Jing niso loupi vahhoi chu kamu teng ;
Agal langkhat kalhun teng Eilhatpa chu ken he ding,
Nui heova eina lamto masa pen ding.
Ken hejeng ding, ken hejeng ding,
Alhatsa akoma kadin teng ;
Ken hejeng ding, ken hejeng ding,
Akhut thingkil maha chu heding.
2. Huhhingsa ken kipah-a Pakai mai kamu tengle,
Lungset’a Amit ha hoi chu kamu ding ;
Ei hepi lungset ngailut iti ka vahchoi tadem?
Van chunga innom gotsa eikoipeh chu.
3. Che masa ka ngai ho chun hungin tin eijap jingui,
Kaki khennau luipanga kikhom kit ding ;
Eden phaihoi tah-a la ngeiyin eilamtou vinte,
Kei vang Pakai mu masah pen ka nome.
4. Akhopi kot hoiya chu pon bangleh eisil peh-a,
Lhiso kit louna a chu eipui lut ding ;
Tonsot kipana la chu avahchoi na kasah ding,
Keivang ka Pakai mu masah pen kanom.
Reference: Doh is A. d

songs.title: VAN A CHENG DING KALUNG KINEM

lines: 1. Van’a chen ding kalung kinem,
Adang ima vanga hilou ;
Jesu thisan le chonphat vang,
Jesu thisan jeng bou hinna.
Christa songpi tah-a ka ding,
Mun dang vang chu nel chim ahi. (2 vei)
2. Mu thimin amai asel teng,
Kalung Ama jenga ki-ngai ;
Lungdon lengvaina jenga jong,
Aman lung olmo lou eipei.
3. Athutep le athisanin,
Eivah jinge twisoh laiya ;
Lei le van mang jengta jong le,
Ama jenga kalung kai ding,
4. Ama ahung kum kit nileh,
Ka kivon kima Athupha ;
Ka chonphat eihung tohnan tem,
Alaltouna anga ding din.
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ
1. Isei jingu olna gam nom,
Avah a vah jing jeng ahi ;
Aloupi kisei jinga ahi,
Chua chen anomna dinge.
Chu gam a chu gam a,
Chen iti anop ta ding ngem ;
Chu gam a chu gam a,
Chen iti anop ta ding ngem.
2. Loupina chang ho von hoi chu,
Ngailutna le lungmon ahi ;
Chung gam la ngei kisahna chu,
Chua chen anomna dinge.
3. Chonset beina gam iseiyu,
Lhepna lungdon genthei umlou ;
Thu noh baotam beihel sohta,
Chua chen anomna dinge.
4. Nopna gimna a Pakaiyin,
Kalha van’a cheng din chingin ;
Chu gam a chen anopje chu,
Keihon jong heloi tauvinge.
Reference: Doh is C. s

songs.title: VAN A GAMNOM EM A CHUN

lines: 1. Van a gamnom em a chun, I-nikhou lhin tengle ;
In na kikhom tau hite, I nikhou lhin tengle ;
Meivom kaina chung peh-a, Kichat beina van gam a,
Lungtup molso cheh hite, I nikhou lhin tengle.
2. Pakai mai imu dingu, I nikhou lhin tengle ;
Eihuhhingnau vahchoiya, I um diu gam noma ;
Chullou pahhoi ke na le, Ka le lhiso umlouna ;
Kipa thanop jeng um ding, Van gam ilhun tengle.
3. Vana gamnom emlaiya, I hinkhou lhin tengle ;
I golngai cheng imudiu, I nikhou lhin tengle ;
Van hintwi pang nom a chun, Kin ichaisoh tengu leh ;
Kikhen kit um talou ding, Van gam ilhun tengle.
Reference: Doh is B♭. sₗ

songs.title: VAN A TONSOT NOPNA AUM E

lines: 1. Vana tonsot nopna aume,
Ipau Pathen chu gam ngah ahi ;
A emsel in avah jing jenge,
A itih a chua mu thim lou.
Chu gamnom lhung dinga,
Kei kache ding chua cheng dinga ;
Chu gamnom lhung dinga,
Kei kache ding chua cheng dinga.
2. Chu gama nisa sat um talou,
Thi le man nat genthei gim beita ;
Kel le chah imajouse beita,
Kem thei louva tonsot’a nopna.
3. Chu gam a chu Vantil thengte cheng,
Van mi thengte jouse jong chu cheng,
Van lallukhuh akikhuh cheh-ui,
Tonsot a nomsa jing ahiuve.
Reference: Doh is G. d

songs.title: CHOLNGAH NA MUN NOM TAH AUM

lines: 1. Cholngahna mun nomtah aum,
Luigal gam nom a chun ;
Jan muthim beina kalchung peh-a khun,
Tohgim lhiso na bei.
Nei lamton, neina lamton,
Chu ni jinga niso vahhoi em’a chun ;
Nei lamton, neina lamton,
Luigal a gam nom hoitah vah jinga chun.
2. Khopi hoitah vah jing jeng chu,
Anopje seithei lou ;
Chua lut jousen Leng chu amu ding,
Akom’a cheng jing ding.
3. Lallukhuh chu koisa ahi,
Christan eipeh diu chu ;
Thoh hatna ahung ding ngah jingte chu,
Chang ding aloupina.
4. Chu gam khopi kot hoitah-a,
I lut thei na diuvin ;
Tonsot chullou khopi noma leng din,
Thigeiyin tahsan in.
Reference: Doh is E♭. d

songs.title: PATHEN THIL KIDANG BOL PACHATNA CHANG HEN

lines: 1. Pathen thil kidang bol pachatna chang hen,
Achapa changkhat chu eihinpe tauve ;
Chonse lhatna din ahinna ape tai,
Mitin lut theina dia hinna kot hongta,
Vahchoiyun, vahchoiyun,
Pathen thusei ngaiyun,
Vahchoiyun, vahchoiyun,
Kipah thanom tah-in ;
Jesu Christa jal’in
Pa henga hungun,
Loupi pachat jouse
Pakaiya hihen.
2. Lhatdam chamkimna hi thisan vang ahi,
Atahsan jouse dia Pathen thutep chu ;
Chonse pen hijong le atahsan poule,
Jesu Christa ngaidamna chu chang tei ding.
3. Thil loupi kidang eiho eihil tauve,
Jesu Christa vanga kipah ihiuve ;
Tu sanga theng jo, loupi, chule sang joa,
Huhhing kidang Jesu mel imu dingu.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ

songs.title: JORDAN LUIPI GAL IKAI KHOM TENG LE

lines: 1. Jordan luipi gal ikaikhom teng leh,
Lhatsate loupia imu dingu ;
Luipi kam’a nel sim senlou bang ding,
Hichu vetnom kidang tah hiding.
Lui kama nel simsen lou jat hi ding,
Lui kama nel simsen lou bang ding ;
Vet nom kidang hi ding,
Lhatsate imu diu chu ;
Luipi kama nel simsen lou jat hi ding.
2. Lei semtil’a pat’a lhatsate chu,
Lhepna lungdonna neita louvin ;
Van gam nom’a ikimuto khom diu,
Hichu vetnom kidang tah hi ding.
3. Chu luipi hoi kam’a idin tengu,
Hin thinglim damnoiya ium diu ;
Canaan gamnom lam chu galdot jinga,
Hichu vetnom kidang tah hi ding.
4. Eihuhhingpau le Aloupina chu,
Kichen tah-a imu tengu le ;
Lengin gam jousea vai ahom ding chu,
Hichu vetnom kidang tah hi ding.
Reference: Doh is A♭. mₗ

songs.title: CHUNG GAM LOUPI NOP DING NGAITON

lines: 1. Chung gam loupi nop ding ngaiton,
Luipi pang chu vah jing jeng ahi ;
Mitheng ho ahoinau chul theilou,
Akijepnau pon bang jeng ahi.
Chung gam a .... chung gam a,
In nom chungnung chu gah ngaiton ;
Chung gam a, chung gam a, chung gam a,
In nom chungnung chu gah ngaiton.
2. Chung gam a golle pai ngaiten,
Eiho sanga ache masa ho ;
Van’a ala sah dingu ngaiton,
A-in’u Pathen inpi sunga.
3. Eihuhhingpau chu gama cheng,
Inko le golle pai lhung jouta ;
Hi leiset lunghel lungdonna kon,
Kei jong chu gam jon’in leng tange.
4. Kei jong chu gam lhung loita ding,
Ka kholjin chaina ding anai tai ;
Chu gam a che masa ka ngaiten,
Ngah jingin kei eigaldot jingui.
Reference: Doh is A. sₗ
1. Christa chenna van innom'a,
Cholngah na nom aum'e,
Ana che masa tai Jesu,
Kalung ngai bulhit sohdin.
Jordan luipi gal gamnom'a
Eden hon nom emlai-ja,
Hinthing pahhoi chullou na,
Cholngah na nom um,
Cholding'a olna nom um,
Genthei dinga nopna um,
Cholngah na aum.
2. Ka chenna ding mun asem'e
Chulmo a tonsot umding,
Chom talou ding kachen kumkho,
Chuche nopna gamtheng a.
3. Thi le nat thohlel lutlou,
Lungdon lengvai gim beita,
Van khopi kulsing lailung a,
Lallukhuh hoi ka khuh ding.
4. Chu gam'a thina umta lou,
Chonset na beihel sohta,
Lhatsa ten kipa la sauvin,
Nopna jeng chu vahchoi un.
5. Loupina chang ding ten sauvin,
Na che pum un la sauvin,
Zion kotpi hong len un tin,
Nalut jel jeng diu ahi.
Reference: Doh is C. m
1. Sun ni kemlou gam a chun,
Khopi hoitah aum ;
Imatih a mang theilou,
Chua jan jong umlou.
I-mit lhiu theh hul soh ding,
Thi le man kichat beita ;
Phat jong kum’a kisim lou,
Chua jan jong umlou.
2. Akot jouse song man tam,
Khopi ningli hoi chu ;
A lam len jong sana em,
Chua jan jong umlou,
3. Akot kikha tih umlou,
Khopi ningli hoi chu ;
Hinna twival alonge,
Chua jan jong umlou.
4. Nisa vah jong ngaita lou,
Khopi hoitah a chun ;
Jesu vah jing jeng ahi,
Chua jan jong umlou.
Reference: Doh is E♭. d
1. Lung don ni um’in tin,
Lungkham ni tamin te ;
Lamto tange eisang ho khu,
Van mite lenna gama
Pathen le van mi chenna,
Latah chung gam nom’a ;
Van mun nom laiya leng tange,
Van mite lenna gam’a.
2. Pakai katha ahi,
Eipui le ahsi toh ;
Bit keiya kei eipui lhug ding,
Van mite lenna gama.
3. La tah chungnung gam’ah,
A ume keima in ;
Kasan ding lallukhuh koisa,
Van mite lenna gama.
4. Leiset gim pai lhang ting,
Hesoh lungdon lengvai ;
Kaltou tange van gam jonin,
Van mite lenna gama.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ
1. Nisat jingna gam aume,
A gam sung vah jing jeng ;
Itih chan’a ni lhum ngailou,
Avah a chu Jesu.
Nun nem’a Cross iput le,
Lallukhuh isan ding ;
Mitheng lah-a ichen teng
Tonsot’a ivah jing ding.
2. Cham lenna gam nom aume,
Thina twipi gal’a ;
Khopi hui nun louna a chun,
Igou jouseu um hen.
3. In nom loupi tah atam’e,
Van in nom hoi tah chu ;
Leiya i-ngailut te ho chun,
Eihung lamto dingu.
4. Leiset dalhah kal kangah lel,
Lei kem mang loi thei hi ;
Chunga mitheng ho lah a chun,
Kalhah kal kangah lel
Reference: Doh is B♭. mₗ
1. I natoh ichaisoh teng,
Nisa hung lhum loi tading ;
Chu teng lung lengvai lung mong tading,
Van le lei Pakai vang chun ;
Eihin ban kaithou dingu,
Zion mol’a ikimu to diu
Chu a ikimu diu, chua ikimu to diu,
Eilhatpau mel iput diu ;
Chu gam nom hoitah a chun
Ikimu to cheh diu, chua ikimu to diu,
Aloupina ichan ding.
2. Dam kokhuh thuh thim noiya,
Khopi huinun gin kichan ;
Muthim in eium kimvel jingui,
Hinla Jesun eipui nai ;
Sun nivah hoi nom’a din,
Leiset huipi nun kit lou na a.
3. I-lungu kicha hen lang,
Imitlhiu long jeng jongle ;
Leiset lung ngaiyin dim jong leu hen,
I Pakai hung kittei ding ;
In lama eipui tou ding,
Chuteng genthei kihe talou ding.
Reference: Doh is E♭. d.
1. Lunggel gilna theng tah,
Ka lung’ah alange ;
Kanai cheh tai in lam tunin,
Tu masanga sang chun.
In kanaiye, in kanaiye,
Kanai cheh tai in lam tunin ;
Tu masanga sang chun.
2. Kanai tai Pa in,
Umna mun nom tamna ;
Laltouna bang chu kanai tai,
Tonsot hinna van gam.
3. Pohgih genthei beina,
Hinna gam kanai tai ;
Cross dalha lallukhuh sang ding,
Kon ka hitai keima.
4. Kalam jot nei lhonpin,
Nei phongin kalhuh teng ;
Tunia kon kalhunna ding in,
Naiyin ka kingaitoi.
Reference: Doh is B♭. sₗ

songs.title: LUNGSET LE KHOTO TAH A HUHHING PAN EIPUI DIU HAM

lines: 1. Lungset le khoto tah a, Huhhingpan eipui diu ham ?
Mol le lhangdam phaihoi gam, Jordan gal’a,
Heng cholnga ding ihiuve ;
Luipang em chu ilhun teng,
Chamna luipi ito teng, Jordan gal’a.
Jordan gal’a, Jordan gal’a,
Heng cholnga ding ihiuve,
Luipang em chu ilhun teng ;
Jordan gal’a, Jordan gal’a,
Chamna luipi’n eito ding, Jordan gal’a.
2. Songthop gamthip lai jot’a, igamlo dingu lhunga,
Eipui lhung kei diu ahi, Jordan gal’a,
Henge jan le meikonga ;
Sun le meilhanga imau,
Eipui le dingu ahi, Jordan gal’a.
3. Athilbol thei thahat’a, eipui diu ham Huhhingpan ?
Gamhoi nomtah lam a chu, Jordan gal’a,
Henge thei namkim agai ;
Kanglou twinah put bangin,
Kel le chah um talou ding, Jordan gal’a.
4. Eitepnau gam geiya chu, eipui diu ham Huhhingpan,
Canaan gam hoi lhun kahsea, Jordan gal’a,
Pakai Nang koma cheng din ;
Nei puiyin neiching leuvin,
Kikhenna kichai kahsen, Jordan gal’a.
Reference: Doh is E♭. m

songs.title: EGYPT A SOHCHANG KA JAM UI

lines: 1. Egypt’a sohchang ka jamui,
Ka Pakaiyu thun ka nungung ;
Lhagao le Athun eipuiyun,
Canaan gam nom jon kahiuve.
Gamtheng jon kholjin kahiuve,
Canaan gam nom jon kahiuve ;
Pathen puile jing kahiuve,
Lamkim geina lai kahiuve.
2. Gamthip go lai jot kahiuve,
Pakaiyin eipuidih jing diu ;
Ei umpiu het nan sun le mei,
Jan le meikongin eipuiyui.
3. Songpi kivo chun eihoiyun,
Ngaichat tah hin twi eipeuve ;
Van’a kon Manna eipeuve,
Lhagao gilkel eivah vauve.
4. Luipi gal ka kai tengu leh,
Akom’a um mithengte chun ;
Nomtah a eina lamto diu,
Pakai chenna Canaan gama.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ

songs.title: KOTKHAH LEN CHU HON IN AUM

lines: 1. Kotkhah len chu honin aum,
Kotkhah loupi hoitah chu ;
Kei dinga hon’a um ahi,
Lhandampu lungset jal’a
O lungsetna loupi tah chu,
Kot chu koi dinga na hon em ?
Kei ding ..... kei ding,
Kei dinga na hon nem !.
2. Lhatdamna a konin kot chu,
Mijouse din hon ahi ;
Ahao, avai, alen, aneo,
Nam jouse dinga ahi.
3. Na dougal’u hat jeng jongle,
Manouvin kot hon pet hin ;
Cross in lallukhuh chu lo’uvin,
Tonsot thutep molso na.
4. Leiset’a Cross pu jongleu hen,
Luigal’a itol koi ding ;
Hinna lallukhuh isan diu,
Van’a ngailutna pung ding.
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ

songs.title: CHUNG VAN MUN NOM A KHUN LHATSA TEN LASAN

lines: 1. Chung van mun noma khun lhatsa ten la san,
Alallukhuh Alengpau anga koiyun ;
Leiset lungdon lungjinna akhel tauve,
Mitheng lhatsa ten kipa la asauve.
Jesu vahchoiyun,
Malaiya Calvarya thi chu ;
Jesu vahchoiyun,
Tonsot geiya dia hing kit chu.
2. Ngailutna la kidang tah chu akim tai,
Atahsan din thao namtui tah abange ;
Chonset jal’a thi Pakai thokit vangin,
Vai ihom diu Pakai toh atonsot’a.
3. Kelngoinou thisan a kisil ngim lou chu,
Chu lathah chu koima chan sah thei lou ding ;
Setna kon Eilhatpauvin eisil ngim tai,
Tun kipa la loupi sa pantau hite.
Reference: Doh is C.

songs.title: LHEPNA A LUT HIH IN CHONSET NA AHI

lines: 1. Lhepna a lut hih-in chonsetna ahi,
Najo na chun midang jong aloi lut ding ;
Hang tah-in malam non muthim galkaiyin,
Sang jingin Christa chu Aman nahuh ding.
Nahu din Christa ngeh-in,
Pen nate lungmon tha hat ;
Aman nang nahuh nom’e,
Aman nang nahuh ding.
2. Nungsun in gol phalou kivoppi hih-in,
Pathen mintheng chu lutah-in panin lang ;
Lunggel hat’in gun chun mi hepi pon thon,
Sang jingin Christa chu Aman nahuh ding.
3. Adinga doujou chu lallukhuh apei,
Thisan’a ijo diu lhu lhoi jongleu hen ;
Eihuhhingpau Jesun thahat aneiye,
Sang jingin Christa chu Aman nahuh ding.
Reference: Doh is B♭. m

songs.title: LUIGAL GAMNOM A MAI KAMU HON

lines: 1. Luigal gam nom a mai kamu hon,
Jing banga hoi le ni bang vah-in,
Lhaset, lungkham, lungdon beisoh-in,
Eiveuvin eigaldot jing jengui.
Hilam veuvin eigaldot jingui,
Ngaiten eigaldot eingah jingui ;
Jing banga hoi le ni bang em’in,
Lungdei hon van’ah eingah jingui.
2. Van gam nom a cheng nu le pa ten,
Acha ngaiteu cheng tol galkai din ;
Kongtol miho kong lhun kal ngahlel,
Angah jingui kong kaimun a chun.
3. Sopi ngai cheng chua che jouta,
Ache ding midang ho chu ngah-in ;
Van mite banga pon bang silhon,
Noiya kon mi che ding angah-ui.
4. Van in nom lhungsa chapang ngaiten,
“Hungun” tin eijap jingui veuvin ;
Ni guiya em le dai bang chimin,
Anu, nangma na galdot jingui.
5. Huhhingpa Jesu jing Valpa chun,
Mihem mangsa chu aholdoh lei ;
Eikounau kipa um chu ngaiyun,
“Hungin chonse mangsa” ati chu.
Reference: Doh is G. m
1. Pakai ipi kabol ding ham?
Ka Lhagao hinna dia,
Keima leiset na ka um in,
Ka lung agimlheh tai.
(S&Alt) Tahbeh a nahin nom em?
(T&B) Na pen thah kit ding ahi.
(S&Alt) Na chonset na jouse chu,
(T&B) Pathen henga tao le chun,
(Alt) Na ngaidam ding ahi.
(S&Alt) Pakai Pathen Ama henga,
(A&T) Michonse nangma jong,
(S&Alt) Thum le chun na soptheng tante,
(All) Pathen tahsan in.
2. Kei tobang michonse ding hi,
Koi aum ta ding em?
Calvary thisan lonlha chun,
Ka chonset soptheng in.
3. Chonset lampi tamtah aum,
Keima hoi-a cheng em?
Pathen na Lhagao lampi chu,
Keima jong neihil in.
4. Van gam nom lhun thei na dingin,
Lampi khat bou aum,
Chonse nangma nahin nom em?
Na lungthim sutheng in.
Reference: Doh is B. m
1. Leiya igol ngai toh kipah-in,
Chomkhat ium khomin ;
Chule lunghel’a kikhenna chu,
Ahung lhung loiji tai.
Vana kikhen kit umlou ding,
Kikhen kitta lou ding ;
Kipa jingna gam nom’a chun,
Kikhen kitta lou ding.
2. Thina luigal kaisa ngaite toh,
Kimu to din einem ;
Leiya toh gim ichaisoh tengle,
I chenkhom jing diu chu.
3. Kikhenpi sa i-ngai cheng chutoh,
Thina luigal kai teng ;
Kikhen kit tih neita lou hel’a,
Nom tah a chenkhom ding.
4. Kikhen kit thu kisei talou ding,
Van in nom hoiya chun ;
Kipa nopna lungmon tonsot’a,
La kisa jing ta ding.
Reference: Doh is B.

songs.title: NEH LHIN NA GAM CHU KA LHUNG TAI

lines: 1. Neh lhinna gam chu kalhung tai,
Ahaona jouse chu keiya ;
Agam vah jing phattheina chu,
Kana jan muthim beisohta.
Gam nom hoitah, gam nom chungnung,
Na molsang chunga ka dinge ;
Twikhanglen gal lam ka dot le,
Ka dinga in nom gotsa chu ;
Aloupi vah jing chu kamui,
Ka van tonsot in nom hoi chu.
2. Huhhing Jesun eilhonpi lei,
Loinom laiya lha ka hitai ;
Aman damheo chan eikai lei,
Van gam kai kimvel sunga hin.
3. Huilhi namtui nung chu hinna,
Athingna jouse chu damna ;
Pahhoi namtui pah chul ngailou,
Tonsot hintwi long kang ngailou.
4. Ponbang vamleh cheh a kivon,
Lhatdam janel chung van gam mi ;
Huhhingpa la ngei long del’in,
Vantil sangja toh asauve.
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ

songs.title: KA THOHGIM LEISET THUNOH KACHAI TENG

lines: 1. Ka thohgim leiset thunoh kachai teng,
Bit keiya kei vangam nom lhungta ding ;
Ka ngaitah ka-Pakai koma cheng ding,
Tonsot khang geiya loupina hi ding.
Hichu ka loupina hi ding,
Loupina ding, loupina ding ;
Alungset vanga Amai kamu teng,
Hichu ka dinga loupina hi ding.
2. Eiholna kemlou lungset kamu teng,
Van mun nom loupi kachan ding keima ;
Amai vejinga mu jing ding keima,
Tonsot khang geiya loupina hiding.
3. Che masa golngai cheng kamusoh ding,
Kipa le thanopna twilong bang ding ;
Pakai yin nuiheova eilamto ding,
Tonsot mun geiya jong.
Reference: Doh is B♭. sₗ
1. Jesu nathu ka ngaito le,
Kalung lhaita ngeiye ;
Namel ngai um kamu phat teng,
Ka kipa chung chon ding.
2. Leiset O ngei jouse jong hi,
Ngainom ka umsah poi ;
Mihem huhhingpa na min bou,
O gin ngeipen ahi.
3. Kisih cheng kinepna nahi,
Genthei cheng nopna jong ;
Alhusa cheng la nakho ton,
Nang hinhol jouse jong.
4. Nang mu cheng hi akipa jeu,
Thun aseijou thei poi ;
Jesu Nang ngailutje vang hi,
Amu hon miljou lou.
5. Jesu ka kipana pen’u,
Lei le van chunga jong ;
Kason pen’u hijing jengin,
Tonsot mun geiyin jong.
Reference: Doh is B.

songs.title: NISA LHUMNA KAL CHUNG PEH A

lines: 1. Nisa lhumna kal chung peh-a,
Meivom kaina khel’a ;
Ahsi kaina chung peh-a khu,
A ume ka in nom.
Khut’a sahlou van in nom chu,
Gotsa um kei dinga ;
Pathen le mitheng chenna chu,
Hichu ka in ahi.
2. Thile nat thohgim beina a,
Hinkho kem kitta lou ;
Phat kikhel kitlouna a chun,
Ka in ding gotsa um.
3. Thi le lungjin lungdon beina,
Khojin muthim beina ;
Kamui kallung kipah-in ken,
Chung khovah in nom chu.
4. Chonset genthei lungdon hesoh,
Lhang ting lesol tange ;
Kaltou tange van tonsot in,
Jesu chenna a chun.
Reference: Doh is A♭. d.
1. Jerusalem keima in nom,
Lungin kagel tan moi ;
I-tih tah le gim ka dalhan,
A nom chu kamu dem ! (2 vei)
2. Akul nisa sanga vahjo,
Nom chungnung hoi chungnung ;
A kot jouse chutia chu em,
A lamlen sana em. (2 vei)
3. Ahon sung vah nom chungnung deh,
Hinthing in hoisah soh ;
Chuto bang khopi hoi nom chu,
Mihem mit’in mulou (2 vei)
4. Mithengte kikhen kitta lou,
Ol jong tan nei talou ;
Neipui lut’in chu gama chun,
Nei kaiyin na khut’in (2 vei)
5. Pakai chenna gam noma chun,
Olle kei jong chenge ;
Ama kamu teng tonsot’in,
Avahchoi la sange (2 vei)
Reference: Doh is E. sₗ
1. Van khopi vantil sangja lenna,
Chua lhatdam changte jong cheng ding ;
Lunghel lungdon kana beita ding,
Chu van khopi lhun kal kangah lel.
Vo Eden.....khopi thah,
Eden lui sanga nom ;
Chua tonsot nomna kemta lou,
Pakai sem khopi thah ka ngaiye.
2. Chung van khopi nom tol sunga chu,
Hi leiset idalhah tengu leh ;
Mitheng ache masa ngai cheng toh,
Chung Pathen koma ichenkhom diu.
3. Chua chun mitheng sangja aleng,
Van mithengte jouse jong chu cheng ;
Lhenchom chapang thengte jouse chun,
Laltouna kimvel’in asauve.
4. Van khopi sung chu sana emsoh,
Van gam vah chu Kelngoinou ahi ;
Vantil ho le lhatsa mitheng te,
Van kho nom a mukal ka ngahlel.
Reference: Doh is C. d

songs.title: LA TAH A KHOPI HUI NUNG GAL'A

lines: 1. La tah-a khopi hui nung gal’a,
Thimpi ajing ;
Tonsot kipana vah alange,
Sun sangin avah joi.
Chua lungdon nat, kikhen kit,
Um talou hel ding ;
Chu luigal a ngaicheng kimsoh ding,
Chu a ichenkhom diu.
2. La tah-a twipi nong gal lam’a,
Ngaite kaita ;
Ngaite sei sana khopi hoi chu,
Loupia ilhun cheh diu.
3. La tah-a phaicham gal lam’a khun,
Kinepna um ;
Eiho jong ama ho umna a,
Ikikhop kimsoh diu.
4. O numnom le kipa lenna a,
O ni loupi ;
Chua genthei mitlhi long jouse,
Jesun theh hulta ding.
Reference: Doh is D. m

songs.title: GAMNOM HOITAH AUM, GAMLA TAH A

lines: 1. Gam nom hoitah aum, gamla tah a,
Mithengte chenna chu, sun sanga vah.
Anop ahoi chungnung,
Huhhinga Jesu chenna ;
Pakai vahchoina la kemmoa kisa.
2. Sopi ngaite hungun, gam nom jon din,
Hung geisang lou jenun, tahsan lel bei.
Tonsotna nop jingna,
Chonset gim genthei beina ;
Pakai lungset tanglou nop kem talou.
3. Mi mai emsel sohta, chu gama chun,
Pathenin ching jinga, lungmon kimta.
Agam achan soh-a,
Gou chunga mitheng chen teng ;
Nisa sanga vahjo, gam mi hi ding.
4. Hungun sopi ngaite, gam nom jon din,
Pakai in nom sem’a cheng din cheute.
Chua thina beita,
Ka na lhiso na beita ;
Nat gim thohlel beita, nop kem talou
Reference: Doh is E. m

songs.title: CHOLNGAH NA GAMNOM KA NGAI CHU

lines: 1. Cholngah na gam nom ka ngai chu,
Itih ahung lhung dem ;
Itih ka galvon kakoiyin,
In nom’ah ka cheng dem.
Na tong jingu hite,
Jesu hung kit kahsen ;
Tongun Jesu hung teng,
Van in a kikhom ding.
2. Leiya hin nopna aumpoi,
Hinna damna olna ;
Lei hi kei din gamthip ahi,
Lei hi ka in hilou.
3. Keima Jesu hengah ka chen,
Cholnga tan eina ti ;
Ama oma kingai jing din,
Van in ah eikouve.
4. Ka beltai keiman Jesu chu,
Chonse kitta lou ding ;
Thi jong leng anung kajui ding,
Van in kalhun kahsea.
Reference: Doh is F.

songs.title: VAN MUN LOUPI NOM CHUNG A KHUN

lines: 1. Van mun loupi nom chunga khu,
I-ngaiteu chengse chu cheng ;
Amaho toh chengkhom ding chun,
Leiset thilse pailhauvin.
Vannoi leiset abei nungle,
Olle in nom hoiya chun ;
Mitheng te lenna gam nom chu,
Van in a ichen ding.
2. Tonsot in nom loupia chengte,
Insung khat cheng ahiuve ;
Chu in nom loupia chu cheng din,
Chitin namtin akouve.
3. Eihuhhingpau loupi thina,
Ngailutna thu seileuvin ;
Leiset nikho kemlai sung hin,
Tahsan um angailutna.
4. Khat chengin ichemang jingui,
Insung mi akem jingin ;
Insung mijouse akemin,
Anunung ilunghel’e,
5. Vannoi leiset abei nileh,
Tonsot van mun noma chun ;
I-inko ngaite chengseu toh,
Kimin icheng khomna dem ?
Reference: Doh is A flat mₗ

songs.title: JORDAN LUI KAM A KA DING E

lines: 1. Jordan luikama ka dinge,
Lhunkal ngahlel kahi ;
Ka galdot’e Canaan gamnom,
Ka tonsot gam ding chu.
Olle chu gam noma icholngah diu,
Luigal gam nom emhoi tah a chun ;
Kelngoi nou le Mose la ngei chu sauhite,
Jesu koma ichen jing diu.
2. Chu gam nom hoitah chunga chun,
A ume vah kemlou ;
Pathen le Chapan vai homin,
Jan muthim um talou.
3. I-tih le keijong ka lhungin,
Nun nom in kaleng dem ;
I-tih le Pa mel chu kamun,
Alim’a ka ol dem.
4. Ka dim’e lung kipan leijah,
Kei cheng sot talou ding ;
Jordan twipi soh jeng jong le,
Bit keiya kei kai ding.
Reference: Doh is G. d

songs.title: IN LAM JON IN KONG TOL UHITE

lines: 1. In lam jonin kong tol’u hite,
Pathen Thupha kinepna chu ;
Vannoi gam tina seiphong leute,
Van gam in noma chen theina din.
Lhiso nungle kikhom ding vangam noma,
Tohgim nungle tonsot’a cholnga ding ;
Lhatsa mithengte kipa lasah khu ngaiyun,
Van in nomtah a khun akikhomui.
2. In lam jonin kong tol’u hite,
Kicha louhel’in cheu hite ;
Lungmonna mun ilhun tengu leh,
Vangam loupi vah hoi imu diu.
3. Gam sung chu molle lhang emsel soh,
Pahcha hoi namtuiyin chansoh ;
Chua chu eingailua Eilhatpau,
Vahchoiya kipa la isah diu.
4. Chua damna huilhi nem nung jing,
Luipang noma khovah nom jing ;
I-ngai chengseu imusoh kei diu,
Thi le nat lungdon um talou ding.
Reference: Doh is B♭. sₗ

songs.title: PATHEN VAHCHOI UN, PATHEN VAHCHOI UN

lines: 1. Pathen vahchoiyun, Pathen vahchoiyun,
Eisempau Pathen vahchoiyun ;
Pathen chungnung chu vahchoiyun gingun,
Nasempau Pathen vahchoiyun.
2. Pathen jeng gingun, Pathen jeng gingun,
Loupi chungnung Pathen gingun ;
Ama thun nungun, Ama thun nung,
Nasempau Pathen thun nungun.
3. Christa lamtouvin, Christa lamtouvin,
Chungnung pen Pathen Chapa chu ;
Hosana samun Hosana samun,
Lamtouvin na-Lengpau Christa.
4. Amin theng lul chu choi-an’un gingun,
Ja cheh-un Christa min theng chu ;
Amin choisangun, Amin choisangun,
Eilhatpau Jesu vahchoiyun.
Reference: Doh is B♭. s

songs.title: GOSPEL DAH GIN ATHONG E, TWIKHANGLEN LE LEICHUNG A

lines: 1. Gospel dah gin athonge, twikhanglen le lei chunga,
Manbeiya huhhingna Thupha,
Nang le keima eihung pei ;
Pathenin vannoi mi, angailut behseh jeh-in,
Achapa changkhat eipeuve,
Atahsan chan hinna din.
Gospel dah aginge,
Twikhanglen le lei chunga ;
Gospel dah manbeiyin,
Nang le kei eihung peuve.
2. Gospel dah in eikouvui, golvahna ankong um din ;
Eikounau ngaidao lou jenun,
Lungsetna eikounau chu ;
“Hinna changlhah kahi, Lhagao gilkel’an neuvin,
Na chonset itobang jong le,
Aboncha chu bangsoh ding”
3. Gospel gin kipa umtah, athongin gam tin aloi ;
Ngaidam chamkimna thu apoi,
“Cross a Jesu thi vangin ;
Hapa kipana thu, kapoh peh-e mijouse”
Huhhingpa chu ahung peng tai,
Leng le Pakai Christa chu.
Reference: Doh is F. sₗ
1. Nang kei dia kumkhoa ka hinna,
Ka hinna sanga lujo ;
Ka lhagao kholjin laise hin,
Lhandampu kei nei lhonpin ;
Kahin nai, kahin nai, (2 vei)
2. Lei nop le minthanna dinga,
Ken toh le thum neilou ding ;
Kipah-in thoh in tong inge,
Nan kei neilhonpi jingin ;
3. Phaicham thim nei pui galkaiyin,
Twipi len eikai pin lang ;
Hinkemlou kotpi eilhut in,
Pakai nangto lutkhom din ;
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ
1. Thokit jing le i-lhagao le,
Itahsau kigom kit dang;
Hesoh genthei thohlel kana beita ding.
2. Leiya chomkhat kikhen teiding,
I-pheu chu cholnga tei ding;
Munthip thenga chu ngah jing ding imu ding.
3. Tahsa thachol in chomcha khat,
Jing khovah chu a-nga ding;
Khovah hoi tah hung vah lhah teng kipah ding.
4. Kipa na thokit jing chuleh,
Lhanin mithi leh doh ding;
Nu, pa, cha, ulenao kim-a kigom ding.
5. Lhagao te tahsa kigom kit,
Chu-a iman khen talou;
Christa mel pu-a thoudoh cheh ding kima.
Reference: Doh is B.
1. Jingkah daitwi alhah teng,
Lui chung thingna louna ;
Jan daitwiyin achap teng,
Ahingdoh soh kitji.
Vanoi jouse gasei leuvin,
Pakai chu athoudoh kit tai.
2. Easter jing ninou asoh,
Pahcha namkim apah ;
Apah hoiyin lei ajem,
Mihem lung alhaiye.
3. Jing ihmu pengpalep ho,
Nalhau jah doh-uvin ;
Hung lengdoh soh-uvin lang,
Pakai athou kit tai.
Reference: Doh is C.
1. Hiche setna leichunga hin,
Gim toh jong leng olmo lou ding ;
Ka ma a nopna aume,
Leiset da lhang ting kache ding.
Chuche gam nom tah van gama,
Huhhingpan kipan eingah-e ;
Ama koma cheng jing dingin,
Genthei lengvai thoh talou ding.
2. Huipi le go kitho jong le,
Gimna jouse chu thoh jong leng ;
Hicheng chu ken dalha tading,
Van chung gam nom ka lhun teng leh.
3. Ka kinepna kamu tenga,
Van gam nom tah kalhun tengle ;
Christa koma kei cheng jing ding,
Van chung gam nom ka Pa gama.
Reference: Doh is F. sₗ
1. Lung genthei chu aloupi ta !
A mitheng ten tun veuvin ;
Galjou hung kile kit ahi,
Namtin A-anga kun ding.
Khuh sah-un van min lallukhuh,
Huhhinga leng ho Leng chu
2. Van miten lallukhuh lul chu,
Khuh sah-un Huhhingpa chu ;
Hat laltouna atou sah-un,
Van kul sung kithong soh-in.
3. Michonse ten Huhhingpa chu,
Nui jatnan akhuh sah-un ;
Mitheng le van min kimvel’un,
Amin ngei avahchoiyui.
4. Vahchoina O gin khu ngaiyun,
Jo la kisah gin ngei khu ;
Jesu mun chungnung achang tai,
Iti hoi vetnom um tam.
Reference: Doh is F. m
1. Khat chengin luigal ikaiyun,
Khat chengin iche mangun ;
Khat chengin vonlui isangun,
Kemlou gamnom chunga chun ;
Chapang khangdong ache jingin,
Twisoh kinong chunga chun ;
Lhagao Thengsel nunnem tah chu,
Christian thia lam hil ahi,
Ei ngailu’va Lhagao Theng chun,
Apui lutji van mun’ah.
2. Khat chengin Jesu hengah,
Icheuvin eikou nauvah ;
Khat chengin alengpi lei jah,
Ana tongin ikonun ;
Pahcha hoi chu ila khomun,
Ngailutna natoh loupia ;
Eihuhhingpa ding pahcha vui,
Chung gama din khom’ute ;
Van Lhagao Theng nunnem tah chun,
Apo touji van in’ah.
3. Khat chengin ipohgih-u hi,
Sun nisan asang kemin ;
Kumsot kholjin eilam touvin,
Nilhum le ahung lhungun ;
Ichonsetnau angaidamin,
Van gam ilhun theina din ;
Lhagaovin eihung puiyuva,
Lam eihil ngah-u hite ;
Lhagao nunnem nunnom tah chun,
Van mun nom’a eilhut ding.
Reference: Doh is C. s

songs.title: KIDANG TAH IN KAHIN KHANKHO AKIKHEL TAI

lines: 1. Kidang tah-in kahin khankho akikhel tai,
Ka lunga Jesu chenna pat !
Hitih chana kahol Lhagao vah ka neitai,
Ka lunga Jesu chenna pat.
Ka lunga Jesu chenna pat,
Ka lunga Jesu chenna pat ;
Jona twilenin alonge kalung sunga,
Ka lunga Jesu chenna pat.
2. Thi le vaveina lama che hi ka bang tai,
Ka lunga Jesu chenna pat ;
Ka chonset jouse jong sop thengin aumtai,
Ka lunga Jesu chenna pat.
3. Nopna chang dinga eikihol’a ka hitai,
Ka lunga Jesu chenna pat ;
Meipi jing um talou ding kahin lai lampi,
Kalunga Jesu chenna pat.
4. Kei dingin vah aum thina phaichama chun,
Ka lunga Jesu chenna pat ;
Chua konin kamui Salem kulpi em chu,
Ka lunga Jesu chenna pat.
5. Kache ding ken kahei Salem kulpi jon’a,
Ka lunga Jesu chenna pat ;
Iti kipa umtam ken kajon pantai tun ;
Ka lunga Jesu chenna pat.
Reference: Doh is A. m

songs.title: KOTPI NANGHO KI HONG LEN UN

lines: 1. Kotpi nangho kihong lenun,
Tonsot kotpi nang ho ;
Kihong lenun loupina Leng,
Chu alut theina din.
(Koi ham loupina Lengpa chu ?)
Pakai hat chu ahi.
(Koi ham chuche Leng loupi chu ?)
Chuche Leng loupi chu koiham?
Thahat chungnung le gal’a hat?
Pakai chungnung ahi (2)
Halleluijah ! Halleluijah (2) Halleluijah,
Amen, Amen, Amen.
2. Kotpi ho kihong len’uvin,
Tonsot kotpi nangho ;
Kihong lenun loupina Leng,
Chu a lut theina din.
(Koi ham loupina Lengpa chu ?)
Pakai hat chu ahi.
(Koi ham chuche Leng loupi chu)
Chuche Leng loupi chu koi ham ?
Loupina Leng dang aumpoi
Ama jeng bou ahi, (2)
Halleluiyah, Halleluiyah (2) Halleluiyah.
Amen, Amen, Amen.
Reference: Doh is E♭. d

songs.title: KIKHEN TASA CHU PAKAI JESU JAL IN

lines: 1. Kikhen tasa chu Pakai Jesu jal’in,
Tun damsel’in ikimu kit tauve ;
Lungkhat le tha khat ‘in kikhom uhite,
Lung nguisa hal’in kipah uhite.
Jesun eina hoidam cheh jeh-vin,
Ama min vahchoiya kikhom hiu hite ;
Mihem mai chun kipana akim jou poi,
Lhagao Thengin eilhamon jingu hen.
2. Vana Pakai koma kikhom ding ging chen,
Tonsot goulu chu muding tup cheh-in ;
Pa le mihemte mitmun ngah uhite,
Pakaiyin cha dia eidei jal’uvin.
3. Hi leiset’a hin chomkhat pah jongleu hen,
Vanna aga imu ding gel’uvin ;
Anung juite chu hi-a genthei jong le,
Ama hungteng kipana hita ding.
Reference: Doh is E♭. s.

songs.title: PAKAI JIN NANGAIDAM THU NA PHON NAH EM

lines: 1. Pakaiyin na ngaidam thu naphon nah em ?
Seikit’in ngaiyu hite avel vel’in ;
Pakai thina Cross chu iti najot em ?
Seikit’in ngaiyu hite avel vel’in ;
Nang nache nah em Ama vah a chu ?
Ngaidam nachan tam na mona kon ;
Seikit’in ngaiyu hite avel vel’in.
Seikit’in ngaiyu hite thu,
Seikit’in seikit temin ;
Thusim ngei chu seikit temin,
Na dinga loupina hi ding,
Seikit’in ngaiyu hite avel vel’in.
2. Na galsat najona thusim ngeitah chu,
Seikit’in ngaiyu hite avel vel’in ;
Galsat kipan ho dingin phachom inte,
Chonset gal len sat ihiuve tu hin,
Christa toh gam kilo loita ding ;
Christa dinga lhagao huhhingna thu chu,
Seikit’in ngaiyu hite avel vel’in.
Reference: Doh is A♭. m.
1. Nangma a kahi O Eilhandampu,
Nalungset O nem kajai ;
Kalung sunga hin tahsanna khang hen,
Nang kahin nai theina din.
Neipui naiyin Pakai neipuiyin,
Nathina Cross phunga chun ;
Neipui naiyin naiyin, Pakai neipuiyin,
Na thisan lonna a chun.
2. Na natong dingin Pakai nei thenson,
Na lungset thahatna chu ;
Ka lhagao mang ding Nangah kingai hen,
Nangma a kalung mong hen.
3. Nangma ang sungah taovin ka kum’e,
Laltouna angin kabol ;
Ka Pathen Na anga ka dilsuh hi
Gol banga Nang bel kahi.
4. Thina twikhanglen gal’a lungsetna,
Aume kamu phah lou ;
Kipana chungnung aume chua,
Ka lhun teng keima san ding.
Reference: Doh is A♭. m
1. Gamla tah-a lhagao mang ding atame,
Asang aja thim noiya atouvui ;
Sochatna thu gamtinna hil ding koi ham ?
Jesu lam vea man gellouva che ding.
Thu neina se eikipe tai,
Thu neina se eikipe tai,
Cheuvin gamtina hillhang leuvin,
“Veuvin Keiman ka umpi jing nai” ati.
2. Ven leiset hi kot jouse akihong tai,
Christa sepai thouvun lung khat hiuvin ;
Christian thouvun manouvin Pakai dingin,
Setbul sutlhan Gospel thu hilleuvin.
3. Jaidam tah-in Pathenin eiho eikou,
Eiho dingin Christa athi leiya ;
Sochatna thu chitin namtin gahil’un,
Lhagao tamtah honga gapui lut’in.
4. O chung Pathen chitin namtin lah-a hin,
Hinphong loiyin Thupha agam tina ;
Noi leiset hin Hossana tin sam’u hen,
Pakai ahi Leng chungnung chu heu hen.
Reference: Doh is A. m

songs.title: NIHUM NUNGA CHU GAM NOM LHUNDING KAGEL'E

lines: 1. Nilhum nunga chu gamnom lhun ding kagelle,
Kalung sung kipana adime ;
Lungset jal’a Lhandampu kom kalhun tengle,
Ka lallukhuh ahsi chong nantem ?
Ka lallukhuh ahsi chong nantem, chong nantem ?
Nilhangkai nilhum jou teng chule ;
Kicholdo na inpi nom chu kalhun tengle,
Ka lallukhuh ahsi chong nantem ?
2. Pakai thahat panin tao toh thon tonging ting,
Lhagao mangsa holdohna dingin ;
Chu niloupi nile ahsi keima san ding,
Vahchoi o twilen kinong bang ding.
3. Pakai mel kamu teng iti kipa tang ngem !
Nop le kipana kemtalou ding ;
Chung sana khopia chen ding chun kei eineme,
Ka Lallukhuh ahsi chong tei ding.
Reference: Doh is A♭. m
1. Chu jingle in nom’a kimu nautem ?
Twikhanglen pang emnom tah a chun ;
Che masa ngai cheng eingah jing hotoh,
Kimu to iti anop tadem !
Kikhop ding, kikhop ding,
Twikhanglen pang emnom tah-a chun ;
Kikhop ding, kikhop ding,,
I ngai chengtoh kimu to cheh ding.
2. Chu nile in nom’a kimu nautem ?
Hiche leiset gentheina dalhan ;
Lhatsate la sah ijomna diuvem,
Kimu to iti anop tadem !
3. Chu jingle in nom’a kimu nautem ?
Eilhandampu nunnom mel mu din ;
Ngai cheng toh ikihe cheh nadiuvem,
Kimu to iti anop tadem!
Reference: Doh is B♭. m.

songs.title: VEUVIN PATHEN THILSEM HON THU ASEI JE

lines: 1. Veovin Pathen thilsem hon thu aseije,
Asempau hung ding ngah in kap in apeng-ui,
Lei kisemthah ding ngah lel'a kap'a peng ahi.
Athah sem soh kei diu ahi.
Vo! Mihem chate thim lah'a kon,
Hung thoudoh loi uvin,
Vo! thumlah a kon vah'a hung un,
Ven thilsem hon thu asei je.
2. Veovin Pathen thilsem hon thu aseije,
Pathen Chate hung kilah ding agal dot ui,
Pathen in hi leiset athah sem niteng chu leh,
Sopi, mun nanei ding hinam?
3. Veovin, thil bul chengse, kilong soh helding,
Van jong lekha jol banga lengmang soh helding,
Pathen in leiset athah sem nikho teng chule,
Na dinmun akicheh nadem?
Reference: Doh is C.
1. Vo Pathen Nang theng chungnung,
Lungset chamkim nahi ;
Lungset phatthei loupi chu,
Hiteni hi hinpen ;
Na loupina ching jing din,
Phatthei boh chang lhon hen ;
Thigeiya umkhom dingin,
Athutem lhon det hen.
2. Vannoiya nalen lai chun,
Canna khoa moupuina ;
Na kipapin golvah chu,
Theitwi bel gup nato ;
Tua hite ni kigop jong,
Kipapin vang hop’in ;
Akilungset lhon pung hen,
Namin jajing lhon hen.
3. Eden hon’a pi le pu,
Nangman na nagomin ;
Hibang chun hite ni jong,
Nangma jang gop ahi ;
Houbung mi le Nang anga,
Athutep lhon le khutjem (Khutjop) ;
Det hen hinlai dam sungin,
Van gam jotna hi hen.
4. Nitin Nangma gel jing ding,
Pakaiyin panpin lang ;
Lungdon genthei lungjinna,
Nangin umpi jingin ;
Hinlai nikho lha lhon hen,
Leiset nuse jongleu ;
Tonsot a umkhom dingin,
Na inpia pui’in.
Reference: Doh is D. sₗ
1. Nisa neipeh hi alhum kittai,
Nathun kho ajing tai Pakai ;
Lhailouva kajal nei ngaidamin,
Jing thoa thangvah jing na ngaiye.
2. Nangma lhenchom mit singlou umjing,
Lei langkhat lama kho vah jing ;
Tichun jingkom umlou lei pum hi,
Vannoiyin sa jing Namin ngei.
3. Molle lhang dam phai kikahse cheh,
Kolmong kikeo ninouvin jui ;
Bang louvin taona o nemin jui,
Lem la gin awn tan nei ngai lou.
4. Nilhah ihmut phat eihilpa hin,
Noimi lam sopite thouvin ;
Twipi nong banga ging o long chu,
Tang louvin van lam’a athong.
5. O Pakai Nangma lenna gam chu,
Leiset banga chulthei hilou ;
Khang touvin tin hungjao ding ahi,
Na gam loupi hung kilang hen.
6. Hiti chun namin loupi jing hen,
Setlei le thangvan kah-a hin ;
Vahchoinan leiset mihemte hin,
“Amen Halleluijah” tiu hen.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ

songs.title: MITHENG TE CHENA LAMLUI IJOT UI
