lines: 1. Mithengte chenna lamlui ijot’ui,
I lengpauvin lam akaiye ;
Van gam in nom jon’a che ihiuve,
Sun ahsin eisalvah jingui.
Van in jon’a che ihiuve,
Kipana Lallukhuh chang dingin ;
Lem louvin chu gam ilhun tengle,
Iti kipa tautem !
2. Mitheng sangja achei Zion jonin,
Akitol’ui lhatsa janel ;
Eiho jong in jon Leng thupeh a che,
I thaomei devah jingute.
3. Kinem tah le kilungsetto cheh-in,
Tahsanin lamlui hou hite ;
I lengpau imua ikihpoulim teng,
Iti kipa aum tadem.
Reference: Doh is A♭. m
1. Ngaiyin thugil loupi kidang hi,
Kei jong amangsa kahi ;
Avan loupina ahin dalhan,
Manlu tah-in eilhat tai.
Kon eilhat doh em thina kon,
(Pathen Chapa Cross a thi chu)
(I abol em ? Tahsan jingun)
Tun van chunga acheng tai.
2. Chung vantil’in eison theilou diu,
Ama chungnung pen ahi ;
Thing Cross chunga long tohpa bou chu,
Van’a Pathen Cha ahi.
3. Nang jong lut’in Huhhingpa ang’a,
Ama bou chibai boh-in ;
Ama lungsetna nang jong chang ding,
Aman nang jong huhhing ding.
Reference: Doh is D♭.m
1. Veuvin lungsetna kemlou hi,
Pan eipeh-u ahi ;
Setna lamvai mangsa eiho,
Pathen cha kivo ding.
Veuvin lungsetna kemlou,
Lungsetna kemlou Pan “Cha” tia
Eikounau ‘ o nem chu ;
Van vouva eikikhel teng,
Pathen cha eikikou ding.
2. Thisan jal’a ngaidam chang ten,
Lungsetna heu hite ;
Alungsetna O ja jing ding,
Pathen naiyu hite.
3. Loupina ichan diu ni chu,
Tun hung lhung loi tante ;
I-Pakai imu tengu leh,
Ama mel iput diu.
4. Phatthei ichanna dinguvin,
Tahsan theng hiu hite ;
Thoukit Pakai anga din teng,
Amai lhai imu diu.
Reference: Doh is D♭.d

songs.title: CHUGNUNG PAKAI NAMTIN CHUNG A VAIHOM

lines: 1. Chungnung Pakai namtin chunga vaihom,
Vahchoiyute, vahchoiyute ;
Chibai boh-un A-anga kun cheh-un,
I-lengpau chu vahchoiyun.
Lhatdam changsa nanghon,
Vahchoiyun Amin theng ;
Lem’un Kelngoinou, lemun hat chungnung,
Phongin thanom tah-in, samlen aloupina ;
I-lengpau chu vahchoiyun.
2. Chungnung Pakai leng jouse Leng chungnung,
Vahchoiyute, vahchoiyute ;
Athahat in gam jousea vai apoi,
I-lengpau chu vahchoiyun.
3. Chungnung Pakai mintheng chungnung ahi,
Vahchoiyute, vahchoiyute ;
Avahchoiyui Vantil le mihem ten,
I-lengpau chu vahchoiyun.
Reference: Doh is C. d.

songs.title: NASET POHGIH A KON THENG NAN NATEM

lines: 1. Naset pohgih a kon theng nan natem ?
Thisan bou ahi, na thenna ding ;
Setna jouse nangman jou nan natem,
Thisan thahat bou chu ahi.
Thisan bou chun na kidang atong,
Kelngoinou thisanin ;
Thisan bou chun na kidang atong,
Kelngoinou thisan lutah chun.
2. Buhbang sangin nang bangjou nan natem ?
Thisan bou ahi, na banna ding ;
Setnan mihem hinkho alen mangpi,
Thisan thahat bou chu ahi.
3. Na Lengpa Jesu natong nan natem ?
Thisan bou ahi, na tohna ding ;
Nitin Ama navahchoi ding hinam ?
Thisan thahat bou chu ahi.
Reference: Doh is B♭.sₗ

songs.title: KA LAM MUTHIM JING A KON IN

lines: 1. Ka lam muthim jinga kon hin,
Ka hunge Nang hengah ;
Nangma vahchoi din kahunge,
Navah emsel jonin.
Vo Jesu, Pathen Kelngoinou,
Ka chunga naphatna ;
Nangma milungsetna jal’in,
Ka kinem e keima.
2. Lung lengvaiyin kahin bel’e,
Na lungset thu gingchan ;
Nei lungsetna o nem kajai,
Na thisan lon kamui.
3. Chonse kalung thim sunga hin,
Lhagaovin na tong hen ;
Na thu kavon le ka thaomei,
Ka hinna hijing hen.
4. Pakai neihil’in na o ngei,
Chonset thim noiya hin ;
Ka kinepna le kahinna,
Ka tonsot la hihen.
Reference: Doh is A♭.d
1. Lhatdam kahi O ka lhagao,
Vahchoiyin na-Pakai ;
Eihuhhingpa ka dinga thi,
Akom’a cholnga ding.
Lhatdam kahi (2 vei)
Avahchoi la sange ;
I-Paklai chu vahchoi jinge,
Aman eihuhhing tai.
2. Calvary thing Cross chu kaven,
Hinna twi alonge ;
Kalung thenglou asoptheng tai,
Sange avahchoi la.
3. Kabat jouse eisah peh tai,
Pakai thahatna chun ;
Ka chonset sop thenga twi chu,
Pakai thisan ahi.
Reference: Doh is B♭.sₗ

songs.title: KHATBOU EI LHANDAM PU NUNNEM CHU

lines: 1. Khat bou ahi Eilhandampu nunnem chu,
Ama lungsetna kikan ihiuve ;
Alungsetna chun eisuhal kit’u hen,
Meiyin kong hen mit kit louhel dingin.
Jesu minin sopite hunguvin,
Kun’u hite I-lamkaipau anga ;
Kun’u hite A-ang sunga nemheuvin,
Aloupina ichoi-at kahseuvin.
2. Khat bou ahi Pakai ijen dingu chu,
Asei thu mangun juiyun nitinin ;
Jabol’ute aponlap che nung juiyin,
Amintheng nunnom hen atonsot’in.
3. Khat bou ahi chungnungpen le loupipen,
Ama milungset chungnung neunnem pen ;
Ja-tah in anung juiyin ponlap leh-un,
Tonsot in Amintheng nunnom hen.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ

songs.title: ITHAO TWIJU ADIM NA DEM PAKI HUNG TENG LEH

lines: 1. Ithao twiyu adim nadem Pakai hung tengle,
Ithaomei vah-u chim nantem Pakai hung tengle ;
Chu che jan loupi tah-a,
Ithaomei vah chim nantem Pakai hung tengle.
O kiging un (3 vei)
Pakai hungna ding.
2. Kitamto O kija nantem Pakai hung tengle,
Kipa nopna ogin thong ding Pakai hung tengle ;
Chuche jan loupi tah-a,
Ithaomei vah chim nantem Pakai hung tengle.
3. Geisang louvin kiging phaute Pakai hung tengle,
Kise khenna phat hunglhung ding Pakai hung tengle ;
Chuche jan loupi tah-a,
Ithaomei vah chim nantem Pakai hung teng leh.
4. Kipana nikho hi nantem Pakai hung tengle,
Halleluijah kipana hiding Pakai hung teng ;
Chu jan chu kipana jan,
Ithaomei vah chim nantem Pakai hung teng leh.
Reference: Doh is E. d
1. Ka ngai nom’e Christa thusim,
Mihem alungset na thusim,
Ami huhhing thusim kidang,
Lungset jal’in keidin athi.
Christa thusim kidang, (2)
Ami huhhing thusim kidang,
Lungset jal’in keidin athi.
2. Ka ngai nom’e Christa thusim,
Athen le aloupina chu,
Pathen lhagao vin eihil in,
Ka lung sung a hin cheng jing hen.
3. Ka ngai nom’e Christa thusim,
Pakai toh kilhon khom kahi,
Amun tin’a a aw kajai.
Tahsan det ding in eidei-je.
4. Ka ngai nom’e Christa thusim.
Ahao na le aloupina,
Aleng gam loupi khang tou ding,
Chamna Lengpa chu hung kit ding.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ

songs.title: KIPANA THUPHA HI ITI LOUPI HITAM?

lines: 1. Kipana Thupha hi iti loupi hitam?
Janhi, tuni, tonsot na Jesu abang ahi.
Michonse ho jong angailutna aum jinge.
Hesoh genthei lengvai te Aman na kouvui tun.
Janhi, Tuni, Tonsot geija Jesu abang hi,
Tilsem jouse phat khat tengle
Mangthah kittei ding,
Pakai Pathen min vang chu mang louding,
Aboncha phat khat leh
Mangthah soh helding ahi.
2. Masang laija pat Jesu milungset na ho hi,
Tulai-ja Jesu lungsetna toh achom umlou,
Michonse ho lungset aw nem in akou jinge,
Ama kouna ngaijun aw michonse teho tun.
3. Peter chu ijatvei achonset kingaidam em?
Thomas jong chu ijat vei ana kisei peh em?
Ama a kisem thah ho jouse chu ngaidam ding,
Tun jong eiho eikouvui Hungun tin, eikouvui.
Reference: Doh is B. sₗ

songs.title: BELSHAZZAR LE A SEMANG PACHONG AKIVAH LAI JUN

lines: 1. Belshazar le asemang pachong akivah laiyun,
Houin theng sana khon ho chu amangun ju adon’ui ;
Ajan chun leng insunga mu kidangtah amuvin,
Inpi tijat in alotai, hichu Pathen khut ahi.
Bang sun chu Pathen khut ahi, (2 vei)
Akisun chu koiman helou ;
Mijouse lungdong jouta,
Bang hinsun chu Pathen khut ahi.
2. Sohchang Daniel mihang chu leng anga agadingin,
Lengpa khansetna lentah chu asosal’in aphoh tai ;
Akisun chu asimin leng le mipi ngui jouta,
“Tua pat in lenggam abeitai; tin Daniel in ale tai”
3. Pathen thaneina le hanna chu Daniel apei,
Tichun lung olmo louhel’in achenna Juda gam le ;
Asohchanna gama jong milen le mineo anga,
A-Pathen khutsut asim thei banga, kisun chu ahi.
4. Hiche khut chun asun cheh eiho chonna jouse jong,
Milen le mineo mochanna phat hunglhung tei ding ahi ;
Hijeh chun nang michonse lungheiyin Jesu anga,
Themmo nachan louna dingin pellin banga kisun chu.
Reference: Doh is F.m.

songs.title: HIN NIKHO LHIN KA NGA JING CHU

lines: 1. Hin nikho lhin kanga jing chu,
Ni chomcha bou kanei tai ;
Khovah kanga hung lhung ding chu,
Nitinin ahung naiye ;
Kolmong kikeo kho hungvah ding,
Thangvan ahsi lhumsoh ding ;
Khang kikhel ding ni kikhel ding,
Mihem lung kidang soh ding.
2. Jao a-ang tai lounei hung ding,
A chang at-lhu loisoh ding ;
Kho akhal tai sih heo hita,
Khal hui ahung nungpan tai ;
Lou neipan achang khom soh ding,
Achang lhing cheh khomtup ding;
Ka lei pahhoi hi achul tai, Leiset nuse loi tange.
3. Vantilten song mantam kotpi,
Ahon diu kangah jinge ;
Kei mi genthei le lamvai hin,
Kotpi phung lhun kangah lel ;
Vantilte le kotpi hoi chu,
Kalung mit in ken kamui ;
Eihin kou diu kahou ding chu,
Iti ka kipa tadem !
4. Hinthing pahna gamnom hoi chu,
A itih a chul ngailou ;
Lungdon hesoh natna jouse,
Um talou ding chu gama ;
Chu gamnom le innom tah chu,
Lhandampu chenna ahi ;
Eilhandampu chenna a chu,
Kei jong cheng ding tonsot’a.
Reference: Doh is G. s.

songs.title: VEN LHANDAMPU CALVARY CROSS CHUNG A

lines: 1. Ven Lhandampu Calvary Cross chunga,
Nang le kei din genthei athoh tai ;
Lungset tah-in nang nakou ngaiyin,
Tahsanin sangin.
Tahsan in sangin, (2 vei)
Cross chunga hinna twi alonge,
Tahsanin sangin.
2. I chonsetnau jouse asoptheng tai,
Lhatdam ichan theina dinguvin ;
Jesun hinna kot chu ahong tai,
Tahsanin sangin.
3. Ven Lhandampu lhan’a kon athoutai,
Aheng jonin mun a on-lai hin ;
Mai lhaisel’a nang na lhamon ding,
Tahsanin sangin.
4. Tun chung van nom’a Jesu acheng tai,
Gentheite hesohna ve jingin ;
Nang jong chu gama napui tou ding,
Tahsanin sangin.
Reference: Doh is A♭. m
1. Keima Cross sepai chu kahi,
Pakai seijui kahi ;
Akin’a pang ding kicha lou,
Amin seichoi lenge.
Det tah-in dingun,
Kipa man sanna dingin ;
Det tah-in dingun,
Lallukhuh hoi isan diu.
2. Vanna kipaman sanna din,
Midang kitet lai hin ;
Keima ka kicholdo ding ham,
Hiche leiset chunga
3. Kadin leiya dou ding atam,
Thisan lui noh kahi ;
Keiman leiya gol kanei poi,
Pakai bou eihu ding.
4. Keiman manong ting dou vinge,
Pakaiyin tha nei pen ;
Genthei hesoh ding kaging poi,
Nei panpin Pakaiyin.
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ
1. Jesu thisanin katheng tai,
I kimu to diu luigalla ;
Kipah tah-a ikikhop diu,
Kikhen kitna umta louding, luipi kinong gal’a.
Luipi kinong gal’a (4 vei)
I-kimu to cheh diu ; (4 vei)
Kikhen kitta lou ding.
2. Kavan innom kalung mit’in,
Kamui iham ken kagin ding ;
“Nalhi thehhul ding Pathenin”
Tin vantilte sei o kajai, luipi kinong gal’a.
3. Chua ngai chengto kimu ding,
Iti thanop aum tadem ;
Kotpi hoi le tolpi nom chu,
Anop ahoi chul talou ding, luipi kinong gal’a.
4. Ka ngai Lhandampun eipui le,
Keijong chu gamnom kalhun ding ;
Bang louvin ken vahchoi tange,
Genthei lengvai umtalou ding, luipi kinong gal’a.
Reference: Doh is C. s.
1. Vangsetnan eipha hen lang,
Twilen kinong bang jongle ;
Kei lungmongin um nange,
Khopi hui hung nung jongle ;
Kong kaina phatah kanei,
Tonsot’a seithei lou ding.
Ka kong ngahmun adet nai,
Khopihui hung nung jongle ;
Ka ngahmun neo jeng jongle,
Ken lhahchomna neilou ding,
2. Kavel’a twipi kinong,
Vangsetna tamtah soh thei ;
Ichung meijin le thim soh,
Twipi kiting hung sang cheh ;
Hiche mun’a um kahi,
Ka kong kaina adet nai.
3. Gentheina tah mun’a hin,
Hesoh nan eichup jongle ;
Hui mut’in thi thei jong leng,
Ken kaki topi ngam nai ;
Niseh-in thim jeng jongle,
Kong kaina phatah kanei.
Reference: Doh is C.

songs.title: LUIGAL LAM'A GAMNOM EM HOI JAH CHUN

lines: 1. Luigal lam’a gamnom emhoiya chun,
Loupi tah-in mi sangja kikhom ;
Ahivangin vanna loupi pen pa chu,
Koitoh kiten tem Lhandampu chu !
Ama asang aja lah-a lamkai,
Samun avahchoina o sangin ;
Ama chu Pakai deipen ahijeh-in,
Atonsot’in Ama vahchoiyun.
2. Pakai dei chungnung pen ngai chungnung pen,
Aman nakouve o nem heochan ;
Vo kalha ngaiyin na sochatna Thupha,
Manbeiyin kisanin sochatna.
3. Pakai dei chungnung pen ngai chungnung pen,
Ngaiyin o nem heochan nakouve ;
Jesun “Hungin pohgih genthei kahenga,
Seplhan kicholdon” tin eikouve.
Reference: Doh is B♭. sₗ
1. Jesun lengvai apoi,
Van Laltouna chunga ;
Alua lallukhuh akhuh-in,
Ama amithengte.
Loupia lhatdamsate,
Avel’a akikhom ;
I-lungna chimsoh ding ; ol olle,
Ol olle (2 vei) ilungna chimsoh ding ol olle.
2. Mipi simsen lou chu,
Ading vah emsel’in ;
Lal tenggol kiphu cheh-uvin,
Vahchoi la asauve.
3. Kelngoinou lem la san,
Adiuva thipa chu ;
Athisan lutah a konin,
Lallukhuh akhuh-ui.
4. Lungsetna Lhagao Theng,
Na phattheina hin lhan ;
Chuche van gammom tah-a chu ,
Ka lhah theina diuvin.
Reference: Doh is E♭.
1. Sohchatna kipana Thupha hi,
Nang le kei dinga hinna thu ;
Pakai chu eiho chonset jal’in.
Thingpel chunga ahung thi tai.
O michonse nangin tahsanin,
Sangin hiche hinna Thupha ;
Lhandampu Cross chunga thipa chun.
Nang jong napei sochatna thu.
2. Thina konin eihuhhing tauve,
Pathen chaten eisemtauve ;
Chonse dingin hinna lui along,
Kisop thengin thisan long chun.
3. Chonset’in vai neisot talou ding,
Chomkhat thu dinga bou ahi ;
Pakaiyin Ama thahatna chun,
Chonsetna jouse sumang ding.
4. Pathenin lungset tah-in nakou,
Tun Jesu heng lam jonin chen ;
Koi hijong le aheng jon chan chu,
Pakaiyin nol anei ngai poi.
Reference: Doh is E. s

songs.title: MIHEM CHONSET NA KON HUHDOH DING IN

lines: 1. Mihem chonsetna kon huhdoh dingin,
Jesu hunga ahi leiya ;
Aman ling lukhuh chu akikhuh-in,
Calvary lhanga kei chunan athi.
Ahingin van’a akal tai,
Aman ka chonset angaidam soh tai ;
Ahingin vana akal tai,
Hung kit tei ding nikhat leh.
2. Jesu van’a chea gacheng kit dingin,
Buikhuh a kon athou kittai ;
Leiya ama ahung kum kit nileh,
Aloite van gama apui tou ding.
3. Na chonset nau Jesu henga phongun,
Man beiyin lhat nauvin nate ;
Jesu henga hungun vang thum dingin,
Ama kom’a thilpha akim soh-e.
Reference: Doh is B.
1. Jesu kalungin kadei pen,
Vang neipeh chu muchen thei leng ;
O nadei bang tah-in neipen,
Nangma bou chu lungset theina.
Lungthim giltah nei hin peuvin,
Na khopi hoi chu muna din ;
Ka lungthim hi hinvah sah-in,
Kei dinga um van’a Pathen,
2. Pathen Nangin kei neilungset,
Chonse ho jong nanga ahi ;
Kipah tah-in Nang ka sange,
Mu kanome nei lungsetna.
3. Kholmun olna gam nom’a chun,
Pahcha hoitah gamu jong leng ;
Lhagao hatmo hatsahna ding,
Na lungsetna kalhah umlou.
4. Lungset tah-in halna neipen,
Na gam loupi neimu sah-in ;
Na lhenchomte kipana ding,
Neihol nau chu neimu sah-in.
Reference: Doh is C.

songs.title: NITIN JESU KALUNG IN ANAIJE TIN KEN KAHEI

lines: 1. Nitin Jesu kalungin anaiye ti ken kahei,
Sana la jing ninou soh emsel sangin ahoijoi ;
Katah-in kamangin Ama chu ken kangai pen’e,
Nitin Ama ka ngailutna akhang tul tul jinge.
Sana ….. lui pang emnoma,
Sana ….. luipeo ema ;
Chua Pakai cheng jing,
A hoina chullou tonsot’a.
2. La tah-a konin kamui Aloupi nan eisal’e,
Jing valpa le molhoi pah em sangin jong a emjoi ;
Hichun kalung ngai jouse alhingtai tin ken kahei,
Nitin Ama ka ngailutna akhang tultul jinge.
3. Kalung hesoh kom le Aman kei eilhamon jinge.
Aphei chunga eipomin Akhut’in eilhem biji ;
Ka setna ngaidam Christa chu iti kangai hitam,
Nitin Ama ka ngailutna akhang tul tul jinge.
Reference: Doh is B♭. sₗ
1. Pakai Christa Leng chu vahchoiyun,
Atonsot’in vahchoiyin um hen ;
Loupi jana ama a ahi,
Tun jong atonsot’in.
Vahchoiyute, vahchoiyute,
Gam loupia Leng vahchoiyu hite ;
Vahchoi cheh-u hite ;
A lemnan o ging hen.
2. Chunga vantil sangjan alemui,
Laltouna kimin la asauve ;
Namtinin jomun kipana la,
Vahchoiyun Leng chungnung.
3. Chonset galjou Ama bou ahi,
Ichunguva Aman vaihom hen ;
Amin’a eiman jong ijo ding,
Tonsot’in Vahchoiyun.
Reference: Doh is G.d

songs.title: MOL LE LHANG AMUN TIN'A MIN

lines: 1. Molle lhanga mun tina min,
Ngaiyun Gospel sumkon gin !
Lhagao tilkhouna thu ngaiyun,
Eikounau thupeh ahi.
Kigoltoh-un, galsat dingin, (2 vei)
Ngaiyun sumkonin nakou, ngaiyun, ngaiyun ;
Ngaiyun Christian sepai ten.
2. Kivon’uvin pakai galvon,
Ponlap loupi dom sangun ;
Thudih a galsat ihiu leh,
Vantilten eihu’vinte.
3. Mut gingun sumkon ging tah-in,
Samun galsat jona joy ;
“Jesu Christa din” tin samun,
Jona chu eiho chan ding.
Reference: Doh is A♭. d.

songs.title: PAKAI NA LAL TOUNA LIMDAM NOIYA

lines: 1. Pakai Na Laltouna limdam noiya,
Lungset thutep gingchan kahung taove.
Jaidam le nemheo chan ka kun'e Na anga,
Kaset nei nei ngaidam in, Jesu keiya.
2. Lungdon kisih in kalhi along e,
Nang katah lelna neipan pin kei,
Nalung sukhel jong leng Nangbou ka kinepna,
Jesu keidin athi, Jesu keiya.
3. Ka taona na ang sung dam heo chan lhung,
Ka lungsung songpi bang tun ajot tai;
Ka lung thoina beita Nang bou kaki nepna,
Jesu kei din athi, Jesu keiya.
4. Pakai nakhopi muh a ka kun'e,
Lungset thutep gingchan nang kahin bel;
Ving nei jin leng jong leng ka kinepna Nang bou,
Jesu keidin athi, Jesu keiya.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ
1. Vo Pathen khanglui ki-ngaina,
Tua khangthah kinepna ;
Khopi huiya Nang ka hinnau,
Ka tonsot inpiu Nang.
2. Na laltouna limdam noiya,
Na mithengte acheng ;
Na ban khat jeng jonga lhing thei,
Ka kulpi dinguvin.
3. Mol le lhang kikhen masanga,
Leigum um masanga ;
Tonna pat Nang Pathen hing jing,
Kikhel lou tonsot’a.
4. Nangma mit mum kum sang jong hi,
Jing khat jong lhing joulou ;
Kei hon “Tu masang, tu nung” ting,
Nangin “Tun” nati jing ;
5. Phat hin luipi long jing bangin,
Mihem len mangpi jing ;
Jan mang jinga aman bangin,
Mihem mel mang jita.
6. Vo Pathen khanglui kingaina,
Tua khangthah kinepna ;
Eichingpau le tonsot inpi,
Hi jingin tonsot, in.
Reference: Doh is C.

songs.title: PATHEN A KON KAGAM LA TAI

lines: 1. Pathen’a kon ka gamla tai,
Tun kahung kit tai ;
Chonset lama kache sot tai,
Pakai kahunge.
Kahunge, kahunge,
Potdoh kit lou din ;
Lungset’in nanga hinge,
Pakai kahunge.
2. Kum lutah ka sumang sohtai,
Tun kahung kit tai ;
Lung kisih-in, ka hung kit tai,
Pakai kahunge.
3. Chonset vah len ka genthei tai,
Tun ka hung kit tai ;
Na lungset thu tahsan tange,
Pakai kahunge.
4. Kalha le kalung ana tai,
Tun kahung kit tai ;
Kipa le tha neipe kit’in,
Pakai kahunge.
Reference: Doh is A♭.sₗ

songs.title: JAN MUTHIM NOIJA KILENG SOTTA LOUDING

lines: 1. Jan muthim noiya kilengsot talou ding,
Kotpi hoi akikhon tengle ;
Chung kho nom Christa vah-a ilen le ding,
Kotpi hoi akihon tengle.
Kotpi hoi akihon tengle, (2 vei)
Pakai mu ding iti kipa um tantem ;
Kotpi hoi akihon tengle.
2. I-ngaiten kongkai muna ei-ngah jingui,
Kotpi hoi akihon tengle ;
Setna kona che kei eina lamto ding,
Kotpi hoi akihon tengle.
3. Nat hesoh genthei lungdon umtalou ding,
Kotpi hoi akihon tengle ;
Goldei chengtoh kipah a kileng khom ding,
Kotpi hoi akihon tengle.
4. Hinlai khankhon eisu lunggim talou ding,
Kotpi hoi akihon tengle ;
I-chenkhom diu Christa toh chunggam noma,
Kotpi hoi akihon tengle.
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ
1. Thina luigal a khopi hoitah aum’e,
Aloupije koiman seijou lou ;
Chua ni lhum ngailou thingna jong pul ngailou,
Chung sana khopi nomtah a chun.
Chua ni lhum ngailou
Thingna jong pul ngailou,
Chu gama chu Lhandampu le
Mithengte cheng ;
Chung sana khopi nomtah a chun.
2. Chung gama Leng chu Eihuhhingpa le Pakai,
Genthei molso chengtoh achengui ;
Chua chun ahsi bangin a emsel jingui,
Chung sana khopi nomtah a chun.
3. Lhagao mangsa Cross phunga lhutsoh uhite,
Kelngoi hon lah a lhalut ute ;
Hichu idinguva van Lallukhuh hi ding,
Chung sana khopi nomtah chun.
Reference: Doh is A. sₗ

songs.title: NA SET THISAN BANG JONG LE

lines: 1. Naset thisan bang jongle,
Buhbang sanga bangjo ding ;
Thisan sangin san jongle.
Kelngoi mul bang ding ;
Naset thisan bang jongle, (2)
Buhbang sang bangjo ding, (2)
2. O’n nakouve ngai phauvin,
Hung kilen Pathen hengah ;
Lungset khoto them ahi,
Lungset len ahi ;
O’n na kouve ngai phauvin, (2)
Hung kilen Pathen hengah, (2)
3. Na chonset angaidam tai,
Lungin jong gelkit hih-in ;
“Keima heng lam hin veuvin,
Pakaiyin ati ;
“Na chonset angaidam tai,” (2)
Lungin jong gelkit hih-in. (2)
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ

songs.title: GENTHEI JA VAHCHOL TE KIPAH UVIN

lines: 1. Gentheiya vahchol te kipah-uvin,
Kipa jing anai tai !
Pathen Ama tah-in eiseipeh-ui,
Kipa jing anai tai !
Kipana jing anai tai !
Kipana jing anai tai !
Kana jan khat kal hilou ding,
Kipa jing ninou hungsoh ding.
2. Mitheng ten tijat lungdon pailhauvin,
Kipa jing anai tai !
Genthei lengvaiyin nalhi theh ngimin ;
Kipa jing anai tai !
3. Lungdonna jankho hungvah loi tading,
Kipa jing anai tai !
Kidang tah a jing ninou hungsoh ding
Kipa jing anai tai !
4. Kipah tah-in jingthou cheh-u hitem,
Kipa jing anai tai !
Pathenin ilhiu jouse thehhul ding,
Kipa jing niso teng.
Reference: Doh is E♭. d
1. Kapa Pathen kalamvai teng.
Kalung sunga lam neihil’in ;
Nangma thu bou ken ngah inge,
“Nang lung hinge,”
“Nang lung hinge”, (2 vei)
Kalungin sei hen neihil’in ;
“Nalung hinge.”
2. Gentheiya kachang lhat tengle,
Goldei jouse umji talou ;
Nang bou ka kingaina nahi,
“Nang lung hinge.”
3. Ka ngaiye kalung hesoh teng,
Lhagao Theng eilhamon dingin ;
Vo ka-Pathen Nang ka ngansei,
“Nang lung hinge.”
4. Thinan kamit asin tengle,
Ka vangam ken hinjon tange ;
Luigal gam nom hungkai tange,
“Nang lung hinge.”
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ
1. Kangai nome Jesu thusim ngei,
Huhhingpa kidang tah ahi ;
Chonse lhatna thi geiya thoh pa,
Ken seilenge avel vel’in.
O thusim ngei, thusim ngei kidang,
Chullouva kisei thusim ngei ;
Loupin seithang jing tange,
Thusim ngei kidang hi ;
Amel hoi kamu na a chun.
2. Van mun loupia konin hung kum lhan,
Athisanin eilhat tauve ;
Tonsot hinna eichoh peh tauve,
Huhhing thahat chungnung ahi.
3. Ami hepina luiyin along,
Ami ngailutje tena bei ;
Alungset tonsot geiya lhingset,
Hichun keijong eihuhhing tai.
Reference: Doh is D♭. sₗ

songs.title: CHOIJUN PAKAI KIPAH IN HOSANA TIN

lines: 1. Choiyun Pakai kipah-in Hosana tin,
Vahchoiyun kipah tah-in ;
Dom sangun lang nalungu kipah tah-in,
Phongjal’uvin Amintheng chu;
Kijot’uvin aponlap lim noiya,
Ama ging chauvin nache pumun.
Alungsetna vah-in eisalvah jing ding,
Akhut’a eikaile jing ding tun jong i-tih a.
Long louvin kijot’un,
Ponlap leh-un ichungu vah ;
Long louvin kijot’un,
Sau hite kipana la chu ;
Long louvin kijot’un,
Meibang lompi imauva achei ;
Gam loupile chung khopi,
I phah mauvin.
2. Choiyun Pakai Ama tonsot Leng ahi,
Loupi hen chunga Pathen ;
Choiyun Pakai alungsetna seiphongun,
Jom’uvin chunga lathah chu ;
Kijot’uvin vahchoiyun kijot’un,
Cheu hite Jesu toh kiloi din ;
Lhatdamte kikhopna in nomtah a chun,
Lhandampu chu kivahchoi ding tonsot tonsot’a.
Reference: Doh is B♭. d

songs.title: THOUVUN THOUVUN, KIPANA THU LAN HUNGSAN

lines: 1. Thouvun thouvun, kipana thu lan hungsan,
Thouvun thouvun, alemna la hi hung jomun ;
Thouvun, thouvun leichung kipa adim tai,
Chung lam vah-in lei hi asalsoh tai ;
Amol, alhang, dam phai kipah in agingsoh tai,
Thilsem jousen asempau alemui.
Chonset ajousoh-in Jehovah alal tai,
Nomun, nomun kipah-uvin Jehovah Leng ;
Agam thahat phongun leiset chunga,
Aloupina ponlap dom sanguvin ;
Aleng chang tai nomun, nomun,
Nomun, Jehovah Leng.
2. Tumun, bengun kipa nopdah khongpi,
Avel vel’in seiyun sauvin kipa nahi ;
Leiyin ajom soh kahsen seiyun sauvin,
Vantil ho toh kitoh-in jom cheh-un ;
Chonset thina konin ahuhhing tai leiset hi,
Tonsot hinna kipa lan hung lemun.
Reference: Doh is C.s
1. Cross lam jon'a kava le laihin,
Loupina Pakai thina chu kamu phat in,
Ka leiset gou ahom keovin kaki het ne,
Hi cheng hil hin akhon nileh,
Themmo eichan sah ding kahei,
(SA&T)
Pan eihong phan hoitho lou ding,
Christa thi thu jeng bou heng'e,
Leiset nopna, kalung nom'a,
Christa thisan in subei hen.
(A&T)
Akhut akeng alu veuvin, Ngailut le,
(SA&T)
Ngailut le lungset long gomta,
Hibang eilungset ding koiham?
Lallukhuh ikhuh na diuvin,
Ling lukhuh chu aki khuh tai.
Hibang thillu ei ki pea chu
Leiset thillu toh te dia kilom hilou
Thil-lu toh te dia kilom hilou.
(SAP)
Ami lungset kidang tah chu (2)
Kalhan lung olna amutai;
Ami lungset kidang tah chu,
Kalhan lung olna amutai. (2)
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ
1. Chu luigal’a chun eikouvui,
Ka ngai chimlou goldei ten ;
Amaho ken muloi tading,
Kikhen kit um talou ding.
Chu luigal gam nom hoi Eden,
In loupi em hoiya chun ;
Vantil ten kei eipuitou ding,
Jesun eina lamto ding.
2. Chu luigal’a chun eikouvui,
Eikounau O nem kajai ;
Jing niso huilhi nem nung jing,
Kalung sunga aginge.
3. Chu luigal’a chun eikouvui,
Lungdon le jan um talou ;
Jesu toh aleng khom’uve,
Avon’u pon bang vamleh.
4. Chu luigal’a Chun eikouvui,
Mitlha louvin eidot’ui ;
“Chu luigal jon’in kahung tai”
Tin kalungin adonbut.
Reference: Doh is F. s
1. Pathen mi lungset vah hoi chu,
Ahung kikho emsel’in ;
Avah chun eisalvah jingui,
I sochatna dinguvin.
Na thomei devah jinguvin,
Vahsah-in twipi gal jong ;
Chonsetna thi ding atam’e,
Nang chen ga huhhing loiyin.
2. Leiya chonset thimpi ajing,
Twikhanglen kinong bangin ;
Panpi ngai sangja aume,
Vah kengin gahuh doh-in.
3. Na thaomei devah-in lang chen,
Lhagao mangthai ding atam ;
Sochatna Thupha hom jalin,
Muthima mangthah theiho.
Reference: Doh is B♭.sₗ

songs.title: AW KA NGAI TAH U IHMUN LANG MILTAN

lines: 1. Aw kangai tah u ihmun lang miltan,
Pakai om'a kingai jin choldo tan,
Keiho sangin Jesin nalungset joi,
Chibai, Chibai, Mangpha.
2. Chapang imu bangin chol do tan,
Tonggim dinga thou lou ding,
Ki chen tah a kichol do nahi tai,
Chibai, Chibai, Mangpha.
3. Pakaijin alal von'a eijep diu,
Iti kipa thanop aum tadem?
Laltouna ang-a iki mu kahsen,
Chibai, Chibai, Mangpha.
4. Ka lhahnau chibai kikhenna hilou,
Chom louva van'a ikimu kit diu,
Kikhen kit umtalou ding aang-a,
Chibai, Chibai, Mangpha.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ
1. Kipana pah chulthei pul ding,
Kem thei louva pah kit ding,
Chunga meivom kaikhomna le,
Thimjin kit um talou ding,
Jing ninou soh emsel’a chun,
Kipan tantih nei talou ;
Chung gamtheng emnom tah a chun,
Mi thengten la asauve.
Ikimu to kit cheh diu,
Chung gam mitheng ho laiya ;
Chu luigal gam nom tah a,
Che masa i-ngai cheng toh ;
Ikimu to kit cheh diu,
Chunggam mitheng ho laiya.
2. Leiset’a kilungsetna gui,
Thina in sutan jita ;
Iki ngainau jong lhou theilou,
Mihem ikikim thei poi :
Chung gam ilhun teng vangule,
Kilungset gui tanlou ding ;
I ngai jouseu kimsoh tading,
Kikhen kit umtalou ding.
3. I hinkhou hi alhin teng leh,
Eijong chua ichen ding ;
Chonset thina le gentheina,
Mangin jong mat kit lou ding ;
Chan anu kimu kitta ding,
Nun acha kimu kit ding ;
Gamtin’a lum i-ngai hou chu,
Chu gama imu cheh diu.
Reference: Doh is G. m.

songs.title: KELNGOI CHING HON AGAM GE NAUVA

lines: 1. Kelngoi chingho agam genauva,
Jankhang laiyin Vantil sangja hung kilah in ;
Chunga la ngeitah asauve,
Hichu Pakai golnop kipat.
Nop ni ….Nop ni … Nop ni … Nop ni,
Apeng tai vannoi Leng chungnung.
2. Valpa hungsoh solam a konin,
Jing ninou bangin ahung vah kidang tah in ;
Hichun vannoi hinsal soh in.
Hichu sun le janin vah jing.
3. Hiche solam Valpa vahkai chun,
La tah a kon solam miching thum ahungun ;
“Israel Leng hoiya penga ham ?”
Tin hin hollun Valpa kaiyin.
4. Miching ho chu Naosen umna in,
Sunga alut’un hapan akipah-uvin,
Kipa man sana bego myrth,
Lultah in peuvin alem’ui.
Reference: Doh is D. m.
1. Kipana dah ging hen nalunggil sunga,
Chamna le lungmon nan nang nuselou ding ;
Lamjang khul chu jot’in lang.
Nitin Pakai din hingin ;
Pakai nalung sunga, nopdah aging ding.
Nop dah ging hen nalunga, (2 vei)
Nachena chan’a Pakai.
Amin chu lum’in songin ;
Pakai nalung sunga nopdah a ging ding.
2. Hia kon chun nangman Pakai lungsetna,
Navel’a muthim mite hetsah dingin ;
Lungsetna thupha seiyin,
Lungset neiyin na tongin :
Pakai nalung sunga nopdah a ging ding.
3. Inpi najot laiyin bolset nato ding,
Mihem mit’a mutheilou lungset jona ;
Pen nate Jesun nitin,
Navel’a ding jinginte ;
Pakai nalung sunga, nopdah a ging ding.
4. Na hinlai dam sungin Pakai na tongin,
Nang kipen lang natoh theina lama chun ;
Nalung thengsel’in mangin,
Lungsetna nangin molson ;
Pakai nalung sunga nopdah a ging ding.
Reference: Doh is A♭. m

songs.title: PATHEN HOUTE KIPAH LUNG LE A LHAGAO UN

lines: 1. Pathen houte kipah lung le alhagaovun,
Ngaiyun ka thuseiyu hi Thu Thah ;
Tunin Jesu apeng tai,
Sel le loiyin jong alem ;
Gan kong sunga ajal lai chun,
Christa peng tunin. (2 vei)
2. Pathen houte kipah lungle alhagaovun,
Ngaiyun tonsot hinna thu joy joy,
Tunin Jesu apeng tai,
Ahong tai van kotpi chu ;
Mihemte vangphatna ahi.
Christa peng tunin. (2 vei)
3. Pathen houte kipah lungle alhagaovun,
Nang ho dia thi gin umlou chamna ;
Jesu peng huhhing dingin,
Aman nabon’un nakou ;
Avan gam noma lhung dingin ;
Nalhat diu apeng, apeng nalhat diu.
Reference: Doh is F. d.
1. Vangphatna thisan luinah chun,
Vannoi chonset alhat ahi ;
Nunnom hen Pathen chapa chu,
Athoh mahan eidamsah ui ;
Ahonga kon vahmang kahi,
Kalung sung nat le sat adim ;
Kelngoinou thisanin sop lhan,
Kei buhbang sanga bangjo ding.
Buh ..... sanga bang jon, (2 vei)
Kelngoinou thisanin soplhan ;
Kei buhbang sanga bangjo ding.
2. A lallukuh chu ling lukhuh,
Ahin Cross a chun ajoutai ;
Lungdon le hesoh athoh in,
Athoh gimna chu moh hilou ;
Chu luinah chu kalhung thei dem,
Hichun kachonset soptheng ding;
Chu thisan longlhan nei sil’in,
Kei buhbang sanga bangjo ding.
3. Pathen Nanga kon vahmanga,
Kalung chonsetnan lamvaiyin ;
Kalung sung setnan lodimta,
Twiya soptheng thei hitalou ;
Jesu Nangma twikhuh jonin,
Na thutep gingchan kahunge ;
Na thisanin neisop thengin,
Kei buhbang sanga bangjo ding.
Reference: Doh is D. m
1. Taona lolhin sah pen Pathen,
Lhamona kathum e,
Lungdong in hesoh jeng jong leng,
Pakai neithe hih in.
2. Nangma bang a um kanom’e,
Nangbou ei ngailu pen,
Thengsel chan umthei hih jong leng,
3. Na nopna chang hoi kahipoi,.
Chonse kahijeh in,
Nang kom’a hung ding a lomlou,
4. Ule nao kain ko ten jong,
Eideimon eitheu hen,
Golcheng in eidalha jong le,
5. Hi leiset na nahung kumlhan,
Thingpel’a nahung thin,
Van’a neitao peh jing jeh un,
6. Houbung lah a umthei ding in,
Thina ging talou vin,
Van’a kitup tah a umdin,
7. Mihem thi le hing thu tan’a.
Loupile ja um’a,
Meilom’a nahung kum phat teng,
Reference: Doh is A♭. s
1. Nangma toh theichan midang
Toh dingin ngah hih-in.
Salvah in mi dang ngahlou jen’in ;
Pakaiyin nangma panpi ding
Natohna chan’a,
Salvah in na umna mun chu.
Salvah-inna umna mun chu ; (2 vei)
Christa a gamla umten navah amuna din,
Salvah-in na umna mun chu.
2. Muthim noiya lam jotte
Nangman salvah peh-in,
Thangset’in navah chu le hih-in ;
Lungdongte kipa sah-in
Nahalna la ngei chun,
Salvah-in na umna mun chu.
3. Pathen thu simin Aman
Nang nakithopi ding,
Guhthim setnan natoh sel hih-in ;
Musah in na meivah chu miten
Pakai heu hen,
Salvah-in na umna mun chu.
Reference: Doh is E♭. m
1. Christa Houbung din dingun,
Lungkhat le tha khat in,
Avahchoina seiyun genthei kithopiute ;
Mangsa hol’u hite. Christa Houbung din.
Christa Houbung din dingun,
Lungkhat le thakhat’in ;
Peu hite ithau tua pat’in,
Christa Houbung din.
2. Christa Houbung din taovun, tong’ute nitinin,
Lunglut le hakat in, toh-in kitet’ute ;
Kitep nit’u hite,
Christa Houbung din.
3. Christa Houbung din saute, Hosana tin saute.
Nomlen ihiuva pat, eitep peh-ui jona ;
Kitep nit u hite,
Christa Houbung din.
Reference: Doh is F. s
1. Thouvin,thouvin, Aw ka lhagao,
Pathen vahchoi lasan,
Tonsot kipana la ngei jin,
Lhatdamna la ngei san,
Ka chonset poh eilhat dohtai,
Cross chung a athi chun,
Athisan a eilhat doh a,
Ei siltheng ahitai.
Thouvin, thouvin, Aw ka lhagao,
Pathen vah choina langei san,
Tonsot kipana la ngei-jin,
Lhatdamna la ngei san.
2. Eilhatdoh Pakai le Lengpa.
Aniseh in neiching,
Lhatdam na kahinna pumpin,
Sajou lou angailut na,
Chung akon ami lungsetnan,
Keima eihung sang in,
Ami lungset na haojeh chun,
A laltouna kanai.
3. Kikhel lou ngailut na chungnung,
Chung a Van Mitheng ten,
Agil le asan seijou lou,
Pathen mi ngailut na,
Hiche ngailut vannoi hop hin,
Chung gam theng alotai,
Hiche hin kemtih neilou ding,
Vahchoi-jun Chung Pathen.
Reference: Doh is E♭. d
1. Twikhanglen kinong lailunga,
Tonsot gam jon, kitol nahi ;
Na kong lamkai len thupeh chun,
“Tol’in, tol’in tol’in”
Tol’in, tol’in khohui thiploi tante,
Tonsot’in muthim jing ponte,
Tol’in, tol’in,
Hing jing Pathen thupeh ahi tol’in.
2. Na chung thimpi ajing jinge,
Twipam naiya chol jongle chun,
Ngaiyin chunga o’n natil’e,
“Tol’in, tol’in, tol’in”
3. Malam no dingin naloite,
Tijat in dau hen kong tol ding ;
Gel ding dang nang din aumpoi,
Tol’in, tol’in, tol’in.
4. Twinongin nakong nuhhen lang,
Thachol’in lhasam jongle chun !
Pathen thupeh chu thon ponte,
Tol’in tol’in tol’in.
Reference: Doh is E♭. m
1. Pathen lungset jal’in,
Lhatdam chamkim asem ;
Aloupina lungset jal’in,
Engse lhatdam changta.
Tahsanin lhatdam namui,
tahsan … tahsan,
Tahsan lungset vanga namu;
Toh phat vanga namu hilou,
Toh hilou, ..... toh hilou
Toh phat vanga hoitho ding hilou,
Pathen thilpeh ahi,
Pathen thilpeh ahi, (2 vei) Thilpeh ahi.
2. Pa lungset alange,
Acha Christa chunga ;
Cross jachat uma atoh chun,
Pa lungset aphonge.
3. Atahsan chan henga,
Christa Pa aphonge ;
Lungsetna lhatdam chamkim changta,
Pathen cha ahiuve.
Reference: Doh is D. s

songs.title: GAL AKISAT GALSAT NA SUMKON AGINGE

lines: 1. Gal akisat galsatna sumkon aginge,
Galvon vonun tin akisam soh tai ;
Pakai sepai asang ajan akitol tai,
Christa galjo ding chu akilange.
Gal akisat’e, Christian sepai,
Kimaiton akisat’uve ;
Galvon gin umtah akivon nuvin,
Se le pha kisat ni ahi ;
Gal akisat’e lungkham hih-un,
Aloupina tuhdet jingin,
Pathen eilama panga ahile,
Akhon nia jo la isah diu.
2. Gal akisat, hungun sepai thudih panun,
Jehovah lamkaina kijou tei ding ;
Pathen galvon lunghem louvin kivon cheh-un,
Athahatna jo ding hetsa ahi.
3. I-gal lamkai Pakai ahi kijou tei ding,
Galjo ding chu kichenin akilang ;
Amin loupi agam tinin jabol cheh ding,
Kho hungvah a champi ni hung soh ding.
Reference: Doh is C.s

songs.title: KANGAIJE, PAKAI NANG BOU KEIMA A

lines: 1. Ka ngaiye Pakai Nangma bou keima a,
Chonset nopna jouse ken kanuse tai ;
Eihuhhinga ka-ngai Nangma bou nahi,
Ka ngaiye Pakai Nangma ken ka ngaiye.
2. Ka ngaiye Lhandampu neilungset teiyin,
Nangman neilhatdoh tai thing Cross chunga chun ;
Ka-ngaiye linglukhuh keidin nakhuh tai,
Ka ngaiye Pakai Nangma ken ka ngaiye.
3. Thi jong leng hing jong leng ken Nang ka ngailui,
Kahin laisen Nangma ken vahchoi jing ding ;
Thina in eikhen masangsea ken lhai ding.
Ka ngaiye Pakai Nangma ken ka ngaiye.
4. Na in loupi tah vah jinga kachen ding,
Ken tonsot’a chua Nangma kalem ding ;
Nang vahchoinan sange lallukhuh pumin,
Ka ngaiye Pakai Nangma ken ka ngaiye.
Reference: Doh is B♭.
1. Kachun ngai ken sumil theilou,
Eilhatna lungset awnem chu,
“Kanao nei dalha jong le chun,
Katao peh na hi geljing in”.
Kachun ngai ken ka geldoh teng,
Ka kom’a um’in kabolji,
Lenlhang phaithi nun gin kajah,
Kachun nu tao aw’n kagelji.
2. Kachun ngai ken sumil thei lou,
I-chan’a gamla hi jong le,
Kanun eitaopeh na aw chu,
Ka lung sunga aging jinge.
3. Kumkho sotin jong kamilpoi,
Kachun nun neitaopeh na chu,
Ka dinga dilsua ataopet,
Kalung mit’in ken kamu jing.
4. Lhandampu kei eilungset na,
Sumil pong e itih chan’in,
Kachun nu taona asang in,
Ka chonset eingaidam sohtai.
Huhhingpa Nang kavahchoije,
Chung gam Mitheng nomte lai jah,
Kachun ngaito kimu kit ding,
Chun ngai tao guilhunna ahi.
Reference: Doh is D. m

songs.title: GAMLA TAHIN KAJAI LEISET MITE KA LE MAO AW

lines: 1. Gamla tah-in kajai leiset mite ka le mao O,
Leiset mite chonset lungjinin alosoh tai ;
Lei lungdon le gimna jouse ka nusesa noiya,
Ken ngai kit talou ding chung khopia.
Cheng kahi chung khonom’a,
Chung meivom kailouna a;
Tonsot’a kanglou twikhuh,
Don ding ken kaneiye ;
Kemlou chung Mana kivah kahi,
Kel le chah umlou na a,
Keima kacheng-e chung khopia.
2. La tah a leiset’a khun tijat lungjin adim’e,
Niseh-in mihemte thisan luiyin alonge,
Kei vang kahoiye Pathen inpi sunga nomtah-in,
Iman eiphalou ding chung khopia.
3. Leiset’a ka le mao o huipi bangin nung jongle,
Kahoiye Pakai jal’in hiche khopi sunga ;
Hiche chunggam’a hin iman eisuse phalou ding ;
Tonsot’a hoi kahi chung khopia.
4. Tuvangin ken kahethei tai Pathen thugil tah chu,
A o kajah-in Kahei thugil kidang tah chu ;
Kamit’in kamui lhagao huhhingna thu chentah-in
Nom tah-in cheng tange chung khopia.
Reference: Doh is B♭. d
1. Thou doh-un lhatdam chate se,
Pakai Christa kai jouse ;
Thoudoh-un namtin chitinte,
Kikhom’uvin Zion’a.
Sau hite galjo la saute,
Twikhanglen van gin bangin ;
Lhandampu Christa thisanin,
I dougal ijo tei diu.(3)
2. Mitheng mihang chemasa ho,
Dettah-in leiya pangun ;
Tun van chunga ponlap leh un,
Kipah-in aleng tauve.
3. Thi gin tijatna umlou ding,
Van Pakai chenna gam’a ;
Pakai ahung kum kit nile,
Leiset kipan losoh ding.
4. Eiho jong Pakai ang sunga,
Kipah a kiding loi ding ;
Mi tinin kipaman sang ding ;
Ama jeng kivahchoi ding.
Reference: Doh is B♭. d
1. Kei tailou nang hon pathen,
Adang neilou jenun ;
Van’a leiya lei noiya,
Twiya hijeng jongle ;
Alim semthun hou hih -un,
A anga kun hih-un ;
Alha chan jong pang hih-un,
Jen jong jenlou jenun.
2. Ajeh beiyin pan hih-un,
Na-Pathen mintheng chu ;
Lutah-in jabol’un lang,
Gingun Amintheng chu ;
Nitheng ni gel jing jengun,
Pakai ni theng ni chu ;
Chuni le na tong hih-un,
Pathen min choi an nun.
3. Nanu napau choi-anun,
Gingun lang jabol un ;
Lhagao hing neiya mihem,
Thatlou jenun nang hon ;
I tobang hi jeng jongle,
Gucha hih-un nang ho,
Guchat chu Pathen hot lam,
Ahi, hejing jengun.
4. Jon thanhoi bol lou jenun,
Lungin jong gel hih-un ;
Mi nei thilpha sum le sel,
Sumang hih-un nang hon ;
Na tipum Pathen Houin,
Ahi chu gel’in lang ;
Hichu suhboh louna din,
Ching theiyin hong phauvin.
5. Naheng nakom’a chunga,
Jouthun thu sei dauvin ;
Na umpi naheng nakom,
Jouthun heh lou jen’un,
Mi nei thangse lou jen’un ;
Aji acha jeng jong ;
Agancha asoh akol,
Thangset peh lou jenun.
6. Pathen hiche thusom hi,
Kanit jing theina din ;
Pathen lungdih lungtheng pha,
Lunghal athah nei pen ;
Lungtheng lungnem ngai um lung,
Tahsan det lung neipen ;
Pathen na-Lhagao Thengin,
Neivop phan neipui len.
Reference: Doh is B♭. sₗ

songs.title: I-PAKAI VAH A CHU AMA JUI IHIUVE

lines: 1. I Pakai vah chu Amu jui ihiuve,
Loupina ichan diu aume ;
Alunga ichon leh, Aman eiumpi diu,
Huhhingpa ahi tahsan jingin.
Tahsan jingin Pakai tahsan jingin,
Nopna ding lamdang umlou,
Pakai tahsan tailou.
2. Chung meithim kalou ding, gim hesoh beita ding,
Pakai chenna chunggam noma chun ;
Thi le nat um talou, lhi lonna beita ding ;
Phattheina ahi tahsan jingin.
3. Ami lungsetna chu, mihemten sim joulou,
Alatouna ilhun tengule ;
Thisana alhatsa,Ami lungsette chu ;
Kipa na chang ding tahsan jingin.
4. Pakai khopi muh a, nom tah-a kitou ding,
Ama toh laitol ilenkhom diu ;
Chung mithengte jousen, Amasei ngai cheh ding ;
Lung olmo louvin tahsan jingin.
Reference: Doh is F. d

songs.title: VANCHUNG A UM KA-PAU PATHEN (PAKAI TAONA)

lines: 1. Van’a um ka-pau Pathen,
Na min kija hen nagam ;
Hung lhung hen vana nalung,
Chan akim bangin leiya.
2. Jong nalung chan kimhen tu,
Nin kaneh khop dingu an ;
Nei peuvin kaleiba teu,
Ka-ngaidam bangun keiho.
3. Bat jong ngaidamin chule,
Lhepnaa neipui hih-un ;
Agilouva konin nei,
Huhdoh jouvin gam thahat.
4. Naloupina tonsot’in,
Nanga ahi van’a um ;
Ka-Pau Pathen namin ki,
Jahen O Pakai Pathen.
Reference: Doh is F. m

songs.title: SENLAI CHEN NA KHOLLUI LE GOLLE PAITE

lines: 1. Senlai chenna kholui le golle paite,
Kagel kom le kalung helji ;
Senlai khankho le chun ngai kagel teng
Senlai ka houin lunga alange.
O van in nom hoi tah,
Chung gam nom ngaite chenna ;
Mitheng ten eina lamto ding ;
Chuteng leiset gimna ken mil ding,
Che masa ngaicheng kamu soh ding.
2. Hiche leiset khankho hi ken kagel teng,
Chung gam nomin kalung alai ;
Ngai cheng chung gam nom’a lengui,
Itih le keijong kalhung theita dem !
3. Leiset loupina le ahoina jouse,
Hung mang ding nikhat leivuiya ;
Kei vang Pakai laltouna angah,
Tua kangai cheng toh lengkhom tading.
Reference: Doh is A. sₗ
1. Ka hinkho hi twilen kinong,
Bangin huipin alet’e ;
Kiselna ding mun kahol’e,
Pathen khut lim kahol’e.
Kei eisel ding, kei eisel ding,
Twi le huipi phahlou na a ;
Kei eisel ding, kei eisel ding,
Pathen khut’in eisel ding.
2. Gim le hesoh toh jeng jong leng,
Ka dinga inlam ngaina ;
Ken engbolna sang chomlou ding,
Lungset kouna bou sang ding.
3. Ka melma ten eidou jongle.
Satan’in thaje jongle ;
Pathenin eiching jing nante,
Satanin eijou lou ding.
4. Chomkhat leiya Cross pu jong leng,
Setna huipi toh jong leng ;
Ka lhagao Pakai khut’a um,
Pan acha eilha lou ding.
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ
1. Thusim ngei kasei nom ta ! Mulou chunggam thu chu ;
Christa le Aloupina, Christa mi lungsetna ;
Thusim ngei kasei nomta ! Thudih ahi kahei ;
Hichu kalung lhaina pen ! Idangin khellou ding.
Thusim ngei ka ngainom ta !
Thusimlui ngei chungnung chu ;
Hichu keidia loupi pen,
Christa milungsetna.
2. Thusim ngei kasei nomta ! Thu kidang tah ahi ;
Kasei chanin kalung ah, Gil cheh cheh in kahei ;
Thusim ngei kasei nomta ! Ahelou mi atam ;
Sochatna thupha kidang, Pathen thudih ahi.
3. Thusim ngei kasei nomta ! Ahe theite dinga ;
Ngainom um cheh ngai chimlou, Lung kicholdona thu ;
Thusim ngei kasei nom ta ! Lathah ngei ngei kasei ;
Hichu thusimlui chungnung ; Ken ka lhangai jinge.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ

songs.title: CHRISTIAN TE CHING THEI JUN NACHEN NA A

lines: 1. Christiante ching theiyun nachena a,
Nalampi a kichatna atame ;
Het louva nalhem dingin najuiye,
Kumkhoa setna a koi din najuiye.
Christiante ching theiyun ; (3 vei)
Gin atam-e.
2. Christiante ching theiyun set ahunge,
Vanpi nim hen thimpin tom jongle chun ;
Huipi nungle mei kihoh loi tante,
Chuteng tonsot’a kicholdo tading.
3. Christiante ching theiyun lhuh louna din,
Sumil hih in Pakai chu kou jingin ;
Setto chanin pangin ding detjingin,
Taona galvon le lumin kivonin,
4. Christiante ching theiyun kinem tah-in,
Chu gam lhun teng Lhandampu dei tah chun ;
“Hung lut’in na-Pakai kipana a,”
Tia nakou teng nalung kipa dim ding.
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ
1. Vanchung-a cheng chapang hoi hon,
Laltouna kivel’un,
Chonset na neilou chapang ten,
Pakai lhaila sauvin,
Asam-ui.....“Nom hen, Nom hen”,
Pakai Lalmang chungnung pen.
2. Pon bang vamleh cheh kisil’un,
Iti kijem, lui tam?
Kemlou chung a cheng chapang ten,
Nitin kipah tah in.
3. Kihepi kipa damna gam,
Iti lhun’a hiuvam,
Leiset’a kona pui galkai,
Chapang te gol lem mun.
4. Lei-ja alen laijun Pakai,
Alung un angai-jun,
Tun nomtah in van’a cheng un,
Pakai nom amu’vin.
Reference: Doh is C. d

songs.title: JESU BOU KADEI PEN E KAGOL DIN

lines: 1. Jesu bou kadei pen’e kagol din,
Amabou lungdonna eimonsah ding ;
Kipah tah-in Ama bou lem inge,
Ka chonset pohgih jongle Jesu bou ka ngaiye.
Jesu bou kadei chungnung pen,
Itih chan hijeng jongle ;
Niso hoilai hijong leh. Meibol kailai hijongle,
Niseh a ka lhonpi ding ; Jesu bou kadei.
2. Jesu bou kadei pen’e kagol din,
Hinna lampi thim jongle eihil ding ;
Galten kalha lhem lengvai jeng jongle,
Ka changa kadin joulou ding ken ka ki het’e.
3. Jesu bou kadei pen’e ka gol din,
Ama michonse te dia jol ahi ;
Jesu bou kadei chungnung pen ahi,
Ama banga gol lungnem le thahat dang umlou.
Reference: Doh is E♭. m
1. Kumthah vang boh-in Pakai.
Akikhom mi jouse jong ;
Na thu thenga kivon’a,
Nalung lhainan nei sem’un.
2. Kum lhunga nei hoidam’u,
Kipa thulhut le thil to ;
Phatthei neiboh-un Pakai,
Hiche kumthah lhungin jong.
3. Kap le maova lung lengvai,
Lhem lungmongin navan thun ;
Thim le kichat no mangin,
Tha le hinkho athah pen.
4. Ateh akhang mi jousen,
Lei jousen vahchoi cheh-in ;
Mipi ten phongjal leu hen,
Na thahat lungset kidang.
Reference: Doh is D. d
1. Hungun golvah gotsa, kouna ngaiyun,
Hung nen hinna changlhah, mijouse ding ;
Avomgui hin jonun A-oma kingaiyun,
Anei jouse nanga chonse hungun.
2. Twinah phunga hungun, Hinna luipi,
Na gimna subei ding, lungjin khoisat ;
Mi janel dia kiphal koimacha da jilou,
Thisan phung hin bel’un, chonse hungun.
3. Hangtah-in nailut’un Alaltouna,
Lhaitet golseh jouchan, hia um ding ;
Na lhahsam nau iham lungsette nahiuve,
Jesu bou nalamkai, chonse hungun.
4. Gamnom lama hungun, jin le kinon,
Vannoi hi michom gam, gamthip ahi ;
Sana tumging ngeile, kipana seijoulou,
Teh le khang lallukhuh, chonse hungun.
5. Ka hunguve Jesu, nei sanguvin,
Kalhau nomlen sah-in, nei silthengun ;
Nagam vah nom sunga, pon banga kijem din,
Choldo ding tonsot’a chonse hungun.
Reference: Doh is B♭. m

songs.title: ALHA LIM NOIJA UM KAHIN KAHOI JE

lines: 1. Alhalim noiya um kahin kahoiye,
Jan muthim hen khopihui nung jongle ;
Ka tahsane, Aman kei eilha lou ding,
Eihuhhingin kei Ama cha kahi.
Alha lim noi, (2 vei)
Lungset jal’a kahoina ;
Alhalim noiya kalha cheng ding,
Atonsot’a cheng jing ding.
2. Alhalim noi mongtah a ka kiselna,
Kalung leh katha akicholdo tai ;
Noi leiset’a kei din monna aumpoi,
Alhalim noiya bou monna kanei.
3. Alhalim noi, iti noptam kipana,
Kei kisel ding lunggim kichai kahsea ;
Tijat lunggimin kei eipha talou ding,
Pakaiya kumkhon kicholdo tange.
Reference: Doh is D♭. m
1. Iti nop tam Jesu tahsan,
Eithupeh dungjuiya chon ;
Athutep dung juiya ol ding,
Ama he jinga um ding.
Jesu, Jesu katahsane
Ka hechen’e dihtah-in ;
Jesu, Jesu loupi Jesu,
Alungset tahsan ninge.
2. Iti noptam Jesu tahsan,
Eisil thenge thisanin ;
Lungset o nemin eikouve,
Damna thisan luiya din.
3. Heng anome Jesu tahsan,
Set’a kona eilhat ding ;
Olna kanei teng nang gama,
Nop le ol chamna kei ding.
4. Ka kipah-e Nathu kihil,
Lhandampu Jesu Christa ;
Keiya Nang naum ken kahei,
Akhonni geiya dingin.
Reference: Doh is A. m

songs.title: NA TONSOT KHANG DING HOILAI HAM?

lines: 1. Na tonsot khang ding hoilai ham?
Ti in nang le kei eidong ui,
Hichu iti nadon but em?
Na tonsot khang ding hoilai ham?
Na tonsot khang ( 2 )
Na tonsot khang ding hoilai ham?
2. Tamtah in Jesu alheng ui,
Asetna hou hin dalha in,
Van mun chu ama ho a ahi,
Na tonsot khang ding hoilai ham?
3. Van in jotna kotjim lam chu,
Pel’in lamvai ta jong le chun,
Hoilai mun’a naga lhung dem,
Na tonsot khang ding hoilai ham?
4. Tutah in hung kinung len lang,
Jesun nalhat tahsan te chun,
Hiti hin donbut tan ati,
Ka tonsot khang ding van ahi
Ka tonsot khang,ka tonsot mun,
Ka tonsot khang ding van ahi.
Reference: Doh is F. m

songs.title: NILHUM KON A KITU MICHI LE

lines: 1. Nilhum kon’a kitu muchi le,
Sun nisa noi-ja kitu muchi,
Van nim noi-ja kitu muchi le,
Janthim noi-ja kitu muchi jong.
{Refrain}- Aga kichom khom tei ding (2)
Jan muthim le khovah noija kitu,
Hattah le hatmo taha kitu jong,
Aphat cha kikhom tup soh kei ding,
Thonlouva kikhom tup soh ding.
2. Lamsih dung a kitu muchi le,
Song chung a kithe thiding .muchi,
Ling deplih dia kitu muchi le,
Leipha lai-ja kitu muchi jong.
3. Phat horn louva kitu muchi le, ill'!
Lunggel neilou va kitu muchi,
Seiset japi pum’a kitu le,
Kumsot jachat na ding muchi jong,
4. Lung na tah a kitu muchi le, I
Mitlhi pum’a kitu muchi ho,
A-at ding ngah jing a kituh ho,
Kipah taha kichom khom soh ding.
Reference: Doh is C. m
1. Salem phaicham’a la hinsa,
Vantil ho chu koiloi hiuvin tem?
Zion lhang a kon kisam aw, ,
Kipa Awgin thutheng ahi.
Leng hung chu Amintheng Loupin
Umjing jeng tahen,
Pathen min’a hung chu,Vahchoi jin
Umjing jeng hen,
Pathen min’a hung chu vahchoi-jin
Umjing jenghen.
3 SP.
Hosanna	Hosanna		Hosanna
Hosanna, Hosanna, Hosanna
Hosanna
3 Part.
Vahchoi-jute..........Hosanna
Hosanna,............ David cha,
Pathen min'in......Hosanna,
Hosanna Hailou jen un, Hailou jen un,
Sam un Hosanna, Hosanna tin,
Hosanna, Hosanna, Hosanna.
2. Veovin iti kipa umtam?
Leng ho Leng le Pakai ho Pakai,
Samun Hossana Hossana tin,
Eihon jong vahchoi-jute.
3. Sam un Hossana,Hossana,
David phung a hungpeng chapa chu,
Vannoi-ja le Van chung gam’a,
Ama min chu Loupi jing ding.
Reference: Doh is F. d
1. Iti ngeitam lungset kidang,
Chonse kei eilhat tai ;
Kei amangsa eiholdoh tai,
Mitchon tun kamu tai.
2. Hichun kiginje eihil’e,
Tun kei eilhamon tai ;
Hi lungset chu eimusah tai,
Ka tahsan phat phat chun.
3. Gim hesohna a kon keima,
Tun sohcha kahi tai ;
Hiti chun eihin puihoi lei,
Tun jong in eilhut ding.
4. Hia chun kum sangsom sangja,
Ni banga em jing ding ;
Tonsot’a kipa la sading,
Vahchoiyin Lhandampu.
Reference: Doh is A. sₗ
1. Chonset in eichup mang tai,
Kithoudoh jou talou,
Setna a ka lhum mang tai,
Hepina ngai kahi,
Ka Pakai eilamkai pun,
Kaka na aw ajan,
Ka Pakai Jesu Christan eihuhhing tai.
Ngailutna bou Eihuhhing thei,
Christa tailou adang bei Ngailut na bou,
Ngailut na bou,Eihuhhing thei,
Christa tailou adang bei ngailut na bou.
2. Ka lhagao mang ding koncha,
Jesun eilhatdoh tai,
Ngailutna eituh jing ding,
Gimna mun hijong le,
Aman eikai hoi jing ding,
Lhandampu tunia nangman
Na huhhing ding.
3. Gimna jouse long mang ding,
Ka lengvai na jouse,
Akhut in kei eikai len,
Vangboh na eipetai,
Ka kichat na jouse jong,
Aman asubei tai,
Ama heng hinjon jousen,
Olna nei ding.
Reference: Doh is B♭. sₗ
1. Abul khat seh Houbung Theng,
Christa bou ahi,
Athilsem thahpen ahi,
Lhagao-Theng le twi-ja,
Van’a kon ahung lhatdoh in, I
Amou deitah ding a,
Athisan theng in achon,
Ahinna jong apei.
2. Namtin jouse laha lhenchom,
Vannoi-ja Houbung khat,
Sochat na Thupha pumkhat,
Pakai khat tahsan khat,
Pathen khat seh Mintheng in,
Antheng ajongkhom’e,
Kinep na khat a kikou,
Lungset na chang cheh dia.
3. Agim thoh kidang tah hi,
Mi jousen amutai,
Thuhil lhem kibung khen in,
Houbung asukhen tai,
Hinla, Pakai Mitheng ho,
Van chung gam athong e,
Hinla kana jan muthim
Jingkah kipana in.
4. Tohgim genthei na laha,
Lhepna gal sat jong leng,
Phat lhin ding ngah jing kahi,
Tonsot’a chamna ding,
Gam loupi tah hung lhung ding,
Ngah jing a um kahi,
Houbung galjona loupi,
Akhon ni leh hiding.
5. Leiset Houbung toh cheng,
Thum pum’a Pathen khat hi,
Giltah le theng a chengkhom,
Olmun loding ho toh,
Vo nunnom le Atheng ho,
Pakai lungset chang te,
Lung neng le lung nem tah a
Chung gam’a ichen-diu.
Reference: Doh is E. m

songs.title: KAHIL THEI POI HOIJA HUNG KON

lines: 1. Ka hil theipoi hoiya hungkon,
Ka lunga chamna hi ;
Chamnan alo bou hi kahei,
Damheova ahin lo,
Ka lunga chamna luipi along (2 vei)
Ka vel’a setna twi nong jongle ;
Christan eiumpi nai.
2. Toh gim noiya um hijong leng,
Luipi kisel long jing ;
Ka lha lengvai dangnou jing ding,
Changa lunghel lou ding.
3. Ka seithipoi a-ngailutna,
Chungnung eipeh-u hi ;
Kalung sung thimjing semhohta,
Tahsan jal bou ahi.
4. Kahil theipoi ipia eilhen,
Gim thoh le thi dinga ;
Hinla athoh khompi hileng,
Ama toh leng chang ding.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ
1. Jesun eipeove ahinkho Calvary
Lhang chung a (Calvary’a)
Eiho set jal’in Calvary
Lhang chung a (Calvary’a).
Lallukhuh isanthei nauvin ;
Athisan eipeuve (Loupihen)
Vahchoi-jun Amin.
3 Bs:
Amintheng vahchoi jute eihuhhing pu loupi leng,
Vahchoi-jun,
3 All:
Vahchoi-jun,lhatdam na ahinpolhai,
Sam leute gamtin’a seiphong leute,
3 Bs:
Cheu te tunin,
3 All:
Seiphong leute,
3 A&T:
Lung lengvai te heng ah,
3 All: Tunia pat in, i
3 A&T: Tong pan in jing geijin,
3 All : Pathen thu hil’in Lallukhuh san’a din,
3 Bs: Van gam’a, i
3 All: Seipeh un manbei jin eilhat dohtai? %
3 A&B: Chonse te,
3 All: Thupha hi gam jousea seiphong leute,
3 Bs: Seiphong leu te,
3 All: Gam jouse a,
3 A&T: Mihem acheng jousen,
3 All: Seipeh uvin,
3 A&T: Pathen thilsem jouse,
3 All: Vahchoi-jun eihuhhingpu loupi leng.
2. Golle pai bei-jin achang in
Ibat jouseu asai(Calvary’a)
Heng ibat joiise Jesun asalhai(Calvary)
Athutep lungset jallin gal jona imutaove,
Vahchoi-jun Amin.
3. Chung gam theng a in hoitah gotsan
Eikoipeh u (Chung gam’a)
Chung gam theng noma,
In hoitah gotsan,(Chung gam’a)
Eingailutnao gingchan kei
Van gam theng mi kahitai,
Vahchoi-jun Amin.
Reference: Doh is B♭. sₗ
1. Kalung a chamna kipana adime,
Ka Lhandampu chu ken kamua pat,
Ka lunga nisa vah bangin avahtai,
Ka lung a chamna chu kanei tai.
Ka lung a cham na kanei tai(2)
Ken vahchoi jing tang e,
Ka Lhandampu chu,
Ka lunga cham na chu kanei tai.
2. Leiset na thil le lo goudang tamnan jong,
Kidang tah a hinkho kikhel na,
Leiset gouva kon ken lunglhai na neilou,
Christa kamu bou hi kipana.
3. Hibang hinkho kikhel kipana kanei,
Ken iti Amin kasei jou dem,
Tonsot kipana thu a lhatdam na hi,
Mihem kam’a seijou thei hilou.
Reference: Doh is G♭. mₗ

songs.title: THILSEM KIDANG HO HI KAGEL DOH KOM LEH

lines: 1. Thilsem kidang hohi kageldoh komle,
Pathen loupina chu akilange ;
Vana Ahsi le Van gin kithong jonghi,
Aboncha Ama thahatna ahi.
Chuteng kalhan vahchoi ding Huhhingpa,
Aloupi ngei, aloupi ngei ;
Chuteng kalhan vahchoi ding Huhhingpa,
Aloupi ngei, aloupi ngei.
2. Gammang thimjing laiya keima kalenge,
Hamngei kidang vahchoi O chu kajai ;
Molsang chungvum a konin ka galdot le,
Nemheo huilhi le gin ngei chu kajai.
3. Pathen milungset kidang chu kahe tai,
Chapa changkhat leiset’a hin sollhan ;
Olmo louvin Calvary Cross chunga chun,
Ka chonset jouse apomang sohtai.
4. Loupi tah a Pakai chu ahung tengle ,
A inpia eipui tou niteng chule ;
Kalung le ka lha kipana dimset ding.
“Aloupi ngei” ting ting vahchoi tange.
Reference: Doh is B♭. mₗ
1. Tunia Pakai nitheng hung lhung,
Avahchoi din ikikhomui ;
Jingpia thouvin Ama houdin,
I kipa nau thu lhut ute.
2. Chonset pum’a thupha choiyin.
Eihon thuse ijop jingun ;
Alungset kidang igel le.
Eihinghoi datmo aume.
3. Ni gup sungin na itongun,
Pakai nikho nit ding ahi ;
Ama thu jeng bou gelna din,
Pakai nikho asem ahi.
4. Kalung gel’in thu manlou ho,
Van gam thu tailou gelda hen ;
Pathen loupile Athenje,
Ngaito jo hen adol ahi.
5. Jesu banga thilpha bol’in,
Ama banga thusei theinan ;
Pakai lhatheng bou ka ngaiye,
Van choldo naa eipui din.
Reference: Doh is F. d
1. Pakai namin kija jing hen,
Na lenggam chal jing hen,
Mitin Na anga thipchet ding,
Na gam hung lhun ni le.
Pakai thenson…. hiche in hi,
Hin bunglhan Lhagao Theng ;
Cheng hen namite lunggil’a,
Phatthei chamkim hin pen.
2. Nangma Hou-in ka molsouve,
Na hoidamna jal’in ;
Na intheng lomtah hi dingin,
Lomin sem chamkimin.
3. Maicham thilto taona muntheng,
Chonse lungheina mun ;
Na gam chal le naloupina,
Kin loupi, neina ding.
4. Kivop jingin na-Hou-in hi,
Thunoh lungjin dal’in ;
Na O jaidamin hil jingin,
Nagam hunglhun kahsen.
Reference: Doh is A♭. d
1. Pathen thu goubom hong’ute,
Gou lutah kim’a kikhol ;
Tahsa gou toh tethei hilou,
Vangam gou tonsot hinna.
Hol’ute …. lung thengin,
Lhagaova gunchu tah-in ;
Sau hite ….. Kipa la’n,
Athu hing thahat pen chu.
2. Hiche Sunday Sekul’a hin.
Pathen le mihem dei kim ;
Lhagao hinna tahsa monna,
Pathen thuguh kiphonna.
3. Athu ngailu sun le jan’a,
Gunchu le thanom hiute ;
Luipanga thingphung hinpha bang,
Pakai dia hinpha hiute.
4. Nahsahmo lou jenin sopi,
Nangma kisong lou jenin ;
Pakai bel’a Athu nun bou,
Van gou lo ding akhon nia.
Reference: Doh is G. d
1. Lhagao ninou ka ngai Pakai,
Nei nai kom le jan um jilou,
Lei-ja beihen meipi jing hi,
Nang le ding namite akon.
2. Imut nom jankho daitwi kai,
Ka mit choltah kangcha khang a,
Ka lungel khon na pen hihen,
Pakai om’a kicholdo jing.
3. Nei umpin jing apat jan gei,
Nang louva hing thei kahipoi,
Nei umpin jankho anai teng,
Nang louvin ka i-mu ngampoi.
4. Tunin nacha vahvei khat tou,
Na thupeh geldau um jong le,
Achung a lungset na tongin,
Set na ihmu din phal hih in.
5. Ka jing tho teng u neinai jun,
Nei umpin phat thei neiboh un,
Na lungset na twikhang len chun,
Na van gam’a neipui lhung un.
Reference: Doh is F. d
1. Kum lhomcha bou umta.
Phat chomcha hung bei ding ;
Ngai chengto ibol khomna diu,
Lhan’a mollem ho toh.
O Pakai neisem phan,
Na niloupi nia din ;
Na thisan lun neisop thengin,
Ka setna sil thengin.
2. Ni Ihomcha bou umta,
Hiche gam thim’a hin ;
Nisa ngailouna ichendiu,
I monnau chung chon ding.
3. Chomkhat meipi ajing,
Hiche songthop gama ;
Huipi nun louna ichen diu,
Luipi nong umlou ding.
4. Gentheina chomkhat bou,
Kikhenna chomcha bou ;
Tohgim kana chomkhat joule,
Kana umtalou ding,
5. Hicheng hi chomkhat bou,
Ama hungkit loiding ;
I hinna diuva thoukit pa,
Ama toh leng chang ding.
Reference: Doh is F. m

songs.title: KUMLUI MANGTA NI LE LHA KIHEI TA

lines: 1. Kumlui mangta ni le lha kum kihei ta,
Tujing kumthah ni emsel soh ta ;
Jalna konin hung thoudoh-un lhaisel’in,
Kipah’in lem’ute ninou emsel toh.
Hungun, hungun Pakai vahchoiyute,
Alungsetna sumil ding koiham ?
Kum lhunga damsel’a Eichingpau ahi,
Tonsot, tonsot’in Amin loupi jing hen.
2. Hinkho lhinga chemasa ingaiteu chu,
Tuhin vangam noma alengui ;
Iding chu ho pul idou diu ham leiya,
Kum lhunga Eichingpau Pathen vahchoiyun.
3. Kipana thu le tohga kengin hungun.
Tunin Pa ahunge vang hom din ;
Lhandampun nachonna thuphon angai nom,
Kum lhunga mona phongin lang set bang tan.
4. Ningkum lhaute tukum lemnan la saute,
Na bonun na inkon hung lhauvin ;
Nung le Pa vangpeh changlouse kisih ding,
Lhaisel’in lemute Pa le Lhandampu.
Reference: Doh is F. sₗ
1. Pakai Pathen le Jehovah,
Kahung taovui Na anga ;
Hiche chapang hung kipui hi,
Lungset’in vang jouse pen.
Hiche chapang, hiche naosen,
Kahin puiyui Na anga ;
Lungset themin kichin jingin.
Ahinkho bulhin kahsen.
2. Pentil’a pat Nangma semin,
Ahung penge pi le pu ;
Akhang khangin nahin chingin,
Na lungset hoithem jal’in.
3. Hibang chun tun hiche naocha,
Nahin pensah-e leiya ;
Lungset themin phattheina pen,
Tun jong khonung teng jongle.
4. Pentil neilou hingjing Pathen,
Seijui dihtah hisah-in ;
Leiset set thim jing lah a hin,
Pa Pathenin ching jingin.
Reference: Doh is E, d
1. Bei hen ka tahsan mo, ka koma Jesu,
Hoi nante Pathenin Ama chate chu ;
Kei ahenga tao leng thonmon ngai nante,
Ka koma naum le ka olmona bei.
2. Kalam mu athim vang, Aman eipui nai,
Ken athu ka-ngai ding Aman eipui chu ;
Kong keh hen mijouse lhamang jeng jongle,
Ama thusei vang chu, khangtou jing tei ding.
3. Ama milungset ken, tuman kamu tai,
Kei athita dingsa, eina chohing tai ;
Aman a-o ngei chun, eina lhem damin.
Aman lung lhaisel’in, eina huhhing tai.
4. Nat le genthei lengvai lungdon olmona,
Keima lung pha mongem Aman seisoh ta ;
Sochatna ding chu kahei Ama seina,
Iti nama jongle jui jinge Pakai.
5. Koimacha ngamlou ding ama thoh bang chu,
Athoh tai michonse sochat theina din ;
Lamse joa ache tai kei lampi sanga ;
Pakai che naa chu kei che dang katem ;
Reference: Doh is A. d

songs.title: I PAKAI JU CHU LEISET MITEN ANAHEPOI

lines: 1. I-Pakai-ju chu leiset miten anahepoi,
Mi tamtah in tuni geijin asang thei pouve,
Ama hungloi ta ding,tahbeh a hung loi ding,
Lallukhuh san’a ding phat sotta lou hel ding.
Pakai Laltouna a atou ding
Phat ahung nai tai,
Pakai Pathen chu vanlai jol’a
Kona hungkum ding,
Ama ngah jing ho kipana
Dimset ding ahiuve,
Lallukhuh san’a ding phat sotta lou ding.
2. Van gam vah chu atahsan te ding a bou ahi.
Jesun Amaho chu ponbang vamleh silpeh ding,
Huhhingpa mel amuteng mailhai sel ta ding,
Lallukhuh isanaa diu nikho teng chule.
3. Genthei na ho mil’ing ting chonset nuse tang e,
Lunggim hesoh kichat na ding umtalou hel ding,
Huhhingpa kamu teng kipana dim tante,
Lallukhuh sana ding hung lhung ding ahitai.
4. Kipana nikho chu itih le ahung Ihung dem?
Lunglhai sel’a eihon inga jing dingu ahi.
Amangsa Kelngoi ho chu gahol’uhite,
Lallukhuh sang a ipancheh ding u ahi.
Reference: Doh is A. sₗ
1. Vangil chung lam'a khun Vantil ten la asai,
Alengpau vahchoina la ngei chu,
Laltouna kimvel'in long del'in asauve,
Achainau la ngei Van kipana,
A vahchoi:- Avahchoi jui chunga Van mitheng te hon jong,
Kelngoinou :- Kelngoinou lem la asauve.
Chu lathah :- Chu lathah ngei a-itih a chultih neilou
Kelngoinou :- Kelngoinou chu avah jing jeng e.
2. Pathen le Chapa chen na chu a vah jing,
Muthim thahat na aum tapoi.
Chu khopi kot jouse chu Sana a kijem,
Kelngoi nou chu avah jiing jenge.
3. Tonsot kipana gam ilhun phat teng uleh,
Kana lhisona beisoh tading,
Kel leh dangchah natna jong kihe talou ding,
Kelngoinou kvah choi jng tading.
Reference: Doh is A♭.

songs.title: KOI HUNG KUM LHAM VAN A KON?

lines: 1. Koi hung kum lham van a kon ?
Eihuhhingpau Jesu;
Naosen’a hung peng koi ham?
Jesu eihuhhingpau.
Lim tah-in vahchoi cheh-un,
Sochatna ahin polhai;
Ama sang’a pha umlou,
Jesu eihuhhing pau.
2. Thingpel’a kithat koi ham?
Jesu eihuhhing pau;
Nang le kei ding’a hinna,
Jesu eihuhhingpau.
3. “Ngaidam nang’e” tia koi ham?
Jesu eihuhhingpau;
“Tahsanun hing’un” ati,
Jesu eihuhhingpau.
4. Tua chunga leng chang koi ham?
Jesu eihuhhingpau;
Athu ingai diu koi ham?
Jesu eihuhhingpau.
Reference: Doh is G. m
1. Hungun Pathen chate hungun,
Na sempau Pathen henga ;
Athupha hinna le damna,
Hung ngaiyun kahinpoi ken.
Hibou hinna le damna thu,
Sochatna nopna lungmonna ;
Achapa Jesu Christa chun,
Hung kumlhan eihung peuve.
2. Indoi, seldoi, uitheng kithoi,
Pailha soh-un abonchan ;
Apanna, aphatna umlou,
Jou kibol thu aboncha.
3. Thu kitan ni sochat theina,
Jesu thisan jengcha bou ;
Chuti lou chun adang umlou,
Jesu bou chu sochatna.
4. Phat anai tai ni alhing tai,
Man gangun tahsan loiyun ;
Achuti loule homlou ding ,
Pathen thupi tanni ding,
5. Hung kumlhan tin Christa mong chu,
Avantil theng sangja toh ;
Vannoi mihem khom soh-in tin,
Thu atan ding aboncha.
6. Chuni athu tan nia ding din,
Hung kigon phasa demin ;
“Naphai” tia na lah theina din,
Kunin taovin A-anga.
Reference: Doh is E♭. sₗ
1. Lhandampu eipuina chan’a,
Ka ngaichat jouse eipe jing ;
Alungset ban chun eihoi jing,
Lam tina ken kajui ding.
Eipuina chan’a kajui ding,
Eipuina chan’a kajui ding ;
Eipuina chan’a kajui ding,
Lam tina ken kajui ding.
2. Ka lampi thim hen jing jongle,
Ka thachol hen genthei jong leng ;
Alungset nan eikipa sah,
Lam tina ken kajui ding.
3. Lei genthei nan eibom jongle,
Set twipi kinong jeng jongle ;
Alungset banin eihoi jing,
Lam tina ken kajui ding.
4. Leiset genthei nan eihen teng,
A in noma din eikouve ;
Kilungsetna twipi gal’a,
Lam tina ken kajui ding.
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ

songs.title: KIPAH UN PAKAI VAHCHOI NAN LA SAUVIN

lines: 1. Kipah-un ! Pakai vahchoinan la sauvin,
Tumging toh thon vahchoi jingun ;
Eilhatdoh tauve ilou ikichat diu,
Jesu ilamkai aum nai.
Pan eipanpiu hen, (3 vei)
Koiman eijou lou diu ;
Koi haimo ?
Koimachan jong eidou jou lou diu.
2. Pakaiya hat’un kipah thanom jingun,
Nitin hat’un chondih jingun,
Thudih a dingun satanin nanai teng,
Aman thahat eipe jing diu.
3. Athudih a dingun athutep thonlou,
Christa a thakhat ihiuve ;
Lei hi mang jongle Ama hing jingjeng ding,
Ti in Bible in aseiye.
4. Pakaiya um jingun athun chon jingun,
Ama tonsot hinna ahi ;
Lhagao nat damna Pakai Jesu ahi,
Ama tailou lam dang umlou.
Reference: Doh is g. sₗ
1. Kache tei ding gamnom jon chun,
Thina ding muthim jing jong le,
Jesu Christa gal lamkai pa,
Gal loupi pen kajo tei ding.
Kei kache ding hinna khopia,
Pakai chen na gamnom a chun,
Jordan luipi gal lang khat’a,
Kajot jing ding kicha louva.
2. Jerusalem gam nom tah chu,
Ajon tauve Mitheng sangjan,
Jesu Christa gal lamkai pan,
“Hung un” tin Joy asam jing e.
3. Kotpi phung hoi kalhun teng le,
Van Mitheng te asang ajan,
Jesu Christa loupi chungnung,
Gal loupi pen ajousoh tai.
4. Kache tei ding gam nom jon chun,
Ka ding in thimpi jing jong le,
Jesu Christa gal lamkai pan.
Eive jing e kei mi chonse.
Reference: Doh is D. sₗ

songs.title: LENG CHRISTA HUNG KIT DING LEISET CHUNG A

lines: 1. Leng Christa hung kit ding leiset chung a,
Vantil pipui sumkon gin kithong chu,
Christa Houbung lhenchom ten ngah ute,
Kotpi hin hong ding Christa chun.
2. Christan a Houbung Ihenchom te khom ding,
Van kelngoi golvah loupia lha ding,
Chua lutte chu tonsot gei-ja ding,
Nop kemlou ding Christa kom’a.
3. Selang dah gin ngei le Baja toh thon,
Khongpi gin thong le la sah Aw ngei thon,
Lem-uhite Leng le Lai loupi chu,
Kithong jing hen vahchoi na la.
4. Loupi chungnung Pathen lem’u hite,
Leng Christa chu vahchoi jing uhite,
Lhatdam chate jousen lem u hite.
Hallelujah min loupi hen
Reference: Doh is E.
1. Latah khat gama konin,
Amangsa ahol jinge ;
Ngaiyun kelngoi Chingphan nitin’in eikou,
Mol le lhang le phaichama,
Nisa vah le go noiya,
Aman eihol jingui avah mangsa te.
Gamla kon, gamla kon,
Aman eihol jingui avah mangsate ;
Molle lhang le phaicham a,
Nisa vah le go noiya,
Ngaiyun kelngoi Chingphan nitin’in eikou.
2. Ven akeng thisan sohta !
Bolsetna ling dimset ta !
Ama phaichama daiya alen laiyin,
Kol lah le song thop lah a,
Hakat tah in eihil’ui ;
Aman eihol’ui amite huhhing din.
3. O ! kichaita chujan chu,
Amangsa kihol kimta ;
Mol le lhang thim lah a kona hung nauvam ?
Hungun kelngoi chingpu nung ;
Juiyute thanom tah in ;
Pakaiyin nemheocha eipui lai sungin.
Reference: Doh is E♭. m

songs.title: LHASAM JENG JONG LEUHEN LHA POUTE

lines: 1. Lhasam jeng jong leuhen lhapoute,
Kipana imu theina dingun ;
Jesu Christa nung chu juiyute,
Del jingu hite iphah mauvin.
Aniseh-in del jingu hite,
Ka lhasame tia hailou dingin ;
Jesu Christan eipente thahat,
Del jingu hite iphah mauvin.
2. Lhasam jeng jong leuhen lhapoute,
Genthei thoh hi umjengta jongle ;
Jesu Christa chu ahi eiding,
Ijona diu tha dang aum poi.
3. Lhasam jeng jong leuhen lhapoute,
Pu hite lal Christa thingpel chu ;
Eihon iheuve genthei thoh ding,
Su mangu hite aboncha chun.
4. Lhasam jeng jong leuhen lhapoute,
Adihtah imu theina diuvin ;
Gamtina khovah ahung naiye,
Abanchan ahungchal khovah chu.
Reference: Doh is E♭. s
1. “Ka lha le ka thisan,
Ken nang din kape tai ;
Na sochat theina din,
Genthei tah in Ka thi,
Kapei, kapei ken ka thisan,
Nangman ineipeh em ?
2. Ka pa in nom tah le !
Ka latlouna loupi ;
Ka dalhai nang chunan,
Gim le da ka thoh-in ;
I na hin dalhah em nangman,
Keima nei chuna a.
3. Vana nop ka dalhan,
Genthei tin ka thoh-in ;
Damun meikonga kon,
Na sochat theina din ;
Nangman chuta i-na thoh em ?
Keima nei chuna a.
4. Van kona hinna,
Nopna, damna, olna ;
Ngaidam kahin polhan.
Manbeiyin nang kapei ;
I-na hinpoh em kei dinga ?
Keima i-neipeh em ?
Reference: Doh is C. s
1. Detna neilou kei tobang din,
Na thisan kei din alonge ;
Nahenga hung din nei kouve,
O ka-Pakai kei ka hunge !
2. Vaicha genthei mitcho kei din,
Lungsung natna sudam nahi ;
Heng ka ngaichan Nanga mudin,
O ka-Pakai kei ka hunge !
3. Sangin nate kei tobang hi,
Ngaidam, suhtheng, eilha ong din ;
Na thutep ka tansan jal’in,
O ka Pakai kei ka hunge !
4. Na lungset hetheilou keima,
Na thupeh chan sukeh jong leng;
Tun nangma a bou hi dingin,
O ka Pakai kei ka hunge !
Reference: Doh is E♭. d.

songs.title: HINKHO TWIPI CHUNG A KA LHAGAO KINGAN

lines: 1. Hinkho twipi chung a ka lhagao kingan,
Chonset pohgih leng vai jin,
Keima neilheng in ti awnem kajah na chu,
Ka Lhagao choldona kong kaimun.
Choldona kong kaimun’a ka lhagao ngan,
Twikhanglen a olmo lou,
Huipi le twipin twikhang len hot ling jong le,
Choldona kong kaimun’a Ka-Pakai.
2. Alungset na ngong koidin kaki phal tai,
Athu seiho ka tahsan tai,
Bulput na kilham in ka Lhagao kong kaita,
Choldona kongkai mun’a Ka Pakai.
3. Pakai-jin eithensah apat ka Lhagao,
Lungset thusim chu ahetai,
Atahsan chan huhhing ding Jesu thisan chun,
Choldona kongkai mun’a eipui.
4. Lungset John bang Pakai-ja kingai leng,
Lungsung kipan dimset ding,
Huipi,twipin eijou lou ding Pakai kom’a,
Choldona kongkai mun’a Ka-Pakai.
Reference: Doh is C.

songs.title: AMA MIN NGEI KITHANG TAH CHU

lines: 1. Ama min ngei kithang tah chu,
Themgao hon aheuve;
Ahung ding ahe masauve,
Vannoi chamna Pakai.
Kidang tah a thusei thempa !
Hatchungnung pen Pakai !
Tonsot hinna Pakai Ama !
Pathen Chapa ahi !
2. Ama mintheng avahchoiyun,
Vana um lhatheng ten;
Loupi chungnung pen Ama min,
Eiho kingaina ding.
3. Choiyun Ama mintheng tah chu,
Hatchungnung pen Ama;
Ama vanga thahat kimu,
Vangam lhun theina ding.
Reference: Doh is C. s

songs.title: TUN ATHANG DING LE A GAL JOU DINGIN

lines: 1. Tun athang dingle agaljou dingin,
Lalmang Pakai ading tai ;
Asepai hat sangja chu aloiyin,
Gal kisatna munna chun,
Malam jonin aloite chun,
Semtoh dingin angaiton ;
Alamkai pau vahchoi dingin,
A aovui kipah tah-in.
Gal gin um chu koiham ajou ding,
Koimacha umlou ahat ;
Mithengte le ginchat te din,
Jona thutepsa ahi.
2. Tun athang dingle agaljou din,
Koi ham leng kidang tah chu ?
Asepai anung juite jouse chun,
Itih a vahchoi chimlou ;
Ka Pakai le Lhandampu chu,
Lhandampu lalpen ahi,
Agam thenga chun van ahsi,
Bangin a em’ui kum khon.
3. Tun athang dingle agaljou din,
Nang leng chungnung mang chungnung ;
Lei laltouna le aloupina chu,
Sepai sangja kumkhoa din ;
Ginchatna ding thumte chu,
Adougal ajo tengle ;
Pakai laltouna muna chun,
Olna loupi changta ding.
Reference: Doh is B♭. d.
1. Vanthah le leithah kamu-e,
Van masa le leilui mang ding ;
Twikhanglen jong umtalou ding,
Khotheng hoile Jerusalem.
Gamthah a Mou neipu aum,
Pathen’a kon mikhat kamui ;
Laltouna kon ahinsei chu,
Pathen mihem lah a alhai.
2. Pathen mi ahi amaho,
A-pa Pathen mi ahijeh ;
Amitlhiu athehhul peh in,
Thina umkit talou hel ding.
3. Lunghel ka le nat abeitai,
Thil masa jong mang ding ahi ;
Chule laltouna kona chun,
“Ven thil kasem thah-e” ati.
4. “Hi thu hi kisut’in” ati.
“Thil hung lhung ding ahi,” ati,
“Kei Alpha le Omega hing,
Hinna twi manbeiyin penge.”
Reference: Doh is D. s
1. Pakai thupeh kahinpoi Halleluijah !
Hichu nangho dinga hinna ;
Hi Ama thupeh ahi Halleluijah !
Veuvin na hinna diu chu ahi.
Ven lang hingun sopite,
Na hinnau Jesu veuvin ;
Hi Ama thupeh ahi Halleluijah,
Veuvin na hinna diu chu ahi.
2. Lungset a thah kahin poi Halleluijah,
Nangho ding ahi goldei ho ;
Chung gama hungkon ahi Halleluijah !
Pakai Jesun eihilchen tauve.
3. Hinna nahinpe tauve Halleluijah !
Na lhagao tonsot’a hing ding ;
Pakai jeng bou veleu chun Halleluijah !
Ama tahsan bou chu sochatna.
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ

songs.title: PHACHAM LIM A CHU KEIMA KACHE TEIDING

lines: 1. Phaicham lima chu keima kache tei ding,
Hin Lhandampu lungset noiya kache ding ;
Aman itih hijongle eilhalou ding,
Aman chua nopna eipe ding.
Phaicham lima, (2 vei)
Phaicham lima chu keima kache tei ding ;
Hin Jordan twi nongin eisuse lou ding,
Chua chamna aum ken kahei.
2. Phaicham lima chu keima kache tei ding,
Lung gentheina jouse jong beisoh tading ;
Jesun aban thahat’a eituh jing ding,
Keima lung genthei kit talou ding.
3. Phaicham lima chun kei vahle jeng jong leng,
Jing khovah loupitah chu ken kamu ding ;
Jordan gal’a Pa vahchoina kei lha ding,
Chu muna lungsetnan eingah jing.
4. Phaicham lim lama chu keima kache ding,
Ka Pakai chena chana ken kajui ding ;
Phaicham lima Aman kei eipui jing ding,
Keiman choldona kamu kahsen.
Reference: Doh is F. sₗ

songs.title: NA KOT A DING JING LE CHUN

lines: 1. Na kot’a ding jing le chun, Lut sah-in ;
Nemheo chan jaiyin nakou, O nemin !
Lut sah-in ache kah-in,
Lut sah-in Pakai theng chu ;
Ahunge na huhhing din, Lut sah-in.
2. Na lungsung kot hongin lang, Lut sah-in ;
Lemin kile kit’inte, Kipa pin ;
Pakai lungset golpha chun,
Na lhagao huhhingin tin;
Van golvahna nalhah ding, Lut sah-in.
3. Alungset O gin ngei chu, Hon peh-in ;
Na-Pakai na-Pathen chu, Lut sah-in ;
Na lungkot akiu jinge,
Na lungsung kotpi phunga ;
Pakai chu vahchoi jingin, Lhandampu.
4. Vana kona leiya hin, Lut sah-in ;
Van golvahna lha dingin, Na kouve ;
Na lhagao huhhingin tin,
Leiset hinna abei teng ;
Van ina napui tou ding, Lut sah-in.
Reference: Doh is D. m

songs.title: KHATVEI PATHEN CHA KHAT THI DING IN AUM

lines: 1. Khatvei Pathen cha khat thi dingin aum,
Mihaopa kot benga atouve ;
Apanna umlou mi haopa sum le sel,
Lebu din vannah a-ngah jinge.
Vantilten apuitai olna gam lama,
Chung lama la ngei gin akithong ;
Lhandampun alamtoi van golvahna din,
Lungdei gol kholna mun van gamnom.
2. I chunguva kidohna aum jinge,
I hinkho bu-lhinna iti ding ;
I lamjot pum’a pohgih ipoh laiyun,
Lung donga i-mitlhiu lon laihin.
3. Pakai seijui nanghon nakhol khom jongle,
Vana gou manlun na ngah jinge ;
Genthei kipan gel’in umsot talou ding,
Kikhelna ding nitin anaiye.
4. Manon Pakai lam chu manon chunga din,
Na phat le nana toh Pakai din ;
Na toh lhom jongle nasan ding atame,
Tua gentheina kipa Lallukhuh.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ
1. Pathenna ikipa jingu,
Halna simthei louvin ;
Agou kholna vangam nom chu,
Chonnem na din heute.
Chukom chu hinna ahi,
Mun emtah vangam nom ahi ;
Christa puma eiya ahi,
Kipah tah-in avahchoi la saute.
2. Manbeiyin chonsetna jouse,
Moh-in ngaidam ahi ;
Ngaidamna chu Pakai Jesu,
Thisan chu ahitai.
3. Chonset thahat jona pen chu,
Ama ahung kipei ;
Chonna athen theina ding chun,
Atheng chu ijatai.
4. Pathen na halna aume,
Halna chu ajal’e ;
Pathenin Christa eipeuve,
I lungu atheng tai.
Reference: Doh is B♭. sₗ
1. Jing ninou sangin nahoijoi,
Lhandampu le ka Lengpa ;
Nahoi le navah emsel chu,
Ka lungin jaichim theilou.
Jing ninou sangin nahoi joi,
Sunlai ni sangin jong navah joi ;
Loupi chungnung nang umna a,
Mei le thim aki hoh-e.
2. Ponbang vamleh a kijem Nang,
Na Lallukhuh emsel toh ;
Na vaihomna Leng gama chun,
Tonsot Pakai Nang nahi.
3. O na milungset loupi chu,
Na mikhoto chu haona ;
Na lenggam kilungsetna chun,
Kei din jong mun aseme.
4. Hinlai sana gui atan teng,
Leiset hinkho hung mang ding ;
Tang louvin chu gam hoiya chun,
Na vahchoi la ken sange.
Reference: Doh is A. m
1. Jesu kei eiching le Eihuhhingpu,
Ka gingchai Nang ; (2 vei)
Loupina chu ka tepkha masa tai,
Nangma ka tahsan lai hin.
Ka tahsane,
Jesu Eihuhhingpa Nang ;
Loupina chu ka tepkha masa tai,
Nangma ka tahsan lai hin.
2. Ka kimvel twipi kinong jeng jongle,
Ka gingchai Nang ; (2 vei)
Songpi chunga kalha kaphut dettai,
Pakai Nang ka tahsane.
3. Muthimin eium kimvel jeng jongle,
Ka gingchai Nang ; (2 vei)
Nangma thahat chu nitinin kamui,
Nangma ka tahsan lai hin.
4. Vo Jesu Eihuhhing, Eiching kagol,
Ka gingchai Nang ; (2 vei)
Nangman neihoiyin neihuhhing jingin,
Nangma ka tahsan lai hin.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ
1. Pathen mi khotona kemlou,
I lamvai nau lam jousea ;
Lengvai gentheite salvah jing,
Pathen chu vah le lungset.
Pathen chu vah le lungset,
Pathen chu vah le lungset.
2. Phat kikhel jing nitin kikhel,
Mite kem khang kikhel jing ;
Pa lungset vang kemtih umlou,
Pathen chu vah le lungset.
3. Nidan khat jeng jong kikhel lou,
Pathen phatna kilang jing ;
Mite Pathen vah le lungset,
Pathen chu vah le lungset.
Reference: Doh is B♭. sₗ

songs.title: PAKAI TOH KILOI ITI NOP HITAM

lines: 1. Pakai to kiloi iti nop hitam ?
Tonsot longlou banjal’a kingai ;
Hibang phattheina, hibang nom lenna,
Tonsot longlou banjal’a kingai.
Kingai, kingai,
Iti jeng jongle ka hoina ;
Kingai, kingai,
Tonsot longlou banjal’a kingai.
2. Leiset hinlai khojin le ka hoina,
Tonsot longlou banjal’a kingai ;
Nitin chamna lampi avah jinge,
Tonsot longlou banjal’a kingai.
3. Gin ding ken neilou lungdon umtalou,
Tonsot longlou banjal’a kingai ;
Lung ol, jalenna, chamna ken neita,
Tonsot longlou banjal’a kingai.
Reference: Doh is A. m
1. Hinkho thah mel akidange,
Lhandampu kamu nin ;
Ka lungset Lhandampu dei um,
Ken kamui Cross phunga chun.
Lungdon tijat beisohta,
Jesun muthim salvahta ;
Van chung gam nom la talou,
Lhandampu kamu nin.
2. Ei lungsetna O nem kajai,
Lhandampu kamu nin ;
A lhatdamna thu hinpo lhan,
Tun keima eilhatdoh tai.
3. Lhandampun eikou ken kajai,
Min loupi ka chang tai ;
Nasa tah-in kei eihoiye,
Huhhingna chu kachang tai.
4. Akhut’in keima eikai lei,
Lhandampu kamu nin ;
Alaltouna limdam noiya,
Eihuhhingpa kamu ding.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ

songs.title: THIL HUNGLHUNG DING KASEI THEI POI

lines: 1. Thil hung lhung ding kasei theipoi,
Pathen chen na vangam nom chu,
Angailut na hen ka tahsan,
Alampi olna eipui ding.
Ama lampi .... keiman kahei,
Eiching jing e....aniseh in,
Alungdei lam kin ka bol ding,
Aman eipui keiman kahei.
2. Thil um ding dan kahe theipoi,
Aman ka pohgih angai jang ding,
Olna eipeh chu ken kahei,
Lallukhuh chu ken kasan ding.
3. Alampi hah hen tou jong le,
Gim genthei thimpi jing jong le,
Hichu phat khat le mang thah ding,
Nikhat Van innoma Ihung ding.
4. Chemasa igol ngaihou toh,
Lung khatna ilenkhom kitdiu,
Angailut kidang la sading,
Kimai toa Ama imu di
Reference: Doh is F. sₗ
1. Kouna Aw ngai uvin,
Tua che ding koiham ?
Koiham kasei ngailou,
Ken kasei lou ham ?
Koiham eipanpi ding,
Galsatna mun’a ?
Dihtah le dettah a,
Pathena ding ding ?
Jesun aloi ponlap noiya achinge ;
Eihon ibon’un, leiset jouvu hite.
2. Pathenin “Choldo’uvin,
Phat alhin kah sen ;
Satan galsat dingin,
Kiging jinguvin !
Thoh hatna ilhagao,
I huhhing dingu ;
Pathen galsatna lung,
Le tha pannu te !
3. Sumkon gin chu ngaiyun,
Sauvin kijot’un ;
I lamkai len pau le,
I leng loupiu chu !
Lungkhat le thakhat in,
Gamla le naiya,
Kijot’un galsatna,
Kouna mun’a chun.
Reference: Doh is C. d
1. Janthip jan, Jan theng jan,
Thipchet’in, Vahseh-in ;
Nu-ngah thengsel mi nu toh,
Naosen pengthah thengsel to,
Nomin alum e. (2)
2. Janthip jan, Jan theng jan,
Kelngoi ching ho tijan ;
Vana loupina hung lang,
Van min sam’un, Halleluiyah,
Lhandampu apeng. (2)
3. Jan thip jan, Jan theng jan,
Chapa lungsetna vah ;
Na mithenga kon kilang,
Lhatdohna ngailut toh ;
Pakai Christa peng. (2)
Reference: Doh is B♭. sₗ
1. Ni loupi khat imu tauve,
Hung dinga kiseisa nikho ;
Ahung nai tai eiho kinepna,
Hijongle dettah a Jesu Christa ;
Christa lam’a ding jouse chu,
Anun nopje seithei lou ding ;
Amatoh leng chang ding ahi,
Kipah un hiche Thupha hin ;
Leiset leng jouse ajou tai,
Pakai jouse ajousoh tai ;
Athahat jouse ajou tai,
Leiset mite bolse dingpa thahat ;
Avo beisoh hel tai,
Ama chan ding aum tapoi ;
Van lhagao chate loini kisat ding,
Ahi gimnei tah a ;
Christa Lhagao cha loi khat,
Avah emsel’e ;
Hat din akon’ui,
Avan gam thenga kon ;
I galpau aloite sat’in,
Jesu Christa loite ;
Satan gal’in jou talou,
“Ama chungnung pen” ;
Tin vantilten la san,
Amin loupi pen ;
Leng lah a Leng chungnung,
Pakai chunga Pakai !
Leiset lhem chavai jingpa chu,
Eimi ten a doujou tapoi ;
Ima jouse chu Christa a,
Tonsot’a Leng chang ding ahi ;
Aman Athisanin adei jouse lhat’in,
Tonsot Leng chungnung vahchoiyun.
Reference: Doh is C.d

songs.title: PATHEN MILUNGSET NA KIDANG SEITHEI LOU

lines: 1. Pathen milungset kidang seithei lou,
Mitna jong muphah joulou thil ahi,
Lungthim jeng a jong gelphah jou hilou,
Mangthah lou-va keima ding.
Lungsetna (Alt) Lungset mana nakipe,
To bang a nang napeh,
(B & T) Lungset man’a kibang a,
Kisan jeng in-(Alt) Lungset
Man’a nakipe bang in,
(B&T) Lungset na nang jong napei.
Bulhingset(Alt) Lungsetna
Bulhingset nakepe,
Nang na kipe,
(B&T).Bulhingset kilungset na hi.
Lungset nahi(Alt)Pakai Pathen in napeh ahi,
(B&T) Pakai Pathen in napeh,Pakai Pathen in,
Nang na peh bang in,
Pathen peh(Alt) Pakai Pathen in
Lungset man’a namohpeh,bang in,
Mangthah lou hella
Mangthei lou lungsetna.
2. Vannoi leiset thil nuse ngap cha a,
Let na Ie Lalna ho jong khoh sah lou,
Lungmon na le kipana ho jouse hi,
Lungset jal’a bou ahi,
3. Ka chonset na itobang hijong leh,
Pathen in eilungset na alenjoi,
Aniseh in eikipa sah jing e,
Tahbeh in eilungset ne
Reference: Doh is G. m

songs.title: CHAPA JAMMANG HUNG LOIJIN PATHEN IN NAKOUVE

lines: 1. Chapa jammang hung loiyin Pathenin nakouve,
Ngaiyin Aman nakouve nakou jinge ;
Ana vahmang jeng jong le chun hungtan tuni hin,
Lungset O’n nakou nakouve.
Nangma nakouve,
Lung genthei nangma hungin ;
Nangma nakouve,
Lung genthei nangma hungin.
2. Thoh hat le lungset tongnem Pan nangma nakouve,
Ngaiyin Aman nakouve nakou jinge ;
Hung kinungle kittan Lhathengin nakou pet hin,
Lungset O’n nakou nakouve.
3. Hungtan Napa innah nang chan ding anneh aum,
Ngaiyin Aman nakouve nakou jinge ;
Van golvah ankong nangma ngah-in aum jinge,
Ngaiyin lungset O’n na-kouve.
Reference: Doh is B♭. sₗ

songs.title: CHUNG GAM INJON IKHOL JIN PET U HIN SEIJU HITE

lines: 1. Chung gam injon ikholjin pet’u hin seiyu hite,
Lhatdamna loupi tah thupha chu ;
Sau hite kipah le la ngeiyin lungsetna O chu,
Lhatdamna loupi tah thupha chu.
Sei leuvin, sei leuvin,
Sei phongun phungtin namtina ;
Sei leuvin, Sei leuvin,
Lhatdamna loupi tah thupha chu.
2. Athu theng phongdoh dingte thisanin asop thenge,
Lhatdamna loupitah thupha chu ;
Alungsetna kemlou vah chun muthim asalvah-e,
Lhatdamna loupitah thupha chu.
3. Galsat muna la isah diu hichu galjona la,
Lhatdamna loupi tah thupha chu ;
Kivet chilna gam idalhah kahseuva isah diu,
Lhatdamna loupitah thupha chu.
4. Lhathengten tumging jouse toh thon sahjou tih neilou,
Lhatdamna loupitah thupha chu ;
Lhatdamna vou hoitah a chu Jesu avahchoi diu,
Lhatdamna loupi tah thupha chu.
Reference: Doh is B♭. sₗ

songs.title: PAKAI JIN EIKOU NAU AW GIN KAJAI

lines: 1. Pakai jin eikou nau aw gin kajai,
Tun vang kamu sohtai,
Tun vang kadin thil abukim sohtai,
Na aw jeng sang tang e.
Katah......san’e,
Nei panpi jing jengin Pakai Nang a hing e,
Ka ding in na thisan lu along lhai,
Nang a hi jing tang e.
2. Pakai akon lungset na kamutai,
Ka lung ahal jing tai,
Na vang in lhatdam na chu kachang tai,
Nang jeng tahsan tang e.
3. Setna kanei Pakai neihet jeh un,
Idang kagin dingham?
Tun vang Pakai kei kahing doh kittai,
Hinna neipeh jeh in.
4. Pakai thil jouse neipe bukim tan,
Na lungset na la chu,
Kipah tah in keiman seiphong leng e,
Na hinna Thupha chu
Reference: Doh is A. sₗ

songs.title: PAKAI NA TONG AMITE CHU AVANGPHA

lines: 1. Pakai natonga mite chu avangpha,
Songmantam banga manlu pen na lhagao ;
Lhagao tamtah chunga puidohna dingin,
Lhagao huhhing chu vangpha.
Lhagao huhhing chu vangpha,
Chung gam inpi nom laiya ;
Aman simjoulou lallukhuh isan diu,
