Lhagao huhhing chu vangpha.
2. In noma chun lungset maiso jeng vah ding,
Nitin Jesu banga hing jing jengta ding ;
Mangthah ding lhagao van lama ipui diu,
Lhagao huhhing chu vangpha.
3. Taona to thon eiho chejing jengute,
Mun tinna mangsa lhagao holdoh-in lang ;
Kelngoi ching Pakai koma ium jing diu,
Lhagao huhhing chu vangpha.
4. Gospel thu chu gamtina galhang samin,
Lungsetna thu nalung sunga ching jingin ;
Chonsen Pakaiya lung aheina dingin,
Lhagao huhhing chu vangpha.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ
1. Ka phaltheng tai Pakai dingin,
Manbeiyin kaphal theng tai ;
Ken ngai jingle tahsan jing ding,
Nitin Aman eiching ding.
Ka phaltheng soh tai,
Ka phaltheng soh tai ;
Eihuhhingpa Nanga dingin,
Ka phaltheng soh tai.
2. Ka phal thengtai, Pakai dingin,
Nemin A anga ka kun ;
Leiset nopna kanuse tai,
Tun Pakaiyin neiching tan.
3. Ka phaltheng tai, Pakai dingin,
Huhhingpan nei suthengin ;
O Lhagao theng hihen ahe,
Kei Nanga, Nang keima a.
4. Ka phaltheng tai, Pakai dingin,
Nang dingin ka kiphal tai ;
Lungsetna le thahat neipen,
Ka chunga phatthei um hen.
5. Ka phaltheng tai, Pakai dingin,
Kalung lhagaovin lohen ;
Sochatna Thupha kidang hi,
Tonsot tonsot’in thang hen.
Reference: Doh is D. m

songs.title: LUNGSET NA MAN BEI CHU APHATA

lines: 1. Lungset na man bei chu “Aphata” (2)
Lungset na Pakai lampi dih chu jot-uvin,
Eiumpi nitin in “Apha ta ka ding in”.
2. Ngailut na loupi chu “Aphata” (2)
Lungjin lungdon hesohna thohna mite dia,
Mangsa te hindoh na “Apha ta ka ding in”.
3. Ngailut na chungnung chu”Apha ta” (2)
Lungjin’a meipi thim kipa nan kileta,
Niloupi mun lodin “Aphata ka ding in”.
4. Ngailutna len pen chu “Apha ta” (2)
Muthim lah a kon’a che na ding lampi chu,
Van in lampi jot na”Apha ta ka ding in”.
Reference: Doh is A♭.sₗ
1. Loupi chungnung Immanuel,
Namtin in avahchoiyui ;
Mitin in Pakai jacheh hen,
O tinin avahchoiyui ;
Chungnung Pakai Leng vahchoinan,
Kelngoinou pachat achang tai ;
Tin lei le vanin jong sam hen,
Lemun, lemun ; (2 vei) Immanuel.
Aw Immanuel, Immanuel, (2vei)
Loupi, jana, thudih le chamna ;
Chihna le thahat Ama changta,
Tun jong nung jongle ;
Aw Immanuel, Immanuel, (2 vei)
Leng jouse Leng le Pakai,
Lemun Immanuel.
2. Loupi chungnung Immanuel,
Lhatdamten avahchoiyui ;
Agamin kemtih nei ngailou,
Ama tonsot Leng ahi ;
Mitheng sangja lhatdamte chun,
Laltouna loupi kimvel’a ;
Tonsot chullou la asauve,
Lemun, lemun ! (2 vei) Immanuel.
3. Loupi chungnung Immanuel,
Lhan’a kon thou Leng chungnung ;
Amelmate kijou sohta,
Tonsot’in Amin loupi ;
Chonset, thina, damun beina,
Setnan vaihom kitta lou ding !
Tonsot’in Amin loupi hen,
Lemun, lemun ! (2 vei) Immanuel.
Reference: Doh is B. sₗ

songs.title: LUNG DONNA SET KINGAI DAM TA

lines: 1. Lungdonna set kingaidam ta,
Lungdong kit da tan ;
Imutna kon hung thoudoh-in,
Na lungkot hongin.
Hinna thaomei avah lai hin,
Pathen lung alhaipet cha hin ;
Kiheiyin Alungsetna a,
Ki-nemin umin.
2. Lhandampun nakaihoi jing nai,
Lungdong kit datan ;
Tun lungset’in nangma nakou,
Nalung kot hongin.
3. Gospel’in nangma nakou jing,
Lungdong kit datan ;
Lhatdamna chamkim mu dingin,
Nalung kot hongin.
4. Kipanan tantih nei talou.
Lungdong kit datan ;
Cham lenna a din nakou jing,
Nalung kot hongin.
Reference: Doh is A♭ m

songs.title: LUNG GENTHEI HO JESU NALUNG A LUTSAH UN

lines: 1. Lung genthei ho Jesu nalunga lutsah-un,
Chu teng ilungdon nau jouse beisoh tante ;
Jesu to ikivop teng Athupeh chan mangleu hen,
Kipah thanom tah in lengkhom tauhite.
Jesu ilunga alut teng,
Itihchan hijongle athu mangkit talou ding ;
Jesu ilunga alut teng,
Chamna le lungmonna mijousen heta ding.
2. Lung genthei ho Jesu nalunga lutsah-un,
Chutengle ilung sungu salvah sohta ding ;
Jesu lamkaina a chun eihon anungjui leu hen,
Lungnem tah-in Amato lengkhom taute.
3. Lung genthei ho Jesu nalunga lutsah-un,
Chuteng le Amatoh chengkhom jing tau hite ;
Hi leiset idalhah a van gam’a ichen tengle,
Ikipanau tonsot’a kemta lou ding.
Reference: Doh is E♭ d

songs.title: KALUNG KOT THIM A KONNIN AW KAJAI

lines: 1. Kalung kot thim’a konin Aw kajai,
Chonsetna konin kahung khangin ;
Kalung kot kiuva chu Jesu ahi,
Vo Pakai tun hungin vang neipen.
Na lung kot hongin,
Pakai Jesu lutna ding ;
Pakai Jesu nalunga alut tengle,
Na lungsung salvah ta ding.
2. Chuin Ami ngailut le lungset chun,
Ka lungsung thim asalvah soh tai ;
Van mithengte laiya kalen ding chu,
Ka kinemin ka kipah jinge.
3. Satan galte lah a um jeng jong leng,
Ama kalum le kapho ahi ;
Ka lhagao avah-in thahat apei,
Ka taona jouse angai jinge.
4. Eivah jinginte Avan gam geiyin,
Lungsetna manbeiya eipeh ding ;
Gamnom gotsa um chu kalhun tengle,
Leisetna tohphat man kasan ding.
Reference: Doh is G. d

songs.title: LA NGEI TAH KHAT KEIMAN KAJAI

lines: 1. La ngei tah khat keiman kajai,
Sahkit dingin katha anom ;
A-O ginin dih tah-in sei,
Ken lan sange Pa lungsetna.
Ken lan sange la ngeitah chu,
Kicholdona Pakai O gin ;
Ken lan sange la ngeitah chu,
Kicholdona Pakai khopi.
2. Ka Pakaiya ka kingai ding,
Ka dinga ka lam abin teng ;
Lei mang jongle van in jon ding,
Van gam nom kahung lhun tei ding.
3. Hung geiyin hungvah jongle chun,
Kihong jing akot niseh a ;
Phat khat leh ijot cheh tei diu,
Kicholdona Pakai khopi.
4. Chena ding anikho lhin teng,
Lamdih chu koiman helou ding ;
Aman eipui lamdih lama,
Aban thahat’a eikai jing.
Reference: Doh is D♭. s

songs.title: KI THANG IN JESU CHRISTA LUNGSET THUNGEI

lines: 1. Ki-thangin Jesu Christa lungset thu ngei,
Iti kidan ngaidam O ging sang ho chu ;
Keima huhhingnan Lhandampu anathin,
Koi hijeng jongle vang pehsa ahitai.
Atahsan din ngaidam pehsa ahitai,
Sanginte Jesun atahsante jouse ;
Eiho huhnan athi lungset Lhandampu,
Halleluiyah eikisimtha jaljeh hin.
2. Pakai thu eihil chu ka dingin hinna,
Koi hijongle hichu kalum le ka thal ;
Tahsan jal’a nangin hinna namu ding,
Hinna Thupha hi gamtina seiphonglen.
3. Koi hijongle lhagao thudih a hung chu,
Setna tintang ngaidaminte Pakaiyin ;
Hichu Pathen Cha lungset kidang ahi,
Koi hijongle Lhandampu tahsan jouse.
4. Ama thu tailou adang tahsan hih-un,
Kana le lhisonan huhhing joulou ding ;
“Lhandampun abei tai” ti in asam’e,
Ama tahsante se bou chu sohcha ding.
Reference: Doh is B♭ sₗ

songs.title: CHEU HITE KHOPI NOM LAM A

lines: 1. Cheu hite khopi nom lam’a,
Zion khopi gam noma ;
Anomin a emsel jinge,
Atekahpi ding umlou ;
Galmi huhhingsa te ho toh,
Khovah em’a kimunte !
Jing khovah a ikikhop teng,
I hinkho bulhin tengle.
2. Solchahte martyar chang ho le,
Malaiya mitheng hon jong ;
Pakai mi huhhingna thu chu,
Aseiyui kumkhon kemmon ;
Asauve amaho chutoh,
Tonsot kem theilou gama ;
Jing khovah a ikikhop teng,
I hinkho bulhin teng le.
3. Chua la ngeitah asauve,
I golngai cheng jong aum ;
Ama ho chutoh kikhom ding,
Lal loupi Pakai anga ;
Lhandampu hung ding kipah-un,
I gentheinau beita ding,
Jing khovah a ikikhop teng,
I hinkho bulhin tengle.
Reference: Doh is G. m
1. Jesun lungset chapang ho, A anga din akou ;
Aman hinkho thah apei, Vangam kot ahon peh.
Jesun chapang ho,
Lungset tah-in akou ;
Hinkho thah chu ape jinge,
Chapang golpha Ama.
2. Jesun lungset chapang ho, Alungset seijou lou ;
Alung gimnau ahenai, Khat chengin apanpi.
3. Jesun lungset chapang ho, Phattheina vang pejing,
Alungset nan ngah jing, Iman suse lou ding,
4. Jesun lungset chapang ho, Apanpi niseh-in ;
Kipah thanom tah-in, Na kouna ngai jin.
5. Jesun lungset chapang ho, Adeiye agol din ;
Aman iti jeng jongle, Tonsot’a um pi jing.
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ
1. Theiga tin kimna gam loupi,
Alhang emsel chul ngailou ;
Chua hinna twi theng along,
Vana nopna akim’e.
Khopi hui…ging talou ding,
Tonsot luigal lam’a chun ;
Thihhat seplhan kong tol’an,
Kahoiye luipang noma.
2. Malam jon’a kongtol kahi,
Lhatdam ten eijap jingui ;
Pa lungset kouna thong kajai,
Mitheng ho lah-a kon chun.
3. Chua chun kong acholdo tai,
Sana luipang em nom’a ;
Twikhanglen kinong kitol mangta,
Nisavah emsel soh ta.
4. Chua lhepna kon ihoi diu,
Hinlai huipi abei teng ;
Eihuhhing pau lungsetna thu,
Vahchoina tang talou ding.
Reference: Doh is G. d

songs.title: CHUA TONSOT KHOPI HOI LE IN VAH JINGJENG

lines: 1. Chua tonsot khopi hoile in vah jing jeng.
Chua kipana jeng jan muthim umtalou ;
Laltouna kimvel’a chun van miten la asauve,
O inhoi loupi tah a chu namel hoi kamu ding.
Innom loupitah vah jing aum,
Pakai sem khopi le inhoi nomtah chu.
2. Pahcha hoi chul ngailou chuche khopi hoiya,
Jesu vahchoinan mithengten la asauve ;
O iti ngeitam kipana Laltouna kimvel’a,
O inhoi loupi tah a chu namel hoi kamu ding.
3. Kei jong lhungloi tading chunggam khopi nom chu,
Pakaiyin kei eilhatta ken thi ging talou ;
Kamit’in muloi tading Laltouna muna atou.
O chuteng keiman inhoi loupi chungnung kamu ding.
Reference: Doh is D. m

songs.title: LHATDAM CHANG DIN PATHEN TAHSAN PA BOU

lines: 1. Lhatdam chang din Pathen thu tahsanpa bou,
Hichu loupi chamkimna ;
Van noma leng le jing ding lungset jal’a,
Hichu loupi chamkimna.
Loupi, loupi ! hichu loupi chamkimna,
Loupi, loupi ! hichu loupi chamkimna.
2. Koiman eichingpoi ka Pakai hang tah-in,
Hichu loupi chamkimna ;
Ama a kon gamla jong leng eive jing,
Hichu loupi chamkimna.
3. Leiset’a Amintheng jal’a athoh gim,
Hichu loupi chamkimna,
A lungsetna homjal’in Cross kiput’in,
Hichu loupi chamkimna.
Reference: Doh is F♭. d

songs.title: JESU CROSS KIDANG TAH CHUNG A

lines: 1. Cross kidang tah chung a,
Loupi Leng Chapa thi kamun ;
Kaphat chomna jong ka ngaidau,
Hoitho le hamdoh kangai dong.
2. Pathen Christa thina tailou,
Thil dang imacha song ponge ;
Ngaichat um thil kadei jouse,
A kin bol nan pesoh ing’e.
3. Akhut, akeng, alu veuvin,
Lungdon le ngailut long gomta ;
Chutobang gomsoh a lingphan,
Leng lukhuh akikhuh umkham.
4. Thilsem jouse keiya hile,
Pathen peh dia homtho um jing ;
Chutobang ngailutna nasa,
Ka hin kanei pehsoh angai.
Reference: Doh is E♭. d

songs.title: VANNOI MITE KIGING UN PAKAI HUNG DING

lines: 1. Vannoi mite kiging un Pakai hung ding,
Moulang hung na ding nidan hetthei hilou,
Van’a Vantil te le Chapan jong nidan hethei lou,
Koiman seithei lou ding Pakai nikho.
Pakai ahung niteng chule (Chule)
Khat kila a khat kidalha ding,
Sumhei-ja chang goikhom khat kila Khat kida lha ding,
Pakai thutep thonlou hel ding ahi.
2. Hijeh chun Sopi kiging jing in um’un,
Jan khangkim in Pakai chu hung jeng ta le,
Jan’a gucha hung bang in 1-Pakai hung jeng ta le,
Kiging jing a um chu nunnom ding.
3. Kiging in ngah-un Pakai lam sang jing un,
Nagel lou pettah ule hung ding ahi,
Chuteng lhenchom chate se alhan Lengtou tauvin te,
Leigim na ho nung ngai um tapon te.
Reference: Doh is G.

songs.title: PATHEN LUNGSET NA KIDANG VAHCHOI LAN SAU VIN

lines: 1. Pathen lungset na kidang vahchoi lan sau-vin
Tang louva eikai hoinau jal’in,
Thao namtui bang jingjeng henjkiphal theng nau,
A-ang a itao khom nauva jong.
Athilbol kidang ho jal’in vahchoi-jute,
Seiphong leo hite aphat na jong,
Thao namtui bang jing jenghen,
Ikiphal theng nau,
A-ang a itao khomnau a jong.
2. Athilpeh kidang ho jal’in vahchoi-jute,
A lungset na eimu sah jal’un,
Achapa Jesu a ihung chenkhom pi nau hin,
A laltouna inai cheh taove.
3. Tao-ute aphat thei icha’na ding-uvin, PH
Ihinkhou lampi avah jing na din,
I-Lhagao hinkhou Ama a aum jing a,
A-Leng gam ilo thei cheh na diuvin.
Reference: Doh is E♭. d

songs.title: I SEIJING U KHOPI NOM CHU

lines: 1. I-seijing u khopi nom chu,
Pakai sem Zion khopi,
Athun kichai tih neilou ding,
Chung gam’a chenna asem.
Tonsot songpi’a kiphut doh,
Imachan sulong lou ding,
Huhhing na hong sung a chun,
Melma ten chan neilou ding.
2. Huhhingpu chen na Zion,
Kei jong nikhat ka len ding,
Vannoi leiset chim jong le,
Namtin loupi vahchoi ding.
3. Vannoi nopsah na mangthah ding,
Kiletsah hoitho na jong,
Kipa nopna chamkim chu,
Zion’a leng ten muding.
Reference: Doh is B♭ sₗ
1. Pakai sum ka ngai donge,
Sana le dangka toh ;
Van gam thupha ka gel leh,
Asunga lut theinan ;
Vangam hinna bua chu,
Kamona ngaidam a ;
Eihuhhingpun neihil’in,
Ka min kikhum taime ?
Ka min kikhum taime ?
Huhhinga um dinga ;
Van gam hinna lekhabua,
Ka min kikhum taime ?
2. Pakai kamona tamtah,
Luipeo songnel jat pha ;
Huhhingpu na thisanin,
Bou asoplheng soh thei,
Na thutep chu sut’a um ;
Lekhabu theng sunga,
“Na chonset boh lheh jongle,
Soptheng nange” ati.
3. O chu khopi nom hoiya,
A in ni sanga vah :
Huhhingsa cheng lhagao chun,
Ponbang lul asil’ui ;
Chonset le boh beisohta,
Vantil nga khopia chun ;
Chu mun nom lo dinga chu,
Kamin kikhum taime ?
Reference: Doh is A♭ sₗ

songs.title: KA LHAGAO NGAIJIN VANTIL TE HO LASAH

lines: 1. Ka Lhagao ngai jin Vantil te ho lasah,
Leichung kipa twikhanglen athong e,
La kisa aw-gin thong chu ijah teng le,
Lung khel’a lung kisih na thu ahi.
Kitepna phat alhing tai tin Vantil ten,
Ngainom umtah in lachu asau-vin,
Jan’a kana jingkah kipana hiding,
Lungset vah in muthim hinsal vah ding.
2. Gamla taj a dah kitum kithong bang in,
Jesu aw gin molle lhang a athong,
“Lhagao-va genthei te hung-uvin” ati.
Kelngoi ching hon Ama ahin jon-ui.
3. Lasah aw gin najah teng malam nouvin,
“Lhagao genthei hung un” ati, Jesun,
Muthim lah a Jesun eikou jing jeng ui,
Gospel dahgin in lam eihil jing diu.
4. Tun genthei hahsat naphat sao jong le,
Muthim mang’a kipana kho vah ding,
Genthei lampi chu i-dalhah teng ule,
Kipana sana khopi ilhun diu
Reference: Doh is D. m
1. Pakai nang keima leng nahi,
Namin loupi jing hen ;
Ling lukhuh kahai louna din,
Calvary’a neipuiyin.
Gethsemani hailou nadin,
Na thoh gim ka hailou nadin ;
Nei lungset ka hailouna din,
Calvary’a neipuiyin.
2. Na lhankhuh chu nei musah-in,
Kap’a na-opnau mun ;
Na lup pet’a vantil thengten,
Na na nga nau mun chu.
3. Mary bangin lunggim pumin,
Na henga kahunge ;
Lhan gohkeo chu neimu sah-in,
Calvary’a neipuyin.
4. Pakai nang dinga niseh-a,
Cross put kanom nadem ?
Ka dinga nathoh gimna khon,
Don ding kanom nadem ?
Reference: Doh is E. m

songs.title: HINNA CHANGLHAH HOM IN PAKAI NEIPEN

lines: 1. Hinna changlhah hom in Pakai neipen, ;
Twilen pang a changlhah,na hop bang chun,
Na lekha bu theng a,Nang kahol’e,
Ka-Lhagao-vin angai,Nathu hing jing.
2. Hinna changlhah na hi Pakai keidin,
Na thutheng le thutah eihuhhing a,
Nangma toh chu gam’a hin jing theina,
Na thutheng ngailut je neihil jing in.
3. Pakai Ka lungmit na Lhagao hasahhinsol in,keidin,
Kalungmit jasah in kamu thei nan,
Na thu-a um thutah,kisel ho chu,
Na thutheng bua kon,Pakai kamui.
4. Thutah phatthei boh in, Pakai keidin,
Galilee dil panga, changlhah bang chun,
Soh a kihen abul kilham soh ding,
Cham leh lungmon lhingset, kei neihin pen.
Reference: Doh is E. m
1. Christa chondan pha kamu hi,
Kipana la sang ting ;
Ama keiya ahijeh-in,
Kipa la kasah ding.
Christa chondan pha kamu hi,
Kipah-in la sang ting ;
Ama keiya ahijeh a,
Kipa la kasah ding.
2. Christa I-Thempu Leng chungnung,
I-Themgao loupi pen,
Thempu Lal chungnung van'a um,
Laltouna ana a chun.
3. Pathen jouse Pathen ahi,
Leng jouse leng chungnung ;
Kei din nisa vah bang ahi,
Hinna le damtheina.
4. Christa kei din hinna ahi,
Kei dia thia thoukit chu ;
Athisan lu eitopeh tai,
Ka deilhen pen ahi.
5. Christa ka ijakai ahi,
Ka lhamonna pen jong ;
Ama kahinna bulpi pen,
Ka kipana lukhuh.
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ
1. Huhhingpu kidang Pakai Jesu kei-ja,
Kei ding a Huhhingpu kidang,
Ka Lhagao songpi khikah a asel’e,
Kipana luidung ken kamui.
Aman Kalhagao songpi khikah a asel,
Gamgo a dangchah na gam’a,
Ka Lhagao songpi khikah a asele,
Aman akhut in eituh jing (2).
2. Huhhingpu kidang Pakai Jesu kei-ja,
Ka pohgih eilah mang peh tai,
Aman eituh dettai keima long lou ding,
Nitin in Aman tha eipei.
3. Nidan tin in phatthei simjou lou eipei,
Aphat tin in eilhem jing e,
Athu tan a Pakai loupi tin sang e,
Huhhing kidang kanei jeh in
Reference: Doh is D. s

songs.title: PAKAI JESU KA PUM'A THENSOH KAGOI

lines: 1. Pakai Jesu kapum’a thensoh kagoi,
Kalunga cheng dingin nang bou kalha ngai ;
Milim jouse le gal jouse son mangin,
Nangin nei sil le buh sangin bang jonge
Buh sangin jong bangjo tei nange,
Nei sille buh sangin bang jonge ;
Nangin neisil le buh sangin bang jonge.
2. Pakai Jesu ima boh ding phal louvin,
Na thisanin nenbeh jouse sil thengin ;
Sil thengna chu isanga jong ka ngailut,
Nangin nei sil le buh sangin bang jonge.
3. Pakai Jesu laltouna kon neihin ven,
Tunung le kei kinot thap din neipanpin ;
Nang tailou kei ka kikhoh sah joh louna din,
Nangin nei sille buh sangin bang jonge.
4. Pakai titahbeh a hiche nang kathum,
Na thohna Cross phunga tun ka ngah-e ;
Na thisana kapum’a neisil theng din,
Nangin neisil le buh sangin bang jonge.
5. Pakai Jesu sottah Nang kanga nahi,
Ka sunga umin lungthah neisem peh-in ;
Naheng hinjon chan koima nathet umlou,
Nangin neisil le buh sangin bang jonge.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ

songs.title: KA PAKAI MUTHEI HIH JONG LENG

lines: 1. Ka Pakai mu thei hih jong leng,
Nidan tinin thu eihil nai ;
Adeilam thil kabol pet’in,
Pakai lhaiyin A-O ka hei
A-O kahei huhhingpu O,
Ka lunga kipana eipei ;
Itih chan’a thu eihil jing,
Pakai lhaiyin A-O kahei.
2. A ngailut nahsahmo jong leng,
Imacha ale thei umlou ;
Vannoi chonset apomang tai,
Tahsan le chun na sochat ding.
3. Dih le kichen tah a hil thei,
Imauva olna gamnom chu ;
Ngailut le lungmon thu eihil,
Chunga innom vahhoi eihil.
Reference: Doh is A♭. d
1. Pathen in eikou nao......Awgin,
Ngaicheh-uvin......Vo Christian te,
Amang ding kon......Lhagao tamtah,
Holdoh ding in......Nang na kouve.
Eiho cheu te......Aman eikou,
Pathen thu chu......Hol uhite,
Christa hung teng...... Tohman sang ding,
Sana Lukhuh...... Akhuh peh ding.
2. Athisan’a......Achohdoh sa,
Thoudoh-uvin......Vo Christian te,
Chonset po a......Ama ho din,
Kipana Thupha......Gasei peh un.
3. Pathen Chapa......Christa bou chun,
Chonset akon......Eihuhdoh ding,
Achamlou-va......Hung kisolpa,
Ama min in......Vahchoi-jute.
Reference: Doh is A♭. m
1. Neilam to ding jing khovah le,
Sana luipang em’a chu,
Na thaomei vah achim na dem?
Aman nahung lamto ding.
Ken nalam tong e jing khovah le,
Huhhingpun eihin kou teng le,
Hung un Kapa phatthei boh ho,
Gotsa um mun hung lou-vin.
2. Kilam to ding jing khovah le,
Meipi jing um talou-va,
Kimai to-a kimu ding Jesu,
Kicheng khom ding Tonsot’a.
3. Eihuhhingpau mai imu teng,
Jti kipa umtan tem?
Ingai cheng imu teng ule,
Amai lhai-ju imudiu.
4. Kipah ute kinem tah in,
Ama ngailut cheh na din,
Ahung na ding phat sotta lou,
Eipui diu a van in’a.
Reference: Doh is G. d

songs.title: ATILCHUN VANNOI CHONSET ANA DIM E

lines: 1. Atilchun vannoi chonset ana dim’e,
Setna thimpi ana jing in ahi,
Pakai Jesu chu vannoi-ja ahung in,
Hinna lampi chu eimusah tauve.
Lungset jal’in athin eihuh hing tai,
Lhan a kon chun ka chonset soptheng ta,
Athouvin eisutheng tai tonsot na din,
Iti kipa tau tem Pakai hung ding.
2. Pakai chu Calvary’a apui touvun,
Akhut akeng thingkil’in khenbeh un,
Alu akaikun eiding in ataove,
Paojong apao poh-poi Pakai Jesu.
3. Nikhat Pakai chu Lhan’a akivui-jin,
i'! Jingpi phalvah in Pakai Vantil chun,
Lhankot a songpi chu ahung tangdoh in,
Thina akon in athoudoh kittai.
4. Nikhat Jesun keima ei hung pui kitding,
Nikhat Pakai chu ken kamu kitding,
Alungset ho jouse a koukhom ding,
Hihhingna loupi chu eimusah ding.
Reference: Doh is D. s

songs.title: DINGDET UN PATHEN DIN GALLEN MUN'A

lines: 1. Dingdet un Pathen din gallen mun’a,
Huipi le twipi kinong hat jong le,
Hiche songpi bou hinna le hat na,
Chonset gallen nai jong le.
Hiche songpi chung a dingdet jing uhi,
Christa songpi tah a chun,
Gimna itou jong le dingdet jing ute,
Thinan ei-um kimvel jong leu.
2. Lungdet tah keng in ding jing-ute,
Lungtheng tah le tahsan na long lou-vin,
Hiche songpi bou jona eipe diu,
Vannoi set na jing lah a .
3. Thudih a ding in chamna nanei ding,
Thonlou ding ahi aphat sot jong le,
Hiche songpi bou cham na le olna,
Gimna hinkho kichai teng.
Reference: Doh is E♭. m

songs.title: IPI JEH A MIPI HO CHU

lines: 1. Ipi jeh a mipi ho chu,
Molmo tah a kikhom hiu vem?
Kholai a le daipam’a jong,
Simjou lou nunao hon ajui,
Ahu sao mitcho het thei-jin
Nazareth Jesu che a ahi.
2. Gamtin khotin muntin’a kon,
Mipi ahung kikhom jiu vin,
Alah-uva damlou mitcho,
Kengbai chethei lou tamtah jong,
Ipi jeh a hung lha hiu-vem?
Nazareth Jesu che a ahi.
3. Mithi jong adamdoh kit in,
Phah jong suhtheng in aum’e,
Buhthi jong adamdoh kit in,
Lhagao boh mat a-ong doh in,
Huipi le twipi kinong jong tang,
Nazareth Jesu che a ahi.
4. Kining lou kinin phat ahi.
Chonset khan tat pha ahitai,
Idiu-va phat kilet kah in,
Nunglam dalhan malam del’un,
Tau le penthah phat ahitai,
Nazareth Jesu che a ahi.
5. Mihon ho kibang jing theilou,
Dam le damlou jong aum-jin,
Geisang in phatmo na anei,
Alhing dehchet khoisat sang ding,
Ageisang tai hintiu vinte,
Nazareth Jesu che a ahi.
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ

songs.title: GAMLA TAH MOLCHUNG A CROSS LUIKHAT ADING E

lines: 1. Gamla tah molchunga Cross luikhat adinge,
Hichu gim le jumna melchihna ;
Ken Cross lui chu thildang sangin kadei pen’e,
Chonset kilhadohna chu ahi.
Ken kangai nai hiche Cross lui chu,
Ka leiset hinkho kalha kahsen ;
Ken hiche Cross lui chu tuhjing ding,
Nikhat lallukhuh toh kalhet ding.
2. Hiche leiset miten akidah Cross lui chu,
Kei dingin lungsetna aume ;
Pathen kelngoinou chun Aloupina dalhan,
Calvary a thina athoh-e.
3. Chuche Cross lui chunga, thisan theng alonglhai,
Ahoi kidang tah chu ken kamui ;
Christa chun Cross chunga athoh gimin athin,
Kei eingaidamin eisop theng tai.
4. Chuche Cross chu keiman dihtah a jui jing ding,
Gim le jum tona neideh lou ding ;
Nikhat ka inpia Aman eihin kou ding,
Aloupina chang jing jengta ding.
Reference: Doh is D♭. m
1. Christa thisan lutah long chu,
Kei dinga lu ahi ;
Kichat le tahsan lel’a kon,
Ka lhagao choldo ta.
O thisan lui kidang tah long,
Lhandampu a kon chun ;
Van lhun geiya kala ding chu,
“O thisan, thisan lu.”
2. Keiman geldoh kitta ponge,
Tin Pathenin ati ;
Ka chapa thisan sop thengte,
Chonset le them mona.
3. Ka chonset ka milmo ho chun,
Eilung kham sah ponte ;
Thisan long chu mijouse ding.
Ka chonset sop thengta.
4. Ka tahsa phe hatlou tah hin,
Natna toh jeng jong le ;
Thisan lua chun kei kingai leng,
Monga ka choldo ding.
Reference: Doh is E♭. m

songs.title: PAKAI JESU PHATDAN KISEI LHING THEM LE

lines: 1. Pakai Jesu phat dan kisei lhing them le,
Ngai nomin Ama bou kipa pin nate ;
Ama gelpet kipah-in alange,
Seijou theilou naho chun einakhang jitai.
Kisei them le, kisei them le,
I-tobanga Ama golpha kanei ham ?
Kasei ding chu, kasei ding chu,
Ama na ngailut tei ding tuni geiya.
2. Ama themdan kisei lhing them bepta le,
Theng tah a chaloh jing kinom teita ding ;
Chuteng Pathen hatna kilang intin,
Paolou hel’in jong chonset phon aum theinai.
3. Ama ngailut dan kisei lhing themta le,
Ngailut aphat, aloupi, kilangdoh ding ;
Ngailut nung gel’in ilung nem tante,
Mitmo jumpin ban ding kinom cheh inte ong.
4. Vo Jesu thusim ken seijou theilou ding,
Nangma phatdan, thendan ngailut danho chu ;
Vo Pakai keijah Nang ngei hung kilah-in,
Pao louvin jong toh-in hettohsah ing kate.
Reference: Doh is A. sₗ
1. Kalung a chamna hung kilang(Chamna)
Kipana le olna langei (Langei)
Avel vel’in kasa jing e,
Pathen thilpeh chamna theng.
Chamna theng pen,
Chunga kon thilpeh kidang (Chung a)
Aw,kidangtah kidang tah chamna,
Chamna theng Pathen thilpeh.
2. Cross chung a Christa cham lenna (Lenna)
Ka bat jouse aman asai (Asai)
Abul dang koiman phutdoh lou,
Chamna chu Pathen thilpeh.
3. Jesu ka Pakai ahinin (Pakai)
Kalung hi chamnan bou aloi (Aloi)
Aphat thei kemlou ka changtai,
Chamna theng Pathen thilpeh.
4. Jesua lungmong in kaum, (Ka-um)
Ama kom’a kasei chet teng le(Akom)
Chamna bou kanei ken kahei,
Chamna theng Pathen thilpeh.
Reference: Doh is A. sₗ
1. Jan khovah vaokam’a tonggim nahim?
Twi lailung a tol’in seplhan,
Twi-thuh a jong nalen ho seplhan,
Twilai lung a tollin seplhan,
Hia chun phatthei nan nangah jing e,
Panna bei twidong lah dalhan,
Tonggim kitlou ding twi kinong lai-ja,
Seplhan Pakai thupeh in.
Seplhan seplhan twi lailung a
Tol’in seplhan,
Pathen lungset na twikhang len bang,
Pakai thupeh in sep in.
2. Phatsot na nga jeh a lunglha nahim?
Twilai lung a tol’in seplhan,
Christa tahsan in na din jouna din,
Twilai sung a seplhan,
Kemtih neilou napa kom’a,
Tuhin thum in nataona sang tei ding,
Na ngaichat jouse pe ding.
3. Thachol jouse tuninJesun nakou,
Twilai lung a tol’in seplhan,
A ngailutna aw sang in na-ol ding,
Twilai lung a seplhan,
Chonset na twipam donglah hin dalhan,
Hinna ding ima umlou,
Jesu lam jeng ven Ama bou hinna.
Reference: Doh is A♭. d
1. Pathen kouna ngaisah louva,
Leiset nopna umden kahin,
Chemang loi ding leiset hinkho,
Ka Lhagao kap’a peng ding ham?
Na kouve ngai jing in (2)
Pathen in nakou,
Na kouve,na kou jinge,
Nakouve,nakouna aw ngaiphan,
Aman nakou jing na kouna
Aw ngaiphan.
2. Pathen kouna kihet louva,
Nahsah louva um ding ka him?
Ngailut na hi toumun’a,-
Donlou-va geisang ding kahim?
3. Pathen kouna kotkiu jing a,
Lungkot khah cheh cheh ding kahim,
Eingah jing e ami hidin,
A van Lhagao taitom pong e.
4. Pathen in eikou jing na aw,
Ngailou-va buPa um kahim,
Geisang jongleng eingah jing,
Kasang tai eikou jing na aw.
5. Pathen kouna geisang lou ding,
Kalung in ngahsot lou hePa,
Ka lhai gimna leiset,
Pathen kouna aw kasang
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ
1. Kaphal thengtai Jesu din,
Leiset gou ima hilou,
Anopna jouse sumil’in,
Calvary bou gel jing in,
Gollin deimon eithe henlang,
Vannoi-jin eidou jongleh,
Eidin huding golpha kanei,
Kotpi hoi kihon tengleh.
Kahinkho jing ninou bang,
Nilhah phat hung lhung loi ding,
Hijong le gimna kaneipoi,
Kotpi hoi kihon teng le.
2. Jesun aw nem’a eikouva,
Vantil ten eijap teng le,
Ka Pakai-ja kingai jing ding,
Thina phaicham jot jong leng,
Athutep manlu phong jing ding,
Leiset gou sana tobang,
Na ang a thina ging louding,
Kotpi hoi kihon teng le.
3. Jordan twipi kinong gal'a,
Thina twipi len gal'a,
Hinna thingphung hoi apah in,
Hinna twi jong alonge,
Van Mitheng te chenna gamnom
Kipana tantih neita lou,
Vantil ten eingah jing-uve,
Kotpi hoitah phung a chun.
Reference: Doh is A. sₗ

songs.title: JESUN NAMTIN AKHOP DING AHI PHAT KHAT LE

lines: 1. Jesun namtin akhop ding ahi phat khat le,
Mise le pha khen nia akhen ding ahi,
Loikhat chu Jesun nang naphai atiphat le,
Nang na-um na dem,hiche miho laha chun.
Mitheng ten kipa la asah teng,
Mitlhi long a kap tam ding u,
Huhhing a miten hinna twi adon phat le,
Twi-dua dangchah a thum tamtah
Umding ahi.
2. Ka phat alhin teng kei jong kache ding van’a,
Leichung damsung tohman kasan tei ding ahi,
Loikhat in chonphat na Lallukhuh akhuh teng,
Nang naum na dem,hiche miho laha chun. .j
3. Hung lhung ding ahi Pakai nikho phat khat le,
Hiche thutep chu koiman apel thei lou ding,
Loikhat in thina meikong ajot teng uleh,
Nang na-um khadem hiche miho laha chun.
4. Mo neilou Pathen Chapa athi laitah in,
Chonse kei khel'a Pathen vaihom toh ahi,
Huhhing hisa Mitheng te akhop teng chuleh,
Kei um ding kahi, Aw chu miho lah a chun.
Reference: Doh is D. s
1. Molle lhang hoitah khel’a, meibol ahung kihodoh-a,
Twilong ho le vacha ho nisan ahin kho teng chule ;
Vana lhagui hungsoh chun, Pa thutepna asu langji,
Meibol chu akiho teng eiho kihechen to tading.
Eiho kihechen tading, tua ikihetto banga,
Chuche kipana jing nikho vahhoi chu aso tengle ;
Meibol chu akiho teng, eiho kihechen to tading.
2. Lunggim le lungkhamin ihinkho lampiu jot jeng jongle,
I loumau gamla henlang muthima na tong jongleu hen ;
Lhandampun mi nunnomte hungun tia eikou-tengu le,
Chuche jingkah meibol kiho teng, eiho kikhom tading.
3. Laltouna kimvel’a eiho kipah a kikhom tei ding,
I ngai chengto kimuto a eiho kihechen tading ;
Tantih neilouva eihon lhatdamna la isah diu,
Meibol chu akiho-a muthim chu akitol mang teng.
Reference: Doh is D. m
1. Hungun Jesu vahchoiyute,
Eihuhhingpau Leng chungnung pen chu ;
Eingailut nau chul lou tonsot’a,
Tang louvin vahchoi jingute.
Minlu pen, Huhhingpu,
Aloupina vahchoijute ;
Minlu pen, Huhhingpu, Huhhingpu,
Pakai chu vahchoi cheh-ute.
2. Angailutna natsat jeh chun,
Ingaichat kim Aman eipente ;
Lungdonna le lha lengvai na a,
Huhhingpu chun eiumpi ding.
3. Lhagaova eihalsah dingin,
Pathenin phatthei eiboh inte,
Koi hi le Amintheng pan’a chu,
Huhhingpu chun eihuh nante.
4. Hungun minlu vahchoiyute,
Eihuhhingpau Leng chungnung pen chu,
Aloupina le athenje chu,
Ichonset lunguva cheng hen.
Reference: Doh is A. sₗ
1. Twi nah khat um (thisan along) 2
Calvary’a kon doh chu ;
Thisan luipi (chonse penin) 2
Thenna anei na chu.
O Calvary lui hoitah, (3 vei)
Kei dinga nahung lon.
2. Chonse khetbeh (thi ding kon chun) 2
Thenna lui chu amun ;
Ama bang (chonse jong leng) 2
Buhbang eisosah thei.
3. Pakai ngaitah (nathisan lu) 2
Tamtah-in hepha lou ;
Huhhing ho chun (hi chu amun) 2
Pohgih a kon ong ta.
4. Tahsanna in (lui chu kamui) 2
Ka gam geiya hung long ;
Ka thupi pen (eingailutna) 2
Ka thi ni geiya ding.
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ

songs.title: VAN JERUSALEM KHOPPI LEN A CHU

lines: 1. Van Jerusalem khoppi len’a chu,
Kikhoppi na hung um ding ahitin,
I-Pakai Jesun ahin lhang sam’e,
Chitin Namtin lah a ahung phong dohtai.
Van Jerusalem’a kikhom ho jouse,
Hinna thinglim dam diodeu noija chun,
Thil gingthei jouse thon,
Pakai a vahchoi-jui,
Nang jong napang theina dem,
Chu mun’a chun.
2. Van Jerusalem khoppi na ding chu
Lhunkim na ding chu ahung naitai,
Chu mun’a chedia nakigot hinam?
Nang jong chelou nahim khoppi na a.
3. Chu’a khoppi na a vaihom turn ding chu,
I-Pakai Pathen le Kelngnoinou hiding,
Chu’a jan muthim umkit talou ding,
Pakai Pathen Kelngoinou chu vah hiding.
4. Van Jerusalem khoppi na ding chu,
Thil thenglou kidah bolho le jou seiho,
Pangthei him him ponte, Chu mun’a ding chun.
Kelngoinou lekhabu’a amin khumlou chu.
5. Van Jerusalem khoppia che ho,
Samgi khen bang a khenna umkit talou ding,
Kile kitna jong umkit talou ding,
Damtan Aw Chibai umkit talou ding.
Reference: Doh is A.

songs.title: HUHHINGPU CHENNA CHAN JUI DING NGAITO A

lines: 1. Huhhingpu chena chan jui ding ngaito a,
Juijing ding Eihuhhingpau le Lengpa,
Ama tah in ihinkhou asempha tai,
Iti ngeitan tern ila ngei sahdiu.
Iti hoi hitam,Huhhingpu nungjui ding hi,
W -
Vah a chele a ,Vah a chele a,
Iti hoi hitam,Huhhingpu nungjui ding hi,
Lamdih a eipui.
2. Naicheh jeng ute Ama eilamkai pau,
Eipui mangthei lhepna toh jong leo hen,
Aban thahat ihoinao tahsan jing a,
Iti nop tantem ithangvah jing diu.
3. Tahsan jal’a Huhhingpu nung jui jing a,
Hahsa jong le ijui jing diu ahi,
Aieng hina loupi imu teng ule,
Iti nop tantem Ama toh chen khom
Reference: Doh is D♭. s

songs.title: CHRISTA LE HOUBUNG DIN I AW GING HEN

lines: 1.Christa le Houbung din I-aw ging hen,
Amin chu jao hite Lhandampu I-Lengpau,
Tong ute lungkhat in ikhang nou laihin,
Van gam goulo din dettah in pang ute.
Christa eihuhhingpau chu,
Christa keidin athi,
Thisan in achoi Houbung hi,
Pakai neithen sah in.
2. Christa le Houbung ding in tao to thon,
Amangsa hol’ute Pakai Christa ding in,
Tong ute nitin in hinkho hoi laijin,
Pakai kipaman san’a din pang ute.
3. Christa le Houbung ding in tao uhite,
Kitepna umjing jeng Pakai Christa ding a,
Peu hite ithau genthei kithopi nan,
Amang ding kon ho gahuh doh loi-jute.
Reference: Doh is D.

songs.title: LUNGSET NA KHANG BEIVAH DING AHITAI

lines: 1. Lungset na khang beivah ding ahitai,
Leiset hinkho nitin’in akem jing,
Phat le nikhon nangma ngah pon’a te,
Lungset na khang beiding kon ahitai
Kigei tem’un Sopi kigel tem’un,
Lungset na khang hi hung bei jeng taleh,
Mitheng kilhen nikho hung lhung taleh,
Nathun nang them nachan na ding em?
2. Pakai nikho koiham ahe them ding,
Chom lou-va mitphet kah a hung jeng thei,
Koiham Pakai nikho ahethem ding,
Phat le nikhon nangma ngah pon nate.
3. Lungset na khang na phat hoilai sung in,
Na Christian hinkho chu kisem phat in,
Na dinna mun Pakai hong sung hinam?
Lungset na khang beiding kon ahitai.
Reference: Doh is A
1. Twikhanglen pang a kon in,nang nakitol gamla tai,
Nang nakitol,nakitol’in,
Twikhanglen le twipi kinong in natol gamla tai,
Ol ol’in nakitol mang e.
Nakitol,nakitol mang e,Nang nakitol,
Tollin nakitol,ol’in nakitol mang e.
Twikhanglen muthim lam’a,
Pa lungsetna a konin nakitol mang e,
Manthah na mun lam jon-in,
Nang nakitol,nakitol,nakitolle.
2. Huhhingna thaomei avah e nang din avel vel’in,
Nang nakitol,nakitol,nakitol’in,
Kong kaimun khelpeh a nakong kitol mangloi tading,
Ol ol’in nakitol,nakitol mange.
3. In lam jon dia naki kouna aw naja phatapoi,
Nang nakitol,nakitol,nakitol’in,
Vo Sopi,kouna aw hi phat aumpet hin ngaiphan,
Tonsot’a dia nakitol mang pai kah in.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ
1. Ka Lhagaovin Christa jenga,
Lha mon’a ahol chu,
Vangbohna tamtah simjou lou,
Tunvang akimu tai.
Christa tailou chu koima dang,
Eikipasah umlou,
Ngailut na le kipa jing na,
Ama jeng a kamu.
2. Aheng a olna hollouva,
Leiset gouhom keuva,
Kahol pet hin Eihuhhingpan,
Ngailut in eisang tai.
3. Vo Pakai leiset na twikhuh,
Thal ding tin kadel’in,
Hinla atwi kadon thei lou,
Thina gutwi ahi.
4. Ka nopna mangsa lha ngaijin,
Nang la kaholji pon,
Na ngailut na thu theng tah chu,
Nei hetsah masang sen.
Reference: Doh is F. sₗ

songs.title: VAIHOM NA NILOUPI HUNG LHUNG DING

lines: 1. Vaihom na niloupi hung lhung ding,
Kamui sumkon ahung ginge,
Namtin chitin ahung pang khom in,
Kamui Laltouna sang lam’a,
Van’a um Mitheng te chu hungpot un,
Twipi ho leh lhang sang ho kah a,
Akhut chu van lam’a ahin jah’in,
Phat chu akichai tai ahung ti.
Ngaijun kale lungkham aw gin chu,
Manthah na mun’a umte hin,
Molle lhang ho jah a neikhu-vin,
Atao nao agei behseh tai.
2. Mihao ho jouse apeng-uvin,
Apaisa hou jong junjou ta,
Khutdo bang Pakai ang a dingun,
Abat-u ditjou talou-vu,
Noimi loupi ho jong apang-uvin,
Thina thoh in ahung lhasam un,
Akhut a chun Van lekha bu choi-jin,
Aloupi jounao aumdehpoi.
3. Meithai le Chaga ho sam-un,
Pakai jin athumnau ngai-jin,
Van’a lungdon umlou na a chun,
Mitlhi jouse thehhul tante,
Paisa kichem a jukham jiho le,
Akom-uva judon ding joh ho,
Akom’uva jujoh phalna pea chu,
Gotmun’a thidin aumtaove.
Reference: Doh is C. sₗ
1. Leiset kholjinna ka chai tengle,
Leiset Innom ka dalhah teng;
Ka Kongkai mun ding hoilai hintem,
Leiset kholjinna ka chai tengle.
Vannoi leiset hi abei tengleh,
Sopi nang hoija na um dem;
Tohga kipaman san ni tengleh,
Kipaman gotsa um hinan tem?
2. Leiset haona kon olna umlou,
Pakai haona ho hollouvin;
Lei thillu jouse nei kirn jongleng, N
Hichun Vangam nom eilhut lou ding.
3. Van haona kalungin kagel jin,
Phat sottah ken kana hollin;
Kei chonphat na in kamu joupoi,
Pakai haona iti gil hitam.
4. Vannoi leiset nikhat hung mang ding,
Chunile Pakai haona chu;
Ninglhing setna aman eipe ding,
Leiset haona ken ngai talou ding.
Reference: Doh is A. sₗ
1. Jesu nei kanomjoi,Goulu pen sang in,
Ama a hi kanom Haona ho sang,
Jesu nei kanomjoi,Gam le insang in,
Akhut thingkil maha chu kalheng nompoi.
Gamlen tah a Leng len taha tousang,
Setna soh kahi ngal’in,
Jesu nei kanomjoi,thil dang jouse sang,
Leiset loupi sang in.
2. Jesu nei kanomjoi, choi-at na sangin,
Gim umna ama a hijing kanomjoi;
Jesu nei kanomjoi min than’a sangin,
Amintheng loupi choi-at ding kanom joi.
3. Lily pahhoi pahsang in jong ahoijoi,
Khoi-ju lhumpen sang in jong alhumjoi,
Kalha gilkel ding in An phapen ahi,
Jesu nei kanomjoi,eipui dih jing ding.
Reference: Doh is D. d
1. Kading sei-ja Lhandampu khat kanei,
Leija gol lhomcha nei jong leng olmo lou ding,
Aman lungset le khoton kei eiching jinge,
Ama chu ven! Nanga dia Lhandampu jong ahi.
Nang din katao peh jing (3)
Katao peh jinge.
2. Ken Pa khat kaneije,Aman eipe-e ,
Tonsot hinkem lou dihtah le nun nom tah,
Aman kei van gam’a eihin kou loita ding,
Aman nangma jong chua din nakouve.
3. Ken ponsil kidang vamleh khat kanei-je,
Hiche san ding kinem-in ka ngah jing e,
Hiche ponbang vamleh kidang chu kasan teng,
Gol nangin jong nasan kamu ding hinam?
4. Christa namu teng midang jong seipeh in,
Ka Lhandampu nang Lhandampu jong ahi.
Ama ho chu Pakai kom’a din taopeh in,
Pakai-jin nataona chu sang tei nante.
Reference: Doh is G. sₗ
1. Jesu tha hatna a kingaijin,
Kithopin nate khoto tahin;
Angailut thonlou nakinep le,
Phatthei boh in nate.
Athahat angailut kinem in,
Athahat angailutna kilang;
Athahat le van in khu ven lang,
Pakai chu tahsan jingin.
2. Jesu thahatna a kingai in,
Nalam muthim jing salvah inte;
Napuina chan a kipah in chen,
Asei chan jui jing.
3. Jesu thahatna a kingai-in,
Na lung khamna se Ama not in;
Na chonset poh chu gih lheh jong le,
Ahenga tao jingin.
4. Jesu thahatna a kingai-in,
Na ima jouse chu Ama pen;
Ngailut le khotona a dim chun,
Phatthei boh nan nate.
Reference: Doh is G

songs.title: AW PAKAI NA LENG GAM SUNG AHIN

lines: 1. Aw Pakai na Leng gam sung ahin,
Hot le pai jin kaum tai,
Kama’a lhepna setgal alen,
Nang in neipui-jin Aw Pakai.
Ka leiset hinlai khan kho,
Hung kile kit lou ding hitam ?
Aw Pakai nagam jal’in,
Na-insung nopna damlai nikho,
Aw he pahbang in amoltai.
2. Leisetna ka gol ngaite ho jong,
Kadin melma asoh gamtai,
Leiset na ka chun le ka jo jong,
Kading in melma asohtai.
3. Pakai keima hoi-ja um tang em ?
Vannoi-jin eiho sohtai,
Munthip le gamthip kachan ding ham,
Heng’e chu mun chu kei chan ding.
4. Kajui ngampoi Pakai na lampi,
Athuh in akhoh ngei-je,
Kichat na nungjam kit lou ding in,
Na khut in neikai jing jeng in
Reference: Doh is A.

songs.title: JESU HETNA LAMPIA GILTAH IN KACHE JINGIN

lines: 1. Jesu hetna lampia giltah in kache jingin,
Iti eingailut hitam,Ajeh hetna ding in,
Chonset thina mun’a kon eiphoh ding ahitai,
Eihuhhing in eidamsatai,Avah mangsa hijong leng.
2. Jesu thupeh lampia giltah in kache jing in,
A lungset jui-jing ding le alampi hoi jing ding,
Kiphal theng a kun jing ding.akhopi muh a chu,
Eikou jing e ama a din,ka thensel masang se hin.
3. Jesu Cross kidang tah a,giltah in kache jingin,
Hon sung gei-jin kajui-je thina dougal ang a,
Gentheina khon’a don in lungdon mitlhi pum in,
Aw Huhhingpu, Eingailu pen nalungset nan eilo hen.
4. Jesu kipa jing na a,giltah in kache jing in,
Mitheng kilhen na pang ding,hiche leiset ahin,
Lhasetna a kipah ding,genthei mun’a chamna,
Jesun pe ding(2)Aman eichang lha iou ding.
5. Jesu ngailutna a chun giltah in kache jingin,
Thina kon eihuhhingpa thangvah chim talou ding,
Atonsot, Atonsot’a thangvah chim talou ding,
Eingailut na kidang ahi Pakai le Lengpa Jesun.
Reference: Doh is C.
1. Gam loupia kon Vantil ho,

Hung sauvin thilsem thusim hi,
Messiah pen ph'ong jal’un.
Hungun houvun, (2)

3. Thempu hon jong gelda tauvin,

4. Mitheng ten Maicham ang sung a,
Kinem’a anga jing u,
Pakai tun ahung kumlha tai,
Ahou in sung a hung un.

2. Asanje simthei lou, Athuhje seithei lou,

lines: Nisa vah chephah na chan’a,
Gam jouse a Jesun vaihom ding,
Gam jouse chung a Leng chang ding,
Ni le lhavah molmang kahsen,
Tan neilouva Ama heng a taona,
Vahchoi na umjing ding,

Namtin vai jousen housoh ding,
Amin chu thao namtui bang ding,
Namtin vai jousen housoh ding;
Vangphat nan loding alenggam,
Setna bul kihen kilham soh ding,

songs.title: HI LEISET NA HINKHO CHOMCHA HI ABEI TENG

lines: 1. Hi leisetna hinkho chomcha hi abeiteng,
Twipi nong thim chu galkai tang-e,
Chamna Van gam nom’a lungkham na beita ding,
Chua ka Lhagao kicholdo tante.
Khopi lam kajot teng,
Mitheng te lenna chu,
Phat kum’a kisim lou,
Van innom lampi kajot teng.
2. Lhagao in’a kipana seijou lou ahi,
Kilungset na huilhi nung jing in,
Kang ngailou hingjing twinah put’a gam’a chun,
Khoisat le lungngai ho beitan te.
3. Aw iti nop tadem luipi gal i-kai teng,
Vahjing van gam’a hoijing tang e,
Chung gam langei sajing tange chungam’a chun,
Vantil thengte toh cheng khom tang e.

Leng ho Leng Pakai chungnung,
Vai hinhom ding,Vai hinhom ding,Vai hinhom ding,
Atonsot tonsot’a Leng ho Leng Atonsot tonsot’a,
Hallelujah,Hallelujah vai hinhom ding.
Atonsot tonsot’a Tonsot’a Leng ho Leng,
Pakai chungnung Leng ho Leng Pakai Chungnung,
Vai hinhom ding Atonsot tonsot’a,
Leng ho Leng Pakai chungnung,
Hallelujah, Hallelujah, Hallelujah,
Hallelujah, Hallelujah.
Reference: Doh is D. d
1. Thisan lu, thisan lu,
Thing Cross chunga long chun;
Chonsetna kon eilhat,
Mi chonse ei’ngaidam;
Chonset nen pen athenna chu,
Calvary thisan lu ahi (2).
2. Aw thisan,thisan lu,
Vankot eihon peh e,
Van gam ilhun teng leh,
Ilau chullou ding chu,
“Thisan,thisan lu,thisan lu”
Tia tanglou-va la isah diu (2).
3. Aw Lhanghoi Calvary,
Miten musit jong leu,
Lhang dang jouse sang in,
Ken ka ngailu pen’e,
O nop na lhang, Vo, mun theng pen,
Pathen thisan alon’a chu (2).
Reference: Doh is F. d
1. Huhhingpu ngailutna ka hen,*
Ngailaut na kidang tah chu ahi,
Van’a kon in ahung kumlhan,
Ei-ngailut le eikho to hintem?
Heng e,heng,keidin keidin,
Heng e,heng,kei din,
Pakai ahung kumlhan,
Ngailut khen louvin,
Cross chung a athi,
Eihuhhing nan.
2. Athoh na le athiso je,
Alem le thing a athi ka hen,
Hijong le ningkom khat beh a,
Eithoh peh le alel kisei nam? (2)
3. Van chondan thusim kahe tai,
Jesu miten amudiu ahi,
Hijong le Van’a mun kei dia,
Sem le phasa dem’a got hinam? (2)
4. Pakai kadoh nei donbut in,
Na heng louva koikom jon tang em?
Lhagao-Theng in neisei peh in,
Kei dia Van le Huhhingpu urn chu (2).
Reference: Doh is B♭. sₗ
1. Chung gam thengtah khat aum’e,
Pakai chen na gamtheng a,
Chung gam thengtah chu ka jon’e,
Lam em lai chu kajon’e.
Chamna lam chu ka jon’e, (2)
Ka chediu ham chamna lampia,
Hungun chamna lampia.
2. Chung gam thertgtah Jesu lam,
Calvary lhang chung a chun,
Lampi thengtah khat aum’e,
Pathen gam eipui lut diu.
3. Chung gam theng tah chu ka jon’e,
Ka Lengpau gam theng a chun,
Tahsan in ken a aw kajai,
Vantil-Theng te lasah chu.
4. Khatvei le jan mumang bang in,
Ka Lhagao chu apui-jin, Mt
Tonsot khopi vah jing a chun,
Lam emlai chu ka jon’e.
Reference: Doh is B♭. sₗ
1. Ven hinna twitheng thisan lu,
Tun jong along jinge,
Huhhingpa thisan luipi chu,
Buh bang a then na chu. (2)
Buhbang a thenna a chun kisil’in,
Koi hile akisil nom chan,
Chonset alhau lheng thei.
2. Huhhingpan Calvary lhang a,
Lung dong tah athoh in,
Hichun thisan le twi along,
Buhbang a then na chu (2).
3. Heng ibon-un chethei ute,
Chu thisan lui-ja chun,
Thisan theng bou tahsan ute,
Buh bang a thenna chu (2).
4. Pakai chuahung phat teng le,
Amite chu pui ding,
Thisan lui tahsan ho bou chun,
Van gam chu chang un te (2).
Reference: Doh is A. sₗ
Pakai vahchoina la saovin (2 times)
Saovin Pakai lemnan saovin
Saovin leile vannoi jouse ten jong
Pakai leile van’a lengpa chun (2 times)
Ama thu in thil jouse asem
Leile van’a asemlou khatcha aumpoi
Ama semlou khatcha aumpoi (2 times) D.C.
Lemun Pakai chu lemnan la saovin
Pakai ka Pathen chu
Vannoi jouse in jong tonsot in alem ui
Thilsem jouse ten jong
Ama achoi an-ui, achoi an-ui
Lhatsa martyr vantil thengten
Alemnan la asai
Tantih neilou dingin
Pakai vahchoi nala saovin (2 times)
Saovin Pakai lemnan saovin
Saovin lei le vanmi jouse ten jong.
Reference: Doh is G.
1. Jui-jing uhite Pakai-jin eipui nai,
Meipi le twipin jong eikhang jou lou ding,
Vaihom pan Laltouna a atoupi jing.
Loupi na le Leng lukhuh isan ding u.
I-galteu chu dou-ute (2)
Thon moa eiho jo ding.
2. Cross kiput in lunggim thoh in icheuvin,
Hicheng chu Jesun eithoh joupi tauve,
Ngailut le khoto na athoh ahi,
I-hesoh na jouseu athoh tan ahi.
3. I-kimvel’u lungjin nan eidou jong leu,
Kicha louvin dettah in ding uhite,
I-lung u itobang in jong bolgim hen,
Pakai-jin hicheng chu eijo peh sohtai.
4. Tun vang Cross jangtah in kiput uhite,
Hesoh abeitai tang louvin la saute,
I-lha mong lheh un,inun’u anom’e,
Jesu Calvary lhang geijin jui-uhite.
Reference: Doh is A. s

songs.title: THINGLHANG JOUSE LE PHAICHAM DUNG A JONG

lines: 1. Thinglhang jouse le phaicham dung a jong,
Pakai Vah emchun asalvah jing,
Jesun eiho ei-umpi jing-uve,
Phat chom khat dia eiumpiu hilou.
Van vah loupi vahhoi em loupi chun,
Ka lungsung penthah na Lhagao eipei,
Hallelujah kipah jing ing ting,
Ka Pakai vahchoi la ken sang e.
2. Aw muthim’a kei ei-um kimvel jing,
Hinla Ka Pakai kamu jing nai,
Muthim umlou na Ka Pakai kom’a,
Taoving ting avahchoi la sang’e.
3. Chung gam nom’a ka in ding gotsa um.
Chu mun gam nom lhung din kei kachei,
Avahchoi na la sa jing tang e ken,
Eihuhhingpa lungsetna noi-jah
Reference: Doh is G. s

songs.title: KA LHAGAO NISA BANG A VAH

lines: 1. Ka Lhagao nisa bang a vah,
Vahdang sang a vahjo,
Vanchung nisa sangin avah,
Ka vah Jesu ahi.
Ken kamutai,Vah nunnom chu,
Cham le kipana ahung lhungtai,
Jesu mailhai chu kamu tai,
Ka Lhagao vah achang tai.
2. Ka Lhagao vin vahchoi la sa,
Kei dia Pa vahchoi la,
Jesun ka vahchoi la ajai,
Kam in sahih jong leng.
3. Ka Lhagao vin kipana nei,
Pakai jin einai teng,
Chamna la kalung in asai,
Ka lung cham nan aloi.
4. Ka Lhagao kipanan adim.
Kinep thangvah toh thon,
Phat theina Aman eipe-e,
Van kipa kanei tai.
Reference: Doh is A♭ d

songs.title: KA THU TEP NA HI KEIMAN SUMIL LOUDING

lines: 1. Kathu tepna hi keiman sumil louding,
I-man heimang lou ding kalha Nang akon,
Chuche phaicham’a chun jan muthim jong le,
Chugal chu Tonsot a vah jing jeng ahi.
Ken sumil lou ding,dalha lou ding,
Kakhut in tuh ing-ting,
Ka ban’in pom ing-ting,
Ken sumil lou ding,dalha lou ding,
Na huhhingpa kahi
Ching jing jeng nang e.
2. Kakipa nahi iti musah ing-em?
Alungset thonlou le ahoidam jal’in,
Ahuhhing na thu midang hillhang leuvin,
Amahon asan teng athutep chang ding.
3. Na thutep gingchan keiman sumil pong e,
Kipa le vahchoi lasah nan mang nang e,
Golten eidalha hen einuse jong leu,
Jesun eingah in tun kipah jing tang e.
Reference: Doh is A♭ sₗ
1. Kigou-vin Christian Sepai te,
Galmi asangjan ahung e,
Gin umtah galmi ahung e,
Pathen galvon von’un pang un.
Gal sumkon gin ngai jing un,
Gal jona ponlap domsang un(domsang un)
Christa ponlap veovin lang,
Manou-vin galjona ding in.
2. Galmi simsen lou hung jong le,
Christa eilam’a apan le,
Thonmo-a eihon ijo teidiu,
Galvon von-un dingdet jing un.
3. I-masang-uva gal miten,
Ei-um kimvel soh jeng jong leu,
Kul dalha lou-vin pang jingun,
Thonmo-a gal chu i-jo tei diu.
4. Galvon vonlou gal masang’a,
Iti na ding jou na ding em?
Galjona din Pathen galvon,
Kivon in galjo na ding in.
Reference: Doh is E.

songs.title: PAKAI KEN HOILANG KAJOT DING HAM?

lines: 1. Pakai ken hoilang kajot ding ham?
Chihna eipe ding Nangma nahi,
Nadei lam chan Pakai neipui-jin,
Na thutep-lungsetna.kaging chai.
I-ting’em Pakai Iting katem?
Ken Nangma iti jen ingem,
Neihil’in kei,Pakai neihil’in,
Nei patep in aw Pakai.
2. Pakai ken ipi kasei ding ham?
Nangma bou lam eihil thei nahi,
Na Thutheng bou kasei theina din,
Pakai Nang in neipanpi jing in.
3. Pakai ken ipi kasei ding ham?
Nami hoithem na bou ka ngaichai,
Na Lhagao-Theng panpi kangai chai,
Lhepna jong keiman pailha jou ding.
4. Pakai kei nachohsa kahitai,
Lungset thohhat kei-ja hitalou,
Nangman neilhat dohsa kahitai,
Nang ding in vahjing inge Pakai.
Reference: Doh is C. s
1. Ka kholjin na hi kachai teng,
Ka genthei kaka na bang ta ding,
Ulsa long a tohgim na ho heta lou ding,
Ka genthei na jouse kile ding.
Ka genthei kaka na kile ding,
Ka-Pakai kom ka lhun teng leh (tengle)
Chen na innom tamtah aum,
Khut’a sahlou Ka-Pakai chen’a.
2. Van innom lam kajot lai hin,
Lhepna meipi hi ajing jing e,
Hijong le Pakai ban thahatna song ing-ting,
Chu khopi nom chu kalhun tei ding.
3. Anachesa Sopi ngaicheng,
Chu khopi gamnom’a aleng-ui,
Ka le mao na leiset ahin ngai tapouve,
jong chu mun lhunkal ka ngah lei.
4. Deikip lelna leiset ahin,
Mihem lunggel jong akikhel jing,
Salem thah innom tilou Leiset in hoina,
Loupi na jouse hung soh ding.
Reference: Doh is C.Lah is A,
1. Mihem loupina ho jouse,
Hung mang loiding ahi,
Lei thilsem ho hung kikhel ding,
Thil lui chengse hung kisem thah in-tin,
Pakai Loupi na hung kilang ding.
Chugam ilhun teng leh,
Genthei kana umta lou ding,
Pakai gam sem Jerusalem.
Pahbang pahna a i-lending.
2. Lei loupina ho jouse jong,
Phat chomkhat ding a bou,
Leipah hoina pahbang molding,
Pakai chen’a Van Jerusalem’a,
Kemtih neilou-va aw ilen diu.
3. Lei nopna le lalna jouse,
Hung mangthah ding ahi,
Lei gentheina pel kanom’e,
Lungdon umkit louna chung gama chu,
Leiset dalhah a len kanom’e.
Reference: Doh is G.
1. Tahsan in gamnom aum kahei,
Aloupi je seithei lou heLchu,
Tonsot’a ni sang a vah a chun,
Jesu toh chu a um kanom’e.
Chua um,Chua um,
Jesu toh chua um kanom’e,
Chua um,Chua um,
Jesu toh chua um kanom’e.
2. Pathen Lekha bu thu kasim’a,
Vangboh pehna mua kaki san le,
Gilkel dangchah hesoh beita ding,
Lhasam te chugam’a choldo ding.
3. Koiham van gam nopje seithei ding,
Lungjin lungdon lengvai beitan te,
Thi le puldou ka le natna jong,
Thikit na jong umta lou hel ding.
4. Chuche gam nom’a chu cheng ding in,
Pathen in mi chonse te akou,
Koi hijeng jong le anom chan chu,
Chuche gam nom’a chun cheng unte.
Reference: Doh is E♭. d
Luipi emhoi gal lang a Lhatdam chate aum,
Chu luipi chu galkai-ja gache ding nanop hih em?
Alampi jouse sana kisem hoichu mukal kangah lei,
Kum sangkhat Leng gam’a chu cheding nanop hih em?
(Alto & Solo)-Kum sangkhat Leng gam’a nache nom em”
Aman “Hung in” tin eikou jing-uve,
Galjona sana Lukhuh ikhuh diu,
Chung gam nom’a chu
Chen ding kanom ngei-je.
(Bass &Solo)-Kipa chimlou gam’a chu nache nom em?
Sana gam emhoi-ja chu nache nom em?
“Kaheng a hungun ” tin eikou jing-uve,
Chua chen ding kanom,Hallelujah,
Vantil janel simjou lou-vin,
Simjou louvin asangjan eigaldot jing-ui.
Kum sangkhat Leng gam hoi-ja chu,
Galjo na lukhuh ikhuh diu,
Lallukhuh san ding kipana la isah diu,
Goldei te i-muteng le kipana
Chulthei talou ding,
Chua galjo na Lallukhuh ikhuh diu,
Jola isah diu ahitai.
Reference: Doh is A. d

songs.title: VADUNG CHIMTAH LON JINGNA PHAICHAM A CHUN

lines: 1. Vadung chimtah Ion jingna phaicham’a chun,
Lhandampu Jesun eipuinai kei che ding,
Aban jal’in twikhanglen a hijong le,
Cheng e kipah in amangsa holdoh din.
Lhandampun eipui nai,
Jui jing e kipah in,
Mi lungset Pakai puina,
Kipah a jui ding.
2. Pohgih pum hihen genthei pet hijong le,
Kelngoi gam mang sate ho chu holdoh in,
Hesohna hihen kipana hijong le,
Pakai toh kilhon khom tange chung gam’a.
3. Lhandampun eipui hoichan gam hijong le,
Kipana le genthei na a thoh hat ding,
Aman lung mon’a lampi dih chu ahei,
Nisa bang a vah innom hoitah gam chu.
Reference: Doh is E♭. m
1. Lungset na thon amangsa holdoh un,
Gamla tah molchung lam ageitai ,
Pakai-jin eiho eikou-vui tunin,
“Ka henga hung un”tin asam jing.
Molchung lam ageitai kou loi-jun,
Hung kile kit’in tin kou loi-jin mangang un,
Lhandampu kul sung a lutloi-jun,
Kelngoinou Jesu set jehin aki-that tai.
2. Amangsa Jesu henga hinpui-jun,
Lhagaova genthei lung lengvai te,
Sochatna lampia hin puilut’un,
Mangsa te hinna lampi hil’un.
3. Lungsetna tanglou-vin seiphong leute,
Niseh in Christa nung jui-ute,
Kipah thanom in Jesun eipui nai,
Hinna lampi Jesu thu hil’un.
Reference: Doh is B♭. sₗ
1. Ven! Meibang toh ahung kumlhai,
Chonse lhatna atha sao,
Mitheng sangsom sangjan ajui,
Loupi leh hu len tah in.
Hallelujah (2), Jesu hung ding vaihom’a.
2. Veovin mit jousen amutai,
Loupi tah a akivon,
Ama nahsah moa johdoh ho,
Anah sun’a khai sang ho.
Kap’a peng diu (3), Messiah amu teng ule.
3. Sumkon gin kichat amut teng,
Van le lei jam mangta ding,
Ama vetda se lung dong ding,
Kouna thupeh aw jading.
Thupi tan’a (3), Mona chu diu Tonsot’a.
4. Tonsot lhatdam na ngah jing ten,
Mu diu loupia hung kilah,
Vannoi san lou Mitheng te sen,
Van lai-ja Ama amudiu.
Hallelujah (3),Pathen hung kilah mu diu.
5. Amen, tin mi jousen lem hen,
Chungnung pen Lai touna a;
Thahat, loupi Lhandampu ding
Tonsot Lenggam Ama ding.
Oh, hungloiyin, (3 vei) Hallelujah hung loiyin
Reference: Doh is B♭. dₗ
1. Keiman malam kano jing e,
Niseh in kama chal jing e,
Ka tao jinge machalna din,
Nei dinsah in mun chungnung a.
Neiphong in lang neidin sah in,
Tahsan in gamnom mung kate,
Lungset kipa vah umna mun,
Nei dinsah in mun chungnung a.
2. Ka lungin lung olna neiloii,
Lung genthei le kichat mun’a,
Ka chen na ding innom tah chu,
Kalung tupna mun chung nung a.
3. Hesoh le genthei na gal’a,
Van gam nom kicholdo na a,
Lung ol le chamna aum’e,
Mun nom chungnung Pakai kom’a.
4. Ka nga jing mun nom chungnung chu,
Thohgim le hahsa toh jong leng,
Vahchoi na lan chung gam athong,
Mun nom’a Pakai neipui-jin.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ
1. Na hina din keima neiven,
Kouna thupeh ngaijin
Manbei-ja lhatdam na thu hi
Gamtin'a seiphong len.
Na hinna din,Keima neiven,
Leiset chung a um ten,
Na Pathen u kahi jeh in,
Na hinna din keima neiven.
2. Cross chung a kaum neiveo vin,
Set pohna lengvai te,
Na set jal’in genthei thoh in,
Nei tahsan jing-uvin.
3. Na Pakai thoudohpa neiven,
Lhepna muthim phatsung,
Hepina manbei-ja pe ding,
Satan jong nehjou ding.
4. Na hinna din neive jingin,
Panpi dang naneipoi,
Ngaidam chamna na-ngaichat teng,
Keima jeng bou neiven.
Reference: Doh is D. d

songs.title: CHRISTIAN ADEI MITHENG LE GALHAT MIDIH

lines: 1. Christan adei Mitheng le galhat midih,
Galsat na mun’a nang din mun aum’e,
Setna vannoi-ja kijot un malam non,
Kipa man Van khopi em chu isandiu
Malam nou-vin Cross galmi,
Lungdong lou-vin tahsan jing in,
Malam nou-vin Cross galmi,
Song un Pakai athu ngai-jun,
Galjo na din nouvin.
2. Satan lhepnan nitin in eijui jing e,
Hijong leh Pakai-ja jona ichan diu,
Til’a gal hatmasa te le hangtah ten,
Malam nou-vin lunglhai sel’in in lhungta.
3. Malam no cheh un hang tah in lamjot un,
Pakai Jesu ve jing unlang tao jing un,
Amitin chitin Pakai-ja hi jing hen.
Hossana isapteng lei hi ijo ding.
Reference: Doh is E♭. s
1. Chamna Lengpa apeng Bethlehem’a,
Hichu gam lai lungpen Canan gamnom,
Namtin ding a keng a lhun thei na ahi,
Chua hin le dam twitheng along e.
Aw lunglhai sel’in Naosen Leng pen nihin,
Kipah in saute Cham le lung ol-na,
Chitin namtin ding in Sochatna ahi.
Nom-un lem-un,Hallelujah tiuvin.
2. Phalbi dapjan khosot phoinel chung a,
Kelngoi chinghon akelngoi nga pet un,
Jankhang lai-jin Gabriel in ahung vil’un,
“Hinna damna Thupha kahin poi” ati.
3. Chu-in Vantil sangjan vanlai jol’a,
Hung kilah in chung langei asau-ve,
Chungnung pen’a Pathen lpupina hihen,
“Leichung a kipa le Charmia leng hen.”
4. Kipah ute chung le noi Leng pen nin,
Van khongpi le lei khongpi ging to hen,
Leng jouse Leng le Pakai jouse Pakai,
Hinlai damsung in lem-ute Leng Christa.
5. Kelngoi ching hon chu khopi sung jon’un,
Solam miching ten jong chu kho jon-un,
Chibai boh un vaicha ten aneisun un,
Leng le Lai ten jong agoubom ahong-un.
Reference: Doh is A. sₗ
1. Kahei.ka Lha'ndampu ahing e,
Leisetckung &%jng ding kit ding,
Kahei,Tonsot hinkem lou eipei,
Loupi thahat chungnung ahi.
Kahei kahei,Jesu chu ahing,
Leiset chung a hung ding kit ding,
Kahei kahei,hinna chu eipei,
Loupi chungnung thahat anei.
2. Kahei,athutepsa chu thonlou,
Asei thucheng mangthah ngailou,
Chonset po kaphe hi mang jong le,
Kamu teiding Ama ol-le.
3. Kahei kachen na ding eigon peh,
Ama umna kei jong cheng ding,
Kalung kinepna chu ahinpoi,
Akhon nile kei dia hung ding.
Reference: Doh is D♭. s
1. Mangang un khovah chate ho,
Pakai thupeh sa ahi,
Jesu Thupha kidang tah hi,
Hangtah in lhangsam leuvin.
Kon-uvin Christian sepai te,
Manou-vin nungchon lou-vin,
Christa din pang det cheh-uvin,
Jona ni ahung naitai.
2. Kigou-vin hinna thu homdin,
Kouna aw chu ngaiphau-vin,
Pakai thahat chu pan unlang,
Amangsa huhdoh loi-jin.
3. Cheuvin genthei te koukhom un,
Lhatdoh ding a thutepsa,
Geisang lou-vin koukhom loi jun,
Golvah na Ankon umdin.
Cheuvin namtin mijouse chu,
Hil loi-jun Sochat na thu,
"Phat anai" tin hil loi-jun,
Kouvun hung lut loi uhen.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ
1. Vo,lungset muchi jalsah a,
Lou len bol nang ho,
Muchi chu hung khangtou vin tin,
Aga pha na-at ding.
Jing le thai le
nalam lhah a,
Thutep muchi
llhah chu,
Aga min ho
molle phai-ja,
Achaina kigom ding.
2. Mitlhi pum hijong le tu-vin,
Muchi chu hing tei ding,
Atoh hah jong le mangpon te,
Pa gasah ding jal’in.
3. Pathen chang at gopkhom lhung ding,
Tong le gim ho jo teng,
Paolou kipan sana at un,
Khomkim tau-vin nate.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ
1. Van gam chihna Thupha chun,
Leiset alosoh tai,
Pathen Chapa Christa kon,
Lungsetna bulhing set.
Heuvin kipah tah in sangun,
Lungset thu kidang tah chu,
Pathen lungset noi-ja um un,
Thisan in kei eisop thengin.
2. Pathen kamsung thua kon,
Chihna kimu ahi,
Bible a kisun chu,
Pathen kamsung ahi
3. Fathen lungset nakimu,
Tahsan vang a ahi,
Calvary lhanga athin,
Chonset angaidam tai.
4. Lhagao Theng in eiseipeh,
Chung gam Thupha thu chu,
Pathen lungset ,na thu chu,
Christa thu loupi pen.
Reference: Doh is A♭. sₗ
1. Lamlhung kei-jin Pakai jin eipui-je,
AmIn vahchoi-jun,
Van Mana chun eivah e,
Amintheng chu vahchoi-jun.
Hallelujah hiche ka la,
A-itih a Jesu Jesu,
Sau-vin avahchoi na la chu,
Amin vahchoi-jun.
2. Ka Lhahsam teng Aman eipanpiji,
Amin vahchoi-jun,
Ka kichat teng eidal’e,
Amintheng chu vahchoi-jun.
3. Hinkho man themna eipen eipui-jing,
Amin vahchoi-jun,
Aman kei eidalha poi,
Amintheng chu vahchoi-jun.
Reference: Doh is E♭. s

songs.title: PHAT TIN IN KEI NEI KITHOPIN

lines: 1. Phat tin’in kei nei kithopin,Leiset nisa em laihin,
Neipui-jin nei hil’in Pakai hinna lam,
Eilungsetnau kidang tah chu,
Lamdih pen’in hillu-vin,
Kipana chu eiho a hita lou ham?
Aw Pakai lensah in,
Kipa na hinkho damsung noplai hin,
Lungjin jousen eivop teng,
Pakai-jin eipui len,
Leiset gimna abonchan eipai lhah peh.
2. Hiche leiset thim jing noi-ja,
Lungmong mon vah le jong leng,
Ka olmo na ding aumpoi aw Pakai,
Nangma vah chun eisal em in, Chonset jousen eivop teng.
Khovah chate eiso sah in Aw Pakai.
3. Jing niso teng neihin veovin,
Lungjin jousen eivop teng,
Pakai tailou adang umlou eihuh ding,
Itih tah le kadalha dem.thimpi jing in eivop hi,
Jing niso teng Huhhingpan eihoidam diu.
Reference: Doh is D. m
1. Pakai Jesu sepai dingin,
Nitin anung jui-jin,
Amintheng chungnun na mun’a,
Lo einei sah diuvem?
Amintheng Chungnung Mintheng,
Ka setna asoplhai,
Mudia lungtup Lallukhuh chu,
A Cross dop jing akon.
2. Thisan twipi galkai na ding,
Cholngahna aumpoi,
Mitheng ten eithum peh nau chu,
Pathen in eipanpi.
3. Hinna pahcha pahna gam’a,
Rei eipui na ding em?
Kalung tuppen Lallukhuh chu,
Thisan lutah tobang.
4. Galdou ding iti tam jong le,
Hatna eipei Jesun,
Cross dopna kigim jong le,
Pakai-jin eipanpi.
Reference: Doh is D. d
1. Bible in vannoi losoh ding,
Hichu eiho loupi na ding,
Namtin in aloupina chu,
Phat theina haona anei ding.
Pathen lungset vahhoi loupi,
Twikhanglen le leiset chung a,
Kithang jing jeng in sun le jan in,
Pathen in eihil Tonsot’ in.
2. Sana khopi emsung a chun,
Sun le jan’a nisa vah jing,
Meithim jong kihoh doh soh ding,
Chonset natoh jong kichai ding.
3. Eihon Pathen mai imudiu,
Alungset nan sal emjing ding,
Hiche loupi kamu teng leh,
Kei iti kaki pah ta dem?
4. Choldo na apeNunggim te,
Mitlhi longte jong kihoh soh,
Thahat apei cholte ding in,
Kumkho-a kinepna pejing.
Reference: Doh is B♭ sₗ

songs.title: MEIVOM KAINA CHUNG PEN A KHUN

lines: 1. Meivom kaina chung peh a khun,
La hung kisa koisah ham?
Ami ngailut na le thahat,
Na la ngeitah in sau-vin.
Kelngoi nou thisan theng a
Avon sop theng a Mitheng te ahi. (2)
2. Kelngoinou chu alamkai jin,
Ama avahchoi jing-ui,
Hinna an in avah jing e,
Thisana Ihatdoh sate.
3. Laltouna kimvel’a touva,
La ngei sa jing a koiham?
Leiset genthei na mun dalha,
Van’a kicholdo ahi.
4. Pathen Kelngoinou lamkai jin,
Sun le jan in atong un,
Aman van an chun avah in,
Alhiu atheh hul peh in.
5. Amin ngei tah lhatdam na chun,
Theng chungnung Christa ang a,
Amit mu-vin akikhel’un,
Laltouna kimvel’a chun.
Reference: Doh is E. s
1. Pakai Nang kangailu pen’e,
Leiset nopna sang in,
Ajeh chu Nangman lung neipen,
Hichu ngailut na lung.
Mi asang aja ngailut na,
Hillou lai atam’e,
Ei sutheng a thisan lu chu,
Mi tamtah hillou lai.
2. Pakai Nangman nei nga jingle,
Keima kicha lod ding,
Namin ngei ken ka vahchoi ding,
Leiset nopna sang in.
3. Aw Ka Pakai ka Lhandampu,
Nalung sung a cheng in,
Chuteng kalung kipah jing ding,
Leiset nopna sang in.
4. Aw Lhandampu lhatdam kidang,
Nei thilpeh ihin tem?
Hitobang kipa na hinkho,
Lei-ja neiching jing in.
Reference: Doh is C. d
1. Jesu lungset kidang chu,
Ka chonset sang a len,
Ka min iti phon ding,
Avahchoi kipana,
Kapoh gihho subei-jin,
Ka Lhagao a-onsah,
Jesu lungset na kidang tah chun,
Eihao sah.
Jesu lungsetna kidang tah chun,
Kidang tah gotsa,
Twikhanglen kinong sang a thuh,
Twi len sang a thuh,
Lungset kidang keima ding,
Lhingset keima ding a,
Ka themmo na jouse sang a jaojo,
Ka chonset jachatna sang a lenjo,
Aw Jesu min vahchoina chu,
Dom sangun vahchoi-jun.
2. Jesu lungset kidang chu,
Mangsa te kom lhungsoh,
Ngaidamna kachan na le,
Apumpia huhhing na,
Eihungpei kei michonse,
Nom len’a eipe tai,
Jesu lungset na kidang tah chun,
Eihao sah.
3. Jesun lungset kidang chu,
Chonse pen kom jonglhung,
Asemthah na thahat chun,
Pathen chadei asoi,
Chamna Van gam achoh peh,
Tonsot Tonsot’a din,
Jesu lungset na kidang tah chun,
Eihao sah.
Reference: Doh is D. s

songs.title: KEIMAN LHANDAMPU LOUPI TAH KANEI JE

lines: 1. Keiman Lhandampu loupi tah kanei-je,
Lei golngai lhom jong le Lhandampu kanei,
Aman tun eingah jing e,lungset le hepin,
Ka Lhandampu nang Lhandampu jong hinam ?
Nang dingin ka Jaove, (3)
Ka taove, nang ding in.
2. Keiman Pa khat kanei,Tonsot kinepna,
Thahat le lung ol eipeh ka-vahchoi-je,
Eihin kou loi ta ding Van’a kimu to din,
Nang jong keitoh kilhon’in puinan natem?
3. Von bang leh le loupi tahsan ding kanei,
Loupi tah a kamu ding kangah jing e,
Vah tah le valtah kasan ni teng chu le,
Vo,Gol nangman jong khat nasan mu nang katem?
4. Chamna kanei luidung bang in aneme,
Leiset golten chuche chamna hekha lou,
Eilhandampu bou apu le eipe ahi,
Aw Nang na kipeh jong hinhet peh nang em?
4. Jesu nanei teng hil’in athu midang,
Ka Lhandampu nang Lhandampu jong ahi,
Jauvin Lhandampun loupia hin puikhom ding,
Na taona Pathen in nasan peh tei nante.
Reference: Doh is G.

songs.title: CHONSET LUNGGEL IN DIM JENG JONG LENG

lines: 1. Chonset lunggel’in dim jeng jong leng,
Tahsan jal’in Pakai kahung e,
Na soptheng ding le onsah ding in,
Innah kahung e.
Kahung e,Kahung e,
Sctna lampia vahle sotta lou ding,
Kei kahung e, kahung e,
Pakai Jesu kei kahung e.
2. Apan vahmang chapa ahol bang,
Chonsetna dim damlou panpi bei,
Nangman kei neihoi doh in tin,
Innah kahung e.
3. Nei kouna awnem chu ken kajai,
Hibang golpha iti ken mung-em?
Ka themmo kichatna lamang in,
Innah kahung e.
4. Jesu thisan manlu tah long chun,
Buhsanga bangjon eisop theng tai,
Nangma jeng bou kinepna bulpi,
In nah kahung e.
Reference: Doh is B♭.sₗ
1. Endeaver nu-ngah gollhang ho,
Chapang te huhdoh-uvin,
Hinpui-jun Lhandampu heng a,
Alampi hilloi-juvin.
MachonuvoNu-ngahgollhang,
Thudih lam’a machon un,
Puidoh un muthim’a umte,
Jing khovah hoi em nom’a.
2. Endeaver nu-ngah gollhang ho,
Idia igei sang diu ham?
Mi tamtah Pathen helou-va,
Mangthah gamdjp ahitai.
3. Endcaver nu-ngah gollhang ho,
Mailhai sel’in tong ute,
Hoichan’a che jeng jong leohen,
Kipana la sajing un.
Reference: Doh is D. d

songs.title: VAN GAM LHUNG DIA NAKIGOT EM?

lines: 1. Van gam lhung dia nakigot em?
Tahsan un kiging phau-vin,
Koi hile kathu tahsan’a,
Van gam nom chu chang inte.
Van gam nom seithei lou,
Lhenchom te dia kisem chu,
Jon-uvin gamtheng chu,
Jubilee a hung kai cheh un.
2. Bible Theng in asei thu hi,
Pathen in mihem thu ding,
Lhagao hinna thu chan asei,
Tahsan un chonset pailhan.
3. Christa hin nom jouse chu,
Lhatdamna lam hinhol’in,
Hinlai chonset pailhah na din,
Lhagao hina eipeove.
Reference: Doh is G. d
1. Gam jousea phong-un Pakai thu,
Poleu-vin twipi gal’a,
Seipeh-un chonse te heng a,
Muthim gam vahsoh kahsen.
Gam jousea seiphongleuvin,
Poleu-vin twilen gal’a,
Pakai thu phongun gamtin’a.
Vahchoi-jun Amin kumkhon.
2. Kipana thu hi seileu-vin,
Khovah pha amu theinan,
Muthim umna gam jouse chu,
Vahsah un jan muthim gam.
3. Kipana thu seichoi lenge,
Molle lhang dam phaicham’a,
Jesu thu mun jouse’a seiding,
A huhhing na thahat chu.
4. Namdang ding a katao pet-un,
Thanom tah in kithopin,
In le louva sumil lou-vin,
Jesu igam diu hihen.
Reference: Doh is D♭. s
1. Khangdong galmi galhat hon
Kipa na la domsang un,
Lamto na thu seiphong un Jesu hing,
Khatvei nang le keidia thi i-setnau thingchung a pon,
Tun eiho onsah ding in Jesu hing.
Setna hunglhung ding le
Nakhang che ding ngah hih-in,
Na chena jousea kipah tahin
Jesu din san,
Kipna lan domsang un
Lei le van’a seiphong un,
Phatthei na Kipana thu Jesu hing.
2. Chapang te anomlen lai khangdong te din kipana,
Lei le twilen chung a san Jesu hing,
Nang le mijouse dia vah chonse te dia mutheina,
Jesu a hinna mu ding Jesu hing.
3. Jesu hin phatthei na thu Leng le Pakai ho Pakai,
Thahat in Cross domsang in Jesu hing,
Ikihen nau susen eidal tan ho sumang sohin,
Eiho din thina jou-vin Jesu hing.
Reference: Doh is A♭.

songs.title: NA HOUBUBNG SEMTHAH KIT IN LANG

lines: 1. Na Houbung semthah kit-in lang,
Na Leng gam chu tung doh kit in,
Chi le meivah bangin athah in
Hinvahdoh sah kit’in lang,
Jan muthim jingkal kah ahin,
Vangsetna ding dimset jeng jong le,
Kajo tei na din kithopi hinsol’in aw Pakai.
2. Na thudih chu neihetsah unlang,
Ka lampiu vahsah jing in,
Na milungset na thu chu neihet sah
Jing jeng-uvin lang,
Nangman keiho neingai-luvin,
Huhhingna neimu sah taove.
Na milungsetna hi kalung
Sung-uva cheng jing hen.
3. Taoje neihil-uvin lang
Na aw neijah sah jing jeng-uvin,
Nang kakom’a naum lou teng
Keiho din mon’a umlou,
Kakom-uva Nang naum’a %
Nangma lungdei kabolna diu,
Niseh a Nangma kahol-uva
Ka houna diu-vin.
4. Mi jouse lungthim’a na
Lungsetna thu hi neihiluvin,
Kivetda kithangset na beina dingin
Nang nahung thitai,
Keiho eisukhen-uva bang ho chu
Neisuh mangpeh tauve,
Nangma milungset chun
Keiho ei-umpi jing tauhen.
5. Nalampi chu neimusah-un
Kaman thah louna ding-uvin,
Kachang un kading joupou-vin
Nangma kithopi ka ngai-jui.
Chonset thahatna ho
Nangma kithopi lou-vin sang joulou,
Jona thahat Nangman bou
Neipethei-uve Pakai.
Reference: Doh is G. d
1. Tahsan lhom kei kichat teng,
Christan eituh nai,
Lhepnan ijo ding teng le,
Eituh det jing nai.
Eituh det jing nai (2)
Lhandampu lungset na chun,
Eituh det jing nai.
2. Keima tahsan det joulou,
Eituh det tei jin,
Ka ngailut na alhom teng,
Eituh det tei ding.
3. A-ang a kei manlu tah,
EituKdet jing ding,
Alhatdoh te kipa pin,
Huhhing te lem’in.
4. Ka Lhagao mangthah lou ding,
Christan eituh ding,
Man tamtah a eilhat doh,
Ei tuhdet jing ding.
Reference: Doh is F. m
1. Chung a Vantil ho lasah,
Phaicham sung kithong soh in,
Molle lhang jouse a jong,
Aw gin akithong matsoh.
Lou ......... pihen
Milungsetpa ............ Pathen,
2. Kelngoi ching ho ibol’a,
Hibang a nakipau ham?
Vantil ho lasah gin chu,
Ipi kipana thu ham?
3. Bethlehem a hung ve uvin,
Vantil ho lasah thu chu,
Chibai boh ding in hungun,
Pakai Christa Leng pengthah.
4. Hungven gan ankong sung’a,
Lum kelngoi chinghon alem,
Mary Joseph in ngah in,
Lungset aum-dan chua.
Reference: Doh is F, m
1. Kipana kemlou eiho dia,
Jesu Christa vang ahi,
“Pathen Cha” tia kivo na,
Min jong eipeu-ve eiho din.
Pathen Cha tia kikou gol eiho cheng,
Tua ipi soh ding ham ti hetlou lai,
Pakai imuteng ihet diu (2).
Pakai melbang a eiho i-umdiu,
Aloupina eiho a hiding.
2. Pakai a lung sung vahsel ding,
Limgeh cha Pathen mu ding,
Thengsel’a ahung vah teng,
Eihuhhingpao imusgh-diu.
3. Lungsetna avou kikhel ding,
Pakai mel iput-dingu,
Christan eithu teppeh tauve,
Pakai-ja chan eiho ding.
Reference: Doh is C, s

songs.title: KEI PAKAI HINKHO A LEN KANOM E

lines: 1. Kei Pakai hinkho a len kanom’e.
Jesu umchan bang in kaum nom’e,
Lung ngamtah in Ama lhachan pang ing-e,
Ken tongpan ing-e Jesun asei bang in.
Pakai Jesu kalung sung thensah in,
Nangma lhachan neipan sah in Pakai.
Lungset tah in keima neihuh hing in,
Nangma hinkho a len ding kanom’ e.
2. Jesu hinkho keima ding a ahi,
Tohthei na thahat keima jong neipen,
Keiman hinna Thupha seiphong leng kate,
Lhagao-Theng in keima neilah lut sah in.
3. Jesu hinkhoa kei len kanom ngei,
Lungset Aw nem-in kalung sung sun hen,
Aw nei lamkai-jin hoitho na a kon in,
Pakai ding in manchah pha nei hisah in.
Reference: Doh is D, s

songs.title: PAKAI JIN KATHIL LE KANEI JOUSE CHU

lines: 1. Pakai jin kathil le kanei jouse chu,
Nangma hon nasel’un nagu’ve ati.
Nathil nei jouse laha som’a khat chu,
Neipehle neithei na vang chu kapeh ding.
Na nei jouse chu itlou hel’in,
Hopsom’a hop khat chu
Neihin pe jing jeng un,
Phatthei na tanglouva kapeh ding ,
Van gam kot kahon ding
Phathei na na chung a,
Hung Ihung ding ahi,
An neh lhingsel’a kapeh ding nahi ti,
Chung a leng ju le va jong
Kaneh sah lou ding ahi,
Pakai jin ati,
Nei pehding ham
Neipeh lou ding ham ti-in,
Pakai jin ati.
2. Pakai-jin kathil chu guhih un ati,
Pakai-jin kathil ati jouse vang chu,
Natohga sung’a kon’a som’a khat chu,
Pakai-jin keima thil jeng ahi ati.
3. Nalousoh sung a kon in som’a khat chu,
Selmang louhel’in som’a khat chu koi-jin,
Hiche bang a napeh le phatthei na chu,
Tantih neilou-va namu jing ding ahi.
4. Pathen thil aselle agu jouse chu,
Nikhat kah le jankhat kaha mangthah ding,
Pathen thil som’a khat chu napeh vang le,
Hauthei na damthei na kapeh ding nahi.
Reference: Doh is D, s

songs.title: MUTHIM LE CHONSET NA LAMPIA KEI CHE TAPONG E

lines: 1. Muthim le chonset na lampia kei che tapong e,
Leiset gimnan eikipasah lou,
Van innom jon‘a che teho nungjui chu kahi,
Kalampi chun loupina eilhut ding.
Keima lampia (2)
Kei mun loupi jotna lampi aum,
Song mantam kotpi mun chu,
Lhandampun einga na mun,
Mun loupi jotna geina lai kahi.
2. Hinna lampi chu kichi henlang hah jeng jong le,
Ama vahchun eipui le jing nai,
Keiman Jesu lhalou ding itih chan hijong le,
Kajotna mun loupi lhun theina ding.
3. Lui gal a khun khopi ningli hoi nomtah aum, ;
Hiche in chu keima ding ahi.
Ka-kholjin kachai teng keiman Ama kamu ding,
Kei mun loupi jon kahina nalaije
Reference: Doh is B, mₗ
1. O chang-at hoiham bemsunga koiding,
Changpal pha chonset lou jaova kon in,
Thudih koitea toh kichai teiding,
Cholngahna umlou Chang khoptup kah sea.
A-at ho hoiham o koi hung ding,
Chuteng vangam loupina chang khom ding in,
O kon eihuding akoitup ding,
Chang palpha chonset loujaova kon in .
2. Cheleuvin lou jaova gaholdoh un,
A chang ho umding hampa tamjong le,
Lamdunga holun hopai lou jen-un.
Hinkhom tupsoh un chung gam inpia din .
3. Loujao ho chu amintai muntina,
Vannoi in tun chang-at phat ngah lelta;
Chang at alhom in atding atam e,
Tamtah mangta ding chang-at ageile.
4. Nakoite kengun hung un mihemte,
Achang manlu tah ho chu kholkhomun;
Lou neipu hung kah in natong gim’un,
Chuteng inpia kipana chang khom ding.
Reference: Doh is G, mₗ
1. Aphat dungjui-jin achal jing,
Aniseh in a chal jing,
Leiset chung natoh dalha a,
Inlam jon in che tang e.
Aphat dung,phat dungjui jin
Che tang e
Che tang e,Che tang e,Inlam jon in,
Aphat dung,phat dungjui-jin che tang e.
2. Kumho dung jui-jin che tang e.
Chung le noi thilsem jouse,
Lungsung a kipana dim jing,
Lengvai genthei adim’e.
3. Leiset chung Mile sangsom sangja,
Keiman kajot laise hin,
Kache velkol jou phat teng le,
Inlam jon’a kache ding.
4. Niseh in Pakai jah taovun,
Lamdih tah a eipui diu,
Chu tailou lamdih dang umlou,
Chubou chu lamdih ahi.
Reference: Doh is G,sₗ
1. Huhhingpun nakouna awgin chu ngaiphan,
Tonggim te kaheng a hungun choldou-vin,
Hungun geisang lou-vin keiman ngai-jang ding,
Na chonset pohgih chu seplhan kaheng a.
Hungun keiman cholngah sah ung-e,
Ka namkol jon kibun ka phatthei chang un,
Keima lungneng kahi phatna song un,
Kanam kol kibu-vin na pohgih jang ding.
2. Lungkham le lunggim genthei a nava lem?
Boina lung khamna jouse pailha soh in,
Phat mona le lungthim boina nanei jem?
Jesu kom’a na pohgih ngan choldo tan.
3. Chonset muthim le boina meipi jing a,
Damun meikong le kokhuh thim jing sung a,
Chonset nan suhmang dia napui mang teng le,
Kelngoi chingpha kouna Aw ngai-jin choldon.
Reference: Doh is C, m

songs.title: SAUVIN LHATDAMSA TE HO PHAT CHESA GELLOU VIN

lines: 1. Sauvin lhatdamsa te ho phat chesa gellou-vin,
Ka tahsan chunggam lhungin kipana la ngeitah,
Ven phatthei na molchung a Kading in Muntheng a,
Ka galdot e Jordan galjKamui gamtep gam chu.
Sauvin langei chungnung in,
Na aw nei sun sun in,
Mitheng kilhen ding ngaito
Kipanan eilotai
2. Sauvin lhatdamsa te ho,Leiset hinlai sung hin,
Jesu vahchoi na langei,kem mang jing niseh in,
Thusim lui chu sa jing in,A ngailut lhatdam na,
Hiche chullou langei hin,Chung gam Intheng aloi.
3. Sauvin lhatdamsa te ho, phatsot um talou ding,
Ipau gamtheng Ihunkah sea I-ngai cheng hon eingah-ui,
Luipang a lamto ding in kilamto ding luigal’a,
Kana umtalou ding eingah ui gol ngaiten.
Reference: Doh is F, s
1. Vannoi kipana hinkhon’n lodim tahen.
Ama leiset na ahung pen hin,
Cham le lungmon nan mihem lungthim,
Semthah kit-hen tuni hin.
Kipa na aw gin,
Vahchoi na langei,
Lungset na thu.
Mijousen kipana aw gin thong chu jacheh hen,
Mitin’in kipana dahgin thong chtf jacheh hen lang,
Vannoi-jin kipana dahgin thong chuJacheh henlang,
Jesu chu ahung tai,
Kipana Thupha hi jacheh hen.
2. Leiset pahcha emsel’a apahna mun’a,
Huilhi nem nung in amut teng,
Pahgim namtui ahinpoi,
Chung leng van jong kipa la asai.
Kipana aw gin,
Vahchoina la ngei,
Lungset na thu.
Mijousen kipana aw gin thong chu jacheh henlang,
Mitin’in kipana dahgin thong chu jacheh henlang,
Vannoi-jin kipana dahgin thong chu jacheh hen lang,
Jesu ahingdoh kittai,
Kipana Thupha hi najadem?
3. Kipana aw gm thong chu akijah teng le,
Hinna nei Lhagao hon ahetdiu,
Leng loupi chu ahung tengle,
Atahsan ho hing tading.
Kipa aw gin,
Vahchoina la ngei,
Lungset na thu.
Mijousen kipana aw gin thong chu
Jacfieh henlang,
Mitin’in kipana aw gin thong chu
Jacheh henlang,
Vannoi-jin kipana aw gin thong chu
Jacheh henlang,
Jesu Leng chang ding,
Kipana Thupha hi seipeh in.
Reference: Doh is C, s

songs.title: PHAICHAM LILY PAH AMA ITI HOITAM

lines: 1. Phaicham Lily pah loupi Ama iti hoitam?
Ama keija ahi,
Vantil awgin ngei sanga ngeijo a aw Keidia,
Kei Ama a kahi,
Lily pahhoi pahna le twinen keu louna a,
Aban thahat tah chun eipuilen eituh det jing,
Ngailut nan eium kimvel’e,Kei kichai lou ding,
Ama kei-ja ahi.
Phaicham Lily pah Ama keija,
Phaicham Lily pah kei Ama a, *
Vantil awgin ngeijo a aw keidia,
Ama kei-ja ahi.
2. A milungsetna khotona dihtah ken lan sange,
Kei Ama a kahi,
Jingkah nilhah aphat tin’in phatthei na eipei
Kei ama a kai,
Boina meipin eikhu teng jongle eihong bit in;
Lung mongin kicholdon iman na$use louding,
Jing khovah kahsea aching avetup hijing ding,
Ama keija ahi.
3. Thina phaicham lim’a Aman kei eipui-lei,
Ama kei-ja ahi.
A aw nem chun eiseipeh jing kakichat ding
Kei ama a kahi,
Ama umna a vahehun jan muthim a salvah vah in,
Phaicham gala molsang chung a umgei jin eipui lei,
Bulputna kon jalenna vah emsellin eipui.
Ama kei-ja ahi.
Reference: Doh is E,
1. Pakai-ja dia thilpha bol numeinu,
Aneisun thao namtui hinchoi-jin,
Angailut Pakai chunga asunglhai,
Seijui ho aphun taove.
Amanu hin abolthei chan,
Pakai chung a abol ahi.
Nang in jong nabol thei chan chu,
Pakai-ja din tongpan tan.
2. Na phat mantam Pakai-ja din mangchan,
Lhagao mang ding simsenlou aum.
Huhdoh din Pakai-jin eisolluve,
Pang ute gamsung nute.
3. Na insung a naji nacha vephan,
A mangthai ding khat tou umkhan te,
Nangma mopohna ahi ching theijin,
Taona toh thon pang jing in.
4. Kipan-ute gamsung salvah na din,
Mung le ithau gomtou tin,
Lhagao mangthai ho huhdoh na dingin,
Lung le tha pantau hite.
1. Vekit in chentah in dah in lang,
Aw Pa namu ding phat anaitai,
Naji nacha te kina nauvin tem,
Dalhah nanei khah dem vekit in.
Noah daijilai miten nuisat un,
Tuilet ding kicha louvin mong un,
Pakai kouna aw hung ging le,
Na jaona diuvem na in kouvin.
2. Pakai jin ati kahung ding teng,
Ling kihot ding kel hung lha ding,
Kidou thuthang ding ngailutna daiding,
Pakai thutep adihlou umlou.
3. Hunglhung loijin te Pakai nikho,
Ngailutna phat hung beiloi ta ding,
Keichang ka soKchai tikhan nate,
Nachate kim nauvem vekit in.
4. Sun le jan chol louva lhatsa te,
Khongpi le Baza tumging to thon,
Hinna thinglim hintwi don ding,
Napang nadiu vem na inkou-vin.
1. Eihuhhingpu ngailut na chu Aw akidang e,
Athina Cedar thingphung noija chun,
Lungset um in achun nu akap’e.
Kipani teng vahchoi jing ting,
Genthei niteng leh akom’a tao vinge,
Leiset miten musit jong le
Eilhandampu chu,
Ahung niteng le aw loupi tante.
2. Pathen in vannoi angailui Aw akidang e.
Achapa changkhat chu eihin peuve,
Lungset um in thingpel’a ahungthi.
3. Vanial nau chu huhhing dingin leija ahung thi,
Lei mihem ten achung thu atan un,
Ahung niteng Aman thu atan ding.
4. Sadrach, Mesach, Abedgego Aw akidang e,
Dura phaicham’a milim kihou chu,
Pakai hung teng amahon hetau vinte.
5. Loupi jing hen Huhhingpu chu Aw akidange,
Thisan’a alhatsa Houbung mite,
Ahung nile Lallukhuh ahop ding
1. Jesu pen ni Chrismas ahin,
Hung-uvin Sopi golle paite,
Eiho dingin ni loupi pen,
Kumlhung a ikinepnau.
Avahchoi na la sacheh uvin,
Leng pengthah loupi Jesu,
Mihem te lhatdoh ding Pa chu,
Apengtai Bethlehem’a.
2. Valpa hungvah solam’a kon,
Jing ninou bang in ahung soh in,
Hichun vannoi ahin sal’in,
Sun le jan in avah jing.
3. Solam miching te ho jong chun,
Pakai pen kipapi na jal’in,
Manlu Sana, Bego, Mor lin,
Pakai aga lem-uve,
Athina Cedar thingphung noija chun.
Reference: Doh is G, sₗ
1. Leiset gentheina mun’a hin,
Kavah lelei Pakai nei engbol hih in,
Kiselna ding mun kaneipoi,
Pakai Na aw kajan ka gamla tai.
Aw Eden muntheng, munnom tah a chun,
Ka Pakai lung ana toh hileng Eden hon’a chun,
Genthei lengvai kana ho hi.
Mang in jong matlou ding.
2. Lung olna kaneipoi leija.
Neihin vetan Pakai kasa goh keo hi,
Kaki hetdoh tai keiman tun,
Hoilam sung em mun jouse Na angsung.
3. Honlai lung a katou pet chun,
Ka Pakai jin eive jing e ntiiheu vin,
Mi lungthim thempa ahung in,
Eve alhem lhatai hon’a kon in.
4. Twikhanglen galkai jeng jong leng,
Thina le lhankhuh in eihin phah tei ding,
Kana le lhisona jeng bou,
Nitin apung e Adam kei khankho.
1. Pathen in vannoi leiset mite ho angailui,
Achapa Jesu Christa eipeuve (Eipeuve)
Vannoi mite le Pathen kicham na Leng Palai chu,
Vannoi themmo na achapan asem.
Tun eiho mopohna ahi Leng Palai (Leng Palai)
Pathen ngailut lungmon na (Alung mon’a)
Hepha lou ingaiteu muntin’a,
Um amaho gasei peh ding.
Christa Leng Palai na tong ute (na tong ute)
2. Pathen in ami huhhingna le lungmonna thua,
Alhacha natong din einganseu ve (einganseuve)
Muntin, Ningtin, Gamtin’a Christa Thupha pole din
Nangho cheuvin tin ei eisol’ui.
3. Corinth nina Bung nga Chang somni na sunga chun
Christa Leng Palai nahi eitiuve (eitiuve),
Pathen le ahelou te, ho kaha chamna leng a,
Pang ding chu khangdong teho ihiuve.
1. Vannoi leiset chang at phat aihingtai,
Lou neipan asam’e
Kolkimvel ning li sung a akhop ding,
Asi jong atahjong.
Lou neipen chang chil ding pholsung a,
Ajap phat le hung kikhen tan te,
Changsi vang chu phol pam’a um unte,
Hung kinung le lou ding.
2. Loupam lam’a chu vang chu chung a leng,
Vacha te hon abonchan sumang un,
Alei laija chu jong le lapong e,
Alhem chu kadeipoi.
3. Changtah chengse vang chu keh unte,
Tonsot a hing jing ding,
Vo ! changsi nang hoija na um ding ham,
Tiuvin te sam un te.
1. Jankang khothen kah-a
Mong in a- ih mu vin
Keingoi chingho husa jah chun
Bethlehem lhang chung a
(Chung nung penna) loupi pen hen
Leichung a cham thu leng hen atiuve
(Chung nung penna) Loupi pen hen
Chamna leng hen tin asaove
2. Ngailut twipi kinong
Vaokam kinong let ta
Alet in set leija bollin
Van min lan asaove
3. Alen lhaovin eikou
Kalung ajing taije
Tonsot chamleng loupi lem in
Van min lan asao ve
4. Nangho van mi teho
Setlei thim lah ahin
Leija cham na lenghen ti-a
Nasah kit lou diu ham?
Reference: Doh is D, sₗ
1. Pathen milungset them le khoto na jallin
Khanglai nachan khom pi keihon tuni
Apa acha le lhagao theng mintheng pan in
Kahin lha uve na sana khang hoi
Kalha uve na sana khnghoi cheta ding
Pathen vangboh chang pum in
Nalung le natha pan in
Christain insung khan sah din
Khan-nou golcheng in kalha ve tunin
2. Gol le pai dalha a na che na ding muna
Insung khosung dia lallukhuh hi din
Lenlai ni toh khel kon kingai dam chehin
Kipah thanom in nang kahin lha uve
3. Khol jin na gama phat chomkhat ilengkhom un
Chung Pathen phat gon ache dungjui in
Ahung lhung tai eiho din kilhah na nikho
Khen na kol ninou ahung soh kit tai
Hiche bou kathum, hiche bou kahol
Pakai in a tonsot a kachen thei na ding in
Hiche bou ka thum, Hiche bou kahol
Pa loupi na ka mu thei na ding in
1. Pakai ka ding a ka ki nep nale ka hatna
Lung dong in ti ja tapong e
Pakai ka songpi ka hat nale hinna
Ipi ging tangem keiman
2. O Pakai ngailhan ka lung gim na O gin hi
Nang ma ka hoi mu kanome
Pakai nei lungset in lang nei na sangtan
Na mai vah nei mu sahdn
