Na mai vah nei mu sah in O Pakai

songs.title: PAKAI CHU SEILEP THEI HI LOU

lines: 1. Ven gam la tah a kon in
Pakai ni kho a hung nai tai
Jing valpan leiset mihem te
Lungsung a hin sal vah tai
Seilep le dei mo tah in
Pakai chu a na that un
Loupi tah in lhan na kon in
Athou doh kit tai (doh kit tai)
Pakai mintheng chu
(seilep thei lou) 2x
Pakai leng christa mintheng
Loupi tah chu vejing un (Fine)
Chirsta chu D.C.
2. Nalung sung kicha louvin
Lamkai christa lam joh chu ven
Leiset chung gal chu ijol tei diu
Pakai christa leng toh
3. Thinglhang phaicham twipi
Kinong jong eihon ito tei diu
Atonsot tonsotna christa toh
Vai horn khom jing ta ding
Reference: Doh is A, sₗ
1. Pathen lungset khoto channa jalin,
Manipur a um ami semsa te;
Ahuhhing na achan theina dingun,
William Pettigrew ahin sol thupha phong din,
Christian tahsan chate kiloi khomna,
KBA le NEKBAM a kigop khomna;
1950 leh 8 kum in Tujang Waichong,
Khomun ah KBC ahung kiphut dohtai.
2. Phat chesa sunga Munpi kimang ho,
Motbung Office Phaicham themjil na mun;
KBC Fellowship amasa pen,
Keithelmanbi khomun a ana kimange
3. Pathen in amite apuijing in,
Lungdon gentheina jouse kipanan;
Aphatthei bohnan eihoi dam selun,
Avahchoila bolna tolsung kithong jing.
Reference: Doh is A, sₗ
1. O! Loupi pen Halleluiyah,
Ka vahchoiye Immanuel,
Vahchoi na le Lalna jouse,
Tonsot’in Nang a ahi-e.
Halleluiyah, Halleluiyah, Amen. (2)
2. Vannoi mihem nam jousen jong,
Vantilte toh lungkhat in long,
Neilhatnau Na thisan jallin,
Salem thah tol’a kaleng khom.
3. O! iti giltam na lungthim,
Iti santam nalungset na,
Lhatheng leiya leng O ngeite,
Le van paovin seiphong joulou.
4. O! neihil’in gil’a sanje,
Gankong le sapsetna thing chu,
Van’a Lallukhuh toh kijom,
Lei Eden le Salem thah jong.
Reference: L.T. No. 70
1. Gamtheng pen’a Leng hung peng chu,
Thangvan ahsi em in ajui-e,
Miching Ama jong ajinte chun,
Ahsi chu amu’ve,
Ken jong chu ahsi em nung chu juileng,
Pakai penna kho Bethlehem eilhut ding.
O Bethlehem kalhun masangse-a.
Tanglouva ka che ding,
Sun ahsi em chun eipui jing inte,
Mary choilai naosen mel,
Ken kamu ding.
2. Ton Salem kho kotpi emhoi chu,
Eiho’a dingin ahong kittai,
Manna gamthip’a ana lengsa,
Van gam gou loding in,
Kipah’in saute Lengthah apengtai,
Leiset hi Tonsot langeiyin losoh hen.
3. Koiham alemlou ding Pakai,
Van Mitheng sangjan ahinlhau-ve,
Pakai ngaijin Van kho ahong tai,
Kap-in lei hin veuvin,
Thangvan ahsi jeng in jong hinjuiyin,
Apenna Bethlehem lhang eihin lhut tai.
4. Chung le noi mihem kidong ton,
Pakai pen thil jouse jong in phong,
Chung a cham leng noiya Sochatna,
Van le lei kilol ta,
Van khongpi ginghen lei hi kithing hen,
Chitin namtin’in Naosen Leng lem’ute.
Reference: L.T. No. 74

songs.title: CHONSE KAHI PAKAI NEI NGAIDAM IN

lines: 1. Chonse kahi Pakai neingaidam in,
Thupha kahin choiye nakeng bul’a,
Ka vella Na-um lou le
Leiset keidia thina,
Van jong kaka na gam ding,
O nei umpin lang.
2. Mon na ding dang umlou hi leiset na,
Nangma bou ka lumdal dougal ang’ah.
3. Gamthip’a sottah kava mang nung hin,
Na O kajan tuhin kahung naije.
4. Tuhin Pakai Nangin nei siltheng in,
Nagam theng’a din melma dou tange.
Reference: L.T. No. 118
1. Ni loupi hunglhun ding ni anaitai,
Chamna Lengpa le lhatsa goldei te,
Thangvan jol’a khongpi le Baza thon,
Eihin kou ding lhatsa goldei ten.
Gel jingin Ni Loupi
Phasa dem’in um-un lang,
Laltouna theng a ding ding in,
Pakai na tong cheh u te.
2. Malaiya Noah damlai nikho chu,
Geldoh-uvin lang setna dalhau vin,
Hung mang in tin ichennau gamlui hi,
Namtin Jordan lui galkai tante.
3. Chu gam loupi chu ahunglhun teng le,
Leiya lhenchom te lhatdam chang ta ding,
Lungdon na le kana kinem sentin,
Lhatdam changte kileng khom soh ding.
4. Leiya lhenchom chaten gel jing-uvin,
Chu gam loupi hunglhun na ding ni chu,
Leng jouse Leng le Pakai Chungnung chu,
Damlaiyin lem-ute Leng Christa.
Reference: L.T. No. 120
1. Gal alen’e leiset na hin,
Satan gal anitin’in ahung len jing e,
Na Lhagao-va neipui lou chun,
Namin ngeihi Pakai ken panngam jilou ding.
Malai Themgao te napui bang chun,
Na Lhagao-vin neivon in lang,
Tahsan’in namel neimu sah in,
Kipah a Na min vahchoi ding.
2. Calvary lhang chunga Pakai,
I-set jal’in lungdon genthei tintang athoh,
Alung don’a sumil hoilou,
Set jal’in O! Alungdonna imiljou tai.
3. Nei ngaidam in Pakai Jesu,
Keiman na lungdonna sumil helta jong leng,
Nangbou ka ngailut pen Nahi,
Ka ngai ngeije Pakai namel neimu sah in,
4. Na gam tungdoh ding in Pakai,
Na lhatsa te set soh akon puidoh dingin,
Set gallen jong doukit ding in,
Ka pang jinge Immanuel nei lamkaiyin.
Reference: L.T. No. 185
1. Kumlhung in neiching un damsel’in,
Neiching jing un chuh le khal’in,
Lemlou-vin eihoijun Pakaiyin,
Ikipanau nilep hi imutauve.
Chungle noiya Pakai lem'u hite,
Huhhingpa leiya penni hin,
Kipah thanom tah in hung lhauvin,
Lhaisel’in lemu-te Eihuhhingpau chu.
2. Tujing Van Lal Lengpa lemna hin,
Hung lhacheh un na'in kou-vin,
Kipah thanom tah in hung lhauvin,
Mijouse lungsung chu kipanan lohen.
3. Namtin phungtin mi jouse dingin,
Ahung peng e genthei thoh in,
Genthei hesohna ajousoh in,
Eiho chonset jouse apomang sohtai.
Reference: L.T. No. 157

songs.title: LEISET KHANG HI SOT TALOU DING

lines: 1. Leiset khang hi sot talou ding; phat anaitai,
O! michonse khang lamvai mite,
Lei lung ngaina; O na jouse chu,
Nungsun’in Pakai beltan.
O! leinopna pah ilou na ngai,
Tonsot geiya imona diu chu,
Dalha tan; ngaikit loujeno O! Sopi,
Pakaiya kinem in kumkhon.
2. Tuhin vang O! ihepou ve thil hung lhung ding,
Hinna thu chu inot thap tauve,
Acham’a chon seingai lou te chu,
Gim hesoh thoh jou lou ding.
3. Setna thimpi jing laha hin O! Ka-Pakai,
Na Lhagao-Theng chun hinsal vah in,
Chonset na hung kilang doh soh ding,
Set banga Nang kajui diu.
Reference: L.T. No. 164
1. Pakai O-gin khu ngai-uvin,
Leiset na miten,
Ahung na ding ni anaitai,
Itohga-u kimlou.
Hung tei ding (2)
Van huikong theng chunga,
Aloupi aphon kichai ni teng.
2. Aman a lhenchom te apui
Tou ni teng chule,
A dalhah te chengse vang chu,
Gim genthei thoh ding.
3. Damun meidil’a umte chu,
Kum sangsom sangja,
Lung genthei na thoh lhum soh ding,
Hin ding gojong leu.
4. Van gou loding chengse vang chu,
A-emsel’a um,
Pa lunglhai na umjou lou ding,
I-tohgau kim lou.
Reference: L.T. No. 139
1. Calvary a nalungset na chun,
Chansoh loihen leiset le gamtin’a,
Nangma lhatsa lei mihem te,
Thina sapset lah a leng un.
Pakai Jesu Na loupina le ngailutna,
Thangsoh loihen chitin lah a,
Mihem lungsung setna lemsa,
Na min loupi vahchoi lan sauhen.
2. Ka gam lungdon lungjin akon hin,
Koiham Pakai achea gahuh doh ding,
Sim le mal’a Nangma min ngei,
Kithopi ding dang umlou hel.
3. Leiset chonset hi meipi bang in,
Ahung jinge Pakai kalung sung a,
Hin semhoh in Van meikong chun,
Nang din pahbang in pah inge.
4. Ka kap’e Pakai na gam ngaiyin,
Tonsot gam le lungset te lenna chu,
I-tih le lungdon le ham na,
Pel’a mitlhi long ahul dem?
Reference: L.T. No. 187
1. Lhatdam na kot akihong e,
Calvary lhang a,
Lungdong lengvai mun neilou din,
Kipah a ilenkhom na diu,
Ana sem’e Vanlal in chu.
Kahin jon’e O! Ka Pakai namun sem chu,
Set le lungjin gal len jong le,
Nang in neikai le jing jengin.
2. Ka Lhagao na Lhandampu thi,
Na Calvary a,
Sun le jan’in gacheng jing tan,
Chu-a na chenna ding gam chu,
Galdot in lungdon anem’e.
3. Thillui jouse amang soh in,
Ahung thah kittai,
Setna thisa thoukit in lang,
Chenna ding a asem gam nom,
Kipah-a ilenkhom na diu.
4. Immanuel lei le van thah,
Khopi nom’a chun,
O! itih le kalhung ta dem!
Ka ngai ngeije Tonsot gam chu,
Golngai lungdei kimna ding chu.
Reference: L.T. No. 182
1. Christa penna Bethlehem,
Leiset Lengho lenna mun nom gam ahi,
Bethlehem chun huhhing chom lou ding,
Egypt gam’a jamlut pitan ati-e.
Hung lem cheh-uvin (2)
Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha,
Tunin Christa Apengtai
Hung lem cheh-uvin.
2. Anu le Apa kom’a,
Ajan mang chun Lhagao-Theng in lam hil’in,
Herod thang chun oh-lih chom lou ding,
Hung kinungle kitdan Herod thi kahsen.
3. Athi nung chun akou-ve,
Hung kinungle kittan Herod athitai,
Hijong le Na huhhing Lalpa chun,
A ngailut nan leiset mihem khomsoh ding.
O! A ngailutna, O! ngailut na a,
Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha
Hossana sam jing u te van le leiya.
4. Na hung peng e leiset na,
Nang ma Leng chan na din hinoi leiset’a,
A tonsot in tonsot in Pakai,
Hijing in Pakai Hallelujah, Amen.
Reference: L.T. No. 293
1. Chamkang lou nou lai ahitai,
Theichang na jong anoutai,
Chi bang chun Lhenchom te jouse,
Pakai lem ding in nou kit hen.
Hung un gel’un phat chedan hi,
Setna thisa tho phat ahitai,
Gam hung lhung ding kinem in,
Ngah jing u te phasadem cheh in.
2. Chulthei leihao pahcha jeng jong,
Phat chomcha khat ding jeng chan,
Namtui selin ahung pah in,
Namtin lung alhaisah soh ji.
3. Hijeh chun Sopi te hung un,
Leng Christa lunglhai ding in,
Gunchu tah in na tong ute,
Leiset hinkho abeikah in.
4. Phat loupi chu hung mang inte,
Gunchu le lung kinem’in,
Hung kigon phasa dem cheh in,
Pa Laltouna Theng a ding din.
Reference: L.T. No. 136
1. Sapset na umlou Pathen Kelngoi-nou,
Laltouna chu aum,Jan aum lou,
Thaomei vah le nivah ngailou,
Pathen ngaitoh Tonsot’a vai homkhom ta ding.
Amen! Hungin Pakai Jesu hung in,
Pakai Jesu a milungset chun,
Mitheng te ho chu umpi tauhen,
Hallelujah, Amen! (2)
2. Pakai Themgao ho Lhagao Pathen chun,
Thil hunglhung ding ho chu avetsah e,
Ngaijin hungloi ding kahi tai,
Hiche thusei doh nitchan anun nom ahi.
3. Aphat chu hung lhung loi ding ahitai
Chonpha lou chun chonphat lou boljing hen,
Mitheng ho chu Theng jing u hen,
Ana umjing tauhen kahung loi ding ahi.
4. Lhagao thusei doh ho lamang a chu,
Hinna thing le khopi Theng a achan,
Chu Pathen in alah mang ding,
Hi thu hetsah pa chun kahung loi ding ahi.
Reference: L.T. No. 175
1. Leiset dalhau hitin,
Nunglam ngaita lou-vin,
Kipa chemasa ten,
Luigal gam nom’a eingah ui,
Tonsot nopna a chun.
Ka le lungjin na gam,
Leiset ka chenna hi,
Kilung tona Zion lhang a,
Jalen kal kangah lei.
2. Vetan Pakai kalen,
Nao lung jinna gam hi,
Gamthip genthei ahi,
Thina in gol eikhen jiuve,
Na gam lhun masang sen.
3. Lal Immanuel kho,
Pi nom Zion’a chun,
Khenna hi umta lou,
Chua genthei chate jouse,
Kimu to ka ngah lel.
Reference: L.T. No. 206
1. Ni lhum ngailou Zion khopi,
Ngaiyin kamao kakap sun nitin in,
Pon loupi sillin leng in lhatsa te
Keidia jong mun umna chu gam’a chun.
Ka ngaitave,ka ngaitave,
Amun loupi hoina jouse sang in,
Lungsetpa Lal Christa meldei um chu,
Mu kanom kalung kham banna ding in.
2. Ahoina seijou lou gam chu,
Thisan in ahong tai Zalenna gam,
Ka Lhagao chu gamnom chu hol’in lang,
Leiset gam hi chul kittei ding ahi.
3. Lungdei lhatdam te lenna mun,
Lhun theilou kadip dam e Lhandampu
Nei siltheng in Lhagao-vin neipuiyin,
Lal lungnem gam hoi chu ka ngai ngeije.
Reference: L.T. No.203
1. Selung leng in tahsan in galdot un,
Alang Van gam loupi,
Leija lengvai chate tol alennau,
Kelngoi-nou le hinna thingpah jon in,
Lungset te aleng-ui,
Aloupina kipah in sau hite.
O thisan lu vahchoiyin lan sang e,
Eilungset na loupi,
Calvary’a lhatna thisan,
Vahchoi lan oi jinge.
2. Lunggel jing in kahin galdot jing-ui,
Kipana anaitai,
Lungsetpa thisan jal’a kipana,
I vangphauve Pathen cha ihiu hi
Christan eimin vonau,
Kipana kim chu anatoh ahi.
3. Kei ding tum’a kipa loupi pen chu,
Lungset theng hi ahi.
Pathen cha le anatong hina jong,
Neihil jingin keima neihin til’in,
O! Ka Pakai deitah,
Neihin mang in Lhagao sochatna din.
4. Lhahna tongso gin ngei akithong e,
Lungset kagol ngai te,
Khanlai boina ngaidam in umtau te,
Lunggel jingun Pakai lam sang jingun,
O! Sopi goldei te,
I lennau leiset lhepna ahat’e
Reference: L.T. No.240
1. Lhagao-Theng van vakhu nunnem,
Hung leng kit-in ka ngai jui,
Hinsu halkit in mipi lhasam te,
Mollep lou-vin hung kit in lang.
O! ka ngai-uve Lhagao nunnem,
Nangma lou-vin mipi te lamvai un,
Hin puikit in lang O! Valpa ahsi,
Zion kipa lampi theng a.
2. Ngaiyin Pakai na lhatsa te,
Atonsot lam ahaiyun,
Lei kelngoi ching ten hin puidih joulou,
Iti ahidiu vem Pakai.
3. Lhagao-Theng pen Nang na um le,
Leiset lungdon anem jin,
Set huipi le lungjin gal len jong le,
Jailan namin vahchoi tang e.
4. Jesu nunnem hung ham kit in,
Lungdong tah a na thohna,
Hetsah in lang na ling lukhuh chutoh,
Na hesoh na kidang tah chu.
Reference: L.T. No.171
1. Gethsemani hon’a Pakai Jesu chu ataove,
Mipi ahung kikhom I-Pakai chu man din,
Achung thu lel dan chu athem pouve,
Thempu lal in sung a atha lou som’un,
Lungdon mei ajing (2)
I-Pakai ahung bom Calvary lhang chung a,
Ling lukhuh le sapsetna thing Cross pun,
Abel ding um talou I-Pakai Jesu.
2. O! Simon Peter le Solchah lungdong
Te hung thou-vun :
I-pu chu akaijun athina ding mun’a
Van’a hung kumlha Van lal genthei chu,
Alungdon nem dingin koima umta lou.
3. Iti vetlel umtam! I-Pakai Jordan kaiding chu,
Atha ahung nguijin Alu chu akaikun,
A Lhagao alhan thimpi ajingin,
Set le dougal jouvin Jordan lui akai.
4. Noija le vanchung a thupha ahil Lhandampu chun,
Atha ding agouvin O! Zion nunau ten,
Aphat lai ni chu asumil taove,
Nanop nau hilou ham na damnao pa chu!
Reference: L.T. No. 2.
1. Chung a Jerusalem thah chu,
Van Mitheng te tolpi ahi,
Chu-a Lal Immanuel in vai ahom’e,
Kajot Zion gamnom chu kangai ngeije.
Hinoi leiset sang in,
Anomjoi Tonsot gam chu,
Nitin mi alhung lha tin in tam,
Kumtin apung jing,
Zion lhang chung a,
Kelngoinou Leng lem in asauve.
2. Immanuel na thisan chu,
A tonsot-a ka la ngei ding,
Mitheng te gam kalhun tengle ken lan sange,
Tolthing Pakai nunnem pah kamu ding.
3. O! Lhandampu Hallelujah!
Gam jouse hi Nang a ahi,
Na thisan lun neisop theng in Nang a kahi,
Ka ngah'e lungjin Jordan meijing noiya.
4. Hung ding nahi tah em Pakai,
Ka gam genthei nan atom’e,
Canan gam le Namel ngai ken kabang theilou,
Jing niso thah in khotheng len kanom’e.
Reference: L.T. No. 79.
1. Peogal gamnom chu kalhun teng le,
Leiset hung mang ding hi dalha tang ting,
Tahsa hinna hi ngaita ponge,
Hinna thing leh Pakai tuh tange.
Kangai tave peogal gamnom,
Thoukit chate lenna kholai chu,
Thina puldou le kana umlou,
O! peogal keidin hung kihong in.
2. Chu gam kavet le kalung alai,
Kelngoinou le alhatsa te lenna,
Lei ngailou-vin einung ngattaove,
Chugam chu kalhun thei hih tadi.
3. Ajou teng le kho hung vah inte,
Ti kahet le kaka pet kahai jin,
Lei gentheina eitom teho hi,
Dalha tange chu gam nom’a chun.
4. Chua chun malaija lem sate,
Kipah in aleng-ui genthei chate,
Lhandampu le alhatsa te toh,
Kikhen louva ilen phat diu chu.
Reference: L.T. No.101.
1. Lungdonna chonset jousen eibom’e,
Thina lam’a puidin,
Tahsan in thina kanung ngat e,
Eilhandam pun eihin kou.
Kakipah tangeije tuvang in,
Lhandampu chonnem tah le milungset chun,
Ka Lhagao ahuhhing kittai.
2. Kelngoinou lenna lhang chu kalhun teng,
Kipan eilam ton tin,
Thina Jordan lui kagal kaiteng,
Van golvahna lha ta ding.
3. Kipana tah lunggel’a kanei hi,
Jesun eipeh ahi,
Leiset kipana sang a lenjo,
Van kipana kanei tai.
Reference: L.T. No.111
1. Keima leija kalen lai hin,
Kalet kalal kathepdan chu seithei lou,
Sana dangka inhoi kidang,
Chutah chun ka Lhagao huhhing jou nadem?
Ohe! keima kahing jou tapoi.
Ahithei le O! Lazar kaleija hin,
Nakhut muh’a twi themkhat ,
Hinvat lhah sah in kaleiya hin,
Ohe! Keima kahing jou tapoi.
2. Lazar leija alen lai hin,
Mihao pa dokhang noija anmal ho,
Kilo dingin kot a achei,
Ama phah chu mihaopan mun kidahta,
Ahinla Pathen in panpi na.
3. Mihao pan leiset dalhah a ,
Van gam pel’a meidil-a achephat in,
Lazar Abraham ang sung a,
Atou chu mun Lengpa akisih lheh e,
Ohe! keima kahing jou tapoi.
Reference: L.T. No. 292.
1. Chonset bul ei kihen nau hi,
Sutna hin Lhandampun,
Ling lukhuh le Lalpon sil’in,
Thisan kai neunou vin puijun,
Themlal te in tin’a.
Thina hesoh thoh in athisah un.
O! Van lal ahi,
Genthei tintang thoh chu,
Israel te le milen ten,
Thutan vaihom ten hechen leu,
Pakai loupina chu,
Thingpel chung a ,
Koiman khaisang lou ding.
2. Mitin anom Cross a thading,
Lei lal te insung a,
Van lal lungdon in akun in,
Chonse te din along toh in,
Calvary lhang chung a,
Amelma te chun han la asauve.
3. O! chung vanpi hung kithing in,
Van lal phula ding in,
Leiset miten kalan sau hen,
Twilon bang in lhi jong long hen,
Lingpi hung kihot hen,
Vanlal dong lai genthei a athinin.
4. Chonset bulpi thina genthei,
Jouvin athou kittai,
Thina jal’a genthei te chu,
Hinkho thah in akipah un,
Eilhandampu jal’in,
Hinna khopi gamnom alotauve.
Reference: L.T. No. 4
1. O! Lalpa David phung a alha ahsi,
Na gam theng a dinga Nang in neigotsa,
Kakipana twiso get ginbang ahi,
Thina luigal’a namin ka vahchoi ding.
O! Pakai ting ting namin pahchang e,
Namtin nasemsa te jousen jong,
Pakai vahchoina la chu sau hen,
Leiset hi kipanan losoh hen.
2. Mihem kahi masangin Pakai Jesun,
Athisan lon ding itlou hel’in eilhat,
Simthei jing gahe taveng lang hileng O!
Leija hin olmo na beija kaum ding.
3. Pakai hoikom ham mun naga semna chu,
Daniel bang in bangkot a galdot inge,
Langkachah khopi amin theng tah a chun,
Gentheina a jong dilsung ting lhai inge.
4. O! Immanuel lei le van thah sem chu,
Adung le vaija lenglen lang gave leng,
Genthei ja kikhen pisa goldei te chu,
Van mun loupia amel’u kamu ding.
Reference: L.T. No. 45.
1. Setna kulpi lam’a chun gachen lang,
Chu lam’a kipana kahol laijin,
Chu lui thina a O thong chu kajai,
Kichat in kadim set kittai.
Vo Jesu keilam hinve kit in,
Pakai kei lamvai jin kavah mang e.
2. Chonset ga chu thina ahung hitai,
Kapal ngampoi thina luipi len chu,
Hinla chena lamdang umlou Pakai,
Lhamon sah Nangma kangaije.
3. Kum tamtah pi kanuse jou jong hin,
Lungset na in neina ching jing jeng in,
I-jakai ja ka ijakai Pakai,
Leichung hi vahchoi lan lohen.
Reference: L.T. No.192.
1. Thouving kating ka Pa kom’a chekit tange,
Kama meipi bang in ajing,
Eilungset ding dang kaneilou leiset a hin,
Kapa lou chu ka dougal jeng.
Setna nuse ta jong leng,
Aphat na chul ngailou,
Kisih a kahol kit le,
Alim’a leng kit ding.
2. Kapa in’a ninglhing setna sum le sel um,
Mi lengvai ten anem jing e,
Kei gonggoh leh gilkel thoh a thi ding kahi,
I-lou genthei ja kava lem.
3. O akom’a kachen lai chun iti noptam,
Leija nopna jouse akim.
Tun kagelle kapa inpi kangai jeng tai,
Thupha choijin jon kit tang e.
4. Kei mi chonse seingai lou le Pathen jalou,
Kading a mun eiphal peh leh,
Hi leiset pah kamelma hi ngaikit pong e,
Apallai ni achom taloi.
Reference: L.T. No. 69.
1. Calvary lhang chung a Pakai chu,
Cross chung a ling lukhuh le,
Mipi ho nuisat ding in,
Thingleh a akhai sang ui.
O anangeije ka Pakai thohna chu,
Akhut akeng alu veovin,
Chonset jal’in athisan,
Thengtah chu along dohtai,
Lungset umngei pa chu.
2. Athi dinga adang chah lai chun,
Koima chan apenom poi,
Melma ten hem in nouvin,
Dangchah giugeo vin athi.
3. Kadang acheh e tia athum chun
Juthuh adonsah uvin,
Juthuh chun sunou lou ding,
Lhagao ngaija chah ahi.
4. O Ka Lhagao nalhatpa natje,
Keiman kahil chen theipoi,
Chenlang Calvary lhang a,
I-Pakai chu ga dong tan.
Reference: L.T. No. 12.
1. I-lungsung set thim jing noija,
Hinna muchi kitu chu,
Pah ding le ga ngei ding a vetup ding in
Thupeh ahi,
Hinna Lallukhuh lo ding in.
Pakai Jesu Lhagao hin sol’in,
Nangma dinga pah namtui hung hi ngei theija,
Na Lallukhuh jem hoi ding in,
Ka hinnau sutheng sel’in.
2. Na gam genthei le nam lengvai,
Hinna Gospel thu theng pha,
Pah ding le ga ngei dinga vetup ding in
Thupeh ahi,
Chonphat na Lallukhuh lo din.
3. Pakai Lhagao a kon lou chun,
Chihna le them na lalna,
Danpha le chonphat na dan,
Lunggil a hung pah ding ngei chu,
Setna gallen ahung sohtai.
4. Ngailut nan kot lentah ahong,
Van leng kin bolna ding in,
Twi vat khat le thing halkhat,
Mu kham hilou tin cheng ho hi,
Van gam gouva sodoh theina.
Reference: L.T. No. 254.
1. Pakai pen nikho alhung kittai,
Silung lengvai te lung akaithouve,
Vannoi hil’un Bethlehem lhang chung a,
Ginchat na lhang leng galkai jin.
O Pakai nunnem, Nang in neikai hoijin,
Na chun le jo ngaija,
Senlai navang naka na mun chu kangai.
2. Bethlehem ahsi avah kittai,
Eden lhan kotkhah sung avah kittai,
Khang in thouvun Eden kho avahtai,
Lungtup gam chu jon tau hite.
3. Kangai ngeije Bethlehem lhang chu,
Thangvan toni kol’a apang leptai,
Bong insung a Pakai lengvai tah chu,
Achun nu Mary’n apom’e.
4. Anom ngeije Pakai na gam chu,
Keidin Bethlehem lhang avah kittai,
Tilla pi le pu ten amu phah lou,
Saron pah lem in leng ute.
Reference: L.T. No.123
1. Twikhanglen kinong lailung a,
Agal langkhat kajot lai hin,
Huipi le twipia kinong,
Nei panpin Pakai.
O Ka Pakai lungset thempa,
Chamna Lengpa monna Pakai.
Hi leiset thim jing noiya hin,
Nei panpin Pakai.
2. Genthei thoh a kakou lai hin,
Neilung set in nei umpiu vin,
Lung hesoh le genthei na a,
Nei panpin Pakai.
3. Ka genthei na eihuhdoh din,
Na hung peng e hi leiset na,
Na hung chenna keiho umna,
Nei umpi jing in.
Reference: L.T. No.307

songs.title: VANG EIPE DIUVIN VAN'A VAI AHOMTAI

lines: 1. Vang eipe diuvin Van’a
Vai ahom kittai,
Eden kotkhah ahong kittai,
Lut in Zion kho avah tai.
Pah un! Pah un! Lhandampu,
Kelngoi nou ahung tai,
Lem-un Hallelujah! Amen!
Hallelujah! Huhhing ding in Ahungtai.
2. Jan langei tah chun leiset
Hi angui jeng e,
Eden a lhute athoutai,
Hoiham sun ahsi atiu chu.
3. Leng jouse Leng le Zion’a
Vaihom pa chu,
Mihem ten sumil thei lou ding,
Alungset na akidang e.
4. Alem la sauvin van
Mitheng te jouse chun,
Twiso get le leiset jong hin,
Zion lohen, Hallelujah!
Reference: L.T. No.98.
1. Pakai na Lhagao vin neipui jin lang,
Leimun lungdon kana gam hi,
Lhatdam na kulpi sung a leng ding in,
Na mite pui jing in lang.
O! Vangam’a neipui jin,
Thim le lung donna jouvin,
Eidougal setgal kajo tei ding,
Navah a chun leng tang e.
2. Pakai Lhagao kakom’a aum le,
Kamao gamthip akem jitai,
Leiset lungdon gim kathoh jou tengle,
Kalen ding na gam’a chun.
3. Pakai na Lhagao vin neipui jin lang,
Sang tamtah manna gam ahi,
Manglou vin gamtheng chu neilhut teijin,
Pakai loupina gel’in.
4. Lungdon na jouse kipah in nathoh,
Genthei Lalpan panpin neiti,
Thigei jin Lhagao vin neipui jin lang,
Mun loupi lhun masang sen.
Reference: L.T. No.117,
1. Hi leiset gentheina gam’a hin,
Nopna gam le ngaite lenna,
Ka ngai ngeije O ka Pakai,
Nopna umlou leija.
Na gam nom kangaije,
Na lungset kinem in,
Set le gimna gam’a
Ka mong joupoi Pakai.
2. Hinna Lal thengpen Pakai Christa,
Nei lhamon in na thisan chun,
Na thutep lhin ding kangah e,
Sochat na hinkem lou.
3. Thina gal’a gamnom ka ngai chu,
Pakai sem gam nom chu ahi,
Hinna thingphung lim noija chun,
Nisa vah jong ngailou .
4. Chitin namtin Pakai Lengho Leng,
Cham na le lung olna gam’a,
Neilhut in Salem thah nom’a,
Mitheng te len na a.
Reference: L.T. No.267.
1. Kalen na gam leiset hi,
Tolthing na nou lai bang in,
Nou jing hen bolna tolsung,
Lenna gam tolthing sahei.
Kalen na gam leiset hi,
Chung Pathen vangpeh chang hen,
Christian khangthah jouse din,
Pa vahchoina hi jing hen.
2. Ka penna lhang hoi gam hi,
Nunnom in kithang jing hen,
Tolthing ngui Saron pah in,
Chullou vin chansoh jing hen.
3. Gol toh kalen na gam hi,
Lhatsate lenkhong gin na,
Hijing hen Atonsot in,
Christa vahchoi na hihen.
4. Mol lah a molhoi chungnung,
Lhang lah a lhang hoi chungnung,
Pakai vahchoi na O gin,
Thong jing hen na gamsung a.
Reference: L.T. No.262.
1. Phat hi akem jingin lei nopna amang ji,
Leisetna kipana akim theipoi,
Pakai hung leng in O! niloupi lhunsah in,
Genthei chaten leiset gimna a dalha nom.
O! Eden thah nom’a chun neipui jin lang,
Lunghel’a khen pisa hotoh kileng khom le,
Kakipanau kim in vahchoi tau ving e,
Leiset hi ngai ta pou ving e Na gam’a chun.
2. Na ding a thohten chu gam chu akinep pin,
Lei kipana adiuva pahthei lou,
Zion mipi ho le lungset na Lal mel chu,
Ni loupi hung kilang ding chu ave chimpoi.
3. Lei lungdon lungjin hesoh na jouse noija,
Tahsan hon kipa la asa jingui,
Adiuvin khovah hen Salem thah nom’a chun,
Napui khom na ding ni ngaijin agaldot-ui.
Reference: L.T. No.159.
1. Leiset chung a hin O!
Chungleng va bang a kalen lai hin,
Eisu lung jing ding lhepna ahat,
Nung le ma chem le thal
Ahem’e ka ding in nitin in,
Lungmong le lha mong thei lou kahi tai.
Pakai lungset twikhanglen ging tobang,
Hoija tham’a lung lengvai le kahim!
Chung Pathen in setlei chung a hin O!
Ana tong ding a eilhamon hinai mo?
2. Nitin in lhepna meipi,
Jing in eijin khum jeng jong le,
Pakai hatnan eikhu jing tahen,
Ulenao cham del’in,
Christan eipeh u na tong ute,
Pahbang a ihinkhou amol kahsen.
3. Kipah in kahung peng e,
Chungnung pen Christa kom’a chun,
Lal loupi bon noi leiset na leng,
Christa ding a kahin...
Kho hi genthei thoh dia ka phal leh,
I-louva kei lung kisih ding kahim?
4. Leiset chung a kagol,
Te le ka jat chanpi te ho chu,
Ithemmo nau kingaidam ute,
Christa Lalmun loupi,
Salem gam nom ichanna ding un,
Khat le khat ki ngaidam to cheh ute.
Reference: L.T. No.155.

songs.title: KA NGAH JING E KA PAKAI.

lines: 1. Kangah jing e Ka Pakai,
Lei genthei thim jing noija,
Nei holnau Salem khopi,
O! keiman ka ngaitai,
Leiset genthei na le,
Thim noija hin leng jong leng,
Lungset na eihol pa chu,
Ken kangai bang lou ding.
Van loupi Eden thah nom chu,
Lungdon um louna gam nom chu,
O! Itih le hung lhung tang em?
Na tonsot Lalna gam
Emnom hoitah chu.
2. Hung naijin Eilhandampu,
Leiset a gal ahat e,
Thisan a nalhat sa te,
Lung dong in akap’e,
Leija nalen laija,
Na lung donna Calvary,
Melma te ahung naije,
Na gam doudal te chu.
3. O! hoikom ham Lhandampu,
Zion lhang gal’a monna,
Set soptheng a mi lungset,
Ka diuva na louna,
Chonset thenna kulpi,
Na tonsot vankho le veng,
Lhatdam cha nalim noija,
Nom’a alennau chu.
4. O! leiset hi hung mang ding,
Loupina jouse jong hi,
Lhandampun mi hin khom ding,
Ken leiset pel ta ding,
Christa lungset te chu,
Lal loupi na chang unte,
Lungset na akihong e,
Nom un Hallelujah.
Reference: L.T. No.81.
1. Chung van gam’a ka in gotsa um,
Ana ngaito din Pakai cheta,
Lhatdam na gam nom’a chun,
Lhatdam sa lungset te toh,
Loikhom’a vahchoi la sa jing ding in.
Kum asot um ngailou,
Kipana gam’a chun,
Gim genthei umta lou,
Chu mun’a chun khat vei ichen ding.
2. Kei ding in Lhandampu hung thita,
Ka Lhagao huhdoh na ding jeh in,
Set dimna leiset a hin,
Keija kon’a peldoh ding,
Van gam nom hoitah a cheng jing ding in.
3. Phat tampi che jing ding O! Pakai,
Keima neivop jing e ti kahei,
Mang lou hellin Pakai jin,
Ichen khom nadiu lim a,
Vetnom vetda umlou cham na lengta.
4. Chung gam nom Sana khopia chun,
Lhilon hesoh genthei umta lou,
Kipana la sa jing ding,
Cholle nan beisoh ta ding,
Nunnom jing ding chung gam innom’a chun.
Reference: L.T. No.258.

songs.title: GALDOT TEM UN VAN KHOPI CHU

lines: 1. Galdot tem un Van khopi chu,
Kikhen louna gam chu alang,
Ikikhen nau ni alhung e,
Ka ngai kikhen lou na.
Achom ngeije lei kipana,
Pahbang in achul kit jin,
Kikhen lou thei ihipouve,
Ilennao adan jeh in.
2. O! ka ngai kikhen lou na gam,
Nom’a ilen na diu mun chu,
Itih tah le ahung lhung dem,
Kikhen lou na khopi.
3. Genthei thoh a ikikhen u,
Itih le kikhom u hitem.
Leiset gim mun ikhel phat le,
Kipan kikhom ute.
4. Ka ngai kikhen lou na khopi,
Leiset a ikikhen u hi,
Lungdon ngah na ding aumpoi,
Leiset gim mun ahi.
5. Ikikhen’a kaka bang hin,
Van mun loupi kagal dot le,
Kikhen aumlou kahet nin,
O! Lhunkal kangah lel.
Reference: L.T. No.112.
1. Leija Pathen tam jeng jong le,
Ipau khat mai van’a aum e,
Pentil neilou hing jing Pathen ahi.
O! ule nao nu le pa deite,
Tonsot hinkem lou neina din,
Lunghei jun lang Pathen hin bel’un.
2. Jouthei Pathen hinna neilou,
Kaneije tin eipui mang jitai,
Aneisun jong dana ahibouve.
3. Chonset bulpi Nungjai pa chun,
Atoh le a kipana pen chu,
Lhagao damun’a puilut hi ahi.
4. Ngaijun Eisempau Pathen chun,
Ami mangsa te holdoh na din,
Achapa chang khat chu eihinpeuve.
Reference: L.T. No.37.
1. Lung in van gam ka ngai to le,
Leiset gimna thoh joute chu,
Nui siuseu-va um kagah mui,
Akipanau la O nem chu,
Nitin olpet kanei theipoi,
O! lhunkal ka ngah lel ngeije.
Neihin vetan Van Lal Pakai,
Lungset um le hatlou kahi,
Chonset in thihkhau vin eihen,
Nagam hunglhun ding nom jong leng,
Thina le lung jinna te hin,
Nitin in eibomme.
2. Kei ngaito a hung thei hilou,
Ti hi neihin hetsah jal’in,
Lungdon in eisun khum jitai,
Lhunkal ka nga lel jal ahi,
Pakai na gam theng nom em chu,
Ngaijin kalan kasa jitai.
3. Ima jouse ka ngaito le,
Ka genthei je kaki het in,
Kaka khosot na ding bep in,
Kappet chapang bang a nuina,
Leiset na hin kamu joupoi,
Ngailou thei chu kahitapoi.
4. Kappet naobang in nui pong e,
Pakai neihung puima sang sen,
Ka lungdon na hi beipon te,
Ka khankho akikhel ma hin,
Vangam lhunkal ngahlel jong leng,
Pakai hung lhung thei sam ponge.
5. Leiset gim mun jenga jong hin,
Pakai Nang in nei umpi le,
Ilouva ka lung don ding ham?
Nei umpi ti kahet phat le,
Kappet naobang in nui jing ting,
Leiset gimna hi miltang e.
Reference: L.T. No. 5.
1. Vannoija hin Leng sangja ana peng nan jong,
Leng Christa bang hi khat cha ana peng khalou,
Lhandampu ahung peng Bethlehem bong in’a,
Van Lengpa lem ding in noi le van mi kikhom.
Kipah in lem u te Van Lal leng pah ute,
Asoni hin vannoi kipa nan losoh hen,
Van Lengpa ahung peng
Lallukhuh hom ding in,
Van Mitheng te jousen jong
Eihung lem u hen.
2. Van Mitheng ten alem nan kipa la sauvin,
Hichu kelngoi ching hon ajauvin gam noija,
Lhandampu umna chu kichen tah-in hil’un,
Akelngoiju dalhan Chibai aga boh ui.
3. Solam miching ten thao namtui choiyin hungun,
Van’a valpa amauva ahung lamkai jin,
Gan ankong a anu Mary’n apom muvin,
Agoubom u hong un Chibai agaboh ui.
4. Leng Herod in ahet in ana lung jin pin,
Chibai boh in kilep in miching te dong in,
A Sepai jouse khom in Juda gamsunga,
Chibai bohna gimnei pe ding in akon ui.
5. Vo Jesu tuni hin ka lung sung bong in’a,
Hung kisem thah kit in lang ka Tonsot Lengdin,
Ka khut then lou hi Mary khut in ngaiton lang ,
Tonsot in kipah in Nang lem kumlhung tang e.
Reference: L.T. No. 51.
1. Hossana sam jing un O! Hallelujah Amen,
Leng Christa ahung peng e Bethlehem a chun,
Atongso dam lungset thu namtin damna ahi,
Kipah in sau hite Hossana ti in.
O! Bethlehem lhang chung a,
Tonsot kho ahung vah e,
Hilkim vel’uvin,
Koi hile chu hinna vah thanom’a tahsan in,
Lunghem ka le gim na thoh kit talou ding.
2. Akidang in aloupi e chamna Lengpa chu,
Ngailut na alonsah e leiset chung a hin,
Setna kon eilhat doh theina diuva hung ahi,
Lungset gam Leng ahi I-Pakai Jesu.
3. Pa thutep ahung lhungtai,I-damthei nau ahi,
Ngailutna along let e Calvary a chun,
Adanje koiham seithei lei mihem te lah’a,
Alungset gam nom chu eilhut tauvin te.
4. Zion loupina Pakai mangsa eihol pau chu,
Van khopi ten itjong leu nang jou deh lou diu,
Ijakai ka Ijakaija Lal pen hen Amen,
Eingailut nao hi koiman nelthei lou ding.
Reference: L.T. No.198.
1. Leiset pon in kiphe lhajongle,
Khopi hoi tah chu keiman kanei nai,
Pakai jin asem Zion chate lenna,
Hichu ka tonsot in.
Zion chate jallen na ding ni chu anaitai,
Na jaona dem O Sopi,
Geisang le chun Tonsot kot kihon homlou ding,
Hinkho damlai Pakaija din peuvin.
2. Lei lung ngainan puimang khan nate,
Damlai nikho ngaichat thil atam’e,
Pahbang ihinkho mollep ding kon cha hi,
Pakai na tong ute.
3. Nilhum kon vaiche phat ahitai,
Vantil te le Mitheng chemasa hon,
Khongpi le Baza thon eina ngah jingui,
Van’a kilam to din.
4. Pakai Christa Lalna gam’a chun,
Leng le Lal chaga genthei um talou,
Lhunkal ka ngah lel Zion chate lenna,
Hichu ka tonsot in.
Reference: L.T. No. 345.
1. Canan gamthah hin jon ding in,
Gamthip a jin kahi,
Ka vahlen ka lamvai tai tun,
Mei le meikong hung vah in,
Ka ang a Nang hung vah in lang.
O Ka Lhandampu neilam dot in,
Canan gam chan ding ka dip dap,
Lungdon na meijing noija,
Kap le lung dong in kamaove.
2. Dangchah na gam songpi sung a,
Hinna twitheng puthen,
Canan gam jon lhasam don din,
Leiset na kaum lai hin,
Aigupta gam sumil ding in.
3. Kama asangja aluttai,
Canan gam nom’a chun,
Aigupta ngaikit tapong e,
Thina gam kadalhah teng,
Hinna khopi lam jon tange.
4. Van’a valpa vanlai jol’a,
Lhandampu a vahchoi,
Leija genthei sumil jouvin,
Kipa lathah sa ding in,
Chua lhah ding chu kanom’e.
Reference: L.T. No..33.
1. Jan lungjin um Zion indan sung a,
Pakai jin Athisan ahom’e,
Hiti chun lungdon meipi ajinge,
Ka Pakai lungset um akap’e.
O nangho Jerusalem mite,
Alungset na chan chu he jingun,
Nanat nau jouse adamsah jeh chun,
Alung donna chu hailou jen un.
2. Jerusalem kulpi kul pam lam’a,
Themgao thidan ahipoi tiuvin,
O hinve tem tan Calvary lhang chu,
Mipi lah'a Ka Pakai kamui.
3. Vetan Calvary lhang alhut maidiu,
Ahitai i-kalo diu hitam?
O Ka Pakai nahung kit lou ding ham,
Namun ding chu Calvary hitam?
4. Hin sumil pong e Ka Pakai Jesu,
Calvary lam hinve jing nange,
Ka dinga nathoh na kalung sung a,
Ka laicha geijin he jing nange.
Reference: L.T. No. 46.
1. Vo! Khangdong ho na khang hoi lai,
Pakaija din peuvin,
Na khanghoi lai Pakai jin amangcha nom’e,
Na huhhingpa na chu tong in,
Sana khang hoi lai jin.
Na.......khangdong hoilai jin,
Nasempa Pathen geldoh in,
Na khanghoi lai Pakai ding in,
Tong in thanom tah in.
2. Phat le nikho akem jinge,
Khankho jong akem jing,
Phat tampi chejou ta nile lha kiheita,
Vo! khangdong ho napah hoilai hin,
Pakai na tong in.
3. Pakai jin ati na khangdong,
Hoilai jin na tong in,
Ajou le na khanghoi lai molpang lep inte,
Tu hinkho hoilaiyin tongin
Tong in tohphat ahi.
4. Nangho cheuvin namtin heng a,
Sochat na thu hil’un,
Koi hile atahsan jousen hinna mu ding,
Na khanghoi lai kilet kah in,
Pakai na chu tong in.
Reference: L.T. No.310.
1. Ka chenna gam gamthip ahi Pakai,
Lhepna meipi le lungdon na,
Alejin Lhandampu mel dei um,
Pakai Nakom’a umjing kanom.
Kataona ngaijin lang,
Kathum phatthei boh in,
Na Onem ngaijin ka um jing,
Na lhamon’a Na lhamon’a Aw chu.
2. Kama a Gethsemania lung dong in,
Na panpi ding koima umlou,
Keiman jong na khonung hinjui ding,
Pakai Nakom’a umjing kanom.
3. Boina meipi lah'a na em hoijin,
Kalung sung thim jing ahinsal,
Calvary ngailutna hung long chu,
Phong dingin nei kithopi'n Pakai.
4. Hahsa jong leng Nang a kahi Pakai,
Nang a dingin nei thah sah in,
Ka phat cheng Nang dinga man kanom,
Nang dingin nei thensah in Pakai.
Reference: L.T. No.289.
1. Malai Aigupta a lunggim te,
Pathen khut’in apuidoh e,
Ngai taponge ka gam hoi Aigupta,
Ngailut na Leng thupeh lam jon tange.
Meilom vah chun neipui jin,
Nang jui pai tauving e,
Na gam tep Canaan gam chu,
O neipui lhung teijin,
Canaan pah choija len kanome.
2. Gamthip lai ponbuh noija konin
Kap in Zion kagal dot’e,
Lung aleng e geljing jeng ding kahi,
Kei sanga ngaijo ding aum na dem ?
3. Paran gamthip golai kalhung tai,
Lhasam in hinding ka ngampoi,
Ka ngai hinthing nalim noi nomtah chu,
Nanglou chu lunglai nem ding dang umlou.
4. Lhungkon ihitai ijot gamhoi,
Salem vangkho gin chu ngaijun,
Canaan lenkol vah chu a emsel’e,
Israel lunggim louvin kipah tauvin.
Reference: L.T. No.207
1. Hinkho deilai kahin nau le phat hoi,
Hi ana kem loi jitai,
Imajouse ka gel’e,
Lunghel aum ngeije.
Na pamai,na pamai,
O! phat le kumlui mol’in,
Na lungset vanga namtin nomsa cheng,
I-hinlai damsung kimpet chau hin.
2. Phat kipa um akem O mi tamtah,
I-hin pahlai achultai,
Khankho akem jinge,
Lunghel aum ngeije.
3. Hithei hihen kavon ding kipa um,
Muthei kit ding chu hileng,
Nunlui ngaijin kahol,
Kumlui bou ka tiuve.
4. Kumlui to ikikhen koukit theilou,
Golngai kikhen pi jong chu,
Ahinkho alhing in
Kumlui to alhon tai.
Reference: L.T. No.151.
1. Hallelujah, Hallelujah !
Leng Christa chu ahung pengtai,
Vantil ten Ama ahin lhai,
Bethlehem daiYa chun,
Leng Christa chu ahung pengtai,
Loupi hen atiuve.
O!....Bethlehem jon’ute,
Vanlal cha penna chu,
Samang jalna gan kong sung a,
Lhandampu kamu nin.
2. Avahchoi vantil lasa hon,
Lungsung imu akai thouve,
Valpa ahsi lamkai vah chun,
Miching ho apuijun,
O! keima jong neipui jin lang,
Bethlehem daiya chun.
3. Hallelujah! Hallelujah !
Ka Lhandampu penna mun chu,
Tahsa mit in kagaldot e,
O! Mu kanom ngeije,
Hungvah kit in Valpa Ahsi,
Keima jong neipuijin.
Reference: L.T. No.314.
1. Ka kholjin na sapset na mun,
Lungdon twisanglen kinong,
Panpi kangai ka Lhandampu,
Neihin huh in.
Jesu nagam nalhung teng le,
Nei he jing in,
Leiset chonset asang taloi,
Ka doujou poi Pakai nunnem,
Jesu na gam nalhun tengle
Neihe jing in.
2. Ka damsung ni chom cha ahi,
Hetlou kah in jan mollep,
Setna meipi jing noija hin,
Nei huhhing in.
3. Ka damsung nikho manding dan,
Neihil jing in Lhandampu,
Ka phat hoilai hi Nang ding in,
Mang tang kate.
4. Leiset loupi naho sang in,
Na hoijoi ka lung sung a,
Sapsetna ling lukhuh jong chu,
Khuh jong le chun.
Reference: L.T. No. 315
1. I-damlai ni phat chom cha hi,
Beivah ding ahitai,
Sopi kingaiton phat aum tapoi,
Na lung heijin vangam ahung naitai.
Phat aboitai,phat abeitai,
Lungsetna khang alem jing e,
I-Pakai chu hungloi jinte,
Na lung heijun van gam ahung naitai.
2. O hinna thu mulou ho khu,
Vetem un Sopite,
Tonsot thi-nina mun lam chu jon in ,
Akitol-ui mitlhi long pum pum in
3. Phat kipa-um chomcha sung hin,
Pakai na tong ute,
Ageisang tai; O! Phat aum tapoi,
Kipan ute Pakai na tong ding in.
Reference: L.T. No.322.
1. Vo Gospel kholjin hoilang a cheding nahim,
Nangma ngaija dangchah sang tampi aumtai,
Mujinga mulou le ja-jing a jalou hon,
Nathilbol thei lhatdamna angah-ui.
Mol le lhang sang jong le cheding kahi,
Pakai thupeh juilou thei kahipoi,
Angailutnan eisol kacham louvin,
Pakai natoh kakin ahi.
2. Setna soh in mi sangja thimnoija aum,
Calvary sochat na niso-lam helou vin,
Gotmun’a ding in lhem lungmong Satan in,
Ache jing-ui, O! Gospel kou loijin.
3. Gospel kouna sang nomlou jouse te ho chu,
Kale hagel thoh un te tonsot geijin,
Chu-a kisih jongle ngaidam um talou ding,
Achung-uva tonsot themmo chuta.
4. O! Sopite Gospel kouna sangloi-uvin,
Gospel lah touna din Rapture ni anaitai,
Tahsan chate jouse chugam’a cheng unte,
Choldo uvinte Hallelujah! tiuvin.
Reference: L.T. No.261.
1. Vo! Michonse, Huhhingpun nang na kouve,
Avel’a nakou kitlou ding,
Van gam lhunna ding muthim in tom le chun,
Dalhah a naum lou ding ham?
Lhandampun thohhat taha nakoupet cha hin,
Vaokam malam chu jon in,
Tujan’a na hinna chu thina lhanmol’a,
Atolmang jeng thei ahi.
2. Vo! michonse, Pakaijin nang nakouve,
Sottah manbei jin na kouve,
Huhhingpu kouna chu nanung sun hitam?
Nungsun le chun i-na ti dem ?
3. Michonse;Pakaiyin ngahjlng pon nate,
Na Lhagao chu adalhah ding,
Vangam lhunna ding lungset khang cheta le,
Tonsot a na-ka louding ham!
Reference: L.T. No.306.
1. Pakai Jesun aseiye, kiging-un anai tai,
Van le leiset pumpi hung mang ding,
Keima thuvang jem hal chajong,
Mang louding ahi.
O! Pakai na gam hung lhun ding chu,
Tahsan chaten agaldot jing-ui,
Mitheng ho napui khom ni teng le,
Mi chonse din mun aum dem?
2. Pathen gam hung lhung ding chu Pathen Ama tailou,
Chapa le vantil ten jong helou,
Mihem chapa hung ding chu,
Thangbang a kipel ding.
3. Pathen Chapa hung ding chu kiging un anaitai,
Noah nikho lai mite bang a,
Kimang cha ho jouse chu,
Mangthai ding ahiuve.
4. Pakai chu ahung tengle,se-le pha akhen ding,
Khat kila khat chu kida lha ding,
Mi chonse tahsan bei chu,
Leiset na mang thai ding.
Reference: L.T. No. 336.
1. Tong ute Christa ding in,
Tonsot a khovah na mun,
Veovin mei gal’a,
Leiset mit a muphah lou,
Chua kicham na lui long,
Veovin mei gal’a.
Na kal son un,
Van gam geijin(2)
Veuvin meipi gal'a,
Chu che gam tolpi sung a,
Phat khat teng ilhun kim diu,
Veovin mei gal’a.
2. Christa'n eipan piuvin te,
Lhepna luijin long jong le,
Veovin meigal’a,
Chonset thimpi jing jong le,
Eihuh ding ken kahenai,
Veovin mei gal’a.
3. Lhepna twi kinong gal’a,
Eihuh ding ken kanei nai,
Veovin mei gal’a,
A gam emnom laija din,
Akihong tai Van khopi,
Veovin mei gal’a.
Reference: L.T. No.327.
1. O! Kipana Christmas ka vahchoi lai hin,
Kum hung lhung lha ding hi jui go-a,
Aban a tuh a nunglam heikit ding in,
Ka ngai na laijui.
Khongaijun(2) ka ngaijui,kho ngaijin,
Khannou gol na lem le hallai bang joulou,
Kipana Christmas.
2. Kum hunglhung ding hi juilou thei kahipoi,
Nikhat jong umthei ding kahipoi,
Na kipanau tun ache ding kahitai,
Damsel’un Chibai.
3. Pakai lungset jaTa kimu kit ding in,
Ngah jing unlang kum hung lhun ding chu,
Malsomna thah hinchoi jin hung kit nange,
Damsel chan Chibai.
4. Na hungkit lamteng kimu kit tei ding in,
Kipah thanom tah in hung kit in,
Na sei malsomna gapha hinchoi jin lang,
Kipana Christmas.
Reference: L.T. No.122.
1. Kama a luigal’a khopi nom chu,
Lhun kangah lei khopi hoi chu,
Lungdei jouse a kimnau mun,
Mu kanom galdot chim pong e.
O! Chelai ihiu cholnga lou vin,
Pakai hatna ging chan khopi hoi jon’ute.
2. Chu khopi nom lam chu jon jing ute,
Lhasam louvin che jing ute,
Gal mon na ding mun umlou hel,
Pakai heng ilhun masang sen.
3. Hechen hileng O! Vahchoi chim lou ding,
Gal ginna a leng hi jong leng,
Vanmun loupi ka lhun teng le,
Vahchoi na la daingai lou ding.
4. O! Van Lhagao Thengpen hung leng in lang,
Lung a set kot hong kit in lang,
Na gam nom’a neipui lut un,
Kipana kem louna a chun.
Reference: L.T. No.188.
1. Malai jin Mosen Canaan agaldot,
Lo joulou vin Leng thupeh apolen,
Canaan gam loupi le ahoina amun,
Kisih a ngaijin kap inte ong! (2)
O! Keijong Canaan thah kagaldot,
Ka hatna song a lhung jou lou ding,
Hinla Leng Jehovan eipui jin tin,
Gam nom chu tobang chu kaga mu ding.
2. Canaan khovui kai nigui em chu,
Lamkai Mose chun agah galdot in,
Jordan galkai ding chu Pakai jin phallou,
Alungset ho chu adalha tai. (2)
3. Lunglen lhang chu ka ngailheh jenge,
Lalnan ajem hoije tonsot gam chu,
Chua galjou Kelngoi nou Leng atouve,
Avel’a lalna pah in abom. (2)
4. Canaan pahhoi lhang nomtah ho chu,
Lamkai Mose galhung pai thei talou,
Ngailou bang in Salem lhang achan maitai,
Israel te ngai ngeijin te ong! (2)
Reference: L.T. No.189.
1. Jan lungjin umpet in I-Pakai Jesu chun,
Atahsa ahom’e, Athisan ahom’e,
Neihet jing na ding un, Che hi don un ati,
Lungdon milhi pum in.
Tena asem-uvin Zion kulpi sung a,
Lhing louvin alhinsah un,
Athu dih-a tan ta lou,
I-Pakai chung ahin.
2. Hon lam jon'in pot un galto kitoh ding in,
Aloite lungdong in ana ihmu tauve,
Pakaijin achang in ul thisan soh leuvin,
Jan khon Pathen alhai.
3. Roman sepai engse ho chun abolseuve,
Veuvin kotpi phung chu thisan kainel nul’in,
Khodung le khovai ja akai le le tauve,
Pakai Genthei Pa chu.
Reference: L.T. No. 8.
1. O! Hallelujah Pakai loupi pen,
Gamtin’ah Ama vahchoiyute,
Namtin Lalloupi le jaa umpen chun,
Mitin lung sung a thu hinsei kit-in.
Hinpui khom kit un vahmang te chu,
Ihmu te chu kaithou kit unlang,
Leiset lamkai Valpa loupi chu,
Lungjinna le lungdonna gam salvah in.
2. David Lengpa le lamkai Mose chu,
Vangam in emnom alhung lhon tai,
Tun Pakai Christa le Lhagao Theng chu,
Thempu lenpen le lamkai loupi pen.
3. Van le leiset, twikhanglen sem masanga,
Um hetphah lou Pathen ahi,
Ni-le lha le ahsi jouse jong hi,
Nang jal’a vah loupi nei ahiuve.
4. Thunei na le loupina jouse hi,
Pakai Christa malsomna akon,
Lei kisem til’a kithat Kelngoinou,
Athisan in leiset huhhing tahen .
Reference: L.T. No. 18.
1. Ngaijun! O gin iti ngeitam,
Ni loupi hung lhung ding chu,
Leiset chonset le thina hi,
Cham lenghen tin asauve.
Chungnung pen’a loupi pen hen (2)
Tin selangdah gin ngei thon,
Cham lenghen tin asauve.
2. Til’a Aigupta gam bang chun,
Jubilee ahung lhung tai,
Chungnung pen a loupi pen hen,
Salem thah kot hongpa chu.
3. Mel hetlou mi ahi lasa,
Lhandampu lemla sa ho,
Tonsot cham Lalloupi lemnan,
Cham lenghen tin asauve.
4. Ahoi ngeije apon loupiu,
Amel’u nibang a em,
Ponbang vamleh loupi sil’un,
Cham leng hen tin asauve.
5. Neihil’uvin vantil Thengten,
Van Lal Immanuel chu,
Laltouna Theng loupi dalhan,
Mi chonse din ahung tai.
6. Hungvah kit in ka chunguva,
Melchih na valpa ahsi,
Chamna lenghen mun tin’a hin,
Cham leng hen tin asauve.
Reference: L.T. No.48.
1. Alhanoi dailim nom’a chun,
Lhatdam te kicholdo tan te,
Amauva Tonsot hinna amuteng ule,
Kipah tauvin te.
Cheng unte chengden tauvin te,
Lungset na Pakai vahchoi jun,
Atonsot in haljing tauvin te,
Alhanoi dailim nom’a chun.
2. Alhanoi dailim nom’a chun,
Genthei na jouse beita ding,
Hinna twikhuh a kisil unte,
Buhbang sang in bang jouvinte.
3. Alhanoi dailim nom’a chun,
Ka le lungdon na um ta lou,
Setna huipi le lhepna gallen,
Abeitai khopi nom’a chun.
4. O! Chu mun a leng teho chun,
Leiset genthei na thoh talou,
Van selangdah gin ngei tum unte,
Van kulpi chu vel tauvin te.
Reference: L.T. No. 22.
1. Jerusalem khopi nom chu Zion,
Goldei te le Van Mitheng te lenna,
Mi chonse te chu Pakai jal’in,
Leng unte chu gam nilhum louna gam’a.
Hallelujah Pakai loupi hihen,
Hallelujah hihen,Hallelujah,
Mi huhhing dingin ahung peng e,
O! Pakai Immanuel, Hallelujah.
2. Cross chung a chun thisan lu along lhai,
Jesu thisan loupi Calvary a,
Chonset thenna dinga hung long chu,
Aloupi Pakai thisan, Hallelujah.
3. Ahung kit mipi kikhop ni tengle,
Damun Pakai sosal na Jubilee,
Chapang te kipana Pakai chu,
Hossana samun Chungnung pen Chapa chu.
4. Jerusalem kipana Pakai chu,
Jerusalem kipana Pakai chu,
Pakai min’a hung te kipah un,
Aloupi Pakai thisan, Hallelujah.
Reference: L.T. No.104.
1. Mangjeng tahen lei lungdon’a,
Golngai kikhen na jouse jong,
Nat na le lungdonna jouse,
Tonsot nopna ding in kilehen.
Lungdon lungjin umta lou ding,
Lhandampu lenna Van gam’a,
Leiset gimna thoh ta lou ding,
O! ka Lhagao choldo din chetan.
2. Geljing in ka hung kitna ding,
Phat le ni hi ahung naitai,
Leithil jouse kidang sohta,
Jon in Pakai jin naholna gam.
3. Goldei te toh lunglhai sel’in,
Zion Pakai chu vahchoiyun,
Pakai kei jong neilhat jal'in,
Neipui lut in O Na van gam’a.
4. Leiset chung a lung hesoh hon,
Zion Pakai chu vahchoiyun,
Ama thisan jal’a miten,
Kakipah e tin vahchoi-ute.
Reference: L.T. No.35.
1. Ni loupi hunglhung ding hita,
Ngah jing Leng Immanuel,
Set le thilha nemse ding ni,
Lhatdam chate nomlen na ding ni chu.
Chuteng kipa thanom in kisan te,
Pakai gotsa tonsot gamnom chu ichandiu,
O iti nop tantem,O iti hal umtan tem?
Hal kem ging louva ilen diu.
2. Jona ni kamuna diu chu,
Itih le hintem Pakai,
Leng in Jordan hung kaijin ting,
Nang ding in Van ahsin hungvah inge.
3. Ahi ngeije tonsot Pakai,
Na khopi semthah a chun,
Na thisan a nalhatsa te,
Hungun kaheng a hunguvin nati,
4. O khopi thah na hoi ngeije,
Nasung a galjou te Leng
Jo lathah ngei asah diu chu,
Leiset man ni ding in tin akheh un.
Reference: L.T. No.85
1. Lungjin kihoh in ka gam jon inge,
Leiset ahin kalha among theilou,
Pakai sem Salem thah gakhol lenge.
O! Thokitna Niloupi thina joupa,
Khotheng noma chun neilhut in,
Luikam hoijo a-chun,
Lungjin thina jouvin kenjong sange.
2. Ka-kap e Pakai namel mulou vin,
Ka lung lengin nilhum khovah joulou,
Zion kulpi hoilam’a um nahim?
3. Kholmun ni em hoi kalam muthim’a,
Hungvah in lang Pakai; Kagam mangtai,
Lungjin na le lhanthim in eikhang e.
4. Ka hinlai nihi lhan’a kapel ding,
Lhatdam ten einga nau kajot jing ding,
Luipi lon gin thipma kicholdong e.
Reference: L.T. No.78.
1. Kale mao umngailou lungdona jousoh in,
Van Salem khopia leng te ho chun,
Setna gal jousoh un thina ging talouvin,
O! vahchoi nala sauvin.
2. Hi leiset kavet le lungdon meijin akhui,
Lungdon lungjin na noija umte ho,
Ikipa lai ni uhi hung mang loi ding ahi,
O! Olgam ka ngai ngeije.
3. O! Thisan jal’in khopi nom chu neilhut in,
Luigal gam golngai te kimna gam’a,
Neipuilut in Van Mitheng te lenna gam’a,
O! Len kanom tangeije.
4. Salem thah nom’a chun len kanom tangeije,
Van Mitheng te ho le lhatsa te chun,
Laltouna kimvel’In pachat la asauve,
O! Hallelujah tiuvin.
Reference: L.T. No. 68.
1. Ka lung lengvai kom le,
Pakai hung lengin kalung sung a,
Lengvai chate choldo namun, Na lenna chu,
Neihil’in aum chan,
Lei genthei na a kalen laihin.
Aloupi-e thu hi,
Ka seijou theipoi,
Van selangdah gin ngei,
Vahchoi na dah keidia gin ngei chu.
2. Lei genthei na a hin,
Lengvai jin kap in mao jeng jong leng,
Thina luigal kakai phat le lungset ka-Pan,
O! Eina lamton tin,
Lungdon mitlhi sona beitan te.
3. O! Chu mun’a leng chun,
Khenna thu him him aseipouve,
Khotheng nom le kelngoi nou chun tongso le lan,
Mitheng le Seraphim,
Ho toh vahchoina chim ta lou ding.
4. O! Chumun lhun ding chu,
Lei genthei na hin eidal jitai,
O! Kangah lelna gam thengnom neimu sah in,
Jona tumkao choija,
O! Salem thah mukal ka ngah lel .
Reference: L.T. No.153.
1. I-lennau lei munthip a kon in,
Ingaiyui gamtheng chu,
Ache masa igolten eingah jing-ui,
Twipi nong gal gamnom’a chun.
Gol’in ven ponlap nama sang a,
Kouna O nem chu ngaiphan jon jing in,
Kicha hih in,Van lamthom’a,
Goldei ten na ngah na.
2. Nama sanga nalhem lha dingin,
Lhepna twi long jong le,
Kichalou vin ven ponlap chu jon jingin,
Hung kile kit thei nahi tapoi.
3. Van mun theng nom’a lengte ho chun,
Lei kana hin veuvin,
Lungdon puldouva umte chu amu-ve,
Ahin sang ui akhut jet in.
4. Vo! Goldei chu mun chu najon tai,
Nunglam hin ngai louvin,
Ache masa igollaija leng ding in,
Pakai Christan pui lhung teijin.
Reference: L.T. No.154.
1. Lungsetna aki-hom’e, ;
Chitin le namtin ding in,
Phatthei phung chu pah-uvin,
Lal loupi chungnung ahi.
Chonse lung genthei lengvai,
Lungset na gam nom chang un,
Thisan theng tah a eilhat jal’un,
Adei jouse hung uvin.
2. Vangphat kihom pet ahi,
Lut-uvin gam nom’a chun.
Na chonset jouse pouvin,
Ngaidam inte lungset in.
3. Tepna gam chang dia gotsa,
Sopi gammang kit dan lang,
Kouna O chu ngai jing in,
Canaan Pakai chu ahi.
4. Kipa O ngei kajatai,
Vah loupi kamu phat in,
Dettah in lung ol eipei,
Lhatna thisan kachang tai.
Reference: L.T. No. 128.
1. Ka galvon katol koi ngampoi,
O! Kachen na gal gin na mun,
Nitin lhepna chun eijui jing,
O! Ka Lhandampu seilep ding in.
O! Neivon in Immanuel,
Na Lhagao vin neivon inlang,
Hi leiset set thim kulpi hi.
Nang ding in dou kit nange.
2. Lhasam le geuchau vin ka um,
Na din sonlel mel pu jong leng,
Gal hatte dinga Lallukhuh,
O! Nasem chu neimu sah kit in.
3. O! Hinve tan ka Lhandampu,
Na thisan’a nalhatsa te,
Hi leiset setthim kulsung a,
Akihen ui Pakai simjou lou.
4. Nang in neipui le melma te,
Ken dou ding na thisan jal’a,
Na tonsot gou loupi ding in,
O! Set soh a kon ken puidoh ding.
5. Ol-leh kho ahung vah tengle,
Ka Lhandampu chu kamu ding,
Chua kagal von sutlhang ting,
O! Ponbang loupi eisil peh ding.
Reference: L.T. No. 169.
1. Kalung sung set boh nensa chu,
Na Hou-in hin semthah in,
Asung a hin O Ka Pakai,
Tonsot’in Nang hung cheng in.
Na um na chu (2), Tonsot kipanan aloi
Na um na chu (2), Tonsot kipanan aloi
2. O khatvei beh muthei hileng,
Khatvei beh Nang namu leng,
Leiset pahhoi jouse sang in,
Ajat jan Nang nahoi joi,
Kipeng kate (2) Nangma toh cheng khom ding in.
Kipeng kate (2) Nangma toh cheng khom ding in.
3. O semhoh in kaset na hi,
Ka Lhagao huhhing in lang,
Ka chimtauve thim’a um hi,
Hungvah in vanvah loupi,
Nahung vah teng (2) Ka lungsung kipa adim
Nahung vah teng (2) Ka lungsung kipa adim
Reference: L.T. No.193.

songs.title: KUM LE LHA AKEM JING E

lines: 1. Kum le Iha akem jing e,
Ka noplai nikho jong hi,
Na emhoi le hi leiset pah hi,
Ka dingin lungdon le kana gam ahi.
O Ka tonsot khopi le gal mun’a
Lhatdam te lenna gamchu kangai ngeije,
Lungdon na le lha lengvai na,
Aumtapoi; kana O ging talou.
2. Ka noplai nikho akem,
Noi leiset pahhoi jong hi,
Lei nopna ponbang in chulkit jin,
Pahbang pahna tonsot gam kangai ngeije.
3. Hi leiset lungdon na le,
Muthim in eikhang kimvel,
Ka lenna gamthip le kamao na,
Pel’a lungset tetoh lenkhom kanome.
4. Einem in lang O Pakai,
Genthei lengvai cha kahi,
Neipui jin Nangma lenna gam’a,
Lungjin na leiset hi ken ngaita lou ding.
Reference: L.T. No. 89.
1. Lhandampu lung dong in achei,
A galten akaijun,
Achena ding lam kavet le,
Thina mun chu ahi.
Chu lhang a chun akhai sang un,
Sapsetna thing chung a,
Lengvai kana O kajah chu,
Lhandampu O ahi.
2. Alengvai na Cross chu apun ,
Pakai chu akaijun,
Lhandampu hoikom alhut um?
Ka-Pu chu ga hung e.
3. Pon loupi le ling lukhuh toh,
I-pu chu akaijun,
Ka chonset jouse hi apon,
Genthei na lhang jon in.
4. Chua mipi akikhom un,
Pakai taitom teho,
Lungdon na ten ana bom un,
Thingpel adom sang un.
5. Akhut le akeng thingkil’in,
Thing to akhen beh un,
Hichun 'Kajou Sohtai' atin,
Pakaijin asam’e,
6. Thina lungjin lungdon jouse,
Lung hesoh na jouse,
Ipun abon-in ajouve,
Lhan’a kon athou tai.
Reference: L.T. No.147.
1. Lhang kumkho akihei tai,
Phai tidam hung leng in,
Gol hinpui jin.
O! kavahchoije Pakai,
O! Na lemnan la kasai,
Lungset in tha neipeuvin,
Genthei cha kahi.
2. Thing le louna apultai,
Lungset in tha neipen,
Solang neikhun.
3. Thi le lungdon beina gam,
Thisan’a lhatsa te,
Neihol nau gam.
4. Chu thisan jal chun Pakai,
Neipuilut in chung van,
Mun lalna gam.
Reference: L.T. No.268.
1. Lhagao Theng chu neihin peuvin lang,
Pakai Jesu min in,
Ka lung sung a cheng jing ding in,
Athilbol chu mei bang in.
2. Pentecost ni ahung lhun ni chun,
Mihem te apanpin,
Aset nau chu ahedoh un
Mi jousen atahsan un.
3. Hiche jou chun athu hetthei nan,
Lhagao Theng kathum ui,
Eihil jing in eilhamon jing in,
Van’a akal tou jou chun.
4. Thildang jouse bulhing jeng jong le,
Hiche hi kathum’e,
Chonset phong le eilhamon ding in,
Lhatheng bou aloupi pen.
Reference: L.T. No. 20.
1. Kinepna gam kagel chimpoi,
Lei lungdon na gal lam,
Hinlai lungdon meipi noija,
Pel tange kana gam
Lei lungdon na mitlhi hulding,
Kana nikho mang tante,
Pakai mel mukal kangah lei,
O! mangta hen leiset hi.
2. Calvary ka ngai loupi pen,
Van gam kot ahong e,
Gachen chu a O! ka Lhagao,
Alang e Van gam nom.
3. Kana janthim hi mang tahen,
Jordan luigal lam’a,
Leiset genthei na kakhel teng,
Ngai pong e kana gam.
4. Kei jong itih le kalhung dem
Jordan luigal lam chu,
O kangaije ka gol ngai te,
Che tang e chu gam’a.
Reference: L.T. No. 13.
1. Pakai leija na lungset ho hin,
Sun le jan in kangah jing ui,
Itih kakipanau niloupi,
Vetnom kidang chu kamu diuvem?
O Pakai tonsot lhang chung a chun,
Mitheng ho simjou lou chuto,
Valpa ahsi bang in hung vah in lang,
Chuteng leiset hi kadalhah diu.
2. Kahin naitaove Pakai na gam,
Lhandampu kangah lei ngeije,
Pakai vahchoi na lasah ding le,
Ima ponlap choikal kangah lel.
3. Chu luikam chapang te lenna a,
Hinna thinglim damnoi jonin,
Ving neija leng galkai thei hileng,
Leiset gentheina ngaikit lou ding.
4. Nang hung jing in namtin Lal loupi,
Na vangphat hom ding hinchoiyin,
Lam nom’a chun nalam to ding in,
Jerusalem geijin vahchoiyun
Reference: L.T. No. 40.
1. Jerusalem Zion khopi chu geltem un,
O mi atam kelngoi nou,
Lal lenna ding mun umlou,
O lungkham le kipana Calvary,
Lhang ahung lange.
O nam jouse le chitin paotin in,
Van Lal naobanga aka-na Calvary’a,
Kidang chom louve.
2. Jerusalem Zion khopi chu geltem un,
O mi janel kelngoi nou Lal,
Lenna mun hoija chun,
O Calvary a Pathen ngailut na,
Ngaito a kul ahi.
3. Hallelujah hilthem leu hen Hallelujah,
O ngailutna dai chom ngai lou,
Kipa nopna pah hoi,
Asei them le hil them um-in tem O,
Angailut na hi.
Reference: L.T. No.199.

songs.title: O! PAKAI NAVANG BOH NA LU

lines: 1. O Pakai na vang boh na lu,
Ijakai chung a kilang,
Na thulou chun ka hinkho jong hi,
Ka neise toh mantha ding,
Kavah choije (2)
Nalungset na kamu hin. (2)
2. Nangma lungset na khut’a kon,
Hinna le ngaichat jouse,
Hampa louhing muchi jousen,
Achang cheh a vangboh na,
Vahchoi na lan(2)
Asauve Atonsot in. (2)
3. O Pakai thil jouse sem’a,
Nangma khutsoh jouse hin,
Lungjin genthei na eichingpau,
Ka vahchoi chim thei pouve,
Nei suhmil dan (2)
Nadei lam neihil jing in. (2)
4. Phat le nikho akem jing e,
Leipah hoi jouse mol’in,
Pakai kasetnau jouse jong,
Nahat na in asiltheng,
Mu kanome (2)
Na hatna hung kilang ding. (2)
Reference: L.T. No.162.
1. Tu athah kilungset na nom em’a,
Ka Pakai munloupi,
Kipana pahcha namtui apahtai,
Chulkit talou ding in.
Olle ikikhop diu nom tah a,
Van Mithengte ho jouse khutoh,
Lungdon na gam’a ikanao hi,
I-Pakai ang a kipa la ding,
2. Kahin lai ni hi akem masangsen,
Ka dinga mei jing jing,
Ajou le chu gam kalhun teng chule,
Lei hi ngai ta lou ding.
3. Chu gam khopi emhoi tah chu jon in,
Lei hi dalha tang ting,
Tun agim namtui chu katep kha tai,
O anom na ding e.
4. Eihuhhingpa meldei um kamu teng,
Alaltouna chung a,
Thu atan ding lhatsa te kipana,
Hallelujah Amen.
Reference: L.T. No. 14.

songs.title: KALOUPI NA NI LE KAHINNA DIN

lines: 1. Ka loupina ni le ka hinna din,
Galgin um le kichat umlou na,
Gamthip’a kon in kamu phajou poi,
Chu gam lhun ding chu kalung kinem,
Galdot jing inge kalhun masang sen,
Kilungset na gam em le nopna,
Miten chu mun chu lungin geljong le,
Ka seithei poi athah in-alange.
2. Hiti phat chule chitin namtin ten,
Aloupina em gam vel’a chun,
Lhandampu mel emhoi le loupi chu,
Amuphat u le tahsan unte.
3. Ka Lhagao lungdong le genthei kom’a,
Kilungset na Christa thu hinna,
Ka dinga jong aphal tah jeh u chun,
Hallelujah vahchoi chim pong e.
4. Gamthim genthei muna kon vahmangsa,
Nitin’in lungjin nan eibom’e,
Lhandampu ang a kadin phat chule,
Ka lungjin na kakipana ding.
5. Ajou le Pathen Cha lungset te to,
Tonsot valpa ahsi emhoi chu,
Ka ding a um ahitai,abonchan,
Tonsot kipa la chu sa tange.
Reference: L.T. No. 16.
1. Lengvai genthei kom le kei mong theilou,
Chung toni jong nilhum joulou Pakai,
Einem ding dang umlou Pakai tailou,
Pahbang mol hen leiset kahin kho hi.
Lungdon kana gim genthei na mun hi,
Peltang e tun Pakai na van in’a,
Chuteng genthei gimna ken mil tange,
Leiset pel’a lhunkal ngahlel kahi.
2. Leiset chung hi golngai kikhen na mun,
Insung mi jong kikhenna mun ahi,
Chung leng vabang gamtin’a ka lenglen,
Mon’a umlou Pakai Nangma tailou.
3. Van khopi tollaija leng teho chun,
Lungdon kana asei ngai tapouve,
Ponbang sil’in Van khotol aleng in,
Itih tah le kei jong ka lhung tadem.
4. Lengthei hileng keiman dalha ta ding,
Ka vantonsot pahbang pahna mun’a,
Ken miltange genthei puldou kana,
Chemasa ngaicheng toh tolleng tange.
Reference: L.T. No.321.
1. Ken na in ding sange,hoitah le nomtah in,
Nalha chenna ding van chung a,
Gilkel dangchah umlou na van gam nom’a chun,
Tonsot kemthei lou gam nom’a (2).
2. Chu gam nom tah chu ken kamang bang in kamui,
Nop le ol kemkit talou ding,
Agamla tapoi tun chu gam nom kangai chu,
Kei ding a innom asem chu.
3. Chu gam chu keichang in ding hilou nang ding jong,
Nazareth Jesu chenna chu,
Chu gam’a chengte iti noptam tonsot’a,
Aman eihepi jeh u chun.
4. Chu gam’a in chu anop ahoi seithei lou,
Chu a lung genthei gim beita,
O ngei tah le kipah tah a la mai sading,
Gamtin kimu to soh ta ding.
5. Hungun ka Sopite hung kipat un hungun,
Cheu hite Sion gam jon in,
Eihuhhingpan asah innom’a chu cheng din,
Thikit louna gam nom em’a.
Thikit louna nat kit lou na,
Lungdon kichat tijat,
Lunghel umta lou ding,
Bei ta ding lhiso le kana.
Reference: L.T. No.146.
1. Hinlai sung in kiging phaute,
Set le manna lah a hin,
Ajou le Canan gam nom’a.
Goldei te toh lengkhom taute.
O leiset na lalte chu'
Tonsot gam Ihung thei lou ding,
Luigal’a hinna lallukhuh chu
O genthei chaten khuh tauvin te.
2. Ka ngai ngeije Immanuel,
Lei lungdon gam thip ahin,
Meilah a na hung kit nile
Ka lei lungdon na beitan te.
3. Tonggim te le pohgih te chu,
Luigal’a achol ngauve,
Olle Canaan gam nom’a chun.
Goldei te toh lengkhom taute.
4. Tonna Eden hontheng a chun,
Adam le Evi chu O,
Seingai louvin aum lhon in,
Set genthei na alha Ihontai.
Reference: L.T. No. 217.
1. Ka hinkho hi pahcha bang a,
Chomkhat kah a mang loi thei,
Janna mang kho ahung vah a,
Aman kit tobang ahi.
O Ka Lhagao van a leng tan,
Lei hi ilou na ngai ham,
Na tonsot khopi nom jon in,
Van Mitheng te khopi chu.
2. Leiset hinkho hi ipi ham?
Nat na le lungdon na bou,
Kipa thanop jouse jong hi,
Hampa pah bang bou ahi.
3. Ache masa igolngai hou,
Nop le kipan aleng ui,
Laltouna kim in asauve,
Tonsot Pathen vahchoiyin.
4. Aloupi na emhoi tah chu,
Nisa sang in a-emjoi,
Chu a aloupi masang a,
Pakai Jesu i-mudiu.
5. Ka O ngei nei chasun sun in,
Vahchoi jing e ka lhun teng,
Vakhu banga leng thei hileng,
Leng tang e golngai mudin.
O ka Lhagao tunin leng tan,
Leiset hi dalha tan lang,
Tonsot khopi nom lam jon in,
Khopi nom Pathen chen na.
Reference: L.T. No.132.
1. Canaan phaicham Saron pahhoi,
Rome engse ten ana subong un,
Molle lhang angui Saron apuljal’in,
Nunao agenthei abel ding umta lou,
Adamnau Saron pah apul jal’in.
2. Saron pahhoi apul nung in,
Ama lung toh te ho kom’a chun,
Lily’n ahung pah alung u thim sung a,
Alu chungguva jing Valpan ahungvah,
Avel’uva kipa namtui ahung nung.
3. Saron pah nahoi jou tapoi,
Sim le mal sah le lhang gamthim’a,
Meipi ajing in na pahhoi le ding in,
Nisan hung vah in Namel hung kilang hen,
Chuteng nahoije chu hetau vinte.
4. Canaan phaicham Saron pah hoi,
Juda gam’a hung don thah kit in,
Mitin anomtai leichung thil jouse jong,
Nang ngaijin mitlhi along leiset mihem,
Israel ten jong vahchoi tanna te.
5. O Saron pah mu kanom’e,
Van loupi a na hung vah ding chu,
Chamna thingphung a na pulna mun’a chun,
Hung kivon in natin mihem loupi nan,
Sa le mihem kidou kit tapon te.
Reference: L.T. No.29.
1. Ol gam kangai ka lal len’a,
Lungdon umlou na van gam chu,
Itih le kalhung dem,kalungdon na mitlhi hi,
Itih le hul ding ham,tia kagel lai hin,
Ka ngai Pakai neihung puijin.
Hinna thinglim damnoiya chun,
Nei kicholdo sah in Pakai,
Lhepna nisa hi kadou joupoi,
Hinna thinglim dam noija chun,
Nei kicholdo sah in Pakai.
2. Leiset gimna thoh jou te chun,
Chua pon in lim asong un,
Eihin son khum-uve, Ol na thinglim umtalou,
Ol na thinglim umlou,Leiset gimna ahin,
Lhep na nisa chu ahah e.
3. Hi leiset gim na gamthip’a,
Ol mun um am tin ka hol le,
Ol na gam aumpoi, Gam hunglhung ding chu hilou,
Leiset gimna ahi, ti hi kaki het in,
Hinna thinglim dam noi ka ngai.
4. Hinna thingphung lim noija chun,
Mitheng te kicholdo jou ta,
Kei hi iti kicholdo thei louva ka um ham?
Ka leiset vou thenglou,Van vouvin neikhel’in.
Kei jong tun kicholdo tang e.
Reference: L.T. No. 21.
1. Nitin kakom’a um jing in lang Pakai,
Kei jong Nang kom’a umchim pong e,
Ka ngai nin choldona gam neimu sah in,
Vahchoi nang e lungjin meipi noiya hin.
Kipana luipang kalhun teng le
Lunghel’a kaki khenpi sa te,
Pakai lal mel lemsa chu vahchoiyin,
Chu a van peogal pahbang a chullou ding.
2. Akem bai tangeije ihinlai nikho hi,
O Calvary hungthah kit in lang,
Vahchoi-nan la sang e napah hoi lemnan,
Kipah in gamtheng chu hinve kit nang e.
3. Til’a kipanan peogal salvah jongle,
Calvary’a kho avah kittai,
Zion gam nom’a vah ahongtai tiuvin,
Thouvun jalenna kolni a emsel tai.
4. Tuhin lung kitoh in leng khom jongleo hen,
Lunghel ni a goldei ka ngai te.
Pakai ang a kipa la isahkhom diu,
Ka galdot ni hin O ka ngai ta ngeije.
Reference: L.T. No.212.

songs.title: LEI LAL PON LOUPI KEMIN TE

lines: 1. Lei lal pon loupi chu kem inte,
Molhoi pahcha jong chu kem inte,
I hinkhou jong hi ahung mang loi thei ahi,
Hi jong le Pakai Jesu kei’a.
Molhoi pah bang Lal Jesu keija,
Kei ding a pah tonsot gam nom’a,
Genthei na a jong Aman eiumpi ding,
Molhoi pah bang Lal Jesu keija.
2. Eilungset nao gam nom em’a chun,
Ama chu tonsot Valpa ahi,
Genthei thoh jeng jong leng hinoi leiset ahin,
Agam’a chun eipuilut inte.
3. Tuhin kap in peng peng jeng jong leng,
Thina in kamit asin teng le,
Kicha louvin lhanthim’a kon eikai thou ding,
Ka mitlhi jouse theh hul inte.
4. Ka gol ngaiten hinoi leiset na,
Eidalhau vin ka lung ahel’e,
Hijeng jong le kalung ngai bangin kaum nai,
Molhoi pahbang Lal Jesu keija.
Reference: L.T. No.9.
1. Vannoija hin O Eilhandampu,
Lungdong tah in ka um jinge,
Neipui jin na lampi lam’a,
O Eilhandampu.
Thina lui neipui gal kaijin,
Kale maona gal lam’a khun,
Goldei ikikhenpi ho toh,
Kipah in leng tau te.
2. Lungdon puldou le mitlhi lon’a
Genthei thoh a kaka na hi,
Pahbang molhen leiset gam hi,
Lung don kaka na,
3. Ka ngaitah Pakai ang sung a chun,
Kikhen na thu seikit lou ding,
Kelngoi nou idiuva thi chu,
Lan vahchoi ute.
4. Valpa ahsi Lhandampu Lalmang,
Kalung sung set thim lah ahin,
Hungvah in na lampi theng tah,
Chu kamu na din,
Reference: L.T. No.19.
1. I-lung len nin ngaito leuhen,
I-lung don nin gahol leuhen,
Calvary’a ga kimun te,
Eiho dingin na thoh-in te
Pakai nunnem chu.
O hung vahchoijun athina chu,
Genthei te thu atan jou tai.
Leiset chonset apomang tai,
Vetchim lou Pa chun.
2. Achul ding a iphal lou pau,
Atoi ding a iphal lou pau,
Roman sepai engse te chun,
Asu chul’un asu toiyun,
Damna pahcha chu.
3. Laina jouse kikhom ute,
Pakai Christa chu op ding in,
I-awnei chasun sun-uvin,
Lhatau hite vahchoi-ute,
Damna pahcha chu,
4. Pakai Jesu amat jan un,
Pakai Christa athi jan’in,
Banglouva lhilong numei ten,
Athokit mel aga muvin,
Ka lai abang ngui.
Reference: L.T. No. 1.
1. Jordan lui peogal kakai teng,
Kilungset na gam noma,
Lhandampu le alhatsa te,
Mel lhai sel’a kamu ding.
O Pakai chun lungset na gam emnom’a, "
Ol na asemtai athisan lu chun.
Kei michonsen thisan jallin kahin bel,
Thisan in siltheng in nei ol sah-in.
2. Pakai tepna gam nom em’a
Ka ngah lel chua ol ding,
Hinna thinglim damnoi ja chun,
Itih le ka ol ding ham ?
3. O van Jerusalem thah chu,
Ahoije seithei hilou,
Kalai cha teng le Lal Jesun;
Khopi theng eilhun sah ding.
4. Lhandampu kom kalhun teng le,
Kalung hel na beitan te,
Gimna gal gam nom’a Ol ding,
Ka lunggim na bei tante.
Reference: L.T. No.149.
1. Kahin jon’e Salem kho chu,
Lungdon umlouna gam nom chu,
Kinem in kahin jon jing e,
Pakai kei ding a mun ong nam?
Lungdon puldou vin kavah lei,
Kava veina leiset ahin,
Van gam kaina Nang bou nahije,
Van Lal Pakai nei dalha lou jen in.
2. Tonsot hinna thing lim noija,
Van Mitheng te chu aleng ui,
Set genthei jin eijui jinge,
Neisumil lou jen in Pakai.
3. Hinna Pakai ka hin bel’e,
Kama lungdon meipi ajing,
Van le leiset kah a hin O,
Nang lou vin hung lhung jou pong e.
4. Kama thina Jordan len in,
Nang gal hinna gamvah nahi,
Van gam kahung lhun jou na din,
O Van Lhagao neipui hoijin.
Reference: L.T. No.39
1. Ka Pathen O,Pakai Pathen,
Iding a kei neidalhah ham?
Kataonan nanung ahin jui,
Kataona lungset in sang in.
Kataona suhmil’a um’am?
Lungset in sang in katao na,
Midang vang kou pong e Pakai,
Lungset them Nangma tailou chu.
2. Juthuh jong keidia lhing joulou,
Teng a sut jong lhing jou lou lai,
Cross chung a na thisan long lha,
Hichun ka chonset atheng tai.
3. Arimathia kho mi lamkai,
Pathen ngah jing a um ahin,
Pilate heng a ngampel’in chen,
Pakai long chu agathum tai.
4. Sepai Ja lamkai adong un,
Joseph thum chu bulhit pehdin,
Along chu tupat ponnem chan,
Tom in songlhan’a avuitai.
5. Ave dia che Anu loiho,
Atho chu vantil in hil’in,
Nithum le janthum acham in,
Athoutai tin asei peh e.
Reference: L.T. No. 137.
1. Kava veina gamthip’a hin,
Ka Lhandampu mel dei um chu,
Luigal’a gonsa gam’a chun,
Ngaijin ka lung ahel’e O.
Chu gam nom’a keijong cheng ding,
Pakai chenna gam nom’a chun,
Ki choldo ding boina khel’a,
Ka tonsot gal monna a chun.
2. Mun kasem’e Pakai jin ati,
Tahsan chate choldo na ding,
Ngai tapong e hi leiset mun,
Agonsa gam kalhun teng le.
3. O vahchoi jute I-Pakai,
Kelngoi thisa thoukit a chu,
Hungkit tei ding kahi ati,
Kipah un lengvai chate ho.
4. Leiset a mun neihih jong leng,
Gamthip gam hijing jeng jong le
Pan keidia agon’a mun’a ,
Ki choldong e luipi gal’a.
1. Galdot leu hen Calvary lhang a,
Thina mun chu
Leiset Lhandampu ka Pakai Jesu,
Lung don le lungkham nan ama abom.
Achena ding chu O kave ngampoi,
Juda mipi ho le melma ho laha,
Ka chonset jal’a Ka Pakai Jesu, :
2. O na lungset na lung dong
Kinong in, Calvary a
Kei ho neilhat tai vahmang genthei te
O kaset thenna na thisan lu chu.
3. Hi leiset a hin vahmang genthei te,
Neihin hol tai,
Na angsung mon’a kalhun masang sen,
Ka hin holjing e O ka Lhandampu.
1. Vanchung sangkon Pakai Jesu,
Lungdong genthei te kipana,
Leiset lung genthei chaisoh in,
Keidin Christa nahung vah tai.
Akidange..... akidang e.
Nangailut na akidang e.
Keidia nathoh na Calvary
Ka seitheipoi Pakai Jesu.
2. Nang kasei chim theipoi Pakai,
Nang ka ngai chim theipoi Pakai,
Ka lung muthim hinvah sah in,
Ngailut vadung neimu sah in.
3. Hesoh genthei twipi nong lai,
Kapal ngampoi O Lhandampu,
Hinla ngailut Na lim hoi chu,
Keidin Christa Na hung vah tai.
4. Elbai hon lam ajottauve,
Phah ho suhtheng in aum in,
Pengsol hon penthah na neijun,
Athi kaithou vin aumtai.
Na ngailut na pah kalem ding,
Kalha hatmo hatsah ding in,
Leiset boina kanoh sung hin,
Lhagao vin eipui le jing in.
Reference: L.T. No.288.
1. O Pakai neingailut na,
Twipi bangin ahung long ,
Eina chupjinge michonse lamvai kei,
Pakai chu ei huhhingpu,
Kakipana seijou lou,
Chonset na thidin hinna eihung pei.
O eingailua Ka Pakai,
Kapum in ka hung kipei,
Kei mi chonse neiman nom pou le,
Katahsa ka hinna le ,
Ka hatna kalung thim toh,
Thichan geija dingdet din ka hung kipei.
2. Leiset na ka dam sung hin,
Umdan je ka he thempoi,
Nitin’a kalson dan ding kahethem poi,
Ka ngailut ka Lal nunnem,
Na khut in neituh jingin,
Ka lamthom tin’a Nang hung ding jing in.
3. O Pakai ka damsung hi,
Hi kolla alep teng le,
Mi hangsan Martyr bangin mollep kanom,
Hansan na le hatna din,
Lhagao vin neivon in lang,
Neiching jingin thichan a gin umdin.

songs.title: VEOVIN VANTIL TE LANGEI SAH KHU

lines: 1. Veovin vantil te langei sah khu,
Kelngoi nou lemla asauve,
Van laijol’a langei kisa khu,
Kelngoi nou lemla ahi.
2. Pakai ja kipah thanom te din,
Vahchoi na langei tanglou vin,
Saovin te Pakai vahchoina din,
Kipana pah chullou ding.
3. Van Jerusalem thah nom’a chun,
Mitlhi long a kikhen na le,
Lunghel puldou kana umlou ding,
Van jerusalem thah a.
1. Lhagao hung lengin Eden a thillui,
Hung mangin tin nagam hoi kavet ding,
Chuteng kamu ding loupina jouse,
Vahchoina gin hui bangin nunginte.
Immanuel nalungset kul sunga,
Gimna gal alen’e hung nai kit in,
Hung kile kit in kahinnau Nahi,
Nalungset kul sunga,
O gimna gal alen e.
2. O kipana malsomna ni loupi,
Nahin a lampi noma neipujin,
Jordan tuipilen chu kinong jongle,
Canan gamnom luipi kagalkai ding.
3. Lengthei jing vakhu bangin leng le leng,
Kahinna Calvary mol kalhun ding,
Chuteng chummun chu kadalhah kitteng,
Lalna gam nilhum louna kajot ding.
4. O kadamlai ni hi abei tengle,
Nopna khopi tollaija kalen ding,
Calvary thina pachat la sa ho,
Kipana chulthei louva lengkhom diu
Reference: L.T. No.53.
1. Hiche leiya kalen lai hin,
Lungdonna jengbou kamui,
Thina Jordan lui kagal kai teng
Pakai deina anga kaum ding.
O neimu sah- in nasem Salem
Goldei mitheng te lenna;
Kikhen louna gam,
Lei lungjinna hin dalhah a;
O itih le kahung lhung tadem!
2. Gentheiya ana um te ho jong,
Mun loupi chu alhun teng;
Che masate le Van mitheng ten,
Salem Pakai chu avahchoiyui
3. Tonsot hinna la sate chun,
Eikouve che -masa ten;
Ama ho Ogin kajah phat in,
Chu mun ngaina-in keima ka kap,
4. Ka ngaiye Nang Immanuel,
Nasem Salem thah hoi chu;
Genthei munna cheng kahi Pakai,
O! nangin kei neihung pui doh in
Reference: L.T. No.3
1. O Eilhandampu kangai tangeiye,
Keidin lungdon meipi ajing;
Na mel dei um kei dia lung kinepna,
Valpa ahsin hung vah kit in.
O ka ngai lheh jenge,.
Nei umpin lang;
Na um lou le a O nangka Pakai,
Kei mong thei lou ding ,
2. Ka lenna gamthip gerithei mun ahi,
Nei daiha hih in Lhangampu;
Na lungsetna chun neiching jingin lang,
Lam hilouva kache laisen.
3. Thina Jordan luiya leng jeng jong leng,
Nei umpin lang O Lal Jesu;
Na gamnom lungsetna kul sunga chun,
Neipui lutnin Nang vahchoi din.
4. Salem kulsung hinna theng tah a chun,
Vantil thengte um jeng jong le;
Nang na um loule Eilhandampu chu ,
Ngaiying kating mongjou ponge.
1. Ka ngaiye kikhen louna,
Pathen chenna Gam chu;
Kolni hungsoh kit ding,
Iki khenna dingin;
Kangai kikhen louna Zion gam chu.
Ka ngai van Pahcha pahna,
Kikhen louna khopi;
Pakai melle hinna thingphung,
Saron Pah hoi a Pah.
2. Van Jerusalem noma,
Hinna twi alonge;
Mit na mulou gam le,
Hinna thing lim noiya;
Salem tolpi sunga nei puilut in.
3. Lalna Kulpi sunga chun,
Van kelngoite aleng;
Janthim lungdonna le,
Kana aum tapoi;
Eilhut inte Pakaiyin Salem chu.
4. Lalna Kulpi thu chan chu,
Seijou gol ahipoi;
Pakai Lhandampu le,
Van mithengte lenna;
Ka Pakai lenna Zion lhang hoi chu.
Reference: L.T. No. 7
1. Leiset lungngai na jouse hi,
Pel tange tonsot gam noma;
Alungsetna lhalim noiya,
Pakai ngaiyin eikouve.
Umkit lou ding kikhen kitna,
Lung gentheina mitlhi lonna;
Eilhandampu Pakai Jesun.
Natheh hulpeh inge ati.
2. Lhandampu chun ana gotsa,
Kipana Khopi emnom chu;
Chu loupi mun emtah a chun,
Ton sotna em ding kahi.
3. Kipah tah in vantilte le,
Lhatdam chate ikikhop diu;
Tonsot hinkemlou ichan diu,
Kikhen kitna umlou ding.
4. Calvary lhang kagavet le,
Kachenna gam ding alange;
Van Kelngoinou Lalna ahi,
Sana khopi em sunga.
5. Lhandampu lungsetna jalin,
Aloupina chu ichan diu;
Chu gam emnom chu kalhun teng,
Vahchoina chim talou ding.
1. Lungdonna meipi laiya,
Keima kalenge;
Kipana ni em chullin,
Kho avah theilou.
O vanghomna ni kangai ngeiye,
Kachunga vahjing in;
Thimna gal lennin ei khang vele,
O hung vah in natonsot gam;
Nopna kholmun’a neihung puiyin.
2. Adam lhan thimpi sunga,
O nang vah jingin;
Lhatna thisan lu jalin,
Nang kahin sam'e.
3. Lei hi hamna in aloi,
Chitin namtin din;
O Eden ni em chulin,
Ngaina bang theilou.
4. Olle lhagao lei thah a,
Kipana lhun teng;
Thim le vannoi leiset pah,
Hi inem se diu.
Reference: L.T. No. 15
1. Akembai tangeiye ka leiset hinkho,
Kakipana ni amang jitai;
Nitin mong in kaum thei poi,
Ngaiyin gel jeng jong leng.
Leija kalgol ngaite,
Kikhen kit jong leuhen;
Kipah tah le lung khat cheh in;
I-leiset hinkhou chom jongle,
I Pakai na tong cheh ute.
2. Janthima le sunthip a jenga jong hin,
Leiset gentheinan eisu lungjing;
Kalungdon kipana soh hen,
Kakana bei tahen.
3. Pakai neipuiyin kagol deite seto,
Nalenna gam nom kamuna din;
Kikhen kitna umtalou ding,
Lungdonna gallama.
4. Leiset’a kapten kikhen kicha talou,
Ahsi kal gamnom a lengte chun,
La asau vin,Aw ngei cheh in.
Loupi na van inah.
Reference: L.T. No. 23
1. Gam ngai kinepna thu kajah leh,
Leiset na konin kagaldot;
Kangai ngeiye chu gam nom chu,
Hilei lungjin na nung tengle;
Ve jing tange chu Gam nom chu.
O chen kalhagao lengvai,
Na Lhandampu Pakai Jesu juijing in lang;
Neset pohgih chu,
Leisetna hin dalhatan lang;
Gam ngai um chu jonin chetan, chetan.
2. Kangai nomlen te lah a lhah ding,
Gam nom van mite lasahna;
Lengthei hileng huiva bangin,
Leng tange chu gam nom jonin;
Hinthingbah chunga gachunge.
3. Hinlai niso hi kangaitole,
Lei lungjinnan eikhu jitai;
Kalha lengtan chu Gam noma,
Lhatdamte chenna chu holin;
Hinlai lungjin hi mangta ding
Reference: L.T. No.25
1. Hinlai luipi dung hi gaholle jong leng,
Malam khonom Canaan kagaldot e;
Kakipana Lallukhuh anaita e,
Kap in leisetna hin umsot taponge.
Sot taponte hinlai lungdon lungjin
Eikou nau O nem chu kajah in,
Laltouna anga einga lel nau O chu
"Lungset te kana thu chu asei uve.
2. Ka vaveina luidung hi sao jeng jongle,
Lamkai Valpa chu vejinging kate;
Kong kaina lhangtheng chu eilhuttei inte,
Chu a lungset le golngaite kimtante.
3. Jon jinging ting tonsot hui lhi theng nunna,
Kelngoi Nou le van Pahcha umna chu;
Chul louvin Pahcha hoi ana uminte,
Thisan jalin chua eilhut teiyinte.
4. Van khonom kisei tol’a kalen phatle,
Nunglam gentheina hi ngai taponge;
Pakai tepna gam nom lungmonna a chun,
Kemlouvin kum khon a em in sallin te.
Reference: L.T. No. 26
1. Pathen kei mi genthei.
Gam lungset hungmang ding pel kanome;
Pakai na anga kicholdo tange,
Mei le twilen’ in eiphah louna din.
Ka tonsot in, (2)
Dinga Pakaiyin eisempeh le;
Sana kotpi hoi chu,
Mu kanom lungdon umlouna Gam chu.
2. Kangaiye van Jerusalem,
Gam thah hung lhung dinga len kanome;
O Van Lhagao hung lengin neipuiyin,
Kadou joupoi hi leiset gimna hi.
3. Song mantam chitin aseme,
Pakai lenna gam lungmona a chun;
Leng tange chu gam in emnoma chun,
Leiset lungngai pon banga chul kit ding.
Reference: L.T. No. 31
1. Vahchoiyute Pakai Lalmang Leng chungnung,
Alungsetnan eihin hoiyun;
Thi-na le natna konnin ei huhhing ngui,
Damselin ikimu to kit cheh tauve.
O vahchoiyute ei Huhhingpao chu, ,
Sim le mal sah le lhanga cheh chausa;
Lem louvin ikimu kit nun Pakai min’in;
Alemnan O ging hen Hallelujah.
2. Chamna Lengpa Pakai golnop len beita,
Kipa nopna jouse bei ta;
Tichun eiho jong gemtina chehchao vin,
Mol le lhang dam phaiyin eina khanguve.
3. Kahung lam touve hiche Welcome phunga
Ka banjet’in ka sanguve;
Christa chamna le lung olna chang cheh-un,
Nop-ni loupi ni hihen Christa minin.
4. Kipa nopna halna thah-in lengkit’in
Lung le lhagao nguisa jong hi;
I chennau thinglhang le, i-pheu gongsa jong,
Leng Christa lem dingin nou kit hen tunin.
Reference: L.T. No. 284
1. Lhandampu thisan alonge,
Kachonset thenna din;
Alu theng chu akaikun in,
Kalha Huhhingna din.
Kelngoi Nou nunnema Pa chu,
Calvarya athitai;
Kelngoi Nou thasa thoudoh kit’a chu,
Ei Lhandampu ahi.
2. Kachonset kasuhkhel vangin,
Cross chunga apengin;
Lungsetna le khoto na in,
Eipei tonsot hinna.
3. Nisan amel asel peh in,
Avah so ngam louvin;
Lhandampun kachonset jehin,
Thingpela athi chun.
4. Ken jong kalu kakun sah ding,
Pakai Cross anga chun;
Athoh natje chu geling ting,
Amel kamu phatle.
5. Kalungdon mitlhi long jongle,
Keidin athoh na joi;
Kapum in lut’ in kipenge,
Hibou chu kathem khon.
Reference: L.T. No. 36
1. Nilhah khat Bethlehem'a
Kelngoi ching gamgeh hon,
I-mulouva touva ahoulim pet-uvin,
2. Khang kim in van kon in,
Vantil khat ahung kumlhan,
Nisa vah sanga vahjon akimvel salvah in,
3. Kicha hih-un kelngoi chingho,
Na kelngoiju dalhauvin;
Cheleu chun bong an konga gamuvin nate
4. Kicha hih un kelngoi chingho,
Keiman mi jouse din ,
Hinna Thupha sei dinga hung kahi ati.
5. Chujouvin Vantil chu
Vantil dang sangja pi chu to
Pathen vahchoi la san van’ akaltauve.
6. Jesu Vannoi leisetna,
Naosen’a ahung pen thu,
Mathew le Luke lekha simleu chun henate.
7. Jesu setna neilouvin,
Mihem’a apen jeh in,
Mi chonse keijal in, genthei thoh in athi.
8. Ollha ni som ni le nga nin,
Jingkah in ka thouvun,
IMMANUEL la kesauve.
9. Koi hijong le ka O jachan,
Kipah-un kipah-un,
Kipahun lang khong le dah le baza thouvin
10. Chule chapang jouse tunia
Pakai golnop nia
Hitin Jesu alunguva lut in ataovui.
Reference: L.T. No. 275
1. Pakai Christa huhhing Lengpa,
Lhai jingute ami jousen;
Kipa nopna lengkhom kit din,
Alungsetnan eina hoidam’un.
Lhai jingu te Lengpa chu eihon,
Aman eihoidam jeh uvin;
Kikhen pisa golngaite to,
Lhaisel’ in ikimu kittauve.
2. Christa mina sopi ngai te,
Namel mudiu kakinem’e;
Neilamto nau welcome phung le,
Khongpi gin’in kalung alange.
3. Neilamto nau la Ongei hi,
Kithong hen lang chung van gil’a;
Leiset mi le van Mitheng ten,
Pakai lemnan la sasoh u hen.
4. Hibang chun akhonni jong le,
Eilamtou hen vantil sangjan;
Lha Theng hung leng lha hen tunin,
I-lung nguisau hi hung su- hal hen.
5. Mitmu phah lou gama’a kon’in.
Tun kamutai kagol ngaite;
Pakai vahchoina ni hihen,
Amin theng loupi jing hen, Amen.
Reference: L.T. No.49
1. I Ieiset hinkho hi abei teng,
Pakai Lhandampu mel chu ga kimunte;
Chuteng ikipa nau chullou ding,
Ol mun nom’a Pakai meldei imudiu.
O hinna thing nalim noiya,
Van Mitheng kipan aleng un;
O chu a ikicholdo diu,
Israel lhang thengtah a chun.
2. Chu khopi nom ngaiyin kamaove.
Chu a chu, lunghel gimna um talou ding;
Lhatna thisan jalin gol deiten,
Leiset gimna jouse adalha tauve.
3. Che jingute O Zion chate,
I lenna diu gam loupi ahung naitai;
Tu-a lunghel ka- le gimna hi,
I kipa nau pahcha bangin pah inte.
4. Chu khopi nom chu ilhun tengle ,
I lennau leiset gam hi ngaita lou ding;
Kelngoinou thasapa Lal touna chu.
Vetnom datmo le kipana kimunte.
Reference: L.T. No. 52
1. Kaset jallin O Pakaiyin alemloi,
Athohna seithei lou agimna seijou lou;
O Amel dei um thisan asoh joutai,
Van Lal Leng aleme(2)
Amite chuna-in kilna thihhem le;
Nah-a hemma chu thoh in,
Lhanmol ngui ajontai.
2. Pakai hesohna Ongei lungset ngui chun,
Setlei athongsoh in lhagao mangsa thouvin;
O setna kulsunga henkol kaite jong.
3. Pakai lemna chu kolkimvel’a phongun,
Sim le, mal’a minjong athohna chu heuhen;
O Pakai ti- in ka- lan hung lemu hen.
4. Genthei tintang thoh in eilhatdoh tauve,
Thisan man ihiuve setna kon lhatdamsa;
O Pan eiholnau gamnom eihut tauve.
5. Kahinna thing phungle Nang kakipana,
Na milungset jal’in dalhangting lei lungjin;
O Salem thah-a sun navang neinouvin.
Reference: L.T. No. 61
1. Setgal dounan O van lengpa chun,
Ling lukhuh akhuh ding lungin gelin;
Lungdongin Pa henga taovin,
Aul thisan’in alongin Gethsemani a;
A Lengpau mannun Israelten.
Lunglhai talou, lunglhai ta lou ,
Israelte lunglhai talou;
Achunga themmo achannun,
Mipin thu atan;
Pilat’in athutan le kit’in.
2. A Lengpau kaiyun Israelten,
Calvary lhang chunga akhenbeh un;
Achun lengtheinu Mary chun,
Atoipah donglai atanchu laina ngeiyin tin o;
Lalna gam chanjou i-Pakai chu.
3. Lungdon lungjin lhan thimpi sunga,
Pakai nunnem Lhagao ache ni chun;
Jerusalem Hou in thenga,
