Ponjal loupi laiya lhangta sitlei kithingin;
Mitheng lhagao chu hinle kit’in.
4. Phat alhing setgal douna bangta,
Vannoi leiset Pakai le Christa gam;
Chonset gallen ajou soh tai.
Athisan lun gam alo tai Calvary lhanga;
Hichun champi hin Pakai mel a.
Reference: L.T. No. 66
1. O chungvan Lhagao Theng meile hui banga lamkai,
Lal Immanuel hung nai Kit’in ;
Leiset gamthip mun a kalen lai hin,
Hungvah kit’in chunga Valpa;
Ahsi em- hoitah chu.
O chung valpa (2) emhoi,
Ei Lhandampu le ka- Pakai deipen nahi;
Lungdon twipi nongin gal
Hunglen jengjong le,
Hinna Pakai kabel ding tonsot’a.
2. Van Jerusalem kotpi ahon tengu le,
Langkachah tol laiya kalen ding;
Kaset jal’a lungdonna jouse hi,
Gamloupi kalhunna a chun,
Pahbang a -pah jing ding.
3. Kelngoi nou lalna gam nilhum ngailouna a,
Che masa golten leiset ngailou;
Kelngoi nou alemnauvin asauve,
Hinna thinglim noiya pon bang;
Leh silin alengui.
Reference: L.T. No. 67
1. Hinlai luipi kinong gal lama chun,
Kalungdei gam emhoi chu aum;
Kangahlel ngeiye Lhandampu lenna,
Nom lengkhom ding lhatdam ngaite to.
Nei lhut’in lang O Pakai dei um,
Lily pahna namuntheng hoi chu;
O itih le keijong kalhun dem?
Lhandampu mun sem kikhen louna.
2. Kangai lheh e Pakai lunghel nihin,
Lungset’in chu gam neimusah in;
O hung emselin kalung sunga hin,
Chuteng lengthei ken ka- bang tange
3. Tuhin eingah jing ngui kagol ngaiten,
Lhandampu lenna zion a chun;
O itih le keijong kaga lhung dem?
Deicheng to kikhen louna Zion.
4. Neihung puiyin lang O ei Lhandampu,
Kamaona gamthip muna konin;
Jon jingin ting kelngoinou Leng lenna,
O kikhen louna tonsot Khol mun.
Reference: L.T. No. 71
1. Kachenau gamlui hung mang ding,
O itih ken kanuse dem?
Van Mithengte le ka- Pakai mel,
Mukal ka- ngah lel.
O Jerusalem dai Pakaiyin. -
Lengvaiyin a ngah;
Sapsetna thing chunga khai sangun.
Aling lukhuh to.
2. Nathoh na kahil chen joulou.
Set thoinan van Lal Kelngoinou;
Bethlehem kho te a nahung pengin,
Bong in lham noiya.
3. Pakai Jesu kagel chimpoi.
Calvary hinve jing nange;
Nagentheina vannoi set pohna,
Lunga mil lom lou.
Reference: L.T. No. 75
1. O van huilhi kangaiye hung lengin,
Kalung sunga meipi jing semhoh - in;
Thim le lungjin nan kei eikhang jitai,
Kajot laiyin alei tonsot kholmun.
O Pakai kadin ijakai Nahi,
Hinna twikhuh Nahi ken- kangaiye;
Loupina le Van mun kangeh chompoi,
Van chu Nangma nahiye nei umpin.
2. Til ’a leiya eden pahhoi leng sa,
Kahol’in vannoi sethim jing noiya;
Hin Calvary lhanga aleng kit tai,
Apah-e eden thah hinthing phunga.
3. Leiset pah mihemte hi chulkit ding,
Anop lai le O ngei gin jong thip ;
O Pakai Namel hoi vang chul ngailou,
Tonsot’a pah jinga einem jing ding,
4. Nangma ka- kouvin thim akihoh jin,
Gamthip lunghel na hi jaiyin ka- oi;
Kakipana athah ken seijou lou;
Na- em chun keidin kho avah sah-e.
Reference: L.T. No. 80
1. Kagel jinge van gam nom chu,
Hung naiyin lang Immanuel;
Lung nem kaneipoi leisetna,
Genthei navang kana.
O nang kalenna gam lung mol,
Nalhang chunga genthei chate;
Lungdon thoh- in,
O nagam loupi lalna pah hoiyin abome;
Nang bou chu nahi kalung kinepna.
2. Kalha lengtan van gam noma,
Nop le ol’in lengin vana;
Selangdah tum le lasah thon,
Pakai chu vachoiyin.
3. Kalha lengtan van gam noma,
Leiset hi idia na - ngai ham?
Nopna Gamtheng nom lhun tengle,
Tonsotna kem lou ding.
4. Jesun nei puiyin nei chingin,
Nalungset tuipia kalhatai;
Zion mitheng le gamtheng chu.
Mu kanome Pakai.
Reference: L.T. No.82
1. Kalhagao gakhol’in Jerusalem daiya,
Calvary mol le lhang le;
Thing le thisan chu gaven,
Chu a gacheng jingin, mi kicha jengjong le,
Pakai long lah lhahphat teng le;
Lhan hom geiyin gaven.
Ana ngeiye kati, kalungset Lhandampu,
Thisan louva Lhatdam thei hile chun;
O ka- Pakai, Van kho nguiya,
Saron pahhoi chullou ding;
Hinla Jesu, Na din vanpi achim.
2. O ka- Pakai deitah, Na Laltouna kaven,
Kadia thoh a chun lhan goh a;
Van Lal Cha Najal chu,
Ana ngeiye kati, ana ngeiye kati;
Itileng ken ilo tangem,
Lhan songin khah jouta.
3. Ka-va vei ding hitam, Pakai hoilam Nahim,
Calvary lhang chunga nathia;
Namel kamu lai chun.
Tun kalung .adongin kalha alengvaiye,
Ka Pakai lungdon mel kamu;
Kalung a mil joulou.
4. Ka- man thisan ahin Vanlal’a kahitai,
Leiset gou thil’a lhat hi lou;
Thisanna lhat kahi.
Ka Pa inlam kahei lungdon meipi gala,
Chu a aman eipui lut ding;
Zion lhang ka gama.
Reference: L.T. No. 83
1. Ka Lal lenna gam ngai um chu,
Lhatdam chate noma lenna salem Kul sung;
Van Mithengte le gol deite alengui.
O Hallelujah. Hallelujah Hallelujah,
Tin pachat la asauve chemasa ten.
2. O Pakaiyin athohna mun,
Calvary chu hungnaiyin lang kalhagao din;
Hung naiyin Calvary lhang sapset mun chu.
3. Kalhagao chen chu manna chun,
Ga choldo tan i-Pakai mun, sem thah a chun;
Senlai nao banga kana umta lou ding.
4. Pakai vetan ka- lennau gam,
Lungdon puldou leiset gam hi, iti hahtam;
Kangai Jordan Iuigal Salem kulsung chu.
Reference: L.T. No. 90
1. Chi genthei lungdon na, gama hin,
Lungdon mitlhi pum’in kangah e;
Tang lou’in Pakai nei um pin lang,
Nam genthei lengvai pah banga pah ding.
O hung lengin Pakai kangaiye,
Calvarya nalung setna’chu;
Pon bangin jah- in kachung’uva,
Nam genthei lengvai pah banga pah ding.
2. Na gam nom jot dalha jeng jong leng,
Mong pong kate Pakai Nang tailou;
Senlai nao banga kakapet hin,
Namtin lungmol lah a Nang hung vah-in.
3. Chonset’ in eihinnai jeng jong le,
Thina thimpi noiya um jong leng;
Pakai neipen Hinna Lhagao hi
Nalungsetna chu pah banga pah ding.
4. Genthei jal’a O van Lal lukhuh,
Chonset genthei munna a hungun;
Nagam le chi kah a gentheina,
Ka pa anga pah namtuiyin apah.
Reference: L.T. No. 95
1. Kamon mo kalung hel ni hin,
Tong donna abanna ahi;
Ka leiset lonlhi long pum in,
Naban jet kahin sange tun
Kisan’in chibai O sopi (gollhangpa).
2. Goldei nungteng huiva mao ding ,
Khoto nan naobang ka kap me; ;
Ban jal’in lonlhi huiyin lang,
Tong donnin thimthu lel temo;
Lai gilla geltwi bang dap ding.
3. Nalong damsa tong donthei lou,
Keiman lhiso pijeng jong leng;
Ichung thangvan sang najon tai,
Pakai Jesu Christan lhonpin;
Kalhauve goldei ngai chim lou.
4. Hinoi leiset gim munna hin,
Goldei ngaiyin mongjou ponge;
Vanchung gam nom nalhun tengle,
Che masa chin ngaite hengah ;
Khankho thimthu cheng nalel tan
Reference: L.T. No. 96
1. Hin vetem’un vanchung mei lah a khun,
Alennau Zion lhanga khun;
Tol alengui lungkhat cheh in,
Angaipouve leiset chulna mun hi.
Lungsetna um leuvin
Kap-in, Pakai na gam ngaiyin;
A leng dildellui lung khat -in,
Pakai chu tahsan’un
2. Lei ngai louvin alengui gam thenga,
Kile-na thusei louvin chen;
Leiset hi lengvaina gam hin,
Pallai ni achullin akem jitai.
3. O phat hunglhung ding chu kangah lel e,
Kipana gal’a nei puiyin;
O kikhen lou ding lung deite
Tonsot’in pah un Lhandampu Pakai.
Reference: L.T. No. 97
1. Gentheina te hin eibom e,
Leiset chunga hin;
Pakai min’a kagol ngaiho,
Khenna ni asoh e,
O kikhen theilou ding (2 vei),
O kagol deiho chu to;
Pakai Lhagao Theng hinsol’in,
Niseh-in ei umpin.
2. Nisim le jankho asot'e,
Namin vahchoi nan;
O kikhenna ni asoh e,
Kagol deiho salam.
3. Namin vahchoi ahung lhunge,
Kalhagao kipah;
Na lungsetna lhalim noiya,
Van mi umchan ka- thoi.
4. Eiho kikhen jeng jong leu hen,
Pathen’in eimui;
Genthei thoh -a ka - ka pet hin,
Saron pah neisal’in.
5. Goldei teho ikikhen nau,
Ni ahung lhung tai;
Damsel cheh-in kikhen taute,
Pan eipui leu jing hen.
Reference: L.T. No. 103

songs.title: A MIN EIHIL ZION GAM HOI

lines: 1. Amin eihil Zion gam hoi chu,
Ngaiyin nitin’in kagele;
Neihung puiyin nakom’a ,
Luigal gam nomna chun.
O ka- ngaiye ei Lhandampu chu,
Lily pah lal Immanuel;
Damna twitheng’in eilon khum,
O kangai lhatsate in.
2. Setna le lhepna gal alen e,
Ahi genthei keiho dou din;
O van Lhagao hung lengin,
Setna gal beina ding.
3. Lungdon ngahna ding mun umta lou,
Hi leiset gimna gama hin;
Phung tin jouse kikhop na,
Van Canaan gam hoitah.
4. Calvary lhang thingpel chunga chun,
Ahung thoh tai Pakai Jesun;
Lhatna na chu tong jouvin,
Hallelujah, Amen.
Reference: L.T. No. 106
1. Lhang chang khat aume
Gam la tah gam khat’a;
Twikhanglen dum jeju gallam’a ,
Chu gama lhanga chun;
Mi khat thi din achei,
Vannoi ding le nang le kei dingin.
Lhang chu kagel doh teng,
Ka mitlhi alonge;
Apanga athoh chu kahin mui.
2. Lam dunga haisam’in,
Vannoi chonset poh nan;
Ling lukhuh khuh mi khat ahunge,
Abung’in Cross apun;
Mipi ho anga chun ,
Lhanga chun akal’e thipkhen chan
3. Athoh gim atan gei,
Jin anuisat’uve;
Aloite lungsea akapet chun,
Achanga athoh gim;
Vang chun apaopoh poi,
Lhanga chun athisan along lhai.
4. Chutah chun thim jingin,
Songpi akeh gamtai;
Apen chun van lung angui soh tai,
Hichu thina thoh a;
Van Leng Ogin ahi,
Apen lainat um chun van aloi.
5. Nisan amai sel’in,
Lingpi akihot e;
Huhhinga thatte ho chunga chun,
Hinla Pathen Kelngoi;
Nou chun thina jouvin,
Athasau chu athoudoh kittai.
Reference: L.T. No.107
1. Hi leiset damlai lungdon, meipi jing noiya hin,
Vangsetna le gentheina ten eijui jinge;
Ahivang’in ei Lhandampu,
Na- thutheng pha ka- ki het’in;
Kalung donna jouse kipan hin le soh hen.
Thu theng pha ka- kinep na,
Thu theng pha keidia damna;
Pakai thu lhung thah loupi ahi,
O keidia damna.
2. Setna huipi le lhepna gal’in ei bomjong le,
Ka Lhandampu nalungsetna kulsunga hin;
Ka lhagao genthei hoiyin tin,
Lhandampu thutep dih tah chu;
Imachan a doujou poi, O alungsetna.
3. Na lungsetna min loupitah chu ka- kinep na,
Kei michonse lengvai genthei khoto na- in;
Tonsot nopna kot ei- hon peh,
Na thisan theng tah loupi chu;
Kalung sunga veijing hen O Pakai Jesu.
Reference: L.T. No. 114
1. Lunghel’in lhang tin kagal dot le,
Lhummei akaiyin lungdonna gam a hin;
O toni kalhum joupoi leisetna hin,
O itih lunghelna gam ka dalhah -a;
Goldeite to nomtah- in kaleng dem?
2. Ka- ngah lei goldei te mel mukal,
Einem jinge kimu to ding luigal’a.
3. Van Khopi tollai kagal dot le,
Lathah ngei le baja, khongpi athong e.
4. Ngai chim pongkate van lathah ngei,
A choinau la ngeiyin kalung aleng’e.
5. Leisetna genthei a- ngah na bei,
O iti lunghel lungdon pul kadou dem?
6. Ka- leltai Pakai set gentheina,
O nei lhamon ’in na- kam dam O ngei chun.
7. Leiset kum lhun ding ka- ngah lel’e,
Kum lhuna Pakai Christa lem khom ding chu.
Reference: L.T. No.115
1. Ka-ngei ye i-tonsot gam u,
Le song mantam Khopi- le achungvum chu;
Nisa sangin avah joi tiuvin,
Mu kanom ngei Pakai inpi;
Van mite lenna.
2. Van in nom jotna ja lampi,
Asih-a pella lamvai ding ka- dip dap;
Kei ka- chonset le hat lou jeh in,
Van Canaan gam hoi le loupi
Chan ding ka- dip dap.
3. Pakai na Lhagao pui lou chun,
Koima hung Ihungthei louding leiset gam mi;
Lhagao manthah na gam ana hin,
Tahsan ho chunga O Pakai;
Setnan lha ajal .
4. Ajou ho chun Apao gam’a,
Nisa sanga vahjon ana um’un tin;
Leiset lunggimna le hesoh na,
Akipa nauvin pah - in tin;
Chul tih nei lou ding.
5. Len ka- nom ngei Van inpi a,
I tonsot cholngah na ding anom ngeiye;
Pakaiyin asem Salem khopi,
Leng cheh leu hen eiho jouse;-
Lunggim um lou ding
Reference: L.T. No.119
1. Ngaijunhung kittei ding ahi.
Loupina toh van mei chung’a
Pakai Immanuel chun,
Leiset thupi tanding,
Chitin namtin alal touna ang’a
Achonnau phong a kikhom diu;
Salem Pakai ang a chun O
I-ham kasei tah ding.
2. Amel loupi ni banga vah,
Satan le melmaho chu,
Lhatsa te kipa nikho teng,
Kichan kithing tauvin te.
3. Hi leiset lungdon genthei pel’n,
Che masa le van mitheng ten,
Salem thah nom’a lengin,
Hinkho kem talou ding.
4. Lungdon le kana um talou ding,
Van selang dah gin ngei chuto
Calvary a Kelngoi nou thisa
Vahchoiyin long del’in.
Reference: L.T. No. 168
1. Lei hi angui joutai,
Achunga mihem te le;
Setna le lunghel nan ahin lo- tai,
I mi ngai um- hou le;
Golpha alem jou tai.
O Pakai nunnem’in,
Gam thah aga sem chu;
O ka - lhagao nang jong,
Chu gam chu hin jon tan;
Leiset dalhah phat’a,
Na lenna mun dingin.
2. Tahna gam asemtai,
O tonsot gam lhun ding chu;
Lei gimna hi lhang bangin chim jongle.
Christa na tahsan le;
Gam thah-a na ten ding.
3. Tilla pi le puten,
Amu phah louvu gam chu;
Thisan jal’in keiman kahin mu- tai,
A che- na lampi chu;
Lal Christa chu ahi.
Reference: L.T. No. 121
1. Huhhinga Pakai Christa apengtai.
Kipah le tha nom’in lengute;
Thina thim Noiya umte din,”
Vah loupi tah alhungtai;
Hallelujah kipah-in sau te.
Amin kidang chamna Leng Pakai,
Tonsot Pakai chamna Leng ahi;
A gam ’ in kem tih neita lou ding,
Tonsot’in man tih neita ponte.
2. Tahsanin kagal dot chung Van gam nom,
Chamna Leng Chapa apen ni chun;
Thi nan vai homin a O gin,
Ngei tah chu, leiset chung le;
Chung thangvan sanga akithonge.
3. Tuhin Bethlehem kho nom lam’a chun,
Tahsanin lha jal’in lengute;
Chun lengthei Mary pom lei le,
Van Lal Lengpa lemna dingin ;
I nei gou thil jousen lem ’ute.
4. Mi huhhinga Pakai thah apengtai,
A min Lal Christa Immanuel;
Hosana Chungnung pen Chapa,
Min loupi tah’in umhen;
Chamna thu leng hen leisetna hin.
Reference: L.T. No. 124

songs.title: I PUN CHONSE HOCHU A LUNG SET

lines: 1. I pun chonse ho chu alungset behseh in,
A cha, anei sunna eina lhatdoh ahi.
Atahsan ho chu hingin te,
Avan khopi nom tah-a chun;
Olle Aloupina kimu nan te.
2. Gul lim mai vete ho, bon chu ahin’u le ,
Lhandampu khetbeh vete ho chu hingin te.
3. Chonset muthim lah-a ana mangjouse chu,
A lhatdamna thu chu, oileng hingding kahi.
4. Leiset oimo dingin, acha ahinsol poi,
Atahsan hon hinna amu johdiu, ahi.
5. Pathen Nalha Theng hi, nei oidet sah jingin,
Naosen pengthah bangin, Van an chun neivah-in
Reference: L.T. No. 126
1. Lung mongmon lhang tin kachon-e.
Lungmonna aumpoi leiset’a
O ka chennau gam dalhang ting che tange,
Kap kit talou ding.
O ka- gam ngai chu,
Pahcha hoiyin abom'e;
Mi genthei keima lenna ding chu,
Lal napahhoi Gam ngai ka-kinep na.
2. Huiva bangin ga-leng thei leng,
Leng tange thangvan sang lam jonin;
Calvary lhang thing Cross chunga gachunge,
Ga tou jing tange.
3. Kho mun’a lengleng gol kim’in,
Lunghel lungdon jong hi bang tan tem?
Ahipoi gol kim’in lunghel abang chompoi,
Ka abang chompoi.
4. Heng thoh cheh’u te lunghel jong,
Chung Pathen malsom in damsel chan;
Lhagao kho mun’a chun eijong iga- len diu
Lei hi dalhao hi tin.
Reference: L.T. No.127
1. O ka - ngaingeiye gam loupi chu,
Mi thengte ho lenna gam chu;
Chu mun nom’a lengte ho chun,
Genthei ahetapoi, ka- na aum tapoi;
Chapang golngai um chu,
Kipah - in a Ihung tai.
Lei hi angai tapoi,
A dalhatai, hung kit nom lou;
A jotnau gamnom chu,
Kipah-in a lhungtai.
2. Keihi itih le hung ding kahim?
Ti- in ka - kingai to jinge;
Kap lou thei chu ka- hi ta poi,
I chennau gam ngaiton, ilennau gam gel’in;
Van kho nom pul douvin,
Kap lou thei ka -hi poi.
3. Keivang chu O Pakai mitheng tah,
Na leiset sem ngui chunga hin;
Leiset gimna a hin napul kadou jou poi;
Nei sumil lou jenno.
Mi genthei cha ka- hi.
Reference: L.T. No.130
1. Vasoh banga leng them hileng kei,
Ka Pakai thina lhang ga venge;
Hia chun eihatna ga - munge,
A chunga thisan kainel nul chu;
Lungset pon nem ’in gatheh inge.
O Calvary ,O Calvary,
Na chunga na Thouvi a khenbeh un,
Thouvin lang akilna botdoh-in *
A thisan lu chu gatheh ngim ’in.
2. Kidron vadung nang jong thouvin lang,
Ka Pakai dangchah chu don sah din;
Ju thuh-in a dangchah pha ponte,
Chenlang a min theng tah noiya chun;
Nem hiuheu chan ga- lonpeh - in lang.
3. Kei ngaiya dangchah hile vang chu,
Kidron ti- in ei hin kou tante;
Malai chun ga -don sah tang kate,
Nang ngaiya a dangchah ahiye;
Chen kalha twi chu ga - don sah-in.
4. Ga che jongleng iga- long katem?
I Pakai dangchah phatsah na din;
Hetna imacha la ka - nei pon,
Che vang, cheng kate Calvary a;
A thisan long beh gatheh inge.
5. Calvary le O Jerusalem,
Pakai chonnem hi eika- huvin;
I chonset jalla genthei ahi,
Thouvin lang akilna botdoh -in;
Van Kelngoinou chu athi ni hin.
Reference: L.T. No. 131
1. Akem bai ta ngeiye,
I leiset hinlai nikho te hi;
Kipana pah chul kit ding ahi,
I kikhenna diu vin;
Kol’a nisa ahung soh kit tai,
Kikhen louna gam i-ngai ta - ngeiye
Kikhen louna kisei gam in nom’a,
I golchan kicholdo hite;
Ei chingpao Lal Christa,
Ei Lhandampu kipana anga;
Lungdon beita ding.
2. Leiset chunga hin O,
Kap 'in haming vah genthei jong leng;
Lungjin gal’a khun gam nom aum,
Ei Lhandampu Christa;
Juiya ihinkho hi iphalle,
Chu Gam noma chu eijong ichen ding.
3. Kipana pah umna,
Lhandampu Christa lenna mun chu;
Ngaiyin ni tin’in kagel jinge,
Van’a Vantil te le;
I gol ikikhen pisa hotoh,
Itih le kipan ikikhom diuvem?
4. Eiho igolchauvin,
I pao na toh ding thase louin;
Phat hi ni- tin ’in akem jinge,
Jing valpa hoi loupi;
Hung kilah na ding ni anaitai,
Na toh jouva ikicholdo na diu
5. O Pakai Lhandampu,
Ka kipanau pah nam tui nahi;
Leiya kipana pah amoltai,
Na maiso a chun O;
Kipana jouse hung kilang hen,
Kipana pah Saron pahhoi na hi.
Reference: L.T. No.133
1. Gam ni lhum louna Van gama,
Van Mi thengten vai ahom’un;
Hallelujah Amen’in vai ahom’un,
Laltouna kimvel’in asauve;
Vahchoi la asauve.
Hallelujah(3) Amen’in la asauve,
Achoina chu Hallelujah Amen ti - in;
Aloupi -in atheng pen’e (2),
Hallelujah tiuvin van lam sangun.
2. Atheng pen’in aloupi pen,
Tiuvin bazza to kitoh-in;
Loupina le vahchoina chu changta hen,
Ti- in Vantil O ngei tah te chun;
Tang louvin kipah un.
3. Kumkho a Pakai chungnung pen,
Noimi ten jong pah- u hite;
I O nei chasun sun nun vahchoiyute,
Pakai lungset um nuina dingin;
Kipah - in la saute.
4. Noiya kipa la isah un,
Van mitheng akipah jiuve;
Kipah uvin tin Vantil thengte ho chun,
Hallelujah ti - in pahchaute;
Pakai vahchoi dingin.
Reference: L.T. No. 135
1. Gam thum’a vai ahome,
Van gam Lengpa Jesu chun;
Ama vai homna gam’a,
Sun le jan aum tapoi ati.
Kavah choiye Jcsu ken,
Na let na hatna jouse chu;
Nasoh kei dinhin ngaiton,
Ka lengvaina jouse hi.
2. Twi leile vanchung gam,
Ama vai homna ahi;
Jesu sanga lenjo ding,
Chung le noiya hin kimu pon te.
3. Thingpel chunga akhaiyun,
Lhandampu Jesu Christa;
Setna ima anei poi,
Hibang genthei hi athoh vangin.
4. Rom sepai engse ho chun,
Engse tah- in ana bol seuve;
Pilat’in huhhing agon,
Ahivangin a huhhing jou poi.
5. A lennau Galil gam’a,
Pakai van’a akaltai;
Akal pet chun a loi hon,
Van lam asangun aka-tauve.
Reference: L.T. No. 143
1. Pakai thohna kangai to le
Kaplou thei kahipoi, -
Amai abehnau le
Avohnau atamnao,
Kageldoh nile ken ka lan kasai.
Iti nattam eilhatdam nau (2)
Leiset Lhandampu chu
Akaiyun lhang lam’a
Pakai nunnem ahi genthei jong le
2. Juda ten them chansah lou din,
Ngaito jeng ta jong leu,
Ken vang kangaito poi,
Pakai nunnem ahi
Eiho chonset jallin mo achangtai.
3. Lhandampu thi mipi lungdong,
Lungdong lou jong aum,
Kappum-in along chu
Ajong un hon lam’a
Lhan’a alupsah un I-Pakai chu.
4. Athoukittai I-Pakaichu
Olna gam jonding in,
Olivet lhang chung a
Meipin ahin tom’e.
Olna gam ajontai, I-Pakai chun.
5. Olna vangam najot phat in,
Leiset angui jenge,
Hungkile kit maitan,
Vannoi gimna ahin,
Na lhatdam na seiyin kipah-ute.
Reference: L.T. No. 32
1. A lalna tonsot gam nom hin dalhan,
A hung vah gentheiye eiho dingin;
Pakai vannoiya hin deiyin aleng ngampoi,
Setna leisetna hin umna ding neilouvin.
A umpoi i Pakai banga genthei,
Leiset Lhandampu chu tugeiyin jong;
Set jeh - in a lungdong,
A gentheiye O thoh sah kit hih un.
2. Kingah na nei lou chungleng va bangin,
Lung ngahna ding neilou I-Pakai chu;
Twipi chung le vangkhoa na hilin ni tinin,
Nei ngailut jeh uva lung genthei Nahi.
3. Setna simtha dingin I-Pakaiyu,
Lal Pilate’in them mo ana chan’in;
A banin akaiyun Calvary lam jonin,
Sapsetna thing chunga eiho din a thoh.
Reference: L.T. No. 148
1. O! Pakai vannoi chonset po,
Thimna gal’in a lemme.
Mi Thengte le Pakai Jesun,
Itobangin na ngai touvem;
Ana e Pakai nunnem ,
Chim tih him him kanei poi.
2. O ka - ngaiye khopi sunga,
Hosanna atiu lai chun.
Nat jouse-a ana le dam lou,
Kipa nopna kile sah Pa;
O athi chonset vangin,
Nopna kolnin alem’e.
3. Kei ding ka- lha monna le,
Kalung gil’a ei nempa.
O athi Calvary lhanga,
Zion chate alengvaiyun;
Lunglai meipi hung jingin,
Kem tih nei kit talou ding.
4. O Cana-a mou lemlai chu,
Ka-ngaiye ka-nop laini.
Tu vang hin pah bangin chulta,
Na mel hoi pon bangin chullin;
Galilee a na len na,
Iti hin holdoh tang em?
5. O Simon Peter le Martha,
Athi- e ka -Lhandampu.
A len nau Canaan gam ngui jou,
Khopi sung le Houin sung chu;
Iti hin mu soh tang em,
Lhandampu le ka- lenna.
6. Ana e, ana tangeiye,
Ka va -veina Canan gam.
Thoh ahai pouve lungdonga,
Simeon thu sei te ho chu;
Ahung lhunge tutah hin,
Kalung lai asunna e.
7. Tuhin vang Pakai Lhandampu,
Na Van gam nalhun tengle.
Ling lukhuh hi ngaita louva,
Na loupina Lal lukhuh chu;
Na khuh teng lengvai keiho,
Nei hin ven Mitheng te toh.
Reference: L.T. No.150
1. Lengleng leu hen thangvan sanga,
Mei le ahsi kaina khu;
Ga- leng leu hen tonsot Gam nom,
Salem thah Khopi chul lou;
A kul sung langkachah twiyin,
Alon khum agam jouse;
Na hinnan Khopi asal-e,
Na lungset Gam emsel’a. i
Ka- ngai ngeiye tonsot Gam nom,
Vantil to ka- Pa um na;
A loupina pahcha bangin,
Hinna twi a long dildel.
2. Chu Gam em’a leng te ho chun,
Leiset thina dalha ta;
A bon’un Pathen Gam nom a ,
A mitlhiu long ta lou ding;
Buhbang bangin a thengsel un,
Leiset melput kikhel ta;
Chungto nisa thoh ta lou ding,
Goldei te to leng-khom ding.
3. Ton a goldei tah te ho to,
Chu Gam nom’a lasa ding;
Leisetna kaum lai bangin,
Ngaita lou ding Gam nom chu;
Masanga ka- ka na ho chu,
Goldei te to kimu ta;
Tun leiset miten ngah lel’un,
A hin thing na lim noiya.
Reference: L.T. No. 152
1. Ama ho chu akom’a um ding,
Ama ho chu ami te hitan te;
Pathen ngai chun umpiuvin te,
Amit’uva mitlhi atheh hulpeh diu.
Dangchah jouse kom’a chun
Hinna twikhuh-a twi
Man beiyin-peng kate;
O lhagao dangchah ho chun,
Hungdon tau hen.
2. Thina um kit thei ta lou hel ding,
Lungdon lhiso na le natna ho jong;
A um kit thei ta lou hel ding,
Thil masa jouse jong chu abei soh tai.
3. "Ngaiyun thil jouse kasem thah-e,
Sun nin hi thu hi thu tah ahi, ati;
Hin kahenga ahung lhung tai,
Kei Alpha Omega patna le jo- na.
4. Amasa pen le anunung pen,
Hinna thing chunga chun thu aneithei;
Kho alut theina dinguvin,
Akisutheng ho chu anunnom ahi
Reference: L.T. No.156
1. O ei Lhandampu set le gimila noiya hin,
Lhagaovin nei pui len lang;
Na thisan’a nalhat sate chun na lem’un ,
Chamna lui dunga acholdouve.
Chamna luipi hung long hen,
Leiset gim munna hin;
Van Lal cha ei Huhhingpa,
Ka ma'ah pah hoiyin pah jingin.
2. Lei hi Pakai thil peh loupi masa ahi,
Kasei thei poi nei lungset;
Van mun loupi nalungsetna bulhing ahi,
Calvary lhanga nei hung lhatna.
3. Thil dang sangin na loupi e ei Lhandampu,
Nakhut so hoi kinepna;
Jing niso sangin na hoiye ei Lhandampu,
Nalung set thu kisei jou thei lou.
Reference: L.T. No.158

songs.title: O PAKAI YIN CHENNA DING MUN

lines: 1. O Pakaiyin chenna ding mun,
Aga-semna a chun;
Vahchoina la sa galeng khom ding,
Goldei kikhen kitna jong um ta lou.
O ka- ngah lei lenkhom ni ding chu,
Leiset ngailouva Zion Pakai lem le;
Goldei te kimni ding chu.
2. Chua lungdon ka- na beita,
Khopi thah nom’a chun;
Thina lui gal kai teng kachenna,
Ding gel’in ka- lai kabang thei jipoi.
3. Ajou le kho avah teng’le,
Goldei te leng’un te;
Chu a Pakai nei lhah sah-in lang,
Leiset ngai louva dalhah ka- nom’e.
Reference: L.T. No. 172
1. Hin laiyin Lhandampu jal’in,
Kipah-in lengkhom jong leu hen;
Kapmin ikikhen kit jitai,
O ka- ngai kikhen louna gam.
Lhandampu mun ga sema chun,
Hi leiya kikhen pisa te;
Tonsot laltouna anga chun,
O itih ikikhom diuvem.
2. Alange Calvary lhang’ah,
Galdot’u te khen louna gam;
I lennau lhang kikhen jong le
Tahsan’in leng khom jing ’u te.
3. Sam jing ’u te I-Pakai bou,
Genthei lengvaina a ei nem;
Ama lou ei nem dang um lou ,
Achul jitai lei kipana.
4. Hi leiset na jong hin Aman,
Alungset na lha lim noiya;
Kipan eipui khom kit un te,
Kapmin kikhen jeng jong leu hen.
Reference: L.T. No. 173
1. Na lungset jal’a kipah-a kikhom sate,
Kahung kikhen kit tauve Lhandampu;
Einem ding dang aumpoi leiset’a ,
Pakai Jesu kakom’uva lengin.
O cheng jingin Pakai ka henguva,
Nei umpiuvin lunghel lengvai chate;
Na mel’a kipana aum,
Ka ngai bang thei lou ding.
2. Hi leiset hi kap’a kikhen na mun ahi, .
Pakai Jesu nalungset na jallin;
Na tonsot gam noma ka lhun teng le,
Kikhen kit talou ding tahsan chate.
3. Lunghel’in kakouve ka- Pakai tuni hin,
Hung lengin kalung sung set thim’a hin;
Valpa ahsi sangin navah hoijoi,
Na mel’a lhamon le kipa aum.
Reference: L.T. No. 186
1. Ka ngah lel Zion khopi thah,
Lal lenna van gam loupi;
Lung len kom le kagal dot jin,
Lei gimna nuse tang e.
O gam theng pen hinna gam vah,
Lalna gam hoi mu kanom ngei;
Ka lhun kahsen O Lal nunnem,
Lha louvin nei kaijing jengin.
2. Chung lama lha jah- in leng un,
Natna le lungkhamna hon;
Thina lhang vuma cheng ihiu,
Hinna gam galdot’u te.
3. Hinlai khankho hi gel temun,
Lungdon meipi ajing jing;
Leiset khel’a hinthah ngaiyin,
Ka kap Lal nunnem angah.
4. Nun nopnan ei nemin Pakai ,
Set chate kipana din;
Nun nop len kolni emsel ta,
Zion gam galdot u te.
Reference: L.T. No.195
1. Themgao hon aseiyu Messiah Leng,
Caesar Leng niloupi ahung lhung tai;
Leng thah kipa um chu lem’un lem’un. (2)
Oh vantil vah le Kelngoi ching hon,
Miching hungjin Solam’a kon;
Chung ahsi le mithengte chun,
Kipah tah-in Leng thah pen eihil’ui.
2. Lal jouse Leng bangin apeng nom’e,
Bethlehem bong in lham noiya apeng;
Amin kidang leng chu lem’un, lem’un. (2)
3. Vantilten lhahnan la ngei asauve,
“Mihemte din chamna leng hen” ti in;
Christa chamna Leng chu lem’un, lem’un. (2)
4. Lhatdamna dah Lal Jubilee O chu,
Lei le van gam jousea athong soh tai;
Leng Immanuel chu lem’un, lem’un. (2)
Reference: L.T. No.200
1. Ka tahsa lungkham jeng jongle,
Van lam’a vingin ka leng jin;
Tun lhasam’in ham jeng jong leng,
Nungteng lhajal’in leng tange.
Hinlai ni akemman O Pakai,
Hin nopna him him kanei poi;
Tonsot Zion kho hungvah loi hen,
Gimna jouse kipan kile tahen.
2. Setna thi in thim jinga hin,
Tonsot vah lam chu kahol’in;
Kei genthei cha sagoh keo hi,
Kipana in nei suthengin.
3. Khopi hoi langkachah gam nom,
Lhung taleng luigal khopi chu;
Nunlui gam hin galdot inge,
Ka kana ngai kit louhel ding.
Reference: L.T. No.205
1. Pakai kiti chu amin ahi,
Eipui lea eidamsah Pa ;
Kolle vaiya eichingpa Pakai ahi.
Jingkol kikeova, jing khang kathon,
Samang kavaimoi laijon o goldam dei.
2. Samang navaimo jeng ta jong leng,
Tongkai kidon’in neigel jing-o ;
Chung Pathen anga kimutona dingin.
3. Tongkai kisanpi golle pai cheng,
I Pakai na tong cheh-ute ;
Alenggama chan inei theina diuvin.
Reference: L.T. No. 320
1. Ka lenna gamthip hin dalhan,
Van Jerusalem thah nom’a;
Itih le kei jong kalhung dem?
Na tonsot gam in nom’a.
O ka ngai kikhen louna
Van in nom’a,
Hinna twi alonge;
Lhatdam chaten adon’un,
Kum khoa hinna changta.
2. Kelngoite lenna mun loupi,
Ngaiyin nitin’in kamaove;
O Lhagao Theng hung lenglhan lang,
Na gam’a neipui lut’in.
3. Kotpi gin ngei chu ahongun,
Agin ngei chun kalung aleng;
Mitheng jouse lenna gam’a O,
Kei jong len ding kanom.
4. Chu mun’a chun Pakai deitah,
Amel nisa em banga em;
A-em chun kei eisalvah sel’e,
Kum khoa damna dingin.
Reference: L.T. No.219
1. Lhang adang, lung ahel tangeiye,
Khennan golte mol alep tai;
Ichan cheh-a lung lhaisel’in,
Pakaiyin hihen tin eitem.
Damsel chan o sopite ho,
Abangkhat vang molkal tante;
I-kimu kit phat tengule,
O goldeite kim taponte.
2. Lung khat cheh in ileng nan jong,
I-kikhennau phat alhing tai;
Na khankho le nathil bol ho,
Lhangai tah in kei hon kamui.
3. Tahsan lung khat in lengleu hen,
Leng gam loupi gamthah chang din;
Zion pah i-kijep nadiu,
Tonsot khopi gam i-lo diu.
4. Phat chun eituhdau cheh hen lang,
Leng khopi tol gal monna chu;
Calvary lungsetna jal’in,
Lhandampu la'n vahchoi taute.
Reference: L.T. No.223
1. O ka chennau hi leiset hi,
Gamthip lunghelna mun ahi;
Chu gam’a chun ga leng tange,
Kelngoinou Jesu henga chun;
Ka chenna ding o-ka gam chu,
Ka ngaiye lungdeite lenna;
Galdot leu hen lhatdam chate,
Lenna gam nom chu.
Lungtup gam nom chenna ding chu,
Leiya hin genthei tajong leng;
Lhandampu chun gentheite din,
Hinna twikhuh chu ahong tai.
2. Ka Lhandampu nathohna chu,
Lungset jal’in mu thei hileng;
Ka ijakai Nangma nahi,
Ka lhagao dinga jong nahi;
Langkachah tollaiya leng din,
Genthei tintang kei din Nathoh;
O nami lungsetna jal’in,
Kei mi genthei din.
3. O Pakai Jesu muthei leng;
Goldeite tol laiya lenna;
Calvary lungsetna jal’in,
Chitin namtinte len khomna;
Kei jong na gentheina jal’in,
Gamthip golai dalha tange;
O ka Pakai nei hung puiyin,
Lungsetna gam’a.
4. Leiset loupina le nopna,
Ahoina jouse mang kit ding;
Lhandampu kom’a kalen ding,
Aloupi vah emsel’a chun;
Lei nopna hi ngaikit lou ding,
Angailutna hong sunga chun;
Tonsot kipa la sa tange,
Kelngoinou ang’a.
Reference: L.T. No.224
1. Veuvin Pathen Kelngoinou chonset poh,
Calvary kiti lhang chunga;
Sapsetna thing chunga chun khai sangun,
Kei din Athisan lu alonglhai.
Lhandampu nah theng sunga chun,
Thisan le twi chu along lhai;
Ka lunga sumil ponge,
Chonset thenna lui chu.
2. Lungsetna twi theng chu along tai tun,
Lhandampu thina munna chun;
Sun le janin chen hiche munna chun,
Ka Lhandampu nunnem henga chun.
3. Hiche thisan luiya kisil jouse,
Asetnau buh banga bang ding;
Von chonset nen chu hung sop thenguvin,
‘Hungun’ tin Lhandampun aseiye.
4. Leiset chunga hin ken mansah ponge,
Ka Pakai ka Lhandampu thina;
O Lhagao thengtah chun nei kithopin,
Na meldei um chu nei musah-in.
Reference: L.T. No.232
1. Ka ngaiye Pakai Jesu nagam sem,
Jordan gal’a gamnom tah chu;
Nei puilhung in Salem thah a chun.
O kipana gamnom lenna gam’a,
Kilungsetna Pakai khopi;
Pahcha hoitah pahna gam’a.
2. Meivom kal’a kipana gam nom’a,
Nei puilut in chu gam nom’a;
Khojin louna gam nom’a chun.
3. Mang jeng tahen leiset lunghel mun hi,
Neipui lut’in o ka Pakai;
Lunghel louna gamnom’a chun.
4. Chu gam khopi nom chu kalhun tengle,
Leiset gimna hi ngai louvin;
Hallelujah Pakai ang’a.
5. O Pakai nagam sem sana khopi,
Ngaiyin kalha alengvaiye;
O Pakai neihung puidoh-in.
6. O Pakai Lhatheng bang lengthei hileng,
Hung leng tange Salem nom’a;
Lily pah hoi pahna gam’a.
Reference: L.T. No.238

songs.title: VEUVIN PATHEN THILSEM HON THU ASEIYE.

lines: 1. Veuvin Pathen thilsem hon thu aseiye,
Asempau hung ding ngah-un kap’in apeng’ui;
Lei kisemthah ding ngahlel’a kap’a peng ahi,
Athahsem sohkei ding ahi.
Vo mihem chate,
Thim lah-a a kon hung thoudoh loiyuvin;
Vo thim’a umte, vah-a hungun,
Ven thilsem hon thu aseiye.
2. Veuvin Pathen thilsem hon thu aseiye,
Pathen chate hung kilah ding agaldot’ui;
Pathenin hi leiset athahsem niteng chule,
Sopi mun nanei ding hinam ?
3. Veuvin thilbul chengse kilong sohhel ding,
Van jong lekhajol banga leng mang sohhel ding;
Pathenin leiset athahsem nikho teng chule,
Na dinmun akicheh nadem?
Reference: L.T. No.241

songs.title: LENG LE LAL MUN LOUPI A

lines: 1. Leng le lal mun loupia vahle jongleu hen,
I-in neocha sanga nomjo mundang umlou;
Chunga valpa ahsiten eigaldot jing,
Lei chunga hin lung ngahna ding mundang umlou.
In nom, ka In nom,
Ka in neocha sanga nomjo;
Mun dang umlou.
2. Kipa thanop loupina amol loiyin,
O ka bi-in neocha chu mukit ka nom’e;
Chung leng vacha ten nom’in jai la’n oiyun,
O nei mu sah kit’in silung monna din.
3. In dalha phatsotpi ache mang nungin,
Kalungin gah ngaitong ka in neocha chu;
Thil hoi le loupi dang ijat tamnan jong,
Kalungin ahin nungsun’in ahin seiye.
Reference: L.T. No.243

songs.title: CHANG AT NADING PHAT ANAI TAI.

lines: 1. Chang atna ding phat anai tai,
Kiging jingun nidan tinin;
Thina lhanmol nalep kah-in,
Pakaiya dingin na tongun.
Khodah uvin loujao ho khu veuvin,
Chang amin’in akoi gam tai;
Natong ding ahinsol na din,
Louneipu heng’a tao jingun.
2. Chang at phat ahung lhun tengle,
Pakaiyin chang a atkhom ding;
O sopi lungmong ta-hih-in,
Lhagao mang hon nakou jinge.
3. Loujao ho khu vetem’uvin,
Anatong ding mi aum poi;
Tuhin chen lang Pakai dingin,
Kipah tah-in natong pan tan.
Reference: L.T. No.245
1. Christa min’a kangai chullou,
Lungset um ngei napal lai hi;
Pakai Christa gon bangin,
Ache tai tunin nakhang hoi.
Lampi thudih le hinna,
Jot in Pakai lungsetna noiya;
Damsel chan che tan o goldei.
2. Khangkhat pallai ache vangin,
Pakai gonpeh khang kit tenga;
Vangphatna tin na chunga,
Umjing hen o Christa min’in.
3. Ngailut thilpeh kanei joupoi,
Ngaidam O nem ka thum’uve;
Nagun le Christa jal’in,
Sumil lou jen’in nagolcheng.
Reference: L.T. No.265
1. Pathen vangboh na jalin tuni hin,
Lamto dingin ka hunguve;
Cholle nanga hung kalsong u-le nao,
Ban jet’in kasanguve
Ka sanguve, ka lemuve,
Christa mina hunga sopite nabon chauvin.
2. Molle lhangin eikhan jeng jongu le,
Pa malsom nan eikan khomui;
I kimuto kit tauve tuni hin ,
Nalung kipa sah cheh-un.
3. Man tih- na nei lou hihen Welcome hi,
Akipatna joh bou hi hen;
Simle mal a um lhenchomte jouse,
Pathen nin ei um piu hen.
4. Kilemna le kimai gopna Welcome,
Lungset ngailut kipun khomna;
Chung Pathen vangboh apatna hi hen,
Ngailutna chamkim jing hen.
5. Christa mina hung kalsong sopite,
Kinemin ka ngah jinguve;
Itoh khomnau jouse aboncha hin,
Christa min in hi jing hen.
Reference: L.T. No. 266
1. Mitlhi longa kikhenna umlou ding ol olle,
Chung Pathen gamnom ilhun tengule ol olle;
Vangil chung lam peh-a khun,
Nop leh kipan leng tau te;
Chung Pathen vangkhoa khun Jesu to ol olle.
2. Kelngoinou thengtah chu ga kimunte ol olle,
Goldei kikhenpi sate ho kom’a ol olle;
Ama kivahchoi tante chu-a mitlhi hultante,
Lungdon lungjin mel kimu talou ding olle.
3. Goldei kikhen kitna um talou ding ol olle,
Leiya lungdonna bang hi umlou ding ol olle;
Molhoi pah pahna munna tonsotna ilen tengle,
Mitlhi lonna gentheina umtalou ding chutengle.
4. Mitlhi longa kikhenpisa goldeite chuto,
Thina lui gal’a gam hoi tah le nomtah a chun;
Kumsot’a kikhen kit louna a chengkhom tau te,
Van gam nom’a chun kitha-ol taute tonsot’in.
5. Hiche leiset hi lungdonna le kana ahi,
Lenkhom’a mitlhi lonna le lelna mun ahi;
Lhagao khopi sunga chun nop le kipan lengtaute,
Van gam nom’a chun kitha-ol taute tonsot in.
6. O kalungdei kagolte, molpang lep tauvinte,
Ve jing ing ting kagolte mol alepkah seuvin;
Christan eiching jingu hen, ikimu kitkah seuvin,
Damsel’in O chung Pathen vangboh cheh tauvin.
Reference: L.T. No.270
1. Ka-pa toh kimu to hileng,
Ka lengvaina seisoh dinga;
Tunla kimu kitta pong ting,
Hoilam’a umkhen na hitam.
Lungset neilou tobanga ka-pan,
Ibol’a neisol hitam?
2. Ka-ute le ka-naote ho,
Ibol’a nei eng bol’u ham?
Kokhuh-a nei lelut phat un,
Athisa to kabang jeng tai.
3. Ishmael ho henga nei joh-un,
Mi soh-a che ding ka hitai;
Potiphar soh ka hijeh-in,
Tukal’in kimu tapoute.
4. Potiphar jinu phalou chun,
Numei jon lung aput jeh-in;
Jonpi dingin eina kaiyin,
Ka Pakaiyin eihuhdoh-in.
5. Pharaoh lengpa a ihmut nin,
Kidang tah-in mang aneiyin;
Ahungkhah phat in amang chu,
Abonchan ahaimil soh tai.
6. Songkul’a kon eikou doh-un,
Amang kidang le-peh ding chun;
Ka Pakaiyin eikithopin,
Amang chu ka-ledoh peh tai.
Reference: L.T. No.273
1. Chungnung’a Pathen aloupi,
Kum lhung keiyin eina chingun;
Ama mi lungsetna jal’in,
I-tohgau cheh imu tauve.
Hin tohdoh-un, (2)
Nanei jouseu hin tohdoh-un;
Pakai Jesu vahchoi khomna din ahi.
2. Christa Leng penni loupi nin,
Kipapi chapangte kei hon;
Tunin nakotpi phung’a hin,
Ka hunguve nanei ngeh-in.
3. Pakai min’a nahin to-doh,
Paini jengcha hijeng jongle;
Chapangte lung lhaina jal’in,
Van’a nasan ding um’inte.
Reference: L.T. No.286
1. Leisetna kipana kahol lai hin,
Eihuhhingpun eikou ngailutna in;
Lei kipana dalhan ka tahsan tai,
Van kipana keiya anahi tai.
Pakai Jesu eihuhhingpu,
Nangbou ka kipana nahi;
Ka hinna nangin neiyin lang,
Kipana kim tante.
2. Cholngahna le monna kana hol’in,
Monna dang aumpoi, Christa lou chu;
Ama-a ka pohgih ka ngah phat’in,
Lungkhamna ding dang umkit talou ding.
3. Ka tahsa le hinna kahin petai,
Nangin lan lang Pakai neihin mangin;
Sang tamtah thim noiya tou nalai ho,
Navah loupi sunga alen theinan.
Reference: L.T. No.299
1. Eden theiga naneh ni ni nathi tei ding,
Tin Pathenin thutep ana koi pehsa;
Satan in nen thipon nate ati,
Koijoh dih nasah-em? Ven, Adam athi tai.
Vo! Adam! Adam! hoiya na-um ham?
Ibol’a nang kisel manga nahim?
Adam! Adam! hoiya na-um ham?
Bol hih-in kati chu nabol hitam.
2. Adam lhanthim thina lim’a tou nalai ho,
Pa Pathenin Adam bangin nakouve;
Hung thouvin lang thina gam hin dalhan,
Hung kipan tan nangma Eden thah-a leng din.
3. Phat alhunge tuhi ahi mithi hon jong,
Pathen Chapa O ajah diu nikho chu;
Aja ho se thoudoh tei diu ahi,
A-tahsan lou vang chu themmo changsa ahi.
4. Pakai Jesun ka masanga hungho chengse,
Gucha le michom ahibouvui ati;
Keima vangin hinna aneiyuva,
Aneibe cheh nadiuva hung kahi ati.
Reference: L.T. No.300
1. Ka Pakai Jesun kasetna jouse,
Apomang tai thingpel chunga chun;
Keima vannoiya khetbeh,
Vannoi kei dinga khetbeh ahi.
Keiman jong ka thingpel chu kiput ing ting,
Ka Pakai kom kalhun tengle keiman;
Jona Lallukhuh to kasan ding,
Chuteng ka gentheina sumil tange.
2. Keiman vang seiset jum le ja pum’in,
Hiche Cross hi song ing ting chenge;
Ka ngai sang pen chu Thingpel,
Hijing jeng hen tonsot tonsot in.
3. Vannoi hi kadalha soh tai tunin,
Achung hokit taponge keiman;
Cross chun vannoi to eina,
Chomkhen soh tai, Hallelujah Amen.
4. Nang dingin Pakai in le lou dalhan,
Genthei lhilon kathohna jouse;
Jo-na ni loupi ni le,
Sumil tange Pakai na angah.
Reference: L.T. No.302
1. Vakhu bangin leng thei leng,
Galeng tange chung gam’a;
Leiya gol ngaite ho toh,
Chu mun’a chun lengkhom tang kate.
Leisetna kikhen pi-sa,
Ingailut gol ngaite ho chun;
Eijap jingui luigal’a,
Gamnom hoitah a lengkhom dingin.
2. Leiset hi keima dingin,
Kicholdo na in hilou;
Chom kah-a dalha tading,
Ngaiten eijap jingui luigal’a.
3. Nei hung puiyin o Pakai,
Lei gimna kadou jou poi;
Lungdeite to leng dingin,
Ngaiten eijap jingui lui gal’a.
Reference: L.T. No.304
1. Leiset loupina kahol laiyin,
Kalung sunga kon thu hinsei chu;
Lamvai nang hung kile tan eiti.
Ka Pakai tailou ken monpi neilou,
Kalamvaina a kon eihun tem!
Pakai Nang tailou monna umlou.
2. Gentheiyin lamvai jeng tajong leng,
Nang ngailutna kon ol ka hitai;
Leiset lung ngaina ken mil tange.
3. O! Lhandampu tun kahin kouve,
Ka hinna abonchan Nang kapei;
Nei mangchan Pakai nakin na din.
4. Tun vang leiset thil nuse tang ting,
Ka Pakai nahinna thu jeng bou;
Jailan sachoi le tange kumkhon.
Reference: L.T. No.312
1. Vannoi chonset thimnoiya hin lhagao tamtah,
Mangthah ding aum’e huhhing ngai ahiuve;
Amaho gapuidoh ding,
Koi um’em Pakaiyin aseiye.
O sochatna ngaiya peng’a ahiuve,
Lhatsa nangman nahuhdoh joulou ding ham?
Huhhingna ngaiya mao ho chu ga huhhingin.
2. O sopi kinon lang phat hi akem jinge,
I-hinlai nikhou hi hung mang loi ding ahi;
Lungset le ngailut thon,
Amaho gapuidoh din kipan tan.
3. Pakai ngailut lhagao tamtah setna lhata,
Nitin aphat’u ka-nan amangjou tauve;
Lhagao ngaiya dangchah ho,
Hinna twi choiyin lang ga petan.
4. Pakai na natong dia lhatsa kahilou ham?
Katoh ding helouvin kana um nalaiye;
Pakai nei ngaidam’in,
Na thupeh ho kana sumil jou tai.
5. Pakai tun ka kipan tai Naleng gam’a din,
Nacha kahi nei sumillou jen’in;
Katahsa ka hatna,
Apumpin Nanga din kaphal theng tai.
Reference: L.T. No. 318

songs.title: NI NUNUNG LAM TENG THIL KIDANG

lines: 1. Ni nunung lam teng thil kidang hung soh ding,
Vetnom, datmo leh hetlou kidang hung soh ding,
Vetnom, datmo leh hetlou kidang ho,
Nidan tin'a hungsoh jing ding.
Kiging’un kigouvin,
Pakai hungna ding nikho anai;
Kiging jingun aphat ding kihelou,
Khodah-un vejingun,(2)
Ahung nading lam chu;
Galdot jingun hung tei ding.
2. Keima gamnai teng neipap kiloset hung pung ding.
Kilung tona le dei le ngai hung chom ding;
Vai khat le vaikhat hung kidou to ding,
Thunoh lungjin nan lei lo ding.
3. Keima gam naiteng kami Israel kahin khop ding,
Gamtin’a soh bul’a atham nauva kon;
Gam lungset um chu hung kile kit ding,
Vannoiya hung thangsoh loi ding.
4. Pakai Pathenin athutheng bua eihil bang un,
Vannoiya cham le lungmonna um talou;
Nitin thilsoh le thuthang ho jousen,
Agam nai dan eihil jing’ui.
Reference: L.T. No. 338
1. Pathen’in eilungset jal’un,
Phat chomkhat din ileng khom’un
Tun kikhenna ni alhung tai,
Ka lhauve damsel cheh-uvin.
Phat chomkhat kikhen jong leu hen
Khatvei ikimu to kit diu,
Pathen’in eiching jingu hen
I kimu to kit kah seuvin.
2. Sopi ngaite kikhen nung teng,
Molle lhangin eikhen jong leu
I ki lungset nau mil pou te,
Lungset jing Valpan vah jing hen.
3. O sopi deite kilhah nan,
Ban jallin chibai ka bollui,
I mo-nau ki ngaidam’u te,
Pathen vang peh ichanna diu.
4. Sopite kikhen jong leu hen,
Ngailut nan eikan khom jing hen
Leiya kimu hih jong leu hen
Van gum’a din kinem’u te.
Reference: L.T. No. 261
1. Kigingun tahsan chate ho,
Pakai chang at phat anaitai,
Aman akoite alamtai,
Kigingun tahsan chate ho.
Vannoi chang at phat alhingtai,
Achangvui hin khomtup loi ding,
Achangvui akoijou gamtai,
Chang khoptup phat alhingtai.
2. Na koite pannun at nun tin,
Pakai tah chun ahin seije,
Vannoi leiset chang amintai
Tohga khoptup phat ahitai.
3. Van’a a vantil te hon jong,
Akoite cheh u alamtai,
A chang ga lhingset chomkhom ding,
Loulen louneo-va khom soh ding.
4. Pakai chang at gin umtah chu,
Changsi le changtah lhet theilou
Aki at hai umthei lou ding,
A chang panga khomtup soh ding.
1. Leng natong ho kingaito phau hite,
Igam lungdon na adimtai,
Igam-uva Lhagao mang ding tamtah,
Aum-uve Satan songkul ah,
O Pakai Jesua ding a,
Sepai hangsan umlou hitam?
Idia Sopi nang tuchan’a,
Lung mong a um nalai nahim?
2. Leng natong ho kingaito phau hite,
Pakai man ding sepai hangsan
Umlou ihiu-vem Satan galsat ding,
Ven igam amachal thei tapoi,
3. Lhagao-va kipana le haldohna
Ahung lhunkit theina ding in;
llungthim apumpin Pakai kom’a,
Mitlhi long in tao jing uhite,
4. Leng natong ho kingaito phau hite,
Igam lungdon na adimtai,
Pakai ngailut na adailha gamtai,
Hung kipan tan Pakai natong din,
1. Kiginguvin tahsan chate geisang louvin,
I hinkhou hi phat chomkhat dinga bou ahi,
Leiset loupi na le ahoina jouse chu,
Chomkhat kaha hung mang loi ding ahi.
Ichennao leiset hi chim jeng jong le,
Van’a innom joh chu kanei,
Hiche a hin khomun det chu ineipouve,
Kho hunglhung ding chu ihol’u ahi.
2. Nanei chengse naphat theina jouse ho hi,
Hoitho na le kiletsah nan mang khan nate,
Leiset ahin imacha ilutpi pouve,
Ima ipotpi kit lou diu ahi.
3. O lengvai Pakai O nemin nakou lai hin,
Pathen in hi leiset na dia nakou lai hin,
Tahsan’a ahaosah ding le ngailut na ho,
Kom’a atep gamnom chu chang ding in.
4. Leiset ahin genthei tahin ium jing-ui,
Galdot ute Lhagao choldo na gamnom chu,
Hesoh na le lunggim gam hi idalhah teng,
Pakai kom’a kipana kim tante.
1. Vetan leiset khopi ho ahoi ngeije,
Chenna in ning tinho ahoi tangeije,
Hinla inhoi tamtah chu kidouna in ahi,
Inhoi tamtah ho chu lung donna dimta.
Insung Maicham ah vahchoi la saute,
Insung Maicham ah Pakai hou ute,
Insung Maicham chung a
Vangam kigal mu thei,
A loupi dan sei jin Insung
Maicham chung ah.
2. Eisem Pathen jalou Nu le Pa tamta,
Nu le Pa jabollou chate adimtai,
Insung mi kitoh lou igam sung jong boi jouta,
Vang bohna tamtah chu na lung don diu ham.
3. Set na leh lungdon na lung jin na pel’in,
Insung Maicham sem in Pakai kou ute,
I-thoh gim nao ho chu athon ahilou na din,
Insung Maicham sem in Pakai hou-ute.
1. Gethsemani hon’a Jesu chu ataove,
Nang le kei chonset na jal’in,
Jankim in ahsi vahnoiya ataove,
Vo ! Kapa Vo! Kapa ati.
Vo Kapa hiche khon chondoh in,
Ahinla Nangdei bang hihen,
Jan muthim noija lupkun in ataove,
Vo Kapa Vo Kapa ati.
2. Vo Peter nidan khat jong neinga jou lou ham?
Lhepnan najo lou nadin taovin,
Lhagao vin ajounan tahsa in ajoupoi,
Ti-in Pakai jin asam’e.
3. Juda Iscariot in Jesu ahin naiyin,
Vo Rabi tin abeng chop in,
Chemjam le thalpi dom in I-Pakai chu,
Calvary lhang a akaiyun.
4. Pakaijin kadang acheh e tin asam’e,
Twi penom koima aumpoi,
Tahsa twi ngaija dangchah anahipon,
Lhagao ngaija dang chah ahi.
5. Pakai chun Cross chung a a Lhagao ahin lhan,
Vannoi leiset thim a jing in,
Ka Pathen Ka Pathen ibol’a neilha ham?
Ti in Cross chung a apenge.
1. Alalna gam chu hin dalhan,
Kadin Lal Immanuel,
Lhatdam na ingaichat u chu,
Tu tah hin ahung lhung tai.
O Bethlehem daipam’a chun,
Van miten la asauve,
Chungnung pen’a loupi pen hen,
Leichung a cham na lenghen tiuvin.
2. Chun nunom’a choiyin Mary’n,
Apenna bong in neovah,
Ajalna gan ankong mang in,
Ajalna vah mei bang in.
3. Kipa thilpeh nei umnao vem?
Lengvaiya naosen peng chu,
Sim le mal’a miching te le,
Kelngoi ching hon alem-ui.
4. A dingin pahbang in pah un,
Ama vahchoi jing ute,
Thina thim noija lhat tadiu,
Van Jubilee ahung lhung tai.
Reference: L.T. No.148
1. Neithah sem kit tao vin Pakai
Lhepna twipi kinong laiya hin,
Lhasam’in ka um kit tauve
Neihung vil’un O Pakai tuni hin.
O Pakai na lhagao vin,
Halna nei hung peuvin lang,
Na mite kakipa theina diu vin,
Neithah sem kit tauvin O Pakai.
2. Na Lenggam na tong ho jouse,
Ngui le chao vin ka um gam taove,
O Van Lhagao-Theng tuni hin,
Neihung vil’un O Pakai tuni hin.
3. Pakai Nang dia kaki tep nau,
Ka sumil tauve nei ngaidam un,
Mitlhi long a tao kit ding in,
Nei hung vil’un O Pakai,tunin

songs.title: PAKAI CHU KALUM LE KAPHO AHI

lines: 1. Pakai chu kalum le kapho ahi, setgal kajona
Lhasam lou vin che jing jeng uhite,
Tahsan chate ho, Calvary ngailutna athisan,
Long chun ichonset jouseu angaidam sohtai.
Keima neisol’in,keima cheng kate,
Lan sachoi leng e,phat kanei sunin,
Dou ding melma ijat in tam jong le,
Che jing ding kahi na gam kalhun man .
2. Pakai chu eiho lam’a apan le,
I-ham igindiu jona ponlap chu domsang u hite,
Lhagao chemjam chu,
Kipaman san ding nikho anaitai,
Chuche nikho chu nikho loupi pen.
3. I-hinkho hoilai Pakaiya dingin, kiphal theng ute,
Dettah in pang uhite Pakaiya machalna ding in,
I-hinkho damlai nikho chomcha bou,
I-neitai Sopi hung kipan loiyin.

songs.title: TAHSAN CHATE PAKAI JIN EIKOU UI

lines: 1. Tahsan chate Pakai jin eikou ui,
Kouna O chu ngai phau hitin,
Christa Lenggam tung doh ding in,
Thina thimnoi ja touho puidin,
Kon uhite ana tong din .
Hung un kipan ute galsat ding in,
Lhagao chemjam pan in malam noute
Christa Sepai nung chon lou vin,
Thina thimnoiya tou ho puidin,
Kon uhite ana tong din.
2. Vo khang dongho Pakai jin eikou ,
Lung kitoh in pang khom u tin,
Kipana Thupha lhang sam din,
Nang jong Pakai jin na kou jinge,
Ana tong din hung kipan tan.
3. Kei kaum’e Ka Pakai neisol’in,
Kei cheng kate nana tong din,
A niseh a Cross kiput in,
Hinjui nang e Pakai na lampi,
Na gam ka hung lhun masang sen.
1. Kisei minthang Mihem Chapa,
Melma ten Calvary lhang a,
Ka Lhagao angailut jeh in,
Chonse te khut a akipetai,
Mihem thoh joulou thina athoh in,
Thimjing in ling akihot.
Aphat hi anai,
Ka lhagao hinna chang nan tem,
Athupi tan niteng chuleh,
Tahsa lhepna dou joulou te chu,
Van sang in kap ta jeng jong le,
Ngaidam na chu chang thei ta lou ding.
2. Angailut pen Chapa changkhat,
Golgotha atiu mun’a chun,
Gilkha twi kihal lengpi twi
Adonsah un adon nom tapoi,
Chu-in thingpel’a akhenbeh uvin,
Anah teng in asun’ui.
3. Van asang in Apa kom’a
Thoh louna din ngaidam athum,
Kapa ahithei leh hiche
Khon hi keija kon in tolmang in,
Amavang kei lunggot bang hilou vin,
Nangma lunggot joh hihen.
4. Nidan ko don in Jesu chun,
Eloi Eloi lam’a Sabak Thani
Tin hapen in apengin,
Sunkim’a pat nilhang kai geiyin,
Apa sem ni le lha ahsi hon jong,
Lungdong in akap taove.
1. Hi leiset hesoh lunghel gim mun hi,
Namelhoi toiyin chul jita;
Napah jin chomkhat gol mel kiplouvin,
Hamna le lhisonan nungjui jita.
Deikip lelna leiset mun hi,
Ohe anai golngai kikhenna mun hi;
Nikhat nunnopna lei thah-a,
Kimu to kit kinem in.
2. Gal hat chungnung pen aum nahet em?
Leiset phe keo that theiya thi;
Ging po-te olmo hih-in kalhai gol,
I kimu to kit lou lam jong hetlou.
3. Mikhat aum’e nahet em? gal hat!
Mikhel gal hat Pakai Christa;
Nikhat hung lamkaiya gal hinsat ding,
Thi ahinjo ding mitin jouse mua.
Reference: L.T. No.140
1. Vannoi chang amin in akoi joutai,
Aga chomkhom’a atkhom loidin,
Natong ding mi ahinsol theina din,
Lou neipu heng a tao-uhite.
Jao a-angtai louva chang amintai,
Kon u hite Pakai chang atkhom din,
Naija gamla kon atkhom soh loijun,
Lou-neipu chu hung ding ahitai.
2. Khodah uvin lang veovin vannoi leiset,
Thinglhang le phaicham vannoi apum pin,
Abon in amin in a gasoh tai,
Pakai chang amin in akoitai.
3. Meibang chung a tou mihem tobang khat,
Sana Lukhuh kikhuh a tou kamui,
Koite hemtah choiyin ahin lamtai,
Vannoi leiset Chang atkhom loi din,
4. Pakai jin a Mitheng ahin khopni,
Vannoi leiset chang ki-at ni hiding,
Soh natong nomlou ahin toho chu,
Pakai kipana chu achaan ding.
1. Ngailut na theng le chungnung pen,
Van kipana leiya hung,
Na chen'a thei din nei sem’un,
Lungset na Lallukhuh chun,
Jesu Nangma lungset na hi,
Ngailut na thengtah ahi,
Sochat na Thupha neipeo-ve.
Angaicha jouse lung a.
2. Na mi ngailut na Lhagao-Theng,
Genthei jouse lung sung a,
Nangma kanei jeng na diu-vin,
Gotsa olna nei-peuvin,
Hatchungnung neihung puidoh un,
Na lungset na chang cheh din.
3. Na thilsem thah kei ho jouse,
Theng tah le nolna beihel,
Sochat na dih neimu sah un,
Nang a kon dih tah a chun,
Loupi tah a kikhel jing ding,
Van mun loupi ilhun kah-sen.

songs.title: THILSEM JU LE VA JENG IN BON

lines: 1. Thilsem jule va jeng in bon,
Avahchoi ju le Pakai keiman,
Iti vahchoi louva ka um ding ham?
Ka O neisun mang chang kate.
Pakai naloupi e Lhandampu,
Nasemsa lei mihem te hin,
Iti vahchoi louva kaum ding ham?
Pakai ka hinna Nangma nahi.
2. Thilsem khaokho,khongbai jule va jeng’n bon,
A vahchoi ju le Pakai keiman,
Iti vahchoi louva ka um ding ham?
Pakai ka hinna Nang nahi.
3. Thilsem thing le go twi jeng in bon,
A vahchoi jule Pakai keiman,
Iti vahchoi louva ka um ding ham,
Pakai ka hinna Nang nahi.
1. Jesu nei hin na nom,
Kipa na thuguh chu,
Ka Lhagao monna eipei,
Jesu neibou kipana.
Jesu nei ,chihna bulpi,
Jesu nei haona bukim,
Jesu nei chu vannoi ,
Toh kikhen na.
2. Jesu ka nei hi seichoi,
Leng e vannoi jah,
Tahsan nan kamuchen tai,
Athina mel Cross chung a.
3. Jesu nei hin na nom,
Mihao ten nei jou lou,
Miching hon ahe them poi,
Koijeh a dangchah hintem.
4. Van Canan ka in ding,
Leiset kakhol jin na,
Aigupta ahah ta loi,
Ka Lal Jesu neipui jin
1. Pakai cross chu ka ngai sangpen,
Leiset sem hi ka ngai nem’e;
Hichun o chitin jouse chu,
Chua kipana kim tante.
O ka ngaiye vahchoi jing ing’e,
Ka Pakai Cross chu ka hinna pen;
Gentheite chu Nangma jeh-in,
Van khopi nom chu lhung thei tante.
2. Leiset hoina le loupina,
Ka ven lhepna in einaiye;
Tonsotna ka lhagao din,
Kipana ka mujou tapoi.
3. Gitlou hui le van kah-a hin,
Kagal ma a kadin kom le;
Ka kulpi le Ei-lhatdampu,
Nei puilutnin Salem nom’a.
4. Twiso get le leisetna hin,
Van Kelngoinou loupina chu;
Vahchoiyin tonsot in Ama,
Hallelujah tin pahchaute.
Reference: L.T. No.283
1. Chung gam nilhum louna, Sun nivah ngailouna,
Pakai vaihom na a khat vei kileng khom ding,
Kanglou twi veina gam noma ilhun teng le,
Lhagao-va ivou kikhel soh ding.
Kisem phan lang ki ging jing un,
Nungah som thulem bang lou vin,
Sumkon sangsom sangja,
Hung ging ding anaitai,
Sumkon in nakouve Van laiya.
2. Pakaiyin nang dinga chen na innom semta
Deimo-a nopchon na insung deiya nahim?
Na Pakai jin hoiya umding a na dei jem?
Hung in na Pakai kom Muntheng a.
3. Nopchon tohga manbei meidil’a govam ding,
Mi chonpha tohga chu Intheng kilhut soh ding,
Nopchon tohga nanei sumkon in akoupoi,
Dalhan hung in na chonset jouse.
1. U-le nao igolnop beita,
Kikhenna ni ahung lhung tai;
Leiset gimna da-na ahin,
Kikhen ding ihiuve.
O gel jingin Pakai lungsetna, (2)
Kalhai, U-le nao damsel cheh-ute.
2. O sopite gel cheh-uvin,
Leiset hinkho hi mangta le;
Ikimu lou lam jong hetlou,
Van gam ilhun mauvin.
3. O sopite i-themmo nau,
Kingaidam to cheh-u hite;
Pakai lungsetna noiya hin,
Mong’in kikhen taute.
4. Leiset golnop ima hilou,
Nikhat thu dinga bou ahi;
Hibanga chu ihinkhou jong,
Nitin in akem jing.
5. Van gam thah chu ilhun tengle,
Tua lunghel bang um talou ding;
Kilungsetna kem talou ding,
Kipan vaihom tante.
Reference: L.T. No.174
1. Phat akidang vaihomna niloupi,
Nitin kanai jinge;
Lhepna le lungjin boina hi,
Ka dougal chu ahung naiye.
O nei changlha lou jenin,
Ka kom’a um jingin;
Zion lhanghoi kalhun kahsen,
Ka Lhandampu neipui jingin.
2. Ka ma a lhepna twipi ahung len,
Man ding kaging Pakai;
Chu luipia che lhasam ho chu,
Tonsot gam lhung thei talou ding.
3. Noah damlaiya thil umchan tobang,
Le Sadom kho-a bangin;
Ama nopsahna ngaitouvin,
O Pakai anungsun tauve.
4. Na lekhabu thenga kisun bangin,
Leiset hi aboi tai;
Ngailutna ahung dai jou tai,
Gimna le lungkham adim’e.
5. Leiset hesohna le lunggim na-in,
Pa mel nei musah-in;
Zion chate inop lennau,
Niloupi chu ahung naiye.
Reference: L.T. No.197
1. Phat chomcha inei tauve,
Goldei ilenkhom nadiu;
Leiset genthei lunghelna chun,
Keiho nei hin ngailou jenun aw;
Tonsot gam lhun ding kinem’in.
Lungdei golte kipah-in chen,
Damsel’in o Mangpha;
Ki galvon in; mei le thisan,
Lal Immanuel gam umdan in.
2. Lunghel tincheng thoh khom’a,
Ngai chullou khenpi sate;
Chungto nisa hung nem’in lang,
Lhepna meipi hung jing jongle,
Alampiu Pakai salvah-in.
3. Zion thusim seikhom din,
I-lennau dang jeng jongle;
Hinna Vah emsel mun’a chun,
Mitheng ho le Vantil Theng to;
Tonsotna kileng khomta ding.
Reference: L.T. No.215
1. Leiya ahung peng van Lal pen chu,
Vantil’in achoi-an ui kipa la loupin;
Chungnung pen’a loupi pen hen,
Lei mite din chamna leng hen atiuvin.
O Van’a Vantil la saho chun,
Bethlehem dai athong soh-e;
Akipanau la Onem chun,
Immanuel Leng Chungnung pen hen atiuvin.
2. Chamna lengpa thengpen apeng tai,
David chilhah ahsi em hi tonsot’a ding;
Tonsot’a leng chang jing tading,
Amin loupi tonsot’a vahchoi ding.
3. O vantil thengten sakit tem’un,
Bethlehem dai gam mun’a ka um lai hin;
Agin ngei le aw-thong ho chun,
Kalung sunga kumkhon cheng hen tiuvin.
Reference: L.T. No.72
1. Ham’in ka ngah gam loupi,
Hung naiyin lal Immanuel;
Ka lhagaovin thangvan sanga,
Nom’in galeng tante.
O nang kalenna gam lungmol,
Nalhang chunga genthei chate ah-bang kivai;
O nagam loupi lalna pahhoiyin abom’e,
Nangbou chu nahi kalung kinepna.
2. Ka lhagao aleng lunghel’in,
Pah bangin chulta di jongle;
Kipana gamtheng lhun tengle,
Chultih ni neilou ding.
3. Lei pahcha noplai ni achul,
Khen nung teng kingai ana-e;
Lung ngahna umlou leisetna,
Genthei naobang ka-na.
4. Jesu nei kaiyin neipui un,
Nalungset tuipia kalut diu,
Zion khonom le gamtheng chu,
Mu kanome Pakai.
Reference: L.T. No. 190
1. Bible thudih ahi, (2)
Lungsetna kot kihon sung hin;
Hung lut in gam thenga. (3)
2. Dan suse mi sugampa thu kipe ahi,
Ahung lhung tai lhenchomte lah;
Genthei lhiso ka-na. (3)
3. Phat nitin’in akem,
Hinkho jong nitin kem;
Christa to nom’a lenna din,
Ka hinkho lhing loi hen. (3)
Reference: L.T. No.278
1. Eiho eichuna in genthei tintang athoh,
Alalna hin dalhan leiset a hung kumlhan;
Chaga chan ahung peng vannoi Lhandampu chu.
Setna a sohchangsa eihung lhatdoh tauve,
Thi geiyin athoh-in athisan lu longlha;
Chu kaset thenna ding.
2. Zion indan sung chu lung gil’in gel tem’un,
O Eilhandampu chun athisan ahom’in;
Lungdongin adon’ui, Ama nungjuite chun.
3. Gam vaipo Pilat in athutan dih talou,
Cross a khaina thu le ling lukhuh anapen;
Calvary lhang lama melmaten akaiyui.
4. Alungset cheng ho jong hoiya vaitham hiuvam?
'Kadang achah-e' tin Cross chunga asam’e;
Twi penom umtalou vannoi setpo Pa chu.
Reference: L.T. No.54
1. Valpa ahsi Lhandampu lalna gam’a chun,
Lei lungdon lungjin genthei jouse;
Hinlai meipi hi jingta ponte,
Kap in kikhen kitta lou ding.
Lily pah le loupi navah emsel,
Kelngoinou le alhatsate lenna;
Van lamthom le vantil thengte,
Mu kangai ngeiye.
2. Galdot tem’un loupina mun’a lhungte chu,
Lem la gin ngei loupi chu jom’un;
Leiya alenpiten hoh jongleu,
Ngaiyin hung kile kitlou ding.
3. Jing lhavingpun van Jerusalem thah nom’a,
O alengun chu gamnom’a chun;
Kalunglen loi, amel em’u chu,
Kalung sunga hin acheng jing.
4. Lungdon gal’a Pakai chenna chung van gil’a,
Ni le lha le ahsi vah ngailou;
Jan thim lungdonna aum tapoi,
Kelngounou chu avah jinge.
Reference: L.T. No.86
1. Lal lunglhai kum kipa phat chu,
Tu hin alhung kit tai;
Ga che hen Bethlehem kho pam’a,
Van mite la sahna.
O nang Bethlehem iti ka ngai hitam?
Nalhang chunga lamkai ahsi em chu;
Kap in kahin hol peh-e,
Pakai penna mi i-sahlou gam.
2. Ngailou um’intem chu mun chu,
Pakai penna mun chu;
Caesar leng chan lai ni phalouva chun,
Ka Lal naobang akap.
3. Ga ve tem’un Vantil thengten,
Nadeiyu Lal Jesu;
Ahung penge genthei chate dingin,
Chu a ichenkhom diu.
4. Cham tadiuvin kelngoi ching ho,
Lungset mun’a um’un;
Lungdon louna ahsi kal, gamnom’a,
Chu-a ichenkhom diu.
Reference: L.T. No.57

songs.title: LHAGAO PUILE A KANA UM LAI CHUN

lines: 1. Lhagao puile a kana umlai chun
O anom ngeije kipana jeng bou
Nopsahna lampia kache phat in o.
Lhagao thengin kei eina dalha tai.
Pathen lhagao theng nei hin solpeh in
Lhagao jaolouvin ding jou pong kate
Kanung ka ma a lhepna huipi hi
Nang louvin Pakai paljou pong kate.
2. Lhagaova chapang kana hijeh in
Na anga umje kana hethempoi
Nitin chon dan ho neihil jingin o
Lhagaova hat lou kahi-e Pakai.
3. Lhagao theng thilbol theina neipeovin
Ipiham neitohsah nom O Pakai
Kakiphal thenge nei mangcha in o.
Nana tong dingin kakipei Pakai.
1. Zion khopi jot lai hin,
Setna lem’in katou dentai:
Nang louvin leisetna hin ka kap-e Pakai
Malaiya ka kipana Lhagao nei puiyin.
Mol lem nung teng kagal dot le.
Ka ngaiye goldei khen sate:
Kikhen louna Immanuel,
Khopi lhun ding chun ei nem me.
2. Ka kana gam hi alen tai,
Leiset’a hin vahvei ka hi:
Immanuel thimgal alen neipui jingin,
Hi leiset le thina Jordan ka galkai man.
3. Leiset’a hin kimna ding ni,
Mun aum poi lungjin gam bou :
O itih ham lung deite to lenkhomna ding,
Tonsot lhangvum-a hi gimna gam bei tading.
1. Pathen galvon mangte ho chu,
Tonsot lhang vum’a cheng un:
Boina kal gal monna lhung un,
Gimna athoh ta pouve.
Lei le van Lal nam tin,
Dinga thi chu:
A vahchoi chim pouve,
Vahchoina dah tumun:
Lhanpu lem lan oiyun.
2. Bang thei lou diu tonsot geiya,
Vahchoi tang thei ta lou diu:
Thisan pon bang sil’in lengun,
Hinna lukhuh a neiyui.
3. Kei jong leiya kalen lai hin,
Calvary lhanga lengin:
Chonphat na von chamkim sil’un,
Gal len jong dou thei tange.
4. Kajo teng le vahchoi tange,
Tonsot lal lungset loupi:
Chonse kei dinga thipa chu,
Ken vahchoi chim ta lou ding.
Reference: L.T. No.204
1. Peogal gam nom le ka Pakai:
Lungset hung lang ding chu:
Galdot jingding lhepna huipi,
Leiset thim lah-a hin.
Ajou-le lhepna meipi le,
Thimjin abei phat le
Kilang jeng ding A-ngailut na,
Kipa hin twi khuh chu.
2. Leiset thu noh jouse dalhan,
Lungset Pakai dei um:
Lem ka ngah lei kipa chullou,
Van lathah ngei sah ding.
3. Leiset thunoh lah a Pakai,
Na lungset min loupi:
Vahchoi kim jou lou Lhandampu,
Ka set nan ei dalle.
Reference: L.T. No.222
1. Tahsanin gah venge alange Van loupi,
Ka gentheina leiset gamthip ’a konin:
Hinna twi lonna gam o-lungset na gam chu,
I tih le kalhung dem galvon ka koina ding.
2. Leiset gimna-a hin vah-le sot ta ponge,
Kho vah ding ahitai kaki choldo-na ding:
Chu niloupi nile van Mitheng te ho to,
Kelngoi nou thasa chu la’n vahchoi tauvinge.
3. Tuhin kap jengjong leng luigal gamnom’a chun,
Kipah-in mu tange loupisa gol ngaite;
Lhandampu angsunga chu lengkhom tau vinge,
Kikhen kit pouvinge; kap kit tapou vinge .
4. Kalung gentheina kipa nan le hen,
I tih le hi dingham ka Pakai hung loiyin:
Leiya lhenchomte le van Mitheng jouse jong,
Mukal ka ngah lel’e peogal gamnom’a chun .
5. Chu gam nom’a chun kai ngai kim soh tan te,
Leiset hi dalhang ting kicholdo tang kate,
Ni akem’in phat anaitai kipana ni.
Vah le sot taponge kap sot tapong kate.
Reference: L.T. No.237
1. Eden pahhoi chulsa nousah kit dingin,
Vannoi huhhingpu ahungpeng tai;
Peogal gam hinnom ichankit thei nauvin;
Leng chungnung penin mun neopen alhengtai.
Kipah u te chamna leng hungpeng hi,
Alemnan lei le van thongsoh hen;
Hibang lom a idiuva leng dei umhi,
Apeng tai, pengkit talou ding tonsot in.
2. Malai mite in kipah in mu atup,
Mulou vin sang tamtah alemtai;
Lal lunglhai kum kipa um huhhingna,
Eihon imu theiju chan vangpha ihiu.
3. Tunung, tuma vannoi mi minsah lah a,
Huhhingpu dang him peng talou ding,
Malai mithengpen Simon bangtah a,
Mu a kipah chu mi vangpha pen ahi.
4. Leile vana simjou lou mipi lah a.
Alpha chungnung deh e Lhandampu;
Israel ten adeimou va apai sao chu,
Vanlal goulu peogal songlu ka changtai.
Reference: L.T. No.323
1. Pakai kei hoilanga che tangem,
O kei nei neihil’in:
Nathu tah neihet doh sah kit’in,
O kei neihil’in nalam dih.
O Pakai... Lhagaovin,
Kalunga thu sei kit’in:
Pakai na Lhagao chu,
Kalung sunga hin hung cheng’in
2. Nathu dih-a kon kagam la tai,
O neipui naiyin:
Lunga gel’in kei hungthei ponge,
Naban thahat chun neikaiyin.
3. Nangma jen din kana kiphal’in,
Hatmo na-anga:
Tun nadin sonlel mel kaputai,
Naban thahat chun neikaiyin.
4. Thutah-a chonphat le chonnem’in,
O kei neivon’in:
Lei lungngai ho dalha soh- ing ting,
Kumkhon nangma jen jing tange.
Reference: L.T. No.298
1. Gam minthang kisei chul ngailou,
Pakaiyin asem gam nom chu:
Sun le jan um ta lou hel ding,
Zion khopi nom tah a chun.
Van Jerusalem khopi chu,
Gilkel dangchah kisei kit lou ding:
Nile lha le Ahsi vah ngai lou,
Kelngoi chu a vah jing jeng e.
2. Pakai na gam theng nom a chun ,
Thina huipi nung ta lou ding:
Mitlhi long a kikhen kitna,
Um talou ding na gam a chun.
3. Hiche vannoi genthei mun a,
Thi na gam ka no jing lai hin:
Lung dong a ka genthei kom le,
Pakai nangin nei lha monin.
Reference: L.T. No.305
1. Lungset them Pakai neihung villin,
Lhamonna o kanei jou tapoi:
Nang lou lungmonna ken neijou lou,
Neihung villin o ka Pakai deitah.
Ka van in nom’a (2),
Neihung puiyin ei Lhandampu:
Ka van in nom’a.
2. Genthei lengvai ka kana o hi
Na ngailutna thun neihung lhem ’in:
Ka pet ka haiya nang kamu teng,
Hinna thinglim noiya kichol donge.
3. Chemasa ngaite to kimu ding
Einem jing jenge kalunga hin,
Golngai te kimdel in lengun te,
Nei lhut loiyin o ka Pakai deitah.
Reference: L.T. No.316
1. Nei ngaidam in O Pakai nei ngaidam in,
Katoh ding helou vin sottah kana ume:
Kei changseh dingin bou kana gel’e,
Nei ngaidam’o Pakai nei ngaidam ’in.
Keima jeh -in lhagau simsen lou,
A mangthah tai torisot thim noiya hin:
Na anga ipi kasei ding ham?
Nei ngaidam ’o Pakai nei ngaidam ’in.
2. Na huhhingna thu man beiyin kamu tai,
Ka hinkho simsen louvin nei vangboh-e:
Hinla ka changin bou kana mangchai,
Nei ngaidam’ O Pakai nei ngaidam’in.
3. Ka kipana pen lhagau tamtah huhhing,
Ka tohding khoh pen hinna thupha seiphong:
Hinla lhagau khatbeh ka hin lhut poi,
Nei ngaidam’ O Pakai nei ngaidam in.
4. Na kouna hi haimil thei ding kahipoi,
Na thupeh lenpen kipana thupha hi:
Na Lhagau Theng in neipui jingin lang ,
Nangma a din ka kiphal tai Pakai.
Reference: L.T. No. 317
1. Lei nopna hi mang jong le
Ka monna nang na hi O Pakai:
Ka kisel na jong nang na hi,
Na lhagaovin nei umpi jing jeng in,
O nei chang lha loujenin,
Ka monna nahi:
Vo ka- Pakai hi leiset na hin,
Nang lou monna dang ken neilou.
2. Chul ding ka leiset hinkho,
Hung mangloi ding pahbang ka hinkho hi:
Mola lep in tin mol tan te,
Koukit thei hilou twi bang in along.
3. Ka hinkho twibang along,
Nei changlha lou jenin O Pakai:
Gentheiya lengvai ka nahi,
Neipanpin Pakai lam nei hil jing in.
Reference: L.T. No. 324
1. Phat ka nei jousea hin Pakai vahchoi jing ding,
Ka kamsung jong hi Pakai vahchoina hihen:
Pakai vahchoi tailou keiman kipana dang nei lou,
O ngeitah in vahchoi jing e.
Pakai ka hollin Aman eihou tai,
Kagin jouse a kon eihuh tai:
Lengvai genthei kei eihuhhingpa Pakai Jesu,
Kahin kum khon vahchoi tang e.
2. Ka Pakai nangma ginglou mi hi jong leng,
Neichang lha loujenin hinlai damsunga hin:
Nagam hung lhun kahsen nang in neipom jing in pakai,
Vahchoi jing ding hinlai khankhon,
3. Tanglouva phat na le hepinan ka hinkho,
Lhumkeiya ei jui ding hinlai damsunga hin:
Kei jong tonsot a dia Pakai ang sung a ka chen ding,
Chuteng kipana kim tante.
Reference: L.T. No. 332
1. Leiset gol ngaite kikhena dingin,
Kol ninou a soh kit tai, damsel un. (2)
2. Leiset chunga hin lungmonna um lou,
Set nan nitin ’in eiju, kiging un. (2)
3. Ni khat kipah- in nop lasa jong leng,
Lily pah amol bangin, amole. (2)
4. I kikhen diu hi leiset a- nguiye
Gam le go a- ngui joutai, chetan gol. (2)
5. Van gam nom’a chun kikhenna um lou
Chua kimu to gingchan , ka lhauve. (2)
Reference: L.T. No. 180
1. Pathen in mopoh na lenpen chu
Vo! Mipate nangma napei;
Insung le Houbung semphat ding hi
Pate mopoh na ahi.
Mopoh na lenpen chang Paten vephan,
Na inneipi le nachate chu;
Hoilai mun geiya hitam?
Ajo le Egypt ah dalhan nate.
2. Noah chun a-in sung mi cheng se,
Sochat na kongsung-a lhut;
Nangin jong na insung mite chu,
Na sochat sah soh nadem ?
3. Joshua le a insung mite chun,
Lungkhat tah in Pakai ajen;
Nangma le na insung miten jong,
Pakai najen lou ding ham ?
Reference: PATE LAPI
Hong it Topa Zeisu nuntak tawntungna hi,
Hehpihna leh itna tawh kidim hi
Lungdam in la ka sa lungmuangin ka om ta,
Kei kha muanna ka Topa Jesuh hi.
Hong itna thei lecin, hong ngaihna thei lecin,
Nang zong sang nuamlo in om kei ni teh
Na theihloh man hizaw, Na telloh man hi zaw,
En dihve na kha a ding hilo maw.
Sanggam aw hih leitung a ding bang Na geel ngei hiam?
Na khantawn a ding zong na geel ngei hiam!
Ki sathei kha kei in na khangdawng hoih lai in,
Tuate paak bang vul ding na phawk thei hiam?
A kimuh theih lai-in a hong nai om lai in,
Hong tung ding na zon hang na muhloh hun,
Hong tunma tu-mah in, Amah nial nawn kei-in,
En dih ve na kha a dingin hong kun.
En ven ka tenna gamnuam, Leimi te a teel zawhloh,
Mizawng mipoite leh tagahte nopsakna gam,
Kei hong simmawh kha ke’n maw,Inn leh lo ka neihloh hang,
Lei inn sang a pha zaw, vanah inn nuam ka nei hi
Ngaklah veng, tua khuapi ka tun hun ding,
To Jesuh a khutpawn ka let ni ciang
Lungdamna khituite a luang dinga,
Kei hong honpa aw ci’n lungdamin la ka sa ding
En ven tuuno anglai ah, melsia mipoi tampi te,
Vanmi bang mel etlawm Topa’n bawlpha khinzo ta,
Lei ah ih kosiat nate kham lukhu in khuta uh,
A lu tung tee ziahziah, suangmanpha tawh kizem hi.
Sihna hanmual hong liamsan,A paisa it leh ngaih te’n,
Hih lei gentheihna gam, nusia in hong pai un ci,
Kei ngai in kap kei unla, kei omna ah hong pai un,
Ih tun ding hong ngaklahVan khuapi pan khut hong van,
Gupna bukim hong pia Jehovah Pasian,
Dikna tawh hong tuam Jehovah Tsidkenu,
Hong ompih tawntung Jehovah shamah
Lungnopna Jehovah Shalom.
Hong hausak hi,
ka sapna teng hong sikJehovah Jireh,
Hong damsak Pasian Jehovah Rapha
Ama min a ding thuman lampi ah hong kha
Jehovah Ra-ah,
Gualzawhna hong pia ka Topa
Jehovah Nissi
Topa’n hiteh hong cih leh hipah hiteh,
Topa’n neiteh hong cih leh a nei hi teh,
Topa’n bawlthei hong cih leh hipah hi.
Vangliatna khempeuh hong piazo.
Topa’n damteh hong cih leh a dam hiteh,
Topa’n hauteh hong cih leh a hau hiteh,
Sih ding nat ding launa pan hong gum hi,
Singlamteh tung’h hong thuaksakzo.
Mi nuamsa in mi nuam sa in,
Sun leh zan in Topa thu lungngai mi hi
A nopsakna in Topa thu sung bek hi,
A tawntungin Topa tungah lungdam hi.
Gunngei a kisuan singkung bang hi a,
A teh vullo, a gah hunin gah den a,
A sepna peuh ah, tangtungin nuamsa hi,
Sun leh zan in a thu ngai leng nuam ka sa.
Ih Topa hoih hi, ih Topa hoih hi,
Thupha hong pia ka kha tha hong dimsak hi.
Kei hong damsak hi, hauhna tawh hong tuam hi.
Gual zote tung’h gualzo pente ih hi hi.
Lungdam kohna tawh, lungdam kohna tawh
Tatsa lo in Topa hoihna gengen ning
A thu lungngai leng lungngai leng nuam semsem
A hoihna gen, gengen ning phat tawntung ning.
Pasian ta Zeisu Khazih kapom ka up ciangin,
Pasian ta cihna thu kangah,
Satan ta panin Pasian ta ka hizo,
Kei tangin ka To Zeisu hong thuaksak hangin
(Cho)Pasian ta ka hizo, Topa kaphat den ding,
Leitung mi’n hong theihpih loh hangin,
Vantungmi sak theihloh sisan manphat na la
Vantung kham khua sungah zong hih la kasa ding hi.
Hot khiatna omkei leh, sing tung’h thah ding ka hi,
Sing lamteh mimawh sih na’ng hi,
A hih hang Zeisu’n, kei ma mawhna tang in,
Sihna mual singlamteh tung’h kikhen khin zo ta,
Ka mawhna a tam hang, Zeisu ka up ciangin
A si in ka mawh sawp siang zo,
Kei septheih omlo, hong hehpih na hangin,
Tua sisan hang mawhnei pi midik ka tang ta,
Hehpih na’n upna tawh gupna kangah khin zo
Tawntung mun ding ka nei zota,
Leitung mi’n theilo, A lam dang tatna thu
A tawntung Topa minphat na’ng langaih ka neita
A tawntung ka kumpipa,A tawntung ka lawmpa,
A tawntung gualzawhna hong pia,
Nisim lam hong lak a, nisim tha hong dim,
Nisim gualzawhna hong pia.
(Buai na veng mang veh)2
Ka lawmpa ka kumpipa ka phat tak teh,
Pasian gam leh ama dikna zong masa leng
Ani ani in nuam semsem.
Vantung gam kham khuapi nuam,A tawntung tang zihziah,
It leh ngaih te’tual len gam,
Eite hong dawn dingin, nisim kiging den uh,
Nuam zen si’n teh tua mun nuam.
Hun hoih hun nuam hong musak,
Hun kilawm hong ngahsak,
Hun manpha sung’h hong tonpih ka To,
Zum leh hiam pan’n hong hem,
Lauh huaina pan hong keem,
Cidam takin a minpha ka lo.
Lungdam si’ng, hunpha sungah,Ka Topa’n lam hong pi,
Na si-pha tawh hong naisak in,
Nang omna peuh lungnopna ka nunna’n vang nei,
Nong itna kei sungah, mei bangin lum den hen,
Hallelujah a minthang hen.
Silh leh ten an leh tui dawn, nisim hong sik hong vak,
A bei theilo hehpihna thupha,
Ka kha a ding zong hong lui, Thu leh la tawh hong vak
Hi ci bangin hong luang a thupha.
Lono hing silsial bangin, unok paak palh bangin,
Ka nuntakna hong nosuak sak zel,
Pahtawi dingin kilawm pen phat dingin zong hoih pen,
Ka khatha hong dimzel, hong dimzel.
A bei theilo hehpihna leh,
itna in kizom den a,
Zing nisuak bangin thakzel a,
ni a suah pelmawh bang hi.
Itna kip leh hehpihna in, mihingta te tungah,
Nabawl lamdang nate hangin,Topa nang kong phat uhhi.
Leivui panin nong lamto a ninphual paninnong domto hi.
Pahtawina leh minthan na tawh Ka nunna nong heisak hi.
Nang na hoih hi, nang na hoih hi,
Na itna kip tawntung hi,
Na kilawm hi, na kilawm hi
,Phat dingin na kilawm hi.
Nang na lian hi, na thuman hi,
Nang tawh kibang omlo hi.
Nong lahsa thulamdang te hang,
Ka dai om mawk thei kei hi.
Van leh lei piangsak Pasian, Ni leh kha piang sak Pasian,
Ka nuntakna a hong bawl ka Pasian,
Nitaang leh guahtui hong pia, tuk ciangin an hong la sak,
Na vangliatna kong phat hi ka Pasian.
Topa aw ka lungdam hi, Nisim nong lungdam sak hi,
Ka hin’ lai teng na min ka phat den ding,
Tumging tawh nang kong phat ding,Lamna tawh nang kong phat ding,
Halelujah na minthang den ta hen.
Tu ni in kei a dingin hun hoih hunnuam hong kipia,
Topa’ tung’ lungdamna ka ko ding hi.
Lungdam koh biakna pia in Topa ka pahtawi ding hi,
Ka hatna teng tawh a min ka phat ding.
Khat veivei nek ding neilo, khat veivei silh ding neilo,
Ahi zong Topa hoihna ka phawk hi,
Van a leng vasate leh gamlak unok paakte in,
Ka nunna nisim in tha hong dim zel.
Vang liatna kangah khina,
Pasian ta ka hih nung sang
Lungdamna koh ding sim loh,
Leibat dang ke’n neinawn keng.
Hong hon ding khat zong neilo,
Khitui luang ka om laitak,
Ka khitui hong nulsak a,
A ang sung kei hong pomta,
Natna in kei hong tuam in,
Hong veh ding ka neihloh lai,
Thoto in na dam zo hi,
Hong cih man ka damsiang ta,
Tu’n keipawh patau nawn ke’ng,
Mawh maisak pa nei zo ing,
Mawhna in kei hong zol hang,
Jesuh hang gupna ngah tang.

songs.title: NA THU SUNGAH NUAM SA ING

lines: (Na thu sungah nuamsa ing)2
Na thu sung bek mah lam-etna nei ing.
Mitte vaksak in lungsim nuam sak hi.
Na thu sungah Topa kei hong kha in.
Na thu in lam hong lak meivak hi, (Halelu-ah)
Ka pai na lampi khua hong vak sak hi.
A lamdang nate ka muhtheih nang in,
Na thu sungah, Topa kei hong kha in.
Mihing te’ nuntakna in an leh tui bek hilo hi,
Pasian kammal thutak tawh nungta hi,
Hih thu a theih nangin Mana tawh vak hi,
Sehnel gamah Topa in thuhilh hi.
(Topa a muang khempeuh te)2
Zan a ihmut kal in hong cing ding hi.
Na khanlawh ciang zong hong hopih ding hi,
Na gamtatzia ding zong hong hilh ding hi.
(Na thu sungah nuamsa ing)2
Na thu sung bek mah lam-etna nei ing.
Mitte vaksak in lungsim nuam sak hi.
Na thu sungah Topa kei hong kha in.
Na thu in lam hong lak meivak hi, (Halelu-ah)
Ka pai na lampi khua hong vak sak hi.
A lamdang nate ka muhtheih nang in,
Na thu sungah, Topa kei hong kha in.
Mihing te’ nuntakna in an leh tui bek hilo hi,
Pasian kammal thutak tawh nungta hi,
Hih thu a theih nangin Mana tawh vak hi,
Sehnel gamah Topa in thuhilh hi.
(Topa a muang khempeuh te)2
Zan a ihmut kal in hong cing ding hi.
Na khanlawh ciang zong hong hopih ding hi,
Na gamtatzia ding zong hong hilh ding hi.
Topa in kei hong cing tuucing lianpa hi,
Ka nun sung bangmah ka kisam kei ding hi,
Lono na mun tui kiangah kei hong kha hi,
Ka nuntakna tha hong dim sak tawntung hi.
Hoihna leh hehpihna in ka khan sung,
A tawntungin hong zui taktak dinga,
Anuam a taang Topa inn pha sungah,
Amah tawh ka om den ding hi.
Sihna lim guam sung na ngawn ka nawk hangin,
Hong cing ahih ma’n siatna ka lau kei hi,
A molhtum leh a ciangkhut in kei a hi.
A tawntungin ka lungmuanna ahi hi.
Ka galte omna mai ah kei a dingin,
Sabuai phah in an hong lui in hong vak hi
Keima lu zong sathau hong nilh sak den a,
Ama kiangah bang ka ngen lai khong ding hiam!
Lawp gige ing zingsang khat peuh ciang
Gabriel pengkul tum ke’n za ning,
Sinawnlo ding ka khanlawh ciang
It huai tanpa mu ding ka dawnteh,
Lungdam awng in lei nusia ning
Sinawnlo ding ka khanlawh ciang
(Sinawnlo ding) Zingsang khat peuh ciang
(Ka khanlawh ciang) Suang manpha kizem,
(Lungdam si ning) Minthanna gamah,
(Vantung khuapi ah) Hih thu sutsut ning,
A khang akhang a tatsa mite tawh,
Amah bia in phat khawm ta ding,
Sinawnlo ding ka khanlawh ciang.
Mitphiat kal sungin pumthak nei ning,
Pasian a minthang den ta hen,
Sinawnlo ding ka khanlawh ciang
,Tua khuapi ka zuat toh tak ciangin
,Dahna teng mangpha khak ning ke’n,
Sinawnlo ding ka khanlawh ciang.
A ki tansa minam khempeuh tawh,
Vantung hoihna ke’n velvel ning,
Sinawnlo ding ka khan lawh ciang,
Tuidam luanna singkung dum gei-ah,
Khawlna ding mun ke’n ka mu ding,
Singnawnlo ding ka khanlawh ciang.
Tunglam ka ettoh leh van dumpi ka mu a,
Mualdawn meeiluumkai-te vanmong bang ka mu a,
Ahih hang ka muh nailoh, genzawhloh in tam a,
Hih thu ka ngaihsut ciang, Topa bangzah na lian,
Tua hi a, Topa aw kong phat hi
Na hihna bangin hong phat ning, Na khempeuhte na khut sung,
A patna leh a tawpna, Vanglian khut in len,
Hih thu ka ngaihsut ciang Topa bangzah na lian
Hih leitung bangmah lo tungah a kaisak hi.
Sun in ni zan in kha aksi te tang sak hi,
Amaute a hun zui in ki hei diamdiam uh hi,
Hih thu ka ngaihsut ciang Topa bangzah na lian.
Vantung vannuai mun khempeuh ah nang na om hi.
Tuipi thuk sung nangawnah zong na ki zel hi.
Na thu sung na koihsate damdam nong musak a
,Hih thu ka ngaihsut ciang, Topa bangzah na lian.
Topa nang om na peuh ah, ka kha in zong nuam sa hi.
Vul in kun ka kha kun cih om ngei lo.
Z ing dai momlai pak palh bang lung tai et lawm nuih mai in.
Nang om na peuh ka kha in nuam sa hi.
Nang om na peuh ka kha in nuam sa hi.
Sun le zan a tawntung in.
Kei kha muanna nang na hi.
Topa nang om na peuh ah lungnop suahtakna om hi
.Huatna, enna, kitot na om ngei lo.
Sun kim ka lunggulh pen nang, zangciang ka zalmang na hi.
Nang om na peuh ka kha in nuam sa hi.
Topa nang om na peuh ah, lawm hoih khat nei gige ing,
Nang ma sung lo bukna ding dang omlo.
Sep na peuhah lung kim na, hei na peuh ah mai tai na,
Nang om na peuh ka kha in nuam sa hi.
Ka gumpa le ka Topa, ka belh suangpi nang na hi.
Nisim hongliah hongdal ka suangpi aw.
Cimawh meigong tangahte,A ding lawm hoih pen na hi.
Nang om na peuh ka kha in nuamsa hi.
Topa Zeisu’n hih bang thugen, manlang in kong paikik ding hi,
Mi siangtho te hongpi ding in,
Thu um misi te thoto ding, mitphial kalsung in ki khel ding,
Kham innpi sungah vabang in leng to ding.
Va bang in kei ka leng ding hi’
Nisuah nitum sak leh khang pan,
Thu um mite ki kaikhawm ding,
Kham innpi ah vabang in leng to ding.
Jerusalem kham khuathak ah, vantung mite ki kaikhawm in,
Thu um mite tawh kimu ding,
(Hallelujah)4 Lungdam kipak in Pasian phat den ding.
Kham innpi ah kei ka tung ding, Topa’n khitui hong nulsak ding,
Natna sihna te om nawn lo,
(Hallelujah)4 Lungdam kipak in Pasian phat den ding.
Mi siangte totsa a tang a kawcik lampi khat om ei,
Ih mai ah a paisa gal hang te’n bawlsiatna thuak hi.
Hong pina leh a gualzawhna te hangin na lungdam leh,
Khukdin in lungdamna ko aw, nangah thupha hangin.
Nuam aw, paakte leh singkungte hangin,
Nuam aw, mualte leh tuipite hangin,
Nuam aw, nang leh kei hong hinsak man in,
Koi koi om ta le teh nuam aw.
Hih leitungah dahna gentheihna leh huaihamna dim ei,
A kang ngeilo ciktui om a, sapna teng kicing sak hi,
Topa kamciamna muang peuh leng, mikim a ding kicing ei,
Na thupha simsim lel dih in, A dang na nget ma in,
Topa hong vaikhaksa bangin a lampialte maisak aw,
Bang hih cih theilo ahih man’ amawh maisak in cizen,
Amau te’n zong tel uh hi leh a nunna kikhel lel ding,
Amau ten na sanggam hi cih phawk in la huh khial ke’n

songs.title: VAN MITE SAK THEIH LOH LA

lines: Van mite’n ka lungdam lam hong theipih kei,
’Sisan tawh a maumawhna sawp kullo pi,
Vantungah la a sak uh hangin khat vei,
Lamdang itna la ka sak ciang daitak ngai ding uhhi.
Tua siangtho van mite saktheihloh la in,
Lamdang itna ke’n ngaih lua sa’ng,
Tua siangtho van mite sak theihloh la in,
Hong kimu zo ka gam man hang.
Van mite’n la a sa Topa siangtho hi,
Pasian tokhom mai-ah lasa den keei veh,
Amau la ka sakpih ding bel lamdang kei,
Hong it manin la ka sak pih lam bel thei kei unteh.

songs.title: PIA IN HONG DIM DING HI

lines: Na thuphate sim dih in, khat khit khat ngaihsun dihve,
Pasian in a tampi hong piak na thei ve leh,
Na neek ding leh na piak ding zong hong sik lailai ai ve,
Pia in mi nuamsa na hih lam kithei niteh.
(Pia in (Hong dim ding hi))2
Ngahna sangin piakna ah, thupha om zaw hi,
Na sum omna mun ah, na lungsim om ding hi,
Pia in pia in na lungdam, na lungdam ding hi.
Meigongnu sathau um sung,Sathau sawh khat zong om lo,
A piak manin thupha luang a zah tampi,
Kial sung tawntung sathau um,Sathau tawh kilawi nawnlo,
Nang zong pia in Topa hoihna na mu ding hi.
A cinghte hau semsem ven, Acilte zawng semsem ve,
Piakkhiatna in itna hi, Pasian dan hi veh,
Cimawh genthei mizawngte,Meigong tagah dongtuakte,
Piakna tawh itna lak in kisik kei niteh.
Piaknoplohna tawh thupha kongvangte ki khak thei a,
Hazatna leh iksikna tawh hong khem thei hi.
A phalte khang semsem ding, a itte kiam semsem ding
Neih man a piak hilo a, phal man hi zaw hi.

songs.title: AW A LAM DANG ITNA LIAN

lines: Mi mawh kahih laitak in, galte kahih laitak in,
A sipha tawh kei hong lei in hong dam sak,
Ka vangik teng hong zang, ka lungdamna hong ki dang,
Aw a lamdang itna lian kei sungah.
Aw a lamdang itna lian, Aw a lamdang itna lian,
Calvary panin hong luang Halelujah Praise the Lord,
Ih lungdamna tangthu, ih gualzawhna sut dih ni,
Aw a lamdang itna lian kei sungah
Ka maawhna a tam hangin, ka khialhna a tam hangin,
Tua te sangin hong hehpihna lian zaw lai,
Hihthu mah khumpen sang,Hihthu mahmah ngaihpen sang,
A khum penpen khuaizu sangin khum zawlai
Ka lametna kip semsem, Ka lungmuanna kho semsem,
Zeisu hoihna tawh nisim in kei hong zem,
Hih thu katheih nungsang, upna taawh ka san nungsang
Kei sungah hongdim semsem ka tel semsem.
Pasian minthang semsem hen,Pasian’gam zai semsem hen,
Vantung nopna mikim sungah hong tung hen,
Tua a lamdang lungnopna, Ih gualzawhna la ngaih pen,
Leitung mimal tungah hong kizeel ta hen.
Tuivot ciim in dangtak mite a lungdam sak bangin,
Bawlsiatna thuak lungtamkham mite,
Hotkhiatna lampi tawnin hong paikhiat pih tak ciangin
Lungdam luan’n a manguh bang liang ee,
Tua bang ngeingei, tuan bang ngeingei
Sihna leh hell panin Topa’n hong honkhia,
Na mite hauhna kham leh ngun tawn na paikhiatpih bang ngei,
Kei a dingin Zeisu hong kipia.
San tuipi kantansak in leikeu tawn na paipih a,
Sun in meiipi zanin mei khuampi,
A puansilhte uh sialo, a khe uh zong bawklo a,
Cidam in a zawngkhal omlo hi.
Bawlsiatna thuakin thumin nakpi’n hong kiko ciang un,
Na kamciam thute na phawk kik a,
Na nasem Abraham leh nangma min na khualna in,
Amaute hehpih in na honkhia.
Amaute vakvai in khualmi bangin a omlai un,
Top’n kuamah nenniam saklo hi,
Kumpite thuhilh in ka kamsangte sukha kei un,
Ci in a mite hu in kem hi.
Sa ngen in vamim sa pia vantung an lumte khiat a,
Neek ding kitasam sak ngei lo hi,
Dawn ding tui suangpi pan phul guntui bangin luang sak a,
Lungdam lasa kawm in paipih hi.
Ka lungmuanna khat om, Lua ke’n kata aw ci,
