Hong thapia aw neem khat ka za,
Na lampi kong honsak lungkhamna kuampite,
Lametna kongpi kong suaksak ding.
Lau peuh mah ken ka ta aw,
Vangliatna khempeuh kong pia zo,
Kei na hong up uh leh keima bawl sang lian zaw,
Na bawl thei ding uh hi, ka kammalte nungkik lo.
Kha siangtho in hong sawl, Topa minthanna ding,
Na khutte tung’h vangliatna kong koih,
Na mukte hong lawngin, ka thu leh ka kammalte,
Kong koihsak khinzo hi, lau kei in.
Na guallehna lampi, gualzawhna tawh na tawn ding,
Thahat inla hangin hong ci,
Lauke’n la lungkia ke’n,
Na mai ah gualzawhna inHong ngak cih tel inla lau kei in
Lamdang lua aw lamdang lua sang liangvai kei a ding,
Dahna khitui hong nulsiang ta, nuamna vive dim ta,
Hong itna tel semsem leng, nuamna khitui hong luang,
Leitung hauhna sang manpha zaw, nopna kei a hi ta
.Aw Zeisu a kha siangtho hong leeng Zeisu
Inn kuan sung hong om ciang,
Nu leh pa’n zong lasa khawmta, tate zong hong lamta,
Ih inn kuan in lasa khawm leng, Buaina lah om nawn lo.
Kitot kiselna om nawnlo, nuamna vive dimta,
Nu pa kal zong hng nuam semsem, kha sung bualkhawm leng,
Tu leh tate masuan in, biak inn lam pai khawmta,
Kitten kum lah hong tam semsem, Ngaih meel lah hoih semsem
Thangvan laukha siangtho hong leeng,Kawl gam hong phong dingin
Vangliatna dim itna khut tawh, tuailai teng hong man ta,
Enven hia lai khangnote biak inn ah hong laam ta,
Hunkhat lai a a mangthangsa ih tate ai ve leh.

songs.title: KA NUNNA HONG BAWL HOIH SAK

lines: Lam et bei ka om lai, lungmuanna hong tung a,
Ka mai ah meiivompi hong kai in ka lampi,
Mial in a lauhuai hang khuavak ni hong tang ta,
Kei a ding hong pai Zeisu kumpi.
Kei tang a ding hong sihlawh ka Topa’n
Tawntung nunna lampi hong tun zo
Kei tang a ding hong suplawh ka Topa’n,
Ka nuntakna hong bawl hoih sak zo
Pheiphung suan kham in bah, mitguite kham in zeu,
Khat veivei lei gawtak tui omlohna gam ah
,Singkung bang ka nunna, huihkhi dam sem in keu,
Ka om lai tak Zeisu hong delh pah.
Kei tang dingin hong ding, kei tang ding hong kithawi,
Kei thuak ding teng hong thuak, kei septangin hong sem
Kei a ding hong thumsak kei tangin mawhlawh tawi
,Siattutna teng a ma’n tual in lem

songs.title: VAN A PA AW KONG PAHTAWI UH HI

lines: //Van a pa aw nang kong pahtawi uh hi//
Hong it ung, hong bia ung,
Na mai ah hong kun ung
Van a pa aw nang kong pahtawi uh hi
//Pasian ‘ ta aw namin hong liansak ung//
Mawhna pan nongsawp a
Khasiangtho nong guan hi
Pasian ‘ ta aw namin hong liansak ung
//Khasiangtho Lamdang hehnempa na hi//
Ka lampi nong hilh a,
Ka sungah nong teng hi
Khasiangtho Lamdang hehnempa na hi
Huntawp a Topa muh ciang, A phatna la ih sak ciang,
Tuani gualzawhna a sangpen hi ding.
Mi dikte tawh khatvei ciang,Gal khat munnuam ih tun ciang,
Tuani gualzawhna a sangpen hi ding.
Tuani gualzawhna a sangpen a sangpen hi ding,
Tua ni gualzawhna a sang pen hi ding
Kumpipa inn ih tun ciang,Hosiana cin ihsak ciang,
Tuani gualzawhna a sangpen hi ding.
Mi siangte tawh khatvei ciang,Kham kongzing ih zuih khop ciang,
Tuani gualzawhna a sangpen hi ding
Van mite tawh khatvei ciangTawntung la I sak khop ciang
Tuani gualzawhna sang pen hi ding
Haksatna teng hong bei ciang,Kumpi lukhu ih ngah ciang
Tuanni gualzawhna a sangpen hi ding,
A tawntung mun ih tun ciang,Kumpipa mai I din ciang,
Tuani gualzawhna a sangpen hi ding.
Topa mite, Topa a te, lei pian mapek a keteel sa te,
Topa mite, Topa a te, lei pian mapek a keteel sa te,
Ni dangin gamlapi ah ka om ngei hangin,
Tu’n Zeisu sisan hangin Pasian kiang tung zo,
Zeisu singlamteh hangin khualmi zong hilo,
Pasian inn kuanpih khat ka hi zo
Na kha a ding huihdik in thungen tawntung in,
Na kha a ding an ahi Lai Siangtho sim in,
Na kha a ding thasan in Topa’ nasem in,
Tua in Christian nuntakna ai ve.
Kha thupha ngahna dingin, hehpih phatna te,
Kha thupha luanna dingin, thupha bawlna te,
Kha sung suahtakna dingin, laamna dianna te
Tua te’n damna zatui bang ai ve
Carmel mual ah Pasian gualzawhna te mu dingin,
Hong pai mite Topa’n thupha hong pia hen,
Elijah bang Pasian gualzawhna te mu dingin,
Carmel mualah Topa’n thupha hong pia hen.
Sa un, Hallelujah la sa un,
Carmel Pasian mite gualzawhna,
Sangpen Topa gualzawhna hangin na lungdam leh,
Nuam un Hallelu Hallelujah.
Kha khanlawhna mei bangin hong tawhkik in Topa,
Kha siangtho aw hih munah kong muak uh hi.
Ko aa dingin na lamdang leh na vangliatna te,
Hong musak in na thupha kong muak uh hi.
Topa a ding khut kilen in nasem khawm ve ni,
Na septheih bang Top’n thupha hong pia hen,
Na septhei bang Topa min tawh kong sang zo uh hi
Topa gamzaina dingin pang ciat ve ni.
Jehovah Shalom nopna Pasian ka up ka san a kipan,
Telzawhloh lungnopna nei tang,
Nisim hih leitung nunna sungah, Nopna dahna ka thuak zong,
Ka nopna Jehovah Shalom
(Aw nuam sing Topa tungah)2
Lungdamna la thak Topa kong sak ding,
Jesuh tawh ka kimuta, a hoihna ka telsiangta,
Kei a ding ka bangkim Jehovah Pasian.
Ka mawhna khempeuh hong maisak Pa,
Natna teng hong damsak Pa,Ka muzo Jehovah Rapha,
Hih leitung neekzon haksatna leh,
Nate hang lunghiang nawn keng,
Ka zawhna Jehovah Nissi.
Jehovah Jireh hong sik Pasian,Tu ciangciang hong huh Topa
,Kei a ding amah hoihpen hi.
Ama vangliatna sung om hauhna
,Ka sapna teng hong cingsak,
Hong sikpa Jehovah Jireh.
(Na thu sungah nuamsa ing)2
Na thu sung bek mah lam-etna nei ing.
Mitte vaksak in lungsim nuam sak hi.
Na thu sungah Topa kei hong kha in.
Na thu in lam hong lak meivak hi, (Halelu-ah)
Ka pai na lampi khua hong vak sak hi.
A lamdang nate ka muhtheih nang in,
Na thu sungah, Topa kei hong kha in.
Mihing te’ nuntakna in an leh tui bek hilo hi,
Pasian kammal thutak tawh nungta hi,
Hih thu a theih nangin Mana tawh vak hi,
Sehnel gamah Topa in thuhilh hi.
(Topa a muang khempeuh te)2
Zan a ihmut kal in hong cing ding hi.
Na khanlawh ciang zong hong hopih ding hi,
Na gamtatzia ding zong hong hilh ding hi.
Pasian gam leh dikna Pasian thu leh deihna,
Thupi tak ngaihsun dih ni
,Leitung nate sangin, thu dangdangte sangin,
Zong masa zaw le cin,Tua nate tawh hong pia khawm ding hi,
Sul hong hei vaw sanggam aw,Sianmang sinthu
anbang kumkhawm in ah,Amai zong dih ni.
Vanman tam a, ih lungkham na te,Zeisu zawhna sungah
hong tui suak ding hi.Van daituite hong luang ding hi.
A thu sung kibual leng, a kha sung kibual lengAma thu ah lungkim leng,
Ih lunggulhnate thei, ih tangsap nate nei,Ih ngaihsutna sangin,
hong pia nuam zaw,Amah muang peuh leng.
Haksatna hong tun ciang, lungkhamna hong tun ciang,
Gilkial dangtak ih thuak ciang,Pasian mai zong zaw ni,
Pasian mai en zaw ni,Midangte muan ding sang,
Zeisu kumpi muan ding hoih zaw hi.
Ih gitlohna pan in I lungsim niamkhiat in,
Ih Topa kiang zuan dih ni.Ih lungsim sungkhia in
ih mawhna pulak leng,Tua hi leh I gam sung,
thupha hong pia’nHong dam sak ding hi.
Itna tawh kei hong beel a hih man in,
A mah kahonkhia ding hi,
A mah in kamin thei a hih man in,
Munsang na ah ka koih ding hi.
A man kei hongsap ciang kadawng ding a,
Haksat na sungah nang kong ompih ding hi,
A mah honkhia in ka pahtawi ding a,
Nuntak sau tawh nang kong lungkimsak ding hi.
Nangtungah siatna na inn ah gimna,
Hong tungsak ngei lo ding hi,
Na mai ah tulkhat, na kim ah tulsawm,
Hong puk hangin na lau kei ding hi.
Sun a thaltang leng, zan a lauhuai na,
Hongsu khasak loding hi,
Topa’ liim sungah naling kei ding hi,
Vantungmi ten’ nang hong cing ding hi.
Ka mai ah lungkham cihmawh lawhsam gensiat na bek dim a,
Dawi gilo leh Satan in, hong kaih zel hang,
Jehovah Shalom in hong ngak den.
Jehovah Shalom kalungmuan na,
Jehovah Jireh ka hauhna,
Kisap ding bangmah lau keng,
Topa’n hong ompih den hi.
Hong langpan dawi gilo te’n,
Hong khemna dan ka telsiang ta,
Sihna ih pawl hilo hi, panpih kei un,
Jehovah Shalom in hong ompih.
Aw ih Topa Pasian in,
Lau kei un hong cihkhit nung sang,
Lungmuang takin omlel in,
Na mai ah ka ding den ding hong ci.
Mittaw khuamialpi sungah om in,
Leitung nopsak nate mulo mah ta leng,
To Zeisu kiangha ka tunhun ciangin,
Mittaw khuamial omlo Jerusalem thak ah.
Kipak in lasa ning, Hallelujah ci in,
Aw ken ngaklah lua ing tua munnuam bel,
To Zeisu kiangah ka tun hun ciang in,
Mittaw khuamial omlo Jerusalem thak ah.
Khebui, khutbui in melsia gawp in,
Bengngong pautheilo in poimawh mah leng,
Hong honpa kiangah katun hun ciangin,
Mipoi miphak omlo Jerusalem thak ah.
Gitlohna tawhdim hih leitung ah,
Kamel in ni sangin taang zawphial mah leng,
Tawntung nuntakna mun nuam ka luah ciang,
Gitlohna hih leitung ke’n ngai ngei nawn kei ning.
Na lungsung Topa’h thupha a dim hong piak na dingin,
Na lunggulh hiam tuni in. Na pa hongciamna muangin la,
A hongcih bang hong pai in,Taang misiangte’ pai bangin.
Na lungsung dimlet dong tuni’n hong buak ding hi.
Topa hongsawlna bangin, beel tampi hong paipih in.
Na lung sung dimlet dong tuni’n hong buak ding hi.
Khasiangtho vanglet na tawh.
Zesu sisan sianthosaksa na leibeel te hong kengin.
Hong pai un a sam dang zong .
Pasian tokhom mai ah napumpi kipia inla ngakin.
Kha siangtho hong ki buak dong.
Sathau bei ngeilo bangin hong hehpih na’n bei hun neilo.
Hong it na zong bei lo hi.
A’ hong ciamnasa bangin khasiangtho vanglian kiteh lo.
Beel khempeuh dimsak ding.
Betlenkhuaneu mite nolah ihsip ta maw.
Hong gum Zeisu hong suak hilo maw.
Tuucingte’n zong nuamin hongbia uh.
Leimi ta ding hong kipia naugek.
Tuzan kimlai a lungdamhuai bel thu.
Betlen khuasung bawngan neek na kuang sung.
Hong gum khazih Zeisu naungek
Minthanghen mi tung nopna om hen.
Kongit lawmaw tuni’n, nangsung mun a awng maw.
Honggum Zeisu naungek suak nuam hi.
Bawngkuang sunglo mundang awnglo maw.
Na lung sungah tuni’n suak sak in.
A lam dang aksipi’n mipilte lamhilh hi.
Kham leh paaknamtui tawh bia uh hi.
Kiniamkhiat a hongsuak To Zeisu.
Lungdam in eizong va bia ve ni.
Gamsa te’n luitui luang sialsial a lunggulh bang
Topa nang kong lunggulh hi.
Nangmah bek ka lungsim
deihna lehBiak dingin kong lunggulh hi.
Nangmah bek ka hatna ka lum,
Nang kiangbek ka hong kipia hi.
Nangmah bek ka lungsim leh ka deihna,
Biak dingin kong lunggulh hi.
(Lawm aw nong Zui diam tua gamah)3
kei pai ning,
(Lawm aw nong Zui diam tua gamah)2
Tua gam ah tua gam ah kei pai ning.
-Bawngnawi leh Khuai zuluang tua damah,
-itna bek omhi tua gamah,
-Zeisu kamu ding tua gam ah,
-Tua gamin Vantung hilo maw.

songs.title: KA MUAN NA ZEISU A HI

lines: Keimah ka muanna a bulpi.
Zeisu si leh sianthona hi.
A dang thu teng ka um ngamkei.
Zeisu a min bek ka um thei.
Keima dinna Zeusu suangpi
(Omna dangteng sehnel bang hi.)2
Khuamial in A mailiahciangin.
A hong heipihna ka muang ding.
Huihpi nakpi a nun ciangah.
Munliah na sungah sikkip khia.
A thuciam nate a ma si.
Tuipi kanlai ka muangding hi.
Ka kimkot teng asiat ciangah.
Kamuan na in Zeisu Topa.
Pengkul aw tawh a pai ciangin.
Ama mai-ah ka ding nuam hi.
A hong siangtho sak khit ciangin.
Mawh nei loin ka om ding hi.
Amah’n hong kha hih thu mah mah,
Heh nemna dim thupha ahi,
Kasepna ka paina tengah,
Pasian khutin kei hong kha hi.
A mah’n hong kha, Amah’n hong kha,
Ama khut tawh A mah’n hong kha,
A nung mantak kazui dinghi,
Ama khut in kei hong kha hi.
Khatvei leh Edan bang nuam na,
Khatvei khuamialna thukpi,
Bangka tuak hang muanna launa,
Ama khutin kei hong kha hi.
Phunlo puamlo lungkim takin,
Topa nakhut kalen nuam hi,
Bangbang thuakzong bang lungkhamna,
Ka Pasian in kei hong kha hi.
Na hehpihna tawh galzo a,
Nasep ka khit ciang a vekpi,
Sih ding lau lo Pasian in ah,
Jordan gungal ah hong kha hi.
Topa thuciamna pha muang takin om ning,
A tawntungin hong gum Topa vang um ning,
A min thang hi ci in ah ka ki ko hi.
A thuciamna pha ka muang ding hi.
Muangin, Om ning,
Hong gum Topa Pasian thuciamnaphaMuang ning,
Muangin, om ning,
Honggum Topa Pasian thuciam muang ning.
A siatheilo Topa thuciamna ka muang,
Up khialh man a launa huih bang hongnun hang,
Nuntak nang a athuphabel tawh zawh nang,
A thuciamna pha ka muang ding hi.
Tu in a thuciamna muangin ka om hi,
A sipha tawh hong sawp leh ka siang ding hi,
Mawhna sung pan suahtak ding thu ka ngah hi,
A thuciamna pha ka muang ding hi.
Topa Zeisu na thuciamna ka muang hi,
Athupha tawh khaubangin hong hen ding hi,
Khasiangtho tawh dawimangpa ka zo ding hi,
A thuciamna pha ka muang ding hi

songs.title: HONPA TUUCING BANG HONG PI IN

lines: Honpa tuu cingbang hongpi- in,
Nong huai na ko kisam pha,
Antam gamnuamah hong vak in,
Hong bawlkholhsak in omna,
(Thupha Zeisu, Thupha Zeisu Nong leizo kote nang aa)2
Hong pawlin nang neihsa kote,
Ko paina lampi cingin
Hongkem, honghuh in Na tuute
Lamkhialh ciang hong zong kik in,
(Thupha Zeisu, Thupha ZeisuKo thungetna hongza in)2
Mizawng mimawh ka hi uh hang,
Nong ciamzo hong sang ding in,
Mawhna phelna’ng, siatnang dal na’ng,
Hehpihna na nei cingin,
(Thupha Zeisu, Thupha Zeisu Nang lam hong ki hei sak in)2
Ka neulai un nangma pahtak,
Na awi bang hongta sak in,
Hong hon Topa pha aw dimtak,
Nangma itna hong guan in,
(Thupha Zeisu, Thupha Zeisu Nongit zo hongit lai in)2

songs.title: HUIHPI NUN CIANG A KI DALNA

lines: I bukna suangpi Topa hi,
Huihpi nun ciang aki dalna,
A sia namkim a ding bit hi,
Huihpi nun ciang a kidalna.
Gimna gam sungah Zeisu suangpi a hi,
Belh ding suangpi, belh ding suangpi.
Gimna gam sungah Zeisu suangpi ahi,
Huihpi nun ciang a kidalna.
Sun in ni liim,Zanin kulhpi,
Huihpi nun ciang a kidalna,
Galte bangmah patau lo hi.
Huihpi nunciang a kidalna
.Huihpi’n I kimkot nuai hangin,
Huihpi nun ciang a kidalna,
Nusia loding cikmah hun in,
Huihpi nun ciang a kidalna.
Pasian suangpi belh ding ithuai,
Huihpi nun ciang a kidalna,
Tawntung hong nai, hong kem,
hong huai,Huihpi nun ciang a kidalna
Keima Topa Zeisu lamdang honpa hi,
Kei ading lamdang honpa hi,
Suangpi kitam sungah ka kha hong liah sak,
Nuamna gunpi bang hong musak.
Suangpi kitam sung keima kha hong liahsak,
Tua suangpi’n gamgawtak liap sak,
A it na sungah ka nuntakna phumta,
(Ama khutin kei hong hum ta)2
Keima Topa Zeisu lamdang honpa hi,
Amah’n puakhia keima vanpi,
Amah’n hong len a kei kalau kei ding hi,
Ka ni bangin tha hongpia hi.
Kisim zolo thupha hongpiak kimat in,
Ama hoihna tawh ki dimin,
Lungdam in la kasa Pasian minthang hen,
Hih bang tanpa kanei hi ken
Ama dikna puanpak silha kathawh ciang,
Amah dawnin ka lentoh ciang,
Ama hongitna leh honghotna ki cing,
Van ah awn tampi tawh sa ning.
Pasian minthang ta hen na lianpi bawl hi,
Leitung a itluat ma’n a Ta hong pia hi,
Mawhna pan suahtak nang a nunna pia hi,
Mi khempeuh a ding nunna kong hong hon hi.
Phat ve un, phat ve un,Athu’n leitung zelhen,
Phat ven un, phat ven un,Mikhempeuh lung dam hen,
Topa Jesuh minsuang in Pa kiang zuan un,
Na lianpi bawlzo hi a minthangsak un
.Sisan tawh hong leizo tatkhiatna manzo,
Aum mi ta ding Pasian kamciam omzo,
Mimawh pen nangawn in Zeisu a up leh
,A up phet in a mawh maipah ding hiven,
Na lianpi hong hilh a, na lianpi bawl hi,
Pasian ta hangin nopna cing ih ngah hi,
Hi hang lamdang Honpa Jesu ih muh hi,
Lungdam, nuamna lianzaw kan ding hi ven.
Sihna mualkuam galkhat ah, khuapi khat a om hi
A hoihna kuaman gen zolo hi
Zankimlai in tuuno aksi bangin taang a
Tua a etlawm kham khuapi sungah
Tualai ah nitum lo , singteh zong vul ngeilo
Midikte a tawntung aksi bangin taang a
Tua a etlawm kham khuapi sungah
Tualai ah dahna natna kahna om nawnlo
Misiang khempeuh zong tek thei nawnlo
Tua khua ah ut sensing zan khuamial lah beita
Tua a etlawm kham khuapi sungah
(Khasiang tho'n hong lungdam sak)3 Nuam sing
Hong nuisak hi hong kap sak hi,
A mah'n honglam to ding
Khasiang tho in hong lung damsak,nuam sing.

songs.title: IH THEI TEL ZAW DING HI

lines: Thupha gamnuam tun theih nang, haksat na tampi om a,
Hih hang Pasian lam tawntung, mitsuan gige’n hongkha ding,
Tua gamsung ih tun theih nang, sih mateng ih zui ding hi,
Eite’n ih thei zaw ding hi nung ciangin.
Nung ciangin zingsang khuavak ding,
Pasian misiangtho te innpi tung ding,
Eite’n ih zawhna tangthu ih sutkik ding,
Eite’n ih theitel zawding hi nung ciang in.
Inn leh lo leh neek leh taak, na khempeuh ih kisam a,
Nuntak na lei golgawtak, lakpi mah ih zui zel a,
Hih hang Topa hongciamna, kammal eite’n muang ciat ni,
Eite’n ih theitel zaw ding hi nung ciang in.
Eite lungsim siasak ding, gamtat kampau a hizong,
Phawk khakloh lauhuai ze-et bawlsiat nate ih thuak zong,
Hanciam nopna takpi tawh, eite ih puk khathei zel zong,
Eite’n ih theitel zawding hi nung ciang in.
A kipatcil a om ka Pasian,
Na khempeuh pianna kong biak Pasian,
Minthana vangliatna nei Pasian,
Van mi siangte phat den Pasian.
(Na kilawm hi Topa)2
Na kilawm phat dingin Topa
(Na kilawm hi Topa)2
Na kilawm biak dingin Topa.,
Huihpi leh tuihual daisak theipa,
Zawdan gunpi khawlsak thei Topa,
Lungkham buaina teng vengsak thei Pa,
Husang thei khempeuh phat den Pa,
Tapa khat neihsun a hong pia Pa,
Ka suahtak nang lam hong honsak Pa,
Damna hauhna nopna hong pia Pa,
Nuntakna hong thahatsak Pa.
Zankhat Topa kha siangtho in keihong lawng a,
Gamnuam khat hong musak a,
Luang sialsial tui, nimdildial singcin pak silsial,
Vasa’n zong lungdam lasa in leng liai liai.
Zingdam huihnung hiau hiau,Paak nantui tawh dimna,
Van mi siangtho te len na,
A tang kham khuapi nuam, ka luahnading mun hi
(Teediam diam misiangte aksi bangtangding)2
Tua laitak van pan la ngaihpi hong ging ziahziah,
Topa sap na ka za hi,
Khitui luangin kanunna hong ki khel pah a,
Lungdam in Zeisu angsung kadelh vingveng ta.
Gamsa te’n tui luang sialsial a lunggulh bang,T
opa nang kong lunggulh hi,
Nang omna peuh ka kha in nuamsa diang hi,
Leitung nate’n hong khih hong buaisak zo nawnlo,
Tua gam munnuam lungsimin ka ngaihsut kik ciang,
Gensiam hileng a hoih dan,
A nopdan vangam a lim leh a vang bek hi,
Bangzah ‘n a nuam diam tua mun ihtun hun ciangin.
Ka nuamhi, Pasian innkuan sungah ka om zo,
A sisan siangtho in kei hong sil siang zo,
Zeisu tawh luah khawmzo, hih mun ka omlai in
Ka nuam hi Pasian innkuan sungah ka omzo,
Ka sanggampa ka sanggamnu ci’n ih kisam,
Eite Pasian sungah innkuan khat ih hih manin,
Gimthuak khat ih omciang, ih kithuakpih ciat a,
A gualzo khat ih omciang, ih ki lungdampih hi.
Tagah te inn pan kipanin, Kumpi inn dong in,
Hong ki deidan tuanlo in, La thak kasa thei hi,
Siatna pan hoihna ah, Zawnna pan hauhna ah,
Kilawm lopi’n hiah ka om, ka Pasian min ka phat.

songs.title: VAN HAUH NA KEI AA HI ZO

lines: Vantungah innkhat nei-ing ni sangin taang zaw hi veh,
Khatvei ciang ka tung ding,
Tua ciang bel ka khualzin hun,Bei ding a tawlnga ta ning,
Aw tua niciang van ah thaman sang ning.
Van hauhna kei a hi zo,A dang bang ka ngen nawn diam
Pasian ta tu’n ka hizo, ka honpa Zeisu hang,
Lei ah ka hih thilthial hang,Mite’n ka hauh lam thei lo,
Aw ka honpa hang mihaupi ka hita.
Lukhu a kihawm niciang,Hih leitung phawknawn kei ning
Bangzah a nuam zen diam,
Ka lutung te zial zial ding,Leinunna phawknawn kei ning,
Aw tua niciang kamai nibang tang ding.
Ka lam etna mikim in hong theihpih leh ut singmaw,
Pasian ta ka suahna,
Ka honpa hang kisa thei ing, van mite khat ka hizo,
Aw tua niciang aksi bang ka tang ding.
Topa tungah lungdam kako ding,
Tuuno laibu sung ka min kigelh zo,
A mual theilo a mial ngeilo ding
,Khut mapawn tawh kigelh zo ta.
Topa tungah lungdam kako ding,
Phatna biakna kongpia hi Topa,
Lungdamkoh biakna kong paipih hi,
Sangpen pa aw ka lungdam hi.
Tuidam kiangah tuuno kikhah bang,
Neek leh dawn silh leh ten inn leh lo zong,
A nisim in zat ding sum leh pai,
Hong sik hongpia ka Topa hi.
Topa hong hehpihna ka phat ding,
Diik ding huih mangenlo hong piak man in,
Nitaang khataang dawn ding tui siangtho,
A khawnkhong in hong zangsak hi.
Kikhenna om nawnlo, kikhenna om nawnlo,
Vantung ka pa inn ah kikhenna om nawnlo,
Sihna natnate leh lungzuanna om nawnlo,
Tuuno inn ni bang tang, Jerusalem khua thak ah,
Aw tua lai mun nuam, lungsim ka ngaihsut ciang
Anop cit dan nop tuak zen si,
Tua munah ka pai ciang,Lawm ten hong muak ding a,
Hong tankhia ka Topa khutpawnte ka len ding hi.
(Lawm aw nang na ut hiam)2
Tatkhiat sate lenna van khuapi ah,
Tua mun tun na dingin Zeisu sisan bek hi,
Lawm aw nang na ut hiam, Jerusalem khua thak ah.
Tuni”n Topa sapna, a aw nem na zak leh,
Na lungsim khauhsak ken Zeisu zuan vaw,
Alian mahmah gupna donlo in om le cin,
Mawhna dan tawh bangci ki pelh theih ding nahi hiam.
Itna sisan luangin ka tatsa mite,
Khuamial gimna sung kahna aw ka za,
Lainat in kakhi luang, kua sawl ding ka hiam?,
A mangthang khate kua’n pikhia ding hiam?.
Topa’n nang hongsam lainatna aw tawh,
Ka nasem dingte tawm lua e,
Mangthang khate kiang itna thugen ding,
Nang hongsawl ning e, na hih zo diam ci.
Topa’n nang hong sawl, haibang nang hongngak.
Na neih nalam khempeuh kong piaksa hi a,
Khatzong sitlo in la kik theipa kahi.
Hizong lakik keining naphal bang pia in,
Van ah nongciah ciang na hawmthawh kha diai.
Na tuai lai in sem in, tumbang na huai ding
Na neihlai pia in beina hun hong tung ding,
Gal le sa haksa in buaina’n hong lap ding,
Sep theihlai sem in khua hong mial ding hi.

songs.title: HONG PAIKIK DING KA UM HI

lines: Mualsang tung khat pan in, Topa van kahto a
Puanpak silh minih in nungzui te hehnem hi
Lungzuang kha peuhmah kei un, tu a kilato Zeisu in
Van a kah namuh bangin hong kumkik ding
A gen bang hong paikik ding ka um hi
Pengkulte ngaihlua kisa in misite phong ding cih ka um hi
Mitphiat sung kikal inah vantung hong keek inah
A gen bang hong paikik ding ka um hi
Topa hong kilat ding, nai mahmah ta kha ding
Tuni zong hithei hi, tuhun zong hithei hi
Tuahun teh misiang khempeuh, leitungin hup zo nawnlo ding
Vankim lai ah laktohna ngah ding uh hi

songs.title: A NI NI IN NUAM SEM SEM

lines: A tawntung ka kumpipa, a tawntung ka lawmpa
A tawntung gualzawhna hongpia,
Nisim lamhonglak a, nisim tha hong dim hi,
Nisim gualzawhna hong pia.
(Buaina veng mang veh)2
Ka lawmpa ka kumpipa kaphat tak teh,
Pasian gam leh a ma dikna zong masa leng,
A ni ni in nuam sem sem.
Vantung gam kham khuapi nuam, a tawntung taang zih ziah,
It leh ngaih te tuallen nag am,
Eite hong dawn dingin, nisim kiging den uh,
Nuam zen si’n teh tua mun nuam.
( Tua ahih man tun thukhenna tawh kipelh zo)3
Ka sungah lungnop suahtakna om hi.
(La bang ci’n nasa, kamtuam tawh lakasa)3
Ka sungah lungnop suahtakna om hi.
(Thubang ci’n nangen, kamtuam tawh thu kangen)3
Ka sungah lungnop suahtakna om hi.
Deihna khempeuh a ki cinna lawmpha Zeisu nei ing,
Kei ading tulsawm tulthen sanghoih zaw hi,
Zangkuam unokpak zah a hoih,A mahbek ke’n mu ing,
Damnang, siannang kadeih teng a sung om hi,
Dah hun ciang hong hehnem in, haksat ciang bukna hi,
Na vangik khempeuh hongpuakin hong ci,Hallelujah.
Amah zangkuam unok paak hi,A taang zingsol zonghi,
Kei a ding tulsawm tulthen sang hoih zaw hi.
Ka lungkhamna teng lakhia in, dahna hong puaksak a,
Ze-et hunciang a muanhuai ka tausang hi,
Upna siasak thei na khempeuh, ke’n tu’n ka nusia ta,
Ka sungpan a vangliatna tawh hong kem hi,
Leitungin kei hong nial in, Satan in hong do hang,
Zeisu hangin ka ma ka tun ding hi,Hallelujah.
A mah’n hong nusia ngeilo ding, zong hong nial ngeilo ding,
Amah um in a deihna bang tapeuh leng,
Keitungah bang bang piang taleh, launawn peuhmah kei ning
,Mana tawh kakha hongvak ding nuamlua veng,
Mingthang gamzuan in lengning, Topa kamu ding hi,
Lungnopna guntui a luanna mun hi.Hallelujah.

songs.title: MUAL TUNGAH TUA KHUAPI KA TUN CIANGIN

lines: Zion mual dawn ah khuapi lian khat om hi,
Kongzingte khempeuh khamtawh kizut hi,
Zingsang khatpeuh teh tua khua ka en ding hi,
Mual tungah tua khuapi ka tun ciangin.
Aw mualtungah Zion khuapi
Ka tunding ngaklah belin kanei hi,
A kum tawn in ka teng ding hi,
Mual tungah tua khuapi ka tun ciangin.
Tua khuapi ah pai dingin hong kisam hi,
A ut khempeuh te zong kisam hi,
Kei adingin kibawl khuapi in hong ngak hi,
Mual tungah tua khuapi ka tun ciang in.
Sihna kiciam kha ngeinawn peuhmah lo ding,
Lungzuan cihbang om ngei nawnlo ding,
Tua lai ah a tawntung in ka teng den ding,
Mual tung ah tua khuapi ka tun ciang in.
Thukhenna ni hong nai zota,
Aw sanggam aw bangci ding na hiam,
Tawntung mun ding lungngai lo in,
Lungmuangtak in om ke’n maw,
Mi siangthote hong la dingin,
Topa hong pai ding sawtnawnlo,
A teelsa mite leikiuli pan, hong khop ciangin
Kongit sanggam nang kong mu ding hiam
Topa Zeisu hong paikik ciang,
Minthanna tawh hong pai suk dinga,
Tatsa mi siangthote khempeuh,
Van kimlai ah hong pito ding
Sanggam aw na kiging nai maw,
Vantung tuuno moipawi sim dingin ah,
Tuuno mopuan na neih kei leh,
Kham innpi sung lutthei kei niteh.
Khazih kazuat lai kihhuai mah ta leng,
Hallelujah ka sung’h vangliatna om hi,
Hong ki siangsak ta sisan muang peuh leng,
Hallelujah ka sung’h vang liatna omta
(Vang liatna a om vangliatna a om
hallelujah ka sung’h vangliatna omta.)2
Ka mawhna pitawh Zeisu ka zuan a,
Hallelujah kasung’h vangliatna om ta,
Kongkhak kakiu a, kei hong lutsak ta ,
Hallelujah ka sung’h vangliat na omta.
Mangthang mite aw, keitawh pai khawm ni,
Hallelujah ka sung’h vang liat na omta,
Zeisu sisan in hong siangsak zota,
Hallelujah ka sung’h vangliatna omta.
Simleitungah mihing pilna leh siamna,
Tha leh ngal hatna te’n Topa muzo kei,
Vangik pua leh tawldamna ngahlo ta ding,
Thuakdansiam haksa lua To Zeisu lo in.
Om dan zong ka siamta, thuakdan zong ka siam ta,
Hong makaih a hong hilhpa, ToZeisu a hi,
Apiang na khempeuh tung’h, lungdam den ding hi tang,
Omdan hong siam sakpa To zeisu a hi.
Sum leh pai deihna leh, huaihamna te in,
Lamtawp cih neilo, lungkim om thei lo,
Gentheih haksa na leh lungzuan luankhi tawh,
Thuakdan hong siamsakpa To Zeisu a hi.
Gentheih zong kasiam ta, hauhdan zong kasiam ta
,Gilvah leh gilkial zong, thuakdan kasiamta,
Hongit Topa Zeisu hang na khempeuh tung ah,
Hong thahatsak pa hang hih theihloh nei keng.
Ih Topa gualzopenpa, dawimangpa zonggawp zo,
Mawh na koltanna pan hong honkhia zo,
Nuam hilhial tu’n ih omta, lungnop suahtakna sungah,
Leitung nate’n hong buaisak zo nawnlo.
Kipak in a min siangtho pahtawi ni,
Lungtuak ei khangno tuailai te’n mainawt ni,
Na sikna khempeuh Topa’n Na gam hong suak sak ding hi
Zeisu en gige inla kalsuan in.
Leitung paiziate en in, buaina leh kisiatna in,
tua te’ hang’n na lungsim sosak ken in,
Tuate Zeisu zawhna sung’h oltak en hithiat lel in,
Nunghei ke’n cikhuampi nasuak kha deh.
Pitazuh zong Topa tawh, tuihual tung’h pai kiau kiau
Upna tawh Zeisu bek a et ciang in,
Ahih hang akhuadak leh tuihual kihta tum dektak .
Khuadak ke’n Zeisu bek en gige in.
Lungnopna zong khinteh namtampi in,
Leitungin tua nopna piathei lo,
Na sumte kawhkholna hiam kidawm in,
Lam hong pi ding khat kisam tei tei.
Ciampello Zeisu sin in,Siatna pan itna honglak
Nitang in huihnung taleh,Ciampello Zeisu sin in.
Na nite gualnopna tawh kidim in,
Lawpin kipahna khuabang taang,T
ua zawhteh dahna khuamial in tuam a,
Khuamial vengsak ding kisam teh nang.
Lungzuangin nangkia lam napai lai tak,
Guallelhna vive tawh ki dim in,
Lungkia in lungsim tamkham dek lai tak,
Tuihual daisak pa kisam teh nang.
Hun leh nite meng meng in bei veh,
Lungnopna sum tawh leitheih hilo,
Zongin thumin tauin na om lai tak,
Na mawhna sawp ding mi kisam teh nang.
(Cho) A sangmual lam ento in, kah leh lungkham teng vengta,
Bangkim ah bangkim Topa, huhna in keivan pan hi,
A sangmual lam ento in, nahoih tampi kangah ta,
Ka gualzawhna teng tengin, van an Topa thupha hi.
Sun in meiikhuam zan in meiikhuam tawh hong kem hi,
Kei hong cingpa lusu ngeilo hi,
Sihna kuampi lam katuak zong,
Lum leh galhiam a hi.
Sun in niin hong gimsak lo ding hi zan in,
Kha in zong hong sukha lo ding hi,
Topa a muangte honkhia hi,
A khut kuak sungh tun koih hi.
Pasian in kha a hihman, amah biakpiak na dingin,
Na kha tawh a mah bia in phat lecin,
Hermon mualah daitui bang, van daituite hong kia in
Hopihna nang zong zathei ni teh
Ka kha tha bek tawh, ka kha tha bek tawh,
Ka kha thabek in lawhcing thei niteh,
Thu haksa pen te’n zong na-ma hong khak zo ke’n teh,
Ka kha hang na-ma na tunzo ding hi.
Khirh a ding nuntakna ah,A siangtho nuntakna ding.T
eep leh muam neek dawn kizawh kul hi,
A siangtho gamtat kampau, na khempeuh ki dek zolo,
Tuate tawh na hizo diam Topa’n ci.
Gupngah lam hong kitel sak,Damngah lam hong kitelsak
Hauh ngah lam hong kitel sak khat om hi,
Vangliatna tawh dawi hawlkhia,Damlo te damsak ,
theih naTunglam pan a hong pai kha hang bek hi
Nitak a ni a tum lamdang sa ing,
Nisuah zong lamdang sasem ing,
Ka lungsim hong khoih kha a lamdang pen in,
Pasian in kei hong itna thu hi,
(Aw hihmah lamdang pen sa’ng
Hihmah lamdang pen sa’ng
Pasian in kei hong it zenzen)2
Tuk hun anlak hunte lamdang si e,
Vantung aksi nite zong e,
Ka lungsim hong khoih kha a lamdang pen in,
Hih ka phawk thak hong itna thu hi.
Sianmang Zeisu naubang ka san man in ah,
Ka ciin leh katuai lai singdang ka tang ta,
Lawmgual itte’n lah lenpih ding hong nial e,
Phamawh kei sawlbang hei ta-ning Topa tawh.
Phamawh kei ee, Singta bang bang lel taleh,
Sianmang Zeisu min hangin,
Zion khuapi tual-ah limnga bang lam ning,
Lei ah ka gentheih nate ka kham lukhu ding hi.
Aw hong lengaw Zeisu vabang hong leng aw,
Ka siangah hong khawl aw, holung kum khawm niN
ang tawh nunnop a lenkhop kan a nuam om lo,
Hinpih sihpih dingin nang kong teel zohi.
Aw Zion tate mainawt in kalsuan ni,
Eite maiah masa Zeisu mitsuan ni,
A ma dawnsa tuikha mah ih dawn ding a,
Ama totsa lampi mah ih zui ding.
Mi khuamulo, mittaw pi’n; lam napai napai den leh
Sihna guamthuk sung nakiat ding lauhuai sa’ng,
Tua guamthuk sung nakiat ma’n
na mit mah mah,Doctor Zeisu lawngsak in,
Tua hi leh, Na mit hong kihong ding a,
lamman na zui ding hi.
Pulpizavat, mittaw khelbai bengngong mi,
Leitung pilna tawh nabawl hang dam ke’n cia
Bethsidatui hong kilok nawn lo ding a,
Na natna mun telin Zeisu lawng sak in.
Khasiangto vabang lenna , leitung mit in muban lo,
Pasian pilna leitung pilna’n ban zolo.
Ngiahsutna tawh napuk ma’n na khuak mah mah,
Doctor Zeisu lawngsak in, Tua hi leh,
Na lungtang kihong ding a, Thuman na tel ding hi.
Kha siangtho huhna meibang a tanlai na mitsak ke’n
Khebai pi-in vangam ah natun sawm ke’n,
Tuanglam bang pial kha niteh, na khe mahmah
,Doctor Zeisu lawngsak in, Tua hi leh,
Na lungtang kihong ding a, thuman na tel ding hi.

songs.title: NA LUKHU TE’N HONG NGAK DIMDEM

lines: Kap kawmin kuankhia in,
A tuh ding khai ci, a pua mi-in,
Lungdamin kiko na tawh buhlomte pua in
,Inn ah hong ciah ding hi.
Leikeu na-ah guahin tui a buak bangin,
Ka thaman- te’n hong ngak dimdem ,
Kei a ding kikoih zo kham lukhu hoih lua kisa in,
Hong tan ziahziah kham lukhu-te tang pempam,
Endih na lukhu te’n hong ngak dimdem zen veleh.
Kiphah dimdem thamante ki gual diudeu,
Laibute zong kiphen ziah ziah,
Lungdamna khituite taak keuhkeuh hong taak keuh keuh
Vantung mi te’n lungdam in hong muak ziahziah,
Endih na lukhu te’n hong ngak dimdem zen veleh.
Kangah ding vangliatnate kangaih ciangin ah,
Ka thuaknate gentham sakeng,
Tua te hang amin siangtho phat ning Hallelujah,
AmenCi-in khamlukhu ka khek ma teng,
En dih na lukhu te’n hong ngak dimdem zen veleh.
Ka khualzin na leitungah, lawmhoih khatnei ing,
Tua in hong it ka Tozeisu hi, Nisim hong lungdamsak,
nisimla hongsa sak,Lawm hoih Zeisu ka neih mah manpha bel.
Muvanlai bangin ah, ka thahat theihna ding,
Thakhuahna leh lungnopna hong pia,
Ka lawmhoih Zeisu in thupha namkim hong pia.
Zeisu tawh ka kimuh ni a kipan in ah,
Nisim in lungdam kipak den ing,
‘Dahna thuakna-te in hong buai sak zo nawnlo,
Lawmhoih Zeisu kaneih mah manpha bel.
Aw kongit sanggam aw nang zong hongpai pah vaw,
A migi kaToZeisu kiang,Sapna khempeuh ki cing,
Nang zong hongpia nuamhi,Hong zuan in kongit kongit sanggam aw.
A ummi tadingin manpiakloh letsong hi,
Nuntak tawntungna na ngahna ding,
Tu’n Zeisu na san leh vangam nang aahi ta.
Tuipi geiah kading a, a galkhat lam ka gal-et leh,
Tuipi geiah tembaw khat a khawl ding mu ing a,
A maute a dawn dingin, alawmte tampi om veh,
It teng tawh kikhen lohna vantung hong phawk sake.
Inn lam kazuan hi, zion tembaw tungtuang in,
Galkhat pekah meiilum lakah a taang ka gal muh ta,
Tembaw khawlna ciangdong,Hoihtakin katun mateng in,
Vantungmi te aw kei hong kha aw.
Kanu in nunna huihpi thuakin hong paisan khinzo a
Tawntung mun hong pi dingin, Honpa neiteh hongci
Tu’n ka telsiang khinta hi, kei zong tua mun lam kazuan ta,
Ka nu’n galah hong ngak hi, nuikawm hong dawnta ding.
>Minbang ka piancil in, ka nu’n hong it manin,
A ang nunkhum tui tawh hong vak den a,
Ka ut bangbang in hong gamtat saktheih manin
,Ka nu hong itna bang zah in lian hiam.
Hong it ka nu bang tawh ka teh thei diam,
Hong ho kamkhum bang tawh ka teh thei diam,
Leizawhloh suangmanpha sang lianzaw hi,
Nu aw nong ho kamkhum za nuam den ing.
Ka nunna a manpha ding nong pattah manin,
Nu aw nong itna lian ka phawk den a,
Top’n hong hehpih in, na nunkum sawt sak hen,
Sim leitung kumsawt guabang hing khawm leng.
Nute pumpi khempeuh ei a ding manpha hi,
A angah hong tawi-in hong lum sak a,
A nungah hong pua in nuamtak hong ih musak,
Nu aw nong itna lian ka phawk den hi.
Lungdam kohna tawh ama kongpi ah lut unla,
Ama huang sungah tumta un,
Tuni pen Topa’n hong piak sa nipha hi a,
Hong lungdam sak manin ka kipak hi.
(Hong lungdam sak hi, hong lungdam sak hi.
Hong lungdam sak manin ka kipak hi.)2
Topa hoih hi, a itna kipin kho tawntung hi,
Tua ahihma’n a min phat un,
Ama thumanna a khang a khang in kip hi.
Hong lungdamsak manin ka kipak hi.
Hih leitung in gibing khenna gam hi,
Mitphiat kalsung na ngawn lungmuan om theilo,
Tu nuam ta leng ding, khawlnuam ta leng pai,
Hih leitung kikhenna gam hi.
Phatni hei na peuhah Topa phat ni,
Ih khen zongin Zeisu sung kimu kik ding,
Lei-ah ih kimu diam van kimlai ah
Hih leitung kikhenna gam hi.
Ih khen zongin kimu ding khawlmun ah,
Hih leitung in ih khualzinna gam bek hi,
Ih khawlkhawm zong holung cim omman lo,
Hih lei khitui luanna gam hi.
Hun leh tuiluang in hong pai khengkheng veh
Hih leitung in a sawt ding hinawnlo pi,
Leitung aw mangpha Zeisu hong nai zo.
Kikhen om nawnlo ding vanah.
Pasian’ hong hehpihna thupha,
Kei kiang hong tun theihna,
Ka kilawm lohpi hong deih na,
Bang hang hiam thei zo keng.
Ahih hang ka up Pa ka thei hi,
Amah muanhuai hi, ke’n ka thei zo hi,
Ama tung ka piaksa te zong,
Keem zo ding hi tua ni dong
.Hong honkhia zo thei hih upna,
Kei tung a hong piakna,
A thu um leeng lungnop theihna,
Bangci bang hiam thei keng.
Kha siangtho in mi lungsim hei,
Mawhna hong phawksak thei,
Zeisu hong musak umsak thei,
Bangci bang hiam thei keng,
Topa mai ke’n ka muh ma in,
A pha a sia tuah ding,
Gentheihna ding nopsakna ding ,
Bang ka sunsiah thei keng.
Thuman lamhilh kha siangtho,
Tapidawte nusia lo,
Vang tung gam zuan zin mite,
A khut tawh hong len gige.
Agimte tawntung phatuam
,A zak ciang Ama aw nuam,
Vantung innpi lam zong mi,
Hong zui-in, kong kha ding hi.
Hong ompih den lawm pha pen,
Ko guak hong zawttawm sak ke’n
Khuamial, lungman, launa sung,
Nang mah’n hong ompih tawntung
,Huihpi nasia mahmah in
,Lungkiat lai tak hong ci-in,
Vantung innpi a zuan mi,
Hong zui in, kong kha ding hi.
Na sepna hun beita a,
Vantung tun’ ding bek om ta.
Kei min zong a om buang tam,
Zeisu’ si bek ka paulam,
Sihna gun ka ngah lai tak,
Hong ci lai, siang tak tel tak,
Vantung innpi a zuan mi,
Hong zui in, kong kha ding hi.
Hong it zaw ning Topa, Hong it zaw ning;
Khuk din’ a kong thumna, Nang hong ngai ding.
Hi bang hi kong thumna, Khazih hong it zaw ning,
Hong it zaw ning, hong it zaw ning.
Ni dang leitung nopna ka lunggulh pen,
Tu in kong deih nangmah, a hoih pha pen,
Tu in kong deih nangma, Khazih hong it zaw ning,
Hong it zaw ning, hong it zaw ning.
Dahna natna thuak hang, phamawh sa lo
, Nangma sawltakte bang, la ka sa zo,
Ka sa khawm anau bang, Khazih hong it zaw ning,
Hong it zaw ning, hong it zaw ning.
Ka sih laitak in ah, nang kong phat ding,
Ka hutawpna inah, ka vaikhak ding,
Ka ngen lailai hihmah, Khazih hong it zaw ning,
Hong it zaw ning, hong it zaw ning.

songs.title: HONG PAI UN THU UM TENG

lines: Hong pai un, thu um teng, Lungdam in kipak un,
Hong pai un va en niBetlen khua sungah
Vantung KumpipaBawngkuang sung hong suak ci
Va bia ni, hong pai ta un,Va bia in hong pai ta un,
Hong pai un, va bai ni,Khazih Topa
Sa un, kipah na laVantung mi honte aw,
Vantung a sang bel naKhempeuh thawn sak un,
Van sang bel na ahPasian’ min thang ta hen
Hi hi, hong hon ding pa,Tu ni’n kong dawn uh hi,
Zeisu Topa, na minThang tawntung ta hen,
Pa Pasian deih thuMi bangin hong piang ta
Singlamteh kiang kong pai hi,
Tha le sumlo, mittaw pi,
Na dang bangmah man lo pi
,Hotna cing ka zong ding hi.
Topa, nangmah kong muang zo,
Singlamteh tung si Tuuno,
Na singlamteh kong beel zo,
Hong hon aw, tu’n hong hon aw,
Nang kong lunggulhna sawt hi,
Ka gitloh sawt lua zo hi,
Zeisu in dam tak hong ci,
Na mawhna kong sawp ding hi.
Ka vekpi’n kong kipia ta,
Ka lawm, ka hun, ka neihsa,
Ka vekpi’n ka pum ka kha,
Nang’ a ka hi khin nuam ta.
Na thu ciamte ka muang hi.
Na sipha tu’n ka phawk hi,
Ka lungsim ka niamkhiat hi,
Nang mah tawh ka si khawm hi

songs.title: KAM A GEN ZAWH HI LO

lines: Zeisu in keimah hong itna,
Keimah hong tatna dingin ah,
Singlamteh gilo hong thuakna, Kam a gen zawh hilo
Hong itna kam’ gen zawh hilo,
Hong itna kam’ gen zawh hilo,
Zeisu in keimah hong itna, Kam a gen zawh hilo
Ka nun’tak tawntung nangin ah
Nakpi’n dahna a hong thuakna,
Ling kiphan lukhu hong khukna, Kam a gen zawh hilo
Pasian kiang hong thumsak
TopaAma sung kangah lungnopna,
Ama si hang hong piang thupha,Kam a gen zawh hilo
Hong nai ciang kangah lungdamna,
Launa kihello tawldamna,
Ama hang lametna a pha,Kam a gen zawh hilo.
Vanglian Kumpipa hong sihna,
A singlamteh ke’n veelveel leng,
Kei’ hauhna kei kiphatsakna,
Kei’n tu’n bangmah in sim nawn keng.
Khazih ka Pasian’ sihna lo,
Ki sialhpih ding bangmah om kei,
Ka deih belteng khat zong siitlo,
Ama’ si kheekna- in ka nei.
En ven a lu, a khut, a khe,
Dahna itna, hong luangsukkhawm,
Na mu ngei maw linglukhu leh
Itna, dahna gawm kilawm khawm.
Leitung khempeuh pia thei hi leng,
Tamlua ka ci ngeikei ding hi.
A hong itna ke’n ngaihsun leng,
Ka pum ka tak ka pia nuam hi.
Lungdam thuzeelsak un, mi om na ci tengah,
Mihing lungsim omna, mihing galtam na ah,
Tapidaw lei khempeuh lungdam thu gensak un,
Huhpa hong paikhiata,
Huhpa hong paikhinta, huhpa hong paikhinta,
Vantung kha siangtho pen,Panpiak ding hong ciam pen,
Lungdam thuzeel sak un, mi omna ci tengah,
Huhpa hong paikhinta.
Zanhun saupi beita, zingkhua hong vakzo ta,
Lungsim vangikpi teng, hehna hu-ging vengta,
Nitaang kham mual panin, hong suahkhiat tak ciangin,
Huhpa hong paikhinta,
A kha sung zatui tawh, kumpite’ To hatpa’n,
Thongkia kha khempeuh tung hong puak, hotkhiat kicing,
Thongpi hawm sung tengah zawhna lapi hong ging,
Huhpa hong paikhinta,
Genzawhloh itna siang ka lei in bang ci-in,
Genzawhloh hehpihna, mi vakvai tung gen ding,
Amah leh a meel taang, sungah ka omtheih nang,
Huhpa hong paikhinta.
Nuntakna khomun kei, hong pia’n Topa,
Galilee tuili gei, na hih bang mah,
Ka lungsim vah zo kei, lai simna tawh,
Nang mah tak ka lungdeih, hinna thu aw
Thuman thutak hong pia’n, ka Topa aw,
Khomun na piak bang zia’n, na thupha tawh,
Tua hi leh ko teng kia’n, ka suakta ding,
Thuman in hong khahkhia’n, ka lungmuan ding
Kei a ding, Topa, nang , nuntak khomun,
Keimah ka suahtak na’ng, nangma thu gun,
Nang tawh vantung luah na’ng, nong vaak ding hi
.Hong it sak in thuman, itna na hi
Topa aw, kha siangtho, kei hong puak in,
Keima mit khuamu lo, vaak sak dingin,
Na thu thuk lai siangtho, hong tel sak ding,
Na thu sung pang nang ko hong musak ding.
Lungdam huai hi, nang kong teel ni,
Keimah hong hon ka Pasian aw,
Keima lungdamna a lianpi,
Mi tung genlo om thei ding maw,
Ka nuam hi, ka nuam hi.
Zeisu’n ka mawh hong phelzo hi,
Thungetna zia a hong hilh hi,
Nisim in hong lungdam sak hi.
Ka nuam hi, ka nuam hi.
Zeisu’n ka mawh hong phelzo hi.
Naseppi bel kikhinzo hi,
Kei Topa a ka hizo ta,
Hong kaihna na ke’n ka zui hi,
Ama thugen leng nuam ka sa.
Ka lungsim aw, lungka nawn ken,
Hih thupha ah kiptak khawltan,
Topa kiang pan lungleng nawn ke’n,
A pha khempeuh nei hi, amah’n.
Lungsimtakpi tawh ka ciamsa,
Nisim in ka ciam phapha ding,
Lungdam huai bel hih ki ciamna,
Ka sih ciangin thupha pia ning.
Na mawh vangik pan na suakta ding hiam?
Si sung, sisung vangliatna om hi.
Siatna tungah nang na gualzo ding hiam?
Si sung vanglian lamdang om hi.
Si sung vanglian, vanglian lamdang om,
Tuuno sisan sungah,S
i sung vanglian, vanglian, lamdang om,
A manpha Tuuno si sungah,
Na kiphatsak pan na suakta ding hiam?
Si sung, si sung vangliatna om hi,
Siangtho ngah ding Kalani tui zuan in,
Si sung vanglian lamdang om hi.
Vuk sangin na paak zaw mahmah ding hiam?
Si sung, si sung vangliatna om hi,
Nuntakna tui sung mawhna nin siangta,
Si sung vanglian lamdang om hi.
Na Kumpi Zeisu’ na nasem ding hiam?
Si sung, si sung vangliatna om hi,
Nisim amah phatna na sa ding hiam?
Si sung vanglian lamdang om hi.

songs.title: BANG DANG HI LO, ZEISU SI HI

lines: Bang in ka mawh sawp siang thei,
Bang dang hi lo, Zeisu’ si in,
Bangin hong damsak kik thei,
Bang dang hi lo, Zeisu’ si in.
Manpha hi hong luang si,
Vuk bang hong ngosak si,
Tui dang ka thei kei hi.
Bang dang hi lo, Zeisu’ si hi.
Ka sian’na ding hih ka muh,
Bang dang hi lo, Zeisu’ si hi.
Ka mawhna kiphel na’ng thu,
Bang dang hi lo, Zeisu’ si hi.
Mawh maisak bang dang hi lo,
Bang dang hi lo, Zeisu’ si hi.
A pha ka bawl hang hi lo,
Bang dang hi lo, Zeisu’ si hi.
Kei lametna lung nopna,
Bang dang hi lo, Zeisu’ si hi.
Kei in dikna ka ngahna,
Bang dang hi lo, Zeisu’ si hi.
Hanthuk sungah lum hi, Kei Honpa Zeisu,
Ani tun’ ding ngak hi,Kei To Zeisu.
Han sung pan hong tho zo,
Vanglianpi tawh galte zo gawp zo,
Khuamial gam pan galzo in hong thoto hi.
A mi siangte maan’pih ding hingkik zo hi.
Hingkik zo, hingkik zo,Hallelujah, hingkik zo.
Cin’ hangin mawkna hi,Hong hon Zeisu’ han,
Ciamteh hang mawkna hi,Ka Topa, luang.
Sihna lenzo lo hi,Hong honpa Zeisu,
Dalnate su-gawp hi,Kei To Zeisu’n
Sungsang a pha zaw gam nuam om a,
I upna in ki-gal muh thei hi.
Ei a ding tua gampha vantungah,
I pa’n om-na hong bawlkholh sak hi.
Nung ciangin a nopnaTua gampha ah I ki mu ding hi,
Nung ciangin a nopnaTua gampha ah I ki mu ding hi.
Eite in tua gungal gampha ah
Thupha ngah mite la-ngaih sa in,
Dah ngei nawnlo ding I lung sungah
Khuisa ngei nawnlo ding tawldam khin.
Hong piaksa vaanglian hong itna pi
Hong siang sak thupha pahtawina la,
Tawlngalo phatna I sa ding hi,
Hong it van tung Pa Pasian mai-ah
kimmkot teng kilawmna, Innkuan ki-it leng,
Aw ging khempeuh lungdamna,Innkuan ki-it leng,
Lungnopna leh kicinna, Kiheina teng maitai na,
Hun khempeuh nuam mahmah a,Innkuan ki-it leng.
Innkuan sung ki-it leng,
Hun khempeuh nuam mahmah a,
Innkuan ki-it leng.
Bukno khat sung zong nuamna, Innkuan ki-it leng,
Huatna en’na omlohna, Innkuan ki-it leng,
I pai-na tengah nuamna,Leitung khempeuh lungdamna,
Lungdamna dim nuntakna,Innkuan ki-it leng.
Pasian zong hong lungdampih, Innkuan ki-it leng,
Leitung teng ki-itna dim, Innkuan ki-it leng,
Lui-ging bek zong la ngaihpi,Vandum bek zong maitaiina,
Pasian vanpan hong nuihpih,Innkuan ki-it leng.
Nakpi tak in ka lungdam theihna
Topa hang bek hi nuam lua ing
Kipak takin ka laam ka dianna
Ka Pasian hang hi nuam lua sing!
A manpha pen tat khiatna
puanpi’nKei hong tuamta,
Nun kilamdang pian kilamdang ta,
Thuman puanpi tawh kei hong tuam ta,
Phat loh theiloh… dian loh theih loh…
Kha siangtho hong leeeng.
Zipipa puan hoih tawh kizem a,Monu kizepna suang manpha
Tua bang teek in Topa’n hong zem ta
Ka Pasian hoih dan lamdang ee!
Topa hoihna ke’n ka muh tak teh,
Kam a gen zawh ding zong hi kei
Lai a at zawh ding zong hilo a,
Lungsim leh kha tawh phat ding hi.
Topa ka kidalna lum lehKa munkip muanhuai nahi ta
Amah tawh tonlengKa lampi nuam semsem ta
Ama khut in kei hong len a,Muan huai tak in kei hong kem ta
Topa in eite zawhna ahi
Thangsiahte thangzak pan in,Aki khak khia vasa bangin,
‘Lamin diangin Topa min ka phat thei ta,
Ka mawhna teng hong mai sak.
Ka natna teng zong hong damsak,
Nuam hilhial ka om theita,Hong it Topa mai-ah
Sihna lim guampi sung na ngawnKa nawk hang ka lau kei ding hi.
Na molhtum leh na ciangkhut inHong lungmuang sak
Ka galte omna mai-ahSabuai phah in an hong lui ta
Topa in eite zawhna ahi.
Gamlapi mual tungah, Singlamteh tul gemgam,
Gentheihna maizumna lim ahi,
Tua khuampi ka it hi, leitung buppi tan ding,
A ithuai pen pa hong sihna hi.
Tua singlamteh ke’n ngilngei keing ning,
Zawhna minpha ka tutzawh mateng,
Tua singlamteh khahlo lenlen ning,
Khamlukhu ka khekna ni mateng.
Mi in tua singlamteh, a thusimloh hangin,
Ke’n ka phawk tawntung na a thu in,
Pasian tuuno in vantung nopna nusia hi,
Kalani mualah tua pua dingin.
Ka mawhna hong maisak, hong siangtho sak dingin,
Sisan luangin Zeisu hong si hi.
Pasian tapa sisan siangtho a hong banna,
Tua singlamteh ka velvel nuam hi.
Tua singlamteh khuampi ke’n nusia ngei kei ning,
Taina, zumna ka thuakpih hangin,
Tua hi leh khat vei ciang hong sam ding a inn ah,
Amah tawh a min thangkhawm dingin.

songs.title: A SAWT LO IN INN AH CIAH DING

lines: Lampi ah hong lungnuam sak ding, la khat sa ni
A sawtlo in inn ah ciah ding
Zan khuamial bei ding, nitang tawntungna sungah
A sawtlo in inn ah ciah ding
A sawtlo in ah, A sawtlo in ah
Tuipi hual i kantan ding
Eite kimu ding, huihpi nun a ven ciangin
A sawtlo in inn ah ciah ding
Sep ding ihmuh peuh in khutih i sem ding hi
A sawtlo in inn ah ciah ding
Pasian hehpihna in ih tha hong khauhsak ding
A sawtlo in inn ah ciah ding
A gim khete ading lam i maisak ding hi
A sawtlo in inn ah ciah ding
Itna lungsim kizel kimin hoihna lawh hen
A sawtlo in inn ah ciah ding
Lungkhamna pengin tawldamna gal khat ah om
A sawtlo in inn ah ciah ding
Tua khuapi nuam sungah khitui luanna om lo
A sawtlo in inn ah ciah ding
Manpha si , tawntung manpha si,
Tun kei a ding manpha,
Tua si hang bek ka kha tawl dam,
Dahna teng bei sak hi.
Aw lamdang hi tua sisan luang
Gumpa pang pan phulkhia,
Vantung dongah la in sa ning
,A manpha bel sisanh.
Pawk in nei nawn peuhmah kei ning,
Zuaulo Pasian in ci,
Note’ mawhna khialhna taangin,
Ka ta sisan ka bua,;
Mawhna ka bawl tampi ka thei,
Maizo diam tua zahpi,
Ahih hang manpha si’n sawp hi,
Mawhna teng puakhia hi.
A cimawh lungsim leh pumpi,
Si ding a lum zongin,
Lungnuam tak in kei ka si ding,
Tua manpha sisan hang,
En un, mawhna khempeuh a puakhia pa,
Sihna Kalvary mual tungah,
Singlamteh tung gimna sihna thuak in,
Kei a dingin a sisan hong luang.
Hong gumpa Topa naak sungah,
Sisan leh tui hong luangkhia hi.
Ka lung sungah om tawntung hi,
Mawhna kisawp siangzo.
Mawh sawpsiang nang tui, A hong luangzo hi,
Hong gum Topa sihna mun pan,
A tawntungin tua tui ah kisil ni,
Hong gum Topa kiang zuan in pai ni.
Tua si sungah a kisil khempeuh te,
A mawhna teng vuk bang ngo ding,
Na mawhna khempeuh uh hong maisak ding
,Ka kiang hong pai un, Topan hong ci.
Mawhna sungah ka pai kiknawn kei ding,
Zeisu’n kei hong suakta sak ding,
A kha siangtho in kei hong pi ding a,
A gam sungah hong lutpih ding hi

songs.title: TUUNO SI TAWH NA KISAWP ZO HIAM

lines: A siangtho ngah ding Zeisu kiang na pai hiam?
Tuuno si tawh na kisawp zo hiam?
A thupha kicing dingin na um nai hiam?
Tuuno si tawh na kisawp zo hiam?
Tuuno a (tuuno a) sipha tawh (sipha tawh)
Nang mah in na kisawpsiang zo maw?
Na puansilh vuk bangin ah na ngah zo hiam
?Tuuno si tawh na kisawp zo hiam?
Nisim in Topa kiangah lamna zui hiam?
Tuuno si tawh na ki sawp zo hiam?
Kithat a thuak Topa kiang na belta hiam?
Tuuno si tawh na kisawp zo hiam?
Mopi pa hong pai ciang na puan siang dingin,
Tuuno si tawh na kisawp zo hiam?
A bawl innpi nuamah luttheihna dingin,
Tuuno si tawh na kisawp ding hiam?
Mawhna khialhna a bang na puansilh pai-in,
Tuuno si tawh na kisawp ding hiam?
A sianglo na lung sung ciktui luangsak in,
Tuuno si tawh na kisawp ding hiam?
Kei hong Honpa a si luangin,
Ka Kumpi hong si maw?
Tangtel bang bek keima a ding,
A lutang hong zang maw?
Keima gitlohnate hangin,
Singlamteh tung tau maw?
Lamdang hehpihna leh itna,
Bang tawh tehthei ding maw?
Kei zong singlamteh ka muh ciang,
Zum in ka kisel diam?
Lungdamna tawh lungnehno in,
Ka khi ka luangsak diam?
Ahih hang khitui takna in,
Itna lohkhinzo kei,
Topa ka pumpi kong pia hi,
Hih kan ka hihthei kei!

songs.title: VANTUNG KHUA I TUNG DING HI

lines: Zeisu’n an bang hongit na pha
Lambang puak zaila sa ni.
Thangvan inn taang suasiang nunnuam
Ko aa ding ngo bang lang hi.
Thangvan dong I tun’ciangin
Deih teng leh lai lungdamna ngah dinghi
.Kum khua in lasa ni
Topa Zeisu I phat ding hi.
Thang vantung lam I zuih laitak
Zaitha tawl na om ding hi
.Hi zong I pai khit ciangin ah
Zai-tha tawl omlo ding hi.
Zangni suah sim I um ding a
Lim bel sawlsang i leeng ding
Saumang nunnuam kuam bang luah na’ng
Gua bang hin’lai ngaih khua-ah.
I mai nopna lai lungdamna
Va bang leeng tung nuam ing ci,
Thangvan kankil I tun’ ciangin
Kham vaang khuapi I mu ding
Sihna kuam gal khatah khua lianpi khat om hi,
Minthan’nate kigen khin zolo,
Tua munah nitumlo, singtehte vulngeilo
Tua Pasian kham khuapi hoih sungah
Tua munah ni tumlo, Singtehte vul ngeilo
Tua munah thumaan mi maitang Topa en ding
Tua Pasian kham khuapi hoih sungah
Tua mun’n I it Kumpi hong tanpa Topa om
Thuman mite’n lungdam’n en uh hi.
Tua munah thumaan mite aksi bang taang ding
Tua kham khuapi hoih sungah
Singlamteh phung I tun’ pih khitsa kha khempeuh
Tuu buk sung I tun’sa tuu khempeuh
Lukhu zepna ding suangmanpha bang kikem hi.
Tua Pasian kham khuapi hoih sungah

songs.title: TUA LAI DAHNA OM NAWN LO

lines: Vantung ka ngaihsun hi.
Topa Pasian omna,
A kham maitang nisim mu ding
Nop kicing man ngahna
Dahna kipelh na mun,
Dahna kipelh na mun
Itna kicing vantung khamgam
Dahna kipelh na mun.
Vantung ka ngaihsun hi,
Hong teel Topa omna
Hong itna pha phatna ding la
Kisa tawntung ding hi.
Vantung ka ngaihsun hi.
Vantung mihing te in
Puanpak sih in a om uh hi,
Ei zong I om ding hi.
Vantung ka ngaihsun hi.
A tungsa I lawmte
Mu-a kikhen nawn lo ding,
A nuam tawntung ding hi veh
Vantung vanglian hehpihna gam,
Mi siangtho te inn a hi,
Ama kiangah om tawntung ni,
Leitung na khempeuh paai ni.
(Cho) Leitung ni a, bei ciangin ah,
Nung ciang in inn nuam ah,
Mi siangtho te omna lam ah,
Vantung khua om ding hi.
Tawntung inn nuam vanglian gam ah,
Ih lawm te tua gam om ding,
Tua inn nuam sung ah om ding in,
Mi nam cin a khawm ding hi.
Hong gupna sip ha vanglian pi,
Hehpihna gam teng zel sak,
Hih gal gam ah ih om lai in,
Hong hehpihna thu gen in.
Khat tang hih hang pai in gen ni,
Leitung dahna kiam ding hi,
Lungsim deih teng tawntung omna,
Kim tak in a om ding hi.

songs.title: INN PHA BEL AH I PAI DING HI

lines: Mi siangthote pai na dinglampi in
Pasian mai-ah a om ding hi
Vantung khua mualah I pai ngitnget a
Zingsol I tungah hong taang hi
Inn pha bel ah I pai dinga
Lungdamna tawh I kimu dinghi.
Khua mun nuambel ei te’n I phak ciang
Dahna om nawnlo hi.
Lamnuam tawn mi siangtho honpite in
Zion khua-ah a pai kik ciang
Meivak sungah namgimtui thunkhol un
Vantung khua-ah I pai ding hi
Lam nuam tawn dinga I ngaihsut tek leh
Khat leh khat I ki-it na in
Pasian tawh eite I omkhawm ding a
Nuam in I om tawntung ding hi.
Zawdan gungei a a votna gei-a
hI din’ hangin a gal khatah
Topa Pasian tawh I ngap khawm ding a
A min I phat tawntung dinghi
Zawdan gungei-ah ka ding a
A gallam ka en hi.
Khanan gamnuam hong kilang a
Ka luahna ding gam hi.
Tua gamnuam sungah ei I khawl ding hi.
A nop tawntung gungallam in –ah
Nung ciangin maw si le tuuno lasa ding hi.
Zeisu tawh mang tawntung ding hi.
Tua gam phabel sunga inn ah
Khuavaak tawntung om hi.
Pasian leh Zeisu vaangin
aTaang tawntung ding hi.
Cik ciang tua gam ka tung ding hiam
Khuamial om lohna-ahI
Pa mai-taang lungdamna dim,
Cik ciang ka mu ding hiam
Ka sin sungah lungdamna ding
Leitung sawtpi omlo
Zawdan gunpi kilok hangin
Lungdam in ka tum zo.

songs.title: HONG HON TOPA ZEISU TAL AH

lines: Hong hon Topa Zeisu tal ah
Migitna nuam pha tuang
A lutung vang liatna khu a
//amuk pan itna luang//
Leitungmi tehpih ding omlo
Amah a pha bel hi
Vantungmi lakah zong omlo
//Amah kilawm bel hi//
Gimna sung ka kiat hong mu a
Hon ding hong delh pah hi
Kei ading singlamteh pua a
//Hansungpan hong honkhia//
Ama hangin kei ka nungta
Nuamna zong a hong pia
Hong gualzo sak sihna tungah
//Hansungpan hong honkhia//
Ama omna vantung khua ah
Kei hong tumpih ding hi
Pasian phatna hong lak dinga
//Ka nuamna kim ding hi//
Pasian citna leh hong itna
Hih bang katheih nung sang
Lungsim tul nei lengzong Topa
//Kongpia khin dinghi nang//
Kei Topa Hnig eive, tun zong leitungah om
Ahin kik ken thei gige, Mite’n bang gen taleh
A man hong hehpih thei a, hong hopihna kaza
Amah kasap laitakin hong nai gige
Hinge hinge hong hon Khazih Topa
Hong tonpih a,hong hopih hi, ka paina khempeuh ah
Hinge hinge mihing honkhia Topa
Bang kacih thei hiam nong cih leh
Kalung sungah hing hi
Ka kiim leitung mun khempeuh ah hong itna kamu
Lungkhamna ka thuak zel hang
Ka lungkia ngeikei ding, Huihpi nunna tengah
A man hong kha, ken ka thei
A mah hong kilat ding ni hong tung ding hi
Nuamun nuamun Zeisu mi, lungdamin lasa un
Hin tawn tung, haleluijah, Zeisu khazih kumpi
Muanna tawh a zong mite’n
A mah muthei ding uh
Tuabang itna a nei midang om ngei kei

songs.title: KA THEI HI KEI HONG TANPA HING HI

lines: Ka theihi kei hong Tanpa hing hi,
Leitungah hong pai kik ding hi.
Ka theihi, nuntakna thak hong pia
Hehpihna vaang a khut sung om.
Kathei, ka thei To Zeisu hing hi,
Leitungah hong paikik ding hi,
Ka thei, ka thei nuntakna hong pia,
Hehpihna vang a khut sung om.
Ka thei hi hong thuciam pel ngei kei,
A gensa thu bei ngeilo ding,
A gilo sihna pan ka suakta,
Amah mu ding nung ciangin ah.
Ka thei hi ka om nang mun bawlkhol,
A omna peuh kei zong om ning,
A lamdang a mah’n kei hong keem hi.
Kei a dingin hong pai kik ding.
Zeisu thu thei semsem nuam ing
Hongit na thu gengen nuam ing
Keitang hong si pa hong itna
A cing zaw in ka thei nuamta
A thu zaza nuam ing ,a thu zaza nuam ing
Keitang hong si pa hong itna
A cing zaw in ka thei nuamta
Zeisu thu ken sinsin nuam ing
A deihna khentel thei nuam ing
Pasian Khasiangtho ka sia pa’n
Khris zia leh tong hong lakkhia ta’n
Zeisu kammal zaza nuam ing
Topa tawh holim nuam ing
A aw ngai in vai khempeuh ah
A genteng ka pomkim nuam ta
Van tokhom ah a tutna thu
Van hauhna teng a neihna thu
A gam zainang leh hong pai nang
Za nuam ing Kumpi a suah nang
Topa hoih hi, Topa lian hi
Lungkham hun in hong huh a,
Ama kiangah a beel mite
Ama’n limtak hong kem hi.
Hong phat ning maw, Toapa hong phat ning
Na vangliatna lamdang si,
Thuk in zai e,Lamdang nong itna,
Ka belh suangpi To Zeisu
Lungsim tamkham, lam-et bei te,
Meigong tagah genthei te,
Leivui pan in nong lamto a,
Zeisu hong itna bek hi.
Kha siangtho mit hong vaksak a,
Itna khut tawh hong len a,
Kei nong sap leh kong dawng ding a,
Ka thu sim kong hilh ding ci.

songs.title: TOPA KA NUNNA HONG BAWL HOIH HI

lines: Ka nuntakna Topa nang a hi,
Muvanlai bang ka thahat nading
Nisim thupha namkimte nong pia
Ka nuntakna Topa nang a hi.
(Cho) Topa ka nunna hong bawl hoih sak in
A tawntung na min kong phat zawh nading
Hih leitungah hu nong kop lai teng in
A tawntung na min kong phat den ding.
Topa hoihna leh hehpihna in
Ka nuntakna tha hong dim sak hi
Sing bang a keu sa ka nuntak na
Gungei ah sing kung bang ka no ta.
Hih leitungah nopsak nate in
Ka nuntakna hong gum zolo hi
Zeisu min bek tawh ka kalsuan ciang
Gungei ah sing kung bang ka no ta.
Kazahi, a lui tangthu, vanpan honpa hong paina thu,
Kalvari ah sihna hong thuak hi, misia kei hong gum hi,
A si hong luankhiat man a, gim in a tauna thu ka za,
Ka mawhnate ka ki sik a, tu’n zawhna , ka ngah hi.
Zawhna om hi, atawntung, ka honpa Zeisu sung,
A si tawh kei mi mawh, Hong zongin hong lei zo,
Ka theih ma’n hong it zo a, kei zong ka it kik thei ta,
Gualzawhna ka ngah nangin,A si sung hong phum zo
A damsak theih thu ka za, Ama vangliatna lang sak a,
Khebaite hoihtak lam pai sak hi, Mittaw khuamu sak hi
Tua ciang ka it Zeisu kiang,kei hong dam sakin ka cih ciang,
Amah ka kiangah hong pai a, Zawhna a hong pia hi.
Van ainn nuam thu ka za,Topa’n kei ading bawlzo ta,
Kongzing khempeuhah khambek kiphah,Limlang tuipi
galah,Vantung mite’lasakna,A hong tatkhiatna thu ka za
Khatvei ciang ke’n zong tua laiah, Zawhna lasa ding ta

songs.title: KUA I LANG PANG ZO DING

lines: Topa sungah nuam un, hong hehpihna phat un
Hong hencip khempeuh phel khia hi
Si tawh hongtan zo, lau nawn peuhmah kei un
Zeisu ah deihna teng cing hi
//Eilam ah Pasian// Ei lam hong om leh
kua i langpang zo ding, ///Kua///
Kua i lang pang zo, kua pangzo ding
Topa sung hat un, a thahatna suang un
Nisim thuman in citak ni
Siatna’n hong nawkciang, thuman ading hang un
Amah i tha leh bukna hi
Ama thu muang un, a kamciam peel ngeilo
Khris sungah Amen hi khin ta
Lei a bei zongin, athu bei thei ngeilo
Laisiangtho in gen khin zo ta
Topa sung kip un, a ang muanhuai sungah
Tawntung nunna kipatna hi
A thanem pen zong a khut sungpan in ah
Kuamah in sut zolo ding hi
Leitungah khua mial lungkham na dim a
Khua vaak in nitaan na zong om ta
Lungkhamna khuamial sung na om khak le
Nitaang sung zong om thei ding hi teh.
(Cho) Nitaang sung om dih in
Tawntung nitang sung om in
Nitaang sung ah nungta dih in
Tawntung nuam na sa ding hi
Na lam hong taang sak ding hi
Sanggam aw nitaang sungah om dih in.
Huihpin ih kimkot teng a nuai hang in
Lam etna teng hong bei sak hang in
Huihpi leh guah pite veng pak na ve
Khuamial in lau na tam hang sa ni
Lam etna tawh nisim in lasa ni
Khuamial in lau na tam hang sa ni
Tawntung Honpa mai ih muak den kei leh
I vekpi in hong huai ding hi veh.
A nop in bang a nuam pen hiam?
Topa phat a laam mah nuam pen
Khat leh khat khut kilen in
Topan thupha hong pia tahen ki ci leng.
(Cho) Hei! Anopin nuam, gupngah ka kitel ni buang pawh
Hei! Anopin nuam, kamtuam ka pau theih ni buang pawh
Hei! Anopin nuam, lai len tawn a ih tawn deudeu buang pawh,
Hei! Anopin nuam, Zeisu lam bang ih paak buang pawh.
Topa phat in khut beng ziahziah,
Etlawm maitai nuih mai siusiau
Khat leh khat khut ki van in
Halleluijah, Ha le lujah ki ci leng.
Topa phat in khut van ziahziah
Zeisu lian bel lian bel ci in
A vangliatna phawk kawm in
Shalom shalom shalom shalom ki ci leng
Topa phat in diang khawm ziahziah
Taksa deih na teng sing khia in
Zeisu lianbel lianbel ci in
Zeisun Zeisun Zeisun hong it ki ci leng.
Topa tawh tonkhawm leng nuam e,Buaina kinuaisiah ta,
Buaina tungah tawntung kigual zo hi.
Haksakna omlo hilo a,Haksakna kizo thei,
Topa hong om pihna kitel peuh leng.
Aw nuam sing, ka Topa sungah,Hong hehpihna lasa ning,
Hong itna sung tawntung ka lung muang hi.
Amah tawh tonkhawm leng nuam ei,Holim khawm leng nuam zaw laai,
Topa sungah nisim in nuam ka sa.
Topa nang tawh holim khawm leng , Nong hona aw za ing,
Na kammalte simin lungngaingai leng,Mit tawh na kimuh theihloh hang,
Na kilawn theihloh hang,
Kei nong lawn lam nong suk khak lam ka thei.
Lam in diangin Topa phat ni,Kha sung kibual khawm leng,
Topa hong om pihna hong lang sak hi.
Suakta lote suahtak na tawh,Dam lote damna tawh,T
opa’n hong om pihna hong lang sak hi.
Hong taisan nai keng ei
Nang nong mangngilh hangin
Hnog nusia naikeng ei
Nang nong phawkloh hangin
Na siatlam thei ing, na gitloh lam thei ing
Kei hong zuan photin, kong kikhel sak ding hi
Cik ciang nong ciah diam
Cik ciang nong zuan diam
Lainatna khitui tawh
Haibang hongngak ing ei
Kumkhua kivei ta ei, sul hong hei loding maw
Siatna hong phak ma’n hong ciahkik vaw ka ta
Na ga,tat bangbang in
Hong thukkik hizen leng
Sim leitung panin
Kong paikhia ta dinga
Hong lainat ingei, kang meili na zuat ding
Zing ciang cinawn seken, tuni’n hong sang pak vaw

songs.title: HAI KHAT PAN IN DAWN KHAWM

lines: Up leh Zuih ki khat hi hangTaang mi siangte bangin ah,
Khasiang khat bek sungah,Hai khat pan ih dawn khawm hi
(Eite pum khat hihang Zeisu sungah)3
(Zeisu sungah)2
Eite pum khat hihang, Zeisu sungah
(It na’n khau bang hong khih Zeisu sungah)3
(Zeisu sungah)2
It na’n khau bang hong khih, Zeisu sungah
.(Khut kilen in sem ni Zeisu sungah)3
(Zeisu sung ah)2
Khut kilen in sem ni Zeisu sungah
Leitung i nuntakna, siatna tawh kidim,
Nek leh dawn haksa, sum zonna zong haksa,
Siatna a tam man in, inn kuan kilem nawnlo,
Tua innkuan sung zong , gawt mun neu khat a hi.
Vangam malep, Oh! Vangam ma lep,
Vangam malep lei ah zong kiciam khol thei,
Zeisu nei kim in, Pasian zahtak ciat leng,
Vangam malep, innkuan sung nuam pen.
Innkuan sung lutang in, Pate hi a,
Pate siam manin, innkuan sung nuam ding hi,
Zite’n pasal thu mang leng, tate’n zong thumang ding
Tua innkuan sung zong Topa’n makaih ding hi.
Innkuan sung nuam pan in, hong khang khia mite,
A heina peuh ah maitai tak in om thei,
Pasian in thupha pia, Pasian in ompih hi,
Tua innkuan sung zong, vangam neu khat a hi.
Leivui pan in hong lam to, Niinphual pan in hong dom to,
A sang na lam ka tung to
Lung mawl kei ka nuntakna hong lam to,
A zawng khal pen kei bang lel,
A lungmawl pen kei bang lel.
Na min ading nong lam to,
Gual laiah Sian aw na minpha ka lo.
( Hong leenging e Sianmang Zeisu,
Na zal na leh na anglim ngai ing ee,
Khuva bang hong khawl sak aw)2
Lai kawi khat zong theilote,Laipai khat zong neilo te,
Lung mawl genthei mangbang te,
Luai nau bang hong muamin hong pantah a,
An zong ne thei nailo te, Puan zong silh thei nai lo te,
Gal leh sa bang melma te,
Sian in hong itna dam tui hong luan ta
Tun sung khat pan laizom te, Itna melma lung mawlte,
Suihlung dawn bang ih tuak diam,
Sinlai siangtho va bang pil ding in hong siam,
Hong leeng aw, hong leeng aw,
Sianmang Zeisu hong leeng aw,
Nang kiang lo koi ka pai diam
Na min phat lo maimit ka sing thei diam.
Kawlgam hong pia in kawlgam hong pia in
Natat samite Sian aw na zal na, nun nuam leeng
Dingin nun nuam khawl ding in
Sian aw na ang lim liap ah hong pi in.
(Cho) Tui in tuipi atuam bang in kawlgam
Hong tuam tahen, nong gupkhiat na
Tul sing lam teh thu, Kawlgam bup
Asiat ma in kha khan lawhna hong
Pia in, hong pia in Topa aw Kawlgam hong pia in.
Kawlgam aading in khua ul sisuak in,
Khitui naptui tawh lobang hial ding in,
It na melma te nuih siam hong lel te,
Sian aw na ang lim liap ah hong pi in.
Tho in la taang in sun ni tang bang in,
Topa khuavakin nang hong tan zo hi.
Natan na sung ah, Kawlgam minam te,
Hong uk kumpi te hong pai ding uh hi.
Kei adding tam khang suangpi
Nangma sung kong bel ding hi
Na pangvang pan hong kizui
Thakhat luangkhia si leh tui
Mawh kiphel thuapna hi hen
Hong sut henla hong sawp hen
Ka khutin ka sepna tawh
Thukham deihna cin zolo
Hahkat den zomah leng zong
Tawplo khitui luan hang zong
Mawhna kiphel zo samlo
Nangmah bekin nong honzo
Khutsung bangmah keng lopi
Na singlamteh kong bel hi
Puan neilo nangman nong guan
Cimawh hehpihna kong zuan
Kihhuai tuinak kong delh hi
Nong silkeh ka si ding hi
Ka nuntak laitak hi taleh
Ka sih laitak hi taleh
Theihloh gam ka kai ciang zong
Thukhenna mai kong tun dong
Keitang kitam suangpi aw
Nangma sung hong bel sak aw
Hong paisan ke’n migi Topa,
Kong thum hong ngai in,
Mi dangte kiang na ban bangmah,
Kei hong kheng kei in.
Topa, Topa, kong thum hong ngai in,
Mi dangte kiang na ban bangmah,
Kei hong kheng kei in.
Hehpihna na tokhom mai-ah,
Kisik kong khukdin,
Nang hong huh in ka uplahna,
Noptuam hong pia in.
Nangma phatna bek ka suang hi,
Na mai muhna ding,
Na thupha tawh nong phel ding hi,
Lungzan damna ding.
Ka nuamna teng bulpi nang mah,
Hinna sang pha zaw,
Leitung vantung omlo kuamah
Nang sang a pha zaw.
Hong pai ciangin, hong pai ciangin,
Suangmanpha khawm dingin,
Ama itte a ma aate,A suangmanphate,
Singsang aksi sol bangin,A taang ciat ding uh hi,
A kumpi lukhu tungah,Te diamdiam ding hi.
Hong khawm ding hi, hong khawm ding hi,
A gam sung om ding mi,
A siangtho te, a taangphate,A suangmanpha te,
Naupangnote, naupangnote,
Hong tanpa a itte,Ama a hi,
a ma- it hi,A suangmanpha hi.

songs.title: HAT IN ZION SEM MENG IN

lines: Hat in Zion, sem mengin na nasep ding,
Mi teng tungah khuavak Pasian hilh in,
Mihing khat zong khuamial sunga mangthang ding,
Phalhetlo hi mihing piangsak Pa in.
Lungdamna thupha, nopna thupha
Zeisu hong tatna thupha va gen meng in.
Enven mawhna khuamial thonginn mial sungah,
Mi tul tampi kihen in om uh hi.
Khat beek vapailo a, mau ko dingin ah,
A suahtak na’ng uh Topa si napi.
Mi namkim pau namkimte kiang va gen in,
Amau henna in itna Pasian hi.
Kiniamsak in a bawlsate hon dingin,
Van nun nuam piakna ding hong si suk hi.
Na tate sawl in tua thupha gen dingin.
Na sum tawh huh in manlang theina ding,
Na lungsim teng tawh nakpi thungetsak in,
Na zat khempeuh Zeisu’n hong dimkik ding.
I lungngaih tawntung dingin ah,Topa Pasian itna,
Mawhna a lian I neih napi,“Tate aw” hong ci hi.
En un, Topa Pasian in,
tate aw hong cihna,Pasian tat I tang ding hi,
en un,Topa Pasian in,
ei hong it thupha phatna,
Topa tawh kinaitheihna ding,Zeisu a si luangsak,
Ka ta itte aw, ci’n hong sam,A angsung I khawl ding.
Nung ciang I min bang cithan’ ding,Tu’n kitheinailo hi.
Topa Zeisu hong kumkik ciang,Amah I sun ding hi.
Tua thu a lawpte khempeuh in,Ih Topa bang ding hi.
Sihna a zo minthang Topa,Maimu dingin a pha.
Singlamteh lam tawnin ka ciahkul ding hi,
Tualo lam dang om lopi,
Tua khuavak kongpi tung theingei kei ning,
Singlamteh lam ka khialh khak leh.
Singlamteh’n inn lam hong hilh,
Singlamteh’n inn lam hong hilh.
Mailam ka pai ciangin nuam semsem ding,
Singlamteh in inn lam hong hilh.
Singlamteh phung ka vanteng tolhkhia khin hi,
Topa mai ka muh ciangin,
Lungtaiitak tualam tawn ding kong kipan,
Ka lung sung phatna tawh kidim.
Si kithehna lamtawn ka ciahsuak ding hi.
Topa totsa lampi mah,
A dawndongin kei ka kahtoh thei leh,
Pasian inn sung ka kha teng ding.
Topa itteng pai ni. Langsak ni i nuamna,
Kituaktak in la sakhawm ni,Kituaktak in la sakhawm ni,
Topa tokhom kim-ah, Topa tokhom kim-ah.
Zion khua I pai hi, a kilawm khuaphapi Zion,
Ih tun mateng kah toto ni,
Kilawm Pasian khuapi Zion.
Ei Pasian theilo te’n phat nuamta kei leh uh,
Ei vantung Kumpipa ta te’n,Ei vantung Kumpipa ta te’n,
Thangsak un, nuamna thu thangsak un nuamna thu.
Vantung gam sung tunma kham khua sung sikma in,
Hong maleep hi siangtho nuamna,
Hong maleep hi siangtho nuamna,
Zion mual kahlai in Zion mual kahlai in.
Tua hi a, lasa un nul un dahna khitui,
Vantung gamah a nopna mun,
Vantung gamah a nopna mun,
Tunna ding lam i zui, tunna ding lam i zui.
Thunget hun nuam, thunget hun nuam,
Lungkhamna pan hong samkhia a,
Ka deih ka sapna a tuamtuam,
Ka gentheih hun ka Pa mai-ah,
Dahna hong tun ciang thungen leng,
Ka lungsim hong nuamtuam sak a,
Mawhna’n hong zol ciang thungen leng,
Dawimangpa thang pan ka suakta.
Thunget hun nuam, thunget hun nuam,
Va lenpih in keima thumna,
Keima kha thupha a pia nuam,
Thuman a dik Pasian kiangah,
Keima mai-ah um in muangin,
Hong pai in hong cih khit nungsang,
Thunget hun nuam hong tun simin,
Lungkhamna teng amah suan tang.
Thunget hun nuam, thunget hun nuam,
Kei lungsim hong hehnem lai in.
Pasian hong ciam Khanaan gamnuam,
Luah ding ka lentoh mateng in,
Hih ka pumpi puan bang suaha,
Sang dingin tulngeilo noptuam,
Ka leen’toh ciang kha ning mangpha,
Thunget hun nuam, thunget hun nuam.

songs.title: DING UN, DING UN ZEISU MI

lines: Ding un, ding un, Zeisu’ mi singlamteh galkapte,
A kumpi dial sangkhan un, lelhna thuaksak lo e,
Gal khat khit khat a ban in, Ama’n hong zawhpih ding,
Gal khempeuh zawhkhit ciangin,Khazih Topa maang ding.
Ding un, ding un, Zeisu’ mi, Mang un pengkul sawlna,
Galpi phual-ah vakuan un, Tuni Topa nipha,
Pasal kisa teng kuan un, Galte a tam hangin,
Tha le tha kisi sak un, Hang seem un lau ciangin.
Ding un, ding un, Zeisu’ mi, Ama tha bek suangun,
Mihing tha’n hong lelsak ding, Nomau tha muang kei un,
Pasian thu galvan bangin, silhin, vil-in, thungen,
Gal leh sep ding om ciangin,A baihsa’n om khial ke’n.
Ding un, ding un, Zeisu’ mi, gal bei haknawnlo ding,
Tun’n galkapna ding zing ciang,Gal zawhna la ging ding,
A zote khempeuh in-ah, nuntak lukhu ngah ding,
Vanglian kumpipa kiangah,A tawntung maangkhawm ding.
Topa tawh tonkhawm in, bangbang piangta leh,
Na lampi khuamial hang, Ama nungzui in,
Na gal te’n hong neh in, A lauhhuai hangin,
Zeisu tawh ton le teh kihtak ding om kei.
Tonkhawm in, hangtak mainawt in,
Natha hong khauhsak ding hi,
Nisim in amah tawh pai in,
Na khualzinna lam hong pi ding hi.
Topa tawh tonkhawm in, Na paina peuh ah,
Khuamialna lim sungah lam hong hilh ding hi,
Ama vaangin na lampi hong taangsak ding,
Keugaw gam zong lonona hong piangsak ding.
Topa tawh tonkhawm in, Nang thu’n tawlnga ken’n,
Hong thupiakna bangin na gamta ding hi.
Hong sawlna bang mangin, Ama tha muangin,
Zeisu nun na zuih leh na khial ngeikei ding,
Topa Pasian nang ma khut tawh na bawl sa,
Leitung khempeuh ka ngaihsut ciangin ah,
Aksi te mu in vanging te ka za hi,
Leitung khempeuh ah na vang ki lang hi.
Tua ahih ciang la kong sa hong honpa,
Bangzah na lian, bangzah na lian,
Tua ahih ciang kong phat hi Topa aw,
Nang na lian hi, nang na lian hi.
Sing lah-ah zong ka vak kawikawi ciangin ah,
Singkung tungah vasa ham ngaih ka za,
Mualsang dawn pan, kuam thuk sung ka etsuk ciang,
Lui ging za in huihdam hong nung hiauhiau,
Pasian in ah a Tapa haza lo in,
Hong puak ka ngaihsut ciang um kei phial ing,
Singlamteh tung kei van lungdam tak pua in,
Sisan luangin ka mawhna hong paih sak.
Ki kona tawh Khazih hong pai kik ciangin,
Hong ciahpih ding bangzah ka nuam ding hiam?
Tua ciang ki-niamkhiat na tawh ka bia ding a,
Ka Pasian lian hi ci’n ka ki ko ding.
Zingsang phalvak tungin,Vansang dawn pan in,
Nisim in lungnopna ka ngah hi,
Mual sang dawn leh guam sung,
Mualkuam zanglei ahi zong,
Topa hong itna in kikhel ngei lo hi.
Zankim lai ahi zong,Ih pa anglim nuai ah,
Lung nop kicing hauhna ka ngah hi,
Nuamsa’n ka om zonginHaksa’n ka om zong in,
Topa hong itna in kicing den hi.
Topa aw hong phat ning, a tawn tung in,
Nisim naisim kong phat zong tul geilo ding,
Nong itna lian in kikhel ngeilo a tawntung,
Topa hong hehpih na lian lua sang.
Mawhna vangik puak zwah ding hilo,
Zeisun singkhuam tungh hong puaksak zota,
Ka mawh hong maisak zo a, a sin hong sawp zo,
A liamma hang natna teng dam khin ta.
(Cho) Ka kha muangta, ka lungmuang ta,
Kalani ah si To Zeisu sisan hang,
Lengthe bangin kakhuang ding hi,
Kuama telzawh loh lungnopna nei khin tang.
Ka etlawm ta Pasian mi dingin
Zeisu paih let in hong ki et ciangin
Tun ka kilawm ta hi, Pasian mi dingin,
Pasian mit tawh kei hong ki et ciangin.
Hong ki leizo, hong ki tan zo,
Man tawh kileisa mikhat ka hita,
Kei hong kisam ding hi mopi pawi sungah,
Nang na uh hiam Tuuno pawipi sungah.
Leitung nuntakna, khat vei leh nopna,
Khatvei leh sehnel gam bang,
Cimawh beidongin, damlo zawngkhal in,
Khat veivei lamet bei kisa.
Topa vang kiamlo kikhel lo,(Hallelujah)
A hoihna kiamlo ki khel lo,
Hong itna zing nisuak bang hi,
Topa hih theihna ki ciangtan lo.
Galilee gamah Zeisu hong vak lai
Damlo tampi damsak hi,Misi thosak hi,
miphak damsak hi,
Natna namkim te damsak hi.
Lunggim mi ading lungnopna om hi,
Bangin hong lunggim sak hiam,
En in na mai-ah thupha nak om hi,
Na up na muan gamzah nang aa,
Topa hong piak thupha, kei leh ka innkuan pihaa ding,
Ki cing hi, hong hehpihna ka phat ding,
Neek leh dawn, silh leh ten, Nisim zat ding sum leh pai
Hong pia hi, ka sapna hong cing sak hi.
(Kicing hi, hong hehpih na thupha )2
kei aading hong hehpihna ki cing hi
(Kicing hi, hong hehpih na thupha )2
kei aading hong hehpihna ki cing hi
A si hang mawh maina, a liamma hangin damna,
Hong pia hi, hong hehpihna ka phat ding,
A khawnkhong nuntakna, A zawnkhal na hang hauhna,
Hong pia hi, hong hehpihna, kicing hi.
Thanemte tha hatna, cidam lote tung damna,
Hongpia hi, hong hehpihna ka phat ding,
Lunggim lungdamna, aki hen mi suahtakna,
Hong pia hi hong hehpih na kicing hi.
Kalsuan simin, honpa kamai ah pai hi,
A itna khut tawh hong makaih a,
Husan simin Topa nangmah kongbia hi,
Nangmah tawh tonkhawm leng nuam ka sa.
Kalsuan simin, a hongpi ding ka thei hi,
A sang zaw ah hong paipih tawntung hi,
Khat vei ni ciang lamtawpna ka tung dinga,
Kalsuan simin inn ka nai semsem ta.
Ka upna tha khat veivei ahong kiam ciang,
Ka etna khempeuh lungkiatna hi,
Ki hei kik in kei hong Gumpa ka et ciang,
Hong ompih man in ka thahat hi.
Bang bang hong piang ta leh Pasian kamuanghi,
Nuntakna a mah sungah om hi,
A mah lampi a hong honsak thei Pa hi,
Khapsa gam nuamah hong tun ding hi.

songs.title: KA KHUAL ZIN NA HIH LEITUNG

lines: Ka khual zinna hih leitungah, haksatna a tam hang,
Ka lam tawpna ah Zeisu in hongngak cih ka thei hi,
Tua mun ka tun matengin ah, kalsuan in ka pai ding,
Van kongkhak pan Zeisu’n hongngak, keizong ka nai semsem
Kumpipa mai kamuh ciang bangzah in a nuam zen tam,
Lungdamna letsong ka sang ding hi,
Leitung ah ka sepna bangin thaman hong kipia ding hi,
Tua hun ciang phawknawn kei na ning,
Hih leitung haksatna te,
Kongit u leh nau lawmgualte aw, hih leitung na nun sungin,
Vantungah na thaman dingin bangzah na khol zo hiam?
Na sepkhiat bang na piakkhiat bang, Topa’n hong thukkik ni ciang,
Maizum in na bu kha zaw diam, lungdam in na om zaw diam.
Hih leitung haksatna leh gimna te ih thuak hangin ah,
Phamawh kei hih leitung gimna tomno khat sung bek hi,
A tawntung ka luah ding kham innpi’nHong ngak cih ka thei hi,
Tua maninTopa nasepna, ke’n nuam kasa sem sem.
Leitung mit tawh mel ka muh loh hang,
Vanglian Pa khut in paai bang hong pom den,
Naubang hong kepnate, Ham bang hong huaite,
A nop in nuam semsem Hallelujah.
Leitung pilna bang mah neilo a,
Lungmawl kei bang lel mimci bang nongtel,
Sian aw na lenggah huan,Gia bangzun ka cimlo,
Lau khasiangtho tuibang hong dim den aw.
Tung solkhapi a mialzong,Tungsunni mual a liam zong,
Mualliam theilo kei nong itna,
Cinglo taklo tual niam ka nunna,A sangna lam hong kaito
, Agape itna Pasian, Namin paak bang kong tawina,
Zaila’n naubang hong awi awi ning maw.
Patpuan hilo, naipuan hilo a,
Zeisu sisan tawh kizem puan silh tang,
Lungin ka gelgel ciang hoihin a hoih sem sem,
Anbang hong itna lian tumdang diaksang.
Na hehpihna tawh hih ciang kong tung,
Mailam ka nunna hong zang toto aw,
Lungbang hong sungden aw, Abraham bangin,
Mite aa ding thupha hong hisak aw.
Ka nunna ka lungngai a lunggim lua cih na’ng theilo,
Mite enleng maizumna khat geelleng lam-et bei,
Kei bang lel ka nuntakna bang hi lel hiam ka cih lai,
Ka maiah sing khuampi khat muthei ing.
Tua hi ka lungdamna, tua hi ka suahtakna,
Tua hi ka kipahna, tua hi ka lam-etna,
Tua hi kei hong siampa, tua hi ka vang neihna,
Tua in gual zawhna hong pia.
Leitung ka nunna khempeuh avekpi’n ka piakhia zo,
Ka sung pan awgingkhia teng phatna la bek ahi zong,
Phat dingin kilawm pen sa’ng,Pahtawi dingin zong hoih pen,
Hong itna lian ke’n bang tawh ka thuk zo diam.
Tu-in kha muanna neitang,Ka geelna teng guak suaklo,
SepnateTopa thupha silh leh teen ding zong hong sik,
Ka kha tha zong hong dim zel,Bangbang piang zong lau nawn keng
Topa deihna bang piangcih ka tel nung sang.

songs.title: VANG LIAN NA KA TUAH DING TEL

lines: Zeisu itna’n sihna pan hong gum khia,
Mi khial kei a dingin a sisan hong luang,
Mangthang mi khial gilo kihhuai pen ing,
Vang lian ka tuah ding tel,
(Oh kei bang leltak in vanglian aka tuah ding,
lamdang oh lamdang lua.
Oh a itna na’n Jesu’n hong gumkhia zo,
Phu loh vangliatna tawh kei hong pom lai a,
Tua vangliatna pian dang sisan vang hi,
Piandang vangliatna hi ka tan dia lawm aw,
Vantung ka tun dong a ka la ding hi,
Pian dang sisan vangin vangliatna kei a.
Van khasiangtho hong leeng a,
A khawlna mun et lawm ee,
Huih bang mau-in lambing in ki pak ziah2
Kam thak pau-in kipau a, lathak te zong ki sakhia,V
anlaukha a khawlna mun et-in lawm ee
Etlawm ee, Etlawm Zion tate,
The bang khuangin gungei sing bang huang diamdiam
,Etlawm ee, Etlawm sian vontawi te,
Gualzawhna lasa-in Topa phat uh hi.
Khanlawhna meibang hong kuang,
Ki-itna hong khang semsem,
A ki-imcip mawhna te zong hong ki phokhia,
A ki lemlo mite tung kilemna daitui hong kia,
Maigum mi zong maitai-in hong diang khia ta.
Dam lo ten damna ngah a,
Lunggim mite’n tawldamna,
Topa tatsa gupngah mi hong khang sem sem,
Vangliatna tawh ki tuamzo, gualzo pen te ihi hi.
Teel tuam tate Topa a ding mainawt ni.
Zan a vansang en ding ka khuadak leh,
Vanpi nungah apil Pasian om veh,
Aksite a mau mun ciat ah belh a,
Van dumpi puan in silh sak khin zota.
Vanglian Pasian lamdangzen mah si cia,
Vanpi’n hong bia, napi’n hong phawk si cia,
Telzawh dinghi lo lamdang nong it zia,
Vanglian Pasian lamdang mah si cia.
Gamla pek ah ni kha aksi ka mu,
Dem zawhloh hehpihna Pasian ka mu,
Meii tung tuangin hong ki pulak ding hi,
Tua kan a lamdang zaw omlo dingpi
Lawp cinten in vantung ka ento a,
A bawlsa khempeuh te lamdang ka sa,
Bang hang peuh mah in kei hong phawk zenzen,
A tapa sing tungah hong ki khai zenzen.
Pa’ inn sungah nopna leh lungkimna om hi tu ni’n,
Sabuai tungah an tampi om a, kua mah nolhlo pi,
Lasakna leh nuihna aw tua mun ah ki za den a,
Ahizong Pa in dahna tawh hih thu hong gen khin ta
Ka inn dim zo ka lo bel hawm si ee,
Tu-ni’n ka lo ah kua kuankhia ding,
Ka it ka tate in sabuai kiim bek um nuam napi,
Ka lo ah kuamah kuan nuamlopi.
Ka lo ah kuamah kuan nuam lopi.
Sabuai kiangah ding khia in kong khak pan in dakkhia ve,
An tam na innpi galah ante kuai khin zo ta ee,
An lak hun khengkhin zo ta a, a la ding omlo ma taw,
Inn sung pan Pa’ thumna aw za thei lo lailai na maw.
Sep ding a ki lawm lopi ka sem kha a,
Gen ding a kilawm lopi ka gen kha hi,
Tua hun ciang hih ka sem dingThupha ka ngah na’ng –in ah,
Mun khat ah gel-in thu ngen khia ning.
Ken’n pawh thu ngen ning,Ken’n pawh thu ngen ning,
Lam hong pii ding lawmpa,Khat ke’n nei le ling,
Ke’n pawh thu ngen ning,Ke’n pawh thungen ning,
Mun khat ah gel-in thu ngen khia ning.
Nisim a hongpiak thupha teng phatpeuh leng,
Ka thumna khempeuh hong dawng ding cih kathei hi,
Mun khat ah gel khian inah.A ma kiang thungen peuh leng,
Ka vangik khempeuh hong dawn khia hi.

songs.title: GUAM TE’N MUAL TE KIPSAK THEI AI VE

lines: Mual tungah ih din teh nuam mah si ee,
Ih kha zong suakta in nuam sa veh,
Pasian tawh a kinai pha diak tawh ki bang ee,
A bawlsa a khutma ih muh teh.
Guam te’n mualte kipsak thei bek ai ve,
Sang kah leng hong hatsak semsem ta,
Topa lunggulh hun te lungdam huai gige,
Guam sung ih tot ciang hong nuam sak se.
Mual leh guam tawh ki dimin ih nun sung teng,
Nop hun leh lungkiat hun ih thuak zel,
Nopsak hun lungkiat hun phukha mah ta se leng,
Tua hun ciang na ngawnin hong kem lel.
Khat vei ciang guam cih bang om nawn ke’n teh,
Zi-on mual tungah ih kah tak ciang,
A etlawm vantung gam ih muh ciang nuam si’n teh,
Hun in hong suvet lo ding tua ciang.
Kong piak vantung nopna,
Na ngah sa suahtakna,
Thei lo-in tu ciang na puuk zeel maw,
Pa’ kiang kong thum sak hi,
An ngawlin thu ka geen zel,
Itna bek in leitung zawhna
Holim nuam ee, Holim nuam ee,
Van a kha siangtho hong kumsuk teh,
Holim nuam ee, Holim nuam ee,
Khasiangtho aw ka sung hong teeng den aw.
Hauhna kong piaksa hi,Zong un na mu ding hi,
Lung nopna pilna kongpiak sa hi,
Dawi in hong kheemzeel maw,
Lau in na lungkia maw, Na sansa upna tawh zo in
Lungkia nawn kei ning, lung kia nawn kei ning,
Suakta zo ka lungdamna khang semsem,
Um lah nawn kei ning,
Nungkik nawnlo ding, upna leh itna in zawhna,
Siatna te’n ih nunna hong zo nuam in,
Ih kampau ah hong siah tawntung hi,
Ih khelh theih na’ngin, ih puk theih na’ngin,
Hong zol hong khem hong tah tawntung hi.
Hong hamsiatte samsia kik lo-in,Thupha tawh thuk in la,
Hong bawlsiate ading thu nget sak in,
Siatna leh gitlohna te’n,Kizo sak peuhmah kei in la,
Thu hoih le thupha tawh zo tawntung in.
Na galte a gilkial leh an pia in,
A dang a taak leh zong tui suah in,
Siatnate siatna tawh thuk kik lo in,
Thu hoih thupha tawh zo tawntung in.
Hong sam hi eite thupha luah dingin,
Thuman sang thuhoih len tawntung in,
A nam tui pen leh a deih huai pen in,
Dikna puan bangin silh, tawntung in.

songs.title: BETSAIDA BUAL AH KI DIAH IN

lines: Betsaida bual kilok lai,
Kha siangtho huih a nun lai,
A hun lap aa ki diah te’n,
Damna ngah damna ngah hi.
Lap lai teh aw lap teh,Betsaida bual kilot lai,
Ki diah in tun ki diah in,
Paulap zongzong nawn ke’n aw.
Na nunna lungmuang ken aw,
Paal lunte zong tual kia thei,
Na laukha lailungmuang ding,
Cii bang teel zekai ke’n aw.
Hih lampi tawnin sawtpi ka pai zo hi,
Hi hi dam tak in pai ning,
Mualsang te lah kah hak mahmah aa,
Khat veivei ka nungah van a gik pua ing.
Inn ka tun teh a vek in bei na veh,
Ka buai na teng,Tua mual kan khin peuhpeuh leng,
Ka vangik teng nga ning,Tua munah ka tun tak teh,
Lungdamna khitui luang ding,
Inn ka tun teh a vekin bei na ve
Ka buai na teng.
Tu laitak in bel, haksatna a tam hang ,
Ka hat na’ng a hong piak hi,
Zanin khuamial in ka lungzuan hang,
Kei guak hong nusia ngei het lo ding a hi.
