Mite’n Zeisu’ nungzuihna,Lung kia in tawp san mah leh,
Ke’n bel ka cross pua-in ka zui den ding, Nisim in tha hong guan ding,
To Zeisu ka nei zo hi,Suplawh keining Zeisu nung ka zuih man in.
Hong piak sate bek ah lungdam ka hi kei hi,
Hong piak lai ding te ah zong a min phat ning,
Tua manin nisim-in ah, gual zawhna la ka sa hi,
Sup lawh kei ning Zeisu nung ka zuih man in.
Ka kha nuntakna dingin,Ka muh nailoh vantung gam,
Upna tawh tung ding ci’n ka gen khol gam,
Pasian’ hong kamciam bangin,
Hih leitung na khempeuh zong,
Hong piak thuah ding cih upna tawh ka mu ta.
Pasian in a Tapa hong sawl,
Hong it ding leh hong damsak ding,
Ka mawhnate maisak ding hong pai,
Nungta a hih manin a han guak bek om hi.
Nungta ahih man bangbang piangta se leh,
Phamawh sa keng zong lau bek keng,
Mailam hunte a khut sungah om cih thei ing,
A mah nungta ahih man ka nun na’n man nei.
Naugek te zong Amah hong kep sak,
Bangzah tak in lungdam huai hiam,
Tua sangin zong lungdam huai zaw lai,
Nungta ahih man lau nang omlo cih thu mahmah
Ni khat ni ciang sihna gungal ah,
Haksapi-in ka kan ding hi,
Tua hun ciangin sih na zozo in,
Amah kumpi a hihlam ka mu thei ding hi.
Kei tumtak in lungdamna lasa-in ka pai hi,
Khat veivei ka lungzuangin ka phun kha zelzel hi,
Hi bang dinmun ciang bek tawh vakthap lel ding maw,
Vantung mite tawh vanlapi sa khawm lo ding maw.
Mualsang tungpan in la aw gal zak ing,
A mah muang in mang leng kei zong sa thei ding hing,
Tua lungdamna thugen in ka vak kawm in ah,
Lim tak in ka ngaih tak ciangin Vanlapi ka za.
Lungdamna thu gimpi a, genbaih kei mah in teh,
Na ki pat khiat ding zong baih kei thei kha mah in teh
,Hi hang ki pan phot lecin na tel na ding hi,
Vanlapi a kisakna mun Zion na hi.
Deidan neilo simlei vannuai mi khempeuh,
Lainat na aw nemno tawh hong sam lai,
Calvary tulsinglel tungah khattang vontawi,
Duang kikhai-in nang leh kei itna hong lak.
(Nial zo keng)2 Zeisu hong itna,
Kata aw hong ciah in, hong ciah in,
Lainatna awnem tawh hong samsam lai ve,
Nial zo keng, nial zo keng ee.
Thei hi leh nang zong nial kei ni teh maw,
Theihloh kal hong it takpi Zeisu hi,
Mipilte leh sum haute’n zong mu zo tuan lo,
Ke’n nei tangh ee lungnopna taktak Zeisu.
Keima kong biak Pasian, A vang lian Pasian,
Ngaihsut zawhloh in vaangliatna tawh dim hi,
Sim zawhloh aksi- te phazah ding seh a,
Tua van aksi-te a min ciatin sam hi.
Keima phatna lel tawh Topa lungkim hi,
Keima biakna lelte Topa’n hong saang hi,
Kei ka ginatloh hang Topa vaanglian hi,
Ka biak Pasian hangin ka lungdam ding hi.
Eite biak Pasian in a nungta Pasian,
Sing leh suang pasian, a si pasian hi lo
Amah nungta ahih man, kei ka nungta hi.
Ka Topa a ding kei ka nungta ding hi.
Pasian ngaihsut tham ding, mi’n bang hi lel hiam?
A hong phawk tham ding mi in bang hi lel hiam?
A Tapa khat neihsun hong pia ka Pasian,
Hong itna vantung pan leitung hong tuak suk.
Vantung kongkhakte tang pempam,
Sabuaite kiphah dimdem,
Kong honsa gei-ah mi khat ding veh,
A tee zialzial gun ka mu a, ka tenna ding mun hi ta,
Hih zah liangin , inn lunggulh ngei keing
Tua khuapi tee zeizai,Inn ka tu’n ding zong hong nai,
Ka pa’n kongkhak gei-ah hong ngak zen ve leh,
Hih leitung gam simtham pan,Suakta ding kiging zo tang,
Hih zah liangin inn lunggulh ngei ke’ng
A inn kuankuan in kikhawm uh,A mai tai thei mahmah uh,
A dahmai cih bang kimu lo hi,Lunggulhna tawh ka khiluang a,
Kha nei leng ka leeng nuam ta,
Hih zah liangin inn lunggulh ngei keing
Puan pak silhin lasa ziahziah,Tuuno pahtawina la hi,
Kham gawsem tumin mi siang honpi,
Phat khawm veni amau bang mah,
Tatsa mi siangte hi hang,Hih zah liangin inn lunggulh ngei keing.
A seem dingte tawm lua a, na sep ding tampi om hi,
Topa buh lak hun zo ta hi.Buhte minkhin kuai zota hi,
Tawntung khuamial gam sungah nisim in bei den,
Aw, nisim nai simin bei den,
Ka itna bei thei tuanlo,
A mawkna in ka si luang ke’nteh,
Ka tatsate’n ahilh kei leh,
Vantung mi sawl mai ning.
Kuate ahiam, ka sawl ding, kei adingin kua pai nuam,
Ka si manpha tawh ka tatsa,Mawhna sungah nisim bei den,
Ka kiangah hong tung thei ding kuamah omlo
Amaute ka it manin, ka gam nuampi nusia in,
Singkhuam tungah kipia zo ingh.Gimna thuak a ka tatna thu,
Mi tampi’n theilo in khuamial sung om den.
Kei hiah om ingh Topa aw, nang ading hong sawl inla,
Ka nuntakna nang a hi khin,Kha siangtho in hong makaih hen,
Ka sem den ding gam khempeuh na neih mateng.
Na sih nung ciang koi-ah na pai diam?
Nang hong Tanpa mun bawlsa ah maw?
Nang hong kheempa Satan kiangah maw?
Na sih nung ciang koi-ah na pai diam?
Mihingta ding khatvei sih seh hi,
Tuani hun ciang thukhenna a om ding aa,
Nang zong sanggam aw, na si ding hi.,
Na sih nung ciang koi-ah na pai diam?
Na sih nung ciang koi-ah na pai diam?
Nang hong Tanpa mun bawlsa ah maw?
Na pai theih na’ng hong Gumpa muangin,
Khantawn hinna na ngahna ding hi.
Na sih nung ciang koi-ah na pai diam?
Nang hong Tanpa mun bawlsa ah maw?
Tawntung nopsakna le gim thuakna,
Na deih teel in koi-ah na pai diam?
Na sih nung ciang koi-ah na pai diam?
Nang hong Tanpa mun bawlsa ah maw?
Lungnop kicing ding khat bek om hi,
Mihing nunna paakpalh bang ahi.
Topa hong gupkhiatna thu donlo in na omlai leh,
Na nuntakna lungngai in, bangci ding na geel ngei maw
Ka thuhilhte siatkaih in, nialnial in na om lai leh,
Ni khatni ciangin na zong ding hi.
Van mangpa kikona tawh,Peengkul hong kitum tak the,
Gupkhiat mi siangtho khempeuh,Mitphiat kai in hong mang ding,
Na pasal hong mang ding hi, Na tate hong mang ding hi,
Tua ni takteh nang kua na ngawh diam?
Tua ni hong tun tak teh, hih leitung dahhuai sin teh,
Vengsak veng khang mi kizong a, khitui luanna om ding,
A lumkhawm khat hong mang ding,Ansu khawm khat hong mang ding,
Tua nitak teh nang kua na ngawh diam?
Pawlpi sungah min apin, pawlpi ngeina teng zui-in,
Gamtat hoihna hahkat in, kikhawm in sumpi pia-in,
Tui na kiphum khit tak teh, Vantung tun ding na sawm leh,
Khatvei na suakkik in Topa’n ci.
Na mawhna tu’n kisik in, peengkhul hong kitum ma in,
Tua vantung mopi pawi-ah nang zong na om kei kha deh,
Na sih khit ciangin hankhuk sungah vai kihawm nawnlo,
Cih thei in, tu-in na Piangthak in.
Topa aw, kong muang hi, Nang mah bek kong muang hi.
Hih leitung nuntakna, lungmuan om thei lopi,
Uptheih muantheih dingin, lungsim hemlam tam si,
Hih leitung ka nun sung, Topa bek kong muang hi.
Kei hong sungin, kei hong liah in, ka Honpa aw,
Ka suangpi aw, bittak in na khaliim hong seel aw,
Lungmuanna huang sungah,Tawldamna liim sungah,
Hong Lenin hong kha in, Na-ang sungah
lungmuang takin,Hong khawlsak aw
Mite muan ding sangin, Topa muan hoih zaw hi,
A muang mite lampi, Topa’n hu-in keem hi.
Hong paisan ngeilo hi, hong nusia ngeilo hi,
Hih leitung ka nun sung, Topa bek kong muang hi.
Hong theikhial ngeilo hi, hong telkhial ngeilo hi,
Amah muanna sungah, dohna khempeuh veng hi,
Hong enkhial ngeilo hi, hong hokhial ngeilo hi,
Hih leitung ka nun sung, Topa bek kong muang hi.
Man neilo hi bang leel kei nuntak sung,
Iplahna them zong neilo bang ah
Topa maipha muh nang semzolo pi’n,
Hizahta nong it ma’n nuam lua ing.
Tu’n nanga hi ta’ng hong Gumpa aw,
Tubansiah nang thu hi ta’ng ka To Zeisu,
Bangbang piang ta zong hong phat den ni’ng,
Nang lo-in bang mah tangtun zo ke’ng
Ze-etna namkim in kei hong tuam hang,
Lungmuang ta’ng, To Zeisu’n hong do sak,
Simmawh thu’n tamvei hong kinelhsiah zong,
Gualzo ka To Zeisu min phat ta’ng.
Tulai momno lia le taang,
Ih gam a ding nang bang na geel, mawhna kol sung,
Gal in don vaw mulkim huai lua,
luankhi tawh, Nisim thunget kisam.
Hong it lua veng aw, ih Zogam mialpi sung zong,
Banghang tu ciang Zeisu meel a leeng lo,
Kua muang na hiam i gam a ding Zeisu in,
Nang teekteek hong deih.
Nang nong kihel loh in maw,
Hong mial semsem ding ih Zogam maw u leh nau,
Dipkuat huai lua tulai ih nuntakna thu,
Citak ding hong deih hi.
Gamthak khuavak puak dingin,
Nang leh kei ih mawhpuak hi na thei nai maw?
Dipkuat huai lua tulai ih nuntakna thu,
Citak ding hong deih hi.
Mi honpite laizang ka ding Topa
Minam tuamtuam pau dangdang lakah
Si tawh nong tatsa mi ka hi Topa
Sihna panin nong hon khia
Kam in cin kei, nuam sing cih ding longal
Kam in cin kei, phat taak cih longal
A hih hang ka aw sangkhan in
La ka sa ding hi, ka hih theih zahin.
(Halelujah)3 Tuuno ci’n
(Halelujah)2, Na si sung kiptak ka ding
Leii teng in nam teng in mi khempeuh in
Gam khempeuh in minthang sak ni,
Tawisang ciat ni, minphatna pia ni, Pasian Tuuno.
Nong hehpihna sung kiptak ka ding
Nong sawp tuuno sisan tawh
Ka tate aw cin ko nong sam hi
Na mai khukdin thu kong ngen
Vangliatna khahkhia’n, ko sung na kasep nang
Nang tawh kibang nuamzaw kan lai ing
Nam teng in nang hong muh nang
Na minthan lak in kong bia ding hi.
Khuk khempeuh khukdin leii teng in
Nang Topa hi cin pulak ding Zeisu I Topa hi.
A kha nuai-ah, lungmuang takin ka om a,
Khuamialpha a, huihpi nak nun’hangin,
Ka muang thei hi, hong kem ding hi, ka thei hi,
Hong tan zo hi, a mata ka hihi.
A kha nuaiah,hong na pan,
Kuamah’n hong khen zolo ding ,
A kha nuaiah keima kha teeng ding
,Lungmuang tak om tawntung ning.
A kha nuaiah, dah ciangin belh dingin pha hi,
A mah kiang a tawldamnuam lunggulh ing,
Leitungin hong damsak zolo ciangin ah,
Tua lai-ah hehnem, lung damna ka ngah.
A kha nuaiah,nopna bangzah tak manpha,
Nuntak haksatna beima teng beel ning,
Hong liah, hong dal; siatna’n hong sutheilo ding,
Zeisu sung khawlleng lungmuan tawntung ning.
Singlamteh hang nuam sing
Leibat nong loh sak nuam sing
Zum le dai nong thuak sak hi
Kei nong it man lamdang hehpih nong pia.
Hih it na hang nuam sing
Aki kilh khut te hang nuam sing
Sian thona tuitawh hong sawp hi
Hong pomna le hong maisakna tun thei tang.
(Cho) Tuuno kilawm hi to khomtung tu in
Lukhu tampi na khu hi
Zawh na tawh na maang hi
Pasian ta Zeisu pahtawi lam to un
Van ngaihno Zeisu kithat lum hi
Tuuno kilawm hi, Tuuno kilawm hi.
Ih teenna hih leitung tui hual bang kilok thei,
Khat veivei, Zeisu ki mangngilh thei.
Upna a piang sakpa upna kicing sakpa,
Zeisu teltak ih et ding hi zaw.
Mi zong piak ka sawmlo mi aa, zong ka englo,
To dang zong ka deihlo Zeisu bek,
Ka tuanna tembaw a hoi zongin ka laulo,
Ka lungmuanna Jehovah Shalom
Ka teenna leitung in Zeisu bang a ci zongin,
Kei aa Zeisu bek mah manpha pen,
Amah ka zungpi ka nuntakna naak hi a,
Ken nusia thei nawnlo Zeisu
Thupha hong pia thei ding To dang a om zongin,
Sihna zo a thokik Zeisu bek,
Ama hangin tu’n kei sihna pan ka suakta,
Lungnopna kha muanna hong pia.

songs.title: GILGAL AH THA IH LA DING

lines: Canaan gam zuan dingin a pai diamdiam lai un,
Ai khua sim ding hong kithawi uh,
Joshua lungkham lua in,Topa tung thungen aa,
Na khut sung teipi zan in Topa’n ci hi.
Gilgal ah tha ih la dinga, nung kiklo
Mi siangte mainawt ni,Kha tha tawh ih do ding a
,Khazih gam zai semsem ding
Khazih a ding ih tha saan ciat ni.
Khazih galkapte aw, hong ding khia mengmeng un,
Topa’n thu hong ciamkhinzo a,Lauken la, lung kia ken,
Galhiam tawh kithawi un na sikna ciang ciang,
Na gam hong pia ning ci.
Tu’n Joshua tekta a, a kum zong tam lua ta,
Gal sim ding tamlua Joshua aw,
Na gal sim ding tamlua na mite tha pia in,
Canaan gam na hawm sak in Topa’n ci hi.
Vang ngaih ang lai ka pom ta,
San mun muang mun muang sawl bang ka heita
Vang ngaih bel ka To Jesu ka neih khit teh
Gual in nuih ciam hong lel zong naubang ka heh hong nem pa
Hong dam sak pa To Jesu ken nei hi veng.
(Cho) Zai la in ka oih cim lo
Va bang in ka laam cim lo
Vang ngaih bel ka To Jesu ka neih khit the
Zin in gibang hong khen zong
Ang lai naubang ka pom sa
Vang ngaih Jesu tawh sam bang khen nawn lo ding.
Sim lei ah mi zatam ten ka paal lai zu bang in hong nial zong le
Lung mawlken ang lain au bang ka pom cim lo
Kua tawh tan bang kong the diam nong it nathuk in sang ee,
Sang gah ken na paal ningtui ka dawn cim lo.
Mubang kong ngaihluatman mawka paal lainang ading hong piaing e,
Lung mawl ken anglai pai bang kong pom cim lo
Hong sang aw ka duang neem ni, ka luan khitui bek mah hi
Nang ading kum sawt tang bang hong dam sak aw.
Vankong khak ki hong ta
Nuntak na tui hong luang khia
Luang den ta hen
A tawntung in ah, Zeisu tokhom tung pan.
(Cho) Lungnop damna suah takna leh nuntakna,
Topa hong piak thupha te, Up na tawh thungen
Mi khempeuh tungah, Thupha hong tung ta hen.
Lungnop suah tak na
Ka Topa’n hong pia ka sung pan in
Nuntakna ciktui hong luang khia
Lungnop damna suah takna leh nuntakna,
Topa hong piak thupha te, Up na tawh thungen
Mi khempeuh tungah, Thupha hong tung ta hen.(Haleluijah)
Haleluijah Kumpipa minthang hen
Haleluijah Pasian Tuuno aw
Phat dingin Na ki lawm
Kalungsim khempeuh tawh
Haleluijah Pasian Tuuno aw
(Thanem te’n hat zo cihen
A zawng te’n hau zo ci hen
Mittaw te’n mu zo ci hen
Topa’n kei tung hong sem khin zo)2
(Cho) Hosana Hosan A kigo van tuuno
Hosana hosan sih na pan tho kik zo kik hi.
Tua guntui sung kaki bual hi
Mawh na teng hong sawp siang hi
Hong hon pa it na ciktui
Vantung pan hong luang suk hi
Tua guntui thuk sung pan tho in
Topa ang ka zuanding hi
Hong suak tasak a hih man
Hot dam na la ka sa ding
Lungnop suahtakna ka Topa’n hong pia,
Ka sung panin Nuntakna ciktui hong luangkhia
Lungnop suahtakna ka Topa’n hong pia.
(Cho) (Nuntakna laibu sung ka min kigelh zo)3
Haleluijah
(Lungdam na tawh phat ziahziah ni,
Topa in gualzah na hong pia khin zo hi)2
I lang pang galhiam ten hong zolo ding,
I lang pang kumpi gamkip loding,
Topa in eite hotkhiatna Suangpi hi
Oh! Tuuno' sisan hang,zawhna i ngah zo hi!
Hallelujah! Zeisu nungta hi,
Sihna in zong len zolo,Hankhuk zong kinusia ta,
Zeisu a tawntungin Nungta hi, nungta hi.
Amah Alpha le Omega,
A patna le a tawpna,Mawhna hamsiatna bei khin,
Suahtakna i ngah khin zo,Pasian’ Tuuno tho kik zo
Nungta hi, nungta hi,Halelujah, Zeisu nungta hi.
A hoih Topa a lamdang Honpa
Ka vai khempeuh Nangma khut sungah
Om cih thei ing, Nang deih bangin
Nong seek ding hi
Na omna sung ah damtak Nong kai a
Na Kha Siangtho tawh lam Nong lak a
Nangma sung ah no semsem nangin
Hong hilh in
Siangtho sapna sung Nong tawn sak a,
Kei Nong teel hi Nang kiangah hong kai in
Hong puah pha’n Topa kong ngen hi
Hong seek, hong bawl, hong zang hong dim
Beel seekpa khut sung kong ki-ap hi
Hong sam hong lak hong len hong tonpih in
Beel seekpa khut sung kong ki – ap hi.
Kei hong panpih kei lecin
Koi lam ka zuan diam? Zingsang khuavak
Bang ci’n tho in ka muak thei diam?
Nong hehpihna tawh ka nung pan nong sam sam hi
Nang tawh I ki nai hang in
Topa kong mu thei kei hi
(Cho) (Topa na hoih)2
(Nong hehpihna a tawntung kip hi)2
(Na migit na kei hong musak in
Na hihna bang hong mu sak in)2
Na hih na bang taktak in.
Nang na siangtho, siangtho
Nang bang omkei Topa,
Nang na siangtho siangtho
Na minthang den ta hen!
Minphatna la ka sasa ding,
Kong it zaw semsem ding,
Kumpi tokhom tawh kinai-na mun ah,
Ka om na’ng ka mu hi.
(Haleluijah)3 Topa maang hi,
(Haleluijah)3 Vanglian Topa maang hi.
A lamdang vangliatnapi tawh
A gualzawhna hong lak hi.
Khuamial tung leh sihna tungah
Gualzo khin
Thong kia mite suahtakna pia,
Sikkol khempeuh sutat khin
Hong hehpihna hang Gupna ngah ta!
[(Topa maang)3(Leitung lungdam hen)3
Mi khempeuh kipak hen, Topa maang hi.]2
(Cho) Meikuang Ama’ mai ah pai,
Gal te khempeuh kangtum khin
Topa omna ah
(mualte khuainun bang tuisuak)2
A thumaanna vantung in hong lak,
A vangliatna mi ten mu
Na khempeuh tung
Topa Nangmah,
(kong laamto uh hi)2
Hiah nang kong ngak hi
Kasung ah hong teng in
Topa kong lunggulh luahi
Nang sung hong selin
Khuk din thu kong ngen
Kong thei tel nuam zaw sem sem hi
(Cho) Ka sung teeng in
Ka nunna hong zang in
Ka leeng to ding
Muvan lai bang.
//Zeisu Pasian tuuno, naming manpha hi//
Ka thazawn ciangin ka hatna
Ka zonzon hauhna nang nahi
Ka bangkim nang nahi
Saungmanpha bangin kong zong hi
Hong khahsuah leng mihai hi ning
Ka bangkim nang nahi
Na lakhia khinzo ka mawhna
Na thokik zo na min ka phat
Ka bangkim nang na hi
Ka puk ciangin nong phong kik hi
Ka dangtak ciang tui nong suah hi
Ka bangkim nang na hi
A siam bel hong damsak theipa
Hong it Topa Zeisu hi.
Dahna hong nopsak nangin ah,
A hong sapna aw ngai in.
Vantung mi a la sakna,Leitung mi pha bel cihna,
Sa ni a ngaih mahmah la,Zeisu pha bel min hi.
Na mawhna a hong phel Topa,
A hong sapna aw ngai in.
Vantung lam nuam tak zui inla,
Zeisu tawh kham lukhu in,
A hingkik Tuuno vanglianpa
Zeisu ke’n ka hong um hi.
Hong gum Topa na min a pha,
A lianbel ka ci ding hi.
Zeisu maitang mu dingin ah,
Vantung ka paitoh ciangin,
A hong itna tokhom kiangah
Phatna lasa tawntung ning.
Zeisu ah deihna teng hi, Hin na, nuam na, van nuai,
Nisim-in a mah tha lo-in, Ka puk ding a lau huai,
Ka dah ciang a-ma kiang ka pai,
Mun dang bang lo ka mai a taai,
Ka dah ciang hong nuamsak, A mah- Kei ma lawm.
Zeisu a deihna teng cing hi, Lungkham laitak ka lawm,
Thupha deih in amah zuan leng,A ma’n hong pia nawnnawn,
Ni tang le guah tui hong pia hi,
Tuk ciangin an hong la sak hi,
Nitaang, guahtui, le an hong pia, Kei ma lawm.
Zeisu a deihna teng cing hi, A tung ka thu man ding,
Kei tungah hong thuman ka lawm,Bangci ka nial zo ding,
A-mah zui leng ka khial ngei kei,
Sun le zan hong cing khial ngei kei,
Sun le zan in zui-ning a mah, Kei lawm,
Zeisu a deihna teng cing hi,Lawmpha zaw deih tuan keng,
Amah tu in ke’n ka muang a,Muang lai ding sih ma teng,
Hih bang lawm tawh nuntak a nuam,
Bei geilo ding hinna a nuam
Bei ngeilo nuntakna nuam na, Kei ma lawm.
Van kong kihong ta
Nuntakna tui hong luang khia
Luang den ta hen
A tawntung in ah, Zeisu tokhom tung pan
Lungnop damna, suahtakna leh nuntakna
Topa hong piak thuphate, Upna tawh thu ngen
Mi khempeuh tungah, Thupha hong tung ta hen

songs.title: PHAT DING NA KILAWM HI TOPA ZEISU

lines: (Phat ding na kilawm hi Topa,
Zeisu! Pahtawi ding na kilawm hi
Phat ding na kilawm hi Topa
Min thanna khempeuh ngah ding)2
(Vangliatna khempeuh
Ukzawhna khempeuh
A tawntung phat dingin na kilawm hi
Vangliatna khempeuh
Uk zawhna khempeu
A tawntung phat dingin na kilawm hi)2
Vanglian pasian Topa
Na min kong phat den ding hi
Vanglian Pasian Topa
Na min kong phat den ding hi.
Zingsang simin nang kong zong ding
Nong thuhilhna bang mangin hong zui ning,
Kal khat khit khat Aman hong kha,
Nisim in Topa nung ka zui den ding,
Nisim in Topa ka zui den ding,
Nisim in Topa nung ka zui den ding,

Nisim in Topa nung ka zui den ding.
Zeisu kong phat uh hi
Kumpite Kumpipa, Hong kumsuk aw,
Hong khawl in Topa,
Na vangliatna kong phat uh hi.
Siangtho biakpiakna kong pia uh,
Siangtho biakpiakna kong pia uh,
Siangtho biakpiakna kong pia uh,
Zeisu kumpi hong kumsuk aw.
//Zeisu a hoihpen Topa
Zeisu lamdang thulakpa
Min khempeuh sangin
Min lianzaw kong pia uh hi
Ko tawh hong omkhawm lamdang hi//
//Phat ding na kilawm hi
Pahtawi dingin
Khut siangthote lamto sa in
Na min siangtho hong phat ung//

Na bawl nate lamdang hi
Nang bang om lo hi Topa
Nang bang om lo hi Topa//
Sehnel gam sung tui na phul sak, Israel tung na piak bangin,
Zogam keu ah nunna tui luangsak aw,
Zomite kha dangtak lua in nunna lam pan pialkhinta ung,
Na kha siangtho hong sawlkik in aw Topa
Hong pikhia in aw Topa, hong pikhia in,
Na tuu huang nuam sungah omkim dingin,
Muvanlai tha hong guan in, tai tampi hong tonpih in,
Na khalim nuai hong khawlsak in aw Topa
Suangpi panin tui na phulsak, Israelte na dawn sak bang,
Zomi kha dangtakte hong dawnsak aw,
Isrealte na pi-khia aa, Canaan gam sung na lutpih bang,
Na kha siangtho hong lutpih kik aw Topa,
Van anlum leh vamim sa tawh, Israelte na vak bangin,
Zomite zong nek le dawn hong pia aw,
Nangma sungah nuamsa dingin aneu alian hong huaikim in,
Itna Pasian nangbek hong muang ung Topa.
Kei vapai ning mangthangte kiang,
Nong gupna thu tangko dingin,
Zogam buppi hong khanglo sakkik aw,
Laulo hangtak, na thu gen ding,
Na kha siangtho hong guankik aw,
Mangthangte kiang gupna thu gen ning Topa.
Zomi te hong tawi sang in minam lian in hong bawl a,
Zomi te thupha hong pia in gual tawh tan bang kim ding in
Pilna siam nate nong pia inn leh lo te nong pia aa

(Cho) Hong makaih a hong hilh pa leivui pan hong lam
Topa tagah inn pan hong dom to
Kumpi inn dong ah hong kha.
Zomi te hong lamto in minam lian in nong bawl a,
Zomi te thupha hong pia a gual tawh tan bang kim ding in,
Mipil tampi nong pia a, misaim tampi tak nong pia
Topa laptoh Zomi te mipil misaim Zomi te.
Zomi te hong makaih in minam lian in nong bawl a,

Mimbang pianna tuan pupate’n,
Sin lailung a mawl manin maw,

Nun bang nuam aw, ih gam lei-ah
Namcin Zeisu naubang ih pom ciang,
Lungdeih teng liibang cing ding a,
Zo laukha hong paallun ding hi.
Tun le zua, lia leh taangte aw,

Tung Sianmang in lung awilo ee,
Gual tawh kim ding Sian siam hi.
Tung Sianmang naubang a pomte,

Gual tung tuang vabang pil ding.
Heitui vangkhua piankum 100 cinna Jubilee.

Laambang pakkhawm ve ni ee,
Tuan pupa leh tongdot te sinlai vabang phawngsak cia,

Kum 100 cinna tun mualsuang kiphut zo ta ee,
Khangsawn noten tuubang ciin na ding.
Khangsawn momno te vabang pil in siam ciat ni,
Pi le pu ten mabang hong patsak.
Second David kha galdo ding tangbang dam in nong tungta maw.
Heitui vangkhua khimzinna gamah, khimbang a zing heitui
Vangkhua nibang a taan theih nading in, sepna khempeuh
Topa minthan na hita hen!
(Cho) Second David kha galdo khitui gospel te aw,
Heitui vangkhua ko ading in tuang nong tungta uh maw,
Tangbang dam in sepna khempeuh Topa gualzawhna hita hen,
Sepna khempeuh Topa minthanna hita hen!
Kha galdo ding galkap te aw tangbang dam in nong tungta maw,
Heitui vangkhua khimzinna gamah, khimbang a zing heitui
Vangkhua nibang a taan theih nadingin, sepna khempeuh
Topa minthanna hita hen!
Khitui gospel gospel te aw tangbang damin nong tungta maw,
Heitui vangkhua khimzinna gam ah, khimbang a zing heitui
Vangkhua nibang a taan theih nadingin, sepna khempeuh
Topa minthanna hita hen!
Hih leitung nuntakna sungah,
A haksa nuntakna sungah
Ka kha Topan hong kem kei leh
A mangthang ding tumah in zong.
(Cho) Kum ten hong khengta, nang nakikhel maw
A beisa sung na mawhna te lungngai in,
A thak kum sungah hong kem lai lai in,
Hong tung ding kumthak ah ni taang pha hong tan aw.
A ni hong bei a kha hong bei
Kum ten hong kheng diai diai ta a,
Hong tung ding a thak kum sung ah,
Bang hun hong hi ding kithei lo.
Len un, len un a nuam kumlui
Tu mah in hong paisan ding hi
Mi khempeuh a ding a it huai
Kumlui aw hong paisan dingmaw.
Leitung lungdam, Topa hong pai,
Kumpi za ngah ding hi.
Lungsim kheempeuh bawl phat sak hi.
Van leh lei la sak ngai, Van leh lei la sak ngai
Van leh, van leh lei la sak ngai.
Leitung nuam na’ng Zeisu maang hi.
Mihingte’n la sa hen.
Lo lai, tuipi, suangpi, mualpi’n
Kidem in ham uh hen, Kidem in ham uh hen
Kidem, kidem in ham uh hen.
Nung ciang mawhna a khan’loh na’ng
Ling in bawlsia lo ding
A pha lo na a pha bel in
Bawlpha ding hong pai ding,
Bawlpha ding hong pai ding,
Bawlpha, bawlpha ding hong pai ding.
Hong hehpihna thupha bel in,
Leitung hong uk ding hi.
A minthang siangtho hong itna
Mi kheempeuh thei sak hi,
Mi kheempeuh thei sak hi
Mi khem, mi kheempeuh thei sak hi.
Ke’n nei khin tang ka saknop la,
Gupkhiat ka hih nung sang,
Kumpi, Honpa phatna la,
Gupkhiat ka hih nung sang.
Gupkhiat ka hih nung sangGupkhiat ka hih nung sang,
Ama min tawh vanglian ningGupkhiat ka hih nung sang,
Ka Honpa’ min in ka vanglian ding
Ke’n nei hong lungkimsak Khazih,
Gupkhiat ka hih nung sang.
Ama deih bek ka bawl ding hi,
Gupkhiat ka hih nung sang.
Ke’n nei kitel teci panna,
Gupkhiat ka hih nung sang,
Beisak launa leh up lahna,
Gupkhiat ka hih nung sang.
Ke’n nei kei a ding inn muanpi,
Gupkhiat ka hih nung sang,
Tua’h atawntung ka um ding hi.
Gupkhiat ka hih nung sang.

songs.title: I NGAK LAITAK HONG TUAK DIAM

lines: Topa Zeisu nuamna hong pia dingin,
Sunkim zankim hong pai leh,
Lungsim dikin meivak a baihsa in,
I ngak laitak hong tuak diam.
Ute naute, I kigingciatzo hiam?
I kha inn nuam lutna ding,
Nangmah leh kei kigingsa’n hong mu diam?
Ngak in, Topa hong pai ding ngak in.
Zingsang khat peuh phalvak tung pan laitak,
Khat khat in hong sam pak leh,
Hong kepsak talen I piakkik laitak,
Pha hi, nang hong ci-na diam?
Hong vaikhakna bangin i hih zo leh,
I siamnazah sit kei leng.
I lungsim kisuanna a om kei leh,
Nopnapha I ngah ding hi.
A ngak zote in thupha ngah ding hi,
Vangtung khua-ah maangkhawm ding,
Sunkim zankim a hong pai kha ding hi,
I ngak laitak hong tuak diam?
Topa Zeisu hong paikik ciang vantung pengkulaw za a
Zingtung khuavak tawntung nuamtak taang ding hi.
Kiphelna ngah mihingte inGungal hong kikhop ciangin,

(Vantungah, min hong sak laitak)3
Min hong sap laitakKeimah zong om ding hing.

Topa tawh nungtakik a nuam sung tum hi.
Sihna a ngah mihingte in vantung inn ah tum ciangin,
Min hong sap laitak keimah zong om ding hi’ng.
Topa a na hong semsak a zing nitum dong matengin,
Kidopna tawh ama itna gensak ni.
Leitung sihna hun hong kheng ding hi, Nasep natang zo in,
Min hong sap laitak keimah zong om ding hi’ng.
Vantungah gam a minthang bel eite aa dingin om hi,
Kum simin mi siangthote ki khawm uh hi,
Gam minthang tawh kinai theih nang in-ni in hongkheng hi,

(Gammin thang hong piang a hun tung dek tak hi)2

kumpipaMinthang tawh hong pai ding hi.

,Phatna aw kizak ciang dawi’gam kiling hi.
Lawmte tua ahih ciang awng un phatna pi.
Galkap honpi bangin pawlpi’n masot hi,

Eite kikhenlo in pumkhat bek I hi.
Lawp le zuih kikhat in hong ki-it sak hi.
Kumpi’za siathei hi, kumpi’gam kip kei,
Hih hang Zeisu’ pawlpi cik mah’n siathei kei,

.Tum in, tu in tum in, omna om lai.

songs.title: KAH HANG HONG GUM ZO LO

lines: Kah hang hong gum zolo
Khitui in ka mai sawp zong
Ka launa daisak tuamlo,
Mawhna kum sawpsiang theilo,
Kah hang hong gum zolo.
(Cho) Zeisu kap keitang ding si,
Singkhuam tungah khaina thuak,
Kei hong hon dingin hong ngak
A mah bek hong hon thei.
Sep hang hong gum zolo,
A hoih pen ka sem thei zong
A siang pen ka ngaihsun zong,
Ka kha thak suaksak thei kei,
Sep hang hong gum zolo.
Ngak hang hong gum zolo,
Huh theihloh mawhna nei zong
Ka bil sung hehpih’n hong sam,
Ngak lai leng ka si ding hi
Ngak hang hong gum zolo.
Khazih up na’n hong gum
Hong umsak in na Tapa
A bawlsa nate um in
A khut in kei hong pom ding,
Khazih upna’n honggum.
Mawhna zol zuikei in, na zuihleh khial ding
Khatvei zo phot lecin, a zom zawhnop ding
Pasal nakpi’n do in, lunggulhna mialpi
Zeisu en gige in, hong zawhpih ding hi
Hong huh nading thungen in
Tha hong pia hong kem ding hi
Hong huhnuam hi Topa in
A hong zawhpih ding hi
Kholhpihj gilo peel in, kam hoihlo zang ken
Pasian’ min zahtak in, a mawknan zang ken
thukhual in citak in, thumaan in migi
Zeisu en gige in, hong zawhpih ding hi
A zote Pasian in , kham lukhu pia ding
I puk khazel hangin, upna tawh zo ding
Eite hong honpa in , tha hong guan ding hi
Zeisu en gige in, hong zawhpih ding hi

songs.title: I LUNGNUAM HI, ZEISU MUANG LENG

lines: I lungnuam hi, Zeisu muang leng,
Ama hong gen bang um leng
,Ama hong thuciamna muang leng,
Topa’ hong cihna thei leng.
Zeisu, Zeisu ke’n ka muang hi,
A muanhuai na thei zo ing.
Zeisu, Zeisu manpha Zeisu,
Amah muang semsem nuam ing.
I lungnuam hi, Zeisu muang leng,
Hong sapna a si muang leng,
Hong dam hong siang sakthei a si,
Sungah upna tawh bual leng,
I lungnuam hi, Zeisu muang leng,
Mawhna pumpi nusia leng,
Nuntak lungnop tawldam nuamna,
Zeisu khut tung pan sang leng.
Zeisu kong muanthei ka nuam hi,
A manpha lawmpa na hi,
Hong honpa aw a tawp dongin,
Nong ompih ding ka thei hi.
Sian’tho na’ng hun zang in, Thungen zelzel in,
Ama sungah om in, Athu’n kivak in,
Pasian’ tate pawl in, a nangte huh in,
Na khat na hih ciangin, dongkhial ngei kei in.
Sian’tho na’ng hun zangin, mi a kin zongin,
Zeisu bek tawh om in, hun tampi zangin,
Amah nasut na’ngin, etteh tawntung in,
Ama lim langsak in, nang’ tatna pan in.
Sian’tho na’ng hun zangin, hong pi-na zui –in,
Amai ah tai kei-in, bang aci zongin,
Na nuam na dah zongin, Topa mah zui-in,
Zeisu en tawntungin, ama thu muang in.
Sian’tho na’ng hun zangin, lung hi dide in,
Ngaihsut a namkim in, amah uksak in,
Kha siangtho tua bangin, ki kaisak le cin.
Vantung naseem dingin, siam ding sawtlo in.
Nang tawh naizaw nuam ing, ka Pasian aw,
Singlamteh thuak ta leng, hong domto aw,
Thuak hang ka sasa ding, Nang tawh naizaw nuam ing.
Nang tawh naizaw nuam ing, ka Pasian aw.
Zakoh bang ka vaka, nitum ta hang,
Khuamial a suangtum bek, ka lukham hang,
Ka maang hong nainuam ing, Nang tawh naizaw nuam ing,
Nang tawh naizaw nuam ing, ka Pasian aw.
Na mai-ah hong lak in, vantung lampi,
Nong ngahsak khempeuhte, hehpihna hi,
Vantung mi hongs am ding, Nang tawh naizaw nuam ing,
Nang tawh naizaw nuam ing, ka Pasian aw.
Nangma min phatna tawh, ka khanglo ding,
KA dahna teng Pasian, phatna’n nei ning,
Tua bangin dahna hang, Nang tawh kizaizaw na’ng,
Nang tawh kinaizaw na’ng, ka Pasian aw

songs.title: I MAWH NA LEH I DAHNA TENG

lines: I mawh na leh I dahna teng,
A pua ding Zeisu I lawm
Pasian kiang I sapna teng
Thum theih na’ng thupha a om
Lungnopna tampi I tan a,
Thuak loh ding pi I thuak hi,
Na khempeuh te Pasian kiangah,T
hum in I kohl oh hang hi.
Ze-et bawlsiat ahi zongin,
Lung khamna khat peuh om maw.
Cik mah ciang lungkia ngei-lo in,
Topa kiang ah ko in aw,
Dah teng thuakpih nuam Zeisu bang,
Lawm man dang muzo ding maw,
Zeisu’n thei khin I sap bangbang,
Ama kiangah ko in aw,
Lung khamna vangik bang lel in,
Zawng khal in na tha nem maw,
Manpha honpa I belh hi in,
Ama kiangah thu ngen in aw,
Min hong sim mawh hong huat ciangin,
Zeisu kiang I pai ding hi,
A ang sung hong pom hong dal in
Lungnopna hong pia ding hi.
Nang kong deih tawntung hi, Migi ka To,
Lungnopna hong pia thei, A dang omlo
Kong deih hi, Nang kong deih hi,
Nang kong deih tawntung hi,
Thupha hong pia’n Topa aw,
Nang kong zuan hi.
Nang kong deih tawntung hi, Nai tak kei kiang,
Ze-etna’n hong zolo, nang hong nai ciang
Nang kong deih tawntung hi, Nuam leng dah leng,
Nuntakna’n man neikei, Nang hong taan leng.
Nang kong deih tawntung hi. Hong thu hilh in,
Nong khapsa aphate, Hong ngah sakin
Nang kong deih tawntung hi, Siangpen pa aw,
Nang a tak hong hi-ning, Tapa pha aw.
Topa thu ki ciamna thei a
Upkhialhna ka pia ding hi.
Lungkiatnathuak loh na’ng in-ah
A thupha ka um ding hi.
(Cho) //A kicing hi, a thupha pi
Keimah in-ah ka um hi.//
Ki mawhsakna Zeisu in-ah
A si pha tawh hong sawp hi.
Keimah hong siangtho zo ta.
Innpi ah hong kha ding hi.
Topa Zeisu hong hehpih man
Kihtak lau-na om lo hi.
Ka lampi ah khua a mial hang
Khuavak hong taangsak ding hi.
Ka nuamna teng Zeisu ka pia
Amah bek ke’n ka deih hi.
Amah in leitung teng uk a
Deihna teng A kiang om hi.
Ka vekpi in Zeisu ka pia
Ka lungsim ka pum khempeuh.
Ka lametna a om khempeuh
Tawntung Ama kiang om hi.

songs.title: LAM TAWNTUNG AH HONG PAIPIH HI

lines: Lam tawntung a hong paipih hi,A dang bang ka ngen nawn diam?
Khan tawntung lam hong hilhzo hi,Hong itna ka muangkhial diam.
Amah muang leng leitungah zong,Vantung nopna pha ka nei,
(Kei tungah bangbang hong tung zong,Zeisu’n a pha bawl ka thei)2
Lam tawntung a hong paipih hi,Lam haksa hang lungnuam sak,
Ze-etna zawhnain hong hehpih,Hinna anlum in hong vak,
Amah muang leng leitungah zong,Vantung nopna pha ka nei.
(Ka mai-ah suangpi pan hong phul,En un lungdamna tuinak)2
Lam tawntung a hong paipih hi,Kicing lamdang hong itna,
Tawl damna tak hong khamzo hi,Vantung ka Pa inn sungah,
Sih nawnlohna puan bang silh in,A tang gam ka kai ding hi.
(Tua ciang sa ning a tawntung in,Zeisu’n hong kha mual suak hi.)2
1.Thupha khuavak sungah Zeisu tawh pai lai ah,
Eite paina lamhong taang sak hi.
A deih bang zuih ciang in Amah tawh pai khawm in
A thungai a muang a om ding hi.
(Cho) Muang un, ngai un. Lampi dang omlo hi.
Zeisu kiang nuam ngah ding in
Muang in a thu ngai un.
Van a gik te pua a, Gimna tawlna thuakna
Topa hong hehpihna ki cing hi.
Eite launa dinga Dawimangpa hong khem na,
Zeisu thu ngai in muang leng bei hi.
Ni liim ahihhangin, Meiikai ahihhangin,
Zeisu in tha khat a hawl khia hi.
Launa leh kihtakna Tau-na leh kahna te
Zeisu I muan’ lai in om thei kei.
Ki-itna pha tawh mah Topa Zeisu mai-ah
Kikhawm ciangin lampai khawm ding hi.
Thu hong piakna ngai a, hong sawlna pai dinga,
Cikmah hun lau lo in nuam ding hi.
Lungsim leh aw in Topa phat ning,
Ama sung ka kipaak ding,
La in sa ning lamdang hong itna,
Ken sasa ning hih la,
Aman ka mawhna teng lakhia zo,
Amin siang phat un, amin siang phat un,
A man ka mawhna teng lakhia zo,
Halelui-ah min phat un
Nopna khawlna ngah ding ama kiang,
Ka mawhna tawh ka pai ciang
Ka nget hong za in hong khahkhia ta,
Ken sasa ning hih la,
Ka hu tawpna tawh amah phat ning,
Sihna ka zawh man in ah,
Amah phat ning a tawntung in ah,
Ken sasa ning hih la,

songs.title: THUPHA GUAH BANG HONG ZU DING HI

lines: Thupha guah bang hong zu ding hi,
Itna tawh hong ciam bang- in,
Thamalh na hun hong tung ding hi,
Hong puak suk ding Topa in.
Thupha guah zu bang,
Thupha guah ih ki sam hi,
Heh-pihna mal hong kiat teei hang,
Hong zu suk hen a tampi.
Thupha guah bang hong zu ding hi,
Thahak kik- na a manpha,
Hong ging zuazua ding hi tam-pi,
Mualtung, guamsung, mun tengah.
Thupha guah bang hong zu ding hi,
Hong buak suk in Topa aw,
Thathak tu in Nong guan ding hi,
Nong ciamsa hong tung sak aw.
Thupha guah bang hong zu ding hi,
Tu ni’n hong zu ta leh maw,
Zeisu kiangah thu ih gen hi,
Pulak in Pa kiang ih mawh.
Mawhna lo lai a, a hoih teng buh lom,
A kai khawm ding an la te koi ah om,
Na sepna dingin thumaan phiaukawi keng,
Kua mah khawl lo ding an lak khit ma teng
An la te kawh om, kua hong kuan nuam,
An lak pawi sungah, kua hong lungdam khawmnuam,
Kuan hong khoppih ding, buhlom hoih teng,
Mawhna lo sungah om buhlom teng
Zawineu zong zui in zongin pha takpi,
Lopa asau hang buh om thei ding hi,
Lamlian zong zui-in la nusiat nei ken
Vantung innpi sung hong tumkhin uh hen
Lo teng khempeuh ah an min khinta hi,
Leitung khempeuh in lak ding bek ngak hi,
Ahih hang a la ding tawm lak ding tam,
La mengmeng kei leng lah a sia ding tam.
Tua ahih ciang hong pai un phiaukawi tawh,
An pha kai khawm un no mihing te aw,
An nei Topa hong pai ma teng sem un,
Tua ciang an lak pawi ah lungdam khawm un.
Khaici manpha vawhun,Zingsang phalvak kipat tungin,
Khaici manpha vawh un, sun khuaphat laitak,
Khaici manpha vawh un,Khangno lungsim zepna dingin,
Khaici manpha vawh un, dawm in lungduai tak.
(Khaici manpha vawh un,)2
Gamla nai-ah vawh un, lungdaui itna khut tawh,
Nuntak khomun balnen,Lungdamna tangthu genta un
,Khaici manpha vawh un, I it gam sungah.
Khaici manpha vawh un, ni akai laitak inah zong,
Khaici manpha vawh un, khuamuina nungah,
Khaici manpha vawh un, phunlo,Um lahlo in om un,
A vekpi’n Pasian ap in amah muang un.
Khaici manpha vawh un,Lawpna leh hanciamna tak tawh,
Khaici manpha vawh un, kham khaici manpha,
Khaici manpha vawh un,Khutte tha zawsak ngeilo in,
Pasian in ni le guah puak ding thungen un
Zeisu si in hong sawp siang hi.
I khawm ding sihna gungal ah,
Natna hong tun’ kik ding nailo
Nuamna thu kikum in om ni.
Sihna gungal khatah
Sihna gungal khatah, sihna gungal khatah,
Sihna gungal khatah I tung ding hong nai ta.
I tung ding hong naita,I tung ding hong nai ta,
I tung ding hon nai ta sihna gungal khatah
Dah na hong tun’ ding ka laulo
Upna’n ka mu vantung ka en.
Ka za hi vantung mi’lasa
Khitui khempeuh Topa’n nulkhin.
Sihna gungal khat-ah
A itte tawh kikhop nuamna
Bang aw ka za ding hiam tua’ah
Ka lungsim hong vut hong tho sak
Na dang deihna tua mun mang sak
Sihna gungal khatah.
Topa hong hilh bang ka zuihna
Lungdam ka ngah a kicin’na
Khawl ngeilo in ka phat ding hi.
Khitui khempeuh hong nulsak hi.
Sihna gungal khat-ah

Vantung vaanglian hehpihna gamMi siangthote inn a hi.Ama kiangah om tawntung ni.Leitung na kheempeuh paai ni.Leitung ni a bei ciangin ah Nung ciangin inn nuamahMi siangthote om na lamahVantung khua om ding hi.Tawn tung inn nuam vaanglian gamahI lawmte tua gam om dingTua inn nuam sungah om dinginMi namcin a khawm ding hi.Hong gupna si-pha vaanglianpiHehpihna gam teng zel sakHih gal gamah I om lai inHong hehpihna thugen in.Khat tang hih hang pai in gen ni,Leitung dahna kiam ding hi.Lungsim deih teng tawntung omnaKim takin a om dinghi
A lungmangte hong hehpih in,
Ni tampi kheng zota hi.
Gimna lungkhamna thuak na-in,
Ni tampi kheng zota hi.
Khulazinna le kikal a, nuamna lungdamna te tawh,
Thu apha ka bawl uh maw, Ni tampi kheng zota hi.
Ni tampi kheng zo hi, Ni tampi kheng zo hi,
Thupha gamtat theihna ding, Ni tampi kheng zota hi.
Mawkna in a hun beisak ke’n,
Ni tampi kheng zota hi.
Na mai zingsang khuavak bang hen,
Ni tampi kheng zota hi.
Leitungah dahna sungah, Lungkhamna kahna om,
Na unaute phong inla, Ni tampi kheng zota hi.
Itna tawh a kikhih khempeuh,
Ni tampi kheng zota hi.
Eite in i nusia ta hi,
Ni tampi kheng zota hi.
Khaici pha kituh khempeuh, A vakpha a lim nuai ah,
Hong pi a i lungdamna, ni tampi kheng zota hi.
Ka nuntakna nak Zeisu Topa hi,
Ka sapna khempeuh hong sik hong guan hi.
Ka sap pen laitak kei a ding hong si,
Ka sapna khempeuh kicing sak hi.
Singlamteh tungah kikhen,
Bangin len bangin kilhcip,
Siktukilh a I diam? Siktukilh hilo,
Hong itna hi zen veh,
Hih thu ke’n bang tawh ka tehthei diam!
Mawhna koi ah om? Pasian lungtang ah,
Itna koi ah om? Pasian lungtang ah,
Pasian lungtang tui bang hong sawpsiang ta,
Itna in mawhna lohkhinzo ta.
Lainatna in kai, hamsiatna singah,
Mawhna’n ling bang sun itna lungtang ah,
Zeisu mawhna lom kisuaksak khinta,
Hong mawhsakpa’n hong diksak zo ta.
Hong itna lian sa’ng hong ngaihna sang sa’ng,
Lei le van a kihal bangin kidang,
Bang ka suak zentam, hong itlo hi leh,
Ka khitui khempeuh in cin’ ken teh.
Ka sungah sisan lum a luan lai teng in,
Ka nuntakna hu a bei ma in,
Man neilo kei bang lel,Hong teel manin nuam lua ing.
A migitna gengen ning
Lei pianma pek na ngawn in kei hong teel,
Hong ciamteh zo, luah khawmzo ta ka hi ta tu’n,
Kha siangtho hong guan,A taak kelkel sisan te’n
Van khamkhuapi nuam hong lutpih ta.
Paubanna neilo in mi siangtho bangin,
Hong seh kholkhinzo, ama mi dingin,
Ama lim le meel sun dingin hong ciamteh zo a,
Pasian innkuan ka hi ta.
Keima mi ahilo, keima mi dingin,
Ka itloh mite ka itmi dingin,
Keima mi hi kei uhteh ke’n kong cihsa hi napi’n
“Tate aw” kong ci ding hi.
Tui duh dangtak in vul, ka om laitak in,
Sehnel gam keu ah, ka zin lai in,
Sun nisa lel in kun, ka om lai aw neem ka za,
Nuntakna tui ka dawn ta.
Topa nagam le na min a ding hong tawi in,
Namte tungah hong tawisang in,
Zogam le Zomite hong laamto in,
Na min a ding hong laamto in.
Israel mite napi bangin,Pa aw, ka nuntakna hong pi aw,
Sehnel gam Rose paak bangin,Ka nuntak lai ni,
Hong paalsak aw, hong paalsak aw,
Zogam lei aw, khanglo in thasan in hat in,
Kum thak nino hong suak en in,
Gamkeu gawtaak hong niim ding,
Singcin hong paal ding,Upna khuam bang khosak ta in.
Bah leh gui a om khutte hong laamto in,
A zaw khutte hong khauhsak in,
Muvanlai tha hong guan in, na na sem dingin,
Kawlgam sung le leimong dongin.
Lungzuan dahna tenDai bang hong nawk ciang in ah,
Hehnem siampa Jesu ngaihsun inA man hong en pah a,
damna sung hong tunpihA khasung zatui tawh tongdam nem hong luan.
(Cho) Hong liah hong dal ding amah hong kikham,
Topa kha nang kiang hong om tawntungLungsung siktui bangnem,
Lungzuang kha hong khoi dam
Hehnem siampa Zeisu a ang sung hong sung.
Haksatna khat peuhpeuhNa thuak khak tak ciang in,
Lungdam ko in amah phat zaw in,
Lungdam ki niamkhiat in amah zuan peuh lecin,
Nopsak theih na lungsim hong piaksa hi khin.
It le ngaih ten hong paisan hong nusiat ciang in,
Dah teng thuakpih nuam Jesu I lawmHong theisiam mahmah a,
Jesu ko peuh lecin,Khamuanna le nopna tui bang hong luang khawm.
A hoihna a vangliatna gen zawh hilo,
Amuanhuai bel Topa,
Hunte kikhel in a kisiat hang,
Cik mah hun na kikhel ngei kei
Leitung maingat in Amah thudon kei zong
Hong itna kip lai zen.
Nau bangin nong kepna lianlua e,
Lungdam in Topa kong phat hi.
Na ziatlam khut tawhKeimah nong makaih a,
gun gal khat ah,Haksatna guampi gal khat dong ah,
Na ciangkhut in keimah lam nong lah manin,
A bei theilo a thak itna tawh kei nong it a,
A tul theilo na hehpihna lian kong phat hi.
Na sung ka nuntak a kipan tu ciang dong,
Awnsuk in an nong pia,
Lungsim kha laulo in ka han na’ng,
Nong pua hi, na liangko tungah
Ka lungsim tawng a ka ngaihsut khempeuhte
Sitlo in nong pia a,
Ka mailam ding nong gelsak khempeuhte,
A sia omlo hoihna bek hi.
Vanglian thuneihna, Kumpi hihna
Pianpih nate le mihing bawltawm nate,
Pilna le theih nate sang a thupipen in
Lei pian ma’n nang na om khin zo hi.
Kumpi gam luahna kumpi tokhom
Leitung in a thuak ngei langdang sakna te
Hauhna nopsak nate sang a thupi pen in
Na man zah ding kiseh zolo hi.
(Cho) Hong kithat suang lak hong kivui,
Siding nong pai, nang bek hong ki pampaih,
Lingpaak bang hong kituan cil hi
Kei nong it man leilak kia sa nong tawm hi.
Siangtho siangtho ka Topa
Leitung teng na min than kizeel hi
Minam khempeuh in na min
Hong pahtawi hong phat ta hen
Nungta cih theih na’ng in
Na maitang ko hong lak in.
(Cho) In Pasian in hoih hi ci’n
Vantung ah kiphat hi
Leitung buppi in zong
Hallelujah ci’n lasa ding
Ka nuntakna nong kem den hi
Phalbi, khuakhal, tuk hun sung
Na khut tawh nong huai hi,
Thumanna ah kei nong kha hi,
Nang kong lam en hi
Nang kong ngak den hi.
(Cho) Nong itna la in kasa ding
Kei tungah nong muanhuai hi
Na ang sungah kei nong pom den hi
Nong khah ngei kei ding hi,
a tawn tung (Hallelujah)4
Hong kinai sak in, hong khahsuah ngei ken
Ki niamkhiat na tawh kong zuan
Na lawmpa ka hi, nong ci hi
Nang kong lunggulh hi, kua ma’n hih kenteh
Na mun kuama’n luah thei kenteh,
Nong kawina an glum ka phawk hi
Lam hong musak in, kei hong pi kik in.
Sap teng cinna, deih teng kimna
Nang na hi, sap teng cinna
Nong naih hong theisak in.

Na kha nuai kei hong seel in,Hong huai in, avangliat na khut tawhTuipi hong khangin van hong gin ciangLauhuai huihpi kheng, I lengkhawm dingDahna tuihual te tung thuneipaPasian kong neih man in om hithiat ningKhris sung bekah ka tawldam hi,A vangliat ka theih teh ka maung hi.
Topa’n hong sem ding,  Lametna teng bei ciangin,
Telzawhloh Ama zia tawh, Topa’n kei hong hilh ding hi.
Lam hong lak ding hi, Amah’n hong ompih den ding,
Itna leh hehpihna tawh, A nisim inah, lam hong pi den ding.
Sehnel gamah kei hong tonpih in lam hong lak
Sehnel gam sung ciktui ka mu ta,’
Van leh lei a mangthang zong,
Pasian kammal kipden ding Tuni-in tha thak hong guan hi.
Topan hong sem ding,Lam etna teng bei ciang in
Tel zawhloh ama zia tawh
Topan kei hong hilh ding hi
Lam hong lak ding hiA mah’n hong ompih den ding
Itna leh hehpihna tawh
A nisim in ah, lam hong pi den ding,
Sehnel gam ah kei hong tonpih in lam hong lak
Sehnel gam sung ciktui ka mu ta,
Van leh lei a mangthang zong
Pasian kammal kip den ding
Tu ni in thathak hong guan hi.
Kangaih in kei a hi, kei zong ama a hing
Sun leh zan lunggulh ing, sawlbang heina peuhah
Nanglo in guabang ka hing zo diam
Pheiphung suankhawm, banzal hong len in aw
Na sakmel paallun ee, et in ka cim thei lo
Na tongdam khum zungzung, taangbang ka damna hi
Simlei ah nang bang a hoih om kei
Lungdeih sinthu liibang cinna hi cia
Na kha nuai ah hong seel aw
Na liimnuai hong beel sak aw
Ka lungdeih nanglo om kei
Sinlai vabang hong phawng cia
Nang lo in deih cing thei kei
Vangngaih Zeisu nang lo
Ka kumpipa na hi, Pasian zong na hi hi
Ka pa zong nahi a, ka lawmhoihpen zong na hi
Zato mangpa, damna mangpa na hi
Sianmang vontawi, minlian pen To Zeisu
Hih leitung ah ka khualzinna, lungkim nop cih omlo
Leitung teekta, thusia lasia bek na za ding
Pilna hileh, hauhna hileh lokhawh singpuakna pan in
Lungnopna om nawnlo hi Zeisu lo buang
Kalani mual tungah, a sisan hong bua a
Kilawm lopi’n khonkhong nuntakna hong pia zo
A liamma hang damna, a zawnkhalna hang hauhna
A sisan in ka mawhna teng hong sawpsiang ta
Lungnopna ding ken ka zonga, lungkim nop cih om lo
Mualtung lamah kahto diaidiai ka khuadak leh
Tua mual hoihpen, kalani mual lungnop kicing tawldamna
Tawldam nopna ngah nading Zeisu lo buang
I hunte bei hong kheng diaidiai, anlak hun kheng dekta
Apil nga bang meivak taangsak, taangsak veni
Mi tul tampi kikhawm mai ah, meivak taanglo a paite
Zumna bek hi ding aiveh Zeisu mai ah

songs.title: KA KHA AA DING A HOIH HI

lines: Gunpi taanlo bang nuam na’ng nong hilh na in,
Dahna tui bangin hong let hi,
Topa hong hilhna pha hi ka kha aa ding,
Hoih bel hi, kha aading , hoih bel hi.
Hoih bel hi, hoih bel hi, kha aading
,Hoih bel hi, hoih bel hi, kha aading.
Dawi in hong khem a,bawlsiatna hong tun hang,
Ka up dinga thu ciam om hi,
Topa zeisu in, ka thanem hong en hi,
Hoih bel hi, kha aa ding, hoih bel hi.
Hongit a a nuam I ngaihsut ciangin ah,
Ka mawh ka khelh na sung pan-in,
Ka suahtakna ding singlamteh tung si hi,
Ka lungsim in kaphat hi Topa.
Topa Zeisu tu nung ciang hong pai ding hi,
Ka lungkhamna teng bei ding hi,
Topa hih leitungah hong pai dingin ah,
Ka,kha siangtho aading a pha hi.
Leitung i nunsung, haksa thei zel a,
Ahih hang Topa muang tawntung peuh le'ng
Ei tawh hong omkhawm den hi,
Buaina teng veng mang ta,
I innkuan sung i vangkhua ah,
Nop na kicing hong pia.
Cho
Noplua si! Topa, nang tawh tonkhawm le'ng,
Lei buaina khempeuh tuikhu bang vengsakpa,
Nisim paisan deudeu oh! Haleluijah,
Zeisu zawhna sungah lungmuang-in ka omta.
Zeisu bek en in, nung hei nawn lo ding,
Ze-etnate in hong tuamcip mah leh,
I langah kuan pang zo diam,
Lau nawn peuhmah kei ning,
Topa tawh tonkhawm peuh le'ng,
Bangmah patau keng.
A phattak Zeisu lam bang paak ve ni,
Israel mite a paikhiatpihpa,
San tuipi kantanpihin,
Suangpi pan tui phulsak,
Gualzawhna tawh a makai den,
Eite' Pasian a hi.
Topa hoih hi, lungkham hunin hong huh a,
Amah a bel mite limtakin kem hi,
Sunin ni-in, zanin khapi'n
Hong cingin hong gimsak lo a,
Vantung mite'n giahphual satin hong kem.
Cho
Aw Topa aw, nang na hoih hi,
Kei nong itna tumdang diak sa'ng,
Nong ompihna ciang a nopin nuam zungzung,
Lamet bei dongin ka om a,
Ka nu ka pa, kei hong kempa,
Ka bangkim ah ka lawm hoihpen na hi.
Na bawlsa kha le aksite ka et ciang,
Na phawktham ding mi in bang hi lel a hiamd
Tangtel bang lel kei nong itna,
Tapa neihsun kei nong pia maw,
Kei nong itna lamdangin lianlua sa'ng.
Ka khualzinna hih leitung ah hong tonpih,
Hong khah ngei lo, itna khut tawh nong len a,
Ka lampi sau, suk le to ah,
Lungkhamna huihpi'n hong nawk ciang,
Nong ompihna itna awnem ka za.

songs.title: NANG TAWH A HOLIM NUAM BEK HI'NG

lines: Topa nang tungah na khat zong hong ngen kei ning,
Nang tawh a holim nuam bek hi'ng,
Lungdamna kong kohzawh loh zah ding,
Nong piaksa khempeuhte kicing,
Nang tawh a holim nuam bek hi'ng
Cho
Lungkhamna, dahna zing ciangin thakkha mah ning,
Ka khitui tampi luangkha ding,
Tua haksatna ka thuak ma-in ah,
Lungdam hong ko nua, ing Topa aw,
Nang tawh a holim nuam bek hi'ng.
Haksatnate in thu hong ngen sak pahpah a,
Tu'n bel a holim nuam bek hi'ng,
Kiphatsakna them zong nei lo-in,
Lungdamna ko nua in Topa,
Nang tawh a holim nuam bek hi'ng

songs.title: MUNKHAT AH GELIN THUNGEN KHIAN NING

lines: Sep dinga kilawm lopi ka sem kha a
Gen dinga kilawm lopi ka gen kha hi
Tua hun ciang hi ka sep ding
Thupha ka ngah nang inah
Munkhatah gelin thungen khian ning.
//Kenpawh thungen ning//
Lam hongpi ding Topa pha ken nei lel ing
//Kenpawh thungen ning//
Munkhat ah gelin thungen khian ning
Nisim a hongpiak thupha teng phat peuhleng
Ka thumna khempeuh hong dawng cih kathei hi
Munkhat ah gelkhia in ah
ama kiang thungen peuh leng
Ka vangik khemppeuh hong dawn khia hi
Lam tawntungah kei hong tonpih hi
Hong liah hong dal hi
Tawntung Pasian kei sung nungta hi
A vangliatna tawh kei hong tuam hi
Topa lianbel hi
Tawntung Pasian keisung nungta hi
Nungta hi Zeisu, keisung nungta hi
Han sungpan Zeisu thokik hi
Kumpi tokhom tung a vangliatna tawh kidim
Zeisu lianbel ta hen
Ka mawhna khempeuh hong maisak zo
Kei hong sawpsiang zo
Zeisu liamma hangin ka dam zo
Zeisu zawngkhalna hangin hau zo
Giautau ngei nawnlo
Deih teng cing khin Zeisun hong dim zo.
Ang lai ah kapom, aman kei hong kem
Vanglian pa’n hong kem, zanni tuni a tawntung
Topa in zingvai hong hawm a,
Topa ka khuavak hong hi ta
Sambang zal napeuh, van laukha’n hong kem
Lungkham huihkhi leh tuihualte hong dai sak hi
Tu ciangciang gualzawhna hong pia
Gualzawhna mualsuang bang phut ing
Topa na min kong pahtawi hi
Nang bang adang pasian omlo
Na hoihna te sinlung ka geel ciang
Lungdam luankhi te’n nang hong phat zel

songs.title: HONG CIAH KIK LEL DING HI

lines: Jerusalen khuapi sungah,
To Zeisu a lutni-in ah,
Kisin nai lo lano tungah,
Tuangin minthanna ngah,
A neipa in kham zo tuan lo,
Topa in a deih nungsang,
Paipihta e, Jerusalemlam ah.
Cho
Topa in a deih a leh,
Hong piaksa thuphbate khempeuh,
Paipih lel hen, a minthan nading ahih leh,
I neihsa bangmah om kei,
A sumkem dingte bek i hi,
Paipih hen aw, hong ciah kik lel ding hi.
Khazih sung a on u le nau,
Hih thupha hi na ngah ngei maw,
Satan in a paipihte pen,
Hong ciah kik ngei nawn lo ding,
Ahih hang vanglian Topa in,
A paipih sum le paaite pen,
Hong ciah kik hi, a zah tampi tak tawh.
I pianna khua le gam a om,
Thu-ummi khangthak lia le taang,
Tu ni-in Topa'n nang hong deih,
Tu-in nang na man nai hiam,
Pang ciatve ni Topa ading,
Piakkhiatna le thungetna tawh,
I sep kul hi, Topa in hong deih hi

songs.title: HONG PAI IN, THUPHA NAMKIM NAK

lines: Hong pai in, thupha namkim nak,
Ka lungsim hong puah sak in,
Kang ngeilo nong hehpihna nak,
Nakpi’n hong phat theisak in,
Vantung mite phatna la-ngaih,
Kei zong hong sa thei nuam ing.
Nong itna tung kip ka lungngaih,
Tua itna mual ka phat ding.
Nong huhna tawh hih ciang kong tung,
Huhna mualsuang hiah phut ing.
Nong deihsakna hangin tu-nung,
Lungmuanin inn hong tung ning,
Lamkhial a Pasian ka nusia,
Ahih hang Zeisu’n hong zong,
A si manpha tawh hong tankhia
Gimna lauhuai pan hong hon.
A nisim-in hong hehpihna
A tampi hong basak den,
Na hehpihna’n hong khih inla,
Na kiang pan hong pial sak ken,
Topa kong vaksan dekzeel hi,
Ka it Pasian, hong keem in,
Hiah! Ka lungsim, nang sung seel ni,
Nang a ding na ciamteh in.

songs.title: NANGMAH TAWH PASIAN OMKHAWM TA HEN

lines: Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen
A hongpi a hong len dingin
A tuu tawh hong kembit ding in
Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen
Ih kimuh kik mateng
Zeisu kiang kimuh mateng
Ih kimuh kik mateng
Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen
Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen
A kha nuai ah hong liah hong dal in
Nisim ‘manna’ hong vak dingin
Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen
Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen
Launa’n hong lungam sak ciangin
Ang sung hong pom bikbek ding
Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen
Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen
Itna nuai ah hong cing dingin
Sihna tuihual satpai dingin
Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen
Lam hong lak gumpa ka kiang hong nai ciang,
Bangbang hong kimvel hang lau om nawnlo,
Huihpi, guahpi-te hong dai sak ding a,
A khutkuak sung muan huai hi.
A khutkuak sung-muan huai hi,
A khutkuak sung- sung muan huai hi,
Bangbang hong kim vel hang lau om nawn lo,
A khutkuak sung muan huai hi.
Itna tawh a ang sung kei hong pom ciang,
Ki lemna thu kha siangtho hong hilh a,
Pasian khut in kei hong kimlet zawh ciang,
A khutkuak sung muan huai hi.
Ka khakem kei hong nusia nawn lo ding,
Hong itna khau tat-sat zo om nawn lo,
Ka theihi, Amah in hong kem den ding,
A khutkuak sung muan huai hi.
Leitung ah launa tampi a om hang,
Bangmah kihtak ka nei kei
Ki langlo Pasian tawh ka om ciangin,
koimah peuh paiding ka laulo.
Tua bangin u leh nau,Pasian lammanah lungkip hen,
Cik mah hun lung kia lo-in,Pasian kiang i tun ciangin,
Lung nopna bangzah takin a om diam.
Haksatna namkim a hong tun hangin,
Bangmah kihtak ka nei kei,
Pasian ka kiangah a hong om peuh leh,
Koi mah peuh pai ding ka lau lo.
Sihna guam thuk sung dong ka tung zongin,
Bang mah kihtak ka nei kei,
Gam nuamah om ding Topa gam sungah
Koimah peuh pai ding ka lau lo.
Mi namkim in kei hong do hang inah,
Bangmah kihtak ka nei kei,
Pasian vangliatna a om ka sungah,
Koimah peuh pai ding kalau lo.
Lungsim gal dona leh dahna sung panin,
Kei sang a suangzaw suangpi ka bel nuam hi,
Mawhlua, gimlua zo, Nang aa hong hi ta ning,
A kip suangpi aw, Nang mah kong belta hi.
Cho -Nang kong bel hi. Nang kong bel hi,
Nangmah kong bel hi,A kip thupha suangpi.
Sun in gam daiah, dah in lungleen lai tak,
Ze-etna in a vang tawh hong tuam ciangin,
Nuntak huihpi nung, Tuipi ki hual laitak,
Thupha suangpi aw, hong liah in bittak in.
Gal do lai takin, gal in hong neh ciangin,
Tai in kong kozel hi, Ka belh suangpi aw,
Tui hual bang ze-et gimna hong tun ciangin,
Na sung kong bel hi,Keima kha suangpi aw.

songs.title: TOPA NANG MAH KA IT KA THEI

lines: Leitungah sum khempeuh sangin,
Topa kongit zaw hi,
Ki sia ngeilo nopsakna in,
Topa in hong pia hi.
Hong it hong ngaihna a thupha,
Kim khat bek gen nai kei,
Hong sawp siangthona a thupha,
Kim khat beek gen nai kei,
Leitung ka zawl khempeuh sangin,
Topa nai nuam zaw ing,
Leitung a la ngaih khempeuh sang,
Thu ngaih na pha zaw hi.
Ka lung hong damsak zota hi
Cik mah’n bei lo ding hi
Hong itna thupha om kei leh
Lungsim ki-sia ding hi
Hong om khawmpih ki theilo pi
Hih zah lung damna lian
Topa mai ih mu ding tak pi
Bang zah a nuam ding hiam?
Hong luang zuazua, zankim laitak,
Vantung langaihpi hong gingsuk hi.
A ladawng lah, langaih mahmah,
A sate lah, vantung mihonpi.
Cho
A sangbel ah minthang hen aw,
Lei-ah mite tung nopna om hen,
Khangsawnte'n tuu bang ciin hen aw,
Lei in pahtawi kikkik hen.
Tuucing mite'n tua thupi mu,
Tua a taang mite' thu pulak za,
Bawngkuang sunga Pa na kibia,
Huih lak khempeuh Thawnin la kisa.
Khazih honpa, Pa' sathau nilh,
Leibat lauhuai loh ding hong pai zo
Dahna mite nialsa mite,
I mahwna puakhia Pasian Tuuno
A lamdang tangthu lasa ning,
Zeisu kei tang ding si hi.
Vantung minthanna nusia a,
Singlamteh sihna thuak hi
.A lamdang tangthu lasa ningZeisu si hi
kei tang dingLimlang tui thuk gei kikhop cian
gMisiangtho te tawh sa ning
A gammang te Zeisu’n zong hi,
Lam a khiat tuu-te zong hi,
A khut tawh kei mah hong pon hi.,
Lampi ah hong kha kik hi
.Cina te Zeisu’n damask a,
A kipuk te zong phong hi,
Mit-taw in a lauhna tam a,
Ahih hang hong gum ding hi.
Khuamial kei tungah hong tungta,
Dahna lampi ka zui-ta,
Kei hong ompih in Topa aw,
Hong ken in lam hong hilh ta,
Sihna gungal kah ma tengin,
Topa in hong cing dingin,
I it te tawh kimu dingin,
Gungal ah hong kha ding hi.
Zeisu min manpha na la in
Dahna gimna tate aw
Hehnep nuamna hong pia ding hi
Na paina peuhah keng aw
Min manpha ngaih mahmah
Leitungmi te lametna
Min manpha ngaih mahmah
Vantung ah lungdam nuamna
Zeisu min na kem tawntung in
Gal namkim kidalna lum
Ze-etna’n hong kimkot ciangin
Amin siangtho suangin thum
Zeisu min a manpha mahmah
Bangzah i lung hong dam sak
Hong saan ciang ama ang sungah
Ama la i sak laital
Lamtawp vantung i tun ciangin
Zeisu khe ah i bok ding
Kumpi khempeuh tung kumpi ci’n
Ama mai ah i bia ding
Hong hehpihna thupha, Lungsim khauhzo theihi
Leitung a itman a, a tapa hong pia hi,
Kuamah peuh mah in thu umleng,
Hin tawntungna pha ngah ding hi,
Hin tawntung napha ngah ding hi.
Gamlakah gul kikhai, Anop tuam mah bangin,
Topa Zeisu kikhai ,Nuntak tawntungna hi.
Mawh neite sih kik ding,Thu khenna I thei hi,
Na thu bang zui lo leng, Kisia takpi ding hi.
Leitung mawh sak dingin, Zeisu hong pailo hi,
A minthan mah bangah, Leitung hong gum ding hi
A um lote hehpih, Up na’ng lungsim guan’ hi,
Thuphabel hong tun’ve’n, Hong um phasak ta hi.
Khazih leh pawlpi aa ding la sa ni,
Thupha eite Kumpipa a min pahtawi ni
Khangno thahat lai ut-na tawh nasem ni
Vantung gam thumaan a ding te-ci pang ni.
Khazih it huai hong Gumpa
Eite hong tan ding asi
Si tawh lei-sa Pawlpi a ding
Topa hong hang sak in
Khazih le pawlpi a ding thungen ni
Nisim singlamteh pua in a dial khai zui ni,
Kha siangtho vaangliatna hong sawlna zui in
Nuntak sung hun hoih laitak in na sem ni.
Khazih le pawlpi a ding utna tawh
Neihsa, siamna leh hun, Topa min tawh ap ni
Cik mah hun beingeilo, lungsim thuk itna,
I neihsa phabel Topa kiangah pia ni
Singlamteh kiangah ka om a,
Kalani mual tungah,
Nuamna hong pia cik tui in,
Mi teng aa dingin luang hi.
Singlamteh, singlamteh,
Ka kisak theihna hi,
Vantung khua ka tun ciangin,
A nuam ka ngah nang hi.
Singlamteh kiang ka ding a,
Hehpih na’n hong um hi,
A tang zingsol aksi in,
Ka kiimkot a taang hi.
Zeisu singlamteh kiang ah,
Ngak a kong om ciangin,
Singlamteh a lim nuaiah,
Hong gum hong om sak in.S
inglamteh a kiang ah ka om,
A thu um tawntung ning,
Gun gal khat-a khamkhua in
Ka tun mateng in ngak ning.

songs.title: TUI KHUK KHAT A OM HI

lines: Sih khuk a dimin ki hong a,Sisan tui bang luang hi,
Tua si tawh ki phum mawhnei te,Mawhna tawh ki pelh hi.
(Mawhna tawh ki pelhhi)2
Tua si tawh ki phum mawhnei te,Mawhna tawh ki pelh hi.
A si mi mawh pa’n tua sih khuk,A muh ciang a nuam a,
Hih mi bang ka gitloh hang in,Mawhna kipelh theita.
(Mawhna kipelh thei ta)2
Hih mi bang ka gitloh hang in,Mawhna kipelh theita.
A liamma-ah hong luangsi pha,Upna ka muh man in,
Hong phelna ding itna la pha,Ka sihma teng sa ning,
(Ka sih mateng sa ning)2
Hong phelna ding itna la pha,Ka sihma teng sa ning,
Nung ciang hih agik I pom teng,Sih han sung om lai in,
Topa hong phel lungdam teng,Vantungah la sa ning,
(Vantungah la sa ning)2
Topa hong phel lungdam teng,Vantungah la sa ning,
It huaituuno na si manpha ,Bei hun nei ngei lo ding,
Gupna ngah miteng ki khawm ding,Mawh ngei nawnlo ding hi.
(Mawhnei nawnlo ding hi)2
Gupna ngah miteng ki khawm ding,Mawh ngei nawnlo ding hi.

songs.title: MUH KHOPNA AH HIN’NA OM HI

lines: Singlamteh tung kikhai mi namuh ciangin,
Thakhat thu’n hinna ngahta un ci,
Tua ahih ciang mawh nei-te’n en un zong un,
Singlamteh aki that pa en un.
En un, hing ta un,
A ki khai mi-pa en in hinna ngah ta un,
Thakhat in hinna pha ngahta un.
Mawhna phel ding hi kei leh amah in ah,
Bang ding singlamteh thuak nuam ding hiam?,
Mawhna pan sihna tawh hong tan nuam ding hiam,
A pang pan si bang ding a luang diam!
Ki sikna bekin mawhna kiphel zolo,
A si bekin a hong phelzo hi,
A si a hong bua Topa Zeisu kiangah,
Na khialhna khempeuh hong puak in ci.
Hong sapna lung hian’na ding omlo ding hi,
Kicing zo hi, ci-in hong sam hi,
Lei a bei ciang khatvei hong pai lai ding a,
Thu ka hong khen ding hi, a ci hi.
Itna siangtho itna kicing
vantung nuamna hong tuaksuk
Nong hehpihna tung khup nading
Ko sung hong lamin na buk
Zeisu aw hehpihna na dim
Itna siang kicing na hi
Lawp a ling ko khempeuh lungsim
Hotna tawh nong veh ding hi
Lung himawh mi’ lungsim sungah
Itna nangmah kha guan in
Kote khempeuh nangma sungah
Tawldamna hong luah sakin
Ko mawhnopna lungsim paikhian
Alpha leh omega in
Upna pan a cingsak Pasian
Ko lungsim hong khahkhia in
Hogn pai in a hon zopen pa
Nang nuntakna hong guan in
Na inn ah hong tum meng inla
Paikhia nawn peuhmah kei in
Thupha kong piapia ding uh a
Na na kasem ding uh hi
Na itna sungah kipakta
Tawlnga lo kong phat ding hi
Dawn un, Zeisu min vang-lianna,
(Vantung mite bok un,)2
kumpi lukhu hong la unla,
‘kumpi…………lian,kumpi,
kumpi, kumpi, kum-pi lianbel pia un.
Pa-sian biak man thahna thuakte’n,
(A mah kumpi bia un)2
Zi-se suan in phatna ngah hen,
Teel tuam I-ta-zi-lah te aw,
(Tawm kha na hih hang-un,)2
Hong tanzo hi, hehpihna tawh.
Aw misang tam pi’n zai sa ding,
\Hong taang vanglian phat ni\
Ka Pasian vaang lianbelna leh,
hong hehpihna phat ni\
Aw ka limbel kei mah hong kha’n,
\Taang bang damna hong piang\
Hih leitung mi khempeuh tungah,
\Na thupha dimta hen\
Aw Zeisu aw Nang mah siang bel,
\Damna leh lungdamna\
Mawh neite’n zong hong theih zawh nang,
\Ka muan’ lianbelna hi\
Mawhna khempeuh hong phelzo hi,
\mi vaitham zong gumkhia\
Asi pha bel hong luang sak hi,
(Eite hong itna hi)3

songs.title: ZEISU KA LUNGSIM IN KA DEIH

lines: Zeisu ka lungsim in ka deih,Hong hehpihna nakpi’n ka ngen,Hong hehpihna itna hong lang,Amah kei’n ka itpha sem ta,Lungsim pha bel hong guan suk in,Tua kham khuapi ka muh na ding,Ka lungsim sung hong tang sak in,Tua khuapi nuam kei aa ding hi.Leitung itna sung a nuampen ,Ki tehtheilo hong itna tawh,Hong ento lam-etna pi tawh,Amai muh ciang lamdang ka sa,Vantung gamsung nopna kidim,Paakte hoihna muh ding tua lai,Za nawnlo ding vantung mi aw,Ka kha in lamdang sa ding ta,Nanglo in nopna om thei kei,Ka lungsim hong damsak thei ding,Nang na om ciang dahna nuam sak.Vantung nopna kei sung hong taang,
A manpha pen suang ken mu ing,
Lungdam in la ka sa
Zeisu kei a ci’n la sa ning
Khazih la in sa ning
A manpha pen suang ken mu ing,
Lungdam in la ka sa
Zeisu kei a ci’n la sa ning
Khazih la in sa ning
Zeisu siampi , ka kumpi hi
Khuavak kamsangpa hi
Tokhom mai-ah kamsang lianpa
Ka van Kumpipa hi
Amah tote Topa hi
Kumpite Kumpi hi
Aman in Thumaanna Ni hi
A kha nuai cidamna
Kilem nading kei tang hong si
Kei tang a si hong bua
A lamdang kei hong Gumpa hi
Amah mah in hong gum
Nangmah tatkhiat nading
Nunna nangah nading
Kei nuntakna kong pia
Kasi pha kong buakhia
//Ken ka nuntakna kong pia zo
Nang kei bang nong pia zo?//
Khang tawhtunga nuamna
Na ngah theih nang inah
Gentheihna kum sawtpi
Nang ading kong thualk hi
//Nang ading kum sawtpi kong gim
Kei hang bangtan na gim?//
A taang ka Pa inn nuam
Ka tokhom vanglian tuam
Nusia’n leitung kong tuak
Lungzuan dahna kong thualk
//Nang hang hizahta ken nusia
Kei hang nang bang nusia?//
Dawigam sungpan nangmah
Kong hotkhiat na’ng inah
Ka thuak gimna pite
Genkhin zo kei niteh
// Nang ading genzawhloh ka thuak
Kei ading bang na thuak?//
Zingsang tuh ding hi, ki itna khaici tuhin,
Sunah tuh bang zanin zong tuh in a ci,
A at hun ngak inla, a khop hun zong ngak in,
Lungdamna tawh buhlomte i khawmding hi.
(Buhlomte khawmin)2
lungdam na tawh buhlom te ikhawmdinghi
Nisa sungah tuh in, a liap sungah tuh in,
Phalbi leh tuk lai lungmanna om lopi,
Na sepna zawh ciangin, kikhop hun hong tung ding,
lungdam na tawh buhlomte i khawm ding hi.
Kap kawmin pai-in la, Topa aa ding tu in,
Ki siatna in a hong dahsak hang a ci,
Kahna khit ciangin,Topa’n hong sam ding a,
Lungdam na tawh buhlomte i khawm ding hi
Gimna sungpan lamet gamnuam
Cikciang ka tung ding hiam
Cikciang galvan ka koih ding hiam
Lailung ka muang ding hiam
//Zeisu hong tun mateng//
Ih nasep zawh ciangin
Inn nuam sung omkhawm ding
Sim leitung lailung dam omlo
Lumbang sung omlo tawh
Sim leitung saunuam a hilo
Gambang daihna a hi
Limbel siangtho ngahding inah
Lambang na pial ken ci
Lengvan siangnuam katun mateng
Nuamna hongpia ding ci
Limbelh nen ah khawl zo ta in
Lamdang ka pial kei ding
Amah banga ka pham nung ciang
Lengvan siangnuam tung ning.
Tapidaw ihmu nawn ken
Mi ngah nang septheih lai sem
Khutzep in ding mawqk ding maw
Topa inthu hong piak leh
Pai in sem ding kipan in
Pai in zong amangte gum
Khualmialna sung mawhnei mi
Tuapawi ah hong paipih in
Topa min na it ding hiam?
Hong ciamna na um zo diam
Sapna teng akiang ngen in
Hong sapna na nial ding maw
Na sansa bangin um in
Hong hilh bangin nungta in
Ama a bek hi den in
Sepna tawh upna lak in
Singlamteh ih puak ding om
Kham lukhu na khuk nop leh
Thathak tawh ma i sot ding
A hun tom a nite tawm
Hong honpa in hong kun, Na thahatna neu hi
Thanem ten thu hong ngen un
Cingtakna ngah ding hong ci
Zeisun loh khinta, ama tung ka ba
Sibang sansa ka mawhna
Vuk bang hong sawp ngo ta
Topa tun kathei zo, Nangma vanglian bekin
Phak leh lol zong damsak zo
Suang lungnem sak tui bang in
Hehpihna ka ngah nading, Phatna khat zong nei keng
Ka puan vuuk bang pak nading
Tuuno si sung hong sawp leng
Sihna lupna tungpan, ka kha a kahto ding
“Zeisu in keimah hong tan”
Ci-in lungdam kiko ding
Topa tokhom mai ah, kicing in ka din ciang
Minphatna puak ning amah
Ngasuk ning Zeisu khe kiang
Kongpi kihong sa-in om a
Asung panin a vangpi
Singlamteh pan hong taang khia a
Topa’ itna hong lak hi
Hi takpi zo diam tua kongpi
Kei ading a honsan om maw
Keimah takpi, keimah hong kihon maw
Hotkhiatna zong mite khempeuh
Tua kongpi honsan om hi
A hau a zawng a lian a neu
a kua cilo lut thei hi
Leitungah homg piak singlamteh
Sih gungal ah i khia ding
Hinna lukhu hong piak takteh
Amah i it zaw sem ding
A za-te khempeuh in hih thu tangko un,
Leitung khempeuh ah hih thupha tungsak un,Mi na muh khempeuh hih nuamhuai thu ko un,A ut khempeuh hong pai thei
A ut khempeuh te, a ut khempeuh te,Cihna thu a mual a guam va thawn sak unHong it ih Pa in hong sam kik lamkhiat te,A ut khempeuh hong pai thei
Hong pai te in ze-kai na ding thu om loLut theih lai in lut un kong honsan om zo,Zeisu lo thumaan henna lampi om lo,A ut khempeuh hong pai thei.
A ut khempeuh te thuciam a maan tak hi,A ut khempeuh te thuciam a kip ding hi,A ut khempeuh te nuntak tawntung na hi,A ut khempeuh hong pai thei
Pasian kiang pan gamla ka pialTu-in hong ciah ingMawhna lam sawtlua ka tawh khialTopa hong ciah ing.
Hong ciah ing, hong ciah ingVakkhia nawnlo dingThupha tawh nangma a hi ningTopa hong ciah ing
Hunpha tampi mawk beisak ingTu-in hong ciah ingTun kapin kisik taktak ingTopa hong ciah ing
Mawhna lampial cimtang TopaTu-in hong ciah ingMuang ning na itna leh thuphaTopa hong ciah ing
Ka kha cina, ka lung meimaTu-in hong ciah ingHong dipkik in ka lawpna thaTopa hong ciah ing
Dadna lungkhamna a tun ciangTopa hong sapna ngai inKhazih Topa thupha um ingTuni’n a kiangah pai ning
Kei hong pai ning, kong pai ding hiTopa thupha sang dinginKei hong pai ning , kong pai ding hiTopa kiang man ngah dingin
A siangtho kiniamsak TopaNa kiang keimah kong pai hiHong kemin hong cingin TopaNa khut nuai hong om sak in
Ka kha nopsak nang Topa awNangma kiang kong bel ding hiVantungah misiangthote tawhKa maang khawm tawntung nuam hi
Ka kiangah hong om in TopaLungkhamna huih dai sakinLungdamna piang sakin, dahnaKhuamial nitaang bang sakin
Topa ka za na awNangkiang a nong sapnaKalani nasi manpha tawhKeima hong sawp nuamna
Kong pai hi Topa, kong pai hi tu-inKalani a nasipha, keimah hong sawp na in
Zawngkhal kihuai hanginKa tha nong khauh sak hiNangkha zong kihbang nawnlo inMawhna nong sawp sak hi
Leitung vantung a dingUpna, itna, lawpnaLungnopna muanna kicingZeisu hi hong guanpa
Thang hen ,mawhmaina siThang hen , hong tan itnaThang hen , Pasian hong piak KhazihEite’ tha leh dikna

songs.title: A SANGNA LAM KA KAHTO HI

lines: A sangna lam ka kahto hi,Nisim a thak ka tung to hi.Kahto kawm kong thum lai Topa,Hong suanto in a sang zaw ah
Topa aw hong domto inla,Ka muh ngeina loh van zaang ahUpna tawh hong ding to sak inA sangzaw ah hong suanto in
Lungman na lauhna tamna ahMidang te a ut hang in ah,Kei ka lungsim a ut kei hi.Kei tupna a sang zaw na hi.
A sangzaw ah misiangte la,Upna tawh kei mah in ka za,Dawimang pa’n thal in hong kap hang,Ka sangzaw nuam hi leitung sang
A sang pen dong ka kah nuam hi,Vaangliatna taang ka mu nuam hiVantung ka muh dong Topa aw,A sangzaw ah hong pi to aw.
Nasen un nasem un, Pasian sawltak hihangI Topa totsa lampi mah a zui hi hangAma thunuam in ei hong thahat sak ding hiNasepding imuh peuh, thahatna tawh sem ni
//Nasem un, nasem un//Lamen un, thungen unTopa hongpai mateng sem un
Nasem un nasem un, gilkialte anvak unNuntakna tuinah ah migimte paipih unSinglamteh leh lungdamnathu tawh kipaak niTangko un man ngenlo, a khawnkhong hong hon hi
Nasem un nasem un, omhi mikim sepdingTheihkhialhna khuamialgam hi eite sukmang dingI Topa Pasian min i pahtawi ding a hiTangko un man ngenlo, a khawnkhong hong hon hi
Nasem un, nasem un, Topa tha tawh sem dingKumpi’ puan leh lukhu, nuamna eite’n sang dingTatkhiatsa midikte tawh eite’n i vek pi’nSawkhawm ding,man ngenlo, a khawnkhong hong hon hi
Zeisu kia'n singlamteh pua a,Guakpai ding maw lei mi.Hilo, mikim puak ding om a,Kei puak ding zong om hi.
Singlamteh ke'n ka pua ding hi,Sihna'n hong khah mateng.Kumpi lukhu ka ngah ding hi.Vantung innpi tung leng
A kikhen let Zeisu khe kiang,Limlang suangphah tungah,Ka kham lukhu ka ngak suk ciang,Nuamin phat ning Amah.
Aw manpha hi, tua singlamteh,Vaanglian kumpi lukhu,Ka ngah ding hi hin kik ni teh,Hong lak ding lawpna thu.

songs.title: A NAI A GAMLA LOTE AH

lines: A nai a gamla lote ahAnte min khin zo ta hiSim leh zo, mual lo zaang lo ahAnvui te min zo ta hi
Topa aw, kote hong thumnahong ngai in an nei TopaAn la ding mi hong kuan sak inAnlak hun a khen ma in
Zingsang phalvak tuung ahi zongSunkim ciang ahi zonginHong kuansak lai in nitak zongLo lai teng an khawm dingin
Kuan mengun , Topa’ sawltakteAnvuite kuai zo ta hiAn kaikhawm khin, ni hong tum teh,Lungdamin na ciah ding hi.
Ciamna kip thupha,Zeisu kei aaPasian vaangliat bang hong ciam sakna pha,Hot khiatna luah-pa, Pasian’ leisa,Kha siangtho a suak, si-aa sawpsa.
Ka gengen ding hi, ka sasa ding ,Hong Honpa phatna sun niloh in,Ka gengen ding hi, ka sasa ding,Hong honpa phatna sun ni loh in.
Thuman’na cing a, cing hi nuamna,Ka mit kha’n ka mu hi lianpi nuamna.Vantung mite in ka bil sungah,Hehpihna itna hong gen ka za.
Thuman’na cing hi, tawlnga khin hi,Hong honpa sung, lung nuamin ka om hi,Vilkawm, ngakkawm in ka ento hi,Ama hoihna, itna hong dim hi.

songs.title: TOPA AW KEI HONG MANGNGILH KEI IN

lines: Kei hong honpa, asi luang inKa kumpi hong si mawTangtel bangbek keima adingA lutang hong zang maw
Cho-Nangtung kong thuman zawhnanginTopa kei hong huhinKumpi tokhom na luah cianginKei hong mangngilh kei in
Keina gitlohnate hanginSinglamteh tung tau mawLamdang hehpihna leh itnaBangtawh tehthei ding maw
Ama piansak mi mawhna hangA piangsakpa KhazihHong sih laitak, khuamial suangahNi a buk mah ding hi
Kei zong singlamteh ka muh ciangZumin ka kiseel diamLungdamna tawh lung nehno inKa khi ka luangsak diam
Hin tawntungna Topa PasianLawmte sang ka it zaw hiVantung lam ka zon laitak ahTopa kiang ka tawn nuam hi.//Nang kiangah, nang kiangah//Vantung lam ka zon laitak ahNang Kiang ah ka tawn nuam hi
Leitungah hauhna leh nuamnaMinthan thu ka ngen kei hiNangma kiang ka om laitakahLungdamin ka sem ding hi//Nang kiangah, nang kiangah//Nangma kiang ka om laitakahLungdamin ka sem ding hi
Mualkuam khuamialna sung hihangTuipi gal ah hong kha inHin tawntung na kongpi sungahNangmah tawh hong lut sakin//Nang kiangah, nang kiangah//Hin tawntung na kongpi sungahTopa kiang ka lut ding hi
Topa bek hong phel thei hiKeimah inah nakiang kong beel hiNa sipha tawh hong sawpinNa kiangah hong omsak tawntung in
Cho-Ni simin, nai siminSipha than na thei sakinHehpih a nong itna tawhKhaubangin ah keimah hong hen in
A kisia thei leitung ahDamtakin keimah lam hong hilhtaTopa bek i up cianginCikmah hunin lamkhial nawnlo ding
Sih ding hun hong tun matengVantung innpi nuamsung tun matengNang kong upna khangsak inTopa tawh kikhen nawnlo dingin
Kumpipa mai ih ding dingVantungmi tawh lasa dingNung ciangin, nung cianginA tang gungei lam zui dingTopa min phat tawntung dingNung ciangin, nung ciangin
Kumpipa mai ih ding dingVantungmi tawh lasa dingKumpipa a min phat dingHaleluijah, haleluijahKumpipa mai i ding ding
Vantung khua siklong tum dingKumpipa mai ih ding dingNung ciangin, nung cianginDAhna te paisan dingaSa tawntung ding minphatnaNung ciangin, nung ciangin
Ka kha in manpha puak dingKumpipa mai ih ding dingNung ciangin, nung cianginZawhna a khe mai nga dingAmah bang mel kicing dingNung ciangin, nung ciangin

songs.title: ZEISU BEK’N NUAMNA HONG PIA THEI

lines: Aw Topa Zeisu kei lungsimNa thu ka up man aSawtpi kazong a nopna inLungnop na ka ngah ta
Tuni’n Zeisu simloh inahDeihna dang omlo piItna hinna tawntung nopnaTopa kiang ka ngah hi
Lungnopna ka zon laitakinTopa ka mangngilh hiHonggum Topa ka nial cianginHong it a hong zol hi
Leitungah nopnate deih inLungkim ngah ding inahHahkat inah ka zon hanginLungkiatna teng kangah
Zeisu hongit thupha inahKeimah kangah ma-inSithei nopna lungsim neihhangTopa ka ngaihsun ke’n

Hong it Zeisu Topa aw,tuihual hong nai lai tak in,Huihpi nung daih nailoh tawh,Na ang sung hong om sak in,Nuntak huihpi kam ma teng,Hong honpa aw hong liahin,Keima kha nong lak ma teng,Khawl mun nuam ah hong kha in.

Belh ding dang khat bek nei keng,Cimawh in nang kong beel hi,Hong nusia peuh mah ngei ke’n,Nong huh nong neemlai ding hi.Kong muang hi, Topa nang mahHuhna nang kiang ka ngah hi.Topa aw na kha nuai ah,Keimah nong liah ding hi.

Kei deihna teng kicin’na,Khazih Topa nang na hi,Pukte phong mitawte khaa,Na damsak lungsim pumpi,Nang na dik, nang na siangthoKei kihhuai, mawhna ka dim,Ka pumtang sianna neilo,Nang thutak hehpihna dim.
Ka lampi sau in a gimhuai avangik pua in kikem khial inLungdam lasa in lungsim anat ciangZeisu in kei a hong kem hiam
Cho :A hong kem hi, ken ka thei hiKa dahna hong phawkpih hiSun in omnuamlo in, zan a lauhuai laitakHong gumpan hong kem
Sunkhua vak in a hong mial cianginKei kiangah a hong nai om hiamKa lampi mialin, lauhuai a tam ciangZeisu in kei a hong kem hiam
Haksa ze-et, ka thuak lai takinZan tawntung khitui luanna tawhHong honding om lo, ka dah laitakinZeisu in kei a hong kem hiam
I itte tawh, mangpha kipia inLungkham lutangnat a bei ciangTopa in ei bangci in hong mu diamZeisu in kei a hong kem hiam
Nuntakna tuipi tungah huihnun cianginSih ding cih ngaihsunin na lungkiat cianginThupha khat nungah khat na ngaihsun inlaTopa in tampi hong pia na thei ding hi.
ChoThupha khat nungah khat ngaihsun inA tampi hong pia-in thei ta inThupha khat nungah khat ngaihsun inPasian in a tampi hong pia thei ta in.
Lungmanna vangik bangin na thuak ngei hiamSinglamteh hong pua sak in a gik thei hiamThupha khat nungah thupha na ngaihsut lehNi simin a tawntung la na sa ding hi.
Midangte a sum a paai na et cainginZeisu kiangah na ngah ding sum ngaihsun inVantung khua sungah na omna inn hi zongKuamah in lei zo kei sum a om ding hi
Tua ahih ciangin gal kido lai takinPasian in na khempeuh uk hi, Lau kei inVantung mihingte in nang kiangah om hiLampi tawp dongin nang a hong huh ding hi
Lungsim a pha mihingte awTopa tungah na lungdam unTopa a teel mihingte awDahna lungmanna paisan un
Cho-Nuam un, nuam unTopa tungah na lungdam unNuam un, nuam unTopa tungah lungdam khin un
Lungdam ve un Topa inahLeitung vantung a phabel hiA thupha a laphate tawhHong uk a eimah hong phel hi
Topa a ding galkap na ahGalte hong zodek hang a ciToipa galkapmangte in ahGalte sangin a tam zaw hi
Sunlai in khua hong mial hanginZanlai in van hong khup hang inahNa lungsim na mawh lo dingt hiUm in galbei mateng thupha
Nang deih bang Topa, nang deih bangbangNangmah belsekpa, kei tungman bangNangma deih bangin kei hong bawlinTanglo mang dingin, nang kong ngak hi
Nang deih bang Topa, nang deih bangbangTuni in Topa, hong sit in nangVuksang ngo zaw in tun hong sawp inLungsim neem takin na mai kong kun
Nang deih bang Topa, nang deih bangbangKa liam ka gimna hong huh in nangVangliatna khempeuh nangman na neiHong dam sakin kei hong honpa aw
Nang deih bang Topa, nang deih bangbangKeima nuntakna hong uk in nangKhazih keima sung mi muh nadingHong guan in keisung, na Khasiangtho
Vantung ah I Pa in ahong itna,Hong piak lai siangtho sungah hong genta,Lai siangtho sungah thu angaihpha pen,Zeisu in kei hong itna mah hi pen
Cho-Zeisu’h hong it man ka nuampha hi,Kei hong it hi, kei hong it hi.Zeisu hong it man ka nuampha hi,Kei na ngawn hong it hi.
Amah manggilh in ka taisan hangin,Hong it lailai hi ka mangthang hangin,Zeisu hong it ken’ ka phawkkik a,Ama angsung ka delh kik vingveng ta
A phatna teng tawh a mai ka muh teh,La khat bek sathei ding hong kici leh,Bang la ka sa zaw diam hihlo a dang,Zeisu in kei hong it piandang lua sang.
Zeisu hong it a kei zong ka it hi,Ka kha hehpih in tan ding hong kum hi,Hong it manin singlamteh tung si a,Tua ahih ciang hong it takpi hi ta.

songs.title: AMAUTE IN LA THAK A SA UH HI

lines: Vantung inn sungah I lawm te’n lasa hi.Hong gum Topa a min a phatna uh hi.Leitungah lungkhamna teng mangngilh khina,Mi siangtho te’n lungdamna la thak a sa.
Cho-Zeisu min phat ni, Kalani mual tungsi zo hi.Zeisu min phat ni. Sihna zo a hingkikta hi.
Hong hehpihna phat na’ng la thak om kim hi.A um ta ding thupha bel ahi ding hi.Topa si a a piangkik a minthan’naPhatna lungdam in limtak in lasa ni.
Tuni sipha tawh a kisil lo te in,Tua la thak kua mahin sa theilo ding hi.Mawhneite mawhna phel a hong hehpihnaPhatna lungdam in limtak in lasa ni.
I omna inn ngaihsun inlaAtaang gungal khatah om a ciMisiangthote nuamna a om aPuanpaak tawh kizem a om hi
ChoVantung ah, Vantung ahI om nading inn Vantung ahVantung ah, Vantung ah, Vantung ahI om nading inn Vantung ah
Nangma lawmte ngaihsun inlaAmai lam amauten a zui hiLungdamna tawh amauten lasaVantung khua dongin kiza
Vantung honggum Topa kiangahKeima lawmte nuamsa a om hiTuamin in gimna om nawnlohnaKeima kha in a tungnuam hi
En in, i lawmte vantung ahAmau in vantung khua a lut zoA lungkhana teng bei khin dingaGimna tawntung mulo om zo
It aw nuam tak ihmu in tawlnga inI Topa dip tung lukham in nei inNang kong it hang, Topa’n hong it zaw sem,Mangpha Mangpha Mangpha
Naungek bang nuamtak ihmu hithiat inDahna kahna te’n nang hong phawnglo dingNang aa a nuam hithiat ihmutna hi.Mangpha Mangpha Mangpha
Hih leitungah ni-liim a bei matengTopa’n a tuu buk sung hong khop matengNi vaang taang khuamial a hong bei matengMangpha Mangpha Mangpha
Pasian tokhom mai kimuh kik ma tengA siatheilo puan a hong piak mateng,Tu’n I theih bangin I kitheih mateng,Mangpha Mangpha Mangpha
Min than’na thawhkik zing khuavaak ma teng,Khazih sung a site thawhkik matengGinalo bek tawh hong pai kik lo ding,Mangpha Mangpha Mangpha.

songs.title: KA OM NA’NG KHUA A HI

lines: Ni a taang khatna gam lamahNop sak na’ng gam lamahAksi zong a taan’na gamah,Ka om na’ng khua a hi
Tua khuapi nuam, khut tawh bawllo,Tua gam ei-ma a dingTawntung vantung mi’n la a saEi-ma omna ding hi.
Gimna tuakna gungal khatahLunggim tamna lamahKikhel a I nopsak na’ngahKa om nang in bawlta
Sihna tuipi gal khat lamahKhuamial na gam sungahLungdam nuamna I ngah na dingA taang in ka mu hi.
Mawhna leh hehna leitungahHong liah a mang sak hi.Tawntung tua khuapi nuam sungahZeisu tawh om khawm ning
An le leengtui gam ka tungzoA phatna teng kei aa hi zoLungdam huai ni taang tawntung hi,Keima khuamial leengmang zo hi
Aw gamnuampi, a pha gampi,Mual sang tungpan ka gal-et aKei aa ding bawlkholhsa innpiTuipi galah ka gal muh taKa ten’na ding vantung khuapiA taang pha hi tuipi gal ah
Hong honpa kei tawh hong vakkhawmNuamtak in kei tawh hong om khawmA khut in damtak in hong kai,Vantung gamgi ciang dong ka nai
Gamgi gal panin pak namtuiHuih nung hiauhiau tawh hong kizuiA vul ngeilo paakte palhinHin’na lui luang a tawntung in
Pasian a minthang hen, na lianpi bawl hi.
Leitung a it manin, A ta hong pia hi;
Mawhna seelna dingin A hinna paai a,
Mi khempeuh lut nading hinna kong hong ta.
Sakkik
Phat ve un! Phat ve un! Leitung teng kizel hen!
Phat ve un! Phat ve un!
Mi khempeuh lungdam hen.
Jesuh’ min suangin a Pa kiang va zuan un;
A bawlsa na lianpi hangin phat ciat un.
A si in hong leizo, tatna kicing khin,
A umte a dingin, Pasian in ciam khin;
Mimawh pen nangawn in Jesuh a up leh,
A mawhna mai ding hi, a up khit phet teh.
Na lianpi hong bawlsak in, ei hong hilh a,
Tapa Jesuh hangin, i lungdam lua ta;
A mai i muh ciangin nuam zaw lai ding hi.
Sangzaw, siangzaw, lianzaw, lungdamzaw ding hi.
Itna kumpi kei hong Cingpa,
Amah’n hong huh lah ngei lo;
A mi suak leng deihna cingta,
Amah kei aa hi den.
Nuntakna tui luanna mun-ah,
Tatsa kei hong paipih hi;
Kei hong pi hi, lonona-ah,
Vantung an in hong vaak hi.
Topa’n hong ompih tawntung-a,
Sihna ka kihta kei hi;
A ciangkhut in lung muan sak-a,
Singlamteh in hong pi hi.
Ka khantawnin ka nuntak sung,
Kei nong cing khial ngei kei hi;
Tuucing pha aw, Na innpi sung,
Phatna la kong sa ding hi.
Vang lian zahtak-huai Kumpipa bia un,
Lamdang hong itna, lungdamin sa un;
A hong liah, hong kem, hong uk tawntung Mangpa,
Vang-liatna tawh kidim phat huai Topa hi.
Nong kep nong huaina kigen zo lo-a,
Huih bang hong nung a, Khuavak bang tang ta,
Mualtung pan hong luang in, zang lei teng zel hi,
Daitui bang hong kia-in, guah bang hong zu hi.
Leivui tawh kibawl thanem mite in,
Nang kong muang uh hi, Nong huh den man in;
Nong hehpihna nuam in a tawntung kip hi,
Hong bawl, hong keem, hong tan, Lawmpha bel Na hi.
Kote Pa Pasian nong itna lian a,
Van-mite’n Nang mah hong phatna la sa;
Leitung mite in thanem mite hi ung,
Hih hang lungsim tak tawh Nang kong phat uh hi.

songs.title: (B) PASIAN MITE IN A MINTHANG SAK UN

lines: Pasian’ mite in Amin thangsak un,
Gamlapi dongin, Amin tangko un;
Gual zo minthang pen Pa, Jesuh phat-huai hi,
Ama gam minthang a, Mun khempeuh uk hi.
Van pan hong Ukpa, Hong hon zopa hi,
Gamlapi dongin, Amin tangko un;
Gual zo minthang pen Pa, Jesuh phat-huai hi,
Ama gam minthang a, Jesuh hi, thei un.
Pasian hong Honpa, Kumpi in mang den,
Mi khempeuh awng hen, Topa pahtawi hen;
To Jesuh min phat in, Van mi’n tangko hi,
A lu uh kun suk in, Tuuno bia uh hi.
Va bia ni, ei’n zong Biak mah ding hi a,
Minthanna teng zong Ama a’ hita;
