Kisialhpih ding bangmah om kei;
Ka deih bel teng khat zong siit lo,
Ama’ si khekna in ka nei.
En ven, a lu a khut, akhe,
Dahna, itna hong luang suk khawm;
Na mu ngei maw linglukhu le,
Itna, dahna gawm kilawm khawm.
Leitung khempeuh pia thei hileng,
Tamlua ka ci ngei kei ding hi;
A hong itna ke’n ngaihsun leng,’
Ka pum ka tak ka pia nuam hi.
Vanglian Kumpipa hong sihna,
A singlamteh ke’n velvel leng
Kei’ hauhna kei kiphatsakna,
Ke’n tu’n bangmah in sim nawn keng
Khazih ka Pasian sihna lo,
Kisialh pih ding bangmah om kei;
Ka deih bel teng khat zong siit lo,
Ama’ si khek na in ka nei.
En ven, a lu a khut, a khe,
Dahna, itna hong luang suk khawm;
Na mu ngei maw linglukhu le,
Itna, dahna gawm kilawm khawm.
Leitung khempeuh pia thei hileng,
Tamlua ka ci ngei kei ding hi;
A hong itna ke’n ngaihsun leng,’
Ka pum ka tak ka pia nuam hi.
Kalvary ah Jesuh a si,
Hong gum Topa, tua kithat hi;
Tua khuam tungah, a si bua hi,
Mawh phelna’ngin a hong lei hi.
Sakkik
Aw Kalvary, aw Kalvary,
Topa Jesuh’n sihna thuak hi,
Aw Kalvary, aw Kalvary,
Hong gum Topa kei ading si.
Suangpi kitam khua hong mial hi,
Hong gum Topa, lusu’n si hi;
A kiliahna puan kikeek a,
Vantung nopna, hong musak ta.
Topa Jesuh, bangci a hiam,
Topa nang in hihna nong pia;
Singlamteh pua haksa thuak hi,
Launa sungah Kalvary ah
Ka kumpi na hi ta tu’n Nang
Vangliatna teng tang in
Lingna khuk ka mangngilh loh na’ng
Kalvary ah hong kha in.
Sakkik
Getsemani mangngilh loh na’ng
Na thuakna mangngilh loh na’ng
Nong itna ka mangngilh loh na’ng
Kalvary hong kha in.
Na kisial na han hong lak in
Nangmah hong ki kah na
Vantung mite’n puanpak silh in
Nangmah a hong cinna.
Mary bang phalvak tung in ah
Pak namtui puak ding in
Hong paipih in Kalvary ah
Na han hawm hong lak in.
Nangma’ ading ken puanuam ing
Singlamteh ni sim in
Na dahna hong thuakpih nuam ing
Kei a’ ding Nang thuak khin.
A neu a lian kua cilo, mawh, mawh lo ci lo;
Jesuh’n vekpi ading khin, sawtpi pek in-ah.
Sakkik
A zozo hi! Takpi hi, vekpi’n zokhin hi;
Hih hi, mawh neite i sap, mawhna pulak ding.
Sang pen a tokhom tung pan, kum in hong sih ciang;
Na khempeuh a vekin zo, A aw ngai dih un.
Lunggim van pua nasemte’n, koi-ah sem na hiam?
Khawl dih in Amah’n zozo, sawtpi pek inah.
Na vangikpi teng khia in, Jesuh khe kiang khia’n;
Amah bekbek kiang ding in, Na khempeuh cinkhin.
Jesuh nasepsa muang in, na up theih mateng;
Hanciamna in kimanglo, sihna hong tunzaw.
Judah mite biakna, ganhing pawlpawl ahi;
Mawhna hong phel i lungdamna,
Neukha bek piangsak kei.
Tuuno Khazih inah, tua biakna sang phazaw;
A si a manpha ahi a, mawhna phel theita hi.
Upna tawh ka khutte, Nangma lamah kong laam;
Mawhna khempeuh ka kisik hi,
Ka hong thum hi Topa.
Singlamteh na tungah, Nangmah’n na thuak gimna,
Kei in ka lungngaih cianginah,
Na hong it ka theita.
Biakna vantung Tuuno, A umte nopsakna;
Ke’n um a ka biak ka nuamzo,
Ka phat ding a itna.
Sing Lamteh tung aa Jesuh en in
Nang aa ding leh kei aa ding hong si
Ngai in it-na’n A kiang hong sap lai
En in, hing ta in.
Sakkik
En in hing ta in, En in hing ta in;
Nang aa ding sing tung sihna en in
En in hing ta in.
Na mawh van gik kha hong gum ding hiam
Nun’ tak tawn tung na na nei ding maw
Jesuh bek in hong hon zo thei hi
En in hing ta in
Han pan a tho Jesuh en le ci’n
Man lang in inn dei sung om lai in
A mai nuam in hong lung dam sak ding
En in hing ta in
Jesuh’n van nun’ nuam hong bawl sak hi
Lung kham mawh nei mi’ sapna hong thei
Napai na peuhah hong kha ding hi
En in hing ta in
Itna siangtho, Itna kicing
Vantung nuamna hong tuak suk
Nong hehpihna tung khup na ding
Ko sung hong lamin Na buk
Jesuh aw hehpihna Na dim
Itna Siang kicing Na hi
Lawp a liing ko khempeuh lung sim
Hotna tawh Nong veh ding hi
Lung himawh mi’ lungsim sungah
It na Nangma Kha guan’ in
Ko te khempeuh Nangma sungah
Tawldam na hong luahsak in
Ko mawh nopna lungsim pai khia’n
Alpha le Omega in upna pan a cingsak Pasian
Ko lungsim hong khah khia in
Hong pai in, a hon zo pen Pa
Nang’ nuntakna hong guan’ in
Na innah hong tum meng in la
Pai khia nawn peuhmah kei in
Thupha kong piapia ding uh a
Na’na ka sem ding uh hi
Na itna sung ah kipak ta
Tawlnga lo kong phat ding hi
Jesuh in kei mah hong it-na,
Kei mah hong tatna dingin ah;
Singlamteh gilo hong thuakna,
Kam a genzawh hilo.
Sakkik
Hong itna kam agenzawh hilo,
Hong itna kam agenzawh hilo,
Jesuh in keimah hong itna,
Kam agenzawh hilo.
Ka nuntak tawntung na’ng in ah,
Nakpi dah na A hong thuakna,
Lingki phan lukhu hong khukna,
Kam a genzawh hilo.
Pasian kiang hong thumsak TOPA,
Ama sung ka ngah lungnop na,
Ama si hang hong piang thupha,
Kam a genzawh hilo.
Hong nai ciang ka ngah lungdamna,
Launa kihel lo tawldamna,
Ama hang lametna apha,
Kam a genzawh hilo.
Sihkhuk adim in kihong a
Sisan tuibangh luang hi
Tua si tawh kiphum mawhnei te
Mawhna tawh kipelh hi
(Mawhna tawh kipelh hi)2
Tua si tawh kiphum mawhnei te
Mawhna tawh kipelh hi
A si mimawh pan tua sihkhuk
Amuh ciang a nuam a
Hih mibangh ka gitloh hang in
Mawhna kiphel thei ta
(Mawhna kiphel theita)2
Hih mibangh ka gitloh hang in
Mawhna kiphel thei ta
A liamma ah hong luang sipha
Upna kamuh man in
Hongphel nading itna lapha
Ka sih mateng sa ning
(Ka sih mateng sa ning)2
Hong phel nading itna lapha
Ka sih mateng sa ning
Nung ciang hih a gik i pumteng
Sihhan sung omlai in
Topa hong phel lungdamna teng
Vantung ah lasa ning
(Vantung ah lasa ning)2
Topa hong phel lungdamna teng
Vantung ah lasa ning
It huai Tuuno Na si manpha
Bei hun nei ngeilo ding
Gupna ngah miteng kikhawm ding
Mawh ngei nawnlo ding hi
(Mawh ngei nawnlo ding hi)2
Gupna ngah miteng kikhawm ding
Mawh ngei nawnlo ding hi
Gamla pi mual tungah
Singlamteh tul gemgam
Gen theih mai zum na lim a hi
Tua khuampi ka it hi
Leitung bup pi tan ding
A it huai pen pa hong sih na hi
Sakkik
Tua singlamteh ken ngilh ngei kei ning
Zawhna minpha ka tut zawh mateng
Tua singlamteh khah lo lenlen ning
Kham lukhu ka khekna ni mateng
Mi in tua singlamteh a thusim loh hangin,
Ke’n ka phawk tawntungna thu hi
Pasian Tuuno in vantung nopna nu sia hi
Kalani mual tua pua ding in
Ka mawhna hong mai sak
Hong siangtho sak ding in
Si san luang in Jesuh hong si hi
Pasian Tapa si san siangtho a hong baan’ na
Tua singlamteh ka velvel nuam hi
Tua singlamteh khuampi
Ke’n nusia ngei kei ning
Taina, zumna ka thuakpih hangin
Tua hi leh khatvei ciang
Hong sam ding a inn ah
Amah tawh a min thang khawm ding in
Singlamteh ka kipakna hi,
Hunsia khempeuh zawhna hi;
Siangtho tangthu khempeuhte’ vang,
Jesuh’ singlamteh kiim tang.
Nuntak dahna’n hong phak ciangin,
Lawpna’n hong khem, lau ciangin;
Singlamteh’n hong khem ngeilo hi,
Lungnop nuamna hong pia hi.
Lungdamna ni hong taan ciangin,
Itna khuavak taan ciangin;
Singlamteh vang taang in ka ni,
Hong tangphasak semlai hi.
Thusia thupha natna nopna,
Singlamteh in siansuah a,
Lungnopna tehzawh loh om hi,
Tua nuamna kip tawntung hi.
Man-pha si tawntung manpha si,
Tu'n kei a'-ding manpha,
Tua si ha'ng bek ka kha tawldam,
Dahna teng bei sak hi
Sakkik
Aw! Lamdang hi tua sisan luang,
Gumpa’ pang pan phulkhia,
Vantung dong ah la in sa ning,
A man-pha bel si-san
"Mangngilh ngei nawn peuhmah kei ning"
Zuau lo Pasian in ci,
"Note' mawhna khialhna tang in,
Ka ta' sisan ka bua"
Mawhna ka bawl tampi ka thei
Maizo diam tua zahpi
A hih hang manpha si'n sawp hi
Mawhna teng pua khia hi
A cimawh lungsim le pumpi,
Si ding a lum zong in
Lungnuam takin kei ka si ding,
Tua manpha sisan hang
En un, mawhna khempeuh a puakhia Pa,
Sihna Kalvary mual tungah,
Singlamteh tunggim na sihna thuak in,
Kei a’ dingin a sisan hong luang
Sakkik
Hong gum Topa pang pan in-ah,
Sisan le tui hong luang khia hi;
Ka lung sungah om tawntung hik,
Mawhna kisawp siang zo.
Mawhna sawpsiang na’ng tui a hong luangzo hi,
Hong Gum Topa sih na mun pan;
A tawntungin tua tui ah kisil in,
Hong Gum Topa kiang zuan in pai ni
Tua si sungah a kisil khempeuh te,
A mawhna teng vuk bang ngo ding;
Na mawhna khempeuh uh hong maisak ding;
Ka kiang hong pai un, Topa’n hong ci.
Mawhna sungah ka paikik nawnkei ding,
Jesuh’n kei hong suak ta sak ding;
A Kha Siangtho in kei hong pi ding a,
A gamsung ah hong lutpih ding hi.
En in thuk in a zai tuikhuk,
A luang tawntung tuikhuk;
Vang nih panin hong luang khia-a,
Vuk bang hong ngosak ding,
Vuk bang hong ngosak ding.
Sakkik
Hong pai un tuikhuk hong luang hi, tu ni’n,
Hong pai khempeuh man ngen lo in,
Na mawh hong sawp sak ding.
Kalvary khuam tungah Lung kham,
Natna thuak in hong si, Lamdang sisan guntui hong luang,
Vuk bang hong ngosak ding, Vuk bang hong ngosak ding.
Mi khempeuh damna ding hong luang,
Tua thupha tuikhuk pan! Upna tawh A si sung bual leng,
Vuk bang hong ngosak ding, Vuk bang hong ngosak ding.
Lungdamna thupha na zak ciang, Hong pai in, ci’n hong sam,
Upna tawh A si sung bual leng,
Vuk bang hong ngosak ding, Vuk bang hong ngosak ding.
Na mawh vangik pan na suak ta ding hiam?
Si sung, si sung vang liatna om hi; Siat na tungah nangna gualzo ding hiam?
Si sung vanglian lam dang om hi.
Sakkik
Si sung vanglian (A vanglian)
Vanglian lamdang om,
Tuunosi (Tuuno si) san sungah ( San sungah)
Si sung vanglian (vanglian) vanglian lam dangom,
Amanpha Tuuno si sungah.
Kiphat sakna pan na suakta ding hiam?
Si sung, si sung vangliatna om hi;
Siangtho ngah ding Kalvary tui zuan in,
Si sung vanglian lamdang om hi.
Vuk sangin na pak zaw mahmah ding hiam?
Si sung, si sung vangliat na om hi;
Nuntak na tui sung mawh na ninsiang ta,
Si sung vanglian lamdang om hi.
Na Kumpi Jesuh’na na sem ding hiam?
Si sung, si sung vangliatna om hi;
Nisim Amah phat na na sa ding hiam?
Si sung vanglian lamdang om hi.
Kumpipa lukhu ngahna ding, Pasian’ Tapa’n do ding;
A dialkhaina kilak ding hi, A nung kua in zui hiam?
Dahna a thuak hang thuum lo-in, gimna a zo thei mi;
Leitung singlamteh puate in, Anung a zui uh hi.
Bawlsiat thuak pen nungzui khat in, han galkaht mu thei hi;
Topa vantung khua ah mu a, ‘Hong gum in’ ci’n ngen hi.
Topa’ sih laitak a galte, a mawhna a phel bang;
A thatte ading thungen ta, Ama nung kua’n zui hiam?
A teelsa sawm le nih tungah, Kha Siangtho hong tung hi;
Amau upna a liat manin, Pasian in a gum hi.
Bawlsiatna tampi thuak taleh, sahang kihta lo hi;
Sihna thuak ding lu a su hi, Amau nung kua’n zui hiam?
Mi siangthote tampi tangval, nungak le nu le pa;
Puanpak silhin Jesuh mai-ah, lungdamna la hong sa.
Launa, nasepna, gimna in vantung lam kahto hi;
Topa amau nungzuihna ding, Ko mau Nong huh ding hi.
Topa kiang pan thu hong tung, Hallelujah!
Ke’n nang kiang kong puak sawn ding hi;
Kigelhzo A kammal sung, Hallelujah!
En a, na hin ziau ding bek ahi.
Sakkik
En in, hing in sanggam aw,
Topa Jesuh en in tuni;
Kigelhzo A Kammal sung, Hallelujah!
En a na hin ziau ding bek ahi.
Itna thupha ka neita, Hallelujah!
Nang kong genloh ding hi thei kei;
Van pan hong kipuaksuk ta, Hallelujah!
Jesuh’n gen hi thuman hi ka thei.
Nunna nang hong kipiazo, Hallelujah!
Tawntung nunna na ngah ding hi;
Jesuh lo et ding om lo, Hallelujah!
Nangmah hong hon thei Jesuh bek hi.
Ka biak ahingkik Honpa tu’n leitungah om a,
Mite’n bangbang genta leh, Ahin lam ka thei ta;
Hong hehpihna ka thei a, A aw ka zaza hi,
Amah ka kisap laitak hongnai den hi.
Sakkik
Hing hi, hing hi, tuni’n Honpa hing hi,
Hong tonpih a, hong hopih hi,
Ka paina khempeuh ah, hing hi, hing hi,
Mihing honkhia Pa hi,
Bangci theih na hiam nong cih leh,
Ka lung sungah hing hi.
Ka kiim ka paam leitung teng A hong itna dima,
Lungman launa ka tuah ciang, A ang sung ka beel a;
Huihpi nun ciang A khut in kei hong len gige hi,
Amah hong kilat ding ni, hong tung ding hi.
Nuam un, nuam un! Jesuh’ mi, sa un lungdamna la,
Hallelujah ci unla, phat un Khris kumpipa;
Amah a zongte’ muanpa a gimte Huhpa hi,
Tua bang itna lian a nei mi om lo hi.
I Topa hong thawhkik ni, lungdam paisan pawipi;
Pasian paisan pawipi in, sihna pan hinna hi.
Leitung aw, genkhia dih in, lei pan vantung dong ah;
Gualzawh lungdamna la tawh, Jesuh’n hong tunpih ta.
Amanin i muh theih na’ng, i lungsim siangsak ni;
Jesuh’n thawhkikna khuavak, hong tangsak khinta hi.
Ama thugen ngai le hang, teltakin i thei ding;
A kiphatna awgingte, teltakin i za ding.
Vantungte lungdam hen la, leitung in lasa hen;
Leitung le a sunga te’n, gualzawhna gen uh hen.
Muh theih muh mawh khempeuh in, aw kikhat-in gen hi;
Jesuh thokik khinta a, kilungdam tawntung hi.
Jesuh hingkik hi tuni, Hallelujah!
Nuamna pha hi, lungdam un, Hallelujah!
Singlamteh tung sizo hi, Hallelujah!
A mite hong teelzo hi, Hallelujah!
Van-ah i Topa Kumpi, Hallelujah!
Amin phat in la sa ni, Hallelujah!
Mawh neite a phel na’ngin, Hallelujah!
Si in han-ah kivui hi, Hallelujah!
Gimna a na thuak manin, Hallelujah!
Eimah hong gumkhin zo hi, Hallelujah!
Van pan hong uk tawntung hi, Hallelujah!
La sa tawntung vantung mi’n, Hallelujah!
Minthang Kumpi hingkik zo, Hallelujah!
Sihna na gu koi-ah om? Hallelujah!
Khatvei si in hong gumzo, Hallelujah!
Hankhuk na zawhna koi om?
Minthang Kumpi Kha Kumpi, Hallelujah!
Nuntak tawntungna Na hi, Hallelujah!
Nangmah theihna Vangliatna, Hallelujah!
Nangmah phatna, kong itna, Hallelujah!s
Han thuk sung ah lum hi
Kei Honpa Zeisuh
A ni tunding ngak hi
Kei To Zeisuh’n
Sakkik
Han sung pan hong thoto zo (Tho to zo)
Vanglian pi tawh gal te zo gawp zo
Khuamial gampan galzo in hong tho to hi
A misiang te manpih ding hing kik zo hi
Hing kikzo, Hing kikzo
Halleluijah hing kik zo
Cin’ hangin mawkna hi
Hong Hon Zeisuh han
Ciamteh hang mawkna hi
Kei To Zeisuh’n
Sihna’n len zolo hi
Hong Honpa Zeisuh
Dalna te sugawp hi
Kei To Zeisu’n

songs.title: Ka Thei Hi, Kei Hong Tanpa Hing Hi

lines: Ka thei hi, kei hong Tanpa hing hi
Leitung ah hong pai kik ding hi
Ka thei hi, nuntakna hong pia
Hehpihna vang a khut sung om
Sakkik
Ka thei ka thei To Zeisuh hing hi
Leitung ah hong paikik ding hi
Ka thei ka thei nuntakna hongpia
Hehpihna vaang a khut sung om
Ka thei hi, hong thuciam peel ngei kei
A gensa thu bei ngeilo ding
A gilo sihna pan ka suakta
Amah muding nungciang in ah
Ka thei hi, ka om nang mun bawlkhol
A omna peuh kei zong om ning
Alamdang Amah’n kei hong kem hi
Kei a dingin hongpai kik ding
Na min a thang hi, A thokik Topa;
Na gualzo tawntung hi, sihna zo Topa.
Vantung mi siangthote’n, Suangi lemkhia zo;
Na puante a maute’n, limtakin kemzo
Sakkik
Na min a thang hi, A thokik Topa;
Na gualzo tawntung hi, Sihna zo Topa.
Han sung pan a tho, Jesuh’n hong muak hi;
Itna tawh hong dawnzo, launa beita hi.
A pawlpite nuamin, zawhna lapi sa;
Topa hingkik tu-in, sihna gu beita.
Kong muang lah nawn kei, hinna Kumpipa;
Nang lo hinna om kei, hong huh in Topa.
Tulmawh nong itna in, hong gualzo sak den;
Jordan gungal kai-in Na inn hong tun hen.
Deihna khempeuh a kicinna,
Lawmpha Jesuh nei ing.
Kei ading tul sawm tul-then sang hoih zaw hi;
Zangkuam unok paak zah a hoih,
Amah bek ken mu ingh,
Dam na’ng sian na’ng,
Ka deih teng a sung om hi.
Sakkik
Dah hun ciang hong hehnem in haksat ciang bukna hi.
Na vangik khempeuh hong suan in hong ci.
Amah zangkuam unok pak hi
A taang zingsol zong hi,
Kei ading tulsawm tulthen sang hoihzaw hi.
Ka lungkhamna teng la khia in,
Dahna hong puak sak a,
Ze-et hun ciang a muanhuai ka tau sang hi.
Upana sia sak theina khempeuh,
Ken tun ka nusia ta,
Ka sung pan a vangliatna tawh hong kem hi.
Sakkik
Leitung in kei hong nial in, Satan in hong do hang
Jesuh hangin ka ma ka tun ding hi.
Amah zangkuam unok pak hi
A taang zingsol zong hi,
Kei a ding tulsawm tul-then sang hoih zaw hi.
Aman hong nusia ngeilo ding, zong hong nial ngeilo ding,
Amah um in A deihna bang ta peuh leng,
Kei tung ah bangbang piang ta leh,
Lau nawn peuhmah kei ning,
Man-na tawh ka kha hong vak ding nuam lua veng
Sakkik
Minthang gam zuan in leeng ning, Topa ka mu ding hi,
Lung nopna guntui a luanna mun hi.
Amah zangkuam unok pak hi
A taang zingsol zong hi,
Kei a ding tulsawm tul-then sang hoih zaw hi.
Dawn un Jesuh’ min vangliatna, Vantung mite bok un;
Kumpi lukhu hong la unla, Kumpi lian bel pia un;
Kumpi lukhu hong la unla, Kumpi lian bel pia un;
Pasian biakman thahna thuakte’n, Amah kumpi pia un,
Jessi suan in phatna ngah hen, Kumpi lian bel pia un,
Jessi suan in phatna ngah hen, Kumpi lian bel pia un.
Teeltuam Israel minamte aw, tawmkha na hih hang un,
Hong tan zo hi, hehpihna tawh, Kumpi lian bel pia un;
Hong tan zo hi, hehpihna tawh, Kumpi lian bel pia un.
Zentail mikhialte’n zong dan pan, Hong hot mangngilh kei un,
Min phatna a khe ah va nga’n, Kumpi lian bel pia un;
Min phatna a khe ah va nga’n, Kumpi lian bel pia un.
Hih leitung a minam kim in, Jesuh lian bel sak un,
Liatna khempeuh ama aa ci’n, Kumpi lian bel pia un;
Liatna khempeuh ama aa ci’n, Kumpi lian bel pia un.
Ama mi siang honpite tawh, A khe mai-ah bok un,
Phat khawm tawntung ni amau tawh, Kumpi lian bel pia un;
Phat khawm tawntung ni amau tawh, Kumpi lian bel pia un.
Dawn un Jesuh’ min vangliatna,
Vantung mite bok un,
Vantung mite bok un;
Kumpi Lukhu hong la un la,
Sakkik
Kumpi lian Kumpi, Kumpi, Kumpi
Kumpi lian bel pia un
Pasian biakman thahna thuakte’n,
Amah kumpi pia un,
Amah kumpi pia un,
Jessi suan in phatna ngah hen,
Teeltuam Israel minamte aw,
Tawmkha na hih hang un,
Tawmkha na hih hang un,
Hong tan zo hi, hehpihna tawh,
Zentail mikhialte’n zong dan pan,
Hong hot mangngilh kei un,
Hong hot mangngailh kei un;
Min phatna a khe ah va nga’n
Hih leitung a minam kim in,
Jesuh lian bel sak un,
Jesuh lian bel sak un;
Liatna khempeuh ama aa ci’n
Ama mi siang honpite tawh,
A khe mai-ah bok un,
A khe mai-ah bok un;
Phat khawm tawntung ni amau tawh,
Dawn un Jesuh’ min vangliatna, Vantung mite bok un,
Kumpi Lukhu hong la un la, Kumpi lian bel pia un;
Sakkik
Kumpi lukhu, Kumpi lukhu,
Kumpi lukhu hong tan Topa khu sak un;
Kumpi lukhu, Kumpi lukhu,
Kumpi lukhu khu sak un;
Hih leitung a minam kim in, Jesuh lian bel sak un,
Liatna khempeuh ama aa ci’n, Kumpi lian bel pia un;
Ama mi siang honpite tawh, A khe mai-ah bok un,
Phat khawm tawntung ni amau tawh, Kumpi lian bel pia un;
Huihdam nung le vakhu khuang in,
Nitak khuamui nuamsak mahmah;
Pasian’ thupha hong phawksak in,
Lungsim hong zol, Galilee ah.
Sakkik
Aw Galilee, aw gam nuampi,
Jesuh’ utna gam nuam hi-a;
Aw Galilee, aw gam nuampi
Hong sakkik in, tua a ngaih la.
Paak le singkung niim dildial ve’n,
Vasa ham tawh kilawm mahmah;
Zing nisuah sim, phatna hong gen,
Om nuam zen si’ng, Galilee ah.
Tuipi tunga, a paina thu’n,
Ka lungsim sung hong phawng mahmah;
Khatvei beek pawh, a vakna mun,
Tung nuam zen si’ng, Galilee ah.
Ngai un! A tulmawh lapi’n, Vantung teng thawn hi;
“Pasian minthang hen” ci-in, lasa uh hi.
Van mi’ la in van thawnin, gawsem tumin lasa uh a;
“Topa Kumpi hi” ci-in phatna la sa.
Ngai un! Gualzawhna la aw, mun teng thawn zuazua;
Tuihual bangin nuamna aw, hong ging zuazua.
“Hallelujah” ci’n sa in, mun teng ah phatna aw ginga;
“Topa Kumpi hi” ci-in phatna kiza.
To thum gawm Pasian phat un, vantung mite aw;
Pa, Tapa le Kha Siangtho, phat den un aw.
Nidang lai hun mah bangin, Tatsa mite’n sa tawntung hi;
“Topa Kumpi hi” ci-in phat ding uh hi.

songs.title: AW, MI SANG TAMPI’N ZAI SA DING

lines: Aw mi sang tam pi’n zai sa ding,
Hong tang vang lian phat ni hong taang vanglian phat ni
Ka Pasian vang lian belna le hong hehpihna phat ni
Hong hehpihna phat ni, hong heh pih na phat ni
Hong hehpihna phat ni
Aw ka lim belh kei mah hong kha’n
Tangbangdamna hong piang tang bang dam na hong pian
Hih lei tung mi khempeuh tungah na thupha dimta hen
Na thupha dim ta hen Na thuphadam ta hen
Aw Jesuh aw nang mah siangbel
Damna’ng leh lungdamna’ng
Damna'ng leh lungdamna'ng
Mawh nei te’n zong hong theih zawh na’ng
Ka muan lianbel na hi, Ka muan lianbel na hi,
Ka muan lianbel na hi
Mawhna khempeuh hong phet zo hi,
Mi vai tham zong gum khia
Mi vai tham zong gumkhia
A si phabel hong luang sak hi,
Eite hong itna hi eite hong itna hi
Eite hong itna hi.
Beng ngongte aw khua za un la
Pau thei lo te’n phat un, Pau thei lo te’n phat un
Mittawte’n zong en un Topa,
Khelbaite diangkhia un, Khelbaite diangkhia un
Khelbaite diangkhia un
Ke’n nei khin tang, ka sak nop la,
Gupkhiat ka hih nungsang;
Ka Kumpi Honpa phatna la,
Gupkhiat ka hih nung sang.
Sakkik
Gupkhiat ka hih nung sang, Gupkhiat ka hih nungsang,
Ama min tawh vanglian ning; Gupkhiat ka hih nungsang,
Ka Honpa min in ka vanglian ding.
Ke’n nei hong lungkimsak Khazih,
Gupkhiat ka hih nung sang;
Ama deih bek ka bawl ding hi,
Gupkhiat ka hih nung sang.
Ke’n nei kitel teci panna,
Gupkhiat ka hih nung sang;
Beisak launa le uplahna, Gupkhiat nung sang.
Ke’n nei kei a’ding inn nuampi,
Gupkhiat ka hih nung sang;
Tua’h a tawntung ka teng ding hi,
Gupkhiat ka hih nung sang.
Ke’n nei genzawhloh lungnopna,
Gupkhiat ka hih nung sang;
Muang ing,A si le thumanna,
Gupkhiat ka hih nung sang.

songs.title: JESUH KA LUNGSIM IN KA DEIH

lines: Jesuh ka lungsim in ka deih
Hong heh pih na nak pi’n ka ngen
Hong heh pih na it nahong lang
Amah ke’n ka it pha sem ta
Sakkik
Lungsim phabel hong guan suk in
Tua Kham khuapi ka muh nading
Ka lungsim sung hong taang sak in
Tua khua pi nuam kei a ding hi
Lei tung itna sung a nuampen
Ki teh thei lo Hong it na tawh
Kong en to lam et na pi tawh
Na mai muh ciang lamdang ka sa
Van tung gam sung nop na kidim
Paak te hoih na mu ding tua lai
Za nawn lo ding vantung mi aw
Ka kha in lam dang sa ding ta
Nang loin nopna om thei kei
Ka lungsim hong dam sak thei ding
Nang Na om ciang dahna nuam sak
Vantung nopna kei sung hong taang
A manpha pen suang ke’n mu ing,
Lungdamin la ka sa;
Jesuh kei aa ci’n la sa ning,
Khazih la-in sa ning.
Sakkik
A manpha pen suang ke’n mu ing,
Lungdamin la ka sa;
Jesuh kei aa ci’n la sa ning!
Khazih la-in sa ning
Jesuh Siampi ka Kumpi hi,
Khuavak Kamsangpa hi;
Tokhom mai-ah Kamsanglian pa,
Ka van Kumpipa hi.
Amah topa-te’ Topa hi,
Kumpite’ Kumpi hi;
Amah in thumanna Ni hi,
A kha nuai cidamna.
Kilemna ding kei taang hong si,
Kei tang A si hong bua;
A lamdang kei hong gum Pa hi,
Amah mahin hong gum.
Khazih ah deihna teng cinga,
Ka lungmuanna ahi;
Leitung hinna Amah hi-a,
Vantung hinna zong hi.

songs.title: NGUN HI LO, KHAM ZONG HI LO

lines: Ngun hi lo, kham zong hilo, hong kitatkhiatna,
Leitung hauhnate in kei hong tan zo lo;
Kei muanna bulpi Jesuh si san bek hi a,
Ka Topa’ sihna in kei hong damsak zo.
Sakkik
Hong kitanzo, hih hang ngun hi kei,
Hong kilei zo, kham tawh hilo;
Jesuh sisan in keimah hong lei,
Hong itna genzawh hi lo.
Ngun hi lo, kham zong hilo, hong kitatkhiatna,
Ka lungsim mawhna vangik puakhin zo hi;
Kei muanna bulpi Jesuh si san bek hi a,
Ka Topa’ sihna bek in hong tan thei hi.
Ngun hi lo, kham zong hilo, hong kitatkhiatna,
Thukham in Pasian hong naihsak thei lo hi;
Kei muanna bulpi Jesuh si san bek hi a,
Ka Topa’ sihna in launa beisak hi.
Ngun hi lo, kham zong hilo, hong kitatkhiatna,
Vantung lampi lah kilei thei tuan lo hi;
Kei muanna bulpi Jesuh si san bek hi a,
Hong Honpa’ sihna bek in hong leizo hi.
Tokhom tunga Tuuno, lukhu namkim khuzo;
Ngai un, a ngaih vantung lapi,
La dang teng mengkhin hi;
Ka kha aw tho inla, Nang ading hong si Pa;
A lian bel Kumpipa ci-in, A phatna la sa in.
Ki-itna Kumpipa, En ve un! A liamma;
A khut, A pang kimu lai hi,
Minphatna in tuam hi;
Hih thupha lamdang lua, Phawkzawh lohin thuk lua;
Vantung mi’n zong en ngam lo-in,
Kuun hi, nuai lam en in.
Hong kilemsak Kumpi, galvai vengsak Pa hi;
Phatna aw, siatna suankhia-in, van nuai kilemna’ngin;
Vantung khuapi nuam sung, Amah in uk tawntung;
A liam, Ama khe kimkot ah, dawnna paak kipia pah.
A tawntunga Kumpi, hun le ni uk Mangpi;
Leitung pumpi na piangsak zo, gen zawh loh Na Siangtho;
Hong tan ka Topa aw, kei tang nang nong si maw;
Na min phat tawp ngei lo ding hing, a tawntung sa ding hing.
Ka lung sungah la ngaih hong kisa, Jesuh hong hopihna hi;
Lau ke’n nang kong ompih tawntung na,
Lungmaung takin om in, ci.
Sakkik
Jesuh, Jesuh, Jesuh,
Min teng pan ngaih pen;
Lunggulh teng kicinna,
La hong sasa nuamsak den.
Ka nuntakna mawhna’n su gawp zo, Lungsim sia, natna dimsak;
Jesuh’n asia teng hong lepsak zo,
A ngaih la khanglo kiksak.
Hong hehpihna pha tawh kivakin, A kha nuai ka beelzo ta;
A maitai ka muh tawntung manin,
Awngin la ka sa thei ta.
A sawt lo-in hong pai kik ding hi, Van ah hong la to dingin;
Theih loh gamah ka leeng to ding hi,
Amah tawh mangkhawm dingin.

songs.title: Topa in Kei Hong Cingpa Hi

lines: Topa in hong cingpa hi a, bangmahka sam kei hi;
Lonona ah hong lumsak a, tui dam kiang hong kha hi.
Nuntakna tha hong dimsak a, keimah hong tonpih hi;
Thuman lampi hong tawnsak a, Ama’ min ding a hi.
Sihna guam thuk ka nawk hangin, ka lau tuan het kei hi;
Na molhtum le Na ciangkhut in, Kei hong lungmuangsak hi.
Ka galte omna lak mah-ah, An nong lui veve hi;
Ka lu sathau nong nilhsak a, Ka hai a dimleet hi.
Ka khan tawntung thupha ngah-in, nopna ka luah dinga;
Pasian’ innpi a tawntungin, ka omna ding hita.
Phabel Jesuh aw, na khempeuh na uk hi.
Pasian le mihing ta na hi;
Nangmah kong muang hi, Nangmah kong phat hi,
Nangmah kong pahtawi ding uh hi.
Lono zong hoih a, singniim zong hoih sem hi.
Tuk lai-a paak palhte hoih a;
Jesuh hoihzaw hi, Jesuh siang pen a,
Nangmah kong pahtawi ding uh hi.
Ni tang zong hoih a, kha tang zong hoih sem hi.
Aksite diamdiam zong hoih a;
Jesuh hoih zaw hi, Jesuh hoih pen a,
Nangmah kong pahtawi ding uh hi.
A phabel Honpa, mikim Topa Na hi.
Pasian le mita Na hi a;
Na min a thang hi, pahtawina phatna,
Nangmah kong pahtawi ding uh hi.
Phat un! Phat un! Eite hong hon thupha Jesuh,
Sa un! Sa un! Hong it na thang sak un;
Dawn un! dawn un! Vantung mi a lianbelte aw,
Amin siangtho pahtawi in lian sak un!
Tuu cin bangin Jesuh’n naupangte cing in,
Ama angah tawi hi sun ni loh in;
Sakkik
Phat un, phat un, A liat na pha den zo omlo,
Phat un, phat un, nuamna la tawh phat un!
Phat un! Phat un! Eite hong hon thupha Jesuh,
Gim na, sih na, ei mawh na hang thuak hi;
Dawn un! Dawn un! Singlamteh
Thuak Topa Jesuh, suahtakna ding
Lam-etna Suangpi hi!
Eite’ dahna hong puak sak Jesuh hi a,
Bei thei lo hi lamdang hat hong it na;
Phat un! Phat un! Eite hong hon thupha Jesuh,
Amah phat na’n vantung innpi thawn hi;
Mang tawntung ta, eite hong hon Topa Jesuh,
Kamsang Siampi, Kumpi za ngah ta hi!
Khazih hong kum ciang leitung zo gawp ding a,
Ukna vang liatna Khempeuh Ama a

songs.title: I NGAK LAITAK HONG TUAK DIAM?

lines: Topa Jesuh nuamna hong pia dingin
Sunkim zankim hong pai leh
Lungsim dikin meivak a baihsa in
I ngak laitak hong tuak diam?
Sakkik
Ute naute i kiging ciat zo hiam
I kha in nuam luut na ding
Nangmah leh kei kiging sa’n hong mu diam?
Ngak in, Topa hong pai ding ngak in.
Zingsang khat peuh phalvak tung pan laitak
Khat khat-in hong sam pak leh
Hong kepsak talen i piak kik laitak
Pha hi nang hong ci na diam?
Hong vaikhakna bangin i hih zo leh.
I siamna zah siit kei leng
I lungsim kisuanna a om kei leh
Nopna pha i ngah ding hi.
A ngak zote in thupha ngah ding hi.
Vantung khua ah mangkhawm ding
Sunkim zankim a hong pai kha ding hi.
I ngak laitak hong tuak diam?
Zingsang, zingsol a tumma diak ahi zongin,
Khua hong vakin, ni a suah ciang ahi zongin;
Minthanna tawh dimin, Jesuh hong pai mu ding,
Amah a umte hong khop ciang.
Sakkik
Aw, Topa cikciang hi ding hiam?
Ko kiang Nong pai kik ding,
Hong paikik ding,
Hallelujah, Hallelujah Amen,
Hallelujah, Amen.
Sun hun hita leh, zankim laitak hita leh,
Zan khuamial sung ihsip laitak zong hita leh;
Pasian khuavak tawh minthang Jesuh hong pai ding,
Amah a umte hong khop ciang.
Vantung mi in Hosanna ci’n a otna aw,
Mun khempeuh ah kiza ding hi, vantung tun ciang;
Vantung mi siangthote in a cing ding uh hi,
Amah a umte hong khop ciang.
Si lo-in lungdamin vantungah i pai ding,
Dahna, gen theihna, natnate om nawnlo ding;
Pasian tawh meii tung tuangin vantung i pai ding.
Amah a umte hong khop ciang.
Topa Jesuh hong pai kik ciang,
vantung pengkul aw za a,
Zing tung khuavaak tawntung
nuamtak tang ding hi
Kiphelna ngah mihingte in
gungal hong kikhop ciangin
Min hong sap laitak kei mah zong om ding hi
Sakkik
Vantung ah, min hong sap laitak
Vantung ah, min hong sap laitak
Vantung ah, min hong sap laitak
Min hong sap laitak kei mah zong om ding hi’ng
Zing tung mei kai omlo khuavak
Jesuh min tawh si tho a
Topa tawh nungta kik a nuam sung tum ni.
Sihna a ngah mihing te in
Vantung inn ah tum ciang in
Min hong sap lai tak kei mah zong om ding hi
Topa a na hong seem sak a
Zing ni tum dong mateng in
Kidopna tawh a ma itna gensak ni
Leitung sihna hun hong kheng ding
Hih nasep na taang zo in
Min hong sap laitak
Kei mah zong om ding hi’ng
Topa hong pai ding, nung ciangin: kithawi in hong pai ding!
Van inn nuam panin hong pai ding: kithawi in hong pai ding!
Amah thuman i Topa hi, A teelsate thupha pia ding,
A Pa’ Kumpi tokhom tu ding: kithawi in hong pai ding!
Sakkik
Mopipa hong pai ciang na kithawi diam?
Mopipa hong pai ciang na kithawi diam?
Zingsang, sun le zan hi zong, Na meivakte tangpha in,
Mopipa hong pai ciang na kithawi diam?
Amah leitung hong pai baih ding: kithawi in hong pai ding!
Gualzawhna ding hun hong tung ding: kithawi in hong pai ding!
Hallelujah van pan ging ding, Jesuh’ gupkhiatna hong puak ciang,
Meivak hoihte’n Topa mu ding: kithawi in hong pai ding!
En in, nang le kei ading hi: kithawi in hong pai ding!
A sawtlo-in pengkul za ding: kithawi in hong pai ding!
Ei hong sam ding thukhen ni ciang, Gam khempeuh panmun khempeuh-ah;
A kumpi tokhom mai ding ding: kithawi in hong pai ding!
I meivakte baihsa’n om diam? Mopi hong pai ciang,
I meivakte tangsa’n om diam? Mopi hong pai ciang,
Tua zan-ah, tua zan dai ah,
I meivak tang pha’n om diam? Mopi hong pai ciang.
Sakkik
A baihsa’n om a baihsa’n om,
A baihsa’n om, Mopi hong pai ciang,
Vaitutna aw i za ding hiam? Mopi hong pai ciang,
Nuamna otna aw i za diam? Mopi hong pai ciang,
Tua zan-ah, tua zan dai ah,
I meivak tang pha’n om diam? Mopi hong pai ciang.
Kikhenna a om kei na diam? Mopi hong pai ciang,
Na kithawina aw i za diam? Mopi hong pai ciang,
Tua zan-ah, tua zan dai ah,
I meivak tang pha’n om diam? Mopi hong pai ciang.
Dah hun a hi kha kei na diam? Mopi hong pai ciang,
Meitui sap hun a hi kha diam? Mopi hong pai ciang,
Tua zan-ah, tua zan dai ah,
I meivak tang pha’n om diam? Mopi hong pai ciang.
Kimuhna nuam hita ding hi, Mopi hong pai ciang,
Hallelujah i ci ding hi, Mopi hong pai ciang,
Tua zan-ah, tua zan dai ah,
I meivak tang pha’n om diam? Mopi hong pai ciang.
Topa ngakta un, kam hong ciam khinzo hi;
Topa ngakta un, van pan hong tung ding hi;
Topa ngakta un, upna tawh saan ding hi;
Inndei tungah ngakta un.
Sakkik
Vangliatna! Vangliat!
Mawhna tung gualzawhna le lungsim sianthona;
Vangliatna! Vangliat!
Pentecost Ni a vangliatna
Topa ngakta un, Jesuh tung ki-ap in;
Topa ngakta un, mawhna a sian dongin;
Topa ngakta un, van huih dam nun dongin;
Inndei tungah ngakta un.
Topa ngakta un, a sangzaw kahna’ngin;
Topa ngakta un, deihna lianpi nei in;
Topa ngakta un, van pan mei ngah nangin;
Inndei tungah ngakta un.

songs.title: Ngai Dih Un, Gawsem Tampi Aw

lines: Ngai dih un! Gawsem tampi tawh,
Van ah phatna la kisa;
Van mang Jesuh vaihawmna tawh,
Itna, nuamna kidimta;
Vantung tokhom ah tu hi,
Jesuh’n leitung A uk hi;
Hallelujah! Hallelujah! Hallelujah! Amen.
Mang tawntung hi, vanglian Kumpi
Minthanna Nang aa hizo;
Na tatsa mite nong it hi,
Hong khenzo kuamah om lo;
Na hehpihna sangsate’n,
Na maipha muta uh hen;
Hallelujah! Hallelujah! Hallelujah! Amen.
Honpa aw, hong pai mengmeng in,
Minthan ni hong tungsak ta’n;
Dipkuat huai sapna zak ciangin,
Mangthang ding hi, lei le van;
Kham gawsemte kitum ding,
Kumpipa’ min kiphat ding;
Hallelujah! Hallelujah! Hallelujah! Amen.
Vantungah gam a minthang bel eite adingin om hi,
Kum simin mi siangthote kikhawm uh hi;
Gam minthang tawh kinai theih nadingin ni in hong kheng hi,
Gam minthang piang ding hun hong tungdekta hi.
Sakkik
Gam minthang hong piang ahun tung dekta hi;
Gam minthang hong piang ahun tung dekta hi,
Kisa khol in ka kha aw, sawtlo pengkul tum ding hi,
Kumpipa minthang tawh hong pai ding hi.
Topa bawlsa vantung a gam minthang phual lungngaihna in,
Hong gum Topa hong pai ding hun i ngak hi;
I thang awkna hih leitung koltanna sungah hong phel hi,
Gam minthang piang ding hun hong tungdekta hi.
Sawtvei i ngak ciangin hih leitungah lungkhamna tam hi,
Meikai manin mihing lungsim kisia hi;
Gam minthanna thu gen inla, la phasa in hansuah ni,
Gam minthang piang ding hun hong tungdekta hi.
Topa bawlsa vantung gam hong tun ciang i Topa mu ding,
Hong pai ma-in vantung gam i mu ding hi;
Hallelujah A si tawh hong gum i Topa’ minthang hen,
Gam minthang piang ding hun hong tungdekta hi.
La sa un! “Jesuh in kong pai ding” ci,
A si tawh a gup mihing ta dingin;
Hong kum a, hong uk ding a minthang hi,
Jesuh hong paikik ding hi!
Sakkik
Jesuh hong pai ding, hong paikik ding hi,
Jesuh hong paikik ding hi!
Lungdamin, la pha sa un nuam ding hi!
Jesuh hong paikik ding hi!
Jesuh hong pai ciang misite tho ding,
I it i ngaih lawmte tawh kimu ding;
Vantung ah ei hong paipihna dingin,
Jesuh hong paikik ding hi.
Jesuh hong pai ding a mi siangthote,
Leitung lungdamna nuam pia suk ding hi;
Bei ding hi, lungkhamna sinkhamnate,
Jesuh hong paikik ding hi.
Jesuh hong pai ding thuciamna om hi,
A teelsa mihingte la to dingin;
Ngak in, lawpin, a kisa-in om in,
Jesuh hong paikik ding hi.
Jesuh leitungah hong kumkik ding, Tuni hikha leh maw?
Itna tawh hong uk ding hong pai ding, Tuni hikha leh maw?
Kikhen a om leitung teng a, A tatsa a sianthosaksa,
Hong la ding Ama lawm teelsa, Tuni hikha leh maw?
Sakkik
Nuam si’ng! nuam si’ng! Hong lungdamsak ding hi;
Nuam si’ng! nuam si’ng! Amah Kumpi ding hi;
Nuam si’ng! nuam si’ng! Lampi puah mengmeng ni;
Nuam si’ng! nuam si’ng! Jesuh hong pai ding hi.
Dawimangpa’ ukna beita ding hi, Tuni hita leh maw?
Dahna khuisatna beita ding hi, Tuni hita leh maw?
A si mite Khris sung tho ding, Vankim lai-ah Amah dawn ding,
Cik ciang hihte eite’n mu ding, Tuni hikha leh maw?
Lungkip thumanin hong mutam maw, Tuni-in hong pai leh?
Laulo kipakin hong mutam maw, Tuni-in hong pai leh?
Hong pai ding lim tam semsem ta, Zing khuavak ding mual kiseem ta,
Vil giugiau un ahun naita, Tuni hong hi kha leh?

songs.title: Pasian’ Kha Siangtho Hong Kumsuk In

lines: Pasian’ Kha Siangtho, hong kumsuk inla,
Ka lungsim siang semsem ding hong hei in;
Ka zawnkhalna hong hehpih suk inla,
Nang kong it ding bangin hong itsak in.
Kong it ding Nong deih, ka To Pasian in,
Pilna, thatang, kha, lungsim khempeuh tawh;
Nangma singlamteh hong beel theisak in,
Nang mai hong zongin hong muzo sak aw.
Nong nai tawntungna kei hong phawksak in;
Lungsim sung noplohna lungmuan lahna;
Nial nopna lungsimte hong zosak in,
Hong ngakzo sak in thunget ngah lohna.
Van mite bang Nang kong it theih na’ngin;
Ka pumpi’n itna siang hon zensak in;
Na Kha Siangtho sung kei hong phumta in,
Nong itna ka sung mei bang lumsak in.
Kha Siangtho meivak pi aw,
Keima lungsim hong taan aw;
Khuamialna na hawlkhia in,
Khuamialna khuavak sak in.
Kha Siangtho vangliatna aw,
Kei lungsim hong sawp siang aw;
Khialhna in hunsawt veipi,
Ka lung sung hong ukzo hi.
Kha Siangtho
Lungdamna aw,
Ka lungsim sung nuamsak aw;
Gimna khempeuh hawlkhia in,
Dahna lungsim damsak in.
Kha Siangtho a dik mi aw,
Ka lungsim sung hong om aw;
Milim khempeuh susia in,
Nangmah guak bek hong maang in.
Lungdam thu zeel-sak un, mi omna ci tengah,
Mihing lungsim omna mihing gal tamna ah,
Tapidaw leii khempeuh lungdam thugensak un.
Huhpa hong pai khinta.
Sakkik
Huhpa hong pai khinta,
Vantung Kha Siangtho pen,
Pa’n piak ding hong ciam pen,
Lungdam thu zeel sak un.
Mi omna ci tengah;
Huhpa hong pai khinta.
Zan hun saupi beita, mi omna citeng ah,
Lungsim vangikpi teng, hehna huging vengta;
Nitang khammual pan in hong suahkhiat tak ciang in,
Huhpa hong pai khinta.
A kha sung zatui tawh, kumpi te’ To hat pa’n,
Thongkia kha khempeuh tung, hong puak, hotkhiat kicing;
Thongpi hawm sung teng ah, zawhna lapi hong ging;
Huhpa hong pai khinta.
Genzawh loh itna siang! ka leii in bang ci-in,
Genzawh loh hehpihna, mi vakvai tung gen ding;
A mah le A meel tang, sungah ka om theihna’ng;
Huhpa hong pai khinta.
Awging van khum dawnah, leng in thawn to sak un;
Vantung misiangte’aw, leinuai mi dawng sak un;
Tatsat lo itna sung, a bei ngeilo ding la;
Huhpa hong pai khinta.
Thumaan Lamhilh Kha Siangtho
Tapidawte nusia lo
Vantung gam zuanzin mite
A khut tawh hong len gige
A gimte tawntung pha tuam
A zak ciang Ama aw nuam
“Vantung innpi lam zong mi,
Hong zui in, Kong kha ding hi”
Hong ompih den Lawm pha pen,
Ko guak hong zawt tawm sak ke’n
Khuamial, lung-man’, launa sung’
Nangmah’n hong om-pih tawntung
Huihpi nasia mahmah in
Lungkia laitak hong ci in
“Vantung innpi a zuan mi,
Hong zui in, Kong kha ding hi”
Nasepna hun bei ta a,
Vantung tun’ ding bek om ta
Kei min zong a om buangtam,
Jesuh si bek ka paulam
Sihna gun ka ngah lai-tak
Hong ci lai, siangtak tel-tak
“Vantung innpi a zuan mi,
Hong zui in, Kong kha ding hi”
Nunna hong pia’n Pasian,
Nang bawl bang bawl dingin,
Na deih bang ka deih theih nading,
Hinna thak hong guan in.
Nunna hong pia’n Pasian,
Ka lungsiim sian’ dongin;
Nang tawh sin khat lung khat suah dong,
Bawl khawm, thuak khawm dingin.
Nunna hong pia’n Pasian,
Nang mi ka hih khit dong;
Leitung na khat ahi kei sung,
Na thu mei bang kuan dong.
Nunna hong pia’n Pasian,
Si ngei nawnlo dingin;
Hin tawntungna gam nuam sungah,
Nang tawh omkhawm dingin.
Kha Siangtho vakhu bangin ah,
Hong pai in vanglian tawh;
Na itna mei bang hong tawh in,
A dai ko lungsung ah.
Kote lasak ngei bangin ah,
Thoto-in sa zolo;
Hosanna ci’n ko aw ging lo,
Kote biakna sita.
Topa tua bang ko si ding maw,
Hehpih huai mahmah ung;
Ka hong itna uh a neu hang,
Nang nong itna lianzaw.
Kha Siangtho vakhu bangin ah,
Hong pai in vanglian tawh
Gumpa itna hong buak inla,
Kote hong tawh kuang in.

songs.title: Ke’n Mu Khin Tang Lawm Taktak

lines: Ke’n mukhin tang lawm taktak, ka sapna teng hong dimsak,
Ka Honpa manpha Honpa;
Upna mit tawh keimah in, ka mu thei a tawntungin,
Lam tawntung hong tonpih hi.
Sakkik
Hallelujah ka Honpa tawh ka paikhawm hi,
Ka it Honpa, manpha Honpa;
Hong it hong angvanna sungah kei hong kem hi,
Kei guak hi ke’ng, kei guak pai ngei ke’ng.
Ka mawhna hong sawp siangsak,
Ka sunglam zong hong siangsak,
Ka Honpa manpha Honpa;
Ka kha hong cidamsak a, ka nunna hong nuamsak a,
Nisimin thupha hong pia.
Maipha hong pia ka dah ciang, ze-etna lian ka thuak ciang,
Ka Honpa manpha Honpa;
A ang sung khawlmun nuam bang, Muzo ke’ng tawldamna dang,
Hong huh den Pa Amah hi.
Inn hong bawlsak van tungah, limlang tuipi gal khatah,
Ka Honpa manpha Honpa;
Ka sunmang hong tangtung ding, tua munah kei ka teng ding,
Tawntung nopsakna munah.
Khazih galkapte’n ah, galsim ding kuan un;
Eite mai a masa, Jesuh mitsuan un;
Khazih eite Mangpa, makai hilo maw;
En un a dialpaina, galphual lam manawh!
Sakkik
Jesuh’ galkapte’n ah, galkap ding kuan un;
Singlamteh pua un la, Na mailam nawt un.
Jesuh min a zak ciang, dawi mite tai uh;
Nawt un, tua ahih ciang, Na mualsuah dong uh;
Phatna aw kizak ciang, dawi gam kiliing hi;
Lawmte tua ahih ciang, awng un phatna pi.
Galkap honpi bangin, Pawlpi’n masot hi;
Tang mi siangte bangin, I totna khat hi;
Eite kikhen lo-in, pum khat bek i hi;
Lawp le zuih kikhat-in, hong ki-itsak hi.
Kumpi za sia thei hi, Kumpi gam kip kei;
Hih hang Jesuh Pawlpi, cikmah’n sia thei kei;
Dawi in Pasian’ Pawlpi, Cikmah’n zo ngei kei;
Khazih hong ciamsa hi, A ciampeel ngei kei.
Tua hi a hong pawm un, mi khempeuh in-ah;
Ko tawh hong sa khawm un, galzawh nuamna la;
A minthang pahtawi un, leitung vantung ah;
Tatsat lo-in phat un, Khazih Kumpipa.
Kumpipa hong maikai in, uan ding ni hong tungzo;
Tu a kipan gal sungah, Nang buk ko inn hizo;
Kigin sung nong hehpihna’n, kote hong hatsak a;
Hing tawntung Kumpipa tawh, galdo la ka sa ta.
Kumpipa hong makai in mawhna gal bei mateng;
Gal kilemna nuam om a, sianthona’n zawh mateng;
Thau, tei le nam, khuangging tawh Pasian’ gam piang hi kei;
Ki-it kihehpihna tawh, Pasian gam hong tung thei.
Kumpipa’n hong makaih in, lau lo kong zui uh hi;
Na mai kimuhna peuh-ah, lungdamna khuavak hi;
Na singlamteh ko tungah, lam pai na’ng hong taan aw;
Galzawh lukhu’n hong ngak hi, Hong pi in Pasian aw.
Tho un! Tho un! Topa’n eite hong sam zo hi,
Ding un ding un, Um in Ama thute;
Pai un! Pai un khia un Jubili kum hi,
Eite Topa Jesuh hong itna thuphate.
Sakkik
Sa un, sa un a la,
Hong tang ta hi lamhilh
Zingsol i tungah pai hi
I mai lam ah, lam hong hilh hong hilh hong gum Topa pi,
A min, amin thang ki za tawntung hen la,
“Hosana, Hosana,” kiko tawntung ni.
A galkap mite’n ngai un,
Jesuh Topa bek thei ni, Haleluijah
Kiko ni paina teng ah.
Ngai un ngai un,
Khuamial sung a si ding mite,
Ki ko, ki ko tuipi
Kheng in hong ging,
Manlang manlang leitung
Khempeuh ah zel sak un.
A zawng a hau mite omna,
Mun khempeuh ah.
Pasian pawlpi’n
Lainatna khut zan khia un la,
Huh un huh un, A cimawhte huh un.
Na khut khak un, Itna maitaina tawh hon in,
Topa’ kepna tuu huang sungah hong tunpih un.
Khuadak khia un, Topa kamciam ni hong nai zo,
Phat un phat un, A lian bel Kumpipa
Lemna nopna, minthanna leh
Vang liatna hun
Haleluijah ci’n awng in
Mun teng thawn sak un.

songs.title: Topa Na Gam Ka It Hi

lines: Topa na gam it ing, Gamlapi aa na inn;
Thupha a piaksa A pawlpi, Ama si tawh leizo.
Na Pawlpi ka it hi, Na ding, a kulhpi mai;
Hawm thawhna le itna mit tawh, En in, khut tawh hong len.
Pawlpi ka it manin, luangsak luankhi tui bang;
Keem in, cingin, A nasem ning, leitung bei ni mateng.
Ka lungdam theihzah-in, vantung ka tun ciangin;
Amah tawh ne khawm nuam sa-in, Hong itna ka phat ding.
Na thumana bangin, Zion mual ah na sang ding;
Leitung minthannate bei-in, nuamzaw vantung thupha.
Ni khat, Ama min phatna van dim napi’n,
Leitung ah mawhna zan bang mial manin;
Nungak sung suakin, Jesuh hong pai suk in,
Mi lak hong teng hi, lampha lak dingin.
Sakkik
Nungta-in hong it, si-in hong hon hi,
Kivui-in ka mawhna a puakhia hi;
Thokik in hong diksak, khawnkhong tawntung hi,
Lungdam huai bel hi, hong paikik ding ni!
Ni khat, Kalvary mual kahto sak uh a,
Singtung kilhcip uh khailum dinginah;
Mawhna teng pua in, simmawh, bawlsiat, huatna,
Nakpi thuaksak uh hi, kei hong Tanpa.
Ni khat, huan sung ah Amah kinusia a,
Ni khat, thuakna tawh pengin tawlnga a;
Vantung mite in, a han hong cingsuk a,
Lam-et bei mite’ muan kei hong hon Pa.
Ni khat, Amah han in siin zo nawnlo a,
Han kong vangkhakna suangpi tukkhia a;
Sihna zo gawpin, sihna pan thokik a,
Tu’n vantung kahzo, tawntung kei Topa.
Ni khat, Amah pengkul in hong masuan ding,
Ama vanglian vantung pan hong tang ding;
Ka it ka ngaihte, Amah’n hong tonpih ding,
Angtan huai hi, tua Jesuh kei ading.
Zion khua kongpi suak dingin, Lai Siangtho genzo hi;
Ciampel ngeilo i Topa in, A omna ding hong bawl hi.
A kip tawntung suangpi tungta, A kiling zo kei ding hi;
Gupna ding thu tawh omkhawm a, gal-etin kilawm thei hi.
A hong it tawntung na panin, a hong luang hinna luitui;
Tanu tapate in tua tui, lungdam taka dawn uh hi.
Tua bang luitui om ngei hileh, kuamah tha kiamlo ding hi;
Thupha hong pia Pasian bangin, Khang khat pan khang khat kip hi.
Mihing omna kiimkot tengah, meii le meikhuam hong langsak;
Hong ompihna lah na’ngin ah, a vangliatna hong musak.
Amau’ an ding manna pia a, Amau’ thuumna a za hi;
Hosanna ci-a kiphatna, vantung dongin kiza hi.
Pasian hong hehpihna thupha,
Kei kiang hongtun theihna,
Ka kilawmlohpi hong deihna,
Banghang hiam theizo keng.
Sakkik
Ahih hang ka uppa ka thei hi,
Amah muanhuai hi,
Ke’n ka thei zo hi,
Ama tung ka piaksate zong,
Kemzo ding hi, tua ni dong.
Hong honkhia zo thei hih upna,
Kei tung a hong piakna,
A thu um leng lungnop theihna,
Bangci bang hiam thei keng.
KhaSiangtho in mi lungsim hei,
Mawhna hong phawksak thei,
Jesuh hong musak umsak thei,
Bangci bang hiam thei keng
Topa mai ken ka muh ma-in,
A pha a sia tuah ding,
Gentheih nading nopsak nading,
Bang ka sunsiah thei keng,
Topa cikciang hong pai ding hiam,
Ka sih kiht hizaw diam?
Vankim lai-ah ka dawnzaw diam?
Bangmah kei-in thei keng
Tanglai Pate’ upna hinglai,
Mei sung, Humpi kuasung khiat thuak,
Tua zah upna lian i zak ciang,
Aw bangzah in i lungdam hiam?
Pate upna, Upna siangtho,
Ei zong sih dong i thuak ngam ding.
Tanglai Pate’n kolbulh thuak in,
Thong sung khuamial munah ki koih,
Hih hang lungsim siangtak tawh om,
Tua bang mite i sun ding hi,
Pate upna, Upna siangtho,
Ei zong sih dong i thuak ngam ding.
Upna i cih Pate’ up bang,
Tual leh gal ki do na sungah,
Banghang hiam cih teltheihna tawh,
Gitna itna kammal tawh lak,
Pate upna, Upna siangtho,
Ei zong sih dong i thuak ngam ding.
Tanglai Pate’ upna nei leng,
Tual leh gal zong i it ding hi,
Nuntak siangtho leh kamkhum tawh,
Topa hong itna thu gen ni,
Pate upna, Upna siangtho,
Ei zong sih dong i thuak ngam ding.
Khris le A Pawlpi ading, lung kituakin i ding;
Kam le muk tawh phat ni, A thanemte huh ni;
Khe tawh mangthang zong ni, Khris le Pawlpi ading.
Sakkik
Khris le A Pawlpi ading, lung kituakin i ding;
I nuntakna i kipiata, Khris le Pawlpi ading.
Khris le A Pawlpi ading, thungen in sem den ding;
Lawpna, hanna thak tawh, Na khat peuh sem pel mawh;
Thuciam man zuihna tawh, Khris le Pawlpi ading.
Khris le A Pawlpi ading, “Hosanna” ci’n sa ding;
Hong suakta sak khin a, zawhna hong ciam man’ ah;
I thu bulphuh inah, Khris le Pawlpi ading.
Bangzahin ka lungnop, mi honpi’ aw ka za,
Tuni-in Topa va zong ni;
Lungnop takin om ni, Zion mualah pai ni,
Kiciamin Topa min phat ni.
Zion mualah nopna, hehpihna tawh kidim,
A muanhuai kulhpi tawh ki-uum;
Tua mun va beel ciat ni, Ama min phat ding le,
Lungdamna la ngai ding pai ni.
Tua ah David Topa’n, A kumpi tokhom koih,
Hehpihna tawh thuman khen ding;
Mi siangte lungdam ding, mawhnei mite dah ding,
Kiniamkhiat in lungdam tek un.
Lungnopna hong tung hen, Lungdamna’n hong zui hen,
Mi khempeuh in thupha ngah in;
Topa’ nopna sang hen, A pha deihna khangin,
Gen zawh loh thupha hong tung hen.
Mualtung le zang lei pan, Hong kipuak hih thuman,
Muan huai ve ni, muan huai ni, Khris tung muan huai ni;
Tua aw hong ging hiauhiau, mual tung teng thawn viauviau,
Muan huai ve ni, muan huai ni, Khris tung muan huai den ni.
Sakkik
Gualzo ding hita! Gualzo ding hita!
“Kuan un” ci’n Topa kiko,
Hong sawlna mang lehang,
Gamluah ding hita hang,
Muan huai ve ni, muan huai ni,
Khris tung muan huai den ni.
Leitung bup lingsak aw, za un, galhangte aw,
Muan huai ve ni, muan huai ni, Khris tung muan huai ni;
Nasem ding kuan khia un, hong gen thu tangko un,
Muan huai ve ni, muan huai ni, Khris tung muan huai den ni.
No zong ko hong pawm un, mawhna pan hong tai un,
Muan huai ve ni, muan huai ni, Khris tung muan huai ni;
Satan dialkhiana ah, sa ni, gualzawhna la,
Muan huai ve ni, muan huai ni, Khris tung muan huai den ni.
Jesuh sungah kikhen lo hi, Ni suah, ni tum sak, khang;
Leitung khempeh kua mi, kua mi, lawm khat pawl khat hi hang.
Jesuh sungah lungsiim mante’n, pawl ngah kawikawi ding hi;
Ama nasepna, miteng henkhawm, kham khau zang bang hi.
Khut kilen ni up kikhat teng, u le nau bang hihang;
Bang nam hi leng, Pa’ nasem teng, beh khat phung khat hihang.
Jesuh sungah, i kimat hi, sakmi, khang mi, paam mi;
Jesuh lungsim banga nei, mi khempeuh pumkhat suak hi.

songs.title: Pawlpi In Bul Khat Nei Hi

lines: Pawlpite a bul in ah, I Topa Jesuh hi;
A sile a thu inah, Pawlpi hong bawlzo hi;
Azi siangtho piang dingin, Vantung pan hong kum hi;
Hong pua a si’n hong lei a, Hinna dingin hong si.
Mi lak pan hong teelkhia a, pum khat hong bangsak hi;
Pasian thu tawh hong suaksuk, Amah bek om hi;
Jesuh a min siangtho in, Tua min bek i phat hi;
Muanna lam-etna khat bek, Phatna’ng i hahkat hi.
Pawlpite simmawh uh a, Nakpi’n bawlsia uh hi;
Galte in nawtgawp uh a, Pawlpi’n Suangpi beel hi;
Upna tawh midikte in, Bangtan sawt ding hiam? ci;
Zan bei-a khuavak ciangin, nopna hong tung ding hi.
Haksatna le bawlsiatna, nakpi-in a thuak hi;
A gualzo mi siangte tawh, nuamsa mahmah uh hi;
Tua mi siangthote bangin, ko nong hehpih ding hi;
Ka ginat loh uh hangin, Nong maan khawmpih ding hi.
Topa leh a vangliatna sungah thahat un,
Ama thuman sungah kiptak ding un,
Gal kidona sungah A mah’n hong makaih ding,
Topa min tawh nang na gualzo ding hi.
Sakkik
Thuman in (Thuman in)
Kiptak ding (Kiptak ding)
Kumpipa thupiakna tawh zawh dong,
Topa’ minthan nading le Ama Thu gualzawh nading,
Topa thahat na sung kiptak ding
Topa le avangliatna sungah thahat un,
Galte mai pan in kihei ngei kei un,
Thuman gal sim laitak
Amah na, kiang ding ding,
Ama vangliatna sungah
Mainawt un,
Topa le A vangliatna sungah tha-hat un,
Ama thu ciam nate pel ngeilo ding,
Thuman galsim laitak na
Taklam khutlen ding,
Amah muang in,
Na gualzo tawntung ding,
Lai Siangtho Pasian thu bu
Ka neih man pha pen na hi
Koi pan ka piang hong gen ding
Bang ka hi hiam hong hilh ding
Sakkik
Lam ka pial ciang hong tai ding
Hon Pa’ itna hong lak ding
Lam hong hilh ding hong cing ding
Hong thu-hilh ding hong phat ding
Hilh leitung gam sim tham ah
Hong hehneem ding dahna ah
Hong hilh hi nei leeng up na
Mi in zong zo thei sih-na
Nong hilh hi nopna ngah na’ng
Lang pan’ mi mawhte thuak na’ng
Ka neih manpha pen na hi
A siangtho Lai Siangtho bu
Lai Siangtho beel in, na dang teng na taan zong,
Hong thuhilhna manphate khahsuah ke’n;
A ihmute tua lungdamna thupha’n phong,
Tawntung nunna hong ciamteh zo tel khial ke’n.
Sakkik
Lai Siangtho beel in, Lai Siangtho beel in,
Lai Siangtho beel in, Lam hilh meivak hi.
Lai Siangtho beel in, vangil manpha pen hi,
Pukte phongin tawntung nunna pia a;
A manphatna genkhit zawh ding hilo hi.
Na zon theih lai-in zong in, tua thupha
Lamkhial mite khe ading khuavak hi-a,
A puk thei ding khangnote lenkip hi;
A phengtat mawhneite ading lam-etna,
Teekte’ ciangkhut, laibu hoih pen ahi.

songs.title: Lai Siangtho beel in Ka Nau Aw

lines: Hankhuk lamah khualzin a na paipai lai-in,
Kong deihsak khat om, nasep ding tawh kisai in;
Tua thupha kong gen lai-in limtak na ngai in,
“Lai Siangtho beel in ka nau aw.”
Sakkik
Lai Siangtho beel in ka nau aw,
Lai Siangtho beel in ka nau aw;
Hih hun le sih hunah, na dang teng sangin,
Lai Siangtho beel in ka nau aw.
Kamsiatna, dahna, kahna, thuak khata lecin,
Satan tawh kum tampi kidodo ta lecin,
Limtak thu zui-in lau ke’n, mainawt tawntung in.
“Lai Siangtho beel in ka nau aw.”
Na sim sialin thu thak khat thei khia den niteh,
Singtung a Jesuh’n hong sih lawhna thu hiveh;
Topa le vantung le nangma tung thuman veh,
“Lai Siangtho beel in ka nau aw.”
Tua laibu khuavak le upna sikkawipi hi,
Zan khuamial a, lam hong lak khuavak aksi hi;
Hong sawlna bang mang lecin, na maan den ding hi,
“Lai Siangtho beel in ka nau aw.”
Kei hong sak kik leuleu dih in
Lamdang nuntak na thu
A hoih na hong lak lai lai in
Lam dang nuntak na thu
Nun tak na thupia hi
Gam tat nang hong hilh hi
Sakkik
Thu hoih mah mah
Thu pha mah mah
Nuntakna thu mah mah
Jesuh’n mi khempeuh hong lui hi
Lamdang nuntakna thu
Hong sam hi ngai un mawh nei mi
Lamdang nuntakna thu
Hong pia khong hih thu gol
Van tung khua lam hong zol
Lungdamna thu na gen sawn in
Lamdang nuntakna thu
Mawh phel lungnopna mi ko in
Lamdang nuntak na thu
Jesuh bek hong hon thei
Tawntung siangtho sak thei
Leitung a ding Lai Siangtho bu,
Hih pen zuih kim, cih kim hihen!
Huih khi laan ciang, tua dial kipeei,
Manpha thupha kizeel thang hen!
Sakkik
Pasian’ kammal, khuavak hong puak,
Leitung tui tung mun khempeuh ah;
Khuamial sunga vak thap mite,
Pasian kiangah hong tunpih hi.
A tunna peuh kham khuavak hi,
Kiliahzo lo ni tang bang hi;
Meii bang liahte theng mang ding hi,
Mawhna khempeuh a phel ding hi.
Pa’ maitangah mi teng puak a,
Mawh maisakna vang kilang hi;
Adam khang pan a mangthang sa,
Hehpihna thupha thangsak hi.
Lunggimte a tawldamsak hi,
Khitui luangte a hehnem hi;
Tha kiam lungvaite tha guan hi,
Nuntak tawntungna silhsak hi.
Cidam in nipi khat sung
Pasian in hong kem lai a;
Tu ni-in Ama inn sung,
Thupha sang ding I ngak ta;
[Ni sagih sung nuam bel hi,
Vantung tawldamna lim hi.]2
Mawhphelna ding hehpihna,
Hong tanpa’ min in kong ngen;
Hong musak in Na maipha,
Mawhna zumna bei ta hen;
[ Tu ni lungkhamna bei in,
Nang sung hong tawldam sakin. ]2
Na min kong phat laitak un,
Nong naina hong phawk sakin;
Na mai kong kilak lai un,
Na vanglian hong mu sakin;
[ Ko ngah ding vantung nuamna,
Hong ciam khol sakin Topa]2
Nangmah lungdamna thu in,
Misia puah, mipha hehnem;
Na thupha’n ta tam tawi in,
Siatna khempeuh a pha’n lem;
[ Tua bang piang hen nipi teng,
Vantung pawlpi tun mateng ]2
Tawldamna le lungdam ni,
Khuavakna, nuamna ni;
Lungkhamna dahna damsak,
A vaak ahoih pen ni;
Taang lai a kipan tuni,
Alian a neu kituak;
“Siangtho, siangtho, siangtho” ci’n,
Vanglian Pasian phat ni.
Na khempeuh a piancil ni,
Khuavak hen a cih ni;
Eite hong honkhia Jesuh,
Sihna pan thawhkik ni;
Sihna galzo i Topa’n,
Kha Siangtho, hong puak ni;
Tua hi-a, hih Nipi ni,
Thupha nam thum ngah ni.
Tuni-in minam kim tung,
Vantung khomun hong tung;
Mi siangtho kikhopna-ah,
Lungdamna thu kihilh;
A gim a tawlte kisil,
Tawldamna lui sungah;
Lungdamna thupha a vaang,
Misiangte mai-ah taang.
Vantung gam mi siangte bang,
Hehpihna a banban;
Tawl dam ni, Nipi ni pan,
A thuapthuap i ngah hi;
Tun’n phatna kiza hi,
Pawlpi mite kam pan;
Phat un thum gawm a siangtho
Pa, Ta le Kha Siangtho.
Nipi Topa Na inn sungah,
kiciamin Nang tung kipia;
Kote’ kong biakna hong sang in,
Gamdai takin Nang kong phat uh.
Nong piak Nipi ni ka it uh,
Tua sang ni thupi zaw omlo;
Nasep nusia-in hong bia ung,
Nangmah phat nopna lungsim tawh.
Lungkham, sinkham om nawnlo-in,
Mawhna gimna om nawnlo-in;
Thuumna, tauna om nawn lo-in,
Na min phat ding thadah lo-in.
I lam-et ni hong tung zota,
Khuavakpi in ei hong tanzo;
Gimna lampi nusia ta ding,
Pasian sungah tawldam ngah ding.
Kei hong Honpa thu-in kong kipia a,
Suahtakna kcing hi;
Tun ka lungsim khentat phamawh ta,
Kong tang ta diam, ka ci.
Sakkik
Hi ning! Hi ning! Pasian aw nong huh hi,
Nang aa bek hong hi ning,
Nong tatkhiatna’ng, Na si manpha luang hi,
Nang aa bek hong hi ning.
Tu-in Topa, Nang kong sang nuamta hi,
Na itna’n hong zota;
Khris Topa aw, Nang kong beel nuamta hi,
Nangmah bek kong muangta.
Ka thanemna, lam pial ding ka launa,
Topa aw nong thei hi;
Na nasep na’ng hong guan in thahatna,
Nang bek kong mitsuan hi.
Na hehpihna tu’n hong pia in, Topa,
La-in ka sasa ding;
Lungdam takin tu’n ka genkhia dinga,
“Khris aa bek hi’ng” ci ning.
Leitung na om lai-a hong zuante in,
“Topa nong sem diam” ci;
“Kong sem nuam hi” ci-a Na dawnna in,
Kote’ lungmuanna hi.
Lungdam huai hi, nang kong teel ni,
Kei mah hong hon ka Pasian aw,
Keima lungdam na a lianpi,
Mitung genlo om thei ding maw
Sakkik
Ka nuam hi Ka nuam hi.
Jesuh ka mawh hong phelzo hi.
Thungetna zia a hong hilh hi,
Nisim in hong lungdam sak hi
Ka nuam hi, Ka nuam hi
Jesuh ka mawh hong phel zo hi.
Na seppi bel kikhin zo hi.,
Kei Topa aa, ka hi zota
Hong kaih na na ke’n ka zui hi,
A ma thugen leng nuam ka sa
Ka lungsim aw, lungka nawn ken
Hih thupha ah kiptak khawlta’n
Topa kiang pan lungleng nawn ke’n
A pha khempeuh nei hi A mah’n
Lungsim takpi tawh ka ciamsa,
Nisim in ka ciamphapha ding
Lungdam huaibel hih kiciamna
Ka sih ciangzong thupha hi ding
Ngai un, gamlak khuamial sungah,
Tuucingpa aw kiza thei hi;
Tuukhumna sung pan a pusuak,
A mang tuute a samkik hi.
Sakkik
Hong paipih’n, hong paipih’n!
Khialhna mun panin hong paipih’n;
Hong paipih’n, Hong paipih’n,
A mangte Jesuh kiang pai pih’n.
A mang tuute a zonna ding,
Tuucingpa kua in huh ding hiam?
Khuadam om lo tuukhumna sung,
Kua in tuute hong tumsak hiam.
Gampa lak le mual tung tengah,
Amau kahna aw hong ngai in;
Topa in nangma kiangah ci,
“Keima tuute na zong ding hi.”
Honpa ka muh theihloh hangin,
Hong hehpih den hi, nisimin;
Amah ka teel tu-in ka nei,
Topa phat un, A aw ka thei.
Sakkik
A aw ka thei, Honpa’ aw hi;
Ka lungsim sung hong nuamsak hi;
Hun simin kei hong hoph hi,
A aw ka thei Topa phat ni!
A mel ka muh loh hangin ah,
Huihpi lak pan A aw ka za;
Tuihual kham in dai pah hilhial;
Ni hong tangin nuam pah silsial.
Thuman, thutak hong genkhia-a,
Muh batloh tawldamna nopna;
Itna, kilemna thugen hi,
Van innpi thu zong hong gen hi.
Nuntakna khomun kei, Hong pia’n Topa;
Galilee tuili gei, na hih bangmah;
Ka lungsim vahzo kei, Laisim na tawh;
Nangmah tak ka lungdeih hinna thu aw.
Thuman thutak hong pia’n ka Topa aw,
Khomun na piak bang zia’n, Na thupha tawh
Tua hileh kolteng kia’n, Ka suakta ding
Thuman in hong khahkhia’n,
Ka lungnuam ding.
Kei a’ ding Topa Nang, Nuntak khomun
Keimah ka suahtak nang,
Nangmah Thugun;
Nang tawh vantung luah na’ng,
Nong vaak ding hi;
Hong it sakin thuman, Itna na hi.
Topa aw, Kha Siangtho, Kei hong puak in,
Keima mit khua mu lo, Vak sak dingin;
Na thu thuk Lai Siangtho,
Hong telsak ding; Na thu sung pan Nang,
ko hong musak ding.

songs.title: Bang Dang Hilo Jesuh Si Hi

lines: Bang in ka mawh sawpsiang thei
Bangdang hilo Jesuh si hi!
Bang in hong damsak kik thei?
Bangdang hilo Jesuh si hi.
Sakkik
Manpha hi hong luang si,
Vuk bang hong ngosak si!
Tui dang ka thei kei hi,
Bangdang hilo Jesuh si hi.
Ka sianna ding hih ka mu,
Bangdang hilo Jesuh si hi!
Ka mawhna kiphelna’ng thu,
Bangdang hilo Jesuh si hi!
Mawhmaisak bangdang hilo
Bangdang hilo Jesuh si hi.
Apha ka bawl hang hilo,
Bangdang hilo Jesuh si hi.
Kei lametna lungnopna
Bangdang hilo Jesuh’ si hi
Kei in dikna ka ngah na
Bangdang hilo Jesuh’ si hi
Nangmah tatkhiat nading,
Nunna na ngah nading,
Kei’ nuntakna kong pia,
Ka sipha kong buakhia,
(Ken ka nuntakna kong piazo
Nang kei bang nong piazo)2
Khang tawntung a nuam na,
Na ngah theih na’ng in ah,
Gentheih na kum sawtpi,
Nang ading kong thuak hi,
(Nang ading kum sawtpi kong gim,
Kei ha’ng bang tan na gim,)2
A taang ka Pa’ Inn nuam,
Ka Tokhom vanglian tuam,
Nusia’n leitung kong tuak,
Lungzuan dahna kong thuak,
(Nang hang hihzah ta ken nusia,
Kei hang bang nang nusia)2
Dawi gam sung pan nangmah,
Kong hotkhiat nangin ah,
Ka thuak gim na pi-te,
Gen khin zo kei ni the,
(Nang ading gen zawhloh ka thuak,
Kei ading bang na thuak)2
Itna mawh kiphelna,
Khawnkhong cing suahtakna,
Vantung ka inn panin,
Kong puak nang ading in,
(Kong piakhong zo a manphapi,
Kei nong piak bang ahi)2

songs.title: I TOPA HONG ITNA LAMDANG HI

lines: I Topa hong itna lamdang hi
Mawhna, khialhna i neih hang tampi,
Lian zaw tham lai hong hehpih na si,
Kalani mual tung ah hong bua hi
Sakkik
Hong hehpih na, i mawhna
hong maisak, siangsak hi, Pasian itna,
I mawhna teng sangin lian zaw hi
Mawhna lungkiat na’n tui khang bang in.
Ka kha hong sut nuam hong to laitak,
Gen zawh loh lian zaw hehpih na in,
Ka belh ding Singlamteh pi hong lak
Kiseelzo nawn kei i mawhna nin,
Bang a om diam hong sawp zo lai ding,
En un, hia-a luang sisan gunpi’n,
Vuk sang hong ngo zaw sak pah thei ding
Lamdang kicing hehpihna lian zaw,
A um khempeuh A hong piak khong hi,
A mai a mu nuamte khempeuh aw,
Saang pak ve un hong hehpih na hi.
Nong hehpihna hangin kong phat uh hi, Topa
Tua in kote tudongin hong keem hi;
Na hoihna, Nong itna ka zahtak uha,
Nangma tungah hong ki-ap-in kong kuun uh hi.
Sakkik
Topa aw, tuni’n nong vaikhaksa mah bangin,
Na sabuai ah an kong um uh hi;
“Kei nong phawk na’ng un ne un” nong cih bangin,
Nang phawkna in ka nei uh hi
Nuntak khomun ne ding, ka kilawm kei uh hi,
A them tawm ding zong kilawm kei ung;
Ahi zongin hong hehpihin nong pia a,
Na hong itna hang bekin a ne thei hi ung.
Upna tawh kote in khomun ka ne uh hi,
Lungsim, pumpi hong thahatsak hen;
Nangma sihna thu hong gengen ahi hi,
Genzawh loh na minthanna sung hong tun tahen.
Huihpi nakpi’n a nun simin,
Dahna tui bang a khan simin;
Zuat ding tawldam huai, lungmuan huai;
Mun om, hehpihna tokhom nuai.
Eite i lu tungah Jesuh’n,
Lungdam sathau hong nilhna mun;
Mundang teng sang nuam pen mun om,
Sisan baang hehpihna tokhom.
Kha le khat lungsim kigawmna,
Lawm le gual tawh kikholh theihna;
Kikhen hang pum khat bang hong suah,
Hehpihna tokhom kiim kituah.
Pumpi’ utna le mawhnate’n,
Hong nawngkaisakzo nawn lo ding;
Vantung in hong dawntuah sukta,
Vangtang in tua tokhom tuam ta.

songs.title: Jesuh Khe Phungah Ka Tu Hi

lines: Jesuh khe phungah ka tu-a,
Hong hopihna ka za hi;
Itna kam khum bekbek hi a,
Nisim ka zaza nuam hi;
Jesuh khephung ah ka tu a,
Tang lai thute ka phawk hi;
Hong it pha mahmah na hi a,
Ka lungsim sung hong zen hi.
Jesuh khephung ah ka tawlnga a,
A nuamzaw mun omlopi;
Ka vangik pi teng ka suahna,
Ka tawldamna mun ahi;
Jesuh khephungah ka tawlnga,
Ka deih khempeuh ka ngen hi;
Ka nget khempeuh A hong pia a,
Hong piak loh om ngeilo hi.
Hong Hon Topa Na thupha tawh,
Tu-in keimah hong hh in;
Hong en in, Na itna mit tawh,
Na maipha hong musak in;
Nangma lungsim kei hong guan aw,
Na sian bang hong siangsak in;
Midik hong tansak Jesuh aw,
Gen ing, kei Nang aa hi khin.
Zingsang tuh ding hi,
Ki-itna khaici tuh in,
Sun a tuh bang zan in
Zong tuh in a ci;
A at hun ngak in la,
A khop hun zong ngak in,
Lungdamna tawh buhlomte
I khawm ding hi.
Sakkik
Buhlomte khawm in,
buhlomte khawm in
Lungdamna tawh buhlomte
Ih khawm ding hi;
Buhlomte khawmin,
buhlomte khawm in
Lungdamna tawh buhlomte
I khawm ding hi.
Nisa sungah tuh in,
A liap sung zong tuh in,
Phalbi leh tuuk lai
lungmanna om lopi;
Nasep na zawh ciangin
Kikhop hun hong tung ding,
Lungdamna tawh buhlomte
I khawm ding hi.
Kap kawm in pai in la,
Topa a’ding tuh in,
Kisiatna in a hong dah sak hang a ci;
Kahna khit ciangin ah,
Topa’n hong sam ding a,
Lungdamna tawh buhlomte
I khawm ding hi.
Nisim ka nuntakna Jesuh tawh kinai semsem veng,
Ngun le kham sang siangzaw tang zaw, A hoihna genzo keng;
Ka lungsim mit kha in Ama hoihna teng ka mu hi,
Nisim hunsim khangto Jesuh itna khum semsem hi.
Sakkik
Kim khat beek kigenzo kei,
Tua galkhat kham khua thu;
Jesuh hong itna khumzaw tham lai ding hi, tua mun ah.
A gamla pek pan ka mu hi, A vangliatna hong tang,
Unok pak sang hoihzaw tham lai, zingsol bangin hong taang;
Ka lunggulhnate hong pia in, kei hong lungkimsak hi,
Nisim hunsim khangto Jesuh itna khum semsem hi.
Lungkhamna ka thuakzelzel hang, Amah’n hong suakta sak,
A ang sung hong pom hong dal in, ka lungkhamna beisak;
Kei tang ding A pumpi’n hong thuakna hang Khris ka it hi,
Nisim hunsim khangto Jesuh itna khum semsem hi.
Gimna sung pan lam-et gam nuam
cik ciang ka tung ding hiam?
Cik ciang gal van ka koih ding hiam?
Lai lung ka muang ding hiam?
Sakkik
Jesuh hong tun ma teng,
Jesuh hong tun ma teng,
I na sep zawh ciangin
Inn nuam sung om khawm ding
Sim leitung lai lungdam om lo
Lum bang sung om lo tawh
Sim leitung sau nuam a hi lo
Gam bang daihna ahi.
Lim bel siangtho ngah ding in ah
Lam bang na pial ke’n ci leng
Van siang nuam ka tun ma teng
Nuamna ong pia ding hi
Lim bel nen ah khawl zo ta in
Lam sawn ka pial kei ding
A mah bang a ka pham nung ciang
Leng van siang nuam tung ning
Topa’ hong sapna tu-in ngai in,
Buh at dingin hong sam;
Buh at ding tampi in hong ngakzo,
Hih hang a at ding tawm.
Sakkik
Topa minin na mailam nawt un,
Itna deihsakna tawh;
Ei hong gupkhiatna thupha letsong,
Leitung teng thangsak un.
Mawhna khuamial sung om mite kiang,
Ai in va khahkhia un;
Pai in mawhna kol va sutkhia un,
Mawhna hencip mi kiang.
Lunggim mite lungdamna sungah,
Itna tawh va zol un;
Amah nuntak tawntungna khomun,
Tua lai ei hong dawn ding.
Kuan in, khuakhal hun bei dekta a,
Ni hong tum dekta hi;
Zan khuamial hun hong tung pak dinga,
Nasep hun bei ding hi.
Mawhna lo lai a ahoih teng buhlom,
A kaikhawm ding an late koi ah om;
Nasepna dingin thuman phiaukawi keng,
Kuamah khawl lo ding an lak khit mateng.
Sakkik
An late kawh om, kua hong kuan nuam?
An lak pawi sung ah kua hong lungdam khawm nuam?
Kua’n hong khoppih ding, buhlom hoih teng,
Mawhna lo sunga om buhlom teng.
Zawi neu zong zui-in zongin pha takpi,
Lopa a sau hang buh om thei ding hi;
Lam lian zong zui inla nusiat nei ke’n,
Vantung innpi sung hong tum khin uh hen.
Lo teng khempeuh ah an min khinta hi,
Leitung khempeuh in lak ding bek ngak hi;
Ahih hang a la ding tawm lak ding tam,
La mengmeng kei leng lah a sia ding tam.
Tua ahih ciang hong pai un phiaukawi tawh,
Anpha kaikhawm un, no mihingte aw;
An nei Topa hong pai mateng sem un,
Tua ciang anlak pawi-ah lungdam khawm un.
Lo lai-ah nasep ding a omlai-ah,
Buh athun zo nasem dingte tawm pha;
Tuni thuman nasem te a kiang ah,
Topa sawlna bangin ta un.
Sakkik
Nasem un! Nasem un!
Nopna pha na ngaihsun un;
Topa in thahatna a hong piading hi,
Nitum ma tengin nasem un.
An kholna buhtang tawh
na dimsak un,
Lungdam na tawh la pha takpi sa un;
Nitum a khua a hongmial mateng in,
Pha takpi na sem niloh un.
Nasepna haksa ni a sawt hang-in,
Nasemte in nopna lian a ngah ding;
Topa in a teel sa mita dingin,
Nopna pha bel hong pia ding hi.
Vantung an khol na
inn nuam mahmah ah,
Nasem mite’n thaman sang ding uh a;
Topa'n itna tawh a mau sam ding a,
A tawntung maangkhawm ding uh hi.
Tu ni-in ah tua gam nuam ke’n ka ngaihsun hi,
Ni tum ciangin ah ka tung ding hi
Heh pih na tawh Honpa kiang ka din’ ciangin ah
Ka lu tang aksi taang a om diam?
Sakkik
Ka lu tung aksi taang, aksi taang a om diam?
Ni tak a ni a tum ciang-in-ah (ciang-in-ah)
Tawl dam na inn sung ah ka khan lawh cianginah
Ka lu tung aksi taang a om diam (a om diam)
Topa hatna sungah na seemin thungen ding
Ka ngah mi bang kei hong hi sak in,
Min than’ ni’n aksi taang kei aa ding hi kha ding
A mah phatna tui hual bang om ciang
A ma mai ka et ciang bangzahin lungdam ding,
A khe phung ah suangmanpha koih ding
Kham khuapi sungah lungdamna hong khang sak ding,
Ka lu tung aksi taang a om diam?

songs.title: Bang Ngak Na Hiam, Sanggam Aw?

lines: Bang ngak na hiam, sanggam aw?
Bang hang khawlkhawl lai na hi hiam?
Misiangte kiang hong sam hilo maw?
Topa in hong ngak hilo hiam?
Sakkik
Pai lo ding maw? Amah zuan lo ding maw?
Pai lo ding maw? Amah zuan lo ding maw?
Zekai lecin sanggam aw?
Bang phattuamna ngah ding na hiam?
Jesuh lo a dang Honpa om maw?
Amah lo lampi dang om hiam?
Phawk lo na hiam, sanggam aw?
Kha Siangtho in hong sawl lo hiam?
Hong hotkhiatna san sawm nai lo maw?
Na vangik khiat sawm lo na hiam?
Bang ngak na hiam, sanggam aw?
An lak hun hong bei dekta hi;
Honpa’n thupha hong pia nuam veh aw,
Na zekai leh na si ding hi.

songs.title: Kong Hong Kiukiu Kua Om Hiam?

lines: Hong kiu, hong kiu, kua om hiam?
Hong ngak, hong ngak, nang hong ngak!
Khualzinpa in midikpa hi,
Amah bang na mu ngei maw!
Ka lungsim in lamdangsa hi,
Kong khak hon lo ding na hiam?
Hong kiu, hong kiu, hiah omlai,
Hong ngak, hong ngak, na um hiam?
Kongkhak hon ding haksa mahmah,
Singkung lopa’n tuamcip a;
Khuamial khaugui in kancip hi,
Kiimkot tengah lencip hi.
Hong kiu, hong kiu, bang om hiam?
Hong ngak, hong ngak, nang hong ngak!
A kilhcip khut in hong kiu lai,
A Kumpi lukhu nuai pan;
A lungnem le a migit mai,
Hong gum Topa’n hong ngak lai.
A zaknop huai penpen thu, thupha khat a om hi,
A lamdang thuciamna thu, kuama theih ngeiloh thu!
Dah ta lehang nuamta leng, tua thu-um ta kei leng;
“Hong pai un” ci-in hong sam, a singlamteh zuan ni.
Sakkik
Hong pai un ka kiang, hong pai un ka kiang,
Lungkham vangik puate, ka kiang hong pai un;
Ka kiang hong pai un, ka kiang hong pai un,
Lungkham vangik puate, ka kiang hong pai un.
Bang hangin hong it lawmpa kiang pan na taikhia hiam?
Ama kiang beel mengmeng in, A tawntungin kip in,
Huh ding neilo-in ka om, mawhna sungah ka om;
Amah ka taisan hangin, tu-in ka zuankik hi.
Ama hong sap mah bangin a kiang nai semsem ning,
A aw neu kha za peuh leng, ka kinai semsem ding,
Tuipi galkhat mual pang khat, inn tawh ka gamlat hang;
Na khut lenin hong zui ning, “Hong pai in” na cih bang.
Tuni Honpa’n hong sam, “Hong pai in” ci.
“Vantung lam theilo mi, Ka hilh ding hi.”
Tuni Honpa’n hong sam, Tu-in ngai in,
Jesuh Topa mai-ah, Nangmah pai in.
Tuni Honpa’n hong sam, Ama kiangah,
Nangmah na pai kei leh, sih ding lauhuai.
Kha Siangtho in hong sam, Amah nial ke’n,
A hong hehpih nuam hi, pai khiasak ke’n.

songs.title: HONG HONPA KIANG HONG PAI MENG IN

lines: Hong honpa kiang ah hong pai meng in,
Lai Siangtho-ah lam hong lah bangin,
Ei te lai zangah tu ni’n ding in,
Hong pai ve, ci’n hong sam
Sakkik
Mawhna khial nate siantho nung ah,
Topa mai ah kikhop ciangin ah,
Tawntung inn nuam vantung khua sungah,
Nuam pha mahmah ding hi.
Ngai sin, Naute hong pai ve vua ci,
I vek pi in ki pakin diangni,
Eite in ,A mah va teel tawm ni,
Ze kai ke’n pai ni,tu’n.
Ngaih sun phain,tu ni’n hiah omlai,
Hong thupiak na phalim tak in ngai,
Migi mah-mah tu’n zong hongsam lai
Nong pai nai uh hia, ci
Hin gim a mang mi aw hong kihei in,
Tuucing hoihpa’n
Hong sam, ngai in tu ni
Hong hon ding hong zong,
Sawpsiang ding hong ngak
Amah sang meng in uai kai nawn kei in
Sakkik
Hong sam hiuhiau hi,
Hong thum lailai hi
Tuucing hoihpa’n nang hong sam za in,
Hong thum ngetngut hi
Hong sam lailai hi
Itna tawh hongsam, Hong pai in ci
Hong ngak lai hive’n
Banghang mangthang ding?
Tuubuk pan gamla na vakkhit hangin
A nuntakna si tawh hong tan veve
Hong thuakpihna lian
Genzawhloh lamdang
A thupha ngaihsun in
A thungai in, mawh nei lo pa’n
Sing tung mawhna pua khia
Mawhmai na kician nuntak tawntung na
A sisan luanna tawh nangmah hongpia
Thuman lampi zui in tangtakpai-in
Jesuh sunglut in nu’ntakna kongpi
Jesuh in lungnem takin hong sam hi
Pai in lutun a mangthang nawn lo ding
Pasian sap lai ka za kei diam?
Leitung nopna ka khenglah diam?
Nuntak hun a beibei lai-in,
Ka kha ka koih diam, ihsip-in?
Sakik
Hong sam lai! Oh, za in!
Hong sam lai! Oh, za in!
Pa in hong sam lai; oh za un,
Pa in hong sam lai, Hong sam lai!
Oh, za un, hong sam lai!
Oh za un, Pa in hong sam lai!
Oh za un, sam lai!
Pasian sap lai ka tho kei diam?
A itna aw ka nial thei diam?
Hong spna ka awlmawh kei diam,
Hong sam lailai ka uaikai diam?
Pasian sap lai hong kiukiu in,
Ka lungsim kong ka khakcip diam?
Hong ngak lai hong sang ding hizo,
Ka dahsak ngam diam? Kha Siangtho.
Jesuh’n hong kiu nang hong sam,
“Lunggim mi’n hong zuan un,” ci;
Hong gum thei Amah bek hi, Na kong za hon in.
Sakkik
Na kong za hon in! Na kong za hon in!
Hong gum thei Amah bek hi,
Na kong za hon in!
Jesuh’n kong kiu hong gum ding,
Nang ading A pumpi pia;
Hing kikin han pan thokhia,
Na kong za hon in!
Jesuh’n kong hong kiukiu lai,
Na lungsim Amah pia in;
Lungdamna hong pia ding hi,
Na kong za hon in!
Jesuh’n kiu hunte beibei,
Gupkhiatna a nai lai-in;
Gumpa’n hong paisan ma-in,
Na kong za hon in!

songs.title: Tu Nitak Na Ciah Ding Hiam?

lines: Inn nong ciah diam? vak thap mi?
Hong gum dingin Jesuh si,
Lungkham, gimna thuak mi, mawhna si baang na puante;
Tuuno si sung na sawp diam?
Na puante paak ding vuk bang,
Na um diam, hong ciamna thupha?
Tu nitak na ciah ding hiam?
Sakkik
Tu nitak na ciah ding hiam?
Tu nitak na ciah ding hiam?
Khuamial sung pan khuavakna sung,
Jesuh’ kiang na ciah ding hiam?
Tu nitak na ciah ding hiam?
Tu nitak na ciah ding hiam?
Hong it vantung i Pa kiangah,
Tu nitak na ciah ding hiam?
Inn nong iah diam, a mang mi?
En in, Topa’n hong ngak hi,
Pai in lung hei nawn ke’n,
Ciah in na zekai kha ding!
Pai in Ama kiang beel in,
Hong itna tha muang inla,
Nong pai diam ci’n hong samsam lai,
Tu nitak na ciah ding hiam?
Inn nong ciah diam, mawh nei mi?
Kua in na mawhna van pua,
Pua lam sawt khawl nawn ke’n,
Tu’n hong ciah in kisikin;
Topa thuciamna muang in,
Amah’n hong um phasak ding,
“Hong pai in,” ci’n Jesuh’n hong sam,
Tu nitak na ciah ding hiam?
Hong Honpa in hong kun,
“Na thahatna neu hi;
Thanemte’n thu hong ngen un,
Cingtakna ngah ding” hong ci.
Sakkik
Jesuh’n lohkhin ta, Amah tung ka ba;
Si bang sansa ka mawhna,
Vuk bang hong saw ngo ta.
Topa tu’n ka theizo,
Nangma vang lian bek in;
Phak le lol zong damsakzo,
Suang lung nemsak tui bangin.
Hehpih ka ngahna ding,
Phatna khat zong nei keng;
Ka puan vuk bang paak nading,
Tuuno si sung hong sawp leng.
Sihna lupna tung pan,
Ka kha a kahto ding;
“Jesuh in keimah hong tan,” ci-in lungdam kiko ding.
Topa tokhom mai-ah,
Kicingin ka din ciang;
Min phatna puak ning Amah,
Nga suk ning Jesuh’ khe kiang.
Omna omlai Tuuno innpi sungah,
A vanglianpi tawh nang hong samta hi;
Tum in, tu-in tum in, omna om lai.
Natang bei dek, ni hong liap zota hi,
Hong liap ta hi manlang inah pai in;
Omna om lai, tum in, tu-in tum in.
Mopi pawi ah zin a khop laitakin,
Hong sapna mi na hih leh tum in tum in;
Omna om lai, tum in, tu-in tum in.
Dim khin dek hi, lungdamna inn sungah,
Manlang a na lut leh ngah lai ding hi;
Omna om lai, tum in, tu-in tum in.
Omna om lai, kong kihon laitak hi,
Pai in tum lein na lap lai ding hi;
Omna om lai, tum in, tu-in tum in.
Tum in tum in, tua pawi nang ading hi,
Ki-it tawntung na hai kidawn ding hi;
Tum in, tu-in tum in, omna om lai.

songs.title: Jesuh’ Om Nading Mun Na Nei Hiam

lines: Na mawhna tang a thuak Jesuh,
Omna ding mun a om hiam?
Kong khak kiu-in lut ding hong tu,
Mawh neite’n a ngai na diam?
Sakkik
Topa Jesuh minthang Kumpi!
A omna’ng mun tu’n bawl ini!
Na lungsim kongkhak tanzau in!
Hong in na lutsak ding hi!
Na lung sunggah na omsak leh,
Nuamna hong bawlsak ding hi;
Omna’ng na omsak loh hangin,
Na mawhna tang ding si hi.
Topa Ejsuh in a hun ciang,
A thupha tawh hong sam ding;
Tuni’n a thupha sang inla,
Zing iang ngak kei leteh pha.
Omna’ng mun le hun na pia in,
A nuam ding ni khengsak ke’n;
Sawt lo-in hong sam pakkha leh,
Na lungsim khauhsak kei in.
Hong gum Topa kei tangin sizo hi,
Mawhna pan kei hong suaktasak hi;
Pasian Tapa a um khempeuhte in,
Nungta tawntung ding hi.
Sakkik
A mantak pi a nang kiangah kong cih in,
A mantakpi a nang kiangah kong cih in;
Pasian Tapa a umte mantakin,
A hing tawntung ding hi.
Topa tung mawhna teng ka nga zo hi,
Ka mawhna leiba teng hong lohsak hi;
Topa thu a um mi khempeuhte in,
Hing tawntung ding uh hi.
Ka zawngkhal hangin ah, thupha um ning,
Ka mawh, ka khial zong hong thupiak muang ning;
Pasian thu-umte lungdam nadingin,
Hin tawntung ngah ding hi.
A kilawm kei zong um khial ngei kei ning,
A painuam pai un, hong ngai ding ci hi;
Na kiko un Topa thu a umte,
Hing tawntung ding uh hi.

songs.title: En In, Kong Biang-ah Kong Ding Lai

lines: En in, kongbiangah kong ding lai,
Ngai in! Nang ka hong zolzol lai;
Mawh nei mi aw, kong lut thei diam?
Na lung sungah kong lut thei diam?
Sakkik
En in, kong biangah kong ding lai,
Ngai in! Nang ka hong zolzol lai;
Mawh nei aw, kong lut thei diam?
Lunggim mi aw, kong lut thei diam?
Nang tang linglukhu ka khu hi,
Lungduai takin kong ngakngak hi;
Mawh nei mi aw, kong lut thei diam?
Lunggim mi maw, kong lut thei diam?
Nang hong mawk zol ka hi kei hi,
Ka thuaknate ngaihsut huai hi;
Nang tang hong si, hi lo ka hiam?
Hong hon dingin kong lut thei diam?
Van pan nuamna nang kong puak hi,
Itna, nopna, mawhphelna hi;
Mawh nei mi aw, kong lut thei diam?
Lunggim mi aw, kong lut thei diam?
Hih leitung mawhna khuamial bangin zinga,
Leitung khuavak in Jesuh hi;
Sun-a nitang bangin Ama vang tang a,
Leitung khuavak in Jesuh hi.
Sakkik
Nang adingin khuavak hong tang hi,
Nuam takin, kei tung zong hong tang hi;
Kei mittawsa tu’n khua ka muta,
Leitung khuavak in Jesuh hi.
Jesuh sung omte khuamial in tuam lo a,
Leitung khuavak in Jesuh hi;
Lam hilhpa zui leng khuavak sung kipai-a,
Leitung khuavak in Jesuh hi.
Mawhna khuamial sunga mittaw mite aw,
Leitung khuavak in Jesuh hi;
Khua muhkikna dingin va kisil un aw,
Leitung khuavak in Jesuh hi.
Vantung khua sungah nitang kul nawn lo a,
Vantung khuavak in Jesuh hi;
Kham khuapi sung khuavak sak Tuuno hi a,
Vantung khuavak in Jesuh hi.

songs.title: Kah Hang Hong Gum Zo Lo

lines: Kah hang hong gum zo lo!
Khitui in ka mai sawp zong,
Ka launa daisak tuam lo,
Mawhna kum sawp siang thei lo;
Kah hang hong gum zo lo!
Sakkik
Jesuh kap kei tang ding si,
Sing khuam tungah khaina thuak;
Kei hong hon dingin hong ngak,
Amah bek hong hon thei.
Sep hang hong gumzo lo!
A hoih pen ka sem thei zong,
A siang pen ka ngaihsun zong,
Ka kha thak suaksk thei kei;
Sep hang hong gumzo lo!
Ngak hang hong gumzo lo!
Huh theih loh mawhna nei zong,
Ka bil sung hehpih’n hong sam,
Ngak lai leng ka si ding hi;
Ngak hang hong gumzo lo!
Khazih upna’n hong gum!
Hong umsak in, Na Tapa,
A bawlsa nate um in,
A khut in kei hong pom ding;
Khazih upna’n hong gum!
Kongpi kihongsa-in om aa,
A sung pan in a vangpi;
Singlamteh pan hong tangkhia a,
Topa’ itna hong lak hi.
Sakkik
Hi takpi zo diam tua kongpi,
Kei ading ki hongsa’n om maw?
Keimah takpi,
Keimah hong kihon maw?
Hotkhiatna zong
mite khempeuh
Tua kongpi honsa’n om hi;
A hau, a zawng, a lian, a neu,
A kua, ci lo lut thei hi.
Hehpihna kong
ki hon lai in,
Nang zong lau ken,
delh in la, It na piak
lukhu ngah na’ng in,
Singlamteh na sang ding ta.
Leitung ah hong piak singlamteh,
Sih gun gal ah, I khia ding;
Hinna lukhu hong piak tak teh,
Amah i it zaw sem ding.

songs.title: Nang le Keimah Hong Sam Hi

lines: Maitai-in damtak Jesuh in hong sam hi,
Nang le keimah hong sam hi;
Topa Jesuh’n lungduai takin hong ngak hi,
Nang le keimah hong ngak hi.
Ssakkik
Inn-ah ciah un, gimna thuakte hong ciah un;
Lungdam takin Topa Jesuh in hong sam
“Mawh neite hong pai un” ci.
Bang khawl i hiam Topa Jesuh’n hong thuum hi,
Nang le kei kiang hong thuum hi;
Hong hehpihna bang hang donlo i hi hiam,
Nang le kei hong hehpih hi.
Hun le nite’n manlangin hong khen thei hi,
Nang le kei ong kheng ding hi;
Khuamialna le sihna natna hong nai hi,
Nang le keimah hong nai hi.
Hong itna le a lamdang thuciamna pi,
Nang le kei a ding koih hi;
Gamtat khialhna Topa’n hong phelsak ding hi,
Nang le kei hong phel ding hi.
Jesuh in itna tawh inn ah hong sam;
Tuni’n hong sam, tuni’n hong sam;
Ni bang tang hong itna pan a pualam,
Bang ding kidai thah na hiam?
Sakkik
Tuni’n hong sam, Tuni’n hong sam;
Jesuh in hong sam,
Hong it manin tuni’n hong sam.
Jesuh’n hong pia nuam a gimte tawldam;
Tuni’n hong sam, tuni’n hong sam;
Na van va puak inla, ngah in lungdam,
Nang a hong nial kei ding hi.
Jesuh’n hong ngak hi, pai in tu laitak;
Tuni’n hong ngak, tuni’n hong ngak;
Na mawhna mah tawh va kun in niamtak,
Pai in kizekai sak ke’n.
Jesuh in hong zol hi, A aw ngai in:
Tuni’n za in, tuni’n za in,
Nuamna ngah ding hi, Amah umte in,
Tho in paipah vingveng in.
A zate khempeuh in hih thu tangko un,
Leitung khempeuh ah hih thupha thangsak un;
Mi na muh khempeuh hih nuamna thu ko un,
A ut khempeuh hongpai thei
Sakkik
“A ut khempeuhte,” “A ut khempeuhte,”
Cih na thu a mual a guam va thawn sak un;
Hong it i Pa in hong samkik lam khialte,
“A ut khempeuh hong pai un.”
Hong paite in zekai
nading thu om lo,
Lut theih lai in lut un,
Kong hon sa’n om zo;
Jesuh lo thu man
hinna lampi om lo,
A ut khempeuh hong pai thei
A ut khempeuhte
thuciam a man tak hi,
A ut khempeuhte
thuciam a kip ding hi;
A ut khempeuh-te”
nuntak tawntung na hi,
A ut khempeuh hong pai thei
Mawh neite Zeisu’n ngai hi
Hi thupha na thang sak un
Tawntung lam khial aa puuk mi
Lung hei nei mi va hilh un
Sakkik
Sa sa un, sa kikkik un
Mawhneite Zeisu’n ngai hi
Hih thu tel tak tang ko un
Mawh neite Zeisu’n ngai hi
Hong pai in, hong damsak ding,
Na muang in, a thutak hi
Asia bel pen zong saang ding,
Mawh neite Jesuh’n ngai hi.
Tu’n sin sung kisuang nawn lo,
Thukham mai-ah ka siangta;
Amah’n hong siangsak khinzo,
Thukham kalhna cinkhin ta.
Mawhneite Jesuh’n ngai hi,
Kei nangawn a mawhpi mah;
Vantungah hong lutpih hi,
Mawhna teng siangta inah.
Zinpa kong kiangah om hi, lutsak in! (Honpa, lutsak in!)
Tamveipi hong paizo hi, lutsak in! (Honpa, lutsak in!)
Apaima’n lut na’ng pia in, Siangtho Topa lutsak in;
Pa Pasian a Tapa hi, lutsak in! (Honpa, lutsak in!)
Lungsim kongkhak tu’n hon in, lutsak in! (Honpa, lutsak in!)
Ngak leh Amah paikhia ding, lutsak in! (Honpa, lutsak in!)
Lutsak in nang ma lawmpa, Nangma lungsim kem dinga;
A tawp dong hong gum dingpa, lutsak in! (Honpa, lutsak in!)
A kam khum na ngai inla, lutsak in! (Honpa, lutsak in!)
Tu’n piangsak in nang teelpa, lutsak in! (Honpa, lutsak in!)
Kong khak kiang ding hi, Amah khangsak ding na lungdamna;
Ama min na phat dinga, lutsak in! (Honpa, lutsak in!)
Tu-in vantung khua zinpa, lutsak in! (Honpa, lutsak in!)
Nang vakna pawi khawm dinga, lutsak in! (Honpa, lutsak in!)
A hong phel ding na mawhna, lawmte tawh kikhen ciangin;
Hong kha ding vantung inn-ah, lutsak in! (Honpa, lutsak in!)
Inn hong zuan in, Na lungsim gimzo hi;
Na lami mialzo hi, lauhuai lua hilo maw;
A taimang ta aw, inn ah hong ciah in
Sakkik
Inn ah (inn ah)
Hong ciah meng in (meng in)
Inn hong zuan in, hong gal-et lailai ung;
Kongpi ah dingding ung,
Khuamialta hilo maw;
A taimang ta aw, inn ah hong ciah in
Inn hong zuan in, mawhsakna dahna pan;
Mawhna le zumna pan, dawi mangpa khemna pan;
A taimang ta aw, inn ah hong ciah in.
Inn hong zuan in, An tampi tak om hi;
Vaitutna nuam om hi, kipawlna nuam om hi;
A taimang ta aw, inn ah hong ciah in.
Mawhna a neite hong pai in
Topa in hong hehpih
A ma thupha bel up ciang in
Nuamna i ngah ding hi
Sakkik
A mah muang in, A mah muang la
Tu in ah muang in
Hong gum ding hi, hong gum ding hi
Tu in hong gum ding
Nuamna a hong pia ding Jesuh
