A si pha bel luang sak
Vuk sang in hong ngo zaw sak thei
A si sung hong phum ta’n
Nop na sung tun’ na ding
Jesuh Thumaan lam pi a hi
Topa na um ding khawl kei leh
Lung dam na ngah ding hi
Mi siang tho kikhopna mun leh
Min thanna mun pai ni;
Lung dam om tawn tung na sung ah
Nuamna i ngah ding hi
Pasian kiangpan gamla ka pial
Tu in hong ciah ing
Mawhna lam sawt lua ka tawn khial
Topa hong ciah ing
Sakkik
Hong ciah ing, Hong ciah ing
Vak khia nawn lo ding
Thupha tawh Nang aa hi ning
Topa hong ciah ing
Hunpha tampi mawk bei sak ing
Tu in hong ciah ing
Tun kap in ki siak taktak ing
Topa hong ciah ing
Mawhna lam pial cim tang Topa
Tu in hong ciah ing
Muang ning na itna leh thupha
Topa hong ciah ing
Ka kha cina, Ka lung meima
Tu ion hong ciah ing
Hong dip kik in ka lawpna tha
Topa hong ciah ing.
Mawhna neite aw, Jesuh’n hong sam, a kiangah pai un!
Hong pai un mawhna kisik khempeuh,
Jesuh kiang khia un!
Sakkik
Khia un, mawh neite’n khia un,
Topa Jesuh kiang pai un,
Khia un, mawhneite’n khia un,
Jesuh kiang khia un!
A umte pai un nopna zong un, Topa kiang pai un!
Na lungsim gimna vangik khempeuh,
Jesuh kiang khia un!
Na upna in hong nuamsak ding hi,
Jesuh kiang pai un!
Na kha ading gimna a tampi,
Jesuh kiang khia un!
Hong pai un, no omna’ng omlai hi,
Jesuh kaing pai un!
Na van neih khempeuh a gikpha pi,
Jesuh kiang khia un!

songs.title: Na Mawh Phel Nading Om Hi

lines: Hong gum Topa min um in a kiang pai in,
Lungsiim hong bawl thaksak ding hi;
Apha a hong bawl nop lai-in pial kei in,
Nang ading mawhphelna om hi.
Sakkik
Na mawh phelna ding om hi (om hi),
Na mawhphel nading om hi (om hi);
Hong gum dingin Jesuh sizo hi,
Na mawh phel na’ng thu hong pia hi
Mawhna lampi zuihna in sihna ahi,
Nang zuizui lai ding na hi hiam?
Itna tawh hong sapna, na nial lai ding hiam?
Mawhphelna thu nang hong pia hi.
Hong tung ding gal peelin singlamteh bel in,
Singlamteh in nang hong phel ding;
Kiniamkhiatna na thumna, Kha Siangtho in,
Hong dawngin, thupha hong pia ding.

songs.title: Gupna Ngah Na’ng Bang Ka Hih Diam?

lines: Gupna ngah na’ng bang ka hih diam?
Dahna sung ka khah vangik pua bang;
Tuipi kilok bangin, huihpi hong nung bangin,
Dahna kei tungah hong kihual a,
Gupna ngah na’ng bang ka hih diam?
Aw, gup ngah na’ng bang ka hih diam?
Khangno lungsim a bei ciangin,
Gupna ngah nading bang ka hih diam?
Ka it ka lawmte in, leitunga a nusiat ciang,
Han phualah dahin ka kapkap hi,
Gupna ngah na’ng bang ka hih diam?
Aw, gup ngah na’ng bang ka hih diam?
Natna in hong bawlsiat ciangin,
Gupna ngah nading bang ka hih diam?
Leitung tawl khat bek hi, mei bangin theng thei hi,
A hunbei ngeilo muh theih na’ngin,
Gupna ngah na’ng bang ka hih diam?
Aw, gup ngah na’ng bang ka hih diam?
Hong hehpih inla, hong en in,
Nopsakna keimah hong khiatsuk in;
Topa kiang lo mundang, kua kiang ka zuan ding hiam,
Lungsim kitam Topa’n damsak thei,
Hi bang hih ning! Hi bang hih ning!
Gupna ngah na’ng Jesuh beel ning.

songs.title: Pai Inla, Jesuh Kiang Gen In!

lines: Jesuh kiang pai in na mawhna gen in,
Na nuntakna ding Ama thu um in;
Na lungsim vangik hong zangsak ding hi,
Topa en in na mawh hong phel ding hi.
Sakkik
Jesuh kiang pai in, na mawhnate gen in,
Ama lam nga-in na mawh hong phel ding hi;
Jesuh kiang pai in, Ama lam zuan in,
Na mawh gen in, Topa’n hogn phel thei ding hi.
Jesuh kiang pai in na mawhna lian hi,
Na mawhna mualcia-in a liat hangin;
Mawhna phel ding hi, nuamna ngah na’ngin,
Topa Jesuh a si luang ciamteh in.
Jesuh kiang pai in na launa gen in,
Na lau lohna ding, A ang hong pom ding;
Upna khangsak in, na khitui nul hi,
A tawntung nuam in na lungdam ding hi.
Dahna lungkhamna a tun ciang,
Topa’ hong sapna ngai ning;
Khazih Topa thupha um in,
Tuni’n a kiangah pai ning.
Sakkik
Kei hong pai ning, kong pai ding hi,
Topa thupha sang dingin;
Kei hong pai ning, kong pai ding hi,
Topa kiang maan ngah dingin.
A siangtho kiniamsak Topa,
Na kiang keimah kong pai hi;
Hong kem in hong cing in Topa,
Na khutnuai hong omsak in.
Ka kha nopsak na’ng Topa aw,
Nangma kiang kong bel ding hi;
Vantungah mi siangthote tawh,
Ka mangkhawm tawntung nuam hi.
Ka kiangah hong om in Topa,
Lungkhamna huih daisak in;
Lungdamna piangsak in, dahna,
Khuamial ni tang bangsak in.
Upa khat zanlai Jesuh kiangah pai-a,
Gupna ngah nading khuavak lampi dong hi;
Topa in a tel takin a hilh in-ah,
“Nihvei na suak in,” ci (in ci)
Sakkik
Nihvei na suakkik in! (kik in!)
Nihvei na suakkik in! (kik in!)
Aman takin kong ci hi, kong hilh kik hi,
Nihvei na suakkik in! (kik in!)
Topa Jesuh thu hilh kikna a pha hi,
Leitung mihingte ngaihsut ding kilawm hi;
A thupiakna a mawkna hilo ding hi,
“Nihvei na suak in,” ci (in ci)
A teel mite tawh lungdamin la sa ta,
Miphate’n a minthang lungdamin nuam a;
Hin tawntung lungdam nuamna na ngah nop leh,
“Nihvei na suak in,” ci (in ci)
Na muhnop mihingte vantung khuapi ah,
A siangtho kong biangah nang hong ngak uh hi;
Tua bang na muh nang hih thupiakna ngai in,
“Nihvei na suak in,” ci (in ci)
Khialhan a nei gimna thuak mi ka hi,
Vantung lam ka et leh ka tung nuam hi;
Hih hang tua sungah khial nei om thei kei,
Hih hang, “Hong pai in” cih aw khat ka thei.
Nisim ka pai lai vantung khua lampi,
A tawntung mawhna khialhna’n hong khem hi;
Hih hang “Pulak in, na kisikkik leh,
Mawh kiphel ngah ding” cih thu ka thei hi.
Kihhuai mi ka hih ciangin bang ci-in,
Tua khua siangtho sungah ka lut ding hiam?
Pasian tokhom mai-ah ding thei ding hiam?
Hih hang, “Hong nai in” khut tawh hong sam hi.
Jesuh Topa a aw, ke’n ka za hi,
Ama khut in kei hong naisak thei hi;
Ama si in ka mawhna ka khialhna,
Hong phel thei vantungah hong lutsakta.
Topa aw ka hong thuumna hong ngai in,
Na hehpihna kei ading kicing;
Na linglukhu in kei kumpi lukhu,
Ka nuntakna ding Nang nunna Nong pia.
Neihsa bangmah nei keng, Nang kong puak ding,
Ka lungsim pumpi’n Nang kong kipia khin;
Ka lungsim teng bang ci’n kong pia thei diam,
Mawh phelna ding thu’n ka lung hong nuamsak.
A siangtho ngah ding Jesuh kiang na pai diam?
Tuuno si tawh na ki sawp zo hiam?
A thupha kicing ding in na um nai hiam?
Tuuno si tawh na ki sawp zo hiam?
Sakkik
Tuuno a (Tuuno a) sipha tawh (sipha tawh)
Nangmah in na kisawp siang zo maw? (siang zo maw?)
Na puansilh vuk bang in-ah na ngah zo hiam?
Tuuno si tawh na ki sawp zo hiam?.
Nisim in Topa kiangah lam na zui hiam?
Tuuno si tawh na kisawp zo hiam?
Thahna a thuak Topa kiang na beel ta hiam?
Tuuno si tawh na ki sawp zo hiam?
Mopipa hong pai ciang na puan siang dingin,
Tuuno si tawh na kisawp zo hiam?
A bawl innpi nuam ah lut theih na dingin,
Tuuno si tawh na kisawp zo hiam?
Mawhna khialhna a baang na puansilh pai in,
Tuuno si tawh na kisawpzo hiam?
A siang lo na lungsung ciktui luang sak in,
Tuuno si tawh na ki sawp zo hiam?
Hong it Honpa hong ngai in, Hong ngai in, hong ngai in;
Na ang kong beel liingkawmin, Topa hong honkhia aw;
Ka mawhna hang nong si hi, Nong si hi, nong si hi;
Hong hehpih in nong liah hi, Topa hong honkhia aw.
Sakkik
Hong sang in, Topa aw, Hong dahsak nawn kei ning,
Tu’n thupha hong pia aw, Topa hong honkhia aw.
Ka gitloh hang kong thum hi, kong thum hi, kong thum,
Nuntakna lampi Na hi, Topa hong honkhia aw;
Hehpihna in nget neilo, nget neilo, nget nei lo;
Hehpih huai lua nong sa zo, Topa hong honkhia aw.
Na sisan in hong sawp in, hong sawp in, hong sawp in,
Sisan sungah hong diah in, Topa hong honkhia aw;
Upna bek mawhphelna hi, phelna hi, phelna hi,
Tua upna tawh kong beel hi, Topa hong honkhia aw.
Lam khial tuu ka hi a, tuu khumna sung ut keng;
Hong cingpa aw ka za nuam kei,
Athu ke’n ngai nuam keng;
Ta taimang ka hi a, inn ah om nuam kei ing;
Ka pa aw ka ngai nuam kei a,
Gamla pai nuam kha ing.
Tuucingpa’ tuu zon bang, pa in ta hong zong a;
Mual kuam guam sung teeng zuizui in,
Gamlapi hong zong a;
Ka sih dektak hong mu, gilgial in ka om hi;
Itna tawh Amah’n hong pua a,
Lamkhial kei hong hon hi.
Jesuh’n kei hong cinga, Amah’n kei hong itzo;
Ama si tawh hong sawp sianga,
Kei hong kicingsak zo; Amah’n lamkhial mi zong,
Tuu mangthang Amu hi; Tuukhumna ah Amah’n hong kh
Tu-in kei hong kem hi.
Lamkhial tuu ka hi a, kuama thu ngai nuam ke’ng;
Tu-in Honpa’ aw ngai nuam ing,
Tuu huang sung om nuam veng;
Ta taimang ka hi a, ka vak kawikawi kha hi;
Tu-in ka Pa thu ka ngai a,
Inn ah ka om nuam hi.
Jesuh sihna singlamteh phungah,
Mawhna hong phel na’ng kaki ko a;
Tua lai-ah sisan in hong sawp ta,
A minthang ta hen.
Sakkik
A minthang ta hen,
A minthang ta hen;
Tua lai ah sisan in hong sawp ta,
A min thang ta hen.
Mawhna pan hong hotna lamdang hi,
Jesuh’n nuam tak-in hong om pih hi;
Tua sing lamteh ah kei hong sam hi,
A minthang ta hen.
Mawh sawp siang na tui nak manpha a,
Ka tun man in kei ka nuam lua a;
Jesuh’n hong hon hong siang sak zo ta,
A min thang ta hen.
Tua cik tui man-pha ah hong pai un,
Jesuh khe phungah hong ki-ap un;
Ki bual un-la, kisawp siang sak un,
Amin thang ta hen.
Kalvary ah Honpa en dih vaw,
Nang le kei ading thuak hilo maw;
Itna tawh hong sap lai ngai dih vaw,
En in, hingta in.
Sakkik
En in, hingta in, En in, hingta in.
Nang ading sing tung sihna en in,
En in, hingta in.
Na kha vangik hong honkhia zo hi,
Nuntak tawntungna na ngah ding hi;
Mawhna tatman Jesuh’n piazo hi,
En in, hing ta in.
Han pan a tho Jesuh na en ding,
Omna omlai na zuan mengmeng ding;
Amai taang in hong lungnuamsak ding,
En in, hingta in.
Hong thumsak ding Jesuh vanah om,
Mawhneite’ gimna thei-in hong dom;
Na paina peuh hong kha dingin om,
En in, hingta in.

songs.title: Mawhnei Mi Aw, Hong Pai Un!

lines: Jesuh’n hong sam, hong pai in! Mawh nei mi aw;
Thu kong ngetsak, hong pai in! Mawh nei mi aw.
Jesuh na neih hunzo ta, Mawh nei mi aw;
Amah na theih hunzo ta, hong pai meng in.
Na vangik tawh hong pai in! Mawh nei mi aw.
Jesuh zuan ding hong pai in! Mawh nei mi aw.
Jesuh’n nang hong khem lo ding, Mawh nei mi aw;
Jesuh’n nang hong sang lai ding, hong pai meng in.
Hong sap ngai in, hong pai in! Mawh nei mi aw.
Thupha sang ding hong pai in! Mawh nei mi aw.
Jesuh’n nang hong samsam lai, Mawh nei mi aw;
Thu hong kingetsak lailai, Mawh nei mi aw.
Ka nun sung ka tatkhialhna tam zo a,
Ka lungsim mawhna tamzaw semta;
Ka kahna in khua mulo pi,
Kong honsa ka va zuan ding hi.
Sakkik
Ka mawhna ka ginat lohna,
Tampi ka phawk semsemta;
Ahih hang Jesuh’n hong sap ciang inn sungah,
Ka tum ding kongpi honsa.
Ama itna lakah kei a neu pen,
Thungetna ah zong a zawngkhal pen;
Hong sap bang ke’n ka zuan mawk hi,
Amah in hong nial lo ding hi.
Ka khialhnate hehpihna’n siin ding hi,
Ka mawhna Amah’n silkhia ding hi;
Meidawi a kiplo keima khe,
A tang kongpi lam zuan gige.
Ka nunsung ka tatkhialhna tamzo a,
Mawhna hang ka lungsim gim lua ta;
Ka kahna in khua mu lopi,
Hong Honpa’n hong tumsak ding hi.
Topa ka za Na aw
Nang kiang a Nong sap na
Ka la ni Nasi manpha tawh
Kei mah hong sawp nuam a
Sakkik
Kong pai hi Topa
Kong pai hi tu in
Kalani a Nasi pha
Keimah hong sawpna in
Zawngkhal, kih huai hangin
Ka tha Nong khauhsak hi
Neng kha zong kih bang nawn lo in
Mawhna Nong sawp sak hi
Leitung vantung aa ding
Upna itna lawpna
Lungnopna muan’na a ki cing
Jesuh hi hong guan’ Pa
Thang hen, mawh maina si
Thang hen, hong tan itna
Thang hen, Pasian’ hong piak Khazih
Eite’ Tha le Dikna
Hong sapsap hang Khris tawh kigamla semsem,
Tudong mahin nial lailai ding na hiam?
Leitung nopsakna lam-en lailai ding maw?
Hong khem hihte muang lailai ding na hiam?
Sakkik
Jesuh zuan meng in! sinkham, lungkham mi aw,
Jesuh zuan in, hun omlai in;
Nang hong sang dingin tu-in hong ngak lai hi
Tuni’n hong sam, A aw ngai in.
Hon hoih napi Khris tawh kigamla semsem,
Zan hong naita nang bang cih ding na hiam?
Khris tawh na kigamlat hang, omna omlai,
Nang ading hinna tui luang hilo hiam?
Hong zolzol hang Khris tawh kigamla semsem,
Na mawhna pan na kisikkik nop leh;
Amah’n hong ngak hotkhiatna kong khakpi ah,
Hong maisak nuamin hong ngakngak lai veh.
Hong it napi Khris tawh kigamla semsem,
Ama itna sang pak lo ding na hiam?
Kinawh meng in, na upna aksi taanlai,
Kisikkikin umpah lo ding na hiam?
Kei dahna, khuamial kol tanna pan
Jesuh kong pai Jesuh kong pai
Nang nuamna khuavak suahtakna lam
Jesuh Nang kiang kong pai
Ka natna pan Nang damna sungah
Ka zawn’na pan Nang hauhna sungah
Ka mawhna sung pan Nangma sungah
Jesuh Nang kiang kong pai
Zumhuai lelhna supna pan in ah
Jesuh kong pai Jesuh kong pai
Vaanglian Na singlamteh meetna ah
Jesuh Nang kiang kong pai
Leitung dahna pan Nang khoina sung
Huihpi sungpan Nang ma daihna sung
Lung gimna pan nuam la sak na sung
Jesuh Nang kiang kong pai
Pha theilo kisak theihna panin
Jesuh kong pai Jesuh kong pai
Nangma deihna bang bang mang dingin
Jesuh Nang kiang kong pai
Ka pumpi nusia’n Na itna sung
Lung kiatna pan vantung nuamna sung
Sang semsem leeng to ning atawntung
Jesuh Nang kiang kong pai
Singlamteh kiang kong pai hi
Tha le sum lo, mit taw pi
Na dang bangmah man lo pi
Hotna cing ka zong ding hi.
Sakkik
Topa Nangmah kong muang zo
Singlamteh tung si Tuuno
Na Singlamteh kong bel zo
Hong hon aw, tu’n hong hon aw.
Nang kong lung gulhna sawt hi
Ka gitloh sawt lua zo hi
Jesuh in damtak hong ci
“Na mawhna Kong sawp ding hi”
Ka vekpi’n kong ki pia ta
Ka lawm, ka hun, ka neihsa
Ka vekpi’n kapum kakha,
Nang’ a ka hi khin nuam ta.
Na thuciamte ka muang hi
Na si pha tu’n ka phawk hi
Ka lungsim ka niam khiat hi
Nangmah tawh ka si khawm hi.
Jesuh ka lung sung tumzo,
Ama sung ka kicingzo;
Ka pumpi’n ka dam siangzo,
Minthang hen, Pasian Tuuno.
Ka hi bangin paulap nei lo,
Kei a’ ding na si luang simloh
Nangmah in Nong sapna thu tawh,
Pasian’ Tuuno’, kong zuan, kong zuan.
Ka hi bangin misia mittaw,
khuamuhna, hauhna, damna tawh;
Ka sapna teng ngah ding in aw,
Pasian’ tuuno, kong zuan, kong zuan.
Ka hi bangin mawhna baangin,
Kisil tawm dingin khawllo-in;
Na si’n hong siangsak thei manin,
Pasian’ Tuuno, kongzuan, kong zuan.
Ka hi bangin lungsim patau,
kisiatna tam, lungkiatna hau;
Sunglam, pualam, kaling kalau,
Pasian’ Tuuno, kong zuan, kong zuan.
Ka hi bangin nong sang mah ding,
Nongphel, nong sawp, nong huh mah ding;
Nang aa bek hi ta ning tu in,
Pasian’ Tuuno, kong zuan, kong zuan.
Ka hi bangin nong it manin,
Hong dal khempeuhte palsat in
Na thu ciamte ke’n umzo ing,
Pasian’ Tuuno, kong zuan, kong zuan
Kong sapna ngai in, tu’n hong hehpih in,
Hong Honpa hong pai in!
Ka lunggim zo, Nang kong ngaita tu-in,
Hong Honpa hong pai in!
Sakkik
Ka va gammang mualtung khuadam lakah,
Inn pan gamlapi ka pial khin;
Tu’n hong la in, hong ciahpih’n Na inn ah
Hong Honpa hong pai in!
Zan khuamial sung ka belh ding ka nei lo,
Hong Honpa hong pai in!
Khatvei Nong et hinna khuavak hizo,
Hong Honpa hong pai in!
Lam gamdai a ka khe zong gimzo ta,
Hong Honpa hong pai in!
Ka dak leh Na it mai mu zenzen a,
Hong Honpa hong pai in!
Na nial ngei kei, lung tamkhamte’ thuumna,
Hong Honpa hong pai in!
Na ngai in lung niamkhiat a kong thumna,
Hong Honpa hong pai in!
Thukham sung pan suahtak nuam mahmah hi,
Jesuh in a si tawh a hong sawp hi;
Thukham sung pan ka suahtakna ding,
Hong itna tawh hong gumzo hi.
Sakkik
Cing ding hi, mawh neite’n umta un,
Cing ding hi, ute naute’n um un;
Singlamteh beel leng mawhna kia ding,
Khatvei tatna tawh cingkhin hi.
Mawhsakna pan i suakta zo a,
Jesuh’n gupna kicing hong pia zota;
Aw khum in hong sam “Hong pai un” ci,
Khatvei tatna tawh kicing hi.
Pasian’ Tapa cihna i ngah zo ta,
A pukte itna tawh hong phong zo ding;
Hong sap ciang sihna pan hingkik ding,
Khatvei tatna tawh kicing hi.
Kiphat sakna’n kum sawt ka bei sak
Kei aading kithat Topa don lo,
Kei a ding hong sih lam
ka phawk kei Kalvari ah
Sakkik
Man piak loh hehpihna a lian leh
Mawh mai sakna kei tungah khang a
Ka kha van gik tu in suak ta hi
Kalvari ah
Pasian thu in ka mawh lam phawk sak,
Bang ka hi ka phawk ciang ka ling a
A mawh ka kha thum in,
Ka kihei Kalvari lam
Tu’n Jesuh a vekpi’n ka pia khin,
Tu’n amah ka ka kumpipa hi ta
Tu’n a sia sa kha in la ka sa
Kalvari mah
Aw, gup khiatna thu a geel itna
Aw, mitung dong hong puak suk thupha
Aw, a khauh kizopna lei hong dawh
Kalvari-ah
Kei aa ding tam Khang Suangpi
Nangma sung kong beel ding hi
Na pang vang pan hong kizui
Tha khat luang khia “si le tui”
Mawh ki phel thuap na hi hen
Hong sut hen la hong sawp hen
Ka khut in ka sep na tawh
Thukham deih na cin’ zolo
Hahkat den zo mah leng zong
Tawp lo khi tui luang hang zong
Mawhna ki phel zo sam lo
Nangmah bek in Nong hon zo
Khut sung bangmah keng lopi
Na sing lam teh kong beel hi
Puan nei lo Nangmah’n Nong guan
Ci mawh heh pih na kong zuan
Kih huai tui nak kong delh hi
Nong sil ke’h ka si ding hi
Ka nuntak lai hi ta leh
Ka sih lai tak hi ta leh
Theih loh gam ka kah ciang zong
Thu khenna mai kong tun’ dong
Kei taang kitam Suangpi aw
Nang ma sung hong beel sak aw

songs.title: Na Sikkip In Hong Lenzo Diam?

lines: Na sikkip in hong lenkipzo na diam?
Huihpi hong nun ciang a muanhuai diam?
Meivom kai ciangin tuihual khang ciangin
Hong lenkip zo diam? Na sikkip in.
Sakkik
Nuntakna hong len sikkip i nei,
Tuihual khan ciang zong launa’ng om kei
A kip suangpi tung khotak khih in,
Honpa itna sungah thukpi phum in.
Huihpi nangzo ding kiptak kikhih hi,
Honpa’ khut in hong lung muangsak hi;
Ama lungtang pan, kei lungsim sungah,
Huihpi nan zawh na’ng hatna ka ngah.
Lauhuaina sungah hong lenkip ding hi,
Siat theihna hong nai i thei khol hi;
Huihsia hong nungin, tui kilok taleh,
Tuihual in hong tumzo ngei ke’n teh.
Hong lenkip ding hi, sihna tuihual sung,
Husan beidek dong huihsia hong nung;
Tuihual a hat hang i liing kei ding hi,
A kimulo lam-etna i nei.
Zan khuamial sung pan i gal-et ciangin,
Tembaw khawl mun tang kigalmuh khin;
Huihpi venna mun, vantung gun piau ah,
I sikkip khia ni, kiptak in-ah.
Na galte in hong zo ding ci’n na lau hiam?
Pualam khuamial sangin sunglam mialzaw hiam?
Khuavakna kongvangte khempeuh hong inla,
Nitang khuavak lutsak in.
Sakkik
Nitang khuavak lutsak in,
Nitang khuavak lutsak in;
Khuavak kongvangte khempeuh hong inla,
Nitang khuavak lutsak in.
Na nasep laitak na upna a kiam hiam?
Nangma thungetnate hong dawng lo a hiam?
Khuavakna kongvangte khempeuh hong inla,
Nitang khuavak lutsak in.
Nuntak sanna lamzuan in na pai nuam hiam?
Khuamial lohna khuavak sung na om nuam hiam?
Khuavakna kongvangte khempeuh hong inla,
Nitang khuavak lutsak in.

songs.title: A SANNA LAM KA KAHTO HI

lines: A sang na lam ka kah to hi
Ni sim a thak ka tung to hi
Kah to kawm kong thum lai Topa
Hong suan to aw a sang zaw ah
Sakkik
Topa aw hong domto in la,
Ka muh ngeinai loh van zang ah
Up na tawh ong ding to sak in
A sang zaw ah ong suan to in
Lung manna launa tamna ah
Midang te a ut hang in ah
Kei ka lungsim a ut kei hi
Kei tupna a sang zaw na hi
A sang zaw a mi siangte’ la
Upna tawh kei mah in ka za
Dawi mangpa’n thal in hong kap hang
Ka sang zaw nuam hi leitung sang
A sang pen dong ka kah nuam hi
Vanglian a tang ka mu nuam hi
Vantung ka muh dong Topa aw
A sang zaw ah hong pi to aw
Hong phat ung Pasian, Kote nong it manin;
Sihna zo vankah, Jesuh Na hong piak manin
Sakkik
Hallelujah! Na min thang hi,
Hallelujah! Amen;
Hallelujah! Na minthang hi,
Hong puahpha kik in.
Hong phat ung Pasian,
Na Kha Siangtho hangin;
Honpa hong lak in,
Khuamial Nong vaksak manin,
Thahna thuak Tuuno,
Na minthang tawntung ta;
Ko mawhna teng puakhia in,
Hong siangsak Topa
Hong puahpha inla,
Na itna hong guan in;
Mi khempeuhte Na mei tawh
Hong tawh kuang ta in.
Topa Pasian, Na na sem ding
Mi tam kisam tawntung
Tuate in sem kimzo lo ding;
Huhna puak kei le ung.
Topa Nangmah kong it manun,
Nasep nading inah,
Kong piak uh zang in Nangmah thu’n;
Jesuh min ding inah

songs.title: SI A KHUT GUAK MASUAN DING MAW?

lines: Si a khut guak masuan ding maw,
Topa mu ding hih bangin;
A na ni khat beek zongsem lo,
Puak ding bang mahkeng lo in.
Sakkik
Si ding a khut guak masuan in,
Hong Hon pa' mai mu ding maw?
A mahdawn na ding mi khat zong
tonpih lo guak pai ding maw?
Sih ding kih ta ka hi kei hi,
Topa in hong hon zo tah,
Ahih hang in guak pai ding pen,
Ngaih sut ciang sin lung kha lah,
Mawh na sung a mawk kum teng,
khat vei sam kik thei leng maw,
Avek pi in Topa pia in na deih bang
mang nuam sing maw.
Hah kat un, dingun, misiang te,
Sun lai na citak in sem,
Sih na zan in hong phak ma in,
Mi ngah nang septheih lai sem.
Jesuh Kumpi suak a, van tokhom tung tu hi;
Kumpi lukhu kikhusak a, mi siangte’n pahtawi hi.
Sakkik
Tat (khiat) sa mi siangte tawh,
Lung (sim) muangin Honpa tawh,
I lung a kim ding hi, Nung (nung) ciangin!
Nung ciangin! Nung ciang!
I lung a kim ding hi, nung ciangin!
Sim zawh loh mi honpi’n, puanpaak silh tee zihziah;
Pahtawina nisuh hiang tawi-in, phatna la sa ziahziah.
Amau ading sipa, Tuuno a phat uh hi;
Tuuno’ sisan hang kilemna, lukhu khu ciat uh hi.
Kha Siangtho hehpihna, Ko ading nong pia hi;
Gualzo mi siangte tawh van-ah, Nong kipawl khawmsak hi.
A sia ding honkhia in,
A si dingdon in,mawh na leh sihna pan in dok khia in;
Kai-in lam khial mi te
Phongin a puk te,
Jesuh hot na thei sak in a maute.
Sakkik
A sia ding hon khia in,
A si ding don in;
Jesuh in hehpih hi,
A hong dinghi.
A mau don ta kei leh,
A mah’n ngak lai veh,
Sanglai dinghi a mau kisik Peuhleh,
Vasam in ci tak in,
Dam tak va zol in,
Um peuh leh uh
Mawh ki phel maan tak in.
Dawimangpa net cip sa,
Mihing lungsim pha,
Hehpih na thu-pha in phongkik thei a,
it na tawh va su in,
Phongleeng dam tak in,
Khuangkhau tatsa
Peh bang ngaih ngei bangin.
A sia ding hon khia in,
Sep loh phamawh hi,
Sepzawh na’ngtha hongpia ding Topa in;
A kaw-cik lampi ah,
Zol teitei in-la,
Hilh in a ma’ tang Topa si khin ta.
Na sem un, na sem un!
Pasian sawltak hi hang,
Ih Topa totsa lampi mah a zui hihang;
Ama thunuam in ei hong thahat sak dinghi,
Na sem ding I muh peuh
Thahatna tawh sem ni
Sakkik
Na sem un! na sem un! Na sem un!
Na sem un! Lam-en un, (muang un)
Thungen un, (ngak un)
Topa hong pai mateng sem un.
Nasem un! Nasem un! gilkialte anvak un
Nuntakna tuinak ah migimte paipih un;
Singlamteh leh lungdamna thu tawh
Kipak ni, Tangko un, “Man ngenlo,
a khawnkhong hong hon hi.
Na sem un! na sem un !
om hi mi kimsep ding
Theih khialhna khuamial
Gam hi ei te suk-mang ding;
I Topa Pasian'min I pah
Tawi ding a hi, Tangko un,
" Man ngen lo, a khawnkhong hong hon hi"
Na sem un! Na sem un!
Topa’ tha tawh sem ding,
Kumpi puan leh lukhu nuamna eite’n sang ding;
Tatkhiatsa midikte tawh eite’n I vekpi’n,
Sa khawm ding, “Manngen lo,
A khawnkhong hong hon hi.”
Kumpipa galkapte’n a et dinginah,
Dialpei khat a kilak hi;
Gupna ngah mite’n la a sak khawm laitak,
Hih dial na sangsak ding hi.
Sakkik
Paita un! (pai un) mai nawt un! (nawt un)
Jesuh ading khempeuh pa un;
Hahkat nasem un, lasa un,
Jesuh Kumpipa’n koih un.
Galkapte in tui bang tam a om hangin,
Dialpeina na laksak un;
Dial peina nuai-ah Topa galkap bangin,
Laulo-in na dota un.
Leitung, tui tung mite omna khempeuh ah,
Lungdamna thu zasak un;
Topa in Ama thu a umte lakna’ng,
Dialpeina tangthu hilh un.
Gualzawh ding naita, minthan ding hong naita,
Zawhna hong nai semsem hi;
Kumpipa mai-ah galte beimang dinga,
Singlamteh gualzo ding hi.

songs.title: Hiah Om Ing, Kei Hong Sawl In

lines: Jesuh hong sapna aw ngai in,
Tuni’n kua pai-in sem ding;
Anvuite kuai-in lak phat khin,
Buhphalte kua’n kaikhawm ding;
Topa’n hong sam nakpi takin,
Thaman tampi hong pia ding;
Kua’n hi ci’n dawng ding lungdamin,
“Hiah om ing, kei hong sawl in,”
“Hiah om ing, kei hong sawl in.”
Tuipi na kantan thei kei zong,
Anai-ah nasem thei ding;
Gam thakah nasem thei kei zong,
Na bangkua ah sem thei ding;
Tul tampi na pia thei kei zong,
Meigongnu bang pia thei ding;
Jesuh tung them khat na piak zong,
Amuhna ah manpha hi,
Amuhna ah manpha hi.
Van mi bang na gen thei kei zong,
Jesuh’ itna gen thei ding;
Paul bang in na gensiam kei zong,
Ei tang si na ci thei ding;
Thukhenna thu na hilhta zong,
Misia khel zo lo kha ding;
Naupangte na tunpih thei ding,
Hong ngak Honpa’ ang sungah,
Hong ngak Honpa’ ang sungah.
Nasep theih a om het kei zong,
Sem thei ke’ng ci’n gen lo ding;
Midangte’ sih dek laitak zong,
Topa in nang hong sam ding;
A hong piakna sep khempeuh zong,
Lungdam takin nasem ding;
Hong sap ciang a manlang dawng in,
“Hiah om ing, kei hong sawl in,”
“Hiah om ing, kei hong sawl in.”
Topa it teng pai ni
Lang sak ni i nuamna
Kituak takin la sa khawm ni
Kituak takin la sa khawm ni
Topa tokhom kim ah
Topa tokhom kim ah
Sakkik
Zion khua i pai hi
A kilawm khua phapi Zion
I tun mateng kah toto ni
Kilawm Pasian khuapi Zion
Ei Pasian thei lo te’n
Phatnuam ta kei le uh
Ei vantung Kumpi pa ta te’n
Ei vantung Kumpi pa ta te’n
Thangsak un nuamna thu
Thangsak un nuamna thu
Vantung gam sung tum ma
Kham khua sung sik ma in
Hong maleep hi siangtho nuamna
Hong maleep hi siangtho nuamna
Zion mual kah lai in
Zion mual kah lai in
Tua hi a lasa un
Nul un dahna khitui
Vantung gam ah a nopna mun
Vantung gam ah a nopna mun
Tunna ding lam i zui
Tunna ding lam i zui
Singlamteh gal kap ka hi hiam?
Topa’ nungzui hi hiam?
Ama na sepna dingin ah,
Ka mai zumthei ding hiam?
Sakkik
Keitang ding (kei tang ding)
A si miPa (a si mi Pa)
A minpha tawh do ding
Singlamteh ka puak hangin ah,
Zawhna lukhu ngah ding.
Midangte’n nopna ngah dingin,
Sihdong a do laitak;
A nuam mahmah lupna tungah,
Lum hithiat ding ka hiam?
Gal do ding galte a om hiam?
Tul luanna thuak ding hiam?
Leitung gitlohna in Pasian
Kiang hong paipih ding hiam?
Mang ding in ah ka ki don na’ng,
Hong hangsak in topa;
Nangma thupha’n hong huh ta in,
Gimna ka thuak ciangin,
Jesuh kia’n singlamteh pua a
Guak pai ding maw lei mi
Hi lo, mikim puak ding om a
Kei puak ding zong om hi
Singlamteh ke’n ka pua ding hi
Sihna’n hong khah ma teng
Kumpi lukhu ka ngah ding hi
Vantung innpi tung leng
A kikhen let Jesuh khe kiang
Lim lang suang phah tung ah
Ka kham lukhu ka ngak suk ciang
Nuam in phat ning Amah
Aw manpha hi, tua singlamteh
Vaanglian kumpi lukhu
Ka ngah ding hi hinkikna leh
Hong lak ding lawpna thu
Hanciamna pha a nei mi, Topa’ thumangte;
Pahtawi un, a muan huai mi,
Phat un, Daniel pawlte.
Sakkik
Daniel bang hi ngam in,
Hang takin ding ni;
Hanciamna kip nei ngamin,
Hang takin gen ni.
Daniel pawl a pawmsate, Psian’ mi tampi;
Hang taka ding ngam lote,
Mangthang khinzo uh hi.
Mi thahat kihtak huaite, tampi a om hang;
Daniel pawl a langpante,
A vekpi un mangthang.

songs.title: At Hun Ciang Bang A Ci Diam?

lines: Ki-itna khaici zingsang vawh un,
Ni sun laitakin zong na suan un;
Nitak lamin zong na hahkat un,
Zan ciangin zong khai na vawh un,
At hun ciang banga ci diam?
At hun ciang banga ci diam? (a ci diam?)
Sakkik
Sun ahi zong, zan ahi zong vawh un,
Tha khauh lai bang, thaneem lai zong vawh un,
Nuntak sung hi leh, sih khit hileh,
A khop hun khatvei tung ding hi.
Khaici kim khat lampi ah kia hi,
Khaici kim khat suang lakah kia hi;
Khaici kim khat linglak ah kia hi,
Khaici kim khat lei hoih-ah kia hi,
At hun ciang banga ci diam?
At hun ciang banga ci diam? (a ci diam?)
Gimna thuakin khaici pha vawh un,
Lungsim siat hang khaici na vawh un;
Mimal siat thuak hangin hahkat un,
Maizumna thuak hangin lungkia ke’n,
At hun ciang banga ci diam?
At hun ciang banga ci diam? (a ci diam?)
Tapidaw limtak pai, launa hong nai,
Launa liinna sunga khual na zin lai;
A pua-ah thang, a sungah ze-etna,
Nungkiksak ding, hong zol mawhna sungah.
Tapidaw limtak pai, Tapidaw limtak pai,
Tapidaw limtak pai, launa hong nai.
Tapidaw nuam in pai, huihpi lak zong,
Kihtak huai vangingin khua a mial zong;
Huihpi le meiipi hong thengkik pah ding,
Tua ciang na Honpa tawh tawlnga den ding.
Tapidaw nuamin pai, Tapidaw nuamin pai,
Tapidaw nuamin pai, Huihpi lak zong.
Tapidaw ngen in pai, na pukkha ding,
Honpa na koh khialh leh na pukzel ding;
Thungetna galvante nang na silh leh,
Ze-etna haksa kantanzo niteh.
Tapidaw ngenin pai, Tapidaw ngenin pai,
Tapidaw ngenin pai, Na pukkha ding.
Tapidaw lam-en in nopna ngah ding,
Khawlmun tun ciang dahna natna bei ding;
“Na Topa tawh lungdam, nuamsa khawm in,”
Cihna za ding, Thukhenpa kam panin.
Tapidaw lam-en in, Tapidaw lam-en in,
Tapidaw lam-en in, Nopna ngah ding.
Paakte a palhna mun, tuidam a luanna mun,
Mualkuamah hong gum Topa tawh ka pai ding hi;
Ama hong paiihna tengah ka zuizui ding hi,
Zawhna lukhu ngah dong ka zuizui ding hi.
Sakkik
Ka zui ding hi! Jesuh ka zui ding hi,
Gamlapi gam khempeuh ke’n ka zui ding hi!
Ka zui ding hi! Jesuh ka zui ding h i,
Hong makaihna mun tengah ka zui ding hi.
Huihpi a nung a tuipi nakpi a luanna,
Mual kuamah hong gum Topa tawh ka pai dinga;
Amah in ka khut hong let ciangin ka lau kei ding,
Topa in hong nai laitak ka lau thei kei.
Guam thukpi ahi a, keen sang dawn ahi zong,
Hong hon Topa tawh ka om khawm dinga tawp dong;
Ama totsa lampi tawnin kei hong ciahpih ding,
Pasian’ mual tung kikhopna hong tunpih ding.
Hong musak in, Nangma thuman,
Keima a ding Na koihsate;
Ka khut sungah hong pia in, Nangmah’n
Hong khahkhia thei kol sutnate;
Nangma deihna muh theih nading,
Kong ngak hi, Topa Pasian aw,
Hong musak in, hong vaak sak in,
Kha Siangtho aw.
Hong zasak in, Nangma thuman,
Teltak a n ginsak thute;
Tua hileh thu tampi ka zak hang,
Lengmang ding hi aman lote;
Nangma deihna tel theih nading,
Kong ngak hi, Topa Pasian aw,
Hong zasak in, hong vaak sak in,
Kha Siangtho aw.
Hong zasak in, Nangma thuman,
Mun khempeuh ah lungdam takin;
Ka lungsim hong puahsak, honsak ta’n,
Nangma mite ka it na’ngin;
Nangma deihna hih theih nading,
Kong ngak hi, Topa Pasian aw,
Ka lungsim sung hong vaak sak in,
Kha Siangtho aw.

songs.title: A NAI, A GAMLA LOTE AH

lines: A nai, a gamla lote ah,
Ante min khin zo ta hi;
Simlo zo muallo zanglo ah,
Anvuite min zo ta hi.
Sakkik
Topa aw kote hong thumna,
Hong ngai in an nei Topa;
An la ding mi hong kuansak in,
An lak hun a khen ma in.
Zingsang phalvak tung ahi zong,
Sun kim ciang a hi zongin;
Hong kuan sak lai in nitak zong,
Lo laiteng ankhawm dingin.
Kuan meng un, Topa’ sawltakte,
An vuite kuaizo ta hi;
An kaikhawm khin,
ni hong tum teh,
lung damin na ciah ding hi.

songs.title: Sem un! Khua hong mial ding hi

lines: Sem un! Khua hong mial ding hi,
Zingsang tung in sem un;
Zing dai nom lai in sem un,
Khuatung lai sem un;
Vai ham-san ciang zong sem un,
Ni- sa sung zong sem un;
Mihing na sep ki zawh hun,
Zan hong tung ding hi.
Sem un! Khua hong mial ding hi,
Sun ni tan lai sem un;
Khauvak lai teng hahkat un,
Om ding hi khawl hun;
A hun bei kong sak kei un,
Na manpha khat sem un;
Mihing na sep nawn loh hun,
Zan hong tung ding hi.
Sem un! Khua hong mial ding hi,
Ni kai ciang zong sem un;
Ni vang kimuh lai sem un;
Ni’n hong kheng ding tu’n;
Hong taan kik nawn loh ding hun;
Nitum siang dong sem un;
Khuamial kuan in zong sem un,
Tawp hong hun ding hi.
“Hong mangngilh kei ning”
Cih thuciam muan huai hi
Bangmah in kei hong susia zolo ding hi
Sihna limkuam sung
Zan khua a mial zong in
Tua sihna kuam gal ah
Ni tangtawn tung hi
Sakkik
Hongmangngilh in (Nang hong mangngilh kei ning)
Hong nusia kei ning (Hong nusia kei ning)
Ka khut in hong len ning
Ka ang ah hong pom ning;
Hongmangngilh in (Nang hong mangngilh kei ning)
Hong nusia kei ning (Hong nusia kei ning)
Nang hong Tanpa ka hi, Kong kem den ding hi
Jesuh hong it na le hong cin hong kep na
Ka lungdam na
A ma’ kiang bang ci lah ding
Midang te tung gen ning
A ma hong tat na
A thuciam te muang in
A zuih theih na ding
“Hong mangngilh kei ning”
Cih thuciam na muang in
Lungdam na la sa in
Mainawt in pai ning
Lawm te’n hong tai san
Mi’n hong simmawh zong in
Jesu’n hong ompih ding
Hong lungdam sak ding
Kham kongpi kiang ah
Kei ka din’ ni ciang inKa thuakna,
Ka dahna khempeuh veng ta ding
“Pha hi” a diktat nasempa hong lut in
Hong cih ka zak ciang in
Angtang mah si ning
I Topa Pasian muangin,
Mainawt un! Mainawt un!
Hong ciamna kammal muangin, Mainawt un!
A minthang na nial ngei ke’n,
Hi kei leh na maizum ding;
A minthanna kizelh dong, Mainawt un!
Amah’n lo lai hong sam zo,
Mainawt un! Mainawt un!
Zan hong tung ding tu’n um in, Mainawt un!
Upna, itna, biakna sung,
Ama hatna tha suang ding,
Khotak i ding tawntung ding, Mainawt un!
Kham khaici hong pia zo hi,
Mainawt un! Mainawt un!
Vawh in, na atkik ding hi, Mainawt un!
Na Topa’ lam na sialin,
Ngakna ding le khawl nading;
Minthan ni dong hong kha ding Mainawt un!
A beina hong naizo hi,
Mainawt un! Mainawt un!
Zahtakna tawh nasem un, Mainawt un!
Na neih lianbel Jesuh hi,
Lam tawntung hong vak ding hi;
Minthan ni dong hong kha ding, Mainawt un!
Tumahmah-in kipan in,
Mainawt un! Mainawt un!
Na vaite a mah ko in, Mainawt un!
Ama lungsim vom inla,
Ama deih bangin gamta;
Amah lenkip tawntung in, Mainawt un!
Mawhna’ zol zui kei in, Nazuih leh khial ding;
Khat vei zo phot lecin, A zom zawhnop ding;
Pasal nakpi’n do in, Lung gulhna meilpi;
Jesuh en gige in, Hong zawh pih hi.
Hong huh na ding thungen in,
Tha hong pia hong kem ding hi;
Hong huh nuam hi topa in,
A hong zawhpih ding hi.
Kholh pih gi lo peel in, kam hoih lo zang ke’n;
Pasian’ min zahtak in,
A mawkna’n zang ke’n;
Thu khualin, citak in,
Thu manin migi;
Jesuh en gige in, Hong zawhpih ding hi.
Hong huh na ding thungen in,
Tha hong pia hong kem ding hi;
Hong huh nuam hi topa in,
A hong zawhpih ding hi.
A zote Pasian in, Kham lukhu pia ding;
I pukkhak zel hangin, Upna tawh zo ding;
Eite hong Honpa in, Tha hong gua’n ding hi;
Jesuh en gige in, Hong zawhpih ding hi.
Hong huh na ding thungen in,
Tha hong pia hong kem ding hi;
Hong huh nuam hi topa in,
A hong zawhpih ding hi.
Launa namkim omna mualkuam thuk sung ahi zong,
Lungnuam a ka omna ni tang khuavak sung hizong;
Khuasia khuapha taleh, thuhoih khat ken thei ing,
Jesuh tawh ton peuh leng, koima peuh pai ning.
Sakkik
Jesuh tawh ton leng mun khempeuh ka pai ding,
Ama omna peuh vantung hipah ding, kei ka om ding;
A singlamteh ke’n ka pua ding, ka hampha ding
Jesuh tawh ton leng, mun khempeuh ka pai ding.
Sehnel nisa kanin mawhna, gal le sa lakah,
Nuntak thupha puakin ka pai ding phamawh hi-a;
Ka mel bangbang pua-in tua munah ka pai ding,
Jesuh tawh ton peuh leng koima peuh pai ning.
Midangte’n tuipi gal kanin a sep laitakin,
Kei puak ding singlamteh tual sung teng ahi zongin;
A thupiakna mangin upna kipin om ning,
Kei hong ompihna koi ma peuhah om ning.
Ka Topa’ thupiakna ke’n ka nial ding hilo hi,
Hong hilhna kammalte ke’n ka zuih ding hizaw hi;
Inn ah omzaw ding maw khual gamla paizaw ding,
Honpa tawh hi peuh leng koi peuh lungkim ing.
Aw lawmte aw, dial pei en un, vantunga a khai;
Hong huh ding Mangpa hong kuan ding
I zawhna a nai!
Sakkik
Galdo-in tu’n ka hong pai ding!
Jesuh’n dial hong lak;
A thupha tawh om tawntung ning,
Dial na lakkik sak.
En un gal tampi hong pai, Satan hong masa;
Thahatte kim khat sizo a, hanna bei dekta
A vanglian dial pei kimu hi,
Peengkul aw kiza;
Hong uk Mangpa a minpha tawh
Galte ka zo ta.
Galkapna sawtvei haksa a, huhna hong nai hi;
Hong uk Mangpa hong pai laitak,
Lungdam khin un, ci.
Galvan a tawi kiptak a ding ka hi-a,
Kumpipa thupiak ngakin ka om hi;
“Kuan un” cihna aw hon ggin ciangin ah,
Galkap mangpa kiang pan gal ka do ding hi.
Sakkik
“Kuan un” cih kikona aw ngai dih in;
En in! a zawngkhal mite lungkia hi;
Topa’ galvan tawipa ka hih ciangin,
Galkap mangpa in kei hong muang ding hi;
Topa’ galvan tawipa ka hih iangin,
Galkap mangpa in kei hong muang ding hi.
Galvan a tawi galsim ding kuan ka hi a,
Lum le tei galvan khempeuh ka keng hi;
“Do un” ci-in hong kiko ciangin ah,
“Hiah om ing hong sawl in” ci’n ka dawng ding hi.
Galvan a tawi thaman sang ding ka hi a,
Vanglian kumpi lukhu ka ngah ding hi;
Galdona phatakpi’n ka do dinga,
Nuamna thaman lian kei hong sangsak ding hi.

songs.title: Ding Un, Ding Un, Jesuh’ Mi

lines: Ding un, Ding un Jesuh’ mi, Singlamteh galkap te
A kumpi dial saang khan un, lelhna thuak sak lo e!
Gal khat khit khat a ban in, Amah’n hong zawh pih ding
Gal kheempeuh zawh khit ciang in, Khazih Topa’n maang ding
Ding un, Ding un Jesuh’ mi, Mang un, peengkul sawlna
Galpi phual-ah va kuan un, tuni Topa’ ni pha
Pasal kisa teng kuan un, Galte a tam hang in
Tha leh tha kisi sak un, hang seem un lau ciangin
Ding un, ding un, Jesuh’ mi, Ama tha bek suang un;
Mihing tha’n hong lelsak ding, Nomau tha muang kei un.
Pasian thu galvan bangin, silh-in vilin, thungen;
Gal le sep ding ding om ciangin, a baihsa’n omkhial ke’n
Ding un, ding un, Jesuh’ mi, Gal bei hak nawnlo ding,
Tu’n galkap na ding zing ciang, galzawhna la ging ding.
Azote khempeuh in-ah, nuntak luhu ngah ding;
Vanglian, Kumpipa kiangah, a tawntung mangkhawm ding.
Min thanna tawh Topa hong paina, Ka mit in mu khin zo
Amah in hehna leenggah kikoihna lo tuan cil khinzo
Kihtak huai a zap tel khua phelep
Anam sau khah khin zo, I Pasian mainawt hi
Sakkik
Min thang, min thang, Hallelujah!
Min thang, min thang, Hallelujah!
Min thang, min thang, Hallelujah!
I Pasian mai nawt hi
Giahphual za khat kiim a mei taang ah
Amah mu khin ing
Nitak dai nom lak ah biakna tau lam uh Ama aa ding
A ma thu khenna maan te mei taang kiaukiau ah sim thei ing
I Pasian mai nawt hi
Nungkik ding a, sam ngei lo ding peengkul Amah’n mut hi
A thu khen na tokhom maiah mi hing te lungsim sit hi
Ka kha aw, amah dawng meng in! nuam in, ka khe!
Nuam huai hi I Pasian mai nawt hi
Tuipi gal khat, unok paak hoih lakah Khazih suak khin hi.
Nang le kei hong kikheel sak A ang sung
minthan’na tawi hi.
Mite siangsak ding hong sih bangin,
mi’ suahtak nang si ni. Pasian mai nawt lai hi
Galdona awng un, gal naizo en un!
Topa dialkhai un sang takin;
Galdal silh unla, kiptak ding unla,
Lai Siangtho’ hilhna, na siksan un.
Sakkik
Khai leh, ding un, dial kim hong kikhawm un,
Limtak, kiging, na kihilh sawn un;
Kuan un! Mainawt, Hosana kiko un,
Khris in hong makaih hi galkap hon.
Eima lammah in zo ding thei khol in,
Galte ngap thawh-in i kuan hi;
I lum le i dial ni ah tezialzial,
Thuman in thukhual lel ngeilo hi.
Mi khempeuh Pasian hehpihna hong pia’n,
Ko a neu a lian hong huh in;
Galzawh cianginah Nangma maitang ah,
Hong suak nung zawhna lukhu khu in.

songs.title: I LUNG NUAM HI, JESUH MUANG LENG

lines: I lung nuam hi Jesuh muang leng
A ma hong gen bang um leng
A ma hong thu ciam na muang leng
Topa’ hong cih na thei leng
Sakkik
Jesuh Jesuh ke’n ka muang hi
A muan huai na thei zo ing
Jesuh Jesuh man pha Jesuh
A mah muang sem sem nuam ing
I lung nuam hi Jesuh muang leng
Hong sap na a Si muang leng
Hong dam hong siang sak thei A’ Si
Sung ah upna tawh bual leng
I lung nuam hi Jesuh muang leng
Mawh na pum pi nu sia leng
Nun tak lung nop tawl dam nuam na
Jesuh khut tung pan saang leng
Jesuh kong muan’ theih ka nuam hi
A manpha Lawmpa Na hi
Hong honpa aw a tawp dong in
Nong om pih ding ka thei hi
Topa’ lam kua pang nuam? Ana kua’n sem ding?
Kua in Amah huh nuam? Midang kua’n puak ding?
Leitung na nusia in, Galdo lo ding maw?
Topa lamah pangin, galsim lo ding maw?
Itna tawh hong sapna, hong hehpihna hi,
“Nang aa hi ung, Topa kong panpih uh hi.”
Galkap kong tum uh a, galla sa ung, ko;
Minthan nop man hilo, lukhu deih hilo;
Jesuh itna hang hi, Ama panpih ding;
Jesuh’ mite peuhmah, Ama lam pang ding;
Itna tawh hong khih a, hong hehpihna hi,
“Nang aa hi ung, Topa kong panpih uh hi.”
Jesuh aw, nong leizo, sum le paai lo-in;
Na si in nong lei zo, Na minthan na’ngin,
Na kiang hong zuante in, Na thupha ngahzo;
Kote hong lawpsak a, Nong suakta sakzo;
Nong tatkhiatna lian a, Nong hehpihna hi,
“Nang aa hi ung, Topa kong panpih uh hi.”

songs.title: Jesuh Aw, Singlamteh Kisuan Khin Ta’ng

lines: Jesuh aw, Nang hong zui dingin, Singlamteh kisuan khinta’ng;
Nangma aa bek hi den dingin, simmawh muhdah thuak khinta’ng.
Ka tup, ka deih ka zonsa teng, A vekpi’n beikhinta hi;
Ahih hang ngaihsun phakik leng, Pasian na ngawn kei aa hi.
Mi’n hong simmawh, hong nusia-in, Honpa nangawn taisan hi;
Mi khempeuh ahoih bangkhemin, Nang tua bang na hi kei h i.
Itna Pasian Nangmah kong zong, Nong maitaina, kei nuamna;
Tual le galin hong taisan zong, Nong et bek zong kei nuamna.
Midangte’ hong bawlsiatna in, Na ang hong tun zawsop hi;
Leitung nuntak haksatna in, Vantung nopna hong tun hi.
Kei Na hong it lai tengin ah, Dahnate siatna’ng hilo;
Nang kihello lungdamna ah, lungnop kicing om thei lo.
Upna lum tawi, thungeninah, hehpihna tawh minthang ding;
Ka mai-a vantung nopna ah, Pasian khut in hong kha ding.
Leitung nasep bei baih dinga, Ka khualzinna bei ding hi;
Ka lam-etna tak suak dinga, Upna kimu thei ding hi.
Ka hun Na khut sungah, Topa kong ap khin hi;
Ka lawmte le ka pum ka kha, Topa kong ap khin hi.
Ka hun Na khut sungah, Nang deihna bang hihen;
Khuamial khuavak nopna dahna, Nang hoihsak bang hihen.
Ka hun Na khut sungah, patauh na’ng om ding hiam?
Ka pa’n a mawkna-in Ata, khitui a luangsak diam?
Ka hun Na khut sungah, kong ap tawntung ding hi;
Ka sih khit ciang na tak lamah, ka om tawntung ding hi.
Hong it zaw ning,Topa,
Hong it zaw ning;
Khukdin a kong thumna,
Nang hong ngai ding;
Hih bang hi kong thumna,
Khazih, hong it zaw ning;
Hong it zaw ning, Hong it zaw ning.
Nidang leitung nopna, Ka lung gulhpen;
Tu in kong deih Nangmah,
A hoih pha pen;
Tu in kong deih Nangmah,
Khazih hong it zaw ning,
Hong itzaw ning, hong it zaw ning.
Dahna natna thuak hang,
Pha mawh salo; Nangma sawltakte bang,
La ka sa zo; Kasa khawm a mau bang,
Khazih, hong it zaw ning;
Hong it zaw ning, hong it zaw ning.
Kasih laitak inah, Nang kong phat ding;
Ka hutawp na inah,
Ka vai khak ding; Ka ngen lailai hih mah,
Khazih, hong it zaw ning;
Hong it zaw ning, hong it zaw ning.
Siantho na’ng hun zang in, thungen zelzel in;
Ama sungah om in, Athu’n kivaak in
Pasian’ Tate pawl in, A nangte huh in;
Na khat na hih ciangin Dong khial ngai kei in;
Siantho na’ng hun zang in, mi a kin zongin;
Jesuh bek tawh om in, Hun tampi zangin.
Amah na sut na’ng in, etteh tawntung in;
Ama lim langsak in, Nang’ tatna pan in.
Siantho na’ng hun zang in, Hong pina zui in;
A mai-ah tai kei in, bang a ci zongin.
Na nuam na dah zong in, Topa mah zui in;
Jesuh en tawntung in, Ama thu muang in.
Siantho na’ng hun zang in, lung hi di-de in;
Ngaihsut a namkim in, Amah uk sak in.
Kha Siangtho tua bang in, kikai sak le cin;
Vantung na sem ding in, siam ding sawt lo in.
Thungetna in lungsim sunga, lunggulh takna ahi;
Mei bang hong lumsak awm sunga, deihna lian pen ahi.
Khasiatna, khitui luanna zong, thungetna mah ahi;
Pasian’ lam-et tohna bek zong, thungetna mah ahi.
Mawhnei mi khat lungsim tak tawh, kisikin thuum peuh leh;
Vantung mite’n nuamin kiko, “En aw, thungen taveh”
Thuzui ta ding thungetna in, hinna hu bang ahi;
Thungetna tawh sih kong panin, vantung khua ah lut hi.
Nangmah hinna thuman lampi, pa kiang tunna dingin;
Nangma totsa thunget lampi, kote zong hong hilh in.

songs.title: Nang Tawh Nai Zaw Nuam Ing

lines: Nang tawh nai zaw nuam ing, Ka Pasian aw
Singlamteh thuak ta leng, Hong domto aw
Thuak hang ka sasa ding, Nang tawh nai zaw nuam ing
Nang tawh nai zaw nuam ing, Ka Pasian aw
Jakob bang ka vak aa, Ni tum ta hang
Khuamial a suang tum bek, Ka lu kham hang
Ka mang hong nai nuam ing, Nang tawh nai zaw nuam ing
Nang tawh nai zaw nuam ing, Ka Pasian aw
Na mai ah hong lak in, Vantung lampi
Nong ngah sak kheempeuh te, Hehpihna hi
Vantung mi hong sam ding, Nang tawh nai zaw nuam ing
Nang tawh nai zaw nuam ing, Ka Pasian aw
Nang ma minphatna tawh, Ka khang lo ding
Ka dahna teng Pasian Phat na’n nei ning
Tua bangin dahna hang, Nang tawh nai zaw nuam ing
Nang tawh kinai zawh na’ng, Ka Pasian aw
Hong paisan ke’n migi Topa,
Kong thum hong ngai in;
Midangte’ kiang na baan bang mah,
Kei hong kheng kei in.
Sakkik
Topa, Topa, Kong thum hong ngai in;
Midang te’ kiang Na baan bang mah,
Kei hong kheng kei in.
Hehpihna Na tokhom mai ah,
Kisik kong khukdin,
Nang hong huh in,
Ka up lah na,
Nop tuam hong pia in.
Nang mah phatna bek ka suang hi,
Na mai muh na ding;
Na thupha tawh nong phel ding hi,
Lungzan dam na ding.
Ka nuamna teng bulpi Nang mah,
Hin na sang pha zaw;
Leitung, vantung omlo kua mah,
Nang sang a pha zaw.
Thupha guah bang hong zuk ka za, Nang nong piak hi, Topa aw;
Keigaw tak gam hing kiksak ta, Kei tung zong hong zusak aw.
Kei tung zong, kei tung zong, Kei tung zong hong zusak aw.
Mawhna tawh ka kidim zongin, Hong paisan ke’n Topa aw;
Nusiat mi ka hi zongin,
Keimah hong hehpih lai aw.
Kei mah zong, kei mah zong,
Kei zong hong hehpih lai aw.
Hong kheng kei in maw, ka Honpa, Nang hong itsak beelsak in;
Nong angvan ding ka lunggulh ta, Topa aw, kei hong sam in.
Kei mah zong, Kei mah zong, Topa aw, kei hong sam in.
Hong kheng kei in, Kha Siangtho aw,
Mittaw khua na musak khin;
Jesuh’ hoihna lakkhiapa aw,
Kei zong thupha hong pia in.
Kei mah zong, kei mah zong,
Kei zong thupha hong pia in.
Pasian’ itna kipin siangtho, Jesuh’ sisan manpha pen;
Pasian’ hehpihna’n mong nei lo, Kei sung hong kilang tahen.
Kei mah zong, kei mah zong,
Kei sung hong kilang tahen.
A mangthangte Na khop laitak, Na ang sungah hong pom in;
Nuntakna tui a phul laitak, Kei zong thupha hong pia in.
Kei mah zong, kei mah zong,
Kei tung thupha hong pia in.
Jesuh hong ngakna mun huan sung khat om,
Tua in a lamdang mun hoih khat hi;
A vangliatna khuavakpi a taang hi,
Ahoih huan sung thungetna mun-ah.
Sakkik
Aw, a hoih huan sung, Huan sung thungetna ahi,
Aw, a hoih huan sung thungetna hi;
Hong Gumpa’n hong ngak a,
Kong khakpi hong honsak,
Ahoih huan sung thungetna mun-ah.
Jesuh hong ngakna mun huan sung khat om,
Vangik pua kawmin Amah ka zuan;
A kam sung pan hehnepna aw ka za,
Ahoih huan sung thungetna mun-ah.
Jesuh hong ngakna mun huan sung khat om,
Amah tawh kimu dingin hong sam;
Topa tawh kimu, kiho khawm dingin,
Ahoih huan sung thungetna mun-ah.
I mawhna leh i dahna teng
A pua ding Jesuh i lawm
Pasian kiangah i sapna teng
Thum theihna thupha a om
Lungnopna tampi ih taan aa,
Thuakloh ding pi i thuak hi
Na khempeuhte Pasian kiangah
Thum in i kohloh hang hi..
Ze-et bawlsiat ahi zongin
Lungkhamna khatpeuh om maw.
Cikmah ciang lungkia ngeilo in
Topa kiangah ko in aw.
Dahteng thuakpih nuam Jesuh bang
lawm man dang mu zo ding maw
Jesuh’n thei khin ih sap bangbang
Ama kiangah ko in aw.
Lungkhamna vangik bang lel in
Zawngkhal in na thanem maw.
Manpha Honpa ih belh hi-in
Ama kiang thungen in aw.
Mi’n hong simmawh hong huat ciangin.
Jesuh kiang ih pai ding hi.
A ang sung hong pom hong daal in
Lung nopna hong pia ding hi.
Vantung ah hong zol Honpa khat ka nei a,
Hong it lawm a tawm hang, Amah’n hong it hi;
Tu’n zong ka Topa’n limtakin kei hong cing a,
Nang a ding zong Honpa hi leh ka ut hi.
Sakkik
Nang ading thu ka ngen, Nang ading thu ka ngen;
Nang ading thu ka ngen, Nang ading thu ka ngen.
Vantungah Pa khat ke’n ka nei khinta a,
Tawntung nopna thupha hong lam-ensak hi;
Van ah Amah dawn dingin hong sampah dinga,
Ka tonpih ding nang hong sam leh ka ut hi.
Ka ngah ding a lamdang puanpak khat om a,
Ka muhkhopna vantungah kei hong ngak hi;
Tua puanpak ka silh ciangin, tee daldal ding a,
Lawm aw, nang zong na silh ding kong deihsak hi.
Tui lipi bang nopna kicing ka nei a,
Leitung mi’n tua bang nopna nei ngeilo hi;
Hong Honpa bek in tua bang nopna pia thei a,
Nang zong hong kipia hiam cih ka thei nuam hi.

songs.title: NANG KONG DEIH TAWN TUNG HI

lines: Nang kong deih tawntung hi, migi ka To,
lungnop na hong pia thei a dang om lo,
Sakkik
Kong deih hi, Nang kong deih hi,
Nang kong deih tawntung hi,
Thupha hong pia’n Topa aw,
Nang kong zuan hi.
Nang kong deih tawntung hi,
Nai tak kei kiang, ze-et na in hong zo lo,
Nang nong nai ciang
Nang kong deih tawntung hi,
Nuam leng dah leng,
Nuntak na’n man nei kei,
Nang hong tan leng,
Nang kong deih tawntung hi,
Hong thu hilh in,
Nong khapsa a pha te hong ngah sak in.
Nang kong deih tawntung hi,
Sang pen pa aw,
Nang a tak hong hi ning, Tapa pha aw,
Hinna tawntung Topa Pasian,
Lawmte sang ka it zaw hi.
Vantung lam ka zon laitak ah,
Topa tawh ka tawn nuam hi.
Nang kiangah, Nang kiangah,
Nang kiangah, Nang kiangah
Vantung lam ka zon laitak ah,
Topa tawh ka tawn nuam hi.
Leitungah hauhna leh nuamna
Minthang thu ka ngen kei hi.
Nangma kiang ka om laitak ah
Lungdam in ka sem ding hi.
Nang kiangah, Nang kiangah,
Nang kiangah, Nang kiangah,
Nangma kiang ka om laitak ah
Lungdam in ka sem ding hi.
Mualkuam khuamialna sung hi hang,
Tuipi gal ah hong kha in,
Hin tawntungna kongpi sungah
Nangmah tawh hong lut sakin.
Nang kiangah, Nang kiangah,
Nang kiangah, Nang kiangah,
Hin tawntungna kongpi sungah
Nangmah tawh hong lut sakin.
Ka Topa aw, Nangma kiangah, lampi haksa paikhawm lai-ah;
Hong cisak thei in, “Na deihna bang hi tahen!”
Sakkik
Nangma deihna bang hi tahen!
Hong cisak thei in, “Na deihna bang hi tahen!”
Dahna ka thuak lawmte sita, hih hang na thu ngaihsun lai-ah;
Hih bang gen ding hi’ng, “Na deihna bang hi tahen!”
Na Kha Siangtho in keima kha, na awi bang gamta dingin-ah;
Hih bang gen ding hi’ng, “Na deihna bang hi tahen!”
Nisimin hong puahpha inla, na awi bang gamta ding inah;
Gen ding hong huh in, “Na deihna bang hi tahen!”
Leitungah keima nuntakna, bei a vantung tun ciangin-ah;
Hih bang gen ding hi’ng, “Na deihna bang hi tahen!”
Topa bek hong phel thei hi,
Keimah in-ah, Na kiang ka beel hi,
Na sipha tawh hong sawpin,
Na kiang hong omsak tawntung in.
Sakkik
Ni simin (simin), nai simin (simin),
Sipha thanna thei sak in;
Hehpih a, Nong itna tawh,
Khaubang in-ah keimah hong hen in.
A kisia thei leitungah,
Damtak in keimah lam hong hilh ta;
Topa bek i up ciangin,
Cikmah hunin lam khial nawn lo ding.
Sih ding hun hong tun mateng,
Vantung innpi nuam sung tun mateng,
Nang kong upna khang sakin,
Topa tawh kikhen nawn lo dingin.
Topa aw, hong ngai in, Na kiang kong nai hi;
Ka leiba loh dingin, Nang Na sizo hi.
Na minpha tawh mawhphelna,
Nang kong up ciang ka ngah hi;
Topa hong beel dingin, Na kiang kong nai hi.
Topa aw, hong ngai in, Hehpihna kong ngen;
Thupha tawh hong hon in, launa beisak in.
Na thuciamna ka muang hi, Na thupha bel ka um hi;
Ka Honpa Pasian aw, hehpihna kong ngen.
Topa aw, hong it in, Nang hong tangkhin in;
Keimah bek leitungah, hong paisak kei i n.
Kei ma lam hong tangsak in, Na minthang ka kimkot ah;
Nang ading taangsak in, Ka belh Suangpi aw.
Topa aw, hong liah in, Na kiang hong koih in;
Na nasep ka zawh dong, Lampi hong hilh in.
Tua ciangin lungdamna la, ka sa ding hi, vantungah;
Topa aw, tua munah, om tawntung nuam ing.
Thunget hun nuam, thunget hun nuam:
Lungkhamna pan hong sam khia a,
Ka deih ka sap na a tuamtuam,
Ka gen theih hun ka Pa mai ah,
Dahna hong tun ciang thungen leng ka lung sim hong nuam sak a;
Mawh na’n hong zol ciang thungen leng,
Dawimangpa’ thang pan ka suak ta.
Thunget hun nuam, thunget hun nuam;
Va len pih in keima thumna,
Kei ma khathu pha apia nuam,
Thuman a dik Pasian kiangah,
Keima mai-ah um in muangin,
Hong pai in, hong cih khit nung sang;
Thunget hun nuam hong tun sim in,
Lungkhamna teng Amah suan tang.
Thunget hun nuam, thunget hun nuam;
Kei lungsim hong hehnem lai in,
Pasian hong ciam Kanaan gam nuam,
Luah ding ka len toh ma tengin,
Hih ka pumpi puan bang suah a,
Sang dingin tul ngei lo noptuam;
Ka len toh ciang kha ning mangpha,
Thunget hun nuam thunget hun nuam.
Thungetna hunpha hi-a, lungsim i niamkhiat ciang,
I lawm le Honpa Jesuh kiang i kikhop ciang;
Amah umin va zuan leng, Amah’n ei hong hupah,
Tua lai-ah va kihel leng, damna zatui hipah.
Sakkik
Thungetna hun nuam, Hun nuam thungetna;
Tua lai-ah va kihel leng, damna zatui hipah.
Thungetna hunpha hi-a, Honpa A hong nai ciang,
A mite lainatna tawh don ding hong pai ciang;
I haksatnate khempeuh, I va puak ciang inah,
Tua lai-ah va kihel leng, damna zatui hipah.
Thungetna hunpha hi-a, ze-etna i thuak ciang,
Honpa kiangah i dahna khempeuh i puak ciang;
Amah in hong khasiat in, i dahna paikhia pah,
Tua lai-ah va kihel leng, damna zatui hipah.
Thungetna hunpha hi-a, i up takpi nak leh,
I thunget thuphate peel lo kingah ding hiveh;
Tua thuphate hanginah, lungkhamna teng beipah,
Tua lai-ah va kihel leng, damna zatui hipah.
Lunggim mi aw, inn nuam om hi,
Lungkhamna, gimnate gal-ah;
Kikhel ngei lohna innpi,
Kua tung nuam lo ding tua lai-ah.
Sakkik
Ngak in (ngakngak in), thuakin thum loin ngakin,
Ngak in (ngakngak in),thuak in thum loin ngak in,
Ngak in (ngakngak in), ngak in (ngakngak in),Thum loin-ah ngak in.
Leitung a na thuak ding a hi,
Vangik lel a na kun hang in,
En in, na tun nading innpi,
Ngak in, lungnem in-ah nggak in,
Na lam pi ah ling a om leh,
A lutung a khu pa phawkin,
Lunggim na, dahna na tuah leh,
Nangsang siangzaw pa’n zongthuak khin.
Sem in, na thuakna na thumna,
Hong zak loh khat beek om lo hi,
Na ngah nading hi, tawldamna,
Lungnem takin ngak ding hi.
Sum haupa a innpha bel kongkhak kiangah,
Topa Pasian ta khat atu hi;
Leitungah gimna, tawlna khempeuh a ngah,
A sih khit ciang a nuam bel ngah hi.
Sakkik
A nopna sungah vantung mite’n paipih,
Vankim lai-ah lasa aw dim hi,
Vantung inn nuam sungah Topa in la hi,
A itte tawh nopna a ngah hi.
Gimna bei-in si leng, bang i piang ding hiam?
Eimah in sin sungah ngaihsun ni;
Leitungah nuntakna vangik pua bang hi,
Dahna khitui luannate om hi.
Jesuh nungzuite in sum a tawm hangin,
Vantung khua-ah om sum lamdang hi;
Ze-et bawlsiatna teng i paisan ding hi,
Nungciang kikhel ding lungdamna hi.
Topa ading hanciamin mainawt ciat ni,
I hun, i siamna i zangkhin ding;
Nasepna a tawm hang za ngahna lian hi,
Singlamteh pua kham lukhu khu ding.
Gupkhiatna ngah ding Pasian in thu hong ciamzo,
Ama Topa Jesuh min a um khempeuhte.
Sakkik
Hallelujah! Khinzo, Tapa min ka um zo;
Ama sisan in kei hong gumkhia khinzo ta!
Hallelujah! Khinzo; Tapa min ka umzo;
Ama sisan in kei hong gumkhia khinzo ta.
Tua l amp gam dai-in a lauhuai hangin ah,
Topa Jesuh in kei hong paipih zo ding hi.
Ka it ka ngaih tampi vantung gam sung tungzo,
Lungmuang tak tua gamah hih lapi sa uh hi.
Naupang note Ama kiangah ding uh ka mu,
Gupkhiatna la sa uh Amah na nui hiuhiau.
Kikhopna sung kumpite kamsangte ka mu,
Kham kongzing lampite zui-in lasa uh hi.
Nang le kei adingin tua lai-ah la om hi,
A tawntung tua lai-ah i phat tawntung ding hi.

songs.title: Topa Jesuh Nang Kong Muang Hi

lines: Topa Jesuh, Nang hong muang ing,
Nang bek kong muang hi;
Gupna ngah na’ng, Nang hong muang ing,
Kong muang hi.
Sakkik
Ke’n hong muang ing,
Nang bek kong muang hi;
Ke’n hong muang ing, muang ing,
Nang bek kong muang hi.
Mawh mai nading, Nang hong muang ing,
Na mai kong kun hi;
Na hehpihna le na thupha, kong muang hi.
Thahatna ding, Nang hong muang ing,
Na lel ngei kei hi;
Kei nong piak na kamciamte in, gualzo hi.
Topa Jesuh, Nang hong muang ing,
Hong puksak ngei ke’n;
Vai khempeuh ah Nang hong muang ing,
Tawntung in.
Hong sawp siang ding, Nang hong muang ing,
Sisan gunpi sung;
Na si tawh hong silsiang sak dingin,
Kong muang hi.
Keima ka muanna a bulpi,
Jesuh si le siantho na hi;
A dang thu teng ka um ngam kei,
Jesuh a min bek ka um thei.
Sakkik
Keima dinna Jesuh Suangpi,
Omna dang teng sehnel bang hi.
Omna dang teng sehnel bang hi.
Khuamial in a mai liah ciangin,
A hong hehpihna ka muang ding;
Huihpi nakpi a nunciang ah,
Munliahna sungah sikkip khia.
A thuciamna le Ama si,
Tuipi kanlai ka muang ding hi;
Ka kiimkot teng a siat ciangah,
Ka muanna in Jesuh Topa.
Pengkul aw tawh hong pai ciangin,
A ma mai ah ka ding nuam hi;
A hong siangtho sak khit ciangin,
Mawhnei loin ka om ding hi.
Topa thuciamna pha muang tak in om ning,
A tawn tungin hong gum Topa vaang um ning
A min thang hi ci in ah ka ki ko hi
A thu ciam na pha ka muang ding hi.
Sakkik
Muang in (a thuciamna pha muang ning),
Om ning (a thuciamna pha muang ning,
Hong gum Topa Pasian thu ciamna pha muang ning
Muang in (a thuciamna pha muang ning),
Om ning (a thuciamna pha muang ning),
Hong gum Topa Pasian thuciam muang ning
A sia thei lo Topa thu ciamna ka muang,
Up khialh man a launa huih bang hong nun’hang
Nun tak na’ng a a thupha bel tawh zawh na’ng
A thuciamna pha ka muang ding hi
Tu in a thu ciam na muang in ka om hi
A si pha tawh hong sawp leh ka siang ding hi
Mawhna sung pan suah tak ding thu ka ngah hi
A thu ciam na pha ka muang ding hi
Topa Jesuh na thu ciam na ka muang hi
A thupha tawh khau bang in hong hen ding hi
Kha singtho tawh dawi mangpa ka zo ding hi
A thuciam na pha ka muang ding hi
Aw Topa Jesuh kei lungsim
Na thu ka um man a
Sawtpi ka zong a nopna in
Lungdamna ka ngah ta
Sakkik
Tuni Jesuh sim loh inah
Deih na dang om lo pi
Itna hinna tawntung nopna
Topa kiang ka ngah hi
Lungdam na ka zon lai tak in
Topa ka mangngilh hi
Hong gum Topa ka nial ciang in
Hong it a hong zol hi
Leitung aa nop na te deih in
Lungkim ngah ding in ah
Hah kat in a ka zon hangin
Lung kiatna teng ka ngah
Jesuh hong it thupha inah
Keimah ka ngah ma in
Si thei nopna lungsim neih hang
Topa ka ngaihsun ke’n
Topa thu kiciamna thei a
Up khialhna kipia ding hi.
Lung kiatna thuak loh nang in-ah
A thupa ka um ding hi
Sakkik
A kicing hi a thuphapi
Keimah inah ka um hi
A kicing hi a thuphapi
Keimah inah ka um hi
Kimawh sakna Jesuh inah
A sipha tawh hong sawp hi
Keimah hong siangtho sak zo ta,
Innpi ah hong kai ding hi.
Topa Jesuh hong hehpih man
kihtak launa om lo hi
Ka lampi-ah khua a mial hang,
khuavak hong tang sak ding hi.
Ka nuamna teng Jesuh ka pia
amah bek ke’n ka deih hi.
Amah in leitung teng uk a,
deihna teng A kiang om hi
Ka vekpi in Jesuh ka pia
ka lungsim ka pum kheempeuh
Ka lametna a om kheempeuh,
tawntung Ama kiang om hi.
Muang un! Thu-umte’n, muang un!
Galdona a sawt hang;
Nangma zawh theih nadingin, Nanglam Topa pang hi.
Sakkik
Muang un! Muang un! Khuamial a lauhuai hang;
Muang un! Muang un! Khua hong vak dekta hi.
Muang un! Gal a tam hangin, a lauhuai lampi ah;
Ze-etna a tam hangin, lam hong hilh ding Topa’n.
Topa’n hong gumzo ding hi, I Topa pha bel hi;
Muang un! A umte’n zo ding, I Topa phabel hi.
Singlamteh lam tawn in ka ciah kul ding hi,
Tua lo lam dang om lopi ,
Tua khuavak kong pi tungthei ngei kei ning,
Singlamteh lam ka khialh khak leh
Sakkik
Singlamteh in lam hong hilh
Singlamteh in lam hong hilh
Mailam ka pai ciang in nuam semsem ding,
Singlamteh in inn lam hong hilh.
Singlamteh phung ka van teng tolh khia khin hi,
Topa mai ka muh ciangin,
Lungtai tak tua lam dawnding kong ki pan,
Ka lung sung phat na tawh ki dim.
Si kithehna lam tawn ka ciah suak ding hi,
Topa totsa lampi mah,
Adawn dongin kei ka kah toh theih leh,
Pasian inn sung ka kha teng ding.
Singlamteh lampi Topa'n tawn masa in
kei a dingin hong si hi,
Tua lam baih tuan lo,
A ma a dingin nuntakna thak ka muhna hi.
Leitung lampi mangpha ka khak ta ding hi,
Tua lampi tawnnawn kei ning,
Topa' kongpi pan hong ciah in hong ci,
Inn lam zuan in kei ciah ta ning.
Maitang kimu ding Honpa tawh,
Bangzah nopna kicing ding;
Kei tang hong si Jesuh’ maitang,
Laktoh ni ciang ka mu ding.
Sakkik
Ka Honpa maitang ka mu ding,
Aksite kheng galkhat ah;
A vangliatna ka tel siang ding,
Nung ciang ka mu ding, Amah.
Hong liah, hong dal khat om lai a,
Ka mu cian thei nai kei hi;
Lungdamna ni hong tung dinga,
A vangliatna ka mu ding.
Ama kiang nuam mahmah dinga,
Dahna, natna beita ding;
Lam kawite kitangsak ding a,
Khuamial teng khuavak suak ding.
Maitang kimu ding nuam si’n teh,
Khat le khat kitheita ding;
Keimah hong it Topa Jesuh,
Hong Tanpa mai ka mu ding.
Jerusalem kham khuapi, bawngnawi khuaizu luanna,
Nangmah kong ngaih sutsut ciang,
Ke’n lamdang lua ka sa;
Keima ading lungdamna, tua lai tampi om hi,
Gen zawh loh minthanna teng,
Tua lai-ah kicing hi.
Zion innpi nuam sungah, bawlsiatna thuakte le,
Puanpak silh van mite in, phatna la sa khawm veh;
David Tokhom omna ah, gimna tawlna bei hi,
Galzo mite nuamin ah, Nuamna la sa uh hi.
Amaute in Topa tawh, galdo-in zo uh hi,
A tawntung kikhel lo-in, puanpak a silh uh hi;
Tua lai dahna omlohna, kilemna mun gam nuam,
Paakte a palh zihziahna, nuntakna innpi nuam.
Thupha a dim gam nuam pen, Pasian’ mite omna,
Thupha a dim gam nuam pen, mihingte lam-etna;
Jesuh in hong hehpih a, tua gam nuam hong tun hi,
Kha Siangtho thupha sanna, Pasian tawh omna hi.

songs.title: LAM TAWNTUNG A HONG PAIPIH HI

lines: Lam tawntung a hong pai pih hi
A dang bang ka ngen nawn diam
Khan tawntung lam hong hilh zo hi
Hong itna ka muang khial diam
A mah muang leng leitung ah zong
Vantung nopna pha ka nei
Kei tungah bang bang hong tung zong
Jesuh’n a pha bawl ka thei
Kei tungah bang bang hong tung zong
Jesuh’n a pha bawl ka thei.
Lam tawn tung a hong pai pih hi
Lam haksa hang lungnuamsak
Ze-etna zawh nang hong hehpih
Hin na anlum in hong vak
Ka kha tui duh dangtak in vul
Ka khe tawl puk dek lai tak
Ka mai ah suangpi pan hong phul
En-un lungdamna tuinak!
Ka mai ah suangpi pan hong phul
En-un lungdamna tuinak!
Lam tawntung a hong paipih hi
Kicing lamdang hong itna
Tawldamna tak, hong kham zo hi
Vantung ka Pa inn sungah
Sih nawn lohna puan bang silhin
A taang gam ka kai ding hi
Tua ciang sa ning a tawntungin
Jesuh’n hong khamual suak hi
Tua ciang sa ning a tawntungin
Jesuh’n hong khamual suak hi

songs.title: THUPHA GUAH BANG HONG ZU DING HI

lines: Thupha guah bang hong zu ding hi
It na tawh hong ciam bang in;
Thamalhna hun hong tung ding hi
Hong puak suk ding Topa in.
Sakkik
Thupha guah zu bang,
Thupha guah i ki sam hi;
Hehpihna mal hong kiat tei hang,
Hong zu suk hen a tampi.
Thupha guah bang hong zu ding hi;
Tha-hat kik na a man pha;
Hong ging zuazua ding hi tam pi,
Mualtung, guam sung mun tengah.
Thupha guahbang hong zu ding hi
Hong buak sukin Topa aw;
Thathak tu-in Nong guan ding hi,
Nong ciamsa hong tungsak aw.
Thupha guahbang hong zu ding hi
Tu-ni’n hong zu ta leh maw;
Jesuh kiangah thu i ngen hi,
Pu-lak in Pa kiang i mawh.
Topa hauhna ngaihsun ke’ng, kham le ngun lunggulh ke’ng;
Vantung gam cian masa ning, Tuu huang sung lut nuam ing;
Vantung gam laipi sungah, Na ciamtehna sungah;
A kigelh hiam, keima min? Jesuh aw hong gen in.
Sakkik:
Gam ciamtehna sungah, nuntakna lai sungah,
Vantung ka tun theih na’ngin, A kigelh hiam ka min
(v3 Kigelh mah hi, ka min)
Gungei-a sehnel bangin, ka mawhna tam hangin,
Topa aw, Nong tatna si, kei ading kicing hi;
Na thuciamtehna laipi, mual theilo ding taang hi;
“Na mawhsi bang san hangin, paaksak ning vuk bangin”
A siangtho khuapi sungah, Innpite taang mahmah;
Vangliatna ngah a mite, a puansilh uh a tee;
Tua a phate siasak ding, bangmah tum theilo ding;
Vantung mite’ cinna ah, ka om ding hi, keimah.
Jesuh tawh mun khempeuh ka pai khawm ding hi,
Kikhen lo in hong khakna ka zui ding hi;
A khe kiangah tu leh launa om lo a,
Jesuh tawh mun khempeuh ka pai khawm ding hi
Sakkik
Pai khawm ding, mun khempeuh
launa om thei kei
Jesuh tawh mun khempeuh ka pai khawm ding hi
Mun khempeuh kei guak hi keng Jesuh tawh hing,
Lawmte’n nusia hangin, Jesuh kei aa hi;
Lam haksa hang a khut tawh hong kha ding a,
Jesuh tawh mun khempeuh ka pai khawm ding hi
Jesuh tawh mun khempeuh kei ka lum thei a,
Sihna a liim in hong kimkot hang in ah
Ka thawh ciang kawivak nawn lo ding ka thei hi
Jesuh tawh mun khempeuh ka pai khawm ding hi.
Jesuh tawh mun khempeuh ka pai khawm ding hi
Kikhen lo in hong khakna ka zui ding hi
A khe kiangah tu leh launa om lo a,
Jesuh tawh mun khempeuh ka pai khawm ding hi
Sakkik
Pai khawm, Jesuh tawh paikhawm ding,
Pai khawm mun khempeuh pai ding;
Pai khawm, Jesuh tawh paikhawm ding,
Mun khempeuh ah Jesuh tawh pai ding.
Mun khempeuh kei guak hi keng Jesuh tawh hing,
Lawmte’n nusia hangin, Jesuh kei aa hi;
Lam haksa hang a khut tawh hong kha ding a,
Jesuh tawh mun khempeuh ka pai khawm ding hi.
Jesuh tawh mun khempeuh kei ka lum thei a,
Sihna a liim in hong kimkot hang in ah
Ka thawh ciang kawivak nawn lo ding ka thei hi
Jesuh tawh mun khempeuh ka pai khawm ding hi.

songs.title: Ka Kha Ading Hoih Bel HI

lines: Gunpi taanglo bang nuam na'ng nong hilhna in
Dahna tui bangin hong leet hi;
Topa hong hilhna pha hi ka kha ading
Hoih bel hi kha ading, hoih bel hi
Sakkik
Hoih bel hi, hoih bel hi, kha ading
Hoih bel hi, hoih bel hi, Kha ading
Dawi in hong khem a bawlsiatna hong tun hang,
Ka up ding a thuciam om hi;
Topa Jesuh in ka thaneem hong en hi,
Hoih bel hi, kha ading, hoih bel hi.
Hong it a, anuam i ngaihsut ciang in-ah,
Ka mawh ka khialhna sung panin;
Ka suahtakna ding singlamteh tung si hi,
Ka lungsim in ka phat hi Topa.
Topa Jesuh tunung ciang hong pai ding hi,
Ka lungkhamna teng bei ding hi;
Topa hih leitung ah hong pai ding in-ah;
Ka Kha Siangtho ading apha hi.
Topa aw nong pai ding hun kong ngak uh hi,
Han hi lo, van hi, ko tupna;
Topa’ aw le van mite pengkul aw hi,
Ka lam-etna le ka tawl damna.
Vantung siklong tum un! Lungdam ni hi a,
Mawh nei mi khat hong ciahkik ta hi;
Apa’n a ta lampi ah na dawn tuah a,
A taimang a ta a ciahpih hi.
Sakkik
Vantung mite’n phatna la sa in,
Gawsem tumin nuamna tawh phat hi;
Tatsa mi honpite’n tuipi ging bangin,
Suahtakna lapi sa zuahzuah hi.
Vantung siklong tum un! Lungdam ni hi-a,
Ta taimang tu’n kisangkik ta hi;
A mawhna pan mi khat kihonkhia zo a,
Tatkhiatna ngah mithak hong suak hi.
Vantung siklong tum un! Pawi kham ni hi-a,
Vantung mite’n zawhna la sa hi;
Lungdam thu tangko un, gamla pi dongah,
A manpha mi khat suak thakzo hi.
Ihmu leng khangma cip loin, minthanna khua hong vak ding;
Hinkik ni ciang kimu kik leng, i kikhen nawn kei ding hi.
Tuipi thuk le kuam thuk sung pan, minam cin hong khawm ding hi,
Mual dawn, mual kuam, gamlak panin, mi tampi hong tho ding hi.
Sakkik
Ihmu leng khangma cip lo-in, minthanna khuavak ding hi,
Hin kik ni ciang kimu kikin, I kikhen nawn kei ding hi.
Paak hoih banga i deih mahmah, I lung hihmawh phat mahmah;
I ang sung pan i lakkhiat ciang, lian mahmah hi i dahna,
Ni a tum dek matengin ah, han kiim ah i kunkun a,
Eite’n paak i it manin ah, lam-etna bei bang kisa.
Ihmu leng khangma cip lo-in, han sungah lumcip lo ding;
Hong sap ciangin thupha a pia, Topa’n thupha ngah tahen,
Sihna om ngei nawn lohna mun, a kip tawntung khuapi ah,
Omna inn nuam ngah dingin-ah, Topa in hong sam ding hi.
Thupha khuavak sung ah
Jesuh tawh pai lai ah
Eite pai na lam hong taang sak hi
A deih bang zuih ciang in
A mah tawh pai khawm in
A thu ngai a muang a om ding hi
Sakkik
Muang un, ngai un, Lampi dang om lo hi
Jesuh kiang nuam ngah ding in
Muang in a thu ngai un
Van a gik te pua a
Gim na tawl na thuak na
Topa hong heh pih na ki cing hi
Eite lau na ding a
Dawimangpa hong khem na
Jesuh thu ngai in muang leeng bei hi
Ni lim a hih hang in
Meii kai a hih hang in
Jesuh in tha khat a hawl khia hi
Launa leh kihtakna
Tau na leh kah na te
Jesuh i muan’ lai in om thei kei
Ki-itna pha tawh mah
Topa Jesuh mai ah
Kikhawm ciangin lam pai khawm ding hi
Thu hong piakna ngai a
Hong sawlna pai ding a
Cikmah hun lau loin nuam ding hi
Honpa kiang pan na zaksa thu,
Ngai dih in, lungdamna thu;
Hong sapna dawng lo ding na hiam?
Topa’ lam na kihei diam?
Sakkik
A umte’n zuan, a umte’n zuan,
Jesuh zuanin hing ta un;
A umte’n zuan, a umte’n zuan,
Jesuh zuanin hingta un!
Hun tampi na beisak zo a,
Anlak phatna mu zo a;
Phalbi vukte tui khin napi,
Mawhna sung na buallai hi.
Na deih teel hun Jesuh’n ngak hi,
Na khentat mengmeng ding hi;
Kha Siangtho in hong zol lai-in,
Honpa zuan in beelta in.
Na lungsim Pasian kiang pia in,
Khazih tatna si muang in;
Vantung a om Jesuh en in!
A kammal kip hi, muang in!
Hih leitunga dahna khempeuh paai khia in,
Nitak hun ciangin ah, damdam lungngai in;
Thukpi-in phum inla, phatakpi’n seel in,
Jesuh kiangah gen in, thupha hong pia ding.
Jesuh kiangah gen in, na dahna thei hi,
Jesuh kiang gen lecin, huhna hong pia ding;
Na lampi hong taan ciang, pai-in kaikhawm in,
Thungen in na dahna, na van zang ding hi.
Dahna lungkhamna tawh, khua a mial hangin,
Nang sang a gimzaw, midangte huh in;
Na dahna paaikhia in, thupha ngah nading,
Midangte ading zong, Jesuh kiang gen in.
Nisimin Jesuh a min, umin huihpi nun ciangin;
Thu upna tawm hangin, Jesuh bek umin muang in.
Sakkik
Nisimin Jesuh Topa, umin beel in muang inla;
Lai Siangtho hong hilh bangin, Jesuh bek umin muang in.
Kha Siangtho keima tungah, hong taang hi, ka sin sungah;
Lam hong hilh leh puk zolo, Jesuh bek umin muang in.
Lam a nop leh la sa ta, khua hong mial le thuum inla;
Gimna thuak ciang thungen in, Jesuh bek umin muang in.
Ka nuntak lai teng muang ning, leitung bei mateng suang ning.
Vantung khua tun mateng in, Jesuh bek umin muang in.
Ka zak nop min khat a om hi
Tua min la’n sak tham hi
Tua min bil-ah la bang ka za,
Leitung a min ngaih bel
Sakkik
Bang zah’n Jesuh ka it
Bang zah’n Jesuh ka it,
Bang zah’n Jesuh ka it,
Hongit masak hang hi!
Hong gumpa itna hong gen hi,
Hong Tan khia ding si hi
Ama si manpha hong hilh hi
Mawh nei mi mawh maina
Pa neih khempeuh kei hong hilh hi
Nisim sapna cing hi;
Khuamial sungla ka pai khialh ciang,
Khuavak hong tangsak hi.
Ka lunggimna a hong theihpih,
Hong itpa hong hilh hi;
Ka dahna teng A hong thuakpih,
Thuakpih dang omlo hi.
Ciamna kip thupha Jesuh kei a
Pasian vanglian bang hong ciamsakna pha
Hot khiatna luah pa Pasian leisa
Kha siangtho a suak si a sawpsa
Sakkik
Ka gengen ding hi, Ka sasa ding
Hong honpa phat na sun niloh in
Ka gengen ding hi ka sasa ding
Hong honpa phatna sun niloh in
Thumanna cing a, cing hi nuamna
Ka mit kha’n ka mu hi lianpi nuamna
Vantung mite in ka bil sungah
Hehpihna itna hong gen ka za
Thu manna cing hi tawlnga khin hi
Hong honpa sung lung nuamin ka om hi
Vil kawm,ngak kawmin ka en to hi
A ma hoihna itna hong dim hi
Thupha khuavak mual sang tung ah
Pasian mite ding un
Zan khuamial hong liah ma in ah
Mai nawt in ah kuan un
Mual kawm sang a galte sim ding
Tha neih teng siit kei ni
I thei hi lei tung zawh na ding
Upna i nei ding hi
Sakkik
Upna in zawhna hi upna in zawhna hi
Upna in zawhna ding hi
Leitung zawhna ding hi.
Ama hong itna dial nuai ah
A thu tem bang zang in
A zosa mi siangte’ khap mah
Eite’n zong i zui hi.
Huihpi nung bangin upna tawh,
Galte nawkgawp uha;
Sihna zo tua upna mah tawh, eite i kidalta
I ziat, i vei i kiimkot ah
Galte in hong pang hi
Noptat maan’ na nusia in ah
Pai un do ding kuan un
Hot khiatna lukhu khu in ah
Thuman kawnggak gak ni;
Lei liing ding hi i khe nuai-ah,
I aw’n mual thawn ding hi.

songs.title: Kha Pasian aw Hong Kum In

lines: Aw a siangtho Kha Pasian aw,
Ko kiangah hong kum in;
Hong sawp inla hong siangsak aw,
Ko’ lungsim hong luah in.
Ci le sa tawh nungta kote,
Sia in niin khin lua ung;
Gamtatna le ngaihsutnate,
Siatna tawh dimkhin ung.
Hanciamna in lungsim luan dan,
Kikhelsak zo ngei kei;
Hong piangsak Pasian’ vangliatna’n,
A thakin puahkik thei.
Pasian taa’n a nunna piazo,
Nang le kei ading hi;
Sihna pan tho vanah kahzo,
Hong kumsuk kik ding hi.
Aw a siangtho Kha Pasian aw,
Hong kumsuk mengmeng in;
Lungsim thak le ngaihsut siangtho,
Ko sungah hong guan in.
A dahte hong pai un,
Na vulna pan un,
Hehpih tokhom mai-ah, hong khuk din un;
Na lung liamna, gimna,
Hong pai hong gen un,
Vantung damsak lah, bangmah om lo hi.
Lungsim hawmte’ nuamna,
Lamkhialte’ khuavak,
Vul ngeilo, mual ngeilo, lawpna hong lak;
Kha Siangtho Huhpa in,
Hong nem hi nuamtak,
Vantung damsak lah, bangmah om lo hi.
En un, hinna anlum, en un, hinna tui,
Pasian’ tokhom mai pan, hong luangsuk tui;
Hong pai un, hih lai-ah, itna an kilui,
Vantung damsak lah, bangmah om lo hi.

songs.title: Jesuh in Nangma Dahna A Thei Hi

lines: Dahna a om khempeuh, Topa Jesuh’n thei;
Lungsim kisikna le thungetna zong thei;
Lau keei lo-n um in, na lungkhauhsak in;
Na van Topa suan in, hong nuamsak ding hi.
Ama lungsim sungah, Nang pha hong sa hi;
Na galte khut sung pan, Nang hong gum ding hi;
Ama deihna bangin, lam hong hilh ding hi;
A vaang tanna lamah na tung thei ding hi.
Gal na do Jesuh’n thei, Na thuumna za hi;
Na lunggim lam zong thei, na kiko za hi;
Na kha tha khauhna’ngin, na tai loh na’ngin;
Lungsim nuam hong pia ding na khitui nul ding.
Jesuh aw kong it hi, kei aa na hi ta
Nangma hang mawhna nuam namcin ka khia ta
Keimah hong Tanpa hong Honpa Na hi ta
Kong it ngei leh zong, tu’n kong it pha sem ta.
Tun’ Nang kong it hang Nang mah’n Nong it masa
Nong it ma’n singlamteh tung Nong tan zo ta
Ling lukhu na tal tung-ah ki khen zo ta
Kong it ngei leh zong tu’n kong it pha sem ta
Hong it tawntung ning hin’na sihna sung-ah
Hong phat tawntung ning hu Nong kop lai in ah
Sihna daitui ka tal ah kai ciangin ah
Kong it ngei leh zong tu’n kong it pha sem ta
Nuamsak tawntungna minthang innpi sungah
Na min hong phat tawntung ning a taang van ah
Zawhna lukhute khu in sa ning hih mah
Kong it ngei leh zong tu’n kong it pha sem ta
Jesuh aw kong it hi, kei aa na hi ta,
Nangma hang mawhna nuam namcin ka khia ta;
Keimah hong Tanpa hong Honpa Na hi ta,
Kong it ngei leh zong, tu’n kong it ngei leh zong,
Tu’n kong it ngei leh zong, Tu’n kong it pha sem ta.
Tun’ Nang kong it hang Nang mah’n Nong it masa
Nong it ma’n singlamteh tung Nong tan zo ta,
Kong it ngei leh zong, tu’n kong it ngei leh zong,
Tu’n kong it ngei leh zong, Tu’n kong it pha sem ta.
Hong it tawntung ning hin’na sihna sung-ah,
Hong phat tawntung ning hu Nong kop lai in ah;
Sihna daitui ka tal ah kai ciangin ah,
Kong it ngei leh zong, tu’n kong it ngei leh zong,
Tu’n kong it ngei leh zong, Tu’n kong it pha sem ta.
Nuamsak tawntungna minthang innpi sungah,
Na min hong phat tawntung ning a taang van ah;
Zawhna lukhute khu in sa ning hih mah,
Kong it ngei leh zong, tu’n kong it ngei leh zong,
Tu’n kong it ngei leh zong, Tu’n kong it pha sem ta.

songs.title: Jesuh Ka Lung Sungah Hong Lutphet-In

lines: Topa Jesuh ka lung sungah hong lut phet-in,
Ka lungsim hong kikhel pah hi!
Topa Jesuh ka lung sungah hong lut phet-in,
Ka lung sung khua hong vak pah hi!
Sakkik
Topa Jesuh ka lung sungah,
Hong tum hong khawl khit phet in-ah;
Tuipi kilok bang ka lung sungah khuavakna,
Thakhat-in a hong tang pah hi.
Topa Jesuh ka lung sungah hong lut phet-in,
Lam ka khial nawn kei pah ding hi!
Topa Jesuh ka lung sungah hong lut phet-in,
Ka mawh khempeuh hong sawp siang hi!
Topa Jesuh ka lung sungah hong lut phet-in,
Upna a kip ka ngah pah hi!
Topa Jesuh ka lung sungah hong lut phet-in,
Up khialhna teng bei khin pah hi!
Topa Jesuh ka lung sungah hong lut phet-in,
Sihna kuam sung khuavak pah hi!
Topa Jesuh ka lung sungah hong lut phet-in,
Khuapi kong khak kimu pah hi!
Pak tung zingdai a nom lai-in,
Keimah guak huan sungah ka vak hi;
Hong kihopihna ka zak aw ging in,
Pasian Tapa’ awkhum hi.
Sakkik
Amah’n hong tonpih-in hong hopih a,
Ama aa ka hih hong gen hi;
Amah tawh omkhawm a nuam ka sakna,
Kuamah’n ciam kha ngei lo hi.
Hong hopihna khum mahmah a,
Vasate’n zong ngai khipkhep uh hi;
Kei a hong sak tua la ngaih mahmah a,
Ka bil kha’n ka zaza hi.
Zan khuamial sung ahi zongin,
Amah tawh ka om khawm den nuam hi;
Launa tam taleh hong zui-in,
“Pai ni” hong cihna aw ka za hi.
Topa min le Ama thu ah,
Ka maizum ngei kei ding;
Ama thu le A Singlamteh,
Ka pahtawi ngitnget ding.
Sakkik
Singlamteh, Singlamteh,
khuavak ka muh cilna,
Ka lung sunga vangik teng bei khinta;
A thu ka up ciang khua ka mu thei ta,
Tu in ka lung a dam tawntung ta.
Jesuh ka Pasian min ka thei,
Tua min bek hi kei’ muan;
Hong maizum sak ngeilo ding kei,
Lam-etna A hong guan.
Ama thuciam kip tawntung a,
A khutsung ka piak teng;
Amah’n phatak na kem dingta,
Ahun a tun’ mateng.
Tua ciang A Pa Pasian’ mai-ah,
Ka min hong sam ding a;
Jerusalem khua thak sungah,
Omna hong pia ding ta.
Ka lampi sau-in a gim huai-a,
Vangik pua-in kikem khialin;
Ka lampi sau-in, lungsim a nat ciangin,
Jesuh in kei a hong kem hiam?
Sakkik
A hong kem hi, ke’n ka thei hi,
Ka dahna hong thuakpih hi,
Sunin om nuam lo-in, zana lauhuai laitak
Hong gumpa’n hong kem.
Sun khuavak in a hong mial ciangin,
Kei kiangah a hong nai om hiam?
Ka lampi mialin, lauhuai a tam ciang,
Jesuh in kei a hong kem hiam?
Haksa ze-et ka thuak laitakin,
Zan tawntung khitui luanna tawh;
Hong hon ding omlo ka dah laitakin,
Jesuh in kei a hong kem hiam?
I itte tawh mangpha kipia-in,
Lungkham lutang nat a bei ciang;
Topa in ei bang ci-in hong mu diam,
Jesuh in kei a hong kem hiam?
Hong it Jesuh Topa aw, tuihual hong nai laitakin;
Huihpi nung daih nailoh tawh,
Na ang sung hong omsak in.
Nuntak huihpi kam mateng,
Hong Honp aw hong liah in;
Keima kha Nong lak mateng,
Khawlmun nuamah hong kha in.
Belh ding dang khat beek nei keng,
Cimawhin Nang kong beel hi;
Hong nusia peuhmah ngei ke’n,
Nong huh, Nong neem lai ding hi.
Kong muang hi, Topa, Nangmah,
Huhna Nang kiang ka ngah hi;
Topa aw, Na kha nuai-ah,
Keima lu nong liah ding hi.
Kei’ deihna teng kicinna,
Khazih Topa, Nang Na hi;
Pukte phong, mittawte kha,
Na damsak lungsim pumpi,
Nang na dik, Nang na siangtho,
Kei kihhuai, mawhna ka dim;
Ka pumtang sianna nei lo,
Nang thutak, hehpihna dim.
Ka mawh sin khinzo dingin,
Hehpihna Nang kiang kicing;
Damna guntui hong luan in,
Ka lung sung sian den nading.
Nang nuntakna Nak Na hi,
Nangmah hong dawndawn sak in;
A tawntung nuntak tui li,
Ka lung sung hong pulsak in.
Kei in lawm hoih khat ka nei a! Ka theih ma-in hong it hi;
Ki-itna khau tawh hong kai-a, Amah tawh hong henkhawm hi.
Keima lungsim hong khih khin a, Kuamah in phel zolo hi;
Kei Ama aa, Amah kei aa, A tawntung ding hita hi.
Kei in lawm hoih khat ka nei a! Hong hon dingin hong si hi;
Nuntakna bek hong pia lo a, Amah mah hong kipia hi.
Kei neihsa bangmah om lo a, Ama neihsa hikhin hi;
Lungsimi thatang le nuntakna, Ama aa hi tawntung hi.
Kei in lawm hoih khat ka nei a! vangliatna khempeuh nei hi;
Ka lampi ah hong cing ding a, Innpi ah hong kha ding hi.
Minthanna taang ka galmuh ta, Hong thahatsak kik ding hi;
Tu’n vil ding, sem ding, do ding a, Nung ciang kitawlnga ding hi.
Kei in lawm hoih khat ka nei a! Migi thuman, lungnem hi;
Vaihawm siampa lamhilh siampa, thahat galdo siampa hi.
Hong it Topa ka nei khinta, hong khenzo ding omlo hi;
Sihna’n hong khen zolo dinga, Topa aa ka hita hi.

songs.title: A MAH’N KA MAWH NA TENG LAKHIA ZO

lines: Lungsim leh aw in, Topa phat ning,
Ama sung ka kipak ding.
La in sa ning lamdang hong itna
Ken sasa ning hih la
Sakkik
Ama’n ka mawhna teng lakhia zo
Amin siang phat un, Amin siang phat un
Ama’n ka mawhna teng lakhia zo
Haleluijah min phat un.
Nopna khawlna ngah ding amakiang
Ka mawhna tawh ka pai ciang
Ka nget hong za in hong khahkhia ta
Ken sasa ning hih la.
Ka hu tawpna tawh Amah phat ning
Sihna ka zawh manin ah.
Amah phat ning a tawntungin ah
Ken sasa ning hih la.
Keima ka pa in na khempeuh nei hi,
Leitung sum khempeuh a khut sungah om hi,
Suang hoih, a san, a kang, kham, ngun a vekpi;
Kisim zolo-in Amah in a hau hi.
Sakkik
Kumpipa’ ta ka hi, Kumpi ta ka hi;
Hong Honpa Jesuh tawh Kumpipa ta ka hi.
Pasian tapa in mihing honkhia hi,
Mizawngte bangin leitungah a vak hi.
Tu-in vantung khua-ah a mang tawntung hi;
Nungciang vantungah omna hong pia ding hi.
Khatvei lai-inah khualmi bang ka hi,
Ka lunggulhna hangin mimawh ka suak hi.
Tu-in innluahna za, ka ngah na dingin;
Vantung khua suangah, keima min kigelh hi.
Puanbuk le lobuk a’ih hang phamawh kei,
Vantung ah innpi nuam ke’n nei khin ta ing.
Inn pan ka gamlat hang, ka lung a nuam hi;
Pasian min thang hen! Kumpipa’ ta ka hi.
Nuntak na tuipi tungah huih nun ciang in
Si ding cih ngaihsun in
Na lungkiat ciangin,
Thupha khat nungah thupha na ngaihsut leh
Nisim in a tawntung la na sa dinghi
Sakkik
Thupha khat nungah khat ngaihsun in,
A tampi hong pia hi thei ta in
Thupha khat nung ah khat ngaihsun in
Pasian in a tampi hong pia thei ta in
Lungmanna vangik bangin Na lel ngei hiam
Singlamteh hong puasak in
A gik thei hiam
Thupha khat nungah
Thupha na ngaihsun leh
Nisim in a tawntung la na sa ding hi
Mi dangte a sum apai na etciangin
Jesuh kiangah na ngahding sum ngaihsun in,
Vantung khua sungah Na omna inn hi zong
Kuamah in leizo kei sum a om ding hi
Tua a hih ciangin gal kido laitak in,
Pasian in na khempeuh uk hi, lau kei in
Vantung mihingte in Nang kiang ah om hi,
Lampi tawp dongin nanga hong huh ding hi
A gim a tawl mite’ tungah,
Pasian in thu a ciam hi;
Leitung panin vantung dongah,
“Kong makaih ding” hong ci hi.
Sakkik
“Kong makaih ding, kong makaih ding,
Kong makaih tawntng ding hi;
Leitung panin vantung dongah,
Kong makaih tawntung ding hi.”
Ze-etna in hong zo thei a,
Muante’n hong taisan thei hi;
Hih hang na phawk ding thu om a,
“Kong makaih ding” hong ci hi.
Na lametnate bei thei a,
Dahna tawh kum bei thei hi;
Hih hang na phawk ding thu om a,
“Kong makaih ding” hong ci hi.
Nuntakna hun hong bei kuan in,
Sih ding hun hong naita hi;
Hih hang hong Honpa’ aw ngai in,
“Kong makaih ding” hong ci hi.
A migi tuucingpa en un,
Tuikhuk kiang a din lai-in;
Tui le an a duhte pai un,
Gam hoihna vantung khua-ah.
Sakkik
Hong paipihna peuh zui un,
Hong paipihna peuh zui un;
Hallelujah, Hallelujah,
Hong paipihna peuh zui un.
Nuntakna lam a zuite bek,
Pasin in lungdampih ding;
Topa Jesuh’ sihna hangin,
Nuntak thak hong pia ding hi.
Tuukhumna buk sungah omte,
Ama tuu taktakte hi;
Pa Pasian tapa a umte,
I nungta tawntung ding hi.

songs.title: Damna Tui A Luanna-ah Ka Teeng Hi

lines: Ka vangik nusia-in gal khat lam Kanaan gam nuamah,
“Damna tui a luanna ah ka teeng hi;”
Lung hianna le mawhna lamah kei vakthap nawn kei ning,
“Damna tui a luanna ah ka teeng hi.”
Sakkik
Ka teenna gam nuam nuntakna tui gei-ah,
“Damna tui a luanna ah ka teeng hi;”
Ka teenna gam nuam nunna tui a luanna,
