“Damna tui a luanna ah ka teeng hi.”
Israel mite tawh lungnuam takin ka paikhawm hi,
“Damna tui a luanna ah ka teeng hi;”
A muanhuai meikhuam in ka paina ding lam hong laka,
“Damna tui a luanna ah ka teeng hi.”
Tunglam pan a Manna hangin, ka gilkial nawn kei ding,
“Damna tui a luanna ah ka teeng hi;”
Suangpi pan phul itna tui hangin dangtak nawn kei ning,
“Damna tui a luanna ah ka teeng hi.”
Suakta zo ing, Hallelujah ci-in la ngaihsa ing,
“Damna tui a luanna ah ka teeng hi;”
Ama kamciam muang in, A sisan hangin, suakta ing,
“Damna tui a luanna ah ka teeng hi.”
Tuni-in kei ma lungsim sungah
Khuavaak a hong taang hi
Lei tung ni sang a vaang tang zaw
Ka khua vak Jesuh hi
Sakkik
Aw ka lung sung, lung khuavakna
Lung sung nopna nuamna hun pha hi
Jesuh mai nuam ka muh ciang in
Ka lungsim sung hong taang hi.
Tuni-in kei mah lungsim sung ah
Kumpi phatna la sa
Kei sak theih loh la ngaihte zong
Jesuh’n ngai leh A za
Tuni-in keima lungsim sungah
Topa hong tum man in
Lungnopna leh gamtatna pha
Hong po, hong palh pan hi
Tuni in keima lung sim sungah
Nuamna, lawpna, dim hi
Hong piaksa le hong piak lai ding
Thupha, nuamna hang hi
Topa sung nuam un, A hehpihna phat un,
Hong hencip khempeuh phelkhia hi
Si tawh hong tanzo
Lau nawn peuhmah kei un,
Jesuh ah deihna teng cing hi.
Sakkik
Eilam ah Pasian, ei lamah Pasian,
Eilam hong om leh
kua i lang pang zo ding?
Kua i langpang zo, kua pang zo ding?
Topa sung hat un,
A tha hat na suangun,
Ni sim thuman in ci tak ni
Siatna’n hong nawk ciang,
Thu man ah ding kip un,
Amah I tha I bukna hi.
Topa thu muang un,
A ciampeel ngei lo hi,
Khris sung ah “amen” hi khin ta:
Lei a bei zongin,
A thu bei lo ding hi,
Lai Siangtho in gen khinzo ta.
Topa sung kip un, A ang muanhuai sungah,
Tawntung nuntak kipatna hi;
A thanem pen zong, a khut sung panin ah,
Kuamah in sut zolo ding hi.
Lungsim a pha mihing te aw
Topa tungah na lungdam un
Topa a teel mihing te aw
Dahna lung man’na pai san un
Sakkik
Nuam un, Nuam un
Topa tungah na lungdam un
Nuam un, Nuam un
Topa tung ah lungdam khin un
Lungdam ve un Topa in-ah
Leitung, vantungah pha bel hi
A thupha a la phate tawh
Hong uk a ei-mah hong phel hi
Topa aa ding galkap na-ah
Galte hong zo dek hang a ci
Topa galkap mangte in-ah
Galte sangin a tamzaw hi
Sun lai in khua hong mial hangin
Zan lai van hong khup bang in-ah
Na lungsim na mawh lo ding hi
Um in gal bei mateng thupha
Nang aa hi’ng Topa,
Na aw za zo ing,
Kei nong itna hong gen in;
Ahih hang upna tawh hong kahto ing,
Kong kinaizaw lai nuam hi.
Sakkik
Hong naisak in Thupha Topa aw,
Na sihna Singlamteh tawh,
Hong kai in na kiangah thupha Topa aw,
Naitakin Na pang si tawh.
Hong siangtho sak in,
Hehpihna vang tawh,
Na nasem ding hong zang in;
Lungkia ngeilo in lametna kip tawh,
Nang deih bang hong deihsak in
Na tokhom mai-ah,
Tawl khat sung bekmah,
Thungenin kong khukdin zong
Lawmta bangin lungsim kumkhawm in ah,
Ka lung hong nuam mahmah khong.
Gun gal kah bang sihna gal kai mateng,
Itna thu phawkkhin zo lo;
Nangmah tawh nuamtak
kong khawlkhawm mateng,
Nuamna sang kiban nailo.
Hong Honpa, Na sih dong,
Kei Nong it zo;
Nang a’ding na khat zong,
Ka hong it lo,
Itna tawh hong kun ning,
Ka ciamna tang tun ning,
Nang kiang tu’n hong tun ning,
Na khat teitei.
Hehpih tokhom mai-ah, hehpih kong ngen;
Upna neihsun in ah, Jesuh kong en;
Thuak ding, gen ding, sak ding,
Na khat peuh Nang a’ ding,
Kei hong hih zo sak in,
Na khat teitei.
Lungsim man hong pia in,
Nang ma aa bang;
A ni kipeel lo-in,
Ka hih theih na’ng.
It na tawh na sepna,
Khat peuh tung migit na,
Lamkhial khat ngah zawh na’ng,
Na khat teitei.
Keimah le ka neihsa,
Nong piak sa hi’ng;
Hih lai ka nuntakna,
Nang ma a’ ding.
Na mai kong muh ciangin,
Tatkhiat sa ka kha-in,
Hi hen, Nang a’ dingin,
Na khat teitei.
Khamgam nuam panin la aw na za hiam?
Lungdamna la thak a hi;
Lawp takin buhlomte hen khawm ve ni,
A hun sawt nawnlo ding hi.
Sakkik
An la Topa tu’n hong kilang baih ding,
Amai mu-in A aw i za ding;
An la Topa tu’n hong kilang baih ding,
Innah an l ate khawm ding.
Khamgam nuam panin hong ensuk uha,
I it i lawm ngaihte hi;
Nasep khempeuh zo, Singlamteh puazo,
Khapsa lukhu khu uh hi.
Khamgam nuam panin la ngaih hong kisa,
I lungsim hong hatsak hi;
Tua la ngaih aw in, hong thakhauhsak a,
Sun niloh na i sem hi.
Khamgam nuam panin la ngaih hong kisa,
Lungnopna gam nuam pan hi;
Upna tawh i thei, a sawt lo in-ah,
Tua la i sa khawm ding hi.
Jesuh ading thumanin ka nungta,
A lungdamsak dingin ka hanciam a;
Lung taitakin Ama lam ka pang hi,
Thupha ka ngahna hih bang lampi hi.
Sakkik
Honpa Topa Jesuh aw, Nang tungah kong kipia,
Nong tatkhiatna dinginah, kei ading nong kipia;
To dang kuamah ka nei lo, ka lung sung hong uk in,
Nang ading bek nungta dingin, Nang tung kong kipia khin.
Ka mawhna teng Kalvary ah pua a,
Keitang si Jesuh ading ka nungta;
Tua itna in a nung hong zuisak hi,
A nungzui dingin ka kipan khin hi.
Mun khempeuh Jesuh ading ka nungta,
Amin siangtho suangin na ka sem a;
Gimna le supnate ka thuak ngam hi,
Tua bang thuakna in, kei singlamteh hi.
Tomkal nuntak Jesuh ading hi-a,
Ama nuih mai mah manpha pen ka sa;
A mangte zongin, tan ding hong si hi,
A gaimte Ama sung tawldamsak hi.

songs.title: JESUH KIANGAH KA PIA DING HI

lines: Hong gum Topa kei mah in ah
Na khempeuh paai in zui ning
Ka Topa aw Nang mah in ah
Lam honghilh Pa Na hi ding
Sakkik
Na khempeuh paai a, Na khempeuh paai a
Na khempeuh Topa khut sungah
Kei mah’n hong pai ning
Hong gum Topa kei mah in ah
Nang ma kiang ka hong nai hi
Ki sik a thu pha kong ngetna
Ngai in hong gum in kong ci,
Hong gum Topa kei mah in ah
Leitung nopna ka nusia
Kha Siangtho le Topa Pasian
Hong om in ka lungsungah
Kong up kong muanna lian,
Hong hon Topa Pasian,
Hong tan Tuuno,
Kong thumna hong ngai in,
Ka mawh na teng paai in,
Tuni a kipan in, Hong tang khin aw.
Keima lungsim zawngkhal,
Hong guan in tha le ngal, Tha nuamsak in,
Kei a’ ding, Nong si ta,
Kei zong Nang kong itna,
Mit ngei lo ka sungah Lum densak in.
Lungman khuamial lak-ah,
Dahna tampi lakah,
Lam honghilhaw; Khuamialna vaksak in,
Dahna khitui siak in,
Pial lo, hong naisak in, Nangma kiang tawh.
Leitung nun tom bei a, Sihna gun ka tungah,
Hong tum ciangin;
Launa lunghih mawhna, Hong paihkhiat sak inla,
Na tatsa keima kha, Hong pua to in.
Kha khaici pha vawh ni, nisimin vawh ni,
Lam dung tengah vawh ni, tua itna khaici;
Kha khaici pha vawh ni, muang den ni Pasian,
Nasepna nuamsa-in sang ding thaman lian.
Sakkik
Kha khaici pha vawh ni,
Ni a niam hang zong, lungkia ke’n cimtak ke’n
Nasep zawh siang dong.
Kha khaici pha vawh ni, thungenin kuan ni,
I vawh khaici phate, hong po khia ding hi;
Upna kip tawh vawh ni, van guah hong zu ding;
I lozau khempeuh teng kham khai tawh dim ding.
Kha khaici pha vawh ni, upna a neu hang,
Thanem taleng vawh ni, khitui a luan hang;
Nasep i zawh siang dong, hun ngah bang sem ding,
Anlak hun hong tung dong, lungdam tawntung ding.
Na lungsung Topa’n thupha a dimtak hong piakna ding in,
Na lunggulh hiam tuni in;
Na Pa’ hong ciamna muang in la,
A hong cih bang hong pai in,
Tang mi siangte’ pai bang in,
Sakkik
Na lungsim dimlet dong tu ni’n hong dim ding hi,
Topa hong sawlna bang in,
Beel tampi hongpai pih in,
Na lungsung dimlet dong tu ni’n hong dim ding hi,
Kha Siangtho vangliatna tawh.
Jesuh’ sisan’ sianthosak sa na leibeel te hong keng in,
Hong pai un a samdang zong;
Pasian to khom mai-ah na pumpi kipia inla ngak in,
Kha Siangtho hong ki buak dong.
Sathau bei ngeilo bangin hong heh pih na’n bei hun neilo,
Hong itna zong kiamlo hi;
Ama hong kamciamsa bangin Kha Siangtho le vangliatna,
Beel khempeuh hongdim ding hi.

songs.title: KA HI BANG HONG LA IN

lines: Topa Jesuh ka thungai in
Na hong phel kei leh ka si ding
Kiphel na thu hong pia suk in
Ka hi bang hong la in
Sakkik
Ka hi bang hong la in
Ka hi bang hong la in
Nang ma sih kei ma phatna hi
Ka hi bang hong la in
Phelna mu lo mawhna tampi
Ka neih manin Topa a si
Nong hehpih leh Nong phel thei hi
Bang mah a pha ka bawl zolo
Ka thu ciamna ka siasak zo
Na min tawh hong phel sak in aw
Ka hi bang hong la in
Na khe mai ah kong kun Topa
Nong muh bangin kei ka hi hi
Nasep kipan kiman khin zo
Ka hi bang hong la in

songs.title: Topa Aw Nang Hong Zui Nuam Ing

lines: Topaw aw, Nang hong zui nuam ing,
Nangmah bangin mi huh nuam ing;
Haksatnate thuakzo dingin,
Na thusimte kei hong hilh in.
Lungsim tuantual huhzawh nading,
A vakthapte khoh zawh nading;
Inn ah ciahpih theih nadingin,
Itna kamsiam kei hong guan in.
Nangma lungduaina hogn hilh in,
Nang tawh sem khawm pang khawm dingin;
Upna kipsak, sepna, bawlna,
Hon pia’n gualzawhna le muanna.
Khuavak a tangsak lam-etna,
Mai nawtzawhna ding khuavakna;
Nang bekmah in nong pia thei hi,
Nong ompih den ding ka ut hi.
Kei tang ding si, Pasian Tuuno,
Ka nuntakna Nang kong piazo;
Nang tungah kong thuman nuamzo,
Hong Honpa Pasian aw.
Sakkik
Kei tang dingin, Nang nong si hi,
Nang ading ka nungta ding hi;
Ka lung a dam tawntung ding hi,
Hong Honpa Pasian aw.
Keima nong sana tu’n ka um hi,
Ka nuntakna ding nong si hi;
Tu a kipan kong muang ding hi,
Hong Honpa Pasian aw.
Keima suahtak nading inah,
Nang nong si zo, Kavary ah;
Ka nuntakna kong ap khinpah,
Hong Honpa Pasian aw.
Topa aw, ka nuntakna,
Tang in, siangtho tak zang in;
Itna tawh Nangma sawlna,
Ka khut mang sak, sem sak in,
Ka khut mang sak, sem sak in,
Ka phei phung hong zang in la,
Nang a’ ding ngal hatsak in;
Ka aw zong Nang tang inla,
Ngaihtak Na min phat sak in,
Ngaih tak Na min phatsak in.
Ka kam ka muk hong zang in,
Na thupha gen theih na ding;
Ka sum ka paai tang khin in,
Neu kha beek hong it kei ning,
Neukha beek hong it kei ning,
Ka lungsim le ka pilna,
Nangma deih bangin zang in;
Ka utna, ka hanciamna,
Nangmah in hong uk ta in,
Nangmah in hong uk ta in.
Ka itna teng hong sang in,
Na khe mai ah hong sung ning;
Ka pumpi in hong tang in,
Nang aa bek hi khin den ning,
Nang aa bek hi khin den ning.
Jesuh, Nangma deih bang, Keimah’n zong deih nuam ing;
Nangma itna khut sung, hong ki-ap khin nuam ing.
Dahna nuamna sungah, Nangmah’n hong tonpih in;
Cizo nuam ing, Topa “Nang deih bang hisak in.”
Jesuh, Nangma deih bang, luankhi’n liah zel zongin;
Ka upna aksi tang, mualsak, mangsak kei in.
Nang zong hih leitungah, na dah na kah manin;
Nang tawh kap dingin-ah, “Nang deih bang hisak in.”
Jesuh, Nangma deih bang, kei ading pha khin hi;
Mailam a piang bangbang, Nangmah kong apkhin hi.
Lung patau lo keimah, Tangtak ka zuan van inn;
Hin lai, sih ciang, ka la, Nang deih bang hisak in.”
Jesuh aw, ka sih dongin, Nangma nasem dingin;
Kiciamna kip ka koihzo, Nangmah ka lawm ka To;
Hong panpih tawntung lecin, Nanglam hong hilh lecin;
Galdona kihta kei ning, lampam sikkhial kei ning.
Nangma pau hong zasak in, a siang a teltakin;
Muhnop huaite in hong leng, zaknop huaite’n hong meng;
Ka galte hong nai tawntung, ka kiim le ka lung sung;
Tuate sang hong naizaw in,
Mawhna pan hong dal in.
Nangma pau hong zasak in, A siang a teltak in;
Lungsung huihpi a nun ciang, Manglo, ka phunno ciang;
Ka lungmuan theih na’ngin-ah, Nong sawlna, nong khaamna;
Hong theisak hong ngaisak aw, ka lungsim hong cing aw.
Jesuh aw, nong iamzo hi, Nangmah a hong zui mi;
Nangma nasemte inah, Nang tawh mang ding, van-ah;
Jesuh aw, ka kiciamzo, sih dong Nangmah ka to;
Kong zuih zawh na’ng hong huh in, Ka lawm, ka Topa in.
Na khekhap, hong musak in, keimah hong tawnsak in;
Kong zuih theih na’ng mantakpi, Nangma tha kong muang hi;
Hong pi, hong sam, hong kaita’n, A tawp dong hong lenta’n;
Vantung dong hong tonpih aw, Hong hon ka Lawmpa aw.
Top tawh kibangzaw sem nuam lai ing,
A kiniamkhiat bang, a migit luat bang;
A thanop bangin, a thuman mah bangin,
Hong vaikhak mah bang, kipia in sem nuam ing.
Sakkik
Kei hong sang in, Nang aa bek hi nuam ing,
Kei hong sang in, Nang aa bek hi nuam ing;
Ka hong thuum hi, Topa hong siangsak in,
Hong sawp inla, hong kem tawntung ta in.
Topa bang nisim thu ngenngen nuam ing,
Thahat nuam lai ing, singlamteh pua ding;
Hanciam nuam lai ing, Ama gam adingin,
Kha Siangtho sap lai, a vakthapte ading.
Topa bangin nungta in khang nuam ing,
Amah bang mi dang itna lak nuam ing;
Galilee gam ah pumpi deihna nial bang,
Topa tawh a tawntungin kibang nuam ing.
Topa hong sapna ka za hi,
Topa hong sapna ka za hi,
Topa hong sapna ka za hi,
“Singlamteh pua in hong zui in” ci
Sakkik
Hong paipihna peuh-ah zui ning,
Hong paipihna peuh-ah zui ning,
Hong paipihna peuh-ah zui ning,
Lam tawntungah Amah zuizui ning.
Lunggimna huanah zong zui ning,
Lunggimna huanah zong zui ning,
Lunggimna huanah zong zui ning,
Lam tawntungah Amah zuizui ning.
Thukhenna munah zong zui ning,
Thukhenna munah zong zui ning,
Thukhenna munah zong zui ning,
Lam tawntungah Amah zuizui ning.
Minpha le hehpih hong pia ding,
Minpha le hehpih hong pia ding,
Minpha le hehpih hong pia ding,
Lam tawntungah hong tonpihpih ding.
Nang deih bang Topa, Nang deih bangbang!
Nangmah beelseek pa, Kei tungman bang.
Nangma deih bangin, kei hong bawl in;
Tang lo, mang dingin, Nang kong ngak hi.
Nang deih bang Topa, Nang deih bangbang;
Tuni in Topa, Hong sit in Nang!
Vuk sang ngo zaw in, Tu’n hong sawp in;
Lungsim neem takin, Nang mai kong kun.
Nang deih bang Topa, Nang deih bangbang!
Ka liam ka gimna, Hong huh in, Nang!
Vangliatna khempeuh, Nangma’n na nei;
Hong damsak in kei, Hong honpa aw.
Nang deih bang Topa, Nang deih bangbang!
Keima nuntakna, Hong uk in, Nang!
Khazih keima sung, Mi’n muhna ding;
Hong guan in kei sung, Na Kha Siangtho.

songs.title: Jesuh Tangthu Hong Gen Dih In

lines: Jesuh tangthu hong gen dih in, ke’n za nuam ing;
Hih lai-ah hong om hileh, bang ka gen ding hiam,
Lam gei a muh teng, tuipi tangthu,
Jesuh’ tangthute kei hong hilh in.
Naupangte tawh a kikholhna, ke’n mu nuam ing;
Tua ciang, Ama thuphate ke’n zong ngah nuam ing,
Gitna kam bek dim hehpihna dim,
Itna khuavak taang Jesuh maitang.
Khuapi sungah ka zui ding hi, naupang hon tawh;
Dial lekin, nisuh hiang tawi-in khut tawh lamin,
“Hosanna” ci-in Jesuh Kumpi!
Amah phatna la nakpi’n sa ning.
Van pan hong kumsuk kua hiam?
Jesuh Khris hong Honpa!
Kiniamkhiat a suak kua hiam?
Jesuh Khris hong Honpa!
Sakkik
Sa un, Ama min phatna,
Hotkhiatna hong tunzo ta;
Eite hong it penpen pa,
Jesuh Khris hong Honpa!
Singkhuam tung kikhai kua hiam?
Jesuh Khris hong Honpa!
Nang le kei hong tan kua hiam?
Jesuh Khris hong Honpa!
Mawhmai na’ng kua’n hong ciam hiam?
Jesuh Khris hong Honpa!
Um in hing un, kua’n ci hiam?
Jesuh Khris hong Honpa!
Van tokhom tung kua tu hiam?
Jesuh Khris hong Honpa!
I it i zuih ding kua hiam?
Jesuh Khris hong Honpa!
Van pan kua hong kumkik diam?
Jesuh Khris hong Honpa!
A mite khawm ding kua hiam?
Jesuh Khris hong Honpa!

songs.title: Jesuh in Tang Dingin Hong Sawl

lines: Jesuh in eite khuaimei vak bangin,
Zan khuamialna sungah tangin hong sawl hi;
Hih leitung khuamial sungah i tang ding,
Nang na omna kiim ah, kei, kei’ kiim ah.
Jesuh’n hong tangsak Ama adingin,
I meivak a mial ciang Amah’n hong mu hi;
I meivak tang van pan Amah’n ensuk,
Nang na omna kiim ah, kei, kei’ kiim ah.
Jesuh’n hong tangsak miteng adingin,
Khuamialna tampi tawh kidim hih leitung;
Mawhna, dahna, natna sung i tang ding,
Nang na omna kiim ah, kei, kei’ kiim ah.
Jesuh’n hong it ka thei hi
Lai Siangtho in hong gen hi
A neu a hat lo mite
A mah hat hong huh na ve
Sakkik
Jesuh’n hong it hi
Jesuh’n hong it hi
Jesuh’n hong it hi
Lai Siang-tho in gen hi
Jesuh’n hong it man si a
Van tung kong hong hon sak ta
Ka mawh na hong sawp sak ding
Van tung ah hong lut sak ding
Jesuh’n hong it manin ah,
Hong nai ka omna peuh a,
Amah it leng ka sih ciang,
Hong lato ding, Ama kiang.
Hong pai ciangin,
Hong pai ciangin,
Suang manpha khawmdingin;
Ama itte, Ama ate,
A suang manphate.
Sakkik
Zingsang aksi sol bangin,
A tang ciat ding uh hi;
A Kumpi lukhu tungah,
Tee diamdiam ding hi.
Hong khawm ding hi,
Hong khawm ding hi,
A gamsung om ding mi;
A siangthote, a tang phate,
A suang manphate.
Naupang note, naupang note,
Hong tanpa a itte;
Ama aa hi, amah it hi,
A suang manphate.
Vantung a i Pa in a hong itna
Hong piak Lai Siangtho sungah hong gen ta
Lai Siangtho sungah thu a ngaih pha pen
Jesuh in kei hong itna mah hi pen
Sakkik
Jesuh’n hong it man ka nuam pha hi
Kei hong it hi, kei hong it hi
Jesuh’n hong it man ka nuam pha hi
Kei nangawn hong it hi
Amah mangngilh-in ka taisan hangin,
Hong it lailai hi, ka mangthang hangin;
Zeisu in hong it ke’n ka phawkkik a,
Ama ang sung ka delhkik vingveng ta.
A phatna teng tawh a mai ka muh teh
La khat bek sa thei ding hong kici leh
Bang la ka sa zaw diam hih lo a dang
Jesuh in kei hong it pian dang lua sa’ng.
Jesuh’n hong it a kei zong ka it hi
Ka kha hehpih in tan ding hong kum hi
Hong it man in Singlamteh tung si a
Tua a hih ciang hong it takpi hita.
Nang na gen thei ding hiam? hong kici leh,
Zeisuh’ minthanna ka gen thei pah hi;
Kha Siangtho in zong hong thukimpih a,
Hong gen tawntung hi, Zeisuh hong itna.
Hih thu ka tel manin ka lungnuam pah,
Zeisuh ka muan manin thupha ka ngah;
“Zeisuh in hong it hi” ciman peuh leng,
Ka kiang pan Satan taikhia pah vingveng.
Naupangte in tatkhiatna tangkote hithei dinga,
Amaute’n Tanpa’ singlamteh thu gen ding uh hi;
Nipi sumpi tawh Lai Siangtho a puakkhia ding uha,
Tua in tuipi gal a mite lungdamsak ding hi.
Sakkik
Naupangte in Honpa itna thupha tangko nuam a sa mahmah uh hi;
Naupangte in, mite van inn tun na’ng lungdam takin lamlak ding uh hi.
Naupangte in sep ding nei hi, Topa’ nasepna ah,
Lungkham, dahnate zong nuamna suaksak ding uh hi;
Dahna in a netcip lungkhamna kha khamvei mite,
Khuavak bang mi gitna kam khum tawh hopih ding hi.
Naupangte kiphawk hi, Topa’ hong kamciamna sungah,
Hehpihna thupha midangte hawmsawn ding uh hi;
Topa’n a maute limtak kemin lungmuangsak dinga,
Amaute in vanah Pasian mai mu ding uh hi.
Nuntak hun tom mahmah hi, singteh pulh tawh kibang hi
Buhlom hen tawh kibang hi, hun lap in!
Hun bei hanhanin hong lak, a site kipaai baih ding,
Launa hun hong tung baih ding, hun lap in!
Sakkik
Hun lap in! hun lap in!
Jesuh in nang hong sap lai in, hun lap in!
Mawhna sung sawtna tham leh, kong honsa’n mu kei niteh,
Na kikona zekai ding, hun lap in!
Paak hoih pen zong vulpak hi, khangno hoihna bei pak hi,
Sauvei na om kei ding hi, hun lap in!
Pasian Kha Siangtho sap lai, mawh nei aw, mawkvak nawn ke’n,
Na siat na’ng bawl nawn ke’n, hun lap in!
Hunte hong bei hanhan hi, sihna thukhenna nai hi,
Jesuh ang na zuan ding hi, hun lap in!
Lawm aw a man ding tuat in, lauhuai hun hong tung kha ding,
Hell khuk sung na tung kha ding, hun lap in!
Mawh nei hong hilh ngai inla, Topa nang teel in bawl in,
Tua ciang vantung lungdam ding, hun lap in!
Khuamial pan khuavak zuan in, Jesuh kibawlphasak in,
Vantung zuan ding kipan in, hun lap in!
Hahkat pawlpi, gamla nai pan, thu sin dingin, i kikhawm hi;
Tawpna a nuam, a omnate, I gen ding hi, Pasian’ thupha,
Sakkik
Hahkat pawlpite aw, Topa kiang kikhawm ni;
Lungsim kituakpha tawh, aminphatna gen ni;
Topa le a gampi, adingin hahkat ni;
Pawlpi a hahkatte huhna ding thungen ni.
Khazih Topa, phat dingin ah, la sa dingin, hong kikhawm un;
Khangnote in, hih mun panin, hin tawntungna ngah ding uh hi.
Topa Pasian, nasem dingin, kiciamna pha, a thak koih hi;
Vantung inn nuam, tun ma tengin, upna behlapin nasem ni.
Tapidaw ihmu nawn ke’n
Mi ngah na’ng sep theih lai sem
Khutzep-in ding mawk ding maw?
Topa in thu hong pia leh
Sakkik
Pai in sem ding kipan in
Pai in zong A mangte gum
Khua mialna sung mawh nei mi
Tua pawi ah hong paipih in
Topa min na it ding hiam?
Hong ciamna na um zo diam?
Sapna teng A kiang ngen in,
Hong sapna na nial ding maw?
Na sansa bangin umin,
Hong hilh bangin nungta in;
A ma aa bang hi den in,
Sep na tawh upna lak in
Sing lamteh i puak ding om,
kham lukhu na khuk nop leh,
Thathak tawh ma i sot ding
A hun tom a nite tawm
Topa tawh tonkhawm in bang bang piang ta leh
Na lampi khuamial hang Ama nung zui in
Na galte’n hong neh in a lauhuai hang in
Jesuh tawh ton le teh Kih tak ding om kei
Sakkik
Ton khawm in, hang tak mainawt in
Na tha hong khauhsak ding hi
Ni simin Amah tawh pai in
Na khualzinna lam hong pi ding hi
Topa tawh ton khawm in na pai na peuh ah
Khuamialna lim sung ah lam hong hilh ding hi
Ama vang in na lam pi hong taang sak ding
Keugaw gam zong lono na hong piangsak ding
Topa tawh ton khawmin nang thu’n tawl nga ken
Hong thu piakna bang in na gam ta ding hi
Hong sawlna bang mangin Ama tha muangin
Jesuh nung na zuih leh na khial ngei kei ding
Tu ka khangno lai-in, hun hoih zat theih lai in,
Topa ko lungsung hong om in, vekpi’n hong kipia ung;
Kong kipiakna bangun, kilawm bang hong sang in,
Nuntak sung teng sepna peuhah, pa deihna bang hihen.
Hong hilh in na deih bang, ka gamtat theih na’ng uh,
Nang deih bangbang gamtat theih na’ng, ka lungdam ding uh hi;
A lian pen teel tuanlo, a neu pen paai tuanlo,
Ko sepnate, Nang sep bangin, hong thupi khinsak in.
Thu hoih thupha deihna, kote hong hilhhilh in,
Hun tomcik no khat sung bek zong, ka siat khak loh na’ng uh;
Ko tha tawh din zawh na’ng, Nang hong panpih ta in,
A siangtho nate bek deih ung, a siate deih kei ung.
Ka suah tung bangmah un, Kha Siangtho hong pia in,
Itna gamtat hoih neih theih na’ng, lungnop hithiatna tawh;
Kum tampi sung man ding, ka kigin kholh na’ng uh,
Tawntung nuntakna hun nuampi, ka zong den ding uh hi

songs.title: HONG GEN DIH IN, TANGLAI THU

lines: Tang thupha hong genta in, a kimu ngeilo na;
Jesuh le a vanglian pi, Amah in na dingin;
Tangthu teltak hong gen in, naupangte hilh bangin;
Hong hilh in ka gimzo hi, ka khial gawp khinta hi.
Sakkik
Tua tangthu hong genta in, tua tangthu hong genta in;
Tua tangthu hong genta in, Jesuh le hong itna
Tua tangthu damtak gen in, ka theih baih nadingin;
A mah in hong tatkhiatna, mawh kiphel nadingin;
Tua tangthu hong genkik in, ka mangngilh theih loh na’ng;
Daitui bang zingsang om hang, sun ciangin mang thei hi.
Tua tangthu mah hong gen in, nuamna aw tawh gen in;
Mawhna pan hong phelna ding, Jesuh hong gup phawk ning;
Tua tangthu gen laitakin, gimna khat hong tun leh;
Hehnepna hong pia ding ci’n, tu’n tangthu genta in
Tua tangthu mah hong gen in, limtak kiciantakin;
Leitung minthannate in, hong suksiat gawp khak ding;
Hih leitung minthannate, ka lunggulh lua thei hi;
Jesuh’n hong damsaknate, nong gen phapha ding hi.
Na sepna lian bel sem dingin lawm aw zekai ke’n,
Khuavak na tangsak dingin khawl ke’n;
Na hih ding ngeina om bangin thupha omsak in,
Na omna munah tangsak in.
Sakkik
Na omna munah tangsak in, Na omna munah tangsak in.
A kisia ding a om mi khat peuhmah gupna ding,
Na omna munah tangsak in.
Na kiimah huh theih ding lunggim mi tampi om hi,
Nangma ang sung ding bek khual kei in;
Na lasak bekin zong a dahte hehnem thei hi,
Na omna munah tangsak in.
Lai Siangtho simin, Topa in hong makaih ding hi,
Na mawhna mai khaksak kei in;
Topa na theihna na mai suah tawh kitheisak in,
Na omna munah tangsak in.

songs.title: NA HI ZO DIAM? TOPA’N HONG CI

lines: Na hi zo diam, Topa’n hong ci,
A mah tawh kikhai khawm ding
Sih dong na deih bang gamta ding
Lungsim ah khentat zo ung
Sakkik
Hizo mah nung, Topa Nang aa hi ung.
Hong bawlpha in Nang tawh kibangin
Lam nong hilhna vang tang ka muh uh ciang
Na mel bangin hong it in
na thu man nung
Na hizo diam, tua thu phawk ding,
Guta pa khuadakna mun
Mawhna khempeuh kimaisak zo
Paradise munnuam tungzo
Na hizo diam, Haksat hun ciang
Na kiimkot khua a mial ciang
A mah na kipiak theihna ding
Na lungsim zo mah sa in
Na hizo diam, Topa’n hong sam,
Nangmah hong sam lailai hi
Galilee gam aa sap bangin
Lungsim hang takin dawng in

songs.title: KA LUNG SUNGAH LA NGAIH KA ZA

lines: Jesuh hong puak la khat ka ngah hi,
Tua la van pan hong puak hi;
Tua sang a ngaihzaw la om ngeilo hi,
Tua in ki-itna la hi
Sakkik
Ka lungsung la ngaih khat ka za hi
A kihual mahmah vantung pan hong kisa hi;
Ka lungsung la ngaih khat ka za hi,
Tua la in ki-itna la hi
Kalvary aa si Khazih it ing,
Ka mawhna hong sawpsak hi;
Ka lung sungah la ngaih khat hong koih hi
Ka lung sungah teng den ding
A tul ngeilo minthanna la hi,
Vantung mite tawh sa ding;
Tua la in a kihual mahmah la hi,
Van innpi panin hong ging
Khazih le Pawlpi a ding lasa ni,
Thupha ei te kumpi pa, A min pah tawi ni,
Khangno tha hat lai ut na tawh na sem ni,
Vantung gam thuman a’ ding teci pang ni.
Sakkik
Khazih it huai hong gumpa
Ei hong tan ding a si;
Si tawh lei sa pawl pi a ding,
Topa hong hang sak in.
Khazih leh pawlpi a ding,
Thungen ni ni sim singlamteh pua in,
A dial khai zui ni, Khasiangtho vangliatna
hong sawlna zui in,
Nuntak sung hun hoih lai tak in na sem ni.
Khazih leh pawlpi a ding ut na tawh
neih sa siamna leh hun,
Topa min tawh ap ni,
Cikmah hun bei ngeilo lungsim thuk itna
I neihsa pha bel Topa kiangah pia ni.
Khazih leh pawlpi a ding nung ta ni,
Kiphat sak na leh aituam lungsim pai khia ni,
Ngimna lianpi nei in, nisim nungta ni,
Tua ciang Honpa in a kiang hong sam ding hi.

songs.title: HONPA TUU CING BANG HONG PI IN

lines: Honpa tuu cing bang hong pi in
Nong huai na ko ki sam pha
An tam gam nuamah hong vak in
Hong bawl kholhsak in omna
Sakkik
Thupha Jesuh, Thupha Jesuh
Nong lei zo ko te nang a,
Thupha Jesuh, Thupha Jesuh
Nong lei zo ko te nang a.
Hong pawl in, Nang neihsa kote
Ko paina lampi cing in
Hong kem, hong hu in Na tuu te
Lam khialh ciang hong zong kik in
Mi zawng, mi mawh ka hih uh hang
Nong ciam zo hong sang dingin
Mawhna phel nang sian nang dal nang
Hehpihna na nei cing in
Ka neu lai un nangma pahtak
Na awi bang hong tasak in
Hong hon Topa aw, dimtak
Nangma itna hong guan in
Mim bang ka piancil in
Ka nu’n hong it man in,
A ang nunkhum
Tui tawh hong vak den a;
Ka deihna bangbang in
Hong gamtatsak manin,
Ka nu hong itna
Bangzah in lian hiam?
Sakkik
Hong it ka nu
Bang tawh ka teh thei diam?
Nong ho kamkhum
Bang tawh ka teh thei diam?
Lei zawh loh suangmanpha
Sang lianzaw hi,
Nu aw nong ho kamkhum za nuam den ingh.
Ka nu’n manphat nading,
A hong pattah manin,
Nu aw nong itna lian
Ka phawk den aa,
Topa’n hong hehpih in,
Na nun kum sawt sak hen;
Sim leitung kumsawt guabang
Hing khawm leng.
Nute’ pumpi khempeuh
Ei adingin manpha
A ang-ah hong tawi in
Hong lum sak a;
A nungah hong pua in
Nuam tak hong ih musak
Nu aw nongitna lian ka phawk den hi.

songs.title: (B). Ka Nu’ Thungetna Zakik Thei Leng Maw

lines: Ka nu damlai nite a nop dan lungngai ing,
Ka lungsim hong vut, hong phawng hilo maw;
Ka lungsim thanem ciang tua hun phawkkha zel ing,
Ka nu thungetna za kik thei leng maw
Sakkik
Zakik thei leng, nu’ awkhum za nuam ing
Keima ading hong thungetsakna aw,
Tua aw za leng, bangzah in lungdam ding
Ka nu thungetna zakik thei leng maw
Jesuh ka muan theih na’ng ka nu’n thu hong ngetsak,
Pasian deih bang ka nuntak theih nading;
Pasian’ itna muangin, van innpi hong zuansak,
Tua lai ah ka nu mu-in lungdam ning
Ka nu’ lungduaina le itna, maitaina in,
Lungnop, tawldam, lametna hong guan hi;
A sak ngei la awte za ing, ka bilkha in,
Tua la van mite’n zong ngaihsa uh hi.
Leitung nasep zo-in nuntak lukhu khuta,
Topa tawh vangam nuam ah tawlnga hi;
Lungdam ni zingsang ciang amah’n hong dawn dinga,
Tawntung innah ka mangkhawm ding uh hi.
Jesuh va ko ning, ka haksatna teng,
Kei kia’n pua zo ke’ng ka van lompi;
Hong puak pih ding hi, Amah va suan leng,
Kei hong it in hong kem tawntung hi.
Sakkik
Jesuh va ko ning! Jesuh va ko ning!
Kei kia’n pua zo ke’ng, ka van lompi;
Jesuh va ko ning! Jesuh va ko ning!
Kei a hong huh thei Jesuh bek hi.
Jesuh va ko ning ka lungkhamna teng,
Hong hehpih thei pen ka lawmpa hi;
Hong huhpah ding hi, va ko manpeuh leng,
Ka lung gimna teng veng pah ding hi.
Ze-et bawlsiatna, ke’n thuakkha zel ing,
Hong honpa lo in ka om thei kei;
Jesuh va ko ning, Jesuh va ko ning,
Amah bekbek hi, kei hong hon thei.
Leitung in hong zol ka siat-theih na ding,
Ka lungsim sung ah siatna dim hi;
Bangbang ka tuak zong Jesuh va ko ning,
Amah’n leitung hong zawhpih ding hi.
Lungdam huai leitung melpha, lungdam huai vantung etlawm;
Suah tung a kipan itna, kote kiim ah hong om khawm
Hih teng hang Khazih Topa, kongsak uh lungdamna la.
Sun le zan, a ni simin, ka muh uh lamdangnate
Mual le guam, singkung, paakpha, ni, kha, a tang aksite,
Hih teng hang Khazih Topa, kongsak uh lungdamna la.
Sanggam, suahpih, nu le pa, ki-it diamdiam a nuamna;
Lei le van a lawm apha, migitna ngaihsutna pha
Hih teng hang Khazih Topa, kongsak uh lungdamna la.
Nangma pawlpi’n a tawntung, khut siangthote lamto-in;
Mun khempeuh ah biakpiakna, lui in Nangmah hong bia hi
Hih teng hang Khazih Topa, kongsak uh lungdamna la.
Anuam kumpi inn sungah i om zongin,
Ei inn sang a nuamzaw inn dang omlo hi;
“Hiah inn nuam om hi” van pan hong ci zongin,
Ei inn sanga nuamzaw inn dang omlo hi
Sakkik
Inn nuam, inn nuam pen, ei inn kan om kei
Eima inn mah nuam pen.
Gamlak ka vak kawmin khapi ka en a,
Ka nu’n a ta hong phawk lamtak ka thei hi;
Kong gei paak kiang pan khapi na en-en a,
Tua paak namtui ka dikkha nawn kei ding hi.
Inn pan taikhiat hang mun nuam dang omlopi,
Ka bukno khiukheu mahah hong tunkik in;
Kei hong lungnuamsak vasate’n la sa hi.
I kimkot teng kilawmna, Innkuan ki-it leng
Awging khempeuh lungdamna
Innkuan ki-it leng
Lungnopna leh kicinna
Kiheina teng maitaina
Hun khempeuh nuammahmah a
Innkuan ki-it leng
Innkuan sung ki-it leng
Hun khempeuh nuam mahmah a
Innkuan ki-it leng.
Bukno khat sung zong nuamna
Innkuan ki-it leng
Huatna en na omlohna
Innkuan ki-it leng
I paina teng ah nuamna
Leitung khempeuh lungdamna
Lungdamna dim nuntakna
Innkuan ki-it leng
Innkuan sung ki-it leng
Lungdamna dim nuntakna
Innkuan ki-it leng.
Pasian zong hong lungdampih
Innkuan ki-it leng
Leitung teng ki-itna dim
Innkuan ki-it leng
Luiging bek zong la ngaihpi
Vandum bek zong maitaina
Pasian’ van pan hong nuihpih
Innkuan ki-it leng
Innkuan sung ki-it leng
Pasian’ vanpan hong nuihpih
Innkuan ki-it leng.
Vuk a pakna mual dawn pan, khang lam leimong dongah;
A mual a guam a zang pan, Tui tung leitung tengah;
A teeng mite khempeuh in, Pasian’ lam khial khin hi;
Tua khialhna kol sut ding-in, Eite hong sam uh hi.
Khua lumna gam sunga nung, Huihvot nuam mahmah a;
Etlawm a tamna gam sung, Mihingte sia khin ta;
Pasian hong hehpihna in, A mawkna suak khin hi;
Lawkite’n mittaw bangin, Sing leh suang bia uh hi.
Vantung khuavak thu theisa, Khuavak ta eite in;
Khuamial sunga mangthang sa, Mite khuavak puakin;
Gamlapi a om mite, Pasian meivak puak ni;
Hotkhiatna thu thei lote lungdamna thu puak ni.
Ama lungdamna thupha, Huih aw va lenpih in;
Mi khempeuh theih ding thupha, Tuipi’n va luan pih in;
Mawhneite tang ding sih thuak, Tuuno A hong pai ding;
I kumpi dingin hong tuak, lungdamna tawh mang ding.

songs.title: I OM DIAM TUA LAI AH?

lines: A minthang mahmah innpi nuam khat om hi,
Van sang dawn pek pek ah;
Tatsa te Jesuh tawh teen nading mun hi,
I om diam tua lai-ah?
Sakkik
I om diam tua lai-ah?
I om diam tua lai-ah?
Tatsate Jesuh tawh teen na ding mun hi,
I om diam tua lai ah?
Puakpaak silh in kham kong zing zui ding uh hi,
mei thenna van gam-ah;
Pasian’ itna khuavak ah pai ding uh hi,
I pai diam tua lai-ah?
Eite hong it Jesuh i muh ciang in-ah,
Pelh lo i zui ding hi;
Tua a nuam innpi ah hong khop ciangin-ah,
Ei zong i om ding hi.
Topa Jesuh singlamteh i belh ciangin,
Sisan in hong gawm hi;
Leitung nuntak na i nusiat ciangin,
A kiang i tung ding hi.
Ni a taan na mun khempeuh ah,
Topa Jesuh A maang ding hi;
Lei mong khat pan mong khat dong-ah,
Ama gam in a zai ding hi.
Minam kim leh pau nam kim in,
Hong itna la in sa uh hi;
Naupangte in Amah phat in,
Ama min a thang sak ding hi.
Ama tungah thu kingen in,
Amah kiphat tawntung ding hi;
Zing meihal paknamtui bang in,
Ama’ min a kizeel ding hi.
Tua ciang minam khempeuhte in,
Ei kumpipa phat ding uh hi;
Vantung mite’n la hong sa in,
Lei mi’n “Amen” ci’n dawng ding hi.
Ka theih ngei loh lungnopna ke’n ngah khin zo ta’ng,
Leitung in hongpiak theihloh nopna;
Topa tung pum leh kha ka kipiak khit nungsang,
Lamdang a lamdang ka Topa.
Sakkik
Lamdang ka Topa, Lamdang ka Topa
Vantung misiangte’n phat in bia hi, vanah;
Vanglian ka Honpa, kei aa Na hi ta,
Lamdang a Lamdang ka Topa.
Ka nuntakna khempeuh uk ding in kong deih hi,
Tua hileh kicing ding Na deihna; Na thu neihna bek in
Na deih na kimsak hi, Lamdang a lamdang ka Topa.
Ka siamna khempeuh Na khe phungah kong nga hi,
Nong san bang bang kei thaman hi pah;
Ka neih sate khempeuh Nang tungah kong pia hi,
Lamdang a lamdang ka Topa.
Leitung a a hoih pen sangin Na hoihzaw hi,
Nuntakna hong pia vanglian Topa;
Tawntung-a ka Pasian phat ding Na kilawm hi,
Lamdang a lamdang ka Topa.
An lak phat khin ta hi, Kuai khin zota hi,
Khris Topa’n hong sam a ni bei baih ding hi;
Hong sawl bang sem meng in, An-late pawm in,
Tha nuamtak sem in la an-late huh in.
Sakkik:
An lak phat khin ta hi, sep theih lai sem in;
A hun bei han han hi, Tuni-in sem in.
An lak phat khin ta hi, Kihei hei kei in,
An late sepna aw huih in hong puak khin;
Lungduai takin sem in, Khawm in anvui teng,
Kham leh zang mun khempeuh ni hong tum mateng.
An lak phat khin ta hi, Tuni’n kua kuan ding?
An late huh in buhlomte kuan pua ding;
Na kisep theih sun hun, Hong bei baih ding hi,
Na zawh ciang Topa’n “Pha hi” hong ci ding hi.
Lungdamna thupha ka za, “Jesuh in hong gum hi!”
Tua thupha na gen inla, “Jesuh in hong gum hi!”
Gam khempeuh ah pai inla, Mual kal, gungal kan dinga;
Va gen in Topa thupha, “Jesuh in hong gum hi!”
Gunpi kan in kiko in, “Jesuh in hong gum hi!”
Gamla nai mi kiang gen in, “Jesuh in hong gum hi!”
Tuikulh panin kiko in, A gal-khat na thawn sak in;
Leitungah lungdamna in, “Jesuh in hong gum hi!”
Gal kapna sung kiko in, “Jesuh in hong gum hi!”
Singlamteh tung sihna in, “Jesuh in hong gum hi!”
Hehpihna i deih ciangin, Tua thute na ngaihsun in;
Sihna zawh man lasa in, “Jesuh in hong gum hi!”
Leitungah na kiko in, “Jesuh in hong gum hi!”
Mi khempeuh lungdamsak in, “Jesuh in hong gum hi!”
Mual tung le kuam thuk sungah, Hong phelna thu gen in-la;
Hih zawhna thu lasakna, “Jesuh in hong gum hi!”
I Topa hong hehpihna in,
Suum pempam in hong tang hi;
Tua khuavak eite hong pia hi,
Tui tung teng ah tangsak in,
Sakkik
Meivak teng a vek pi’n vaak in,
Tuihual teng kimuh nading;
A cimawh tuikia om kha ding,
Gum khia in-la kaikhia in.
Mawhna in khua hongmial sak hi,
Tui-hualpi hong kilok hi;
Hoih takin khuadak pha in-la,
Tui dung teng phatak en in.
Na meivak phatak vak inla,
Tuihual in mi taai kha ding;
Nop takin suahtak theih nading,
Tawl ngakna mun tun theih nang.
Tangsak in, tangsak mengmeng in,
Tuipi kilok kantan in;
Hotkhiatna thu zeelsak mengin,
Migi Gumkhia Pa’ min in.
Sakkik
Tangsak in, tangsak mengmeng in,
Tuipi gal, tuikulhte dong;
Tangthu lamdang va zasak in,
Itna hehpihna khawnkhong.
Tangsak in, kha te’ sihna ah,
Tua zan khuamialna mun-ah;
Hat mengin hunte bei nei veh!
A nai, a nai in, bei ta.
Tangsak in, Topa’n hong sawl hi,
Athu siangtho lim ngaih dih!
“Paikhia in, ka thu va gen in,
Hong om pih den ning,” a cih.
Lungdamna thupha ngai in,
Gam la a nai gen in, Sihna thuak Topa Jesuh ,
Hong gup na thu gen in; Om tawntung hi,
Ama thu, A thuciamkip ding hi,
Topa Jesuh a umte, A min thang sak ding hi.
Sakkik
Topa Pasian kiangah, Hehpihna ngen te in,
Gupna thupha mantak a ngah thei ding uh hi;
Topa Pasian kiangah, Hehpihna ngente in,
Gupna thupha mantak a ngah thei ding uh hi.
Sawtvei khuamial a omte, Mawhna lam a zuite,
Topa Jesuh’n tanna pi, En in thupha bel hi;
Lungsim na neihzah inah, A thuciamna umin,
Topa kiangah thungente, Kisia ngeilo ding hi.
Leitungah vangik puate, Gimna tawlna thuakmi,
Na vangik a pua dingin, Topa in hong ngak hi;
Thupha lamdang hong pia a,
Mi khempeuh hawmsak hi,
Topa Jesuh thu umte, Amin thangsak ding hi.
Leitung teng Jesuh thu gen un,
Gun gal khat pan gal khat ah;
Jesuh thu mawhneite gen un,
A khuavak pha tangsak un.
Sakkik
Thangsak un, Leitung tengah, lungdam Thu
Gungal khat ah; Leitung teng Jesuh thu gen un,
A tawntung A min phat un.
Lungdam Thu’n gam-la-pi zeel hen,
Khuamialna mun gam khempeuh;
Lungdamna khuavak thei-sak un,
Thangsak un khuamial gam-ah.
Tuipi tung le mualtung tengah,
Lungdamna Thu thang sak un;
Mun khempeuh Jesuh Thugen un,
Hong sapna Thu thangsak un.
Mi khempeuh a’ding thungen in,
Lungdamna tawh huh ciat un;
I gam a’ ding zong thungen un,
Jesuh ei gam a’ ding in.
Miallak tuipi hual tung pan kiko aw in,
Khuavak hong puak un ci!
Khualmial sungah a cimawh mi tampi in,
Khuavak hong puak un ci!
Sakkik
Tang sak ni (o, tangsak ni nuamna)
Nuamna thupha khuavak (thupha khuavak)
Tangsak ni (tangsak ni), mun khempeuh-ah (mun khempeuh ah)
Tangsak ni (o tangsak ni), nuamna thupha khuavak (nuamna thupha khuavak)
Tangsak ni tawlnga lo-in.
Makedawnia gam pan a sapna aw in,
Khuavak hong puak un ci!
Singlamteh mai-ah i biakna koih sukin,
I khuavak va puak ni.
Jesuh hong hehpihna mi’n ngah kim na-ding,
Tangsak ni, tang sak ni!
Khazih lungsim bang kimuh kawikawi nading,
Tangsak ni, tangsak ni.
Eite’n itna nasepna cimtak kei ni,
Tangsak ni, tangsak ni!
Van lukhu zep nading suangmanpha khawm ni
Tangsak ni, tangsak ni.

songs.title: MITE TUNG GEN DING THU KHAT I NEI HI

lines: Mite tung gen ding thu khat i nei hi,
Amau lungsim A man hei ding;
Thuman le hehpihna tangthu,
Kilemna, khuavakna thu,
Kilemna khuavakna thu.
Sakkik
Zan khuamial, zing khuavak suak ding a,
Zing khuavak sun nitang suak ding hi;
Khazih gam lei tung’ hong tung ding hi,
Itna le khuavakna gam.
Mite tung sak dingla khat i nei hi,
Topa lam lungsim ngasak ding;
Siatna a zo ding la khat hi,
Tei leh namsau susia ding,
Tei leh namsau susia ding.
Mite tung puak ding thu khat i nei hi,
Van a mang tawntung Topa thu;
A Tapa hong sawlna thu hi,
Pasian itna hong lak thu,
Pasian itna hong lak thu.
Mite tung lah ding Honpa i nei hi,
Gimna dahna hong thuah khin hi;
Leitung mi khempeuh theih dingin,
Pasian thuman hong lak hi,
Pasian thuman hong lak hi.
Hat in Zion, sem meng in na na sep ding,
Miteng tung-ah khuavak Pasian hilh in;
Mihing khat zong khuamial sung a mangthang ding,
Phal het lo hi mihing piangsak Pa in.
Sakkik
Lungdamna thupha, Nopna thupha;
Jesuh, hong tatna thupha, va gen meng in.
En ven, mawhna khuamial thong inn mial sung ah,
Mi tul tampi kihenin om uh hi;
Khat beek va pai lo amau ko dingin ah,
A suaktak na’ng uh Topa si napi.
Mi namkim, pau namkimte kiang va gen in,
Amau hinna in Itna Pasian hi;
Kiniamsak in A bawlsate hon dingin,
Van nun nuam piak nading hong sisuk hi.
Na tate sawl in tua thupha gen dingin,
Na sum tawh huh in manlang theih nading;
Na lungsim teng tawh nak pi’n thunget sak in,
Na zat khempeuh Jesuh’n hong dinkik ding.
Lungdamna thu gingsak in,
Gam khat pan gam khat dongah;
Suahtakna thu zel khin sak in,
Kei leh nang ading bawl ta;
Leitung hong it man in,
A Tapa a hong pia hi;
A thu-um mite khempeuh in,
Nuntak tawntung ngah ding hi.
Sakkik:
Lungdam thu (lungdam thu) gingsak in (gingsak in),
Gam khat pan gamkhat dongah (gam khat pan gamkhat dongah)
Lungdam thu (lungdam thu), man ngen lo (man ngen lo),
Nangmah le kei ading hi (Nangmah le kei ading hi)
Lungdam na thu’n hong sam hi,
“Mi khempeuh hong pai ta hen;”
A hong sapna na nial kei in,
Pasian hehpihna lian hi;
“Kei in hinna ka hi, Lungsim khial a nei mi in;
A mawhnate a san hangin, Tuumul bang in ngo ding hi.
Lungdamna thu ngai lo mi’n,
Bang gimna a thuak ding hiam;
Tua lungdamna thu a khum in,
Kikepna hong hilh lai a;
Hinna gupkhiat na’ng in,
Khawl lo in-ah tai in la;
Na nunglam ki hei kik kei in, Hi kei leh na si ding ta.
Lungdamna thu nuamhuai hi,
Mun teng gam teng thawn khin ta;
Hon pa singlamteh tung sih na,
Tua hang mawhna mai thei ta;
“Lungdamna thu kong puak,
Mi khempeuhte a’-ding hi;
Note a’ ding Honpa hong suak,” Khris Topa Kumpipa hi.

songs.title: A THU KA GENGEN NUAM HI

lines: A thu ka gengen nuam hi,
Muh nai-loh vantung na;
Jesuh leh Ama vangpi,
Jesuh leh hongit-na
Thu ka gengen nuam hi,
Thuman ahih manin;
Ka lungsim hong kim sak hi,
Thu dangte bang lo-in.
Sakkik:
Tua thu ka gen-gen nuam hi,
Gengen lai ning vantungah;
Hih thu tul thei ngei lo pi,
Jesuh le hong itna.
A thu ka gengen nuam hi,
Lamdang semsem ka sa;
Kingaihsun thei nawn lopi,
Tua sang lamdangzaw na;
Tua thu ka gengen nuam hi, Hong nop-tuamsak na lian;
Tua hang mah’n kong gen sawn hi, Tu in lawm aw, nang kiang.
A thu ka gengen nuam hi,
Gengen leng nuam semsem;
Ka gengen sa hi napi,
Gengen leng ngaih semsem;
Tua thu ka gengen nuam hi,
Hotkhiatna thu a pha;
A za nai lo mi om hi,
Pasian hong gen thupha.
A thu ka gengen nuam hi,
A thei pente in zong;
An duh tuiduh bang duh hi,
Midangte sang in zong;
Vantung vanliatna sungah,
La thak ka sa ding hi;
Tua ciangin hih thului mah,
Kei in ka sa ding hi.
Khaici manpha vawh un,
Zingsang phalvak kipat tungin,
Khaici manpha vawh un, Sun khua phat laitak;
Khaici manpha vawh un,
khangno lungsim zep nadingin,
Khaici manpha vawh un, dawm in lungduai tak.
Sakkik
Khaici manpha vawh un, Khaici manpha vawh un,
Gamla nai-ah vawh un, Lungduai itna khut tawh;
Nuntak khomun balnen, Lungdamna tangthu gen ta un,
Khaici manpha vawh un, I it gam sungah.
Khaici manpha vawh un, ni a kai laitak inah zong,
Khaici manpha vawh un, um lah lo-in om un,
A vekpi’n Pasian ap in, Amah muang un.
Khaici manpha vawh un,
Lawpna le hanciamna tak tawh,
Khaici manpha vawh un, kham khaici manpha;
Khaici manpha vawh un,
Khutte tha zawsak ngei lo-in,
Pasian in ni le guah, pua ding thungen un.
A siangtho mahmah mual tungah, meilum a then ciangin ah;
Nisa a vangtanna vakpha, cik le lui neute tung tu’n;
Sakhi tuihup a vangin ah, itna pha lai kisimta;
Eite kimu dingin a hun, meiilum a then ciangin ah.
Sakkik
Eite i (eite i) kimu ding hi (kimu ding hi),
Leitungah (leitungah), kimuh bangin (kimuh bangin);
Tua thupha le lungdamna ni,
Zingsang a phalvak ciang ah;
Eite kimu dingin a hun, meilum a then ciangin ah
Mihingte khuamial sungah khial, leitung mi a hih mangngilh;
Phatna dinga hahkatna a, ki-itna thupha paikhia;
Nopsakna’ng Topa’n hong phel ding, eite khempeuh hong liah ding;
I ngak dingin zingsang hun hi, meilumte a theng ding hi.
Meilumte ei khempeuh tungah, a leentoh laitakin ah,
I it khempeuh i lawmte tawh, eite i kimu ding maw;
Khuamial cipna gungal khat-ah, khuavak ni tang hong tung ta;
A lamdang khuavak i muhna, meilum a then ciangin ah.
Nuihna le kahna kheng gal khatah,
Manlang in-ah ka tung ding hi.
Ih-mut-na le thawh na kheng gal ah, Tuh-na le at-na kheng gal khatah,
Manlang in-ah ka tung ding hi.
Sakkik
Nong it-na pha, inn-pi ah,
A om dingin,
Hong kha in Topa aw.
Palhna le vul-na kheng gal khatah,
Manlang in-ah ka tung ding hi.
khuavak le khuamial kheng gal khatah,
Lawp-na le lau-na kheng gal khatah,
Manlang in-ah ka tung ding hi.
Khuadam le khualum kheng gal khatah,
Manlang in-ah ka tung ding hi.
Suangmual-te le gunte gal khatah, Tawntung le tawntung lo gal khatah,
Manlang in-ah ka tung ding hi.
Ki-muh-na le ki-khenna gal-ah,
Manlang in-ah ka tung ding hi.
Ki-muak-na le ki-khakna gal-ah, Dip-kuat-na le ngaih muanna galah,
Manlang in-ah ka tung ding hi.
Gamlapi a mawhna khuamial gam sung-ah,
Mi tul le then gam mang in om uh hi;
Kua pai ding a Gupkhiatna thu va gen ding,
Jesuh en in, gimna ding ngaihsun ke’n.
Sakkik
“Vangliatna kei tung hong pia zo!”
Vangliatna kei tung hong pia zo!
Vak kawikawi unla, Lungdam Thu va gen un,
Note tawh ka om khawm tawntung ding hi.
Khua dak leci’n kong honsa in hong ngak hi,
Khazih galkapte aw pai in lut un;
Tha neih zah teng gawm in kikhen thang loin,
Thupha hilh in mawh na kol va sut un.
“Banghang note si zenzen ding” hong ci-in,
Pasian hong sapna thu va ko sawn un;
Hotkhiatna le hinna na ngah nadingin,
Jesuh si in hong tan zo va ci un.
Pa Pasian aw, hong tung sak mengmeng ta in,
Minam cin in Na min phat nading hun,
Hotkhiatna la lungdamna tawh kiko in,
Halelujah, Topa kumpi phat un.

songs.title: Lungdam Ni A’ding Na Kithawi Hiam?

lines: Vantung panin vangliatna tawh Topa hong paikik ding hun,
Lei le van mi a thei kuamah omlo hi;
Mi siangthote’n Amah dawnin a mite hong sam dinga,
Tua ni ciang pengkul awging kiza ding hi.
Sakkik
Na kithawi hiam? thawi hiam?
Kumpi dawn dingin,
Sem kawm, ngak kawm na kigingzo hiam?
Na kithawi hiam? thawi hiam?
Kumpi dawn dingin,
Lungdam ni adingin na kithawi hiam?
Mitphiat kal tomno khat sungin i kikhel khinta ding a,
Si thei nawnlo dingin i kikhel ding hi;
Amah ite’n Amah suun ding van pan hong kumsuk dinga,
Sun kim, zan kim, zingsang zong hi thei ding hi.
I mawhna si bang a san hang Kalvary pan hong tanta,
Singlamteh liimnuai-ah damna va zuan ni;
Amah’n eite hong kem den a, vuk bang in hong ngosak ta,
Meiipi tung tuangin hong paisuk kik ding hi.

songs.title: Amaute in La Thak Asa Uh Hi

lines: Vantung inn sungah i lawmte’n lasa hi,
Hong gum Topa a min a phatna uh hi;
Leitungah lungkhamna teng mangngilh khina,
Misiangthote’n lungdamna la thak a sa.
Sakkik
Jesuh min phat ni,
Kalvary mual tung sizo hi;
Jesuh min phat ni,
Sihna zo a, hingkik ta hi.
Hong hehpihna phatna’ng la thak om kim hi,
A um tading thupha bel ahi ding hi;
Topa si a a piangkik a minthanna,
Ka genna sa nuam bel Pasian kiangah.
Tuni sipha tawh a kisil lote in,
Tua la thak kuamah in sa thei lo ding hi;
Mawh neite mawhna phel a hong hehpihna,
Phatna lungdamin limtakin la sa ni.
Kumpi pa mai i ding ding,
Vantungmi tawh la sa ding,
Nung ciangin, nung ciangin;
A tang gun gei lam zui ding,
Topa min phat tawntung ding,
Nung ciangin, nung ciangin.
Sakkik
Kumpipa mai i ding ding,
Vantung mi tawh la sa ding,
Kumpipa a min phat ding;
Hallelujah! Hallelujah!
Kumpipa mai i ding ding.
Vantung khua sik long tum ding,
Kumpipa mai i ding ding,
Nung ciangin, nung ciangin;
Dahnate paisan ding a,
Sa tawntung ding min phatna,
Nung ciangin, nung ciangin.
Ka kha in manpha puak ding,
Kumpipa mai i ding ding,
Nung ciangin, nung ciang in;
Zawhna A khe mai nga ding,
Amah bang meel kicing ding,
Nung ciangin, nung ciangin.
Gal omlo Jesuh ang sung, kham khut tawh hong kawi ding,
Hong itna a liim beel leng, ka lungsim nuamsa ding.
Ngai un, vantung mi aw in, A vangtang vantungah;
Mual tung, tuipi tal panin, la sa bang hong tunga.
Sakkik
Gal omlo Jesuh ang sung, Kham khut tawh hong kawi ding;
Hong itna a liim beel leng, Ka lungsim nuamsa ding.
Gal omlo Jesuh ang sung, gimna tawlna beina,
Leitung ze-etna khialhna’n, Hong zolzo nawn lo ding.
Lungkiatna le dahnate, kihtakn zong dai hi;
Leitungah khitui luanna, neukha bek om lai hi.
Ka bukna Jesuh suangpi, kei tang ding hong si pa,
Tua khang suangpi ka bel a, ka muang tawntung ding hi.
Zan khuamial hun bei mateng,
Hiah ka ngak hithiat hi;
Kham khua a hong vak mateng, lungdamin ka ngak hi.
I omna’ng inn ngaihsun inla,
A tang gungal khat ah om a ci;
Mi siangthote nuamna a oma,
Puan pak tawh kizemin om hi.
Sakkik
Vantung-ah, vantung-ah,
I omna ding inn vantung-ah!
Vantung-ah, vantung-ah,
Vantung-ah, I omna ding inn vantung-ah.
Nangma lawmte ngaihsun inla,
Amailam a maute’n a zui hi;
Lungdamna tawh a maute’n la sa,
Pasian innpi sung om uh hi.
Vantung hong gum Topa kiangah,
Keima lawmte nuamsa a om hi;
Tua mun in gimna om nawnlohna,
Keima kha i n a tung nuam hi.
En in, i lawmte vantung-ah,
Amaute vantung khua a lutzo;
A lungkhamna teng bei khin ding a,
Gimna tawntung mu lo omzo.

songs.title: Tua Lai Ka Om Nuam Hi

lines: A sap mi gam nuam ah om nuam ing,
A nopna kam in gen zawh hi lo;
Ni sangin a tangzaw gam nuam ah,
Jesuh tawh a tawntung om nuam ing.
Sakkik
Hih lamah, Hih lamah,
Jesuh tawh a tawntung om nuam ing;
Hih lamah, Hih lamah,
Jesuh tawh a tawntung om nuam ing
Lai Siangtho sung thu ka theih ciangin,
Tawntung nuntak nopna thu hi ding;
Gimna tawlna dangtak na khempeuh,
Tua gam i tun ciang om nawn lo ding.
A nuam a hoihna gam nuam sungah,
Sihna lungkhamna om nawn lo ding;
Kahna khitui luanna om nawn lo,
Sihna om lo nun nop gam nuam ah.
Tua gam nuam sungah om thei dingin,
Pasian in mawhnei mi hong hehpih;
A thuciam bang a um khempeuhte,
A tawntung tua gam ah om ding hi.
Vantung inn nuam ah kikhawm ding in-ah,
Ni nuam zing sang gungei cik khuk-ah;
Kikhawm ding hong ngakte tawh kimu leng,
Lungdam nuamsa in la i sa ding.
Sakkik
Kikhawm ding innpi ah,
A nuam gun pi le ciktui gei-ah;
Hong ngak i lawmte tawh,
Nuam in Topa min i phat ding hi.
Hong tel Topa hong hehpihna pha a,
I lawmte ei hong ngak in om ta;
Dahna tawh kipelh in i om ding hi,
Kimuh ciang lungdam in la sa ding.
Hong gum Topa Jesuh tokhom tung ah,
Lawmte aw a mai kikhawm in-ah;
Hong itna hong hehpihna a pha a,
A minthanna phat in la sa ni.
Khua mial bei ding Jesuh A hong pai ciang,
Khuamial bei ding Jesuh A hong pai ciang;
Khuamial bei ding Jesuh A hong pai ciang,
A it teng hong khawm ding hi.
Sakkik
A it teng hong khawm ding hi,
A it teng hong khawm ding hi;
Khuamial bei ding Jesuh A hong pai ciang,
A it teng hong khawm ding hi.
Dahna bei ding Jesuh A hong pai ciang,
Dahna bei ding Jesuh A hong pai ciang;
Minthang ta ding Jesuh A hong pai ciang,
A it teng hong khawm ding hi.
Kahna bei ding Jesuh A hong pai ciang,
Kahna bei ding Jesuh A hong pai ciang;
Thaman sang ding Jesuh A hong pai ciang,
A it teng hong khawm ding hi.
Nuam la sa ding Jesuh A hong pai ciang,
Nuam la sa ding Jesuh A hong pai ciang;
Lungdam khawm ding Jesuh A hong pai ciang,
A it teng hong khawm ding hi.
Sun sanga phazaw gam nuam om a,
I upna in kigalmuh thei hi;
Ei a’ ding, tua gampha vantung-ah,
I Pa’n omna hong bawl kholh sak hi.
Sakkik
Nung ciangin a nopna,
Tua gam pha-ah i kimu ding hi;
Nung ciangin a nopna,
Tua gam pha ah i kimu ding hi.
Eite in tua gun-gal gam pha-ah,
Thupha ngah mite’ la ngaih sa in;
Dah ngei nawn lo ding I lung sungah,
Khuisa ngei nawn lo ding tawldam khin.
Hong piak sa vanglian hong itna pi,
Hong siang sak thupha, pahtawina la;
Tawlnga lo phatna i sa ding hi,
Hong it vantung Pa Pasian mai ah.

songs.title: KHAM GAM NUAM-AH KA TENG HI

lines: Gamlapi a gal do na thu ka bil in ka za hi,
Tua ciang leitung mawhna’n van nuai zeel ding ka thei hi;
Muanlahna, launa leitung nate’n kei hong zol uh hang!
Hong ngah khia lo ding hi, Kham gam nuam pan.
Sakkik
Mual tung-ah meiikai lohna, a nopna ah ka teeng hi,
Tuinak pha pan a hong luang, tui kang ngei lo dawn ing,
Hi hi, bei hun nei lo a hong piak Manna tawh ka kivak hi,
Kei in kham gam nuam-ah ka teeng hi.
Gamlapi a om leitungah lungmanna huih nung a,
Leitung mite in sawtveipi gal a do uh hi;
Kei ka hih leh Pasian inn muanhuai sungah ka om a,
Gal do na’n hong ban kei, kham gam nuam-ah.
Huihpi nak pi nun hangin phamawh ka sa kei ding hi,
Pasian khutnuai kiliah in, lungmuang in ka om hi;
Hih lai-ah ni tang tawntung a, hong siasak ding om lo,
Tawntung ka lungmuang hi, Kham gam nuam-ah.
Pasian na-sepna mi in, ka ngaihsut sut ciang in-ah,
A aw ka za a, Lampi hong puah sak ka mu hi;
Kha Siangtho ka ngah khina, gupna thu ka tel khin hi,
Lungdamin om den ning, Kham gam nuam-ah.
Lim ngaihsut dide khat,
Lungsim hong phawng pahpah;
Inn lam ka naih zaw hi, tuni’n,
A beisa nite sang.
Sakkik
Inn tawh naizaw’ng, Inn tawh naizaw’ng,
Inn tawh naizaw’ng tuni’n, tuni’n,
A beisa nite sang.
Omna tampi omna,
Ka Pa inn lam naihzaw’ng;
Kumpi tokhom naihzaw’ng, tuni’n,
Suang pak tuipi naihzaw’ng.
Van gikte kingakna,
Nuntak gam gi naihzaw’ng;
Singkhuam ngak ding nai zaw’ng, tuni’n,
Lukhu ngah ding naihzaw’ng.
Lampam ka sik khialh ciang,
Ka kiang ah hong nai in;
Inn tawh ka kinai zaw tuni’n,
Ka ngaihsut sang in-ah
Tua lai gam om nitum lohna,
Van ah ni tang tawntung;
Tua lai nitak om ngei lo hi,
Topa vang in tang hi.
Sakkik
Singlamteh e’n i puak leh,
Kham lukhu i khu ding;
Mi hoihte sung i ten leh,
Khuavak sung i om ding.
Tua lai mun om kilemna gam,
Gimna om nawnlohna;
Tua lai huih dam zong nung hiauhiau,
I tunna’ng tua mun-ah.
Tua lai inn om, minthang inn om,
A kigen van inn nuam;
I tun nading vantung inn nuam,
Ei hong dawn ding tua lai.
I pum lui na i nusiat leh,
Manlangin hong kheng ding,
A tang van zinpa kiang zuan leng,
I lung nuam tawntung ding.
Ni tumna gal-ah, Aw a nuam zingsang,
Topa hong om ciang, Vantung hi zo;
Khualzin na bei in, minthanna mu ding;
Ni tumna gal-ah, Lei bei ni ciang.
Ni tumna gal-ah, Meii kai ngeilohna,
Huihpi om nawn lo, Launa bei ta;
Aw lungdam na ni, Aw bei ngei lo ni,
Ni tumna galna gal-ah, tawntung nopna.
Ni tumna gal-ah, Khut tawh hong kha ding,
I biak i Topa, Pasian kiangah;
A ma minthanna hong dawnna kamkhum,
Kei a’ ding hi ta, Tua gungal-ah.
Ni tumna gal-ah, Lungdam kikholhna,
A tungsa i it, i lawmte tawh;
Tua a nuam gam sung, Kikhen nawn lo ding,
Ni tumna gal-ah, a tawntung ah.
Jordan gun gei ah ka dinga,
A gal lam ka en hi;
Kanaan gam nuam hong kilang a,
Ka luah nading gam hi.
Sakkik
Tua gam nuam sungah ei i khawl ding hi,
A nop tawntungna gungal khat-ah;
Nung ciangin Moses le Tuuno la sa ding hi,
Jesuh tawh mang tawntung ding hi.
Tua gam pha bel sungah inn-ah,
Khuavak tawntung om hi;
Pasian le Jesuh vang in-ah,
A tang tawntung ding hi.
Cikciang tua gam ka tung ding hiam,
Khuamial om lohna ah;
I Pa maitang lungdamna dim,
Cikciang ka mu ding hiam.
Ka sin sungah lungdam nading,
Leitung sawtpi om lo;
Jordan gunpi kilok hangin,
Lungdamin ka tum zo.

songs.title: NUNG CIANGIN I ZO DING HI

lines: Topa Jesuh’n hong sam hi,
I mai-ah koih khin zo hi,
Thaman la ding pai un ci, Vantung pan;
Itna kamkhum tawh hong sam,
Mawhna khuamial sung om mi,
Dam takin Topa’n hong sam, Hong nai hi.
Sakkik
Nung ciang a kiang kimu ding, Nung ciang a kiang kimu ding,
Nung cianga Topa Jesuh tawh mang ding hi.
Nung ciang a kiang kimu ding, Nung ciang a kiang kimu ding,
Nung cianga Topa Jesuh tawh mang ding hi.
Lam hong hilh bang zui ding hi,
I tun nading inn nuam ah,
Hong zui un, ci’n hong sam hi,
Vantung pan Tua ciang kikhen nawn lo ding,
Lawp a i lam-etna bang,
Upna bangin khial lo-in, Hong nai hi.
Ze-et bawlsiat i thuak zong,
I inn ding Vantung om hi,
Jesuh’n hong it veve hi, Vantung pan;
Topa’ muanhuaina lian hi,
A kamciam peel ngei lo hi,
A tawntung i phat ding hi, Hong nai hi.
It aw, nuam tak in ihmu in tawl nga in;
I Topa dip tung lukham in nei in;
Nang kong it hang, Topa’n hong it-zaw sem;
Mangpha! Mangpha! Mangpha!
Naungek bang nuamtak ihmu hit-hiat in;
Dahna, kahnate’n nang hong phawng lo ding;
Nang aa a nuam hit-hiat ihmut-na hi;
Mangpha! Mangpha! Mangpha!
Hih leitung-ah ni liim a bei mateng;
Topa’n A tuu buk sung hong khop mateng;
Ni vangtang khuamial a hong bei mateng;
Mangpha! Mangpha! Mangpha!
Pasian tokhom mai kimuh kik mateng;
A sia thei lo puan a hong piak mateng;
Tu’n i theih bangin i kitheih mateng;
Mangpha! Mangpha! Mangpha!
Minthanna thawhkik zing khuavak mateng;
Jesuh sung a si te thawhkik mateng;
Minthanna tawh a hong paikik mateng;
Mangpha! Mangpha! Mangpha!
Jesuh si in hong sawp siang hi,
Kikhawm ding sihna gun gal-ah;
Natna hong tun’n kik ding nai lo,
Nuamna thu kikum in om ni;
Sihna gungal khatah.
Sakkik
Sihna gungal khatah, Sihna gungal khatah,
Sihna gungal khatah, I tun ding hong nai ta!
I tun ding hong nai ta, I tun ding hong nai ta,
I tun ding hong nai ta, Sinna gungal khatah.
Dahna hong tung ding ka lau lo,
Upna’n ka mu vantung ka en;
Ka za hi vantung mi’n la sa,
Khitui khempeuh Topa’n nul khin;
Sihna gungal khatah.
A itte tawh kikhop nuamna,
Bang aw ka za ding hiam tua-ah;
Ka lungsim hong vut hong tho sak,
Na dang deihna tau mun mang sak;
Sihna gungal khatah.
Topa hong hilh bang ka zuihna,
Lungdam ka ngah a kicinna;
Khawlngei lo-in ka phat ding hi,
Khitui khempeuh hong nul sak hi;
Sihna gungal khatah.

songs.title: TUA LAI DAHNA OM NAWN LO

lines: Vantung ka ngaihsun hi,
Topa Pasian omna;
A kham maitang nisim mu ding,
Nop kicing man ngahna.
Sakkik
Dahna kipelhna mun,
Dahna kipelhna mun;
Itna kicing vantung khamgam,
Dahna kipelhna mun.
Vantung ka ngaihsun hi,
Hong teel Topa omna;
Hong itna pha phat nading la,
Kisa tawntung ding hi.
Vantung ka ngaihsun hi,
Vantung mihingte in;
Puanpak silh in a om uh hi,
Ei zong i om ding hi.
Vantung ka ngaihsun hi,
A tungsa i lawmte;
Mu a kikhen nawn lo ding a,
Nuam tawntung ding hi veh.

songs.title: VANTUNG KHUA I TUNG DING HI

lines: Jesuh’n an bang hong itna pha,
Lam bang pak zaila sa ni;
Thang van inn tang sau siang nun nuam,
Ei a’ ding ngobang lang hi.
Sakkik
Thangvan dawng i tun ciangin,
Deih teng le lai lung damna ngah ding hi;
Kum khua in la sa ni,
Topa Jesuh i phat ding hi.
Thangvan tuanglam i zuih laitak,
Zaitha tawlna om ding hi;
Hi zong i pai khit ciangin-ah,
Zaitha tawl om lo ding hi.
Zangni suah sim i um ding a,
Limbelh sawl siang i leng ding;
Saumang nunnuam kuam bang luah na’ng,
Guabang hinlai ngaih khua-ah.
I mainopna lailung damna,
Va bang leng tung nuam ing ci;
Thangvan kankil i tun ciangin,
Kham vang khuapi i mu ding.
Vantung gam lam i zuat nadingin,
Jesuh in lam hong sialsak zo ta;
I gal khempeuh a vekpi’n zo khin,
Hih lam-ah hong pai un u le nau.
Sakkik
Gam nuamah om ding in, om dingin, om dingin,
Hih lam-ah hong pai un u le nau,
Gam nuamah om dingin, om dingin, om dingin,
Hih lam-ah hong pai un u le nau.
Tu-inah hehpihna lam zong un,
Tua hi leh khuamialna bei ding hi;
A umte in vantung gam zuan un,
Na up leh vantung na tung ding hi.
Jesuh in hong hehpih in hong sam,
A um lo mite umsak ding hi;
Hehpihna thupha ngah ding hong sam,
Pasian gam sung hong lutpih ding hi.
Sihna kuam gal khat-ah khua lianpi khat om hi,
Minthan nate kigen khin zo lo;
Tua mun-ah ni tum lo, singteh vul ngei lo,
Tua Pasian kham khuapi hoih sungah.
Sakkik
Tua munah ni tum lo,
Singtehte vul ngei lo;
Tua munah thuman mi’ maitang Topa’n en ding,
Tua Pasian kham khuapi hoih sungah.
Tua mun i it kumpi hong tanpa Topa om,
Thuman mite’n lungdam en uh hi;
Tua munah thuman mite aksi bang tang ding hi,
Tua Pasian kham khuapi hoih sungah.
Singlamteh phung i tunpih khit sa kha khempeuh,
Tuu buk sung i tutsa tuu khempeuh;
Lukhu zep nading suang manpha bang kikem hi,
Tua Pasian kham khuapi hoih sungah.
Ze-etna le nasep nate bei ciang,
A hoih tuipi gei-ah muangtak om ding;
Ka it mahmah Topa kiang nai om ding,
Tanglai pek pan minthanna kei a’ding.
Sakkik
Aw kei a’ ding tua minthanna,
Tua minthanna, tua minthanna;
Hong hehpih na, A mai ka en dingta,
Tua minthanna in keima a’ ding hi.
A bei ngei lo hehpihna hong piak ciang,
Vantung khua ah omna khat ka nei ding;
Topa maitang tua mun ka mu den ding,
Tanglai pek pan minthanna kei a’ding.
Sawtpi a muh nop lawm te na om ding,
Tua mun-ah lungdamna guntui luang ding;
Gumpa mai-ah nuih mai bek om ka thei,
Tanglai pek pan minthanna kei a’ding.
Vantung vanglian hehpihna gam,
Mi siangthote inn a hi;
Ama kiangah om tawntung ni,
Leitung na khempeuh paai ni.
Sakkik
Leitung ni abei ciang in-ah,
Nung ciangin inn nuamah;
Mi siangtho te om na lam-ah,
Vantung khua om ding hi.
Tawntung inn nuam vanglian gamah,
I lawmte tua gam om ding;
Tua inn nuam sung-ah om dingin,
Mi namcin a khawm ding hi.
Hong gupna si pha vanglianpi,
Hehpihna gam teng zelsak;
Hih gal gamah i om lai-in,
Hong hehpihna thu gen ni.
Khattang hih hang pai in gen ni,
Leitung dahna kiam ding hi;
Lungsim deihteng tawntung omna,
Kim takin a om ding hi.
Nidang lai a i kikholhna,
Lung sungah hong suak zel hi;
Hih leitunga I kikhenna,
Dah khitui luanna hi.

songs.title: KA OM NA’NG KHUA A HI

lines: Ni a taanna gal khat lamah,
Nopsakna gam lamah;
Aksi zong a taanna gal-ah,
Ka om na’ng khua a hi.
Sakkik
Tua khuapi nuam khut tawh bawl lo,
Tua gam ei ma ading;
Tawntung vantung mi’n la a sa,
Eima omna ding hi.
Gimna thuakna gungal khat-ah,
Lungsim tamna galah;
Kikhel a i nopsak na’ngah,
Ka om na’ng in bawl ta.
Sihna tuipi gal khat lamah,
Khuamialna gal khatah;
Lungdam nuamnai ngah na ding,
A tang in ka mu hi.
Mawhna, dahna, gimna, launa,
Mangpha ka khak khin ta;
Tawntung tua khuapi nuam sungah,
Topa tawh om khawm ning.
Hong tung ding leitung hin bei ni,
Tu’n ka theih bang la sa lo ding;
Ka thawh kik ciang ka nuam ding hi,
Topa Kumpipa tawh om ning.
Sakkik
Ka mu ding hi, Topa’ maitang,
Gupna thu itna tawh hong gen;
Ka mu ding hi, Topa maitang,
Gupna thu itna tawh hong gen.
Leitung ka inn puk ni om,
Cik ciang ding hiam gen thei lo hi;
Hih hang ka thei kei a’-ding om,
Vantung ka om na’ng ka thei zo.
Ni a tang hong liap sak ciangin,
Ni tum khua vangtang lim nuaiah;
Ka Topa’n kei pha ci-in,
Hong lut sak ding hiam khawlna-ah.
Ni khat ni ding vil in ngak in,
Ka meivakte tang phasak ning;
Hong Honpa’n kong hong hon ciangin,
Ama kiang zuan in lengto ning.
Kiu li nei khuapi om a,
Ni tum ngeiloh na-hi;
Cik mah ciang sia lo ding a,
Zan cih om ngeilo hi.
Sakkik
Pasian in khitui nul a,
Sihna, natna om lo hi;
Hun le kum cih om lo a,
Zan cih om ngeilo hi.
Kiu li nei khupi om a,
A kongpi kep a hi;
A kong zing-te kham hi a,
Zan cih om ngeilo hi.
Tua kiu li nei khuapi-ah,
Kong kikhak ngei lo hi;
Nuntakna tui luanna-ah,
Zan cih om ngeilo hi.
Tua kiu li nei khua sungah,
Nitang kisam lo hi;
Tuuno ni bang tanna ah,
Zan cih om ngeilo hi.

songs.title: A SAWT LOIN INN-AH CIAH DING

lines: Lampi ah hong lungnuam sak ding la khat sa ni,
A sawt loin ah inn ah ciah ding;
Zan khuamial bei ding, ni tang tawntungna sungah,
A sawt loin ah inn ah ciah ding.
Sakkik
A sawt loin ah, a sawt loin ah,
Tuipi hual i kantan ding;
Eite kimu ding huihpi nung a ven ciang in,
A sawt loin ah inn ah ciah ding.
Sep ding i muh peuh i khut in i sem ding hi,
A sawt lo inah inn ah ciah ding;
Pasian hehpihna in i tha hong khauhsak ding,
A sawt lo inah inn ah ciah ding.
A gim khete a’ ding lam i sialsak ding hi,
A sawt loin ah inn ah ciah ding;
Itna lungsim kizel kim in hoih na lawh hen!
A sawt loin ah inn ah ciah ding.
Lungkhamna peng in tawldamna gal khat-ah om,
A sawt loin ah inn ah ciah ding;
Tua khuapi nuam sungah khitui luanna om lo,
A sawt loin ah inn ah ciah ding.

songs.title: INN PHA BEL-AH I PAI DING

lines: Mi siangthote pai nading lampi in,
Pasian mai-ah a om ding hi;
Vantung khua mual ah i pai ngit nget a,
Zingsol i tungah hong taang hi.
Sakkik
Inn pha bel-ah i pai ding a,
Lungdamna tawh i kimu ding hi;
Khuamun nuambel eite’n i phak ciang,
Dahna om nawn lo hi.
Lam nuam tawn mi siangtho honpite in,
Zion khua a ciah kik bangin;
Meivak sungah namgim tui thun khol un,
Vantung khua ah i pai ding hi.
Lam nuam tawn ding a i ngaihsut leh,
Khat le khat i ki-itna in;
Pasian tawh eite i omkhawm dinga,
Nuam in i om tawntung ding hi.
Jordan gun gei a a votna gei-ah,
I din hangin a gal khat-ah;
Topa Pasian tawh i ngap khawm dinga,
A min i phat tawntung ding hi.
I kimuh na’ng gun galkhat ah,
Nung ciangin, nung ciangin;
Khuamial hun om ngei loh-na ah,
Nung ciangin, nung ciangin;
Khuazin gimna bei khin a,
Minthanna tawh galzo in;
Ni bangin i tang ding hi,
Nung ciangin, nung ciangin.
Minthanna guasem i tum ding,
Nung ciangin, nung ciangin;
Ei hong gupna la i sa ding,
Nung ciangin, nung ciangin;
A kisia ngeilo vantung,
Lungdam nopsak den-na mun;
Gun gal thawm in la sa ding,
Nung ciangin, nung ciangin.
Jesuh mu in kibang ta ding,
Nung cingin, nung ciangin;
Kisia thei lo lukhu ngah ding,
Nung ciangin, nung ciangin;
A kisia ngei lo vantung,
Vantung mi nasemte in;
Ei’ na hong sep sak ding hi,
Nung ciangin, nung cingin.
Khitui luanna om nawn lo ding,
Nung ciangin, nung ciangin;
Lungdamna nuam pen hi ta ding,
Nung ciangin, nung ciangin;
A paisa mi siangthote,
Nuntakna gam nuam tungta;
Amau tawh awng ding eite,
Nung ciangin, nung ciangin.
Zan khuamialna ah i vakthap nawn kei ding,
A kilawm kong pi kihon ciang;
Pasian khuavak a hihna khua i pai ding,
A kilawm kongpi kihon ciang.
Sakkik
A kilawm kongpi kihon ciang,
A kilawm kongpi kihon ciang;
Tua mun-ah Topa mu in i lung nuam ding,
A kilawm kongpi kihon ciang.
Natna, satna dahnate om nawn lo ding,
A kilawm kongpi kihon ciang;
A pai sa I lawm itte tawh kikhawl ding,
A kilawm kongpi kihon ciang.
Gen khiat zawh loh lawpna kei aa hi ta ding,
A kilawm kongpi kihon ciang;
Amah en in a sianthona ka mu ding,
A kilawm kongpi kihon ciang.
Leitung vangik te’n hong nawngkai sak lo ding,
A kilawm kongpi kihon ciang;
Lungdam tawntungna ah Khris tawh i teng ding,
A kilawm kongpi kihon ciang.
Jesuh mai-ah mi tampi kikhawm uh a,
A min phatna la sa in, gawsem tum uh hi.
Sakkik
Ei hong it a,
I mawhna hong phelsak Topa,
Ama min thang tawntung ta hen!
Amen, Amen.
Mawhna nei ngeite tua mihon maitang ah,
Puanpak silh in, sa uh hi,
Ama minphatna la.
A galte, siampi le kumpi suaksak hi,
A sipha tawh lei in, la thak a sa sak hi.
Hong tatkhiatna om kha zenzen lo hi leh,
Mawh nei mite bangzah in, i cimawh ding hiam.
Amah phatna aw nakpi in gingsak ni,
Midangte zong um a la thak a sak na’ng hi.
An le leng tui gam ka tung zo,
A phatna teng kei aa hi zo;
Lungdam huai ni tang tawntunghhi,
Keima khuamial leng mang zo hi.
Sakkik
Aw gam nuampi, a pha gam pi,
Mualsang tung pan ka gal-et a,
Kei a’ ding bawl kholhsa inn pi,
Tuipi gal-ah ka gal muh ta;
Ka tenna ding vantung khuapi,
A tangpha hi tuipi gal ah
Hong Honpa kei tawh hong vak khawm,
Nuam takin kei tawh hong om khawm;
A khut in dam tak in hong kai,
Vantung gamgi ciang dong ka nai.
Gam gi gal panin paknamtui,
Huih nung hiauhiau tawh hong kizui;
A vul ngei lo pakte palh in,
Hinna lui luang a tawntung in.
Vantung gam pan ngaih mah mah la,
Huih in hong puak ka gal zak hi;
Vantung mi le mising honpi’n,
Tatna phelna la sa uh hi.
Vantung kumpipa tate,
Na pai la sa un aw;
Hong gum Topa’ van pi tawh,
Phat in ah la sa un aw.
Sakkik
Vantung inn ah pai ding om,
Tanglai mi paina lampi;
Tu lai mi nuam sa un aw,
A sawt lo eite’n mu ding.
En un aw, khuavak mi-te,
Zion khuapi mu dek hi;
Tua ah Topa tawh nuam sa,
Topa pi mukim un aw.
Lau kei un! u le nau aw,
Leitung lam tawpah ding un;
A ta Jesuh Topa in,
Hong sawl hi mai nawt ding in.
Leitung nate nusia in,
Mainawt ka pai ding uh hi;
Nang bek makaipa Na hi,
Na nung kong zui ding uh hi.
Mawhna sung ka om lai-in, Jesuh itna’n hong zong;
A lam dang hehpih na in, Hong kha kik tuu buk dong;
A thuk, a sang hehpihna, Tuipi sang zong thuk zaw;
Vantung sangin zong sang zaw, Ka deih bel hi lo maw.
Sakkik
A kumkum in nuam semsem,
A kum kum in nuam semsem;
Jesuh it-na lian zaw, cing zaw, thukzaw, khumzaw,
A kum-kum in nuam semsem.
Tang lai Judea gam sungah, Jesuh vak kawikawi a;
Hotkhiatna thu thei nuam in, Mi hon hong pai uh a;
Lung tamkham te damsakin, Mittawte vaak sak hi;
A migitna lungsim in, Kei na ngawn hong it hi.
A lamdang hong itna hang, Supna, baina hong thuak;
Singlamteh tungah gimna, Phun lo, pau lo-in thuak;
Tatkhiat sa mi siangte tawh, I aw sang khai ve ni;
Leitung vantung thawnsak in, Ei hong Tanpa phat ni.
Tu-in kum thak hong tung ta, Topa nong piaksa hi;
Sep ding bawl ding kum hi a, Nang tawh sep khop ding hi;
Mainawtna ding kum hi a, Kong phat ding kum a hi;
Nisim a nong ompihna, Theih telna ding kum hi.
Hehpihna kum thak hi a, Cihtak na’ng kum zong hi;
Na maipha muh kum hi a, Lung damna’ng kum thak hi,
Nong hehpihna ang-sung a, Kong ki ap kum a hi;
Lungnuam tawl dam hit-hiat a, Kong muan na’ng kumthak hi.
Nong itna thu gen khia a, Nasep na’ng kumthak hi;
Nasep siangtho sem ding a, Kipattah kum a hi;
Tu-in kum thak hong tung ta, Topa nong piaksa hi;
Leitung leh vantung teng a, Na minthan ding kum hi.
A deihhuai tangthu Hon pa itna thu,
Ani ani-in ngaih semsem;
Hong khap sa van inn hang lung-muanna thu,
Ani ani-in ngaih semsem.
Sakkik
A ni (ani) simin, Amah (amah) phatna la sasa ni,
Hun zong nuam semsem (nuam semsem);
Van a Pasian i phatna la,
Ani a ni-in ngaih semsem.
Nuntakna khuavak pan a vang tangpi,
Ani ani-in tang semsem;
Dahna hong hehnem kamciam na aksi,
Ani a ni-in tang semsem.
Huihpi nung ciang a hong len sikkippi,
Ani ani-in kip semsem;
Nuntak tawntungna thu i theita hi,
Ani ani-in thei semsem.
Jesuh in eite hong piak lungnopna,
Ani ani-in nuam semsem;
Khristiante a’ ding kihong lam-etna,
Ani ani-in nuam semsem.

songs.title: KUM TAWN KHA TAWN HONG KEM TOPA

lines: Kumtawn khatawn Nong kep manin Topa, Kong muang uh hi.
A beisa hun launa, dahna khempeuh, Nang Nong huh hi.
Zingsang khuavak, Ni thak hong suak sial in,
Topa hehpihna bek kong ngak uh hi.
A beisa hun teng zong Na khut sung om, hong om-pih in.
Upna tawh thuciam na gam sung tun na’ng, Lam hong hilh in.
Khuamialna ah khuavak hong tang-sak in,
Upna lungsim khuavak hong nei sak in.
Mailam hun ding zong a thei khol Topa, kong zui uh hi.
Muanhuai mah le ung zong hong om pih in, Hong beel-beel nung.
Nuntak lai teng Nang, nuntakna khomun,
Ko hun bei ciang inn nuamah hong kha in.
A lungmangte hong hehpih hi
Ni tampi kheng zo ta hi
Gimna lungkhamna thuakna in
Ni tampi khengzo ta hi
Khualzinna leh kikal a
Nuamna lungdamnate tawh
Thu a pha ka bawl uh maw
Nitampi khengzo ta hi.
Sakkik
Ni tampi kheng zo hi,
Ni tampi kheng zo hi
Thupha gamtat theih nading
Ni tampi kheng zo ta hi
Mawhna in na hun bei sak ke’n
Ni tampi kheng zo ta hi
Na mai zingsang khuavak bang hen
Ni tampi kheng zo ta hi
Leitung ah dahna sung ah
Lungkhamna kahna om a
Na unaute phong in la
Ni tampi kheng zo ta hi
Itna tawh a kikhih khempeuh
Ni tampi kheng zo ta hi
Eite in i nusia ta hi
Ni tampi kheng zo ta hi
Khaici pha kituh khempeuh
A vak pha a lim nuai ah
Hong po a, i lungdamna
Ni tampi kheng zo ta hi
A lungdamte hong pai un, An lakna la hong sa un;
Phalbi guahsia zukma in, An khempeuh kikaikhawm khin;
I kisapna khempeuhte, Pasian in hong pia eite;
Biakinnpi ah hongpai un, An-lakna la hong sa un.
Leitung khempeuh Pasian’lo, Amah phatna’ng ankung po;
Tang le tahum hong pokhawm, Nuamna, dahna hongkhang khawm;
Teh neih khit ciang hong gah a, A nung ciangin hong tak sa;
An nei Topa in Na lo, Ko nong hah ding kong ngen zo.
Lo ah Topa hongkuan ding, Inn-ah ante ciahpih ding;
Tua ni ciang i Topa in, An si seep ding lo panin;
Van-mite thupia inah, Tahumte kikhul ding a;
A taksa teng kaikhawm ding, A tawntungin nuamsa ding.
Hong pai meng in Topa aw, Innah hong ciahpih ta aw;
Na mite hong kaikhawm in, Mawhna dahna pan khah in;
A tawntung a siangtho ding, Nangmah tawh omkhawm den ding;
Van mite tawh hong pai aw, Innah hong ciah pih ta un.
Eite in lo i kho a, Khaici pha i tuh hi;
Pasian in hong etsak a, Tui buakin khangsak hi;
Phalbi daingo kaisak a, Khualum zong hong pia hi;
Huih nung in ni hong tang a, Guah in no suaksak hi.
Sakkik
Kim leh pam na hoihte, Pasian hong piak sa hi;
Topa phat un, Topa phat un, Hong it lua hi.
Na khempeuh a piangsak Pa, Amah bek a hi hi;
Lam gei-a pakte zem a, Aksite tangsak hi;
Huih leh tui’n athu mang a, Vasate an vak hi;
Eite A ta i hi a, An hong vakzaw hi.
Nong piak na hoihte hangin, Pa aw, kong phat uh hi;
Lo pawi, an lak hunte in, Nuntak cidamna hi;
Nong itna thuhkik na’ng in, Bangmah dang om lo hi;
Hih hang Nang deih lian pen in, Lungsim nuam khiatna hi.
Honpa’ itna thu ka za hi,
Itna lamdang hi mah hi ding hi;
Hih hang, itna hehpihna tawh,
Van pan kei ading hong kumsuk maw?
Van pan kei ading hong kumsuk maw?
Sakkik
Hi, hi, hi, kei ading hi,
Keima ading hi,
Topa hong kumsuk, a sihna, tul theilo hong itna,
Nang le kei ading hi.
Sisan luangin hong thuak ka thei,
Sing tungah gimna thuakin hong si;
Mun khempeuh ah hih thu kithei,
Hong khasiat man kei ading thuak hi,
Hong khasiat man kei ading thuak hi.
Vantung thu hong kigen ka za,
Jesuh a umte’n mu ding uh hi;
Kei ading vantungah omna,
Bawl kholhsa-in a om hiam, innpi?
Bawl kholhsa-in a om hiam, innpi?
Topa kong dotna hong dawng in,
Nang kiang lo kua kiang pai ding ka hiam?
Kha Siangtho kei hong hilhsak in,
Honpa le vantung om, ci’n nong ciam,
Honpa le vantung om, ci’n nong ciam.
Pasian hong hehpihna’n, A geel hotkhiat kicing;
Langdo mite honkhia dingin, a thupha sung hong teel.
Sakkik
Upna tawh gupna i ngah, up man, up man,
Nang dikna hilo upna tawh;
Nang dikna hilo upna tawh sep hilo,
Sep hi lo, sep hi lo, hi leh mi kisial ding,
Pasian hong piak khong hi,
Sep hi lo, hi leh mi kisial ding,
Pasian hong piakkhong hi, Pasian hong piakkhong hi,
Pasian hong piakkhong hi, Pasian hong piakkhong hi,
Hong piakkhong hi.
Hih Pasian’ thupha lian, Tapa ah kilangsak;
Zum huai singlamteh ah thuakin, Pasian thu kithangsak.
A um takpi mite, Pasian in hong theisak;
Khazih hangin hotkhiatna cing, “Tate” cihna ngahsak.
A hong pai Pasian’ Tapa, Ama min “Dahna Thuaka,”
Mawh neite hong Honkhiapa,
Hallelujah! Hong Honpa hi.
Maizumna a hong Thuakpa, Kei tang mawhsakna Thuakpa,
A si tawh kei hong Leipa,
Hallelujah! Hong Honpa hi.
Mawhna hang i cimawh a, Amah’n mawhna nei lo a,
Amah tawh hong Lemkikpa,
Hallelujah! Hong Honpa hi.
Si dinga hong kikhai pa, “Ka zozo” ci-a Awngpa,
Vantunga kipahtawipa, Hallelujah! Hong Honpa hi.
Minthang Kumpi’n hong pai ding,
A tatsate hong la ding,
Hih lathak e’n i sa ding, Hallelujah! Hong Honpa hi.
Tho un, no hotkhiatsa tate, lutang Khazih beel khempeuh;
Tho un, no minam vangliante, Zion ah gal hong paima’n.
Sakkik
A vanglian la gingsak ta un,
Tuipi nakpi ging bangin;
Ei hong tatna Khazih si hang,
Gualzo pente i hi hi, Gualzo pente i hi hi,
Gualzo pente i hi hi,
Ei hong tatna Jesuh si hang, gualzo pente i hi hi.
Eima a misiang galhangte, hih thu bekah kip uh hi;
I tunga dial kipei mu un, Jesuh hang gualzote hi.
Si lo-in i lau kei ciat hi, nuntakna Pasian sung om;
Ama hong kilat zingsang ciang,
Minthanna tui hong luang khia.
I vekpi’n Amai i ding ding, minthang i Topa mu ding;
Lungdamin Amah phat baih ding, Thaman ciat ding sang ciat ding.
A thusiam pen Pasian aw, deih teng cinna Na hi;
Na nuntakna laigil tawh, Amaute Na gawm hi.
Sih dongin a amau tegel, A thuciam uh kip hen;
Na vangliatna tawh kigeel, Na thupha sang uh hen.
Leitungah Na om lai-in, Kana Na pai laitak;
Kiteenna pawi va simin, Tui lengtui na suaksak.
Tua lai mopina pawi a, Na thupha hong tung hen.
Nangmah hong muan theih nangun, Topa aw, Na huh in;
Haksatna a thuak ciangun, Na ompih tawntung in.
Leitung a nusiat ni dong, Nang sungah kip uh hen;
Na innpi ah hong tun dong, Nangmah hong muang uh hen.
Kei tang ding a si nuam mipa khat hiah om hi,
Ka kha gi na lo nungta sak ding;
Singlamteh tawn lampi khat Amah’n zui nuam hi,
Ka mawhna teng hong puaksak dingin.
Sakkik
Singlamteh tung kilh hi, Singlamteh tung kilh hi,
Aw, bangzahin Amah’n gimna thuak!
Khua-ul sisan suakin, Jesuh’n Singlamteh pua!
Ka mawhna teng singkhuam tung pua khin!
Amah dikin hong it a, kei ading nuam hi,
Ka lungsim hong sawp siangsak ding hi;
Mawhsakna om nawnlo ka suahtak lam ka thei,
Ka mawhna singlamteh tung kilh hi.
Ama tung kipia ning, kikhen nawnlo dingin,
A nisim lungdamtak zui den ning;
Ka lung sung la sa-in ka kam tawh zong phat ning,
Ka mawhna teng puakhin zo hi.
Ka vangik teng nga ning kisuan kik nawn kei ning,
A vekpi’n ka nusia khin ding hi;
To Jesuh singlamteh tungah suan khin zo ing,
Amah’n kei hong tankhia khinzo hi.
Pasian geelsa hong tunga, lia le tang kigawmna;
Itna tawh pumkhat suak ding, khuk din uh, Na mai-ah,
Kamciamna kip la uh aa, Amau khutte kilen;
Pasian gawmsa a amaute, mite in khen kei hen.
Nangma thupha namkim tawh, lungnopna guanta in;
Gentheih hun le nopsak hun, ki-it hun suaksak in.
Inn sung, phung sung kilemna, kipatna suak uh hen;
Khristian innkuan hoih suakin, limpha lak den uh hen.
Topa aw, hih nupate, thupha tampi pia in;
Tu le ta tawi uh hen la, Neih le lam cingsak in.
Upna, lawpna kip nei-in, Nang sung lungkim uh hen;
A khan kum uh sawt henla, tawntung kha kihual hen.
Lia le tang mu bang kingai, thei bang kilo,
Kum sawt tang bang dam khawm uh hen;
Seino gualte’n pak bang tawi, nunnop i zo,
Sian’ lungdeih tuang tunna hi hen.
Sakkik
Sihna’n samgi bang khen mateng, ma tengin,
Sian tawh maciang suan uh hen;
Itna le tongciamna’n khau bang hual khawm in,
Gual lai-ah ni bang tang uh hen.
Inn le lo suang zo dingin, Na siam inla,
Khawhma, ehma daupai sak in;
Zin le leeng do siam innkuan suak sak inla,
Vandai ngo tawh Na tuam den in.
Sesum minthang le sung nek, mim le tang tawh,
Nunnop lii bang Na cingsak in;
Zai tha saan uh hen, thunget lasakna tawh,
Khristian innkuan pha suak dingin.
Van Lau Kha Siangtho va bang hong leng inla,
Nangmah’n zingvai Na hawmpih in;
Simlei nun sungin, milun vontawi henla,
Thangvan tuang tun dong Na huai in.
Pasian in kiteenna pawi bawlkhinzo hi,
A siangtho innkuan a suak dingin;
A kicing innkuan khat a suah nadingin,
A siangtho nuntakna a nei ding.
Sakkik
Lungdam takin nuampih ciat ve un,
I lawmte kiteenna pawi sungah;
Hih lungdamna thu vantung dong thangsak un,
Leitung nuntakna a bei ciangin.
Jesuh in Tapidawte a it manin,
A nuntakna a hong piak bangin;
Hih zi neipa in zong tua bangin hih hen,
A siangtho thu hilhna zui ta hen.
Topa Nang khut sungah hihte omta hen,
Amau sungah khantohna om hen;
Kithu tuahna lungsim om tahen,
Thahatna teng Nang ading zang hen.
Tatkhiatna thu ka tangko nuam hi, Tuuno si tawh hong tatkhiatna;
A bei theilo hong hehpihna hi, Pasian ta cihna ka ngahna.
Sakkik
Tatkhiat, tatkhiat, Tuuno sisan tawh tatkhiatsa;
Tatkhiat, tatkhiat, Pasian ta cihna ka ngahta.
Jesuh in keimah hong tatkhiatna, Kam a genzawh ding hilo hi;
Ama khuavak sungah ka om ta,
Amah tawh ka tengkhawm den ding.
Ka lung sung om hong Tanpa itna,
Sun nilohin hong phawng den hi;
Ke’n sasa nuam ing, Amah phatna,
Tua la mah ka sasa nuam hi.
Ka thei hi ahoihna ka mu ding,
Amah ka Kumpi hong hita;
Amah in kei hong kem tawntung ding,
Hong pia den Amah phatna la.
Ka thei hi, kham lukhu ka ngah ding,
Hong bawl kholhsak mun ka tun ciang;
Ama mel bangin ka kicing ding,
Amah tawh ka teenkhop hun ciang.
Tuan-a pupa lamtual saina, khawh lo phungpha tonkhuang saina;
Lungdeih sinthu khau bang sutna,
Phuh bang kho hen, pianna Zogam
Sakkik
Sianmang lum sun, lungtuak vontawi,
Sian sinthu tawh mawng bang kikawi;
Nunnuam kisung, lungtuak zai awi,
Sian in siam hen, pianna Zogam.
Tuan pupa’ ma bang i zopna, Siamsil min lian tuang i tutna;
Tongdam siktui zu bang khumna,
Kil bang khang hen, pianna Zogam.
Aw Zogam nuam huihdam semna,
Milun zata laitual lenna;
Lungtuak momno nga bang lenna,
Lawi bang thang hen, pianna Zogam.
Sakkik
Zogam, Zomi, Zogam ei hong pia Pa Pasian thang hen!
Zogam, Zomi, Zogam ei hong pia Pa Pasian thang hen!
Beh le phung pawlpi ngeina pau kilamdang zong,
Tun sung khat pan piang laizom sanggamte hihang,
Zogam kicinna, Zomite zawhna,
Jesuh in Topa ci’n phat un.
Zogam ading Pasian, Zomi ading Pasian,
Lungsim khutte lamto-in Pasian liansak un.
Thungen in nasem hanciam Zogam tate w,
Zomite i belh i suan in Pasian bek hi,
Zogam kicinna, Zomite zawhna,
Jesuh in Topa ci’n phat un.
Zogam ading Pasian, Zomi ading Pasian,
Lungsim khutte lamto-in Pasian liansak un.
To Jesuh’ thahatna suang inla,
Ham bang hong huai in, hong huh ding hi;
Hong itna thu na phawk dennak leh,
Phatna la sak nuam ding.
Sakkik
A hatna le hong itna muang in,
Ahatna le hong itna kicing,
A hatna le, van mite en in,
Hong Tanpa na mu ding hi.
To Jesuh’ thahatna suang inla,
Lam hong tangsak ding, tangsak ding hi;
Hong paipihna peuh lungdam zui in,
A aw nemno ngai in.
To Jesuh’ thahatna suang inla,
Na buaina khempeuh Amah pia in;
Na vakgik lelin na kun zongin,
Jesuh kiang thungen in.
To Jesuh’ thahatna suang inla,
Na neih teng pia in, bang kim pia in;
Itna le hehpihna tawh kidim,
Hong ensan lo ding hi.
Pasian’ deihna, lungkimna, biakna pia un,
Abel bangin a limci pen pia un;
A gah masa, anpal tawh zahtak lecin,
Na ansalte an tawh kidim ding hi.
Sakkik
Hong kisin dih un, hong ze-et dih un,
Thupha a namkim kong pia ding hong ci;
Thupha kong pia ding, kong daupai sak ding,
Thupha a tampi kong pia ding hong i.
Lungkim takin, citpiakna, biakna pia un,
Meigong nu sumpi piak bangin pia un;
A sia thei lo vantungah na sum khol un,
Pasian hoihna thupha na zeek ding hi.
Ka Biakinn ah, an a om theih nadingin,
Sawm ah khat a kimin hong paipih un;
Vantung kongkhakte hongin note ading,
Na hoih tampi kong piakna na mu ding hi.
Dahna tawlna tawh Jesuh ka zuat leh,
Ka mawh hong lakkhiatsak, Ka mawh hong lakkhiatsak;
Tu’n hong itna’n hong kipaksak taveh,
Ka mawh hong lakkhiatsak.
Sakkik
Ka mawh hong lakkhiatsak, Ka mawh hong lakkhiatsak,
Ni simin la hong sasa sak; Nuam lua ing,
Ka mawh hong lakkhiatsak, Ka mawh hong lakkhiatsak.
Mawhna vangik ka puakzawh ding hilo,
A vekpin hong laksak, A vekpin hong laksak;
Ka gimna teng Ama tung ka suanzo,
Ka mawh hong lakkhiatsak.
Hong kimawhsak nang khat zong om nawnlo,
Ka mawh hong lakkhiatsak. Ka mawh hong lakkhiatsak;
Kha muanna cing Kei tungah hong piazo;
Ka mawh hong lakkhiatsak.
Tuni Jesuh Khazih kiang na zuat leh,
Na mawh hong lakhia ding, Na mawh hong lakhia ding;
A itna sung nisim nuamsa ni teh,
Na mawh hong lakhia ding.
Ka thei hi, ka vangik khempeuh tukkhiazo,
Sun le zan kum sawtpi ka puak hizo;
Thupha Topa ka zuat ciang, A kammalte ka muan ciang,
Thakhat-in ka vangik teng tukkhia zo.
Sakkik
Tukkhia zo, tukkhiazo,
Ka nuam hi, ka vangik khempeuh tukkhia zo.
Tukkhiazo, tukkhiazo, tukkhiazo,
Ka nuam hi, ka vangik khempeuh tukkhia zo.
Ka thei hi, ka vangik khempeuh tukkhiazo,
Ka van bei theilo di’n ka um ngeio;
Jesuh’n hih thu hong laka,
Singlamteh phung ka nga pah,
Ka nuam hi, ka vangik khempeuh tukkhia zo.
Ka thei hi, ka vangik khempeuh tukkhiazo,
Kum sawtpi sung ka mai hong khak khinzo;
Hepih tokhom ka zuan a, Jesuh maipha ka muta,
Hallelujah! vangik khempeuh tukkhia zo.
