La ka sa, ka vangik khempeuh tukkhia zo,
Sun le zanin ka lung hong damsak zo;
Kumpipa a ding ka hing, lungdam la asasa hing,
Hallelujah! vangik khempeuh tukkhia zo.
Aw vanglian bel Hallelujah,
Kong phat uh hi.
Emmanuel Pah tawi na leh liatna khempeuh Kum khua in nang aa hi den hi.
Sakkik
Halelujah Hallelujah, A men (Amen )
Hallelujah Hallelujah, Amen (Amen )
Leitung mihing namcin vontawi, Vantungmitawh lungkituak in
Nong tatna sisan phahangin, Sa lemthak tual nuamah leng khawm
Aw tuibangthuk gamsing bangsang,
Na pilna le nong hehpihna
Laukha sim lei a ging kilawm,
Van leh lei kamte’n gen zo lo
Aw hong hilhin a thuknathu,
Gan ankuang leh hamsiat tulsing
Van Kumpi lukhu kizom,
Lei Eden leh Salem thak tawh
Nitak a ni a tum lamdang sa ing
Nisuah zong lamdang sa sem ing
Ka lungsim hong khoih kha a lamdang pen in
Pasian in hong itna hi nuam sing
Sakkik
O himah lamdang pen sa’ng
Himah lamdang pen sa’ng
Pasian in kei hong it zenzen
Tuk-hun an lak hunte lamdang si ee
Vantung, aksi, nite zong ee
Ka lungsim hong khoih kha a lamdang pen in
Hih ka phawk thak hong it na thu hi
A thokik Topa’n a vaikhak bangin, inndei tungah nungzuite kikhawm;
Pa’ kamciamna tua lai takin, lungsim kikhatin zong khawm (O Hallelujah)
Van pan Kha Siangtho in huihpi nung le meikuang bang leiite hong kumsuk khin,
Na thupha ngaklah ung, Topa a lamdang lawpna hong pia suk in.
Sakkik
Hong tawh kuang in, hong tawh kuang in, Van mei hong tawh kuang in,
Ngak gige ung, na lam-en nung, Upna tawh kong sam uh hi;
Hong tawh kuang in, hong tawh kuang in, Na kamciam bekmah muang ung,
Na mai-ah na vanglianpi tawh, Na Pentecost mei hong tawh kuang in.
Elijah bang a siang teci panna, biakna pia dih ni, biakna tau-ah;
Khris in Honpa, hong damsak Pa, hong pai ding Pa, Baptaizpa (O Hallelujah)
A bei theilo hehpihna le gupna, mi mangthang ta dingin na gel a,
Hih thupha nong lah tel manin, Na kammal tungah ko ding ngamta.
Topa’ sapna za khempeuhte tungah, kamciamna hong kipia khinzota;
Pate tung le tate tungah, Na mi khempeuhte tungah (O Hallelujah),
Na kammal sungah nuamsa tawntungin, upna tawh Na vangpi hong siim ung,
Kha Siangtho mei hong kumsukin, van mei hong tawh kuang in ka lung sung.
Nang hong sang tawi-in kong biak theih nang un,
Kong phat theihna dingun ngaihtak in,
Biakna tau pan mei-am khat tawh, ka muk uh hong biksak in; (O Hallelujah)
Na minthanna mei tawh h ong tuam inla, a siangtho lawpna tawh hong dim in,
Kha Siangtho aw, Na zia bangin minthang vanglianpi tawh hong pai in.
Lamdang vangliatna ngah na’ngin,
Nong kamciamna thu ka za khin,
Topa, Pentecost thupha ko hong puak in;
Ka gilkialna uh sawtzo hi, tua na thupha ka ngak uh hi,
Topa, Pentecost thupha ko hong puak in.
Sakkik
Topa, Pentecost thupha ko hong puak in,
Topa, Pentecost thupha ko hong puak in;
Guahpi, huihpi nung bangin, Kha Siangtho hong buaksuk in,
Topa, Pentecost thupha ko hong puak in.
Nong hehpih thupha kamciamna, Vil a ka ngak laitak unah,
Topa, Pentecost thupha ko hong puak in;
A sang van mun siangtho panin, mawhna baang lungsim sawp siang in,
Topa, Pentecost thupha ko hong puak in.
Na vangliatna hong ciamsak in, thungen, lasa’n hong nuamsak in,
Topa, Pentecost thupha ko hong puak in;
Beh l e phung minam khempeuh in, gupna a ngahkim mateng in,
Topa, Pentecost thupha ko hong puak in;
Thukzaw, thukzaw Jesuh itna sungah;
Nisim hong pi-in,
Sangzaw, sangzaw vantung pilna sangah;
Hong kalsuanpih in.
Sakkik;
A thuk,a thukzaw thukzaw in
A sangzaw nisim in,
Hong khang sakin Topa
Manpha na kammal sungah
Thukzaw, thukzaw thupha kha siangtho aw,
Hong thuk paipih in,
Ka nuntakna Jesuh deihna sungah;
Phum khit mateng in.
Thukzaw, thukzaw haksat thuak kuul taleh,
Hong thuk paipih in,
Jesuh itna sung hong zungkha sakin,
Hong gahphasak in.
Lau ke’n, tuuhonte, sihna pan hinna ah,
Nangma adingin, Topa paizo tah;
Vangliatna khempeuh, leitung le vantungah,
Amah kipiazo nangma adingin ah.
Sakkik
Um pah lel vaw! Um pah lel vaw!
Na khempeuh piang thei hi, um pah lel vaw!
Um pah lel vaw! Um pah lel vaw!
Na khempeuh piang thei hi, um pah lel vaw!
Lau ke’n, tuuhonte, Topa ma pai zota,
Nang hong cing Topa’n, na lam nawk zota;
Tui kha om khempeuh, Aman khumsak ding hi,
Tuikha khempeuhte Aman dawn khinzo hi.
Lau ke’n, tuuhonte, bangbang piang tase leh,
Kong kikhak khempeuh, Topa’n hong zo veh!
Hong don khial ngei lo, hong kinusia ngei lo,
Khuamial, khuavak ah hong ompih khial ngei lo.
Zankim khuamial laitakin lau-in ka buzel a,
Ka tungah huihpi nungin, ka belh ding lah thei keng;
Hih van ginna phual panin, hong ngai in, kong thuumna,
“Hong kem in huihpi a ven mateng.”
Sakkik
Huihpite veng mang khina, vangingte a beisiang dong,
Van a meiite beimang a khua phat dong;
Topa, hong len in na khut kuak sung hong koih in,
Hong kem in huihpi a ven mateng.
Hahkat hang a mawkna pi, dahna bei theilo pi,
Lam-etna zong om beek kei ci’n Satan’n hong khem hi;
A’ih hang Nong ompih thei ing, zing ciang thoto inah,
“Ka pai ding huihpi omlohna ah.”
Zan saupi bei khinta a huihpi a ven ciangin,
Na mai-ah ka ding ding hi, tua a tang gungei-ah;
Tua gamah huihpi omlo hong teng ning Topa aw,
“Huihpi a ven khittak ciangin maw.”
Khatvei lai-in mawh nei ka hi a,
Mawh mai na’ng Topa ka zuat leh;
Hong kipia khong hilhial na hi a,
A kammal kip den hiveh.
Sakkik
Van gam sungah min thak kigelh hi,
Kei’ min hi, keima min hi!
Puanpak silh vantung mite’n lasa hi,
Mi mawh khat hong tung ci;
Vantung gam sungah min thak khat kigelh hi,
Kei min hi, Keima min hi!
Ka mawhna maizo a, vantung lam ka zuanta!
Nuam hit-hiat zen si!
Pasian’ hehna thuak ding launa tawh,
Singlamteh phung ka khukdin a,
Vantungte kihongin ka mit tawh
Ka min kigelh ka muta!
Hehpihna hang gupna kingah ta,
Thu bu sung ka mu nuam mah sing!
Telzo ing, ka mawhna maizo ta!
Sisan hang dam siangzo ing.
Lo sung ah ante min khinzo
Mikim sep theih ding om a
Ngai dih ve Pasian in hong sam
Tua ante ala dingin
Sakkik
Pasian kihelna neu cih om lo
Minthanna, hauhna zong ken
Jesuh’ min suang a nasep leh
Kham lukhu na ngah ding hi
Topa in nang hong koihna mun
Neu in kua man theiloh hang
Hong koihpa hangin thupi hi
Aman hong mangngilh ngeilo
Na pumpi hong zawngkhal ta dia
Sepzawhloh hun hong tun ciang
Thungetna tawh Topa a ding
Gal na sim thei lai veve
Leitung haksat nate nusia’n
I nasep i zawh khit teh
Citak a nasem pa tung ah
‘Pha hi ta, hong ciah tan’ ci
Upna bek tawh i ngah theih thupha lamdang lua hi;
Zan ni, tuni, a tawntung Jesuh kikhel lo hi;
Mawh neite gum nuam, cinate zong damsak nuam den;
Adah mite lung nuamsak hi, A minthang tahen!
Sakkik
Zanni, tuni le a tawntung Jesuh kikhel lo,
Na dang khempeuh a kikhel hang Jesuh kikhel lo!
Mawhneite lawm bawlin gum nuam a, a hong zong Pa;
Tu’n zuan in, kisikna tawh kuunin A khe phungah;
“Thu hong khen kei ning, na mawh nawn ke’n” aci Pa in;
Na mawhna hong maisak nuam hi tanglai mah bangin.
Leitunga om lai, Jesuh’n cinate damsak hi;
I natnate A thupiakna tawh dam thei lai hi;
Numei khat in A puan mong a lawn ciang dampah hi;
Tua bang upna mah tawh nang zong hong damsak thei hi.

songs.title: Topa Kiang Lo Koi Ka Pai Diam?

lines: Mawhna dim hih lei-ah ka nuntakna,
Ka kha buk na’ng mun zong dingin,
Ze-etna lianpi ke’n ka sunsiah hi,
Topa kiang lo, koi ka pai diam?
Sakkik
Koi ka pai diam? Oh!
Koi ah ka pai diam?
Ka kha buk na’ng mun zong dingin;
Nitawp niciang hong gum ding kisam ing,
Topa kiang lo, koi ka pai diam?
I it lawmte khempeuhte ke’n it ing,
I lung sung ah kingil thei lo;
Ka kha a’dingin kha an kisam ing,
Topa kiang lo, koi ka pai diam?
Nun in nuam e hiah i it lawmte tawh,
Pasian hong piak hehnepna hi,
Sihna daitui ka tal-ah hong kai ciang,
Topa kiang lo, koi ka pai diam?
Kalsuan simin Honpa ka mai ah pai hi:
A itna khut tawh hong makaih a
Husan simin Topa nangmah kong bia hi.
Nang mah tawh tonkhawm leng nuam ka sa.
Sakkik
Kalsuan simin a hong pi ding ka thei a
A sangzaw ah hong paipih tawntung hi.
Khatvei ni ciang lamtawpna ka tungding a,
Kalsuan simin inn ka nai semsem hi.
Ka upna tha khat veivei a hong kiam ciang
Ka etna khempeuh lungkiatna hi.
Kihei kikin kei hong gumpa ka et ciang
Hong ompih manin ka thahat hi.
Bangbang hong piang taleh Pasian ka muang hi.
Nuntakna ama sungah om hi.
Amah lampi a hong honsak theipa hi.
Khapsa gam nuam ah hong tun ding hi.
Pengkul lamto un, nakpi’n gingsak un;
Jesuh hong paikik ding hi;
Khualzinte kipaak, lungdam lasa un,
Jesuh hong paikik ding hi!
Sakkik
Hong pai ding hi, hong pai ding hi,
Jesuh hong paikik ding hi!
Zangkuam kiko, mualte thawnsak un;
Jesuh hong paikik ding hi!
A kigo Tuuno, vanglian in hong kum,
Jesuh hong paikik ding hi!
Tuipite’n zong tuihual sim gingsak un;
Jesuh hong paikik ding hi!
Tuipi gei sehnel tungah kitam un,
Jesuh hong paikik ding hi!
Thangvan ngo mei in, miza ta hilh un;
Jesuh hong paikik ding hi!
Huihpi le pingpeite’n zong zai in suut,
Jesuh hong paikik ding hi!
Minamte’ buaina in hong theisak hi;
Jesuh hong paikik ding hi!
Pilna khang semsem, sak khang ah mizin,
Jesuh hong paikik ding hi!
Mihing Tapa hong paikik na’ng tua khuavak pha zingsang le,
A minthanna tangpha eite’n i mu ding;
Micin namin lak panin Ama’ mite hong ciahpih teh,
Hotkhiatsate’ kikhopna lianpi hi ding!
Sakkik
Kikhopna lian! Kikhopna lian!
Hotkhiatsate’ kikhopna lian itna gam sungah;
Kikhopna lian! Kikhopna lian!
Hotkhiatsate’ kikhopna lian vantung ah!
Ama sunga ihmusa mi Jesuh’n A thawhsak hun ciang,
A gamdai hankhuk le tuipi sung panin;
Siangtho pumpi nei-in vanah kilato ding Ama kiang,
Hotkhiatsate’ kikhopna lianpi hi ding!
“Omna tampi” a omna mun tua khuapi lian i et ciang,
A khawnkhong a luang nuntakna gun mu ding;
Sihna in hong khensa lawmte nuamna tawh i muh hun ciang,
Hotkhiatsate’ kikhopna lianpi hi ding!
Kumpipa hong pai laitak ding, a hun hong nai khinzo ta,
Hong naizo hong ciamsa ni thupi mu ding;
“Mit phiat kal sung hun tomno ah” eite i kikhel khin ding,
Hotkhiatsate’ kikhopna lianpi hi ding!
Leitungah dahna tam, lungsim launa tam,
Mun tengah gal gin nam, bangcih khong ding?
Pasian kiang zuan lecin, Ama hehna panin,
Tang misiangte bangin na suakta ding.
Sakkik
Jesuh hong pai baih ding,
Sun lai maw, zan maw, zing,
Mi tampi’n gim thuak ding,
Pengkul mut ciang;
Misite thokik ding,
Midikte’n van zuan ding,
Si kik ngei nawn lo ding, vantung tun ciang.
Itna hong kiam dinga, inn le lo bei ding hi
Siatna hong tam ding a, Thubu’n gen zo;
Hih teng hong tun takteh, beina nai ding hiveh,
Pengkul mut pak ven teh, mitphiat kal in.
Gimna ong beipah ding, tawntung lungdam den ding,
Dahna om nawnlo ding hong pai ciangin;
Vantung ah leng to ning, leitung mangpha khak ning,
Amah tawh mangkhawm ding, tua hun ciangin.
Pasian in ah, A Tapa hong sawl
Hong it ding leh hong damsak ding
Ka mawhnate maisak ding hong pai
Amah nungta ahih man ka nunna’n man nei.
Sakkik
Nungta ahih man, bangbang piang tase leh
Phamawh sa keng, zong lau beek keng
Mai lam hunte a khut sung om cih thei ing
Amah nungta ahih man ka nunna’n man nei.
Naungekte zong Aman hong kepsak
Bangzah takin lungdam huai hiam?
Tua sangin zong lungdam huai zawlai
Nungta ahih manin ahan guak bek om hi.
Ni khatni ciang sihna gungal ah
Haksa pi-in ka kan ding hi
Tua ni ciangin sihna zozo-in
Amah Kumpi ahih lam ka mu thei ding hi.
Ngai un! Jesuh’ hong sapna aw, “Tuni kua in nasem ding?
Lote au khin anlak hunzo, Tangte kua in kaikhawm ding?”
Topa’n tu’n zong hong sam lai hi, Thaman tampi hong lui hi;
Kua in dawng ding lungdam takin: “Topa aw, kei hong sawl in.”
Tuipi galna kai zawh loh hang, Lawki gam na pai lah zong;
Na kong biang ah na huh theih dang, Na kiang nai zong om theizaw;
Van mi bang na pau thei kei zong, Jesuh’ hong itna gen aw;
Paul bang thu na hilh thei kei zong, Topa hong si hi, ci aw.
Zion kulhpi sang tung panin, Galvilna hi zolo zong;
Na hilh thei lo zong van lami, nuntakna na lui lah zong;
Thungetna le sumpite tawh, vantung deihna sem thei ding;
Kamsangpa’ khutte a domto, Aaron bang na hi thei ding.
Mihingte a sih laitakin, Topa’n nang hong samlai hi;
“Bangmah ka sem thei kei” ci-in, Thadah kampau khia kei in;
Hong sawl peuh lungdam tak sem in, Thu nuamtakin semta in;
Dawng pah in, a hong sap cinagin “Topa aw, kei hong sawl in.”
Topa, huihpi hong kipei hi, Tuihualte zong hong sang hi;
Vanpi zong meivompi’n hong tuam hi, Huh ding kuamah om lo pi,
Nang nong kep kei leh sia man ding, Bang dia Nang ihmu ding;
Tu laitak nakpi’n hong linglawngsak hi, Sihna hanmual hong naita.
Sakkik
Huihpi le tuihual aw, ka thumang in, Dai dide!
Lauhuai tuihual nakpi kilok zong, Dawi gilo le migilo hita leh zong
Tuihual in upna tembaw su zolo;
Vanpi leipi tuipi bawl Topa hi,
Daitak Keima thu hong mangta un, Dai dide! Dai dide!
Daitak Keima thu hong mangta un, dai dai dide!
Topa, kei ka lungkham lua hi, Dah in na mai kong kun hi;
Ka dahna lungkhamna lian lua hi, Tho a huh ding kong thuum hi.
Mawhna lungkhamna lian lua hi, Si ding kha hong gum in;
Si man kha ning Topa kei hong huh in, Manlang hong pai mengmeng in.
Topa, launa hong vengta a, lungnuamtakin ka tawlnga;
Buaina teng veng sunni hong tang a, ka awm hong vang hiuhiau ta.
Hong gum Topa Nang kong muangta, hong nusia nawn ken la;
Thupha tawh khawlmun nuam dong kei nong kha, lungnuamtak ka tawlnga ta.

songs.title: Topa A Inn Siangtho Sung Om Hi

lines: Topa A inn siangtho sung om hi,
Topa A inn siangtho sung om hi,
Dai diede-in omta un,
Dai dide-in omta un,
Amai-ah, dai dide’n omta un,
Amai ah, Amen.

songs.title: Mite In Na Sungah Jesuh A Mu Diam?

lines: Topa deihna bangin i gamta hiam,
Pai kawikawi a na i sepna peuhah;
Midangte in ei’ sungah a mu diam?
Kalvary mual a Mipa!
Sakkik
Kei’ sung Jesuh a kimu diam?
Nang sung Jesuh a kimu diam?
Na heina teng khempeuh ah na itna kilang hiam?
Ei sung Jesuh a kimu diam?
Ki-itna takpi eite’n i nei hiam,
Topa’ bawlsa mi mangthang khempeuhte;
Bangbang i tuak zong eite’n i sem diam?
Kaikhawm dingin mawh neite!
Hong kisim thei dingin laimal bangin,
Gamtat kampaute nisim kidawm ni;
Jesuh kiang mite’n a zuat theih na’ngin,
Nisim ki-itna nei ni.

songs.title: Zing Ni Suak Sangin A Tangzaw

lines: Zing nisuak sangin a tangzaw, Ka Honpa le Kumpi hi;
Na hoihna le na thupina,
La-in ka sasa nuam hi.
Sakkik:
Zing nisuak sangin a tangzaw,
Sun nitang sang tangzaw Nang na hi;
Vangliatna tawh dimna mai-ah,
Khuamial le meiilum theng h.
Vangliatna puan tawh kizemin,
Min thanna lukhu khu hi;
Thupha vangliatna le hatna,
A tawntungin na nei hi.
Na migitna lian mahmah a,
Na hehpihna kicing hi;
Na ukna itna tawh dim a,
Kei ading hong bawlsak hi.
Ngun meivak khaute kitat-in,
Ka nuntakna bei ciangin,
Kum tul kum then Topa mai-ah,
Phatna la ka sa ding hi.
Kumpipa kong biangah om hi,
Mawh neite’ tang sihna thuak Mi;
Mi siangthote bekmah tu-in,
Kaikhawm ding hong pai hi.
Sakkik
Kong biangah, kong biangah,
Kong biangah hi, kong biang tungzo;
Hong paita hi, hong paita hi,
Kong biang nangawn hong tungzo.
Hong pai ding nai na lak limte,
Kum simin kicing mengmeng hi;
Vantung zingsang khuavak tawntung,
Sawt lo i mu ding hi.
Kidona, gimna veng lo ding,
Leitung ah nopna zong kei in;
Honpa hong paikik ni ciangin,
Mawhna, sihna bei ding.
Van le lei thak i tun ciangin,
A tawntungin i teng ding hi;
Sihna om nawnlo nuntakna,
A tawntung hun zang ding.

songs.title: E’n A Hun Lian Thei Lo

lines: Topa hong pai ding a hun lian kuamah’n thei lo,
Tua hun hong nai hi, ci-in limte’n hong lakzo;
Hong pai kik ding hi cih kam ciamna thupha kho,
E’n a hun lian thei lo.
Sakkik
Hong pai ding kigingsa-in om ciat ni,
Hong pai ding, Hallelujah! Hallelujah!
Pasian vangliatna tawh meii tung tuangin hong pai ding,
E’n a hun lian thei lo.
Hotkhiatna a zong mipil ta ding khuavak hi,
Topa thuhilhna Lai Siangtho sungah om hi;
Hong hilhna thu in hun bei nading hong lak hi,
E’n a hun lian thei lo.
Meivak tangsak in thungen kawmin i ngak ding,
Topa hong pai dong, ngakkawmin na i sem ding;
Na lamdang pian sim hong naina thu phawk sem ding,
E’n a hun lian thei lo.
Pasian’ Thubu ka um hi, Jesuh’ thusim kisutna;
Vanzuatna tuang lam Lai Siangtho,
Vangam ka tun theihna’ng.
Sakkik
Lai Siangtho! Lai Siangtho! Ka up ka khiat lah pen hi;
Lai Siangtho! Lai Siangtho! Pasian’ Thubu ahi.
Pasian’ lungsim athuk dan, mihing le mawhna omzia;
I damna zong hong telgen in, Thubul pen ahi hi.
Jesuh’ thu kicinna hi, Pasian’ hong piak ahi hi;
Sihna thawhkikna hong hilh hi, nuntakna bu ahi.
Zan a meivak tang bangin, Na thu i n lungsim hong taan;
Na dangte sangin manpha zaw hi, lungsim sung ka kem ding.
Sabbath mangngilh kei un, Pasian thupha piaksa,
Apha a nuam bel ni hi, ni sagih kal sungah;
Gimna pan tawldam hong pia, lungnopna hong gen hi,
Vantung melhoihna pha tawh, a vang hong tangsuk hi.
Sakkik
Dawn ni, dawn ni, dawn denden ni,
Thupha Sabbath ni;
Dawn ni, dawn ni, dawn denden ni,
Thupha Sabbath ni.
Sabbath siangtho sak un, bia un Amah tuni’n,
A nungzuite’ kiangah ci, “Hinna lampi ka hi;”
Hih leitungah hong Honpa, kiniamkhiatin zui leng,
Nuntakna tui hong pia ding, a tawntunga luang den.
A nuam a siangtho ni! Zang ni ahun manpha,
Lawmpha bel Jesuh’ tungah, Sak ni lungdamna la;
Midik hong it Honpa aw, Nangmah Na phabel hi,
Mi teng tungah teng dingin, Na thuciamna pha hi!
Vangphat tin konna Chung Pathen,
Lhai cheh un Van Mitheng jousen,
Lhaicheh un noiya mijousen,
Apa, Acha, Lhagao-Theng chu, Amen.
Reference: G. Frane, Doh is G.d.
Kaki khop nau kikhen nung le,
Pathen in neiumpi jing un,
Ka lungu le ka chennau in,
Na-Intheng hijing hen Pathen, Amen.
Reference: G. Frane, Doh is G.d.

2. Leiset An neipeh bang u hin,

songs.title: Na um em Pakai Cross a kikhaiya

lines: 1. Na um em Pakai Cross a kikhaiya (2)

Na um em Pakai Cross’a kikhaiya?

songs.title: Mi tin het ding dol ahi

lines: Mi tin het ding dol ahi (2)
Mi tin het ding dol ahi, Jesu koi ham.
1. Ama phaicham lily ahi,
Ama vah jing jeng valpa,
Sangsom lah-a hoipen Ama,
Mi tin hetding dol ahi.
2. Cross’a chonse te din athi,
Athisanin buh bang so,
Lungset hing jing, hung ding Pakai,
Nahet ding Ama ahi.
Reference: Lathah No. 297

songs.title: Hu Sang Thei Khempeuh In Topa Phat Ta Hen

lines: Mi pawlkhatte in

Kicing hi kei tungah

Nek ding dawn ding a giau tau laitak
Topa aw kei lel
A kicing in nong pia maw

Tawntung nong itna

Lungnop tawldamna, nong guan hi

A mawkna ka hi ding

Neih sun Tapa hong ki piak khiatna tawh

Itna nei in, na kham lukhu ding hi
Itna

Lam in diangin
Na hoihna kong phat ding hi
It taaklopi nong it a
Ngaih taaklopi nong ngai maw
Ko innkuan in, bang hi lel ka hi uh hiam
Ki phatsakna ding omlo
Ki liatsakna ding omlo
Zeisu ka Gumpa leh ka Topa hi
Mong neilo nong itna leh
Bei ngeilo nong hehpihna
Kote ading nisim in ki cing hi
A tawntung hong phat den ning
A tawntung hong bia den ning
Ka hu san lai teng
Na min kong pahtawi ding
Natna satna ka thuak a
Gim in tawl in ka om ciang
Nong et ding in, kei in bang hi lel ka hiam
Lungkhamna meipi bang zing
Dahna ten hong vuknelh ciang
Zeisu ka Gumpa leh ka Topa hi
Leitung mawh neite taang ding
Van tokhom nong nusia maw
Mihingte in, bang hi lel ka hi uh hiam
Itna maantak tawh hong it
Ngaihna maantak tawh hong ngai
Zeisu ka Gumpa leh ka Topa hi
Sehnel gambang ka khual zin na
Itna ciktui lunggulh ing
Topa ka kha keu zel e
Kim leh paam lah khim bang zing
Ka zak aw khempeuh te zong
Lungkiat na aw vive hi
Dotna tampi’n hong bawm
Zaitha nem in lungsung hawm in
Lametna khempeuh a bei ciang
Mualte khin sakthei pa nang kong deih hi
Huihpi tuihual a uk Topa
Kulhpi cim sak
Guh keute a hing sak kik pa
Ka mailam hunte na khut sung om hi
A patna leh a tawpna Pasian
A tawntung in kong kisam den hi
Topa
Na kammal ka galhiam hoih pen
Na thu in ka zuih ding lampi
Na min in ka gualzawhna hi
Ka hatna hi
Zinmang lai tual lenna, khimbang zing simlei ah
Khuavak Zeisu sunni bang hong taang a
Lungdeih liibang cinna, van tokhom tuang nusia’n
It huailo te, itna tui hong luanlai
Ka pilna hang hilo, ka siam na hang hilo
Ka dikna leh, ka hoihna hang hilo
Itna in maisak zo, itna in siangsak zo
Pasian ta dik, Zeisu si tawh kip zo
Ngun leh kham hang hilo, neih leh lam hang hilo
Nuamna taktak Zeisu lo buang omlo
Zeisu sung ah hau zo, Zeisu sung cing khin zo
Tua hi a ken, sapna dang nei nawnlo
Topa ka hu tawpna dong phat phat ning
Hong itna lian bang toh ka teh thei diam
A lamdang sisan vanglian tawh hong thoih hi
Ka kisaktheihna tua sisan bek hi
Nangma khephung ah, ka lungtang sung khia’n
Nong lawn ding ngak in, kong zuan hi
Nang tawh ki khawl in, Nang tawh holim in
Nong itna thusut mah nuam pen
Itna mit tawh Nong et ka muh ciang’n
Tel zawh loh nopna’n ka sung hong dim
Itna khut tawh Nong let ka theih ciang’n
Ka tha Nong hatsak hi
Kei tawh hong om khawm Pasian
Ka puk ciang’n Nong phongto hi
Itna leh hehpihna tampi te
Kei Nong piak thuah lai hi
Muvanlai bang ka hat nang’n
Thupha namkim Nong pia hi
Na ang sung bittak Nong kem
Ka hih na khempeuh tawh kong bia hi
Ka To Zeisu
Na omna mun ah, om leng nuam semsem
Nong hopihna aw khum semsem
Haksat buaina te Na vaangliatna hang’n
A vekpi’n tuisuak khin zo ta
Ka kidalna ka lum, ka gupkhiatna Topa
A muanhuai pen suangpi, lampi hong hilh Pa
Ka lauhna teng khempeuh
Ka buaina teng khempeuh
Nong ompih ma’n a vekpi’n veng khin ta
Van aksite khempeuh, amin in Na thei hi
A bawl Pa ka Pasian, ka nunna Na hi
Ka min in Nong thei hi, ka vekpi’n Nong tel hi
Kei Nong it bang’n a dang ke’n mu zo ke’ng
Ka lametna ka Pasian
Na min kong phat hi
Tehpih thei ding om kei
Nong it, Nong khualna gen zawh hi kei
Zing ni hong suakthak bangin
Na hehpihna thak den hi
Kei Nong tatkhiat man in
Ka nunna’n man nei ta
Ka nuntakna ka lungngai a
Khatvei leh Eden huan bang nopna
Khatvei leh keugaw gambang in vul
Nop leh dah ki gawm
Pasian maipha ka zon hang in
Lungkham haksat na tuak kha zel ing
It bang lo mi ka hi zong maw
Ka Topa aw na mai hong sel ken aw
Nang tawh hong omkhawm den na Pasian kahi
Hong cing khial ngei keng ei ka ta
Kei lo a kua muang tuan na hiam
Na Pasian hiah om ing
Ka muhloh hang a khut tawh hong len gige
Ka bah ciang a angsung hong pom
Itna a thak hong phawk sak zel
Ka zaitha hong dim kik sak zel
Upna hang ze etna thuak Zawbah
Mawh lo pi mawhsakna thuak Zawtah
Tua te honkhia in a lam sang pa
A kua hi tuan a hiam
Bang hang lung kia thanem ding ka hiam
Bang hang lam et beisak ding ka hiam
Topa theih loh kal a piang om kei
Ka nunna ah thunei pa amah hi zaw

songs.title: Ka Zaitha Ka Dim Kik Ding

lines: Topa aw ka haksatna khimzing pi bang
Hong tuam ciang, lamet bei kha kun in
Sunni hong suak nawn lo ding maw
Thum in
Ka thumna aw Topa in hong za a
Ka ta aw cih aw nem tawh hong sam a
Hatsatna tui hual nung ah
Hamphatna thupha’n hong zui ding ci
Tua in, ka lung muang sak
Tua in ka tha khauh sak
Tua kam mal in
Ka lampi hong tang sak hi
Bang dang ka tuak lai zong
Ka lau nawn kei ding a
Tua kammal tawh
Ka zaitha ka dim kik ding
A kilawm lo pi, a thahat lo pi
Nong it na’n kei hong baan hi
Ka sep man hi lo, ka hoih man hi lo
Nong hehpihna hang bek hi
Mi hai, mi pilte, mi hau, mi zawngte
Na it na’n deidan nei lo
Nong hehpih na hang, lungdam ki pak ning
Ka kha tawh nang kong bia hi
Topa aw kei lungdam lua ing
Kei nong itna, gen cim ngei keng
Nang na hoih hi, Nang na lian hi
Na ki lawm hi, kam gen zawh hi kei
Kam gen zawh hi kei, lai in cin zo kei
Lamdang lua hi, kei nong it na
Kam gen zawh hi kei, lai in cin zo kei
Lamdang lua hi, kei nong it na
Ka hoihna zah’n, hong it ding hi le cin
Hoihna khat zong neilo, kei bang lel
Hi mah leng, nong itna’n deidan neilo
Aw Topa, nuam zen mah sing
Ka siamna zah’n, hong zang ding hi le cin
Kei sang a siam zaw mi, tampi om
Hi mah leh, nong itna’n deidan neilo
Aw Topa, nuam zen mah sing
Kei in kua hi a
Ka innkuanpihte zong maw
Nong phawk tham ding
Ken hoihna nei keng
Ka cin lohna ka siam lohna
Ka khialhna kempeuh sang
Nong hehpihna sang zaw lian zaw lai
Ka khialhna bang hong thuk kik lo
Ka hih bang nong sang
Ka mawhna bangzah in lian zong
Nong hehpihna sang zaw lian zaw
Pai nang theilo in
Ka tuang lampi khimbang zing
Ka nung pan huihpi in
Hong nawk in hong vei ciang
Ka pai nang zat tawm theilo
Vanging in keek hong kiat ciang
Leikiu khat pan kong sapna
Hong za in nong hu hi
Zeisu aw nang om kei le cin maw
Ka nunna’n man nei kei
Miban zolo mi hai pen kei lel nunna
Hong thusim in, Hong domto singlamteh hi
Ka puk ciangin nong phong a
Nindum sung pan nong kai khia
Mun sang na ah, Kei nong tonpih maw
Kilawm lopi nong domto
Ka thanem ciang tha nong guan
Ka khituite nong nulsak
Mite simmawh nuai nen ka nunna
Hong simmawhlo in
Kei lam ah nong pang den hi
Zeisu aw nang om kei le cin maw
Ka nuna lauhuai lua
Mi zawngkhal pen, mihai pen, kei lel nunna
Hong thusim in, hong domto singlamteh hi
Ka mawhnate nong maisak
Genzawh loh in tam mah leh
Nong itna leh nong hehpihna in tuam zo
It tham lo kei lel nunna
Ninphual pan in nong dom to
Vantung nong luah sak
Na hoihna tawh nong zeem
Na liamnate kei dam na
Na zawnkhalna kei hauhna
Na guallelhna kei ading in gualzawhna
Na melsiatna kei hoihna
Na gimna kei tawldamna
Na sisan luanna kei ading mawhmaina
Tua singlamteh ken ngilh ngei kei ning
Zawhna minpha ka tutzawh mateng
Tua Singlamteh khah lo lenlen ning
Kham lukhu ka khekna ni mateng
Hong itna kam genzawh hi lo
Hong itna kam genzawh hi lo
Zeisu in keimah hong itna
Kam-a genzawh hi lo
Ka nuntakna na khut sung kong ap hi
Ka lungsim ka thahat-nate
Nang aa ding ka nungta ding Topa
Nang deih bang kei hong zang in
Ka neihsa khempeuh nang hong piak sa hi
Ki sak theih pih nang ke’n nei keng
A gammang sa kei nong mu kik hi
Khua nong mu sak hi
Na khut leh na khe hong hi sak in
Na muh bang’n kei hong mu thei sak in
Nang deih te hong deih thei sak in
Na it te hong it thei sak in
Kong it hi Zeisu, nang kong deih hi
Kei tung ah nong lungkia ngei kei hi
Nang lo in kei bangmah hi keng
Nang hang bek in kei nung ta ingh
Ka husanna khempeuh tawh
Ka neihsa teng khempeuh tawh
Ka vek pi’n nang kong bia ding hi
Ka aw neih teng khempeuh tawh
Ka thahatna khemepeuh tawh
Ka vek pi’n nang kong phat ding hi
Vangtung a i Pa in a hong itna
Hong piak laisiangtho sungah hong gen ta
Laisiangtho sungah thu a ngaih pha pen
Zeisu in kei hong itna mah hi pen
Zeisu’n hong it man ka nuampha hi
Kei hong it hi, kei hong it hi
Zeisu’n hong it man ka nuampha hi
Kei na ngawn hong it hi
Amah mangngilh in ka taisan hang in
Hong it lailai hi ka mangthang hang in
Zeisu in hong it ken ka phawk kik a
Ama ang sung ka delh kik vingveng ta
Zeisu’n hong it a ken zong ka it hi
Ka kha hehpih in tan ding hong kum hi
Hong it man in singlamteh tung si a
Tua ahih ciang hong it takpi hi ta
A nunnem itna tawh kidim Khasiangtho
Sun leh zaan a tawntung kong deih hi
A lamdang nate hong sem in Khasiangtho
Ka lungsim khempeuh tawh nang kong bia hi
Guahbang hong zu in
Meei bang hong kuang in
Ka lungsim khempeuh tawh
Nang kong bia hi
Huihpi bang hong nung in
Ka sungah hong tengin
Lauhna leh buaina te veng sak in
Khasiangtho kong deih hi
Na vangliatna kha khanlawhna tawh
Hong kumsuk in, mun kong pia uh hi
Na vangliatna kha khanlawhna tawh
Hong kumsuk in, nang kong bia uh hi
Hunluite ka lungngaih ciang
Khasiangtho na vangliatna mu ing
Tuni dong nang na lian hi
Leikeu gamgaw in
Siktui a lunggulh bang
Ka nunna in, nangmah hong lunggulh hi
Khasianghtho nang nong om ciang
Damna leh suahtakna ngah ing
Hong pai in khasiantho aw
Leikeu gamgaw in
Siktui a lunggulh bang
Ka nunna in nangmah hong lunggulh hi
Lungdeih teng ki cing in
Sapna khempeuh cing ta
Khasiangtho nang nong ompih ciang
Ka kha in nuamsa, Zion zaila awi e
Khasiangtho a tawntung hong ompih aw

songs.title: Kha Siangtho Hong Ngai Ing – Sian

lines: Ka hih bang’n Na mai-ah kong zuan
Ka lungsim khempeuh kong sung khia
Nang kong lunggulh hi
Nang bek kong ngak hi
Kei hong hopih in
Mit tawh kong muh theihloh hang in
Nong ompih den ke’n ka thei hi
Hong nusia ngeilo
Hong cimtak ngeilo Topa
Kha Siangtho hong ngai ing
Kha Siangtho hong ngai ing
Na aw mah khum pen e
Nong lawn ciang’n nuam pen e
Kha Siangtho hong it ing
Hong hehnem, hong huhpa
Ka lawmpha bel na hi
Kha Siangtho hong ngai ing
Ka lametna Nang na hi
Ka thahat na nang bek na hi
Nang bek na hi
Ka lampi Nong hon sak hi
Na itna tawh Nong domto hi
Nong domto hi
Ka suahtak na Nang na hi
Ka bangkim Nang mah bek na hi
Nang bek na hi
Ka lawm hoih pen Nang na hi
Ka kiang naitak Nong ompih hi
Nong ompih hi
Kha Siangtho tawh la sa khawm
Kha Siangtho tawh la sa khawm
Kha Siangtho tawh la sa khawm
Aw nuam si, nuam si e
Kha Siangtho tawh thu ngen khawm
Kha Siangtho tawh thu ngen khawm
Kha Siangtho tawh thu ngen khawm
Aw nuam si, nuam si e
Kolteng kitat, kei suak ta
Ka vangik teng tolhkhia ta
Ka natna teng dam siang ta
Hallelujah
Kolteng kitat, kei suak ta
Ka vangik teng tolhkhia ta
Ka natna teng dam siang ta
Hallelujah
Kha Siangtho tawh khut beng khawm
Kha Siangtho tawh khut beng khawm
Kha Siangtho tawh khut beng khawm
Aw nuam si, nuam si e
Kha Siangtho tawh lam in diang
Kha Siangtho tawh lam in diang
Kha Siangtho tawh lam in diang
Aw nuam si, nuam si e
Kha Siangtho tawh awng ziah ziah
Kha Siangtho tawh awng ziah ziah
Kha Siangtho tawh awng ziah ziah
Aw nuam si, nuam si e
Kha Siangtho tawh nui ziah ziah
Kha Siangtho tawh nui ziah ziah
Kha Siangtho tawh nui ziah ziah
Aw nuam si, nuam si e
Topa Nong itna ka ngaih sut sut ciang in
Lian lua thuk lua ngaih sut na’n cin zo kei
Nong itna bei thei hi leh
Kei hong ban nawn ken teh
Lian lua zai lua Nong itna
Topa Nong itna ka ngaih sut sut ciang in
Nong phawk tham ding, kei-in bang hi lel ka hiam
Nong itna bei thei hi leh
Kei hong ban nawn ken teh
Lian lua zai lua Nong itna
Khen tuam a nei lo
Pa Nong itna lian lua
Dei dan tuam nei lo
Kei a ding na ngawn ki cing
Nong itna bei thei hi leh
Kei hong ban nawn ken teh
Lian lua zai lua Nong itna
Topa ka nun na ka ngaih sut sut ciang in
Nong phawk ding in ka nun na’n cin zo kei
Nong itna bei thei hi leh
Kei hong ban nawn ken teh
Lian lua zai lua Nong itna
Topa ka nun na ka ngaih sut sut ciang in
Nong phawk ding in pilna-in cin zo kei
Nong itna bei thei hi leh
Kei hong ban nawn ken teh
Lian lua zai lua Nong itna
Ken hoihna khat zong ka neilo
Zeisu Khrist hoihna koppih in
Amah vang a dik a sim in ka omlel hi
Aw tu in zong hoihna ka neilo
Ka hihna zaw mikhial lel ka hi
Khrist vang a siangtho
Khrist vang a hoih ka hi lel hi
Khrist hoihna kei a a hi ta
A sianthona kei a a hi ta
A hihna a hon neisak a A hon pomta
Tun ah lau ding ka nei nawnlo
A huang ah muang in ka om
Khrist hoihna leh sianthona kei a a hita
Kei mahmah ka ki et ciang in
Sianthona hoihna ka neilo
Hizong Aman siangtho in a hon pomta hi
Amah nate ka sem theita a
A paina ah ka pai thei ta hi
Khrist vak a nungta’n
Amah bang in a hon bawlta
Khuamial sung pan khuavak hong taang
Lungdam na khuavak
Satan henkolh suahtak theihna
Gupkhiatna khuavak
Khimbang zing dawigam susia
Zeisu khuavak ni bang taang ta
Nuntakna khuavak To Zeisu hi
Zing ni bang hong taang Honpa khuavak
Dawigam sung susia Zeisu khuavak
Suahtakna nopna Honpa khuavak
Ze-etna lum mei bang kaai zong
Zeisu’n hong zawhpih hi
Haksatna teng hong gualzawhpih
Khuavak Zeisu hi
Khualzinna hih leitung, lamsuk lamto ah
Khua-ulte nulzel in, khitui-te nul zel maw
Khuavak sung na pai a, khuamial na nawk zong
Aman nang hong ompih, aman nang hong it veve
Music te tum in hong phat ning
Khutte lam in hong phat ning
Khum ngaungau sa ing Zeisu
Kei nong itna
Hatsakna tam semsem
Thupha zong lian semsem
Lungsim tawng pek pan
Kong sapna nong za hi
Kuama lawn nop ngei loh, miphakte na lawng
Suang tawh den ding numei,
A mawhna na mai sak
Meigong nu sumpiakna, manpha na sa hi
A paktak numei nu, na khepek na nam sak hi
Ciktui bang kang ngei lo, kei nong itna hi
Guntui bang a luang den, nong hehpihna hi
A lianpen gupkhiatna, kei nong ngah sak hi
A sangpen pasian in, a niam pen te nong it hi
Topa nang na hoih hi
Topa nang na hoih hi
Ka thanem hun ciang
Nong hehpihna ki cing hi
Topa nang na hoih hi
Topa nang na hoih hi
Nong hehpihna in
Kei a ding in ki cing hi
A tawntung in
Nisim in, hong tonpih den
Hong khah ngei lo
Thanem in ka puk hun ciang
A vanglian, hong hehpihna khut in
Hong len den hi
Nisim a tawntung in
Belh leh muan, suan ding ka nei kei zong
Ka munkip, muanhuai suangpi nang na hi
Nusia ngei lo
Koi mun ka om zong
Nong len den hi
Lauhuai huihpi’n hong nawk ciang
Ka kidalna lum, Zeisu bek hi
Leitung nate tung ki nga kei ning
Sun leh zan in kei hong cing den hi
Hong kempa lusu ngeilo
Sangpenpa vanglian, ka Pasian aw
A lauhuai thaltang zum leh hiam pan
Na kammal ten kei hong kem den a
Lungmuan khamuanna hong pia hi
A tawntung ka bukna suangpi na hi
Ze-et na huihpi tuihual ten
Hong nawk hun ciang
Ka ki dalna lum ka munkip muanhuai
Nang kong neih man Kei lungmuang hi’ing
Tuni’n bang teng hong tung ding hiam
Zing ciang bang ni suak diam
Mailam hun bang hong ci ding hiam
Khatzong ken ka theilo, Topa
Nang kon muang hi
Kon muang veve Topa
Bangteng hong tung zong
Nang kon muang hi
Nang kon muang hi
Kon muang veve Topa
Bangteng hong tung zong
Nang kon muang veve
Honpi na mun ka theihlo hang
Honpi pa ken thei ing
Lunglau lo in ka zuizel ding
Nang kon muang veve hi Topa
Nop hiam dah hiam ka tuah dingte
Nang theih pihloh omlo
Kei thu hilo, nang’ thu hihen
Pha nasak bang hong tung sak aw
Topa aw nang kong bel hi
Muanhuai suangpi na hi
Ki khel ngeilo, kiam ngeilo nong itna
Ziat leh vei pan kei nong kem
Sun leh zan in kei nong cing
Lungmuang tak in, kei nong tawldam sak hi
Lungkia lamet bei mite
Lametna nang mah na hi
Lungsim tamzan te, nong hopih tawntung hi
Sawl bang vul ka nuntakna
Vandai tuite hong buak in
Paak bang etlawm ding, nong no suah sak zel hi
Siavuan te damsak zawh lo
Natnate na dam sak hi
A ki khat lampite, nang nong hon sak hi
A beisa ka nuntakna
Hong zawh pih Topa na hi
Ka mailam ding zong, a hoih pen nong gel sak
Van leh lei piangsak ka Pasian
Na lim leh mel sun in nong bawl
Leimi mawhna hang in
Na nunna tawh nong tan maw
Na hoihna sut cimthei keng e
Zaila in awi cim thei keng e
Kei lel hi zah nong it man maw
Lai lung dam ing
Nuam lo phat lo in om thei keng
Kei a ding’n ai tuam hoih ngiat teh
Mun dang ni tulkhat om sang in
Ni khat om nuam zaw, na anglum
Ka hu san thei lai teng hong phat ning
Ka nuntakna a bei dong in maw
Nong itna leh hehpihnate
Kong phat den ding
Hallelujah ci-in phat ning
Na min siangtho phat ning
Van misiangte, pahtawi bang in maw
Nuam lo phat lo in om thei keng
Kei a ding’n ai tuam hoih ngiat teh
Mun dang ni tulkhat om sang in
Ni khat om nuam zaw, na khalim
Ka hu san thei lai teng hong phat ning
Ka nuntakna a bei dong in maw
Nong itna leh hehpihnate
Kong phat den ding

songs.title: Kong Tel Sem Nuam Hi – Thang Tawng

lines: Ka lungsim khempeuh tawh
Na maipha kong zong hi
Na hoihna vangliatna
A thukzaw’n mu nuam in
Ka nunna hong pia Pa
Hong it zaw ning Topa
Kumpipa khe phung ah
A tawntung nuamsa ing
Na aw khum zaza nuam ing
Na ang sung kei hong pom in
Kong tel sem nuam hi
A thukzaw zaizaw in
Na lungtang kisai zia
Tel zaw sem nuam ing
Na deihna bang in ah
Hong nungta theisak in
A thukzaw Nang sung ah
Keimah hong kha in
Kong tel sem nuam hi
Gualzawhna la ken ka sa
Ka biak Topa hang
Na khempeuh ken gualzo thei ing
Vantung leh leitung khempeuh
A uk ka Pasian
Na hoihna ken hong phat cim keng
Satan tung gualzo pa
Sihna zo in thokik pa
Na hoihna na liatna
Lungsim khempeuh tawh
Lam lam lam, Topa phat in lam
Diang diang diang, Topa phat in diang
Ka aw neih khempeuh, ka hihna khempeuh
Ka lungsim khempeuh tawh, Topa phat ning
Na nuntak na kei sung Nong guan hi
Ka Pasian aw
Ka min in Nong sam, kei Nong thei hi
Ka bangkim ah Nang na hoih hi Topa
Na khut tawh Nong len hi
Na thuman hi
Ka thahatna, ka lu hong phong Pa
Itna lian pen tawh Nong it hi
Sang pen mun ah kong lamto hi
Ka kha hong Gumpa ka Pasian
Lamdang ka Kumpipa
Na min kong pahtawi hi
Sang pen kong lamto hi
A tawntung phat ding’n ki lawm hi
Na maang tawntung hi
Hehpihna hang bek a nungta hi’ing
Bang dan hi hiam, hong gen thei tuan keng
Hiah ka om bek zong na lamdang hi khin ta
Ka tan ding lawm lo thupha ngah nei ing
Ka siamna ding, sinna pawn bel om
Hiah ka om bek zong na lamdang hi khin ta
Ka ngaihsut kik ciang in, ki tuak khin zo kei
Tunglam pan hong pai hi ei
(Kei din) Lamdang lua aw lamdang lua
Kisim zo lo na lamdangte
Lamdang lua aw lamdang lua
Sim khit sawm dih ve

Sim khin zo keng, sim khin zo keng avek pi’n

songs.title: Lamdang Nong Hehpihna (This Is Amazing Grace)

lines: Mawhna leh khualmial, vangliatna susia

songs.title: Na Min Hong Lian Sak Ung

lines: Ka kumpipa, ka Tou Zeisu, na min a lian pen e
Phat ding kilawm, biak ding kilawm na hi
Vangletnate, ukzohnate, tangtawn nang a ahi
Phat ding kilawm, phat taak Pathian na hi
Aw Zeisu, na min hong lian sak ung
Aw Zeisu, na min hong tawi sang ung
Kumpite Kumpi na hi
Lei khempeuh phat ding kilawm
Aw Zeisu, na min lian hi
Nang hong bia ung, na mai kun ung
Thupina hong pia ung
Khuavan nuai ah, na min ngaih hi na e
Na itna sang, na itna lian, a hoih Pathian na hi
A tawntung in, na min ka hong phat uh
Ka kilawmna, ka sianthouna, na sisan pha ahi
Ka siamtanna, ka moh maina na hi
Nang hong zuan ung
Na khebul ah, zahtakna sang pen toh
Nang kia bia in, na min ngaih hong phat ung
Na hehpihna a khang a khang in kip hi
Na itna ki khel ngei lo, bei ngeilo hi
Na hoihna tehpih theih ding om kei
Lamdang, vanglian hi
Na thuman, na minthanna kip tawntung hi
Na siangtho, na vangliatna zahtak huai hi
Na kammal, na kamciamte ki sia ngeilo hi
Topa
Van leh lei in hong phat hi
Minam khempeuh’n zong
Sang pen mun ah ki lamto
Na min in thupha ngah hen
Nang bang Pasian a dang omlo hi
Minthanna khempeuh Nang a hi
Phatna, pahtawi na, ukna khempeuh
Zong Nang a hi, Topa
Ka lampi suk leh to Nong tonpih
Nop hun, dah hun Nong ompih hi
Na khempeuh ah na hehpihna lian
Kicing na minthang hen
Kumpi lian pen pa, to khempeuh Topa
Phat ding in kilawm hi, biak ding’n ki lawm hi
Nang na thahat hi, Nang bang omlo hi
A tawntung na mang hi
Topa a omte dingin, bangkim a hauhna hi
Itna ah zong itna lian semsem
Zawnna ah zong hauhna thupi pen
Topa a neite a ding
Nang na omna nuam
Nang na omna a nuam hi
Topa aw ka siang uah hong om in
Nang toh ton in pai leng
Bangkim a muanna
Topa na omna nuam hi
Lemna leh muanna gam zaw, Topa a neite hi
Huatna leh kidanna om ngeilo
Ei a ding ih gam a ding damna
Topa, a hong om ciangin
Sum leh pai hauhna pilna siamna leh sanna te
Manna ding a omlo na omloh leh
Hinna khempeuh sang na manpha zaw
Topa na om leh nuam hi
Ka nunna hu hong muam Pa
Kei hong bawl ka Pasian
Ka lungsim tawng dong nong tel hi
Kei nong lawn, nong hopih na ten’n
Ka thahat na hi
Ka kicin loh Nong thei hi
Ka thanem Nong tel hi
Hih hang’n Nang kong ki sam pha hi
Haksat na te’n Nang tawh hong
Ki naisak na hi zaw
Topa hoih hi, lungkham hun in
A mite huh tawntung hi
Amah a bel mite limtak
Hum in kem hi
Vangik pua in a gim mite
Ama kiang ah tawldam na pia
Nang lo kisap dang om kei
A hoih Pasian
Ka hun khempeuh a nei Pa
Ka husan na nei Pa
Ka thuak na khempeuh Nong thei hi
Ka tuk ciang Na liangko tung ah
Kei Nong pua to hi
Kei tung ah Nong thuman hi
Kei tung Nong citak hi
Nang ma theih loh a piang om kei
Na khempeuh kei hoih na ding’n
A piang na hi zaw
A nisim in Topa itna
Nakpi nuamna thu kong tangko uh hi
Nakpi nuamna thu kong tangko uh hi
Nakpi nuamna thu kong tangko uh hi
Ha… ha…. ha… ha…
Ei hong Honpa, ei hong Tanpa
Zeisu hong suak
Ei hong Honpa, ei hong Tanpa
Zeisu hong suak
Zeisu hong suah lungdamna
Zeisu hong suah lungdamna
Zeisu hong suah lungdamna
Thupha hong tung ta hen
Nang bang kua dang omlo hi
Simlei leh thangvan ah zong
Thupina, vaihawmna khempeuh
Tangtawn in Nang a ahi
Hong bia ung, hong pahtawi ung
A siangtho vanglian Topa aw
Sangpen Pa aw, hong liansak ung
Aw nang bang kua dang omlo hi
Aw nang bang kua dang omlo hi
Nang bang kua dang omlo hi
Sangpen, lianpen, thupipen
Nang bang minngaih dang omlo hi
Minthanna teng nang a hi
Na thilbawl zia lam dang hi
Na pilna sui vual hilo
Na thupina a phuang uh
Na khutsuak te’n
Topa aw, Nang bang kua dang omlo
Ka khitui hong nulsak
Zaitha thak hong guan in, Nong ompih hi

songs.title: Zeisu Suahna (Go Tell It On The Mountains)

lines: Tuucing te kiang zankim lai
Vantung mite ki lang
Gumpa hong suahna la sa in
Lungdamna hong taang ko
Mual tung lam ah va gen un
A sang a niam na mun khempeuh
Mual tung lam ah va gen un
To Zeisu hong suahna
Mipilten aksi pi zui
Zeisu a bia ding in
A neih manpha pen tawh hong zuan
Gumpa a bia ding in
Gan an nek na kuang sung
Kiniam khiat in hong suak
Pasian in leitung mimawh te
Hong gup khiat nop man hi
T. Pumkhothang
Tangthupha vang in i semgim in i tawl hiam aw,
Aw A gam vang in i genthei maw?
Tua i thuaknate i tunung a i tan ding toh;
Phulou in simtham a hilou hi.
Simlei ah gentheihnate thuak in i mau zong a,
Aw A gam vang in i lelliang in bangteng i taan zong;
Thupi a vanglian i Toupa bang a i om chiang’n,
Gimna i thuakte tung ah zohna lasa in,
Denchiang i leng ding.
Aw! i ginnate a bah in tawl in a om maw?
Lunglel a om in a nguigawp maw?
Muhtheih enlou in i pai ding hi i ginna toh,
Van a thil omte i mitsuan ding.
Gimna tampite i thuak in van-gam i lut ding,
Tun ah gimthuak huibang i mau lel;
Aw i ngaklah ngei Pathian tate thupi hun ding,
Van a aksi bang i zem hun ding.
T. Pumkhothang
Toupa hoihna ngaihsun ni,
Hehpihna a thawn in pia;
A hon tel a Amah di’n hon bawlta,
Zahngaihna a hon pia zou.
A hing biakna i pia ding uh,
A zahngaihna ngaihsun in;
A lungtaina’n i pumpi i piak chiang,
Khalam biakna ahi ding.
A hauhna thupi na e,
A pilna a thuklua hi;
A lunggelna a theizou omlou a,
Tangtawn in a thupi hi.
Lei nunziate taisan ni,
A deihlam i theihna di’n;
I lungsim uh kibawlthakna om in,
Lamdanna i nei ding uh.
Sianthouna toh nungta ni,
Toupa di’n i kipia ding;
I pumpi zong Amah tenna hi a,
Bawlsia in susia kei ni.
T. Pumkhothang
Lungkhamna te’n a hon tuam chiang’n,
Kipahnate a hong bei chiang’n;
Ka zuih siam hilou tuanglam ka zuih lai in,
Ka Toupa in a hon sinsak hi zaw.
Hon pinate ka gel chiang in,
Keimah lemgel in theihsiam a haksa ngei;
Hizong kei a di’n A vualzawlna leh,
Amah muan ding hon sinsak ahi zaw.
Kaan zohlouh a ka ngaihsutte,
Pal zohlouh a ka ngaihsutte;
A muanhuainate ka muhna ding hi zaw,
Amah a di’n a haksa omlou e.
Vuui takmai a ka om in zaw,
Aw a pialpak a lang theilou;
Tua in aw ka lam-etna a bahsak a,
Hizong Aman a pialpak hon musak.
Koimun peuh ah ka om zong in,
Hon pina khut a muanhuai hi;
Keimah hatna zaw muan ding a omlou e,
Amah hatna a muanhuai pen hi zaw.
T. Pumkhothang
Lungkhamna te’n a hon tuam chiang’n,
Kipahnate a hong bei chiang’n;
Ka zuih siam hilou tuanglam ka zuih lai in,
Ka Toupa in a hon sinsak hi zaw.
Hon pinate ka gel chiang in,
Keimah lemgel in theihsiam a haksa ngei;
Hizong kei a di’n A vualzawlna leh,
Amah muan ding hon sinsak ahi zaw.
Kaan zohlouh a ka ngaihsutte,
Pal zohlouh a ka ngaihsutte;
A muanhuainate ka muhna ding hi zaw,
Amah a di’n a haksa omlou e.
Vuui takmai a ka om in zaw,
Aw a pialpak a lang theilou;
Tua in aw ka lam-etna a bahsak a,
Hizong Aman a pialpak hon musak.
Koimun peuh ah ka om zong in,
Hon pina khut a muanhuai hi;
Keimah hatna zaw muan ding a omlou e,
Amah hatna a muanhuai pen hi zaw.
T. Pumkhothang
Hatlou mi ka hi zong, hat theihna thuguk te,
Toupa in kei a dingin a nei;
Khovel in a tellouh, khovel in a deihlouh,
Toupa in Amah dingin a tel.
Aw a lamdang e, Aw a thupi e,
Na itna aw na hehpihna;
Mimawlte nangawn zong aw na tel lawmlawm,
Lamdang in aw a thupi e.
Lelliangte na it a, genthei te na huai a,
Leitung mi’n a phawk zohlouh te zong;
Toupa aw na thei a, Itna in na pi zel,
Gentheihna panin nunnopna ah.
Lamet bei a lungngai, mipoite na thei a,
Piangsualte bukimloute na ngawn;
Khovel hoihna mulou, mitdel te na thei a,
Nang a din na telta lamdang e.
A chinglou a om lou, a siamlou a omlou,
Mi khempeuh i Toupa mai ah zaw,
Leitung mi a ding a simmoh huai a neute,
Silpak bang a lun Toupa a din.
Aw a lamdang e ..Aw a hon telna
Kipak in nuamna lasa ni,
Khovel in a phawklouh mi ihi zongin,
A hontel na a lamdang e.
T. Pumkhothang
Simleitung zaw tul zouta e,
Ngabang bualte huibang mau uh;
Chikleh tuangnung ka siah ding hiam?
Simleitung zaw sawt nawnlou ding.
Aw gam ngaihhuai, damtui luanna,
Na sung ngabang ka bual nuam hi;
Nun chimlou a ka lenna ding,
Ka gelchiang in aw, gelchim kei ing.
Tung si-al leh vandum khen ah,
Tung sunni leh lummei khen ah;
A tang silsial khuapi nuam om,
Lungzuan khitui daibang theng ding.
Simlei ah luankhi nul zong leng,
Thangvan ah luankhi nul kei ning;
Sian in naubang in hon pom dia,
A tulsa simlei ngilhta ning.
Suut siam hileng sutchim kei ning,
Gen siam hileng kua’n ngailou ding?
A ngailoute a zuan theih na’n;
Sutsiam hileng aw ka nuam ngei e.
T. Pumkhothang
Na nuntak dante vel kik in, simlei in hong zou khin hi,
Na gamtat dante vel kik in Toupan hong phal na ding maw?
Amah a na hihkhit leh Amah ah muanna koih in,
Toupa lam na et peuh leh khovel in hon zoulou ding.
Aw hong kik in Toupa kiang Amah lam hong hei nawn in,
Aw hongkik in Toupa kiang , lung nopna hong pia ding hi.
Sakmel hoihnate na deih leh Toupa kiang kiching om hi,
Minthannate na deih a leh Toupan nang hon pe nuam hi;
Hauhsaknate na deih leh Toupa kiang kiching om hi,
Na angsung na khual man in na utbang gamta kei in.
Toupa mai a na chiamsate koilam tung zouta uhiam?
Na lungdamna leh kipahna meibang in theng zouta maw?
Toupan nang lam hon en hi Amah nial kik ding na hiam?
Aw nem a hon saplai in hon sapna dawnglou ding maw?
T. Pumkhothang
Aw Ka Bible Ka lampi ahi,
Kei a dia ka ki etna;
Nisim in ka vak ahi,
Tung Pathian aw ka zakna mun;
Khuaizu bang mai a a khum pen zaw,
Aw ka Bible, Aw ka Bible ahi.
Aw ka Bible ka hinna leh,
Ka sianthouna lampi hi;
Bangkim a ka bangkim leh ka ki ngakna,
Tung Pathian kilakna bukim;
Ki dang ngeilou, ki khel ngei lou,
Aw ka Bible, Aw ka bible ahi.
Leitung mite’n a simmoh zong in,
Lei mite’n a dou zong in,
Kei a di’n ka Bible hi;
Liansem ding aw a liansem ding,
Bei ngeilou in aw a liansem ding;
Aw ka Bible aw ka bible ahi.
Hinna laibu a siangthou pen hi,
Nuntakna bukim ahi;
Sa leh kha a din damna,
Mizata dia kiching nunna;
A umte ding a kiching damna,
Aw ka bible aw ka bible ahi.
T. Pumkhothang
Ngabang ka bual hiai simlei ah,
Luankhi ka nul huibang ka mau;
Thangvan khopi aw ka tun hun in,
Lei gimnate a beita ding.
Aw ngai na’ng e Thangvan khopi,
Lungngaihnate omlouhna mun;
Nunnuam tak a ka lenna ding,
Ka pa gamnuam ka ngai na e.
Tua gam khopi suangmanpha gam,
Lei a pan in ngai in ka mau;
Ginna’n ka don aw ngaihlai a na,
Belamnou in a taanna mun.
Ka Toupa mel ka muh hun in,
A khut a pawn ka lenta ding;
Lei a ka tuahte ka hilhta dia,
Ka mit khitui a beita ding.
T. Pumkhothang
Hinna hongpia ka Toupa hong it ing,
Mangthang lungngai ka vaihlai in;
Lunglai gil a khamuanna N’ong pia a,
Muanna tuibang na hong luan na.
Hinna hong pia ka Toupa aw,
Nanglou muanna ding ka nei ngei diam?
Lungngai huibang ka mauna simlei ah,
Nang toh om l’eng ka lung nuam hi.
Suanding omlou ka hoihna zong omlou,
Nang toh om di’n kaching zoulou;
Hizong Toupa na itna aw neem toh,
Kong it chi in na hong samlai.
Keimah lampi kazuih khempeuhte leh,
Ka lunggel leh ka ngaihtuahna;
Toupa nang di’n a ching zou ding omlou,
Hizong kong it ka ta nong chi.
T. Pumkhothang
Tuan a simthu sut le’ng maw, tual i niam simthu,
Theihphak louh selung mawlte i hi;
Tung Pathian itna vang in, ei di’n khua a hong vak;
Tu’n A tate hi hang e.
Phatna zaila lawm ging, a kilawm semgua toh,
Vanglian Toupa min phat in;
Tuan-a selung mawlte tu’n A hondomsang ta,
Toupa ei di’n hoih na e.
Itna thu sang kei le’ng maw, bang i suak ding hiam?
Toupa it na lian in sang na e;
Ju leh va bang gammual a vakvai a i om lai,
Itna in hon zong khe ta.
Itna vang siamnate leh sannate nei hang,
Tua khempeuh i Toupa vang ahi;
Lamdang in thupi na e, loubang A hon khualna,
Toupa ei di’n hoih na e.
T. Pumkhothang
Toupa na siamsa lei mihingte,
Nopna zong in nisim in buai ung;
Simlei thupinate’n a hon pi zel,
Nang hon ngilh ung Toupa na tate’n;
Huaihamna sung a kibualta in,
Duh-amnate’n aw a hon zouta.
Aw Na mite Nanglam a hei di’n,
Toupa Na tate hon huai nawn in;
Lambang haih ung Toupa na huangsung pan,
Aw ka Pathian hon nuse lou aw;
Hehpihna in aw! hon enlai in,
Na kha siang in Toupa hon huai nawn in.
Itna a kiam nisim a kiam zel,
Lainatna zong tuibang in kiam a;
Hehpihna luipite a kang zouta,
Nang toh nunnuam kholhkhawmna munte;
Gitlouhna te’n aw! a luah zouta,
Hon pikik nawn in na huangsung ah.
Toupa aw tuni in ka hon ngen,
Koute a di’n aw! Na zahngaihna;
Honpia in aw Toupa ka hon ngen hi,
Nang hehpih thei Pathian Na hi a;
Itna aw neem in ka lungsung uah,
Hon sam lai inla Nang a ding in.
T. Pumkhothang
Toupa aw kei hon len in,
Simlei a kazin lai in;
Keikia in kapai siamlou,
Ka zinna a haksa in;
Lamhaih in gammang zel ing,
Na lamvak hon musak in hon zui ning maw.
Na lam vak ah ka pai theih na din,
Ka lampi ah Na vak hong taan in;
Mittaw bang khua mulou a,
Zanmial bang kapai lai in;
Hon len in ka puklouh na’n hon len in aw.
Buaina tui kihawt kal a,
Lauhna te’n kei hong tuam a;
Lung muanna hon neisak aw,
Muanhuaipa a kip tawntung;
Nang na hi Nang kia na hi,
Toupa aw Na ban in hon lenden in aw.
Galkhat lam ka hong kai ma’n,
Tua mual siangthou kong tun ma’n;
Lampial lou di’n hon len in,
Nisim in ka nuntakna;
Hong siamthak hong hatsak in,
Na angsung ka tun mateng hon pi in aw.
T. Pumkhothang
Toupa aw lungsim thak hon guan in,
Ka sung ah lunggel dik honpia in aw;
Aw Nang in hon luah in ka lungsung,
Aw! ka lungtang Nang nei in.
Aw! Na simthu’n hon luan in ka lung sung,
Na kha ngai in mimva bang ka thum hi;
Aw! Na sihkhuk ka kha in a lungngulh,
Tua in hon tai sak in aw.
Kei nusia di’n Na Kha phal ken aw,
Kei ah teng inla, kei hon nei gige’n;
Nangmah ngai in ka dang a tak hi,
Aw! ka lunggulh Nang na hi.
Zaitha nem a ka lungkham hun in,
Aw! Na panpihna kei ah hon sawl in;
Lam-et bei lungkham a ka om chiang’n
Aw! Na thu’n hon nem in aw.
T. Pumkhothang
Ka sung a om sual ngaihtuahna te’n,
Ka utlouhlam a honpi zel;
Hoih ka ut a ka sualzel ahi,
Na mai ah mikhial ka na hi ta.
Hon ngaidam in, hon ngaidam in,
Toupa aw kei mikhial ka hi;
Hon ngaidam in, hon ngaidam in,
Toupa aw kei mikhial ka hi.
Kei mikhial lel na hon it man in,
Na sisan kei a di’n hong luang;
Hoihna neilou kei bang leltak in,
Na itna ka mu lamdang na e!
Hoih ka hilou, dik zong ka hi lou,
Na itna’h dikna ka mu zaw;
Kei ziak hilou, Khris ziak lel ahi,
Ka phulouh A ngaihdamna ka tan.
T. Pumkhothang
Buaina te’n sunchin hong bawm zong leh,
Toupa na ang hong bel ning;
Hatsatna namkimte hong tung zong leh,
Toupa hong bel den ning.
Hong bel ning hong bel den ning,
Toupa aw nang hong bel ning;
Ka damna leh ka lung nopna ,
Toupa hong bel den ning.
Khemna haksa te’n hong man zong leh,
Toupa na ang hong bel ning;
Kei vuak in lam haksa zui hizong leng,
Toupa hong bel den ning.
Sihnaten’n hong man ding hizong leh,
Toupa na ang hong bel ning;
Zatam in nang hong nial ding hizong leh,
Toupa hong bel den ning.
T. Pumkhothang
Toupa aw na mite’n Nang hong ngilh zouta ung,
Na nasemtute mang hiai hiai uh;
Zinmang in hon zol e, khovel in hon zouta,
Ka vak uh mial khin zouta e.
Hong leng in Toupa aw, hong leng in Toupa aw,
Na Laukha siang in hong phawng halh in;
Na mite ngui zouta, lunglel sul kik lel lou,
Ka siang uah hong leng nawn in aw.
Laukha siang thou nunnem hong hatsak tu ahi,
Ka siang uah na laukha’n hong leng in;
Lungkham huibang maute hong nem in Toupa aw,
Na mite zaitha hong pia in.
Ka khe uh liam zouta, ka khut uh hat zoulou,
Khasiang in hong damsak nawn in aw;
Amangthang mite dia ka nunna uh phal di’n,
Na kha in hong hatsak nawn in.
T. Pumkhothang
Ei te lam hong pi hong keem hong huai a,
Neu chik pan hong khang lian sak Tou-pa;
Mialna pan khuavak hong mu sak Toupa,
Tuni dong hong pi Toupa a hi.
Hong Pah tawi ung e, hong tawisang ung e,
Kou te hong huai vanglian Toupa aw;
Nang vang nungta ung Nang vang khang tou ung,
Pahtawina sang pen Nang hong pia ung.
Muh ngei louhte zong hong mu sak Pathian,
Neih ngei louhte hong nei sak Pathian;
Pilna siamnate hong guan hong nei sak,
Vanglian tung Pathian Nang vang hi e.
Gamdai gam keu a khut toh hong len a,
Lam suk lam tou a hong nu sia lou;
Vualzawlna kim toh hiai tan hong pi pa,
Nong kep nong huaina lian in sang e.
T. Pumkhothang
Mang vontawi Immanuel Hondampa a hong piangta,
Mohna pan i sianna di’n a hong piangta;
Lei mite a dia Kumpi, Lemna Lal a hong hi dia,
A gam zaw a bei ngeilou a hong hi ding.
Hondampa a hong piangta, Judia gam Beth-lehem ah,
Amah Kris i Toupa ngei a hong piangta;
Tung Pathian thupi hen la, leitung ah ki lemna leh,
Deihsakna mihingte kiang om hen.
Van mun nuam ahon nusia, lei mun niam ah hong tualkum,
Gan an piakna kung sung ah a hong zaalta;
Nang leh kei a hon it vang, lei mun niam a hon teelta,
Ei di’n Kumpi hong piangta, i sang ding uh.
Na Lalgam ka lung sung uah, tuihing lui in hong luang hen,
Hong piang hen kilemna leh ki-itnate;
Aw Jesu ka hon ngai uh, Lemna Kumpi hi ding in,
Michih dia kilemna Lal Nang hong hi in.
T. Pumkhothang
Toupa ka hong kipia nang a ding in,
Na khut sung ah ka om hon zang in aw;
Ka siamna omlou zong ka pilna omlou zong,
Ka nunna tualniam zong hong sang in aw.
Hong sang inka nunna Toupa aw,
Na min thupina di’n hon zang in;
Ka hihna bangbang in nang in hon pom ila,
Na deihna mun peuh ah hon zang in aw.
Ki manna ding omlou ka hizong in,
Hoih ding na chihna peuh ah hong koih in;
Bellei a seekpa in a deihbang a bawl bang,
Kei zong hong bawl in aw na deih bang in.
Mihing in a et bang hon enlou aw,
Mihing in a telbang hon tellou aw;
Nang in a hatloute nangawn na tel zaw a,
A hatlou keimah zong hong sang in aw.
T. Pumkhothang
Hounem Thianmang gelsa bang in,
Lia leh tang simthu paibang ki pom;
Thianmang in chibang a tel bang in,
Atamten pakbang hong tawi ung e.
Pakbang hong tawi ung, pakbang hong tawi ung,
Mubang kingai a laitawi lia leh tang,
Lambang hong pak ung, lambang hong pak ung,
Simthu paibang pom lambang hong pak ung.
Zang phualva bang a lengkhawm in,
Manpha vondeih zatam hon tawi un;
Simlei ah kumsawt guabang hing in,
Vualzawlna’n tuibang hon tum hen aw.
Paibang pom simthu ngilh lou in,
Itna’n lemnaang bang hong hekkhawm hen;
Lentualkhiakna simthu ngilhlou in,
Simlei ah tangbang hong dam un aw.
Lunmang in tuibang a gawmsa,
Kuata’n khenna simthu lel kei hen;
Zatam in lampang ahon paksa,
Nuai zinmang in zong hong khen kei hen.
T. Pumkhothang
Huihkhi hong lang simlei tung ah bang huih khi hiam aw,
Na gim nam e buaina lung ngaihna;
Hizong Toupa’n kei hong ompih bang di’n ka lau dia?
Buaina lel in khapham leng zong Toupa’n hong pi ding.
Hong zoulou ding hong mu lou ding simlei huihkhi in,
Simlei gimnamte hong bei hun chiang’n;
Sian anglai ah lung muang den in naubang kah nate,
Melmu lou ding kei hong itpa kiang;
Simlei ngilh in buaina ngilh in sawlbang hei den ding,
Ka ngaih belh ding Toupa Na gam nuam lou dang omlou.
Na gam tulsing a hiang zau e luankhi a tuang lou,
Gahthei bang nun vabang tuang nuam ing;
Muikhua zin a lung zuan zaikhia maimit sing omlou,
Zaideih khia in zumluang tum in zaila’n hong phat ning.
Zilza Na gam pakbang etlawm bahkhi bang vel ning,
Zingzin simlei nunna ka zoh chiang’n;
Nunna siktui damdiai in luang vaibang ka tham ding,
Khensa zatam umbang kholh di’n mel ki mu kik ding.
T. Pumkhothang
Simlei ah zaw khualtaam lel ka hi a,
Ki sapna ngen hi bukimna omlou;
Lungsiknate leh lungngaihna te in,
Ka lampi a ding in lingbang a hon sun.
Inn ka tun chiang’n van inn nuam ka tun chiang’n,
Leitung lungkhamnate a beita ding;
Gimtak leh bahtak a ka puak van-gikte,
Ka pa inn ka tun chiang in a beita ding.
Simlei ah gou manphate neilou in,
Vuallel tak in simlei ah leng zong leng;
Thangvan ka tun chiang’n ka gou manpha leh,
Vualzohna in tua ah kei hon na ngak hi.
Khatvei leh lungkiatnate’n a hon tuam,
Ka hinna zong bah in a ngui sak zel;
Tuni’n ka nuam zong, zingchiang ka dahna,
Lungnop kisinna kia’n sunni ka tum zel.
T. Pumkhothang
Innkuan kituaklou, innkuan ki lem lou’n ,
Innsung gawtmun a tang sak;
Innkuan zatamte siat vang a vul in,
Lungngaihna in a dim ta.
Innkuan a dam na’n, innsung a dam na’n,
Van Laukha kia i ngai uh;
Innkuan ah Pathian in vai a hawm leh,
Tua kia i damna ding hi.
Nute ki ngaihtuah’n innkuan a ding in,
Vontawite dia ki piadi’n,
Pate ki ngaihtuah’n Pathian thu bang a,
Innkuan pitu hi ding in.
Toupa na Lalgam innkuan ah tung in,
Nang thuneihna hita hen;
Setan thuneihna vang a kisiate,
Nang in hon bawlpha kik in.
T. Pumkhothang
I mohna te’n eite hon dou gige a,
Aman eilam hon en nuamlou hi;
Toupa a di’n kihhuai pen i hi zong a,
Aman eite a hon it lailai hi.
Aw! itna thuuk pen, Aw! itna sang pen,
Kalvari a itna hong luang khia;
I mohna khempeuhte dikna toh hon kheek in,
A siangthou in eite a hon bawl zou.
Amah a di’n mohna lianlua omlou hi,
I mohnate bangzah in lian zong;
Ngaihdam zohlouh a nei lou, A sisan in,
A saang khempeuh a di’n damna ahi.
Khrist a-nei mi’n siamlouhtanna nei nawn lou,
Aman mohna khempeuh ngilh zouta;
A siangthou in hon sim a, siangthou hi hang,
Aman mohna khempeuh a paaimang zou.
T. Pumkhothang
Van aksi leh thilsiamte khempeuh,
Tuipi te leh taang te kilawm;
Ahoih na te suiseng hilou,
Tua te sang in Tou Jesu hoih zaw.
Aw kilawm na e, ka Tou Jesu,
Aw a manphat dan, suiseng hilou;
Aw a thilsiam khempeuhte sang,
Jesu hoihzaw hi aw tua te sang in.
Hauhna hoih in,siamna zong hoih hi,
Nuntakna ding i geel te zong;
Inn leh lou leh neih leh lam zong,
Tua te sang in Tou Jesu hoih zaw.
Kisak theihna Jesu ah kanei,
Manphatna te neita kei leng;
Ka bangkim hi ka Tou Jesu,
Khovel sang in Tou Jesu hoih zaw.
T. Pumkhothang
Lunglai ah aw ka gel chiang in,
Aw a na i gam simthu;
Toupa mel loubang a tul zouta,
Aw lung in i gel ngam hiam?
Toupa aw hong leng in,
Ka gam uah Nang vaihawm in;
Toupa aw hon ngai ung,
Nang lou in zaw muanna
Aw! a om ngeilou.
Simlei muanna ka zong zel ua,
Muanna ding a omlou e;
Taikhua val dong a ka siallai un,
Sial zatam tuibang kang zel.
Aw! Na mite na hon vel chian’
Lung na awi na hiam Toupa;
Itna leh lainatna bei zouta,
Toupa aw hon ngaidam in.
U leh naute ki ngaihsun ni,
Lung i gel a hunta hi;
Ngaihdamna ei a ahihlai in,
Toupa kiang i zuan ding uh.

songs.title: Ka Gam Uh Dam Sak In

lines: T. Pumkhothang
Aw Toupa ka gam uh hon en in,
Khelhna leh gitlouhna te’n munteng a luah zou;
Ki itna a kiamta, hehpihna a bei,
Ka gam uh siatna’n ki dim, Toupa aw hondamsak in.
Ka gam uh Toupa hondamsak in,
Van a pan hon en inla;
Aw Na mite sualna hon mu inla,
Sualna vang a liamsa gam,
Toupa aw hondamsak in.
Duh-amna ki neksiatna gam hi,
Angmasialna toh kidim huaihamna ngen hi;
Siatna tui kihawt in lehlam lehlam ah,
Ka gam uh ahonpi e, Toupa aw hon hondam in.
Khristian gam kichi sam na pi in,
Muanna leh nunnopna te galmuanna omlou;
Kithahna a pung zel, mulkimna beita,
Ka gam uah Na mel kilawm loubang in tulzouta e.
Toupa aw ka gam siatnate uh,
Itna leh zahngaihna toh aw hon enlai in;
Na mite kisik a ahong thum uleh,
Sualna henkol a pan in, Toupa aw hon honkhia in.
T. Pumkhothang
Ka hinna ki sel, a muan huai Toupa sung ah,
Bang lau ding ka hiam bang hang ka lung dong diam?
Muan huai Na khut in keimah hong len den hi a,
Tua hang lung ka nuam ka Ginpa muan huai.
Kei muan- huai hilou, ka Ginpa a muanhuai hi zaw,
Bang kim ah Amah, kei a di’n a muanhuai;
Hondam di’n a hat, pan pih di’n a muanhuai,
Kei muanhuai hi lou ka Ginpa muai huai.
Ka ginna a neu, ka hat- na zong neu hi a,
Hizong kei hi lou, Amah hatna vang in;
Kei ginna lel in hotdam in om zou hi keng,
Ka Ginpa a hat na in hondam hi.
Khovel ka et in, launa in ka dim sek a,
Lunglau in ka om lungkia in ka om zel;
Toupa ka et in A muanhuai na ka mu a,
Lung lau na pan in nop na lui hong luang.
T. Pumkhothang
Hiai lei gentheihna lungngaihna gam ah,
Tu in lungngai in leng mah zong leng;
Thianmang saunuam ah Belamnou vak ah,
Ka len hun chiang in nun nuamta ding.
Simlei ngai lou in tua ah ka leng ding,
Lei gimhuai pel in thangvan sang ah;
Tatsa te mel mu’n lungngaih omnawn lou,
Tangtawn in nunnuam in ka leng ding.
Lei ah gim thuak in huibangmau zong leng,
Dahna lungngaihna’n hon tuam zong leh;
Lungdeih paisa te’n hon ngakna mun ah,
Gim gen theih om lou inn ka nei hi.
Simlei kikhenna khitui luanna gam,
Lungzuang a nau bang kahna gam hi;
Van inn nuam sung a i leen hun chiang in,
Gi bang kikhenna om nawnlou ding.
T. Pumkhothang
Kei kia’n lampai nawn kei ning,
Simlei tung ka nun sung in;
Toupa toh ton le’ng ka paina,
Thawmhau in lungmang kei ning.
Ka nunna lam hong pi in,
Nang lou in simlei gam ah;
Lungmuanna omlou Toupa,
Na khanuai hon sel in aw.
Ka muh leh zaak khempeuhte,
Lung ka gel khempeuhte zong;
A siangthou lampi zui thei di’n,
Ka nuntakna hong pi in.
Simlei luummei kai zong leh,
Nang hon ompih den in aw;
Sunkhua zankhua ka geel khempeuh,
Na deihbang lam hong pi in.
Ka nuntak ding dan geel na’n,
Lunggim in ka om zong a,
Toupa aw Nang nong ompih leh,
Bang di’n huibang ka mau dia.
T. Pumkhothang
Ka nunna dangtak in aw a bah zel,
Ka lunggulh Jesu a ngai hi;
Lei thupina hon neem thei a om lou,
Amah kia hi aw ka lunggulh.
Aw Jesu kei din ak sihkhuk ahi,
Bangteng sang ka lunggulh pen;
Simlei pallun leh ahoihna sang in,
Jesu kei din na manpha.
Kei a ding a damna leh ka taina,
Ka Jesu lou dang a omlou,
Amah kei a din ka hatna hi a,
Ka sihkhuk Jesu ka hinna.
Bah leh nguite dia hatna a neipa,
A dawn mite ding a damna;
Kang ngeilou sihkhuk a zuan mite zaw,
A dangtek kik nawn lou ding uh.
T. Pumkhothang
Tou Jesu ka neih man in,
Bangdang thupi omta lou;
Tou Jesu neih, kei a di’n a hun hi,
Siamna saanna hauhnate;
Bangmah neilou ka hi zong,
Tou Jesu neih, kei a di’n a hun hi.
Tou Jesu neih,
Kei a di’n bang teng sang in manpha;
Tou Jesu neih ka hauhna pen ahi,
Hiai khovel in;
Mihai banglel in hon sim taleh zong,
Tou Jesu neih kei a di’n a hun hi.
Taaksap hunte hongtung a,
Lam-etna a bei zong in;
Tou Jesu neih, kei a di’n a hun hi,
Theipi kung pallun lou in;
Huang ah ganta bei zong in,
Tou Jesu neih, kei a di’n a hun hi.
Zaitha hatna hongbei in,
Pallaini hong vul zong in;
Tou Jesu neih, keia di’n a hun hi,
Teek leh vuai hun hongtung a;
Tung sunni a kaaita zong,
Tou Jesu neih, kei a di’n a hun hi.
T.Pumkhothang
Aw ka Suangpi Toupa aw kei hong liah in,
Kei a dia ka bitna Nang na hi;
Khemna a honglian dou a ka zoh theih na’n,
Tam Suangpi aw kei hong liah in.
Nang ka Suangpi aw kei hong liah in,
Nang lou ka bitna omlou e;
Ka Honpa na hi ka Pathian na hi,
Kei din ka lum leh phaw Na hi;
Aw ka Suangpi kei hong liah in aw.
Lau leh ling a ka om in Nang non thei a,
Lungngai in ka om zong Nang na thei;
Aw Nang ka Suangpi launa a ka bitna,
Hong liah in aw Nang kong bel hi.
Ka tung ah bangteng a hong tung zong in ah,
Lau kei ning ka Suangpi Nang na hi;
Pipa ka Pathian Na khut sung a pan in,
Launa ka nuai siah ngei ding hi.
T. Pumkhothang
Khangnou lai hun a manphatna theilou’n na om hiam?
Zu leh sa in na hinkhua hon zou in,
Manna neilou, na hun khempeuh na mawk beisak a,
Khangnou lai hun in tua bangte tawpsanta in.
Na khangnou lai hun suang manpha sang manpha zaw,
Na vai khempeuh kichian tak a na gel leh;
Na kha leh nuntakna khempeuh a bei dong in,
Na hauhsakna na lungnopna honghi ding hi.
Khangnou lai in na hun khempeuh mawk beisak nawn ken,
Na zohsa hun na mai hong kik lou ding;
Na utbang in na deih bang in niang leh tai’n om in,
Toupa mai ah nang tuate’n hon pilut ding hi.
Thatang hatna hong kipia, lungsim hatna hong kipia
Tua khempeuh mawkna in na beisak ding maw?
Lung in na gelpha thak in khangnou lai tomkal sung in,
Khangnou lai hun suangmanpha sang manpha zaw.
T. Pumkhothang
Haksatna mun a pangngam in Toupa na i sem ding,
In leh lou paisan akul Toupa nasem di’n zaw;
Gimna ah zong lung kelou thuakna mun a tai lou,
I khros mah i puak a kul ahi.
Khawl theih hilou Toupa gam a di’n,
A nuamlou a haksa bang teng ah zong;
Thuakna leh supna lou in, Toupa Na kisem theilou,
I Toupa a di’n isem ding uh.
Toupan ei a dia a thuaknat dante lung a gel in,
A nasepna tawl ki sa’n lunglel in om kei ni;
Koi mun ah hizong Aman hon deihna mun peuh ah,
Amah di’n i sem kei ding ua hiam?
Toupa gam nasem lou namte mangthang ding ahi uh,
A nasemlou nam ihih in zaw i mangthang ding;
A gam a di’n kipe le’ng ei di’n i damna hi,
A nasem minam ihi ding uh.
T. Pumkhothang
Khovel a ka leen sung in,
Ka hindan ding hong hilh in;
Hiai khovel ka inn a hihlouh dan,
Ka mun ding na kiang hi zaw;
Ka inn ding na kiang hi zaw,
Kipak a kong tun theihna di’n.
Hon theisak in aw Toupa,
Khovel ka leen sungin;
Na deih leh Na lunggelna,
Nisim in kei hong hilh in;
Ka nunna leh kalsuante,
Toupa aw kei hong pi in aw.
Khovel a ka leen sungin,
Toupa aw kei hong hilh in;
Ka deihtelnate na deih hi di’n,
Na paina ka pai theih a;
Na khawlna a khawl thei din,
Ka lutang nanglam hei in aw.
Khovel a ka leen sungin,
Kei tunga a hong tungte;
Nang a pan Na sawl hi zeel hen aw,
Nopnate ka tuah ni in;
Dahnate ka tuah ni in,
Ka khitui nang hon sawl hi hen
T. Pumkhothang
Ken hoihna khat zong ka neilou,
Jesu Khris hoihna koppih in;
Amah vang a dik a sim in ka omlel hi,
Aw tu in zong hoihna ka neilou;
Ka hihna zaw mikhial lel ka hi,
Khris vang a siangthou;
Khris vang a hoih ka hi lel hi.
Khris hoihna kei a a hita,
A sianthouna kei a a hita;
A hihna a hon neisak a A hon pomta,
Tu’n ah lau ding ka nei nawnlou;
A huang ah muang in ka om,
Khris hoihna leh sianthouna kei a a hita.
Kei mahmah ka ki et chiang in,
Sianthouna hoihna ka neilou;
Hizong Aman siangthou in ahon pomta hi,
Amah nnate ka semtheita a;
A paina ah ka pai theita hi,
Khris vak a nungta’n;
Amah bang in ahon bawlta!
T. Pumkhothang
Kei Hon tanpa’n a hong thuakna, tua Khros lampi zaw,
Gimna leh haksatna zumhuaina a hi,
Hiai simlei in theisiam lou, tua Khros lampi pen
Sim lei a di’n haina lel a hi zaw.
Kros lam pi zaw thupina a hi lou
Kros lampi zaw gimna leh thuakna a hi
A laitak a ka Toupa’n a thuakna Khros zaw,
Gimna leh zumhuaina Khros a hi.
Kiletsakna ki-otsakna na kilhlum ta maw,
Khros lampi kiniamkhiatnate a hi zaw,
Hiai simlei pahtaknate na paisan ta maw
Khros lampi zaw simlei paisan a hi.
Tua Khros lampi ka zuih chiang in simlei a ding in
Kilh belh in ka om a, simlei a hi keng
Tua kros vang in ka bangkim ka nusia ta a,
Tua kros lampi ka lampi a hi ta.
T. Pumkhothang
Hiai khualzinna gam, nuai simlei ah,
Gimthuak a i mau lai in;
Pathian tate dia ni thupi pen,
Haibang i ngaklah ngei e.
Hiai khualzinna gam, simlei ahi,
Eite inn van ahi zaw;
Tuun ah gimthuak in, i mau zong a,
Denchiang zoh laa i sa ding.
Hiai khualzinna gam, nuai simlei ah,
Lungmuanna ding a omlou;
Van-gam nuam ah zaw, lungkim tak in;
Nuam in i khawl denta ding.
Hiai khualzinna gam, nuai simlei ah,
Thupina neilou te’n zong;
Van-gam nuam ah zaw, Belamnou in,
Thupi tak in a thuam ding.
T.Pumkhothang
Zaitha hatna bangmah ka neilou a,
Theihna leh kichinna bangmah nei keng;
Selung pilna masuan ding neilou pi,
Na nasem ding in bang ka hi hiam Toupa.
Kon ompih ding banzal ka hon len ding,
Lunglau lou aw nang din Toupa ka hi;
Nangmah hatna hilou kei hatna in,
Hon nusia kei ning nang toh ka omkhawm ding.
Sianmang sung ah a piang theilou omlou,
Zaitha hatna neilou te’n hatna nei;
Khattang muanding omlou ahih lai in,
Tung Sianmang zaitha ka hatna hong hita.
Keimah hatna suang a ka pai in zaw,
Lunglauna ding lungngaihna ding atam;
Tunglam en a Sianmang ka mit suan chiang,
Tung muvanlai bang zaitha hatna ka nei.
T. Pumkhothang
Aw hon ngai ung khuva bang nem,
Van laukha siangthou hon ngai ung;
Nang tellou in kal suan dan ka theisiam kei uh,
Hon phel inla, hon velchian in;
Ka sung ua mohna om khempeuh,
Hong halsiang in hon bawlpha in;
Laukha Siang aw.
Aw hon ngai ung Laukha Siangthou,
Koute sung ah hon sem inla;
Vualzawlna vuah koute a di’n hon zu sak aw,
Aw! khatvei beek hon veh lai in;
Bah leh nguite hon phawnghalh di’n,
Halhna meikuang Laukha Siangthou ;
Hon ngai ung e.
Toupa Na Laukha vang in aw,
Kipahna lui hong luanglet in;
Hon dimsak in hon tuisak in Laukha Siang aw,
Si napi a lungmuang laite;
Hing minpu a lungmuang laite,
Na hotdamna Na lungmuanna ;
Ka ngai uh e.
Huan tu bang in hon ching inla,
Lamhaih lammangte pikik in;
Khelhna zanmial nuai a omte hon tanvak in,
Lungsik simthu lel nuamlou a;
Lungtang khauh a zatam omte,
A neemsak thei Laukha Siangthou ;
Nang kia Na hi.
T.Pumkhothang
Lawm it tun leh zua chin leh tuaite aw,
Sianmang siang ah tuang i tung thei ding hiam?
Tuangtung thei lou ding maw chin leh tuai aw,
Lawm it nang zong tuang tung thei ding na hia,?
Hun bei ma in gel in.
Aw Thangvan tual ah mun na muang ta hiam?
Aw na kha’n koilam zuan ding hiam?
Hotdamna ni leh hun kipahhuai ah,
I din lai in gel ni.
Pakbang lutlai nite hong vul ding,
Zaitha hatna leh sakmel hoihnate;
Loubang tul in tuibang hong kang ding a,
Sihna’n salbang hon mat hun hong tung ding;
Hun bei ma in gel in.
Simlei i nopna te hong bei ding a,
Lungzuan dahna in tui bang hon tum dia;
Na laukha tun na’ng tu in gel dih vaw ,
Hun hong bei leh kua siang nab el ding hiam?
Hun bei ma in gel in.
T. Pumkhothang
Ngabang lenna simlei tual ah,
Dah luankhi dai bang theng moh e;
Lungkham omlou thangvan gam nunnuam ah,
Nunnuam in laitual leng nuam ing.
Leng nuam ing leng nuam in,
Angel leh Serafte lenna gam ah;
Nunnuam a laitual lenna hun ding,
Chikchiang ngaih bang ding na hiam?
Ka ngaih bang thei lout hangvan gam,
Tuailou tulsing lim gam nuam ah;
Thianmang toh laitual ka lenkhawm hun ding,
Lungsung ah ngaih bang thei lou e.
Ka luankhi puan bang hong nul ding,
Toupa nang lou kua dang omlou;
Na gam leh na sau nunnuam ka gel in,
Kei luankhi puan bang hong nul hi.
T. Pumkhothang
Lia leh taang aw bang chi’n pallaini na zang hiam?
Pawn a pakbang vul ding lung in na gel ngam diam?
Na pilna leh siamna zaitha hatlai nite
Sakmel lawmlou kulsin sam bang a zaal ding maw?
Tun leh zua lung awilou, tung Thianmang lung awi lou,
Pallaini vullou a mual a liam mai ding zaw;
Lung in hon gel kik in pallun lai etlawmnou,
Toupa dia zang lou a mualliam mai ding maw?
Pallut lai etlawmnou mizata mitsuanna,
Tun leh zua lunggelna nun a nuamsaktu hi:
Sianmang it leh deih pen pallutlai nite hi,
Maimit hon suan chim lou hong it tung Thianmang in;
Na lunggel a ngilhlou, na heina a ngilh lou,
Simlei hoihna teng toh nun in na nuam zong in;
Simlei pallun hoihna nang hon doute hi uh,
Sul hong hei kik mai in na heina pan in.
T. Pumkhothang
Khelhna zanmial ah, lungkham in ka om,
Ka van-gikte ka puak lai in;
Ka thumna za in A aw nem ka za,
Na mohna ka ngaidamta chi in.
Ka nuamta, ka lung nuamta,
Lui siangthou ah ka khelhna siangta;
Khris sisan luisiang a ka bual lai in,
Dai ngeilou ka lungnopna hong luang.
Kei hoihna nei lou, kei a moh mi in,
Na ngaihdamna ka za Toupa;
Nang a pan hinna ken ka neita hi,
Lungnopna ka gen zou ngei ding maw?
Aw lamdang lua hi, kei na hon itna,
Tangtawn tangtawn a tul ngeilou;
Aw kei dia damna’n ka sung ah hong luang,
Tangtawn in a kang ngei nawn lou ding.
T. Pumkhothang
Nuntakna lampi lummei hong zing maw?
Hon taisan hilou i Toupa in;
Huihpi hong nung in khua a hong mial zong,
Toupa khut muanhuai na kiang om hi.
Lung lau ken Toupa’n na kiang hon ompih hi,
Khattang kisa ken Aman hon thei gige;
Thawmhau ken Toupa’n nang hon ompih hi,
Aman na lampi ahon pi ding.
Mailam nuntakna lau in na om maw?
Na nuntakna zong na chimtak maw?
En in Toupa khut nang tung ah om hi,
Hong huh di’n mansa’n a om gige.
Na lam-etna in hon beisan zong in,
Bangkim bawltheipa a omlai hi;
Lungkhamna guamkhuk mial ah na pai maw?
Tua ah zong Toupa na kiang om hi.
Na vai khempeuh zong Toupa tung nga in,
Aman hon pi ding na muan peuh leh;
Nuntakna haksa bangteng hong tung zong,
Toupa nang ding in a muanhuai hi.
T. Pumkhothang
Toupa kong pai na vualzawlna tangsam ding in,
Ka utna leh deihna khempeuhte paisan in;
Na gamchiam lam zuan in kong pai,
Vualzawlna ka tanna ding leh;
Midangte dia vualzawlna ka hih theihna di’n.
Aw ka Toupa honpi in aw,
Hiai lei tomkal ka damlai ni;
Abraham bang midangte dia,
Vualzawlna ka hih theihna di’n
Aw ka Toupa hon thuam in aw.
Ka nuntakna ka ngaihsutna khempeuhte zong,
Ka omdan leh ka aw suakte khempeuh hi zong;
Ka innsung leh midangte dia,
Vualzawlna ka hihtheihna di’n;
Ka nuntakna midangte di’n zangta ning e.
Gingtute aw itna vak ah i taang ding uh,
Ki gensiatna ki bawlsiatnate paisan in;
I Pathian in a hon it bang,
Veng leh pam lainatna nei in;
Midangte dia vualzawlna din kizang ta ni.
Aw Khasiangthou hon ngai ung e,
Na thilhihtheihna meikuang in
Aw Na mite hong phawnghalh in
Midangte dia vualzawlna di’n
Aw Khasiangthou hon ngai ung e.
T. Pumkhothang
Sakmin ngaih a hawmsiam pen Vanglian tung Pathian,
Simleitung leh thangvan ah min ngaihpen na hi;
Koute dia a hoih tawntung limbelh tung Pathian,
Min ngaihpen a Vanglian Nang Na hi.
Min ngaihpen aVanglian pen Toupa hong phat ung,
Koute dia ka Pathian uh, Thupipen Na hi;
Khang suangpi a bei ngeilou Toupa Nang Na hi,
Sutseng louh na min ngaih hina e.
Damloute, misite zong damsak thei Na hi,
Guhkeute a dia hinna pia thei pa Na hi;
Thil bangkim na bawl thei a, bangkim Nang Na hi,
Thupi pen a Vanglian hong phat ung.
Na hoihna a honglang zel Na mite a di’n,
Nisim a ka taksap uh hong pia zel Pathian;
Khattang hon nusia ngeilou hon ompih Na hi,
Nang it bang a hon it omlou e.
T. Pumkhothang
Toupa na hon itna lamdang ka gen zoulou,
Kei bang leltak na hon itna a thupi e;
Na mai ah suan ding ka neilou,
Belpuan bang lel ka na hi e,
Hizong Toupa na hon itna hong luang.
Na hon itna a thupi ngei,
Kei mikhial di’n tulsing lel a na hong thuakna;
Hiai bang lawmlawm itna lamdang,
Ka gen zoulou ka sut zoulou;
Aw kei a di’n damna bukim ahi.
Na thupina nusia in lei ah nong tualkum,
Lei ah vai in mikhialte di’n na hong thuak a;
Simmohna leh bawlsiatnate,
Gentheihna teng na hong thuak maw;
Aw ka Toupa na itna vang hi e.
Na hon it bang itna lamdang a om ng eilou,
Man ngen lou in itna nong pia a thupi lua;
Lei sang tampi nei hileng zong,
Nang phatna di’n a tam lou lai;
Aw a gen in genseng ding hilou hi.
T. Pumkhothang
Toupa Pathian ka Lalpen aw,
Malai pan hon pipa;
Bangmahlou pan nong laamtou a,
Hiai tan dong a non pi;
Khatvei leh aw! Na hon pi dan,
Theisiamlou hizong leng;
Na hoihnate kei a ding in,
Puanbang Na hon kop lai.
Na hon pi dan ka ngaihtuah in,
Thupi hina tel e;
Na hoihnate ka gelgel chian,
Gel in a chian zoulou;
Bang ka hi hiam a lamdang ngei,
Hiai tan dong a non pi;
Ka kipak e ka Pathian aw,
Na hon pina vang in.
Khat veivei leh haksatnate’n,
Hong buaisak thei zel a;
Khat veivei leh lam haksa ah,
Bah in ka pai zong a;
Na khut hat in Na hon pi a,
Taamsawl lou in non pi;
Hiai tan melmu a ka om zaw,
Na hoihna vang hi e.
Bangmahlou hi’ng na hon thei a,
Leivui banglel ka hi;
Hizong Toupa na hon phawk a,
Tua kia zong hunlua e;
Hizong vualzawlna non pia lai,
Kei di’n a thupi ngei;
Na hon khotuahna lianlua e,
Sim thu’n a lel zou lou.
T. Pumkhothang
Simlei mite’n a theihlouh,
Na Kros mitsua’n kalen ding,
Thuakna leh gensiatna kal ah hizong leh;
Na Kros tawpsan thei hi ke’ng,
Na Kros taisan thei hi ke’ng,
Ka zuiding ka zui zelding kha pham dong in.
Na Kros kia ka len ding a,
Na Kros kia ka zuiding hi;
Kei a di’n Kros tungah simlei ki zouta,
Simlei a ka hi nawnlou;
Kei aw Kros di’n ka nungta,
Ka lampi ka zuihpen zaw tua Kros ahi.
Ka mohna teng Na pua a,
Ka khelhna teng Na pua a;
Kei a ding in Kros tung ah na hongthuak ta;
A hatlou pen ka hizong,
A chinglou pen ka hizong,
Ka hatna ka chitna thusim na Kros hi.
Tu in aw ken theichian ta’ng,
simlei a ding hinawn keng,
Toupa a ding in ka bangkim ka piata;
Ka hatna zong kilhbelh ing,
ka utna zong kilhbelh ing,
Ka Toupa Kros tung ah bangkim ka ngata.
T. Pumkhothang
Toupa a omte dingin bangkim a hauhna hi,
Itna ah zong itna lian semsem;
Zawnna ah zong hauhna thupi pen,
Toupa a neite a din.
Nang na omna nuam,
Nang na om na a nuam hi;
Toupa aw ka siang uah hong om in,
Nang toh ton in pai leng;
Bangkim a muanna,
Toupa na om na nuam hi.
Lemna leh muanna gam zaw Toupa a neite hi,
Huatna leh kidanna om ngeilou;
Ei a din i gam a din damna,
Toupa a hong om chiangin.
Sum leh pai hauhna, pilna, siamna leh sanna te,
Manna ding a omlou na omlouh le;
Hinna khempeuh sang na manpha zaw,
Toupa na om leh nuam hi
T. Pumkhothang
Aw i gam gingtu hinkhua,
Siatnaten zing daibang in a nawk;
Tangthupha in a luahna gam,
Sualnate in aw a dim zouta.
Thou inla na Pathian sam in,
Aw i gam mangthang ding hilou maw?
I khelhnate thupha tawi in,
Aman hon ngaidam lai ding ahi.
Tuun leh zua a mangthang uh,
Chiin leh tuaite zong a mangthang uh;
Mulkimhuai siatnate sung ah,
Aw setan sal in a taang uh e.
Lungmuang in i omlai maw?
Don lou in hun sawt i omta ngei;
Kua a hiam itna khitui toh,
Aw a maute ding a thu ngen ding?
T. Pumkhothang
Taang in na omna peuh ah,
Na vaak taang sak in;
Miallak a mite kiang ah,
Na vaak taang sak in.
Taang sak in na vaak tang khe sak zel in,
Taang sak in simlei tung mun khempeuh ah;
Taangsak in na vaak tang khe sak zel I,
Taang sak zel in na vaak mite kiang.
Khristian vak nein a hih leh,
Miallak ah taang in,
Na kim leh paam mite kiang;
Na vaak taang sak in.
Na omdante’n thu gen hen,
Leitung mun peuh ah,
Na gamtat dante pan in,
Na vaak tangsak in.
T. Pumkhothang
Nang bang kua dang omlou hi,
Simlei leh thangvan ah zong;
Thupina Vaihawmna khempeuh,
Tangtawn in Nang a ahi.
Hong bia ung, Hong Pahtawi ung,
A Siangthou Vanglian Toupa aw;
Sangpen Pa aw! Hong Liansak ung,
Aw! Nang bang kua dang omlou hi;
Aw! Nang bang kua dang omlou hi.
Nang bang kua dang omlou hi,
Sangpen, Lianpen, Thupipen!
Nang bang minngaih dang omlou hi,
Minthanna teng Nang a hi.

T. Pumkhothang
Simlei thupina leh hauhsakna,
Deihtaakna in lungsung a luahzou;
Nang sang a zong in ka buai den ua,
Kalung sung uah Nang di’n mun a om lou.
Tou pa aw nang kia ka hon tel hi,
Nang sang in bang dang ka tel theilou;
Simlei thu pi na tengteng sang in,

Lei hauhsakna teng kei a hi a,

Toupa na vualzawlna ka tante,

T. Pumkhothang
Nang toh lou in hiai nuai simlei,
Thawmhauna lungngaihna hi;
Kei kia in machiang suan in ka pai zou lou,
Tua bang hi zong Toupa ngaih aw;
Na khut in kei hon len den a,
No’ng ompih chiang’n nuamna bukim a om zel.
Nang toh lou in Toupa aw,
Nuamna kiching a om thei lou;
Nang toh lou in lungmuanna a om lou e,
Hon tonpih in hon len in;
Simlei ka zin sung in ah,
Nang toh lou in nuamna bukim a omlou.
Nang toh lou in ka machiang ah,
Lummeibang a zing den a;
Nang toh lou in lametnate a bei zel a,
Nang toh lou in lei pallun zong;
Bangmahlou bang lel ahi a,
Lungngaihna leh mangbatna lel ahi zaw.
Nang toh lou in simlei lungkham
Thuakzoh ding ahi lou hi;
Nang toh lou in simlei nunna a mial na e,
Liamsa ngai ung, lungzuan sial ung;
Duangvul in ka om zel uh a,
Nang toh lou in ngaihtam sialna lel ahi.
T. Pumkhothang
Toupa Pathian aw na hoihna ka mu,
Vualzawlna lampite ah na honpi;
Lam-etna khen gam ah na honpi lai,
Manpha in thupi lua.
Non vualzawlna simseng ahi lou,
Na honpi dan suut seng a hilou;
Kei leh ka innkuan bang hiam ka hih uh,
Hiai tantan a Na honpi.
Ahun ahun in Na hoihna ka mu,
Koi a kipan a hong pai ahi hiam;
Zion apan in aw Na panpih na,
Hongtung ahi zaw hi.
Na simthuphate Na hon musak a,
Manpha hina e, thupi hina e;
Mimawl a ding in pilna ahi a,
Hon tawisangtu ahi.
Na hon khotuah daan thupi hina e,
Loubang na khualna kan in a sang ngei;
Gamkeu leh haksatna ah hilou in,
Vualzawlna ah No’n pi.
T. Pumkhothang
Pakpalh zu bang ka khumlou zong,
Khuai bang in ka paal hong veh in;
Ka nunna thelnah bang keu zong leh,
Toupa a hong paampaih kei in.
Aw ka nunna tualniam zong leh,
Toupa nang ding in hon zang in;
Etlawm pak bang ka hihlou hang’n,
Ka nunna nang di’n zang in aw.
Lengthe bang zai ka siamlou zong’n,
Ka sak zailate hong ngai aw;
Pilna siamna ka neihlouh hang in,
Ka nunna sennau bang pom in.
Tantawk ah hong lungkim pih in,
Toupa nang di’n ki zang nuam ing;
Septheih bang ka sep ding hon nial ken,
Nang di’n liimsing bang hi nuam ing.
T. Pumkhothang
Pasian Kumpigam zaw nek leh dawn hilou,
Silh leh ten leh neih leh lam hilou;
Hauhna thu hilou, zawnna thu hilou,
Khasiangthou-a diktatna hi zaw.
Aw! Na Kumpigam ka lak uah hong tung hen,
Michih ah Na Kumpigam tung hen;
Innkuan khempeuh ah, gamsung khempeuh ah,
Aw! Na gam ka lak uah hong tung hen.
Pasian in a hon sam, aw ei gingtute,
Lemna leh lainatna nei ding in;
Tua pen i Pasian, lungtaina ahi,
Leimi di’n a lungdamhuai hiveh.
A simthu i thei in, A zaila thei hang,
A khekhap zui ding i tawm ngei e;
Sianthouna nei in, diktatna nei in,
Amah bang i khangtou ding uhi.
T. Pumkhothang
Omsa Pathian om lel leh om gi ge ding,
Piandang na vanglet na lian hi,
Lei siam a Van leh tuipite a siampa,
Tangtawn a tangtawn nang nahi.
Piandang na vanglet na lian hi Tou pa,
Piandang na vangletna lian hi Toupa,

Piandang na vanglet na lian hi.
Lei leh a sung a thilsiam te a bawlpa,
