T. Pumkhothang
Simlei tung lungngaihna silpaklun a vul e,
Nunnuam a ngabang leng a om diam?
Lungmuan om nawn lou naubang kahna ahi,
Nunnuam a sambang zal omlou.
Sunkhua lungzuan sialna, zankhua ngaihtam sialna,
Lung guuk a lungngai a tam ngei;
Lungmuan om nawn lou naubang kahna lel,
Nunnuam a ngabang leng om diam?
Lia leh tang lungmuang lou, tun leh zua lungmuang lou,

Zaitha tawl ngaihtam sial meibang thenni omlou,

T. Pumkhothang
1. Tuan a pupa selung mawl dawi leh kau bia’n,
Sing bul suang bul bia a kun in;

Suahtakna la ngaihtak in i sa ding uh,
Halleluiah! Halleluiah!
Vangletna vualzohna Aman hong pia,

Halleluiah minthang hen.
2. Pilna hong guan Tangthupha khuavak a hi,
Siamnate leh sannate zon;,
Tangthupha ei di’n manpha hina tel e,
Hon tawisangtua na hi.
Brigde
Tangthupha khovak in eite hon taanvak ta a,

Hong lamtou a san na mun te a hon tung sak in,
Leivui pan in hong lamtou Tangthupha hi.
3. Thupina leh Pahtawina Amah pia ni,
Hinna lampi hon bawlsak ta, hon suakta sak;
Sihna pan hong hon khiata,
Tangtawn Toupa min thang hen.
T. Pumkhothang
Na thupina gen in gen vual hilou,
Aw a vanglian Toupa nang na min lian hi;
Van Angel sangsawmte’n,
Phat la ngaihtak in na kim ah leng uh.
Vangletna leh minthanna,
Thupina leh pahtawina;
Zahtakna teng vaihawmna teng Nang a,
Na siangthou Na siangthou hi Toupa;
Tangtawn in thupina Nang ahi.
Nang phatna la tangtawn in sa nuam ing,
Nang phatna ka kha ah dim leh ka nuam hi;
Na mai a hong kun in,
Pahtawina leh Thupina ka hon pia.
A hoih khempeuh keia nong hisak a,
Na kilawmna khempeuh kei ah nong koih hi;
Na hoihna a lian lua,
Halleluiah Halleluiah Amen.
T. Pumkhothang
Toupa na tate lai ah kawlni suak sim in,
Huhamna leh siatna in ka gam uh a luah zou;
Ki itte ki laizomte dougal a suak zouta,
Ki itna’n mun a nei nawnta lou.
I thouding aw i zuan ding Toupa i zuan ding uh,
I gam zong Toupa’n a hon it lai;
Banghang a i Toupa mel liahtu i hih lailai,
Kisik in Toupa i zuan ding uh.
Khelh vang in aw sen momnou sanggah a tam ngei,
A it huai a naupangte nangawn in zong a thuak;
A poi in a mulkim huai tulai i nuntakna,
I Toupa a melsiatna ahi
Zuang hong thou un tun leh jua, chin leh tuaite aw,
Kisathei in om kei ni kingaihniam a hunta;
Kisik a i sul hei leh ngaihdamna i tang ding,
A liam ma’n i zuan meng ding uhi.
T. Pumkhothang
Toupa anbang a nong itna,
Lailung ka gel chiang lamdang sa’ng;
Gitlouhna dim nong tatkhiak,
Lunglai ah gelseng zou keng maw;
Kei a dia na itna kiching,
Chik leh lung in ka ngilh zou diam?
Aw, Toupa nong nong itna,
Lamdang lua sang e ka lunglai ah;
Ih, chikchiang nong itna
Lailung in ka gel zou ding hiam?
Kei dia nong itna lunglai ah naubang in sang ing.
Nisim lam ka paina peuh ah,
Khelhna’n ka mai nuihchiam hong lel;
Nui kha zel ing Toupa aw,
Hizong kei hon taisan kei in;
Na khut in hon lenden in aw,
A tawp dong khut in hon len in,
Kei di’n khua-ul sibang luang a,
Khapham dong in nong thuaksak lai;
Sihna kei di’n nong zohsak,
Mimohte sianna nong peta;
Nang vang in siangthou hitang maw?
Toupa aw kou di’n na hoih hi.
T. Pumkhothang
I Toupa hon itna lian hina lawmlawm,
Hoihna khat zong neilou i hihlai in;
Itna sisan hongluang in a hon tanta,
A ta’n hon bawl lamdang e a hon itna.
Tua sisan hi, ka lung nop a kimna,
Tua sisan ahi ka kisaktheihna pen;
Kalvary khros a sisan hong luangkhia,
Kei a di’n aw ka damna tua sisan hi.
Eimah utdan a om in i leeng jel a,
Amah i heisan lai a hon it pa;
Lam pialsan a i om zong hon it lailai,
Toupa it bang’ itna dang a omlou e.
Mihingte it vang in aw a hong thuak a,
I mohna liammate a damsakta;
Aw miteng dia hinna lui a hong luanna,
A dawnte di’n damna lui a hong hita.
T. Pumkhothang
Toupa ka Pathian uh vualzawlna bukim aw,
Nang a kipan hong luangkhia;
Thupi hina tel e, manpha hina tel e,
Dimlet in a hong luangkhia.
Vualzawl tu Toupa aw, Sangpen Pathian hoih aw,
Na min ka hon pahtawi uh;
Vualzawlna tui nak aw, kou di’n na hong luangkhia,
Thupi hina tel e Aw.
Nite leh kumte ah na hoihna hong thak zel,
Vualzawlna thak hon puak zel;
Simthu’n ki genseng lou, lei in ki lel zoulou;
Sim zoh louh na hoihna hi.
Lou nouna munte ah, tuidam a luanna ah,
Koute na hon pi zel ah;
Taksapna hunte leh thawmhauna munte ah,
Khamuanna na hon pia zel.
T. Pumkhothang
Hun hiai tan honpi Toupa na hoih hi,
Ka sapna teng a hon huhpa na hi;
Nong kem nong huai a, lam nong pi den a;
Na hoihna kei di’n thupi na e.
Tuchiang dong honpi, tuchiang dong hon kem,
Na honpi dante lamdang hi na e;
Lam suk lam tou ah hun haksa kal ah,
Toupa hoih aw hon pipa na hi.
Nisim hunsim in na hoihna ka mu,
Kei hoihna in a loh zou ding a hiam?
Na hoihna kiamlou, Na itna kiam lou,
Tuni dong in kang lou lai ahi.
Khatvei leh hun haksa kal ah leng in,
Lungkia in lungkham in ka om zong a;
Na khut muanhuai in hon nusia lou a,
Tua hang hi e bahlou a ka pai.
T. Pumkhothang
Toupa na kiangah ka muangta ding,
Dahna lungkhamna ki lel lou ding;
Na siang nuam a ka len chiang,
Damsung khosak buaina haksatna,
Leigim haksatna ka thuakte uh;
Tua mun nuam ah om nawnlou.
Tul ngeilou ding kipahna,
Tul ngeilou ding nunnopna;
Sisan a na gam chiam,
Tua mun ah kalen hun chiang;
Tul ngeilou in ka leng ding.
Hun in lenmual khum a liamzel in,
Ka lei nunnate a liampih a;
Theihlouh kal in a bei zel,
Simlei nunnopna ka zon te uh;
Tangtawn lungnopna a ching zoulou,
Na siang kia ah bukim hi.
Vang nei ki sa’ng e ka ngaihsut chiang,
Nunnuam kisa’ng e ka lunggel chiang;
Hon neisakta ka Toupa’n,
Leitung buaina ten a sukkhak louh;
Tawntung lungnop na’n a luahna gam,
Ka Toupa vang ka neita.
T. Pumkhothang
Lei leh van bawl pa vanglian tung Pathian,
Na kilawm hi pahtawina tang di’n;
Na pilna sang e, Na lunggel sang e,
Na siamsate’n sut zoulou.
Minthannate leh, vangletna khempeuh,
Tangtawn tangtawn Nang a hi;
Nang bang vanglian pen, Nang bang thupi pen,
Lei leh thangvan ah omlou.
Koute hon it pa, koute honhuai pa,
Nong itna lian hi, kan in sang e;
Bangmahloute zong nong kem nong huai a,
Nong lamtou eklei pan in.
Ka dahna uh thei, ka lungkham uh thei,
Ka mangbatna uh thei pa na hi;
China damsak chia, misi hingsak chia,
Thuneihna teng Nang a hi.
T. Pumkhothang
Lei leh van siamtu Toupa na min lian in thupi lua,
Ka nuntak sung teng Nang mah hong phat ning;
Thuneihna teng Nang ahi, Vangletna teng Nang a hi,
Lamdang in lian lua Toupa hong phat ing.
Vanglian Toupa aw a muanhuai Toupa,
Na thupina lamdang in lian lua;
Lei leh van vaihawm Nang mah,
Tang tawn a dang ngeilou ding;
Halleluiah Toupa aw hong phat ing.
Zingsang teng in na siamsa te’n Nang mah hong phat uh a,
Na muanhuaina dang ngeilou Toupa aw,
Khua hun hong kihei zel leh thilsiamte hong thakzel te’n,
Na muanhuaina thupina hong gen uh.
T. Pumkhothang
Lungkhamna ki gen zou lou khelhna kol sung ah,
Suahtakna mu thei lou a ka om lai’n;
Lungkhama ka thumhon za suahtak na hon pia,
Chiantak in A aw nemken ka thei hi.
Vanglian tung Pathian Toupa hong phat ing ,
Nang bang hoih Pathian phat tak Pathiana om lou;
Lung khamte nempa Gentheite huhpa,
Pahtawina Nang a ding in kilawm hi;
Tangtawn in na minthang den ta hen.
